1.1: Foyla-u Allae asman ar dunia foyda ḳorla.
1.2: Duniai niraḳar ar ḳali asil, goin fanir ufre fura andair asil. Allar ruhu er ufre solasol ḳorta.
1.3: Bade Allae formaila for ouk, ar for oilo.
1.4: Allae deḳla for bala. Tain andair taki forre alga ḳoria
1.5: er nam raḳla din, ar andairor nam raḳla rait. Hainja gelo, bian-o gelo, ikṭa oilo foyla din.
1.6: Bade Allae formaila, fanir maze gumbuzor laḳan faḳ zaga ouk, ar fani dui bag oizauk.
1.7: Ar Allae faḳ zaga foyda ḳoria, tolor ar ufror fani alga ḳorla. Ar oula oilo.
1.8: Allae gumbuzor laḳan ze zaga banaila, tar nam raḳla asman. Hainja gelo, bian-o gelo, ikṭa oilo dui nombor din.
1.9: Erbade Allae formaila, asmanor tolor fani eḳ zagat dola ouk, ar hukna zaga deḳa zauk. Ar oula oilo.
1.10: Allae hukna zagar nam raḳla zomin ar zomail fanir nam doria. Tain deḳla ita bala.
1.11: Bade Allae formaila, zomino gash folouk; ar hoḳol zator bisala lota-fata gas-gasalir zonom ouk. Ar zominor ufre hoḳol zator folor gas-o ouk, era nizor zatmoto fol dorbo ar folor maze zarzir bis-o taḳbo. Ar oula oilo.
1.12: Zomino gash folilo, hoḳol zator bisala lota-fata gas-birik zonmilo. Zominor ufre hoḳol zator folor gas oilo zetae zarzir zatmoto fol dore, hi folor maze zarzir bis-o ase. Allae deḳla ita bala.
1.13: Hainja gelo, bian-o gelo, ikṭa oilo tin nombor din.
1.14: Bade Allae formaila, asmanor maze oula serag oḳol ouk, zara rait taki dinre alga ḳore. Ita alga alga din, bosor ar id-utshobor nishana oibo.
1.15: Asman taki tara duniair ufre for dibo. Oula-u oilo.
1.16: Allae duiṭa boṛo serag banaila, ermaze boṛoṭare dinor ufre bashshai korar lagi ar huruṭare raitor ufre. Ita saṛa tain tera oḳol-o foyda ḳorla.
1.17: Tain erare asmanor maze boaila zate tara duniait for dey.
1.18: Era din ar raitor ufre bashshai kore, andair taki forre alga ḳore. Allae deḳla ita bala.
1.19: Hainja gelo, bian-o gelo, ikṭa oilo sair nombor din.
1.20: Bade Allae formaila, fanir maze zandar oḳol fale fale bori zauk, ar duniair ufre asmanor maze fakin uṛouk.
1.21: Ar Allae doriar biraṭ zandar oḳol, ar fanir maze fal bandia gurra hoḳol zator zandar foyda ḳorla, ar hoḳol zator faki-o foyda ḳorla. Tain deḳla ita bala.
1.22: Tain tara hoḳolre ou laḳan borkot nazil ḳorla, tumra folala oia baṛo ar doriar fani bori zao, duniair maze faki oḳol-o baṛouk.
1.23: Hainja gelo, bian-o gelo, ikṭa oilo fas nombor din.
1.24: Erbade Allae formaila, maṭi taki oula zandar ouk zarar nizor zat oḳolre baṛaibo, erar maze fala heman, maṭit solra huru-muru zandar ar zongli zanuar oḳol-o. Oula-u oilo.
1.25: Allae duniair maze hoḳol zator zongli zanuar, fala heman ar maṭir maze buke solra zandar banaila. Tain deḳla ita bala.
1.26: Erbade Allae formaila, ao amrar surote amrar loge mil rakia manush banai. Tara doriar mas, asmanor faki, zanuar, maṭir maze buke solra zandar, ar asta duniair ufre bashshai korouk.
1.27: Tain tan nizor surote manush foyda ḳorla, ekkere nizor moto ḳori foyda ḳorla, foyda ḳorla beṭa ar beṭi.
1.28: Ar tarare borkot nazil ḳoria ḳoila, tumitain folala oia baṛia duniai borizao. Duniaire shashon ḳoro, ar doriar mas, asmanor faki, maṭir ufre solra hoḳol zandaror ufre bashshai koro.
1.29: Erbade Allae formaila, huno, duniar ufror hoḳol zator bisala gas-birik, ar hoḳol zator folor gas zarar nizor zatmoto fol dore zar folor maze tarar nizor bis ase, ita hoḳolta ami tumrar ḳanir lagi dilam.
1.30: Duniar forteḳ zanuar, asmanor fakin, maṭir maze buke solra zandar, ita hokkol zandaror ḳanir lagi ami hoḳol lota-fata ar gash dilam. Oula-u oilo.
1.31: Allae tan foyda ḳora hoḳolta deḳla, ita hoḳolta-u kub bala oise. Hainja gelo, bian-o gelo. Ikṭa oilo soy nombor din.

2.1: Ou laḳan asman-zomin ar er mazor hoḳolta foyda ḳora shesh oilo.
2.2: Allae i hoḳol ḳam shesh ḳoria harle shat nombor din aram ḳorla, tain idin ar kunta foyda ḳorla na.
2.3: Ou shat nombor dinre borkot nazil ḳoria pak din ḳorla, tan hoḳolta foyda ḳora shesh ḳori tain ou din ziraila. Adom-Haoa foyda
2.4: Ou oilo asman ar zomin foydar boyan. Mabud Allae zebla asman ar zomin foyda ḳorsila,
2.5: i shomoy zominor ufre kunuzator gas-fala asil na ar kunu lota-fata-o folise na, ḳaron tain zominor ufre meg disoin na, ar zomin abad ḳorar manush-o asil na.
2.6: Ou shomoy maṭir mur taki fani uṭto ar zomin bizto.
2.7: Bade Mabud Allae feḳ maṭi dia manush banaia tar naḳor maze fu dia zan haraila. Ar ou manush zandar oilo.
2.8: Mabud Allae fubedi Adan namor zagat eḳ bagan ḳorsila, hono tanor banail ou manushre raḳla.
2.9: Hikanor maṭit tain ou laḳan gas oḳol folaisla, zeta deḳte kub shundor ar fol-o ḳaite kub moza. Ar baganor mazḳano tain “zindegi-gas” ar “neki-bodir aḳol deora gas” namor duiṭa gas-o raḳsila.
2.10: Hou bagano fani zugaia dito ek gang asil, zeḳṭa Adanor mazedi bar oia sair bag oigesil.
2.11: Foyla gangor nam asil Pishun, ikṭa asta Hobila deshor bitre dia gese. Ino shuna faoa zae,
2.12: ar ou deshor shuna kub ḳaṭi, ita saṛa-o hino meshke-ambor ar akik moni faoa zae.
2.13: Dui nombor gangor nam Zihun, ikṭa asta Kush deshor bitre dia gese.
2.14: Tin nombor gangor nam Dojla, ikṭa Ashiria deshor fubedia gese. Ar sair nombor gangor nam oilo Furat.
2.15: Bade Mabud Allae ou manushre Adan bagano raḳla, hino ḳet-ḳamar ar hefazot ḳorar lagi.
2.16: Tain Adomre hukum dila, “Tumi tumar kushimoto i bagisar zekunu gasor fol ḳaitae farbae,
2.17: ḳali neki-bodir aḳolor gasor fol ḳaio na, zedin tumi ou gasor fol ḳaibae idin tumi morbae-u morbae.”
2.18: Erbade Mabud Allae ḳoila, “Manshor lagi eḳla taḳa bala nae. Ami tar laḳ eḳzon zuṛi banaimu.”
2.19: Ar Mabud Allae duniair hoḳol zandar ar asmanor hoḳol faki maṭidi banaia ou manshor samne anla, deḳla ein itare kita ḳoia ḍaḳoin, ar tain zare ze name ḍaḳla, tar ou nam oilo.
2.20: Adome hoḳol fala heman, asmanor faki ar zongli zanuaror nam raḳla, itar maze tan lak kunu zuṛi millo na.
2.21: Erbade tain Adomor maze behushi gum anla. Ou gumor maze tan fainjoror eḳṭa aḍḍi kulia nia zagaṭa bond ḳori dila,
2.22: ar ou aḍḍi dia Mabud Allae eḳ beṭimanush banaia Adomor gese anla.
2.23: Tane dekia Adome ḳoila, “Oḳon oise, tai amar aḍḍir aḍḍi, gustor gust. Tair nam oibo nari, taire nor taki neoa.”
2.24: Erlagi beṭainte ma-bafre saṛia bour loge roiba, tara duiozon eḳ shoril oiba.
2.25: Adom ar tan bibir shoril udam taḳto, ita kunu shorom asil na.

3.1: Mabud Allar foyda ḳora zominor hoḳol zandaror maze haf oilo hoḳol taki fondibaz. Ou hafe eḳdin hi beṭi manshore ḳoilo, “Allae hasau tumatanre ḳoisoin ni, baganor hoḳol gasor fol tumra ḳaitae fartae nae?”
3.2: Beṭie ḳoila, “Baganor zekunu gasor fol amra ḳaitam fari,
3.3: ḳali baganor mazḳano ze gasṭa ase, Allae ḳoisoin, tumra er fol ḳaio na, soio-o na, soile-u morbae.”
3.4: Ou hafe tanre ḳoilo, “Na, kunumonte-u mortae nae.
3.5: Allae to zanoin, zedin tumra i gasor fol ḳailibae idin tumrar souk kulizibo, ar neki-bodir aḳol faia tumra Allar laḳan oizibae.”
3.6: Beṭie zebla buzla, ou gasor fol ḳaite moza oibo, deḳte-o shundor, ar aḳoldar-o oizimu, ou tain fol faṛia ḳaila, ar tan zamaire-o dila ar zamaie-o ḳailila.
3.7: Loge loge tara duio zonor souk kuli gelo, ar buzla tain-tain lemṭa. Ou tara ḍumur gasor ḳoyṭa fata siṛia silai kori lemṭi banaila.
3.8: Hainja bala tara Mabud Allar aoaz hunla, tain baganor maze faḳanit aira. Teu Adom ar tan bou Mabud Allar samne na foṛar lagi baganor gasor aoṛe luḳaila.
3.9: Mabud Allae Adomre ḍaḳ dia zikaila, “Tumi kuai?”
3.10: Tain ḳoila, “Baganor maze ami tumar aoaz hunchi. Ami to lemṭa, erlagi ḍoraia lukai roisi.”
3.11: Teu Mabud Allae zikaila, “Tumi ze lemṭa ḳe ḳoilo? Ze gasor fol ḳaite tumare na ḳorsilam, ḳailiso na kita?”
3.12: Adome ḳoila, “Ze beṭimanush tumi amar loge diso, tai ou gasor fol amare ḳaoaise.”
3.13: Ou Mabud Allae beṭire zikaila, “Tumi ita kita ḳorlae?” Tain ḳoila, “Hafe amare salla dia ḳaoaise.”
3.14: Teu Mabud Allae hafre ḳoila, “Tumar i kamor lagi hoḳol fala heman ar hoḳol zongli zanuaror maze tumi-u lannoti oilae. Tumi zindegibor feṭo bordi solbae ar dula-balu ḳaibae.
3.15: Ami tumar ar beṭir maze, tumar bongsho ar beṭi manshor bongshor maze dushmoni foyda ḳormu. Hi bongshe tumar ḳolla guṛa ḳorbo, ar tumi tar faor murat ḳamṛaibae.”
3.16: Ar tain beṭire ḳoila, “Tumar hurutta oibar shomoy tumar mosibot kub baṛai dimu, tumi kub ḳoshṭo ḳoria hurutta foyda ḳorbae. Zamair bae tumar kub ḳaish taḳbo, ar he tumar ufre beṭagiri korbo.”
3.17: Tain Adomre ḳoila, “Ze gasor fol ami haram ḳoria dislam, tumi tumar bour ḳota hunia ita ḳaiso, ou ḳarone zominre lannoti kora oilo. Zindegibor zobor toklif ḳoria tumi zominor foshol ḳaibae.
3.18: Tumar lagi maṭir maze ḳaṭa-gosa ar bishala zongol zonmaibo, ar tumar ḳani oibo ou maṭir foy-foshol.
3.19: Ze maṭi taki tumare foyda ḳorslam, hou maṭit firia na zaoa forzonto tumar matar gam faot falaia ḳani kaibae. Tumar maṭir shoril, maṭit-u mishizibo.”
3.20: Adome tan bibir nam raḳla Haoa [mani, zindegi-deora], ḳaron tain hoḳol zinda manshor ma oiba.
3.21: Adom ar tan bibir lagi Mabud Allae zanuaror samṛadi lebas banaia findaila.
3.22: Erbade Mabud Allae ḳoila, “Deḳo, neki-bodir aḳol faia manush amrar laḳan oigese, oḳon he zate at baṛaia zindegi-gasor fol ḳaia hamesha zinda na roy.”
3.23: Ou ḳota ḳoia Mabud Allae ze maṭi dia manshore foyda ḳorsla, hou maṭit ḳet-ḳamar ḳorar lagi tare Adan bagan taki kedai dila.
3.24: Ḳedai dia tain zindegi-gasor gese zaoar fot fara deoar lagi Adan baganor fubedi Karubi firista oḳol raḳla ar aguinor toluaro guranit raḳla.

4.1: Adome tan bibi Haoar loge milar bade tan feṭo hurutta ailo, ar Kabil name tan eḳ fuar zonom oilo. Teu Bibi Haoae ḳoila, “Mabudor ges tone ami eḳ manush kobul ḳorsi.”
4.2: Hirbar tan goro Kabilor bai Habilor zonom oilo. Habile sagol-meṛa raḳto, ar Kabile ḳet ḳorto.
4.3: Bade eḳdin Kabile Mabudor gese tar ḳetor foy-foshol ania lilla dilo
4.4: ar Habile-o tar falor maze foyla zonmise oula ḳoyṭa sagol-meṛa zobo ḳoria sorbiala ongsho lilla dilo. Mabude Habil ar tar lilla kobul ḳorla,
4.5: Kabil ar tar lilla kobul ḳorla na, gotike he kub gusa ḳoria muk kala ḳorlo.
4.6: Mabude Kabilre ḳoila, “Tumi gusa ḳorrae ḳene, ar kitar lagi tumi muk kala ḳorso?
4.7: Tumi bala ḳam ḳorle tumar muk for oilo one? Ar na ḳorle to gunae tumare dorar lagi tumar duaro ubai roise. Igur ufre tumi zitte oibo.”
4.8: Bade Kabile tar bai Habilre ḍakia ḳoilo, “Ao amra bondo zai.” Ar bondo gia tar bai Habilor ufre aḳta hamla ḳoria kun ḳorlo.
4.9: Heshe Mabude Kabilre zikaila, “Tumar bai kuai?” Kabile ḳoilo, “Ami zani na, amar baire ami deḳa-huna ḳori ni?”
4.10: Teu Mabude ḳoila, “Tumi ita kita ḳorlae? Deḳo, zomin taki tumar bair loue amar gese foriad ḳorer.
4.11: Zomine zebla tumar ḳarone tumar bair lou ḳailo, ou shomoy tumi lannoti oia zomin taki kedail oilae.
4.12: Tumi zebla zomino ḳet ḳorbae, zomine ar tumare foshol dito nae. Tumi boitol oia duniai zuṛi gurbae.”
4.13: Teu Kabile Mabudre ḳoilo, “I shasti amar angaz oito nae.
4.14: Aiz tumi amare zomin taki kedai dirae, ami tumar samne tone hori zaimugi. Ar boitol oia zebla ami duniait gurmu, ou shomoy zar samne-u ami foṛmu, he-u amare kun ḳorbo.”
4.15: Mabude tare ḳoila, “Te tumare ze kun ḳorbo, tar ufre ami shatgun bodla loimu.” Ou ḳota ḳoia Mabude Kabilre eḳṭa sinnot dila, zate ḳeu tare ato faia-o na mare.
4.16: Erbade Kabil Mabudor samon taki horia Adanor fubedi Nud [mani, gura-fira] desho gelogi. Ḳarigori kam ar dormo-ḳormo shuru
4.17: Ar Kabil tar bour loge milae tair feṭo hurutta ailo, ar Honukor zonom oilo. Kabile eḳṭa ṭaun banaia tar fuar name ṭaunor nam raḳlo Honuk.
4.18: Honukor fua Irod, Irodor fua Mohuayel, Mohuayelor fua Motushayel, Motushayelor fua Lemoḳ.
4.19: Lemoḳe dui bia ḳorsla, eḳ bour nam Ada, aroḳ bour nam Shilla.
4.20: Adar goro Zabolor zonom oilo, zara tambut taḳe ar foshu fale, ou Zabol tarar mul baf.
4.21: Zabolor bair nam Zubol. Zara bashi ar bin bazae, ou Zubol tarar mul baf.
4.22: Shillar feṭo Tubol-Kabilor zonom oilo. Fitol ar luar atiar banani asil tar ḳam. Tar boinor nam Nayema.
4.23: Eḳdin Lemoḳe tar dui boure ḳoilo, “O Ada ar Shilla, amar ḳota hun, Lemoḳor bibin, amar ḳotae deo ḳan. Ze beṭae amare ḳorilo zoḳom, ze beṭae amar gat tullo at, here ami korilam nifat.
4.24: Kabilor kunor bodla zudi shat gun oy, Lemoḳor bodla shatottoir gun nichchoy.”
4.25: Ermaze Adome hirbar tan bour loge milae, tan feṭo aroḳ fua oilo, Haoae tar nam raḳla Shish . Tain ḳoila, “Kabile Habilre kun ḳorse ḳori Allae Habilor bodla amare eḳ serag zugai disoin.”
4.26: Bade Shishor-o eḳ fua oilo, he tar nam raḳlo Anush, ou shomoy tone manshe Mabudor nam loa shuru ḳorla.

5.1: Ita oilo Adomor ḳandanor ḳolombondi boyan. Manush foyda ḳorar shomoy Allae tan nizor surote foyda ḳorla.
5.2: Foyda ḳorla beṭa ar beṭi, ar tarare Mabude borkot dila, foyda ḳoria nam raḳla Adom.
5.3: Adomor eḳ-sho tish boros boyosho tan loge mil rakia tan surote eḳ fua oilo. Tain er nam raḳla Shish.
5.4: Shishor zonmor bade Adom aro aṭ-sho boros basla, er maze tan aro fua-fuṛin oisil.
5.5: Muṭ noy-sho tish boros zinda taḳar bade Adom mara gela.
5.6: Shishor eḳ-sho fas boros boyosho tan fua Anushor zonom oilo.
5.7: Anushor zonmor bade Shish aro aṭ-sho shat boros basla. Er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisil.
5.8: Muṭ noy-sho baro boros basar bade Shish mara gela.
5.9: Anushor nobboi boros boyosho tan fua Kinanor zonom oilo.
5.10: Kinanor zonmor bade Anush aro aṭ-sho fonro boros basla. Er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisil.
5.11: Muṭ noy-sho fas boros basar bade Anush mara gela.
5.12: Kinanor shottoir boros boyosho tan fua Maholailor zonom oilo.
5.13: Maholailor zonmor bade Kinan aro aṭ-sho sallish boros basla. Er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisil.
5.14: Muṭ noy-sho dosh boros basar bade Kinan mara gela.
5.15: Maholailor foyshoṭṭi boros boyosho tan fua Iaredor zonom oilo.
5.16: Iaredor zonmor bade Maholail aro aṭ-sho tish boros basla. Er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisil.
5.17: Muṭ aṭ-sho fosanobboi boros basar bade Maholail mara gela.
5.18: Iaredor eḳ-sho bashoṭṭi boros boyosho tan fua Idrisor zonom oilo.
5.19: Idrisor zonmor bade Iared aro aṭ-sho boros basla, er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisil.
5.20: Muṭ noy-sho bashoṭṭi boros basar bade Iared mara gela.
5.21: Idrisor foyshoṭṭi boros boyosho tan fua Matushalaḳor zonom oilo.
5.22: Matushalaḳor zonmor bade tin-sho boros forzonto, Allar loge Idrisor ḳas didar asil. Er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisil.
5.23: Idris muṭ tin-sho foyshoṭṭi boros duniait asla.
5.24: Erbade tane ar deḳa gelo na. Allar loge tan ḳas didar asil gotike Allae tanre zinda halote nizor gese nilagi.
5.25: Matushalaḳor eḳ-sho shatashi boros boyosho tan fua Lamaḳor zonom oilo.
5.26: Lamaḳor zonmor bade Matushalaḳ aro shat-sho birashi boros basla. Er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisil.
5.27: Muṭ noy-sho unushottoir boros basar bade Matushalaḳ mara gela.
5.28: Lamaḳor eḳ-sho birashi boros boyosho tan eḳ fua oilo.
5.29: Tain er nam raḳla Nuh ar ḳoila, “He amrar ator i duḳ-mosibotor ḳam taki, Mabudor lannoti zomin taki oḳon aram dibo.”
5.30: Nuhor zonmor bade Lamaḳ aro fas-sho fosanobboi boros basla, er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisil.
5.31: Muṭ shat-sho shatottoir boros basar bade Lamaḳ mara gela.
5.32: Nuhor fas-sho boros boyoshor bade tan fuain Sham, Ham ar Iafetor zonom oilo.

6.1: Duniar ufre zebla manush baṛa arombo oilo, ar bout fuṛintor-o zonom oilo,
6.2: teu gaibi shoktiala oḳole ou fuṛintore ḳubsurot dekia, ze zare kushi taire fosond ḳori nila.
6.3: Ita dekia Mabude ḳoila, “Amar ruhu hamesha manshor loge taḳto nae. Manush to ḳali gustor ḳaya, oḳon taki ami tarare eḳ-sho bish boros hayat diar.”
6.4: Ou fuṛintor loge hou gaibi shoktiala oḳlor mila-mishar ḳarone ze aolador zonom oilo, tara asla furana zomanar foyluan oḳol. Hi shomoy ba tar bade-o duniait Nefili zator manush asil.
6.5: Mabude deḳla, duniait manshor naformani kub baṛi gese, ar tarar dilor ḳaish, kial-kushi kali karafir bae.
6.6: Ita dekia Mabude kub toklif faila, tain duniait manush foyda ḳorsila ḳori kub bezar oila.
6.7: Ar ḳoila, “Amar foyda ḳora manshore, ar tarar loge hoḳol zator zanuar, maṭit solra huru-muru zandar ar asmanor faki-o ḳotom ḳori dimu. Itare foyda ḳoria amar dilo duk lager.”
6.8: Oile Nuhor ufre Mabud kushi asla. Hozrot Nuh (a:)or kishti
6.9: Ita oilo Nuhor zindegir boyan. Nuh eḳzon kamil manush, tan amolor manshor maze tain-u asla fak-forezgar. Allar loge tanor ḳas didar asil.
6.10: Sham, Ham ar Iafet namor tan tin fua asil.
6.11: I shomoy Allar sokut hara duniai gunae fosi gese ar zur-zulume bori gese.
6.12: Allae duniar bae saia deḳla, ita gunae fosi gese. Ḳaron duniar manshor ḳaislot be-fote gesegi.
6.13: Ita dekia Allae Nuhre ḳoila, “Tamam manush zatre ami kotom ḳorilaitam ṭik korsi. Manshor lagi duniai zur-zulume bori gese. Manshor loge loge duniar hoḳolta ami shesh ḳorilitam.
6.14: Tumi goforor toḳta dia tumar lagi ekkan zaz banao. Er bitre alga alga kuṭa taḳbo. Ar zazor bare-bitore alḳatra lagaio.
6.15: Zazḳan lambae tin-sho at, fashe foinchash at ar ḳaṛa-ubi tish at banaio.
6.16: Ar salo taki eḳ at tole sairobae kiṛki raḳbae, ar duar dibae zazor ek kandat. Zazḳan titala banaio.
6.17: Dekio, ami duniait ola boinna dimu, asmanor tole zoto zandare dom falae hoḳolta-u binash oizibo. Duniair hoḳol zandar-u morizibo.
6.18: Ḳali tumar loge amar oada zari raḳmu. Tumi gia zazo uṭbae, ar tumar loge tumar fuain, tumar bibi ar tumar fuaintor bou-o.
6.19: Ar zan basanir lagi tumi hoḳol zator zandaror beṭa-beṭir zuṛa milaia tumar loge zazo tulbae.
6.20: Forteḳ zator faki, heman-zanuar ar maṭir maze buke solra zandarre basanir lagi zuṛa zuṛa ḳori tumar gese anbae.
6.21: Ar tumi hoḳol zator lagi kanir zinish zugaṛ ḳori raḳbae. Ita tumar ar tarar ḳani oibo.”
6.22: Nuhe Allar hukum mafik hoḳolta-u ḳorla.

7.1: Ar Mabude Nuhre ḳoila, “Tumi ar tumar foribaror hoḳol aia zazo uṭbae. Ami dekiar i zomanar manshor maze tumi-u ḳali dindar.
7.2: Tumi halal zanuar oḳol taki nor-medi milaia shat zuṛa ḳori ar haram zanuar taki eḳ zuṛa ḳori tumar loge loio.
7.3: Asmano uṛra fakir maz taki nor-medi milaia shat zuṛa ḳori loio. Duniar maze erar bongsho basanir lagi ikan ḳorio.
7.4: Ami shat din bade duniair ufre sallish din sallish rait eḳlagare meg dimu, ar hoḳol zandarre dunia taki kotom ḳormu.”
7.5: Mabudor hukum mafik Nuhe hoḳol ḳam ḳorla.
7.6: Boinna shurur shomoy Nuhor boyosh asil soy-sho boros.
7.7: Boinna taki basar lagi Nuh, tan bibi, tan fuain ar fuaintor boure loia zazo gia uṭla.
7.8: -9 Allar hukum mafik halal-haram zanuar, faki, buke solra zandaror nor-medi milia zuṛa zuṛa oia Nuhor gese aia zazo hamaila.
7.10: Ou shat din bade duniait boinna oilo.
7.11: Nuhor soy-sho bosoror shomoy dusra mashor shotro tarik fatalor hoḳol fani bar oito laglo, ar asman zenu faṭi gelo.
7.12: Sallish din sallish rait duniair ufre meg oilo.
7.13: Zedin meg shuru oilo, idin Nuh, tan bibi, tan fuain Sham, Ham, Iafet ar tarar bou oḳol-o zazo aia uṭla.
7.14: Tarar loge zuṛa zuṛa ḳori hoḳol zator zongli zanuar, fala heman, maṭir maze buke solra zandar, faki ar ḍaḳna-ala hoḳolta-o uṭla.
7.15: Dom falaia base ila hoḳol zator zandar Nuhor gese aia zazo uṭsil.
7.16: Allar hukum mafik-u nor-medir zuṛa milia tara uṭsil. Erbade Mabude zazor duar bond ḳori dila.
7.17: Sallish din dori duniait fani baṛte-u taḳlo. Fani baṛi zaoae zazḳan maṭi taki ufre baia uṭlo.
7.18: Bade fani kub baṛlo ar zazḳan fanir ufre solasol ḳorlo.
7.19: Ar fani baṛte-u taḳlo. Erlagi zeno zoto boṛo boṛo faṛ asil, hokkolta buṛi gelo.
7.20: Hoḳol faṛ-forbot buṛia fani aro fonro at ufre uṭlo.
7.21: Ar duniait solra hoḳol zandar, mani faki, fala heman, zongli zanuar ar fal bandia gurra hoḳolta, manshor loge binash oigelo.
7.22: Maṭir ufre zoto roḳomor zoto zandar dom falaia base ita hoḳolta-u morigelo.
7.23: Allae ou nomunae zominor hoḳol zandar duniair ufor taki fusilaila. Ete manush, zanuar, buke solra zandar ar asmanor faki duniai taki saf oigelo. Ḳali Nuh ar tan loge zara asil, tara-u basia roila.
7.24: Dunia deṛ-sho din fanit buṛail roilo.

8.1: Zazo Nuh ar tan loge zoto zandar ar fala heman asil, Allae tarar ḳota-o faurila na. Tain duniait batash salaile fani koma shuru oilo.
8.2: Maṭir tol taki fani baroni ar asman tone meg foṛar faṭa bond oigelo, ar meg-o dom loilo.
8.3: Maṭir ufror fani hori gelo, ar deṛ-sho din bade deḳa gelo fani bout ḳomse.
8.4: Shat nombor mashor shotro tarik zazḳan Ararator faṛi elaḳat gia aṭkilo.
8.5: Erbade-o fani komat taḳlo, ar dosh nombor mashor foyla din faṛ oḳlor mata deḳa gelo.
8.6: Er sallish din bade Nuhe zazor kiṛki kulla.
8.7: Ar kiṛkibae ek kaua saṛla. Maṭi taki fani na hukani forzonto ḳauaṭa aoa-zaoat roilo.
8.8: Maṭir ufor tone fani komse ki na deḳar lagi Nuhe bade eḳṭa faro saṛla.
8.9: I shomoy-o asta duniait fani asil ḳori fao toibar zaga na faia faroṭa hirbar firia ailo. Tain at baṛaia tare bitre anla.
8.10: Heshe tain aro shat din bar saia hirbar tare saṛla.
8.11: Hainja bala he tan gese firia ailo, ar tar ṭuṭo asil zoytun gasor hazma fata, tain buzla maṭir ufor taki fani komi gese.
8.12: Aro shat din bade tain hirbar faroṭa saṛla, ikṭa ar firia ailo na.
8.13: Nuhor boyosh soy-sho eḳ bosoror shomoy foyla mashor foyla din maṭir ufor taki fani hori gelo, ar Nuhe zazor sal kulia saia deḳla, maṭi hukani dorse.
8.14: Dusra mashor shataish dinor din maṭi eḳoibare hukai gelo.
8.16: “Tumi tumar bibi, tumar fuain ar tumar fuaintor boure loia zaz taki bar oia ao.
8.17: Ar tumar loge zoto zator zandar ase - faki, zanuar ar maṭir maze buke solra zandar - tarare-o bar ḳori loia ao, zenu hara duniai zuṛi tara sitria gia folala oia baṛe.”
8.18: Teu Nuhe, tan bibi, tan fuain ar tarar boure loia zaz taki bar oila.
8.19: Tarar loge duniair hoḳol zanuar, maṭit solra huru-muru zandar, ar faki, ek kotae duniait solra hoḳol zandar, zarzir zatmoto bar oilo.
8.20: Bade Nuhe Mabudor name ekkan kurbani kana banaila, ar forteḳ zator halal foshu-faki taki eḳ eḳṭa loia zobo ḳoria, zalaia kurbani dila.
8.21: Mabud i kurbanir dumar gerane kushi oila, ar tain ḳoila, “Manshor lagi ami ar kunu shomoy-o maṭire lannot ditam nae, zudio hurubala taki-u manshor monor kial ḳarafir bae taḳe. Ifira zela hoḳol zandarre marsi, ilaḳan ar kunu din-u martam nae.
8.22: Zotodin i duniai taḳbo, otodin niommoto bis falani ar foshol ḳaṭa, ṭanḍa ar gorom, barisha ar eot, din ar rait solte-u taḳbo.”

9.1: Allae Nuh ar tan fuaintore borkot dia ḳoila, “Tumitain folala oia baṛia duniai bori zao.
9.2: Duniair zanuar, asmanor faki, maṭir maze buke solra zandar ar doriar mas, hoḳole-u tumrare ḍor-boy ḳori solbo. Itare tumrar ato deoa oilo.
9.3: Zela tumrare ḳetor fol-foshol ar tori-torḳari dislam, oula oḳon zita zandar hoḳolre-o tumrar ḳanir lagi dilam.
9.4: Ḳali lou shoho gust tumra ḳaio na, lou oilogi zan.
9.5: Ḳeu zudi manshore kun ḳore te ami oboshsho-u tar kunor bodla loimu. He zanuar ouk ba manush ouk, manshor zan ze ney, tar zan-o deon lagbo.
9.6: Manshor lou ze bar ḳore, manshe-o tar lou bar ḳorbo, ḳaron Allae manshore nizor surote banaisoin.
9.7: Tumitain besh ḳori folala oia baṛo ar duniait sitria zao.”
9.8: Bade Allae Nuh ar tan fuaintore ḳoila,
9.9: “Huno, ami zoban diar, tumra ar tumrar bador hoḳol manshore,
9.10: ar faki, fala heman ar duniair zoto zanuar tumrar loge zaz taki bar oise, tarare-o.
9.11: Zobanṭa oilo, banor fani dia ar kunu shomoy-u hokkol zandarre mara oito nae, ar tamam duniai saf ḳorar lagi ila kunu ban-o oito nae.”
9.12: Allae aro ḳoila, “Ze zoban ami tumrare ar tumrar logor zandar oḳolre dilam, ikṭa kiamot forzonto boail roibo.
9.13: Ar megor ḳalnir maze amar rongdenu dilam, ikṭa oilo duniait amar zobanor nishana.
9.14: Zebla ami duniair ufre ḳalni dimu, i shomoy ou rongdenu deḳbae.
9.15: Ar ou shomoy-u ami tumrar ar hoḳol zandaror loge amar zobanor ḳota iad ḳormu. Ar kunu shomoy-u boinna oia hoḳol zandarre fani dia doia nito nae.
9.16: Ḳalnir maze zebla hi rongdenu deḳa zaibo ou shomoy ami duniair hoḳol zandaror loge amar i hameshakur zobanor ḳota iad ḳormu.”
9.17: Heshe Allae Nuhre ḳoila, “Duniair hoḳol zandaror loge ami ze zoban disi, ikṭa oilo tar nishana.” Hozrot Nuh (a:) ar tan fuain
9.18: Zaz tone Nuhor ze fuain bar oisla, tarar nam oilo Sham, Ham ar Iafet. Ou Ham oilo Kenanor baf.
9.19: Nuhor ou tino fuar ḳandan oḳol hara duniait sitri gela.
9.20: Nuhe ḳet-ḳamar shuru ḳoria eḳ angur ḳet ḳorla.
9.21: Ar anguror shorab ḳaia ṭal oia tambur bitre udam oia foṛi roila.
9.22: Kenanor baf Hame aia tar bafor ou hal dekia bare gia tar duio bair gese ḳoilo.
9.23: Oile Sham ar Iafete ḳando ḳori ekkan ḳafoṛ loia fise aṭia bafre ou ḳafoṛdi guria dila, tarar souk ulṭabae taḳae bafre be-abru halote deḳla na.
9.24: Nisha ḳomi zaoar bade Nuhe tan fuar ḳanḍo hunia
9.25: ḳoila, “Kenanor ufre lannot foṛouk, he tar baiaintor gese gulamor gulam oibo.”
9.26: Tain aro ḳoila, “Hoḳol tarif Shamor Mabud Allar, Kenan Shamor gulam ouk.
9.27: Allae Iafetre boutta deukka, he Shamor tambut taḳouk, ar Kenan tar gulam ouk.”
9.28: Banor bade Nuh aro shaṛe tin-sho boros basla.
9.29: Muṭ shaṛe noy-sho boros boyosho tain mara gela.

10.1: Nuhor fuain Sham, Ham, ar Iafetor ḳandanor boyan. Banor bade tarar fua-fuṛi oisla.
10.2: Iafetor fuaintor nam: Gumor, Mazuz, Madoy, Iaban, Tubol, Meshok ar Tirosh.
10.3: Gumoror fuain: Oskinosh, Rifot ar Tugormo.
10.4: Iabanor fuain oila: Ilishah, Torshish, Kittim ar Rudanim.
10.5: Erar bongshor manshe nanan zator mat-ḳota, foribar ar zat hishabe doriar faror nanan desho sitri gela.
10.6: Hamor fuaintor nam: Kush, Mishor, Puṭ ar Kenan.
10.7: Kushor fuain: Soba, Hobila, Softa, Royma ar Softoḳa. Roymar fuain oila: Shaba ar Dodan.
10.8: Kushor eḳ fuar nam asil Nomrud. Ou Nomrud duniait foyluan oia uṭsil.
10.9: Mabudor gese he asil foyluan shikari. Erlagi ḍaḳor ḳota ase, manushṭa zen Mabudor samne Nomrudor laḳan foyluan shikari.
10.10: Shinar deshor Babil, Eroḳ, Okkod ar Kolni namor ṭaun oḳol loia he bashshai shuru ḳorlo.
10.11: On taki tar raijjo baṛia Ashiria desh forzonto gelo. Hoḳanor Ninob, Rohobotpur, Keloh
10.12: ar Reshon namor ṭaun oḳol-o tar banail. Reshon asil Ninob ar Kelohor mazḳano, i tinṭae milia eḳ biraṭ shohor oilo.
10.13: Mishoror bongsho oila ou zat oḳol: Ludi, Onami, Lohabi, Noftuhi,
10.14: Fotrushi, Kosluhi, ar Kofturi, ou Koftur dif taki Filistini oḳol bar oia aila.
10.15: Kenanor boṛo fua Sidon, bador fua Hiṭ, Hiṭṭi zatir mul baf.
10.18: Arbadi, Zomari ar Hamati, ou zati oḳlor mul baf. Heshe ou Kenani oḳol sairobae sitri gesla.
10.19: Sidon ṭaun taki Geraror muka Gaza forzonto, ar Gaza taki Sadum, Amura, Odma ar Soboyim zaoar fote Lasha forzonto Kenani oḳlor razotto asil.
10.20: Foribar, mat-ḳota, desh ar zat hishabe era asil Hamor ḳandan.
10.21: Iafetor boṛo bai Shamor-o fua-fuṛin oisla. Sham oila Aber ar tar ḳandanor baf.
10.22: Shamor fuaintor nam: Ilam, Ashur, Arfaksad, Lud ar Oram.
10.23: Oramor fuain: Uz, Hul, Getor ar Mosh.
10.24: Arfaksador fua Shaleḳ, ar Shaleḳor fuar nam Aber.
10.25: Aberor dui fua oisla, eḳzonor nam Falez [mani, alga], tan shomoy dunia alog oisil ḳori tan ou nam oilo. Falezor bair nam Iaktan.
10.26: Iaktanor fuain oila: Olmudod, Shelof, Hazramaot, Zeroh,
10.29: Ofir, Hobila ar Zubob. Era hoḳol oila Iaktanor fuain.
10.30: Mesha taki fubedi Sefaro zaoar foto ze faṛi zaga ase, ono tara taḳta.
10.31: Foribar, mat-ḳota, desh, ar zat hishabe era oila Shamor ḳandan.
10.32: Zat ar bongsho hishabe era oilo Nuhor fuaintor foribar. Banor bade erar bongsho oḳole nanan zat oia asta duniait sitri gesla.

11.1: Hi zomanat asta duniait ḳali eḳ bashae matta, ar tarar buli oḳol-o eḳlaḳan-u asil.
11.2: Tara fubedi aguaia zaite zaite Shinar deshor eḳ homan zaga faia hoḳano-u boshot ḳorla.
11.3: Tara eḳe-oinnore ḳoilo, “Ao, amra iṭ banaia aguindi zalai.” Ḳoia-u tara fattoror bodla iṭ ar sun-shurkir bodla tartel lagailo.
11.4: Tara aro ḳoilo, “Ao, amrar nizor lagi eḳṭa shohor banai, ar oula eḳṭa gor-o banai, zeḳṭar minar gia asman lagal faibo. Teu amrar nam-o oibo ar amra duniait sitritam-o nae.”
11.5: Manshe ze usa gor ar shohor banaira ikṭa deḳat Mabud lami aila.
11.6: Ar ḳoila, “Era eḳ zator manush, erar mat-ḳota-o eḳ; erlagi tara ou ḳamor maze at dise. Nizor motlob hasilor lagi era ar kunu bada-u manto nae.
11.7: Te ao, amra lamia gia tarar bulir maze gulmal lagai dei, zate tara eḳzone aroḳzonor mat buzto na fare.”
11.8: Erbade Mabude hou zaga taki tarare asta duniait sitrai dila. Ar tarar hou shohor bananir ḳam-o bond oigelo.
11.9: Ou ḳarone hou zagar nam oilo Babil [mani, gulmal], hoḳano-u Mabude hara duniair bulir maze gulmal lagai disla. Hoḳan taki-u tain tarare asta duniait sitrailila. Hozrot Ibrahim (a:)or baf-dadain
11.10: Ou oilo Shamor ḳandanor boyan. Banor dui boros bade Shamor boyosh zebla eḳ-sho boros, ou shomoy tan fua Arfaksador zonom oilo.
11.11: Arfaksador zonmor bade Sham aro fas-sho boros basia asla. Er maze tan aro fua-fuṛin oisla.
11.12: Arfaksador faytish bosoror shomoy tan fua Shaleḳor zonom oilo.
11.13: Shaleḳor zonmor bade tain aro sair-sho tin boros basia asla. Er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisla.
11.14: Shaleḳor tish boros boyoshor shomoy tan fua Aberor zonom oilo.
11.15: Aberor zonmor bade Shaleḳ aro sair-sho tin boros basia asla. Er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisla.
11.16: Aberor soutish bosoror shomoy tan fua Falezor zonom oilo.
11.17: Falezor zonmor bade Aber aro sair-sho tish boros basia asla. Er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisla.
11.18: Falezor tish boros boyoshor shomoy tan fua Raur zonom oilo.
11.19: Raur zonmor bade Falez aro dui-sho noy boros basia asla. Er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisla.
11.20: Raur bottish bosoror shomoy tan fua Saruzor zonom oilo.
11.21: Saruzor zonmor bade Rau aro dui-sho shat boros basia asla. Er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisla.
11.22: Saruzor tish bosoror shomoy tan fua Nahuror zonom oilo.
11.23: Nahuror zonmor bade Saruz aro dui-sho boros basia asla. Er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisla.
11.24: Nahuror untish bosoror shomoy tan fua Tareḳor zonom oilo.
11.25: Tareḳor zonmor bade Nahur aro eḳ-sho unnish boros basia asla. Er maze tan aro fua-fuṛi oisla.
11.26: Tareḳor shottoir bosoror shomoy tan fuain Abram (tan bador nam Ibrahim), Nahur ar Haronor zonom oisil.
11.27: Ou oilo Tareḳor ḳandanor boyan. Tareḳor fuar nam asil Abram, Nahur ar Haron. Ar Haronor fuar nam Lut.
11.28: Haron tan baba zinda taḳte-u, tan zonom-maṭi Babil deshor Ur ṭauno mara gesla.
11.29: Abram ar Nahur duizone bia ḳorsla. Abramor bour nam asil Sara. Ar Nahuror bour nam Milka. Milka ar Iska asla Haronor fuṛin.
11.30: Oile Sarar kunu fua-fuṛi asil na, tain niaoladi asla.
11.31: Tareḳe Abram, Lut ar Sarare loia Kenan desho zaoar lagi Babil deshor Ur ṭaun taki roana oila. Abram oila Tareḳor fua, Haronor fua Lut oila Tareḳor nati, ar Sara oila Tareḳor fua Abramor bou. Foyla tara Haran name eḳ ṭauno gela ar hoḳano boshot ḳorla.
11.32: Tareḳ dui-sho fas boros boyosho Haran ṭauno mara gela.

12.1: Bade Mabude Abramre formaila, “Tumi tumar nizor desh, ḳesh-kuṭum, ar babaiti biṭa-maṭi saṛia ami ze desh deḳaimu hou desho zao.
12.2: Tumar maz taki ami bout boṛo eḳ zati foyda ḳormu. Tumare rohom-borkot dimu. Ami tumare boṛo ijjoti banaimu, ar tumar usillae asta duniar manshe rohom-borkot faiba.
12.3: Ar huno, tumare zara dua diba, ami Allae tarare rohom-borkot dimu, oile zara tumare boddua diba, ami tarare lannot dimu. Duniar hoḳol zatie tumar usillae rohom-borkot faiba.”
12.4: Mabudor hukum moto-u Abram bar oigela, tan batiza Lut-o tan loge gela. Haran ṭaun falaia zaoar shomoy Abramor boyosh asil fosottoir boros.
12.5: Tan bibi Sara ar batiza Lutre loia tain bar oila. Hoḳol mal-samana loia ar ze gulam oḳolre tain-tain Haran elaḳat faisla tarare loia Kenan desho zaita ḳori roana dila. Heshe hono gia fosla.
12.6: Kenanor mazedi zaite zaite Abram Shikimo aia Murir elon gasor gese ziraila. I shomoy Kenani oḳol hou desho boshot ḳorta.
12.7: Mabude Abramre doroshon dia ḳoila, i deshḳan ami tumar oarishre dilaimu. Abramre zein deḳa dila, hou Mabudor name tain hono ek kurbani kana banaila.
12.8: Hon taki tain Betel ṭaunor fubedi faṛi elaḳat aguai gela, gia foisme Betel fube Oy ṭaunor mazḳano tain tambu gaṛila. Mabudor name tain ino ek kurbani kana banaila ar Mabudor nam loila.
12.9: Bade tain hin taki horte horte Negeb namor douknor morubumir baedi gelagi. Hozrot Ibrahim (a:) Mishor desho gela
12.10: I shomoy Kenan desho nidan deḳa dilo. I nidan kub ḳoṭin oae, Abrame musafir oia Mishor desho gelagi.
12.11: Mishoror ḳandat aia Abrame tan bibi Sarare ḳoila, “Huno, ami zani tumi kub shundori.
12.12: Tumi zebla Mishori oḳlor souko foṛbae, teu tara buzbo tumi amar bou, ar tumare rakia amare kun ḳorilibo.
12.13: Erlagi koio, tumi amar boin. Ete tumar lagi amar bala oibo, ar amare basaia raḳbo.”
12.14: Abram Mishoro aia harle Mishoror manshe deḳla Sara kub shundori.
12.15: Mishoror bashsha Feraunor guia oḳole tane dekia Feraunor gese gia tan tarif ḳoria boutta ḳoila. Ar Sarare razbaṛir bitre neoa oilo.
12.16: Sarar lagi Feraune Abramre maya ḳorta lagla. Tain Abramre bout goru-sagol, gada-gadi, uṭ, ar bandi-gulam ufohar dila.
12.17: Oile Bibi Sarar lagi Mabude Feraun ar tar baṛir hoḳol manshor maze besheba bemar foyda ḳorla.
12.18: Teu Feraune Abramre nia zikaila, “Afne amar loge ita kita ḳorla? Tanre ḳene afnar bou na ḳoia
12.19: boin ḳoila? Ar ami to tanre bia ḳorar lagi neoaislam. Ein to afnar bibi, ene loia afne in taki hori zaukkagi.”
12.20: Ou ḳota ḳoia Feraune tan manshore hukum ḳorla, ar tara Abramor hoḳol mal-samana shoho tane ar tan bibire bidae ḳori dila.

13.1: Teu Abram ar tan bibie hoḳolta loia Mishor desh falaia Negeb morubumit gelagi, Lut-o tan loge asla.
13.2: Abram kub doni asla, tan bout heman-zanuar ar shuna-rufa asil.
13.3: Bade tain Negeb taki horte horte Betel forzonto gela. Gia tain Betel ar Oy ṭaunor mazḳano fosla, ze zagat tain age tambu gaṛisla
13.4: ar foyla kurbani kana banaisla. Ono gia tain hirbar Mabudor nam loila.
13.5: Abramor loge musafir asla tan batiza Lut, en-o bout goru-sagol ar tambu asil.
13.6: Oile zagaṭa ila asil na zen, duiozonor foshur fale eḳloge ḳaita farba. Goru-sagol ar tambu oto beshi asil zen, ita loia tarar taḳar ufae asil na.
13.7: Erlagi Abram ar Lutor raḳal oḳole hamesha dorbar-ḳaijja ḳorta. Ar hi shomoy Kenani ar Farizi oḳol-o hi desho boshot ḳorto.
13.8: Teu Abrame Lutre ḳoila, “Huno, amra to duiozon-u afon. Te tumar-amar maze ar tumar-amar raḳalor maze-o dorbar-ḳaijja ḳora ṭik nae.
13.9: Hara deshṭa-u tumar samne foṛi roise. Te ao, amra alga oizai. Tumi baue fosond ḳorle, ami ḍaine, ar tumi ḍaine gele, ami baue zaimu.”
13.10: Lute saia deḳla, Zordan gangor tʼol zagar hoḳol bae Suar gau forzonto bout fani ase, Mabudor bagisa ba Mishor deshor laḳan i zaga-o gash-fani ala. Ou shomoy-o Mabude Sadum ar Amura ṭaun binash ḳorsoin na.
13.11: Erlagi Lute Zordan gangor hoḳol tʼol zaga nizor lagi basia fubedi horia gelagi. Oula tara alga oigela.
13.12: Abram Kenan desho roila, ar Lut hou tʼol zominor ṭaun oḳlor ḳasat gia boshot ḳorla. Tain Sadum ṭaunor kinaro tambu gaṛilla.
13.13: Sadumor manush oḳol kub ḳobis asil, Mabudor nozoro tara betaya gunagar.
13.14: Lut alga oar bade Mabude Abramre ḳoila, “Tumi ze zagat ubaiso, ikan taki utore-douḳne, fube-foisme eḳbar saia deḳo.
13.15: Ze zaga oḳol tumi deḳrae, ita ami tumare ar tumar oarish oḳolre hameshakur lagi dilaimu.
13.16: Ami tumar oarishre duniair duil-balur laḳan behishab ḳormu. Duniar duil-balu zudi keu gonia fuṛaito fare, te tumar oarishre-o gonto farbo.
13.17: Uṭo, asta deshṭa tumi eḳbar guria ao, ou desh-u ami tumare dimu.”
13.18: Teu Abrame tan tambu tulia, Hebron elaḳat Momrir elon bonor ḳandat nia gaṛila. Hoḳano tain Mabudor lagi kurbani kana banaila.

14.1: Babil deshor bashsha Omrafel, Illashoror bashsha Ariak, Ilamor bashsha Ḳodor-laumor ar Guimor bashsha Tidiol, era sairozone eḳ oia
14.2: Sadumor bashsha Bira, Amurar bashsha Birsha, Odmar bashsha Shinab, Soboyimor bashsha Shimebor ar Bilar ba Suaror bashshar birudde zuddo ḳorat gela.
14.3: Ou faszon bashshae tarar sifai oḳolre ekḳano ḳoria Siddimor tol zagat loia gela. I zagare Luna shagor ḳoin.
14.4: Hi bashsha oḳole baro boros bashsha Ḳodor-laumoror gulami koria tero bosoror shomoy bidruho ḳorla.
14.5: Er bador boros bashsha Ḳodor-laumor ar tan logor bashsha oḳole gia Ostorut-Kornoyimo Rofayi oḳolre, Homo gia Zuzi oḳolre, ar Shabi-Kiriataimo gia Eimi oḳolre araila.
14.6: Bade morubumir ḳasar El-Faron forzonto Seir faṛor Hurio oḳolre-o araila.
14.7: Heshe ou bashsha oḳole guria gia Oin-Mishpoṭo ba Kadesh gela. Tara Amaleki oḳlor asta desh doḳol ḳorla ar Hazazon-Tamar ṭauno ze Amuri oḳol asil tarare-o doḳol ḳorla.
14.8: Bade Sadum, Amura, Odma, Soboyim ar Bila ba Suaror bashsha oḳole
14.9: Ilamor bashsha Ḳodor-laumor, Guimor bashsha Tidiol, Babilor bashsha Omrafel ar Illashoror bashsha Ariakor loge zuddo ḳorar lagi Siddim namor tol zagat tarar sifai oḳol hazaila. Sair bashshar birudde fas bashshae lagla.
14.10: Siddimor tol zagat tartelor bout gat-gaṛa asil. Sadum ar Amurar bashshain zebla bagia zaira, i shomoy tarar logor ḳeu ḳeu ou tartelor gato foṛi gela, ar baki oḳole bagia faṛo gela.
14.11: Teu tarar dushmon oḳole Sadum-Amurar hoḳol don-samana ar ḳani-danir hoḳolta luṭia loia gelogi.
14.12: Ar tara Abramor batiza Lutor hoḳol mal-samana shudda hou Lutre-u doria loia gelagi, ḳaron eine-u Sadum ṭauno roita.
14.13: Teu eḳzone bagia aia Ibrani Abramre ou ḳobor dilo. Abram i shomoy Amuri Momrir elon bonor ḳasat taḳta. I Momri asla Ashkul ar Aneror bai, Abramor loge erar zuddor shaijjor chukti asil.
14.14: Tan batizare doria loia gesoingi hunia Abrame laṛai zanra nizor tin-sho aṭaro zon gulamre loia Dan ṭaun forzonto dushmonor ḳore ḳore gela. Ou gulam oḳol tan baṛit-u zonmisil.
14.15: Raitkur bala dushmon dolor lagal faia era hamla ḳoria herare arailla, ar ḳedaite ḳedaite Damesk ṭaunor utore Huba forzonto gela.
14.16: Luṭ ḳora hokkol zinish tain firaia anla, mal-samana shudda tan batiza Lutre-o uddar ḳorla. Er loge hoḳol beṭintore ar hoḳol manshore-o uddar ḳori anla. Bashsha Malki-Siddike dua dila
14.17: Ḳodor-laumor ar tar logor bashsha oḳolre araia Abram firia aoar shomoy Sadumor bashshae tan loge deḳa ḳorar lagi Shabi ba Bashsha namor tol zagat bar oia aila.
14.18: Ar Shalemor bashsha Malki-Siddike Abramor lagi ruṭi ar anguror shorbot loia aila, tain oila Allatalar fosondor imam.
14.19: Tain Abramre dua ḳoria ḳoila, “Zein asman ar zomin foyda ḳorsoin, hou Allatala Abramre borkot dan ḳoroukka.
14.20: Afnar dushmon oḳolre zein afnar ato shofisoin, tan nam doinno ouk.” Ou Abrame tan hokkoltar doshbaṭor eḳbaṭ Malki-Siddikre dilaila.
14.21: Ar Sadumor bashshae Abramre ḳoila, “Afne mal-samana hoḳolta raki deukka, ḳali manush guin amare firot dilain.”
14.22: Abrame Sadumor bashshare ḳoila, “Zein asman-zomin foyda ḳorsoin hou Mabud Allatalar name ami at tulia ḳosom ḳorsi,
14.23: afnar kunu zinish-u, eḳsa suta-u ba faor zutar eḳsa fita-o ami nitam nae. Arnae bade afne ḳoiba, amar done-u Abram doni oise.
14.24: Amar manshe zeta ḳailisoin ita saṛa ami ar kichchu nitam nae. Ḳali Aner, Ashkul ar Momri zera amar loge gesla, tarar faona baṭ tara neukkagi.”

15.1: Ota goṭona oḳlor bade ohir maze Mabudor kalam Abramor gese nazil oilo. Tain ḳoila, “O Abram, ḍoraio na, ami-u tumar hefazotkari, tumar bout boṛo furuskar.”
15.2: Abrame ḳoila, “O Mabud Moula, amare kita ditae? Ami to niaoladi. Ami morar bade Dameskor Eliezer amar shompottir malik oibo.
15.3: Tumi to amare kunu aolad dilae na, erlagi amar baṛir gulam amar oarish oibo.”
15.4: Ou Mabude Abramre ḳoila, “Na, he nae, tumar nizor bour aolad-u tumar oarish oibo.”
15.5: Mabude Abramre bare ania ḳoila, “Asmanor bae sao, ar farle ou tera oḳol gonia fuṛao, tumar bongshor oarish oula behishab oibo.”
15.6: Abrame Mabudor ou oadare ekin ḳorla, ar Mabude hou ekinre dindari kam hishabe kobul ḳorla.
15.7: Ar tain Abramre ḳoila, “Ami-u Mabud. I Kenan deshor odikari oibar lagi ami tumare Babil deshor Ur ṭaun taki bar ḳoria anchi.”
15.8: Ou Abrame ḳoila, “O Mabud Moula, ami itar malik oimu ḳori kila buzmu?”
15.9: Tain ḳoila, “Tumi tin bosoror eḳṭa ḳori ḍeki, sagi, ar meṛar faṭa amar samne loia ao, er loge eḳṭa ḍufi faki ar eḳṭa faror baichcha-o anio.”
15.10: Abrame oula ḳorla. Tain ita hoḳolṭi ania dui ṭukra ḳoria ulṭa-ulṭi kori hazaia raḳla, ḳali faki oḳolre ṭukraila na.
15.11: Teu hokun aia ou ṭukra oḳlor ufre foṛle, Abrame ḳedaila.
15.12: Shuruz ḍubar shomoy Abramor eḳ beushi gum ailo. Gumor maze betaya ḍor ar andaire tane asor ḳorlo.
15.13: Ou Mabude tanre ḳoila, “Tumi nichchoy oia zanio, tumar oarish oḳole oula desho gia roiba zeḳṭa tarar nizor nae. Hono tara kub zulum-mosibotor maze roia sair-sho boros forzonto gulami korba.
15.14: Ar ze zatie tarare gulam banaiba, ami hi zatir bisar ḳormu. Bade tara bout don-doulot loia hon tone bar oia aiba.
15.15: Ar tumi shantie tumar baf-dadar gese zaibae. Tumi fura murobbi boyosho ḳoyboro hamaibae.
15.16: Tumar sair siṛi bade era ono firia aiba, ḳaron Amuri oḳlor guna oḳono fura oise na.”
15.17: Shuruz ḍubia zebla andair oigelo ou shomoy dumae bora eḳ undal ar agunir mushal hou hazaia raḳa kurbanir ṭukraintor mazedi gelo.
15.18: Mabude hou din-u Abramor loge oula oada ḳorla, “Mishoror gang tone boṛo gang Furat forzonto asta desh ami tumar oarishre dilam.
15.21: Amuri, Kenani, Girgashi ar Zibuzi oḳlor desh.”

16.1: Bibi Sarar feṭo Abramor kunu hurutta oisoin na, oile Hazera name Sarar eḳ Mishori bandi beṭi asla.
16.2: Eḳdin Sarae Abramre ḳoila, “Huno, Mabude amare niaoladi korsoin. Te tumi amar bandir ḳasat zao, kiba taire dia ami aolad failitam fari.” Ou Abram-o Sarar mate razi oila.
16.3: Kenan desho Abram dosh boros roar bade Sarae tan Mishori bandi Hazerare nizor zamai Abramor loge bia dila.
16.4: Bade Abram ar Hazera ekḳano roile tair feṭo hurutta ailo. Hazerae zebla buzlo tair hurutta oita teu tair malik bibir bae boṛai deḳanit laglo.
16.5: Ou Sarae Abramre ḳoila, “Amar bae tair be-adobir lagi tumi-u dayi. Amar i bandire ami-u tumar bisnat tulia dislam, ar oḳon tair hurutta oita ḳori amare boṛai deḳar. Mabude tumar-amar bisar ḳoroukka.”
16.6: Abrame Sarare ḳoila, “Deḳo, tumar bandi to tumar ato-u ase. Tumar zela bala mone ḳoy ola-u ḳoro.” Ou Sarae Hazerare oula duk dila, duke tai tan ges taki bagia gelogi.
16.7: Foto morubumir maze eḳṭa fanir indarar ḳasat Mabudor firistae Hazerare faila. I indara asil Shur namor zagat zaoar foto.
16.8: Firistae ḳoila, “O Sarar bandi Hazera, tumi koi taki airae ar ḳoi zaitae?” Hazerae ḳoilo, “Ami amar malik Bibi Sarar ges taki bagia zairamgi.”
16.9: Teu Mabudor firistae ḳoila, “Tumar malik bibir gese firia gia ḳolla nuaia hirbar tan kezmoto lago.”
16.10: Tain aro ḳoila, “Ami tumar oarish oula baṛai dimu, tarare gonia fuṛaito nae.
16.11: Huno, tumar feṭo hurutta ase. Tumar eḳ fua oibo, tar nam rakio Ismail [mani, Allae hunoin], ḳaron Mabude tumar duk hunchoin.
16.12: Ar boṛo oile he lagam saṛa guṛar laḳan oibo. He hokkolor bae at tulbo, ar hokkole tar bae at tulba. Baiaintor loge hamesha tar lag taḳbo.”
16.13: Ar Hazerar loge Mabude matila ḳori, tai tan nam dilo “Tumi deḳa deneala Alla”; tai koilo, “Zein amare deḳoin, ami ono-u tanre deḳlam nae ni?”
16.14: Erlagi Kadesh ar Beredor mazor hi kuar nam oilo, Ber-Lohoy-Rui [mani, zein zinda ar amare deḳra, tan kua].
16.15: Bade shomoy aile Hazerar goro eḳ fua oilo, Abrame ou fuar nam raḳla Ismail.
16.16: Abramor boyosh zebla siashi bosor oigese, ou shomoy Hazerar goro Ismailor zonom oilo.

17.1: Abramor nirannobboi borosor shomoy Mabude hirbar tanre didar dia ḳoila, “Ami Shorbo-shoktiman Alla. Tumi amar deoa foto takia kamil o.
17.2: Ami tumar-amar maze chukti kaim ḳormu ar tumar oarish kub beshi baṛai dimu.”
17.3: Teu Abram soizdat foṛla, ar Allae tan loge batchit ḳori koila,
17.4: “Tumar loge ami oada ḳaim ḳoriar, tumi bout zatir mul baf oibae.
17.5: Tumare ar Abram [mani, boṛo baf] ḳoia ḍaḳa oito nae, oḳon taki tumar nam oilo Ibrahim [mani, bout zatir baf], ami tumare bout zatir mul baf banailam.
17.6: Ami tumare bout folala ḳormu, ar tumar maz tone bout zati ar bashsha oḳol foyda ḳormu.
17.7: Ami tumar ar tumar oarishor for oarish oḳlor loge ze chukti kaim ḳormu, ikṭa hor-hamesha boail taḳbo, ou usillae ami tumar ar tumar oarishor for oarish oḳlor Alla oimu.
17.8: Ar ze Kenan desho tumi oḳon musafir oia taḳrae, i furaṭa-u ami tumare ar tumar oarish oḳolre hor-hameshakur doḳolor lagi dimu. Ami tarar Alla oimu.” Mosolmani kamor chukti
17.9: Allae Ibrahimre ḳoila, “Tumi amar ḳaim ḳora chukti manio, tumi ar tumar oarishor for oarish oḳole-o mania solio.
17.10: Tumrar loge ar tumrar oarishor loge amar oula chukti kaim oilo, tumrar hoḳol beṭaintor mosolmani kam ḳoraite oibo.
17.11: Tumra hoḳole nizor purush ongor mukar samṛa ḳaṭbae. Oḳṭa-u tumrar ar amar maze boail ḳora chuktir nishana.
17.12: Oarishor for oarish doria tumrar hoḳol fuaintore zonmor aṭ dinor din mosolmani koraibae. Zara tumar oarish nae, ḳali tumrar baṛit zonmise ba tumrar ḳorida gulam, tarar-o mosolmani korani lagbo.
17.13: Tumrar goro zonmise ba ḳorida gulam oḳolre nisoy mosolmani koraibae. Tumrar shorilo zari kora amar i chukti hor-hameshakur chukti oibo.
17.14: Ze beṭae purush ongor mukar samṛa ḳaṭto nae, tare tar zatir maz taki fusia falail oibo. He to amar chuktir borkelaf ḳorse.”
17.15: Allae Ibrahimre ḳoila, “Tumar bibire ar Sara ḳoia ḍakio na. En nam oibo Sayra [mani, rani].
17.16: Ami taire borkot nazil ḳormu, tair goro tumar eḳ fua dimu. Ar borkot nazil ḳoria bout zatir mul ma banaimu, ar bout mullukor bashsha oḳol-o foyda oiba.”
17.17: Ou Ibrahime maṭit soizdat foṛi ashia mone mone ḳoila, “Hasau eḳ-sho bosoror buṛar hurutta oito ni! Ta-o nobboi bosoror buṛi Sayrar feṭo?”
17.18: Tain Allare ḳoila, “Ah! Ismailgu zanu tumar rohomote basia taḳe.”
17.19: Ou Allae formaila, “Ṭik ase. Oile tumar bibi Sayrar feṭo hasau tumar fua oibo, tumi tar nam raḳbae Isʼhak [mani, he ashe]. Tar loge amar chukti kaim ḳormu, tar oarishor loge ikṭa amar hor-hameshakur chukti oibo.
17.20: Ar Ismailor lagi-o tumar dua hunchi. Huno, ami tare-o borkot nazil ḳormu ar tare folala ḳoria bout baṛai dimu. He barozon razar baf oibo ar tar mazedi ami biraṭ zati foyda ḳormu.
17.21: Samnor boros i sando Sayrar goro tumar ze hurutta oibo, hou Isʼhakor loge ami amar chukti kaim ḳormu.”
17.22: Ibrahimor loge batchit shesh ḳoria Allae tan ges taki uṭia toshrif nilagi.
17.23: Allar hukum moto Ibrahime hou din-u Ismailre mosolmani koraila. Er loge ḳorida gulam oḳol ar tan baṛit zonmise ila hoḳol gulamre, baṛir hokkol beṭaintore mosolmani koraila.
17.24: Ibrahimor nizor mosolmani kam ḳoranir shomoy tan boyosh asil nirannobboi boros,
17.25: ar tan fua Ismailor boyosh tero.
17.26: Eḳ dine-u Ibrahim ar tan fua Ismailor mosolmani korail oilo.
17.27: Hi din baṛir hoḳol beṭaintor, zara tan baṛit zonmisil ar zerare bidesh taki loia anchoin, ita hoḳlor-u mosolmani kam eḳloge ḳorail oilo.

18.1: Bade Momrir elon bonor ḳasat Mabude Ibrahimre deḳa dila. Tain dinor gormor shomoy tambur dorzat boat asla.
18.2: Oula shomoy souk tulia deḳla, tan samne tinzon manush ubai roisoin. Dekia-u tain dorzar ges taki douṛaia gia, maṭit soizda ḳoria tarare ḳoila,
18.3: “O munib, ami zudi afnarar mayar kunu manush oi, taile afnarar i gulamre falaia zain na zen.
18.4: Ami tuṛa fani ania diar afnara at-fao doia, ou gas tolat ziraukka.
18.5: Ar i gulamor ḳasat zebla aisoin, te tuṛa ḳani ania dei, ota ḳaia zano aram oile afnara hirbar roana dibane.” Tara ḳoila, “Bala, afne zebla ḳoira, te ḳoroukka.”
18.6: Ibrahime loge loge bitre gia Sayrare ḳoila, “Zoldi koria tin feṭu bala moyda makia fiṭa banao.”
18.7: Tain douṛaia gia gorur fal tone kub bala eḳṭa ḳosma basur ania tan gulamre dila. He-o zoldi kori oḳṭa randilo.
18.8: Ou Ibrahime dud, doi ar gust ania tarare ḳaibar dila, tara ḳaoa-daoa ḳorla. Tain tarar ḳandat gas tolat ubaila.
18.9: Tara Ibrahimre zikaila, “Afnar bibi Sayra ḳoi?” Tain ḳoila, “Ounu, tambur bitre asoin.”
18.10: Ou erar maze eḳzone ḳoila, “Samnor boros i sando ami oboshsho-u afnar gese aimu. Deḳba, ou shomoy afnar bibi Sayrar kulo eḳ fua taḳbo.” Sayrae Ibrahimor ḳore tambur dorzat ubaia ita hunla.
18.11: I shomoy Ibrahim ar Sayra buṛa-zoif oigesoin, hurutta oar laḳan boyosh-o Sayrar roisil na.
18.12: Erlagi Sayrae mone mone ashia ḳoila, “Amar oula heshḳali boyosho ita kushi ar aibo ni? Amar malik-o murobbi oigesoin.”
18.13: Teu Mabude Ibrahimre ḳoila, “Sayrae kitar lagi ita ḳoia ashlo zen, hasau amar hurutta oibo ni, ami to buṛi?
18.14: Mabude faroin na ila kunta ase ni? Dekio, ṭik shomoye ami hirbar tumar gese aimu, ar i shomoy Sayrar kulo fua taḳbo.”
18.15: Sayrae ḍoraia ḳoila, “Ji na, ami to ashchi na.” Ou tain ḳoila, “Na rego, tumi nu ashilae.” Sadum ṭaunor lagi Ibrahim (a:)or minoti
18.16: Erbade hou tinzone in tone uṭia Sadumor bae saila. Ibrahime tarar loge oia bidae deoat gela.
18.17: Teu Mabude ḳoila, “Ami zeta ḳortam saiar, ita kunu Ibrahimre lukaitam ni?
18.18: Ibrahim takia-u to ami eḳ mohan himmot-ala zati foyda ḳormu, duniair hoḳol zatie on tone borkot ḳamaiba.
18.19: Erlagi-u ami tare ḳatir ḳorsi, he tar oarish ar tar nizor hoḳolre amar morzi mania hok ar insafor ḳam ḳorar hukum dey. Tara-o zudi ou laḳan sole, taile ami Mabude Ibrahimor befare zotota ḳoisi, hoḳolta-u fura ḳormu.”
18.20: Bade Mabude ḳoila, “Sadum ar Amurar birudde kub nalish ar foriad huniar, tarar guna-o kub bezuita.
18.21: Erlagi ami tole lamia gia deki, ami zela nalish huniar, ita hasau oula ḳaraf ki na. Ar na oile-o to deḳmu.”
18.22: Ou hi duiozone firia Sadumor bae roana dila ar Ibrahim Mabudor gese ubai roila.
18.23: Bade Ibrahime Mabudor bae aguaia gia ḳoila, “Afne gunagaror loge hok manush oḳolre-o marilaita ni?
18.24: Ṭaunor maze zudi foinchash zon hok manush taḳe taile hou foinchash zonor ḳatire ṭaunre meherbani na ḳoria binash ḳorilaiba ni?
18.25: Te afnar ḳam to oula nae, hok ar gunagarre eḳloge marilaoa, eḳ homan shaza deoa, afnar lagi to ṭik nae. Zein hara duniar bisar ḳoroin, tain kunu hok insaf ḳorta nae ni?”
18.26: Mabude ḳoila, “Zudi Sadum ṭauno foinchash zon-o hok manush taḳoin, taile tarar ḳatire ami asta ṭaunre rehai dilaimu.”
18.27: Ibrahime ḳoila, “Deḳoukka, ami to duil ar sali saṛa kunta nae, ta-o ami shaosh ḳoria amar malikor loge matiar.
18.28: Doroukka, zudi foinchash zon hok manush na oia fas zon ḳom oy, taile kita ou fas zon ḳomor lagi afne asta ṭaun binash ḳorilaiba ni?” Tain ḳoila, “Ami zudi hino foytallish zonre fai, taile ikṭa binash ḳortam nae.”
18.29: Ibrahime tanre hirbar ḳoila, “Doroukka, zudi hino sallish zon faoa zae?” Mabude ḳoila, “Hou sallish zonor ḳatire ami binash ḳortam nae.”
18.30: Ibrahime ḳoila, “Amar malik zanu amar mate naraz na oin. Aichcha, zudi hino tish zonre faoa zae?” Tain ḳoila, “Zudi ami tish zonre-o fai, taile-o ami binash ḳortam nae.”
18.31: Ibrahime ḳoila, “Ami zebla himmot ḳoria malikor loge batchit ḳoriar te hirbar ḳoiar, zudi hino bish zonre faoa zae?” Mabude zuaf dila, “Hou bish zonor ḳatire-u ami ikṭa binash ḳortam nae.”
18.32: Heshe Ibrahime ḳoila, “Amar malik zanu naraz na oin, ami kali aro eḳbarta ḳoiar, zudi hino dosh zon taḳoin?” Mabude ḳoila, “Hou dosh zonor ḳatire-u ami ikṭa binash ḳortam nae.”
18.33: Ibrahimor loge Mabudor bat-soal shesh oia harle roana dilaila, ar Ibrahim-o tan baṛit firia aila.

19.1: Bade hainja bala hou duizon firista Sadum ṭauno gela. I shomoy Lut ṭaunor mul geiṭor gese boat asla, erare dekia tain ubaila ar maṭit soizda ḳoria ḳoila,
19.2: “O amar malik oḳol, ami minoti kori koiar, doya ḳori afnarar ou gulamor goro toshrif anilaukka ar at-fao doia raitḳan ḳaṭaukka. Biane hirbar roana oibane.” Era ḳoila, “Na, amra ou ṭaunor moydano rait ḳaṭaimu.”
19.3: Tain zebla kub minot-ḳajji korra ou shomoy era tan baṛit hamaila. Bade Lute ruṭi banaia erar lagi kana-dana zuit ḳorla, ar tara ḳaila.
19.4: Erar hutibar age-u Sadum ṭaunor hokkol zuan-buṛa beṭainte aia hi baṛire berilaila,
19.5: ar Lutre ḍakia ḳoila, “Aiz rait ze duizon manush tor ino aise, tara ḳoi? Otare bar ḳoria amrar gese an. Amra otar loge mouz ḳortam.”
19.6: Ou shomoy Lute dorzar bare gia tan ḳoror doroza bond ḳoria tarare ḳoila,
19.7: “Baiainre, ami minot ḳoriar, tumra ila bod ḳam ḳorio na.
19.8: Deḳo, amar duiṭa shoti fuṛi ase. Ami bar ḳoria tumrar gese loia aiar, tara kunu beṭaintor gese roisoin na, tumrar zeta mone sae ḳoro; ta-o, i manshor loge tumra kunta ḳorio na, era amar goro asroy loisoin.”
19.9: Oile tara ḳoilo, “Za, za, fot taki hor!” Tara aro ḳoilo, “Oi beṭa, tui eḳla boitol oia aisos ar ḳali amrar ufre netagiri korre. Oḳon erar saite tor loge aro beshi kobisi kormu.” Ḳoia-u tara Lutre ṭelia horaia dorza bangto sailo.
19.10: Ou shomoy hou duizone at baṛaia, Lutre goror bitre ṭania nia doroza bond ḳori dila.
19.11: Ar dorzar bare ubail huru-boṛo hoḳol aḳta-u anda oigelo, ar dorza tuḳaite tuḳaite heran oigelo.
19.12: Bade hou duiozone Lutre zikaila, “Ino tumar ar ḳe ḳe ase? Tumar fua-fuṛi ar damandre loia in tone horia zaogi.
19.13: Ḳaron amra i zagare sarḳar ḳorilaiar. Inor manshor birudde Mabudor gese oula bezuita nalish oise zen, ikṭa binash ḳorar lagi tain amrare faṭaisoin.”
19.14: Ou Lute bare gia tan daman oḳolre ḳoila, “Ao, tumra i zaga saṛia baro ḳaron Mabude i ṭaunre binash ḳorar lagi tiar oiroisoin.” Oile tara mone ḳorlo, tain ita tamsha ḳorra.
19.15: Fotabala hou firistae Lutre tagda dia ḳoila, “Uṭo, zoldi kori tumar bou ar i duio fuṛire loia on tone zaogi. Naile ou gozobor maze foṛia binash oizibae.”
19.16: Lute zai-zairam oula ḳorra. Oile Mabudor maya tan ufre asil ḳori hou duiozone, tain ar tan bou ar tan duio fuṛintor ato dori ṭania ṭaunor bare loia aila.
19.17: Hoḳolre bar ḳoria anar bade tara ḳoila, “Baste saile bago, ḳoredi saio na, bagia faṛo zao, i tʼol zagar kunuḳano ubaio na arnae tumra-o morbae.”
19.18: Ou Lute ḳoila, “O amar malik oḳol, ila ḳoroin na zen;
19.19: deḳoukka, afnar i gulamre afne meherbani korsoin, ar amar zan basaibar lagi afne amare moha doya deḳaisoin. Oile ami bagia faṛo zaitam fartam nae. Hoyto i bifod aia amare zata mari dorle, ami-o mormu.
19.20: Deḳoukka, bagia zaite to ou huru gauṭa ḳasat ase. Zan basaibar lagi amare ono faṭai deukka. Gauṭa huru-muru ase.”
19.21: Tain ḳoila, “Ṭik ase, ami tumar i arzi manlam. Tumi ze gaur ḳota ḳoilae, iṭa ami dongsho ḳortam nae.
19.22: Zoldi kori hino zao. Tumi hono na fosani forzonto ami kunta ḳortam fariar na.” Lutor ḳotar lagi hou gaur nam oilo Suar [mani, huru].
19.23: Lute zebla Suaro gia fosla i shomoy shuruz uṭigese.
19.24: Erbade-u Mabude asman taki Sadum ar Amurar ufre aguin ar gondoḳor gozob saṛila.
19.25: Tain hi ṭaun oḳol, hoḳol tʼol zaga, hokkol manush ar hi maṭir ufror hokkolta dongsho ḳorilaila.
19.26: Ermaze Lutor boue ḳoredi firia saoae, tain eḳṭa nunor sakka oigela.
19.27: Bador din Ibrahime biane uṭia hou zagat gela zeno agor din tain Mabudor gese ubaisla.
19.28: Tain tole Sadum, Amura ar hoḳol tʼol zagar bae saia deḳla, iṭ-baṭṭa taki zela duma baroy, ou laḳan hou elaḳa taki duma uṛer.
19.29: Ar Lute zeḳano boshot ḳorta, hou tʼol zagar ṭaun oḳol dongsho ḳorar shomoy, Allae Ibrahimor ḳota mono ḳoria Lutre hinor gozobor maz taki horaia anla. Muab ar Bin-Ommi zatir ḳobisi foyda
19.30: Suar gaut roite ḍoraila ḳori, Lute tan duio fuṛire loia hin taki bar oia faṛo aia, ek gator bitre roila.
19.31: Eḳdin tan boṛo fuṛie huru boinre ḳoilo, “Baba to murobbi oigesoin. Ar zogotor shomazor niom moto amrare bia ḳorar lagi ino kunu beṭain-o nae.
19.32: Te ae, amra babare shorab ḳaoaia tan ḳasat roi. Teu babaredi amrar bongsho basaitam farmu.”
19.33: Ou tara duiozone raitor bala tanre shorab ḳaoaia ṭal banailo. Bade boṛo boin bafor gese hutito gelo, oile kun shomoy hutilo ar kun shomoy uṭilo, bafe kunta-u ṭer faila na.
19.34: Bador din boṛogue hurugure ḳoilo, “Dek, kail rait ami babar gese hutislam. Ae, aiz rait-o tane oula shorab ḳaoaia ṭal banai, bade tui-o gia tan gese hutis. Te babaredi amrar bongsho basaitam farmu.”
19.35: Ou laḳan tara hou rait-o tarar bafre shorab ḳaoaia ṭal banailo, ar huru fuṛi tair bafor gese hutilo. Tai kun shomoy hutilo ar kun shomoy uṭilo, ita tain kunta-u ṭer faila na.
19.36: Ou nomunae Lutor duio fuṛir feṭo bafredi hurutta ailo.
19.37: Bade boṛo fuṛir goro fua oile, er nam raḳlo Muab [mani, babar ges tone]. Ou Muab-u oḳonkur Muabi oḳlor mul baf.
19.38: Ar huru fuṛir-o eḳ fua oilo, er nam raḳlo Bin-Ommi [mani, amar mullukor fua]. He oḳonkur Boni-Ammanor mul baf.

20.1: Ar Ibrahime hin tone Negebor morubumir bae gia Kadesh ar Shuror mazḳano Gerar desho roila.
20.2: Hono hirbar tan bou Sayrare nizor boin ḳoia forisoy dila. Erlagi hinor bashsha Abimalike manushdi Sayrare tan gese nilagi.
20.3: Ar rait Allae Abimalikre kuabe ḳoila, “Huno, ou ze beṭire tumi loia aiso, tair to zamai ase, erlagi tumi oḳon moutor muko.”
20.4: Abimalik oḳono Sayrar gese gesoin na. Erlagi tain ḳoila, “O Malik, ni-oforadi zati oile-o kita afne marilaita ni?
20.5: Ou manushṭae to nize-u ḳoise, ein tar boin. Ar ou beṭie-o ḳoisoin na ni, ein tan bai? Ami to shorol mone ni-oforadi ate i kam ḳorsi.”
20.6: Allae kuabe tanre ḳoila, “Ami-o zani, tumi shorol mone i kam ḳorso. Erlagi tumare gunar ḳam taki ami dom loailam. Taire soite dilam na.
20.7: Oḳon tumi tan bibire tan gese firot dilao. Tain eḳzon nobi. Tain tumar lagi dua ḳorba, teu tumar zan basbo. Ar zudi taire firot na deo, te zanilio, tumi ar tumar hoḳol-u nisoy morbae.”
20.8: Ou Abimalike fozore uṭia tan nizor uzir-nazir oḳolre ita hoḳolta ḳoila, ita hunia tara kub beshi ḍoraila.
20.9: Bade Abimalike Ibrahimre anaia ḳoila, “Afne amrar loge ita kun zator bebohar ḳorla? Ami afnar gese kita dush ḳorsi zen, afne amare ar amar bashshaire oto boṛo gunar daye falaila? Afne to amar loge ita oinnae ḳam ḳorla.”
20.10: Abimalike aro ḳoila, “Afne kita dekia ila ḳam ḳorla?”
20.11: Ibrahime zuaf dila, “Ami mone ḳorslam, i zagar manshor Allar bae kunu ḍor-boy nae, erlagi amar bour lalose hoyto tara amare kun ḳorba.
20.12: Ar tai hasau amar boin lage, ḳaron tai amar haton goror boin, ar oḳon amar bou.
20.13: Allae zebla amare amar bafor baṛi tone bar ḳori anla, ou shomoy ami taire ḳoislam, ‘Tumi amare ou mayaḳan ḳorio, amra zeno-u zai na ḳene, tumi amare tumar bai koia forisoy dio.’ ”
20.14: Bade Abimalike ḳotoṭa meṛa-goru, bandi-gulam Ibrahimre dila ar tan bibi Sayrare-o firot dilaila.
20.15: Abimalike ḳoila, “Deḳoukka, amar asta deshṭa-u afnar samne foṛi roise, te afnar zeno fosond ono-u roukka.”
20.16: Tain Sayrare ḳoila, “Deḳoukka, ami afnar baire eḳ azar rufar ṭeḳa dilam. Ar afnar ijjotor hoḳol bisaror foysala oilo.”
20.17: Bade Ibrahime Allar gese dua ḳorla, ar Allae Abimalik, tan bou ar tan bandi oḳolre shifa ḳorla ar tarar hurutta-o oila.
20.18: Ḳaron Ibrahimor bibi Sayrar lagi Mabude Abimalikor baṛir hoḳol beṭintor hurutta oa bond ḳori disla.

21.1: Mabude tan kalam mutabek Bibi Sayrare hefazot ḳorla, tain zela oada ḳorsla, ola-u ḳorla.
21.2: Ar Bibi Sayrar feṭo hurutta ailo. Allae ze shomoykur ḳota ḳoisla, hou shomoye-u Ibrahimor murobbi boyosho tan fuar zonom oilo.
21.3: Ibrahime Sayrar goror tan ou fuar nam raḳla Isʼhak [mani, asha].
21.4: Allar hukum moto tain aṭ dinor din tan fua Isʼhakor mosolmani kam ḳoraila.
21.5: Ibrahimor eḳ-sho bosoror shomoy tan fua Isʼhakor zonom oilo.
21.6: Bibi Sayrae ḳoila, “Allae amar muko ashi bar ḳorla, ar ita ze hunbo, he-o amar loge ashibo.”
21.7: Tain aro ḳoila, “Sayrae fuaintore bukur dud ḳaoaibo, ita Ibrahimre ḳe ḳoilo one? Ar oḳon to ou buṛa boyosho, amar feṭo tan fua foyda oilo.” Bibi Hazera ar tan fuare ḳedai deoa
21.8: Isʼhak boṛo oar bade zedin tane maʼr dud saṛail oilo, houdin Ibrahime eḳ boṛo mezbani korla.
21.9: Ar Mishori Hazerar feṭo Ibrahimor ze fua oisil, Sayrae deḳla he tamsha ḳorer.
21.10: Ou tain Ibrahimre ḳoila, “Fua shoho i bandire bar ḳori deo, bandir fua amar Isʼhakor loge ongshidar oito farto nae.”
21.11: Fuar ita hunia Ibrahime mono kub toklif faila.
21.12: Ou Allae tanre ḳoila, “Tumar bandi ar tair fuar lagi tumi bezar oio na. Sayrae zela tumare ḳoise oula ḳoro, ḳaron tumar fua Isʼhakor ḳandanre-u tumar ḳandan ḳoia gona oibo.
21.13: Ar i bandir torofa fua taki-o ami eḳṭa zati toiar ḳormu, ḳaron he-o to tumar aolad.”
21.14: Ou Ibrahime aguan uṭia kisu ruṭi ar fani bora eḳṭa samṛar toli hazaia Hazerar ḳando tulia dia, fuagure tair ato shofia bidae ḳorla. Hin tone bar oia Hazerae Ber-Shebar morubumir maze sokkor dita lagla.
21.15: Tolir fani shesh oigele tain fuare eḳṭa zonglar tole hutaia toila.
21.16: Ar eḳ ḍaḳor foriman duroi gia tain boiroila. “Fuar mout zate amar souke na deki,” mone mone ḳoia, tain hono boia-u sillaia ḳandila.
21.17: Fuagur ḳandon Allae hunla, ar Allar firistae asman tone ḍakia Hazerare ḳoila, “Hazera, O Hazera, tumar kita oise? Ḍoraio na, fuagu zeno ase, hon taki-u tar ḳandon Allae hunchoin.
21.18: Tumi uṭia fuagur ato doro, ami taredi eḳ biraṭ zati foyda ḳormu.”
21.19: Ou Allae Hazerar souk kulia dila, ar tain ek kua deḳla. Hi kua tone samṛar tolit fani bori ania fuare ḳaoaila.
21.20: Allae hou fuare hefazot ḳorla. He boṛo oilo, ar morubumit takia tir-donuk salanir ustad oilo.
21.21: He Faran morubumit taḳto. Tar maʼe Mishoror eḳ fuṛire ania tare bia ḳoraila. Ber-Shebat Geraror bashshar loge chukti
21.22: Hou shomoy Abimalik ar tan shenapoti Fikule Ibrahimre ḳoila, “Afne zeta-u ḳoroin, otat-u Allae afnar loge taḳoin.
21.23: Erlagi Allar name afne oḳon ono amar gese ḳosom ḳoroukka, amar ba amar aolad oḳlor loge, afne kunu beimani korta nae. Ar ami zela afnare doya deḳaisi, afne-o amar loge ar afnar musafirir zaga, i deshor loge oula doyar nozor raḳba.”
21.25: Ar Abimalikor gulam oḳole eḳṭa fanir kua zure nisilgi kori, tain nalish dila.
21.26: Abimalike zuaf dila, “Ita ḳam ḳe ḳorse ami to zani na. Afne-o amare ita ḳoisoin na, aiz-u ami ikṭa hunlam.”
21.27: Bade Ibrahime kisu meṛa ar goru ania Abimalikre dila ar duiozone chukti korla.
21.28: Ar Ibrahime fal tone shatgu meṛi-baichcha algaila.
21.29: Abimalike tane zikaila, “I meṛi-baichcha shatgu alga ḳorar mani kita?”
21.30: Ibrahime ḳoila, “Afne oguintore neukka. I kuaṭa ze ami kudsi ikṭa oilo tar forman.”
21.31: Erlagi ou zagar nam oilo Ber-Sheba [mani, ḳosmor kua], ono-u tara duio zone ḳosom ḳorsla.
21.32: Tara Ber-Shebat ou chukti korar bade, Abimalik ar tan shenapoti Fikul uṭia Filistini oḳlor desho firia gelagi.
21.33: Bade Ibrahime Ber-Shebat eḳṭa zau gas ruila, ar ze Mabudor shuru-o nae shesh-o nae, tan ebadot ḳorla.
21.34: Ar Ibrahime Filistini oḳlor desho bout din ḳaṭaila.

22.1: I goṭonar bade Allae Ibrahimor eḳ forikka loila. Allae tanre ḍaḳ dila, “Ibrahim!” Tain zuaf dila, “Ounu ami.”
22.2: Mabude formaila, “Tumar fuare, zare tumi oto mohobbot ḳoro, hou ḳas mayar fut Isʼhakre loia tumi Muria elaḳat zao. Hoḳano ze faṛor ḳota ami tumare ḳoimu, er ufre tare nia zalail kurbani deo.”
22.3: Teu Ibrahime fozore uṭia gadar fiṭit goddi lagaia tan fua Isʼhak, duizon gulam ar zalail kurbanir lagi laḳṛi kaṭia loia, ze zagar ḳota Allae tanre ḳoisla, hobaedi roana oila.
22.4: Tin dinor din Ibrahime souk tulia saite-u duroi taki hou zagaḳan deḳla.
22.5: Ou tan gulam oḳolre ḳoila, “Tumra gadaṭa loia ono ubao, ami ar amar fua hono gia ebadoti shesh ḳoria harle tumrar gese aimu.”
22.6: Ibrahime zalail kurbanir laḳṛir aṭa tan fua Isʼhakor ḳando tulia dia nize aguinor fatil ar suri loia, duio zone samnor bae aguaila.
22.7: Ou Isʼhake tan bafre ḳoila, “Baba.” Tain ḳoila, “Kitare baf ḳo?” Isʼhake ḳoila, “Ino to laḳṛi ar aguin ase, te kurbanir meṛa-baichcha kuai?”
22.8: Tain zuaf dila, “Babare, kurbanir lagi Allae nize-u meṛa-baichcha zugaiba.” Ota matte matte tara aguai gela.
22.9: Allar fosondor zagat fosia Ibrahime kurbani kana banaia, laḳṛi hazaila. Bade nizor fua Isʼhakre bandia ou darur ufre hutaila.
22.10: Ar tain nizor fuare kurbanir lagi suri ato loila.
22.11: Ou Mabudor firistae asman tone tane ḍaḳ dila, “Ibrahim! O Ibrahim!” Tain ḳoila, “Ounu ami.”
22.12: Firistae ḳoila, “Fuagur bae tumar at tulio na, tare ar kunta-u ḳorio na. Tumi zen Allare ḍorao ita buza gese, ḳaron amare tumar fua, tumar ḳas mayar fua dan ḳorte-o na-kush oiso na.”
22.13: Ibrahime souk tuli saia deḳoin, tan ḳore eḳṭa dumba ar tar hing zongolor maze aṭki roise. Ou tain gia dumbaṭa ania, nizor fuar bodla zalail kurbani dila.
22.14: Tain hi zagar nam raḳla Iaoweh-Zirih [mani, Mabude zugain]. Erlagi oḳono manshe ḳoin, “Mabudor faṛo zugail oibo.”
22.15: Mabudor firistae asman tone hirbar Ibrahimre ḍakia ḳoila,
22.16: “Huno, Mabude ḳoira, tumi oula ḳorlae, tumar fuare, tumar ḳas mayar fuare dan ḳorte-o naraz oilae na. Erlagi ami Mabude ḳosom ḳoria ḳoiar,
22.17: ami nisoy tumare borkot nazil ḳormu, tumar bongshore asmanor tera ar doriar soror balur laḳan behishab ḳormu. Tumar bongshoe tarar dushmonor ṭaun oḳol doḳol ḳorba.
22.18: Ar tumar bongshor usillae duniar hoḳol zatie borkot hasil ḳorba. Ḳaron tumi amar hukum mancho.”
22.19: Bade Ibrahime tan gulam oḳlor gese firia aila, ar tara eḳloge Ber-Sheba namor zagat gela. Ou zagat-u tain boshoti korla. Hozrot Ibrahim (a:)or bai Nahuror ḳandan
22.20: I goṭonar bade Ibrahime ḳobor faila, tan bai Nahuror bibi Milkar ḳoygu fuain oisoin.
22.21: Er boṛo fuar nam Auz, tar baiaintor nam Buz, ar Oramor baf Komuel,
22.22: erbade Kesod, Hosho, Fildosh, Zidlof ar Botuel. Botuelor fuṛir nam Rebeka.
22.23: Ibrahimor bai Nahuror bibi Milkar feṭo taki i aṭzon fuar zonom oisil.
22.24: Nahuror eḳ hangar bou asil, tair nam Rouma. Tair feṭo Ṭeboh, Gohom, Tohosh ar Maḳar zonom oisil.

23.1: Bibi Sayra eḳ-sho shataish boros basila; Allae tane otodinor hayati disla.
23.2: Bade Kenan deshor Kiriot-Orbo mani Hebrono inteḳal ḳorla. Ar Ibrahime tan lagi bout ḳanda-ḳaṭi ar ahazari korla.
23.3: Heshe tan murda bibir ges tone horia gia hou deshor Hiṭṭi oḳolre ḳoila,
23.4: “Ami to bideshi musafir oia afnarar ono roiar. Meherbani kori kobrostan banaibar lagi amare tuṛa zomi deukka, ami amar samne tone amar murdare dafon ḳori.”
23.6: “Huzur, amrar ḳota hunoukka. Afne to amrar maze Allar mohobbotor buzurg. Amrar gurustanor maze zeno fosond oy, ono-u afnar murdare dafon ḳoroukka. Tanre dafon ḳorar lagi amrar ḳeu-u nizor banail ḳoybor saṛte omot ḳorto nae.”
23.7: Ou Ibrahime ubaia hinor Hiṭṭi oḳlor samne mata nuaia ijjot ḳori koila,
23.8: “Amar bibire ino dafon ḳorat zudi afnarar kunu omot na taḳe, te doya ḳori amar arziḳan hunoukka. Afnara amar oia Shuhoror fua Ifrunre ḳoukka,
23.9: tan zominor hesh matat Moḳfela ze guha ase, oḳanta zenu ḳobrostan bananir lagi tain fura dam loia amar gese besilain.”
23.10: Aro Hiṭṭi oḳlor loge i shomoy Ifrun-o hono boat asla. Ibrahimor mator zuafe hou Hiṭṭi oḳlor samne Ifrune ḳoila,
23.11: “Na, na, afne doya ḳori amar matḳan hunoukka. Ami hoḳlor samne-u i zomi ar guha afnare dilailam, afnar murdare dafon ḳorilain.”
23.12: Teu Ibrahime hirbar hinor hoḳlor samne mata nuaia,
23.13: hi deshor hokkolre hunaia Ifrunre ḳoila, “Hunoukka, zomiḳanor dam ami dilai. Afne-o zomiḳanor dam neukkagi, bade amar murdare ono dafon ḳormu.”
23.15: “Huzur, amar ḳota hunoukka, ou zomiḳanor dam oilogi sair-sho tola rufa, te afnar-amar lagi ita kunta-u nae. Afnar murdare ḳoybor dilaukka.”
23.16: Ou Ibrahime Ifrunor ḳota mania Hiṭṭi oḳlor samne tain, Ifrunor saoa dam mafik, faikari mafe sair-sho tola rufa tanre mafia dila.
23.17: Ou laḳan Momri ṭaunor gese Moḳfelat Ifrunor ze zomin asil hou zomin ar honor guha ar zominor sairobae zoto gas-gasali asil,
23.18: ita hoḳolta-u hinor Hiṭṭi oḳol ar ṭaunor mukor hoḳlor samne, Ibrahimor malikanae ailo.
23.19: Bade Ibrahime Kenan deshor Momri ṭaun ba Hebronor Moḳfelar guhat tan bibi Sayrare dafon ḳorla.
23.20: Ou laḳan Moḳfelar ou guha shoho asta zominḳan gurustanor lagi, Hiṭṭi oḳlor at tone Ibrahimor ato ailo.

24.1: Ibrahim i shomoy kub murobbi ar zaoagir foti oigesoin. Mabude tanre hoḳolbae tone borkot nazil ḳorsla.
24.2: Ar tan ḳas gulam, baṛir furan ze gulamor ufre tan hoḳoltar bar deoa asil tare ḳoila, “Tumar atḳan amar urator tole harao.
24.3: Ami tumare asman-zominor malik Alla Mabudor name ḳosom ḳoraiar, ami ze Kenani oḳlor maze takiar, tarar kunu fuṛire amar fuar bou banaia tumi anio na.
24.4: Tumi amar desho gia, amar fua Isʼhakor lagi amar ḳesh-kuṭumor maz taki egu ḳoina saia anbae.”
24.5: Ou hi gulame tanre ḳoila, “Zudi kunu fuṛie amar loge i desho aite razi na oin, taile ze desh saṛia afne aisoin, afnar fuare ami hono loia zaitam ni?”
24.6: Tain ḳoila, “Ḳobordar! Tumi amar fuare kunumonte-u hino loia zaio na.
24.7: Ze asmani Alla Mabude amare, amar bafor baṛi ar zonom maṭi tone bar ḳoria anchoin, tain amar loge bat-soal ḳori kosom ḳoria ḳoisoin, i deshḳan tain amar oarish oḳolre diba. Tain tumar age-u tan firistare hono faṭaiba, zate amar fuar lagi tumi hon tone egu ḳoina antae faro.
24.8: Zudi kunu fuṛie tumar loge aite razi na oy, te amar i kosom taki tumi kalas; ta-o amar fuare tumi kunu laḳan-u hino loia zaio na.”
24.9: Ou hi gulame tan munib Ibrahimor urator tole at haraia oula ḳosom ḳorla.
24.10: Bade hou gulame tan munibor uṭor fal taki doshṭa uṭ loila. Ar munibor bala bala zinish oḳol loia, Oram-Nohoroyim deshor zeno Nahur taḳta hobaedi roana oila.
24.11: Ar hainja bala zebla beṭinte fani anat bar oin, ou shomoy hi gulame ṭaunor bare ek kuar ḳasat tan uṭ oḳolre toila.
24.12: Toia ou dua ḳorla, “O Mabud, amar munib Ibrahimor Alla, aroz ḳori, aiz amar samne kamiabi zair ḳoro, ar amar munib Ibrahimre meherbani koro.
24.13: Deḳo, i ṭaunor fuṛinte fani neoat aira ar ami ino kuar ḳasat ubai roisi.
24.14: Te ou fuṛintor maze ami zare ḳoimu, ‘Afnar ḳoyla lamaia amare tuṛa fani kaoaukka’, er zuafe zudi hou fuṛie ḳoin, ‘Afne fani kaukka ar afnar uṭ oḳolre-o ami fani kaoaimu’ taile ou fuṛi-u zanu tumar gulam Isʼhakor lagi tumar fosondor fuṛi oin. Teu ami buzmu, tumi amar munibre meherbani korlae.”
24.15: Tan dua shesh na oite-u Botuelor fuṛi Rebekae ḳaḳo ḳoyla loia ṭaun taki bar oia aila. Ou Botuel oila Ibrahimor bai Nahuror bibi Milkar fua.
24.16: Rebeka asla kub shundori, abiati, shoti nari. Tain kua taki koyla boria zebla uṭia aira,
24.17: ou shomoy-u Ibrahimor gulame douṛaia tan gese gia ḳoila, “Doya ḳori afnar ḳoyla taki amare tuṛa fani kaoaukka.”
24.18: Rebekae ḳoila, “Huzur, fani kaukka.” Ou ḳota ḳoia-u tain zoldi kori koylaṭa ḳaḳo tone ato ania fani kaite dila.
24.19: Fani kaoaibar bade Rebekae tanre ḳoila, “Ami afnar uṭ oḳolre-o tarar fias miṭaia fani kaoaimu, tara feṭ boria fani kaiba.”
24.20: Ḳoia-u tain zoldi kori fanir gamlat ḳoylar fani ḍalia hirbar douṛaia kuar gese gela. Ar hoḳol uṭre fani tuli dila.
24.21: Mabude tan i sofor kamiab ḳorsoin ki na iṭa zanar lagi hi gulame nirobe Rebekar bae sai roila.
24.22: Uṭ oḳole fani kaia harle, tain ada tolar eḳṭa shunar naḳor not ar dui ato dosh tolar duiṭa shunar bala Rebekare dia zikaila,
24.23: “Afnar babar nam kita? Afne ḳoukka sain, afnar bafor baṛit amrar rait taḳar zaga oibo ni?”
24.24: Rebekae ḳoila, “Amar babar nam Botuel. Dadar nam Nahur ar dadir nam Milka.
24.25: Te afnar uṭor ḳanir lagi amrar baṛit bout ḳer-busi ase ar roibar zaga-o ase.”
24.26: Ou hi gulame Mabudor soizda ḳoria ḳoila,
24.27: “Hokkol proshongsha Mabudor, zein amar munib Ibrahimor Alla. Tain amar malikre tan deoa oada raḳte ar imandari deḳaite faurisoin na. Tain amare-o fot sinaia amar munibor kuṭmor baṛit loia aisoin.”
24.28: Rebekae douṛaia gia tan maʼr baṛir hoḳolre ita zanaila.
24.29: Rebekar eḳ bair nam asil Labon. Ou Labone douṛaia kuar ḳasat aila enre deḳta ḳori.
24.30: Bonir ator bala ar naḳor not dekia, ar hi manshe zeta ḳoise ita hunia, tain aia deḳla, manushṭa kuar ḳandat tar uṭor gese ubai roise.
24.31: Labone tanre ḳoila, “O Mabudor rohomotor manush, aukka. Bare ubai roisoin ḳene? Ami afnarar lagi gor, ar uṭor lagi zaga zuit ḳoria aisi.”
24.32: Ou hi gulame tarar baṛit gia uṭ oḳlor gaiṭ lamaite-u, Labone ḳer ar busi ania dila. Tane ar tan logor hoḳolre at-fao doar fani-o dila.
24.33: Bade tan samne ḳani deoa oilo, teu tain ḳoila, “Ami kitar lagi ino aisi, ita na hunaia ḳani kaitam nae.” Labone ḳoila, “Te ḳoilaukka.”
24.35: Amar malikre Mabude bout borkot nazil ḳorsoin, aiz tain bout doni-mani. Mabude tanre bout goru-meṛa, uṭ-gada, shuna-rufa, ar bandi-gulam disoin.
24.36: Tan bibi Sayrar murobbi boyosho munibor eḳzon fua oisoin, ar ou fuare-u tain, tan hoḳolta dilaisoin.
24.37: Tain amare ḳosom ḳoraia ḳoisoin zen, tain ze desho boshot ḳorra, hi Kenan deshor kunu fuṛire zate tan fuar bou na banai.
24.38: Er bodla tan bafor ar tan ḳandanor baṛit gia tan fuar lagi eḳzon ḳoina saia nei.
24.39: Ou ami amar munibre ḳoilam, ‘Zudi kunu fuṛi amar loge aite razi na oin?’
24.40: Tain ḳoila, ‘Mabud, zanre ami kezmot ḳori, tain-u tan firistare faṭai diba, zate tumar sofor kamiab oy. Ar tumi amar nizor bongsho ar amar bafor ḳandan tone, egu fuṛire amar fuar lagi saia anbae.
24.41: Tarar hino gele zudi tara kunu fuṛire na dein, taile tumi amar i kosom taki kalas faibae.’
24.42: “Ou aiz ami kuar gese aia dua ḳorlam, ‘O Mabud, amar munib Ibrahimor Alla, tumi zudi amar i sofor kamiab ḳoro taile,
24.43: deḳo, ami ou bora kuar gese ubai roisi, ar kunu fuṛie ono fani neoat aile ami koimu, ḳoyla taki amare tuṛa fani kaoao.
24.44: Ar zudi tai koy, ‘Tumi-o fani kao ar tumar uṭ oḳolre-o ami fani tulia dimu’, taile ou fuṛi-u zanu amar munibor fuar lagi tumar fosond ḳora fuṛi oy.’
24.45: “Amar dua shesh na oite-u deki, Rebekae ḳoyla ḳaḳo loia kuat aira fani tulta. Fani tular bade ami koilam, ‘Doya ḳoria amare tuṛa fani kaoaukka.’
24.46: Tain zoldi kori kaḳo tone ḳoyla lamaia amare ḳoila, ‘Ou nein, fani kain. Ami afnar uṭ oḳolre-o fani kaoaimu.’ Teu ami fani kailam, ar tain amar uṭ oḳolre-o fani kaoaila.
24.47: Bade ami tane zikailam, ‘Afne ḳar fuṛi?’ Tain ḳoila, ‘Ami Botuelor fuṛi, amar dadar nam Nahur ar dadir nam Milka.’ Ou ami tan naḳo not ar ato bala findaia dilam.
24.48: Bade ami Mabudor soizda ḳorlam. Ar zein amar munib Ibrahimor Alla, hou Mabudor shukur adae ḳorlam, tain-u amare ṭik fote salaia anchoin zate ami amar munibor batizire, tan fuar lagi tukaia fai.
24.49: Teu oḳon afnara amar munibor bae dorod ar insaf ḳorba ni, ḳoukka. Zudi na ḳoroin ta-o ḳoukka, zate ami ḍaine-baue zaitam fari.”
24.50: Ou Labon ar Botuele ḳoila, “Goṭona to Mabud taki-u oise. Oḳon amrar bala-bura matar kunta-u nae.
24.51: Ou deḳoukka, Rebeka to ono ase, te Mabudor hukum moto afnar munibor fuar bou banaibar lagi ere loia zaita farba.”
24.52: I mat hunia Ibrahimor gulame Mabudor soizda ḳorla.
24.53: Erbade tain shuna-rufar goyna-gaṭi ar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ bar ḳoria Rebekare dila, er loge Rebekar ma-baire-o bout dami dami ufohar dila.
24.54: Bade tain ar tan logor hoḳole ḳaoa-daoa shesh ḳoria hoḳano-u rait ḳaṭaila. Biane gum taki uṭia tain ḳoila, “Amar munibor gese zaoar lagi amare bidae dilaukka.”
24.55: Teu Rebekar ma ar baie ḳoila, “Fuṛigu aro doshḳan din amrar gese taḳouk, bade zaibone.”
24.56: Ou hi gulame tarare ḳoila, “Mabude zebla amar i sofor kamiab ḳorsoin, taile amare deri na ḳoraia bidae dilaukka, amar munibor gese zaigi.”
24.57: Era ḳoila, “Amra taile fuṛire samne ania zikailai.”
24.58: Ar Rebekare ḍakia ania zikaila, “Tumi kita tan loge zaibae ni go?” Tain ḳoila, “Aichcha, zaimune.”
24.59: Ou tara Ibrahimor gulam ar tan logor manshor loge tarar boin ar tan bandi beṭire bidae dila.
24.60: Ar Rebekare dua ḳoria ḳoila, “Boin go, tumi laḳ laḳ aolador ma o. Tumar aolade dushmon oḳolre gail ḳorouk.”
24.61: Rebeka ar tan bandi oḳole toiar oia uṭor ufre soṛia, Ibrahimor gulamor ḳore oia roana dila. Ou laḳan hou gulame Rebekare loia bar oila.
24.62: Isʼhak i shomoy Negebo taḳta. Tain Ber-Lohoy-Rui namor zaga tone firot aila.
24.63: Eḳdin biali bala tain bondedi aṭat bar oila. Aḳta-u souk tulia saia deḳla, ḳoyṭa uṭ aira.
24.64: Rebekae-o duroi tone Isʼhakre dekia-u uṭor ufor taki lami gela.
24.65: Ar hou gulamre zikaila, “Ou zein bondor mazedi amrar bae aira, ein ḳe?” Gulame ḳoila, “Ein to amar munib.” Ou Rebekae burkar forda lamai dila.
24.66: Ar hi gulame zeta zeta ḳoria aisoin, hoḳolta Isʼhakre zanaila.
24.67: Isʼhake tan ma Bibi Sayrar tambut Rebekare loia gia tane bia ḳorla. Ar tanre maya ḳorla. Tan maʼr moutor bade, Rebekar mayae-u tan zano shanti faisla.

25.1: Ibrahime Katura namor aro eḳzon beṭire bia ḳorsla.
25.2: Tan feṭo Zimron, Zokshon, Modan, Madian, Zishboḳ ar Shuhar zonom oisil.
25.3: Shaba ar Dodan oila Zokshonor aolad. Ashuri, Loṭushi, Liummi oḳol oila Dodanor aolad.
25.4: Madianor aolad oila Oifa, Efor, Honuk, Obid ar Ildaya. Era hoḳol-u Katurar aolad.
25.6: Oile tain zinda taḳte-u, tan heshor biar aolad oḳolre-o alga alga dan ḳoria, erare Isʼhakor loge na rakia fubedi, fubor desho faṭai dila. Hozrot Ibrahim (a:)or inteḳal ar ḳoybor
25.7: Ibrahim eḳ-sho fosottoir boros basila, Allae tane otodinor hayati disla.
25.8: Tain murobbi oia furafur buṛa boyosho inteḳal ḳorla, ar tan baf-dadar gese gia azila.
25.9: Heshe tan fua Ismail ar Isʼhake Momri ṭaunor fubedi, Hiṭṭi Shuhoror fua Ifrunor zomir Moḳfela-guhat, tanre dafon ḳorla.
25.10: I zomiḳan tain Hiṭṭi oḳlor ges tone loisla. Ono-u tan bibi Sayrare ar tane dafon ḳora oise.
25.11: Ibrahimor moutor bade Allae tan fua Isʼhakre borkot nazil ḳorla. Tain Ber-Lohoy-Ruir gese roita. Hozrot Ismail (a:)or inteḳal ar ḳandan
25.12: Ou oilo Ismailor ḳandanor boyan. Bibi Sayrar bandi Mishori Hazerar feṭo Ibrahimor fua Ismailor zonom oisil.
25.13: Ou oilo Ismailor aolador nam ar gusṭir boyan. Tan boṛo fuar nam Nabaut, bade Ḳaedar, Odbel, Mibsom,
25.15: Hodod, Tema, Ziṭur, Nafish ar Ḳedoma.
25.16: Ismailor ou barozon fua asla baro gusṭir shordar. Tarar namor laḳan hi gau ar tambu bisail zagar-o ou nam oisil.
25.17: Ismailor hayat eḳ-sho shaṛtish boros asil, heshe tain mara gela ar tan baf-dadar gese gelagi.
25.18: Hobila tone Ashiriar bae Mishoror samnor Shur forzonto tan aolad oḳol roita. Ismaile tan hoḳol baiaintor galabae roar zaga faila. Hozrot Isʼhak (a:) ar tan bai Shek Ish
25.19: Ou oilo Ibrahimor fua Isʼhakor ḳandan-nama. Ibrahimor goro Isʼhakor zonom oilo.
25.20: Isʼhake sallish boros boyosho tan mamur goror boin Rebekare anaia bia ḳorla. Rebeka oila Foddon-Iram deshor Orami Botuelor fuṛi, Orami Labonor boin.
25.21: Tan bou niaoladi asla gotike, Isʼhake Mabudor gese dua ḳorla. Mabude tan dua kobul ḳorla, ar Rebekar feṭo hurutta ailo.
25.22: Bade feṭor bitre huruttae loṛa-soṛa ḳorat lagla. Ou tain ḳoila, “Amar feṭo ila lager ḳene?” Ḳaron zanar lagi tain Mabudor gese dua ḳorla.
25.23: Mabude tanre ḳoila, “Tumar feṭo duiṭa zati ase, feṭo tone-u tara dui bongsho oia foyda oiba. Eḳ bongsho tone aroḳ bongsho shoktiala oibo, ar boṛogue hurugur kezmot ḳorbo.”
25.24: Hurutta foydar bala deḳoin, hasau tan feṭo zuṛor fua.
25.25: Foyla zar zonom oilo he lal rongor ar tar shorilo foshomi kafṛor laḳan rumae bora. Tar nam raḳla Ish [mani, ruma-ala].
25.26: Bade Ishʼor faor murat dori tar bair zonom oilo, er nam raḳla Iakub [mani, faot dorra]. Isʼhakor shaiṭ boros boyosho era zuṛe foyda oila.
25.27: Ou fuain boṛo oar bade Ish kub bala shikari ar morubumit faḳaora oila, oile Iakub asla nirai-zirai, tain tambut taḳta.
25.28: Shikaror gust moza lagto ḳori Isʼhake Ishʼre maya ḳorta, ar Rebekae Iakubre maya ḳorta.
25.29: Eḳdin Iakube ḍail randisoin, ou shomoy tan boṛo bai Ish morubumi taki feṭor buke kub ḳator oia aila, aia huru bai Iakubre ḳoila,
25.30: “Baire, amar kub buk lagse. Te ou rongil, rongil ota amare feṭ bori kaite de.” Ou ḳotar lagi tan siṛ laglo Idum [mani, rongil].
25.31: Iakube ḳoila, “Taile boṛo bai oar malikana, tumi aiz amar gese besilao.”
25.32: Ishe ḳoila, “Deḳo, amar zan bar oizar, ar boṛo bair malikanadi ar kita ḳortam?”
25.33: Iakube ḳoila, “Age tumi amar gese ḳosom ḳoro.” Ou Ishe ḳosom ḳoria boṛo bai oar malikana Iakubor gese besilaila.
25.34: Bade Iakube Ishʼre ḍail ar ruṭi kaite dila. Ḳaoa-daoa ḳoria tain uṭia gelagi. Ou laḳan Ishe boṛo fua oar kunu dam-u raḳla na.

26.1: Ibrahimor zomanar laḳan ifira-o desho hirbar eḳ nidan deḳa dilo. Teu Isʼhak Gerar ṭauno Filistini oḳlor bashsha Abimalikor gese gelagi.
26.2: Ar Mabude Isʼhakre didar dia ḳoila, “Tumi Mishoro lamia zaio na. Ami tumare ze deshor ḳota ḳoimu, ono-u takio.
26.3: Ou desho tumi musafir oia ro. Ami tumar loge roia, tumare borkot nazil ḳormu. I desh oḳol ami tumare ar tumar oarish oḳolre dimu. Ar tumar baf Ibrahimor gese ami ze ḳosom ḳorslam, oḳṭa fura ḳormu.
26.4: Ami tumar oarish oḳolre asmanor terar laḳan behishab ḳormu, ou desh oḳol-o tarare dimu. Tumar oarishredi, duniair hoḳol zatie borkot faiba.
26.5: Ibrahime amar mat hunia, amar hukum, amar ain ar amar shoriot oḳol amol ḳorse.”
26.7: Ar hinor manshe tan bour ḳota zikaile, tain ḳoila ein amar boin. Enre bou ḳoite tain ḍoraila, mone ḳorla, Rebeka shundori koria hinor manshe Rebekare neoar lagi tanre kun ḳoriliba.
26.8: Isʼhak bout din hono roar bade eḳdin Filistini oḳlor bashsha Abimalike tan kiṛki baedi saia deḳla, Isʼhake tan bibi Rebekare maya ḳorra.
26.9: Dekia tain Isʼhakre neoaia ḳoila, “Deḳoukka, Rebeka to ashole afnar bibi, te afne ḳene tanre afnar boin ḳoila?” Isʼhake zuaf dila, “Ami mone ḳorslam tair lagi amar zan araimu.”
