26.10: Teu Abimalike ḳoila, “Amrar loge afne ita kita bebohar ḳorla? Zekunu manshe to afnar bibir loge mila-misha ḳorto sailo one ar afne amrare dushi banaila one.”
26.11: Bade Abimalike hoḳol manshore ou hukum zari korla, ḳeu zudi Isʼhak ba tan bibir shorilo at dey, tare nisoy zane mara oibo.
26.12: Ar Isʼhake hi boros ḳet ḳoria tan zomino rua bis taki eḳ-sho gun beshi foshol faila, Mabude tanre oula borkot nazil ḳorla.
26.13: Tan ḳali baṛte-u laglo, aste aste tain kub maldar oigela.
26.14: Tan goru-sagol ar gulam-bandi oula baṛlo zen, ita dekia Filistini oḳole ingshaita lagla.
26.15: Ar tan baf Ibrahimor amolo, tan gulam oḳole ze kua oḳol kudisla, Filistini oḳole iguin maṭidi boria bond ḳorilaisla.
26.16: Bade Abimalike Isʼhakre ḳoila, “Afne amrar ges tone zaukkagi, afne to amra tone beshi shoktiala oigesoin.”
26.17: Ou Isʼhake hon tone horia gia Gerar mora gangor soro tambu gaṛia roila.
26.18: Ar tan baf Ibrahimor amolor kuda kuain, tain hirbar kudila, ḳaron Ibrahimor moutor bade Filistini oḳole ita borilaisla. Ar tan bafe ou kuaintor ze nam raḳsla, tain-o ou nam raḳla.
26.19: Isʼhakor gulam oḳole ou gangor soro kudia fanir futala ek kua faila.
26.20: Ar Geraror raḳal oḳole tan raḳal oḳlor loge dorbar ḳoria ḳoilo, i fani amrar. Ou tain i kuar nam raḳla Eshok [mani, dorbar].
26.21: Bade Isʼhakor raḳal oḳole aro ek kua kudila, ar iṭa loia-o tara dorbar ḳorla. Ou tain iṭar nam raḳla Siṭna [mani, dushmoni].
26.22: Heshe tain hon tone horia gia aro ek kua kudaila, ifira tara ar kunu dorbar ḳorla na. Teu Isʼhake ou kuar nam raḳla Rohobot [mani, bout zaga]. Tain ḳoila, “Oḳon Mabude-u amrare bout zaga dila, amra i desho aro baṛtam farmu.”
26.23: Bade Isʼhake hon tone horia Ber-Shebat gelagi.
26.24: Hou rait-u Mabude tanre didar dia ḳoila, “Ami tumar baf Ibrahimor Alla. Tumi ḍoraio na, amar gulam Ibrahimor ḳatire ami tumar loge asi. Ami tumare borkot nazil ḳormu ar tumar bongsho baṛaimu.”
26.25: Ou Isʼhake hono ekkan kurbani kana banaia Mabudor nam loila. Hono tain tan tambu gaṛila ar tan gulam oḳole ek kua kudila.
26.26: Bade Abimalike tan uzir Ohuzot ar shenapoti Fikulre loia Gerar taki Isʼhakor gese aila.
26.27: Isʼhake erare ḳoila, “Afnara amar gese kitar lagi aila? Afnara to ingsha ḳoria amare afnarar ges tone ḳedai dilaisoin.”
26.28: Tara ḳoila, “Amra oḳon saf buziar zen, Mabud afnar loge asoin. Erlagi afnar loge amrar egu oada oizauk. Aukka, amra eḳ chukti korilai.
26.29: Amra zela afnare soisi na ar afnar balai saṛa kunu ḳeti korsi na, zela afnare shantie bidae disi, oula afne-o amrare ḳeti korta na. Afne-u to Mabudor borkotor manush.”
26.30: Bade Isʼhake tarar lagi kana-dana zuit ḳorle, tara ḳana-dana ḳorla.
26.31: Bador din biane uṭia tara duiozone ḳosom ḳorla. Ar Isʼhake tarare bidae dile, tara dilor maze shanti faia roana oila.
26.32: Hou din-u tan gulam oḳole aia tarar kuda ek kuar ḳobor zanaila, tara fanir lagal faisoin.
26.33: Ou tain er nam dila Sheba [mani, ḳosom]. Erlagi aiz-o hinor nam Ber-Sheba roise.
26.34: Ishe sallish boros boyosho Hiṭṭi Berir fuṛi Zihudit ar Hiṭṭi Elonor fuṛi Bashomotre shadi korla.
26.35: I duio beṭie Isʼhak ar Rebekar zanor maze kub duk dila.

27.1: Murobbi boyosho Isʼhakor souḳor zuti komi zaoae tain ar souke deḳta na. Tain tan boṛo fua Ishʼre anaia ḳoila, “Babare.” Ishe zuaf dila, “Ounu ami.”
27.2: Tain ḳoila, “Deḳo, ami to buṛa oigesi, kundin morizimu ḳoitam fariar na.
27.3: Tumi egu ḳam ḳoro; tumar atiar, tir-donuk loia zongolo shikaro zao, ar amar lagi kunta shikar ḳoria,
27.4: amar fosondor bala ḳani toiar ḳori ano, teu morar age ita ḳaia amar zane tumare dua dibo.”
27.5: Isʼhake zebla tan fua Ishʼor loge ita matira, i shomoy Rebekae ita hunchila. Teu Ish zebla shikaro gelagi,
27.6: tain aia tan fua Iakubre ḳoila, “Huno, ami hunlam tumar bafe tumar bai Ishʼre ḳoira,
27.7: ‘Tumi amar lagi kunta shikar ḳori bala ḳani toiar ḳoro, teu ami morar age ota ḳaia, Mabudor samne tumare dua dimu.’
27.8: Te re fut, ami tumare oḳon zeta ḳortae ḳoimu, tumi oula hunio.
27.9: Tumi gia fal taki duiṭa taza ḳoshi ano. Ami itadi tumar bafor shoḳor ḳani, asanoḳ moza ḳori randia dei.
27.10: Teu tumi ota loia tumar bafor gese zaio, tain ita ḳaia morar age tumare dua ḳorba.”
27.11: Iakube tan maʼre ḳoila, “Huno, amar bai Ishʼor shoril to ruma-ala, amar shorilo to ruma nae.
27.12: Zudi babae amar shorilo atain, te mono ḳorba ami tane duka diar, taile ami duar bodla aro lannot ḍakia anmu.”
27.13: Teu tan maʼe ḳoila, “Futre, tumar i lannot amar ufre-u foṛouk. Tumi kali amar matḳan huno ar ḳoshiguin ania deo.”
27.14: Ou Iakube gia ḳoshi ania tan maʼre dila. Ar tan bafe zela shok koroin, tain oula moza ḳori randila.
27.15: Bade tain goror maze toa boṛo fua Ishʼor bala bala ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ ania tan huru fua Iakubre findaila.
27.16: Iakubor ato ar golat ze zagat ruma nae, hou zagat ou ḳoshir samṛa lagai dila.
27.17: Ar nizor randa hou mozar ḳani ar ruṭi tan fua Iakubor ato dila.
27.18: Iakube tan bafor gese gia ḍaḳ dila, “Baba.” Isʼhake zuaf dila, “Ounu ami, tumi ke re fut?”
27.19: Iakube tan bafre ḳoila, “Ami afnar boṛo fua Ish. Afne amare zela ḳoisla, ami oula ḳorsi. Doya ḳori uṭia boukka, amar shikaror gust ḳaukka, ḳaia harle afne amare dua diba.”
27.20: Isʼhake tan fuare ḳoila, “Babare, tumi oto zoldi shikar failae kila?” Tain ḳoila, “Afnar Mabud Allae milai disoin.”
27.21: Ou Isʼhake Iakubre ḳoila, “Baba, amar ḳasat ao teu tumar gotro at dia buzmu, tumi hasau amar fua Ish ni.”
27.22: Iakub tan baf Isʼhakor aro ḳasat gela. Tain shorilo ataia ḳoila, “Golar aoazṭa Iakubor, oile at duioḳan to Ishʼor.”
27.23: Iakubor at tan bai Ishʼor moto rume bora asil ḳori Isʼhake tanre sinla na. Ou tain Iakubre dua dila.
27.24: Tain zikaila, “Tumi kita hasau amar fua Ish ni?” Iakube ḳoila, “Ji oy baba.”
27.25: Ou Isʼhake ḳoila, “Fuar shikaror gust amar gese ano, ita ḳaia harle amar zane tumare dua dibo.” Iakube gust loia aile tain ḳaila. Bade tanre anguror shorbot dile tain eota ḳaila.
27.26: Heshe tan bafe ḳoila, “O fut ao, ḳasat aia amare hunga deo.”
27.27: Ou Iakube ḳasat gia hunga dila, ar Isʼhake tan shorilor ḳafoṛor geran hungia tanre dua dila, “Deḳo, amar fuar geran to Mabudor borkoti ketor geranor laḳan.
27.28: Allae asmanor kua tone ar roshail zomin tone tumare deukka; bout foshol ar anguror shorbot tumare deukka.
27.29: Hoḳol manush tumar gulam ouk, hoḳol zatie tumar gese mata nuauk. Nizor zator maze tumi boṛo murobbi o, tumar maʼr feṭor baiainte tumar gese mata nuauk. Ze tumare lannot dibo, tar ufre lannot foṛouk. Ze tumare dua ḳorbo, he rohomoti ouk.” Baf taki faona dua Shek Ishe araila
27.30: Isʼhake Iakubre dua ḳora shesh oile, Iakub tan baf Isʼhakor samne tone horte-u, tan bai Ishe shikar loia goro aila.
27.31: Tain-o bala ḳani toiar ḳoria bafor gese loia aia ḳoila, “Baba, uṭia boia afnar fuar shikaror gust ḳaukka, ḳaia harle afnar zane amare dua diba.”
27.32: Ou tan bafe ḳoila, “Tumi ke?” Tain ḳoila, “Baba, ami to afnar boṛo fua Ish.”
27.33: Ar Isʼhakor shorilo bezuita ḳafa shuru oilo. Ḳafi kafi tain ḳoila, “Taile amar gese shikaror gust loia ze aisil, igu ḳe? Tumi aibar age-u ami ota ḳaia tare dua disi, ar duar fol he-u faibo.”
27.34: Bafor mat hunia-u Ishe ekebare buk bangia sillaia tan bafre ḳoila, “Bazan, amare, amare-o dua ḳoro!”
27.35: Isʼhake ḳoila, “Tumar baie aia soturi koria tumar faona dua nisegi.”
27.36: Ishe ḳoila, “Tar nam Iakub [mani, dukabaz] nae ni? Hasau he duibar amare duka dise. Boṛo fua hishabe amar malikana he age suri kori nisil, ar deḳoukka, ifira amar dua-o loia gelogi.” Tain firia ḳoila, “Afne amar lagi kunu dua-u raḳsoin na ni?”
27.37: Isʼhake zuaf dila, “Huno, ami tare tumar neta banaisi, ar tar gusṭire tar gulam banaisi, tare foshol ar anguror shorbot dia samani korsi; oḳon tumar lagi ar kita ḳortamre fut?”
27.38: Ishe firia tan bafre ḳoila, “O bazan, afnar gese kita ou eḳ dua-u asil ni? Bazan reba, afne amare, amare-o dua ḳoroukka!” Ota ḳoia tain zure zure sillaia ḳandat lagla.
27.39: Ou tan baf Isʼhake ḳoila, “Tumar boshotḳanar maṭi nirosh oibo, hino asmanor kua-o foṛto nae.
27.40: Toluar-u tumar zindegi oibo, ar nizor bair gulam oibae; oile zebla tumi na-manra oizibae, ou shomoy nizor gordona taki tar zual horaibae.” Hozrot Iakub (a:) Shek Ishʼor ges tone bagila
27.41: Iakube tan bafor ges tone dua faisla ḳori Ishe tanre ingshaita lagla. Ishe mone mone ḳoila, “Amar bafor lagi moutor ḳandonor din aichche. Erbade-u tare kun ḳormu.”
27.42: Rebekae tan boṛo fua Ishʼor ita mata-mati hunla, teu huru fua Iakubre anaia ḳoila, “Huno, tumar bai Ishe tumare kun ḳorar niote dilre bandilaise.
27.43: Amar fut, tumi amar matḳan huno, tumi Haran ṭauno amar bai Labonor gese horia zaogi,
27.44: ar tumar bair gusa na ḳoma forzonto tan gese taḳo.
27.45: Tar gusa ḳomigele, tumi tar loge zeta ḳorso ita he faurilile, ami kobriadi tumare anaimu. Kitallagi ami eḳdine tumra duiozonre araitam?”
27.46: Bade Rebekae Isʼhakre ḳoila, “Ou Hiṭṭi fuṛintor lagi amar ar basar shad nai. Iakube-o zudi ou laḳan, i deshor kunu Hiṭṭi fuṛire shadi korilae, taile amar ar basia-u lab kita?”

28.1: Rebekar mat hunia Isʼhake, Iakubre anaia dua ḳorla ar ou hukum dila, “Tumi Kenan deshor kunu fuṛire bia ḳorio na.
28.2: Tumi Foddon-Iram desho tumar nana Botuelor baṛit zaogi, hono tumar mamu Labonor kunu fuṛire bia ḳorio.
28.3: Shorbo-shoktiman Allae tumare borkot nazil ḳoroukka ar foldar ḳoria bout baṛaukka, zate ḳori tumi bout gusṭiala zati o.
28.4: Ze borkot tain Ibrahimre nazil ḳorsla, hou borkot tain tumare ar tumar bongshore dan ḳoroukka. Ar ze desh Allae Ibrahimre disoin, zeḳano tumi oḳon musafir aso, i deshḳan zanu tumar oy.”
28.5: Bade Isʼhake Iakubre bidae dila, ar tain Foddon-Iramo Orami Botuelor fua Labonor gese roana oila. Labon oila Rebekar bai, Iakub ar Ishʼor mamu. Hozrot Ismail (a:)or fuṛir loge Shek Ishʼor bia
28.6: Ishe zebla hunla, Isʼhake Iakubre dua ḳoria bia ḳoranir niote Foddon-Iramo faṭaisoin ar Kenani fuṛintore bia ḳorte nished ḳorsoin,
28.7: ar Iakube tan ma-bafor hukume Foddon-Iramo gesoingi,
28.8: ou Ishe buzla zen, tan baf Isʼhak Kenani beṭintor ufre kushi nae.
28.9: Erlagi dui bou taḳle-o tain Ibrahimor fua Ismailor gese gia tan fuṛi Moholotre bia ḳorla. Moholot oila Nabautor boin. Betelo Hozrot Iakub (a:)or kuab
28.10: Ar Iakube Ber-Sheba saṛia tan mamur baṛi Haran ṭaunor bae roana dila.
28.11: Foto eḳ zagat shuruz ḍubi gele tain hono-u rait ḳaṭaila. Honor fattordi hitan dia Iakube gumaita ḳori hutila.
28.12: Hutia harle kuabe deḳla, duniair ufre ekkan moi ubai roise, i moir mata asmano lagail. Tain deḳla Allar firista oḳole ogubae uṭa-nama ḳorra,
28.13: ar Mabude er ufre ubaia ḳoira, “Ami Mabud, tumar baf-dadain Ibrahimor Alla ar Isʼhakor Alla. Tumi ou ze zomino hutiso, iṭa ami tumare ar tumar oarish oḳolre dimu.
28.14: Tumar oarish oḳol duniair duil-balur laḳan behishab oiba. Ar fube-foisme, utore-douḳne sairobae meliziba. Tumi ar tumar bongshor mazedi duniair hokkol zatie borkot hasil ḳorba.
28.15: Ami tumar loge loge asi, tumi zeno-u zao na ḳene ami tumare hefazot ḳormu ar ou desho hirbar tumare firaia anmu. Ami tumare zeta zeta ḳoisi ita hasil oar age, tumare saṛtam nae.”
28.16: Bade Iakube gum taki uṭia ḳoila, “Taile hasau Mabud ino asoin, ami to zantam na.”
28.17: Ou tain ḍoraia ḳoila, “Kizat gorom i zaga! Ikan nichchoy Allar gor, oḳano-u behestor duar.”
28.18: Tain fozoror shomoy uṭia, ze fattorṭa tan matar tole hitan disla, ikṭa kuṭir moto ḳori gaṛia er ufre tel ḍalila.
28.19: Ar hi zagar nam raḳla Betel [mani, Baytulla], inor agor nam asil Luz.
28.20: Bade Iakube ḳosom ḳaia ḳoila, “Allae zudi amar i soforo hefazot ḳoroin, tain amar ḳani-kuraḳ, findar lebas zugai dein,
28.21: ami hirbar sohi-salamote bafor baṛit firia ai, te ou Mabudre-u amar Alla manmu.
28.22: Ar ou ze fattor ami kuṭi gaṛia toilam, ono Baytulla Shorif oibo. Ar tumi amare zotota dibae, er dosh baṭor eḳ baṭ ami nichchoy tumare dilaimu.”

29.1: Bade Iakube aṭi aṭi fubor deshor manshor elaḳat gelagi.
29.2: Gia honor bondor maze ek kua deḳla. Hou kuar gese tin fal meṛa huti roise; raḳal oḳole on tone tarare fani kaoain. Ar kuar muko boṛo eḳ fattor toa oise.
29.3: Hoḳol meṛar fal zebla ekḳano oito, teu raḳal oḳole kuar muk tone fattorgu horai dia meṛaintore fani kaoaito. Bade fattorre hirbar kuar muko toito.
29.4: Iakube tarare zikaila, “Bai oḳol, afnara kun zagar manush?” Tara ḳoila, “Haran ṭaunor.”
29.5: Ou tain ḳoila, “Afnara Nahuror nati Labonre sinoin ni?” Tara ḳoila, “Ji oy, sini.”
29.6: Iakube zikaila, “Tain bala asoin ni?” Tara ḳoila, “Ji oy, bala asoin. Ounu tan fuṛi Rahelae meṛar fal loia aira.”
29.7: Tain ḳoila, “Deḳoukka, oḳono bout beil ase. Te foshu oḳol ekḳano oibar shomoy to oise na. Afnara meṛaintore fani kaoaia hirbar raḳat loia zaingi.”
29.8: Tara ḳoila, “Na, amra ila ḳortam fari na, hokkol fal ekḳano dola oile bade kuar muk tone fattor horaia amra meṛaintore fani kaoai.”
29.9: Tain oḳono tarar loge mato roisoin, ou shomoy Rahelae tan bafor meṛar fal loia ono aila, tain i falor raḳalit asla.
29.10: Iakube tan mamu Labonor fuṛi Rahelare ar tan meṛar fal dekia-u kuar gese gia kuar muk tone fattorṭa horaia meṛaintore fani kaoaila.
29.11: Bade tain Rahelare maya dia zure zure ḳandita lagla.
29.12: Ar tain Rahelare ḳoila zen, tain Labonor baigna, Rebekar fua. Ou Rahelae douṛaia gia tan bafre i kobor dila.
29.13: Labone tan baigna Iakubor ḳobor hunia douṛaia tan loge deḳa ḳorat aila. Tanre ainja ḳori doria hunga dia baṛit loia gela. Gia harle Iakube Labonre tan aibar hokkolta zanaila.
29.14: Labone ḳoila, “Tumi to amar-u zan ar amar-u gust.” Ar Iakub Labonor baṛit eḳ mash roila. Hozrot Iakub (a:)or dui bia
29.15: Eḳ mash bade Labone Iakubre ḳoila, “Tumi amar kuṭum oilae ḳori bina betone amar saḳri kortae ni ba? Tumare kita ditam, ḳoilao.”
29.16: Labonor duiṭa fuṛi asil. Boṛogur nam Lea ar hurugur nam Rahela.
29.17: Lear ḳali souk-u shundor asil, oile Rahelar goṭon ar sehara-surot, hokkolta shundor asil.
29.18: Iakube Rahelare fosond ḳorta ḳori tain ḳoila, “Afnar huru fuṛi Rahelar lagi ami shat boros afnar gulami kormu.”
29.19: Labone ḳoila, “Rahelare manshor ato deoar saite tumar gese deoa-u bala. Tumi amar gese ro.”
29.20: Teu Iakube Rahelar lagi shat boros gulami korla. Rahelare mohobbot ḳorta ḳori, ita eḳo boros tan gese eḳ dinor homan mono oilo.
29.21: Heshe tain Labonre ḳoila, “Amar gulamir miad furi gese. Oḳon amar boure amar ato shomzaia deukka, ami tair gese roitam sai.”
29.22: Teu Labone hou elaḳar hoḳol manshore biar daot ḳoria ḳana-dana ḳaoaila.
29.23: Heshe rait oile tain tan fuṛi Leare Iakubor gese dila, ar Iakube en loge roila.
29.24: Labone nizor bandi Zilpare, tan fuṛi Lear bandi girit dila.
29.25: Oile biane uṭia deḳoin, ein to Lea. Teu Iakube Labonre ḳoila, “Afne amar loge ita kun zator ḳam ḳorla? Oto din ami Rahelar lagi afnar gulami korsi nae ni? Te amare duka dila ḳene?”
29.26: Labone ḳoila, “Boṛo fuṛir age huru fuṛir bia deoa amrar deshor sol nae.
29.27: Tumi biar kushi-bashir haftaṭa faroite deo. Teu hi fuṛire-o tumar gese bia dimu, oile tumi aro shat boros amar gulami korte oibo.”
29.28: Iakube tan ḳota mania ou kushi-bashir hafta far ḳorla. Bade Labone tan fuṛi Rahelare-o Iakubor gese shadi dila.
29.29: Ar tan bandi Bilhare Rahelar bandigirit dila.
29.30: Iakube Rahelar loge-o roila, tain Lear saite Rahelare beshi maya ḳorta. Bade tain aro shat boros tan mamu Labonor gulami korla.
29.31: Oile Leare maya na ḳorae, Mabude Leare hurutta foydar ḳemota dila, ar Rahela niaoladi roila.
29.32: Ar Lear goro eḳ fua oilo. Tain fuar nam raḳla Ruben [mani, fuare deḳo]. Tain ḳoila, “Mabude amar duk deḳsoin, oḳon nichchoy amar zamaie amare maya ḳorba.”
29.33: Bade hirbar tan goro eḳ fua oilo. Tain fuar nam raḳla Shimion [mani, hunoin], tain ḳoila, “Amare elami korar ḳota Mabude hunchoin, erlagi tain amare ou fua disoin.”
29.34: Bade hirbar tan goro eḳ fua oilo. Tain ḳoila, “Oḳon amar zamaie amar loge ashik oiba, tan tinṭa fua amar feṭ tone foyda oilo.” Ou er nam raḳla Lebi [mani, ashik].
29.35: Bade hirbar tan aro eḳ fua oile tain ḳoila, “Ifira ami Mabudor tarif ḳormu.” Ar tain ou fuar nam raḳla Ehuda [mani, tarif]. Erbade tan hurutta oa bond oigelo.

30.1: Rahelae zebla deḳla, tan goro Iakubor kunu aolad oira na, ou shomoy tan bonir bae ingsha foyda oilo. Tain Iakubre ḳoila, “Amare aolad deo, naile ami morizimu!”
30.2: Teu Rahelar loge Iakube kub gusa ḳoria ḳoila, “Ami kunu Alla ni? Tain-u to tumar feṭ bond ḳori disoin.”
30.3: Rahelae ḳoila, “Hunoukka, amar bandi Bilha ono ase, afne tair gese zaukka, tairedi hurutta faia ami-o hurutta-ala oizitam fari.”
30.4: Oḳan ḳoia hari Rahelae tan bandi Bilhare Iakubor gese hanga dila, ar Iakub tair gese roila.
30.5: Teu Bilhar goro Iakubor eḳ fua oilo.
30.6: Ar Rahelae ḳoila, “Allae amare insaf ḳorsoin, ar amar ahazari hunia egu fua disoin.” Tain i fuar nam raḳla Dan [mani, insaf].
30.7: Bade Rahelar bandi Bilhar goro hirbar Iakubor dusra fua foyda oilo.
30.8: Ar Rahelae ḳoila, “Boinor loge moha laṛait ami zitsi.” Ou tain i fuar nam raḳla Noftali [mani, laṛai].
30.9: Leae zebla deḳla tan goro ar hurutta oira na, teu tain-o tan bandi Zilpare Iakubor gese hanga dila.
30.10: Teu Lear bandi Zilpar feṭo Iakubor eḳ fua oilo.
30.11: Ar Leae ḳoila, “Amar ḳofal kulche!” Tain er nam raḳla Sadu [mani, ḳofal].
30.12: Bade Lear bandi Zilpar goro Iakubor aroḳ fua oilo.
30.13: Ar Leae ḳoila, “Amar ḳoto shuk! Hoḳol beṭinte amare shuki koiba.” Teu tain i fuar nam raḳla Ashir [mani, shuki].
30.14: Gom daoar shomoy Rubene bondo gia kisu dutra-guṭa faia, tan ma Lear gese ania dila. Ar Rahelae Leare ḳoila, “Tumar fuar ḳoygu dutra-guṭa amare deo sain.”
30.15: Leae ḳoila, “Tumi amar zamaire doḳol ḳorso, itae oise na ni? Oḳon amar fuar dutra-guṭa-o sairae ni?” Rahelae ḳoila, “Taile tumar fuar dutora-guṭar bodla aiz rait tain tumar loge roiba ne.”
30.16: Hainja bala Iakube bondo tone aite-u Leae bar oia tane ḳoila, “Aiz amar loge roibae, ḳaron amar fuar dutora-guṭar bodla ami tumare aolat nisi.” Ou hi rait tain Lear goro hutila.
30.17: Allae Lear dua kobul ḳorae, tan goro Iakubor fas nombor fuar zonom oilo.
30.18: Ou Leae ḳoila, “Amar zamair gese amar bandire dislam ḳori, Allae amare er bodla dila.” Erlagi tain i fuar nam raḳla Isaḳor [mani, bodla].
30.19: Bade hirbar Lear goro Iakubor soy nombor fuar zonom oilo.
30.20: Leae ḳoila, “Allae amare bout boṛo eḳ niamot dila. Oḳon amar zamaie amare dam diba, ḳaron ami tan soygu fuar zonom disi.” Tain i fuar nam raḳla Sobulon [mani, dam].
30.21: Heshe Lear eḳ fuṛi oilo, tair nam raḳla Dina.
30.22: Allae Rahelar bae-o kial ḳorla. Tain Rahelar dua kobul ḳoria, tanre hurutta foydar takkot dila.
30.23: Ar Rahelar goro eḳ fua oile tain ḳoila, “Allae amar shorom horaisoin.”
30.24: Tain i fuar nam raḳla Iusuf [mani, baṛani]. Tain ḳoila, “Mabude amare arogu fua baṛai deukka.” Hozrot Iakub (a:)or don-shompod baṛise
30.25: Rahelar goro Iusuf oar bade, Iakube Labonre ḳoila, “Oḳon amare bidae dilaukka, ami nizor deshor baṛit zaigi.
30.26: Afne to zanoin, ami kila afnar gulami korsi, ami amar bouain ar fua-fuṛir lagi afnar gulami korsi. Oḳon tarare loia amare zaite deukka.”
30.27: Labone tanre ḳoila, “Amar lagi zudi tumar maya taḳe, te zaio na. Ami alamote buziar zen, tumar ḳatire Mabude amare-o borkot nazil ḳorsoin.
30.28: Tumar beton tumi nize-u ḳoilao. Ami tumare ola-u dimu.”
30.29: Ou Iakube tanre ḳoila, “Ami kila afnar gulami korsi, ar amar ato afnar foshur fal kilaḳan oise, ita afne-u zanoin.
30.30: Ami aoar age afne gorib asla. Ar oḳon to baṛia boutta oise. Amar ḳarone Mabude afnare bout borkot disoin. Oile amar nizor foribaror lagi kundin ḳamai kortam?”
30.31: Teu Labone ḳoila, “Ami tumare kita ditam?” Iakube ḳoila, “Afne amare kunta-u na dia zudi amar egu mat raḳoin, te ami hirbar afnar foshur falor kezmot ḳormu.
30.32: Ami aiz afnar foshur falor maze gia, fuṭa fuṭa dagala ar ḳala ar sitra meṛain ar sagolor maze sitra ar fuṭa fuṭa rongor hokkolṭi amar beton babot nimugi.
30.33: Teu afne zebla-u betonor ḳarone aiba, i shomoy deḳba, amar imandarie amar lagi zuaf dibo. Ar fuṭa fuṭa dagala ar ḳala ar sitra meṛain ar sagolor maze sitra ar fuṭa fuṭa rongorta saṛa ar kunta faile mono ḳorba, ami suri korsi.”
30.34: Ou Labone ḳoila, “Aichcha, tumar ḳota-u ṭik taḳouk.”
30.35: Labone hou din-u fal taki lamba dagala ar sitra sagol, fuṭa fuṭa dag ar sitra tuṛa tuṛa dola sagin ar ḳala meṛa oḳol algaia nizor fuaintor gese dilaila.
30.36: Dia tain Iakubor ges taki tin dinor fot duroi horia gelagi ar Iakube Labonor baki fal oḳolre raḳat roila.
30.37: Iakube libni, lauz ar armun gasor ḳasa ḍal ḳaṭia ufre taki baḳol falaia ḍalor maze lamba lamba dola dag dila.
30.38: Sagolor fale aia zeḳano fani kain, tain ou baḳol falail dagala ḍal oḳol, hono fanir gamlar samne toila. Ar fani kaoar shomoy era fal ḳaito.
30.39: Teu ou ḍalor gese aia fal ḳaoae tarar baichchain-o sitra, lamba dagala ar fuṭa fuṭa rongor oita.
30.40: Bade tain ou baichchain algaita, ar Labonor ḍura-ala ar ḳala meṛaintor bae meṛintor souk raḳaita. Ou laḳan tain, tan nizor falre Labonor falor loge milaita na.
30.41: Ar zurala meṛi-saginte fal ḳaoar shomoy, tain gamlat tarar souḳor samne ou ḍal oḳol toita,
30.42: oile ḳomzur foshur samne i ḍalain toita na. Teu Labonor foshuin oita ḳomzur, ar Iakubor foshuin oita zurala.
30.43: Ou laḳan ḳam ḳoria tain bout doni oila. Tan gulam-bandi, uṭ-gada ar foshur fal bout baṛigelo.

31.1: Bade Iakubor ḳano ailo Labonor fuainte matira zen, “Iakube amrar bafor hokkolta nisegi, ar amrar bafor mal dia-u he maldar oigese.”
31.2: Ar Iakube-o kial ḳorla, tanbaedi Labonor agor hi monor bab ar nae.
31.3: Mabude Iakubre ḳoila, tumi tumar baf-dadar desho nizor manshor gese firia zaogi. Ami tumar loge taḳmu.
31.4: Ou Iakube ḳobria faṭaia Lea ar Rahelare bondo tan foshur falor gese anaia ḳoila,
31.5: “Ami tumartanor bafor muk dekia buziar, tan agor hi monor bab amar bae nae, oile amar bafor Mabud Alla amar loge loge roisoin.
31.6: Tumitain to zano zen, ami amar hoḳol shokti dia-u tan ḳoto gulami korsi,
31.7: ta-o tain amare ṭogisoin ar dosh-doshbar ḳoria amar beton bodlaisoin, oile Allae amar kunu ḳeti oite disoin na.
31.8: Tain zebla ḳoila, tumar beton oibo, fuṭa fuṭa rongor foshu, teu falor hoḳol foshue ou laḳan baichcha dilo. Hirbar tain zebla ḳoila, tumar beton oibo ḍura-ala foshu, teu falor hoḳol foshue ḍura-ala baichcha dilo.
31.9: Allae ou laḳan ḳori tan falor foshu ania amare disoin.
31.10: “Eḳbar foshuinte fal ḳaoar shomoy ami kuabe deḳlam, meṛi-sagintor ufre ze faṭa oḳol uṭira, iguin ḍura-ala, sitra ar fuṭa fuṭa rongor.
31.11: Kuabor maze Allar firistae amare ḍakila, ‘Iakub!’ Ami koilam, ‘Ounu ami.’
31.12: Tain ḳoila, ‘Tumi souk tulia deḳo, meṛi-sagintor ufre zeta faṭain uṭira, hokkolṭi ḍura-ala, sitra ar fuṭa fuṭa rongor. Labone tumar loge zeta zeta ḳorse, ita hoḳolta-u ami deḳsi.
31.13: Ami hou Betelor Alla, zeno tumi kuṭir ufre tel ḍalia amar name ḳosom ḳorslae. Oḳon solo, i desh saṛia tumar zonom maṭit firot zao.’ ”
31.14: Ou Lea ar Rahelae ḳoila, “Babar shompottir kunu dabi ar amrar roilo ni?
31.15: Tain to amrare begana manush mono ḳoria, amrare besilaisoin ar amrar hokkolta-u ḳailisoin.
31.16: Erlagi Allae amrar babar samana tone zotota nisoin, i hokkolṭi-u oḳon amrar ar amrar aolador oise. Te Allae tumare zela hukum ḳorsoin, tumi-o oula ḳoro.”
31.17: Bade Iakube tan huruttain ar bibintore uṭor ufre tulia,
31.18: Foddon-Iramo tan ḳamail foshu oḳol ar mal-samana hokkolta loia, Kenan desho tan baf Isʼhakor gese roana dilaila.
31.19: Hou shomoy Labone tan meṛaintor ruma ḳaṭar lagi gesla, ar ou faḳe Rahelae tan bafor murti oḳol suri korilila.
31.20: Iakube tan zaoar ḳota Orami Labonre na zanaia tanre ṭogila.
31.21: Ar tain hokkolta loia bagia, Furat gang faroia Giliodor faṛor samnedi zaoat roila. Houre Hozrot Iakub (a:)re dorat aila
31.22: Zaoar tin din bade Labone hunla zen, Iakub bagia gesoingi.
31.23: Ou tain ḳesh-kuṭumre loia, Iakubor ḳore oia shat dinor fot gia, Giliodor faṛo tarar lagal faila.
31.24: Oile raitor bala Allae kuabe Orami Labonor gese aia ḳoila, “Ḳobordar! Iakubre bala-bura kunta-u ḳoio na.”
31.25: Iakube faṛor maze tambu gaṛisla, ar Labone gia tanre ono-u lagal failila, teu Labon ar tan ḳesh-kuṭum oḳole-o Giliodor hou faṛor maze tambu gaṛila.
31.26: Bade Labone Iakubre ḳoila, “Tumi kene ita ḳorlae? Amare ṭogia amar fuṛintore ḳene zuddor bondir laḳan loia ailae?
31.27: Ḳene tumi duka dia amare na zanaia, lukaia bagia ailae? Amare zanaile to ami kushi-bashi koria, dutara ar mondira bazaia gan gaia, tumare bidae dilam one.
31.28: Tumi amar fuṛintore ar natinoshare-o hunga dite-o dilae na, be-aḳolor moto ḳam ḳorlae.
31.29: Oḳon ami to tumrar ḳeti kortam farmu, oile tumrar baf-dadar Allae goto rait amare ḳoisoin, ‘Ḳobordar! Iakubre bala-bura kunta-u ḳoio na.’
31.30: Tumar bafor baṛit zaoar lagi mone ḳandisil ḳori, tumi bagia aiso manlam, te amar devta oḳol ḳene suri korlae?”
31.31: Iakube zuaf dila, “Ami ḍoraislam, mono ḳorslam, afne zur ḳoria afnar fuṛintore, amar ges tone ḳaṛia raki diba.
31.32: Te oḳon zar gese afnar devtain faiba, tare zita raḳtam nae. Amrar ḳesh-kuṭmor samne hokkolta tallash ḳoria zudi afnar kunta fain, taile neukkagi.” Hou murti oḳol zen Rahelae suri korsoin, ita to Iakube zanoin na.
31.33: Ou Labone Iakub, Lea ar duio bandir tambut hamaia hoḳolta tukaia kunta na faia, heshe Lear tambu tone Rahelar tambut gia hamaila.
31.34: Rahelae i murti oḳol nia uṭor goddir bitre toia, tain ou goddir ufre boila. Labone tan tambur hoḳolta tukaia hono-o ita faila na.
31.35: Ar Rahelae tan bafre ḳoila, “Bazan ami uṭia ubaitam fariar na ḳori afne bezar oin na zen, beṭiara bemaror lagi amar shoril ḳaraf.” Ou Labone hi murti oḳol ar tukaia faila na.
31.36: Heshe Iakube gusa oia Labonre siṛaia ḳoila, “Amar oforad kiano? Ami kita dush ḳorsi, afne amar ḳore oia oula ḳedanit aila?
31.37: Amar hoḳol mal-samana aulaia afnar goror kun zinishḳan faila? Faile ita afnar-amar ḳesh-kuṭmor samne raḳoukka, tara amrar bisar ḳorba.
31.38: Ami i bish boros afnar loge aslam. Er maze afnar kunu meṛi ba sagir feṭor baichcha nosṭo oise na ba afnar falor kunu meṛa-o ami kaisi na.
31.39: Ar zongli zanuare mara kunu foshu-o afnar gese anchi na, ita ami nize-u furia disi. Dino ba rait kunu foshu suri oile, afne amar ges taki boria loisoin.
31.40: Ami oula din ḳaṭaisi, dino zolchi gorome ar raite ḳafsi shite. Amar sokut gum aito na.
31.41: Ze bish boros afnar baṛit roisi, er souddo boros ami afnar dui fuṛir lagi gulami korsi, ar soy boros gese afnar foshur lagi. Er maze afne dosh-doshbar amar beton-o bodlaisoin.
31.42: Alla Pak, zanre amar baf Isʼhake Mabud hishabe ḍoraita, zein amar dada Ibrahimor-o Mabud, tain zudi amar loge na taḳta, te hasau oḳon afne amare ḳali ate bidae dila one. Allae amar menot ar duk deḳsoin. Erlagi-u tain ḳail rait afnare domḳaisoin.” Hozrot Iakub (a:)or loge houror chukti
31.43: Labone Iakubre zuaf dila, “I fuṛin amar-u fuṛin, ar ou huruttain amar-u natinosha, ar i foshur fal oḳol-o amar. Tumi ono zotota deḳrae, hoḳolta-u amar, ta-o amar fuṛintore ba tarar huruttaintore ami ar kita ḳormu?
31.44: Ao, amra duiozone eḳ chukti korilai. Ou chuktir nishanaṭa tumar-amar maze shakki roibo.”
31.45: Ou Iakube eḳ fattor loia kuṭi gaṛila.
31.46: Ar tan ḳesh-kuṭum oḳolre ḳoila, “Afnara-o fattor anoukka.” Teu tara-o fattor ania eḳ biṭa banaila, heshe ou biṭar gese ḳani kaila.
31.47: Labone hou biṭar nam raḳla Zigor-Sahoduta [mani, shakki-biṭa] oile Iakube er nam raḳla Gol-ed.
31.48: Labone ḳoila, “Ou biṭa oḳon tone tumar-amar shakki oilo.” Erlagi ou biṭar nam oilo Gol-ed,
31.49: ar ou kuṭir nam oilo Mispa [mani, faharar zaga]. Labone ḳoila, “Amra zebla horia zaimugi ou shomoy Mabude-u tumar-amar fahara diba.
31.50: Tumi zudi amar fuṛintore duk deo ba amar fuṛin saṛa ar ḳeurore bia ḳoro, taile kunu manush amrar loge na roile-o Alla amrar shakki roila.”
31.51: Labone Iakubre aro ḳoila, “Ou biṭa bae ar ou kuṭir bae sao, iṭa tumar-amar mazḳano ami gaṛlam.
31.52: I duioṭa tumar-amar shakki roilo. Tumi-o ingsha ḳori ou biṭa ar kuṭi ḍingaia aibae na ar ami-o burair niote ita ḍingaia zaitam nae.
31.53: Ibrahimor Alla, Nahuror uforala ar tarar bafor uforalae tumar-amar bisar ḳorba.” Ar Iakube, tan baf Isʼhake zanre ḍoraita tan name ḳosom ḳorla.
31.54: Iakube hou faṛor ufre kurbani koria tan ḳesh-kuṭum oḳolre ḳaoar daoat dila. Ḳaoa-daoa shesh ḳoria hari tara hou faṛor maze rait roila.
31.55: Bador din fozore Labone tan fuṛintore ar natinoshare hunga dia dua ḳorla, heshe tan baṛi muka fot dila.

32.1: Iakub-o tan fote roana oile, Allar firista oḳole tanre deḳa dila.
32.2: Erare dekia tain ḳoila, “Ita Allar fouz.” Ar i zagar nam raḳla Mohonoyim [mani, dui fouz]. Shek Ishʼor gese ufohar faṭani
32.3: Iakube tan age ḳori Seir ba Idum desho, tan boṛo bai Ishʼor gese ḳoyzon ḳobria faṭaila.
32.4: Tain erare hikai dila, “Tumra amar munib Ishʼre ḳoio, tan gulam Iakube ḳoise, ami otodin tone amrar mamu Labonor gese musafirit aslam.
32.5: Amar goru-gada, sagol-meṛa ar gulam-bandi hoḳolta-u ase. Amar munibor gese doya faoar ashae tumrare faṭailam.”
32.6: Ḳobria oḳole firia aia Iakubre ḳoila, “Amra afnar bai Ishʼor gese geslam. Tain sair-sho manshore loia afnar loge mulaḳat ḳorat aira.”
32.7: Ou Iakube ḍoraia kub ostir oigela. Tain logor hoḳol manshore, goru-sagol, meṛa-meṛi ar uṭ-gada oḳolre dui dole algaila.
32.8: Tain ḳoila, baie aia eḳ dolre hamla ḳorle-o aroḳ dol nirafode roibo.
32.9: Ar Iakube dua ḳorla, “O Alla, amar dada Ibrahimor Mabud ar amar baf Isʼhakor Mabud, tumi-u amare hukum ḳorso zen, ‘Tumar desho tumar nizor manshor gese firia zao, teu ami tumare rohom ḳormu.’
32.10: Tumar i gulamor bae ze rohom ar imandari deḳaiso, ami ita kuntar-u laḳ nae. Ami to egu laṭi loia i Zordan gang faroislam, ar oḳon dui dol oigesi.
32.11: Mabud, ami aroz ḳoriar, amar bai Ishʼor at tone amare basao. Amar ḍor ḳorer, he aia bou fua-fuṛir loge amare-o kun ḳorbo.
32.12: Tumi-u to oada ḳorso, ‘Ami oboshsho-u tumar balai kormu, tumar oarish oḳolre doriar faror balur laḳan behishab ḳormu, zela gonia fuṛae na.’ ”
32.13: Iakube i rait hono roila ar tan zotota asil er maz taki kotoḳan loia tan bai Ishʼor lagi eḳ ufohar toiar ḳorla.
32.14: Ita oilo dui-sho sagi, kuṛiṭa sagol, dui-sho meṛi, kuṛiṭa meṛa,
32.15: tishgu baichcha-ala dudor uṭ, dui kuṛi gai, doshgu bisal, ek kuṛi gadi ar doshgu gada,
32.16: bade tain eḳ ek gulamor ato eḳ eḳ fal shomzai dia ḳoila, “Tumra amar age oia zao ar eḳ fal taki aroḳ falor maze faḳ rakio.”
32.17: Foyla dolor gulamre tain hikai dila, “Amar bai Ishʼor loge deḳa oar bade zebla zikaiba, ‘Ḳoi zaitae ba? Tumi kar manush? Tumar homḳor foshuin ḳar?’
32.18: Tumi zuaf dio, ‘Ita afnar gulam Iakubor. Tain amar munib Ishʼor lagi, ita ufohar faṭaisoin. Ar tain amrar ḳore oia aira.’ ”
32.19: Ou laḳan tain dui nombor, tin nombor dolor gulam oḳolre-o hikai dila zen, “Ishʼor loge deḳa oile tumra-o oula ḳoio.
32.20: Ar heshe ḳoio, afnar gulam Iakub-o amrar ḳore oia aira.” Iakube mono ḳorla, “Age ufohar oḳol faṭaia tane ṭanḍa ḳormu, bade tan loge deḳa-shaikkat ḳormu, te tain amare maya ḳorilita faroin.”
32.21: Tan age oia ufohar oḳol gelogi, oile tain rait tan ḍerat roila. Firistar loge kustir bade noya nam Israil
32.22: Heshe rait uṭia tan duio bibin, duio bandi ar egarogu fuare loia faoe aṭia, Zabbuk kalor hofaro toia aila.
32.23: Tain erare ḳal far ḳoraia tan hoḳol mal-samana-o hono faṭai dila.
32.24: Ar tain eḳla ono roila, teu gaibi eḳzon manush aia tan loge raitbor kusta-kusti korla.
32.25: Oile tain Iakubre ḳabu ḳorta na farae en urator zuṛat marla ar Iakubor urator aṛ zaga tone ḍuli gelo.
32.26: Heshe hi manshe ḳoila, “Fozor oizar, oḳon tumi amare saṛi deo.” Iakube ḳoila, “Afne amare dua na ḳorle saṛtam nae.”
32.27: Hi manshe zikaila, “Tumar nam kita?” Tain ḳoila, “Iakub.”
32.28: Ou hein ḳoila, “Tumi Alla ar manshor loge laṛai koria zitso ḳori, tumar nam ar Iakub roito nae, tumar nam oilo Israil [mani, Allar loge kusti korra].”
32.29: Iakube tanre ḳoila, “Afnar namḳan kita ḳoukka.” Tain ḳoila, “Tumi kitar lagi amar nam zikairae?” Heshe tain Iakubre dua ḳorla.
32.30: Ou Iakube i zagar nam raḳla Ponuel [mani, Allar surot]. Tain ḳoila, “Ami Alla Pakre mukamuki dekia-o zinda roisi.”
32.31: Ar Iakube Ponuel faronir bade shuruz uṭigelo. Tan urator mairor lagi lengṛaita lagla.
32.32: Erlagi Boni Israile oḳono ranor zuṛar gust ḳain na, ḳaron tain urator zuṛar rogor maze Iakubre marsla.

33.1: Iakube saia deḳla, tan boṛo bai Ishe sair-sho manush loia aguaia aira. Ou tain huruttaintore tan bibin Lea ar Rahela ar duio bandir gese baṭia dilaila.
33.2: Tain tan bandin ar tarar huruttaintore samnor ḳataro raḳla. Bade Lea ar tan huruttaintore, hoḳol heshe raḳla Rahela ar Iusufre.
33.3: Ar nize erar age gia shatbar maṭit soizda ḳoria tan bair gese azir oila.
33.4: Teu Ishe tan gese douṛaia aia ainja ḳori golat doria hunga dila, ar duiozone ḳandita lagla.
33.5: Bade Ishe muk tulia ou beṭin ar huruttaintore dekia zikaila, “Tumar loge era ḳegu?” Tain ḳoila, “Allae tan rohomote afnar gulamre i huruttain disoin.”
33.6: Teu foyla bandi oḳole Ishʼor ḳasat aia tarar hurutta loia mata nuaila,
33.7: bade Leae-o huruttaintore loia aguaia mata nuaila, heshe Iusuf ar Rahelae gia mata nuaila.
33.8: Teu Ishe ḳoila, “Foto zeta dolbol deḳlam, ita kior lagi?” Tain ḳoila, “Amar munibor gese doya faoar lagi.”
33.9: Ishe ḳoila, “Baire, amar boutta ase, tumar ita tumar-u taḳouk.”
33.10: Tain ḳoila, “Ji na, ami minot ḳoria ḳoiar, zudi amar bae afnar doya oy, taile amar deoa i dan-dokkina afne neukka. Afne zebla amare kushi mone kobul ḳorsoin, te afnar muk deḳa ar Allar didar faoa amar lagi homan.
33.11: Allae amare rohomot dan ḳorsoin, amar boutta ase ar ou zeta ufohar afnar lagi anchi, ita afne neukka.” Tain oula minot-ḳajji korae, Ishe ita kobul ḳorla.
33.12: Ishe ḳoila, “Solo, amra roana oi, ami tumar loge roimu.”
33.13: Iakube tanre ḳoila, “Amar munibe to zanra, i hurutta oḳol-o huru ar dudal gaiain-meṛin-o loge ase, bezan oia itare eḳdin-u aṭaile, hokkolṭi moriziba.
33.14: Te munib, afne amar age zaukkagi, foshur fal ar hurutta oḳlor solar ḳemota buzia ami aste aste Seir elaḳat afnar gese airam.”
33.15: Ishe ḳoila, “Taile amar logor ota ḳoyzonre tumar gese toia zaigi.” Tain ḳoila, “Itar dorḳar kita? Amar munibor gese ami ze rohom faisi, oṭa-u to boutta.”
33.16: Ar Ish hou din-u Seiror bae roana dilaila.
33.17: Oile Iakube Sukkoto fosia nizor lagi ḍera banaia, foshur falor lagi-o ḳoyḳan batan banaila, teu i zagar nam oilo Sukkot [mani, ḍera oḳol].
33.18: Foddon-Iram tone bar oia Iakube, sohi-salamote Kenan deshor Shikim ṭauno aia, ṭaunor bare tambuin gaṛila.
33.19: Heshe ou tambuala zominḳan tain, Shikimor baf Homuror fuaintor ges tone, rufar eḳ-sho ṭeḳa dia ḳorid ḳorla.
33.20: Ar hono ekkan kurbani kana banaia er nam dila El-Iluhe-Israil [mani, Alla, Israilor uforala].

34.1: Lear goro Dina name Iakubor ze fuṛi oisil, ein eḳdin honor fuṛintor loge deḳa ḳorat gela.
34.2: Ar Shikim namor eḳzon manshor souko foṛla. I Shikim asil Hibbi zatir shordar Homuror fua. Shikime ere zur ḳori doria nia ḳobisi kam ḳorillo.
34.3: Dinar bae tar dil ashik oigelo. He ere mohobbot ḳori er loge miṭa miṭa mat matilo.
34.4: Bade Shikime tar baf Homurre ḳoilo, “Tumi ou ḳoinare amar loge biar bondobost ḳoro.”
34.5: Iakube ḳobor faila, Shikime tan fuṛire beijjoti korse, oile tan fuain foshur fal loia bondo taḳae, tain na-matia nirai roila.
34.6: Shikimor baf Homure Iakubor gese biar mat loia ailo,
34.7: ar i kobor hunia Iakubor fuain-o bondo tone aila. Tara betaya gusa ar gorom oila, ḳaron Iakubor fuṛire beijjoti korae Shikime asta Israilor loge beijjoti ar nazaiz ḳam ḳorse.
34.8: Teu Homure erare ḳoilo, “Afnarar ḳoinar lagi amar fua ashik oigese. Doya ḳori, amar fuar loge er shadi dilaukka.
34.9: Amrar loge kuṭumita ḳoroukka, amrar ḳoinaintore afnara neukka ar afnararta amrare deukka.
34.10: Ar amrar loge taḳoukka, i asta desh-u to samne roise, afnara ono-u taḳoin, ḳay-ḳarbar ḳoria, nizor malikana ḳaim ḳoroin.”
34.11: Shikime Dinar baf-baire ḳoila, “Amar bae afnara doya ḳoroin, afnara amar gese zeta saiba, ami ota-u dimu.
34.12: Mohorana ar mal-samana afnara zeta dabi korba ami dimu, zekunu laḳan-u Dinare amar loge bia deukka.”
34.13: Shikime tarar boinre beijjoti korsil ḳori Iakubor fuainte tare ar tar baf Homurre bana deḳaia ḳoila,
34.14: “Mosolmani kam na ḳorail kunu damandor loge amrar boinre bia dile amrar beijjoti oibo.
34.15: Oile ou ḳam ḳorle amra razi oimu, afnara hoḳol beṭainte mosolmani koraia, amrar laḳan oiba.
34.16: Taile amrar fuṛintore afnarar gese dimu ar afnarar fuṛintore-o amra anmu, amra-o afnarar loge eḳ zati oia boshot ḳormu.
34.17: Oile afnara i mosolmanir ḳota na manle, amrar ḳoinare loia zaimugi.”
34.18: Teu tarar i mate Homur ar tar fua Shikim kushi oila.
34.19: Ou Shikim oilo gusṭir maze hoḳol tone dami manush. He deri na ḳoria ḳota manilailo, ḳaron Iakubor fuṛir bae he ashik asil.
34.20: Bade ṭaunor duaror gese aia, Homur ar tan fuae hokkol manshor loge matia ḳoila,
34.21: “I manushguinte amrare kunu zamela ḳorer na. Amrar desho erar taḳar lagi bout zaga-o ase, te era ono-u taḳouk ar ḳay-ḳarbar ḳorouk, amra erar fuṛintore bia ḳoria ani ar amrar fuṛintore-o tarar gese dei.
34.22: Oile amra ekkan ḳam ḳorle, tara amrar loge eḳ zati oite razi asoin. Ḳamṭa oilo, tarar laḳan amrar-o hokkol beṭaintor mosolmani korani lagbo.
34.23: Ar tarar goru-meṛa, mal-samana hokkolta-u to amrar oibo, tarar ḳotae razi oile-u tara amrar loge taḳba.”
34.24: Ou ṭaunor hoḳol beṭain Homur ar tan fua Shikimor mate razi oilo, ar tara hoḳlor mosolmani kam ḳorailo.
34.25: Heshe tin dinor din zebla hoḳol beṭainte mosolmanir bedonae ḳoshṭo faira, ou shomoy Dinar afon bai Iakubor dui fua Shimion ar Lebi, tarar toluar loia ṭauno hamaia, erare bekialo faia hoḳol beṭaintore marililo.
34.26: Tara Homur ar tan fua Shikimre-o toluardi zane maria Shikimor gor tone Dinare loia ailo.
34.27: Era tarar boinre beijjoti korsil ḳori, Iakubor hoḳol fuainte mora lashor gese aia ṭauno luṭ-toraz ḳorla.
34.28: Ar ṭaunor bitor-bairor goru-gada, sagol-meṛa, ar ḳetor hoḳolta luṭia loia aila.
34.29: Hoḳol mal-samana, fua-fuṛin, beṭin, ar goror hoḳolta-o luṭ-faṭ ḳorla.
34.30: Heshe Iakube Shimion ar Lebire ḳoila, “Tumra i deshor Kenani ar Farizi oḳlor gese amare fosa-ginnar manush banaia mosiboto falaiso. Amar manush ḳom, oḳon tara ekḳano oia amare hamla ḳorle, ami foribaror hokkolre loia mormu.”
34.31: Tara zuaf dila, “He amrar boinre nia ḳanki banailito ni?”

35.1: Erbade Alla Pake Iakubre ḳoila, “Tumi hirbar Betelo zaogi. Tumar bai Ishʼor ges tone bagibar bala, zein tumare doroshon disla, hou Alla Pakor name tumi hono ekkan kurbani kana banao.”
35.2: Teu Iakube tan afon manshore ar logor hoḳolre ḳoila, “Tumrar gese devtar zeta murtin ase, ita hokkolṭi falao; ar hoḳole fak-saf oia, saf-sutra lebas findo.
35.3: Ar solo, amra Betelo zaitamgi. Hono ami Allar name ekkan kurbani kana banaimu, zein mosibotor dino amar dua kobul ḳorsla, ar amar soforor logi oisla.”
35.4: Teu tarar zoto laḳan devtar murtin ar ḳanor zeorat asil, hoḳolta Iakubor ato dilaila. Tain ita nia Shikim ṭaunor ḳandat elon gasor tole gaṛilaila.
35.5: Bade tara hon tone roana oila ar Allae sairobae hoḳol gau-geramo eḳ ḍor foyda ḳorla, teu hinor kunu manshe Iakubor fuaintore ḳedanit gelo na.
35.6: Heshe Iakub ar tan logor hoḳole Kenan deshor Luz namor zaga, mani Betelo aia fosla.
35.7: Ono tain ek kurbani kana banaia, ou zagar nam dila El-Betel [mani, Betelor Alla], ḳaron bair ges taki bagibar bala Allae ono-u tanre didar-doroshon disla.
35.8: Ar Rebekar daima Dobura mara gela. Tane Betelor lamat eḳ elon gasor tole maṭi dila, teu i zagar nam oilo Elon-Bakut [mani, ḳandonor gas].
35.9: Iakube Foddon-Iram taki aoar bade, Allae hirbar tanre didar dia borkot nazil ḳorla.
35.10: Allae ḳoila, “Tumar nam to Iakub; oile manshe tumare ar Iakub ḳoia ḍakta nae, tumare Israil ḳoiba.” Teu tan nam oilo Israil.
35.11: Allae tanre ḳoila, “Ami-u Shorbo-shoktiman Alla. Tumi folala oia baṛo. Tuma tone eḳ zati foyda oibo, iṭa oibo bout gusṭiala zati, ar tumar ḳandano bashsha oḳol foyda oiba.
35.12: Ami Ibrahim ar Isʼhakre ze desh dan ḳorsi, hou desh oḳon tumare ar tumar bador oarishre dimu.”
35.13: Allae hono Iakubor loge batchit ḳoria harle asmano toshrif nilagi.
35.14: Iakube hou batchitor zagat fattoror ek kuṭi gaṛia, er ufre tain Allar name shorbot-fanir sodga ḍalila, heshe tel-o ḍalila.
35.15: Allae zeḳano tanre didar disla, Iakube i zagar nam raḳsla Betel.
35.16: Bade Iakub ar tan logor hoḳole Betel taki roana ḳoria Ifrato fosar bakka age, Rahelar hurutta oar bishe dorlo, tan kub toklif oilo.
35.17: Hurutta oar bish aro baṛlo, teu dai beṭie ḳoilo, “Ḍoraio na go, ibar-o tumar goro fua oibo.”
35.18: Oile Rahela mara gela. Morar shomoy tain fuar nam raḳla Bin-Oni [mani, amar toklifor fua] oile bafe tar nam raḳla Bin-Iamin [mani, amar bolor fua].
35.19: Rahelar moutor bade Ifrat, mani Betelham, zaoar fotor ḳandat tanre maṭi deoa oilo.
35.20: Maṭi dia harle Iakube tan ḳoyboror ufre eḳ fattoror kuṭi gaṛla, i kuṭi aiz-o ono ase.
35.21: On tone Israile hirbar roana dila, ar Edor minar falaia aia tan tambu gaṛila.
35.22: Israil zebla hono roira, ou faḳo Rubene gia tar bafor bador biar bou Bilhar loge zina ḳorlo ar ita Israilor ḳano gelo.
35.23: Iakubor barozon fua asla, Lear torofa tan boṛo fua Ruben, bade Shimion, Lebi, Ehuda, Isaḳor ar Sobulon.
35.25: Rahelar bandi Bilhar torofa, Dan ar Noftali.
35.26: Lear bandi Zilpar torofa, Sadu ar Ashir. Tan ou hurutta oḳol Foddon-Iramo oisla. Hozrot Isʼhak (a:)or inteḳal
35.27: Heshe Iakub Kiriot-Orbor, mani Hebronor ḳasat Momri namor zagat, tan baf Isʼhakor gese aila. Ou zagat Ibrahim ar Isʼhake-o boshot ḳorta.
35.28: Isʼhakor boyosh eḳ-sho ashi boros oisil.
35.29: Ar Isʼhak furafur buṛa oia, murobbi boyosho mara gia tan baf-dadar gese gia azila. Tan fua Ish ar Iakube tanre dafon ḳorla.

36.1: Ou oilo Ish ba Idumor ḳandanor boyan.
36.2: Ishe Kenani dui fuṛire bia ḳorsla. Era oila Hiṭṭi Elonor fuṛi Ada, ar Hibbi Zibionor natin, Onar fuṛi Oholibama.
36.3: Erar bade-o tain Ismailor fuṛi Nabautor boin Bashomotre bia ḳorsla.
36.4: Adar feṭo Ilifoz ar Bashomotor feṭo Ruelor zonom oisil,
36.5: ar Oholibamar feṭo Ziush, Zalom ar Kurohor zonom oisil. Ishʼor i fuaintor zonmo oisil Kenan desho.
36.6: Bade Ishe tan bouain, fua-fuṛin, goror hoḳol manush ar foshur falain, Kenan desho ḳamai kora hoḳol don-doulot loia, tan bai Iakubor ges tone horia aroḳ desho gelagi.
36.7: Ish ar Iakubor foshur fal, mal-samana oto beshi asil zen, era ekḳano roite hi deshor i zagae ar kulailo na.
36.8: Teu Ish Seiror faṛi elaḳat gia boshot ḳorla. Ein-u Idum.
36.9: Ou oilo Seiror faṛor Idumi oḳlor mul baf Ishʼor ḳandanor boyan.
36.10: Ishʼor fuaintor nam oilo, Ilifoz ar Ruel. Ilifoz Adar fua, Ruel Bashomotor fua.
36.11: Ilifozor fuain oila, Toimon, Omar, Zofo, Gatam ar Kenaz.
36.12: Ishʼor fua Ilifozor Timna namor eḳ hangar bou asil, er goro Amalekor zonom oisil. Era hoḳole-u Ishʼor bou Adar aolad.
36.13: Ruelor fuain oila Nohot, Zarah, Shommo ar Mijja. Era Ishʼor bou Bashomotor aolad.
36.14: Zibionor natin, Onar fuṛi Oholibamar torofa Ishʼor fuain oila Ziush, Zalom ar Kuroh.
36.15: Ishʼor aolador maze era asla gusṭir neta. Ishʼor boṛo fua Ilifozor fuain oila Toimon, Omar, Zofo, Kenaz,
36.16: Kuroh, Gatam, ar Amalek. Era oila Idum desho, Adar fua Ilifozor aolad.
36.17: Ishʼor fua Ruelor fuain zera gusṭir neta oisla, tara oila Nohot, Zarah, Shommo ar Mijja. Era oila Idum desho Ishʼor bou Bashomotor fua Ruelor aolad.
36.18: Ishʼor bou Oholibamar ze fuain gusṭir neta oisla, tara oila Ziush, Zalom ar Kuroh. Era asla Onar fuṛi Oholibamar aolad.
36.19: Era oila Ish ba Idumor ḳandan ar gusṭir neta.
36.20: Honor Hurio Seiror fuaintor nam oilo Luṭon, Shubol, Zibion, Ona,
36.21: Dishun, Etoshor ar Dishan. Era hoḳole Idum desho Seiror fuain, Hurio ḳandanor neta asla.
36.22: Luṭonor fuar nam oilo Huri ar Hemam, ar bonir nam Timna.
36.23: Shubolor fuaintor nam oilo Olbon, Manohot, Ibal, Shofo ar Onom.
36.24: Zibionor fuaintor nam oilo Oya ar Ona. Ou Ona-u tan baba Zibionor gada raḳat gia, morubumir maze gorom fanir indara oḳol tukaia faila.
36.25: Onar fuar nam Dishun ar fuṛir nam Oholibama.
36.26: Dishunor fuaintor nam oilo Himdon, Ishbon, Zitron ar Keran.
36.27: Etoshoror fuaintor nam oilo Bilhon, Zaoan ar Aḳon.
36.28: Dishanor fuaintor nam oilo Auz ar Oran.
36.29: Hurio oḳlor neta oila Luṭon, Shubol, Zibion, Ona,
36.30: Dishun, Etoshor ar Dishan. Era oila Seir deshor Hurio gusṭir neta.
36.31: Boni Israilor maze bashshai hukumot aibar age, Idum desho era-u raza asla.
36.32: Bauror fua Bela Idumor raza oila. Tan razdanir nam asil Dinhaba.
36.33: Bela morar bade, tan zagat Bosra ṭaunor Zarahor fua Zubob raza oila.
36.34: Zubob morar bade Toimon deshor Hushom honor raza oila.
36.35: Hushom morar bade tan zagat Bododor fua Hodod raza oila. Tain zuddo ḳori Muab deshor Madiani oḳolre araila. Tan razdanir nam oilo Obit.
36.36: Hodod morar bade Mosreka ṭaunor Samla honor raza oila.
36.37: Samla morar bade honor Furat gangor faror Rohobot ṭaunor Shoul raza oila.
36.38: Shoul morar bade tan zagat Akbaror fua Baal-Hanon raza oila.
36.39: Akbaror fua Baal-Hanon morar bade tan zagat Hodor raza oila. Tan razdanir nam asil Pau, ar tan bour nam asil Moheṭabel. Ein Moṭredor fuṛi ar Mezahabor natin.
36.40: Ishʼor zeta aolad oḳol gusṭi ar elaḳar neta asla, tarar nam oilo, Timna, Olba ar Zitet,
36.43: Mogdiel ar Oram. Era asla zarzir deshor, zarzir elaḳar Idumi neta. Idumi oḳlor mul baf Ishʼor boyan ono-u shesh.

37.1: Iakub Kenan desho-u roila, tan baf-o hono musafir oia asla.
37.2: Ou oilo Iakubor ḳandanor boyan. Iusufe shotro boros boyosh tone tan baiaintor loge meṛa-sagol raḳta. Tain huruman tone-u tan haton ma Bilha ar Zilpar fuaintor loge roita. Ar erar hoḳol bad sal-cholonor ḳobor bafre zanaita.
37.3: Iusuf, Israilor buṛa boyoshor fua gotike, tain ere hoḳol tone beshi maya ḳorta. Tain ere ek kandani zubba banai dila.
37.4: Bafe Iusufre hoḳol tone beshi maya ḳoroin dekia, baiainte tanre ginnaita. Tara en loge bala mone mat-ḳota-o matta na.
37.5: Iusufe ek kuab dekia tan baiaintore hunaila, teu tara aro beshi ginnaila.
37.6: Tain ḳoila, “Ami kuabe kita deḳsi huno:
37.7: ami deḳlam, amra ḳetor maze danor muiṭ bandiar ar amar banda muiṭḳan ubaigelo, teu tumrar muiṭ oḳole amar muiṭre sairobae beria soizda ḳorer.”
37.8: Ou tan baiainte ḳoila, “Tui hasau amrar raza oite saire ni? Tui raza oia amrar ufre beṭagiri korte ni?” Teu tan kuab ar tan mator lagi tara aro beshi ginnaila.
37.9: Iusufe hirbar ek kuab dekia tan baiaintore hunaila. Tain ḳoila, “Huno, ami hirbar kuabe deḳsi, san-shuruz ar egaroṭa terae amare soizda ḳorer.”
37.10: Tain i kuabor ḳota tan baf ar baiaintor gese ḳoia harle, bafe tanre domḳaia ḳoila, “Tuin ita kun zator kuab deḳle, re fut? Tor ma-baiain ar ami-o kita hasau tore soizda ḳortam ni?”
37.11: Ar Iusufre tan baiainte kub ingshaita. Oile bafe i kuabor ḳota mono raḳla. Gulam banaia baiainte besila
37.12: Ar tan baiainte bafor foshur fal loia Shikimo raḳat gela.
37.13: Teu Israile Iusufre ḳoila, “Tor baiainte foshur fal raḳat Shikimo gesoin, te ae, ami tore-o hono faṭai.” Tain ḳoila, “Aichcha, ami zaimu.”
37.14: Israile tane ḳoila, “Tui gia tor baiain ar foshur falor ḳobor-antor hunia aia amare ḳois.” Teu tain Iusufre Hebron tone Shikimo faṭaila. Ar Iusuf-o gia Shikimo azir oila.
37.15: Aia harle tanre ḳetor maze gura-firat dekia eḳ beṭae zikaila, “Tumi kita tukairae ba?”
37.16: Iusufe ḳoila, “Ami amar baiaintore tukaiar. Afne zanoin ni, era foshur fal kun zagat raḳra?”
37.17: Hi beṭae ḳoila, “Tara in tone gesoingi. Ami hunchi tara matira, ao, amra Dutono zaigi.” Ou Iusufe tukai tukai Dutono gia tarare faila.
37.18: Baiainte duroi tone tanre deḳlo, ar tarar gese fosar age-u tara ene kun ḳorar motlob ḳorlo.
37.19: Tara eḳzone aroḳzonre ḳoilo, “Ou deḳo, kuab deḳra sab aira.
37.20: Ao, oḳon-u amra ene ḳotom ḳoria ou gato falai dei; bade ḳoimu, kunu zongli zanuare ḳailaise, heshe deḳmune, tar kuabor dosha kita oy?”
37.21: Oile Rubene ita hunia tarar at taki enre basaibar lagi koila, “Tare zane mario na.”
37.22: Tain erare foramish dila, “Kun-ḳarafi korat zaio na, nizor ate na maria ogure emne-u gator maze falai deo.” Oula tain Iusufre tarar at tone basaia, bafor ato faṭanir sesṭa ḳorla.
37.23: Iusuf tan baiaintor gese aite-u tara, tan gotor tone zubba kulilaila, hou ḳandani zubbaṭa ṭania kulilila.
37.24: Ar tane doria gator maze falai dila. I gat hukna asil, kunu fani asil na.
37.25: Heshe tara ḳaoat boia saia deḳla, Giliod taki Ismaili eḳ befarir dol ibae ar. Era uṭor fiṭit ḳori kushboy moshla, agor, ar meshke-ambor loia Mishor desho zaita.
37.26: Ou Ehudae tar baiainre ḳoilo, “Doro, baire kun ḳoria amra lukaililam, teu amrar kita lab oibo?
37.27: He to amrar-u bai, amrar afon lou ar gust. Te tar shorilo at na dia ao, Ismaili oḳlor gese tare besilai.” Ou baiain-o razi oigela.
37.28: Hou Madiani befari oḳol ḳasat aite-u, baiainte Iusufre gato tone ṭania tulla ar ek kuṛi rufar ṭeḳar bodla, Ismaili oḳlor gese tane besilaila. Era Iusufre loia Mishoro gelagi.
37.29: Bade Rubene hou gator gese aia Iusufre na dekia, tan gotror kurta farilla.
37.30: Baiaintor gese gia ḳoila, “Fuagu to ino nae. Oḳon ami kita ḳortam?”
37.31: Ou tara eḳ bokri maria, er lou Iusufor hou zubbat lagaila.
37.32: Bade manushdi ou zubba tarar bafor gese faṭaia ḳoila, “Iṭa amra foto faisi, te afne bala ḳoria deḳoukka, iṭa afnar fuar zubba ni?”
37.33: Iakube i zubba sinia ḳoila, “Iṭa to amar fuar-u. Tare kunu zongli zanuare ḳailise, tare nisoy siṛi-biṛilaise.”
37.34: Tain finnor ḳafoṛ siṛia, ḳomro solar soṭ bandia, fuar lagi bout din mattom ḳorla.
37.35: Tan hoḳol fua-fuṛie tane buzaita saila, oile kunu buze-u tan buk ṭanḍa oilo na. Tain ḳoila, “Ami mattom ḳori kori amar fuar gese ḳoyboro hamaimu.” Fuar lagi tain ou laḳan ḳanda-ḳaṭit roila.
37.36: Er maze Madiani oḳole Iusufre Mishoro nia, Feraunor ḳormosari Azizor gese besilaila, i kormosari asla tan fordan gaḍ.

38.1: Ehudae tar baiaintore toia Odullom gaur Hira namor eḳ manshor loge roat gelo.
38.2: Hono roia Shua namor ek Kenani manshor fuṛir loge deḳa oilo, dekia he ou fuṛire bia ḳorlo.
38.3: Biar bade hou beṭir goro eḳ fua oilo, Ehudae tar nam raḳlo Eir.
38.4: Hirbar beṭir goro aroḳ fua oile, maʼe tar nam raḳlo Onon.
38.5: Heshe ou beṭir aroḳ fua oile, tar nam raḳlo Shela. I shomoy tara Koshib gaut roita.
38.6: Ar Ehudae tar boṛo fua Eiror loge Tamar namor eḳ fuṛire bia dilo.
38.7: Oile tar i fua Mabudor nozoro kub ḳobis asil gotike, Mabude tare marilaila.
38.8: Ou Ehudae Ononre ḳoilo, “Tumar babire bia ḳorilao. Tair deor oae tumar zeta ḳora zorur ase, ita adae ḳoro ar nizor bair oarish foyda ḳoro.”
38.9: Onone zanto, i oarish tar nizor oito nae, ar tar bair oarish raḳte tar kial asil na gotike, tair loge mila-mishar shomoy tar biz baire maṭit falai dito.
38.10: Mabude tar i kame naraz oila, tain Eirre-o marilaila.
38.11: Ou Ehudae tar fuar bou Tamarre ḳoilo, “Amar fua Shela zotodin boṛo na oy, otodin tumar bafor baṛit gia ṛaṛi oia-u ro.” Ehudae ḍorailo, Shela-o tar baiaintor laḳan morizibo. Ar Tamar bafor baṛit gelogi.
38.12: Bakka ḳoydin bade Ehudar bou, Shuar fuṛi morigelo, teu ḳanda-ḳaṭi korar bade Ehudae shanti oia Odullom gaur tar dust Hirar loge Timna gaut, tar meṛar falor ruma ḳaṭra manshor gese roana dilo.
38.13: Ar Tamarre gia ḳeu ḳobor dilo “Tumar houre tan meṛar ruma ḳaṭar lagi Timnat zaira.”
38.14: Tamare deḳlo, Shela boṛo oile-o houre Shelar loge tair bia dira na, ou tai ṛaṛir ḳafoṛ bodlaia hazi-faṛi muko gumṭa dia, Aynaimor fotor muko gia boilo. Aynaim asil Timnat zaoar foto.
38.15: Ar tai muk lukaia raḳae, Ehudae mono ḳorlo igu silan beṭi.
38.16: Teu Ehudae fuar boure na sinae, fotor daro Tamaror gese gia ḳoilo, “Ao, tumar loge mila-misha ḳori.” Tamare ḳoilo, “Te amare kita dibae?”
38.17: He ḳoilo, “Amar fal tone bokri baichcha egu faṭai dimu.” Tamare ḳoilo, “Iṭa faṭanir age amar gese kunta zimma toia zaukka.”
38.18: Ehudae ḳoilo, “Kita toitam?” Tai koilo, “Afnar ou fita-ala sil ar afnar ator laṭi toia zaukka.” Teu Ehudae oguin zimma toia tair loge mila-misha ḳorlo ar Tamaror feṭo hurutta ailo.
38.19: Bade Tamar uṭia gelogi ar hi kafoṛ bodlaia hirbar ṛaṛir ḳafoṛ findilo.
38.20: Heshe ou beṭir ges taki zimmar mal firot nibar lagi, tar Odullomor dustre dia sagolor baichcha egu faṭailo. He aia taire tukaia failo na.
38.21: Ou he honor manshore zikailo, “Aynaimor fotor daro eḳ shebok beṭi asil, ogu ḳoi?” Tara ḳoila, “Ino to ila kunu beṭi nae.”
38.22: Teu he Ehudar gese gia ḳoilo, “Ami gia taire tukaia failam na. Honor manshe-o ḳoila, ino to ila kunu beṭi aise na.”
38.23: Ehudae ḳoilo, “Te ita ar tair gese-u taḳouk. Naile amra shorminda oimu. Sagolor baichcha to faṭailam, ta-o tumi ere tukaia failae na.”
38.24: Onuman tin mash bade Ehudae hunlo, tar fuar bou Tamare zina ḳorse, erlagi tair hurutta oita. Ou Ehudae ḳoilo, “Ogure bare nia aguindi zalailao.”
38.25: Tamarre zebla bare nira, ou shomoy tair hourre ḳobor dilo zen, “Zar hurutta amar feṭo ase, ou mal-samana oḳol tar. Te deḳoukka, ou fita-ala sil ar laṭigu ḳar sinoin ni?”
38.26: Ehudae ita dekia ḳoilo, “Tai to ama taki bout boṛo forezgar. Amar fua Shelar loge taire bia ḳoraisi na.” Erbade Ehudae ar kunudin-o Tamaror gese hutise na.
38.27: Hurutta oibar bala deḳoin, Tamaror feṭo zuṛor hurutta.
38.28: Foyla egue tar at bar ḳorlo ar dai beṭie lal suta eḳsa tar ato bandia ḳoilo, “Igu foyla foyda oilo.”
38.29: Oile he at ṭan dia bitre nilogi, teu tar bai foyla bar oilo ar dai beṭie ḳoilo, “Tumi kila fak koria bar oilae?” Erlagi er nam oilo Firuz [mani, fak kora].
38.30: Bade tar bai lal suta ato banda loia bar oilo, tar nam raḳla Zarah.

39.1: Iusufre Mishor desho loia zaoar bade, Ismaili oḳlor ges tone, Aziz namor Feraunor eḳzon Mishori kormosarie, Iusufre ḳorid ḳorla. Aziz oila Feraunor fordan gaḍ.
39.2: Mabude Iusufor logi oila, erlagi Iusuf hoḳol ḳamo kamiab oila. Tain hou Mishori munibor baṛit ḳam ḳorta.
39.3: Mabud tan loge loge asoin ar hoḳol ḳamo tane kamiab ḳorra, tan munibe-o ita buzilaila.
39.4: Teu munibe Iusufre maya ḳorta lagla, tane munibor ḳas kezmotgar banaila ar tan baṛir hoḳolta deḳa-hunar bar-o Iusufor gese shomzai dila.
39.5: Iusufre tan baṛir ar hoḳoltar bar shofi deoar bade tone, Mabude Iusufor lagi-u, tan munibor hoḳoltar maze borkot nazil ḳorla. Azizor baṛit ar ḳet-ḳamar, hoḳol zagat Mabude borkot nazil ḳorla.
39.6: Ita dekia Azize tan hoḳoltar bar Iusufor ufre shofi dila, tan nizor ḳana-dana saṛa ar kuntar-u ḳobor loita na. Iusufor shorilor goṭon ar sehara-o shundor asil.
39.7: Ita dekia tan munibor boue tan bae lalos ḳorlo. Tai Iusufre ḳoilo, “Amar bisnat ao.”
39.8: Oile Iusuf razi na oia munibor boure ḳoila, “Deḳoukka, i baṛit kita kita ase, amar munibe kunta-u ḳobor loin na, hoḳoltar bar amar ufre shomzai disoin.
39.9: I baṛit ama tone boṛo ar ḳeu nae. Afne to tan bibi, erlagi afnare saṛa ar hoḳolre tain amar zimmae raḳsoin, te ami kila oto boṛo eḳ zogoinno ḳam ḳoria Allar birudde guna ḳortam?”
39.10: Tai hamesha Iusufre oula minot ḳorle-o Iusufe tair gese hutte ba ḳasat roite-o razi oila na.
39.11: Heshe eḳdin kunu ek kamor lagi Iusuf goror bitre hamaila, ou shomoy ar ḳeu hino asil na.
39.12: Teu Azizor boue Iusufor ḳafoṛo dori koilo, “Amar bisnat ae.” Oile Iusufe tan ḳafoṛ falaia douṛia gelagi.
39.13: Iusufe tair ato ḳafoṛ toia douṛaia gelagi kori,
39.14: Azizor boue goror manshore ḍakia ḳoilo, “Huno, tain amrar loge tamsha ḳorar lagi i Ibrani beṭare anchoin. He amare beijjoti korar motlobe amar bisnat aisil, ou ami sillaia uṭsi.
39.15: Amar sillani hunia he tar finnor ḳafoṛ amar gese toia bagise.”
39.16: Iusufor munib baṛit na aoa forzonto, i kafoṛ tai nizor gese raḳlo.
39.17: Tain aia harle tai nalish dilo, “Tumi ze Ibrani gulamre amrar gese ancho, he amare beijjoti korar motlobe amar goro hamaisil.
39.18: Oile amar hauka-hauki ar sillanie he amar gese tar ḳafoṛ falai toia bagise.”
39.19: Bour mat hunia Iusufor munibe gusae aguin oigela. Tan boue ḳoilo, “Tumar gulame amar loge ou laḳan ḳam ḳorse.”
39.20: Teu Azize Iusufre nia zel ḳanat haraila. Zel ḳanat Hozrot Iusuf (a:) Mishoror bashshar bondi oḳolre zeno raḳoin, tane-o hou zel ḳanat toila.
39.21: Oile Iusufor ufre Mabudor saya asil, tain Iusufre boṛo zelar sabor gese mayar manush banaila.
39.22: Boṛo zelar sabe zel ḳanar hoḳol bondi oḳlor shordari Iusufor ufre saṛi dila, teu honor hoḳol ḳam-ḳaz Iusufor hukume solto.
39.23: Ar boṛo zelar sabe kunta-u deḳa-huna ḳora lagto na, ḳaron Mabud Iusufor loge asla, erlagi Iusufe zetat at dita, Mabude ita kamiab ḳorta.

40.1: Itar bade Mishoror bashshar dorbaror shorab bilai deora ar ruṭi banaora i duiozone bashshar gese ḳosur ḳorla.
40.2: Teu Feraun tara duiozonor ufre gusa oila,
40.3: tain erare bondi koria tan boṛo zollador baṛir zelo haraila. Ou zelo Iusuf-o asla.
40.4: Boṛo zollade i duio ḳoydir bar-o Iusufor ato dila, ar Iusufe tarar kezmot ḳorta lagla. Oula era kisudin zelo roila.
40.5: Bade Mishoror bashshar hou ruṭi banaora ar shorab bilaora duiozone eḳ raite dukan kuab deḳla, tarar kuabor mani-o asil dui laḳan.
40.6: Biane Iusufe tarar gese gia deḳla, tara kub mon-mora oiroisoin.
40.7: Iusufe tarare zikaila, “Kita oise, aiz oto bezar ḳene?”
40.8: Tara zuaf dila, “Amra to kuab deḳsi, oile er tabir buzai deora ḳeu nae.” Iusufe tarare ḳoila, “Mani buzanir ḳemota kita Allae dein na ni? Deki sain, amare hunaukka.”
40.9: Ou hi shorab bilaorae, tan shofon Iusufre hunaila. He ḳoilo, “Ami deḳlam, amar samne eḳ anguror gas.
40.10: Gasor tingu ḍal ase; hou ḍalo kuṛi baronir loge loge ful dorlo, ar soṛa soṛa angur dori faki gelo.
40.11: Ou shomoy Feraunor shorbotor fiala amar ato asil. Ami hou angur oḳol sifia rosh bar ḳori Feraunor ato dilam.”
40.12: Iusufe tare ḳoila, “Afnar shofnor mani oilo, tin ḍal mani tin din.
40.13: Ou tin dinor maze Feraune afnare bar ḳoria hirbar agor ḳamo lagaiba. Afne hirbar agor laḳan Feraunor ato fiala tuli diba.
40.14: Oile afnare minoti kori koiar, afnar balai oar bade amare mono ḳorba ar doya ḳori Feraunor gese amar ḳota ḳoia, i zelḳana tone amare ḳalas ḳoraiba.
40.15: Ibrani oḳlor desh tone amare zur ḳori doria ana oise. Ar ono aia-o ami zel ḳaṭar moto emon kunta ḳorsi na.”
40.16: Bade hi ruṭi banaorae zebla deḳlo zen, shorab bilaorar kuabor mani bala ase, teu he Iusufre ḳoilo, “Ami-o kuabe deḳsi, deḳlam zen amar matat tin ṭukri moydar ruṭi loisi.
40.17: Ar ufror ṭukrit asil, Feraunor lagi bout zator fiṭa; teu faki oḳole aia, amar matar ufror ṭukri taki ita ḳailira.”
40.18: Iusufe zuaf dila, “I shofnor tabir oilo, tin ṭukri mani tin din.
40.19: Ou tin dinor maze, Feraune afnar doṛ tone ḳolla algaia, gasor maze loṭḳaiba, heshe fakinte aia afnar doṛor gust ḳaiba.”
40.20: Er tin dinor din Feraunor zonom din asil. Feraune tan dorbaror hoḳol manshor lagi, ḳani tiar ḳoraila. Ar hou ruṭi banaora ar shorab bilaora duiozonre anaia tan dorbaror samne azir ḳorla.
40.21: Tain shorab bilaorare hirbar tan ḳamo lagaila, he Feraunor ato hirbar fiala tulia dilo.
40.22: Oile ruṭi banaorare gaso loṭḳaila. Iusufe zela ḳoisla, ekkere oula oilo.
40.23: Ta-o Iusufor ḳota hi shorab bilaorar iad roilo na, he faurililo.

41.1: Er fura dui boros bade Feraune kuabe deḳla. Tain deḳla, Nil nodor gese tain ubai roisoin,
41.2: ar Nil nod tone shatgu shundor tortaza goru uṭia aia nol bonor maze aṭia ḳaira.
41.3: Erbade deḳoin, aro shatgu halaḳ ar ḳobisor laḳan goru uṭia aia, Nil nodor faror hou goruintor ḳasat ubailo.
41.4: Heshe ou halaḳ ar ḳobisor laḳan goruinte hou shundor ar tortaza shato gorure ḳaililo, teu Feraunor gum bangi gelo.
41.5: Bade tain hirbar gumaila ar duara kuabe deḳla, ek gomor ḍeṭat shatgu fusṭo ar taza soṛa bar oise.
41.6: Heshe bar oilo, fubali batashor gorome hukna shatgu ḳom fusṭo susa-ala soṛa,
41.7: ar ou ḳom fusṭo soṛae hou shato fusṭo-taza soṛare gililailo. Bade Feraunor gum bangi gelo, tain buzla zen ita to kuab.
41.8: Biane tan mon ostir oigelo, teu Mishor deshor hoḳol zadugir ar fonḍitre ḳobriadi anaia, tan kuab tarare hunaila, oile erar ḳeu er tabir ḳoito farlo na.
41.9: Heshe Feraunor hou shorab bilaorae ḳoilo, “Huzur, aiz amar eḳ dush mono oise.
41.10: Bout din age huzure nizor dui gulamor ufre gusa ḳorsla, tain amare ar ruṭi banaorare boṛo zelar sabor baṛir zelo toisla.
41.11: Ar eḳ raite amra duiozone alog alog kuab deḳlam, duio kuabor dui laḳan tabir asil.
41.12: I shomoy zelar sabor, eḳ Ibrani zuan gulam-o ono asil. Tare amrar kuabor ḳota hunailam, ar he amrar kuabor tabir ḳoia dilo.
41.13: He amrar kuabor tabir zela ḳoisil, ekkere ou laḳan-u folilo. Huzure amare hirbar tan ḳamo lagaila, oile ruṭi banaorare gaso loṭḳaila.”
41.14: Ou Feraune Iusufre anar lagi manush faṭaila, tara gia zoldi kori zelḳana tone tanre bar ḳori anla. Iusufe daṛi-mus ḳamaia, ḳafoṛ bodlaia Feraunor dorbaro azir oila.
41.15: Feraune tanre ḳoila, “Ami ekkan kuab deḳsi, oile er tabir ḳeu ḳoito farer na. Te ami hunlam zen tumar gese kuab hunaile, tumi er tabir ḳoitae faro.”
41.16: Iusufe zuaf dila, “Hi kemota to amar nae, Alla Pake moharazor dilor shantir zuaf bataia diba ne.”
41.17: Feraune Iusufre ḳoila, “Kuabe deḳlam, ami Nil nodor faro ubai roisi.
41.18: Ar deki, gango tone shatgu shundor, tortaza goru uṭia aia nol bonor maze aṭia ḳaira.
41.19: Erbade aro shatgu goru uṭia ailo. Ita halaḳ ar ḳobisor laḳan, Mishor deshor kunu ḳano ilaḳan be-surot goru kunu dino deḳsi na.
41.20: Bade ou halaḳ ar be-surot goruinte, agor hi shato tortaza gorure ḳaililo.
41.21: Oile tara itare gilar bade, ḳaise ḳori buza-o gelo na, ḳaron tara agor laḳan-u halaḳ ar be-surot roilo. Heshe amar gum bangi gelo.
41.22: Bade ami hirbar deḳlam, gomor eḳ ḍeṭar maze shatgu boṛo ar fusṭo soṛa bar oilo.
41.23: Fubali haoar gorome hukna shatgu ḳom fusṭo susa-ala soṛa-o bar oilo.
41.24: Ar ou shato soṛae, hou taza shato soṛare gilililo. I kuab ami zadugir oḳolre hunaislam, oile ḳeu er mani koito farse na.”
41.25: Iusufe Feraunre ḳoila, “Huzur, i duio kuab-u adote eḳ. Allae zeta ḳorta saira, ita afnare deḳaisoin.
41.26: Ou tortaza shato gorur mani shat boros, ar fusṭo shato gomor soṛar mani-o shat boros. Duio kuab-u eḳ.
41.27: Ar heshe uṭia aoa shato halaḳ ar be-surot goru, ar fubali haoar gorome hukna shato gomor soṛa, erar mani oilo, aḳalor shat boros.
41.28: Te Allae zeta ḳorta saira, ita moharazre deḳaisoin. Ou ḳota-u ami afnare age ḳoisi.
41.29: Hunoukka, hara Mishor desho shat boros kub beshi foshol folibo.
41.30: Erbade-u aibo aḳalor shat boros. Teu agor hi beshi fosholor ḳota manshe fauriliba, ar aḳale deshre shesh ḳori dibo.
41.31: Ou aḳalor dorun, agor hi fosholor ḳota manshor mono roito nae. I aḳal oibo kub bezuita mosibotor.
41.32: I kuab afnare duibar deḳanir mani oilo, Allae i dosha goṭaiba, ekkere ṭik korilaisoin, ita kub zoldi kori-u goṭibo.
41.33: Oḳon huzure eḳzon sotur-buzdar fonḍit manshore tukaia, en gese Mishorre shofi deukka.
41.34: Ar afne oula ḳoroukka, desho afnar ḳormosari lagain, ou shat bosore zebla kub beshi foshol folbo, i shomoy tara er fas baṭor eḳbaṭ dola ḳorba.
41.35: Tara ou shudinor bosoror dan dola ḳoria huzuror doḳole, bazare bazare gudamo boria touk ar hefazot ḳorouk.
41.36: Shat boros dori Mishoro ze aḳal oibo, hou aḳalor lagi dan zomaia raḳba, teu aḳale deshor manush morta nae.” Feraune Iusuf (a:)re montri banaila
41.37: Iusufor i mat, Feraun ar tan dorbaror hoḳlor gese kub bala mono oilo.
41.38: Feraune tan uzir-nazir oḳolre ḳoila, “I besaṛar laḳan Allar ruh-ala manush ami kuai tukaia faimu?”
41.39: Ou Feraune Iusufre ḳoila, “Allae zebla tumar gese ita hokkolta zair ḳorsoin, te tumar laḳan buzdar ar bibekman to ar ḳeu nae.
41.40: Oḳon razbaṛir hokkolta tumi-u salaibae. Amar hoḳol proza tumar hukme solba. Ḳali bashshar toḳto, ami tumar ufre taḳmu.”
41.41: Tain Iusufre ḳoila, “Huno, ami asta Mishor desh tumar ato shofi dilam.”
41.42: Ar Feraune nizor anguil taki bashshai silor angṭi kulia Iusufor ato findaila, tan golat shunar har dila ar dami kafoṛor shada lebas-o findaila.
41.43: Bade tain Iusufre tan raijjor dui nombor rotor maze tulla ar Iusufor age age elan ḳora oilo, “Fornam ḳoro! Fornam ḳoro!” Ou laḳan tain Iusufor ufre asta Mishor deshor bar shomzai dila.
41.44: Feraune Iusufre ḳoila, “Ami-u Feraun, Mishoror bashsha! Oile tumar hukum saṛa, asta Mishor desho ḳeu ruma-o laṛaito farto nae.”
41.45: Feraune Iusufor noya nam raḳla, Safonot-Paneh. Tain Oun mondiror babon-ṭakur Puṭiferar fuṛi Asonotre Iusufor loge bia dila ar Iusufe asta Mishor desho guraguri korat lagla.
41.46: Iusufe tish boros boyosho, Mishoror bashsha Feraunor ḳamo lagla, tain Feraunor dorbar tone bar oia deshor hoḳol zaga sofor ḳorla.
41.47: Ar beshi fosholor ou shat bosore desho bout foshol folilo.
41.48: Teu Iusufe i shudinor shat bosore Mishoror hoḳol dan, bazaror gudam gorainto zoma ḳoraia toila. Tain hokkol bazaror sairo galar dan oḳol, hou bazaror gudamo zomaila.
41.49: Tain doriar balur laḳan oula behishab dan dola ḳorla zen, ita ar mafia fuṛaita farla na, teu mafa-mafi kora bad dilaila.
41.50: Ar aḳalor age Oun mondiror babon-ṭakur, Puṭiferar fuṛi Asonotor feṭo Iusufor dui fua oila.
41.51: Iusufe tan boṛo fuar nam raḳla Manosha [mani, faurilaoa]. Tain ḳoila, “Allae amar hoḳol toklif ar bafor baṛir hokkolta, amar dil tone fauraila.”
41.52: Bade tan dusra fuar nam raḳla Afraim [mani, foldar]. Tain ḳoila, “Ami ze desho toklif faisi, hou desho-u Allae amare foldar banaila.”
41.53: Ar Mishor deshor kub beshi fosholor hi shat boros furigelo.
41.54: Teu Iusufe zela ḳoisla, oula aḳalor hou shat boros aia azilo. Er loge ḳanda-ḳasar hoḳol desho-o nidan deḳa dilo oile Mishoror kunu zagat ḳani-kurakir obab oilo na.
41.55: Heshe asta Mishor desho aḳal deḳa dile, proza oḳole aia Feraunor gese ḳani magila, teu Feraune ḳoila, “Tumra Iusufor gese zao. Ein zela ḳoin, ṭik-u oula ḳoro.”
41.56: I aḳal asta desh zuṛi deḳa dilo. Bade aro bezuita oae Iusufe hoḳol zagar gudam gorain kulia, Mishori oḳlor gese dan besat lagla.
41.57: Asta duniait nidan deḳa dilo ar hoḳol deshor manshe dan ḳorid ḳorar lagi Mishor desho Iusufor gese aila.

42.1: Iakube-o hunla Mishor desho dan ase, ou tan fuaintore ḳoila, “Tumra egue arogur mukor bae sai roiso ḳene?
42.2: Huno, ami hunchi, Mishor desho dan ase, tumra hono gia amrar lagi kisu dan loia ano, teu amra i moron takia zane basmu.”
42.3: Ou Iusufor dosho baie dan loia anar lagi Mishoro gela.
42.4: Oile Iakube Iusufor afon maʼr feṭor bai Bin-Iaminre tarar loge zaite dila na, tain ḳoila, er kunu bifod oizito fare.
42.5: Dan ḳoridor lagi Kenan desh taki zera Mishoro gelo, Israilor fuain-o tarar dolor logo oia gela, ḳaron Kenan desho-o aḳal asil.
42.6: I shomoy Iusuf-u asla Mishor deshor hokkoltar malik. Deshor hoḳol manshor gese tain-u dan besta. Teu Iusufor baiain-o tan gese gia, tara matare maṭit lagaia tanre ijjot ḳorla.
42.7: Iusufe tan baiaintore dekia-u sinilila, oile na sinar ban ḳoria, tain kub ḳoṛa golae tarare zikaila, “Tumra kuai taki aiso?” Tara ḳoila, “Amra Kenan desh tone aisi, dan nibar lagi.”
42.8: Iusufe tan baiainre hasaror sinle-o, baiainte tanre sinla na.
42.9: Tain erare loia kuabe zeta deḳsla, hou ḳota tan mono oilo. Ou tain erare ḳoila, “Tumra to guia! Amrar deshor fak-fuḳor ota deḳat aiso.”
42.10: Tara ḳoila, “Ji na huzur, afnar i gulam oḳole ḳali dan loat aisi.
42.11: Amra to hoḳol eḳ bafor aolad ar saichcha manush; afnar i gulam oḳol kunu guia nae.”
42.12: Iusufe hirbar tarare ḳoila, “Na, na, tumra amar deshor fak-fuḳor deḳat aiso.”
42.13: Tara ḳoila, “Afnar gulam oḳol, hoḳole milia baro bai. Amra Kenan deshor eḳ bafor aolad. Amrar huru bai oḳon babar gese roise, ar aroḳ bai nae.”
42.14: Iusufe tarare ḳoila, “Na, na, ami ṭik-u ḳoisi, tumra guia-u!
42.15: Te tumrar forikka ola-u oizauk: ami Feraunor zanor ḳosom ḳori koiar, tumrar huru bai ono na aile, tumra-o in tone saṛa faitae nae.
42.16: Tumrar eḳzonre faṭaia, tumrar hou baire anao ar baki hoḳole bondi ro. Ou forikkae tumrar mator hasa-misa buzmu. Tare na anle, ami Feraunor zanor ḳosom ḳori koiar, tumra nisoy guia!”
42.17: Ar Iusufe tin din tarare azot ḳanat bondi kori toila.
42.18: Heshe tin dinor din, Iusufe tarare ḳoila, “Huno, ami to Allare ḍorai, tumra baste saile, ami zela ḳoi, oula ḳoro.
42.19: Tumra hasaror saichcha manush oile, tumrar eḳ bai azoto taḳouk ar baki hoḳole tumrar aḳali foribaror lagi dan loia zaogi.
42.20: Tumrar mat hasa ki na iṭa buzar lagi, tumrar huru baire amar gese loia aio. Teu tumra mortae nae.” Ou tara-o razi oila.
42.21: Bade tara mata-mati korla, “Hasau to, amrar hi bair loge zeta ḳorsi ita oinnae. He amrar gese ḳaz-minoti korle-o, amra tar mato ḳan disi na. Erlagi amrar ufre i mosibot aise.”
42.22: Teu Rubene tarare ḳoila, “Ami to tumrare ḳoislam, tar ufre kunu zulum ḳorio na, tumra hunlae na. Deḳo, oḳon tar lour hishab-nikash dite or.”
42.23: Oile Iusufe zen tarar mat buzra, ita tara zanlo na. Ḳaron tain mat buzaora eḳzonre maze rakia, tarar loge matta.
42.24: Teu Iusufe tarar ges tone horia gia ḳandita lagla. Bade hirbar aia tarar loge matila ar tain Shimionre doria tarar samne-u bandailla.
42.25: Bade Iusufe tarar bostar maze dan boraia, zarzir ṭeḳa tar bostat firai dia, erar fotor ḳanir mosa deoar lagi hukum dila. Ar oula ḳora oilo.
42.26: Heshe tara zarzir gadar fiṭit danor gaiṭ bandia roana oila.
42.27: Foto ziranir zagat gia zebla eḳzone gadare ḳaoanir lagi bosta kullo, ar deḳlo, bostar muko tar ṭeḳar kuti.
42.28: Ou he tar baiainre ḳoilo, “Deḳo, deḳo, amar ṭeḳa amar bostat firot deoa oise.” Dekia-u tarar zan uṛi gelo ar ḍoraia ḳafte ḳafte ḳoilo, “Allae amrare ita kita ḳorla?”
42.29: Bade Kenan desho gia tarar baf Iakubor gese azir oia, ita hoḳolta hunaia ḳoila,
42.30: “Hi deshor malike, amrare kub ḳoṛa golae ḳoisoin, amra guia oia hi desho gesi.
42.31: Amra ḳoisi, amra hok manush, kunu guia nae.
42.32: Amra barozon bai, eḳ bafor baro fua, oile amrar eḳzon nae ar hoḳol tone huru bai oḳon Kenan desho babar gese roise.
42.33: Ou hi manshe, zein hi deshor malik, tain amrare ḳoila, ‘Ami oula buzmu zen, tumra hok manush. Tumrar eḳ baire amar gese toia, tumrar aḳali foribaror lagi dan loia zao.
42.34: Ar tumrar huru baire amar gese loia aio. Teu ami buzmu, tumra hok manush, kunu guia nae. Bade ami tumrar baire firai dimu ar tumra i desho ḳay-ḳarbar ḳortae farbae.’ ”
42.35: Bade tara bosta tone dan ḍalte-u deḳoin, tarar hoḳlor ṭeḳar kuti bostar maze roise. Ita dekia tarar bafe ar tara-o ḍoraigela.
42.36: Teu bafe tarare ḳoila, “Tumra amare aolad saṛa banaiso. Iusuf nae, Shimion-o nae ar oḳon tumra hirbar Bin-Iaminre-o nitae sairae. Ita hoḳolta-u amar zulum.”
42.37: Rubene tan bafre ḳoila, “Ami Bin-Iaminre tumar gese firaia ante na farle, tumi amar duio fuare kun ḳorilio. Tare tumi amar ato saṛi deo, ami tare tumar gese firaia anmu.”
42.38: Iakube ḳoila, “Na, amar i fua tumrar loge ditam nae. Tar bai morigese, ar oḳon he eḳla zita ase. Tumrar zaoar foto zudi tar kunu bifod oy, te ou faḳna sule bout duk dia tumra amare ḳoyboro haraibae.”

43.1: Kenan deshor aḳalor dosha aro behal oilo.
43.2: Ar Mishor desh tone zeta dan nisla, ita fuṛai gele Israile ḳoila, “Tumra hirbar gia amrar lagi aro kisu ḳani-kuraki loia anogi.”
43.3: Teu Ehudae tanre ḳoilo, “Hou manshe amrare kub ḳoṛa bashae ḳoia disoin, ‘Tumrar bai tumrar loge na aile tumra ar amar samne aio na.’
43.4: Oḳon tumi amrar baire amrar loge ḳori deo, teu amra gia tumar lagi kani loia aimu.
43.5: Ar tare loge na dile amra-o zaitam nae. Hi manshe amrare ḳoia disoin, ‘Tumrar baire loge na anle, tumra ar amar samne aio na.’ ”
43.6: Israile ḳoila, “Tumra ḳene amar loge oula fatrami korlae? Tumrar aroḳ bai ase, ita tanre ḳene ḳoilae?”
43.7: Tara ḳoila, “Hi manshe amrar ar amrar foribaror aga-guṛi hokkolta zikaisoin, ‘Tumrar baf kita oḳono zinda asoin ni? Tumrar ar kunu bai asoin ni?’ Amra ḳali tan soalor zuaf dislam, amra kunu zantam ni, tain ḳoiba tumrar baire-o loia aio?”
43.8: Ehudae tan bafre ḳoila, “Tare amar loge ḳori dilao, amra zoldi zoldi roana oizai, teu tumi, amra ar amrar huruttain hokkol-u zane basmu, ḳeu mortam nae.
43.9: Ami nize-u tar lagi zamin roilam, tare amar ges tone shomzia nio. Ami tare tumar gese firaia na anle, tumar gese azir na ḳorle, hara zindegi bora ami tumar gese dayi roimu.
43.10: Ar oto deri na ḳorle, amra otodine duibar guria aitam farlam one.”
43.11: Ou tarar baf Israile ḳoila, “Oula oile ek kam ḳoro, tumra zarzir begor maze onor bala bala mal, agor, mou, kushboy moshla, meshke-ambor, pesta ar badam boria hou manshor lagi salami loia zao.
43.12: Ar tumrar loge ḳori agor ḍabul ṭeḳa neo, bostar muko ze ṭeḳa firot aise, ta-o hirbar loia zao, ki zani kunu bul oigesil.
43.13: Tumrar i baire loge loia, zoldi kori hou manshor gese zao.
43.14: Shorbo-shoktiman Allae tumrar lagi hou manshor dilo meherbani foyda ḳoroukka, zate tain tumrar hou bai ar Bin-Iaminre tumrar ato firot dein. Ar amar fua kuani gele, na oy gelo-u.”
43.15: Teu tara hou salami, ḍabul ṭeḳa ar Bin-Iaminre loia roana oia, Mishor desho fosia Iusufor samne azir oila.
43.16: Tarar loge Bin-Iaminre dekia Iusufe tan baṛir ḳadimre ḳoila, “Ou manush oḳolre baṛir bitre neo ar ḳoshi zobo ḳoria gust rando. Tara madane amar loge ḳaiba.”
43.17: Iusufe zela ḳoila, ḳadime-o ṭik oula ḳorlo, he erare baṛir bitre loia gelo.
43.18: Ar he erare Iusufor baṛir bitre neoae, tara ḍoraia mata-mati korla, “Agor fira ze ṭeḳa amrar bostat ḳori firot gesil, otar lagi-u amrare ono nira, oḳon amrar dush deḳaia mair-doir ḳoria amrare gulam banaiba, ar gada oḳol-o ḳaṛia niba.”
43.19: Teu Iusufor baṛir dorzar samne aia tara baṛir ḳadimre ḳoila,
43.20: “Huzur, amra er age-o dan loat aislam,
43.21: heshe firot zaoar bala, dom loibar zagat fosia, bosta kulte-u deki, amrar fura ṭeḳa-foysha zarzir bostar muko roise, oḳon ou ṭeḳa firot anchi.
43.22: Ar dan neoar lagi aro ṭeḳa anchi, oile hi ṭeḳa amrar bostar bitre ḳe toisil zani na.”
43.23: Ou ḳadime ḳoilo, “Tumrar balai ouk, ḍoraio na. Tumrar ar tumrar bafor Allae, i gaibi don tumrar bostar maze disoin. Tumrar ṭeḳa ami faisi.” Bade he Shimionre bar ḳoria tarar gese loia ailo.
43.24: He hoḳolre Iusufor baṛir bitre nia fani dilo tara fao duila ar he tarar gada oḳolre-o ḳani dilo.
43.25: Iusuf madane aiba gotike, era tarar salami oḳol zuit ḳorla. Tara hunsla zen, tan loge-u tarar ḳana-dana oibo.
43.26: Bade Iusuf baṛit aile, tarar hou salami oḳol goror bitre nia tanre dila, dia harle tanre soizda ḳorla.
43.27: Tarar bala-bura ḳobor hunia tain zikaila, “Tumrar ze murobbi bafor ḳota ḳoislae, tain bala asoin ni? Tain zinda asoin ni?”
43.28: Tara zuaf dila, “Ji oy, afnar gulam amrar baba oḳono zinda asoin ar bala asoin.” Heshe tara mata nuaia tanre ijjot ḳorla.
43.29: Iusufe souk tulia tan nizor bai Bin-Iaminre dekia ḳoila, “Ouni tumrar hou huru bai, zar ḳota age ḳoislae?” Tain Bin-Iaminre ḳoila, “Allae tumare rohom ḳoroukka.”
43.30: Baire dekia Iusufor dil ḳandito laglo. Tain zoldi kori bar oia, nizor kuṭat gia ḳandila.
43.31: Bade souk-muk doia bar oia aila ar nizore shamlaia ḳani bilaibar hukum dila.
43.32: Ou Iusufre, tan baiainre ar tan loge ḳaneala Mishori oḳolre alog alog zagat ḳani dila. Ḳaron Mishorinte Ibrani oḳlor loge boia ḳana-dana ḳorto na, ita tara gin ḳoroin.
43.33: Tara Iusufor samne tan baiainre boṛore boṛor zagat, hurure hurur zagat boaila, teu tara taijjub oia eḳzone aroḳzonor bae sai roila.
43.34: Ar Iusufe nizor talor ḳani tone tan baiainre deoaila, oile Bin-Iaminre hoḳol tone fas gun beshi deoa oilo. Ḳaia harle tara kushi oia uṭla.

44.1: Bade Iusufe tan baṛir ḳadimre ou laḳan hukum dila, “I manush oḳlor bostat zoto dan zaga oy, boria dilao ar zarzir ṭeḳa tar bostar muko toio.
44.2: Oile ou huru zonor bostar muko tar ṭeḳar loge amar rufar baṭi-o toio.” Iusufe tare zela ḳoila, he oula ḳorlo.
44.3: Bador din biane-u tara gada loia bidae oila.
44.4: Tara ṭaun taki tuṛa duroi zaite-u Iusufe tan baṛir ḳadimre ḳoila, “Zoldi kori erar ḳore douṛaia gia, erar lagal faia harle ḳoibae, tumra ufoḳaror bodla ḳene ḳeti korlae? Amar munibor rufar baṭi kene suri korlae?
44.5: Ou baṭit ḳoria to tain shorbot-fani kain ar todbiror ḳam-o ḳoroin. Tumra ita kub oinnae ḳorso.”
44.6: Hi kadime tarar ḳoredi gia lagal faia ou laḳan ḳoilo.
44.7: Oile tara ḳoila, “Huzur ila mat ḳene matira? Afnar gulam oḳole kunu laḳan-u ita ḳam ḳorto nae.
44.8: Deḳoukka, agorbar amrar bostar muko ze ṭeḳa faislam, ita amra Kenan desh tone hirbar afnar gese firot anchi, te amra kunu afnar munibor baṛi tone shuna-rufa suri kormu ni?
44.9: Afnar i gulam oḳlor maze zar gese ou baṭi faiba, tare marilaiba ar amra-o huzuror gulam oizimu.”
44.10: Teu ḳadime ḳoilo, “Bala ḳota, te tumra zela ḳoilae, oula-u ouk. Zar gese ou baṭi milbo, ḳali tare amar gulam banaimu ar baki hoḳol ḳalas faibae.”
44.11: Ou tara zoldi kori hoḳlor bosta maṭit lamaia kullo.
44.12: Ar ḳadime boṛo bai tone huru bai tori hoḳlor bosta tukaile-o heshe Bin-Iaminor bostat hi baṭi millo.
44.13: Teu tara zarzir finnor ḳafoṛ faṛilla, bade hirbar gadar fiṭit gaiṭ bandia ṭauno ailo.
44.14: Teu Ehuda ar tar baiain Iusufor baṛit gela, i shomoy tain hono asla. Tara tan samne gia maṭit foṛla.
44.15: Iusufe tarare ḳoila, “Tumra ita kita ḳorlae? Ami zen hoḳolta gontam fari, ita tumra zano na ni?”
44.16: Ehudae ḳoilo, “Huzuror gese amra kita ḳoimu? Kita zuaf dimu? Ar kila amrare be-ḳosur ḳoitam? Allae-u tan gulam oḳlor dush deḳai disoin, te zar gese i baṭi milche, he ar amra hoḳole-u huzuror gulam oilam.”
44.17: Oile Iusufe ḳoila, “Na, na, ami i kam kunu laḳan-u ḳortam nae. Zar gese ou baṭi milche, he-u amar gulam oibo, baki shob sohi-salamote tumrar bafor gese zaogi.”
44.18: Teu Ehudae Iusufor ḳasat gia ḳoilo, “Huzur afne to Feraunor homan, te doya ḳori afnar gulamre ekkan mat matar shuzug deukka. Afnar gulamor ufre gusa oin na zen.
44.19: Huzure age i gulam oḳolre zikaisla, tumrar baf ba kunu bai asoin ni.
44.20: Amra zuaf dislam, amrar murobbi baba zinda asoin, ar tan heshḳali boyoshor egu fua ase. Tar bai morigese, ar he eḳ maʼr eḳ fut gotike babae tare kub maya ḳoroin.
44.21: Bade afnar i gulam oḳolre ḳoisla, tare amar gese loia aio, ami tare nizor souke deḳmu.
44.22: Hi shomoy amra huzurre ḳoislam, babare toia he aito farto nae ar toia aile-o baba mara zaiba.
44.23: Oile afne i gulam oḳolre ḳoisla, tumrar huru baire loge na anle, tumra ar amar samne aio na.
44.24: Erlagi amra firia gia afnar gulam, amrar babare huzuror hoḳol ḳota hunaislam.
44.25: Bade babae ḳoila, tumra hirbar gia amrar lagi aro tuṛa dan loia anogi.
44.26: Teu amra ḳoilam, amrar huru baire loge dile amra zaimu, arnae amra gia hi manshor samne muk deḳaitam nae.
44.27: Ou afnar gulam, amrar babae ḳoila, tumra to zano, amar i bibir torofa dugu fua asil.
44.28: Erar eḳzon amar sokur samon taki bar oia gelo, ar to kunudin tare deḳlam na, ami buzlam zen, nisoy kunu zanuare tare siṛi-biṛilaise.
44.29: Oḳon tumra ere-o amar ges tone nilegi ar er kunu ḳeti oile, tar duke tumra amare ou faḳna sule ḳoyboro haraibae.
44.30: Erlagi oḳon zudi afnar gulam, amar babar gese ami zai ar tan i fuare loge na deḳoin, te er zanor loge tan zan ekḳano banda gotike,
44.31: tare na deḳle, tain nisoy mara zaiba. Afnar gulam, amrar murobbi baf bout duke faḳna sul loia ḳoyboro hamaiba.
44.32: Ar afnar gulam ami, amar babar gese tar lagi zamin oia ḳoisi zen, tare firaia ante na farle, hara zindegi bora ami tumar gese dabit roimu.
44.33: Te huzur ami minoti koriar, tar bodla ami afnar gulami kormu ar tare afne erar loge zaibar dilaukka.
44.34: Ere loge na nia ami kila babar gese zaimu? Naile babar zanor shorbonash amar nizor souke deḳon lagbo.”

45.1: Iusufe tan ḳormosari oḳlor samne nizore ar ṭik raḳta farla na, tain sillaia ḳoila, “Amar ges tone hokkol hori zao!” Teu baiaintor gese nizor forisoy deoar shomoy tan samne ar ḳeu roilo na.
45.2: Tain sillaia ḳandon shuru ḳorla, teu Mishori oḳole ita hunla ar Feraunor baṛir manshe-o i kobor faila.
45.3: Iusufe tan baiaintore ḳoila, “Ami Iusuf; amar baba oḳono zinda asoin ni?” Ou tan baiainte ḍoraia zoban bond oigelo, matta farla na.
45.4: Teu Iusufe tan baiainre ḳoila, “Tumra amar ḳasat ao.” Tara ḳasat aile tain ḳoila, “Ami tumrar hou bai Iusuf, Mishoro zaora befari oḳlor gese, tumra zare besilaislae.
45.5: Oile tumra amare besislae ḳori oḳon bezar oio na, ba nizor ufre naraz oio na. Manshor zanor hefazotor lagi, Allae-u tumrar age amare ono faṭaisoin.
45.6: Aḳal soler ou dui boros dori, te aro fas boros kunu ḳet-ḳamar ba foshol folto nae.
45.7: Duniait tumrar aolad oḳolre basaia raḳar lagi Allae-u tan kudrote tumrar age amare faṭaisoin.
45.8: Teu buza zae zen, tumra amare ino faṭaiso na, Allae-u faṭaisoin. Tain amare Feraunor bafor homani koria tan foribaror saloḳdar banaisoin, ar hara Mishor desh shashonor eḳtiar disoin.
