45.9: Oḳon tumra zoldi kori babar gese gia ḳo, tan fua Iusufe ḳoise, Allae amare hara Mishor deshor saloḳdar banaisoin, te tumi ar deri na ḳoria amar gese aio.
45.10: Tumi, tumar fua-fuṛin, nati-futi, goru-meṛar fal ar tumar zotota ase, hokkolta loia amar gese Gushon elaḳat roibae.
45.11: Hono ami tumare deḳa-huna ḳormu, aḳal to aro fas boros roibo, arnae tumitain hoḳole i aḳale behalot oizitae faro.
45.12: Amar afon bai Bin-Iamine ar tumra hoḳole nizor souke deḳrae zen, ami nizor muke tumrar loge matram.
45.13: Mishor desho amar zeta dafoṭ, man-ijjot deḳrae, tumra amar babare ita ḳoibae, ar tanre zoldi kori oḳano loia aibae.”
45.14: Heshe Iusufe tan bai Bin-Iaminor golat ainja ḳori doria ḳandon shuru ḳorla ar Bin-Iamine-o golat dori kanda-ḳaṭi korla.
45.15: Bade Iusufe tan hoḳol baiainre hunga dila ar tarar golat dori-o ḳandila. Teu baiainte-o tan loge mat-ḳota matla.
45.16: Iusufor baiain aoar ḳobor Feraunor baṛit fosile, Feraun ar tan ḳormosari oḳol kushi oila.
45.17: Feraune Iusufre ḳoila, “Tumar baiainre ḳo zen, tumra gadar fiṭit danor bosta bandia Kenan desho gia,
45.18: babare ar tumrar foribaror hokkolre loia amar gese aio. Ami tumrare Mishoror bala bala siz oḳol dimu ar tumra deshor hoḳol tone bala zaga-o faibae.
45.19: Ar tumrare ami hukum diar, tumra zarzir bou, fua-fuṛintor lagi Mishor desh taki gaṛi loia gia, tarare ar babare loia aio.
45.20: Ar hono tumrar mal-samanar lagi maya deḳaio na, hara Mishor deshor bala bala siz oḳol to tumrar-u.”
45.21: Israilor fuainte oula-u ḳorla. Feraunor hukume Iusufe tarar lagi gaṛi ar fotor ḳanir mosa dila.
45.22: Tain era hokkolre eḳ seṭ ḳoria ḳafoṛ dila, oile Bin-Iaminre dila fas seṭ ḳafoṛ ar tin-sho rufar ṭeḳa.
45.23: Tain tan bafor lagi doshgu gadar fiṭit ḳori Mishoror bala bala siz oḳol, ar doshgu gadir fiṭit ḳori kanir lagi ruṭi ar dan buzai kori faṭaila.
45.24: Ou laḳan tan baiaintore bidae dila, bidae bala tain erare ḳoila, “Tumra foto laga-lagi korio na.”
45.25: Bade tara Mishor tone Kenan desho, tarar baf Iakubor gese gia ḳoila,
45.26: “Iusuf oḳono zinda ase. He to oḳon asta Mishor deshor ortaḳorta.” Oile ita hunia Iakubor hush uṛi gelo, tan bishash-u oilo na.
45.27: Bade Iusufe tarare zeta ḳoia disla ita hunia, ar tane neoar lagi Iusufor faṭail gaṛin dekia, tarar baf Iakubor hush ṭik oilo.
45.28: Israile ḳoila, “Amar fua Iusuf zen oḳono zita ase, oṭa-u to bout, morar age ami gia tare deḳa-u lagbo.”

46.1: Israile tan hokkolta loia bar oigela. Ar Ber-Shebat aia tan baf Isʼhakor Allar name kurbani korla.
46.2: Bade raitor bala Allae Israilre didar dia ḳoila, “O Iakub, Iakub!” Tain zuaf dila, “Ounu ami.”
46.3: Allae formaila, “Ami Alla, tumar bafor Mabud. Tumi Mishoro zaite ḍoraio na, hono ami tumar eḳ biraṭ zati foyda ḳormu.
46.4: Ami tumar loge loge Mishoro zaimu, ar ami-u tumare hirbar firaia anmu ar tumar fua Iusufe tumar souk muzaia dibo.”
46.5: Bade Iakube Ber-Sheba taki roana oila. Feraune tarare neoar lagi zeta gaṛin disla, Israilor fuainte otat ḳori tarar bafre ar tarar bou, fua-fuṛinre loia gela.
46.6: Heshe Iakub, tan fuain ar tan fura gusṭi, foshur fal oḳol ar Kenan desho ḳamai kora hokkol don-doulot loia Mishoro fosla.
46.7: Ou laḳan Iakube tan fua-fuṛin, nati-natin, fura gusṭir hokkolre loia Mishoro faroigela.
46.8: Boni Israil, mani Iakub ar tan aolad oḳol zera Mishoro gesla, tarar ḳandan-nama oilo: Iakubor boṛo fua Ruben;
46.9: ar Rubenor fuain: Honuk, Falu, Hasir ar Kormi.
46.10: Shimionor fuain: Zimuel, Zamin, Ohod, Zakin, Shuhor, ar Kenani bour torofa Shoul.
46.11: Lebir fuain: Zarsun, Kahat ar Marari.
46.12: Ehudar fuain: Eir, Onon, Shela, Firuz ar Zarah. Oile Onon ar Eir Kenan desho-u mori gesla. Firuzor fuain: Hasir ar Hamul.
46.13: Isaḳoror fuain: Tola, Foa, Zashub ar Shimron.
46.14: Sobulonor fuain: Sered, Elon ar Zoholel.
46.15: Tara oila Lear huruttain, Foddon-Iramo Lear torofa Iakubor i huruttain ar tan fuṛi Dinar zonmo oisil, era hokkoltae tetrish zon.
46.16: Sadur fuain oila: Sifon, Hogi, Shuni, Ishbun, Eiri, Orudi ar Oreli.
46.17: Ashiror fuain: Imna, Zisba, Zisbi, Boria ar tarar boin Sera. Boriar fuain: Hebor ar Molkiel.
46.18: Tara oila Zilpar huruttain, Labone tan fuṛi Lear loge ou bandi Zilpare disla, era hoḳol-u tair torofa Iakubor huruttain, ou shullo zon.
46.19: Iakubor bibi Rahelar fuain oila: Iusuf ar Bin-Iamin.
46.20: Iusufor fuain Manosha ar Afraim Mishor desho zonmisla. Erar ma oila Oun mondiror babon-ṭakur, Puṭiferar fuṛi Asonot.
46.21: Bin-Iaminor fuain: Bela, Beḳor, Oshbel, Gera, Naman, Ehi, Rush, Muppim, Huppim ar Ord.
46.22: Tara oila Rahelar torofa Iakubor huruttain, ou souddo zon.
46.24: Noftalir fuain: Johoshiel, Guni, Izer ar Shillem.
46.25: Tara oila Bilhar huruttain, Labone tan fuṛi Rahelar loge ou bandi Bilhare disla. Era hoḳol-u tair torofa Iakubor huruttain, ou shat zon.
46.26: Iakubor nanan torofar zonmor zara Mishoro aila, tan fuaintor bou bad dia era hoḳole milia soyshoṭṭi zon asla.
46.27: Mishor desho Iusufor duizon fua zonmisla. Era shoho Iakubor foribaror zara Mishoro aila, tara muṭ shottoir zon.
46.28: Er age Iakube Ehudare Iusufor gese faṭaila, Gushono zaoar fot sinar lagi, teu tara hokkol ono gia fosla.
46.29: Ar Iusufe-o guṛar gaṛi hazaia tan baf Israilor loge Gushono deḳa ḳorat gela, ar tanre dekia-u ainja ḳori golat doria bout shomoy ḳandila.
46.30: Teu Israile Iusufre ḳoila, “Tumi zen zinda aso re fut, iṭa nizor souke deḳlam. Oḳon shantie-u mortam farmu.”
46.31: Ou Iusufe tan baiaintore ar tan bafor logor hoḳolre ḳoila, “Ami gia Feraunre zanaimu, amar baiain ar amar bafor baṛir hoḳol, Kenan desh tone amar gese aichchoin.
46.32: Tarar ḳam oilo foshu fala. Tara to sagol-meṛa faloin, ar tarar foshur fal oḳol ar hokkol mal-samana loia aichchoin.
46.33: Feraune zebla tumrare zikaiba, afnara kita ḳam ḳoroin?
46.34: Ou shomoy tumra ḳoio, afnar i gulam oḳole ar tarar baf-dada oḳole-o huruman tone-u foshu falia basoin. Teu tumra Gushono roitae farbae. Ḳaron foshu falra manshore Mishori oḳole gin ḳoroin.”

47.1: Iusufe Feraunor gese gia ḳoila, “Amar baba ar baiainte, tarar goru-sagol ar tarar hokkolta loia, Kenan desh saṛia aisoin. Tara aia Gushono fosi gesoin.”
47.2: Baiaintor maze fas zonre nia tain Feraunor samne azir ḳorla.
47.3: Feraune tarare zikaila, “Tumra kita ḳam ḳoro?” Tara ḳoila, “Afnar i gulam oḳole baf-dadar amol taki-u foshu fali.”
47.4: Tara hirbar ḳoila, “Amra i desho musafir oia taḳar lagi aisi. Kenan desho oḳon bezuita nidan soler ḳori, hino amrar foshur falor kuraki nae. Erlagi doya ḳori afnar i gulam oḳolre, Gushono roibar shuzug deukka.”
47.5: Feraune Iusufre ḳoila, “Tumar baf-baiain tumar gese aisoin;
47.6: asta Mishor desh-u to tumar samne foṛi roise. Deshor hoḳol taki bala zagat tarare roite deo, tara Gushono-u taḳouk ar erar maze zoiggo manush faile, tarare amar foshur falor saloḳdar banailao.”
47.7: Bade Iusufe tan baf Iakubre Feraunor samne anaila ar Iakube Feraunre dua dila.
47.8: Feraune Iakubre zikaila, “Afnar boyosh ḳoto oise?”
47.9: Iakube ḳoila, “Duniait amar musafirir ayu eḳ-sho tish boros oise, ita to beshi nae, ar kub toklife-u i din ḳaṭse; amar baf-dadar musafirir ayur homan oḳono oise na.”
47.10: Heshe Iakube Feraunre dua ḳoria bidae loila.
47.11: Teu Iusufe Feraunor hukum moto, tan baf-baiainre Mishor deshor hoḳol taki bala zaga, Ramashesh elaḳat roita dila.
47.12: Iusufe tan baf-baiain ar tarar foribarre zarzir dorḳari, ḳani-kuraki hoḳolta zugai dila. Mishor desho nidan baṛse
47.13: Bade aḳal aro betaya oilo, deshor kunu zagat ḳanir kunta asil na. Teu Mishor ar Kenan desh ekkebare ḳahil oigelo.
47.14: Mishor ar Kenan deshor manshor zoto ṭeḳa-foysha shuna-rufa asil, itadi tara dan ḳorid ḳorae, Iusufe ota dola ḳoria Feraunor banḍaro zomaila.
47.15: Mishor ar Kenan deshor hoḳol shuna-rufa zebla fuṛai gelo, teu Mishori oḳole aia Iusufre ḳoila, “Amrare ḳanir kunta deukka. Amrar shuna-rufa fuṛai gese ḳori afnar souḳor samne morizitam ni?”
47.16: Iusufe ḳoila, “Taile tumrar foshu oḳol ania deo, shuna-rufa fuṛai gele-o foshu oḳlor bodla ami tumrare ḳani-kuraki dimu.”
47.17: Teu tara zarzir goru-sagol, guṛa-meṛa, gada-gadi Iusufor gese anla ar Iusufe er bodla tarare dan dila. Ou laḳan tarar hokkol foshur bodla, hi bosoror kuraki salaila.
47.18: Ar hi boros gelo, er bador boros manshe aia Iusufre ḳoila, “Huzuror gese amra kunta-u lukaiar na, amrar hoḳol shuna-rufa shesh oigese ar foshu oḳol-o afnare dilaisi. Oḳon amrar ar kunta-u roise na, ḳali ou shoril ar zaga-zomin saṛa.
47.19: Erlagi afnar souḳor samne zomi-zoma shoho amra kila morizitam? Te afne amrare-o ar amrar hoḳol zomi-zoma-o loilaukka, amra Feraunor gulami kormu, ta-o amrare ḳani deukka ar bis deukka, teu amra-o mora tone basmu ar zomin ḳanain-o borbad oito nae.”
47.20: Ou Iusufe Mishor deshor hokkol zomin Feraunor name loilila, ḳaron i aḳal oula bezuita oisil zen, Mishoror hoḳole-u tarar zaga-zomin besilaila. Teu deshor hoḳol zomin Feraunor ato aillo.
47.21: Ar Iusufe Mishor deshor eḳ mata taki aroḳ matar hoḳol manshore ṭauno far ḳorilila.
47.22: Ḳali babon oḳlor zaga-zomin tain loila na, ḳaron erare Feraune beton dita, ar ota dia-u tara solta.
47.23: Heshe Iusufe manshore ḳoila, “Huno, Feraunor name ami tumrare ar tumrar hoḳol zaga-zomin-o loililam. Oḳon tumra ou bis oḳol neo ar zomino bain ḳoro.
47.24: Teu zomino zeta foshol folibo, er fas baṭor eḳ baṭ Feraunre dio ar baki sair baṭ, zominor bis, tumra ar tumrar foribar ar huruttaintor ḳanir lagi niogi.”
47.25: Teu manshe ḳoila, “Afne amrar zan basaila. Huzure amrare doya ḳorle, amra Feraunor gulami kormu.”
47.26: Bade Iusufe Mishor deshor zaga-zominor lagi ou ain zari korla, hoḳol fosholor fas baṭor eḳ baṭ Feraune faiba, ḳali babon oḳlor zomin bade. Ou ain oḳono soler. Hozrot Iakub (a:)re dafonor lagi osiot
47.27: Boni Israile Mishor deshor Gushono boshot ḳorla. Tara honor doḳoldari faia, kub folala oila ar tarar bout aolad oila.
47.28: Mishor desho aia Iakub shotro boros zinda roila. Teu tain hoḳoltae eḳ-sho shatsallish boros basila.
47.29: Israilor moutor din ḳasaia aile tan fua Iusufre ḳobor di anaia ḳoila, “Amar bae tumar meherbani oile ekkan osiot ḳoraitam, tumi amar urator tole tumar atḳan harao, tumi amar bae doya ar halali deḳaio, amare Mishoro dafon ḳorio na.
47.30: Ami zebla amar baf-dadar gese zaimugi, ou shomoy tumi amare Mishor desh taki nia, amar baf-dadar ḳobrostano dafon ḳorio.” Iusufe ḳoila, “Afne zela ḳoila, oula-u ḳormu.”
47.31: Teu Iakube ḳoila, “Te tumi amar gese ḳosom ḳoro.” Iusufe ḳosom ḳorla. Ou Israile tan bisnar hitan bae ḳait oila.

48.1: Erbade Iusufe ḳobor faila, tan baf bemar, ou tan duio fua Manosha ar Afraimre loia bafre deḳat aila.
48.2: Iakube zebla hunla, tan fua Iusuf aisoin, ou tain shorilor hoḳol bol ḳaṭaia, uṭia bisnat boila.
48.3: Ar tain Iusufre ḳoila, “Shorbo-shoktiman Allae Kenan deshor Luz ṭauno, amare didar dia borkot dan ḳoria ḳoisla,
48.4: ‘Huno, ami tumare foldar ḳormu ar bout aolad dimu, tuma tone bout gusṭiala eḳ zati foyda ḳormu ar tumar oarish oḳolre, hameshakur lagi i deshor malikana dimu.’
48.5: Ami tumar gese Mishoro aibar age, tumar ze duio fua Mishoro zonmisoin, tara amar-u. Ruben ar Shimion zela amar, oula Manosha ar Afraim-o amar oiba.
48.6: Oile erar bade tumar zeta hurutta oisoin, tara tumar-u roiba, ar tarar bair name-u erar malikana ḳaim oibo.
48.7: Ar Foddon taki amra aoar shomoy, Kenan deshor Ifrat taki tuṛa duroi taḳte-u, Rahela mara gela. Teu ami honor Ifrato, Betelhamor fotor daro tanre dafon ḳorlam.”
48.8: Bade Iusufor fuaintor bae saia Israile zikaila, “Era ḳe?”
48.9: Iusufe tanre ḳoila, “Era amar fuain, Allae ou desho-u erare disoin.” Tain ḳoila, “Erare amar ḳasat ano. Ami tarare dua ḳortam.”
48.10: Murobbi boyosho souḳor zuti komi zaoae Israile bala ḳori deḳta na. Teu era ḳasat aile, Israile tarare ainja ḳori doria hunga dila.
48.11: Tain Iusufre ḳoila, “Babare, ami mono ḳorslam tumar muk ar kunu din deḳtam nae, oile Allae tumar aolad oḳolre-o deḳailila.”
48.12: Teu Iusufe tan bafor ges tone, fuaintore horaia maṭit soizda ḳorla.
48.13: Ar Iusufe tan duio fuare loia, ḍain at dia Afraimre doria Israilor bau galat, ar bau at dia Manoshare doria Israilor ḍain galat ania azir ḳorla.
48.14: Oile Israilor nizor aḳole, tan at aṛa-aṛi koria, ḍainor at huru fua Afraimor matat ar Iusufor boṛo fua Manoshar matat toila tan bau at.
48.15: Bade tain Iusufre dua ḳoria ḳoila, “Hou Alla, zan morzie amar baf-dada, Ibrahim ar Isʼhake solta, hou Alla, zein foyla taki aiz forzonto amare falia aira,
48.16: hou firista, zein amare hoḳol mosibot taki basaisoin, tain-u ou duio fuare borkot nazil ḳoroukka. Erare dia-u Ibrahim ar Isʼhak ar amar nam zinda taḳouk. Duniair maze tarar bout gusṭi ouk.”
48.17: Bafe tan ḍain at Afraimor matat raḳla ḳori Iusuf bezar oigela. Ar Afraimor mata taki horaia, Manoshar matat deoar lagi, tan bafor at usa ḳorla.
48.18: Tain ato doria ḳoila, “Baba, i laḳan nae. Ounu amar boṛo fua, te afnar ḍain at tar matat raḳoukka.”
48.19: Oile tan bafe na-kush oia ḳoila, “Babare, ami ita zani, ami ita zanire fut. Tar-o eḳ zati oibo ar mohan oibo, oile tar huru bai tar saite-o mohan oibo, ar tar aolador bout gusṭi oibo.”
48.20: Israile erbade ou duio natire dua ḳoria ḳoila, “Boni Israile kunu manshore dua ḳorle oula ḳoiba, Allae tumare Afraim ar Manoshar laḳan ḳoroukka.” Oula tain Manoshar saite Afraimre boṛo banaila.
48.21: Heshe Hozrot Israile Iusufre ḳoila, “Deḳo, amar moronor oḳt aichche. Alla tumrar loge roiba, ar tumrare hirbar tumrar baf-dadar desho nichchoy firaia niba.
48.22: Tumar baiaintor saite tumare eḳ baṭ beshi dilam. Ou baṭ to Shikim elaḳa, ita amar toluar-donuk dia Amuri oḳlor ges taki anslam.”

49.1: Bade Iakube tan fuaintore anaia ḳoila, “Tumra hokkol ekḳano o. Bobishote tumrar zindegi kila zaibo, ita ami tumrare ḳoiram.
49.2: Iakubor fuain, tumra ekḳano ao; tumrar baf Israilor buli huno.
49.3: Ruben tumi amar boṛo fua, tumi amar bol, amar zuankir foyla fol; tumi hoḳol taki tezi ar himmoti.
49.4: Tumi utrail gorom fanir laḳan, tumar boṛai roito nae; tumi afon bafor bisnat geso, haton maʼr loge nafaki kam ḳorso.
49.5: Shimion ar Lebi dui bai; tarar toluar zalimor atiar.
49.6: O amar zan, tarar mozliso hamaio na; O amar shan, tarar shomazo zaio na. Tara gusa ḳori kun ḳorlo; aṛuami kori bisalor rog kaṭlo.
49.7: Tarar gusa to lannoti, ita boṛo bezuita; lannoti tarar zulum, ita to fashan. Ami tarare Iakubor maze baṭimu; Boni Israilor maze sitrai dimu.
49.8: Ehuda, tumar baiainte tumar tarif ḳorba; tumi dushmonor gordonat dorbae; tumar bafor oarish oḳole, tumar gese mata nuaiba.
49.9: Tumi to shinghor baichcha Ehuda. Tumi shikaror gust ḳaia horia ailae; he shinghor laḳan leṭia hutia goṛiailo; shinghire ḳegue gum bangaito?
49.10: Ehudar at tone to raz-laṭi horto nae; tar duio faor maz tone bisaror goda zaito nae; zotodin Shilo na aiba, ar hoḳol zati tan hukume solba.
49.11: He angur gaso banbo tar gada; anguror shundor ḍalo banbo gadar baichcha; lal anguror roshdi duibo tar zubba, anguror loudi korbo lebas sofa.
49.12: Tar souk anguror roshe lal ṭoḳṭoḳa, ar tar dat dudor laḳan dola.
49.13: Sobulon doriar faro boshot ḳoribo, he zaz biṛanir gaṭ oibo, Sidon forzonto tar shimana oibo.
49.14: Isaḳor egu bolala gada, he kuoṛor bitre hute.
49.15: He deḳlo ziranir zagaḳan bala, deshḳan shundor; teu gaiṭ boibar lagi kand lamailo, ar zuror gulam oilo.
49.16: Dane tar nizor proza oḳlor bisar ḳorbo, Israilor ek gusṭir laḳan.
49.17: He oibo shoṛokor daror haf, fotor bishala alod; zegie guṛar faot ḳamoṛ mare, guṛ-soar ḳoredi ulṭia foṛe.
49.18: O Mabud, ami tumar nazator muka sai roisi.
49.19: Sadure luṭra dole hamla ḳorbo, bade he-o tarar ḳoredi luṭibo.
49.20: Ashiror kub bala foshol folibo, he bashshar zuka ḳani zugaibo.
49.21: Noftali oilo saṛa horini, tar muko ase miṭa miṭa mat.
49.22: Iusuf folala gasor ḍal, indarar daror folala gasor ḍal; tar ḍalain beṛ faroizae.
49.23: Tir-donuk alainte tare bezuita toklif disla, tir maria tare beḳaydat falaisla;
49.24: oile tar donuk mozbut roilo, tar ator honat bol roilo; Iakubor hou mohan shoktialar at dia, zein Israilor asroy ṭilla, tanre dia.
49.25: Tumar bafor hou Allare dia, zein tumare shaijjo ḳorba; hou Shorbo-shoktimanre dia, zein tumare borkot nazil ḳorba; ufre toa asman taki lamra borkote, tole bisail fani taki bar oa zornar borkote, bukur dud ar feṭ taki bar oa borkote.
49.26: Amar baf-dadar dua taki, tumar bafor deoa dua bout bala ouk; ita hameshakur ḳaṛa hazail faṛ-forbot taki lamouk. Hou dua Iusufor matat foṛouk; baiain taki alogor matar talut foṛouk.
49.27: Bin-Iamin oilo boṛo-bagor laḳan, he biane ḳae shikaror gust, ar hainjae bilae luṭor mal.”
49.28: Era oila Israilor baro gusṭi, tarar bafe tarar lagi duar shomoy oula ḳoila. Tain era hokkolre zarzir faona dua dila. Hozrot Iakub (a:)or inteḳal ar dafon
49.29: Bade Iakube tan fuaintore osiot ḳoraila zen, “Amar to baf-dadar gese zaoar shomoy oigese, te Hiṭṭi Ifrunor zominor guhat, amar baf-dadar ḳandat amare dafon ḳorio.
49.30: I guha Kenan deshor, Momrir daro Moḳfelar zomit. Ibrahime Hiṭṭi Ifrunor ges tone ou zomin loisla ḳobrostan bananir lagi.
49.31: Ono-u Ibrahim ar tan bibi Sayrare dafon ḳora oise, Isʼhak ar tan bibi Rebekare-o ono dafon ḳora oise, ar ami Leare-o ono dafon ḳorsi.
49.32: I zomin ar er mazor guha Hiṭṭi oḳlor ges tone loisla.”
49.33: Iakube tan fuaintore osiot ḳora shesh oile, bisnar ufre tan duio fao ekḳano ḳorla ar aḳeri dom saṛia tan baf-dadar gese gelagi.

50.1: Iusufe tan bafor mukor ufre muk lagaia ḳandita lagla ar tanre hunga dila.
50.2: Bade tain nizor odinor hekim oḳolre hukum dila, tara tan bafor lashre momi banaibar lagi. Teu tara tan gotro momir moshla lagaila.
50.3: Tara i kamo sallish din lagaila, ou ḳamo to sallish din-u lage. Ar Mishori oḳole tan lagi shottoir din boria ahazari korla.
50.4: Ou ahazarir dinor bade, Iusufe Feraunor baṛir manshore ḳoila, “Afnara zudi amare doya ḳoroin, te Feraunre amar ou ḳotaḳan zanaukka zen.
50.5: Babae amare ḳosom ḳoraia ḳoisla, ‘Huno, ami to morizimu, te Kenan desho amar lagi zuit ḳora ḳoyboro amare dafon ḳorio.’ Teu oḳon tanre dafonor lagi, doya ḳori amare zaite deukka, babare ḳoybor dia-u ami hirbar aimu.”
50.6: Feraune zuaf dila, “Tain tumare zela ḳosom ḳoraisoin, tumi gia oula-u ḳoro.”
50.7: Teu Iusufe tan bafre dafonor lagi roana dila; ar Feraunor hoḳol gulame, tan dorbaror murobbi oḳole ar Mishoror moy-murobbi oḳole,
50.8: Iusufor nizor foribar, tan baiain ar tan bafor foribaror hoḳole roana dila. Gushono ḳali tarar huruttain ar goru-meṛar falain toia gela.
50.9: Tara bout guṛar gaṛi ar guṛ-soar oḳol loia eḳ biraṭ dol hazia roana dila.
50.10: Ar Zordan gangor hofaro Aṭador dan maṛar zagat gia, tara hoḳole shatdin dori Iusufor bafor lagi kub ahazari ar bilaf ḳorla.
50.11: Aṭador dan maṛar zagat tarare ila ahazari korat dekia, hi deshor bashinda Kenani oḳole ḳoila, Mishori oḳlor lagi iṭa kub bezuita ahazari; erlagi Zordan gangor faror ou zagar nam oigelo, Abel-Mishroyim [mani, Mishori oḳlor ahazari].
50.12: Israile tan fuaintore zela osiot ḳorsla, tara tanre ola-u ḳorla.
50.13: Tara tan lash Kenan desho loia gela, ar Momrir gese Moḳfelar zominor, guhar maze tanre dafon ḳorla. Iṭa ḳobrostan bananir lagi Ibrahime, Hiṭṭi Ifrunor ges taki loisla.
50.14: Bafre dafon ḳorar bade Iusuf, tan baiain ar zoto manush tan bafre dafon ḳorat loge gesla, tara hoḳole Mishoro firia aila. Hozrot Iusuf (a:)e baiainre maf ḳorla
50.15: Baf morigesoin dekia Iusufor baiainte mata-mati korla, Iusufe kiba amrare ginnaibo ar amra tar zeta ḳeti korsi, oḳon ita hokkoltar bodla loibo.
50.16: Teu tara Iusufor gese ḳobria faṭaia ḳoila, “Tumar bafe morar age i osiot ḳorsla zen,
50.17: tumra Iusufre ou ḳotaḳan ḳoio, tumar baiainte tumar zeta ḳeti korsoin, doya ḳori tumi tarar hi oinnae ar guna maf ḳori dio. Erlagi amra minot ḳoriar, tumar bafor Allar ou gulam oḳolre maf ḳori dilao.” Tarar mat hunia Iusufor ḳandon aillo.
50.18: Bade tan baiainte tan samne aia maṭit foṛia ḳoila, “Huno, amra to tumar gulam.”
50.19: Oile Iusufe tarare ḳoila, “Tumra ḍoraio na. Ami kunu Allar ḳolifa ni?
50.20: Tumra to amar ḳeti kortae saislae, oile Allae itare balai banailla, zela aiz deḳrae, te tan kial asil ou laḳan ḳori bout manshor zan basaita.
50.21: Tumra oḳon ḍoraio na. Ami tumrare ar tumrar fua-fuṛintore deḳa-huna ḳormu.” Tain ou laḳan ḳori tarare buz dila ar kush dile mat-ḳota matila. Hozrot Iusuf (a:)or inteḳal
50.22: Bade Iusuf ar tan bafor aolad oḳole Mishoro boshot ḳorat roila. Iusuf eḳ-sho dosh boros zinda asla.
50.23: Tain Afraimor natinosha forzonto deḳla ar Manoshar fua Makiror huruttain-o Iusufor ato foyda oila.
50.24: Bade Iusufe tan baiaintore ḳoila, “Amar to moutor oḳt aichche, nisoy Allae tumrar bae nozor raḳba. Tain Ibrahim, Isʼhak ar Iakubor gese ze desh dita ḳori kosom ḳorsoin, tumrare on taki hou desho loia zaiba.”
50.25: Ar Iusufe Boni Israilre ou osiot ḳoraila, “Nisoy Allae kunudin tumrar bae nozor ḳorba. Te on taki zaoar bala tumra amar aḍḍi oḳol tulia loia zaio.”
50.26: Heshe eḳ-sho dosh boros boyosho Iusuf mara gela. Teu manshe tan lashre kushbu-mosholadi makia momi banaia Mishor desho ek kafonor baksor bitre toila.

1.1: Allae Hozrot Iakubor noya nam disla Israil, erlagi tan bongshor nam oilo Boni Israil. Iakube tan bibin-baichchain ar foribaror hoḳolre loia Mishor desho gelagi. Ou shomoy tan loge oia zera gela, erar nam oilo,
1.2: Ruben, Shimion, Lebi, Ehuda,
1.3: Isaḳor, Sobulon, Bin-Iamin,
1.4: Dan, Noftali, Sadu ar Ashir.
1.5: Iakubor bongshor hokkoltae milia shottoir zon asla. Ar Iusuf ag taki-u Mishoro taḳta.
1.6: Bade Iusuf, tan baiain, ar hi amolor hoḳol mara gela.
1.7: Oile tarar bador bongshodor baṛia kub bolala oila. Era sairobae sitria asta Mishor desh borigela.
1.8: Ermaze Mishoro eḳzon noya bashsha oila, ein Iusufre sinoin na.
1.9: Ein nizor proza oḳolre ḳoila, “Saia deḳo, Boni Israil amra taki beshi-o ar bolala-o.
1.10: Te ao, amra eḳ fondi kori, ita zenu ar na baṛoin. Arnae tara baṛia heshe zuddor ḳalo amrar dushmonor loge milia amrar birudde zuddo ḳorbo, bade amrar desh taki zaibogi.”
1.11: Teu tara shordar lagaila erare maria-doria zur-zulum ḳoria ḳam ḳoranir lagi. Era Feraunor foshol raḳar lagi Pitum ar Ramashesh namor duiṭa ṭaun-o banaila.
1.12: Oile erar ufre zoto beshi zur-zulum ḳora oilo, era-o oto beshi baṛila ar sitrila. Erlagi Mishori oḳole Boni Israilre kub ḍoraigela.
1.13: Ḍoraia eraredi aro ḳoṭin ḳam ḳoraila.
1.14: Maṭi kam, iṭor ḳam ar ḳetor maze ḳoshṭor ḳam ḳoraia erar zanre titta banaililo. Ar tara zur-zulum ḳoria nisṭur-fashanor laḳan ḳam ḳoraito.
1.15: Bade Mishoror bashshae Shifra ar Fuah namor duizon Ibrani dai beṭire hukum dila,
1.16: “Tumra Ibrani beṭintor dai girit gia, itar fuain foyda oile-u marilaio, ḳali fuṛintore zita rakio.”
1.17: Oile hi dai beṭinte Allare ḍoraita gotike, Mishori bashshar hukum na mania fuaintore-o zita raḳta.
1.18: Teu bashshae erare nia zikaila, “Ita ḳam ḳene ḳorlae? Fuaintore ḳene zita raḳlae?”
1.19: Tara zuaf dila, “Ibrani beṭin Mishori beṭintor laḳan nae, tara bout bolala. Daibeṭi tarar ḳasat zaibar age-u tarar hurutta foyda oizae.”
1.20: -21 Ou duio beṭie Allare ḍoraita ḳori, Allae rohomot ḳoria tarare-o aolad dila. Ar Boni Israil-o aro beshi kori baṛia kub shoktiman oila.
1.22: Ita dekia Feraune nizor proza oḳolre hukum dila, “Ibrani oḳlor kunu fuain oile-u tumra Nil nodo falai dio, ḳali fuṛintore zita rakio.”

2.1: Ermaze Lebi kandanor eḳzon manshe, tan nizor ḳandanor ek koinare shadi korla.
2.2: Ou ḳoinar goro eḳ fuar zonom oilo. Fuagu deḳte kub shundor oae, tin mash dori lukai raḳla.
2.3: Heshe ar lukaita na faria, tain nol-ḳagṛar eḳ ṭukri loila. Ou ṭukrit maṭia tel ar alḳatra lefia ogur bitre huruttare haraia, gangor soror nol bonor maze toia aila.
2.4: Ar er kita dosha oy deḳar lagi, tar boin duroi ubailo.
2.5: Tuṛa bade Feraunor fuṛi gango naoat aila. Gangor faro tan bandi oḳol guragurit asil. Tain soror nol-ḳagṛar maze ou ṭukri dekia, tan bandire ḳoila, “Ou ṭukrigu an.”
2.6: Ṭukrir ḍala kulia deḳla, er bitre eḳ fuae ḳander. Dekia tan maya lagigelo. Tain ḳoila, “Ish, igu to kunu Ibranir fua.”
2.7: Ou shomoy fuar boin aia Feraunor fuṛire zikailo, “Rani ma, i huruttare dud ḳaoanir lagi kunu Ibrani beṭire faile afnar gese antam ni?”
2.8: Feraunor fuṛie ḳoila, “Za angi.” Teu fuṛie gia fuar maʼre loia ailo.
2.9: Feraunor fuṛie tanre ḳoila, “Ogo, ami tumar beton dimune, tumi amar oia ou fuagure bukur dud ḳaoao.” Ou hi beṭie nia huruttare dud ḳaoaia falila.
2.10: Fuagu kisu boṛo oar bade tain nia Feraunor fuṛir gese dilaila. Feraunor fuṛie enre nizor fua banaia falila. Tain ḳoila, “Ami tare fani taki ṭania tulchi.” Erlagi tar nam raḳla Musa [mani, ṭania tula]. Hozrot Musa (a:) Mishor desh taki bagi gela
2.11: Heshe Musa boṛo oigele eḳdin tan nizor zatir baiaintor gese gia deḳla, tara kub ḳoshṭor ḳam ḳorra. Ermaze deḳla, tan nizor Ibrani zatir eḳ beṭare, eḳ Mishorie mair-doir ḳorer.
2.12: Dekia sairobae saia ar kunu manush na deḳae, tain hou Mishorire kun ḳoria balur tole gaṛilla.
2.13: Bador dino tain hirbar bare gela. Gia deḳla, duizon Ibranie nize nize maramari korer. Ou tain dushi zonre ḳoila, “Oba, tumar baire ḳene marrae?”
2.14: He ḳoilo, “Tumare ḳegie amrar hakim banaia bisar ḳorat faṭailo? Ḳail zela hou Mishorire kun ḳorso, oula amare-o kun ḳoriltae sairae ni?” Ou Musae ḍoraigela. Tain buzla ita to zana-zani oigese.
2.15: Ar Feraune-o ita hunia Musare marilta saila. Ou shomoy Musa Feraunor ges taki bagi gela. Bagia Madian desho boshot ḳorar lagi aila. Aia honor ek kuar ḳasat boila.
2.16: Madian desho Shuaib namor eḳ imam sab asla. Tan shatzon fuṛin asoin. Ou fuṛinte kuar faro aia, tarar bafor sagol-meṛare fani kaoanir lagi gamla borat lagla.
2.17: Ou shomoy oinno raḳal oḳole tarare ḳedaia dilailo. Oile Musa ubaia tarare shaijjo ḳorla, ar tarar falre fani kaoaila.
2.18: Tara tarar bafor daro gia harle tain zikaila, “Tumra aiz oto zoldi kemne ailae?”
2.19: Tara ḳoila, “Eḳ Mishori beṭae amrare raḳal oḳlor at taki basaisoin. Ein amrar sagol-meṛare fani tulia ḳaoaisoin.”
2.20: Teu tain zikaila, “I manushgu kuai? Tumra tare toia aillae ḳene? Ere ḍakia ania ḳana ḳaoao.”
2.21: Erbade Musae ou imamor baṛit roite razi oila. Imam sabe tan fuṛi Sofurare Musar loge shadi dila.
2.22: Bade Sofurar goro eḳ fua oile Musae ḳoila, “Ami to boitol bonia bidesho roiram.” Erlagi ou fuar nam raḳla Zarsum [mani, boitol].
2.23: Bout din bade Mishoror bashsha morigela. Boni Israile gulamir lagi kator oia ḳanda-ḳaṭi korlo. Tarar ḳandon Allar gese kobul oigelo.
2.24: Allae tarar foriad hunla. Tain Ibrahim, Isʼhak ar Iakubor loge tan oadar ḳota iad ḳorla.
2.25: Ar Boni Israilor bae muk firaila, doyar nozore tarar bae saila.

3.1: Ou shomoy Musae tan hour Madian zatir imam sab Hozrot Shuaibor sagol-meṛa raḳta. Eḳdin tan sagolor fal loia morubumir hesh galat Allar hou Tur faṛor ḳasat gela.
3.2: Hono eḳ zonglar maze Mabudor firistae agunir laḳan nuror maz taki tanre deḳa dila. Musae deḳla, zonglar maze aguin zoler oile zongla zoler na.
3.3: Ou tain taijjub oia ḳoila, “Zongla ze zoler na, er ḳaron kita? Te aro ḳasat gia deki sain.”
3.4: Allae zebla deḳla ein deḳar lagi kasat zairagi, ou shomoy tain zonglar maz taki ḍakia ḳoila, “Musa, O Musa!” Musae ḳoila, “Ounu ami.”
3.5: Allae ḳoila, “Ar samne aguaio na. Tumar fao taki zuta kulilao. Zano ni, tumi oḳon ze zagat ubaiso ikan pak zaga.
3.6: Huno, ami Alla-u tumar bafor Mabud, Ibrahimor Mabud, Isʼhakor Mabud ar Iakubor-o Mabud.” Ikan hunia-u Musae tan muk lukailla. Allar bae saite tan dilo ḍor hamaigelo.
3.7: Mabude ḳoila, “Ami Mishor desho amar bonda oḳlor duḳ-mosibot dekiar. Mishori shordar oḳlor zulumor lagi tarar ḳandon huniar. Tarar duk-koshṭo hoḳolta ami deḳsi.
3.8: Dekia Mishori oḳlor at taki tarare basaitam ḳori ami nize lamia aisi. Te ami tarare Mishor taki horaia nimugi. Nia roshail zomir bout boṛo shundor eḳ desh dimu. Ikan dud ar mour banḍar-ala desh. Ou desh oilo oḳonkur Kenani, Hiṭṭi, Amuri, Farizi, Hibbi ar Zibuzi oḳlor desh.
3.9: Boni Israilor foriad amar dorbaro aise, Mishori oḳole tarare zela sataira, ita ami dekiar.
3.10: Erlagi ami tumare Feraunor gese faṭaiar. Tumi zao, gia amar bonda Boni Israilre Mishor taki bar ḳoria ano.”
3.11: Musae zuaf dila, “Ami aroḳzon ḳe, zein Feraunor samne gia Mishor desh taki tarare horaitam farmu?”
3.12: Allae ḳoila, “Ami to tumar loge loge roimu. Tumi Mishor taki manshore horaia ania, tarare loia ou faṛo amar ebadot ḳorbae. Teu buzbae ami-u tumare faṭaisi.”
3.13: Musae aroz ḳorla, “Deḳoukka, ami zebla Boni Israilre gia ḳoimu, tumrar baf-dadar Mabude amare faṭaisoin, ou shomoy tara zudi zikain tan nam kita, te tarare kita zuaf ditam?”
3.14: Allae ḳoila, “Ami zein asi, asi-u. Boni Israilre oula ḳoio, zen nam ‘Ami asi’ tain amare tumrar gese faṭaisoin.”
3.15: Tain aro ḳoila, “Tumi gia tarare ḳoio, ‘Hou Alla zein hor-hamesha asoin, ein tumrar baf-dadar Mabud, Ibrahimor Mabud, Isʼhakor Mabud ar Iakubor-o Mabud, ein-u amare tumrar gese faṭaisoin.’ “Amar hor-hameshakur nam ‘Ami zein asi’. Zuge zuge, furushe furushe ou nam ḳaim roibo.
3.16: Tumi zao, gia Boni Israilor murobbi oḳolre ekḳano dola ḳoria ḳo, hou Alla, zein tumrar baf-dadar Mabud, Ibrahim, Isʼhak ar Iakubor Mabud, tain amare didar dia ḳoisoin, tain tumrar bae kial ḳorsoin, tumrar ufror zulum-mosibot deḳsoin, Mishor desho tumrar bae zeta ḳora or eota tain kial ḳorsoin.
3.17: Oḳon tain ḳoira, Mishoror gulami taki tumrare basaia Kenani, Hiṭṭi, Amuri, Farizi, Hibbi ar Zibuzi oḳlor dud ar mour banḍar-ala desho tain tumrare nibagi.”
3.18: Allae aro ḳoila, “Boni Israilor murobbi oḳole tumar ḳota hunba, tumi tarare loge loia Mishoror bashshar gese zaio. Gia ḳoio, ‘Alla zein Ibrani oḳlor Mabud, tain amare doroshon disoin. Erlagi amra tan name ekkan kurbani kortam saiar, amra morubumir bae tin dinor fot gia kurbani dimu, te amrare zaoar onumoti deukka.’
3.19: Oile ami zani Mishoror bashshae tumrare zaite dito nae, zur-zobordosti korle-o dito nae.
3.20: Teu ami amar kudroti at lagaimu ar oula asanok gozob nazil ḳormu, zate he tumrare zaite dey.
3.21: Ar ami Mishori oḳlor dilor maze Boni Israilor bae emon eḳ doyar bab foyda ḳoraimu, era zanu Mishor taki kali ate na zain.
3.22: Hoḳol Israili beṭinte tarar ari-fori ba zerar baṛit tara roin, oula Mishori beṭintor ges taki tarar shuna-rufar goyna-gaṭi ar bala ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ kuzia nio. Ota dia tumrar fua-fuṛinre-o hazaio, ou nomunae tumra Mishorintor don-samana doḳol ḳorbae.”

4.1: Musae zuaf dila, “O Mabud, tara zudi amare ekin na ḳoroin, amar mat na hunoin ba tara zudi koin, Mabude tumare doroshon disoin na, te ami kita ḳortam?”
4.2: Teu Allae tane zikaila, “Tumar ato igu kita?” Tain ḳoila, “Egu laṭi.”
4.3: Allae ḳoila, “Oḳṭa maṭit falao.” Musae laṭire maṭit falaite-u iṭa haf oigelo. Haf dekia-u tain faldi hori gela.
4.4: Allae tane hukum ḳorla, “At baṛaia ogur lenjo doro.” Ar tain dorar loge loge ogu hirbar laṭi oigelo.
4.5: Bade Allae ḳoila, “Tumi-o oula ḳorio, teu tara hasau ekin ḳorba tarar baf-dadaintor Mabud, Ibrahimor Mabud, Isʼhakor Mabud ar Iakubor Mabude tumare doroshon disoin.”
4.6: Allae aro ḳoila, “Tumar at tumar saddoror tole harao.” Tain at haraila, ar bar ḳorar bade-u tan at kusṭo-dolbeda bemare dudor laḳan dola oigelo.
4.7: Allae ḳoila, “Tumar at hirbar hono harao.” Tain haraila ar saddoror tol taki bar ḳoria deḳoin, agor laḳan bala oigese.
4.8: Allae ḳoila, “Tara zudi tumare ekin na ḳoroin, te tumar laṭire haf oa deḳle ekin ḳorba, ar eoṭae ekin na ḳorle tumar ator bemaror keramoti deḳle tara ekin ḳorba.
4.9: Ar zudi i duio keramotie-o ekin na ḳoroin, tumar ḳota na manoin, te tumi Nil nod taki tuṛa fani ania hukna maṭit falaio, deḳbae maṭit foṛia-u i fani lou oizibo.”
4.10: Ou Musae Mabudre ḳoila, “O malik, ami to bala ḳori mat-ḳota-u mattam fari na, age-o fartam na ar afne i gulamor loge batchit ḳorar bade-o fari na, amar to zifra baṛua.”
4.11: Allae ḳoila, “Manshor muk ke banaise, ami nae ni? Ḳe manshore buba, ḳalua ba anda banain? Souke deḳar lagi sokur faoar ḳe dein? Ita to ami Allae-u dei na ni?
4.12: Te tumi zao, gia kita matitae ami hikaia dimu. Tumar mukor zobanre ami shaijjo ḳormu.”
4.13: Tain ḳoila, “O malik, ami minot ḳoriar, oinno ḳeurore faṭai deukka.”
4.14: Ou Musar ufre Mabudor gusa uṭlo. Tain ḳoila, “Tumar bai Harun bin Lebi ase na ni? Ami zani, he bala boktita dito fare. He oḳon tumar loge deḳa ḳorat ar, tumare dekia he kub kushi oibo.
4.15: Tumi hikaia dio ar ḳoio he kita matito. Ami tumra duiozonor mukor zobanre shaijjo ḳormu. Ar hono gia kita ḳortae ami hikaia dimu.
4.16: Tumar bai Harunor muk oibo tumar muk, he tumar oia manshor loge matibo. Fegambor oḳole zela Allar kalam ḳoin, Harune oula tumar buli koibo.
4.17: Ou laṭi tumar ato rakio, iṭa dia hou keramoti-muzeza oḳol zair ḳorbae.”
4.18: -19 Madian desho taḳte-u Mabude Musare hukum ḳorsla, “Tumi Mishoro zaogi, ḳaron Mishoror zeta manshe tumare kun ḳorta saisla, ita oḳon mori gesoin.” Teu Musae tan hour Shuaibor ḳasat gia ḳoila, “Ami amar zonom maṭi Mishor desho zaitam sairam, amar ḳesh-kuṭum oḳol zita asoin ki na, tarar hal-hokikot deḳat zaitam, te amare zaoar onumoti deukka.” Houre ḳoila, “Aichcha, sohi-salamote zao.”
4.20: Ou Musae tan bibi ar fuaintore gadar ufre soṛaia Mishoror fote roana oila. Tan ato Allai keramotir hou laṭi raḳla.
4.21: Allae Musare hukum dila, “Tumi Mishoro gia harle amar deoa keramoti oḳol Feraunor samne deḳaio, oile ami tar dilre fashan banailimu, he manshore saṛto nae.
4.22: Tumi Feraunre ḳoio, Mabude nize ḳoisoin, ‘Boni Israil to amar foyla futor laḳan .
4.23: Ami nize tumare hukum ḳorslam, amar ebadoto zaita ḳori tumi amar futre saṛi ditae, oile tumi mancho na. Erdae ami-o tumar foyla futre marilimu.’ ”
4.24: Bade Mishoro zaoar foto rait ḳaṭaibar zagat aile Mabude Musare marilita ḳori mukamuki oila.
4.25: Oile tan bibi Sofurae ekkan darail fattor loia tan fuar mosolmani korailla ar oḳṭa tan zamai Musar faor maze soaia ḳoila, “Lour bodla ami tumare zamai hishabe faisi.”
4.26: Teu Musare Mabude saṛidila. Mosolmani kamor befare Sofurae to ou ḳota-u ḳoisla.
4.27: Ermaze Mabude Harunre ḳoila, “Tumi morubumit gia Musar loge deḳa ḳoro.” Ou tain gela ar Allar faṛ Turor gese aia Musare faia suma dila.
4.28: Ar Mabude zeta zeta ḳoibar lagi Musare hukum disla, Musae ita hokkolta Harunre zanaila. Mabude zoto laḳan keramoti-muzeza deḳanir hukum disoin, ita hoḳolta-u tain Harunre buzaila.
4.29: Bade Musa ar Harun Mishor desho gia Boni Israilor hoḳol murobbire dola ḳorla.
4.30: Mabude Musare zotota ḳoisla, Harune ita hoḳolta tarare zanaila, ar hou keramoti oḳol-o manshor samne deḳaila.
4.31: Erlagi manshe ita ekin ḳorla. Tara zebla hunla, Mabude tarar bae kial ḳorsoin, tarar ufror zulum-mosibot deḳsoin, ou tara tanre soizda ḳorla.

5.1: Musa ar Harune gia Feraunre ḳoila, “Mabud, zein Boni Israilor Alla, tain nize ḳoisoin, amar bonda oḳolre tumi saṛi deo, amar name hoj ḳorar lagi, tara morubumit hizrot ḳorte oibo, tumi tarare saṛo.”
5.2: Feraune zuaf dilo, “I Mabud aroḳzon ḳe, zen hukum mania ami Boni Israilre saṛi ditam? Ila kunu Mabudre ami sini na, ar Boni Israilre-o ami saṛtam nae.”
5.3: Tara ḳoila, “Ibrani oḳlor Allae amrare doroshon disoin. Erlagi amra minot ḳoriar amrare morubumir bae tin dinor fot gia, amrar Mabud Allar name kurbani korte deukka, arnae tain amrare gozobi bemar dia ba zuddor maze falaia marilaiba.”
5.4: Mishoror bashshae zuaf dila, “O Musa ar Harun, tumra manshore ḳene ḳamo taki firairae? Zao, tumra-o gia ḳamo lago.
5.5: Deḳrae ni, desho tumrar manush bout baṛigesoin, ar tumrar lai faia itae kunu ḳam ḳorra na.”
5.6: Ou Feraune hou din-u Mishori zalim shordar ar Ibrani subedar oḳolre hukum ḳorla,
5.7: “Iṭ banaibar lagi tumra manshore agor laḳan ḳer-nera ania dio na, tara gia ita zugaṛ ḳorouk.
5.8: Oile age tara zotoḳan iṭ banaito oḳono otoḳan banaite oibo, ekkan-o ḳom oito nae. Ita alshia oigesoin ḳori, ono aia tarar Allar namor kurbani korta ḳoia sillaira.
5.9: Tumra tarare aro ḳoshṭor ḳamo lagao, teu itae kunu laḳan baze mat na hunia ḳamor maze mon diba.”
5.10: Ou hi shordar ar subedar oḳol baroi gia manshore ḳoila, “Feraune ḳoisoin, oḳon taki tain ar iṭ bananir ḳer zugai dita nae.
5.11: Tumra zen taki faro ḳer-nera zugaio, oile tumrar ḳam kunta-u ḳomail oito nae.”
5.12: Ou manshe ḳer-nera tukaibar lagi hara Mishor desho sitri gela.
5.13: Ar shordar oḳole bare bare tagda dia ḳoilo, “Age ḳer zugaia deoar bala tumra forteḳ din zotoḳan iṭ banaitae, oḳono otoḳan banao.”
5.14: Feraunor zalim shordar oḳole Boni Israilor ufre ze subedar lagaisil, hou shordar oḳol aia subedar oḳolre mair-doir ḳoria zikailo, “Tumra age zotoḳan iṭ ditae, oḳon otoḳan deo na ḳene?”
5.15: Ou Boni Israilor subedar oḳole aia Feraunor gese nalish dila, “Afnar i gulam oḳlor loge ila bebohar ḳene ḳorra?
5.16: Shordar oḳole amrare ḳer-nera zugai dein na, ta-o iṭ banaibar hukum dein ar afnar i gulam oḳolre mair-doir ḳoroin, oile dush to afnar nizor shordaror.”
5.17: Feraune zuaf dilo, “Tumra alshia, kuṛia, erlagi koirae Mabudor name kurbani korat zaitam.
5.18: Zao, ḳam ḳoro gia. Tumrare ḳer deoa zaito nae, ta-o forteḳ din zotoḳan iṭ banaibar ḳota asil, otoḳan-u banaite oibo.”
5.19: Ou Boni Israilor subedar oḳole buzla, tara bifodor maze foṛsoin, ḳaron tarare hukum ḳora oise, age zotoḳan iṭ banani lagto, oḳono otoḳan iṭ banaite oibo, ḳom oito nae.
5.20: Tara Feraunor ges taki zaoar foto Musa ar Harunor loge deḳa oilo, era ubaia bar saoat asla.
5.21: Subedar oḳole ḳoila, “Mabude afnarar faona shaza diba, afnara Feraun ar tar uzir-naziror gese amrare fosa-ganda banaia, amrare kun ḳorar lagi toluar nia tarar ato disoin.”
5.22: Ou Musae hirbar gia Mabudor gese foriad ḳorla, “O din duniar malik, tumi kene tumar bondare mosiboto falailae? Ar amare kitallagi faṭailae?
5.23: Feraunor gese tumar ḳota hunanir bad taki-u tumar bonda oḳlor ufre zulum to aro baṛise. Oile tumi to kunta-u ḳorlae na.”

6.1: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Feraunor kita dosha oy tumi dekio, amar ator zur deḳle-u he manshore saṛi dibo. Zurala ator kudrot deḳle-u he tar desh taki erare ḳedai dibo.” Boni Israilor logor oada Allar iad ase
6.2: Allae Musar loge batchit ḳori koila, “Amar nam-u ‘Alla zein asoin’.
6.3: Ami Ibrahim, Isʼhak ar Iakubor gese Shorbo-shoktiman Alla name didar ditam, ‘Alla zein asoin’ name tarare didar ditam na.
6.4: Ami tarar loge ou oada ḳorslam, ami tumrare Kenan desh dimu, ze desho tumra musafir oia ro, ou desh-u ami tumrare dimu.
6.5: Ḳas ḳori Mishori oḳole Boni Israilre gulami koranir lagi erar ḳandon hunia, amar hou oada oḳon iad ḳorlam.
6.6: Erlagi tumi gia Boni Israilre ḳo, Mabude ḳoisoin, ami Mabud, ami tumrare Mishori oḳlor tol taki bar ḳoria anmu, tarar gulami taki azad ḳormu. Tarare deḳar moto shaza dia, amar kudroti atdi tumrare ḳalas ḳormu.
6.7: Heshe tumrare amar nizor bonda banaimu, ami nize tumrar Alla oimu. Teu tumra buzbae, ami Alla-u tumrar Mabud, ar Mishori oḳlor baror tol taki ami-u tumrare basaisi.
6.8: Ami Ibrahim, Isʼhak, Iakubor loge ze deshor ḳota oada ḳorsi, hou desho tumrare loia zaimu, tumra hou deshor malik oibae. Ami-u Mabud.”
6.9: Musae gia ita hoḳolta tarare zanaila, oile hi betaya zulum-toklif ar gulami korte ḳorte mon-mora oizaoae, tara ar Musar mate ḳan dila na.
6.11: “Tumi gia Mishoror bashsha Feraunre ḳo, he zanu tar desh taki erare zaite dey.”
6.12: Musae zuaf dila, “Boni Israile-u zebla amar mat huner na, te Feraune kila hunbo? Ar amar to matte muko lagizae.”
6.13: Teu Mabude Musa ar Harunre ḳoila, “Tumra Boni Israil ar Mishoror raza Feraunre ḳo, Mabude amrare hukum disoin, Boni Israilre Mishor taki bar ḳori neoar lagi.” Hozrot Musa ar Harun (a:)or baf-dadaintor forisoy
6.14: Boni Israil zatir mul murobbi oila Hozrot Iakub, Allae ou Iakubor noya nam disla Israil. Tan fuain oila Ruben, Shimion, Lebi shoho muṭ barozon. Musa ar Harun oila ou Hozrot Lebir bongshodor. Israilor boṛo fua Rubenor fuain oila Honuk, Falu, Hasir ar Kormi, era to Ruben ḳandanor nanan gusṭir mul murobbi.
6.15: Shimionor fuain oila Zimuel, Zamin, Ohod, Zakin, Shuhor ar tar Kenani bour torofa fua Shoul, era Shimion ḳandanor nanan gusṭir mul murobbi.
6.16: Ḳandan talika hishabe Hozrot Lebir fuain oila Zarsun, Kahat ar Marari. Lebi eḳ-sho shaṛtish boros basisla.
6.17: Zarzir gusṭir fordan hishabe Zarsunor fuain oila Libni ar Shimei.
6.18: Kahator fuain oila Imran, Izhar, Hebron ar Ujjol. Kahat eḳ-sho tetrish boros basisla.
6.19: Mararir fuain oila, Moholi ar Mushi. Era-u oila Lebi kandanor nanan gusṭir mul murobbi.
6.20: Imranor fuain oila Musa ar Harun. Imrane tan fufu Iukabezre bia ḳorsla, tan feṭo erar zonom oisil. Imran eḳ-sho shaṛtish boros basisla.
6.21: Izharor fuain oila Kurah, Nefog, Zikri.
6.22: Ujjolor fuain Mishayel, Elzafon ar Zitri.
6.23: Ar Harune Aminadabor fuṛi Nahishor boin Ilishebare bia ḳorae, tan hurutta oila Nadab, Abihu, Ali-Azor ar Isamar.
6.24: Kurahor fuain oila Oshir, Ilkana, Obiashof. Era Kurahi oḳlor nanan gusṭir mul murobbi.
6.25: Ali-Azoror fua oila Finohosh. Harunor fua Ali-Azore Fuṭielor fuṛire bia ḳorae tair feṭo Finohoshor zonom oisil. Era oila Lebi kandanor nanan gusṭir mul murobbi.
6.26: Ou Harun ar Musare Mabude hukum ḳorsla, tumra Boni Israilre sifai dolor laḳan hazia Mishor taki bar ḳoro.
6.27: Musa ar Harune-u Boni Israilre Mishor taki bar ḳori anar ḳota Mishoror bashsha Feraunor loge matisla. Mabude Hozrot Musa ar Harun (a:)re hukum dila
6.28: Mabude Musar loge zedin Mishor desho batchit ḳorla,
6.29: hou din tain ḳoila, “Ami Mabud. Te tumare oḳon zeta zeta ḳoimu, ita hoḳolta tumi Mishoror bashsha Feraunre ḳoio.”
6.30: Musae Mabudor dorbaro aroz ḳorla, “Deḳoukka, amar to matte muko lagizae, Feraune kunu amar mat hunbo ni?”

7.1: Ou Mabude Musare ḳoila “Huno, ami Feraunor gese tumare Allar laḳan banaimu. Ar tumar bai Harunre banaimu tumar nobi.
7.2: Ami tumare zela hukum ḳormu, tumi oula Harunre ḳoibae, ar Harune ota Feraunre ḳoibo; zate he Boni Israilre tar desh taki saṛi dey.
7.3: Oile ami Feraunor dilre fashan ḳorilimu. Mishor desho ami bout keramoti ar kudroti lila-ḳela deḳaimu.
7.4: Tar bade-o Feraune tumrar mator dam dito nae. Teu ami Mishoror ufre amar at lagaia, deḳar moto shaza dia Mishor desh taki amar nizor bonda Boni Israilre sifair laḳan dole dole bar ḳormu.
7.5: Mishoror maze amar nizor at lagaimu, Mishori oḳlor maz taki Boni Israilre bar ḳoria anmu, oudin tara buzba ami-u Mabud.”
7.6: Bade Musa ar Harune oula ḳorla, Mabudor hukum mafik kam ḳorla.
7.7: Feraunor loge mat-ḳotar shomoy Musar boyosh asil ashi, ar Harunor tirashi boros. Hozrot Harun (a:)or keramotir laṭi
7.8: Ou shomoy Mabude Musa ar Harunre ḳoila,
7.9: “Feraune zebla ḳoibo, tumrar nizor kunu keramoti kam deḳao, teu tumi Harunre ḳoio, tar laṭi nia Feraunor samne falaito, falanir loge loge-u iṭa haf oizibo.”
7.10: Bade Musa ar Harun Feraunor gese gela, gia Mabudor hukum mafik kam ḳorla. Harune Feraun ar tar uzir-naziror samne hou laṭi falanir loge loge-u iṭa haf oigelo.
7.11: Ou Feraune-o tar gunin ar zadugir oḳolre anailo, tara-o tarar zadu-montro dia oula deḳaila.
7.12: Tara hoḳole-u zarzir laṭi saṛlo, ar eota haf oigelo, oile Harunor laṭie tarar hokkol laṭire gilililo.
7.13: Ita dekia-o Feraunor dil fashan roilo, he erar mate ḳan dilo na, zela Mabude age ḳoisla. Allar foyla gozob, fani lou oigelo
7.14: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Feraunor dil to fashan, he manshore saṛte razi nae.
7.15: Te tumi biani bala Feraunor gese zaio, gele deḳbae he fanir gese zaibo, tumi tar loge deḳa ḳorar lagi Nil nodor faro ubaio. Tumar ze laṭi haf oisil, ou laṭi ato ḳori nio.
7.16: Nia tare ḳoio, ‘Mabud, zein Ibrani oḳlor Alla, tain nize amare faṭaisoin afnare oḳan ḳoitam, tumi amar bonda oḳolre saṛi deo, tara amar bondegi korar lagi morubumit hizrot ḳorouk, ta-o oḳono tumi hunrae na.
7.17: Erlagi oḳon tumi buzbae, ami-u Mabud.’ Oḳan ḳoia hari tumi koio, ‘Deḳoukka, ami nizor ator laṭi dia ou Nil nodor fanit baṛi marmu, ar hokkol fani lou oizibo.
7.18: Hokkol mas morizibo ar fosa gondo bar oibo, teu Mishori oḳole ou Nil nodor fani kaita farta nae.’ ”
7.19: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Harunre ou ḳota ḳo, tumi nizor laṭi loia Mishori oḳlor hokkol fanir ufre, deshor gang-nala, ḳal-bil, aor-baor sairobae tumar at baṛao, teu itar hokkol fani lou oizibo. Fattor kudia banail ba laḳṛir fatil-ḳoloshor maze toa fani-o lou oizibo.”
7.20: Ou Musa ar Harune Mabudor hukum mafik oula ḳorla, tain laṭi usa ḳori Feraun ar tar uzir-naziror samne Nil nodor fanit baṛi marla, teu hoḳol fani lou oigelo.
7.21: Nil nodor hoḳol mas morigelo, hoḳol fanit fosa gondo bar oilo, Mishori oḳole fani ar ḳaita farla na, Mishor deshor hoḳol fani lou oigelo.
7.22: Mishori zadugir oḳole-o tarar zadu-montro saṛia oula ḳorlo, ete Feraunor dil fashan roilo. He erar mato ḳan dilo na, zela Mabude age ḳoisla.
7.23: Bade Feraune Musa ar Harunre fis dia tar razbaṛit gelogi, ita kuntat-u ḳan dilo na.
7.24: Oile kunu Mishorie gangor fani kaite na farae, fani kaoar lagi gangor faror sairobae tara gat kudila.
7.25: Nil nodor fanit Mabudor gozob nazil oar bade shat din guzori gelo.

8.1: Ou shat din bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi Feraunor gese zao, gia tare ḳo, Mabude nize ḳoira, amar kezmot ḳorar lagi amar bonda oḳolre saṛi deo.
8.2: Tarare na saṛia kunu bada dile, ami beng dia tumar asta desho gozob ḍalmu.
8.3: Asta Nil nod benge boriziba, ar ita aia tumar razbaṛit, hutibar goro, tumar bisnat uṭiba. Ar tumar uzir-naziror goro, tumar proza oḳlor goro, tumar undal ar fiṭa banaibar gamlat-o aia hamaiba.
8.4: Tumar, ar tumar uzir-naziror, ar proza oḳlor gotro beng uṭiba.”
8.5: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Harunre ḳo, tumi Nil nod ar ḳal-bilor ufre hou laṭiala at baṛaia asta Mishoro beng anao.”
8.6: Ou Harune Mishoror hoḳol fanir ufre tan at baṛaila, teu bengainte aia Mishor desh boria jam oigela, kunu zaga ḳali roilo na.
8.7: Oile zadugir oḳole-o tarar zadu-montro dia Mishoro oula beng anlo.
8.8: Bade Feraune Musa ar Harunre anaia ḳoila, “Mabudor gese aroz ḳoro, tain amar ges taki ar amar proza oḳlor ges taki i beng oḳol horaia neukka, taile ami manshore saṛi dimu, zate tara gia Mabudor name kurbani korto fare.”
8.9: Ougi Musae Feraunre ḳoila, “Afne amare ṭik kori koukka, ami kun shomoykur lagi minoti kortam, kun shomoy afnar gor, afnar uzir-nazir ar proza oḳlor gor taki beng oḳol horia zaitagi, gia ḳali gango roita?”
8.10: Tain ḳoila “Ḳailkur lagi.” Ou Musae ḳoila, “Afnar zoban moto-u ouk, zate afne buzta faroin, amrar Mabud Allar homani ar ḳeu nai.
8.11: Bengainte afnar ges taki, afnar gor-baṛi taki, afnar uzir-nazir ar proza oḳlor gor taki horia gia ḳali Nil nodo roiba.”
8.12: Musa ar Harun Feraunor ges taki bare gela, gia Musae Mabudor gese foriad ḳorla, Feraunor ufor taki bengor gozob horanir lagi.
8.13: Mabude Musar arzi kobul ḳorae, tarar baṛi-gor, uṭan ar bondor hoḳol beng morigelo.
8.14: Ar manshe itare zagae zagae dola ḳorle, fosia desho gondo bar oilo.
8.15: Oile Feraune zebla deḳlo, gozob to horigese, ou he tar dil fashan ḳorillo. Erar mato ar ḳan dilo na, zela Mabude age ḳoisla. Allar tin nombor gozob, mosha
8.16: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi Harunre ḳo, tumi tumar laṭi baṛaia maṭir dulit baṛi maro, teu i duil mosha oia asta Mishor desh borizibo.”
8.17: Tara oula ḳorla, Harune tan laṭiala at baṛaia maṭir dulit baṛi marla, teu maṭir hokkol duil mosha oigelo. Ou moshae manush, zanuar ar Mishoror hokkolbae borigelo.
8.18: Ar zadugir oḳole-o tarar zadu-montro dia oula mosha banaito sailo, oile farlo na. Manush ar zanuaror maze mosha roilo.
8.19: Teu zadugir oḳole Feraunre ḳoila, “Ita to Allar kudrot.” Ta-o Feraunor dil fashan roilo, he erar mate ḳan dilo na, zela Mabude age ḳoisla. Allar sair nombor gozob, ḍash-masir fal
8.20: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi fozore uṭia Feraunor gese azir o, gele deḳbae he fanir gese aibo. Tumi tare oula ḳoio, Mabude nize ḳoira, amar kezmot ḳorar lagi tumi amar bonda oḳolre saṛi deo.
8.21: Zudi na saṛo taile ami tumar, tumar uzir-nazir, tumar proza oḳlor ufre, ar tumar goraintor maze ḳamṛaora ḍash-masir fal faṭaimu, ita fale fale aia Mishori oḳlor goro ar tarar boshot-biṭa shoho hoḳol zagat jam oiziba.
8.22: Oile ami amar bonda oḳlor boshot ḳana Gushon elaḳare ita taki basaimu, ino ḍash-masir fal aita nae. Teu tumi buztae farbae, ami Alla i desho asi.
8.23: Ami to amar bonda ar tumar prozar maze tofat-partokko ḳormu, ḳail i nomuna deḳbae.”
8.24: Ar Mabude oula ḳorla, Feraun ar tar uzir-naziror goro ḳamṛaora ḍash-masir fal ailo, asta Mishor deshor hokkolbae ḍash-masir lagi shorbonash oigelo.
8.25: Teu Feraune Musa ar Harunre ḍaḳaia ḳoila, “Tumra zao, deshor bitre tumrar Allar name kurbani korogi.”
8.26: Musae ḳoila, “Ila ḳora ṭik nae, ḳaron amrar Mabud Allar name Mishori oḳlor ginna ḳora kurbani korte oibo. Ar deḳoukka, Mishori oḳlor samne tarar ginna ḳora kurbani korle tara to amrare fattordi iṭaia mariliba.
8.27: Te amrar Mabud Allae zela hukum ḳorba, amra morubumir bae tin dinor fot horia gia, tan name oula kurbani kormu.”
8.28: Feraune ḳoila, “Ami tumrare saṛi diar, tumra morubumit gia tumrar Allar kurbani koro. Oile beshi duroi zaio na, tumra amar lagi-o minot ḳorio.”
8.29: Ou Musae ḳoila, “Deḳoukka, ami afnar ges taki horia gia Mabudor gese minoti kormu, teu ḳail afnar ges taki, afnar uzir-nazir ar afnar proza oḳlor ges taki ḍash-masir fal horiziba. Oile manshe Mabudor kurbani korat zaite afne ar kunu baotabazi koroin na zanu.”
8.30: Bade Musae Feraunor ges taki gia Mabudor gese minoti korla.
8.31: Ar Mabude Musar arzi mafik kam ḳorla. Feraun, tar uzir-nazir ar tar proza oḳlor ges taki hokkol ḍash-masi horigela, egu-o roilo na.
8.32: Oile hirbar Feraune tar dil fashan ḳorillo, manshore saṛlo na.

9.1: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi Feraunor ḳasat gia tare ḳo, Mabud, zein Ibrani oḳlor Alla, tain nize ḳoira, amar ebadot ḳorar lagi amar bonda oḳolre saṛi deo.
9.2: Tarare saṛte razi na oia oḳono bada dile,
9.3: hunia raḳo, bondor maze tumar foshuintor ufre, guṛaintor, gadaintor, uṭ, ar goru-sagol, meṛaintor ufre-o ami Mabude at dimu, betaya bemaror morki saṛimu.
9.4: Oile ami Mabude Mishoror ar Boni Israilor foshur maze tofat ḳormu; Boni Israilor kunu foshu morta nae.”
9.5: Ar Mabude shomoy-o ṭik koria dilaila, samnor ḳail tain desho i kam ḳorba.
9.6: Hasau bador din Mabude oula-u ḳorla, teu Mishoror hokkol foshu morigela, oile Boni Israilor egu foshu-o morla na.
9.7: Feraune manushdi kobor loia deḳlo, Boni Israilor egu foshu-o morsoin na; ta-o tar dil fashan roilo, he manshore saṛlo na. Allar soy nombor gozob, bish-furi
9.8: Ou Mabude Musa ar Harunre ḳoila, “Tumra duiozone muiṭ boria undalor sali ano, ania Musae ou salire Feraunor samne ufredi siṭai deo.
9.9: Deḳbaene, ita hara Mishor deshor maze fatla duil oia hoḳol zagar manush ar foshuintor gotro gozobi bish-furi oibo.”
9.10: Teu tara undalor sali ania Feraunor samne ubaia, Musae ufredi siṭai dila, ete manshor ar foshuintor gotro bish-furi fuṭilo.
9.11: Ar ou furir lagi zadugir oḳole Musar samne ubaita farla na, hoḳol Mishori ar zadugir oḳlor gotro-o bish-furi oilo.
9.12: Oile Mabude Feraunor dil fashan ḳorilla. He erar mate ḳan dilo na, zela Mabude age ḳoisla. Allar shat nombor gozob, hil-tufan
9.13: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi biane uṭia Feraunor samne ubaia oula ḳoio, Mabud, zein Ibrani oḳlor Alla, tain nize ḳoira, amar ebadot ḳorar lagi amar bonda oḳolre saṛi deo.
9.14: Naile ifira ami tumar, tumar uzir-nazir ar tumar proza oḳlor maze amar hokkol zator gozob saṛimu. Teu tumi buzbae, hara duniait amar homani keu nai.
9.15: Er age-u ami amar at baṛaia betaya morki dia tumare ar tumar proza oḳolre martam farlam one, tumi duniai taki binash oigelae one.
9.16: Ashole erlagi-u ami tumare duniait otodin basaisi, zate tumare amar lila-ḳela deḳai, ar hara duniait amar nam zair oy.
9.17: Tumi oḳono amar bonda oḳolre saṛrae na, tumar beṭagiri deḳairae,
9.18: te dekio, ḳail i shomoye ami ou laḳan hil-tufan ar meg dimu, zeta Mishoror zonom taki aiz forzonto kunudin oise na.
9.19: Erlagi bondor maze tumar foshuin ar zotota ase, itare ania goro harao; manush ba foshuin zeta goro hamaita nae, itar ufre hil foṛia hokkolṭi morba.”
9.20: Teu Feraunor uzir-naziror maze zera Mabudor zobane ḍoraila, tara zoldi kori nizor gulam ar foshuintore goror bitre anaila.
9.21: Oile Mabudor zobanre zetae dam dilo na, tarar gulam ar foshuintore bondor maze toilo.
9.22: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi asmanor bae nizor at baṛao, teu Mishoror hokkol zagat hil-tufan oibo, Mishoror manush, foshu ar ḳetor hoḳol gas-gasalir ufre ita foṛbo.”
9.23: Ou Musae tan ator laṭi ufredi tulla, Mabude Mishor deshor ufre megor ḍak-zilkanir loge hil-tufan deoaila; ar asmani ṭaṭa zomino foṛlo.
9.24: Ou hilor loge megor zilkani ar ṭaṭa-o asil. I laḳan gozobi hil-tufan Mishor deshor zonom taki kunudin-o oise na.
9.25: Hara Mishor deshor bondor mazor hokkol manush ar foshuintor ufre-o kub zure zure hil foṛlo, ar ḳetor hoḳol foshol nosṭo oigelo ar hoḳol gas-gasali-o bangi gelo.
9.26: Ḳali Boni Israilor boshot ḳana Gushon elaḳat hil-tufan oilo na.
9.27: Bade Feraune manush faṭaia Musa ar Harunre anaia ḳoilo, “Ifira ami oforad ḳorsi. Mabud to fak-fobitro, oile ami ar amar proza oḳol oforadi.
9.28: Te gozobi megor ḍaḳ ar hil-tufan to bout oise, ar zartam fariar na. Erlagi ami oḳon tumrare saṛi dimu, ar aṭḳaitam nae. Tumra amar lagi Mabudor gese minot ḳoro.”
9.29: Musae tare ḳoila, “Ami ṭaunor baire gia-u Mabudor gese at tulmu, teu megor ḍaḳ, hil-tufan bond oizibo, zate afne buzta faroin i duniai to Mabudor.
9.30: Oile ami to zani, afne ba afnar uzir-nazir oḳole oḳono Alla Mabudre ḍoraira na.”
9.31: I shomoy ḳetor hoḳol nalia gas ar barli foshol nosṭo oigelo, ḳaron nalia gasor ful ar barlir soṛa bar oigesil.
9.32: Oile kunuzator gomor gas boṛo na oae itar ḳeti oilo na.
9.33: Teu Musae Feraunor samne taki ṭaunor bare gia Mabudor gese at tulla, loge loge megor ḍaḳ, hil-tufan bond oilo, megor zoṛi-o bond oigelo.
9.34: Oile Feraun ar tar uzir-nazir oḳole meg, megor ḍaḳ ar hil foṛa bond oigese dekia tarar dil fashan ḳorilla. Feraune hirbar guna ḳorlo.
9.35: Tar dil fashan oizaoae, he Boni Israilre saṛlo na, Mabude age zela Musare ḳoisla.

10.1: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi Feraunor gese zao; ami to tar ar tar uzir-naziror dilre fashan ḳorilisi, zate tarar samne ami amar kudroti lila-ḳela deḳaitam fari.
10.2: Ami Mishori oḳlor ufre zeta zeta ḳoṭin gozob disi, tarar maze kudroti zeta lila-ḳela zair ḳorsi, tumi ita tumar aolad ar nati-futir gese gof ḳortae faro, ar ami-u zen Mabud iṭa buztae faro.”
10.3: Teu Musa ar Harune Feraunor gese gia ḳoila, “Alla, zein Ibrani oḳlor Mabud, tain nize ḳoira, tumi amar samne mata nuaite ar ḳotodin horail roitae? Huno, tumi amar bonda oḳolre amar ebadot ḳorar lagi saṛi deo.
10.4: Tarare saṛte razi na oile dekio, ami kail tumar shimanat fongofal oḳol saṛimu.
10.5: Itae aia tumar asta zominre oula beriliba, kunu manshe maṭi deḳto farto nae. Hil-tufan taki zotota basigese, ḳetor maze zoto gas-gasali roise, ita hokkolta tara ḳailiba.
10.6: Tumar nizor gor-baṛi, tumar uzir-naziror gorain, ar hokkol Mishori oḳlor gorain boria jam oiziba. Tumar moy-murobbi ar tarar baf-dada oḳole-o duniait tarar zonom taki aiz forzonto kunudin oula deḳsoin na.” Oḳan ḳoia-u tain muk firaia Feraunor ges taki bare gelagi.
10.7: Feraunor uzir-nazire tare ḳoila, “I beṭae ar ḳotodin amrare sataito? Otar Mabud Allar ebadotor lagi otare saṛi deukka. Afne oḳono kunta buzra na ni, asta Mishor deshnu sarḳar oizar?”
10.8: Ou Feraune Musa ar Harunre hirbar anailo, anaia ḳoilo, “Tumra zaogi, gia tumrar Mabud Allar ebadot ḳoro. Oile ḳe ḳe zaitae sairae?”
10.9: Musae ḳoila, “Amra to Mabudor name hojo zairam. Te amrar huruttain, murobbi, fua-fuṛin ar goru-sagol loia zaimu.”
10.10: Feraune ḳoilo, “Aichcha, ami zudi hasau tumrare hurutta-murutta dia saṛi dei, te tumrar ou Mabud-o zanu tumrar loge oia zaegi. Ḳobordar! Tumrar motlob to bala nae.
10.11: Na, ila to oito nae, tumrar hokkolta nite ditam nae. Tumra zebla zaitae-u sairae, te ḳali beṭain zaogi.” Oḳan ḳoia hari Feraune tar samne taki Musa ar Harunre ḳedai dilo.
10.12: Teu Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi Mishor deshor ufre fongofalor lagi at tulo, fongofale aia Mishoror zominor hoḳol gas-gasali kailibo. Hil-tufan taki zotota basise, ita hokkolta ḳailibo.”
10.13: Musae Mishoror ufre tan laṭi melia dorla, ar Mabude hara din hara rait deshor maze fubali haoa saṛla, ou fubali haoae biane fongofal loia azilo.
10.14: Hara Mishor deshor ufre fongofale jam oigela. Mishoror hoḳol zagat fongofale gisgis ḳorla, kub beshi fongofal aila, oto fongofal er age-o kunudin oisoin na ar bade-o kunudin oita nae.
10.15: Tara asta zominor ufor gurilila, desh andair oigelo, ar zominor zoto ḳet, gas-gasali hil-tufan taki basi gesil, ita hokkolta ḳailila. Asta Mishoror kunu gas-gasali ba ḳetor foshol kunta-u roilo na.
10.16: Feraune zoldi kori Musa ar Harunre anaia ḳoilo, “Ami to tumra ar tumrar Mabud Allar gese gunagar oigesi.
10.17: Te minot ḳoriar, ḳali ekkan bar amar guna maf ḳori deo. Amar ges taki i moron afodre horai neoar lagi, tumrar Mabud Allare minot ḳoro.”
10.18: Ou Musae Feraunor ges taki horia gia Mabudor gese minot ḳorla;
10.19: ar Mabude kub zure fochchima haoa saṛla, itae fongofal oḳolre ḳedaia saf ḳoria Nil doriat falailo, Mishoror kunu zagat egu fuk-o roilo na.
10.20: Oile Mabude Feraunor dil fashan ḳorilla, he Boni Israilre saṛlo na. Allar noy nombor gozob, andair
10.21: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi asman muka tumar at baṛao; teu hara desho oto gono andair oibo, i andair at dia soa zaibo.”
10.22: Musae asman muka at baṛaile tin din forzonto hara Mishor desh kub gono andair oilo.
10.23: Tin din ḳeu ḳeuror muk-o deḳto farlo na, ḳeu zaga taki loṛto farlo na. Oile Boni Israilor hoḳol goro kunu rushnir obab asil na.
10.24: Feraune Musare anaia ḳoilo, “Zao, tumra gia tumrar Mabudor ebadot ḳoro, tumrar huruttainre-o neogi, ḳali tumrar goru-sagolor fal taḳouk.”
10.25: Musae ḳoila, “Amrar Mabud Allar name dibar lagi, foshu kurbani ar zalail kurbanir foshuin amrar loge nite oibo.
10.26: Amrar loge oia amrar foshuin-o zaiba, foshur ekkan kura-o toia zaitam nae. Amrar Mabud Allar ebadotor lagi on taki kurbani kora lagbo, ar kita kita kurbani kortam, ita amra hono na gele ḳoitam fartam nae.”
10.27: Oile Mabude Feraunor dil fashan ḳorilla, he erare saṛte razi oilo na.
10.28: Feraune ḳoilo, “Amar samne taki bago. Ḳobordar! Amar mukor samne ar kunudin aio na. Amar samne zedin aibae, hidin zan kuaibae.”
10.29: Musae ḳoila, “Balare bala! Ami shok koria kunudin-u afnar muk deḳat aitam nae.”

11.1: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Ami Feraun ar Mishor deshor ufre ar matro eḳṭa gozob saṛmu, erbade he tumrare ontone saṛidibo, saṛar bala he tumrare ekkebare ḳedai dibo.
11.2: Tumi Boni Israilre hikai deo, hokkol beṭain-beṭinte tarar Mishori ari-forir ges taki shuna-rufar goyna-gaṭi kuzia neuk.”
11.3: Ou haloto Mishori oḳlor nozoro maya faite Mabude shaijjo ḳorla. Ermaze Mishor desho Feraunor uzir-nazir ar proza oḳlor gese Hozrot Musa kub ijjoti bonigela.
11.4: Musae Feraunre ḳoila, “Mabude nize ḳoira, ami ada raitkur bala Mishor deshor mazdi zaimu.
11.5: Ete godit boa Feraunor boṛo fua taki bara-banra bandir fua forzonto, Mishor deshor maze roura hokkol foribaror boṛo fuain moriziba. Erloge hoḳol foshuintor foyla meda baichcha-o moriziba.
11.6: I laḳan dosha Mishor desho kunudin oise-o na ar oito-o nae, asta Mishor desho ou laḳan ḳandon ḳandiba.
11.7: Oile Boni Israilor kunu manush ba foshur bae egu kuttae-o uh ḳorto nae, zate afnara buzta faroin ami Mabude Mishori ar Boni Israilor maze tofat ḳori.”
11.8: Heshe Musae Feraunre ḳoila, “Ou shomoy afnar hokkol uzir-nazire aia amar faot foṛia ḳoiba, afne afnar hoḳol manshore loia bidae neingi, erbade ami bar oimu.” Oḳan ḳoia tain gusae aguin oia Feraunor ges taki horia gela.
11.9: Mabude Musare ḳoisla, “Feraune tumar ḳota manto nae, zate Mishor desho amar keramotir foriman aro baṛe.”
11.10: Erlagi Musa ar Harune Feraunor samne ou keramoti oḳol deḳaila. Oile Mabude Feraunor dilre fashan ḳorilla, he nizor desh taki Boni Israilre saṛlo na.

12.1: Bade ou Mishor deshor bitre Mabude Musa ar Harunre ḳoila,
12.2: “I sandḳan bosoror foyla sand oibo, tumra i sandre bosoror foyla sand gonio.
12.3: Tumitain tamam Boni Israilre dola ḳori zanai deo, ou sandor dosh tariko tumrar hoḳol foribaror murobbie, zarzir foribaror lagi egu ḳori meṛa ba sagolor baichcha nibae.
12.4: Oile kunu foribaro er gust ḳaoar manush ḳom oile, laga goror manshor loge milia, duio foribare zotoḳan ḳaita faroin, hou onumane meṛa ba sagolor baichcha nibae.
12.5: I baichcha oibo nikut, eḳ boros boyoshor faṭa baichcha oite oibo; tumra meṛa ba sagolor baichcha nitae farbae.
12.6: Ar ou sandor souddo tarik forzonto iṭar zoton ḳorbae, bade tamam Boni Israil eḳloge milia, tara hainja bala zarzir foribare ou baichchain zobo ḳorba.
12.7: Zobo ḳorar bade tara er kisu lou nia zoto goro er gust ḳaiba, oto goror duaror soukaṭor duio galat ar ufror soukaṭo ou lou lagaiba.
12.8: Hou rait-u tara i gust aguindi sekia ḳamir saṛa ruṭi ar titta hagor loge milaia ḳaiba.
12.9: I gust tumra ḳasa, ba fanidi randia ḳaio na. Ḳali aguindi sekia ḳaio, er ṭeng, ḳolla shudda bitoror hokkolta ekḳano sekio, bade ḳaio.
12.10: Rait fuanir age ḳani shesh ḳorio, bian forzonto kunta-u baki toio na. Zudi kunta baki roizae, te aguindi zalailio.
12.11: I kani kaoar bala tumrar ḳomror ḳafoṛ mozbut ḳori findio, faot zuta lagaio, ator laṭi loio. Zoldi kori kani kaio. Iṭa oilo Mabudor namor Azadi Id.
12.12: Hou rait-u ami Mishor deshor mazdi zaimu, deshor hokkol manshor boṛo fuare ar foshur foyla meda baichchare-o marilimu. Mishoror hoḳol deb-debir bisar ḳoria shaza dimu; ami-u Mabud.
12.13: Oile tumrar duaror soukaṭo lefa lou deḳle ami buzmu i goro tumra ro. Erlagi ami Mishor desho gozob ḍalibar shomoy, lou lefa ou gor bad dia samnedi zaimu. Moutor gozob tone tumra rehai faibae.
12.14: Ou dinre tumra iad rakio ar ami Mabudor name idor din manio. I idre tumra amar hukum mono ḳoria hor-hamesha oarishor for oarish dori mania zaio.” Ḳamir saṛa ruṭi kaoar hukum
12.15: Mabude ḳoila, “Tumra shat din forzonto ḳamir saṛa ruṭi kaibae. Foyla din-u zarzir gor taki hoḳol ḳamir falai dibae. I shato dinor maze zegue ḳamir ala nan ruṭi kaibo, tare Boni Israil tone fusia falail oibo.
12.16: Foyla din ar shat nombor din tumra fobitro milon-mahfil adae ḳorbae, i dui din ḳali zoruri kaoa-daoa saṛa dusra kunu ḳam-ḳaz ḳorbae na.
12.17: Ou laḳan tumra Ḳamir Saṛa Ruṭir i id adae ḳorio, amar hukum mono ḳoria oarishor for oarish dori hor-hamesha i id adae ḳorio. Ou din-u ami tumrare sifai dolor laḳan ḳori Mishor desh taki bar ḳori anmu.
12.18: Tumra foyla sandor souddo tarikor hainja taki shuru ḳoria, ekuish tarikor hainja forzonto ḳamir saṛa ruṭi kaio.
12.19: Ou shat din zate tumrar goro ḳamiror kunu nam-nishana na taḳe, ou shomoy ḳeu zudi kamir ala ḳani kae, te he tumrar nizor zatir ouk ba bin zatir ouk, tare Boni Israilor shomaz taki fusia falail oibo.
12.20: I shat din tumra zeno-u ro na ḳene ḳamir ala kunta-u ḳaio na; ḳali kamir saṛa ruṭi kaio.”
12.21: Musae Boni Israilor hoḳol moy-murobbire dola ḳoria ḳoila, “Afnara zaukka, gia zarzir foribaror lagi Azadi Idor meṛa-baichcha ania zobo ḳoroukka.
12.22: Ar ‘esub’ gasor eḳ aṭi ḍeṭa loia, fatilo toa lout buṛaia duaror soukaṭor duio galat ar ufre lagaio. Shabdan! Shuruz uṭar age ḳeu goror bare bar oio na.
12.23: Mishori oḳolre marar lagi Mabude zebla Mishor deshor mazdi toshrif niba, ou shomoy tumrar soukaṭor ufre ar duio galat lou deḳle, tain i gor bad dia samnedi aguaiba. Azrail firistare tumrar goro hamaia marte dita nae.
12.24: “Amar batail hukum mono ḳoria tumra ar tumrar aolad oḳole i idre adae ḳorio.
12.25: Ami amar nizor oada mafik tumrare ze desh dimu, hou desho gia harle-o tumra i id adae ḳorio.
12.26: Tumrar huruttainte zebla tumrare zikaiba, i idor ḳaron kita? Iṭa kila aise?
12.27: Te tumra zuaf dio, iṭa Mabudor name Azadi Idor kurbani. Mishori oḳolre marbar bala tain Mishor desho Boni Israilor gor bad dia samnedi aguai gia, amrare azad ḳorsla.” Ikan hunia hoḳol manshe Mabudre soizda ḳorla.
12.28: Musa ar Harunre Mabude zela batai disla, hoḳol Boni Israil tarar goro gia ou laḳan ḳam ḳorla. Dosh nombor ba aḳeri gozob, boṛo fuar mout
12.29: Heshe maz raite ou laḳan goṭlo, Mabude godit boa Feraunor fua tone zel ḳanar bondir fua forzonto hokkolre marilila. Mishor deshor hokkol foribaror boṛo fuain ar foshuintor foyla meda baichchare-o tain marilila.
12.30: Teu Feraun ar tar uzir-nazir oḳol, Mishoror hoḳol manush hozag oia uṭla, asta Mishor desho betaya ḳandonor ruil foṛlo; ḳaron ola kunu gor roisil na, ze goro ḳeu na ḳeu morse na. Mishor desh taki Boni Israilor hizrot
12.31: Hou rait-u Feraune Musa ar Harunre anaia ḳoilo, “Tumra zoldi zao, Boni Israilre loia amar prozar ges tone horo. Tumra zela ḳoiso, oula gia Mabudor ebadot ḳoro.
12.32: Tumrar zoban moto-u tumrar goru-meṛar fal oḳolre-o neogi. Tumra amare-o nek dua deo.”
12.33: Mishori oḳole kub ḍoraila, tara mono ḳorla tara-o moriziba. Erlagi tara tagda dita lagla, Boni Israil zoldi kori bidae oita.
12.34: Boni Israile tarar moydar ḳair maze ḳamir furaibar age-u, ḳai shoho gamlain ḳafoṛdi gaiṭ bandia ḳando loila.
12.35: Hoḳol Boni Israile Musar foramish moto, Mishori oḳlor shuna-rufar goyna-gaṭi ar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ kuzia nila.
12.36: Mabude ag tone-u Mishori oḳlor dilor maze eḳ doya-maya foyda ḳorsla, zate Boni Israile zeta kuziba, ota-u zanu tarare dein. Ou laḳan ḳori tara Mishori oḳlor bout don-doulot-o ḳobza ḳorla.
12.37: Ota nia Boni Israil Ramashesh elaḳa taki Sukkotor muka roana oila. Tarar maze onuman soy laḳ shobol beṭain aṭia gela. Erar loge beṭin ar huruttain-o asla.
12.38: Boni Israil bade-o tarar loge roura aro bout manush, goru-meṛar fal hoḳolta milia bout boṛo dol bandia roana dila.
12.39: Bade tara Mishor taki ana hou moydar ḳai dia ḳamir saṛa ruṭi banaila. Mishor taki tarare zoldi kori bidae deoae i kait ḳamir maḳaibar shomoy-u faisla na, ar fotor lagi kunu mosa-o nita farsla na.
12.40: Boni Israil Mishoro hokkoltae sair-sho tish boros boshot ḳorsla.
12.41: Ṭik ou sair-sho tish boros fura oibar dino Mabudor hokkol bonda, sifai dolor laḳan hazia Mishor desh taki bar oila.
12.42: Ou rait Mabude afon kudroti sayae fahara dia tarare Mishor desh taki bar ḳoria anae, i raitḳan ebadotir rait. Hokkol Boni Israilor lagi oarishor for oarish dori, Mabudor name uzagori korar ek kas rait. Azadi Id adae ḳorar niom-ḳanun
12.43: Mabude Musa ar Harunre ḳoila, “Azadi Idor kurbanir niom-ḳanun ami tumrare hikai diar. Huno, oinno kunu zatir manshore er gust ḳaite dibae na.
12.44: Oile ḳorida gulame mosolmani koranir bade ita ḳaito farbo.
12.45: Oinno zekunu zatir musafir ba betondari kamlare-o ita ḳaoaio na.
12.46: Tumra zar baṛit foshu zobo ḳorbae hou baṛit-u er gust ḳaite oibo; baṛir bare kunta-u nibae na, foshur kunu aḍḍi bangibae na.
12.47: Tamam Boni Israile ou id adae ḳorbae.
12.48: Tumrar loge roura kunu abadie zudi Mabudor namor i id manto sae, te foyla tar foribaror hoḳol beṭaintor mosolmani korani lagbo. Bade he Boni Israilor laḳan id adae ḳorto farbo. Oile mosolmani korani saṛa ḳeu i gust ḳaito farto nae.
12.49: Boni Israilor lagi ar abadir lagi-o eḳ homan ain zari oilo.”
12.50: Mabude Musa ar Harunre zela hukum disla, Boni Israile hasaror oula-u amol ḳorla.
12.51: Mabude hou din-u sifai dolor laḳan ḳori, Boni Israil oḳolre Mishor desh taki bar ḳori anla.

13.2: “Tumi Boni Israilor hokkol foribaror boṛo fuainre amar name alog koria shofia deo. Ita kunu manshor fua ouk ba foshur baichcha ouk. Hoḳoltar boṛo fuain ḳali amar-u.”
13.3: Teu Musae manshore ḳoila, “I din ḳanre tumra iad rakio, ou din-u tumra Mishoror gulami taki azad oiso. Mabude tan kudroti at dia tumrare hon taki bar ḳorsoin. I din kunuzator ḳamir ala ḳana ḳaio na.
13.4: Abib sandor ou tariko tumra bar oilae.
13.5: Mabude tumrar baf-dadar gese oada ḳorsoin, Kenani, Hiṭṭi, Amuri, Hibbi ar Zibuzi oḳlor desho tumrare nibagi. I desh dud ar mour banḍar-ala desh. Te hono gia harle-o tumra forteḳ bosor Abib sandor ou id adae ḳorio.
13.6: “Tumra shat din forzonto ḳamir saṛa ruṭi kaio, bade shat nombor dino Mabudor name id adae ḳorio.
13.7: I shato din ḳamir saṛa ruṭi kaoa lagbo, tumrar gese ḳamir ala kunuzator ḳana zate na deki, tumrar asta deshor bitre-o zanu kunu ḳamir na mile.
13.8: I din tumra hoḳole zarzir fuaintore ḳoio, ‘Amra zebla Mishor taki bar oia aislam, ou shomoy Mabude amrare zela rohom ḳorsla, otare mono raḳar lagi ami-o oḳon ola ḳorram.’
13.9: Ou laḳan tumra zarzir aolad oḳolre Mabudor hukum talim dio, zate tumrar mono roy, Mabude tan kudroti at dia tumrare Mishor desh taki bar ḳori anchoin. Tumrar ator ba ḳofalor tabiz-ḳobzor laḳan, ou talimre-o hamesha sokur samne rakio.
13.10: Erlagi forteḳ boros ou oḳt aile-u tumra i niom adae ḳorio.
13.11: “Mabude tumrar gese ar tumrar baf-dadaintor gese zela oada ḳorsoin, ou oada mafik tain tumrare Kenani oḳlor desh dan ḳorsoin. Te Mabude hono nia harle,
13.12: tumra zarzir boṛo fuare Mabudor name shofia dilaio; erloge tumrar hoḳol foshuintor foyla meda baichchare-o Mabudor name dilaio, ita to Mabudor-u.
13.13: Oile hoḳol gadintor foyla meda baichchar bodla, tumra egu meṛa-baichcha dia ḳalas ḳoraio. Ḳalas na ḳoraile gada baichchar gordona bangi dio. Mono rakio, tumrar hokkol foribaror boṛo fuainre ḳalas ḳorani lagbo.
13.14: “Tumrar fuainte zebla zikaiba, ita kitar lagi kora lage? Tumra zuaf dio, ‘Mabude tan kudroti at dia amrare Mishoror gulami taki azad ḳori anchoin.
13.15: Feraune na-humari koria zebla amrare aite dilo na, ou shomoy Mabude Mishor deshor hoḳol foribaror boṛo fuaintore, manshor fuain ar foshuintor foyla meda baichchainre marilla. Ou ḳarone amrar boṛo fuainre Mabudor ges taki kalas ḳorai, ar foshur foyla meda baichchare kurbani dei.
13.16: Iṭa omon eḳ iadgarir id, at ba ḳofalo banda tabiz-ḳobzor laḳan zanu hamesha sokur samne roy, ar Mabude tan kudroti at dia amrare Mishor taki bar ḳori anchoin, oḳan mono roy.’ ” Allar kudroti hazira megor ar agunir kuṭi
13.17: Feraune Boni Israilre saṛar bade, Filistini oḳlor deshor mazdi shida fot taḳle-o Allae tarare hi fotedi nila na. Allae ḳoila, heshe zudi kunu zuddor mukabila ḳora lage, te manshe zuddor ḍore hirbar Mishoro firizito fare.
13.18: Erlagi tain manshore Nil doriar faredi morubumi bae neoaila; tamam Boni Israile sifai dolor laḳan hazi-faṛi Mishor desh taki roana oila.
13.19: Zaoar bala Musa nobie Hozrot Iusufor ḳoybor taki tan aḍḍi-guḍḍi loge ḳori nila. Iusufe Boni Israilre mozbut ḳori kosom ḳorai koisla, “Allae nisoy tumrare hefazot ḳorba, te tumra zaoar bala amar aḍḍiguin tulia loge ḳori niogi.”
13.20: Bade tara Sukkot gao taki roana oia morubumir kinaro Etom namor zagat aia tambu gaṛila.
13.21: Ar Mabude tarare fot sinanir lagi dinor bala megor kuṭir surote roita, ar raitor balae for deḳanir lagi agunir kuṭir surote tarar age age zaita, erlagi tara rait-din homane solta farta.
13.22: Manshor samne hamesha dinor bala megor kuṭi ar raitor bala agunir kuṭi roito.

14.2: “Tumi Boni Israilre ḳo, tara guria aia Fama-Hirut namor zagar ḳandat Migdul ar doriar mazamazi, Baal-Zafon elaḳar samne doriar soror maze tambu gaṛita.
14.3: Ita deḳle Feraune mono ḳorbo, Boni Israile kunubae fot na faia guraguri korte ḳorte morubumit aṭki gesoin.
14.4: Ami Feraunor dilre fashan banaimu, he tumrar ḳore ḳore ḳedanit aibo. Teu Feraun ar tar sifai oḳolredi amar nam uzila oibo; ita dekia Mishori oḳole-o buziliba, ami-u Mabud.” Mabudor hukum mafik Boni Israile oula ḳorla.
14.5: Hasau Mishoror bashsha Feraune zebla ḳobor failo, Boni Israil oḳol bagi gesoin, hunia-u Feraun ar tar uzir-naziror dil firigelo. Tara ḳoila, “Hae, hae! Amra ita kita ḳorsi? Itare amrar gulami taki kene saṛlam?”
14.6: Oḳan ḳoia-u Feraune tar zuddor guṛar gaṛi hazanir hukum dia, tar sifai oḳolre zuit ḳorailo.
14.7: He tar ḳas shoktiman soy-sho guṛar gaṛi, Mishoror shob guṛar gaṛin ar erar saloḳdar sifaire-o loge loilo.
14.8: Mabude Mishoror bashsha Feraunor dilre fashan ḳorilla, he Boni Israilor ḳore ḳore ḳedanit ailo. Era zebla himmot ḳori aṭia zaira, ou shomoy he erare dorat ailo.
14.9: He Mishor deshor hoḳol guṛ-soar sifai, guṛar gaṛiala sifai shoho asta armi dol loia erare dorar lagi erar ḳandat aillo. Ou shomoy Boni Israil oḳol doriar faro Baal-Zafonor samne Fama-Hirutor ḳandat asla.
14.10: Tara ḳandat aite-u Boni Israile saia deḳla, tarar ḳore oia Mishori sifai aira; dekia-u zanor ḍore Mabudor dorbaro ḳandon lagaila.
14.11: Tara Musare ḳoila, “Mishoro ḳoybor dibar zaga nai dekia, amrare martae ḳori ou morubumit loia aiso ni? Tumi ita kita ḳorlae? Ḳene amrare Mishor taki bar ḳorlae?
14.12: Mishoror bitre amra tumare ḳoisi na ni, amrare ono roite deo, amra Mishorintor gulami kori? I morubumit morar saite Mishorintor gulami kora-u to amrar lagi bala asil.”
14.13: Musae tarare ḳoila, “Tumra ḍoraio na. Hoḳole nirai oia deḳo, Mabude aiz kila basain. Ou zeta Mishorintore oḳon deḳrae, itare ar kunudin-u deḳtae nae.
14.14: Tumra oḳon shanti o, deḳo, Mabude-u tumrar fokko oia zuddo ḳorba.” Allar kudrote Nil doria hukai gelo
14.15: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi kene amar gese ḳandirae? Boni Israilre ḳo na, samnedi aguaita.
14.16: Ar tumar ator laṭire baṛaia doriar ufre usa ḳori doro, doriare dui bag korilao. Teu tamam Boni Israil hukna bae aṭia doria faroiba.
14.17: Kial rakio, ami Mishori oḳlor dil ola fashan banaimu, tara erare dorar niote doriat hamaiba. Erbade Feraun, tar sifai, tar guṛar gaṛin, tar guṛ-soar oḳlor mazdi amar zalal-shan zair oibo.
14.18: Feraunor hal-hokikot dekia baki Mishori oḳole-o buziliba, ami-u Mabud.”
14.19: Ermaze Allar ze firista Boni Israilor age oia zaoat asla, ein zaga bodlaia Boni Israilor ḳore gelagi. En loge oia kudroti hou megor kuṭi-o samne taki horia ḳore aillo.
14.20: Ḳore aia Mishori ar Boni Israili duio dolor mazḳano ubailo. Erlagi ou megor kuṭir andaire Mishori oḳol andarit foṛigela, tara raitor bala Boni Israilor ḳanda loita farla na. Oile Boni Israilor samne raitor bala-o megor kuṭir forsha roilo.
14.21: Bade Musae doriar ufre tan at baṛaila, ar Mabude hara rait kub zure fubali haoa dia doriar fani horaia dui baṭ ḳorilla, doria hukaia mazedi hukna fot bar oilo.
14.22: Boni Israil oḳole hukna faoe doriar mazdi roana dila, doriar fani tarar ḍaine-baue oalor laḳan ubai roilo.
14.23: Ita dekia Mishori oḳole tarare ḳedaia doriar hou hukna fotedi gela. Feraunor hokkol guṛar gaṛi, guṛa, ar guṛ-soar oḳol ḳedai kedai doriar hou foto gia hamaila.
14.24: Ar fotabala Mabude hou kudroti aguin ar megor kuṭi taki Mishori sifair bae lannoti nozore saila, teu tara bedisha lagigela.
14.25: Tain erar guṛar gaṛir sakka nosṭo ḳori dila, erlagi tarar kub ḳoshṭo ḳoria-o gaṛi salanit roilo; ermaze tara eḳe-oinnore ḳoilo, “Oise, ar bad deo, amra Boni Israilor ḳor tone hori zai. Mabude nize tarar fokko oia amrar loge zuddo ḳorra.”
14.26: Ou shomoy Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi doriar ufre hirbar at baṛao. Tumar at baṛaile fani hirbar Mishorintor ufre, tarar guṛar gaṛi ar guṛ-soaror ufre aibbo.”
14.27: Musae doriar ufre at baṛaila, ar bian oar age-u doriar fani hirbar homan oigelo; Mishorinte ḍaine-baue douṛa-douṛi lagaila, oile Mabude tarare doriar fanidi baoai dila.
14.28: Fani hirbar zagat aillo, tarar guṛar gaṛin, sifain, ar guṛ-soar oḳol, mani Boni Israilor ḳore oia ḳedanit aora hokkolta fanie buṛigelo, egu-o zita roila na.
14.29: Oile Boni Israil oḳole hukna fote doriar mazdi gela, tarar ḍaine-baue fani oalor laḳan ubai roilo.
14.30: Ou nomunae Mabude hi din Mishori oḳlor at taki Boni Israilre basaila, tara nizor souke deḳla, Mishorintor mora lash doriar soro foṛia roise.
14.31: Mishorintor ufre Mabudor kudroti lila-ḳela dekia, Boni Israile-o Mabudre ḍoraigela. Tara Mabudor ufre ar tan gulam Hozrot Musar ufre furafur iman anla.

15.1: Allar kudrote Nil doria faroia aia harle, Hozrot Musa ar tamam Boni Israile Mabudor name ou shukurana gozol gaila: “Ami Mabudor name gozol gai, hoḳlor samne tan kudroti mohima baṛise, guṛ-soar shudda guṛainre tain-u doriar fanit falaisoin.
15.2: Alla-u to amar bol, tain-u amar gozol, amare basanir ḳol-ḳobza tan ato ase. Ou Alla-u amar Mabud, amar baf-dadar Mabud, ami tan hamd gaimu, tan lila-ḳelar boyan ḳormu.
15.3: Mabud oila foyluan sifai, tan nam-u Mabud.
15.4: Feraunor guṛar gaṛire ar sifaire tain fanit falaila, tar namḳora subedar oḳol Nil doriat buṛia morla.
15.5: Goin fanie tarare gilillo, ar bari fattoror laḳan tara doriar tole gelagi.
15.6: O Mabud, tumar ḍain atḳan kudroti lilae bora, tumar ate nichchoy dushmonre surmar ḳorse.
15.7: Tumar birudde zetae lagsila, kudroti bole tarare goin gato falailae. Tumar faṭail gozobi aguine, hukna ḳer-nerar laḳan tarare zalaililo.
15.8: Tumar naḳor dome hoḳol fani dola oigelo, fanir fut oḳol zagat ubai roilo, doriar goin fani sakka bonigelo.
15.9: Dushmone ḳoisil, ‘Ami itare ḳedaia nimu, douṛaia nia dormu, tarar hoḳolta ḳaṛia ania baṭimu. Tarar maldi ami maldar oimu, itadi amar monor ḳaish furaimu. Amar toluardi maria tarar nam miṭailimu.’
15.10: Oile tumi fu dia batash dilae, ar doriae tarare gurililo, tara shishar laḳan goin fanit tolaigelo.
15.11: O Mabud, kun deb-debi tumar homan? Ḳe tumar laḳan oto fobitro mohan, ar tumar moto boyonkor kudroti mohima ḳar ase?
15.12: Tumar bolala ḍain atḳan baṛailae, ar duniae tarare gilililo.
15.13: Tumar ḳas mayae zerare basaiso, tarare to tumi-u salairae, tumar afon kudroti bole tumar fobitro boshot ḳanat nirae.
15.14: Ita hunia hokkol zatie ḳafira, Filistini be-din oḳlor mon soṭfoṭ ḳorer.
15.15: Idumor shordar oḳol ḍoraia bedisha lagigela, Muabor neta oḳole tor-toraia ḳafila, Kenani oḳol ḍoraia horigela.
15.16: Tarar bitre ḍor-ḳof aia hamaise, tumar ator ṭelae fattoror laḳan nirai oigese. O Mabud, tumar proza oḳol, tumar ḳorida gulam oḳol, furafur far na oa forzonto tumi oula raḳso.
15.17: Tumi erare nia gasor serar laḳan, tumar nizor faṛo ruibae. O Mabud, hoḳan-u tumar boshot ḳana, tumar afon ator goṛa Herem Shorif.
15.18: O Mabud, zug zug dori tumi-u ḳali bashshai korbae.”
15.19: Feraunor guṛain, tar guṛar gaṛin ar guṛ-soar oḳol zebla doriar maze hamaigelo, Mabude tarar ufre doriar fani firai anla, oile Boni Israil hoḳol to hukna fote doriar mazedi age aṭia geslagi.
15.20: Harunor boin Hozrot Moriom-o nobi asla, tain ḍugi ato loia bazaila, ar baki hoḳol beṭinte-o tan ḳoredi ḍugi loia nasi nasi baroi aila.
15.21: Ar Moriome-o manshor samne oula gaila: “Tumra Mabudor name gozol gao, hoḳlor samne tan kudroti mohima baṛise, guṛ-soar shudda guṛainre tain-u doriar fanit falaisoin.” Morubumit Boni Israilor sofor (15:22—18:27) Hozrot Musae titta fanire miṭa banaila
15.22: Musae Boni Israilre Nil doria taki samnedi loia roana oila, ar Shur namor morubumit gela. Tarar zaoar foto tin din dori kunu fani faila na.
15.23: Bade tara Marua namor eḳ zagat aila, oile hinor fani-o ḳaita farla na, hinor fani kub titta. Erlagi ou zagar nam laglo Marua [mani, titta].
15.24: Ar manshe Musar birudde ḳana-ḳani kori koila, “Amra oḳon fani kaitam kila?”
15.25: Musae Mabudor gese foriad ḳorla, Mabude tanre egu gas deḳai dila, tain hou gasre nia fanit falaila, ar fani miṭa oigelo. Mabude hou zagat Boni Israilor forikka loila, ar tarar lagi niom-ḳanun batai dila.
15.26: Tain ḳoila, “Tumra zudi kial ḳoria tumrar Mabud Allar kalam huno ar ou laḳan amol ḳoro, ami zeta fosond ḳori ota ḳoro, amar hukum mano, te ami Mabude Mishori oḳolre zeta bemar-azar disi, ita kunu bemar tumrar ufre ditam nae; zano to, ami Mabud tumrar shifa ḳoroneala.”
15.27: Heshe tara Elimo gia fosla, hino barogu fanir indara ar shottoirgu ḳezur gas asil. Tara ou fanir ḳandat tambu gaṛila.

16.1: Bade tamam Boni Israile Elim taki roana dilaila. Mishor desh taki baronir bador sandor fonro tariko tara Sin namor morubumit aia azila. Sin oilo Tur faṛ ar Elimor mazḳano.
16.2: Ou shomoy tamam Boni Israile Musa ar Harunor birudde ḳana-ḳani lagaila.
16.3: Era duio zonor birudde Boni Israile ḳoila, “Haere hae, itar ḳotae amra ḳene ailam, Mabude ḳene nizor ate amrare Mishor desho marla na? Hi shomoy amra gustor ḍegor ḳandat boitam, feṭ boria gust-ruṭi kaitam, oile itae amrare ufashe ar feṭor buke marta ḳori ono anchoin.”
16.4: Ikan hunia Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Ami tarare forikka ḳoria deḳmu, tara amar niom-ḳanun manoin ki na. Ami tumrar ḳani megor zoṛir laḳan asman taki zomino saṛimu. Manshe baire aia haftar forteḳ dinor ḳani forti din tulia niba.
16.5: Ḳali haftar soy nombor dino tara zeta tulia anba, ita toiar ḳorar bade oinno dinor ḳani taki ḍabul oizibo.”
16.6: Bade Musa ar Harune hokkol Boni Israilre ḳoila, “Mabudor birudde tumra zebla ḳana-ḳani lagaiso, te aiz hainja bala-u buzbae, ou Mabude-u tumrare Mishor taki bar ḳori anchoin.
16.7: Bian oile-u tumra Mabudor kudroti nur deḳbae, tain to hunchoin, tumra kita ḳana-ḳani korso. Te amra ar kita zen, tumra amrar birudde otota matirae?”
