16.8: Musae tarare ḳoila, “Mabude hainja bala tumrare gust diba, ar biane feṭ bora ruṭi-o diba. Mabudor birudde tumra zeta ḳana-ḳani korso, ita tain hunchoin. Ashole amra duizon kita zen, tumra amrar birudde otota matirae? I mat to amrar birudde nae, tumra Mabudor birudde-u matirae.”
16.9: Erbade Musae Harunre ḳoila, “Tumi hokkol Boni Israilre zanai deo, tumra Mabudor birudde zeta matiso, ita tain hunchoin. Oḳon tumra aia Mabudor samne azir o.”
16.10: Teu Harune tarare ou shongbad zanaira, ou shomoy morubumir bae tarar souk foṛte-u deḳoin, megor ḳalnir maze Mabudor kudroti nur zair oise.
16.12: “Ami Boni Israilor hokkol mat-ḳota hunchi. Oḳon tumi zanai deo, tara forteḳ din hainja bala ḳaiba gust ar biane ḳaiba feṭ bora ruṭi. Teu tara buzba, ami Alla-u tarar Mabud.”
16.13: Hasau hainja bala kuel fakir fal aia tarar asta kempo jam oigelo, bador din biane kua foṛia kempor sairobae bizigelo.
16.14: Beil oar bade ou kua hukaile deḳa gelo, shagur danar laḳan eḳzator fatla zinish maṭir ufre foṛi roise.
16.15: Ita dekia Boni Israile eḳe-oinne zikaila, “Oba, ita kita? Ita kita foṛse, amra ḳeu to sinram na.” Teu Musae ḳoila, “Ita to behesti kani, tumra ḳaitae ḳori Mabude dan ḳorsoin.
16.16: Ou ḳanir ḳota-u Mabude hukum disoin, forteḳ zone zarzir foribaror lagi kani tukaia neo. Goror hoḳlor lagi zon-fisu eḳ feṭu ḳori tukaio.”
16.17: Teu tara oula ḳorla, manush onumane ḳeu besh ḳori nila, ḳeu ḳom nila.
16.18: Bade feṭudi mafia deḳla, zein beshi tukaisla, tan-o beshi oise na, ar zein tuṛa tukaisla, tan-o ḳom oise na; hoḳole-u zarzir foribaror ḳanir onumane tukaisoin.
16.19: Musae tarare ḳoila, “Tumra ḳail biankur ḳanir lagi ita muṭe-u zomai toio na.”
16.20: Ta-o ḳeu ḳeu Musar ḳota na mania bador dinor lagi-o tuṛa toilo. Erlagi ita fosia kiṛa-fuk zonmia gondo bar oilo; ita dekia Musa tarar ufre kub gusa oila.
16.21: Ola forteḳ din fozore tara zarzir ḳanir onumane tukaito, oile roid gorom oile-u ita golizito.
16.22: Bade soy nombor dino tarar ḳanir lagi ḍabul ḳani, mani dui feṭu ḳori tukailo, ar gusṭir murobbi oḳole aia Musare zanaila.
16.23: Musae tarare ḳoila, “Ita ṭik ase, Mabude-u oula hukum disoin; ḳail to haftar shesh din, Zummabar; Mabudor fak-fobitro din. Te tumrar zeta randar dorḳar ase ita aiz randilao, ar biran ḳorar zorur oile biran ḳoro, baki hoḳolta bador din biankur lagi toi deo.”
16.24: Ou Musar hukum mafik tara bador din forzonto ita goro toilo, itar maze kunu gondo-o bar oilo na, kiṛae-o dorlo na.
16.25: Bade Musae tarare ḳoila, “Aiz tumra ita ḳao, ḳaron aiz Mabudor fak-fobitro din, Zummabar. Aiz tumra bondor maze i kani faitae nae.
16.26: Tumra haftat soy din i kani tukaio, oile shat nombor din to Zummabar, i din ita faitae nae.”
16.27: Ta-o kunu kunu zone shat nombor din-o ou ḳani tukaibar lagi bare gelo, gia kunta failo na.
16.28: Teu Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumra ar ḳotodin amar hukum ar niom-ḳanun bangitae?
16.29: Huno, tumrar ziranir lagi i Zummabar to Mabude-u tumrare disoin, erlagi tain haftar soy nombor dino tumrare dui dinor ḳani dein; oḳon taki ou shat nombor din, mani Zummabare tumra hoḳole zarzir goro roia ziraio, ḳeu goror bare zaio na.”
16.30: Erbad taki haftar shat nombor dino manshe ziraito.
16.31: Boni Israile i kanir nam toilo, manna; ita deḳte dola ḍula bisir laḳan, ar ḳaite mou maḳail fiṭar laḳan moza.
16.32: Bade Musae tarare ḳoila, “Mabude ou hukum disoin, tumra eḳ feṭu foriman manna tulia tumrar bador bongshodor oḳlor lagi zoma ḳori to, teu tara-o deḳba, Mishor desh taki tumrare bar ḳori neoar ḳalo morubumir maze tain kita ḳaoaisoin.”
16.33: Musae Harunre ḳoila, “Tumi egu boyamor maze eḳ feṭu foriman manna tulia Mabudor samne to, ita tumrar oarishor for oarish dori zoma roibo.”
16.34: Mabude Musare zela hukum ḳorsla, ou laḳan Harune ou manna boyamo borla. Bade tain fobitro shondukor bitre shahadot fattoror samne toila.
16.35: Boni Israile sallish boros dori i manna ḳailo, tara zotodin forzonto manush boshot ḳorar zaga, mani Kenan deshor shimanat aia na fousilo, otodin ou ḳani-u ḳaila.
16.36: Eḳ feṭu oilogi, eḳ furaror dosh baṭor eḳ baṭ.

17.1: Bade Mabudor hukume tamam Boni Israil Sin morubumi taki roana dia, eḳ zaga taki aroḳ zagat gia gia heshe Rofidimo aia tambu gaṛila, oile hino manshor ḳaoar fani asil na.
17.2: Erlagi manshe Musar loge ḳaijja ḳori koila, “Amrare ḳaoar fani deukka.” Musae tarare ḳoila, “Tumra ḳene amar loge ḳaijja ḳorrae? Ḳene Mabudre forikka ḳorrae?”
17.3: Manshe fanir fiase ḳahil oia Musar birudde gali-galaz ḳori koila, “Tumi amrare martae ḳori Mishor desh taki ancho ni? Amrare, amrar huruttaintore, amrar foshur falre ana-fanie martae ḳori ono ancho ni?”
17.4: Teu Musae Mabudor gese foriad ḳori koila, “Ami i manshore kita ḳortam? Ar tuṛa deri oile-u to tara fattordi iṭaia amare mariliba.”
17.5: Mabude zuaf dila, “Tumi ze laṭidi Nil nodo baṛi marslae, hou laṭi ato lo, ar Boni Israilor ḳoyzon murobbire loge loia manshor age age zao.
17.6: Gia harle ami Tur faṛor ḳandat eḳ fattoror ufre azir oimu, tumi ou fattoro baṛi marle ogu taki fani bar oibo, teu manshe ḳaita farba.” Hasau Musae Israilor murobbi oḳlor samne oula ḳorla.
17.7: Ou Rofidimo aia manshe ḳaijja ḳori koisla, “Mabud kita amrar loge asoin ni, na hori gesoin?” Oula ḳoia tara Mabudre forikka ḳorsla ḳori, i zagar nam oilo Masa [mani, forikka] ar Meriba [mani, ḳaijja]. Amaleki oḳlor loge Boni Israilor zuddo
17.8: Ou shomoy Boni Israilor loge zuddo ḳorar lagi Amaleki sifai oḳol Rofidimo aila.
17.9: Teu Musae tan ḳadim Hozrot Iusare ḳoila, “Tumi amrar manush taki laṛai korra zon basia nia, Amaleki oḳlor loge zuddo ḳorat zao. Ami-o ḳail Allai kudroti laṭi ato loia faṛor ufre ubaimu.”
17.10: Iusae-o Musar hukum mafik kam ḳorla. Amaleki oḳlor loge zuddo ḳorla, Musa, Harun, ar Hur, ou tino zon gia faṛor ṭillar ufre uṭla.
17.11: Bade deḳa gelo, Musae zoto shomoy at usa ḳori raḳoin, oto shomoy Boni Israilor dol zitoin, oile Musae at lamaile-u Amaleki dol zitoin.
17.12: Aste aste Musar at bar oa dorlo. Ou tara ekkan fattor ania Musare boibar bebosta dila. Ou fattoror ufre Musa boila, Harun ar Hur duiozone Musar dui galat ubaia tan at usa ḳori dorla. Teu shuruz ḍubar ag forzonto tan at usa roilo.
17.13: Erlagi Amaleki sifair loge zuddo ḳoria Iusa zitigela.
17.14: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Ita iad raḳar lagi tumi ekkan kitabor maze lekia to ar Iusare-o zanao. Mono rakio, ami duniar buk taki Amaleki oḳlor nam miṭailimu.”
17.15: Musae ekkan kurbani kana banaia er nam toila, Mabud-u amar zuddor janḍa.
17.16: Tain ḳoila, “Mabudor zuddor janḍa amra ato loi, teu Mabude-o oarishor for oarish dori Amaleki oḳlor loge zuddo ḳorba.”

18.1: Allae Hozrot Musare ar tan bonda Boni Israilre zoto laḳan rohom ḳorsoin, ita hoḳolta Musar hour Madian deshor imam Shuaibor ḳano gelo. Mabude Boni Israilre Mishor desh taki kila bar ḳori anchoin, eota tain hunla.
18.2: Musae age tan bibi Sofurare hour baṛit faṭai disla, erlagi tan houre Musar bibire ar duio fuare nizor gese raḳla.
18.3: I duio fuar mazor eḳzonor nam asil Zarsum [mani, boitol]. Musae ḳoila, “Ami bin desho boitolor laḳan roiram.”
18.4: Ar dusra zonor nam asil Eliezer [mani, Alla shohae]. Tain ḳoila, “Amar bafor Alla amar shohae oia amare Feraunor toluar taki hefazot ḳorsoin.”
18.5: Musar hour Shuaibe Musar bibi ar tan duio fuare loia Musar gese aila. Ou shomoy Boni Israil ar Musar tambu asil Allar faṛ Turor ḳandat.
18.6: Tan hour ono aia Musare ḳobor dila, “Ami tumar hour Shuaib. Te ami tumar bibi ar duio fuare loia ono aisi.”
18.7: Ḳobor faia Musae tan houror loge deḳa ḳorat bar oila. Tain maṭit soizda ḳoria tan hourre salam ḳorla ar mayar hunga dila. Bade duiozone bala-bura zikaia hari tambur bitre hamaila.
18.8: Mabude Boni Israilor fokko loia Feraun ar Mishori oḳlor loge zeta zeta ḳorsoin, ita hokkolta tan hourre hunaila. Mishor taki zaoar bala tarar ḳoto ḳoshṭo oisil ar Allae kila tarare basaisoin eota-o tanre zanaila.
18.9: Ar Mabude Mishori oḳlor at taki Boni Israilre azad ḳoria tarare zoto laḳan asan ḳorsoin, ita hunia tan hour kub kushi oila.
18.10: Tain ḳoila, “Hoḳol tarif Mabudor, zein Feraun ar Mishori oḳlor at taki tumrare azad ḳorsoin.
18.11: Oḳon ami nize-o buziar, hoḳol devtar saite Alla-u mohan. Ḳaron Mishorinte zeta befar loia tumrar birudde bahaduri korta, itar ḳobza taki tain-u tumrare basaisoin.”
18.12: Bade Musar hour Shuaibe Allar name zalail kurbani ar hoḳol zator kurbani zuit ḳori loia aila. Heshe Harun ar Boni Israilor murobbi oḳol aia, Musar houror loge boia Allar samne ḳana-fina ḳaila. Hozrot Shuaib (a:)e daman Musare foramish dila
18.13: Bador din Musae manshor bisar-salish ḳorat boila. Bisaror lagi manush aia bian taki hainja forzonto haradin tan samne ubai roila.
18.14: Musae ola ḳorra dekia tan houre ḳoila, “Tumi manshore loia ita kita ḳorrae? Kitar lagi tumi eḳla ono bisaro roiso, ar bian taki hainja forzonto hoḳol manush tumar gese ubai roise?”
18.15: Musae zuaf dila, “Bisaror befare Allar foysala hunar lagi manush amar gese ain.
18.16: Tara kunu ḳaijja-fosad ḳorle amar ḳasat ain, aile ami duio dolor bisar ḳori, ar Allar hukum-ahkam tarare batai.”
18.17: Teu Musar houre ḳoila, “Tumi zelaḳan ita ḳorrae, ita to bala nae.
18.18: Ila ḳorle tumi ar tumar hoḳol manush-o ḳahil oizibae. I kam tumar takkot taki beshi, tumi eḳla ita kulaitae fartae nae.
18.19: Te ami tumare ḳoiar, tumi amar foramish huno, ete Alla-o tumar loge roiba. Tumi manshor bisar-asar foysala ḳorar niote, tarar imam hishabe hoḳol befar Allar samne azir ḳorio.
18.20: Ar manshore-o Allar hukum-ahkam talim dio. Tara kila solta, kita ḳorta na ḳorta, ota tarare buzaio.
18.21: Ar tumi erar maz taki basia oula zoiggo manush bar ḳoro, zera Allare ḍorain, hok fote soloin, ar gush ḳaoare gin ḳoroin. Erare tumi manshor bisar-asaror dayitto deo. Era kunu zonre azar zonor ufre, ḳeurore sho zon, ḳeurore foinchash zon, ar ḳeurore dosh zonor ufre bisar-asaror bar deo.
18.22: Era-u hamesha manshor bisar-insaf ḳorba. Huru-muru hoḳol bisar tara ḳorba, ḳali boṛo boṛo bisar tumar gese anba. Teu tumar bar kisu ḳombo, tara-o tumar loge kisu bar boukka.
18.23: Allar hukum faia tumi zudi oula ḳoro, te tumi kulaitae farbae, ar manshe-o arame zarzir zagat zaita farba.”
18.24: Musae tan houror foramish manla, tain zela ḳoila Musae oula ḳorla.
18.25: Musae tamam Boni Israil taki basia ufozukto manush tukaia, tara ḳeurore azar zon, ḳeurore sho zon, ḳeurore foinchash ar ḳeurore dosh zonor ufre neta banaila.
18.26: Era hamesha manshor bisar-asar ḳorta. Ḳali boṛo boṛo goṭona oḳol Musar ḳasat anta, ar huru huru hoḳolta tara miṭaita.
18.27: Heshe Musae tan hourre bidae dile, tain nizor desho toshrif nilagi.

19.1: -2 Mishor desh taki Boni Israil oḳol baronir bade, tin nombor sandor foyla din-u tara Rofidim oia Sinai morubumit fosila. Ono aia tara morubumir Tur faṛor samne tambu gaṛila.
19.3: Ermaze Hozrot Musa Tur faṛor ufre Allar dorbaro gela. Mabude faṛor ufre taki tanre ḍakia ḳoila, “O Musa, tumi Iakubor aolad oḳolre ḳo, Boni Israilre zanai deo,
19.4: ami Mabude Mishori oḳlor dosha kita goṭaisi, ita to tumrar nizor souke deḳso. Sile zela tar baichchare ḍaḳnadi boia ney, ami-o ou nomunae tumrare amar gese boia anchi.
19.5: Oḳon tumra zudi amar tamam hukum-ahkam mano, ar amar logor oada adae ḳoro, te duniar hokkol zatir maz taki tumra-u oibae amar ḳas shompod. Mono rakio, hara duniar hoḳolta-u amar eḳtiaro.
19.6: Tumrare dia-u ḳaim oibo amar imam oḳlor bashshai, tumra-u oibae amar fobitro zati. Te amar ou buli kanain tumi Boni Israilre zanao.”
19.7: Ou Musae aia Boni Israilor murobbi oḳolre dola ḳoraila. Dola ḳoraia ḳoila, Mabude tanre kita kita hukum disoin.
19.8: Teu hoḳol manshe eḳloge ḳoila, “Mabude zela bataisoin, amra ola hokkolta ḳormu.” Manshe zemne zuaf dila, Musae gia Mabudor dorbaro ola zanaila.
19.9: Ar Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Ami zebla tumar loge batchit ḳormu, ou batchit zate manshe nizor ḳane hunto fare, erlagi ami gono eḳ megor ḳalnir maze roia batchit ḳormu. Teu manshe ita hunba, ar tumar ufre hor-hamesha furafur ekin raḳba.” Bade Musa gia tarar-o hoḳol ḳota Mabudre zanaila.
19.10: Ikan hunia Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi aiz ar ḳail duio din manshor ḳasat gia tarare fak-saf ḳoro. Tara zarzir ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doia deuk.
19.11: Tara forshu dinor lagi toiar ouk, ou din ami Mabud Tur faṛor ufre lamia aia tara hoḳolre didar dimu.
19.12: Te tumi faṛor sairobae eḳṭa shimana ṭik koria dilao. Dia tarare hushiar ḳori ko, tara zanu i faṛo na uṭe ar faṛor shimanat na soy. Ḳeu zudi i faṛo soy, te tar shaza oilo mout.
19.13: Marar bala tar gotro at na dia, tare fattor ba tir maria marbae. He manush ouk ba zanuar ouk tare marilibae. Ḳali eḳloge bout shomoy shinga bazanir aoaz hunle, tara ou faṛor ḳandat aita farba.”
19.14: Teu Musae faṛo taki lamia aia manshore fak-saf ḳorla, manshe tarar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doia dilo.
19.15: Musae tarare ḳoila, “Tumra forshu dinor lagi zuit o, ermaze ḳeu bibir loge mila-misha ḳorio na.”
19.16: Hasau hou forshu din aile bianku bala faṛor ufre gono megor ḳalni deḳa gelo, kub beshi megor ḍak-zilkani shuru oilo. Zure zure shingar aoaz huna gelo, teu Boni Israilor kempor bitoror hoḳol manush ḍoraia ḳafa dorla.
19.17: Ou shomoy Musae manshore Allar samne neoar lagi kemp taki bar ḳorla. Tara hoḳol gia faṛor lamat ubaila.
19.18: Ar asta Tur faṛ dumae bori gelo, Mabud moulae agunir laḳan nuror surote faṛor ufre toshrif anla. Iṭ-baṭṭar dumar laḳan duma uṛa shuru oilo ar asta faṛ zuṛi bezuita ḳaf shuru oilo.
19.19: Shingar aoaz aro zure zure bazilo. Ou shomoy Musae Allar loge matila, ar Allae-o nizor aoazdi Musar mator zuaf dila.
19.20: Mabud nize Tur faṛor matat lamia aia Musare ḍakila, teu Musa uṭia faṛor ufre gela.
19.21: Gia harle Mabude tanre ḳoila, “Tumi lamat zao, gia manshore ḳoṛa ḳori koia ao, arnae amare deḳar lagi tara shimana faroia ufre aibba. Aile bout manush mara zaiba.
19.22: Ar ze imam oḳol hamesha amar samne azir oin, ashole tarar ḳam-u amar samne azir oa, tara-o nize nizore fak-saf ḳorba. Arnae ami tarar ufre-o gozob ḍalimu.”
19.23: Musae Mabudre zuaf dila, “Tara to emne-u Tur faṛo aita nae, afne age-u amrare ḳoṛa hushiari disoin. Amra-o faṛor sairobae dag dia afnar lagi pak shimana algaisi.”
19.24: Oile Mabude tanre ḳoila, “Na, tumi lamat zao. Bade tumi ar Harun duiozone milia ufre aio. Kial rakio, kunu imam ba dusra kunu manush zate shimana saṛia amar ḳasat na ain, aile ami tarar ufre lannoti gozob ḍalmu.”
19.25: Ikan hunia Musa lamat gela, gia manshore hoḳolta zanaila.

20.2: “O Boni Israil oḳol, ami Alla-u tumrar Mabud. Mishor deshor gulami taki ami-u tumrare ḳalas ḳori anchi.
20.3: “Amar bodla tumra dusra kunu devta manio na.
20.4: “Puja ḳorar kiale tumra kunu murti banaio na, asman, zomin ba fanir tole zotota ase, ita kunutar surote murti banaio na.
20.5: Tumra itar puja ḳorio na, itar sheba-zoton ḳorio na. Mono rakio, ami Alla to la-shorik Mabud, kunu shorik shoijjo ḳori na. Huno, amare zera mane na, ami tarar gunar shaza dei, tarar tin-sair siṛi forzonto shaza dei.
20.6: Oile zera amar ashik bonia amar hukum-ahkam amol ḳore, ami tarar azar azar oarish forzonto amar obiram maya-mohobbot deḳaimu.
20.7: “Beḳama kunu ḳarone tumrar Mabud Allar nam muko loio na. Ḳeu zudi kamoḳa Mabudor nam loy, te kunumonte-u amar shaza taki rehai faito nae.
20.9: Haftar soydin tumra ḳam-ḳaz ḳorio, tumrar dorḳari hoḳol ḳam shario.
20.10: Oile shat nombor din oilo Zummabar, tumar Mabud Allar name ziraibar din. I din tumi, tumar fua-fuṛin, tumar gulam-bandin, tumar foshur fal, tumar gaut ba ṭauno roura musafir ba bin-deshi, ḳeu kunuzator ḳam-ḳaz ḳorio na.
20.11: Zano to, Mabude soydine asman-zomin, doria ar erar mazor hoḳolta foyda ḳorsoin, bade shat nombor din ziraisoin, kunu ḳam ḳorsoin na. Ou dinre Mabude rohomot dia pak din ḳorsoin.
20.12: “Tumrar ma-bafre ijjot ḳorio. Teu tumrar Mabud Allae ze desh diba, hou desho tumrar hayati baṛibo.
20.17: “Foror gor-duaror bae lalos ḳorio na, tar bou, gulam-bandi, goru-gada, ba kunu kichchur bae lalos ḳorio na.”
20.18: Boni Israile zebla faṛ taki megor ḍaḳ, zilkani, shingar aoaz, ar duma baronit deḳla, dekia tara duroi taki-u ḍoraia ḳafa dorla.
20.19: Tara Musare ḳoila, “Afne-u amrar loge matoukka, amra hunmu; oile Allae amrar loge batchit ḳorle to amra morizimu.”
20.20: Musae tarare ḳoila, “Tumra ḍoraio na. Allae tumrare forikkat falaisoin, zate tumrar zano Allar ḍor hamae, ḍoraia tumra guna taki basia ro. Erlagi-u tain nize didar disoin.”
20.21: Hoḳol manush duroi ubai roila, ar Musa Allar hazirar hou megor ḳalnir andarir gese gela. Allar loge milonor usillar shorto (1) Kurbani kana banani
20.22: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi Boni Israilre ḳo, tumra nize-u to deḳlae, ami Mabude asman taki tumrar loge batchit ḳorlam.
20.23: Erlagi ebadot ḳorar niote, amar bodla dusra kunuzat devta banaio na. Tumra shuna ba rufadi-o nizor kunu deb-debi banaio na.
20.24: “Amar lagi kali maṭi dia kurbani kana banaio. Er ufre tumrar zalail kurbani ar salamoti kurbanir goru-sagol ania kurbani dio. Zeta zagainto ami amar nam iad ḳorai dimu, hou zagainto ami nize azir oia tumrare dua dimu.
20.25: Tumra amar lagi fattordi kunu kurbani kana bananit lagle, hi fattorguin ḳaṭio na. Er ufre atiar salaile tumra itare nafak banailibae.
20.26: Amar kurbani kana oula ḳori banaio, zate er ufre uṭte kunu moi ba siṛi na lage, moi ba siṛi bae uṭat gele kiba tumrar shorom deḳa zaibo.”

21.1: Mabude Musare aro ḳoila, “Tumi Boni Israilre amar ou niom-ḳanun oḳol zanao.
21.2: “Tumra zudi kunu Ibrani beṭare ḳorid ḳoria gulam banao, te ou gulame soy bosor tumrar gulami korbo, bade shat bosoror bala tar ges taki kunta na nia, tare emne-u azad ḳori dibae.
21.3: He zudi eḳla tumrar gese ae te eḳla-u zaibo; ar zudi boure loge loia ae, te bou loia zaibo.
21.4: Oile tar munibe zudi tare bia ḳorai taḳe, ar tar kunu hurutta-murutta oin, taile i beṭi ar huruttain munibor gese-u roiba; he ḳali eḳla azad oibo.
21.5: Ar hi gulame zudi saf ḳori koy zen, he tar munib ar tar bou-baichchar mayae, erare saṛia zaito nae,
21.6: te i malike tare loia Allar dorbaro azir oibo. Tare duaror ḳofaṭ ba soukaṭor loge uba ḳoria munibe shik dia tar ḳano fuṛ ḳorbo. Teu he hara zindegibor munibor gulamit roibo.
21.7: “Kunu manshe zudi bandigirit dibar lagi tar nizor fuṛire besilae, te gulam oḳol zela soy bosor bade munibor baṛi taki emne-u azad oizain, ou fuṛi to ila azad oito nae.
21.8: Tair munib zudi tair ufre kushi na oin, te ṭeḳa-foyshar bodla taire azad ḳori dite oibo. Taire dusra kunu zatir manshor gese besibar eḳtiar nai, ḳaron munibe to tan nizor dayitto adae ḳorsoin na.
21.9: Oile munibe zudi tan nizor fuar lagi taire fosond ḳoria nein, te taire afon fuṛir laḳan hoḳol ḳemota dite oibo.
21.10: Munibe zudi ou bandire bia ḳorar bade, dusra kunu ḳoinare bia ḳore, ta-o i bandir kuraki, ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ ar shorilor faona hok taire deoa lagbo.
21.11: He zudi ou tino hok furafur adae na ḳore, te i fuṛire eḳdom bina foyshae azad ḳori dite oibo. Allar loge milonor usillar shorto (3) Mara-marir shaza
21.12: “Mair ḳaia zudi kunu manush morizae, te zegie tare marse, tare-o zane mara oibo.
21.13: Oile he nize zudi kun na ḳorar niote mare, aḳta kunu ḳarone goṭizae ba ami Allar morzie ita oy, te ou kuni zon gia ola kunu zagat bagito farbo, ze zagar ḳota ami tumrare ḳoimu.
21.14: Ar ḳeu zudi zania-hunia ichcha ḳori keurore kun ḳoria, bade aia amar kurbani kanar gese-o asroy loy, ta-o hon taki doria nia tare zane mara oibo.
21.15: “Ze manshe tar afon ma ba bafor ufre at tule, tare nisoy zane mara oibo.
21.16: “Ḳeu zudi kunu manshore suri koria ania besilae, ba ou manshore tar gese faoa zae, te tare nichchoy zane mara oibo.
21.17: “Ze manshe afon ma ba bafre gali-galaz ḳore, tare-o nichchoy zane mara oibo.
21.18: “Kunu manshe ḳaijjat lagia zudi logor zonre ṭushi ba fattordi mare, i mair ḳaia ou zon na morle-o bisnat hutia foṛono taḳe,
21.19: heshe uṭia laṭi bor dia sola-fira ḳorar zorur oy, te zegie tare marse tare zane mario na. Ḳali hou zonor ḳam-ḳazor ḳeti ar tar shullo-ana daoai koros dite oibo.
21.20: “Ḳeu zudi tar ḳorida gulam-bandire laṭi dia mare ar mair ḳaia ogu morizae, te ere shaza dite oibo.
21.21: Oile mair ḳaoar dui-eḳdin bade zudi basia roy, te kunu shaza deoa lagto nae, ḳaron ou gulam to tar nizor samana asil.
21.22: “Mara-mari korat lagia zudi aḳta ḳeu kunu beṭire mare ar tair feṭor baichcha nosṭo oizae, oile ar kunu ḳeti na oy, te ou beṭir zamair dabi ar bisari-salishor bibechona mafik ere ḳeti-furon dite oibo.
21.23: Oile zudi tair aro kunu ḳeti oy, taile ere ou laḳan shaza dibae:
21.24: zanor bodla zan, souḳor bodla souk, dator bodla dat, ator bodla at, faor bodla fao,
21.25: zalanir bodla zalani, zoḳomor bodla zoḳom, dagor bodla dag dite oibo.
21.26: “Ḳeu zudi tar ḳorida gulam ba bandir kunu sokut marae souk nosṭo oizae, te ou souḳor bodla he i gulamre azad ḳori dite oibo.
21.27: Zudi maria er dat falai dey, ta-o ere azad ḳori deoa lagbo.
21.28: “Kunu gorue gutaia zudi kunu beṭa ba beṭire marilae, te gorur malikre kunu shaza deoa lagto nae. Ḳali hi gorure fattordi iṭaia marilite oibo, i gorur gust ḳeu ḳaito farto nae.
21.29: Oile i gorur zudi hamesha oula gutanir ḳaichchot taḳe, ar hi malikre hushiar ḳorar bade-o he iṭare aṭḳae na, ermaze i gorue kunu beṭa ba beṭire marilae, te i gorure fattor maria marilite oibo, ar tar malikre-o marilite oibo.
21.30: Zudi i malikor gese kunu ḳeti-furon saoa oy, taile he ou zorimana dia nizor zan basaito farbo.
21.31: I gorue zudi kunu huruttare gutaia marilae, taile erlagi-o ou homan niom oibo.
21.32: Kunu gorue zudi keuror gulam ba bandire gutaia marilae, taile gorur malike hi gulamor malikre tish tola foriman rufa dite oibo ar hi gorure-o fattor mari marilite oibo.
21.33: “Ḳeu zudi kunu gator muk kulia toy ba gat kudia igur muk guria na toy, ar i gator bitre kunu goru ba gada foṛizae,
21.34: taile gator malike foshur malikre ḳeti-furon dite oibo. Oile i mora foshu faibo gator malike.
21.35: “Ḳeuror gorue zudi aroḳzonor gorure gutaia marilae, te hou zita gorure besia, er dam ar mora gorur dam-o era duiozone homan homan ḳori baṭia niba.
21.36: Oile ag taki zudi zana-huna taḳe zen, i gorue ola gutae, ar tar malike tare na aṭḳae, te gorur bodla goru dite oibo, bodla deora zone ou mora goruṭa faibo.

22.1: “Ḳeu kunu manshor goru ba meṛa-sagol suri koria ania zudi besilae ba zobo ḳorilae, te ek gorur bodla fasgu, eḳ meṛa ba sagolor bodla sairgu firot dite oibo.
22.2: -4 Sure tar surir malor ḳeti-furon dite oibo, oile tar zudi keti-furon dibar kunu takkot na taḳe, te tare besia er ḳeti-furon adae ḳorte oibo. Suri kora goru-gada ba meṛa-sagol zudi suror gese zita faoa zae, taile he ita egur bodla dugu firot dite oibo. “Kunu sure zudi surit gia goro hamaibar bala dora ḳailae ar zoḳom oia morizae, taile tare marar lagi marra zon dayi oito nae. Oile shuruz uṭar bade zudi dinor bala ila oy, te i kunor lagi he dayi oibo.
22.5: “Ḳeu zudi tar goru-sagol nizor bagano ba ḳetor maze raḳat gia saṛi dey, ar itae gia manshor ḳetor foshol ḳailae, te tar nizor ḳetor hoḳol taki bala ongsho bodla dia ḳeti-furon dite oibo.
22.6: “Kunu zaga taki aguin lagia zudi zuf-zongol zole, ar bade ou aguin gia ḳeuror ḳetor maze banda muiṭ, ṭeki ba asta ḳet zoli zae, te aguin zegie zalaisil, he itar ḳeti-furon dibo.
22.7: “Ḳeu zudi aroḳzonor gese mal-samana ba ṭeḳa-foysha amanot toy, ar amanot-daror gor taki ita suri oizae, te ou sur dora foṛle, sure er ḍabul firot dibo.
22.8: Oile sur dora na foṛle, hi goror malike nize-u ita lukaise ni, oḳan zanar lagi tare Allar dorbaro azir ḳorbae.
22.9: “Aroḳ zonor doḳolo ase, oula kunu goru-gada, meṛa-sagol, finnor ḳafoṛ ba zekunu arail samana dekia ḳeu zudi mono ḳore iṭa tar mal, taile iṭar salishir lagi tara duiozon gia Allar dorbaro azir oibo. Allae zare dushi shaibosto ḳorba, he tar birudi zonre er ḍabul firot dibo.
22.10: “Ḳeu zudi tar goru-gada, sagol-meṛa ba oinno kunu foshure kunu girostor gese raḳat dey, ar ogu morizae, zoḳom oizae ba araizae, oile er kunu shakki na mile,
22.11: te ou giroste nize-u zen ita ḳorse na, iṭa he Mabudor samne gia ḳosom ḳoria miṭ-maṭ ḳorbo. I foshur malike-o ikan mante oibo, tain kunu ḳeti-furon faita nae.
22.12: Oile i girostor ges taki zudi iṭa suri oizae, te malike ḳeti-furon faibo.
22.13: Zudi kunu zongli zanuare doria igure marilae, taile er formanor lagi ogur fara-siṛa ṭukrain ania deḳani lagbo. Teu er kunu ḳeti-furon lagto nae.
22.14: “Ḳeuror ges taki kuzia ana kunu foshu zudi malikor aforḳe zoḳom oy ba morizae, te zein kuzia anchoin, ein er ḳeti-furon diba.
22.15: Oile malikor samne-u zudi oula oy, te ḳeti-furon lagto nae. I foshu zudi ṭeḳa dia baṛa ḳori ana oy, te ou baṛar ṭeḳa-u oibo er ḳeti-furon. Allar loge milonor usillar shorto (5) Shomazor befare
22.16: “Biar aḳt oise na, oula kunu shoti fuṛire ḳeu zudi misa matia ania tair loge zina ḳorilae, taile hou beṭae fuṛir bafre zorimana dia ou fuṛire bia ḳorte oibo.
22.17: Oile fuṛir bafe zudi tar fuṛire i fuar gese bia dite kunumonte-u razi na oy, ta-o i zorimana dite oibo.
22.18: “Kunu zadugir beṭire tumi zita rakio na.
22.19: “Kunu foshur loge ḳeu zina ḳorle, tare nisoy zane mara oibo.
22.20: “Ḳali Mabud saṛa dusra kuntar name zudi keu kunu boli-foshad dey, te tare-o shesh ḳorilte oibo.
22.21: “Kunu bin-deshi manshor loge bad bebohar ḳorio na, tare zulum ḳorio na. Mono rakio, tumra-o eḳ shomoy Mishor desho musafir aslae.
22.22: “Kunu ṛaṛi beṭire ba kunu etim huruttare duk dio na.
22.23: Tarare duk dile tara zudi kande, te i kandon nisoy ami kobul ḳormu.
22.24: Ete amar gusa oibo aguin borabor. Tumra zuddot foṛia morbae, tumrar bou-o ṛaṛi oibo, tumrar huruttain-o oula etim oiba.
22.25: “Tumra zudi amar kunu obabi bondare ḳoroz deo, taile shudkuror laḳan tar ges taki shud nio na.
22.26: Ḳeuror gotror saddor bondok raḳle, shuruz ḍubar age-u tar saddor firot dilaio.
22.27: Ḳaron uṛibar lagi oṭa-u tar eḳmatro shombol. Ikan nilegi he kita uṛia hutibo? Huno, he zudi amar gese ḳande, te ami to rohmanur rohim, ami tar ḳandon hunmu-u.
22.28: “Tumi Allar birudde matio na, tumar kunu bisarok-salishre-o boddua dio na.
22.29: “Tumrar ḳetor foshol ba anguror shorbotor ze baṭ amare dibar ḳota, amar i baṭ dite deri korio na. Tumra hoḳlor boṛo fuain amare dilaibae.
22.30: Tumrar goru-basur ar sagol-meṛar lagi-o ou eḳ shoman hukum. Itar hoḳol boṛo meda baichchain shatdin forzonto tarar maʼr gese roiba, aṭ dinor din amare dilaibae.
22.31: “Tumra-u oibae amar fak-fobitro bonda. Zongli zanuare maria falaise, ila kunu zandaror gust tumra ḳaio na; ita kukurre ḳaoaio.

23.1: “Tumra misa kunu bodnam bar ḳorio na. Fokkofati kori misa shakki dia kunu ḳobis manshore shaijjo ḳorio na.
23.2: Shomazor doshzone oinnae ḳorer dekia tumi-o oula ḳorio na. Kunu mamla-mokoddomar shakki deoat gia, shoktiala dolor fokko loia oinnae ḳam ḳorio na.
23.3: Ar kunu goribor bisaro gia, he gorib gotike-u tar fokko loio na.
23.4: “Tumar dushmonor kunu goru-gadare be-fote zaoat deḳle, iṭa firaia ania tar gese dio.
23.5: Tumare ingsha ḳore ila kunu manshor gadare baror tole foṛigese deḳle, tare ila falaia zaio na. Ou gadare tulat tumi oboshshoi shaijjo ḳorbae.
23.6: “Kunu goribor mamla-mokoddomat oinnae salishi korio na.
23.7: Hazail misa mamla taki horia roio. Kunu be-ḳosur ba ni-oforadi manshore moutor shaza dio na. Zegie ila oinnae ḳorbo, tare ami saṛtam nae.
23.8: Gush ḳaio na, ḳaron gushe souk ala manshore-o anda ḳorilae. Gushe bala manshor mator maze-o fes lagai dey.
23.9: “Kunu bin-deshi manshor ufre zulum ḳorio na. Musafiror hal-hokikot to tumra zano, ḳaron tumra-o Mishor desho musafir aslae. Allar loge milonor usillar shorto (7) Zummabar ar aram ḳorar niom
23.10: “Tumra eḳlagare soy boros zomino ḳet ḳorio ar foshol ḳaṭio,
23.11: bade shat nombor boroso zomino kunu ḳet na ḳoria fotit rakio, zominre aram dio. Ete zomino emne-u zeta folibo, ota tumrar gorib oḳole ḳaia basiba. Tara neoar bade zeta foṛi roibo, ita zongli foshu-fakinte ḳaiba. Tumrar anguror bagan ba zoytun baganor lagi-o ou hukum manio.
23.12: “Tumra haftat soy din ḳam ḳorio, oile shat nombor din to Zummabar, idin kunta ḳorio na. Teu tumrar goru-gadae ziraiba, ar tumrar baṛit zonmise i gulam ar musafir oḳlor zane-o aram faibo.
23.13: “Ami tumrare zeta hukum dilam, ita kub hushiar oia amol ḳorio. Kunu devtar nam muko loio na, itar nam zanu tumrar muko na huna zae. Allar loge milonor usillar shorto (8) Idor befare
23.14: “Tumra forteḳ boros tinbar amar name id adae ḳorio.
23.15: Foyla, Ḳamir Saṛa Ruṭir Id adae ḳorio. Ami zela hukum ḳorsi, ekkere ou laḳan Abib sandor shatdin ḳamir saṛa ruṭi kaio, ḳaron ou sando tumra Mishor taki bar oia aislae. Idor shomoy lilla-sodga saṛa tumrar ḳeu zanu ḳali ate amar gese na ae.
23.16: Dusra, tumra Foshol Daoar Id manio. Ḳetor maze tumra zeta ruiso, ita daoar bade foyla foshol dia-u id ḳorio. Tisra id, bosoror hesh sando baganor faḳna fol baṛit anar bade Ḍera-goror Id ḳorio.
23.17: Ou tino idor shomoy, bosoro tinbar tumrar hoḳol beṭain aia hoj ḳorar niote ami Alla malikor samne azir oio.
23.18: “Tumra zebla amar name foshu kurbani deo, ou shomoy ḳamir ala kunuzat ruṭi itar loge furaia lilla dio na. Idor shomoy amar name zeta foshu kurbani dibae, itar sorbiala ṭukrain bian forzonto rakio na.
23.19: Tumrar ḳetor hoḳol taki bala foshol, tumrar Mabud Allar goro anio. “Ar huno, kunu sagolor baichchar gust tar maʼr dud dia randio na. Allar hukum ar oada
23.20: “Ami tumrar lagi ze zaga zuit ḳori raḳsi, hono tumrare hefazote fosanir lagi, ami tumrar age age eḳzon firista faṭaimu.
23.21: Tumra en ḳota mon dia hunio ar manio, en loge to ami-o asi. Hushiar roio, en birudde zaio na. Arnae ein tumrar oforad maf ḳorta nae.
23.22: Oile tumra zudi en hukum mano, ar ami zela ḳoisi oula solo, taile tumrar dushmonor loge ami dushmoni kormu, zera tumrar birudde lagbo, ami tarar birudde lagmu.
23.23: Amuri, Hiṭṭi, Farizi, Kenani, Hibbi ar Zibuzi oḳlor desho amar firistae tumrare nia haraiba. Ami tara hoḳolṭire binash ḳorilimu.
23.24: Tumra tarar devtare puja ḳorio na, kezmot-o ḳorio na, ar hinor manshe zeta ḳoroin tumra ita ḳorio na. Tumra tarar deb-debir murtin ar tarar pujar monḍop oḳol bangia surmar ḳorilio.
23.25: Tumra ḳali tumrar Mabud Alla, mani amar ebadot ḳorio. Teu tumrar rizekor maze rohomot dimu, ar tumrar hokkol bemar-azar dur ḳormu.
23.26: Tumrar deshor kunu beṭir feṭor hurutta nosṭo oito nae, ḳeu aṭkura roito nae. Ami tumrare furafur hayati forzonto basaia raḳmu.
23.27: Tumra zoto zatir ḳasat zaibae, tarar dilor maze ag taki amar ḍor-ḳof foyda ḳormu, tarare bedisha banailimu. Tumrar hokkol dushmon ḳoredi bagiba.
23.28: Hibbi, Kenani ar Hiṭṭi oḳolre tumrar samna taki kedaibar lagi, ami tumrar age ḳori bingulor fal faṭaimu.
23.29: Oile ami tara hokkolre eḳoi bosoror bitre ḳedaitam nae, arnae asta desh fotit roia zongli zanuare boriziba, bade itae tumrare sataiba.
23.30: Ami aste aste tarare ḳedaimu, ar tumrar manush baṛia asta desh abad ḳorbae.
23.31: Ami Nil doria taki Filistini deshor shagor, mani Bumodio shagor forzonto, ar douknor morubumi taki Furat gang forzonto tumrar deshor shimana gaṛmu. I desho zera boshot ḳorer tarare tumrar ato shofimu, ar tumra tarare i desh taki kedai dibae.
23.32: Tarar loge ba tarar devta oḳlor loge tumra kunu chukti korio na.
23.33: Tumrar deshor bitre tarare roibar dio na. Arnae tara tumrare amar ges taki horaia gunar fote ṭania nibogi. Tumra zudi tarar deb-debir puja ḳoro, taile nichchit tumra-o tarar fando hamaibae.”

24.1: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi ar Harun, Harunor fuain Nadab ar Abihu, ar Boni Israilor shottoir zon murobbi neta amar gese uṭia ao. Aibar bala tumra duroi taki amare soizda ḳorio.
24.2: Oile ḳali tumi eḳla amar ḳasat ufre aibae, ar ḳeu nae. Erar loge ar kunu Boni Israil zanu na uṭe.”
24.3: Musae manshor gese aia Mabudor hokkol kalam ar ain-ḳanun hunaila, ita hunia hoḳol manshe eḳloge ḳoila, “Mabude zotota bataisoin ita hokkolta amra manmu.”
24.4: Mabudor batail hoḳol kalam Musae lekia toila. Bador din fozore uṭia faṛor lamat ekkan kurbani kana banaila, ar Boni Israilor baro gusṭire iad raḳar lagi barogu kuṭa banaila.
24.5: Bade tain Boni Israilor zuan oḳolre faṭaila ar tara Mabudor name bout zalail kurbani dila, ar bout bisal zobo ḳoria salamoti kurbani-o dila.
24.6: Musae kurbanir lour ordeḳ nia ḳoyṭa baṭit toila, ar baki ordeḳ nia kurbani kanar ufre siṭai dila.
24.7: Bade tain Allar loge milonor usillar niom-ḳanun leḳa kitabḳan tilaot ḳori manshore hunaila. Ita hunia manshe zuaf dila, “Amra Mabudor hoḳol hukum hunmu, tain zotota ḳoisoin hoḳolta manmu.”
24.8: Oḳan hunia Musae lou loia manshor ufre siṭaia ḳoila, “I lou oilo Allai milonor hou usillar lou, ze usilla Mabude tan hoḳol shorto mafik tumrar loge boail ḳorsoin.”
24.9: Teu Musa, Harun, Nadab, Abihu ar Boni Israilor shottoir zon murobbi neta faṛor ufre uṭla.
24.10: Tara nizor souke Boni Israilor Alla Pakor didar deḳla. Tara deḳla, Allar fao mubarokor tole ase, soḳsoḳa lil moni fattoror toiari saṭor laḳan, asmanor nomunae saf.
24.11: Boni Israilor murobbi oḳole Allare deḳle-o tain erare marar lagi at tulla na. Tara tan didar faila ar ḳaoa-daoa ḳorla. Hozrot Musa eḳla Allar dorbaro roila
24.12: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi ou faṛor ufre amar ḳandat ao, aia ḳoydin ro. Manshore talim dibar lagi amar ze hukum-ahkam fattoror ufre leḳsi, ota ami tumare dimu.”
24.13: Teu Musae tan ḳadim Iusare loge loia faṛo uṭla, ar Musa Allar faṛo gela.
24.14: Tain murobbi oḳolre ḳoia gela, “Amra firot aibar ag forzonto afnara amrar lagi ono bar saiba. Harun ar Hur afnarar ḳasat asoin, kunu ḳaijja-fosad lagle erar gese zaiba.”
24.15: Musa faṛo uṭte-u asta faṛ megor ḳalnie gurigelo,
24.16: ar Tur faṛor ufre Mabudor nuror tozolli zair oilo. Soy din asta faṛ ḳalnie gura roilo. Shat nombor din ou ḳalni taki Mabude Musare ḍakila.
24.17: Boni Israile Mabudor nuror tozolli deḳla, tara deḳla faṛor ufre agunir laḳan zoler.
24.18: Faṛ baia uṭi uṭi Musa hou ḳalnir bitre hamai gela. Tain sallish din sallish rait hou faṛo roila.

25.2: “Tumi Boni Israilre ḳo, tara amar gese dan-ḳoyrat loia azir ouk. Tarar nizor kushie zeta dan ḳorba, ota tumi shomzia rakio.
25.3: Tarar ges taki ou laḳan mal shomzio: shuna, rufa, fitol;
25.4: lilua, baingoni, lal rongor suta; dami suti kafoṛ ar sagolor ruma;
25.5: lal rong lagail meṛar samṛa, doriar fuʼ masor samṛa; babla laḳṛi;
25.6: serag oḳol zalanir lagi zoytunor tel; kelafoti shomzibar telor moshla ar agor-kushboy bananir moshla;
25.7: imamor lebasor efron ar bukur ufror tolit laganir akik moni ar baki hoḳol zator dami fattor.
25.8: “Amar roar lagi tumi Boni Israil oḳolredi fak-fobitro ekkan zaga toiar ḳoraibae. Teu ami tarar loge boshot ḳormu.
25.9: Amar roar gor ar mal-samanar befare ami tumare zela nomuna deḳaimu, ekkere ou laḳan ḳori hoḳolta tiar ḳoraio. Shahadot shonduk bananir niom
25.10: “Tara babla laḳṛi dia egu shonduk banaiba. Iṭa lambae aṛai at, deṛ at fash ar deṛ at usa.
25.11: Er bare-bitore ḳaṭi shunadi lefia dio, ar sairo kinaro shunar noksha lagaio.
25.12: Aguindi shuna golaia sairṭa ḳoṛa er sairo kunat lagaio, ogalat duiṭa ar hogalat duiṭa lagaio.
25.13: Babla laḳṛidi dugu benda banaia shunadi lefia dite oibo.
25.14: Shondukre boia neoar lagi duio galar ḳoṛar mazedi, ou duio benda harani lagbo.
25.15: Benda duioṭa shondukor ḳoṛar bitre harail roibo, iguin kulio na.
25.16: Ami amar hukum-ahkam leḳa ze fobitro shahadot fattor tumare dimu, tumi iṭa ou shondukor bitre toio.
25.17: “Ḳaṭi shunadi shondukor ekkan ḍaḳna banaio, oḳanor ufre gunar kofora adae ḳora oibo. I ḍaḳna lambae aṛai at ar fashe deṛ at oibo.
25.18: -19 Tumi hou ḍaḳnar kinaro shuna fiṭaia dugu Karubi banaio. Ou Karubi deḳte Duldul guṛar laḳan ḍaḳna ala. Banaia shondukor dui galat lagaio, ogalat eḳṭa, ar hogalat eḳṭa. Duio Karubi ḍaḳnar loge ou laḳan ḳori shunadi banani lagbo, zeṭa astaṭae ḳali eḳ siz oy.
25.20: Er ḍaḳna duioḳan ufredi melail roibo, ar er sayar tole taḳbo shondukor ḍaḳna. Duio Karubi mukamuki uba taḳbo, ar tarar souk roibo ḍaḳnar bae.
25.21: I ḍaḳnare shondukor ufre lagaio, ar amar hukum-ahkam leḳa ze shahadot fattor tumare dimu, ou fattor tumi shondukor bitre toio.
25.22: I shahadot shondukor ḍaḳnar ufre duio Karubir mazḳano, ami tumare didar dimu. Ou didaror shomoy Boni Israilor lagi amar hoḳol ain-ḳanun zanaimu. Fobitro ruṭi raḳar ṭebul banaio
25.23: “Babla laḳṛi dia dui at lamba, eḳ at fash ar deṛ at usa ḳori ekkan ṭebul banaio.
25.24: Oḳanre ḳaṭi shunadi lefia sairo kinaro noksha lagaio.
25.25: Ṭebulor sairo kinaro sair angul usa ḳori eḳ haz dibae, hazor maze shunadi noksha ḳorbae.
25.26: Ṭebulor sairo kunat sairo fayar ufre shunar sairṭa ḳoṛa lagaibae.
25.27: I sairo ḳoṛain ṭebulor kunar hou usa hazor tole lagaio, zate ṭebul boia neoar bala ḳoṛar bitre benda harail zae.
25.28: Benda duioṭa babla laḳṛidi banaia shunadi lefibae, ou bendadi ṭebul boia nibae.
25.29: Ṭebulor ufror tal-bashon, Allar name ḍalia dibar shorbot-fanir sodgar zog ar mog, hoḳolta ḳaṭi shunadi banani lagbo.
25.30: Ou ṭebulor ufre amar samne hamesha fobitro ruṭi raḳbae, i ruṭi zanu shob shomoy toa oy.” Fobitro serag dani bananir niom
25.31: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi kaṭi shunadi ekkan serag dani banaibae, serag danir tola ar ḍanḍi kaṭi shuna fiṭaia goṛaibae. Ou ḍanḍi, fulor laḳan fiala, kuṛi ar fafṛi oḳol, serag danir hoḳoltae eḳloge eḳ fis oibo.
25.32: Serag danir ḍanḍir dui galat tinṭa ḳori muṭ soyṭa ḍal taḳbo.
25.33: Forteḳ ḍalor maze zoba fulor laḳan tingu ḳori fiala taḳbo. Serag danir soyo ḍalo eḳlaḳan ḳam ḳora oibo.
25.34: Serag danir mul ḍanḍir maze-o zoba fulor laḳan sairṭa fiala taḳbo.
25.35: Ou mul ḍanḍi taki bar oilo soyṭa ḍalor maze, foyla duio ḍalor zuṛat egu kuṛi, dusra duio ḍalor zuṛat arok kuṛi, ar heshor duio ḍalor zuṛat-o kuṛi dio.
25.36: Kuṛi ar ḍal hoḳolta serag dani taki bar oibo, hoḳolta milia eḳ siz oibo. Astaṭa-u ḳaṭi shuna fiṭaia banani lagbo.
25.37: Erbade shatṭa serag banaia ou serag danir ufre ou laḳan ḳori lagani lagbo, zate serag oḳol zalanir bade serag danir samna for oy.
25.38: Seragor fita saf ḳorar simṭa ar zalail fitar sali toar lagi koygu baṭi, ḳaṭi shunadi banani lagbo.
25.39: Serag danir hoḳolta bananir lagi eḳ mon ḳaṭi shuna lagbo.
25.40: “Huno, ou faṛor ufre tumare zela noksha deḳail oilo, ekkere ou laḳan ḳori hoḳolta banaio.”

26.1: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi dosh ṭukra fesail sutar dami suti kafoṛdi amar goror fordain banaio. Ar lilua, baingoni, lal sutadi bala ustadredi er maze Karubi oḳlor sobi bain ḳoraio.
26.2: Hoḳol ṭukrain eḳ mafor oibo, lambae aṭaish at ar faṛe sair at.
26.3: I ṭukraintor fasḳan fasḳan ḳori ekḳano zuṛa dia, dukan boṛo gilaf banaite oibo.
26.4: Boṛo gilafor foyla ṭukrar fashor ek kinaro lilua sutadi hukor fuṛ banaite oibo. Dusra ṭukrat-o oula ḳorte oibo.
26.5: Foyla gilafor kinaro fonchashgu hukor fuṛ ar dusra gilafo oula fonchashgu fuṛ dite oibo. Duio boṛo gilafor hukor fuṛ egu aregur ulṭamuka taḳbo.
26.6: Bade shunadi fonchashgu huk banaia hou fuṛor mazedi haraia, boṛo duio gilafre aṭḳai dio. Teu i duio ṭukradi ekkan gor tiar oibo.
26.7: “Amar goror ufor gurar lagi sagolor ruma dia gilafor laḳan egaroḳan ṭukra banani lagbo.
26.8: Hoḳol ṭukrain eḳ mafor oibo, tish at lamba ar sair at faṛ.
26.9: On taki fas ṭukra eḳloge zuṛa dia boṛo ek gilaf banaite oibo. Ar baki soy ṭukra zuṛa dia, boṛo arok gilaf banaia harle, ou dusra gilafor ze ṭukra baṛti roibo, oḳanre tambur samnor bae dui bainj ḳori dite oibo.
26.10: Foyla boṛo gilafor fashor ek kinaro fonchashgu hukor fuṛ banaite oibo, ar dusra gilafo-o oula oibo.
26.11: Bade fitol dia fonchashgu huk banaia hou hukor fuṛor maze haraia, ou boṛo duio gilaf ekḳano zuṛa dite oibo. Teu i duio gilaf milia ekkan sani oibo.
26.12: Sagolor rumar boṛo gilafor ze ada ṭukra baṛti oibo, ikan ḳoredi loṭḳail roibo.
26.13: I gilaf ḳan tolor ḳafoṛ taki eḳ at boṛo oae ikan duio galabae loṭḳail roia hara gorre gurilibo.
26.14: Er ufor gurar lagi lal rong kora meṛar samṛadi aroḳan gilaf banaia guri dite oibo. Bade er ufre doriar fuʼ masor samṛadi sani toiar ḳori guri dite oibo.” Allar goror freim bananir laḳṛi-toḳta
26.15: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Amar goror lagi babla laḳṛidi koʼḳan freim banani lagbo.
26.16: Forteḳ freim banaibae dosh at lamba ar deṛ at faṛ.
26.17: Ou freimo dugu ḳori faya taḳbo. Hoḳol freim eḳlaḳan banaite oibo.
26.18: Dokkin galar lagi bishḳan freim banani lagbo.
26.19: I freimor fayar tole deoar lagi sallishgu rufar sungi banani lagbo, forteḳ freimor dui fayar lagi dugu sungi lagbo.
26.20: Amar goror uttor galar lagia-o bishḳan freim lagbo,
26.21: ar forteḳ freimor fayar tolor lagi dugu ḳori sallishgu rufar sungi banani lagbo.
26.22: Foismor galar lagi, mani kor galar lagi soyḳan freim,
26.23: ar ḳoror duio kunar lagi aro dukan freim lagbo.
26.24: I dui freimre dui kunar duio freimor loge tole-ufre ekḳano zuṛa dite oibo. Fortek kunar dui freim daror freimor loge batti maria eḳloge zuṛa dite oibo. Duio kuna eḳlaḳan oibo.
26.25: Teu ḳoredi aṭḳan freim oibo, ar forteḳ freimor tole deoar lagi dugu ḳori shullogu rufar sungi lagbo.
26.26: “Tumi freimre zuṛa dibar lagi babla laḳṛidi koygu lamba batti banaio.
26.27: Er maze fasgu batti goror ek galar lagi, ar baki fasgu arok galar lagi, ar fasgu lagbo ḳor gala, mani fosim galar freimor lagi.
26.28: Freimor mazḳano lagail ou battidi hoḳol freimor eḳ mata taki aroḳ mata forzonto aṭḳaibae.
26.29: Freim ḳanain shunadi lefte oibo, ar batti haranir lagi shunar ḳoṛa banaia freimo lagaite oibo. I batti oḳol-o shunadi lefte oibo.
26.30: Amar goror ze noksha tumare ou Tur faṛor ufre deḳailam, tumi ekkere ou laḳan ḳori iṭa toiar ḳoraio.” Allar goror lagi forda
26.31: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi lilua, lal, baingoni suta ar fesail dami suti kafoṛdi ekkan forda banaio. Bala kunu ustadredi er ufre Karubi oḳlor sobi bain ḳoraio.
26.32: I fordaḳan babla laḳṛidi sairṭa kuṭir loge lagaia shunar ḳoṛadi loṭḳai dibae, kuṭir matat shunar ḳoṛa lagaibae. Ar kuṭiguin shunadi lefaibae, kuṭir tolat rufar sungi lagaibae.
26.33: Fordar ufror suti kafoṛo lagail hukor loge fordaḳan loṭḳail roibo. I fordar ḳore shahadot shonduk toibae. Fordadi amar goror Herem Shorif, mani kas pak zaga ar pak zagar mazḳano beṛa dio.
26.34: Ou Herem Shorifor bitre shahadot shondukor ufre er ḍaḳna lagaio.
26.35: I fordar bare Herem Shorifor uttor galat fobitro ruṭi raḳar ṭebulḳan toio, ar er ulṭamuka dokkin galat toio serag dani.
26.36: “Amar goror duaror lagi ekkan forda banaio, ikan dami suti kafoṛdi banaia hari, lilua, baingoni, lal rongor sutadi noksha ḳorio.
26.37: I fordar lagi shunar ḳoṛa ar babla laḳṛir fasṭa kuṭi banaio. Kuṭiguin shunadi lefaio, kuṭir tolat fitolor fasgu sungi lagaio.”

27.1: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi babla laḳṛidi fas at lamba, fas at fash ar tin at ubi dia sairkuni kori ekkan kurbani kana toiar ḳoraio.
27.2: Er sairo kunar ufre laḳṛidi sairṭa hing dio. Ou hing kunar laḳṛi kudia banani lagbo, i astaḳan eḳ siz oibo. Bade fura kurbani kana fitoldi lefaio.
27.3: Kurbani kanar sali tular boṛo samos ar gamla, lou toar baṭi, gust tular boṛo ḳaṭa-sif, angra toar fatil, hoḳolta fitoldi banaio.
27.4: Fitoldi ekkan zali banaibae. Er sair kunat sairṭa fitolor ḳoṛa lagaio.
27.5: Kurbani kanar tola taki ufror mazamazi zagar taṛiar tole ou zali boaio.
27.6: Kurbani kana boia nibar lagi babla laḳṛidi dugu benda banaio, banaia duiogu fitoldi lefio.
27.7: I bendain ḳoṛar bitredi harani lagbo. Teu kurbani kana boia neoar bala duio bendain kurbani kanar dui galabae taḳbo.
27.8: Kurbani kana toḳtadi banaia er bitre faḳ rakio. Ami ou faṛor ufre tumare zela noksha deḳailam, ekkere olaḳan ḳori banani loaio. Allar goror uṭanor nomuna
27.9: “Amar goror sairobae uṭan taḳbo. Er dokkin galabae eḳ-sho at rakio, i muka dibae dami suti kafoṛor forda.
27.10: I forda ṭananir lagi bishgu kuṭi dibae. Kuṭir tolat dibae eḳṭa ḳori fitolor sungi, forda ṭananir lagi rufar ḳoṛa ar bandibar tar lagaibae.
27.11: Uttor galabae eḳ-sho at uṭan raḳbae. Hono-o forda dio, bishgu kuṭi, bishgu fitolor sungi, kuṭir loge lagaio rufar ḳoṛa ar tar.
27.12: Foisme foinchash at uṭan rakio, hono-o ḳoyḳan forda, doshgu kuṭi, fortek kuṭir tolat eḳṭa ḳori sungi dio.
27.14: geiṭor ek galat fonro at lamba forda, tinṭa kuṭi ar tinṭa sungi lagaibae,
27.15: ola dusra galat-o fonro at forda, tinṭa kuṭi ar tinṭa sungi dio.
27.16: Uṭanor geiṭor lagi sairṭa kuṭi, sairṭa sungi ar bish at lamba ekkan forda. Fordaḳan dami suti kafoṛdi banaia lilua, baingoni, lal sutadi noksha ḳoraio.
27.17: Uṭanor sairo galar hokkol kuṭire bandibar tar ar ḳoṛa oibo rufar, er tole fitolor sungi taḳbo.
27.18: Uṭanḳan lambae eḳ-sho at ar fashe foinchash at oibo. Er sairobae fas at ubi forda dio, forda oibo dami suti kafoṛor, ar kuṭintor tole dio fitolor sungi.
27.19: Amar goror ḳamor hoḳol siz fitoldi banaibae, mul tambu ar uṭanor beṛar ṭanar rosir tolor fereg oḳol fitolor oibo.
27.20: “Tumi Boni Israil oḳolre hukum dio, tara zoytun sesia tel banaia tumar gese anto, zate serag oḳol hamesha zalail roy.
27.21: Milon-tambur shahadot shondukor samne ze fordaḳan taḳbo, ou fordar bare Harun ar tar fuainte hainja taki fozor forzonto, Mabudor samne serag guin deḳa-huna ḳorba. Amar ou hukum zanu Boni Israile oarishor for oarish dori hor-hamesha amol ḳore.”

28.1: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “O Musa, Boni Israilor maze imamoti korar lagi tumar bai Harun, tar fua Nadab, Abihu, Ali-Azor ar Isamarre tumar samne anao.
28.2: “Tumar bai Harunor ijjot ar shundor baṛanir lagi fobitro lebas toiar ḳorao.
28.3: Ami Pak Ruhu dia zeta ustad oḳolre ḳarigori kamor aḳol-hekmot disi, tumi hou ḳarigor oḳolre hukum deo, tara Harunor lagi oula fobitro lebas banaukka, ze lebas ḳali amar imamotir ḳamo lage.
28.4: I lebasor maze bukur ufror toli, efron, alḳella, chekor ḳafoṛor fainjabi, faugṛi ar ḳomror bondoni banaio. Tumar bai Harun ar tar fuainte zate amar imamoti kam ḳorta faroin, erlagi tarar fak-fobitro lebas banaio.
28.5: Lebas banaite tara lilua, baingoni, lal suta, ar dami suti kafoṛ, er loge shuna-o lagaiba. Fordan imamor efron bananir niom
28.6: “Fordan imamor efron banaibae lilua, baingoni, lal suta, dami suti kafoṛ, ar shunadi. Ita bala kunu ustadredi banaio.
28.7: Efronor ḳandor dui gala zuṛa dibar lagi dukan foṭṭi banaia, efronor ufror kunat lagaio.
28.8: Efronor loge zuṛa lagail feṭor ufror belṭ ḳan-o efronor laḳan lilua, baingoni, lal suta, dami suti kafoṛ, ar shunadi banaio.
28.9: “Tumi duiṭa akik fattor ania er ufre Israil, mani Iakubor fuaintor nam kudaia lekaio.
28.10: Foyla fattoror ufre, tarar zonmor hishabe boṛo taki huru muka soy zonor nam, ar dusra fattoror ufre-o baki soy zonor nam kudaia lekaio.
28.11: Hunar oḳole dami fattoror ufre kudia zela sil banain, ekkere ou laḳan ḳori dugu fattoror ufre Israilor fuaintor nam kudaio.
28.12: Fattor duiogu shunar zazoiror maze lagaia efronor ḳandor foṭṭir loge lagaio. Israilor fuaintor bae Mabudor nozor raḳar lagi, i fattor Harune Mabudor samne tar ḳandor maze lagaibo.
28.13: -14 Duio zazoiror loge shunadi banail duksa chein lagaio. Ou duio chein ḳaṭi shunadi rosir nomunae fesaia banaio. Bukur ufror toli bananir niom
28.15: “Amar ray-foysala zanar lagi bukur ufror toli banaio. Bala ustad kunu dorziredi banaio. Efronor ḳamor laḳan iṭa-o lilua, baingoni, lal suta, dami suti kafoṛ, ar shunadi banaio.
28.16: Iṭa oibo lambae ada at, fashe ada at, sair kuna ala dui bainj ḳora ekkan ḳafoṛ.
28.17: Er ufre hair doraia sair hair fattor lagaibae. Foyla harit iakut, fit, ar fanna moni.
28.18: Dusra harit lal moni, lil moni ar hira;
28.19: tin nombor harit firuz, gumed ar foddorag moni.
28.20: Sair nombor hairo fukraz, boidurjo ar shuruz moni. I fattor oḳol shunar zazoirdi lagaio.
28.21: Israilor baro fuar lagi baroṭa fattor lagbo. Ita eḳo fattoro eḳ eḳ fuar nam kudia lekaio, zela kudia sil banail oy.
28.22: “Bukur ufror tolir lagi kaṭi shunadi rosir laḳan fesaia duksa chein banaio.
28.23: Shunar duiṭa ḳoṛa banaia bukur ou tolir ufror kunat lagaio.
28.24: Ar chein duiogesa duio ḳoṛar loge aṭḳaio.
28.25: Duio ḳandor efronor samnor fitat shunar zazoiror loge cheinor eḳ mata bandio.
28.26: Aro duiṭa shunar ḳoṛa banaia bukur ufror tolir dui kunat lagaio. I duioṭa efronor loge bukur tolir tole roibo.
28.27: Bade aro duiṭa shunar ḳoṛa banaia, efronor ḳandor foṭṭir shoi toledi, feṭor ufror belṭor ufror silair ḳasat lagaio.
28.28: Bade bukur ufror tolir tolor ḳoṛar loge feṭor ufror noksha ḳora belṭor ḳoṛa lilua sutadi bandio. Teu ou toli efronor ufre taki horto nae.
28.29: “Pak zagat hamaibar bala Harune amar ray-foysala hunar lagi, bukur ufror tolir ufre leḳa Israilor baro fuar nam lagaite oibo, i toliṭae tarare hor-hamesha Mabudor samne raḳbo.
28.30: Amar ray-foysalar ou tolir bitre Urim ar Tummim namor fobitro fattorguin rakio. Harun zebla Mabudor samne azir oibo, ou shomoy ita tar bukur ufre roibo. Harune Boni Israilor lagi amar ray-foysala zanar ufae hishabe hor-hamesha tar bukur ufre Mabudor deoa ou siz raḳbo.” Imam sabor aro lebas
28.31: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Efronor tole lamba ze alḳella roibo, ikṭa furaṭa-u lilua rongor sutadi banaio.
28.32: Mata haraibar lagi er mazḳano faḳ rakio. I faḳ zaga zate na siṛe, erlagi er sairo gala mozbut ḳori bain ḳorte oibo.
28.33: Lilua, baingoni, lal rongor sutadi anuar folor laḳan banaia, ou alḳellar tolor muṛir sairobae lagaio. Ar itar maze maze dio shunar gungur.
28.34: I muṛit dibae egu ḳori anuar ar egu gungur.
28.35: Imamoti korar bala Harune i lebas findibo. He zebla pak zagat Mabudor samne azir oibo, ar hon taki bare bar oibo, ou shomoy ou gungur oḳlor aoaz huna zaibo, teu he morto nae.
28.36: “Ḳaṭi shunadi ekkan fat banaia er ufre silor laḳan kudia ou ayat lekaio, ‘Mabudor name fak-fobitro.’
28.37: I fatḳan faugṛir samnor galat lagaia lilua sutadi bandio.
28.38: Iṭa Harunor ḳofalor ufre roibo. Zoto fak-fobitro mal Boni Israile dan-ḳoyrat loia aiba, itar hoḳol nomunar dush-tiruṭir bar Harune boibo. Mabude zate tarare kobul ḳoroin, erlagi Harune ḳofalor ufre i shunar fatḳan hamesha lagaia raḳbo.
28.39: Imamor fainjabi ar faugṛi toiar ḳoraio chekor dami suti kafoṛdi. Ḳomror bondoni kan sui-sutadi noksha ḳori banaio.
28.40: “Harunor fuaintor ijjot ar shundoror lagi fainjabi, toki ar ḳomror bondoni toiar ḳoraio.
28.41: Tumi tumar bai Harun ar tar fuaintore i kafoṛ findaio. Tarar matat fobitro tel ḍalia ḳelafoti shomzaia imamoti kamo lagaio. Tumi tarare fak-fobitro ḳorio, zate tara amar imam oita faroin.
28.42: Ḳomor taki urat forzonto shoromor zaga gurar lagi suti kafoṛdi haf-penṭor laḳan zangia banaio.
28.43: Harun ar tar fuain zebla Milon-tambut hamaiba, ba kurbani kanar gese pak zagat hamaia imamotir ḳamo lagba, ou shomoy tara ou zangia finba. Teu tara ni-oforadi roiba, morta nae. Harun ar tar oarishor silsilar lagi i ain hor-hamesha salu roibo.”

29.1: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi imam oḳolre ou laḳan fak-saf ḳorio, zate imam bonia tara amar ebadot ḳam salaita faroin. Tumi nikut egu bisal ar dugu meṛar faṭa anaio.
29.2: Erloge moydadi ruṭi, teldi baza fiṭa, ar tel maḳail safaṭi banaio. Ita kuntat-u ḳamir mishaio na.
29.3: Ota banaia eḳ ṭukrit loio, erloge hou bisal ar duio meṛar faṭa loia amar samne aio.
29.4: Bade Harun ar tar fuaintore Milon-tambur duaror ḳasat ania, fanidi naoai dio.
29.5: Ar hou fobitro lebas oḳol ania Harunre findaio. Fainjabi, alḳella, efron ar bukur ufror toli hoḳolta findaio. Efronor loge ustadi ator banail hou feṭor ufror belṭ ḳan-o bandia dio.
29.6: Tar matat faugṛi findaio ar shunar fatdi banail fobitro taz ḳan-o lagaio.
29.7: Bade ḳelafotir tel tar matat ḍalia tare ḳelafoti dio.
29.9: Harun ar tar fuaintore ḳomror bondoni bandia dio. Fuaintor matat dio toki. Ou laḳan Harun ar tar fuaintore imamor fodo boail ḳorio, zate siroḳalin niom hishabe imamotir fod ḳali tarar bongshot taḳe.
29.10: “Bade hou bisalre tumi Milon-tambur samne anio, Harun ar tar fuainte ogur ḳolla ataia diba.
29.11: Atanir bade ou bisalre Milon-tambur duaror ḳasat nia Mabudor samne zobo ḳorio.
29.12: Zobo ḳoria harle tuṛa lou tumar angulit lagaia kurbani kanar hingor maze lagaio, ar baki lou kurbani kanar tole ḍali dio.
29.13: Bisalor feṭor bitoror at-boṛor sorbi, ḳoiljar logor maṭia, duio kiḍni ar er sorbi, kurbani kanar ufre nia zalailio.
29.14: Er gust, ḳal, at-boṛ gufor shudda Boni Israilor kempor bare nia zalailio, ita to gunar koforar kurbani.
29.15: “Bade hou duio meṛa taki egu meṛa anio, anle Harune ar tar fuainte ogur ḳolla ataia diba.
29.16: Ar ou meṛare zobo ḳoria er lou nia kurbani kanar sairo galat siṭai dio.
29.17: Meṛare ḳaṭia ṭukraia tar ṭeng ar feṭor bitoror hoḳolta doia, ḳolla ar baki ṭukraintor loge toio.
29.18: Heshe i astagu kurbani kanar ufre nia zalailio. Ita oilo Mabudor name zalail kurbani, Mabudor niote agunit deoa geran ala sodga.
29.19: “Bade dusra meṛare-o ania Harune ar tar fuainte ḳolla atai diba.
29.20: Atanir bade ogure zobo ḳoria er tuṛa lou nia Harun ar tar fuaintor ḍain ḳanor lotit, ḍain ator ar ḍain faor buṛi angulor maze lagaio. Ar baki lou nia kurbani kanar sairo galabae siṭai dio.
29.21: Bade ḳelafotir tel ar kurbani kana taki tuṛa lou loia, Harun ar tar fuaintor gotro ar lebasor ufre siṭai dio. Teu lebas shudda Harun ar tar fuain fak-saf oiba.
29.22: Tumi ou meṛar sorbi, sorbi ala lenguṛ, feṭor bitoror hoḳoltar ufror sorbi, ḳoiljar logor maṭia, duio kiḍni, er sorbi, ar ḍainor ran nio, iṭa oilo imamoti kamo boailor lagi boḳshia dibar meṛa.
29.23: Bade Mabudor nozoro toa ḳamir saṛa ruṭir ṭukri taki ekkan ruṭi, teldi baza ekkan fiṭa ar tel maḳail safaṭi ekkan loio.
29.24: Loia ita hoḳolta Harun ar tar fuaintor ato dia, Mabudor samne raḳar niote dulona kurbani hishabe dulaibae.
29.25: Ar ota tarar at taki nia, Mabudor samne kurbani kanar ufre, hou zalail kurbanir ufre zalailibae. Iṭa oilo Mabudor name agunit deoa sodga. Itar dumar gerane Mabud kushi oin.”
29.26: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi Harunre imamotir ḳamo boail ḳorar lagi, ḳelafoti shomzibar meṛar sinar ṭukra loia Mabudor samne dulona kurbani hishabe dulaibae. Iṭa oilo tumar baṭ.
29.27: Harun ar tar fuaintore imamotir ḳamo boailor lagi dulail ou sina ar ran tumi fak-fobitro ḳorio.
29.28: Ou laḳan Boni Israilor deoa ou kurbanir ṭukrain hor-hamesha Harun ar tar fuainte faiba. Ita oibo Mabudor name Boni Israilor deoa salamoti kurbanir eḳṭa ongsho.
29.29: “Harunor bebohar ḳora fobitro lebas oḳol tar oarish oḳole faiba. Ou lebas findia tara ḳelafoti faiba ar imamotir ḳamo boail oiba.
29.30: Harunor bade tar ze fua imam oia Milon-tambur pak zagat ḳam ḳorbo, he shatdin forzonto i lebas tar gotro raḳbo.
29.31: “Ḳelafoti shomzibar meṛar ou gust ḳanain nia kunu fobitro zagat randibae.
29.32: Harun ar tar fuainte Milon-tambur duaror ḳasat boia, ṭukrit toa hou ruṭir loge ou gust ḳaiba.
29.33: Imamor ḳamo boail ḳorar lagi, tarare fak-saf ḳorar lagi, ḳanir zeta siz oḳol gunar mafir lagi kurbani deoa oibo, ita ḳali Harun ar tar fuainte ḳaiba. Ar ḳeu ita ḳaito farto nae, ḳaron ita oilo fak-fobitro ḳana.
29.34: Ou boail ḳorar kurbanir meṛar kunu gust ba ruṭi zudi bian forzonto roizae, te ita zalailite oibo, ḳeu ḳaito farto nae, ita to fak-fobitro.
29.35: “Harun ar tar fuaintor lagi, ami tumare zotota ḳorar hukum disi, tumi oula ḳorio. Boail ḳorar ou ḳam tumi shatdin bora ḳorio.
29.36: Gunar kofora hishabe tumi forteḳ din egu ḳori bisal kurbani dibae. Ar kurbani kanare fak-fobitro ḳorar lagi-o ou laḳan kurbani dio, ar fak-saf oar lagi fobitro tel ḍalio.
29.37: Kurbani kanare fak-fobitro ḳorar lagi shatdin bora kurbani dia, guna mafir kofora adae ḳoria fak-fobitro ḳorio. Teu i kurbani kana eḳ moha-fobitro zaga oibo. Zekunu zinish i kurbani kanat soaile, ita fak-fobitro oizibo. Forteḳ dinor kurbanir niom
29.38: “Er bad taki forteḳ din i kurbani kanar ufre, eḳ boros boyoshor dugu meṛa-baichcha kurbani dibae,
29.39: egu biane ar egu hainja bala.
29.40: Foyla meṛa-baichchar loge dui sher moyda ar eḳ sher zoytunor fisha tel mishaite oibo. Ar shorbot-fanir sodgar lagi anguror eḳ sher shorbot-o Allar name dibae.
29.41: Hainja bala ze meṛa kurbani dibae, erloge-o biankur laḳan dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodgar hoḳolta dite oibo. Ita oilo Mabudor niote agunit deoa geran ala kurbani.
29.42: “Oarishor for oarish dori Milon-tambur duaror gese, mani amar samne forteḳ din i zalail kurbani dite oibo. Hono ami tumrare didar dimu, tumar loge batchit ḳormu.
29.43: Boni Israilor gese ami hono didar dimu, ar amar kudrote ou zaga fak-fobitro oibo.
29.44: Ami Milon-tambu ar kurbani kana fobitro ḳormu. Amar imamotir lagi Harun ar tar fuaintore-o ami fobitro ḳormu.
29.45: Ami Boni Israilor Mabud oia tarar maze boshot ḳormu.
29.46: Teu tara zanba, ami Alla-u tarar Mabud. Ami tarar loge boshot ḳorar lagi-u to tarare Mishor desh taki bar ḳoria anchi. Ami Alla-u tarar Mabud.”

30.1: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Agor-kushboy zalaibar lagi tumi babla laḳṛidi ekkan ṭebul banaio.
30.2: Igu oibo sairkuna ala, eḳ at lamba, eḳ at fash, dui at ubi. Asta ḳan-u hing shudda ekḳano lagail roibo.
30.3: Er ufror sani, sanir sairo kinara ar hing, hoḳolta ḳaṭi shunadi lefibae. Sairo kinaro shunar noksha ḳoraibae.
30.4: Er dui kinaror nokshar tole dugu ḳori shunar ḳoṛa lagaio. I koṛar bitre benda haraia ogu boia neoa oibo.
30.5: I benda guin babla laḳṛidi banaia shunadi lefaio.
30.6: Shahadot shondukor ḍaḳnar ḳasat ze fordaḳan ase, ou ṭebul er samne rakio. Ou zagat ami tumare didar dimu.
30.7: “Forteḳ din biane serag guin zuit-zait ḳorar bala, Harune ou ṭebulor ufre kushboy-ala agor zalaibo.
30.8: Hainja bala serag zalanir shomoy, he hirbar agor-kushboy zalaibo. Tumrar oarishor for oarish dori Mabudor samne hor-hamesha ou agor-kushboy zolbo.
30.9: I agor-kushboy zalanir ṭebulor ufre dusra kunuzator kushboy zalaio na. Kunu zalail kurbani, dan-gomor sodga, ba shorbot-fanir sodga dio na.
30.10: Gunar mafir kofora hishabe, Harune bosoro eḳbar gunar koforar kurbanir lou, ṭebulor hing oḳlor ufre lagaite oibo. Teu ikan Mabudor name moha-fobitro oibo. Oarishor for oarish dori fordan imame bosoro eḳbar ou laḳan ḳorte oibo.” Zanor bodla rufa
30.12: “Tumi zebla Boni Israilor manshor foriman gonbae, ou shomoy tara hoḳole-u zarzir zanor bodla rufa dite oibo, zate i gonar lagi tarar ufre kunu gozob na ae.
30.13: Tarare gonar bala oula bodla loio, gona oise dolo zera hamaiba, era ebadot ḳanar mafe ada tola rufa diba. Forteḳ bish rotie eḳ tola gonio. I rufa oibo Mabudor.
30.14: Bish boros ba er beshi boyoshor zekunu zon gona shesh oa dolo hamaile, en zanor bodla Mabudre ou rufa diba.
30.15: Zanor bodla deoar shomoy doni oḳole ou ada tolar beshi dita farta nae, ar goribe-o ḳom dile oito nae.
30.16: Tumi Boni Israilor ges taki zanor bodla ou rufa nia, amar goror ḳamo lagaio. Tumrar zanor bodla i rufae, Boni Israil oḳolre Mabudor dorbaro iad ḳorai dibo.” Uzur fanir gamla banaio
30.18: “Uzu ḳorar lagi tumi fitolor eḳṭa gamla, ar gamla toar lagi fitolor ekkan soki-kaṭ banaio. Milon-tambu ar kurbani kanar mazḳano fani boria ogu toio.
30.19: I fanidi Harun ar tar fuainte uzu ḳorba.
30.20: Tara zate na moroin, erlagi forteḳbar Milon-tambut hamaibar bala ou fanidi uzu ḳorte oibo. Imam hishabe Mabudor name agunit deoa zekunu kurbani adae ḳorar shomoy-o uzu ḳorte oibo.
30.21: Tara zane basia roar lagi ou uzu ḳorba. I hukum tarar lagi hor-hamesha salu roibo, oarishor for oarish dori boail roibo.” Ḳelafoti shomzibar tel
30.23: “Tumar nizor gese kushboydar bala bala moshla oḳol dola ḳoro. Tumi fas-sho tola mura namor ator, aṛai-sho tola kushboy-ala ḍailchini, ar aṛai-sho tola bos,
30.24: shadaron ḍailchini fas-sho tola, ar zoytunor tel sair sher dola ḳorio. I maf oilo ebadot ḳanar mafe.
30.25: Ou moshla oḳol dia agor-kushboy moshla bananir ḳarigoror niome tumi kelafoti shomzibar tel banaio, i tel to fobitro.
30.26: Ou tel dia tumi Milon-tambu, shahadot shonduk,
30.27: ṭebul, ṭebulor ufror hoḳol samana, serag danir hoḳolta, ar agor-kushboy zalanir ṭebul,
30.28: kurbani kana ar er mazor hoḳol samana, uzur gamla ar er tolor soki-kaṭ hoḳoltare fusia fak-fobitro ḳorio.
30.29: Teu i hoḳolta moha-fobitro samana oibo. Ita samana ḳeu soile, he-o moha-fobitro oizibo.
30.30: “Tumi Harunre ar tar fuainre amar imamotir ḳamor lagi kelafotir tel dia fak-fobitro ḳorio.
30.31: Ar Boni Israilre zanai dio, oarishor for oarish dori iṭa-u oibo amar ḳelafoti shomzibar fobitro tel.
30.32: I tel manshor gotro deoa zaito nae. I niome tara zate ar kunu tel na banae. I tel to fobitro. Tumra iṭare fak-fobitro mono ḳoria ijjot ḳorte oibo.
30.33: Ḳeu zudi i laḳan tel toiar ḳore, ba imam sab saṛa ar ḳeu i tel gotro maḳe, te tare nizor zati taki fusilibae.” Agor-kushboy bananir niom
30.34: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi nizor gese kisu kushboy-ala moshla: guggulu, noki, kunduru ar ḳaṭi loban dola ḳorio. Dola ḳoria ota homan homan ḳori mishaio.
30.35: Ar zera agor-kushboy banain, tararedi ou ḳam ḳoraio. Itar loge nun mishaio, ita oibo nirbezal ḳaṭi fak-fobitro agor.
30.36: Ou agoror tuṛa guṛa nia Milon-tambur shahadot shondukor samne toio. Hono ami tumare didar dimu. Tumra i agorre moha-fobitro samana mono ḳorio.
30.37: Ou moshla dia i niome ḳeu zate tar nizor lagi kunu agor-kushboy na banae. Ita to Mabudor name fak-fobitro siz, ikan kial rakio.
30.38: Kushboydar siz mono ḳoria ḳeu zudi ita toiar ḳorilae, te tare i zati taki fusilibae.”

31.2: “Huno, ami Ehuda gusṭir Huror nati, Urir fua Batselolre fosond ḳorsi.
31.3: Ami tare Allai ruhu dia kamil ḳorsi. Hoḳol laḳan ḳarigori kamor aḳol-buddi, biddae ustadi kamor ḳemota disi.
31.4: Erlagi he shuna, rufa, fitolor ufre shundor shundor noksha banaito farbo.
31.5: Dami dami fattor ḳaṭia moni-mukta lagani, laḳṛir ufre nokshar ḳam ar hoḳol zator ator ḳam ḳorto farbo.
31.6: Tar zugali hishabe ami Dan gusṭir Ohisamaḳor fua Aholiabre fosond ḳorsi. Ze ustad oḳole i kam ḳorta farba, ami tarare ḳamor aḳol disi, zate tumare batail amar hukum mafik, ita hoḳolta tara banaita faroin.
31.7: Tara banaiba, Milon-tambu, shahadot shonduk, er ufror ḍaḳna, tambur hoḳol mal-samana,
31.8: ṭebul, ṭebulor logor siz oḳol, ḳaṭi shunar serag dani, serag danir logor hoḳolta ar agor-kushboy zalanir ṭebul,
31.9: kurbani kana ar er hoḳol mal-samana, hanḍi-bashon, uzur fanir gamla ar er soki-kaṭ,
31.10: imamoti kamor lagi Harunor imamotir lebas ar tar fuaintor lebas,
31.11: ḳelafotir tel, pak zagar lagi kushboy-ala agor. Ami tumare zela hukum disi, ekkere ou laḳan tara banaiba.” Zummabaror niom
31.13: “Tumi nize Boni Israilre ḳo, tumra amar deoa forteḳ Zummabar manio. I Zummabar oarishor for oarish dori tumra ar amar maze eḳ nishana oibo, zate tumra buzbae, ami-u Mabud, ar ami tumrare amar fobitro bonda oar lagi alada ḳorsi.
31.14: “Tumra Zummabar manio, ou dinre tumrar lagi pak din ḳora oise. Ḳeu zudi i din na mane, te tare marilite oibo. Ze manshe idin kunuzat ḳam ḳorbo, tare tar zatir maz taki fusilibae.
31.15: Tumra haftar soydin ḳam ḳorio, oile shat nombor din Mabudor name aramor din, Zummabar. Shukrobar shuruz ḍuba taki Shonibar shuruz ḍubar ag forzonto Zummabar. I din ze manshe ḳam ḳorbo, tare marilibae.
31.16: Boni Israil oḳole amar deoa siroḳalin niom hishabe, oarishor for oarish dori hor-hamesha i Zummabar mante oibo.
31.17: I Zummabar to Boni Israil ar amar maze hameshakur lagi siroḳalin eḳ nishana. Ḳaron soydine Mabude asman-zomin hoḳolta foyda ḳorla, oile shat nombor din kunu ḳam na ḳoria ziraila.”
31.18: Mabude Tur faṛor ufre Hozrot Musar loge ou batchit shesh ḳoria harle, Musar ato dui ṭukra shahadot fattor dila. Ou fattoror maze Alla Pake tan nizor ate tan hukum-ahkam leḳsoin.

32.1: Musa nobi faṛ taki lamia aite deri or dekia, manshe aia Harunor sairobae dola oia ḳoila, “Amrare fot sinaia neoar lagi, afne amrare devta banai deukka. Ḳaron, ze Musae amrare Mishor taki bar ḳori anche, tar kita goṭse amra to zani na.”
32.2: Ikan hunia Harune tarare ḳoila, “Tumra zarzir bou ar fua-fuṛintor ḳano taki shunar goyna kulia amar gese ano.”
32.3: Teu hoḳole tarar ḳanor goyna kulia Harunor gese ania dilo.
32.4: Manshe zeta shuna ania dila, Harune ota nia aguindi golaia, hunaror atiardi eḳ basuror murti banaila. Ogu dekia Boni Israile ḳoila, “Bai oḳol, ou ein-u tumrar devta, zein tumrare Mishor desh taki bar ḳori anchoin.”
32.5: I halot dekia Harune hou basuror samne eḳ boli kana banaia zanai dila, “Samnor ḳail Mabudor name kushi-bashi kora oibo.”
32.6: Teu bador din kub sobre uṭia manshe devtar samne aia mongol boli ar foshu zalaia boli dila. Bade tara ḳaoa-daoa ḳoria hari, hoi-hulla ḳori nas-gan, furti-amud ḳorat lagla.
32.7: Ou Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi faṛor lamat zao. Tumar ou zeta manshore Mishor desh taki bar ḳori ancho, ita to naforman bonigese.
32.8: Ami tarare zela solar hukum dislam, tara ita bad dia nizor lagi eḳ basuror murti banaia, maṭit foṛia ogure fornam ḳorer. Ogur name tara foshu boli der ar ḳor, bai oḳol, ou ein-u tumrar devta, zein tumrare Mishor desh taki bar ḳori anchoin.”
32.9: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Ami ita manshore sini, ita to gaṛteṛa-ekguia zat.
32.10: Oḳon tumi amare bada dio na, itar ufre amar gusa aguinor laḳan dau dau ḳori zoler, ami itare sarḳar ḳorilimu. Bade ami tumar maz taki eḳ moha zati foyda ḳormu.”
32.11: Teu Musae tan Mabud Allare minot-ḳajji koria ḳoila, “O Mabud, tumi tumar kudroti at dia tumar moha kudroti bole zetare Mishor taki bar ḳori ancho, tarar ufre tumi kene oto gusa oilae?
32.12: Mishori oḳole ḳene ikan matar shuzug faita, faṛia elaḳat ania tarare ḳotom ḳoria, dunia taki tarar nam miṭailibar lagi tumi tarare Mishor taki bar ḳoria ancho? Mabud go, tumar i betaya gusaḳan tumi tamailao. Meherbani kori, tumar bonda oḳlor ufre i gozobḳan anio na.
32.13: Tumar afon gulam Ibrahim, Isʼhak ar Iakubor ḳota iad ḳoro. Tumi nizor name ḳosom ḳaia tarare ḳoislae, tarar oarish oḳolre tumi asmanor terar laḳan baṛaibae, ar tumar oada ḳora ou asta deshor malikana-o tarare dibae, ar tara hor-hameshakur lagi er doḳol faiba.”
32.14: Ikan hunia Mabudor meherbani oilo. Tain tan bonda oḳlor ufre ze gozob ḍalita saisla, ita bad dilaila.
32.15: Erbade Musae Allar deoa duioḳan shahadot fattor loia lamat aila. I fattoror ulṭa-baṭiol duio galat leḳa asil.
32.16: I duio fattor oilo Alla Pakor nizor ator ḳam, ar i fattoror ufre kudia leḳa ḳano tan nizor ator leḳa.
32.17: Musar ḳadim Iusae manshor ita hoi-hulla hunia Musare ḳoila, “Sab, amrar kempor maze zuddor aoaz huna zar.”
32.18: Musae ḳoila, “Ita to kunu zuddor ara-zitar aoaz nae. Ami zeta huniar, ita to ganor aoazor laḳan lager.”
32.19: Bade Musae kempor ḳasat aia manshor nasa-nasi ar basuror murti deḳla. Dekia-u tain gusae aguin oia, ator fattor duioḳan iṭa mari falai dila. Teu fattor duioḳan faṛor tole foṛia surmar oigelo.
32.20: Ar Musae tarar banail basuror murti nia agunit falaia zalailila. Bade ogure fishia guṛa banaia fanit mishaia, Boni Israil oḳolre ḳaoai dila.
32.21: Tain Harunre ḳoila, “Ita manshe tumare kita ḳorsil, tumi kene tararedi shiriki kam ḳorailae?”
32.22: Harune zuaf dila, “Malik, afne gusa ḳoroin na zanu, afne to zanoin-u, ita manush ḳali karaf ḳamor ashik.
32.23: Tara aia amare ḳoila, amrare fot sinaia loia zaoar lagi devta banai deukka, ḳaron ze Musae amrare Mishor taki bar ḳori anchoin, en kita oise, amra to zaniar na.
32.24: Ikan hunia ami tarare ḳoilam, tumrar gese zeta shuna-dana ase, ota kulia amar gese ano. Tara ania amar ato dila, ar ami oḳnain iṭa mari agunit falailam, teu ou basur ogu bar oia ailo.”
32.25: Musae deḳla, i manush guin beforua oigesoin. Tain buzla, Harune tarare beforua oar shuzug disoin. Erlagi dushmon oḳole ashibar shuzug faisoin.
32.26: Ou Musae kempor geiṭor gese ubaia ḳoila, “Tumra zoto zon Mabudor fokke aso, hoḳol amar ḳasat ao.” Teu Lebi gusṭir hoḳol manush tan gese ailo.
32.27: Aia harle Musae tarare ḳoila, “Mabud, zein Boni Israilor Alla, tain nize hukum ḳorsoin, tumra hoḳole zarzir ḳomro toluar bando, ar kempor bitre zare samne fao zane maro. Asta kempor bitre bai-bondu, ari-fori zare fao maro.”
32.28: Teu Lebi gusṭir manshe Musar hukum mafik kam ḳorla. Hi din onuman tin azar manush mara gela.
32.29: Bade Musae ḳoila, “Tumra aiz Mabudor name zarzir fua ar bai-biradoror ufre at tulte ḳoredi geso na, Mabudor ḳamor lagi tumra alada oiso, erlagi Mabude tumrare rohomot disoin.”
32.30: Bador din Musae manshore ḳoila, “Tumra to bezuita guna ḳorso. Te ami oḳon hirbar Tur faṛo Mabudor dorbaro zairam, farle tumrar guna mafir koforar kunu fot bar ḳormu.”
32.31: Musae Mabudor dorbaro gia aroz ḳorla, “O Mabud, i manush guinte bezuita guna ḳorilise. Tara nizor lagi shunar murti banaise.
32.32: Te tumi meherbani koria tarar gunare oḳon maf ḳori dilao, ar zudi maf na ḳoro, taile tumar leḳa ḳata taki amar namḳano ḳaṭilao.”
32.33: Mabude zuaf dila, “Huno, amar birudde zera guna ḳorse, ami kali tarar namre-u amar ḳata taki fusilimu.
32.34: Te tumi oḳon zaogi, ar ami ze deshor ḳota ḳoisi, tumi tarare loia hou desho roana dilao. Amar firistae tumrare fot deḳaia niba. Bade zebla shaza deoar shomoy aibo, ou shomoy ami tarar gunar shaza dimu.”
32.35: Harunor ate banail hou basuror murtir lagi manshe zeta ḳorsila, otar lagi Mabude tarar ufre gozob nazil ḳorla.

33.1: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Zao, tumi ou zerare Mishor taki ancho, erare loia oḳon-u i zaga saṛia zaogi. Amar oada ḳora hou desho zao. Ami Ibrahim, Isʼhak ar Iakubor gese oada ḳorslam, tarar oarish oḳolre ou desh oḳol dimu, te tumi tarare loia hono zaogi.
33.2: Ami tumrar age ḳori eḳzon firista faṭaimu. Ein gia honor Kenani, Amuri, Hiṭṭi, Farizi, Hibbi ar Zibuzi oḳolre ḳedai diba.
33.3: Ita to dud ar mour banḍar-ala desh. Oile ami tumrar loge oia zaitam nae, ḳaron tumra kub gaṛteṛa-ekguia zat, kizanu ami fotor maze-u tumrare nifat ḳorilai.”
33.4: I bifodor ḳota hunia manshe ḳanda-ḳaṭi lagaila. Tara ḳeu kunuzat goyna-gaṭi finla na.
33.5: Ḳaron Mabude Musare ḳoisla, “Tumi Boni Israil oḳolre ḳo, tumra oilae gaṛteṛa-ekguia zat. Ami eḳ foloḳor lagi gele-o tumrare nifat ḳorilimu. Tumrar gotro taki hoḳol goyna-gaṭi kulilao, teu ami buzmu, tumrar lagi kita ḳortam.”
33.6: Teu Boni Israile Tur faṛo-u tarar goyna-gaṭi hoḳolta kulilila, ita ar finla na. Hozrot Musa (a:)or ḳaneka-tambu
33.7: Hozrot Musar eḳ tambu asil, tain Boni Israilor kempor bare duroi nia ou tambu fatita, i tambure tain ḳaneka-tambu ḳoia ḍakita. Mabudor ges taki keu kunta zante saile tara ou ḳaneḳar gese zaita.
33.8: Musa zebla hi kaneḳa shorifo roana dita, ou shomoy hokkol manush zarzir tambur duaro ubaita ar Musa ḳaneḳat na hamani forzonto hoḳole tan bae sai roito.
33.9: Tain hi kaneḳa shorifo hamanir bade-u Allai megor kuṭi kaneḳar duaror muko lamia aito, ar Mabude zotoboil Musar loge batchit ḳorta, otoboil i kuṭi ono roito.
33.10: Manshe zebla-u i megor kuṭire ḳaneḳar duaror gese deḳto, ou shomoy tara zarzir duaror ges taki Mabudre soizda ḳorto.
33.11: Kunu manshe tar dustor loge mukamuki boia zela batchit ḳore, Mabude-o Musar loge oula mukamuki batchit ḳorta. Bade Musa kempo firia aita, oile tan ḳadim Nunor fua Iusa namor i zuan, ḳaneḳa shorif taki bar oita na. Hozrot Musar gese Mabudor oada
33.12: Musae Mabudor dorbaro aroz ḳorla, “Mabud, tumi to ḳoirae ami ota manshore loia zaitamgi, oile amar loge ar ḳare dirae, ikan to amare zanailae na. Tumi kali koilae, tumi amare tumar nizor zon mono ḳoro ar amare tumar ḳas mayar nozoro raḳso.
33.13: Te hasau zudi ami tumar mayar nozoro taki, taile tumi kun kiale kita ḳoro, ota amare zanao, zate ami tumare furafur sini ar tumar rohomotor maze roi. Tumi to zano-u, i Israil zati tumar-u proza.”
33.14: Mabude zuaf dila, “Huno, ami nize-u tumar loge oia zaimu ar tumare aram dimu.”
33.15: Ou tain ḳoila, “Tumi zudi amrar loge na zao, te amrare in taki bidae dio na.
33.16: Tumi na gele manshe kila buzba, amar ufre ar tumar i bonda oḳlor ufre tumar rohomot ase? Amra-u zen duniar hoḳol zati taki alada, ikan kila buzba?”
33.17: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Ṭik ase, tumi zela ḳoilae, ami ola ḳormu. Tumi to amar mayar nozoro aso, tumare amar nizor afon mono ḳori.”
33.18: Teu Musae aroz ḳorla, “Te tumar shan-tozolli amare deḳaona.”
33.19: Mabude ḳoila, “Ami zare kushi doya ḳormu, ar zare kushi rohom ḳormu. Huno, tumar samnedi ami amar hokkol nek surot zair ḳormu. ‘Mabud, zein asoin’ tumar samne ami amar ou nam elan ḳormu.
33.20: Oile amar muk deḳar takkot tumar oito nae. Ḳaron amare dekille kunu adom zat base na.
33.21: Te huno, tumi amar ḳasar ou zaga bae sao, deḳrae ni, fattoror eḳ taḳ ase, ou taḳor ufre tumi ubao.
33.22: Teu tumar samne dia amar shan-tozolli zaoar bala, ami tumare ou fattoror faṭar bitre haraimu. Ami na zaoa forzonto, amar at dia tumare guria raḳmu.
33.23: Bade amar at horaile, tumi amar ḳor gala deḳtae farbae, oile ḳeu amar mukor didar faito nae.”

34.1: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Agor fattoror laḳan tumi noya dukan fattor tiar ḳoro. Tumi ze dukan bangislae, hi fattoror maze ze hukum leḳa asil, ou hukum oḳol ami hirbar i duio fattoro lekia dimu.
34.2: Fozor bade-u tumi tiar oia Tur faṛor ufre uṭio. Uṭia faṛor matat amar samne azir oio.
34.3: Tumar loge kunu manshore anio na, i faṛor kunuḳano zate kunu manush na ae. Faṛor ḳandat kunu goru-sagol ba meṛa-meṛire raḳte dio na.”
34.4: Teu Musae agor fattoror laḳan dukan fattor banaila, ar Mabudor hukum mafik fozore uṭia fattor duioḳan ato loia Tur faṛor ufre uṭila.
34.5: Ar Mabud-o megor ḳalnir maze lamia aila. Tain Hozrot Musar daro ubaia tan “Mabud, zein asoin” nam elan ḳorla.
34.6: Tain Musar samna dia toshrif nila, ar ou kalam elan ḳori kori gela, “Mabud, zein asoin, rohman ar rohim Alla, tain gusa ḳoroin dir gotie, tan obiram maya-mohobbot ar hok-halalir kunu shima nai.
34.7: Tain azar azar oarish forzonto obiram maya-mohobbot ḳoroin, manshor oinnae-oforad, naformani ar gunar mafi dein, oile dushi zonre shaza-o dein. Baf-dadar naformanir shaza, tarar nati-futi forzonto bortain.”
34.8: Ikan hunia-u Musa nobi loge loge soizdat foṛia ḳoila,
34.9: “O malik, ami zudi tumar dorbaro rohomot fai, te meherbani kori tumi-o amrar log kano solo. Ou zati zudio kub gaṛteṛa-ekguia zat, ta-o tumi amrar guna ar ḳosurire maf ḳoria dilao. Amrare tumar afon proza hishabe kobul ḳorilao.”
34.10: Mabude ḳoila, “Huno, ami eḳ usilla boail ḳoriar, ami tumar hoḳol manshor samne ou laḳan keramoti kam deḳaimu, zeta asta duniar kunu zatir samne kunudin-o ḳora oise na. Tumi ou zeta manshor loge boshot ḳorrae, tara deḳba, ami Mabude tumrar lagi kita ḳoriar, ita dekia tarar zano ḍor hamaibo.
34.11: Ami aiz tumrare zeta hukum dimu, ita kial ḳori amol ḳoro. Ami Amuri, Kenani, Hiṭṭi, Farizi, Hibbi ar Zibuzi oḳolre tumrar samna taki kedai dimu.
34.12: Oile ḳobordar! Tumra ze desho zairae, i deshor manshor loge kunuzat chukti korio na, arnae fando hamaibae.
34.13: Tumra tarar puja-monḍop bangia ṭukra ṭukra ḳorbae, tarar boli kanain bangilibae, ar tarar Ashera-debir nishana kuṭi oḳol ḳaṭia falaibae.
34.14: Tumra kunu deb-debir puja ḳorio na. Ami Alla to la-shorik Mabud, kunu shorik shoijjo ḳori na, amar faona ebadot ami sai-u sai.
34.15: “Hou deshor manshor loge kunuzat chukti korio na, arnae tara zebla shiriki kamor niote, tarar deb-debir samne nizore shofia diba, devtar name boli diba, ou shomoy tara tumrare-o daot diba ar tumra gia tarar ou bolir gust ḳaibae.
34.16: Tumrar fuaintor loge tarar fuṛintor bia-shadi dibae, ar ou fuṛinte tarar devtar gese gia shiriki kam ḳorba, tarar loge tumrar fuaintore-o ṭanba.
34.17: “Tumra nizor lagi kunuzator murti banaio na.
34.18: “Tumra Ḳamir Saṛa Ruṭir Id adae ḳorio. Shat din ḳamir saṛa ruṭi kaio. Abib sandor ṭik kora tariko tumrare zela hukum deoa oise, ou laḳan id adae ḳorio. Mono rakio, ou sando tumra Mishor taki bar oia aislae.
34.19: “Tumrar feṭor foyda hoḳol foyla fua amar oibo. Erloge tumrar goru-sagol ba foshur foyla meda baichcha-o amar oibo.
34.20: Ḳali gadintor foyla meda baichchar bodla, amare egu meṛa-baichcha bodla dia ogure ḳalas ḳoria nio. Ḳalas na ḳoraile ogur gordona bangilio. Tumrar hokkol boṛo fuainre ola ḳalas ḳorai nio. “Huno, idor shomoy ḳeu ḳali ate amar ḳasat aio na.
34.21: “Haftar soydin tumra ḳam ḳorio, oile shat nombor din ziraio. Ḳet ḳora ar foshol daoar bala-o ziraio.
34.22: “Ou tino id tumra manio, Fonchaisha Id, ḳetor foyla daoa gom dia Noya Fosholor Id, ar bosoror hesh masho baganor faḳna fol baṛit ania Ḍera-goror Id adae ḳorio.
34.23: Bosoro tinbar tumrar hoḳol beṭain aia hoj ḳorar niote amar gese azir oio. Mono rakio, ami-u Mabud, Boni Israilor Alla.
34.24: Ami hou deshor hoḳol zatire tumrar samon taki kedai dimu. Tumrar deshor shimana baṛaia boṛo ḳormu. Tumra bosoro tinbar nizor Mabud Allar samne azir oio, teu tumrar zaga-zominor bae ḳeu lalos ḳorto nae.
34.25: “Amar namor kurbanir foshur loge tumra ḳamir ala kunta lilla-kurbani dio na. Azadi Idor kurbanir kunuzat ḳani bian forzonto rakio na.
34.26: “Tumrar ḳetor daoa foyla fosholor hoḳol taki bala ongsho Alla Mabudor goro loia aio. “Ar huno, sagolor baichchar gust tar maʼr duddi randio na.”
34.27: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi i kalam oḳol lekia to. Ami ou kalam mafik tumar loge ar Boni Israilor loge amar milonor usilla boail ḳorlam.”
34.28: Ou shomoy Musa nobi sallish din sallish rait Mabudor daro faṛor ufre roila. Tain kunuzat dana-fani kaila na. Mabude hou duio fattoror ufre tan loge milonor usillar ou ayat oḳol, mani shoriotor doshṭa hukum-ahkam lekia dila. Hozrot Musa (a:)or nurani surot
34.29: Teu Musae shahadot fattor duioḳan ato loia Tur faṛ taki lamia aila. Mabudor loge batchit ḳorae Musar mukor surot nurani oigelo, oile Musae ikan ṭer faila na.
34.30: Ou shomoy Harun ar hoḳol Boni Israile Musar nurani surot deḳla, dekia tara ḳasat aite ḍoraigela.
34.31: Oile Musae tarare ḍaḳ dila, teu Harun ar Boni Israilor murobbi oḳol tan gese aila, ar Musae tarar loge mat-ḳota matila.
34.32: Bade hoḳol Boni Israil tan ḳasat aila. Aia harle tain Tur faṛor ufre Mabudor deoa hoḳol hukum-ahkam tarare zanaila.
34.33: Tarar loge mat-ḳota shesh oigele Musae tan nurani sehara lukanir lagi muko forda lagai dila.
34.34: Oile Musae zebla Mabudor loge batchitor lagi kaneḳar bitre tan samne zaita, ou shomoy i forda kulilita. Bade bare aia forda lagaita, ar Allar deoa hukum oḳol Boni Israilre zanaita.
34.35: Hoḳol manshe deḳta Musar muk nurani oigese. Musae tan muk gurilita ar Mabudor samne zaoar ag forzonto tan muk gura roito.

35.1: Musa nobie Boni Israilor hoḳol gusṭire dola ḳoria ḳoila, “Mabude hukum disoin, tan ou hukum-ahkam amol ḳorar lagi.
35.2: Tumra haftar soydin ḳam ḳorio, oile shat nombor din Mabudor name fak-fobitro din, aramor din, Zummabar. I din ze manshe ḳam ḳorbo, tare marilibae.
35.3: Zummabare tumrar ḳeuror goro aguin zalaio na.” Allar goror lagi lilla deo
35.4: Hozrot Musae Boni Israilre ḳoila, “Mabude hukum disoin,
35.5: tumra zarzir dilor kushi mafik Mabudor name lilla loia ao. Anar shomoy oula siz oḳol lilla anio: shuna, rufa, fitol;
35.6: lilua, baingoni, lal rongor suta; dami suti kafoṛ ar sagolor ruma;
35.7: lal rong lagail meṛar samṛa, fuʼr samṛa; babla laḳṛi;
35.8: serag zalanir lagi zoytunor tel; kelafoti shomzibar telor moshla ar agor-kushboy bananir moshla;
35.9: imamor efron ar bukur ufror tolit laganir lagi akik moni ar hoḳol nomunar dami fattor.
35.10: “Tumrar maze zara bala ustad ḳarigor, tara aia ou hoḳolta banaiba, zela Mabude hukum disoin:
35.11: Allar gor, goror sal, huk, freim, batti, kuṭi, kuṭir tolor sungi;
35.12: shahadot shonduk, shondukor ḍaḳna, shonduk boia neoar benda; shondukre agla dibar forda;
35.13: benda shudda ṭebul, ṭebulor ufror hoḳol siz, Mabudor namor fobitro ruṭi;
35.14: for dibar lagi serag dani, er logor hoḳol siz ar serag oḳol, serag zalanir tel;
35.15: agor-kushboy zalanir ṭebul, ikan boia neoar benda; kelafotir tel, kushboy-ala agor, Allar goror duaror forda;
35.16: zalail kurbani dibar kurbani kana; er fitolor zali ar boia neoar benda; kurbani kanar hokkol mal-samana; uzur gamla ar gamla toar soki-kaṭ;
35.17: uṭanor fordain, kuṭin ar kuṭir tolor sungi; uṭano hamanir geiṭor forda;
35.18: goror fereg ar doṛi, uṭanor fereg ar doṛi;
35.19: pak zagat imamoti kamor lagi, imam Harunor fobitro lebas, ar tan fuaintor-o imamotir lebas.”
35.20: Musa nobir boyan bade Boni Israilor hoḳol gusṭi bidae oigela.
35.21: Gia tarar dilor eshki mafik zarzir ichchae Allar Milon-tambu bananir lagi, imam Harunor fak-fobitro lebasor lagi ar ebadot ḳamor lagi hoḳol nomunar mal-samana loia aila. Allar name lilla dibar lagi ota loia tara azir oila.
35.22: Beṭain ba beṭintor maze zarar mone sailo, tara ita dila. Tara zarzir ḳafoṛor fing, ḳanor iaring, angṭi, golar har, ar hoḳol zator shunar goyna ania Mabudor name dulona kurbani hishabe dila.
35.23: Ar zerar gese lilua suta, baingoni, lal suta, dami suti kafoṛ, sagolor ruma, lal rong kora meṛar samṛa, fuʼr samṛa asil, tara ita hoḳolta loia aila.
35.24: Zerar gese rufa ar fitol asil, tara-o ita ania Mabudor name lilla dila. Allar goror ḳamo laganir zuka babla laḳṛi zerar gese asil, tara-o ita loia aila.
35.25: Zeta beṭinte suta bananit ustad, tara nizor ate lilua, baingoni, lal rongor suta, ar dami suti kafoṛ banaia anla.
35.26: Ar suta banaora zeta beṭintor dilor maze eshki foyda oilo, tara sagolor ruma dia suta banaila.
