35.27: Murobbi oḳole efron ar bukur ufror tolit laganir lagi, akik moni ar dami dami fattor loia aila.
35.28: Serag zalanir tel, ḳelafoti shomzibar tel, agor-kushboy bananir moshla ar zoytunor tel-o anla.
35.29: Mabude Musar mazdi zeta zeta ḳorar hukum disla, ita fura ḳorar lagi Boni Israilor hoḳol beṭain-beṭinte, zarzir kushi mafik lilla loia azir oilo. Batselol ar Aholiab Allar fosond ḳora ḳarigor
35.30: Bade Musae hoḳol Boni Israilre ḳoila, “Mabude Ehuda gusṭir Huror nati, Urir fua Batselolre fosond ḳorsoin.
35.31: Tain ere nizor ruhu mubarok dia kamil banaia, hoḳol laḳan ḳarigori kamor aḳol-buddi, biddae ustadi kamor ḳemota disoin.
35.32: Erlagi ein ḳarigori kam ḳorar bala nizor aḳol ḳaṭaia shuna, rufa, fitolor ufre shundor shundor noksha banaita farba.
35.33: Dami dami fattor ḳaṭa, laḳṛir ufre noksha, ar hoḳol nomunar ator ḳam ḳorta farba.
35.34: Ar oinno manshore-o ita ḳam hikanir lagi Batselol ar Dan gusṭir Ohisamaḳor fua Aholiabor dilo Mabude aḳol disoin.
35.35: Tain erare nanan zator nokshar ḳam, lilua, baingoni, lal sutadi kafoṛ bain ḳora, noksha ḳora, silai kora, ar dami suti kafoṛ silai korar-o aḳol disoin. Tara hoḳol nomunar ator ḳam ḳorta farba, ar nizor mon taki nanan nomunar noksha banaita farba.”

36.1: Musa nobie eoḳan ḳoila, “Mabude Batselol, Aholiab ar oinno ḳarigor oḳolre aḳol-buddi dan ḳorla, zate tara fobitro ebadot ḳanar hoḳol ḳam-ḳaz ḳorta faroin. Mabude zela hukum ḳorsoin, ou laḳan tara zanu ebadot ḳanar hoḳolta banain ar hazain.”
36.2: Ou ḳam ḳoranir lagi Musae Batselol ar Aholiabre anaila. Mabude zeta ustad ḳarigor oḳolre aḳol-hekmot disoin, ar i kam ḳorar lagi zerar dilo ḳaish foyda oise, Musae tarare-o anaila.
36.3: Tara aia fobitro ebadot ḳana bananir lagi, Boni Israilor deoa lillar hoḳol mal-samana Musar ges taki shomzia nila. Manshe kushi oia nizor ichchae forteḳ din biane aro siz oḳol ania ono lilla dita.
36.4: Ze ustad ḳarigor oḳol ebadot ḳanar ḳamo asla, tara ita dekia, nizor ḳam toia aia Musare ḳoila,
36.5: “Mabude zeta zeta bananir hukum disoin, ita bananir lagi manshe dorḳar taki aro beshi mal-samana loia aira.”
36.6: Teu Musar hukume manshe hoḳol Boni Israilre zanai dila, ebadot ḳana bananir lagi, ḳeu zanu ar kunu mal-samana lilla na dein. Ougi manshe lilla deoa bond ḳorla.
36.7: Ḳaron ebadot ḳanar ḳamor lagi dorḳar taki aro beshi siz zugaṛ oigesil. Allar gor banail oilo
36.8: Bade ḳam ḳorra ustad oḳole fesail sutar dami suti kafoṛ, lilua, baingoni, ar lal sutadi banail dosh ṭukra ḳafoṛ dia Allar goror forda banaila. Ar ustad oḳole er ufre Karubi oḳlor noksha bain ḳorla.
36.9: Forteḳ ṭukrain eḳ mafor asil, lambae aṭaish at ar fashe sair at.
36.10: Bade fasḳan fasḳan ḳori ekḳano zuṛa dia boṛo ḳori dukan gilaf banaila.
36.11: Ar duio gilafor fashor ek kinaro, lilua sutadi hukor fuṛ deoa oilo.
36.12: Oula foyla gilafor kinaro fonchashgu hukor fuṛ ar dusra gilafor kinaro fonchashgu hukor fuṛ lagail oilo. I duio hukor fuṛ egu aregur ulṭamuka ḳora oilo.
36.13: Bade shunadi fonchashgu huk banaia hou hukor fuṛor mazedi haraia, boṛo duio gilafre zuṛa deoa oilo. Teu ekkan gor tiar oilo.
36.14: Allar goror salor lagi sagolor ruma dia gilafor laḳan egaroḳan ṭukra banail oilo.
36.15: Ita fortek kan eḳoi mafor asil, tish at lamba ar sair at fash.
36.16: On taki fas ṭukra eḳloge zuṛa dia boṛo ek gilaf banaila. Ar baki soy ṭukra zuṛa dia, aroḳan boṛo gilaf banaila.
36.17: Foyla boṛo gilafor fashor ek kinaro fonchashgu hukor fuṛ lagaila, ar dusra gilafo-o oula lagaila.
36.18: Bade fitol dia fonchashgu huk banaia hou hukor fuṛor mazedi haraia, ou boṛo duio gilaf ekḳano zuṛa dila. Teu i duio gilaf milia ekkan sani oilo.
36.19: Lal rong kora meṛar samṛadi er ufror sani banail oilo, bade fuʼr samṛadi aroḳan sani toiar ḳoria er ufre guri deoa oilo.
36.20: Bade babla laḳṛidi koyḳan freim banail oilo.
36.21: Forteḳ freim asil lambae dosh at ar faṛe deṛ at.
36.22: Forteḳ freimo dugu ḳori faya lagaia goror hoḳol freim eḳlaḳan banaila.
36.23: Ou goror dokkin galar lagi bishḳan freim zuit ḳorla.
36.24: I bisho freimor fayar tole sallishgu rufar sungi lagaila. Forteḳ freimor dui fayar tole dugu sungi lagail oilo.
36.25: Allar goror uttor galar lagia-o bishḳan freim zuit ḳorla.
36.26: I forteḳ freimor fayar tole sallishgu rufar sungi lagaila. Eḳo freimor tole dugu ḳori sungi lagail oilo.
36.27: Ar fosim galar lagi, mani kor galar lagi soyḳan freim banaila.
36.28: Ar ḳoror duio kunat dukan freim lagaila.
36.29: I duio kunar freimre ḳasar freimor loge tole-ufre zuṛa deoa oilo. Fortek kunar duio freimre daror freimor loge batti maria zuṛa deoa oilo.
36.30: Teu aṭḳan freim ar shullogu rufar sungi laglo, eḳo freimor tole duiṭa ḳori sungi dila.
36.31: Bade freimre zuṛa dibar lagi babla laḳṛidi koygu lamba batti banaila.
36.32: Goror ek galar lagi fasgu batti, arok galar lagi aro fasgu, ar fasgu batti kor gala, mani fosim galar lagi banaila.
36.33: Freimor mazḳano lagail ou battidi hoḳol freimor eḳ mata taki aroḳ mata aṭḳai dila.
36.34: Bade i freim ḳanain shunadi lefila. Ar batti laganir lagi shunar ḳoṛa lagaia, battire-o shunadi lefila.
36.35: Ou ustad ḳarigor oḳole dami suti kafoṛdi ekkan forda banaila. Fordar ufre lilua, baingoni, lal suta dia Karubi oḳlor sobi bain ḳorla.
36.36: I forda ṭananir lagi babla laḳṛidi sairṭa kuṭi banaila, banaia ou kuṭintore-o shunadi lefila, kuṭintor matat shunar ḳoṛa lagaila. Kuṭir tolor lagi rufar sairṭa sungi banail oilo.
36.37: Tambur duaror lagi lilua, baingoni, lal suta ar dami suti kafoṛdi noksha ḳori ekkan forda banaila.
36.38: I fordar lagi fasṭa ḳoṛa ar fasṭa kuṭi banail oilo. Kuṭir mata ar tol shunadi lefa oilo, kuṭir tolor lagi fitolor fasgu sungi banaila.

37.1: Batselole babla laḳṛidi fobitro shahadot shonduk banaila. Iṭa aṛai at lamba, deṛ at fash ar deṛ at usa.
37.2: Er bare-bitore ḳaṭi shunadi lefila, er sairo kinaro shunar noksha lagaila.
37.3: Aguindi shuna golaia sairṭa shunar ḳoṛa er sairo kunat lagaila, ogalat duiṭa ar hogalat duiṭa lagaila.
37.4: Babla laḳṛidi dugu benda banaia shunadi lefila.
37.5: Shonduk boia neoar lagi i duio benda, shondukor dui galar ḳoṛar bitredi haraila.
37.6: Bade ḳaṭi shunadi shondukor ekkan ḍaḳna banaila, oḳanor ufre gunar kofora adae ḳorar lagi. I ḍaḳna lambae aṛai at, ar fashe deṛ at.
37.7: Shuna fiṭaia ḍaḳnar duio galat duiṭa Karubi banaila.
37.8: Duio Karubi shondukor ḍaḳnar dui kinaro roilo. I duio Karubi ḍaḳnar loge ekḳano ḳori banail oilo, i astaṭa ḳali eḳ siz oilo.
37.9: Karubi deḳte Duldul guṛar laḳan ḍaḳna ala, er duio ḍaḳna ufredi melia deoae, ou ḍaḳnar sayar tole shondukor ḍaḳna hamaigelo. Iṭa mukamuki uba roilo. Ar tarar souk roilo shondukor ḍaḳnar bae. Fobitro ruṭi raḳar ṭebul
37.10: Batselole bade babla laḳṛidi dui at lamba, eḳ at fash ar deṛ at usa ḳori ekkan ṭebul banaila.
37.11: Banaia harle ḳaṭi shunadi lefia er sairo kinaro noksha lagaila.
37.12: Ar er sanir sairo kinaro sair angul usa ḳori eḳ haz dila, hazor maze shunadi noksha lagaila.
37.13: Ṭebulor sairo kunar fayar ufre shunar sairṭa ḳoṛa lagaila.
37.14: I sairo ḳoṛain ṭebulor kunar hou usa hazor tole lagani oilo, zate ṭebul boia neoar bala ḳoṛar bitre benda harail zae.
37.15: Ṭebulre boia neoar lagi babla laḳṛidi dugu benda banaia shunadi lefila.
37.16: Ṭebulor ufror tal-bashon, Allar name shorbot-fanir sodgar zog ar mog, hoḳolta ḳaṭi shunadi goṛaila. Serag dani banani
37.17: Bade ḳaṭi shunadi ekkan serag dani tiar ḳorla. Serag danir tola ar ufror ḍanḍi kaṭi shuna fiṭaia goṛaila. Er ḍanḍi, fulor laḳan fiala, kuṛi ar fafṛi oḳol serag danir loge ekḳano ḳori banaila.
37.18: Serag danir ḍanḍir dui galat tinṭa ḳori muṭ soyṭa ḍal deoa oilo.
37.19: Forteḳ ḍalor maze zoba fulor laḳan tingu ḳori fiala tiar ḳora oilo. Serag danir soyo ḍalo eḳlaḳan ḳam ḳora oilo.
37.20: Serag danir mul ḍanḍir maze-o zoba fulor laḳan sairṭa fiala deoa oilo.
37.21: Ou mul ḍanḍi taki bar oilo soyṭa ḍalor maze, foyla duio ḍalor zuṛat egu ḳori kuṛi, dusra duio ḍalor zuṛat arok kuṛi, ar heshor duio ḍalor zuṛat-o kuṛi lagail oilo.
37.22: Kuṛi ar ḍal hoḳolta serag dani taki bar oilo, hoḳolta milia eḳ siz oilo. Astaṭa-u ḳaṭi shuna fiṭaia banani oilo.
37.23: Ḳaṭi shunadi shatṭa serag, seragor fita saf ḳorar simṭa, zalail fitar sali toar lagi koygu baṭi banail oilo.
37.24: Eḳ mon ḳaṭi shunadi i serag dani, ar logor hoḳolta tiar ḳora oilo. Agor-kushboy zalanir ṭebul
37.25: Bade babla laḳṛidi sair kuna ala agor-kushboy zalanir ṭebul banail oilo. Eḳ at lamba, eḳ at fash, ar dui at ubi dia i ṭebul banaila. Er sairo kunar sairo hing-o ekḳano ḳori banaila.
37.26: Sani, sanir sairo kinar ar hing, hoḳolta ḳaṭi shunadi lefia sairo kinaro shunar noksha lagaila.
37.27: Er dui kinaror nokshar tole dugu ḳori shunar ḳoṛa lagail oilo, zate er bitre benda haraia boia neoa zae.
37.28: Babla laḳṛidi boia neoar benda banaila, iṭare-o shunadi lefila.
37.29: Bade kushboy-ala moshla bananir ḳarigoror niome ḳelafoti shomzibar fobitro tel ar kushboy-ala ḳaṭi agor tiar ḳorla.

38.1: Zalail kurbanir lagi babla laḳṛidi fas at lamba, fas at fash ar tin at ubi dia sairkuni kori ekkan kurbani kana banaila.
38.2: Er sairo kunar ufre laḳṛidi sairṭa hing dila. Ou hing banaila sanir ufror kunar laḳṛi kudia, erlagi i astaḳan eḳ siz oilo. Bade fura kurbani kana fitoldi lefaila.
38.3: Kurbani kanar sali tular boṛo samos ar sali toar gamla, lou toar baṭi, gust tular boṛo ḳaṭa-sif, angra toar fatil, hoḳolta fitoldi banaila.
38.4: Kurbani kanar lagi fitoldi ekkan zali banaila, banaia i zalire kurbani kanar bitoror mazḳanor sairo galar taṛiar tole lagaila.
38.5: Ar benda haranir lagi zalir sairo kunat sairṭa ḳoṛa lagaila.
38.6: Boia neoar benda banaila babla laḳṛidi, banaia duiogu fitoldi lefaila.
38.7: Ar kurbani kanare boibar lagi er kunar ḳoṛar bitre ou benda haraila. Kurbani kana banaila toḳtadi, ar er bitre faḳ raḳla.
38.8: Uzur fani toar lagi fitolor ek gamla banaila. Ebadoti kamor lagi zeta beṭin Milon-tambur duaror ḳasat aita, tarar fitolor aynadi i gamla ar er soki-kaṭ toiar ḳora oilo. Allar goror uṭan
38.9: Batselole Allar goror sairo galabae uṭanor zaga raḳla. Uṭanor dokkin galar eḳ-sho at zagar lagi dami suti kafoṛdi forda banaila.
38.10: I forda ṭananir lagi bishgu kuṭi banaila. Kuṭir tolat dibar lagi fitolor bishgu sungi banaila, ar forda ṭananir lagi rufar ḳoṛa ar bandibar tar banaila.
38.11: Uṭanor uttor galar eḳ-sho at zagar lagi bishgu kuṭi, kuṭir tole dibar lagi fitolor bishgu sungi, ar forda ṭananir lagi rufar ḳoṛa ar bandibar tar banaila.
38.12: Fosim galar foinchash at uṭanor lagi forda, doshgu kuṭi, doshgu sungi, forda ṭananir lagi rufar ḳoṛa ar bandibar tar banaila.
38.13: Fub galar uṭan-o foinchash at asil.
38.14: Uṭanor geiṭor ek galar lagi fonro at lamba forda, tinṭa kuṭi, kuṭir tolor tingu sungi,
38.15: ar dusra galat-o ou laḳan ḳori tinṭa kuṭi, tinṭa sungi ar fonro at forda banail oilo.
38.16: Uṭanor sairo galar hokkol fordain dami suti kafoṛdi banail oilo.
38.17: Kuṭir tolor hokkol sungi fitolor, forda ṭananir ḳoṛa ar bandibar tar oilo rufar, kuṭir mata-o rufadi fesail oilo. Uṭanor sairo galar hokkol kuṭit rufar tardi banda oilo.
38.18: Uṭanor geiṭor lagi dami suti kafoṛdi ekkan forda banail oilo. Bade lilua, baingoni, lal sutadi noksha ḳora oilo. Forda ḳan bish at lamba, ar uṭanor baki fordar laḳan iṭa-o fas at usa deoa oilo.
38.19: Er sairo kuṭi ar sungi fitolor, kuṭir ḳoṛa ar bandar tar rufar, kuṭir mata-o rufadi fesai deoa oilo.
38.20: Allar gor ar uṭanor sairo galar kuṭir fereg oḳol fitoldi banail. Allar goror mal-samanar hishab
38.21: Allar gor mani ou shahadot tambu banaite zeta mal-samana lagsil, imam Harunor fua Isamaror zimmae Lebi kandanor manshe itar hishab raḳla. Musa nobie ou hishab raḳar hukum disla.
38.22: Mabude Musare zelaḳan hukum disla, i hukum mafik Ehuda gusṭir Urir fua Batselole ita hokkolta banaila, tain asla Huror nati.
38.23: Dan gusṭir Ohisamaḳor fua Aholiabe Batselolre shaijjo ḳorla. Hoḳol zator ator ḳam ar noksha bananir ḳamo tain ustad asla. Dami suti kafoṛor maze lilua, baingoni, lal sutadi noksha ḳorar ḳamo-o tain ustad asla.
38.24: Dulona kurbani taki faoa untish mon shat-sho tish tola shuna ou ebadot ḳana banaite lagse. I maf oilo ebadot ḳanar tolar mafe.
38.25: Boni Israilor manush gonibar bala zerare gona oisil, tarar ges taki eḳ-sho mon eḳ azar shat-sho fosottoir tola rufa faoa gesil, i maf oilo ebadot ḳanar mafe.
38.26: Gona oise oula manush, mani bish boros ba er saite beshi boyosh ala, hou soy laḳ tin azar shaṛe fas-sho manshe ebadot ḳanar mafe mata fisu ada tola ḳori rufa disil.
38.27: I rufa taki eḳ-sho mon rufa dia ebadot ḳana ar fordar kuṭir tolor sungi banail oisil. Eḳ eḳ sungit eḳ mon rufa dia muṭ eḳ-shogu sungi banail oise.
38.28: Ar baki eḳ azar shat-sho fosottoir tola rufa kuṭir ḳoṛa, kuṭir mata fesani, ar bandibar tar bananit lagse.
38.29: Dulona kurbani taki lillar fitol dola oisil shottoir mon dui azar sair-sho tola.
38.30: Ita dia Milon-tambur duaror sungi, fitolor kurbani kana, er fitolor zali ar kurbani kanar hokkol siz banail oise,
38.31: uṭanor sairo galar sungi, geiṭor sungi, tambu ar uṭanor sairo galar kuṭir fereg banail oise.

39.1: Allar goror pak zagat imamoti kamor shomoy findar lagi, tara lal, baingoni ar lilua sutadi shundor ḳori lebas banaila. Mabude Musare zela hukum disla, ekkere ou laḳan ḳori imam Harunor lagi fobitro lebas banaila.
39.2: Ou ustad ḳarigor oḳole lilua, baingoni, lal suta, dami suti kafoṛ ar shunadi fordan imamor efron banaila.
39.3: Shuna fiṭaia fat banaia, sutar laḳan shunar tar tiar ḳorla. Bade lilua, baingoni, lal suta, dami suti kafoṛ ar shunar tar eḳloge milaia ḳafoṛ banaila.
39.4: Efronor ḳandor gala zuṛa dibar lagi dukan foṭṭi banaia, efronor ufror kunat lagaila.
39.5: Efronor loge zuṛa lagail feṭor ufror belṭ ḳano efronor sutadi banaila. Tara lilua, baingoni, lal suta, dami suti kafoṛ ar shunar tar dia ṭik efronor nomunae banaila. Mabude Musare zela hukum disla, ekkere ou laḳan ḳori hokkolta banail oilo.
39.6: Bade tara duiṭa akik fattor ḳaṭia, er ufre shunar zazoir boaila. Hunar oḳole dami fattor kudia zela sil banain, oula fattor kudia Israilor fuaintor nam leḳla.
39.7: Ar ou duio fattor shunar zazoiror maze lagaia, efronor ḳandor fitar loge bandila. Israilor fuaintor bae Mabudor nozor raḳar lagi ila ḳorla. Mabude Musare zela hukum disla, oula hoḳolta ḳora oilo.
39.8: Bade efronor laḳan bala ustad dorziredi lilua, baingoni, lal suta, dami suti kafoṛ ar shunadi bukur ufror toli banail oilo.
39.9: Iṭa oilo lambae ada at, fashe ada at, sairkuni dui bainj ḳora ḳafoṛ.
39.10: Er ufre tara sair hair ḳori dami fattor lagaila. Foyla harit iakut, fit ar fanna moni;
39.11: dusra harit lal moni, lil moni ar hira;
39.12: tin nombor harit firuz, gumed ar foddorag moni;
39.13: sair nombor harit fukraz, boidurjo ar shuruz moni. I fattor oḳol shunar zazoiror ufre lagail oilo.
39.14: Israilor baro fuar lagi baroṭa fattor lagaila. Ita eḳo fattoro eḳ eḳ fuar nam kudia leḳa oilo, zela kudia sil banail oy.
39.15: Bukur ufror tolir lagi kaṭi shunadi rosir laḳan fesaia duksa chein banaila.
39.16: Ar shunar dukan zazoir ar duiṭa ḳoṛa banaia, bukur ou tolir ufror dui kunat lagaila.
39.17: Ar chein duiogesa duio ḳoṛar loge aṭḳaila.
39.18: Duio ḳandor efronor samnor fitat shunar zazoiror loge cheinor eḳ mata bandila.
39.19: Aro duiṭa shunar ḳoṛa banaia bukur ufror tolir dui kunat lagaila. I duioṭa efronor loge bukur tolir tole roilo.
39.20: Bade aro duiṭa shunar ḳoṛa banaia, efronor ḳandor foṭṭir shoi toledi, feṭor ufror belṭor ufror silair ḳasat lagai dila.
39.21: Ar bukur ufror tolir tolor ḳoṛar loge feṭor ufror noksha ḳora belṭor ḳoṛa bandila, ar ou tolie loṛa-soṛa na ḳorar lagi tolor ḳoṛar loge lilua sutadi bandi dila, zela Mabude Musare hukum ḳorsla.
39.22: Bade tara efronor tolor alḳella lilua rongor sutadi bain ḳorla,
39.23: ar mata haraibar bala golar faḳ siṛto na ḳori er sairo gala foṭṭi dia doṛo ḳori bain ḳorla, golar ou faḳ raḳla maz borabor.
39.24: Lilua, baingoni, lal rongor fesail sutadi anuar folor laḳan banaila. Banaia oguinre alḳellar tolor muṛir sairobae lagaila.
39.25: Bade ḳaṭi shunar gungur banaia ou anuaror faḳe faḳe lagaila,
39.26: asta tolor muṛit egu ḳori anuar ar egu ḳori gungur lagail oilo. Ebadoti kamor bala imam sabe ou alḳella findita. Mabude Musare zela hukum disla, ekkere oula ḳora oilo.
39.27: Bade tara Harun ar tan fuaintor lagi dami suti sutadi fainjabi banaila.
39.28: Matar faugṛi ar tokiguin-o dami suti kafoṛdi banaila, ar haf-penṭor laḳan zangia-o banaila ou ḳafoṛdi.
39.29: Ḳomror ekkan bondoni banaila, dami suti kafoṛ, lilua, baingoni ar lal sutadi noksha ḳori banaila. Mabude Musare zela hukum disla, ekkere oula ḳora oilo.
39.30: Ar faugṛir samne laganir lagi, ḳaṭi shunar fatdi ekkan fobitro taz tiar ḳorla. Silor ufre zela kudia leḳa oy, ou fattor ufre ola kudia leḳla, “Mabudor name fobitro.”
39.31: Mabude Musare zela hukum disla, ou hukum mafik-u i fatre lilua sutadi faugṛir samne bandi dila. Musa (a:)e hoḳolta shomzia nila
39.32: Ou laḳan Milon-tambu shoho Allar goror hokkol ḳam-ḳaz shesh oilo. Mabude Musare zela hukum disla, Boni Israile ekkere ou laḳan hoḳolta ḳorla.
39.33: Bade tara Allar goror lagi banail hokkolta Musar ḳasat loia aila. Tara anla: Milon-tambu, tambur hoḳol mal-samana, huk, freim, batti, kuṭi, kuṭir tolor sungi;
39.34: lal rong kora meṛar samṛar sani, fuʼr samṛar sani, Herem Shorifor beṛar forda;
39.35: shahadot shonduk, shonduk boia neoar benda, shondukor ḍaḳna;
39.36: ṭebul, ṭebulor hoḳol siz, Mabudor namor fobitro ruṭi;
39.37: ḳaṭi shunar serag dani, er logor hoḳol siz, zalanir tel;
39.38: shunar agor-kushboy zalanir ṭebul, ḳelafotir tel, kushboy-ala agor, Allar goror duaror forda;
39.39: fitolor kurbani kana, fitolor zali, kurbani kana boia neoar benda, kurbani kanar hokkol mal-samana, uzur gamla ar er tolor soki-kaṭ;
39.40: uṭanor fordain, kuṭin, kuṭir tolor sungi, uṭano hamanir geiṭor forda, uṭanor fereg ar doṛi; ek kotae, Milon-tambu shoho Allar goror hokkol mal-samana;
39.41: ar pak zagat imamoti kamor lagi imam Harunor fobitro lebas, ar tan fuaintor-o imamotir lebas.
39.42: Mabude Musare zela hukum disla, ou laḳan Boni Israil oḳole hoḳol ḳam ḳorla.
39.43: Heshe Musae ita hoḳolta dekia buzla, Mabude zela hukum disla, ou laḳan-u ḳora oise. Erlagi tain hoḳol Boni Israilre dua dila.

40.2: “Tumi bosoror foyla sandor foyla tariko Milon-tambu shoho amar gorre ḳaṛa ḳorio.
40.3: Goror bitre shahadot shondukre haraia, maze forda ṭanaia shondukre aoṛe toio.
40.4: Ṭebulre-o bitre haraia, er ufror siz oḳol hazaio. Bade serag dani bitre ania tar serag oḳol zalai dio.
40.5: Shunadi banail agor-kushboy zalanir ṭebul shahadot shondukor samne toio, toia amar goror duaror forda lagaio.
40.6: Amar goror Milon-tambur duaror samne zalail kurbani kana toio.
40.7: Kurbani kana ar Milon-tambur mazḳano uzur gamla fanidi boria toio.
40.8: Bade uṭanor sairo galabae forda ṭanaio, ar uṭanor geiṭo-o forda lagaio.
40.9: “Bade tumi kelafotir tel dia amar gor ar amar goror hoḳol mal-samanare fobitro ḳorio. Teu ita hoḳolta moha fak-fobitro oibo.
40.10: Ar zalail kurbani kanar ufre-o ḳelafotir tel dia fobitro ḳorio. Kurbani kanar hoḳol mal-samanare-o fobitro ḳorio. Teu i kurbani kana moha-fobitro siz oibo.
40.11: Uzur fanir gamla ar er tolor soki-kaṭre-o ḳelafotir tel dia fobitro ḳorio.
40.12: “Bade Harun ar tar fuainre Milon-tambur duaror samne ania fanidi naoai dio.
40.13: Naoanir bade Harunre fak-fobitro lebas oḳol findaio, ar amar imam oar lagi tare fobitro tel lagaia ḳelafoti dia fobitro ḳorio.
40.14: Tar fuaintore ania imamotir fainjabi findaio.
40.15: Tarar bafre zela fobitro teldi imamoti kamor ḳelafoti diso, tarare-o oula ḳelafoti dio, zate tara-o amar imamoti kam ḳorta faroin. I kelafotir mazdi imamotir ze niom salu oibo, ita oarishor for oarish dori salu roibo.”
40.16: Mabudor hukum mafik Musae ita hoḳolta ḳorla.
40.17: Dusra bosoror foyla sandor foyla tariko Allar gor ḳaṛa ḳora oilo.
40.18: Musae i gor ḳaṛa ḳorla, foyla er kuṭir tolor sungi boaila, kuṭin uba ḳorla, beṛar freim lagaila, freimor bitredi batti dila.
40.19: Mabudor hukum mafik tain sagolor ruma dia goror foyla sani dila, er ufre dila aro duiṭa sani.
40.20: Bade hou duioḳan fobitro shahadot fattor ania shondukor bitre haraila. Shonduk boia neoar benda lagaila, shondukor ufror ḍaḳna-o lagaila.
40.21: Ar shondukre nia Allar goror bitre haraila. Haraia forda ṭanaia shondukre aoṛe raḳla, zela Mabude Musare hukum disla.
40.22: Shondukor ou fordar bare uttor galabae, Milon-tambur maze fobitro ruṭir ṭebul raḳla.
40.23: Ṭebulor ufre Mabudor namor fobitro ruṭi hazaia toila, zela Mabude Musare hukum disla.
40.24: Ṭebulor samne tambur dokkin galat serag dani toila.
40.25: Bade Mabudor samne serag guin zalaila, zela Mabude Musare hukum disla.
40.26: Milon-tambur mazḳanor fordar samne shunadi banail agor-kushboy zalanir ṭebul toila.
40.27: Oḳanor ufre kushboy-ala agor zalaila, zela Mabude Musare hukum disla.
40.29: Tain Allar goror Milon-tambur duaror ḳandat zalail kurbani kana toila. Toia er ufre zalail foshu kurbani ar dan-gomor sodga dila, zela Mabude Musare hukum disla.
40.30: Bade Milon-tambu ar kurbani kanar mazḳano uzur gamla toila, toia uzur fani boria dila.
40.31: Ou fani dia Musa, Harun ar Harunor fuainte uzu ḳorta.
40.32: Mabudor hukum mafik tara Milon-tambut hamanir age, ba kurbani kanar ḳandat zaoar age uzu ḳorta.
40.33: Bade Musae Allar gor ar kurbani kanar sairobae forda ṭanaia uṭan banaila. Uṭanor geiṭor forda lagaila. Ou laḳan Musae tan hoḳol ḳam shesh ḳorla. Allar mohima zair oilo
40.34: Ḳam shesh ḳoria harle, gaibi megor kuṭi aia ou Milon-tambure gurililo, Mabudor mohima ar kudrote asta gor borigelo.
40.35: Erlagi Musa ar Milon-tambut hamaita farla na, ḳaron er ufre hou megor kuṭi asil, ar Mabudor kudroti mohimae asta gor bori gesil.
40.36: Boni Israilor ou asta soforor maze, Allar goror ufre taki megor kuṭi horia harle tara aṭia roana dita.
40.37: Oile megor kuṭi ufre taki na hora forzonto tara bar oita na, ou kuṭi horar lagi bar saita.
40.38: Ḳaron Boni Israilor ou asta soforor maze-u, dinor bala tarar sokur samne Allar goror ufre megor kuṭi roito, ar raitor bala roito aguinor kuṭi.

1.1: Ou fobitro Kaba gor mani Milon-tambu bananir bade, Mabude Musa nobire ono anaia ḳoila,
1.2: “Tumi hoḳol Boni Israilre zanai deo, ḳeu zudi kurbani hishabe Mabudor dorbaro kunu foshu dito sae, te goru ba sagol-meṛar fal taki foshu ania kurbani dilauk.
1.3: “Kurbani deorae zudi gorur fal taki zalail kurbani adae ḳorto sae, te furafur nikut egu bisal ante oibo. Ania Mabudre kushi korar niote ou bisalre Milon-tambur duaror gese loia aibo.
1.4: Aia zalail kurbanir niote ana ou bisalor ḳollar ufre at toibo, teu tar gunar kofora hishabe iṭare kobul ḳora oibo.
1.5: Bade Mabudor samne ou bisalre he zobo ḳorbo. Ar imam Harunor ze fuainte imamoti koroin, tara ou bisalor lou nia Milon-tambur duaror samnor kurbani kanar sairo galat siṭai diba.
1.6: Bade kurbani deorae ou bisalor ḳal ḳalia hari, ogur gust ṭukra ṭukra ḳorba.
1.7: Ar imam Harunor fuainte kurbani kanar ufre zalail angra toiba, er ufre daru hazaiba.
1.8: Hazaia ou darur ufre bisalor ḳolla, sorbi, gustor ṭukrain toiba.
1.9: Kurbani deorae gorur ṭeng ar feṭor bitoror hokkolta fani dia doia saf ḳoria diba, ar imame ota nia asta bisalor hokkolta kurbani kanar ufre zalailiba. Iṭar nam oilo zalail kurbani, Mabudor name agunit deoa kurbani, ou dumar gerane tain kushi oin.
1.10: “Ar kunu manshe zudi sagol-meṛar fal taki zalail kurbani adae ḳorar kiali oy, te ikṭa furafur nikut egu faṭa oite oibo.
1.11: Kurbani deorae ikṭare kurbani kanar uttor galat nia Mabudor samne zobo ḳoria harle, imam Harunor ze fuainte imamoti koroin, tara ogur lou nia kurbani kanar sairo galat siṭai diba.
1.12: Bade kurbani deorae iṭar gust ṭukra ṭukra ḳori kaṭia dile, imam sabe ogur sorbi, ḳolla ar gustor ṭukrain nia kurbani kanar zalail angrar ufror darur ufre hazaiba.
1.13: Kurbani deorae iṭar ṭeng, feṭor bitoror hokkolta fani dia doia saf ḳoria diba, ar imam sabe ita hokkolta shomet asta foshure kurbani kanar ufre zalailiba. Iṭa oilo zalail kurbani, Mabudor name agunit deoa geran ala kurbani, ou dumar gerane tain kushi oin.
1.14: “Ar kunu faki dia zudi Mabudor namor ou zalail kurbani adae ḳorar kial oy, te kurbani deorae ḍufi faki ba faro loia aibo.
1.15: Aile, imame kurbani kanar daro gia ou fakir ḳolla mura maria siṛia algaia hari kurbani kanar ufre ou ḳollare zalailiba, ar ogur lou nia kurbani kanar ek galat siṭai diba.
1.16: Imame fakir bitoror gila-toli ar foir nia kurbani kanar fub galar salir ṭekir maze falai diba.
1.17: Ar ogur ḍaḳnat doria ola baṭe siṛiba, zate iṭar dui ṭukra furafur alog na oy. Bade imam sabe iṭa nia kurbani kanar zalail angrar ufror darur ufre toia zalailiba. Iṭa-o oilo zalail kurbani, Mabudor name agunit deoa geran ala kurbani, ou dumar gerane tain kushi oin.

2.1: “Kunu manshe zudi dan-gom dia Mabudor name lilla-sodga dito sae, te nireḳ moyda dia adae ḳorbo. Ou moydar ufre he zoytunor tel ar loban-agoror duna dibo.
2.2: Dia imam Harunor ze fuainte imamoti koroin tarar gese ota loia aibo. Imame ota taki tel mishail eḳ muiṭ moyda ar hoḳol agor loia, tar ana hokkoltar bodla nishana hishabe ou ongshore kurbani kanar ufre zalailiba. Ita oilo Mabudor name agunit deoa kurbani, itar dumar gerane tain kushi oin.
2.3: Zalanir bade zotoḳan baki roibo, ita imam Harun ar tan fuainte faiba. Mabudor namor agunit deoa kurbanir ongsho oae, basi zaoa ou moyda to ḳas fobitro zinish.
2.4: “Ar ḳeu zudi tunduri undalo hedia ana kunu dan-gomor sodga adae ḳorto sae, te tel mishail nireḳ moyda dia ḳamir saṛa ruṭi ba banail ruṭit tel maḳaia loia aibo.
2.5: Ar ou sodgar ruṭi zudi taoat hedia ana oy, te ita tel mishail ḳamir saṛa nireḳ moyda dia banaia ante oibo.
2.6: Ania ita ṭukra ṭukra ḳoria er ufre tel ḍalia dite oibo, ita-o dan-gomor eḳ nomunar sodga.
2.7: Ar ou sodgar ruṭi zudi luaṛir maze bazia ana oy, te ita-o tel ar nireḳ moyda dia banaia anbae.
2.8: Ola zekunu nomunae banail dan-gomor sodgare Mabudor name ania imamor ato shomzai dibae, imame ita kurbani kanar gese niba.
2.9: Nia tar ana ou hokkoltar bodla nishana hishabe, imame oḳan taki kisu ongsho algaia kurbani kanar ufre zalailiba. Ita oilo agunit deoa kurbani, er dumar gerane Mabud kushi oin.
2.10: Ou ongsho zalaia harle bad-baki zeta roibo, ita hoḳolta imam Harun ar tan fuainte faiba. Mabudor name agunit deoa kurbanir ongsho oae, basi zaoa ou sodgar ruṭi to ḳas fobitro zinish.
2.11: “Ar huno, Mabudor name dan-gomor sodgar niote zotota ana oibo, ita hoḳolta-u zanu ḳamir saṛa tiar ḳora oy. Hushiar roio, tumra Mabudor namor agunit deoa lilla-sodgar malor loge kunu ḳamir ba mou zalaio na.
2.12: Ta-o ḳetor foyla foy-fosholor sodgar loge tumra mou ba ḳamir Mabudor name ditae farbae, oile dumar geran ala sodgar niote ḳamir ba mou kurbani kanat zalail zaito nae.
2.13: Kial rakio, tumra dan-gomor sodgar niote zotota banaia anbae, ita hokkoltar maze nun mishaibae. Boni Israilor Allar oada-chuktire mono rakia, tumra hoḳol nomunar dan-gomor sodgat nun dite faurio na. Tumrar hokkol kurbanir maze nun dio.
2.14: “Tumrar ḳetor foyla daoa dan-gomor kunu foshol zudi Mabudor name lilla-sodga hishabe loia ao, te ita maṛa deoa ḳasa noya dan-gom ba asta soṛare aguindi hedia anbae.
2.15: Itar ufre tel ar loban-agor dibae, ita oilo eḳ nomunar dan-gomor sodga.
2.16: Ou sodga loia aile, imam sabe nishana hishabe ou zonor ana dan-gomor sodgar kisu ongsho, kisu tel ar hoḳol agor nia kurbani kanat zalailiba, ita oilo Mabudor name agunit deoa kurbani.

3.1: “Kunu manshe zudi Mabudor name nizor kushie salamoti kurbani adae ḳorar niote kunu gai ba bisalre kurbani dito sae, te i goru furafur nikut oite oibo.
3.2: Kurbani deorae ou foshur ḳolla ataia dia, Milon-tambur duaror samne iṭare zobo ḳorbo. Bade imam Harunor fuaintor mazor imam oḳole ogur lou nia kurbani kanar sairo galat siṭai diba.
3.3: Ar kurbani deorae Mabudor name ana salamoti kurbanir foshur ou ongsho oḳol diba. Ogur feṭor bitoror hokkoltar ufror sorbi,
3.4: duio kiḍni ar otar sorbi, ḳoiljar logor maṭia, ou hoḳolta ania imamor gese diba.
3.5: Bade Harunor fuainte kurbani kanar ufre hazail daru ar kurbanir foshur ufre ita hoḳolta rakia eḳloge zalailiba. Ita to eḳ nomunar agunit deoa kurbani, itar dumar gerane Mabud kushi oin.
3.6: “Kunu manshe zudi Mabudor name salamoti kurbani adae ḳorar lagi sagol-meṛar fal taki kunu foshure kurbani dibar niot ḳore, te i foshu meda ba medi oile-o solbo, oile iṭa furafur nikut oite oibo.
3.7: Kurbani dibar niote zudi meṛa ane, te Mabudor samne iṭa azir ḳorba.
3.8: Kurbani deorae ou meṛar ḳolla atai dia, Milon-tambur duaror samne iṭare zobo ḳorbo. Bade imam Harunor fuaintor mazor imam oḳole ogur lou nia kurbani kanar sairo galat siṭai diba.
3.9: Kurbani deorae Mabudor name agunit deoa kurbani hishabe ana, ou salamoti kurbanir meṛar hoḳol sorbi imamor gese diba. Tain sorbi ala lenguṛ, feṭor bitoror hoḳoltar ufror sorbi, itar loge lagail sorbi,
3.10: duio kiḍni ar otar hoḳol sorbi, ḳoiljar logor maṭia, ota hoḳolta ania imam sabor gese diba.
3.11: Imame ita nia kurbani kanar agunir ufre zalailiba, ita oilo Mabudor name agunit deoa kurbanir ḳani.
3.12: “Ar kurbani dibar niote he zudi sagol ane, te he iṭare Mabudor samne azir ḳorbo.
3.13: He ogur ḳolla atai dia, Milon-tambur duaror samne iṭare zobo ḳorbo, bade Harunor fuainte ogur lou nia kurbani kanar sairo galat siṭai diba.
3.14: Kurbani deorae foshur ou ongsho oḳol nia, Mabudor name agunit deoa kurbani hishabe imamor gese dibo. He foshur feṭor bitoror hoḳoltar ufror sorbi, itar loge lagail sorbi,
3.15: duio kiḍni ar otar ufror sorbi, ḳoiljar logor maṭia, ota hoḳolta ania imamor gese dibo.
3.16: Imame ita hoḳolta nia kurbani kanar ufre zalailiba, ita to agunit deoa kurbanir ḳani, itar dumar gerane Mabud kushi oin. “Mono rakio, kurbanir foshur hokkol sorbi oilo Mabudor.
3.17: Tumra bongshor for bongsho doria ou niom manio, zekunu zagat boshot ḳoro na ḳene kunudin sorbi ba lou ḳaio na, ita haram.”

4.1: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila,
4.2: “Tumi Boni Israilre ḳo, na zanar ḳarone ḳeu zudi bul ḳoria Allar nished ḳora kunu gunar ḳam ḳorilae, te tain ou nomunae gunar koforar kurbani adae ḳorba.
4.3: “Ein ḳelafoti faoa fordan imam sab oile, tan gunar dae-bar hoḳol manshor ufre borte, erlagi tain nikut egu bisal ania Mabudor dorbaro tan gunar koforar kurbani diba.
4.4: Ou bisal loia tain Milon-tambur duaror gese Mabudor samne aiba, aia ogur ḳolla atai dia, Mabudor samne zobo ḳorba.
4.5: Ḳoria ou bisalor tuṛa lou nia Milon-tambur bitre zaiba.
4.6: Gia lour maze nizor angul subaia lou lagaia Herem Shorifor fordar bae Mabudor samne shatbar siṭai diba.
4.7: Bade aro tuṛa lou loia Milon-tambur maze Mabudor samne agor-kushboy zalanir ṭebulor sairo kunar hing oḳlor maze lagaiba. Ar bad-baki lou nia Milon-tambur duaror samnor zalail kurbani kanar tole ḍali diba.
4.8: Bade gunar koforar lagi deoa kurbanir ou bisalor hoḳol sorbi bar ḳorba, feṭor bitoror hokkoltar ufror sorbi, itar loge lagail hoḳol sorbi,
4.9: duio kiḍni ar otar ufror sorbi, ar ḳoiljar logor maṭia.
4.10: Salamoti kurbanir gorur sorbir laḳan, ou kurbanir bisalor hoḳol sorbire-o ola bar ḳorba. Bade imame ou sorbi nia zalail kurbani kanat zalailiba.
4.11: Oile ou bisalor ḳolla, ḳal, gust, ṭeng, at-boṛ, gufor,
4.12: hoḳolta nia Boni Israilor kempor bare zeḳano kurbanir salir ṭeki toin, hou fak-saf zagar salir ṭekir ufre ota toia hari, laḳṛir aguindi zalailiba.
4.13: “Ar asta Boni Israil shomaz na zanar ḳarone zudi bul ḳoria kunu gunar ḳam ḳorilae, Allar nished ḳora kunu ḳam ḳoria dushi bonizae, te na zania ḳorle-o tara hoḳol-u gunagar.
4.14: Bade zebla tara zanba, zania hari ou gunar koforar lagi hoḳlor torof taki egu bisal kurbani diba, ou bisal loia tara Milon-tambur samne azir oiba.
4.15: Oia Boni Israilor murobbi oḳole ou bisalor ḳolla atai diba, ar imame Mabudor samne oḳṭa zobo ḳorba.
4.16: Zobor bade ḳelafoti faoa imam sabe bisalor tuṛa lou loia Milon-tambur bitre hamaiba.
4.17: Hamaia ou lour maze tan ator anguil subaia, tuṛa lou Herem Shorifor fordar bae shatbar Mabudor samne siṭaiba.
4.18: Bade aro tuṛa lou loia Mabudor samne toa, Milon-tambur bitoror agor-kushboy zalanir ṭebulor hing oḳol-o lagaiba. Bad-baki lou fuṭain Milon-tambur duaror samnor zalail kurbani kanar tole ḍali diba.
4.19: Ar bisalor hoḳol sorbi bar ḳoria kurbani kanat zalailiba.
4.20: Fordan imamor gunar koforar lagi bisalre zela kurbani deoa oy, imame ou bisalre-o ola kurbani korba. Tain ou shomazor gunar koforar kurbani adae ḳorle, tarar gunar mafi milbo.
4.21: Imam sabe bisalor bad-baki hoḳolta loia kempor bare zaiba. Gia tan nizor gunar koforar hou bisalor laḳan ou bisalor hoḳolta-o kempor bare ola zalailiba. Ita oilo asta shomazor gunar koforar kurbani.
4.22: “Ar Boni Israilor kunu shordare na zanar ḳarone zudi bul ḳoria ola guna ḳorilain, te Allar nished ḳora ḳam ḳorae tain to dushi.
4.23: Tain zebla ou gunar befare zaniliba, zanar bade koforar kurbani dibar lagi nikut egu faṭa sagol loia aiba.
4.24: Aia ou faṭar ḳollar ufre atai dia, zalail kurbanir foshu zobo ḳorar zagat nia ogure Mabudor samne zobo ḳorba. Ita to tan gunar koforar kurbani.
4.25: Bade imam sabe ou foshur tuṛa lou tan ator angulit ḳori loia, zalail kurbani kanar hing oḳlor ufre lagaiba. Bad-baki lou nia tain kurbani kanar tole ḍali diba.
4.26: Ar salamoti kurbanir foshur sorbir laḳan ogur hoḳol sorbire kurbani kanar ufre zalailiba. Ou laḳan imame hou shordaror gunar mafir lagi kofora adae ḳorle, tain mafi faiba.
4.27: “Ar Boni Israilor kunu shadaron zone na zanar ḳarone zudi bul ḳoria kunu gunar ḳam ḳorilae, Mabudor nished ḳora kunu ḳam ḳoria dushi bonizae,
4.28: te he zebla tar gunar befare zanilibo, zania ou gunar koforar lagi he nikut egu sagi loia aibo.
4.29: Aia ou sagir ḳollar ufre atai dia, zalail kurbanir zobor zagat nia ogure zobo ḳorbo.
4.30: Bade imam sabe tan ator angulit ḳori ogur tuṛa lou lagaia, kurbani kanar hing oḳlor ufre lagaiba. Bad-baki lou tain kurbani kanar tole ḍali diba.
4.31: Ar salamoti kurbanir meṛar sorbir laḳan ogur hoḳol sorbi bar ḳoria kurbani kanar ufre zalailiba. Itar dumar gerane Mabud kushi oin. Ou nomunae imame hou zonor gunar kofora adae ḳorle, tar mafi milbo.
4.32: “Gunar koforar kurbanir niote ḳeu zudi kunu meṛa ane, te iṭa nikut meṛi-baichcha oite oibo.
4.33: He ogur ḳollar ufre atai dia, zalail kurbanir foshur zobor zagat nia, gunar koforar kurbanir niote ogure zobo ḳorbo.
4.34: Bade imam sabe tan ator angulit ḳori ou meṛir tuṛa lou loia, kurbani kanar hing oḳlor ufre lagaiba. Bad-baki lou tain kurbani kanar tole ḍali diba.
4.35: Ar salamoti kurbanir meṛar sorbi zela bar ḳoroin, ogur hoḳol sorbire-o ola bar ḳorba. Bar ḳoria kurbani kanat kurbani deoa hoḳoltar ufre toia ou sorbire-o zalailiba, ou nomunae imame hou zonor gunar kofora adae ḳoria harle, he mafi faibo.

5.1: “Kunu manshe zudi nizor souke deḳa ba ḳane huna kunu goṭona zane, ar bisaror ḳalo adaloto shakkir shuzug faia-o shakki na dey, te itar lagi he guna ḳore, tar i oforador shaza he boibo.
5.2: “Ḳeu zudi na zania kunu nafak zinish soilae, te he nafak ar dushi bonbo. Ita kunuzator zongli haram mora foshu, goro fala kunu mora zandar ba maṭir maze buke solra zekunu mora zandarre na zania soile-o dushi-nafak bonbo.
5.3: “Manshor shorilre zetae nafak korilae, shoril taki bar oil ou laḳan kunuta ḳeu zudi na zania soilae, te ita zanar bade he dushi oibo.
5.4: “Aḳol-bibeḳ na ḳaṭaia aḳta zudi keu kunu ḳosom ḳorilae, bala ba bura kunta ḳormu ḳoia monor bekiale ḳeu kunu ḳosom ḳaile-o, he zebla ikan buzilibo ou shomoy he dushi bonbo.
5.5: “Ou laḳan zekunu oforad ḳoria ḳeu dushi bonigele, he nizor gunare shikar ḳorte oibo.
5.6: Ar ou gunar zorimana hishabe he Mabudor name, gunar koforar kurbanir niote eḳṭa meṛi ba sagi anbo, ar imame tar gunar kofora adae ḳorba.
5.7: “Ar he zudi meṛi ba sagi ante ofarog oy, te ou gunar zorimana babot duiṭa ḍufi faki ba faro ania Mabudor name dite oibo. Itar mazor egu oibo gunar koforar kurbani, ar dusraṭa zalail kurbani.
5.8: Ar he ita ania imamor ato dibo, imame gunar koforar kurbani hishabe foyla egu fakire kurbani diba. Tain ogur ḳolla muraia marba, oile ḳolla algaita nae.
5.9: Bade ogur tuṛa lou nia kurbani kanar sairo galat siṭai diba, ar bad-baki lou kurbani kanar tole ḍali diba. Ita oilo gunar koforar lagi kurbani.
5.10: Ar dusra fakiṭare imam sabe niom mafik zalail kurbani diba. Dia, tar gunar kofora adae ḳorba, teu he mafi faibo.
5.11: “Ar zudi ou gunar koforar lagi duiṭa ḍufi faki ba faro anto na fare, te he dui sher moyda ante oibo. Ita gunar koforar kurbani oae itar ufre kunu tel ba loban-agor dio na.
5.12: Ou moyda loia he imamor gese zaibo, gele ou asta kurbanir bodla nishana hishabe eḳ muiṭ moyda imam sabe kurbani kanar ufre Mabudor name zalailiba. Ita oilo Mabudor name gunar koforar kurbani.
5.13: He ze oforad ḳorse, otar mafir lagi imame ola kofora adae ḳorba, teu tar gunar mafi faibo. Ar kurbani deoar bade i moydar zotoḳan roibo, dan-gomor sodgar laḳan ita hoḳolta imame faiba.” Dush-ḳosurir ḳeti-furon ar kurbani
5.14: Bade Mabude Musa nobire ḳoila,
5.15: “Ḳeu zudi na zania Mabudor fak-fobitro kunu mal-samanar befare emne-u kunu dush-ḳosuri korilae, te ou gunar zorimana hishabe ebadot ḳanar mafe zoto tola rufadi meṛar dam ṭik kora oy, te he tar nizor fal taki ou foriman damor ba homan damdi kinia nikut egu meṛar faṭa Mabudor name kurbani dite oibo. Ita to dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbani.
5.16: Ar he ou fak-fobitro mal-samanar befare ze dush-ḳosuri korse, itar ḳeti-furon-o dite oibo. He ou meṛar damor loge aro fas baṭor eḳ baṭ foriman nogod ṭeḳa imam sabor ato dibo. Bade imame tar ḳosuri mafir niote ou meṛare nia dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbani adae ḳoria harle, he mafi faibo.
5.17: “Ar kunu manshe zudi bul ḳoria na zania Allar nished ḳora kunu dush-ḳosurir ḳam ḳorilae, te itar lagi he dushi. I gunar lagi tare dayi kora oibo.
5.18: He tar ou dush-ḳosurir kofora hishabe, egu nikut meṛar faṭa ba er dam ania imam sabor gese dibo. He na zania ze dush-ḳosuri korilise, imam sabe otar kofora adae ḳorba, teu tar mafi milbo.
5.19: Ita to dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbani, he Mabudor dorbaro dush ḳorse.”

6.2: “Huno, kunu manshe zebla tar ari-forir loge harami koria Mabudor dorbaro guna ḳore, tar gese toa amanot ba bondoki zinishor kianot ḳore, ba suri kori kunu mal ney ba ṭogaṭogi kore, sol-soturi koria beimani mate,
6.3: tubaia faoa malor befare beimani mate ba ota hokkoltar befare kunu misa ḳosom ḳae, ba ou laḳan aro kunu guna ḳore,
6.4: te ou nomunar guna ḳoria oforadi bonae, he zeta mal attoshat ḳorse, ba sol-soturi koria nise, ba amanotor kianot ḳorse, tubai faoa mal lukaise,
6.5: ba zekunu malor befare misa ḳosom ḳaise, ita hoḳolta he firot dibo, erloge zorimana hishabe aro fas baṭor eḳ baṭ beshi dibo. He zedin tar dush shikar ḳorbo, ou din malor malikre ita firai dibo.
6.6: Ar nizor dush-ḳosuri mafir niote he Mabudor dorbaro kurbani loia azir oibo, imam sabor ṭik kora damor egu nikut meṛar faṭa loia aibo.
6.7: Imame Mabudor dorbaro tar gunar kofora adae ḳorba. He otar mazor zekunu guna ḳorle, ou nomunae tar gunar mafi faibo.” Zalail kurbanir aro musla
6.9: “Tumi Harun ar tar fuaintore hikai deo, zalail kurbani adae ḳorar musla oilo, kurbanir foshu fozor forzonto hara rait kurbani kanar agunir ufre roibo, ar aguino zalail roibo.
6.10: Biani bala imam sabe suti kafoṛdi banail haf-penṭor laḳan nizor zangiaḳan ar tan imamotir baki hoḳol sutir lebas findiba. Findia kurbanir foshu zalanir sali tulia nia kurbani kanar ḳandat toiba.
6.11: Bade tain ou lebas bodlaia, dusra lebas findia, ou salire kempor bare kunu fak-saf zagat nia falaiba.
6.12: Oile kurbani kanat aguin zalail roibo, ita nibto na. Forteḳ din biane imame ou agunir ufre zalanir daru diba, dia darur ufre zalail kurbanir foshure hazaiba, hazaia er ufre salamoti kurbanir sorbire zalaiba.
6.13: Hushiar roio, kurbani kanar aguin hamesha zolat roibo, ita kunu shomoy-u nibto na. Dan-gom sodgar aro musla
6.14: “Dan-gom sodgar niom oilo, Harunor fuain taki eḳzon imame ou sodgar moyda ar dorḳari hokkolta loia kurbani kanar gese Mabudor samne azir oiba.
6.15: Ar imame oḳan taki eḳ muiṭ moyda, kisu tel ar sodgar hoḳol loban-agor nia asta sodgar nishana hishabe ou ongshore kurbani kanar ufre zalaiba. Itar dumar gerane to Mabud kushi oin.
6.16: Sodgar malor bad-baki ongsho imam Harun ar tar fuainte ḳaiba. Tara itar maze kunu ḳamir na mishaia ruṭi banaiba, banaia Milon-tambur uṭano kunu pak zagat boia ḳaiba.
6.17: Mono rakio, kunu ḳamir furaia itare sekio na. Amar name deoa zalail kurbanir ou ongsho ami tarare dilam. Gunar koforar kurbani, ar dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbanir laḳan dan-gomor sodgar ou ongsho-o oilo ḳas fobitro.
6.18: Ḳali imam Harunor bongshor hoḳol beṭa manshe ita ḳaita farba, Mabudor namor zalail kurbanir ou ongsho to oarishor for oarish dori tara-u faiba. Kub kial rakio, zesatae itar loge lagbo, ota-o fak-fobitro bonizibo, mani imam oḳlor baira manshor lagi haram.” Imamoti shomzibar sodgar musla
6.20: “Harune zedin imamotir ḳelafoti shomzia ḳamo boail oiba, ou din Harun ar tar fuainte dan-gomor sodgar niom mafik dui sher moyda Mabudor dorbaro anba. Itar ordeḳ biane ar ordeḳ hainja bala diba.
6.21: Tara tel dia ḳai banaia taoat sekia harle ita ṭukra ṭukra ḳoria Mabudor samne dan-gomor sodga hishabe azir ḳorba, itar dumar gerane Mabud kushi oin.
6.22: Harunor bade tar ze fuare fordan imam hishabe ḳelafoti deoa oibo, he-o oula sodga adae ḳorbo. Ita to Mabudor hor-hameshakur faona, ou sodgar fura ongsho zalailite oibo.
6.23: Imam oḳlor nizor deoa dan-gomor sodgar hokkolta zalailite oibo, ita ḳaoar kunu hukum nae.” Gunar koforar kurbanir aro musla
6.25: “Tumi Harun ar tar fuaintore gunar koforar kurbanir niom hikao. Zalail kurbanir foshure ze zagat zobo ḳoroin, gunar koforar kurbanir foshure-o ono zobo ḳorba. I kurbanir gust to ḳas fobitro.
6.26: Ze imame ou kurbani adae ḳorba, ein ou gust ḳaiba. Milon-tambur uṭano fobitro zagat ou gust ḳaite oibo.
6.27: Zeta zinishe ou gustre soibo, ita fak-fobitro oizibo. Kunu ḳafoṛor maze zudi er lour siṭa lage, te fak-fobitro kunu zagat ita doite oibo.
6.28: Ar maṭir ze fatilo ou gust randa oibo, ita bade bangilibae. Oile fitolor fatilo randile iṭa manjia fanidi doia fak-saf ḳorbae.
6.29: Imam bongshor zekunu beṭainte ou kurbanir gust ḳaita farba, ita to ḳas fobitro gust.
6.30: Oile gunar koforar kurbanir foshur lou zudi Milon-tambur bitre neoa oizae, te i kurbanir gust ḳaoa nished, ita zalailite oibo.

7.1: “Dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbanir musla oilo, i kurbanir gust to ḳas fobitro.
7.2: Zalail kurbanir foshure ze zagat zobo ḳora oy, ou kurbanir foshure-o ono zobo ḳorte oibo. Itar lou kurbani kanar sairo galabae siṭai dite oibo.
7.3: Ar itar hoḳol sorbire loibo, mani sorbi ala lenguṛ, feṭor bitoror hoḳoltar ufror sorbi,
7.4: er loge duio kiḍni ar otar ufror sorbi, ar ḳoiljar logor maṭia, i hoḳolta algaiba.
7.5: Algaia imame ou hoḳolta nia Mabudor name agunit deoa kurbani hishabe kurbani kanar ufre zalailiba, ita oilo dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbani.
7.6: Kurbanir gust imam foribaror zekunu beṭa manshe ḳaita farba. Ita to ḳas fobitro zinish, erlagi tara zekunu pak zagat boia ḳaite oibo.
7.7: “Gunar koforar kurbani ar dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbanir niom-ḳanun to eḳoi nomunar. Ze imam sabe ou koforar kurbanire adae ḳorba, ein ou gust faiba.
7.8: Ar ze imame zalail kurbani adae ḳorba, ein ou kurbanir foshur samṛa-o nita farba.
7.9: Luaṛit, taoat ba tunduri undalo hedia ana dan-gomor sodgar ruṭi kali hou imame faiba, zein i sodga adae ḳorsoin.
7.10: Oile dan-gomor bad-baki hoḳol sodga, ita tel maḳail ba hukna zekunu laḳan ouk, imam Harunor hoḳol fuainte itar homan baṭ faiba. Salamoti kurbanir aro musla
7.11: “Mabudor name deoa salamoti kurbanir niom oilo,
7.12: kunu manshe zudi Mabudor shukria adae ḳorar kiale salamoti kurbani dey, te ou kurbanir foshur loge tel mishail nireḳ moyda dia ḳamir saṛa ruṭi ba banail ruṭit tel maḳaia loia aibo, ba tel mishail ḳamir saṛa nireḳ moydar fiṭa banaia ante oibo.
7.13: Shukria adae ḳorar kiale salamoti kurbanir zinishor loge ḳamir ala tuṛa ruṭi-o anbo.
7.14: Mabudor name deoar lagi he ou forteḳ zinish taki eḳṭa eḳṭa ḳori anbo. Ze imame salamoti kurbanir foshur lou siṭaiba, ein ita faiba.
7.15: Shukurana adae ḳorar niote deoa ou kurbanir gust ou din-u ḳailite oibo. Ita bador din biankur lagi toa zaito nae.
7.16: “Ou salamoti kurbani zudi kunu mannot adae ḳorar niote deo, ba emne kushi oia kurbani deo, te itar gust ou din-u ḳaio, ar kisu baki roile bador dino ḳaitae farbae.
7.17: Oile dui din bade i gust roile, ita zalailite oibo.
7.18: Tin nombor din i gust ḳaile kurbani kobul oito nae. Kurbani deorar amol-namat ita uṭto nae, ou gust to nafak oigese, kunu manshe ita ḳaile tare naforman hishabe gona oibo.
7.19: “Salamoti kurbanir gustor maze nafak kunu zinish lagigele, i gustor i ongsho ar ḳaoa zaito nae, ita zalailiba. Oile baki gust ḳaoa zaibo, fak-saf halote ze kunu zone ita ḳaita farba.
7.20: Ar nafak halote kunu manshe zudi Mabudor name deoa ou salamoti kurbanir gust ḳailae, te shomaz taki tar nam miṭailite oibo.
7.21: Kunu manshe zudi foshur ba manshor kunu nafak zinish soia hari ba dusra nafak kunta soia hari Mabudor name deoa salamoti kurbanir gust ḳailae, te tar nam-o shomaz taki miṭailite oibo.” Lou ar sorbi haram
7.23: “Tumi Boni Israilre zanai deo, tumra goru-sagol ba meṛar kunuzat sorbi kaio na.
7.24: Kunu mora foshur ba zongli zanuare mara foshur sorbire tumra oinno kunu ḳamo lagaitae farbae, oile ḳaitae fartae nae.
7.25: Zoto nomunar foshu dia Mabudor name agunit deoa kurbani adae ḳora oy, ita zator foshur sorbi zegue ḳaibo, tar namre shomaz taki miṭailibae.
7.26: Tumra zekunu zagat boshot ḳoro na ḳene, kunuzat foshu ba fakir lou ḳaoa zaiz nae.
7.27: Kunu manshe zudi lou ḳae, te shomaz taki tar nam miṭailite oibo.” Imam sabor faona hok
7.29: “Tumi Boni Israilre zanai deo, zekunu manshe kunu foshu dia salamoti kurbani adae ḳorle, kurbanir gustor eḳṭa ongsho Mabudor dorbaro dite oibo.
7.30: Mabudor name agunit deoa kurbanir ou ongsho, mani sina ar sinar ufror sorbi he nizor ate ania imam sabre dibo. Imame itare usa ḳoria Mabudor samne dulaiba.
7.31: Bade tain sorbire kurbani kanar ufre zalailiba, oile ou sinar gust imam Harun ar tan fuainte faiba.
7.32: Salamoti kurbanir foshur ḍainor ranor gust imam sabre dilaibae.
7.33: Imam Harunor bongshor ze ḳeu salamoti kurbanir foshur lou ar sorbire kurbani diba, tan faona hishabe ou ranor gust niba.
7.34: Boni Israilor deoa hoḳol salamoti kurbanir gust taki dulona kurbanir sina ar ḍainor ranor gust ami imam Harun ar tar fuaintore dilam. Boni Israilor deoa kurbanir i ongsho oilo tarar hameshakur faona hok.”
7.35: Harun ar tar fuaintore zedin taki imamotir ḳamo boail ḳora oisil, hou din taki Mabudor name agunit deoa hoḳol nomunar kurbanir ou ongshore tarar faona hok hishabe dora oise.
7.36: Tarare zedin ḳelafoti shomzaia boail ḳora oise, hou din Mabude Boni Israilre hukum disla, kurbanir gustor ou ongsho hor-hamesha erare dibar lagi.
7.37: Ita oilo zalail kurbani, dan-gomor sodga, gunar koforar kurbani, dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbani, imamoti shomzibar sodga, ar salamoti kurbanir niom.
7.38: Sinai morubumit Mabude zedin Boni Israilre hukum disla tan name kurbanir zinish anar lagi, hou din tain Tur faṛor ufre Musa nobire ou hokkol niom-ḳanun zanaisla.

8.2: “Tumi Harun ar tar fuaintore loia amar gese azir o. Er loge tarar imamotir lebas, ḳelafoti shomzibar tel, gunar koforar kurbanir bisal, dugu meṛar faṭa ar ḳamir saṛa ruṭir ṭukri-o anio.
8.3: Ar tumi tamam Boni Israilre Milon-tambur duaror ḳandat dola ḳoro.”
8.4: Teu Mabudor hukum mafik Musa nobie hoḳolta ḳorla, hoḳol Boni Israil Milon-tambur duaror ḳandat dola oila.
8.5: Ou shomoy Musae erare ḳoila, “Mabude hukum disoin ita ḳorar lagi.”
8.6: Oḳan ḳoia tain imam Harun ar tan fuaintore samne ania fani dia naoaila.
8.7: Bade tain Harunre imamoti lebasor fainjabi findaia hari komror bondoni bandia dila. Tain alḳella ar efron findaia feṭor ufror noksha ḳora ḳafoṛre fitadi bandi dila.
8.8: Bade bukur ufror toli findaia er bitre fobitro Urim ar Tummim haraila.
8.9: Erbade Harunor matat faugṛi findaia hou fobitro taz, mani shunar fatḳan faugṛir samnabae lagaila. Musae i hoḳolta ḳorla Mabudor hukum mafik.
8.10: Bade tain Milon-tambu ar er bitoror hoḳol mal-samanare ḳelafotir tel dia fobitro ḳorla.
8.11: Ou tel taki tuṛa tel nia tain kurbani kanar ufre shatbar siṭaila. Kurbani kana ar er logor hoḳol mal-samana, hanḍi-bashon, ar uzur fanir gamla ar er tolor soki-kaṭre, tel dia fak-fobitro ḳorla.
8.12: Aro tuṛa tel nia imam Harunor matar maze ḍalia tanre fak-fobitro bonar lagi kelafoti dila.
8.13: Ar Harunor fuaintore samne ania tarar gotro fainjabi findaila, ḳomror bondoni bandia hari matar toki findaila. Ita hoḳolta ḳorla tain Mabudor hukum mafik.
8.14: Erbade tain gunar koforar kurbanir bisal anla, anle Harun ar tan fuainte bisalor ḳolla atai dila.
8.15: Teu Musae ou bisalre zobo ḳoria ogur kisu lou nia, kurbani kanare fak-saf ḳorar kiale oḳanor hing oḳlor maze ator anguildi lou maḳaila. Baki lou tain kurbani kanar tole ḍali dila. Ou nomunae tain gunar koforar kurbanir lou dia kurbani kanare fak-saf ḳorla.
8.16: Bade tain bisalor feṭor bitoror hoḳol sorbi, ḳoiljar logor maṭia, sorbi shomet duio kiḍni nia kurbani kanar ufre zalailila.
8.17: Oile bisalor ḳal, gust, gufor nia tain kempor bare zalaila. Musae ita hoḳolta ḳorla Mabudor hukum mafik.
8.18: Bade tain zalail kurbanir meṛar faṭare anla. Anle Harun ar tan fuainte ogur ḳolla atai dila.
8.19: Ar Musae ou meṛare zobo ḳoria kurbani kanar sairo galat lou siṭai dila.
8.20: Tain meṛare ṭukraia ogur ḳolla, gustor ṭukra ar sorbire zalaila.
8.21: Ar ou meṛar feṭor bitoror hoḳolta, tar sairo ṭeng fani dia doia hari, asta meṛare zalail kurbani hishabe kurbani kanar ufre zalailila. Ita to Mabudor name agunit deoa zalail kurbani, itar dumar gerane tain kushi oin. Musae ita hoḳolta ḳorla Mabudor hukum mafik.
8.22: Bade tain imamoti kamo boailor niote, dusra meṛare ania harle Harun ar tan fuainte meṛar ḳolla atai dila.
8.23: Musae ou meṛare zobo ḳoria, ogur tuṛa lou nia Harunor ḍain ḳanor lotit, ḍain ator ar ḍain faor buṛi angulit lagaila.
8.24: Ar Harunor fuaintore-o samne ania, tarar ḍain ḳanor lotit, ar ḍain at, ḍain faor buṛi angulit tuṛa lou lagai dila. Aro tuṛa lou nia kurbani kanar sairo galat siṭai dila.
8.25: Tain meṛar sorbi, sorbi ala lenguṛ, ḳoiljar logor maṭia, sorbi shomet duio kiḍni, ar ḍainor ran nila.
8.26: Ar Mabudor samne toa ḳamir saṛa ruṭir ṭukri taki ekkan ruṭi, ar teldi baza ekkan fiṭa, ar tel maḳail ekkan ruṭi nia hou sorbi ar ranor ufre toila.
8.27: Toia ita hoḳolta Harun ar tan fuaintor ato dia dulona kurbani hishabe Mabudor samne dulaila.
8.28: Bade tain ita tarar at taki nia hari kurbani kanar foshur ufre toia zalailila. Ita to ḳelafoti shomzibar kurbani, Mabudor name agunit deoa kurbani, itar dumar gerane tain kushi oin.
8.29: Bade tain nizor faona ongsho, mani kelafoti shomzibar kurbanir meṛar sina nia dulona kurbani hishabe Mabudor samne dulaila. Tain ita hoḳolta ḳorla Mabudor hukum mafik.
8.30: Bade Musae ḳelafoti shomzibar tuṛa fobitro tel nila, ar kurbani kana taki tuṛa lou ania Harun ar tan fuaintor ufre ar tarar lebasor ufre siṭai dila. Ou nomunae Harun ar tan fuaintore, ar tarar lebasre-o fak-fobitro ḳora oilo.
8.31: Bade Musae Harun ar en fuaintore ḳoila, “Tumra Milon-tambur duaror samne ou gust rando, randia hono boia ḳelafoti shomzibar ṭukrir ruṭi dia ota ḳao. Amare to age ou ḳota zanail oise, ita ḳali tumi ar tumar fuainte ḳaibae.
8.32: Ḳanir bade zeta gust ar ruṭi baki roibo, itare aguindi zalailio.
8.33: Tumrare ḳelafoti shomzibar ou mahfil shat din dori solbo. I shat din tumra Milon-tambur duaror ḳanda taki horio na.
8.34: Aiz zeta ḳorlam, ita to tumrar gunar kofora hishabe Mabudor hukum mafik korlam.
8.35: Te tumra zane basia roar lagi aiz taki shat din forzonto ou Milon-tambur duaror ḳandat roio. Din-rait ono roia Mabudor hukum mafik kam ḳorio. Tumra ola ḳorar lagi to ami hukum faisi.”
8.36: Musa nobir mazdi Mabude zotota ḳorar hukum disla, Harun ar tan fuainte ita hoḳolta ḳorla.

9.1: Ḳelafoti shomzibar mahfilor aṭ dinor din Musa nobie imam Harunre, tan fuaintore ar Boni Israilor murobbi oḳolre-o anaila.
9.2: Anaia Harunre ḳoila, “Tumar gunar koforar kurbanir lagi tumi egu bisal ano, ar zalail kurbanir lagi egu meṛar faṭa loia Mabudor dorbaro azir o. Kurbanir foshu guin furafur nikut oito.
9.3: Ar tumi Boni Israilre ḳo, tara zanu Mabudor namor kurbani loia azir oy. Tara gunar koforar lagi egu sagol, ar zalail kurbanir lagi eḳ bosor boyoshi nikut egu goru-basur, ar egu meṛa-baichcha ane,
9.4: ar salamoti kurbanir lagi egu bisal ar egu meṛar faṭa loia azir oy. Itar loge tara tel maḳail dan-gomor sodga-o anba. Mabude tarare aiz didar diba, erlagi tara ota loia azir oukka.”
9.5: Musa nobir hukum mafik tara hokkolta loia Milon-tambur samne aila. Hoḳol Boni Israil Mabudor samne aia ubaila.
9.6: Ou shomoy Musae tarare ḳoila, “Mabude tumrare ita ḳorar lagi hukum disoin, ita adae ḳorle tumrar samne tan kudroti nur zair oibo.”
9.7: Bade tain imam Harunre ḳoila, “Tumi gia kurbani kanar ḳandat zao, gia tumar nizor ar manshor gunar koforar lagi, zalail kurbani ar gunar koforar kurbani adae ḳoro. Ar manshor ana kurbani-o adae ḳoro, Mabude amare ola hukum disoin.”
9.8: Teu imam Harun kurbani kanar ḳandat gia, tan nizor gunar koforar kurbanir basur zobo ḳorla.
9.9: Zobor bade tan fuainte ogur lou loia tan daro gela. Tain ou lour maze angul ḍubaia tuṛa lou nia kurbani kanar hing oḳol-o maḳaila, ar baki lou kurbani kanar tole ḍalila.
9.10: Mabude Musare zela hukum disla, imam Harune ṭik ou laḳan gunar koforar kurbanir basuror sorbi, duio kiḍni ar ḳoiljar logor maṭiare kurbani kanar ufre nia zalailila.
9.11: Kurbanir gust ar samṛa nia tain kempor bare zalaila.
9.12: Bade imam Harune zalail kurbanir meṛare zobo ḳorla. Tan fuainte ogur lou nia tan ato dila, tain ou loure kurbani kanar sairo galat siṭaila.
9.13: Tara zalail kurbanir meṛar ḳolla ar gustor ṭukrain eḳ ek kori Harunor ato dila, tain ita kurbani kanar ufre zalailila.
9.14: Meṛar ṭeng ar feṭor bitoror hoḳolta fani dia doia saf ḳoria, zalail kurbani foshur loge ita hokkolta-o kurbani kanar ufre zalailila.
9.15: Bade tain shomazor manshor lagi kurbanir foshu oḳol anaila. Tain manshor gunar koforar kurbanir sagol zobo ḳorla, ar agor laḳan kurbani adae ḳorla.
9.16: Erbade tain tarar zalail kurbanir foshure-o Mabudor hukum mafik kurbani dila.
9.17: Ar dan-gomor sodgar lagi ana samana taki eḳ muiṭ nia hari kurbani kanar ufre zalaila. Ita saṛa-o tain biani balar hameshakur zalail kurbani adae ḳorla.
9.18: Tain manshor salamoti kurbanir ou goru ar meṛare zobo ḳorla. Zobor bade tan fuainte ogur lou ania tan ato dila, lou nia tain kurbani kanar sairo galat siṭai dila.
9.19: Ar imam Harunre hou goru ar meṛar loge lagail hoḳol sorbi, mani sorbi ala lenguṛ, feṭor bitoror hoḳoltar ufror sorbi, duio kiḍni ar otar ufror sorbi, ḳoiljar logor maṭia-o ania dila.
9.20: Tara ou hoḳol sorbire hou foshur sinar ufre toila. Ar imam Harune ou sorbi nia kurbani kanar ufre zalaila.
9.21: Musa nobir hukum mafik Harune bade kurbanir foshur sina ar ḍainor ran nia Mabudor samne dulona kurbani hishabe dulaila.
9.22: Bade imam Harune manshor baedi tan at baṛaia tarare dua dila. Tain gunar koforar kurbani, zalail kurbani ar salamoti kurbani adae ḳoria harle, kurbani kana taki lamia aila.
9.23: Erbade Musa nobi ar imam Harun gia Milon-tambur bitre hamaila, bade hon taki bar oia aia hoḳol manshore dua dila. Ou shomoy hoḳol manshor samne Mabude tan kudroti nur zair ḳorla.
9.24: Mabudor ges taki kudroti aguin aia, kurbani kanar ufror zalail kurbanir foshu ar hokkol sorbire zalaia sali korililo. Ita dekia hoḳol manush kushie Subohan Alla ḳoia sik dia soizdat foṛla.

10.1: Bade ola oilo, imam Harunor fua Nadab ar Abihue tarar zarzir agor-kushboy danit aguin zalaila, ar ou agunir ufre agor-kushboy dila. Tara Mabudor hukumor ulṭa gia dusra aguin dia Mabudor name agor-kushboy zalaila.
10.2: Otar lagi Mabudor ges taki aguin lamia aia tarare zalaililo, tara Mabudor samne morigela.
10.3: Teu Musae Harunre ḳoila, “Mabude to age-u zanai disla, Amar samne zera azir oy, tara amare fak-fobitro ḳoia manbo, hoḳol manshor samne amar gourob-mohima zair ḳorbo.” Ikan hunia Harun sufsaf roila.
10.4: Bade Musae Harunor sasa Ujjolor fuain Mishayel ar Elzafonre ḳobor dia anaila, anaia ḳoila, “Tumra Herem Shorifor samon taki tumrar duio batizar lashre bar ḳoria kempor bare neo.”
10.5: Tan hukum faia tara gia Nadab ar Abihur lashre imamoti fainjabir ḳafoṛo dori ṭania kempor bare nila.
10.6: Bade imam Harun ar tan fuain Ali-Azor ar Isamarre Musae ḳoila, “Tarar moutor duke tumra nizor sulre aula-zaula ḳorio na, ar finnor ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ fario na. Ita ḳorle tumra-o morbae, ar asta shomazor ufre Mabudor gozobi gusa lambo. Oile Mabude zerare aguindi zalai marsoin, tarar duke tumrar kuṭum-ḳesh mani bad-baki Boni Israile mattom-ahazari korta farba.
10.7: Tumrar gotro to Mabudor namor ḳelafoti shomzibar fobitro tel deoa oise, erlagi tumra Milon-tambur duaror bare zaio na, gele-u morbae.” Tara-o Musar ḳota manla.
10.9: “Tumi ar tumar fuainte anguror shorbot ba shorab ḳaia Milon-tambur bitre hamaio na, hamaile-u morbae. I hukum oarishor for oarish dori hor-hamesha manio.
10.10: Kunṭa haram ar kunṭa halal, kunṭa fak ar kunṭa nafak, ita buzia-hunia solio.
10.11: Ar ami Mabude Musar marfote Boni Israilre zoto hukum-ahkam bataisi, ita tarare talim dio.”
10.12: Bade Harun ar tan baki duio fua Ali-Azor ar Isamarre Musae ḳoila, “Mabudor name agunit deoa kurbanir logor dan-gomor sodgar ze ongsho baki roise, ota dia ḳamir saṛa ruṭi banaia kurbani kanar ḳandat nia tumra ḳaio. Ita to ḳas fobitro zinish.
10.13: Tumra fobitro Kaba goror shimanar bitre ota ḳaio. Mabudor name agunit deoa kurbanir ou ongsho to tumar ar tumar fuaintor faona. Mabude amare ola hukum disoin.
10.14: Oile Mabudor name dulona kurbanir sina ar ranor gust tumra ar tumrar fua-fuṛinte-o ḳaitae farbae. Zekunu fak-saf zagat boia tumra ita ḳaio. Boni Israilor hoḳol salamoti kurbanir gustor ou ongsho tumrare ar tumrar fua-fuṛintore deoa oise.
10.15: Ou kurbanir foshur sorbi zebla ana oibo, ou shomoy dulona kurbanir lagi sina ar ranor gust-o ana lagbo. Mabudor hukum mafik ou ran ar sinar gust tumi ar tumar fua-fuṛintor siroḳalin faona.”
10.16: Bade Musae kub kiali oia tallashi koria zanla, ze sagol dia gunar koforar kurbani adae ḳora oisil, ogur hoḳol gust tara zalailise. Erlagi Musae Harunor baki duio fua Ali-Azor ar Isamaror ufre gusa ḳoria ḳoila,
10.17: “Gunar koforar kurbanir gust tumra Kaba goror shimanat ḳailae na ḳene? Ita to ḳas fobitro zinish. Mabudor samne Boni Israilor gunar kofora adae ḳoria, tarar dush-ḳosuri mafir lagi ita to tumrare deoa oisil.
10.18: Kurbanir sagolor lou zebla Herem Shorifor bitre neoa oise na, te amar hukum mafik itar gust to tumra Kaba goror shimanar bitre ḳaoa zorur asil.”
10.19: Harune zuaf dila, “Aiz Mabudor samne tarar gunar koforar kurbani ar zalail kurbani adae ḳorar bade amar ufredi otota goṭilo. Te aizkur dino ami ou kurbanir gust ḳaile Mabud kunu kushi oiba ni?”
10.20: I zuaf hunia Musa nobi kushi oila.

11.2: “Tumra Boni Israilre zanai deo, maṭir ufror foshur maze zeta foshu tumrar lagi halal, ota oilo:
11.3: “Zeta foshur faor kura furafur sira, ar ḳanire fazae, itar gust tumrar lagi halal.
11.4: Ta-o er mazor kunu kunu foshue ḳali kanire fazae, ar kunu kunu foshur ḳali kura sira, ita to tumrar lagi haram. Uṭe ḳanire fazaileo tar kura sira nae, erlagi uṭ haram.
11.5: Shafon-undure ḳanire fazaileo, itar kura sira nae, otar lagi ita-o haram.
11.6: Ḳorgushe-o ḳanire fazae, oile itar kura sira nae, otar lagi haram.
11.7: Shuoror kura furafur sira, oile itae ḳanire fazae na, erlagi ita tumrar lagi haram.
11.8: Itar gust tumrar lagi haram, itar mora lashre-o soio na. Ita tumrar lagi nafak.
11.9: “Fanir maze zeta zandare boshot ḳoroin, itar maze zetar foir ar ḍaḳna ase, ita tumrar lagi halal.
11.10: Oile zetar foir ar ḍaḳna nai, ita tumrar lagi nazaiz. Ita fanir maze fal bandia gurra zandar ouk ba aro kunu zandar ouk, itare tumra ginnaio.
11.11: Nazaiz oae itare haram mono ḳorio, ita tumra ḳaio na. Itar mora lashre-o tumra ginnaio.
11.12: Fanir maze boshot ḳore, oile kunu foir ba ḍaḳna nai, ilaḳan hoḳol zandarre tumra ginnaio.
11.13: “Ar faki oḳlor mazor ou laḳan fakire tumra ginnaio, ita tumra ḳaio na. Ota oila, boṛo sil, hokun, haf-ḳauri,
11.14: hoḳol zator sil, hoḳol zat ḳaua,
11.16: nim faki, gangsil, hoḳol nomunar baz faki,
11.17: hoḳol zat fesa, hoḳol zator kuṛa, sola-kak, bolua faki,
11.19: hoḳol zator zaṭia, hoḳol zator bogla, mon-sura faki ar badur, ita tumrar lagi haram.
11.20: “Fuk-foring oḳlor maze ou laḳan fuk-foring tumrar lagi nazaiz, zetae faodi aṭe ar uṛal dey, itare tumra ginnaio.
11.21: Oile itar mazor zetar aṭu ase, ar maṭir ufre falai falai sole, itar mazor kunu kunuṭa tumrar lagi halal.
11.22: Ita oilo, hoḳol zator fongofal, baga-foring, gash-foring.
11.23: Oile ita saṛa bad-baki zoto fuk-foringe sair faoe aṭe ar uṛito fare, ita hoḳolta tumra ginnaio.
11.24: “Tumra ou laḳan ḳam ḳorle nafak oizibae; kunu manshe zudi ou haram foshu, faki, mas, fuk-foring otar mora lash soilae, te he hainja forzonto nafak roibo.
11.25: Ar ḳeu zudi ota haram zinishor lashor kunu ongshore atdi doria boia ney, te he tar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doia dite oibo, ar hainja forzonto nafak roibo.
11.26: “Ar zeta foshur faor kura furafur sira nae, ba ze foshue ḳanire fazae na, ita to tumrar lagi haram. Ou haram foshure ze zone soibo, he nafak bonizibo.
11.27: Sair faoe aṭra zanuar oḳlor maze, ze foshue faor talut bor dia aṭe, ita-o tumrar lagi haram. Ḳeu zudi itar mora lash soilae, te hainja forzonto nafak roibo.
11.28: Ar kunu manshe zudi itar lash atdi doria boia ney, te tar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doia dite oibo, ar hainja forzonto he nafak roibo. Ita zanuar oḳol to tumrar lagi haram.
11.29: “Ar maṭit solra huru-muru zandaror maze neul, undur, hoḳol zator girgiṭi,
11.30: ṭikṭiki, guil-haf, moi-haf, ainjail ar ḳaklash, tumrar lagi haram.
11.31: Maṭit solra huru-muru zandaror mazor ou zator zandar to tumrar lagi nazaiz. Itar mora lash ḳeu soile, he hainja forzonto nafak roibo.
11.32: Otar mazor zekunu egur mora lash zudi oinno zinishor ufre foṛe, zelan laḳṛi, ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ, samṛa ba solar soṭ dia banail zekunu malor ufre foṛle-u ita nafak oizibo. Nafak malre fanit bizaia toibae. Hainja forzonto ita nafak roibo, bade fak-saf oibo.
11.33: Ar ou nafak zandaror kunuṭar mora lash zudi kunu maṭir bashonor maze foṛe, te igur bitoror hoḳolta nafak oizibo, i bashonre-o bangilibae.
11.34: Ou bashonor fani ba rosh zudi kunu ḳanir zinishor ufre foṛe, te i kani nafak oizibo. Ikṭar maze zudi fani zatio kunuta toa taḳe, te ita-o nafak oizibo.
11.35: Ar otar mora lash zudi kunu zinishor ufre foṛe, te ita nafak oizibo. Ita kunu undalo foṛle, i undal bangilibae. I undal to tumrar lagi nafak, itare nafak goinno ḳorio.
11.36: Oile ita zudi kunu kuar bitre ba indarar maze foṛe, te i kua ba indara nafak oito nae. Ḳali itar mora lash ze zone soibo, he nafak oizibo.
11.37: Zomino bain dibar niote toa kunuzator bisor ufre zudi otar lash foṛe, te ita nafak oito nae.
11.38: Oile kunu bisor ufre fani dia bizanir bade zudi ita foṛe, te i bis tumrar lagi nafak.
11.39: “Tumrar halal kunu foshu morigele, igur lash ze zone soibo, he hainja forzonto nafak roibo.
11.40: Ḳeu zudi ou mora foshur gust ḳae, te he tar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doia dite oibo, ar he hainja forzonto nafak roibo. Ar ḳeu zudi ou foshur lashre at dia tule, te he tar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doia dite oibo, he-o hainja forzonto nafak roibo.
11.41: “Huno, maṭir maze solra hoḳol zator huru-muru zandar ḳaoa tumrar lagi haram, itare tumra ginnaio.
11.42: Ita buke solra zandar ouk, ba sair faoe aṭra zandar ba bout faoe solra ouk, hoḳol nomunar maṭit solra huru-muru zandar tumra ḳaio na, itare ginnaio.
11.43: Tumra ita kunutar lagi nizore ginnar zon banaio na, ba otae-o zanu tumrare nafak na banae.
11.44: Mono rakio, ami Alla-u tumrar Mabud. Amar niote tumra nizore fak-fobitro rakio. Zano to, ami nize-o fobitro. Erlagi maṭit solra kunu huru-muru zandaror lagi tumra nizore nafak banaio na.
11.45: Ami to Alla, ami tumrar Mabud oar kiale, Mishor desh taki tumrare bar ḳori anchi. Ami nize fobitro, erlagi tumra-o fobitro roio.
11.46: “Te foshu, faki, fanit boshot ḳorra zandar, ar maṭir maze solra hoḳol nomunar huru-muru zandaror befare tumra amar hukum-ahkam manio.
11.47: Kunṭa tumrar lagi zaiz ar kunṭa nazaiz, kun foshur gust halal ar kunṭa haram, ita tumra buzia-hunia solio.”

12.2: “Tumi Boni Israilre zanai deo, kunu beṭir goro zudi kunu fuar zonom oy, te beṭiara bemaror shomoykur laḳan i beṭi nafak roibo. Tair ou nafaki halot shat din roibo.
12.3: Bade aṭ dinor din fuare mosolmani kam ḳoraite oibo.
12.4: Ar ou beṭir hurutta zonmor lou zaoar ḳarone tetrish din forzonto nafak roibo. Ou miad na fura forzonto tai kunu fobitro zinisho dora-soa zaiz nae. Ar fobitro Kaba goror shimanat zaibar hukum nae.
12.5: Oile i beṭir goro zudi fuṛir zonom oy, te beṭiara mashik bemaror laḳan tai nafak roibo, ta-o i nafaki halot fura dui hafta solbo. Bade ou bemar taki pak-pakiza oar lagi aro soyshoṭṭi din bar saibo.
12.6: “Fua ba fuṛir zonmor bade pak-pakiza oar shomoy aile, beṭie kurbani adae ḳorar niote Milon-tambur duaror ḳandat imam sabor gese zaibo. Zaite zalail kurbanir lagi eḳ bosor boyoshi egu meṛa, ar gunar koforar kurbanir lagi egu faro ba ḍufi faki loge nibo.
12.7: Teu imam sabe Mabudor samne ou kofora adae ḳoria lou zaoa bemar taki beṭire pak-pakiza ḳorba. Beṭintor goro fua ba fuṛir zonmor bade pak-pakiza oar lagi ou niom zari roilo.
12.8: Ar kurbanir lagi meṛa anar tofik zudi na taḳe, te dugu faro ba ḍufi faki anbo. Ermazor egu oibo zalail kurbani, ar dusraṭa gunar koforar kurbani. Ou nomunae imam sabe kurbani adae ḳoria taire nafaki taki basaiba, teu i beṭi pak-pakiza bonbo.

13.1: Bade Mabude Musa ar Harunre ḳoila,
13.2: “Kunu manshor gotror samṛar kunu zaga zudi aḳta fuli zae, ba kunu kulosh uṭe ba kunuzat dag deḳa zae, ar mono shondoy oy zen, ita bade fosa-kusṭo bemar oito fare, te imam Harun ba tan fuaintor mazor kunu imamor gese tare loia zaibae.
13.3: Imam sabe tar samṛar ou zaga deḳba, hi zagar ruma zudi dola oizae, ar buza zae i bemar samṛar tolor gustor maze lagigese, te buzbae, ita nafak fosa-kusṭo bemar. Ila bemari deḳle imame tare nafak koia elan ḳorba.
13.4: Oile tar samṛar maze ou dag zudi kali dola oy, ar ita samṛar tolor gustor maze na lage, onor ruma dola na oy, te imam sabe ou zonre shat din dori hoḳol manshor ges taki horai raḳba.
13.5: Bade shat dinor din tare hirbar deḳba. Zudi deḳa zae, ou bemar samṛar toledi na gia zela asil ola roise, te imame tare aro shat din alga raḳba.
13.6: Ar hirbar shat dinor din tare deḳba, ermaze zudi tar bemar na baṛia hukaia ḳomi zae, te buzba, ita ḳali kulosh uṭse. Imame tare fak-saf ḳoia elan ḳorba. He tar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doia hari fak-saf bonbo.
13.7: Oile imame tare fak-saf ḳoia elan ḳorar bade zudi tar gotror kulosh aro baṛi zae, te tare hirbar imamor gese deḳaibae.
13.8: Imame hirbar deḳba, zudi ou bemar samṛar ufre aro baṛi zae, te buza zaibo, ita nafak fosa-kusṭo bemar, tain ere nafak koia elan ḳorba.
13.9: “Kunu manshor samṛat fosa-kusṭo bemaror laḳan deḳa gele tare nia imam sabor gese deḳaibae.
13.10: Imame deḳba, tar gotro kunu zagar samṛar ufre zudi dola oia fuli zae, ar honor ruma dola oizae, ou fula zagat ḳasa ga taḳe,
13.11: te to iṭa eḳṭa furana fosa-kusṭo bemar. Imame tare nafak koia elan ḳorba. Tare forikkar lagi shomazor manshor ges taki kunu miade duroi raḳar zorur nae, he to emne-u nafak halote ase.
13.12: “Oile i bemar zudi asta shorilo oizae, ar imame shorilor zoto zaga deḳta faroin, ota dekia zudi tan mono oy, i bemar mata taki fao forzonto ase,
13.13: te tare aro balamonte deḳba, ar dekia zudi buza zae, i bemare tar asta gotor dola oigese, te tare fak-saf ḳoia elan ḳorba. Tar asta gotor dola oae he nafak nae.
13.14: Oile erbade zudi kunu ḳasa ga deḳa dey, te he nafak.
13.15: Imame ou ga dekia tare nafak koia elan ḳorba. Ou ga to nafak, tar nafak fosa-kusṭo bemar oise.
13.16: Bade ou ḳasa ga hukaia zudi dola oizae, te tare hirbar imamor gese niba.
13.17: Imame tare hirbar deḳba, tar asta gotror bemar zudi furafur dola oizae, te imame tare fak-saf ḳoia elan ḳorba, he ashole-u fak-saf.
13.18: “Kunu manshor gotro zudi boron oia iṭa bala oizae,
13.19: ar ou zaga bade dola oia fuli zae, ba lalṭi-dola dag oy, te tare imamor gese niba.
13.20: Imame tare deḳba, hi bemar zudi samṛar tole gia gustor maze lagizae, ruma dola oizae, te iṭa to boronor zagat zonom loa fosa-kusṭo bemar, imame tare nafak koia elan ḳorba.
13.21: Oile imame kunu dola ruma na deḳle, ar ou ga zudi samṛar tole na gia hukaizibar laḳan oy, te imame tare shat din forzonto shomaz taki alog raḳba.
13.22: Bade zudi deḳa zae, ita samṛar ufre sitri zar, te imame tare nafak koia elan ḳorba, ita eḳlaḳan fosa-kusṭo bemar.
13.23: Oile kunu laḳan ḳom-beshi na oile, na sitrile buza zaibo ita ḳali boronor dag, imame tare fak-saf ḳoia elan ḳorba.
13.24: “Kunu manshor gotror kunu ongsho zudi aguine zoli zae, ar ou zolar zagat ḳasa gar maze lalṭi ba dola dag deḳa dey,
13.25: te imame tare forikka ḳori deḳba. Ar zudi deḳa zae, ruma dola oigese, ou ga samṛar tole gia gustor maze lagigese, te iṭa to zalail zagat zonom loa fosa-kusṭo bemar oia bar oise. Ita to nafak fosa-kusṭo bemar, erlagi imame tare nafak koia elan ḳorba.
13.26: Oile imame forikka ḳoria zudi deḳoin, i zagar ruma dola oise na, ar ga sitria gia gustor maze na lagia mili zar, te imame tare shat din forzonto shomaz taki alog raḳba.
13.27: Bade imame shat dinor din tare hirbar deḳba, zudi deḳoin, ou bemar baṛi zar, te imame tare nafak koia elan ḳorba. Ita eḳlaḳan nafak fosa-kusṭo bemar.
13.28: Oile i zaga zudi kunu ḳom-besh na oia zela asil ola taḳe, ar samṛar maze na sitria mili zaoat roy, te ita aguine zolar fula ḳoia dora oibo. Ita to eḳlaḳan zolar dag, ar imame tare fak-saf ḳoia elan ḳorba.
13.29: “Ar kunu beṭa ba beṭir mata ba daṛi-musor maze zudi kunu gar alamot deḳa dey,
13.30: te imam sabe tare forikka ḳori deḳba. Tain zudi deḳoin, bemari zagar sul ba rum oldia oia sikon oigese, ar ga samṛar tole gia gustor maze lagigese, te iṭa to eḳlaḳan daud-ḳauzlir muk, ita daṛi-mus ba matar samṛat fosa-kusṭo bemar bar oise. Erlagi imame tare nafak koia elan ḳorba.
13.31: Oile imame zudi bemar forikka ḳoria deḳoin, i ga samṛar tole gese na, ar onor sul ba rum to ḳala nae, te ou bemarire shat din forzonto shomaz taki alog raḳba.
13.32: Bade shat dinor din imame hirbar forikka ḳori zudi deḳoin, i daud-ḳauzli bemar baṛse na, ba sul-rumo oldia oise na, ar onor ga samṛar tolor gustor maze lagse na,
13.33: te ou daud-ḳauzlir zaga bad dia, tar shorilor bad-baki sul ba daṛi-mus ḳamailite oibo. Bade imame tare aro shat din shomaz taki alog raḳba.
13.34: Ar shat dinor din imame hirbar forikka ḳoria zudi deḳoin, i daud-ḳauzli samṛar ufre sitrise na, ba samṛar toledi gustor maze-o lagse na, te imame tare fak-saf ḳoia elan ḳorba. Ar he ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doia hari pak-pakiza bonbo.
13.35: Ta-o imame tare fak-saf ḳoia elan ḳorar bade-o zudi i daud-ḳauzli samṛar ufre sitri zae,
13.36: te imame tare hirbar deḳba. Tain zudi deḳoin, i daud-ḳauzli sitri gese, te sul ba rum oldia oise ki na ita ar forikka ḳorar zorur nae, he to emne-u nafak.
13.37: Oile imame zudi mono ḳoroin, ita zela asil ola-u roise, ar i zagat ḳala ruma uṭer, te buzba, ita bala oigese. He to pak-pakiza ase. Imame tare fak-saf ḳoia elan ḳorba.
13.38: “Kunu beṭa ba beṭir samṛar maze zudi dola soḳsoḳa dag deḳa zae,
13.39: te imame tare forikka ḳori deḳba. Tain zudi deḳoin, tar dag dola fainsha oigese, te iṭa to ḳali dol-fisti oise. Itae kunu ḳeti oito nae, he to fak-saf ase.
13.40: “Ar kunu manshor zudi matar sul foṛia ṭaḳ oizae, te he nafak oito nae.
13.41: Tar matar samnor galar sul foṛia zudi kofalor bae ṭaḳ foṛi zae, te he-o nafak oito nae.
13.42: Oile i ṭaḳ foṛa mata ba ḳofalor maze zudi lalṭi dag deḳa dey, te buzbae, tar mata ba ḳofalo fosa-kusṭo bemar bar oise.
13.43: Ar imam sabe tare forikka ḳoria zudi deḳoin, tar ḳofalo ba matat nafak fosa-kusṭo bemarir laḳan hou dag to fuli gese,
13.44: te buza zaibo, tar nafak fosa-kusṭo bemar oise, he to nafak. Tar matar ou bemaror lagi imame tare nafak koia elan ḳorba.
13.45: “Ar ou laḳan fosa-kusṭo bemar ze manshor oibo, he fara-sira ḳafoṛ findite oibo. Tar matar sul aula-zaula roibo. Tar mukre hijabor laḳan ḳafoṛdi guria sillai sillai koibo, nafak, nafak.
13.46: I bemar tar gotro zotodin roibo, otodin he nafak halote roibo. He Boni Israilor kempor bare eḳla eḳla roibo.
13.47: “Kunu ḳafoṛor maze zudi saba saba dag lage, ulor ḳafoṛ ba suti kafoṛor maze zudi feukni foṛar alamot mile,
13.48: ita ulor ḳafoṛ ba suti kafoṛ bananir ṭana ba tator maze ouk, ba samṛa ar samṛadi banail zekunu zinishor maze zudi feuknir dag mile,
13.49: ar finnor ḳafoṛor ṭana ba tator maze, samṛar kunu zinisho zudi lalṭi ba ḳosua kunuzat dag mile, te ita oilo feuknir alamot. Ila oile imam sabor gese deḳani lagbo.
13.50: Imam sabe ita balamonte forikka ḳori dekia, ou zinishre shat din hoḳolta taki horaia raḳba.
13.51: Bade shat dinor din imame hirbar deḳba. Tain zudi deḳoin, ou ḳafoṛor ṭanat ba tato, ba samṛar zinisho lalṭi ba ḳosua dag baṛise, te hou feukni bemar boṛo marattoḳ, ou zinish to nafak.
13.52: Erlagi i kafoṛ, ba samṛar ou zinish, gamsa ba uṛna zetar maze ila feuknir dag milbo, ita hasribo ḳori hoḳolta zalailite oibo.
13.53: “Oile imame zudi deḳoin, i kafoṛ ba samṛar zinishor dag na sitria eḳoi zagat roise,
13.54: te tain itare fanidi doia dibar hukum diba. Doia hari ou zinishre shat din dusra hoḳolta taki horai raḳba.
13.55: Bade imame hirbar deḳba. Tain zudi deḳoin, i feuknir dag kunubae na sitrile-o agor laḳan rong roise, te ita nafak. Igur ulṭa-baṭiol zekunu galabae i dag rouk, igure aguindi zalailite oibo.
13.56: Oile ita doia deoar bade zudi imame deḳoin, i zagar rong fainsha oigese, te ou zaga siṛia falai dibae.
13.57: Ar doar bade-o zudi ou zinisho hirbar feuknir dag deḳa zae, te buzbae, ita sitri zaoa bemar, erlagi i zinishre aguindi zalailibae.
13.58: Ar ou zinish doar bade zudi deḳoin, ou dag milaigese, te ita hirbar doia harle fak-saf buzbae.
13.59: “Ou niom-ḳanun mania ulor ḳafoṛ, suti kafoṛ ba samṛar kunu zinisho feuknir dag lagle, pak ba nafak koia elan ḳorbae.”

14.2: “Fosa-kusṭo bemarire fak-saf ḳorar din ou niom manio. Imam sabe tare deḳar lagi,
14.3: kempor bare gia forikka ḳoria deḳba. Tain zudi deḳoin he hasau bala oigese,
14.4: te imame hukum diba, fak-saf oa zonor niote zita duiṭa halal faki, debdaru gasor kisu laḳṛi, esub gasor ḍeṭa ar lal suta loia aita.
14.5: Bade imame hukum diba, futor fani taki fani ania maṭir gamlat toa fanir ufre, hou duio fakir mazor eḳṭare zobo ḳorar lagi.
14.6: Zobor bade imame baki hou zita fakire, debdaru gasor laḳṛire, lal sutare ar esub gasor ḍeṭare, futor fanir gamlar ufre zobo ḳora hou fakir lour maze subaiba.
14.7: Ar ou ze bemarire fak-saf ḳora oito, imame tar ufre hou lou shatbar siṭaia hari, tare fak-saf ḳoia elan ḳorba. Bade imame hou zita fakire kula zagat saṛi diba.
14.8: Ar fak-saf bonra ou bemarie tar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doibo, tar gotror ar matar hoḳol sul-rum ḳamaia hari fani dia naite oibo, teu he fak-saf bonbo. Erbade he aia Boni Israilor kempor bitre hamaito farbo, oile tar nizor tambur bare shat din roite oibo.
14.9: Bade shat dinor din hirbar tar shorilor hoḳol sul, mani matar sul, daṛi-mus, sokur buri ar gotror hoḳol ruma ḳamaite oibo. Bade tar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doia naia harle he furafur fak-saf oibo.
14.10: “Bador din he furafur nikut duiṭa meṛa-baichcha ar eḳ bosoror egu meṛi loia aibo. Ar er logor dan-gomor sodgar niote he soy sher tel maḳail moyda ar eḳ faoa tel anbo.
14.11: Ania harle tar fak-safor lagi ze imam sabe ḳam ḳorra, ein ou zonre ar kurbanir mal-samanare Milon-tambur duaror gese Mabudor samne azir ḳorba.
14.12: “Imam sabe hou duio meṛa-baichcha taki egu meṛa ar hou tel nia dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbani adae ḳorba, ḳoria dulona kurbani hishabe Mabudor samne ita dulaiba.
14.13: Bade fobitro Kaba goror shimanar ze zagat gunar koforar kurbani ar zalail kurbanir foshu zobo ḳora oy, hou zagat ou foshure-o zobo ḳorba. Gunar koforar kurbanir laḳan dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbanir gust-o imam sabe faiba, ita to ḳas fobitro gust.
14.14: Ze zonre fak-saf ḳora oibo, imam sabe dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbanir kisu lou nia tar ḍain ḳanor lotit, ḍain ator ar ḍain faor buṛi angulit lagaiba.
14.15: Bade imame hou tel taki kisu tel tan bau ator talur maze ḍaliba.
14.16: Ar ḍain ator anguil dia, bau at taki tel tulia Mabudor name shatbar siṭaiba.
14.17: Bade ator talur bad-baki tel taki kisu tel nia imame hou zonor ḍain ḳanor lotit, ḍain ator ar ḍain faor buṛi angulit dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbanir lour ufre lagaiba.
14.18: Ar ator talur baki tel tain hou fak-saf oa zonor matat lagaiba. “Ar ou nomunae tar kofora adae ḳorba,
14.19: ze zonre fak-saf ḳora oibo, tar ana gunar koforar kurbanir foshure imam sabe zobo ḳorba. Bade zalail kurbanir foshu-o zobo ḳoria,
14.20: dan-gomor sodgar zinishor loge milaia, imam sabe kurbani kanar ufre ita diba. Ou nomunae tar kofora adae ḳoria tar nafaki horaiba.
14.21: “Oile ou zon zudi gorib oy, ita hoḳolta anar tofik tar na taḳe, te dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbanir lagi kali egu meṛa-baichcha ante oibo, anle imame tar kofora adae ḳorar lagi oḳṭare kurbani dia dulaiba. Ar er logor dan-gomor sodga hishabe tar ana tel maḳail dui sher moyda, eḳ faoa tel
14.22: ar tar duiṭa ḍufi faki ba faro ante oibo, zela tar takkote kulae. Duio fakir mazor eḳṭa gunar koforar kurbanir lagi, ar eḳṭa zalail kurbanir lagi.
14.23: Bade aṭ dinor din fak-saf oar niote he ita hoḳolta ania Milon-tambur duaror daro Mabudor samne imamor gese shomzaite oibo.
14.24: Imame dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbanir meṛa ar ou tel nia Mabudor samne dulona kurbani hishabe dulaiba.
14.25: Bade imame meṛare zobo ḳoria ogur kisu lou nia hou zonor ḍain ḳanor lotit, ḍain ator ar ḍain faor buṛi angulit lagaiba.
14.26: Bade hou tel taki kisu tel tan bau ator talur maze ḍaliba.
14.27: Ar ḍain ator anguil dia imame bau ator kisu tel tulia Mabudor samne shatbar siṭaiba.
14.28: Erloge tar ḍain ḳanor lotit, ḍain ator ar ḍain faor buṛi angulir ze zagat dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbanir lou lagail oise, hou zagar ufre ou tel-o lagaiba.
14.29: Mabudor samne hou fak-saf oa zonor koforar niote imamor ator baki tel tar matat ḍali diba.
14.30: Bade hou zonor takkot mafik ana ḍufi ba faro zuṛa nia,
14.31: imame egure gunar koforar kurbani hishabe, ar dusraṭare zalail kurbani hishabe kurbani diba. Loge dan-gomor sodgare-o diba. Imame ou nomunae Mabudor samne tar kofora adae ḳorba.
14.32: Fosa-kusṭo bemari fak-saf oar lagi zelaḳan kurbani adae ḳorar ḳota, ita adae ḳorar takkot zerar nai, tarar lagi ou niom deoa oise.” Feukni foṛa gor
14.33: Bade Mabude Musa ar Harunre ḳoila,
14.34: “Ami ze deshḳanre tumrar malikanae dimu, ou Kenan desho hamanir bade, ami zudi honor kunu goror maze nafak-feukni bemar faṭai,
14.35: te goror malike gia imam sabre ḳoiba, amar goro nafak-feuknir laḳan kita zanu dekiar.
14.36: Teu imame i feukni forikka ḳoria deḳat aia, goror hoḳol mal-samanare zate nafak koia elan ḳora na lage, ou niote tain malikre hukum diba, ami goro hamanir age tumar goror hoḳol mal-samana bare bar ḳorilao. Hoḳolta bar ḳoria harle tain goro hamaia forikka ḳorba.
14.37: Tain zudi deḳoin, goror oalor kunu feuknir dag gia bitredi hamaise, ar ou dagor rong kosua ba lalṭi,
14.38: te tain i gor taki baroi aia, goror duar shat din bond ḳori toiba.
14.39: Ou shat din bade hirbar forikka ḳori deḳba, zudi deḳa zae, i dag oalor maze aro sitrise,
14.40: te tain hukum diba, ou oalor dag ala fattor ba iṭ kulia hari, gau ba ṭaunor bare nia nafak kunu zagat falai dita.
14.41: Bade asta goror bitoror hoḳol oal sasia astor tulia hari, ota nia ṭaunor bare nafak kunu zagat falaita.
14.42: Ar oalor ze zaga taki fattor ba iṭ kula oise, hono noya fattor lagaiba, lagaia asta gor hirbar noya astor ḳorta.
14.43: “Oalor fattor kulia falaia sasia astor tular bade, noya astor lagaia harle-o zudi oalo hirbar ola dag deḳa zae,
14.44: te imame hirbar gia ita forikka ḳori deḳba. Tain zudi deḳoin, oalor mazor dag sitria aro baṛse, te buzba, ou goro nafak-feukni bemar ase, erlagi i gor ḳan nafak.
14.45: Nafak ou goror hoḳol fattor ba iṭ, hoḳol astor, goror laḳṛi, hokkolta bangia ṭaunor bare kunu nafak zagat nia falaite oibo.
14.46: “Ar hou shat din bond raḳar ḳalo zudi kunu manush gia i goro hamae, te he ou din hainja forzonto nafak halote roibo.
14.47: Ar ḳeu zudi ou goro ḳana-fina ḳae ba gumae, te tar finnor ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doia dite oibo.
