4.7: Fobitro ruṭi raḳar ṭebulor ufre tara lilua rongor ekkan ḳafoṛ bisaia, oḳanor ufre huru-boṛo hoḳol tal-bashon, ar shorbot-fanir sodga ḍalibar zog-mog toiba. Fobitro zeta ruṭi hamesha ṭebulor ufre toa taḳe, ita ṭebulor ufre-u roibo.
4.8: Otar ufre lal ekkan ḳafoṛ bisaia, fuʼr samṛadi oḳanre guriba, ar ṭebul boia nibar benda guin zaga moto harai diba.
4.9: Bade lilua ekkan ḳafoṛdi asta serag dani, er serag oḳol, seragor fita saf ḳorar simṭa, zalail fitar sali toar baṭi ar telor fifare guria diba.
4.10: Hoḳol mal-samana shomet serag danire fuʼr samṛadi beraia, boia nibar ḳaṭiar ufre toiba.
4.11: Ar agor-kushboy zalanir shunar ṭebulor ufre lilua ekkan ḳafoṛ bisaia, fuʼr samṛadi guria diba, bade ou ṭebul boia neoar benda guin zaga moto haraiba.
4.12: Ebadot ḳanar kezmotor hoḳol mal-samana tara lilua ḳafoṛdi fesaia, fuʼr samṛadi guria hari, ota boia nibar ḳaṭiar ufre toiba.
4.13: “Kurbani kanar bitoror hoḳol sali falaia, baingoni rongor ekkan gilafdi guria diba.
4.14: Bade kurbani kanar hoḳol mal-samana oḳol, ortat angra toar fatil, gust tular boṛo ḳaṭa-sif, sali tular boṛo samos, lou toar baṭi, ita hoḳolta kurbani kanar ufre toiba. Toia fuʼr samṛadi guria dia, er benda guin ṭik zagat haraiba.
4.15: Harun ar tar fuainte zebla ou fak-fobitro zinish oḳol ar ebadot ḳanar mal-samana hoḳolta guriliba, tara tambu tulia soforo baronir lagi zebla tiar oiziba, ou shomoy ota boia nibar lagi Kahati oḳol aiba. Oile tara kunu fak-fobitro sizre atdi soita farta nae, soile-u morba. Milon-tambur ou hokkol zinish tara boia niba.
4.16: “Ar imam Harunor fua Ali-Azoror ufre serag danir tel, zalanir lagi agor-kushboy, fortidinor dan-gomor sodga ar ḳelafoti shomzibar telor dayitto roibo. Allar gor, goror hoḳol mal-samana, mani ebadot ḳana ar tar hoḳol mal-samanar todarki roibo Ali-Azoror ufre.”
4.17: Erbade Mabude Hozrot Musa ar Harunre ḳoila,
4.18: “Tumra kial rakio, Lebi kandanor maze Kahati bongsho taki keu ḳeu zate hor-hamesha taḳoin.
4.19: Tara zanu ḳas fobitro siz oḳlor ḳasat gia na more borong basia roy, otar lagi Harun ar tar fuainte amar goror bitre gia zarzir ḳam-ḳaz buzai diba. Ar ḳe kita boia nita, ota-o ṭik kori diba.
4.20: Oile Herem Shorifor bitoror ou fak-fobitro zinish eḳ foloḳor lagi-o deḳar niote Kahati oḳol bitre kunu laḳan-u hamaita farta nae, ou niote hamaile-u mori zaiba.” Zarsuni oḳlor day-dayitto
4.22: “Tumi gusṭi ar foribar mafik Zarsuni oḳolre gono.
4.23: Tish taki foinchash bosor boyoshor zeta Zarsuni beṭainte Milon-tambur ḳam ḳorta farba, ḳali tarare gonio.
4.24: “Milon-tambur kezmot ḳora ar bar boar shomoy Zarsuni oḳlor ḳam oilo,
4.25: amar goror hoḳol fordain, Milon-tambu ar er gilaf, tar ufror fuʼr samṛar sani, ar Milon-tambur duaror forda boia neoa.
4.26: Erloge Allar gor ar kurbani kanar uṭanor sairo galar forda ar er doṛi oḳol, uṭano hamanir geiṭor forda, otar logor dorḳari hoḳol mal tara boia niba, ar ou befare zoto ḳam-ḳaz ase, ita tara ḳorba.
4.27: Bar boibar ḳam ouk ba oinno kunu ḳam ouk, hoḳolta Harun ar tar fuaintor hukum mafik Zarsuni oḳole ḳorba. Tara kita kita boia nito, ita tumra-u tarare ḳoia dibae.
4.28: Ota-u oilo Milon-tambur ḳamo Zarsuni oḳlor day-dayitto. Tarar ḳam-ḳazor todarki korba imam Harunor fua Isamare. Mararia oḳlor day-dayitto
4.29: “Tumra gusṭi ar foribar mafik Mararia oḳlor foriman gono.
4.30: Tish taki foinchash bosor boyoshor zeta Mararia beṭainte Milon-tambur ḳam ḳorta farba, tumra ḳali tarare gonio.
4.31: Milon-tambur maze Mararia oḳlor dayitto oilo, Allar goror hoḳol freim, freimor batti, kuṭi ar kuṭir tolor sungi boia neoa.
4.32: Erloge sairo galar uṭanor hoḳol kuṭi ar sungi, uṭanor forda ṭananir fereg ar doṛi ar otar logor mal-samana zeta dorḳari ita hoḳolta tara boia niba. Tara ḳe kita boia nito, ita tumra ḳoia dio.
4.33: Ota-u oilo Milon-tambur maze Mararia gusṭir day-dayitto. Tarar ḳam-ḳazor todarki korba imam Harunor fua Isamare.” Lebi kandanor manush gona
4.34: Teu gusṭi ar foribar mafik Hozrot Musa, Harun ar Boni Israilor shordar oḳole Kahati oḳolre gonila.
4.35: Tish taki foinchash bosor boyoshi zeta beṭainte Milon-tambur ḳam-ḳaz ḳorar ḳota, ḳali tarare gonila.
4.36: Gonia tarar gusṭi mafik dui azar shat-sho foinchash zon faoa gelo.
4.37: Era-u asla Kahati gusṭir muṭ manush, zera Milon-tambur ḳam-ḳaz ḳorta. Musa nobir marfote Mabudor batail hukum mafik Musa ar Harune tarare gonila.
4.38: Gusṭi ar foribar mafik Zarsuni oḳolre gona oisil.
4.39: Tish taki foinchash bosor boyoshor zeta beṭainte Milon-tambur ḳam-ḳaz ḳorar ḳota,
4.40: gusṭi ar foribar mafik tarare gonia hari dui azar soy-sho tish zon faoa gelo.
4.41: Era-u asla Zarsuni gusṭir muṭ manush, zera Milon-tambur ḳam-ḳaz ḳorta. Mabudor hukum mafik Musa ar Harune tarare gonila.
4.42: Gusṭi ar foribar mafik Mararia oḳolre gona oisil.
4.43: Tish taki foinchash bosor boyoshor zeta beṭainte Milon-tambur ḳam-ḳaz ḳorar ḳota,
4.44: gusṭi mafik tarare gonia tin azar dui-sho zon faoa gelo.
4.45: Era-u asla Mararia gusṭir muṭ manush, zera Milon-tambur ḳam-ḳaz ḳorta. Hozrot Musar marfote faoa Mabudor hukum mafik Musa ar Harune tarare gonila.
4.46: Gusṭi ar foribar mafik Hozrot Musa, Harun ar Boni Israilor murobbi oḳole asta Lebi kandanre gonila.
4.47: Tish taki foinchash bosor boyoshi zeta beṭainte Milon-tambur kezmot ar mal-samana boia nibar ḳota,
4.48: gusṭi mafik tarare gonia aṭ azar fas-sho ashi zon faoa gelo.
4.49: Hozrot Musar marfote Mabudor batail hukum mafik era forteḳ zonor ḳam-ḳaz ar ḳe kita boia nita, hoḳolta buzai deoa oisil. Mabudor deoa hukum mafik Musa nobie Lebi kandanre gonila.

5.1: Mabude Musare ḳoila,
5.2: “Tumi Boni Israilre ou hukum deo, tara zanu kemp taki hoḳol fosa-kusṭo bemarire bar ḳori dey, ar hoḳol nomunar datu bemari, mora lash soia zera nafak oise tarare-o kemp taki bar ḳori deuk.
5.3: Beṭa ba beṭi ouk, ogure kemp taki bar ḳori dibae. Boni Israilor kemp zate era nafak na banae, ou niote otare bar ḳori dibae, zano to, shoyong ami Boni Israilor maze boshot ḳori.”
5.4: Teu Boni Israile ola ḳorla. Mabude Musare zela hukum disla, tara ṭik oula-u ḳorla. Tara nafak hoḳol manshore kemp taki bar ḳori dila. Ḳeti-furon dibar ain
5.5: Bade Mabude Musa nobire ḳoila,
5.6: “Tumi Boni Israilre zanai deo, kunu manshe zudi Mabudor naformani koria dusra manshor ḳeti kore, te he beṭa ba beṭi oile-o nichchoy dushi.
5.7: He tar gunar shikarukti dite oibo. Ar he ze manshor ḳeti korse, tare shullo-ana ḳeti-furon dite oibo. Ze zinishor ḳeti korse, ḳeti-furon hishabe ou zinishor mul damor loge aro fas baṭor eḳ baṭ beshi dite oibo.
5.8: Ḳeti-furon neoar zuka manush zudi na roin ar tar kunu afon zon na taḳoin, te ita Mabudor faona oibo. Ou ḳeti-furon ar gunar koforar kurbanir meṛaṭa imam sabe faiba.
5.9: Boni Israile fak-fobitro zoto zinish imamor gese loia aiba, ita hokkolta-u imame faiba.
5.10: Forteḳ zonor kurbani deoa zinish imame faiba. Imamor ato ze zinish deoa oibo, ita imamor-u oibo.” Zinar shondoy ala beṭintor bisar
5.11: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila,
5.12: “Tumi Boni Israilre zanai deo, ḳeuror bou zudi ku-fote zaegi,
5.13: ar zamaire lukaia aroḳ beṭar loge zina ḳoria oshoti bone, tair zamaie ikan na zane ba itar kunu shakki-o na taḳe, tai kunu dora na-o ḳae.
5.14: Erbade-o zamaie boure shondoy ḳorilae, tar bitre oshanti korer, kiba boue kunu oshoti kam na ḳorle-o zamaie ḳali taire shondoy ḳore, erlagi tar monor maze oshanti hamaizae,
5.15: te zamaie tar boure loia imam sabor gese zaite oibo. Zaoar shomoy tar bour torof taki sodga hishabe dui sher barlir moyda nite oibo. Ou moyda oilo shondoyor lagi sodga, Mabudor samne oforad zair ḳorar sodga, erlagi itar maze kunu tel ba kushboydar loban mishani nished.
5.16: “Imame ou beṭar boure Mabudor samne ḳaṛa ḳoraiba.
5.17: Ar maṭir ek gamlar maze kisu fobitro fani borba, boria Allar goror bitoror maṭir ufor taki kisu duil tulia ou fanit saṛiba.
5.18: Beṭire Mabudor samne uba ḳoria harle tain beṭir matar sul kulia diba, ar beṭir oforador hasa-misa zair oar lagi ana sodgar barlir moydare tair ato diba. Dia tan nizor ato loiba hou lannot ḍakia anar titta fani.
5.19: Fani loia imame ou beṭire ḳosom ḳoraia ḳoiba, ‘Tumar biar bade zudi kunu beṭae tumar loge zina na ḳore, ba ku-fote gia tumi oshoti na o, te ou lannot anar titta fanie zanu tumar kunu ḳeti na oy.
5.20: Oile biar bade ku-fote gia dusra kunu beṭar loge zina ḳoria zudi oshoti o,’
5.21: —oḳan ḳoia imame ou beṭire nizor ufre lannot ḍakia anar ḳosom ḳoraia hari hirbar ḳoiba— ‘Te Mabude tumare ou gozob deukka, tumar nari-ongo nistez oizauk, ar tumar feṭ fulia muṭa oizauk. Teu ita dekia tumar shomazor manshe zekunu boddua ar lannoti kosom ḳaoar shomoy tumar nam tara iad ḳorbo.
5.22: Ar ou lannot anar fani tumar shorilo hamaia zanu ola ḳam ḳore, zate tumar feṭ fulizae ar tumar nari-ongo nistez oizae.’ Teu beṭie ḳoibo, ‘Amin, ola-u ouk.’
5.23: “Imame ou lannot ana ḳosmor ḳota eḳ samṛar ufre lekia hari, fani ḍalia ou leḳar ḳali titta fanit falaiba.
5.24: Lannot anar ou titta fani beṭire ḳaoanir bade beṭir feṭo kub zala-zontrona foyda oibo.
5.25: Imame foyla ou beṭir at taki shondoyor sodgar moyda nia Mabudor samne dulaia kurbani kanat loia zaiba.
5.26: Bade tain fura sodgar bodla ou moyda taki nishana hishabe eḳ muiṭ foriman nia kurbani kanat zalaiba, ar hou titta fani beṭire ḳaoaiba.
5.27: Beṭie zudi zamair loge beimani koria oshoti oia taḳe, te i fani kaoar bade-u tair feṭo kub zala-zontrona oibo. Tair feṭ fulia muṭa oibo, ar nari-ongo nistez oia aṭkura bonizibo, manshe lannot dibar niote tair nam loiba.
5.28: Oile tai zudi oshoti na oia ni-oforadi roy, te tai i lannot taki kalas faibo, ar hurutta zonom deoar ḳemota-o zari roibo.
5.29: Zamai-bour shondoyor bishoye Allar ain to ola. Kunu bou zudi zamair shongsharo roia ku-fote gia oshoti bone,
5.30: ba zamaie tar boure bodmaishir shondoy ḳore, te tarar lagi ou ain. Beṭae tar boure Mabudor samne nibo ar imame ita hoḳolta beṭir ufre bortaiba.
5.31: Teu zamaie tar nalish taki kalas faibo, ar bou hasaror oforadi oile tair shaza boibo.”

6.2: “Tumi Boni Israilre zanai deo, kunu beṭa ba beṭie zudi Naziria etekaf ḳorta sain, mani kali Mabudor ebadot-bondegir lagi alada roar mannot ḳorilae,
6.3: te anguror shorbot ba zekunu nomunar shorab ḳaoa taki tara nichchoy horia taḳte oibo. Anguror shirka ba zekunu nomunar shirka ḳaoa taki-o tara basia roibo. Ar tara taza angur, kismis, ba anguror rosh-o ḳaito nae.
6.4: Mul ḳota oilo, era zotodin Naziria etekafo roibo, otodin angur to duror ḳota, anguror eḳṭa bisi ba baḳol-o tara kunu laḳan-u ḳaito farto nae.
6.5: “Ar zotodinor lagi Naziria etekafor niote nizore alada raḳar mannot ḳorsoin, otodin tarar matat kur-beleiṭ lagani nished. Mabudor name alada roar shomoy era pak-pakiza roite oibo. Matar sul lamba ḳorte oibo.
6.6: I shomoy kunu mora lashor gese zaito farto nae.
6.7: Tarar ma-baba, bai-boin ḳeu mara gele-o nizore nafak korto farto nae, ḳaron erar matar maze to Allar name alada roar nishana sul lagail.
6.8: Tarar i alada roar miad na fura forzonto, pak-pakiza roite oibo.
6.9: “Ar aḳta kunu manush zudi tar samne morizae, te ou morar dae Mabudor name raḳa tar matar sul nafak oizaibo, ar hirbar pak oar lagi shat dinor din tar mata ḳamailite oibo.
6.10: Ar aṭ dinor din he duiṭa ḍufi faki ba duiṭa faro loia Milon-tambur duaro imamor gese zaibo.
6.11: Mora lashor gese gia he nafak oae, oḳon tar nafakir guna mafir lagi imame eḳṭa faki dia gunar koforar kurbani, ar dusra faki dia zalail kurbani adae ḳorba. Ou din-u Mabudor name tar matare noya ḳori pak-pakiza raḳte oibo.
6.12: Ar agor laḳan hirbar Mabudor name alada roar mannot ḳora lagbo. Erloge dush-ḳosurir koforar lagi eḳ bosor boyoshi egu meṛa-baichcha kurbani dibo. Ta-o age zotodin he Mabudor name alada roisil, ita batil oizibo, ḳaron hi shomoy he nafak oigesil.
6.13: “Zekunu zone Mabudor name Naziria etekafor miad fura ḳoria harle, fobitro Milon-tambur duaror ḳandat zaibo.
6.14: Gia Mabudor name zalail kurbanir lagi eḳ bosor boyoshi egu nikut meṛa-baichcha, ar gunar koforar kurbanir lagi eḳ bosor boyoshi egu nikut meṛi-baichcha, erloge salamoti kurbanir lagi egu nikut meṛa ante oibo.
6.15: Otar logor dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodga anbo, erloge nirek guṛidi banail teldi baza eḳ ṭukri fiṭa ar tel maḳail safaṭi banaio. Ita kuntat-u ḳamir mishaio na.
6.16: Imame ita hoḳolta nia Mabudor samne toia hari, gunar koforar kurbani ar zalail kurbanir loge diba.
6.17: Ar salamoti kurbanir meṛar loge-o ola ḳamir saṛa ruṭi diba. Erlogor dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodga adae ḳorba.
6.18: Bade Milon-tambur duaror gese Naziria etekaf ḳorra zonor matar sul ḳamaia, ou sul salamoti kurbanir tolor aguino falaiba.
6.19: Ar Mabudor name raḳa ou sul ḳamanir bade imame kurbanir meṛar shiddo ḳora ekkan gordona ar ṭukri taki kamir saṛa ekkan fiṭa ar ekkan tel maḳail safaṭi nia Naziria etekaf ḳorra zonor ato diba.
6.20: Bade imame ota nia Mabudor samne usa ḳori dulaiba. Ita to fak-fobitro zinish, ita hokkolta imamor faona. Dulaia toa sinar ou gust ar kurbanir foshur ran-o imamor faona. Ita hoḳolta ḳorar bade Naziria etekaf ḳorra ou zone anguror shorbot ḳaita farba.
6.21: “Ita to Naziria etekaf ḳorra zonor lagi ain. Mabudor name alada roia Naziria etekafor niom mafik, ota hoḳolta kurbani dite oibo. Ar zudi tarar shaiddo mafik aro kunta ḳorar niot ḳore, te ota-o ḳorte oibo. Mabudor name alada roar mannot mafik etekafor zoruri hokkolta era adae ḳorbo.” Boni Israilor lagi imam oḳlor dua
6.23: “Tumi imam Harun ar tar fuainre zanai deo, Boni Israilor lagi dua ḳorar shomoy tara zanu ola ḳoin,
6.24: Mabude deukka rohom-borkot, ar ḳoroukka tumrare hefazot.
6.25: Tan nuror rushni tumrar ufre foṛouk, tan meherbani hamesha zari rouk.
6.26: Mabude tan muk kan zanu tumrar bae firain, ar tumrare shae-shanti dan ḳoroin.
6.27: Ou laḳan tara Boni Israilor ufre amar nam loiba, teu ami tarare rohom-borkot dimu.”

7.1: Hozrot Musae Allar gor bananir ḳam shesh ḳoria hari, fobitro tel siṭaia gorre fak-fobitro ḳorla. Ar goror hoḳol mal-samana, kurbani kana ar er logor tal-bashon hokkolta fak-fobitro ḳorla.
7.2: Ou din Boni Israilor baro ḳandanor shordar oḳol nanan zator ufohar loia aila. Era oila zarzir gusṭir fordan manush, tarar dayitto asil gonia alog kora hoḳol manshor deḳa-huna ḳora.
7.3: Mabudor name tara sani ala soyḳan gorur gaṛi, barogu goru loia Allar goror samne aila. Forteḳ shordaror torof taki eḳṭa ḳori goru ar dui zonor torof taki ekkan ḳori gorur gaṛi deoa oilo. Tara ita ania Allar goror samne toila.
7.5: “Tumi tarar ges taki ota shomzia raḳo, zate Milon-tambur ḳamo lagani zae. Lebi kandanor ḳadim oḳlor ḳam buzia tarar maze ota baṭia deo.”
7.6: Erlagi Musae ou gaṛi ar goru oguin Lebi kandanor ḳadim oḳolre baṭia dila.
7.7: Erar maze Lebir foyla fua Zarsunor gusṭir ḳam mafik dukan gorur gaṛi ar sairgu goru tarare dila,
7.8: ar aroḳ fua Mararir gusṭir ḳam buzia tarare dila sair ḳan gaṛi ar aṭgu goru. Imam Harunor fua Isamare ou ḳamor todarki korla.
7.9: Oile Lebir fua Kahator gusṭire ita kunta dila na, ḳaron niom asil tara ḳali fak-fobitro siz oḳol deḳa-huna ḳora, ar otare ḳando ḳori boia neoa.
7.10: Kurbani kanat fobitro tel siṭanir shomoy, ikanre boail ḳorar niote shordar oḳole zarzir boḳshish loia aila. Ania kurbani kanar samne toila.
7.11: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Forteḳ din eḳ eḳ shordare kurbani kanare boail ḳorar niote tan boḳshish ania shomzaiba.”
7.12: Foyla din Ehuda ḳandanor shordar Aminadabor fua Nahishe tan boḳshish loia aila.
7.13: Tain dan-gomor sodgar lagi ebadot ḳanar mafe eḳ-sho tish tola uzonor rufar ekkan tal, ar shottoir tola uzonor rufar ek gamla ania dila, ou tal ar gamlat bora asil dan-gomor sodgar niote tel maḳail moyda.
7.14: Agor-kushboye bora dosh tola uzonor shunar eḳṭa baṭi,
7.15: zalail kurbanir lagi eḳṭa bisal, eḳṭa meṛa, eḳ bosor boyoshi egu meṛa-baichcha,
7.16: gunar koforar kurbanir lagi egu sagol,
7.17: salamoti kurbanir lagi dugu goru, fasgu meṛa, fasgu sagol ar eḳ bosor boyoshi fasgu meṛa-baichcha anla. Ita oilo Aminadabor fua Nahishor ufohar.
7.18: Dui nombor din Isaḳor ḳandanor shordar Sugaror fua Notonele boḳshish loia aila.
7.19: Tain dan-gomor sodgar lagi ebadot ḳanar mafe eḳ-sho tish tola uzonor rufar ekkan tal, ar shottoir tola uzonor rufar ek gamla ania dila, ou tal ar gamlat bora asil dan-gomor sodgar niote tel maḳail moyda.
7.20: Agor-kushboye bora dosh tola uzonor shunar eḳṭa baṭi,
7.21: zalail kurbanir lagi eḳṭa bisal, eḳṭa meṛa, eḳ bosor boyoshi egu meṛa-baichcha,
7.22: gunar koforar kurbanir lagi egu sagol,
7.23: salamoti kurbanir lagi dugu goru, fasgu meṛa, fasgu sagol ar eḳ bosor boyoshi fasgu meṛa-baichcha anla. Ota asil Sugaror fua Notonelor ufohar.
7.24: Tin nombor din Sobulon ḳandanor shordar Helonor fua Iliabe boḳshish loia aila.
7.25: Tain dan-gomor sodgar lagi ebadot ḳanar mafe eḳ-sho tish tola uzonor rufar ekkan tal, ar shottoir tola uzonor rufar ek gamla ania dila, ou tal ar gamlat bora asil dan-gomor sodgar niote tel maḳail moyda.
7.26: Agor-kushboye bora dosh tola uzonor shunar eḳṭa baṭi,
7.27: zalail kurbanir lagi eḳṭa bisal, eḳṭa meṛa, eḳ bosor boyoshi egu meṛa-baichcha,
7.28: gunar koforar kurbanir lagi egu sagol,
7.29: salamoti kurbanir lagi dugu goru, fasgu meṛa, fasgu sagol ar eḳ bosor boyoshi fasgu meṛa-baichcha anla. Ota asil Helonor fua Iliabor ufohar.
7.30: Sair nombor din Ruben ḳandanor shordar Shadiuror fua Alisure boḳshish loia aila.
7.31: Tain dan-gomor sodgar lagi ebadot ḳanar mafe eḳ-sho tish tola uzonor rufar ekkan tal, ar shottoir tola uzonor rufar ek gamla ania dila, ou tal ar gamlat bora asil dan-gomor sodgar niote tel maḳail moyda.
7.32: Agor-kushboye bora dosh tola uzonor shunar eḳṭa baṭi,
7.33: zalail kurbanir lagi eḳṭa bisal, eḳṭa meṛa, eḳ bosor boyoshi egu meṛa-baichcha,
7.34: gunar koforar kurbanir lagi egu sagol,
7.35: salamoti kurbanir lagi dugu goru, fasgu meṛa, fasgu sagol ar eḳ bosor boyoshi fasgu meṛa-baichcha anla. Ota asil Shadiuror fua Alisuror ufohar.
7.36: Fas nombor din Shimion ḳandanor shordar Shuroshadayor fua Shalumile boḳshish loia aila.
7.37: Tain dan-gomor sodgar lagi ebadot ḳanar mafe eḳ-sho tish tola uzonor rufar ekkan tal, ar shottoir tola uzonor rufar ek gamla ania dila, ou tal ar gamlat bora asil dan-gomor sodgar niote tel maḳail moyda.
7.38: Agor-kushboye bora dosh tola uzonor shunar eḳṭa baṭi,
7.39: zalail kurbanir lagi eḳṭa bisal, eḳṭa meṛa, eḳ bosor boyoshi egu meṛa-baichcha,
7.40: gunar koforar kurbanir lagi egu sagol,
7.41: salamoti kurbanir lagi dugu goru, fasgu meṛa, fasgu sagol ar eḳ bosor boyoshi fasgu meṛa-baichcha anla. Ota asil Shuroshadayor fua Shalumilor ufohar.
7.42: Soy nombor din Sadu ḳandanor shordar Duelor fua Iliasofe boḳshish loia aila.
7.43: Tain dan-gomor sodgar lagi ebadot ḳanar mafe eḳ-sho tish tola uzonor rufar ekkan tal, ar shottoir tola uzonor rufar ek gamla ania dila, ou tal ar gamlat bora asil dan-gomor sodgar niote tel maḳail moyda.
7.44: Agor-kushboye bora dosh tola uzonor shunar eḳṭa baṭi,
7.45: zalail kurbanir lagi eḳṭa bisal, eḳṭa meṛa, eḳ bosor boyoshi egu meṛa-baichcha,
7.46: gunar koforar kurbanir lagi egu sagol,
7.47: salamoti kurbanir lagi dugu goru, fasgu meṛa, fasgu sagol ar eḳ bosor boyoshi fasgu meṛa-baichcha anla. Ota asil Duelor fua Iliasofor ufohar.
7.48: Shat nombor din Afraim ḳandanor shordar Amihudor fua Alishamae boḳshish loia aila.
7.49: Tain dan-gomor sodgar lagi ebadot ḳanar mafe eḳ-sho tish tola uzonor rufar ekkan tal, ar shottoir tola uzonor rufar ek gamla ania dila, ou tal ar gamlat bora asil dan-gomor sodgar niote tel maḳail moyda.
7.50: Agor-kushboye bora dosh tola uzonor shunar eḳṭa baṭi,
7.51: zalail kurbanir lagi eḳṭa bisal, eḳṭa meṛa, eḳ bosor boyoshi egu meṛa-baichcha,
7.52: gunar koforar kurbanir lagi egu sagol,
7.53: salamoti kurbanir lagi dugu goru, fasgu meṛa, fasgu sagol ar eḳ bosor boyoshi fasgu meṛa-baichcha anla. Ota asil Amihudor fua Alishamar ufohar.
7.54: Aṭ nombor din Manosha ḳandanor shordar Fatoshuror fua Gomoliele boḳshish loia aila.
7.55: Tain dan-gomor sodgar lagi ebadot ḳanar mafe eḳ-sho tish tola uzonor rufar ekkan tal, ar shottoir tola uzonor rufar ek gamla ania dila, ou tal ar gamlat bora asil dan-gomor sodgar niote tel maḳail moyda.
7.56: Agor-kushboye bora dosh tola uzonor shunar eḳṭa baṭi,
7.57: zalail kurbanir lagi eḳṭa bisal, eḳṭa meṛa, eḳ bosor boyoshi egu meṛa-baichcha,
7.58: gunar koforar kurbanir lagi egu sagol,
7.59: salamoti kurbanir lagi dugu goru, fasgu meṛa, fasgu sagol ar eḳ bosor boyoshi fasgu meṛa-baichcha anla. Ota asil Fatoshuror fua Gomolielor ufohar.
7.60: Noy nombor din Bin-Iamin ḳandanor shordar Zidaunir fua Abidane boḳshish loia aila.
7.61: Tain dan-gomor sodgar lagi ebadot ḳanar mafe eḳ-sho tish tola uzonor rufar ekkan tal, ar shottoir tola uzonor rufar ek gamla ania dila, ou tal ar gamlat bora asil dan-gomor sodgar niote tel maḳail moyda.
7.62: Agor-kushboye bora dosh tola uzonor shunar eḳṭa baṭi,
7.63: zalail kurbanir lagi eḳṭa bisal, eḳṭa meṛa, eḳ bosor boyoshi egu meṛa-baichcha,
7.64: gunar koforar kurbanir lagi egu sagol,
7.65: salamoti kurbanir lagi dugu goru, fasgu meṛa, fasgu sagol ar eḳ bosor boyoshi fasgu meṛa-baichcha anla. Ota asil Zidaunir fua Abidanor ufohar.
7.66: Dosh nombor din Dan ḳandanor shordar Amishadar fua Akiazare boḳshish loia aila.
7.67: Tain dan-gomor sodgar lagi ebadot ḳanar mafe eḳ-sho tish tola uzonor rufar ekkan tal, ar shottoir tola uzonor rufar ek gamla ania dila, ou tal ar gamlat bora asil dan-gomor sodgar niote tel maḳail moyda.
7.68: Agor-kushboye bora dosh tola uzonor shunar eḳṭa baṭi,
7.69: zalail kurbanir lagi eḳṭa bisal, eḳṭa meṛa, eḳ bosor boyoshi egu meṛa-baichcha,
7.70: gunar koforar kurbanir lagi egu sagol,
7.71: salamoti kurbanir lagi dugu goru, fasgu meṛa, fasgu sagol ar eḳ bosor boyoshi fasgu meṛa-baichcha anla. Ota asil Amishadar fua Akiazaror ufohar.
7.72: Egaro nombor din Ashir ḳandanor shordar Ukranor fua Foziele boḳshish loia aila.
7.73: Tain dan-gomor sodgar lagi ebadot ḳanar mafe eḳ-sho tish tola uzonor rufar ekkan tal, ar shottoir tola uzonor rufar ek gamla ania dila, ou tal ar gamlat bora asil dan-gomor sodgar niote tel maḳail moyda.
7.74: Agor-kushboye bora dosh tola uzonor shunar eḳṭa baṭi,
7.75: zalail kurbanir lagi eḳṭa bisal, eḳṭa meṛa, eḳ bosor boyoshi egu meṛa-baichcha,
7.76: gunar koforar kurbanir lagi egu sagol,
7.77: salamoti kurbanir lagi dugu goru, fasgu meṛa, fasgu sagol ar eḳ bosor boyoshi fasgu meṛa-baichcha anla. Ota asil Ukranor fua Fozielor ufohar.
7.78: Baro nombor din Noftali kandanor shordar Inanor fua Ahire boḳshish loia aila.
7.79: Tain dan-gomor sodgar lagi ebadot ḳanar mafe eḳ-sho tish tola uzonor rufar ekkan tal, ar shottoir tola uzonor rufar ek gamla ania dila, ou tal ar gamlat bora asil dan-gomor sodgar niote tel maḳail moyda.
7.80: Agor-kushboye bora dosh tola uzonor shunar eḳṭa baṭi,
7.81: zalail kurbanir lagi eḳṭa bisal, eḳṭa meṛa, eḳ bosor boyoshi egu meṛa-baichcha,
7.82: gunar koforar kurbanir lagi egu sagol,
7.83: salamoti kurbanir lagi dugu goru, fasgu meṛa, fasgu sagol ar eḳ bosor boyoshi fasgu meṛa-baichcha anla. Ota asil Inanor fua Ahiror ufohar.
7.84: Te fobitro tel dia kurbani kanare boail ḳorar shomoy Boni Israilor shordar oḳole zeta dan ḳorsla ita oilo, baro ḳan rufar tal, baroṭa rufar gamla ar baroṭa shunar baṭi.
7.85: Ebadot ḳanar mafe forteḳ rufar talor uzon asil eḳ-sho tish tola ar gamlar uzon asil shottoir tola. Rufar hoḳol tal-bashonor muṭ uzon asil dui azar sair-sho tola.
7.86: Agor-kushboye bora forteḳ shunar baṭir uzon asil dosh tola, shunar baroṭa baṭir muṭ uzon asil eḳ-sho bish tola.
7.87: Zalail kurbanir lagi muṭ barogu bisal, barogu meṛa ar eḳ bosor boyoshi barogu meṛa-baichcha-o era dan ḳorsla. Ar erlogor dan-gomor sodgar hoḳol zinish. Gunar koforar kurbanir lagi muṭ barogu sagol deoa oisil.
7.88: Salamoti kurbanir lagi muṭ sobbishgu goru, shaiṭgu meṛa, shaiṭgu sagol, eḳ bosor boyoshi shaiṭgu meṛa-baichcha. Fobitro tel siṭaia hari kurbani kanare boail ḳorar shomoy ufohar hishabe i hoḳolta deoa oisil.
7.89: Erbade Musa nobie zebla-u Mabudor loge batchit ḳorar lagi Milon-tambut hamaita, ou shomoy shahadot shondukor ḍaḳnar ufre ze duio Karubi roin, erar mazḳan taki tan buli hunta. Mabude ou nomunae Musa nobir loge batchit ḳorta.

8.2: “Tumi Harunre ḳo, amar goror serag danir mazor shatoṭa serag ou nomunae lagaita, zate seragor for serag danir samna bae foṛe.”
8.3: Harune ola-u ḳorla. Musare batail Mabudor hukum mafik tain hoḳol serag olaḳan boaila, zate seragor for serag danir samnedi foṛe.
8.4: Serag danir tol taki agar ful forzonto astaṭa ḳaṭi shuna fiṭaia banail oilo. Mabude Musare zela noksha deḳaisla, ṭik ou laḳan serag dani banail oilo. Lebi kandanre pak-pakiza ḳora
8.6: “Tumi Boni Israilor maz taki, Lebi kandanre alog koria pak-pakiza ḳoro.
8.7: I pak-pakiza ḳorar niom oilo, foyla tarar ufre fak-fobitro oar fani siṭaia dibae, siṭaia tara nize asta shorilor sul ḳamaia ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doia fak-saf bonba.
8.8: Ar tara kurbanir lagi egu bisal anba, bisalor loge dan-gomor sodgar lagi tel maḳail moyda, gunar koforar kurbanir lagi-o aroḳṭa bisal anaio.
8.9: Bade tumi Lebi oḳolre loia Milon-tambur samne aibae, aia hokkol Boni Israilre hono dola ḳorbae.
8.10: Lebi oḳolre tumi Mabudor dorbaro azir ḳorbae ar hoḳol Boni Israile tarare ataia shofia diba.
8.11: Imam Harune hoḳol Boni Israilor fokko taki, dulona kurbani hishabe Lebi oḳolre Mabudor samne boḳshia diba, teu tara Mabudor kezmoto ḳam-ḳaz ḳorta farba.
8.12: Bade Lebi oḳole hou duio bisalor ḳollar ufre atai diba, dile tumi er eḳṭa dia gunar koforar kurbani ar dusraṭa dia zalail kurbani adae ḳorio. Olaḳan Lebi oḳlor nafakir kofora adae oibo.
8.13: Tumi Lebi oḳolre Harun ar tar fuaintor samne uba ḳoraia, Mabudor name tarare dulona kurbani hishabe shofia dibae.
8.14: Ou laḳan tumi oinno Boni Israil taki Lebi kandanre alog korbae, teu tara ḳali amar oiba.
8.15: “Lebi oḳolre pak-pakiza ḳoria dulona kurbani hishabe shofia dia harle, tara Milon-tambur kezmoto aiba.
8.16: Boni Israil taki basia alog kora i Lebi kandan ḳali amar, ar ḳeuror nae. Forteḳ Israili beṭintor foyla fuar bodla ami Lebi kandanre amar nizor banaisi.
8.17: Boni Israilor goro zonom loa hoḳol foyla fuain amar. Ami Mishori oḳlor foyla fuaintore marilibar ḳalo, Boni Israilor forteḳ foyla fuare amar lagi fobitro ḳoria raḳsi, ita manshor fut ouk ba foshur baichcha ouk, ita to amar.
8.18: Ar oḳon ami Boni Israilor foyla fuaintor zagat ḳali Lebi oḳolre amar nizor ḳoia kobul ḳorsi.
8.19: Ou Lebi oḳolre ami Harun ar tar fuaintore shomzaisi, zate tara Boni Israilor oia Milon-tambur kezmot ḳoroin, tarar gunar koforar usilla ḳoroin. Erlagi Boni Israilor ḳeu amar goror ḳandat aile-o tar ufre kunu gozob lamto nae.”
8.20: Mabude Lebi oḳlor befare Musa nobire zela hukum disla, ou hukum mafik Musa, Harun ar hoḳol Boni Israile ola ḳorla.
8.21: Lebi oḳole nizore fak-saf ḳoria hari tarar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ-o toila. Bade Harune tarare Mabudor name dulona kurbani hishabe shofia dila, ar tarare pak-pakiza ḳorar niote tarar gunar koforar bebosta ḳorla.
8.22: Erbade Lebi oḳol-o Harun ar tan fuaintor zimmae Milon-tambur ḳadimdarit gela. Gele Mabude Musare Lebi oḳlor befare zela hukum disla, ṭik oula ḳora oilo.
8.24: “Lebi oḳlor befare ou niom salu oibo, tarar maze fosish bosor ba tar beshi boyoshi manshe Milon-tambur ḳam-ḳaz ḳorba,
8.25: oile foinchash bosor oia harle tara oboshor failiba, kezmot ḳam bad dilaiba.
8.26: Ou shomoy tara nizor ate Milon-tambur kunu ḳam ḳora nished, oile tarar mone saile baiaintore Milon-tambur ḳamo shae-shaijjo ḳorba. Ou niome tumi Lebi oḳlor ḳam-ḳaz ṭik kori dibae.”

9.1: Boni Israil zati Mishor desh taki baronir dusra bosoror foyla sando, Sinai morubumit Mabude Musa nobire bataila,
9.2: “Boni Israile zanu ṭik shomoye Azadi Id adae ḳoroin.
9.3: Tara ou sandor souddo tarik hainja bala amar niom-ḳanun mania id adae ḳorte oibo.”
9.4: Mabudor hukum faia Musae Boni Israilre zanaila Azadi Id adae ḳorar lagi.
9.5: Erdae tara foyla sandor souddo tarik hainja bala Sinai morubumit ou id adae ḳorla. Mabude Musare zelaḳan hukum disla, tara ṭik olaḳan hoḳolta ḳorla.
9.6: Oile tarar maze ḳoyzone mora lashre soia nafak oae, ou din Azadi Id ḳorto farlo na. Erlagi ou din-u tara Musa ar Harun nobir gese gia azir oila.
9.7: Tara Musare zikaila, “Mora lash soae amra nafak oisi, erlagi Boni Israilor loge ṭik shomoy Mabudor name kurbani ditam fartam na ḳene?”
9.8: Musae zuaf dila, “Tumrar befare Mabudor hukum na zana forzonto tumra bar sao.”
9.10: “Tumi Boni Israilre ḳo, tara ba tarar bongshor ḳeu zudi mora lashre dora-soar ḳarone nafak bonizae, ba musafir halote lamba soforo taḳe, te tara-o Mabudor name Azadi Id adae ḳorta farba.
9.11: Dusra sandor souddo tarik hainja bala tara ou id ḳorba. Azadi Idor gustor loge ḳamir saṛa ruṭi ar titta hag furaia ḳaiba.
9.12: Bian forzonto kunuzat ḳani zoma raḳa nished, kurbanir gustor zekunu aḍḍi banga nished. Azadi Idor ou hoḳol niom-ḳanun tara mante oibo.
9.13: Oile zera pak-pakiza halote ase, ar zera soforor maze nae, ila kunu zone zudi Azadi Idor kurbani na dey, te Mabudor ṭik kora shomoye kurbani na deoae, tar zati taki tar nam miṭailibae. Tar gunar shaza he faite oibo.
9.14: “Boni Israilor maze boshot ḳorra bideshi kunu manshe zudi Mabudor name Azadi Id adae ḳorto sae, te ḳorto farbo. Oile ou idor niom-ḳanun mania adae ḳorte oibo. Boni Israil ba bin-deshi hoḳole-u eḳoi niom mante oibo.” Allar kudroti megor kuṭi
9.15: Allar gor shahadot tambu zedin ḳaṛa ḳora oilo, ou din kudroti megor kuṭi aia asta gorre gurililo. Hainja taki bian forzonto hara rait i megor kuṭire nuror agunir laḳan deḳa gelo.
9.16: Erbad taki ola oilo, Allar gor dinor bala hamesha megor kuṭie gura roito, ar raitor bala mono oito ita nuror agunir kuṭi.
9.17: Ar fobitro tambur ufre taki megor kuṭi zebla horto, ou shomoy Boni Israil oḳol soforo bar oita, bade zeno gia ou kuṭi tir oito, tara oḳano-u tambu oḳol gaṛita.
9.18: Mabudor hukume tara soforo bar oita ar tan hukume-u sofor bond ḳoria tambu gaṛita. Allar goror ufre zotoboil megor kuṭi roito, tara otoboil kempor bitre roita.
9.19: Allar goror ufre megor kuṭi beshi din roile, Mabudor hukum mania tara kunu soforo bar oita na.
9.20: Maze maze megor kuṭi Allar goror ufre tuṛa din roito. Boni Israil to Mabudor hukume kempo roita ar tan hukume-u hirbar soforo bar oita.
9.21: Ar maze maze ḳali hainja taki bian forzonto megor kuṭi roito. Biane megor kuṭi horigele tara soforo bar oita. Dino ba rait zekunu shomoy megor kuṭi horar loge loge-u tara soforo bar oita.
9.22: Zotodin megor kuṭi Allar goror ufre roito, otodin tara kempo roita, soforo bar oita na. Ita dui din ouk, eḳ mash ba er beshi oile-o bar oita na, ḳali megor kuṭi horar bade tara soforo bar oita.
9.23: Mabudor hukume tara kemp gaṛita ar tan hukume-u soforo roana oita. Musa nobir marfote faoa hukum mafik, tara Mabudor ou niom mania solta.

10.2: “Tumi rufar fat fiṭaia duiṭa sunga banao. Boni Israilre ekḳano dola ḳorar niote ḍakibar lagi ou sunga bazaio, tarar nanan dol soforo roana oar bala-o tumi oguin bazaio.
10.3: Ou duio sunga zebla eḳloge bazani oibo, ou shomoy hoḳol Boni Israil tumar samne Milon-tambur duaror gese aia dola oiba.
10.4: Oile eḳṭa sunga bazani oile ḳali Boni Israilor nanan ḳandanor shordar oḳol tumar samne aia dola oiba.
10.5: Foyla bar sunga bazaile Milon-tambur fubedi zera tambu ṭangaise, tara roana diba.
10.6: Dusra bar bazaile douknor galar dol oḳol roana diba. Ikṭa to soforo roana dibar shongkeṭ.
10.7: Te hoḳol manshore dola ḳorar lagi tumi duio sunga bazaio, oile er shur oibo alada roḳomor.
10.8: Ou sunga bazaiba imam Harunor bongshor imam oḳole. Iṭa tumrar lagi ar tumrar bongshodoror lagi-o siroḳalin niom.
10.9: “Nizor desho gia harle tumra zebla kunu zulumbaz dushmonor loge laṛait bar oibae, ou shomoy duio sunga bazaia shongkeṭ dibae. Teu tumrar Mabud Allae tumrar bae kial ḳoria dushmonor at taki tumrare basaiba.
10.10: Tumrar kushi-bashir onusṭano, tumrar hoḳol ido, sandor foyla din zebla zalail kurbani ba salamoti kurbani dibae, ou shomoy-o sunga bazaio. Ou aoaz hunle tumrar Allae tumrar bae souk firaiba. Mono rakio, ami Alla-u tumrar Mabud.” Boni Israilor sofor shuru
10.11: Boni Israil zati Mishor taki baronir dusra bosoror dusra sandor bish tarik shahadot tambu mani Allar goror ufre taki kudroti megor kuṭi horigelo.
10.12: Ou shomoy Boni Israile Sinai morubumi taki roana dila. Hou megor kuṭi Faran morubumit aia tir na oa forzonto tara solat-u roila.
10.13: Musa nobir mazdi Mabudor hukum faia, tara foyla bar ou soforo roana oila.
10.14: Foyla-u Ehudar fotaḳar tino ḳandanor nanan fouzi dole roana dila, erar neta asla Aminadabor fua Nahish.
10.15: Erar maze Isaḳor ḳandanor manshor dayitto asil Sugaror fua Notonelor ufre,
10.16: ar Sobulon ḳandanor manshor dayitto asil Helonor fua Iliabor ufre.
10.17: Bade Allar goror hoḳolta kula oilo, teu Zarsuni ar Mararia oḳole oḳanor hoḳolta boia loia roana dila.
10.18: Erar bade Rubenor fotaḳar tino ḳandanor fouzi dole roana dila, erar shordar oila Shadiuror fua Alisur.
10.19: Erar maze Shimion ḳandanor dayitto asil Shuroshadayor fua Shalumilor ufre,
10.20: ar Sadu ḳandanor dayitto asil, Duelor fua Iliasofor ufre.
10.21: Erar bade Allar goror fak-fobitro mal-samana loia Kahati oḳole roana dila. Kahati oḳol zagat gia fosar age-u Allar gor ḳaṛa ḳorar ḳota asil.
10.22: Erbade Afraim fotaḳar tino fouzi dolor manshe roana dila, erar shordar oila Amihudor fua Alishama.
10.23: Er maze Manosha ḳandanor dayitto asil Fatoshuror fua Gomolielor ufre.
10.24: Ar Bin-Iamin ḳandanor dayitto asil Zidaunir fua Abidanor ufre.
10.25: Hoḳol heshe roana oila Dan fotaḳar tino ḳandanor fouzi dolor manshe, tarar shordar oila Amishadar fua Akiazar. Erar samnor hoḳol fouzi dolre fara dia tarar ḳore ḳore roila.
10.26: Er maze Ashir ḳandanor dayitto asil Ukranor fua Fozielor ufre,
10.27: ar Noftali kandanor dayitto asil Inanor fua Ahiror ufre.
10.28: Ou laḳan Boni Israilor nanan fouzi dol eḳe eḳe roana oila.
10.29: Erbade Musae Madian deshor tan hour Shuaib nobir fua Hubobre ḳoila, “Mabude amrare ze desh dibar oada ḳorsoin, amra hou desho zairamgi. Te tumi-o amrar loge ao. Mabude to oada ḳorsoin, tain Boni Israilre bout meherbani korba. Oḳon tumi amrar loge aile amra tumare kub maya-doya ḳormu.”
10.30: Hubobe zuaf dila, “Na, ami zaitam nae. Ami amar desho nizor manshor gese firia zaimugi.”
10.31: Oile Musae ḳoila, “Na, na, tumi amrare falaia zaio na. Tumi-u amrar fot deḳaora zon. Morubumir maze kun zagat amrar tambu gaṛa usit, ita to tumar zana ase, erlagi tumi-u oilae amrar souk.
10.32: Huno, tumi zudi amrar loge ao, te Mabude amrare zoto meherbani korar oada ḳorsoin, tumare-o otar baṭ dimu.”
10.33: Ou laḳan Boni Israile Mabudor faṛ taki roana oia tin dinor fot aguai gela. Ar ziraibar lagi ekkan zaga tukaia bar ḳorar kiale, Mabudor hou fobitro shahadot shonduk tin din dori tarar age age gelo.
10.34: Kemp taki roana oar bade, dinor bela Mabudor gaibi megor kuṭi Boni Israilor ufre roito.
10.35: Ou shahadot shonduk roana oile-u Musae ḳoita, “O Mabud, soloukka. Tumar dushmon oḳol sairobae sitri zauk, tumare zetae ingshain, ita tumar samon taki bagouk.”
10.36: Ar zebla ou shonduk tamizito, tain ḳoita, “O Mabud, laḳ laḳ Boni Israilor gese tumi firia ao.”

11.1: Boni Israile nizor duk-koshṭor lagi bezar oia boḳa-zoḳa ḳorla. Erlagi Mabude tarar ita hunia gusa oigela. Tain gozobi aguin faṭaila ar ou aguin tarar maze zolilo, ete kempor kinarar kisu ongsho aguine zoligelo.
11.2: Erdae tara Musa nobir gese gia ḳanda-ḳaṭi lagaila, teu Musae Mabudor dorbaro dua ḳorae aguin nibi gelo.
11.3: Mabudor aguin tarar maze zolchil ḳori, ou zagar nam oigelo Tabera. Shoḳor ḳani na faoae boḳa-zoḳa ḳora
11.4: Boni Israilor loge oinnainno zatir zeta manush asla, tara dusra zator mozar kunu ḳanir lagi fagol bonigela, ar erar deḳa-deki Boni Israile-o hirbar ḳanda-ḳaṭi kori koila, “Ish, amra zudi gust ḳaitam fartam!
11.5: Mishoro taḳte to bina foyshae magna mas ḳaitam, hono tormuz, fiaz-roshun, kira, hag-torḳari hokkolta ḳaitam, ita oḳono mono foṛer.
11.6: Oile oḳon amrar ḳoilja hukai gese. Ino to ḳali manna saṛa ḳaoar ar kunta-u nai.”
11.7: Ou manna deḳte ḍula baḳoror laḳan, er rong oilo kismisor laḳan.
11.8: Manshe sairobae taki manna tukaia ania gail-siadi kuṭia ba hil-faṭadi sesia guṛa ḳorta. Bade ita fatilo una dia ba fiṭa banaia ḳaita. Ita ḳaite teldi banail fiṭar laḳan moza.
11.9: Raitor bala Boni Israilor kempor ashe-pashe kua foṛto, ou kuar loge oia behesti kani manna-o foṛto.
11.10: Musa nobir ḳano ailo, fortek goror manshe zarzir tambur duaror gese ubaia ḳandira. Erdae tain kub bezar oila, ar Mabud-o gusae aguin oigela.
11.11: Teu Musae Mabudre ḳoila, “Tumi kene tumar i gulamre ila bifodo falailae? Ami kita dush ḳorlam, ze ḳarone ota manshor bar amar ḳando dilae?
11.12: Ami kunu tarare feṭo loisi ni, ba tara amar feṭ taki zonmise ni? Tumi tarar baf-dadaintor gese ze desh dibar oada ḳorsilae, tarare hono nibar lagi amare ḳene tarar falok-bafor laḳan banaiso, ar tarare kulo ḳori nibar ḳota ḳene ḳoirae?
11.13: Ita manshor ḳanir lagi ami oḳon gust kuai faitam? Tara amar gese ḳali gust gust ḳoia sillaira.
11.14: Tarar zimma neoa boṛo moshkil, amar eḳar fokke i zimma neoa shombob nae.
11.15: Tumi zudi amare i moshkilo falao, te tumar duai dia ḳoiar, oḳon-u amare zane marilao. Ar ḳoiram, ami zudi tumar rohomotor tole taki, te nizor souke nizor behalloti dosha amare deḳaio na.” Shottoir zon murobbie ḳemota faila
11.16: Teu Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Boni Israilor maze tumi zarare murobbi neta ar ijjoti hishabe sino, erar maz taki shottoir zon murobbi netare loia amar gese ao. Tumi tarare ḳo, tara Milon-tambur gese aia tumar loge ubaita.
11.17: Ami hono lamia aia tumar loge batchit ḳormu. Tumar maze Allar ze ruhu asoin, ou ruhu ami tarar ufre-o dan ḳormu. Manshor zimmadari boia nite tara-o tumare shaijjo ḳorba. Teu tumar eḳla boa lagto nae.
11.18: Ar tumi ota manshore zanai deo, tara fak-fobitro oia ḳailkur lagi zuit roita, ḳail-u tara ḳanir gust faiba. Tara to gustor lagi Mabudor dorbaro ḳanda-ḳaṭi koria ḳoisil, Mishoro taḳte-u tara arame asil. Te ḳail Mabude tarare gust diba ar tara ḳaiba.
11.19: I gust ḳali eḳdin-duidin, fasdin-doshdin, ba bishdin nae,
11.20: fura eḳ mash bori kaiba. Ḳaite ḳaite tarar naḳedi bar oibo, bade ar zane kulaito nae. Ami ila goṭaimu, ḳaron tumrar loge ze Mabud boshot ḳoroin, ou Mabudre tumra mancho na. Tan samne ḳanda-ḳaṭi koria ḳoiso, Mishor taki horia aoa bule tumrar lagi ṭik oise na.”
11.21: Ikan hunia Musae ḳoila, “Ḳali zuddo ḳorar zuka-u to soy laḳ manush amar loge asoin, ar tumi koirae fura eḳ mash bori tarare gust ḳabaibae.
11.22: Te hokkol goru-meṛa zobo ḳorle-o to oto manshor fuito nae, ar doriar hoḳol mas maria anille-o kulaito nae.”
11.23: Mabude zuaf dila, “O Musa, Mabudor kudroti bol oto ḳomzur ni? Te tumi deḳbae, ami tumare zeta ḳoisi, ita hasa, na misa.”
11.24: Teu Musa bare gela, gia ota manshore Mabudor hukum zanaila. Ar Boni Israilor shottoir zon murobbi netare ania Milon-tambur sairobae ḳaṛa ḳoraila.
11.25: Ou shomoy gaibi megor saḳat oia Mabud lamia aila, aia Musa nobir loge batchit ḳorla. Musar ufre Allai ze ruhu asla, Mabude ou shottoir zon netar ufre-o ou ruhur kisu ongsho dila. Ou ruhu tarare dan ḳorar bade, tara kisu shomoy sufi-dorbeshor eshki bab deḳaila, oile bade ar ila oise na.
11.26: Ar ou shottoir zon murobbi netar mazor duizon murobbi kempor bitre roigela, erar nam Ildad ar Midad, tara Milon-tambur gese gesla na. Tebou Allai ou ruhu tara-o faila, faia tara kempor bitre roia sufi-dorbeshor eshki bab deḳaila.
11.27: Ita dekia eḳ zuan beṭae douṛaia gia Musare ḳoila, “Huzur, hunchoin ni? Ildad ar Midad namor duio murobbie kempor bitre sufi-dorbeshor eshki bab deḳaira.”
11.28: Ou shomoy Nunor fua Iusae Musare ḳoila, “O amar malik, afne erare nished deukka.” Ou Iusa zuankir shuru taki-u Musa nobir ḳas ḳadim asla.
11.29: Musae enre ḳoila, “Amar man-shomman-u tumar gese boṛo oigelo ni? Ami sairam, Mabudor hoḳol bondae-u sufi-dorbeshi faukka, ar Mabude afon ruhu tarare dan ḳoroukka.”
11.30: Erbade Musa ar Boni Israilor murobbi neta oḳol kempo firia gelagi. Kuel fakir gust ḳaoa
11.31: Bade Mabudor hukume boṛo eḳ tufan ailo. Ou tufane doriar far taki kuel faki ṭelia ania kempor sairo gala borai dilo. Eḳdinor fot foriman zaga fakie borigelo. Fakir fal maṭi taki dui at usa tub oia, gis lagia foṛi roilo.
11.32: Teu hou din, hou rait, ar bador asta din manshe bare gia kuel fakin tubaia anla. Tara forteḳe ḳompokke foinchash mon ḳori faki dola ḳorlo. Fakin dola ḳoria kempor sairobae tara boaia toila.
11.33: Oile fakir gust tarar muko haranir loge loge-u Mabud gusae aguin oigela. Gusa ḳoria tain bezuita gozobi bemar ḍalila.
11.34: Erlagi i zagar nam deoa oilo Kibrut-Hutaba, mani lalosi oḳlor ḳoybor, ḳaron ou lalosi oḳolre manshe ono ḳoybor disil.
11.35: Erbade tara Kibrut-Hutaba saṛia gelagi, gia Hazirut namor zagat roila.

12.1: Hozrot Musae Itiopia deshor eḳzon beṭire bia ḳorsla. Enre bia ḳorae Musar boin Moriom ar bai Harune Musar birudde mat-ḳota matila.
12.2: Tara ḳoila, “Mabude ḳali Musar marfote matoin ni? Amrar usillae-o matoin na ni?” Ikan Mabude hunla.
12.3: Ashole Musa nobi to asla eḳzon gorima saṛa manush. Zogotor maze ila gorima saṛa ar kunu manush asil na.
12.4: Musar birudde Harun ar Moriomor mat-ḳota hunia-u Mabude Musa, Harun ar Moriomre ḳoila, “Tumra tinozon bar oia Milon-tambur gese ao.” Teu era tinozon ono aila.
12.5: Ou shomoy Mabude-o kudroti megor saḳat oia lamia aila, aia Milon-tambur duaror ges taki Harun ar Moriomre ḍakila. Tara aguaia aile
12.6: Mabude ḳoila, “Tumra amar ḳota huno. Tumrar maze kunu pir-dorbesh taḳle, ami Mabude doroshonor mazdi amar nizore tar gese zair ḳori ar kuabe tar loge batchit ḳori.
12.7: Oile amar gulam Musar loge ila ḳori na. He amar asta shongsharor hoḳol taki bishashi zon.
12.8: Ami tar loge samna-samni oia kula-kuli batchit ḳori, kunuta batuni raki na. Ami Mabude ze surote tare didar dei, he amare ola deḳe. Erbade-o tumra amar gulam Musar birudde matite ḍorailae na ni?”
12.9: Erlagi Harun ar Moriomor ufre Mabud gusae aguin oigela, oia tain horia gelagi.
12.10: Megor saḳa zebla Milon-tambu taki ufre uṭigelo, ou shomoy deḳa gelo, Moriomor asta gotro fosa-kusṭo bemare dudor laḳan dola oigese. Harune Moriomor bae saia ou halot deḳla.
12.11: Dekia tain Musare ḳoila, “O amar malik, amra na buzia ze guna ḳorilisi, i kosuri kan tumi mono rakio na.
12.12: Maʼr feṭo taki zonom oar bala ze huruttar ordeḳ shoril koy oigese, tumi Moriomre ila banaio na.”
12.13: Teu Musae ḳandia Mabudor dorbaro aroz ḳorla, “O Alla, tumi amar boinor bemar shifa ḳori deo.”
12.14: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tair bafe zudi tair muko ḳali sef falaita, te shormaia tai shat din goror bare roilo one na ni? Ola shatdin taire kempor bare alog raḳo, bade bitre anbae ne.”
12.15: Erlagi Moriomre shat din kempor bare horai toila. Enre bitre anar ag forzonto manshor soforo baroni bond roilo.
12.16: Bade Boni Israil oḳol Hazirut saṛia Faran morubumit gia kemp gaṛila.

13.2: “Boni Israilre ami ze Kenan desh ditam sairam, ou deshor hal-hokikot dekia aoar lagi tumi baro ḳandan taki baro zon shordar faṭao.”
13.3: Mabudor hukum faia Musae ola-u ḳorla. Tain Faran morubumi taki zerare faṭaila, era hoḳol-u Boni Israilor shordar.
13.4: Era oila: Ruben ḳandanor Zakuror fua Shammua,
13.11: Iusufor fua Manosha ḳandanor Sushir fua Gaddi,
13.15: ar Sadu ḳandanor Makir fua Guzoyel.
13.16: Kenan deshor hal-hokikot zania aibar lagi guia hishabe Musa nobie erare faṭaila. Tain Nunor fua Husiare Iusa ḳoia ḍakita.
13.17: Kenan desho faṭanir bala Musae tarare ḳoila, “Tumra Negeb morubumir mazedi gia faṛia elaḳat hamaibae.
13.18: Hamaia deḳbae, ou deshḳan kila. I deshor bashinda manush ḳom na beshi, tara ḳomzur na boloban.
13.19: Tarar deshḳan bala na mondo? Deshor ṭaun oḳol usa baunḍori oal ḳora, na baunḍori saṛa?
13.20: Hinor maṭit rosh ase ki na, gas-fala ase ki na? Ar aoar shomoy dekio, farle hou deshor kunu fol-mul loia aio.” Ou shomoy to angur faḳar shomoy aise.
13.21: Teu tara Zin morubumi taki shuru ḳoria Hamator bae Rahob forzonto gia asta deshor hal-hokikot dekia aila.
13.22: Zaoar ḳalo tara Negeb morubumi oia Hebron ṭauno gia azila. I Hebron ṭaun banail oisil Mishor deshor Suan ṭaun bananir shat bosor age. Hino foyluan Anaki kandanor tinzon manush asil, erar nam oilo Ahiman, Shisai, ar Talmai.
13.23: Bade ou guia oḳol Ashkul namor faṛia ḳalor faro taki eḳ soṛi angur shudda asta eḳ lot ḳaṭia loia aila. I anguror soṛi tarar duizone bang dia boia anla. Loge kisu anuar ar ḍumur fol-o anla.
13.24: Boni Israilor shordar oḳole hon taki ou anguror soṛi kaṭae ou zagar nam oigelo, Ashkulor ḳal, mani soṛir ḳal.
13.25: Asta Kenan deshor hal-hokikot dekia hari, sallish din bade tara hoḳol firia aila. Kenan deshor befare guiar ripoṭ
13.26: Ou guia oḳol Faran morubumir Kadesh namor zagat firia aila, ono Musa nobi, imam Harun ar Boni Israil oḳol asla. Era aia hoḳolre honor ḳobor-antor zanaila ar hou deshor fol-mul deḳaila.
13.27: Tara Musare ḳoila, “Afne amrare ze desho faṭaisla, amra hono gia deḳlam, hi deshḳan hasau dud ar mour banḍar-ala desh. Ou deḳoukka, hou deshor fol.
13.28: Oile hinor manush kub foyluan ar tarar ṭaun-o boṛo boṛo ar usa baunḍori kora. Amra Anaki foyluan ḳandanor manshore-o hono deḳsi.
13.29: Amaleki oḳol boshot ḳoroin Negeb morubumit. Hiṭṭi, Zibuzi ar Amuri oḳol faṛi elaḳat roin. Ar Kenani oḳlor ḳeu ḳeu doriar ḳandat ar ḳeu ḳeu Zordan gangor faro roin.”
13.30: Ou shomoy Musar samne zeta manush dola asla, Kalute erar shurgul tamaia ḳoila, “Amrar lagi zorur oilo hono gia ou desh doḳol ḳora, ar ita amra farmu-o.”
13.31: Ikan hunia tan logor guia oḳole ḳoila, “Na, na, ita manshor loge laṛai kora amrar lagi oshombob, ita amra taki bout bolala.”
13.32: Era hou deshor befare mongoṛa misa matia ḳoila, “Amra ze desh deḳat geslam, i deshe tar proza oḳolre gilia ḳailae. Hinor manush kub usa-muṭa foyluan.
13.33: Amra hino Nefili zator manshore-o deḳsi, ita deḳte doitto-danobor laḳan. Amra to tarar gese tuchcho fifṛar laḳan, tara-o amrare ola fifṛa mono ḳorse.” Zano to, oḳonkur Anaki zati ou Nefili oḳlor bongshodor.

14.1: Ikan hunia hoḳol Boni Israile silla-silli lagailo. Tara hara rait ḳanda-ḳaṭi korlo.
14.2: Hozrot Musa ar Harunor birudde bout ḳota-barta matilo. Tara hoḳole milia Musa ar Harunre ḳoilo, “Haere hae! Amra ḳene hou Mishor desho ba morubumit morlam na? Hono mora-u to bala asil.
14.3: Mabude ḳene amrare zuddor moydano marar niote ou desho nira? Honor dushmon oḳole amrar bou-baichchainre ḳaṛia niba. Er taki Mishoro firia zaoa-u amrar lagi bala nae ni?”
14.4: Tara eḳe-oinne ḳoilo, “Ao, amra eḳzon neta banaia hirbar Mishoro firia zaigi.”
14.5: I halot dekia Musa ar Harun asta Boni Israil shomazor samne maṭit soizdat foṛla.
14.6: Ar ze guia dole ou deshor hal-hokikot dekia aisla, tarar maz taki Nunor fua Iusa ar Zifunnir fua Kalute monor duke nizor gotror ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ siṛilla,
14.7: siṛia Boni Israil shomazor hokkolre ḳoila, “Huno, amra ze desh deḳat geslam, i deshḳan kub shundor.
14.8: Mabud zudi amrar ufre kush ar razi taḳoin, te amrare hou desho nia far ḳorba, tain dud ar mour banḍar-ala ou deshḳan amrare dan ḳorba.
14.9: Huno, tumra Mabudor morzir ulṭa ḳam ḳorio na. Tumra hi deshor manshore ḍoraio na, tarare gilia ḳaite-o amrar deri oito nae. Tumra itare ḍoraio na, tarar matar ufror saya nai, amrar loge to Mabud asoin.”
14.10: Oile tara hoḳole-u ḳoila Iusa ar Kalutre fattor maria marilta. Ou shomoy Milon-tambu taki asta Boni Israil shomazor samne Mabudor kudroti nur zair oilo.
14.11: Mabude ḳoila, “O Musa, itae amare ar ḳotodin elami korbo? Tarar samne oto keramoti nishana deḳanir bade-o, tara ar ḳotodin amare ekin ḳorto nae?
14.12: Te huno, ami tarar ufre boṛo ek gozob ḍalimu, amar oada ḳora hou deshor malikana ḳaṛia nimugi. Bade ami tumar maz taki ita tone aro boloban, aro boṛo noya eḳ zati foyda ḳormu.” Boni Israilor lagi Hozrot Musar minoti
14.13: Ikan hunia Musae ḳoila, “O Mabud, tumi zudi ila ḳoro, te Mishori oḳole ita hunba. Ar tumi to Mishor taki ita manshore tumar nizor kudrotie bar ḳori ancho.
14.14: Oḳon Mishori oḳole i deshor manshore-o ita zanai diba. Te O Mabud, inor manshe to emne-u zanilisoin zen, Boni Israilor loge loge tumi aso, tumare kub daro taki deḳa zae. Tara hunchoin, tumar nuror megor saya erar ufre ase, tumi dinor bala megor kuṭi ar rait oile aguinor kuṭir surote erar age age ro.
14.15: Oḳon tumi zudi era hoḳolre eḳloge marilao, te zoto zatir manshe tumar ita kudroti kamor ḳobor hunche, tara ḳoiba,
14.16: Mabude Boni Israilre ze desh dibar oada ḳorsla, hi desho loia zaoar ḳemota tan nai, erlagi tain erare morubumit nia marilisoin.
14.17: “Te, O din-duniar malik, tumi age zela ḳoislae ola kudroti kam zair ḳoro. Tumi nu ḳoislae,
14.18: Mabude gusa ḳoroin dir gotie, tan maya-mohobbotor kunu shima nai, tain manshor oinnae ar naformanir mafi dein. Oile dushi zonre shaza-o dein, baf-dadar naformanir shaza tar nati-futi forzonto bortain.
14.19: Te tumar duai dia ḳoiram, Mishor desh saṛia aoa taki oḳon forzonto tumi erare zela mafi dirae, tumar hou mayar ḳatire tarar oḳonkur gunare-o ola maf ḳori dilao.”
14.20: Teu Mabude ḳoila, “Aichcha, tumar ḳotae ami itare maf ḳori dilam.
14.21: Oile ami zinda asi ikan zela hasa, asta zogoto amar lila-ḳelae bora iṭa-o zela hasa, ou laḳan aroḳ hasa oilo,
14.22: -23 ita eḳzone-o amar oada ḳora hi desh deḳar shuzug oito nae, ze desh ditam ḳori ami tarar baf-dadar gese oada ḳorslam. Ḳaron itae amar nuror tozolli deḳsoin, tara Mishoro taḳte ar ou morubumit aia-o amar kudroti lila-ḳela deḳar bade-o itae amare manchoin na, borong dosh-doshbar tara amare forikka ḳorsoin. Te tara zotozone amare elami korse, ita eḳzone-o hi desh deḳar ḳofal oito nae.
14.24: Oile amar bonda Kalutor dilor bab ila nae, he amar hukum furafur mane. Erlagi ze desh deḳat he gesil, ami tare hou desho nimu, tar aolad oḳol hi deshor malik oiba.
14.25: Huno, hou deshor faṛia tol zagainto oḳon Amaleki ar Kenani oḳole boshot ḳorra. Te samnor ḳail tumra fisedi gia Akaba shagoror faredi morubumir bae roana oio.” Naforman oḳlor shaza
14.26: Bade Mabude Musa ar Harunre ḳoila,
14.27: “Ou naforman zatie amar birudde ar ḳotodin ber-beri korto? Tara amar birudde zeta mat mater, ita to ami hunchi.
14.28: Oḳon tumra gia Boni Israilre ḳo, ami Mabude nizor zindegir ḳosom ḳaia ḳoiram, ami tumrar mukor zeta mat-ḳota hunchi, ami-o tumrar loge ṭik ola-u ḳormu.
14.29: Manush gonibar shomoy tumrar bish bosor ba tar beshi boyoshor zetare gona oisil, mani zetae amar birudde ber-beri korse, itar lash ou morubumir maze foṛi roibo.
14.30: Ami tumrare ze desh ditam ḳori oada ḳorslam, ḳali Zifunnir fua Kalut ar Nunor fua Iusa saṛa ar ḳeu gia hi desho hamanir ḳofal oito nae.
14.31: Ar tumrar zeta huruttare ḳaṛia neoa oibo ḳoislae, ami ou huruttainre-u hou desho far ḳormu, tara-u oiba hi deshor malik, ze deshre tumra elami korso.
14.32: Oile tumrar lash ou morubumit foṛi roibo.
14.33: Ou morubumir feṭo tumrar ekkere aḳeri zon na mora forzonto, tumrar beimanir lagi tumrar aolad oḳole sallish bosor ono goru-sagolor raḳali korba.
14.34: Kenan deshor hal-hokikot dekia aite ze sallish din lagsil, er eḳ dinor bodla eḳ bosor, oula muṭ sallish bosor tumrar naformanir lagi koshṭo ḳorbae. Teu buzbae, ami zebla ḳeuror birudita ḳori er dosha kila oy.
14.35: Te ami Mabude ḳoiram, ou naforman zatir zeta manshe amar birudde dol bandise, ita hokkolṭi ou morubumit morba.”
14.36: Kenan deshor hal-hokikot zanar lagi Musae ze guia dolre faṭaisla, erar mazor zeguin firia aia beimani kobor roṭaia, hoḳol Boni Israilre dia Musar birudde boḳa-zoḳa ḳoraisil,
14.37: mani zera hou deshor befare aze-baze mat roṭaisil, tara hokkol-u moha gozobi bemare Mabudor samne morigela.
14.38: Ou guia dolor maz taki kali Nunor fua Iusa ar Zifunnir fua Kalut basia roila. Nizor bole Kenan desh doḳolor ichcha
14.39: Hozrot Musae Mabudor ḳota hoḳol Boni Israilre zanaila. Ita hunia tara monor duke ḳator oigela.
14.40: Bador din biane tara hou faṛi elaḳat zaoar lagi tiar oia ḳoilo, “Ou deḳo, amra zairamgi. Amra to guna ḳoria harsi, te oḳon amra Mabudor oada ḳora desho-u zaitamgi.”
14.41: Oile Musae ḳoila, “Tumra Mabudor hukumor ulṭa zairae ḳene? Tumrar niot fura oito nae.
14.42: Huno, tumra zaio na, ḳaron Mabud tumrar loge nae. Dushmon oḳlor gese tumra aribae.
14.43: Hino gia tumra Amaleki ar Kenani oḳlor mukamuki oibae. Ar Mabudor log saṛia gesogi kori, tain tumrar loge roita nae. Erlagi tumra zuddor muko morbae.”
14.44: Tebou tara tan ḳota ulṭaia hou faṛi elaḳa bae roana dilo. Oile Musa tarar loge gela na ar Mabudor fobitro shahadot shonduk-o kempor bitre roigelo.
14.45: Tarare dekia-u hou faṛia elaḳar Amaleki ar Kenani oḳol lamia aia hamla salailo, ar honor Horma ṭaun forzonto ḳedaia nilo.

15.2: “Tumi Boni Israilre zanai deo, ami ze deshḳanre tumrar nizor desh hishabe dan ḳorram, tumra zebla hou Kenan desho zaibae,
15.3: gia amare kush raḳar niote agunit deoa geran ala zekunu kurbani hishabe tumrar fal taki zebla gai-goru ba meṛa-sagol ania amar name dibar niot ḳorbae, ar zalail kurbani, kunu mannot furonor kurbani, hoḳol nomunar nofol kurbani, ba zekunu idor kurbani dile,
15.4: kurbanir forteḳ foshur loge dan-gomor sodga-o dibae. Ou sodgar lagi dui sher moydare eḳ sher teldi maḳaia ḳai banaia anbae.
15.5: Oile kurbanir foshuṭa zudi meṛa-baichcha oy, te iṭar loge shorbot-fanir sodga hishabe anguror eḳ sher shorbot-o dibae.
15.6: Ar ou foshu zudi meṛa oy, te tar loge dan-gomor sodga hishabe shua sher teldi maḳaia sair sher moyda dibae.
15.7: Shorbot-fanir sodgar lagi lagbo anguror shua sher shorbot. Ita ania amare kush ḳorar geran ala kurbani hishabe dite oibo.
15.8: Tumra zudi zalail kurbani, mannot furonor kurbani ba salamoti kurbanir lagi kunu goru loia ao,
15.9: te erloge dan-gomor sodga hishabe soy sher moydare dui sher teldi maḳaia ḳai ante oibo.
15.10: Ar shorbot-fanir sodgar lagi anguror dui sher shorbot-o ante oibo. “Ita oilo agunit deoa kurbani, i kurbanir dumar gerane ami kushi oi.
15.11: Kurbanir fortek goru, meṛa, meṛa-baichcha ba sagolre ou niome kurbani dibae.
15.12: Tumra zoto foriman foshu-u kurbani deo na ḳene, forteḳ foshur loge ou niome sodga-o dibae.
15.13: “Huno, ami Mabudre kush ḳorar niote, zekunu geran ala agunit deoa kurbani adae ḳorar shomoy, forteḳ Boni Israile ou niome kurbani dibae.
15.14: Oinno zatir kunu musafir ba tumrar loge boshot ḳorra kunu bin-deshie zudi, amare kush ḳorar niote agunit deoa geran ala kurbani dito sae, te he-o tumrar laḳan eḳoi niom mante oibo.
15.15: Oarishor for oarish dori ou niom zari roibo. Tumrar shomazor hoḳlor lagi ou niom salu roibo, ita tumra o ba tumrar loge boshot ḳorra bin-deshi oile-o, hoḳlor lagi-u oarishor for oarish dori ou eḳoi niom zari roibo. I befare ami Mabudor gese tumra zela, bin-deshi oḳol-o oula, hoḳol homan.
15.16: Tumrar lagi ar tumrar maze boshot ḳorra bin-deshi oḳlor lagi eḳlaḳan hukum-ahkam ar eḳoi shoriot salu roibo.”
15.18: “Tumi Boni Israilre zanao, ami Mabude tumrare ze desho niar, hono gia harle,
15.19: tumra zebla hou deshor foy-foshol ḳaibae, ou shomoy tumra itar kisu ongsho amar dorbaro sodga hishabe dibae.
15.20: Tumrar ḳetor foyla daoa fosholor moyda dia ekkan ruṭi banaia amar name sodga dibae. Girost-baṛir sodgar laḳan dibae.
15.21: Foyla daoa fosholor ou sodga, oarishor for oarish dori lilla-sodga hishabe tumra amar name dibae. Bule kunu hukum bangile
15.22: “O Musa, tumi Boni Israilre ḳo, ami Mabude tumar mazdi zoto hukum-ahkam disi, tara zudi na zania ota kunu eḳṭa hukum bangilae,
15.23: ita hoḳol hukum to deoar shomoy taki oarishor for oarish dori zari roy,
15.24: te i ozana befarṭa zanar bade-u asta Boni Israil shomaze milia kurbani dite oibo. Tara eḳṭa bisal dia ami Mabudre kush ḳorar niote geran ala zalail kurbani dibo, erloge niom mafik dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodga dibo. Ar gunar koforar lagi egu sagol-o kurbani dibo.
15.25: Imam sabe asta Boni Israil shomazor ou ozana gunar kofora adae ḳorba, teu tara mafi faiba. Tara to ichcha ḳoria i naformani korse na, tarar bulor lagi Mabudor name agunit deoa kurbani ar gunar koforar kurbani-o adae ḳorse.
15.26: Teu asta Boni Israil shomaz ar tarar maze boshot ḳorra bin-deshi manshore-o maf ḳora oibo, zudio tara hoḳole-u i bul-ḳosuri korse.
15.27: “Oile ḳeu zudi kali eḳla bul ḳoria monor ozante kunu naformani korilae, te gunar koforar kurbanir lagi he eḳ bosor boyoshi eḳṭa sagi loia azir oite oibo.
15.28: Ar ze zone monor ozante ou guna ḳorse, imam sabe Mabudor dorbaro tar gunar koforar bebosta ḳorba. Ou kurbani kobul oile he mafi faibo.
15.29: Bul ḳoria monor ozante ze manshe naformani korilae, ou laḳan forteḳ manshor lagi i niom salu roibo, he Boni Israil ouk, ba bin-deshi ouk, eḳoi niome solbo.
15.30: “Oile Boni Israil ba tarar maze boshot ḳorra oinno kunu zatir ḳeu zudi ichcha ḳoria kunu naformani kore, te he shoyong Mabudre beijjot ḳore. Ila naformanir lagi shomaz taki ogur nam miṭailite oibo.
15.31: Mabudor hukumre elami korae ar naformani korae ogur nam miṭailite oibo, tar i gunar dae-bar tar ufre-u bortaibo.” Zummabar na manar shaza
15.32: Boni Israil morubumit soforor ḳalo eḳ Zummabare eḳzon manshore daru tubanit deḳla.
15.33: Zummabare daru tubanit deḳae ou manshe tare doria Musa nobi, imam Harun ar hoḳol Boni Israilor samne loia aila.
15.34: Ou laḳan manshore kita ḳorte oibo, i hukum to Allae oḳono zanaisoin na, erlagi ere tara bondi kori toilo.
15.35: Ou shomoy Mabude Musare zanaila, “Ou manshore zane marilite oibo. Tare kempor bare nia hoḳol Boni Israile fattordi iṭaia marilibae.”
15.36: Teu Musar marfote faoa Mabudor hukum mafik, Boni Israile tare kempor bare nia fattor maria marilla. Ḳafoṛor kunar zazoir
15.38: “Tumi Boni Israilre ḳo, tumra zarzir lebasor faiṛo zazoir lagao, ar zazoiror fortek giṭre lilua sutadi fesaia mul ḳafoṛor loge zuṛa dio. I hukum oarishor for oarish dori manbae.
15.39: I zazoir laganir ḳaron oilo, otar bae saile tumra amar hokkol hukumor ḳota iad ḳoria ota amol ḳorbae. Teu tumra amar loge kunu beimani kortae nae, tumrar souḳor ar dilor bod ḳaishor ato nizore shofitae nae.
15.40: Amar hoḳol hukum-ahkam amol ḳorar ḳota tumrar iad roibo, tumrar Allar name tumra fak-forezgar bondar halote roibae.
15.41: Ami tumrar Mabud Alla. Tumrar Mabud oar kiale, ami tumrare Mishor taki bar ḳori anchi. Ami-u Alla, tumrar Mabud.”

16.1: -2 Lebi kandanor Kurahe Musa nobir birudde dushmoni lagailo. Ou Kurah oilo Kahati gusṭir Izharor fua. Tar loge Ruben ḳandanor Iliabor fua Daton ar Abiram, ar Foletor fua Oune-o Musa nobir birudita ḳorlo. Erar dolo Boni Israilor aro aṛai-sho zon namḳora murobbi neta-o shorik oila.
16.3: Oia tara dol bandia Musa ar Harunre ḳoila, “Tumra to kub beshi baṛabaṛi korrae. Asta Boni Israilor forteḳ manush-u zebla fak-fobitro, Mabud-o tarar loge asoin. Te tumra Mabudor bonda oḳlor ufre ustadi korrae ḳene?”
16.4: Ikan hunia Musa nobi ufoit oia maṭit foṛla.
16.5: Bade tain Kurah ar tar dolor manshore ḳoila, “Ḳail biane-u Mabude deḳaiba, ḳe tan bonda, ar ḳe fak-fobitro. Tain zare fosond ḳoroin, ḳali tarare-u tan ḳasat aite diba.
16.6: -7 O Kurah, huno, tumi ar tumar logor hoḳole ek kam ḳoro, samnor ḳail tumra hoḳole eḳṭa ḳori agor dani loia Mabudor samne agor-kushboy zalao. Tain zare fosond ḳorba, buzilio he-u tan fak-fobitro bonda. Tumra Lebi kandanor manush to beshi baṛigese.”
16.8: Musae tare eoḳan ḳoila, “Tumra Lebi oḳole amar ekkan ḳota huno.
16.9: Tumra mono ḳorrae ni Mabudor Kaba goro ebadoti kora ar shomazor manshor kezmot ḳora ita ekkere huru-muru befar? Huno, Boni Israilor Allae shomazor oinnainno manush taki tumrare basia nia, tan nizor didaro anchoin, zate tumra ou ḳam ḳoro.
16.10: Tain to tumare ar oinnainno Lebi oḳolre nizor daro aibar shuzug disoin, oile tumra dekiar imamotir fodre-o doḳol ḳortae sairae.
16.11: Harun ar kun manush zen, tumra tar birudde boḳa-zoḳa ḳorrae? Tumi ar tumar dolor manshe to Mabudor birudde-u dol bandiso.”
16.12: Erar bade Musae ḳobor dila, Iliabor dui fua Daton ar Abiram aita ḳori, oile tara zanailo, “Amra oto ṭeḳat nae.
16.13: Tumi ou morubumit ania martae ḳori, dud ar mour banḍar-ala hou Mishor desh taki amrare bar ḳori ancho, hi desho to kuntar-u obab asil na. Er bade-o amrar ufre beṭagiri deḳanit lagso.
16.14: Ar tumi to amrare hou laḳan kunu dud ar mour banḍar-ala desho-o niso na, kunu zomi-zoma ba angur baganor malikana-o diso na. Tumi ita manshore anda banaia raḳtae sao ni? Na, amra zaitam nae.”
16.15: Ita hunia Musa kub gorom oia Mabudre ḳoila, “Mabud, tumi erar kurbani kobul ḳorio na. Ami to tarar kunu ḳeti korsi na, tarar egu gada-o ami nisi na.”
16.16: Bade Musae Kurahre ḳoila, “Ḳail tumi ar tumar dolor hoḳol aia Mabudor samne azir oibae. Tumrar loge Harun-o azir oiba.
16.17: Forteḳe aia zarzir agor danit agor-kushboy boria Mabudor name zalaibae. Tumrar aṛai-sho zonor hokkole ola zarzir agor dani zalaio. Erloge tumi ar Harune-o agor-kushboy zalaio.”
16.18: Musar hukum mafik forteḳe zarzir agor danit agor-kushboy ar aguin loia, Milon-tambur duaror samne, Musa ar Harunor loge gia ubaila.
16.19: Kurahe zebla shomazor hoḳol manshore uskaia dola ḳorlo, ḳoria Milon-tambur duaror gese Musa ar Harunor birudde ubailo, ou shomoy tara hokkolor samne Mabudor kudroti nur zair oilo.
16.21: “Ita manshor ges taki tumra hori zao, ami itare sokur foloḳor loge shesh ḳoriliar.”
16.22: Oile Musa ar Harun soizdat foṛia ḳoila, “O Alla, tumi to hoḳol manshor bitre zan deo. Oḳon ḳali eḳzonor naformanir dae asta Boni Israilor ufre tumi gozob ḍalitae ni?”
16.24: “Tumi Boni Israilre zanai deo, tara zanu Kurah, Daton ar Abiramor tambur ges taki hori zain.”
16.25: Ikan hunia Musa soizda taki uṭia Daton ar Abiramor gese gela, tan ḳore oia Boni Israilor murobbi neta oḳol-o gela.
16.26: Tain Boni Israilre ḳoila, “Tumra ou naforman oḳlor tambu taki hori zao, itar kunu mal-samanat soio na. Arnae tarar gunar shazar loge tumrare-o binash ḳora oibo.”
16.27: Ikan hunia Kurah, Daton ar Abiramor tambur ges taki hoḳol manush hori gela. Ermaze Daton ar Abirame tarar bou-baichchain ar huru-boṛo hoḳol huruttain loia aia zarzir tambur duaror gese ubat asil.
16.28: Ou shomoy Musae Boni Israilre ḳoila, “Tumra ou alamot dekia buzilibae, ami zeta ḳoriar ita amar mongoṛa kunta nae. Ou ḳamor lagi Mabude-u amare faṭaisoin.
16.29: Erar moron zudi oinnainno manshor laḳan shababik halote oy, te mono ḳorio, Mabude amare faṭaisoin na.
16.30: Oile Mabude zudi asanoḳ noya kunu ḳam ḳoroin, ou zomine muk kulia tarare ar tarar hoḳoltare zinda gililae, tara zinda halote-u maṭir tolor fatalo zaegi, te buzilio, era Mabudre elami korse.”
16.31: Musae oḳan ḳoar loge loge-u erar faor tolor maṭi faṭia dui baṭ oigelo,
16.32: ar maṭie a ḳoria Kurahor foribaror hoḳolre tarar mal-samana shoho gilililo.
16.33: Mal-samana shudda zinda halote tara maṭir tole gelogi, bade maṭir faṭa bond oigelo. Oula Boni Israil taki tara eḳdom nifat oigelo.
16.34: Tarar sik-sillani hunia sairobae taki hoḳol manush douṛaia bagila, itae sillai sillai douṛaia ḳoila, “Maṭie hoyto amrare-o gililibo.”
16.35: Ar hou ze aṛai-sho zone agor-kushboy zalaia kurbani korsil, Mabudor ges taki gaibi aguin aia itare zalaia sali korillo.
16.37: “Tumi imam Harunor fua Ali-Azorre ḳo, ou zalail zaga taki agor dani guin bar ḳoria, er angra-sali nia tuṛa duroi falanir lagi, i agor dani guin fak-fobitro bonigese.
16.38: Naformanir lagi zeguin morigesoin, ou agor dani to tarar asil. Oile Mabudor samne ita azir ḳora oisil, erlagi i hoḳolṭi fak-fobitro oigese. Te tumi ita bangaia fat banaia fobitro kurbani kanare guria toio. Ita nishana hishabe Boni Israilor gese roibo.”
16.39: Teu aguine zolia zeguin morsila, otar ana fitolor agor dani guin imam Ali-Azore ekḳano dola ḳorla. Bade ota bangaia kurbani kana guria toar fat banaila.
16.40: Mabude Musa nobir mazdi zela hukum disla, ein ou laḳan ḳorla. Ikṭa ḳora oilo zate Boni Israilor mono taḳe zen, ḳali Harunor bongsho saṛa dusra kunu zon, agor-kushboy zalanir lagi Mabudor samne zaito farto nae. Zudi zae, te tar dosha ou Kurah ar tar dolor laḳan oibo.
16.41: Oile bador din-u Boni Israilor manshe Hozrot Musa ar Harunor birudde ber-beri lagailo, tara ḳoilo, “Mabudor bonda oḳolre tumra-u marso.”
16.42: Ar shomazor hoḳol manshe zebla Musa ar Harunor birudita ḳoria Milon-tambur muka guria ubailo, ou shomoy hou gaibi megor kuṭie aḳta-u Milon-tambu guri gelo, Mabudor kudroti nur zair oilo.
16.43: Teu Musa ar Harun Milon-tambur samne gela,
16.45: “Ita manshor ges taki tumra hori zao, ami itare sokur foloḳor loge shesh ḳoriliar.” Ikan hunia-u tara duio zon soizdat foṛla.
16.46: Bade Musae Harunre ḳoila, “Tumar agor dani ato lo, ar kurbani kana taki aguin neo, nia er ufre agor-kushboy zalaia, zoldi kori ota manshor guna mafir kofora adae ḳoro. Mabud to gusae aguin oigesoin, tan lannoti mohamari shuru oigese.”
16.47: Teu Musar ḳotamoto Harune agor danit aguin ar agor-kushboy loia tarar gese douṛaia gela. Er maze-u itar ufre gozob shuru oigesil, oile Harune agor-kushboy zalaia tarar gunar kofora adae ḳorla.
16.48: Tain zinda ar murda zonor mazḳano ubaila, erlagi gozob bond oigelo.
16.49: Kurahor naformanir lagi zeta mara gesla, iguin bade-o aro souddo azar shat-sho manush gozobi mohamarie morla.
16.50: Mohamari bond oia harle Harun Milon-tambur duaror gese Musar daro firia aila.

17.2: “Tumi Boni Israilre ḳo, tara zanu tarar baf-dadar ḳandan hishabe fortek kandanor shordaror ges taki eḳṭa ḳori muṭ baroṭa laṭi ania tumar gese dey. Dile tumi zarzir laṭir ufre ou zonor nam leḳbae.
17.3: Lebi kandanor laṭit lekio imam Harunor nam, ola baf-dadar ḳandan mafik fortek kandanor shordaror lagi eḳoṭa laṭi taḳbo.
17.4: Milon-tambur bitre fobitro shahadot shondukor samne ze zagat tumrar loge amar deḳa oy, ou laṭiguin hono toio.
17.5: Teu amar fosond ḳora bondar laṭir maze gasor ḳeng fuṭibo. Ou laḳan tumrar birudde Boni Israilor ber-beri kora ami bond ḳormu.”
17.6: Teu Musae ita hoḳolta Boni Israilre zanaila. Ar tarar baf-dadar ḳandan mafik forteḳ shordare zarzir ḳandanor torof taki egu ḳori, muṭ baro ḳandanor baroṭa laṭi ania dila. Ou laṭintor egu laṭi asil Harun nobir.
17.7: Musae ou laṭiguin nia shahadot tambur bitre Mabudor samne toila.
17.8: Bador din Musa gia shahadot tambur bitre hamaia deḳoin, Lebi kandan taki Harunor name ze laṭi raḳa oise, i laṭit ḳali keng nae, kuṛi dia ful fuṭia badam-o dorilise.
17.9: Teu Musae Mabudor samne taki laṭi guin bar ḳori ania Boni Israilor samne toila. Shordar oḳole laṭi guin deḳla, dekia zarzir laṭi sinia nila.
17.10: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Birudi naforman oḳlor mono roar lagi nishana hishabe tumi Harunor laṭiṭa hirbar shahadot shondukor samne to. Teu amar birudde tarar bokbok kora ḳan tumi bond ḳortae farbae, tara-o ar morta nae.”
17.11: Mabude Musare zela hukum dila, Musae ṭik ola ḳorla.
17.12: Ita dekia Boni Israile Musare ḳoila, “Amra to morizaiar, binash oiziar, amrar shorbonash oizar!
17.13: Zekunu manush Mabudor goror daro gele-u morizar, te amra hoḳol-u morizimu ni?”

18.1: Mabude Harun nobire ḳoila, “Fobitro ebadot ḳanar befare zoto naformani kora oibo, er day-dayitto bortibo tumar ufre, tumar fuain ar tumar gusṭir hoḳlor ufre-o. Ar imamoti kamor bala zoto laḳan naformani kora oibo, itar dayi oibae ḳali tumi ar tumar fuain.
18.2: Te tumar baf-dadar ḳandan taki aro Lebi oḳolre tumi ano. Tara aia tumare ar tumar fuainre shahadot tambur samnor ebadoti kamo shaijjo ḳorba. Tara tumar zimmae roia shahadot tambur hoḳol ḳam-ḳaz ḳorba.
18.3: Oile kurbani kana ba Allar goror kunu fobitro zinishor daro zaoa tarar lagi nished. Nished na manle tara ar tumra hoḳol-u morbae.
18.4: Tara tumar ḳamo shorik oia Milon-tambur ḳadimdari korba, hoḳol zat ḳamor day-dayitto niba. Ta-o ḳali Lebi oḳol saṛa dusra ḳeu tumrar gese zaoa nished.
18.5: Boni Israilor ufre ami zanu hirbar naraz na oi, erlagi ebadot ḳana ar kurbani kana deḳa-hunar bar tumrar ufre roibo.
18.6: Ami nize tumrare ufohar hishabe dibar lagi, Boni Israilor mazor Lebi oḳolre fosond ḳorsi. Milon-tambur ḳam ḳorar lagi erare Mabudor name shofi deoa oise.
18.7: Oile imam hishabe ḳali tumi ar tumar fuainte kurbani kana ar fordar bitoror Herem Shorifo kezmot ḳam ḳorbae. Imamotir fod ḳan ami ufohar hishabe tumrare dilam. Ḳali Lebi oḳol saṛa dusra ḳeu zudi Milon-tambur shimanat ae, te tare zane marilite oibo.” Imam oḳlor faona beton
18.8: Erbade Mabude Harunre ḳoila, “Amar name zoto laḳan kurbani deoa oy, itar hoḳol zimmadari ami nize-u tumar ato shomzaisi. Te amar name Boni Israilor kurbani kora hoḳol fak-fobitro zinish, ami tumare ar tumar oarishor faona beton hishabe siroḳalor lagi dilailam.
18.9: Ḳas fobitro kurbanir ze ongsho aguino zalani lagto nae, ou baṭo tumra niogi. Te dan-gomor sodga, gunar koforar kurbani, ar dush-ḳosurir koforar kurbanir lagi Boni Israile amar gese zotota loia aiba, ita tumi ar tumar oarish oḳlor faona hok.
18.10: Ita nia hari kas fak-fobitro zinish buzia ijjot ḳoria tumra ḳaio. Tumrar hoḳol beṭainte ita ḳaitae farbae. I kani tumrar lagi fobitro.
18.11: Ar Boni Israilor deoa hoḳol dulona kurbanir zinish-o tumrar oibo. Ita ami tumare ar tumar oarish oḳolre siroḳalin faona hishabe diram. Tumar foribaror zera pak-pakiza halote roiba, tara ita ḳaita farba.
18.12: “Boni Israile tarar ḳetor hoḳol taki bala ze tel, noya anguror shorbot ar fosholor ze ongsho Mabudor name sodga diba, ita hokkolta ami tumare dilailam.
18.13: Mabudor gese ana tarar folail foy-fosholor foyla ongsho tumar oibo. Tumar foribaror mazor zera pak-pakiza halote taḳba, tara ita ḳaiba.
18.14: “Boni Israile furafur dabi-daoa saṛia mannot hishabe zoto zinish diba, ita-o tumi faibae.
18.15: Mabudor name shofi deoa forteḳ foyla baichcha tumar oibo, ita manshor aolad ouk ba foshur baichcha ouk. Manshor foyla fuare tumi nichchoy ḳalas ḳoria nite dio, ar nafak foshur foyla meda baichchare-o ola ḳalas ḳori nite dio.
18.16: Manshor foyla fuar boyosh eḳ mash oile ḳalas ḳoranir zanor bodla babot, ebadot ḳanar mafe fas tola rufa nia azad ḳori dio.
18.17: Oile gai-goru ba meṛa-sagolor foyla baichchare ḳalas ḳorai nite dio na, iguin to halal. Itare kurbani dia tumi kurbani kanar ufre lou siṭaia dio, ar sorbire agunit deoa kurbani hishabe zalaio. I kurbanir dumar gerane ami Mabud kushi oi.
18.18: Dulona ḳorail sina ar ḍainor ranor gustor laḳan, oguintor gust-o tumi faibae.
18.19: Mabudor name Boni Israilor kurbani kora hoḳol fobitro zinish tumar faona babot ami tumare ar tumar aolad oḳolre siroḳalor lagi dilailam. Ita oilo Mabudor loge tumi ar tumar oarishor lagi siroḳalin chukti, er kunu rod-bodol oito nae.”
18.20: Erbade Mabude Harunre ḳoila, “Boni Israilor desho tumi kunu don-doulotor malikana ba zomi-zomar kunu baṭo faitae nae. Erar maze tumar faona baṭ oilam shoyong ami, ami-u tumar don-doulot.” Lebi kandanor faona beton
18.21: Mabude ḳoila, “Boni Israile tarar ruzi-ruzgaror dosh baṭor eḳ baṭ to amare diba, ami-o ita Lebi kandanor faona beton babot dilailam. Milon-tambut ebadoti kamor mozuri hishabe tara ita faiba.
18.22: Ar aiz taki Boni Israilor dusra kunu gusṭir manush Milon-tambur daro zaoa nished. Gele tarar naformanir dae tara morba.
18.23: Milon-tambur ḳam-ḳaz ḳali Lebi kandane ḳorba, ou ḳamo zekunu naformani korle tara nize-u dayi oiba. Ita oibo oarishor for oarish dori eḳṭa siroḳalin niom. Boni Israilor oinnainno ḳandanor loge kunu don-doulotor malikana Lebi kandane faito nae.
18.24: Er bodla Boni Israile tarar ruzi-ruzgaror ze dosh baṭor eḳ baṭ Mabudor dorbaro azir ḳorba, ita ami erar faona hishabe dilailam. Erlagi erar befare ami Mabude ḳoisi, Lebi oḳole Boni Israilor maze kunu zomi-zomar malikana faita nae.”
18.26: “Tumi Lebi oḳolre ḳo, oinnainno Boni Israilor ruzi-ruzgaror ze dosh baṭor eḳ baṭ faona hishabe ami tumrare dilam, ita faia harle tumra-o otar dosh baṭor eḳ baṭre, zoḳator zoḳat babot Mabudor name dilaibae.
18.27: Ou zoḳatre-u tumrar ḳetor fosholor ar nizor banail anguror shorbotor zoḳat hishabe gona oibo.
18.28: Boni Israilor baki egaro ḳandanor zoḳat babot ze dosh baṭor eḳ baṭ tumra faibae, oḳan taki tumra-o ola dosh baṭor eḳ baṭ Mabudor name zoḳat dibae. Mabudor namor ou ongsho tumra imam Harunor ato dio.
18.29: Tumrare zotota deoa oibo, tumra-o otar hoḳol taki bala ar fobitro ongsho, Mabudor faona hishabe tanre dio.
18.30: “Hoḳol taki bala ongsho Mabudre deoar bade zeta baki roibo, otare tumrar nizor ḳetor foshol, ar tumrar nizor banail anguror shorbot hishabe gona oibo.
18.31: Ou ongsho tumra ar tumrar foribaror manshe zekunu zagat ḳaitae faro, ita to tumrar ḳamor beton, Milon-tambur kezmotor beton.
18.32: Hoḳol taki bala ongsho Mabudor name dilaile, bakita ḳaite tumrar kunu dush nai. Ar Boni Israilor deoa fak-fobitro malre tumra ofobitro ḳorio na, teu tumra mortae nae.”

19.1: Erbade Mabude Musa ar Harunre ḳoila,
19.2: “Tumra Boni Israilre ḳo, Mabude shoriotor hukum mafik bataisoin, tumra furafur lal rongor egu ḍeki goru loia amrar gese ao, ou ḍeki shullo-ana nikut oito, ar tair ḳando kunudin zual lagani oise na.
19.3: Ogu ania tumra imam Ali-Azoror gese dibae. Imame iṭare kempor bare nia tan samne zobo ḳoraiba.
19.4: Zobor bade tan angulo kisu lou loia Milon-tambur samna bae shatbar siṭaiba.
19.5: Tan samne-u ou gair ḳal, gust, lou ar gufor shudda at-boṛ aguindi zalailio.
19.6: Ou ḍekire zalanir shomoy imame debdaru gasor kisu daru, esub gasor ḍeṭa, ar lal rongor kisu sutare ou agunir maze falaiba.
19.7: Bade tain naiba, ar finnor ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ-o doiba. Naia-doia harle tain kempor bitre zaita farba, oile hainja forzonto tain nafak halote roiba.
19.8: Ze zone ou ḍekir hoḳolta zalaibo, he-o naia hari kafoṛ-sufoṛ doibo ar hainja forzonto nafak roibo.
19.9: Ou ḍekir zalail sali kanain kunu fak-saf manshe tulia nia, kempor bare kunu pak zagat toibo. Boni Israile fak-saf oar fani tiar ḳorar lagi ou salire zotone toiba. Bade nafak taki fak-saf oar ḳalo ou fani kamo lagaiba.
19.10: Ze zone ou sali tulbo, he-o tar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doite oibo ar hainja forzonto nafak roibo. Iṭa Boni Israil ar tarar maze boshot ḳorra hoḳol zatir lagi siroḳalin niom. Mora lash soar niom-ḳanun
19.11: “Ḳeu zudi kunu murdar lash soilae, te shat din bora he nafak roibo.
19.12: Lash soar tin nombor ar shat nombor din, fak-saf oar fobitro fani dia nizore doia harle he fak-saf oibo. Ar i niom na manle he nafak-u roibo.
19.13: Lash soar bade ḳeu zudi fak-saf na oy, te he Mabudor gorre nafak banae. Ou zonre Boni Israilor shomaz taki fusilibae. Pak-saf oar fani tar shorilo na siṭanie, tar nafaki tar loge roibo.
19.14: “Ar tambur bitre kunu manush morigele, zera ou tambut hamaiba ar zera tambut asla, tara hoḳol-u shat din bora nafak roiba.
19.15: Ou boshot tambur bitoror zeta tal-bashon hora dia gura asil na, ota-o nafak oizibo.
19.16: “Bondor maze kula zagat falail kunu lashre zudi keu soilae, te he shat din bora nafak roibo. I lash kunu laṛair ḳarone ouk, ba emne mora ouk, zera soibo era nafak. Kunu mora manshor aḍḍi ba ḳoyborre soile, he-o shat din bora nafak roibo.
19.17: “Ola nafak manshore fak-saf ḳorar niote ze lal ḍekir gust zalani oise, ogur kisu sali eḳṭa gamlat loia, ou gamlat futor fani borte oibo.
19.18: Bade kunu fak-saf manshe esub gasor ḳoyṭa ḍeṭa ania fanit buṛaia hou murdar tambu, er bitoror hoḳol mal-samana ar manshor ufre siṭai diba. Zoto zone emne mora, ba kun oia mora kunu murdar lash, morar aḍḍi-guḍḍi ba ḳoybor soise, tarar ufre-o ou fani siṭai diba.
19.19: Pak-saf ou zone nafak manshor ufre haftar tin nombor ar shat nombor din fani siṭai diba, ar shat nombor din tara fak-saf oiba. Tara gusol ḳoria finnor ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doiba, ar ou shat nombor dinor hainja taki fak-saf bonba.
19.20: Oile nafak oar bade ḳeu zudi nizore fak-saf na ḳore, te tare shomaz taki fusia falaibae. He nizore nafak rakia Mabudor Herem Shorifre-o nafak banaise. Pak-saf oar fani tar ufre na siṭanie, he nafak roise.
19.21: Ita oibo Boni Israilor lagi eḳṭa siroḳalin niom. “Ze zone ou fak-saf oar fani siṭaiba, ein nize-o tan ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doite oibo. I fak-saf oar fani kunu manshe soile, he hainja forzonto nafak roibo.
19.22: Nafak halote i zone zotota soibo, ita hoḳolta nafak oizibo, tar soa kunu zinish zegie soibo, he-o hainja forzonto nafak roibo.”

20.1: Bosoror foyla sando hokkol Boni Israil Zin morubumit gia Kadesh elaḳat aia roila. Hono Musa nobir boin bibi Moriomor inteḳal oilo ar tanre dafon ḳora oilo.
20.2: Hino ḳaibar kunu fani na faoae Boni Israile Musa ar Harunor birudde dol bandia erar fise lagla.
20.3: Tara Musar loge ḳaijja ḳoria ḳoila, “Amrar logor baiain zebla Mabudor samne morsla, hou shomoy amra-o morigele bala asil.
20.4: Mabudor bonda oḳolre tumi kene ou morubumit anlae, oḳon foshur fal shudda amra hokkole ono zan kuaitam ni?
20.5: Mishor desh taki tumi kene amrare ola zomor gato loia ailae? I zagat na ase kunu dan-saul ba ḍumur fol, na ase angur ba anuar fol? Ar ḳaibar fani-o nai.”
20.6: Ita hunia Musa ar Harun manshor ges taki horia Milon-tambur duaror gese gia soizdat foṛla. Teu Mabudor nuror tozolli tarar samne zair oilo.
20.8: “Tumi hou laṭiṭa lo, loia tumi ar tumar bai Harune hoḳol Boni Israilre ekḳano dola ḳoro. Ar ou boṛo ze fattorgu deḳrae, tarar samne ou fattorre hukum deo, dile ou fattore fani dibo. Boni Israil ar tarar foshufal hoḳole zate fani kaito fare, erlagi tumi ou fattor taki fani bar ḳorbae.”
20.9: Mabudor hukum moto tan samne taki Musae laṭiṭa loila.
20.10: Loia Musa ar Harune manshore ou fattoror gese dola ḳorla. Ar Musae tarare ḳoila, “O beimanor zat, huno, amra ou fattor taki tumrar lagi fani bar ḳortam ni?”
20.11: Oḳan ḳoia Musae laṭi dia ou fattoro dui baṛi marla, baṛi marar loge loge fattor taki zure zure fani bar oilo, teu tara ar tarar foshur fale fani kaila.
20.12: Oile Mabude Musa ar Harunre ḳoila, “Tumra to Boni Israilor samne amare fak-fobitro ḳoia manlae na, amar zobanor ufre borosha ḳorlae na. Erlagi ami ze deshḳan Boni Israilre dan ḳormu, tumra tarare loia hino zaitae fartae nae.”
20.13: Fattor taki ze zagat fani bar oilo, ou zagar nam deoa oilo Meriba, mani kaijja. Ino Boni Israile Mabudor loge ḳaijja ḳorsil, ar Mabude ono-u tan fak-fobitrota tarar samne zair ḳorsoin. Idum deshedi zaita farla na
20.14: Bade Musae Kadesh taki manush faṭaia Idum deshor bashshare ḳoila, “Amra to Boni Israil, afnar silsilar baiain. Afnar dorbaro amrar ekkan arzi ase, afne to amrar duḳ-mosibotor ḳota zanoin.
20.15: Te amrar baf-dadain to Mishor desho gesla, ar amra bout bosor hono aslam. Mishori oḳole amra ar amrar moy-murobbir ufre zulum-mosibot ḳorae,
20.16: amra Mabudor dorbaro ḳanda-ḳaṭi korlam. Teu Mabude amrar foriad kobul ḳoria, tan firista faṭaia amrare hou desh taki bar ḳori anchoin. “Erlagi amra oḳon afnar deshor shimanar Kadesh ṭaunor ḳandat aisi.
20.17: Afne amrare afnar deshor mazdi zaibar shuzug kan deukka. Amra afnar kunu ḳet-kishi ba angur baganor mazedi zaitam nae, kunu kua taki fani-o tulia ḳaitam nae. Amra ḳali Raz Fotedi aṭia zaimu, afnar deshor shimana faronir ag forzonto ḍaine-baue kunubae fao baṛaitam nae.”
20.18: Oile Idumor bashshae ḳoila, “Na, na, tumra ibae zaitae fartae nae. Zaibar sesṭa ḳorle amra zuddot bar oia tumrar ufre hamla ḳormu.”
20.19: Teu Boni Israile zuaf dila, “Amra to ḳali Raz Fotedi zaimu. Amra ba amrar foshur fale zudi afnar deshor kunu fani kai, te itar dam dilaimu. Amra faoe aṭia ḳali desh faṛi dia zaitam sairam.”
20.20: Oile Idum deshor bashshae hirbar ḳoilo, “Na, na, ibaedi tumrar zaoa nished.” Bade Idum deshor bout sifaie beṭagiri deḳaia Boni Israilor loge laṛai korat bar oilo.
20.21: Tara Boni Israilre deshor bitredi zaite dilo na, erlagi era hoḳol firia aila. Hozrot Harun (a:)or inteḳal
20.22: Erbade Boni Israil Kadesh taki roana oia Hur faṛor gese gia azila.
20.23: Hino Idum deshor shimanar daro Mabude Musa ar Harunre ḳoila,
20.24: “Harun to tar baf-dadar gese ḳoyboro zaitegi oibo. Ar ami Boni Israilre ze desh dimu, he to hi desho zaito farto nae. Mono ase ni, Meriba namor zagat fanir befare tumra amar hukumor ulṭa ḳam ḳorso.
20.25: Te Harun ar tar fua Ali-Azorre loia tumi Hur faṛor ufre uṭo.
20.26: Uṭia Harunor gotor taki imamoti lebas kulia tar fuare findao, ḳaron Harun tar baf-dadar gese zaibogi, hono-u tar inteḳal oibo.”
20.27: Musae Mabudor hukum mafik ola ḳorla. Hoḳol Boni Israilor samne tara Hur faṛor ufre uṭla.
20.28: Uṭar bade Musae Harunor imamoti lebas kulia hari en fua Ali-Azorre findaila. Hou faṛor ufre Harune inteḳal ḳorla. Bade Musa ar Ali-Azor faṛ taki lamia aila.
20.29: Boni Israile Harunor moutor ḳobor hunia fura tish din tan lagi mattom ḳorla.

21.1: Ar Kenani zatir Orad deshor bashsha Negeb morubumit boshot ḳoroin, ein ḳobor faila, Boni Israil zati Otarimor fotedi aṭia aira, oḳan hunia bashshae tarar ufre hamla ḳoria ḳoyzonre doria nilagi.
21.2: Teu Boni Israile Mabudor dorbaro mannot mania ḳoilo, “O Mabud, tumi zudi Orador ou bashinda oḳolre amrar ato shofia deo, te amra tarar gau-geram ar ṭaun oḳol ekkebare binash ḳorilimu.”
