21.3: Mabude tarar minoti kobul ḳorla, ar onor Kenani oḳolre tarar ato shofi dila. Tara era hokkolre ar erar ṭaun oḳolre ekkebare binash ḳorillo. Erlagi ou zagar nam oilo Horma, mani binash. Tamar haf bananir goṭona
21.4: Erbade Boni Israile Idum deshor galabae guria zaoar lagi Hur faṛor ges taki Nil doriar faredi roana dila. Oile fotor maze tara odoirjo oia,
21.5: Musa nobi ar Alla Pakor birudde mata-mati lagaila, tara ḳoila, “Amrare Mishor desh taki kene bar ḳori anlae, ou morubumit ania marar lagi ni? Ino to ḳani-o nai, fani-o nai. Ar ola baze ḳani amra dui souke deḳtam fari na.”
21.6: Ou shomoy Mabude tarar maze bout bishakto haf faṭaila. Hafor ḳamoṛe tarar bout zon mara gela.
21.7: Teu manshe gia Musare ḳoila, “Amra to afnar ar Mabudor birudde matia guna ḳorilisi. Te afne oḳon Mabudor dorbaro minoti koroukka, zate ou haf guin amrar ges taki horaia neingi.” Teu Musae tarar lagi minoti korla.
21.8: Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi eḳṭa haf banaia usa ek kuṭir ufre to. Ze manshore hafe ḳamṛaibo, he tumar ou hafor bae saile bala oizibo.”
21.9: Teu Musae ḳaṭi tamadi eḳ haf banaia kuṭir ufre toila. Kunu zonre hafe ḳamṛaile he ou tamar hafor bae saito, ar basizito. Muab desho zaoa
21.10: Bade Boni Israile roana dila, ar Obut namor zagat gia tambu gaṛila.
21.11: Ar Obut taki roana oia Muab deshor fubor shimanat, morubumir Iya-Abarimo aia tambu ṭanaila.
21.12: Oḳan taki roana oia Zered namor hukna ḳalor faro gia tambu gaṛila.
21.13: Zered taki roana dia Ornon hukna ḳalor hofaro gia tambu ṭanaila. Amuri oḳlor desho taki ze morubumi shuru oise, i kal asil ou morubumit. Ḳalor eḳ faro Muab desh, oinno faro Amuri oḳlor desh.
21.14: Mabudor Jihad namor kitabo to ase, “Shufa elaḳar Baheb ar Ornon hukna ḳal,
21.15: Aur ṭaunor muka zaora usa-nisa nal, ita to Muab deshor eḳ shimana.”
21.16: Oḳan tone roana oia tara Ber namor ek kuar gese aila. Ono aia harle Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi hoḳol manshore ekḳano dola ḳoro, ami tarare fani dimu.”
21.17: Ikan hunia Boni Israile ou gozol gailo, “O kua, tumar fani utlia foṛouk. Tumra kuar ḳatire gozol gao.
21.18: Ikṭa to hou shordar oḳlor kua, raza oḳole tarar laṭir bole kudisoin, ḳandani gollar zure ḳorsoin.” Bade tara morubumi taki Mottana namor zagat gela.
21.19: Mottana taki Noholiel, Noholiel taki Bamut,
21.20: Bamut taki Muabor faṛia ek kalor faro gela. Ou ḳalor ḳandar Pisga faṛor usa ṭilla taki morubumi deḳa zae. Bashsha Sihun ar Uzor binash
21.21: Boni Israile Amuri oḳlor bashsha Sihunor gese manush faṭaia minot ḳorla,
21.22: “Amra afnar deshor bitredi faroi zaitam sairam, amrare zaibar diba ni? Amra to Raz Fot saṛia ḳet-kishi bae ba angur baganedi zaitam nae, kunu kuar fani-o ḳaitam nae. Afnar deshor shimana faronir ag forzonto hamesha Raz Fotedi aṭat roimu.”
21.23: Oile bashsha Sihune tan deshor bitredi tarare zaite dila na. Tain tan sifai dol loia morubumir maze Boni Israilor loge zuddot bar oila. Tain Iyahaz ṭauno aia tarar loge zuddo lagaila.
21.24: Zuddot Boni Israile hou bashshare toluardi kaṭia Ornon ḳal taki Zabbuk kal forzonto tar asta desh doḳol ḳorilila. Tara Boni-Ammanor shimana forzonto hoḳol zaga doḳol ḳorla, oile Boni-Ammanor shimana asil kub mozbut, ikanre ḍingaia zaoa ḳoṭin.
21.25: Boni Israile Hishbon ar er ash-fashor gau-geram shudda Amuri oḳlor hoḳol ṭaun doḳol ḳoria hono boshoti gaṛila.
21.26: Hishbon asil to Amuri bashsha Sihunor razdani. Tain Muab deshor agor bashshar loge zuddo ḳoria Ornon ḳal forzonto asta desh doḳol ḳorsila.
21.27: Erlagi kobi oḳole ḳoin, “Ao tumra hoḳol, Hishbon ṭauno ao, raza Sihunor ṭaunre noya ḳori banao.
21.28: Sihunor ou ṭaun taki aguin bar oia, Muabor Aur ṭaunre sarḳar ḳorlo zalaia, Ornon ḳalor usa zaga binash oigelo, honor hoḳol ṭakurre zalaia marillo.
21.29: Haere Muab, shorbonash! O Komush-devtar bokto oḳol tumra to binash oigelae. Komushor fuain bagia horigese, tar fuṛin oḳol bondi oise, Amuri bashsha Sihunor ato bondi tara.
21.30: Amra-u to tarar loge zuddo ḳorsi, Diban forzonto asta Hishbon binash ḳorsi, tarar batti amra nibailisi, Nufa ar Medeba forzonto dongsho-lila salaisi.”
21.31: Erbad taki Boni Israile Amuri oḳlor desho boshot ḳorat roila.
21.32: Hozrot Musae Zazira ṭauno guia faṭanir bade Boni Israile ou ṭaunor ash-fashor gau-geram hoḳolta doḳol ḳorla, ar honor bashinda Amuri oḳolre ḳedai dila.
21.33: Bade tara firia Bashon deshor bae roana oila. Teu Bashonor bashsha Uze tar hoḳol sifai loia tarar loge zuddo ḳorar lagi Idri ṭauno aia azilo.
21.34: Ou shomoy Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi bashsha Uzre ḍoraio na, ami tare, tar asta deshre ar hoḳol sifaire tumar ato tuli disi. Erlagi Hishbonor Amuri oḳlor bashsha Sihunre tumi ze dosha goṭaislae, ogure-o ola ḳorio.”
21.35: Teu tara bashsha Uz, tar fuain ar hoḳol manshore binash ḳorla. Hesh-mesh tara ḳeu ar zinda roilo na. Boni Israile ou fura desh doḳol ḳorla.

22.1: Erbade Boni Israil gia Ziriho ṭaunor ulṭabae Zordan gangor daro Muab deshor tol zagat tambu ṭangaila.
22.2: Boni Israile Amuri oḳlor ze halot ḳorsil, Muab deshor bashsha Balak bin Shipare ita hoḳolta deḳsoin.
22.3: Boni Israilor oto manush dekia Muabi oḳol ḍoraigela. Ashole-u tara kub beshi gabṛi gela.
22.4: Tara Madian deshor murobbi neta oḳolre ḳoila, “Gorue zela bondor ḳesma gashre leia-fusi kailae, ou dole-o oula amrar sairo galar hoḳolta leia-fusi kailibo.” Ou shomoy Muab deshor bashsha asla Balak bin Shipar.
22.5: Bashshae ḍoraia Balam bin Baur namor pir sabre anar lagi kobria faṭaila. Balam to ou shomoy tan nizor deshor Furat gangor faro Fotur ṭauno asla. Balake ḳobriare ḳoia dila, “Tumra gia tanre ḳoio, Mishor desh taki eḳdol manush bar oia aise. Aia asta zomin boria ḳali gisgis ḳorra, tara oḳon amar samne boshot ḳorra.
22.6: Ita to amra taki beshi boloban. Erlagi afne aukka, aia otare lannot deukka. Teu ami hoyto tarare maria desh taki kedaitam farmu. Ar ami to zani, afne zare dua dein he ṭik-u dua fae, ar zare lannot dein tar ufre hasau lannot foṛe.”
22.7: Teu Muab ar Madianor murobbi neta oḳole isteḳara-azirat ḳoranir ṭeḳa loia roana oigela. Bashsha Balake zela hikai disla, tara gia Balamor gese ola ḳoila.
22.8: Teu Balame tarare ḳoila, “Te afnara aiz rait amar ono roukka. Mabude amare zeta zanaiba, ami ota afnarare zanaimu.” Gotike-u tara tan ono roila.
22.9: Mabude Balamor gese zair oia zikaila, “Tumar loge era ḳara?”
22.10: Balame zuaf dila, “Muabor bashsha Balak bin Shipare amar gese ḳobria faṭaisoin,
22.11: ḳoisoin, Mishor desh taki eḳdol manush aia asta desho gisgis ḳorra. Oḳon afne aia tarare lannot deukka. Teu ami zuddo ḳoria tarare bule ḳedaitam farmu.”
22.12: Oile Mabude Balamre ḳoila, “Tumi erar loge zaio na, ar hita manshore kunu lannot-o dio na. Mono rakio, tara amar rohom-borkot faoa bonda.”
22.13: Bador din biane Balam gum taki uṭia Balakor ḳobria oḳolre ḳoila, “Afnara zarzir desho firot zaukkagi. Ar Mabude amare mana ḳorsoin, afnarar loge na zaoar lagi.”
22.14: Teu Muabi neta oḳole firia gia bashsha Balakre ḳoila, “Balam to amrar loge aite razi oisoin na.”
22.15: Oḳan hunia Balake erar saite aro beshi, aro ijjoti neta oḳolre faṭaila.
22.16: Tara gia Balamre ḳoila, “Bashsha Balak bin Shipare ḳoisoin, afne tan gese zaite kunuzator kunu bada manta na.
22.17: Tain afnare bout ijjot-boḳshish diba, ar afne zela ḳoiba, tain ola-u ḳorba. Ḳali afne zanu tan fokko loia ota manshore lannot dein, tain oḳan-u saira.”
22.18: Balame zuaf dila, “Bashsha Balake zudi tan shuna-rufae bora razbaṛi kan-o amare dilain, ta-o amar Mabudor hukumor ulṭa gia ami ekkan ḳam-o ḳortam nae, ita huru ḳam ouk ba boṛo ḳam ouk.
22.19: Oile afnara-o agor erar laḳan aizkur rait ḳan ono ḳaṭai laukka. Ami deki, Mabude amare noya kunta ḳoin ni.”
22.20: Hou rait Allae zair oia Balamre ḳoila, “Era zebla tumare neoat aise, te tumi tarar loge zao. Gele ami tumare zela ḳoimu, tumi kali ola-u ḳorio.” Gadir muko zoban fuṭilo
22.21: Bador din biane Balam pir gum taki uṭia tan gadir ufre godi bisaia Muabi neta oḳlor loge roana oila.
22.22: Tan zaoa dekia Alla Pak tan ufre gusae aguin oigela. Tanre bada dibar kiale Allar firistae fot auglia ubai roila. Balam to gadir ufre soṛia zaira, tan duizon saḳor tan loge asil.
22.23: Mabudor firistae toluar ato loia, fotor maze ubai roisoin dekia, gadiṭa fot saṛia zominedi lami gelo. Gadire hirbar foto tular lagi Balame taire mair-doir ḳorla.
22.24: Bade Mabudor firista zominor angur baganor dui ketor mazor ailor ufre ubai roila. Ailor duio galabae faḳa oal deoa asil.
22.25: Mabudor firistare dekia gadie oalor galabae geshia gelo. Erdae Balamor eḳ fao-o kub gosha laglo. Teu tain hirbar gadire marla.
22.26: Erbade Mabudor firista aguaia gia fotor mazor ola eḳ sifa zagat ubaila, zeno ḍaine-baue kunubae horar ufae nai.
22.27: Mabudor firistare dekia gadie Balamre loia maṭit huti gelo. Teu Balam aro gorom oia laṭi dia gadire marla.
22.28: Ou shomoy Mabude gadir mukor zoban kuli dila. Tai Balamre ḳoilo, “Ami afnare kita ḳorsi, afne tin-tinbar amare marla?”
22.29: Balame gadire ḳoila, “Tui amare aua banaia ḳeiṛ ḳelaire ni? Hun, amar ato zudi ekkan toluar taḳto, te tore sed mari oḳon-u ḳaṭillam one.”
22.30: Gadie Balamre ḳoilo, “Ami afnar hou gadi nae ni, zegur ufre afne hara zonom dori soṛia aira, ar afnar loge ami kunudin ila ḳorsi ni?” Balame ḳoila, “Na, ila ḳorsot na.”
22.31: Erbade Mabude Balamor souk kulia dila, tain deḳla, Mabudor firistae toluar loia fot bond ḳori ubai roisoin. Dekia tain mata nuaia nak-kofal maṭit lagaila.
22.32: Teu Mabudor firistae tanre zikaila, “Tumar gadire ḳene tin-tinbar marlae? Tumi amar samne amar birudde ḳam ḳorat zairaegi dekia, ami tumare aṭḳaibar lagi ono aisi.
22.33: Tumar gadie amare dekia tin-tinbar horia gesegi. Tai zudi na horto, te ami tumare marillam one, ar taire basai raḳlam one.”
22.34: Ou shomoy Balame Mabudor firistare ḳoila, “Ami to guna ḳorsi. Ashole ami buzchi na, afne amare aṭḳaibar lagi foto ubat asoin. Te afne naraz oile ami firia zaimugi.”
22.35: Mabudor firistae Balamre ḳoila, “Ṭik ase, tumi ota manshor loge zao. Oile ami tumare zela hikai dimu, tumi kali ola-u ḳoibae.” Teu bashsha Balakor faṭail neta oḳlor loge Balam pir solat roila.
22.36: Balam piror aoar ḳobor hunia, tanre aguaia anar lagi bashsha Balak Ornon ḳalor faro Muab deshor eḳ ṭauno gela. I ṭaun asil tan deshor hesh shimanat.
22.37: Bashsha Balake Balam pirre ḳoila, “Ami to afnare zoruri tolob ḳorlam. Te afne ḳene foyla bar aila na? Afnare zoiggo boḳshish dibar ḳemota kunu amar nai ni?”
22.38: Balame zuaf dila, “Ami oḳon afnar gese aisi. Oile amar nizor kunu mat matar shaiddo nai. Ḳali Allae amaredi zeta ḳoaiba, ami kali oḳan-u ḳoimu.”
22.39: Erbade Balak bashshar loge oia Balam pir Kiriot-Husut gaut gela.
22.40: Gia bashsha Balake goru ar meṛa kurbani dia kisu gust Balam pirre ar tan logor hou neta oḳolre dila.
22.41: Bador din biane bashsha Balake ou Balamre loia Bamut-Baal faṛo gela. Hono ubaia Balame Boni Israilor eḳ ongshore deḳla.

23.1: Ar ou bianku bala Balam pire Balak bashshare ḳoila, “Afne amar lagi shatḳan kurbani kana banaukka, banaia kurbanir lagi shatgu bisal ar shatgu meṛa zugai deukka.”
23.2: Balamor ḳotamoto-u Balake ola ḳorla, ḳoria duiozone milia fortek kurbani kanar ufre egu ḳori bisal ar egu ḳori meṛa kurbani dila.
23.3: Erbade Balam pire Balakre ḳoila, “Afnar kurbani deoa ou foshur ḳasat afne roukka. Ami tuṛa horia zairam, oito fare Mabude amare doroshon diba. Tain amare zeta zanaiba, ami aia afnare ḳoimune.” Oḳan ḳoia Balam pir gia faṛor hoḳol taki usa ṭillar ufre uṭila.
23.4: Ou shomoy Mabude tanre doroshon dila. Balam pire Mabudre ḳoila, “O Mabud, tumi to deḳrae, ami shatḳan kurbani kana banaisi ar fortek kurbani kanar ufre egu ḳori bisal ar egu ḳori meṛa kurbani disi.”
23.5: Teu Mabude Balam pirre eḳ buli hikai dila, dia ḳoila, “Tumi gia Balak bashshare ota ḳoio.”
23.6: Teu Balam pire Muab deshor bashsha Balakor gese firia aia deḳla, bashsha Balake Muab deshor hoḳol murobbi netare loia tan kurbani kora foshur ono ubai roisoin.
23.7: Ou shomoy Balam pire Allar hikaia deoa ou buli hoḳol hunaila, ḳoila, “Siria desh taki Balake amare anaisoin, fubor faṛ oḳlor daro taki Muabor bashsha Balake-u more zugaisoin. Zugaia ḳoila, amar fokko loia Iakubor aolad Boni Israilre lannot deukka, otare boddua deukka.
23.8: Oile Allae lannot disoin na zare, ami kilan dimu lannot tare? Mabude ḳeti korar ḳota na ḳorsoin zar, ami kilan ḳetir ḳota ḳoitam tar?
23.9: Deḳsi ami tarare usa ṭilla taki, tarar baedi saisi to faṛor suṛa taki, deḳlam ami era oila ola eḳ zati, tara roin alog oia baki hoḳol taki.
23.10: Iakubor aolad deki balur danar moto, gonia fuṛaito tare ḳar ase shaiddo? Moron zanu oy amar nekkar ou dolor laḳan aḳerato ouk mor tarar-u laḳan.”
23.11: Ikan hunia bashsha Balake Balamre ḳoila, “Afne ita kita ḳorla? Afnare anaitam amar dushmonre lannot dibar lagi, ar afne ḳali tarare dua dila.”
23.12: Balam pire zuaf dila, “Mabude amar muko zeta zugai disoin, ita ami koimu na kila?” Balam piror muko Allar dusra ohi
23.13: Bade bashsha Balake Balam pirre ḳoila, “Afne amar loge aroḳ zagat aukka. Hon tone afnar souke Boni Israilor deḳa faiba. Tara hoḳolre deḳa zaito nae, ḳali eḳ ongshore afne deḳba, dekia afne amar fokko loia tarare lannot diba.”
23.14: Oḳan ḳoia bashsha Balake tanre loia Pisga faṛor ufror Zofim namor bondor maze loia gela. Gia hono shatḳan kurbani kana banaia fortek kurbani kanat egu ḳori bisal ar egu ḳori meṛa kurbani dila.
23.15: Bade Balam pire bashsha Balakre ḳoila, “Zalail kurbanir niote zeta foshu kurbani deoa oise, afne otar daro roukka. Ami oinnobae zairam, Mabudor didar faoar ashae.”
23.16: Mabude Balam pirre didar dila, ar tar zobanor maze kisu buli zugai dia ḳoila, “Tumi bashsha Balakor gese amar hikail ou mat matio.”
23.17: Teu tain bashshar gese gela. Gia deḳla bashshae Muab deshor neta oḳolre loia kurbani kora foshur gese ubai roisoin. Bashshae tanre zikaila, “Mabude afnare kita ḳoisoin?”
23.18: Balam pire ou shomoy Allar hikail ou buli koila, “Bashsha Balak kial ḳoro, oḳon huno dia mon, ere Shiparor fut Balak, mor ḳotat deo ḳan.
23.19: Alla Pak to manush nae zen misa matiba, tain kunu Adom shontan nae zen dil bodlaiba. Tain zela ḳota ḳoin ṭik ola-u ḳoroin, tan oada oḳol-u nichchit fura ḳoroin.
23.20: Nek dua ditam ḳori hukum zela faisi, kila bodlaimu ami munibor ou morzi?
23.21: Iakubor aolador maze Allae kunu bod-nosib deḳsoin na, Boni Israilor ḳofalo kunu duḳ-mosibot leḳsoin na. Tarar Mabud Alla tarar loge asoin tarar malikor joy gan tarar loge loge ase.
23.22: Mishor taki tain-u tarare bar ḳori anchoin tarar fokke tain oila zongli boyrar bol.
23.23: Iakubor aolador ufre kunu zadu-montro solto nae, Israil zatir ufre kunu tabiz-ḳobze ḳam aito nae. Tarar befare oḳon ou buli koa zae, Allae zeta ḳorsoin ota saia deḳo.
23.24: Ou zati to shinghir laḳan gunjria uṭibo, ar shinghor laḳan uṭia ag baṛibo. Shikaror lou ar gust na ḳaoa forzonto tara dom loita nae.”
23.25: Ikan hunia bashsha Balake ḳoila, “Bond ḳoroukka, afne tarare dua-o diba na, lannot-o diba na.”
23.26: Balam pire zuaf dila, “Ami to afnare age-u ḳoisi, Mabude amare zela ḳoiba, amar ola-u ḳora lagbo.” Balam piror muko Allar tisra ohi
23.27: Bade Balak bashshae Balam pirre ḳoila, “Aukka, ami afnare aroḳ zagat loia zaimu. Hono gele oito fare Allae kushi oia amar fokko loiba, ar afnaredi hotar ufre lannot dite diba.”
23.28: Oḳan ḳoia bashshae tanre loia Piyur namor faṛor ufre gela, ou zaga taki morubumi deḳa zae.
23.29: Ou shomoy Balam pire ḳoila, “Ono amar lagi shatḳan kurbani kana banaia, shatgu bisal ar shatgu meṛa kurbanir bebosta ḳoroukka.”
23.30: Pir sabor ḳotamoto bashshae ola-u ḳorla. Tain fortek kurbani kanar ufre egu ḳori bisal ar egu ḳori meṛa kurbani dila.

24.1: Balam pire zebla buzla, Boni Israilre dua deoa-u oilo Mabudor ichcha, buzia tain agor laḳan ar isteḳara-azirator sesṭa ḳorla na. Borong tan nizor muk morubumir bae firailla.
24.2: Firaia deḳla, Boni Israilor nanan ḳandanor tambu eḳ ek kori ṭangani oise. Ou shomoy tan ufre Allar ruhu lamia aila,
24.3: tain Allar deoa ou ohi koila, “Bauror fut Balame ḳoira, Souk zar kula ase ein ou buli koira.
24.4: Ze zone Allar kalam hunra, Shorbo-shoktimanor didar faira, zein soizdat foṛia batuni kobor deḳoin, ein oḳan ḳoira.
24.5: O Iakub bongsho, tumar tambu oḳol kub soḳsoḳa! O Boni Israil, tumar roar zaga ḳoto bala!
24.6: Ita to deḳar moto boṛo ḳezur baganor laḳan, gangor faror hazail-faṛail bonor laḳan, Mabudor lagail agoror gasor laḳan tortaza, fanir daror debdaru gasor laḳan shundor.
24.7: Tarar bora ḳoloshi taki fani utlia foṛbo, bisi ar serae bout fani faibo. Tarar bashsha oiba Ogag bashsha taki-o himmoti, tarar desh oibo namḳora ijjoti.
24.8: Allae Mishor taki tarare bar ḳori anchoin, tain oila tarar fokke bolala zongli boyra, tarar loge zoto zatie lagba, itare tara gilia ḳailiba, tarar aḍḍi-guḍḍire guṛa guṛa ḳorba, tir-donukdi tarare gatiba.
24.9: Shinghor laḳan tara ḳaf dori hutibo, tarare laṛanir shaosh oibo kun beṭar? Tumrare zera dua diba, erar ufre dua lamouk; tumrare zetae lannot diba, itar ufre lannot foṛouk.”
24.10: Ita hunia bashsha Balake Balam piror ufre gusae aguin oigela. Tan nizor ator fiṭit tabṛai tabṛai kiṛimiṛi kaia ḳoila, “Ami afnare anaitam amar dushmonre lannot dibar lagi, ar afne tarare ou lagaia tin-tinbar dua dila.
24.11: Afne amar samon taki horoukka, nizor zagat zaukka. Ami afnare bout furuskar dimu ḳoislam, oile Mabude dila na.”
24.12: Teu Balam pire bashsha Balakre ḳoila, “Afnar faṭail manshore ami age-u ḳoisi na ni,
24.13: bashshae zudi shuna-rufae bora tan asta razbaṛi kan-u amare dilain, tebou ami amar nizor ichchae bala-bura kunta ḳortam fartam nae, ami Mabudor birudde zaitam nae. Mabude amare zela hukum diba, ami kali ola-u ḳoimu.
24.14: Te ami oḳon amar manshor gese firot zairamgi, oile ou zatie bobishote afnar zatir loge kita kita ḳorba, afnar hushiarir lagi ita agam zanai diar.” Balam piror muko Allar souta ohi
24.15: Balam pire Allar deoa ou aroḳ ohi koila, “Bauror fut Balame ḳoira, Souk zar kula ase ein ou buli koira,
24.16: ze zone Allar kalam hunra, zeinor gese Allatalar aḳol-hekmot ase, zein shorbo-shoktimanor didar faira, zein soizdat foṛia batuni kobor deḳoin, ein oḳan ḳoira.
24.17: Ami to hou zonre dekiar, oḳon samne na taḳle-o dekiar. Tain amar ḳasat na oile-o, amar souk gia tan ufre foṛse. Iakubor bongshot aiba asmanor eḳ tera, Boni Israilor maze-u eḳ raz-laṭi zonmiba. Ein Muab zatir mata faṭaia dui ṭukra ḳorba, Shish nobir aolador ḳolla surmar ḳorba.
24.18: Idum deshre enor doḳolo anba, tan dushmonor ou Seir faṛre ḳobza ḳorba, ar Boni Israil zatie foyluani korba.
24.19: Iakubor bongshor eḳzone raz-godi salaiba, Ir ṭauno zara zinda roiba ein tarare-o binash ḳoriliba.”
24.20: Oḳnain ḳoar bade Balam pire souk melia Amaleki oḳolre deḳla. Dekia Allar ou ohi koila, “Amalek to hoḳol zatir maze asil fordan, oile tarar shesh dosha oibo shorbonash.”
24.21: Bade tain Keni oḳolre deḳla, dekia Allar ou ohi koila, “Tumrar boshot ḳana kub mozbut, tumra to fattoror faṛo basha banaiso,
24.22: oile agedi tumrar binash goṭibo, tumrare bandia Ashiria desho neoa oibo.”
24.23: Bade Balam pire Allar deoa ou shesh ohi koila, “Haere hae! Allae zebla ota goṭaiba, ou shomoy ḳeu ar zinda roibo ni?
24.24: Saipras difor zaz oḳol aibo, aia Ashiriare durdosha dibo, Aberor manshore-o domaibo, oile ou dif nize-o bade binash oizibo.”
24.25: Oḳan ḳoia hari Balam pir uṭia nizor goro gelagi, Balak bashsha-o tan fote roana dila.

25.1: Boni Israil Muab deshor Shiṭim elaḳat boshot ḳorla, tara ono roia roia Muabi beṭintor loge zina ḳorat lagla.
25.2: Honor beṭinte tarar deb-debir name boli dibar onusṭano Boni Israilre daot dila, ar era gia ota beṭintor loge ḳana-dana ḳaia hou deb-debir puja ḳorla.
25.3: Ou nomunae tara honor Piyur faṛor Baal devtar puja-boḳti deoat lagi gela. Erdae Boni Israilor ufre Mabudor gozobor aguin zolia uṭlo.
25.4: Bade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi shomazor dushi neta oḳolre doria zane marilao, ar otar lash roidor maze ania loṭḳai to. Teu Boni Israilor ufre taki amar hou lannoti gozob horbo.”
25.5: Oḳan hunia Musae Boni Israilor hakim-salish oḳolre ḳoila, “Tumrar zimmae taḳa zoto manshe Piyur faṛor Baal devtar pujat shorik oise, ota hokkolṭire tumra zane marilao.”
25.6: Ermaze ola oilo, Musa nobi ar Boni Israile milia zebla Allar goror duaror gese ḳanda-ḳaṭi korra, ou shomoy tarar samnedi Boni Israilor eḳ beṭae Madiani eḳ beṭire loge loia kempor bitre hamailo.
25.7: Ita dekia imam Harunor nati Finohosh bin Ali-Azor mozlis taki uṭia ekkan sulfi ato loila.
25.8: Loia tarar ḳore ḳore gia Boni Israilor hou beṭar tambut hamaia tar ar hou beṭir feṭedi gatilla. Teu Boni Israilor ufor taki Allar gozob horigelo.
25.9: Oile ou gozobor maze sobbish azar manush morigesil.
25.11: “Imam Harunor nati Finohosh bin Ali-Azor Boni Israilor ufre taki amar gozob horaise. Boni Israilor maze amar faona ijjot adae ḳorar befare he to amar zalae-u zoler. Erlagi amar faona ijjot adae ḳorar lagi monor zala taḳle-o ami tarare ar marlam na.
25.12: Te oḳon tumi tare ḳo, ami tar lagi eḳṭa ḳas shanti-chukti boail ḳorsi.
25.13: He tar Allar faona ijjotor befare kiali oia nizor ichchae Boni Israilor gunar kofora adae ḳorae, ami-o tar lagi ou shanti-chukti boail ḳorsi. Erlagi imamotir fod he ar tar aolador maze siroḳal zari roibo.”
25.14: Madiani hou beṭir loge Boni Israilor ze beṭare mara oisil, he oilo Salur fua Zimri, he to Shimion ḳandanor ek gusṭir neta.
25.15: Ar ze Madiani beṭire mara oisil, tair nam Kosbi, tai asil Madian deshor Shur namor eḳ netar fuṛi, ou Shur-o oila ek gusṭir neta.
25.17: “Madiani oḳolre tumrar dushmon mono ḳorio, itare zane marilio.
25.18: Ḳaron Piyuror devtar puja ar Kosbir befare fand fataia tumrare bul fote neoae tara tumrar dushmon bonche. Ar tumi to zano, ou Kosbi asil tarar kuṭum, tai to Madiani eḳ shordaror fuṛi. Piyuror Baal devtare puja ḳorae tumrar ufre zebla lannoti gozob lamsil, ou shomoy taire zane mara oisil.”

26.1: Lannoti ou gozob tami zaoar bade Mabude Musa ar imam Harunor fua Ali-Azorre ḳoila,
26.2: “Boni Israilor maze zerar boyosh bish bosor ba er beshi, mani zuddo ḳorar zoiggo zera oigese, erare zarzir gusṭi mafik gono.”
26.3: Erlagi Ziriho ṭaunor ulṭabae Zordan gangor faro Muab deshor ze tol zaga ase, hono Musa nobie ar imam Ali-Azore neta oḳolre ḳoila,
26.4: “Mabude Musa nobire zela hukum ḳorsoin, oula tumra bish bosor ba er beshi boyoshi hoḳol beṭaintore gono.” Teu Mishor desh taki Boni Israilor zoto beṭain bar oia aisla, gonar shomoy erar bongshodoror nam leḳa oilo. Era oila:
26.5: Iakub urfe Israilor boṛo fua Rubenor sairo fuar bongshodor: Rubenor boṛo fua Honuk taki Honuki bongsho, Falu taki Falui bongsho,
26.6: Hasir taki Hasiri bongsho, ar Kormi taki Kormia bongsho.
26.7: Era hoḳol-u Ruben ḳandanor nanan bongsho. Erar maz taki gonia tetallish azar shat-sho tish zonre faoa gelo.
26.9: Iliabor fuain oila Nomuel, Daton ar Abiram. Daton ar Abiram Boni Israilor duizon neta asla, tara Musa ar Harunor bifokke lagla. Ar Kurahor dol zebla Mabudor birudde asil, ou shomoy era-o Kurahor dolo asla.
26.10: Kurahor loge ou duizonre-o maṭie a ḳori gililisil ar tar dolor aṛai-sho zon aguine zolia morsil. Ita Boni Israilor lagi hushiarir nishana oia roilo.
26.11: Oile Kurahor fuain hi shomoy morsoin na, tarar bongsho zari roise.
26.12: Iakubor fua Shimionor bongshodor oila, Nomuel taki Nomueli bongsho, Zamin taki Zamini bongsho, Zakin taki Zakini bongsho,
26.13: Zarah taki Zarahi bongsho ar Shoul taki Shouli bongsho.
26.14: Ita Shimion ḳandanor nanan bongsho. Erar maz taki gonia baish azar dui-sho zon faoa gelo.
26.15: Iakubor fua Sadur bongshodor oila, Sifon taki Sifoni bongsho, Hogi taki Hogia bongsho, Shuni taki Shunia bongsho,
26.16: Ozni taki Oznia bongsho, Eiri taki Eiria bongsho,
26.17: Orud taki Orudi bongsho, ar Oreli taki Orelia bongsho.
26.18: Era oila Sadu ḳandanor nanan bongsho. Erar maze gona manush oila sallish azar fas-sho zon.
26.19: Iakubor fua Ehudar dui fuar nam asil Eir ar Onon, Kenan desho taḳar ḳalo era mara gesil.
26.20: Oile Ehudar aro fuain asla, erar bongshodor oila, Shela taki Shelayi bongsho, Firuz taki Firuzi, Zarah taki Zarahi bongsho.
26.21: Firuzor bongshodor oila Hasir taki Hasiri bongsho ar Hamul taki Hamuli bongsho.
26.22: Era hoḳol-u Ehuda ḳandanor nanan bongsho. Erar maz taki gonia siottoir azar fas-sho zonre faoa gelo.
26.23: Iakubor fua Isaḳoror bongshodor oila, Tola taki Tolayi bongsho, Foa taki Foai bongsho,
26.24: Zashub taki Zashubi bongsho ar Shimron taki Shimroni bongsho.
26.25: Era hoḳol Isaḳor ḳandanor nanan bongsho. Erar maz taki gonia soushoṭṭi azar tin-sho zonre faoa gelo.
26.26: Iakubor fua Sobulonor bongshodor oila Sered taki Seredi bongsho, Elon taki Eloni bongsho ar Zoholel taki Zoholeli bongsho.
26.27: Era hoḳol Sobulon ḳandanor nanan bongsho. Erar maz taki shaiṭ azar fas-sho zonre faoa gelo.
26.28: Iakubor fua Iusufor fuain oila Manosha ar Afraim.
26.29: Erar maze, Manoshar bongshodor oila, Makir taki Makiri bongsho, ar Makiror fua Giliod taki Giliodi bongsho.
26.30: Giliodor bongshodor oila Iazir taki Iaziri bongsho, Helok taki Heloki bongsho,
26.31: Osriel taki Osrieli bongsho, Sheḳom taki Sheḳomi bongsho,
26.32: Shimida taki Shimidayi bongsho ar Hefor taki Hefori bongsho.
26.33: Heforor fua Zolafḳad, tar kunu fuain asla na, ḳali fuṛin asla. Fuṛintor nam oilo, Mohola, Nua, Hogla, Milka ar Tirza.
26.34: Era hoḳol-u Manosha ḳandanor nanan bongsho. Erar maz taki gonia bayanno azar shat-sho zonre faoa gelo.
26.35: Iakubor fua Afraimor bongshodor oila, Shutoloh taki Shutolohi, Beḳor taki Beḳori ar Tohon taki Tohoni bongsho.
26.36: Shutolohor bongsho, Eron taki Eroni bongsho.
26.37: Era hoḳol Afraim ḳandanor nanan bongsho. Erar maz taki gonia bottish azar fas-sho zonre faoa gelo. Ḳandan hishabe era hoḳol-u Iusufor bongshodor.
26.38: Iakubor fua Bin-Iaminor bongshodor oila, Bela taki Belayi bongsho, Oshbel taki Oshbeli bongsho, Ahiram taki Ahirami bongsho,
26.39: Shufom taki Shufomi bongsho, ar Hufom taki Hufomi bongsho.
26.40: Belar fuain Ord ar Namanor mazdi Belar bongshodor oila, Ord taki Ordi bongsho ar Naman taki Namani bongsho.
26.41: Era Bin-Iamin ḳandanor nanan bongsho. Erar maz taki foytallish azar soy-sho zonre faoa gelo.
26.42: Iakubor fua Danor bongshodor oila, Shuhom taki Shuhomi bongsho. Era-u asla Dan ḳandanor manush.
26.43: Erar maz taki gonia soushoṭṭi azar sair-sho zonre faoa gelo.
26.44: Iakubor fua Ashiror bongshodor oila, Imna taki Imnayi bongsho, Zisbi taki Zisbia bongsho ar Boria taki Boriayi bongsho.
26.45: Boriar bongshodor oila Hebor taki Hebori bongsho, ar Molkiel taki Molkieli bongsho.
26.47: Era hoḳol-u Ashir ḳandanor nanan bongsho. Erar maz taki gonia teppanno azar sair-sho zonre faoa gelo.
26.48: Iakubor fua Noftalir bongshodor oila, Zohoshiel taki Zohoshieli bongsho, Guni taki Gunia bongsho,
26.49: Izer taki Izeri bongsho, ar Shillem taki Shillemi bongsho.
26.50: Era hoḳol-u Noftali kandanor nanan bongsho. Erar maz taki gonia foytallish azar sair-sho zonre faoa gelo.
26.51: Te gonar bade Boni Israilor maze zuddot zaoar zuka beṭaintor foriman oilo, muṭ soy laḳ eḳ azar shat-sho tish zon.
26.53: “Gona ou manush mafik asta deshor zomin baṭia dite oibo, zate hoḳole zarzir baṭ fae.
26.54: Ze ḳandanor manush beshi ou ḳandanre beshi ar ze ḳandanor manush ḳom, ou ḳandanre ḳom zaga dibae. Fortek kandanor manshe tar manush hishabe zaga-zomin faibo.
26.55: Ar kun ḳandane kun zagat zomin faibo, ita loṭari maria ṭik kora oibo. Forteḳ bongshor faona ongsho tar ḳandanor name deoa elaḳar maze-u taḳbo.
26.56: Ḳandanor manush ḳom ba beshi zeṭa-u ouk, loṭari maria zaga ṭik kora oibo.”
26.57: Hoḳol heshe Lebi kandanor bongshodor gona oilo. Era oila, Zarsun taki Zarsuni gusṭi, Kahat taki Kahati gusṭi ar Marari taki Mararia gusṭi.
26.58: Lebi kandanor kisu namḳora foribar asil, erar mul bafor nam oilo Libni, Hebron, Moholi, Mushi ar Kurah. Kahator eḳ fuar nam asil Imran.
26.59: Imranor bour nam Iukabez, Mishor desho taḳte Lebi kandanor maze en zonom oisil. En feṭ taki Imranor fuain Harun ar Musa ar tarar boin Moriomor zonom oisil.
26.60: Harunor fuain oila Nadab, Abihu, Ali-Azor ar Isamar.
26.61: Oile Mabudor hukum bangia dusra aguin dia ebadot ḳorat gia Nadab ar Abihu ou dui zonor moron oisil.
26.62: Eḳ mash ba er beshi boyoshor Lebi kandanor beṭaintor foriman asil teish azar. Boni Israilor bitre erare kunu zagar malikana deoa oise na gotike Boni Israilor oinnainno ḳandanor loge erare eḳloge gona-o oise na.
26.63: Ziriho ṭaunor ulṭabae Zordan gangor daro Muabor tol zagat dusrabar manush gonar shomoy Musa nobi ar imam Ali-Azore Boni Israilre gonla.
26.64: Oile foyla bar Sinai morubumit Musa ar imam Harune Boni Israilor zarare gonisla, ou dusrabar gonar shomoy erar mazor eḳzon-o zinda roisoin na.
26.65: Ashole ota Boni Israilor befare Mabude age-u ḳoisla, tara nichchoy ou morubumit mara zaiba. Ar hasau ḳali Zifunnir fua Kalut ar Nunor fua Iusa saṛa tarar mazor dusra ḳeu zinda roisil na.

27.1: Iusufor fua Manoshar ḳandanor Zolafḳador fuṛintor silsila oilo, Manoshar fua Makir, Makiror fua Giliod, Giliodor fua Hefor ar Heforor fuar nam Zolafḳad. Zolafḳador fuṛin oila Mohola, Nua, Hogla, Milka ar Tirza.
27.2: Ou fuṛin aia Milon-tambur duaror samne ubaia Musa nobi, imam Ali-Azor, murobbi neta ar hoḳol Boni Israilre ḳoila,
27.3: “Amrar baba to morubumit mara gesoin. Ar Kurahor dolor zeta manshe Mabudor birudde naformani korsla, tain to itar loge asla na. Tain ḳali tan nizor gunar dae mara gesoin. Ar amrar kunu bai zonmisoin na,
27.4: te bai na taḳae oḳon amrar bafor nam kita i bongsho taki miṭizito ni? Tan shoriḳanor loge amrare-o zaga-zominor baṭ deukka.”
27.5: Teu Musa nobie tarar befare Mabudor dorbaro aroz ḳorla.
27.7: “Zolafḳador fuṛinte ṭik kota-u ḳoise. Tarar bafor shoriḳanor loge tarare-o zomi-zomar baṭ dite oibo. Tara zate tarar bafaiti zomin fain, ikan tumi kial rakio.
27.8: Ar tumi Boni Israilre ḳo, morar ḳalo zudi kunu manshe fuain na toia morizae, te tar zomi-zomar baṭ tar fuṛinte faiba.
27.9: Tar kunu fuṛin na taḳle tar baiainte i shompotti faiba.
27.10: Tar zudi kunu bai na taḳe, te ita tar sasainte faiba.
27.11: Ar tar zudi kunu sasa-o na taḳoin, te tar bongshor hoḳol taki afon zone i shompotti faiba, ein itar malik oiba. Musa nobire batail Mabudor ou hukum oilo, Boni Israilor lagi zomi-zomar ainor eḳ dara.” Hozrot Musa (a:)or aḳeri bidae
27.12: Erbade Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Tumi Abarim faṛor ou usa ṭillar ufre uṭo, uṭia ami Boni Israilre ze desh disi, oḳan dekilao.
27.13: Ar huno, tumar bai Harun zela tar baf-dadar laḳan ḳoyboro huti roise, ou desh deḳar bade tumi-o ola tumar baf-dadar gese zaibaegi.
27.14: Mono ase ni, Zin morubumir Kadesh elaḳar Meriba namor zagar hou fanir ḳota? Morubumit Boni Israile zebla fanir lagi amar birudita ḳorsil, tarar samne tumra-o amare fak-fobitro ḳoia na mania amar hukumor ulṭa geslae.”
27.16: “O Mabud, zein hoḳol manshor zindegi dan ḳoroin, hou Alla Mabude Boni Israilor ufre ola eḳzon manshore boail ḳoroukka,
27.17: ze netae hoḳol manshore gore-bare, maṭo-moydano hoḳol befare salaiba. Teu Mabudor bonda oḳol a-raḳali goru-sagolor laḳan oita nae.”
27.18: Teu Mabude zuaf dila, “Nunor fut Iusar bitre to Allai ruhu asoin. Tumi tare ania tar ufre tumar at toia ḳelafoti boḳshia deo.
27.19: Tumi imam Ali-Azor ar hoḳol Boni Israilor samne tare azir ḳoria, tarar samne-u tare dayitto shomzai deo.
27.20: Tumare ze ḳemota deoa oise, ou ḳemotar kisu baṭ tare deo, teu hokkol Boni Israil tar ḳotae solba.
27.21: Bade he imam Ali-Azoror gese zaibo, gele Ali-Azore Allar fobitro Urim ar Tummim fattordi loṭari maria Mabudor morzi zanta farba. Ola Iusa ar tamam Boni Israile sola-fira ḳorba.”
27.22: Musa nobie Mabudor hukum mafik kam ḳorla. Tain imam Ali-Azor ar Boni Israilor samne Iusare nia azir ḳorla.
27.23: Ar Mabudor hukum mafik tan ufre at toia tanre dayitto shomzaila.

28.2: “Tumi Boni Israilre amar ou hukum zanai deo, amare kushi korar niote geran ala zalail kurbani amar ḳanir lagi shoṭik shomoye azir ḳorte oibo.
28.3: Tarare eoḳan ḳo, tumra Mabudor name fortidinor agunit deoa kurbani adae ḳorar niote ou foshu oḳol anio, fortidin eḳ bosor boyoshi dugu nikut meṛa-baichcha anio.
28.4: Ania egu biane ar egu hainja bala kurbani dibae.
28.5: Erlogor fortidinor dan-gomor sodgar lagi dui sher moyda ar eḳ sher zoytunor fisha tel anbae.
28.6: Iṭa oilo hou fortidinor zalail kurbani, zeta Tur faṛo shaibosto ḳora oisil. Ar ita to amar name agunit deoa kurbani, er dumar gerane ami kushi oi.
28.7: Forteḳ meṛar loge eḳ sher anguror shorbot dia shorbot-fanir sodga adae ḳorio. Mabudor namor kurbanir ou shorbot ebadot ḳanar uṭano ḍali dibae.
28.8: Meṛar aroḳ baichchare hainja bala kurbani dibae. Erloge biankur laḳan dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodga adae ḳorbae. Ita oilo agunit deoa kurbani, er dumar gerane ami Mabud kushi oi. Forti Zummabaror kurbanir niom
28.9: “Forteḳ Zummabare eḳ bosor boyoshi dugu meṛa-baichcha kurbani dibae. Erloge shorbot-fanir sodgar samana ar dan-gomor sodgar tel maḳail sair sher moyda-o dibae.
28.10: Fortidinor zalail foshu kurbani ar er logor shorbot-fanir sodga saṛa-o forteḳ Zummabare ou zalail kurbani adae ḳorbae. Forteḳ sandor kurbanir niom
28.11: “Forteḳ sandor foyla din Mabudor name zalail kurbanir lagi dugu bisal, egu meṛa ar eḳ bosor boyoshi shatgu meṛa-baichcha kurbani dibae, i hoḳol foshu fura nikut oito.
28.12: Ou forteḳ bisalor loge dan-gomor sodga hishabe tel maḳail soy sher moyda dibae, ar meṛar loge sair sher moyda dio,
28.13: ar forteḳ meṛa-baichchar loge tel maḳail dui sher moyda dio. Ita oilo amar name agunit deoa kurbani, itar dumar gerane ami Mabud kushi oi.
28.14: Shorbot-fanir sodgar lagi forteḳ bisalor loge dui sher anguror shorbot dibae. Forteḳ meṛar loge shua sher ar forteḳ meṛa-baichchar loge eḳ sher shorbot dio. Ita oilo mashik zalail kurbani, bosoror forteḳ sando ita adae ḳorbae.
28.15: Itar loge gunar koforar niote amar name egu sagol kurbani dio. Ta-o forteḳ dinor zalail kurbani, ar er logor shorbot-fanir sodga-o adae ḳorio. Azadi Idor kurbanir niom
28.16: “Forteḳ bosoror foyla sandor souddo tarik Mabudor name Azadi Id adae ḳorio.
28.17: Ou sandor fonro tarik taki shat din bora aroḳ id adae ḳorio, ikṭar nam Ḳamir Saṛa Ruṭir Id.
28.18: Er foyla din fobitro milon-mahfil ḳorio, i din duniabi niote kunu ḳam-ḳaz ḳora nazaiz.
28.19: Ou din amar name dugu bisal, egu meṛa ar eḳ bosor boyoshi shatgu meṛa-baichchadi agunit deoa zalail kurbani adae ḳorio. Kurbanir forteḳ foshu nikut oite oibo.
28.20: Ou foshur logor dan-gomor sodga hishabe tel maḳail moyda dibae, eḳoṭa bisalor loge soy sher, meṛa faṭar loge sair sher,
28.21: ar meṛa-baichchar loge dui sher dibae.
28.22: Itar loge tumrar gunar koforar lagi egu faṭa sagol-o kurbani dio.
28.23: Forteḳ dinor biankur zalail kurbani to dibae-u, erloge ou kurbani-o adae ḳorbae.
28.24: Ou laḳan fura haftar shatodin amare kushi korar geran ala ḳani hishabe forteḳ din ou agunit deoa kurbani adae ḳorbae. Fortidinor zalail kurbani ar er logor shorbot-fanir sodgar loge ou kurbani-o adae ḳorbae.
28.25: Heshe shat nombor din-o tumra fobitro milon-mahfil ḳorio, ou din duniabi niote kunu ḳam-ḳaz ḳora nazaiz. Fonchaisha Idor kurbanir niom
28.26: “Fonchaisha Idor din, mani ketor foyla daoa foshol dia zedin tumra amar name fobitro milon-mahfil ḳorbae, hi din kunu duniabi niote ḳam ḳorio na.
28.27: Ou din tumra dugu bisal, egu meṛa ar eḳ bosor boyoshi shatgu meṛa-baichcha dia zalail kurbani adae ḳorio, ou kurbanir dumar gerane ami Mabud kushi oi.
28.28: Ar otar logor dan-gomor sodga hishabe eḳoṭa bisalor loge tel maḳail soy sher moyda, meṛar loge sair sher,
28.29: ar meṛa-baichchar loge dui sher dibae.
28.30: Otar loge egu faṭa sagol-o kurbani dio tumrar gunar koforar lagi.
28.31: Ou hoḳol kurbani ar itar logor shorbot-fanir sodgar loge fortidinor zalail kurbani ar er logor dan-gomor sodga adae ḳorbae. Kial rakio, kurbanir hoḳol foshu zanu furafur nikut oy.

29.1: Mabude aro ḳoira, “Forteḳ bosoror shat nombor sandor foyla din oilo, tumrar Shinga Bazanir Idor din. Ou din tumra fobitro milon-mahfil ḳorio. I din duniabi niote kunu ḳam-ḳaz ḳora nazaiz.
29.2: Ou din tumra amare kushi korar geran ala zalail kurbani hishabe, egu bisal, egu meṛa ar shatgu eḳ bosor boyoshi meṛa-baichchare kurbani dio, hoḳol foshu zanu furafur nikut oy.
29.3: Ar otar logor dan-gomor sodga hishabe tel maḳail moyda dio. Bisalor loge soy sher, meṛar loge sair sher,
29.4: ar forteḳ meṛa-baichchar loge dui sher dibae.
29.5: Itar loge tumrar gunar koforar lagi egu faṭa sagol-o kurbani dibae.
29.6: Forteḳ sandor ar forti dinor zalail kurbani, itar logor dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodga saṛa-o ou kurbani oḳol adae ḳorio. Ita to amar name agunit deoa kurbani, itar dumar gerane ami Mabud kushi oi. Koforar Idor kurbanir niom
29.7: “Ar ou shat nombor sandor dosh tariko eḳṭa fobitro milon-mahfil ḳorbae. Ou din tumra forteḳe noto oia zarzir dil shofia dibae, i din ḳeu kunuzat ḳam ḳorio na.
29.8: Ami Mabudre kushi korar niote geran ala zalail kurbani hishabe nikut egu bisal, egu meṛa, ar shatgu eḳ bosor boyoshi meṛa-baichchare kurbani dio.
29.9: Ar otar logor dan-gomor sodga hishabe bisalor loge tel maḳail soy sher moyda dio, meṛar loge sair sher,
29.10: ar forteḳ meṛa-baichchar loge dui sher dibae.
29.11: Heshe guna mafir kurbanir lagi egu faṭa sagol-o dibae. Idor ou kurbani oḳol saṛa-o gunar koforar kurbani ar forti dinor zalail kurbani, er logor dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodga-o dio. Ḍera-goror Idor kurbanir niom
29.12: “Tumra Ḍera-goror Idor haftar foyla din mani, shat nombor sandor fonro tariko, eḳṭa fobitro milon-mahfil ḳorbae, ou din tumra duniabi niote kunu ḳam-ḳaz ḳorio na. Ou shat din Mabudor name idor kushi-bashi korio.
29.13: “Idor foyla din furafur nikut terogu bisal, dugu meṛa ar souddogu eḳ bosor boyoshi meṛa-baichcha dia zalail kurbani adae ḳorio. Er dumar gerane ami Mabud kushi oi.
29.14: Otar forteḳ bisalor logor dan-gomor sodga hishabe tel maḳail soy sher moyda, forteḳ meṛar loge sair sher,
29.15: ar forteḳ meṛa-baichchar loge dui sher dibae.
29.16: Heshe guna mafir kurbanir lagi egu faṭa sagol-o dibae. Dia forti dinor zalail kurbani, er logor dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodga-o dibae.
29.17: “Idor dui nombor din furafur nikut barogu bisal, dugu meṛa ar souddogu eḳ bosor boyoshi meṛa-baichcha kurbani dibae.
29.18: Ou bisal, meṛa ar meṛa-baichcha hokkolṭir loge dan-gomor sodga, shorbot-fanir sodga, foshur foriman mafik adae ḳorio.
29.19: Heshe guna mafir kurbanir lagi egu faṭa sagol-o dibae. Dia forti dinor zalail kurbani, er logor dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodga-o dibae.
29.20: “Idor tin nombor dino furafur nikut egarogu bisal, dugu meṛa ar souddogu eḳ bosor boyoshi meṛa-baichcha kurbani dibae.
29.21: Ou bisal, meṛa ar meṛa-baichcha hokkolṭir loge dan-gomor sodga, shorbot-fanir sodga, foshur foriman mafik adae ḳorio.
29.22: Heshe guna mafir kurbanir lagi egu faṭa sagol-o dibae. Dia forti dinor zalail kurbani, er logor dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodga-o dibae.
29.23: “Idor sair nombor din furafur nikut doshgu bisal, dugu meṛa ar souddogu eḳ bosor boyoshi meṛa-baichcha kurbani dibae.
29.24: Ou bisal, meṛa ar meṛa-baichcha hokkolṭir loge dan-gomor sodga, shorbot-fanir sodga, foshur foriman mafik adae ḳorio.
29.25: Heshe guna mafir kurbanir lagi egu faṭa sagol-o dibae. Dia forti dinor zalail kurbani, er logor dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodga-o dibae.
29.26: “Idor fas nombor din nikut noygu bisal, dugu meṛa ar souddogu eḳ bosor boyoshi meṛa-baichcha kurbani dibae.
29.27: Ou bisal, meṛa ar meṛa-baichcha hokkolṭir loge dan-gomor sodga, shorbot-fanir sodga, foshur foriman mafik adae ḳorio.
29.28: Heshe guna mafir kurbanir lagi egu faṭa sagol-o dibae. Dia forti dinor zalail kurbani, er logor dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodga-o dibae.
29.29: “Idor soy nombor din nikut aṭgu bisal, dugu meṛa ar souddogu eḳ bosor boyoshi meṛa-baichcha kurbani dio.
29.30: Ou bisal, meṛa ar meṛa-baichcha hokkolṭir loge dan-gomor sodga, shorbot-fanir sodga, foshur foriman mafik adae ḳorio.
29.31: Heshe guna mafir kurbanir lagi egu faṭa sagol-o dibae. Dia forti dinor zalail kurbani, er logor dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodga-o dibae.
29.32: “Idor shat nombor din furafur nikut shatgu bisal, dugu meṛa ar souddogu eḳ bosor boyoshi meṛa-baichcha kurbani dibae.
29.33: Ou bisal, meṛa ar meṛa-baichcha hokkolṭir loge dan-gomor sodga, shorbot-fanir sodga, foshur foriman mafik adae ḳorio.
29.34: Heshe guna mafir kurbanir lagi egu faṭa sagol-o dibae. Dia forti dinor zalail kurbani, er logor dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodga-o dibae.
29.35: “Idor aṭ nombor din mani, aḳeri din bidayi mahfil ḳorio, i din tumra duniabi niote kunu ḳam-ḳaz ḳorio na.
29.36: Ar Mabudre kushi korar niote geran ala agunit deoa kurbani hishabe ekkan zalail kurbani dibae. Erlagi nikut egu bisal, egu meṛa ar shatgu eḳ bosor boyoshi meṛa-baichcha kurbani dio.
29.37: Ou bisal, meṛa ar meṛa-baichcha hokkolṭir loge dan-gomor sodga, shorbot-fanir sodga, foshur foriman mafik adae ḳorio.
29.38: Heshe guna mafir kurbanir lagi egu faṭa sagol-o dibae. Dia forti dinor zalail kurbani, er logor dan-gomor sodga ar shorbot-fanir sodga-o dibae.
29.39: “Te forteḳ idor ḳalo Mabudor name tumrar id oḳlor niom mafik kurbani adae ḳorio. Ita saṛa, mannot furonor kurbani, zekunu nofol kurbanir niote zalail kurbani, dan-gomor sodga, shorbot-fanir sodga, ar salamoti kurbani-o adae ḳorio.”
29.40: Mabude Musa nobire zeta hukum-ahkam zanaisla, tain ita hokkolta Boni Israilre zanaila.

30.1: Bade Musa nobie Boni Israilor hoḳol ḳandanor murobbire ḳoila, “Mabude hukum disoin,
30.2: kunu beṭae zudi Mabudor name kunta mannot ḳore ba ḳosom ḳaia kunuta ḳorar oadae bondi oy, te he zanu tar oada bongo na ḳore. He zeta ḳoise, ita furon ḳora lagbo.
30.3: “Kunu abiati fuṛie zudi bafor baṛit taḳar ḳalo Mabudor name kunta mannot ḳore ba kunuta ḳorar oadae bondi oy,
30.4: ar bafe ita hunia-o fuṛire kunta na ḳoin, te i mannot ba oada tai furon ḳora lagbo.
30.5: Oile ikan hunar loge loge bafe zudi fuṛire ita ḳorte nished ḳoroin, te i mannot ba oada batil oizibo. Bafe nished ḳorae Mabude-o i mannot ba oada bangare maf ḳori diba.
30.6: “Ar kunu fuṛie zudi sinta-babna na ḳoria aḳta kunu mannot ba oada ḳorilae ar bade tair bia oizae,
30.7: biar bade zamaie ikan hunia loge loge kunta na ḳoin, te i mannot ba oadare tai furon ḳora lagbo.
30.8: Oile ita hunar loge loge zamaie zudi nished ḳoroin, te i mannot ba oadar bandon taki tai kalas faibo, Mabude-o ita maf ḳori diba.
30.9: “Ar kunu ṛaṛi beṭi ba talaḳ faoa kunu beṭie zudi mannot ḳoria oadae bondi oy, te ita furon ḳora lagbo-u.
30.10: “Zamair goror kunu boue zudi ola mannot mane ba ḳosom ḳaia oadae bondi oy,
30.11: bade tair zamaie ikan hunia kunta na matoin, taire nished na dein, te tai ita furon ḳora lagbo.
30.12: Oile zamaie hunia zudi loge loge nished dein, te i mannot ba oada batil oizibo. Tair zamaie nished ḳorae, Mabude-o ikan maf ḳori diba.
30.13: Boue ḳosom ḳaia oada ḳorle ba kunu mannot manle zamair eḳtiar ase ita mana ba batil ḳorar.
30.14: Oile zamaie zudi beshi din i befare kunta na matia nirai roin, te tar bour mannot ba oadar bandon fakka oizae. Hoḳolta hunar bade-o zamai ou shomoy nirai roae bour mannot ba oadare fakka banailae.
30.15: Oile hoḳolta hunar bade zamaie zudi hou dinor maze kunta na matia shomoy faronir bade nished ḳore, te boue ou mannot fura na ḳorae er dae-bar tair zamair ufre foṛbo.”
30.16: Zamai-bour befare, baf ar bafor baṛit roura fuṛir befare Mabude Musa nobire ola ain hikai dila.

31.2: “Madiani oḳole Boni Israilor loge zeta ḳorse, tumi otar oforador bodla deo. Erbade tumi tumar baf-dadar gese siroḳalor lagi huti roibae.”
31.3: Teu Musae Boni Israilre ḳoila, “Madiani oḳlor loge zuddo ḳorar lagi tumrar kisu sifaire zuit ḳoro, tara Mabudor torof taki Madiani oḳlor faona shaza diba.
31.4: Oḳon tumra Boni Israilor fortek kandan taki eḳ azar ḳori sifaire zuddot faṭao.”
31.5: Teu Boni Israilor baro ḳandan taki eḳo azar ḳori muṭ baro azar sifaire zuddor lagi zuit ḳora oilo.
31.6: Musae fortek kandan taki eḳ azar zon sifaire zuddot faṭaila. Erar loge imam Ali-Azoror fua Finohosh-o gela, zaite fobitro Kaba goror kisu samana loge ḳori nila ar tan ato ḳori zuddor aoazor sunga oḳol-o nila.
31.7: Musa nobire deoa Mabudor hukum mafik tara Madiani oḳlor loge zuddo ḳoria otar hoḳol beṭaintore marilila.
31.8: Shadaron manshor loge Madiani oḳlor fas zon bashshare-o tara marilila. Ou bashshain oila, Ibi, Reḳom, Shur, Hur ar Reba. Ar erar loge Balam bin Baur namor hou pirre-o tara zane marilila.
31.9: Tara Madian deshor hoḳol beṭin ar huruttainre bondi korla, tarar goru-sagol ar hokkol mal-samana luṭia anilla.
31.10: Madiani oḳol zoto ṭauno boshot ḳorta, ou ṭaun oḳol ar ṭaunor baror hoḳol tambu tara aguindi zalailila.
31.11: Zuddor bade tarar bondi kora hoḳol manush, gonimotor mal-samana, ar foshur fal loia roana oila.
31.12: Tara Musa nobi, imam Ali-Azor ar Boni Israilor kempo firar niote roana dila. Ou shomoy tarar tambu asil Ziriho elaḳar Zordan gangor daro Muab deshor tol zagat.
31.13: Tarar ḳobor faia Musa nobi, imam Ali-Azor ar Boni Israilor hoḳol murobbi kemp taki bar oia tarar loge deḳa ḳorat gela.
31.14: Gia zuddo taki firot aoa hoḳol kamanḍaror ufre mani azar sifair ar sho-sifair kamanḍar oḳlor ufre Musae kub gorom oia
31.15: ḳoila, “Tumra dushmonor hoḳol beṭintore zinda raḳlae ḳene?
31.16: Mono nai ni, oguinte Piyur faṛor ufre Balam piror foramishe, Boni Israilre Mabudor ges taki duroi horaisil, erlagi to Mabudor bonda oḳlor ufre gozobi bemar nazil oisil.
31.17: Te oḳon tumra otar hoḳol fuaintore zane marilao, biati ba oshoti hoḳol beṭintore-o marilao.
31.18: Ḳali abiati shoti fuṛintore tumrar lagi zita rakio.
31.19: “Ar tumra zera kunu manshore zane marso ba murdar lash soiso, tumra shatdin bora kempor bare roio. Ermaze tin nombor ar shat nombor din tumra nize ar bondi kori ana manshore-o fak-saf ḳorbae.
31.20: Tumrar hoḳol ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ, samṛar mal-samana, laḳṛi ar sagolor rumadi banail hokkol samanare-o fak-saf ḳorbae.”
31.21: Zeta sifai oḳol zuddot gesla, imam Ali-Azore tarare ḳoila, “Ita oilo Musa nobir ate deoa Mabudor shoriotor ekkan ain:
31.22: Tumra shuna, rufa, fitol, lua, ṭin, shishadi banail hoḳol mal-samana,
31.23: mani zeta mal agunit dile zole na, ita hoḳolta agunir maze dibae, teu ita fak-saf oibo. Oile zalanir bade itare fak-saf ḳorar fanidi doia pak-pakiza ḳora lagbo. Ar zeta aguine nosṭo oizae, itare ḳali fak-saf ḳorar fanidi doilibae.
31.24: Bade shat nombor din tumrar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ doia harle, pak-pakiza bonia kempor bitre hamaibae.” Gonimotor mal-samanar baṭ
31.26: “Tumi ar imam Ali-Azor ar shomazor murobbi oḳole milia, bondi kori ana hoḳol manush ar foshuintore gono.
31.27: Gonia hoḳol mal dui baṭ ḳoro. Itar eḳ baṭ dibae zuddot zeta sifai oḳol gesil tarare, ar dusra baṭ bad-baki manshore dio.
31.28: Ou sifai oḳlor baṭo zoto manush, goru-sagol foṛbo, itar forteḳ fas-shoṭa taki eḳṭare Mabudor lagi algai toio.
31.29: Algaia Mabudor faona ou baṭre tumi imam Ali-Azoror ato dibae.
31.30: Ar Boni Israilor baṭo zeta manush, goru-sagol faiba, itar forteḳ foinchashṭa taki eḳṭare alog kori toio. Toia Allar boshot ḳana, Baytulla tambur ḳadim Lebi oḳlor ato ita shomzaio.”
31.31: Mabude Musare zela hukum disla, tain ar imam Ali-Azore ola-u ḳorla.
31.32: Sifai oḳole zitia ana gonimotor mal-samana saṛa-o aro asil, soy laḳ fosottoir azar meṛa ar sagol,
31.35: ar bottish azar abiati shoti fuṛin.
31.36: Teu zuddo ḳorra sifai oḳlor baṭo foṛlo, tin laḳ shaṛtish azar fas-shoṭa meṛa ar sagol,
31.37: ita taki Mabudor faona baṭo foṛlo, soy-sho fosottoirgu sagol-meṛa.
31.38: Ar goru asil soytish azar, ita taki Mabudor baṭo foṛlo baottoirṭa.
31.39: Ermaze gada asil tish azar fas-shoṭa, ita taki Mabudor baṭo foṛlo eḳshoṭṭigu.
31.40: Ar abiati shoti fuṛin asla shullo azar, ita taki Mabudor baṭo foṛlo bottishṭa.
31.41: Mabude Musa nobire zela hukum disla, tain Mabudor faona baṭ nia imam Ali-Azoror ato ola shomzai dila.
31.42: Ar Musae Boni Israilor bad-baki manshor lagi ze baṭ sifai oḳlor ges taki nisla,
31.43: i baṭo tin laḳ shaṛtish azar fas-shogu meṛa ar sagol,
31.46: ar shullo azar abiati shoti fuṛin asla.
31.47: Bade Mabudor hukum mafik Musa nobie Boni Israilor faoa baṭor, forteḳ foinchash zon abiati fuṛin ar foshuin taki-o, egu ḳori fuṛi ar foshu nia Lebi kandanor manshore dila, zerar ufre Mabudor Kaba goror deḳa-hunar zimmadari asil.
31.48: Erbade sifai dolor azar sifair ar sho-sifair kamanḍar oḳol Musar gese aila,
31.49: aia ḳoila, “Afnar i gulam oḳole amrar zimmae taḳa sifai oḳolre gonilam. Gonia deḳlam, tara hoḳol fura asoin, zuddot ḳeu morse na.
31.50: Erlagi amra forteḳor baṭo zeta shunar bazu, bala, ator angṭi, ḳanor dul ar golar har faisi, amra ita hoḳolta loia aisi. Amrar zanor koforar kurbani hishabe ota Mabudor dorbaro dilaitam.”
31.51: Teu Musa ar imam Ali-Azore tarar ges taki shunar hoḳol goyna shomzia faila.
31.52: Tara azar sifair ar sho-sifair kamanḍar oḳlor ges taki Mabudor name deoa ze shunar goyna shomzia faila, itar uzon asil shullo azar shat-sho foinchash tola.
31.53: -54 Musa nobi ar imam Ali-Azore azar sifai ar sho-sifair kamanḍar oḳlor ges taki ou shuna oḳol shomzia raḳla. Rakia Mabudor samne Boni Israilor iadgarir nishana hishabe ota shuna oḳol Kaba goror bitre toila. Ita saṛa-o sifai oḳole gonimotor aro mal-samana zarzir gese raḳsila.

32.1: Ruben ar Sadu ḳandanor manshor goru-sagolor boṛo boṛo fal asil. Tara deḳla, Zazira ar Giliod elaḳa foshu falibar lagi kub bala zaga.
32.2: Teu tara Musa nobi, imam Ali-Azor ar Boni Israilor fordan murobbi oḳolre ḳoila,
32.3: -4 “Afnaintor i gulam oḳole to goru-sagol fali. Ar amrar Mabude Oṭarut, Diban, Zazira, Nimra, Hishbon, Iliali, Sebam, Nobo ar Biun namor zeta zaga Boni Israilor doḳolo anchoin, ita to foshu falibar lagi kub bala zaga.
32.5: Oḳon afne zudi amrare doya ḳoroin, te ou zaga ḳanain afnar i gulam oḳolre dilaukka. Amrare Zordan gangor hifaro nein na zanu.”
32.6: Musa nobie tarare zuaf dila, “Tumrar baiain zuddo ḳorat zaiba, ar tumra ono boi roibae ni?
32.7: Mabude Boni Israilre ze zaga ḳanain disoin, hino zaite tumra ḳene tarar monobol bangi dirae?
32.8: Huno, age zebla ou desh deḳar lagi tumrar baf-dadainre ami Kadesh-Bornea taki faṭaislam, hou shomoy tara-o ola ḳorsla.
32.9: Tara Boni Israilor lagi Mabudor dan ḳora desh deḳat gesil, gia Ashkulor faṛia ḳal forzonto deḳsil, dekia aia hou desho zaite erar monobol bangi disil.
32.10: Erlagi hou din gusae aguin oia Mabude ḳosom ḳaia ḳoisla,
32.11: ami Mabude ze desh dibar lagi Ibrahim, Isʼhak ar Iakubor gese ḳosom ḳaislam, Mishor taki bar oia aoa manshor maze bish bosor ba er beshi boyoshi kunu zone i desh deḳar shuzug faita nae, ḳenena tara amar ḳota furafur shullo-ana manche na.
32.12: Ḳali Konizi Zifunnir fua Kalut ar Nunor fut Iusae ou desh deḳar shuzug faiba. Tara to amar ḳotare shullo-ana manche.
32.13: Hou shomoy Mabude Boni Israilor ufre gusae aguin oigesla, erlagi tan nozoro naformani korra ota manshor binash na oa forzonto, sallish bosor dori morubumir nanan zagat itare sokkor deoaila.
32.14: “Ar hou gunagar oḳlor aolad oae, oḳon tumra-o zarzir baf-dadar ḳaislot faiso, erlagi Boni Israilor ufre Mabudor gusar aguinre aro baṛairae.
32.15: Oḳon tumra zudi tan hukum mafik na solo, te tain hirbar ota manshore morubumit falai toiba, tan i lannotor ḳaron oibae tumra-u.”
32.16: Ita hunia tara Musar daro biṛia ḳoila, “Sab, amra to ḳali foshur fal raḳar zaga banani ar amrar bou-baichchare toar lagi ono ṭaun oḳol bananir izazot saisi.
32.17: Oile Boni Israilre nizor zagat na fosani forzonto amra zuddor sifair laḳan tarar age age zaimu. Ermaze amrar bou-baichchain baunḍori kora ou ṭauno roile, ota deshor manshor at taki tara nirafode roiba.
32.18: Hokkol Boni Israilre zarzir zomi-mirash na shomzani forzonto amra nizor goro firia aitam nae.
32.19: Ar Zordan gangor hofaro Boni Israilor loge amra kunu zomi-zomar baṭo nitam nae, ḳenena amrar baṭ to gangor ou fubor faro-u miligese.”
32.20: Ikan hunia Musae ḳoila, “Aichcha, tumra zudi hasau ila ḳoro, Allare azir-nazir zania zuddor haze atiar loia zudi hono laṛait zao,
32.21: ar Allae zotoboil tan dushmon oḳolre tan samne taki kedaia na dein otoboil tumra zuddor haze tan lagi gang faroia hofaro zudi zao,
32.22: te hou desho Mabudor doḳoldari kaim oia harle tumra ono firot aitae farbae. Teu Mabud ar bad-baki Boni Israilor lagi tumrar ze day-dayitto asil, ita taki kalas oibae; ar Mabudor kushi mafik ou zomino tumrar malikana ḳaim oibo.
32.23: Oile tumra zudi ila na ḳoro, te tumra Mabudor gese gunagar bonbae. Mono rakio, tumrar fafe tumrare saṛto nae.
32.24: Oḳon tumrar bou-baichchar lagi ṭaun oḳol ar goru-sagol toar lagi zaga-o banaitae faro, oile tumra zeḳan oada ḳorso, ita furon ḳora lagbo.”
32.25: Teu Sadu ar Ruben ḳandanor manshe Musa nobire ḳoila, “Afne to amrar malik, afnar i gulam oḳolre afne zela hukum disoin, amra ola-u solmu.
32.26: Amrar bou-baichchain ar goru-sagolor fal onor Giliod elaḳar ṭaun oḳol-o roiba.
32.27: Oile amra amrar malikor hukum mafik zuddor shaz-shoronjam loia gang faroia Mabudor name laṛai korat zaimu.”
32.28: Teu Musae ota manshor befare imam Ali-Azor, Nunor fua Iusa, ar Boni Israilor baro ḳandanor nanan gusṭir murobbi oḳolre hukum dila.
32.29: Tain erare ḳoila, “Sadu ar Ruben ḳandanor hoḳol beṭain zudi hasau zuddor shaz-shoronjam loia Mabudor name laṛai korar niote tumrar loge Zordan gang faroia zain, te hou desh zebla tumrar doḳolo aibo, ou shomoy tumra Giliod elaḳare tarar malikanae shomzai dio.
32.30: Oile tara zudi ila na ḳoroin, te hou Kenan desho-u tumrar loge tarar baṭ niba.”
32.31: Ikan hunia Sadu ar Ruben ḳandanor manshe ḳoila, “Mabude tan i gulam oḳolre zela hukum disoin, amra ola-u ḳormu.
32.32: Amra Mabudor name zuddor shaz-shoronjam loia Zordan gang faroia Kenan desho zaimu, oile amrar zomi-zomar baṭ gangor ofaro roilo.”
32.33: Ikan hunia Musa nobi razi oila. Tain Sadu ar Ruben ḳandanre, erloge Iusufor fua Manosha ḳandanor ordeḳ manshore, ou zagain dila. Musae Amuri oḳlor bashsha Sihun ar Bashonor bashsha Uzor asta razottor hoḳol ṭaun ar gau-geram shoho shob zomi-mirash tarar lagi toila.
32.34: Teu Sadu ḳandanor manshe Diban, Oṭarut, Aruar,
32.36: Bayt-Nimra, Bayt-Haran namor gauain ar ṭaun oḳolre usa usa baunḍori oal gatia mozbut ḳorla. Erloge tarar goru-sagol toibar zaga-o banaila.
32.37: Ruben ḳandanor manshe Hishbon, Iliali, Kiriataim ṭaun,
32.38: ar Nobo, Baal-Miyun, Sibma namor gauain ṭik-ṭak korla. Ḳoria tara itar noya nam toila.
32.39: Manoshar fua Makiror aolad oḳole Giliodo gia age-u ita doḳol ḳorilisil, ar honor bashinda Amuri oḳolre ḳedai disil.
32.40: Erlagi Musae Manoshar ou aolad Makiri oḳlor baṭo Giliod elaḳare dilaila, tara ono boshot ḳorla.
32.41: Ermaze Manosha ḳandanor Zayir namor eḳzone gia Amuri oḳlor hoḳol gau-geram doḳol ḳorilisil, ar itar nam disil Habbut-Zayir.
32.42: Ar Nuba namor eḳzone gia Konat ar er ḳanda-ḳasar gau-geram oḳol doḳol ḳoria, tar nizor name i zagar nam dilo Nuba.

33.1: Musa ar Harun nobir netagirie Boni Israil zati fouzi dol hazia, Mishor desh taki bar oia aoar bade nanan zagat dom loila.
33.2: Ar Mabudor hukume Musa nobie tarar dom loar zagaintor nam lekia toila. Ou zagain oilo,
33.3: bosoror foyla sandor fonro tarik, mani Azadi Idor bador din, tara Mishor deshor Ramashesh elaḳa taki roana oila. Mishoror hoḳol manshor sokur samnedi tara buk fulaia bar oia aila.
33.4: Ou shomoy Mishori oḳole tarar boṛo fuaintor lash dafon ḳorat asil. Mabude agor rait tarar hoḳol goror boṛo fuainre marilisla. Tain otar deb-debir ufre-o gozob ḍalia tarar faona shaza disla.
33.5: Boni Israile Ramashesh elaḳa saṛia Sukkoto aia tambu gaṛila.
33.6: Bade Sukkot taki morubumir ḳandat Etom namor zagat aia tambu gaṛila.
33.7: Ar Etom taki Baal-Zafonor samne Migdulor ḳandat Fama-Hirut namor zagat aia tambu gaṛila.
33.8: Bade Fama-Hirut taki doria faroia Etom morubumit gela, ou morubumi bae tin dinor fot faṛi dia Maruat gia tambu gaṛila.
33.9: Bade Marua taki Elimo gela, ino fanir barogu indara ar shottoirgu ḳezur gas asil.
33.10: Erbade Elim saṛia Nil doriar faro gia tambu gaṛila.
33.11: Hono taki Sin morubumit aia roila.
33.12: Ar Sin morubumi taki Dofka namor zagat gia kemp gaṛila.
33.13: Bade Dofka saṛia Alusho gia kemp gaṛila.
33.14: Alush taki Rofidimo gela, ino ḳaibar kunu fani asil na.
33.15: Teu Rofidim saṛia tara Sinai morubumit gia kemp gaṛila.
33.22: Rissa taki Kohelata namor zagat tambu gaṛila.
33.36: Ar oḳan taki Zin morubumir ḳandat Kadesh elaḳat gia tambu gaṛila.
33.37: Bade Kadesh saṛia Idum deshor shimanar gese Hur faṛo roila.
33.38: Boni Israil Mishor desh taki baroi aoar bade, sallish bosoror fas nombor sandor foyla din imam Harun Mabudor hukume Hur faṛor ufre uṭisla, ar hono tan ufat oilo.
33.39: Tain eḳ-sho teish bosor boyosho Hur faṛor ufre inteḳal ḳorla.
33.40: Ermaze Orad elaḳar Kenani bashshae ḳobor faila, Boni Israil ono aisoin. Tain to Kenan deshor Negeb morubumit roita.
33.41: Bade Boni Israile Hur faṛ saṛia Solmuna namor zagat gia tambu gaṛila.
33.44: Obut taki Muab deshor shimanat Iya-Abarimo gela.
33.47: Bade tara Abarim faṛo uṭia Nobo namor ṭillar ḳandat kemp gaṛila.
33.48: Erbade Abarim faṛ saṛia Ziriho ṭaunor ulṭabae Zordan gangor ḳandat Muab deshor tol zagat tambu gaṛila.
33.49: I kempor shimana asil Zordan gangor faro Muab elaḳar tol zaga Bayt-Zishimut taki Abel-Shiṭim ṭaun forzonto.
33.50: Ar ou shomoy Ziriho elaḳar Zordan gangor daro Muab deshor tol zagat Mabude Musa nobire ḳoila,
33.51: “Tumi Boni Israilre zanai deo, tumra zebla Zordan gang faroia Kenan desho gia azibae,
33.52: ou shomoy tumrar samon taki honor hoḳol manshore ḳedai dibae. Ḳedaia tarar fattor kudia banail hoḳol murti bangia surmar ḳorbae. Hunaror atiardi banail hoḳol deb-debir murti binash ḳorbae. Ar ṭillar ufror devtar namor foshur-boli kanain tulia falaibae.
33.53: Olaḳan tumra asta desh doḳol ḳoria hono boshot ḳorbae. Mono rakio, tumrar doḳoldarir lagi i deshḳan ami tumrare dan ḳorsi.
33.54: Hono loṭari maria tumrar nanan gusṭir zaga baṭia nio. Ze gusṭit beshi manush tarare beshi zaga, ar ḳom oile ḳom zaga dio. Loṭarit ze gusṭie ze zaga faiba, tara ono-u boshot ḳorba. Ḳandanor mazor nanan gusṭie zarzir ḳandanor elaḳar maze zaga faiba.
33.55: Oile tumra zudi honor bashinda oḳolre na ḳedao, te tarar zeguin roiba, iguin tumrar sokur ḳaṭa ar bukur sel bonia roiba. Itae tumrar boshoti zomino tumrare zulum-mosiboto falaiba.
33.56: Hou shomoy ami tumrare ola shaza dimu, ze shaza ḳali tarar lagi-u ṭik koria toislam.”

34.2: “Tumi Boni Israilre amar ou hukum zanai deo, tumra gia Kenan desho hamanir bade hono ze zagar malikana faibae, i zagar shimana oilo,
34.3: Idum deshor boḍaror Zin morubumir kisu elaḳa tumrar deshor douknor shimana. Bade ou douknor shimana taki fubedi gia Luna shagoror hesh mata forzonto.
34.4: Erloge Akrabbim faṛor fot faroia hari Zin morubumit hamaia Kadesh-Bornear douknedi shimana zaibo. Gia oḳan taki Hazor-Ador oia Ozmun forzonto tumrar shimana.
34.5: Ar Ozmun taki guria Mishoror shimanar hukna ḳalor faredi Bumodio shagoro gia lagbo.
34.6: “Tumrar deshor foismor shimana oibo Bumodio shagor. Iṭa-u tumrar foismor ail.
34.7: “Tumrar utoror shimana oibo, Bumodio shagor taki Hur namor faṛ,
34.8: ou faṛ taki Hamato zaibar fot forzonto, Hamator fot taki tumrar shimana Zidad gau forzonto zaibo.
34.9: Ar Zidad taki Zifrun oia Hazor-Onono gia shesh oibo. Iṭa-u oibo tumrar utoror shimana.
34.10: “Deshor fubor shimana oilo, Hazor-Onon taki Shofam forzonto eḳṭa shimana ail ṭik korio.
34.11: Ou Shofamor shimana taki Oin gaur fubedi gia Ribla forzonto aia lambo, lamia Galil aoror soredi zaibo,
34.12: gia Zordan gangor faredi Luna shagoro aia shesh oibo. Ou shob oilo tumrar deshor sairo galar shimana ail.”
34.13: Ar Musae Boni Israilre hukum dila, “Mabudor hukum mafik tumra loṭari maro, maria tumrar noy ḳandan ar Manosha ḳandanor ordeḳ manshore ou deshor zomi-maṭi baṭia dia, tumrar doḳoldari kaim ḳoro.
34.14: Zano to, Ruben ḳandan, Sadu ḳandan ar Manosha ḳandanor ordeḳ manshe tarar zarzir gusṭi mafik zomi-zomar baṭ age-u failise.
34.15: Tara Ziriho elaḳar Zordan gangor fubor faro tarar baṭ age-u basia nisoingi.” Noya shordar ṭik kora
34.17: “Ou deshor zomi-maṭire baṭia dite zera matobbori korba, erar nam oilo, imam Ali-Azor ar Nunor fua Iusa.
34.18: Zomi-zoma baṭibar ḳalo shaijjo ḳorar lagi fortek kandano taki eḳzon ḳori shordar nibae.
34.19: Ou shordar oila, Ehuda ḳandanor Zifunnir fua Kalut,
34.22: Dan ḳandanor shordar Uzolir fua Bukki,
34.23: Iusufor fua Manosha ḳandanor shordar Ifador fua Hanniel,
34.24: Iusufor fua Afraim ḳandanor shordar Shiftonor fua Komuel,
34.25: Sobulon ḳandanor shordar Fornaḳor fua Ilizafon,
34.26: Isaḳor ḳandanor shordar Azanor fua Foltiel,
34.27: Ashir ḳandanor shordar Sholumir fua Ohihud,
34.28: Noftali kandanor shordar Amihudor fua Fodohel.”
34.29: Mabude ou shordar oḳolre zimmadari shomzaila, Kenan desho Boni Israilor zomi-zoma baṭia dibar lagi.

35.1: Bade Ziriho ṭaunor ḳasat Zordan gangor daro Muab deshor tol zagat Mabude Musare ḳoila,
35.2: “Tumi Boni Israilre ou hukum deo, tara zarzir ḳandanor zomi-zomar baṭ faia harle, ota taki kisu ṭaun Lebi kandanor manshore dilaita, era ono roiba, erloge bondor kisu zomi-o erare dita.
35.3: Ou ṭauno tara boshot ḳorba, ar bondor zomino tarar foshur fal raḳba.
35.4: Tumra Lebi kandanre ze ṭaun oḳol dibae, itar baunḍori oalor bare tarare aro eḳ azar at zaga dibae, tarar foshur fal raḳar lagi.
35.5: Tumra zoto ṭaun tarare dibae, itar sairo galar baunḍori oalor bare, mani utore-douḳne, fube-foisme, hokkolbae aro dui azar at bondor zaga mafia dio. Ono tarar foshur fal raḳba.
35.6: “Tumra Lebi kandanre zeta ṭaun oḳol dibae, ermazor soyḳan ṭaun oibo kuni manshor asroy ṭaun. Kunu manshe aḳta ḳeurore marilile, he ou ṭauno gia asroy loibo. Ou soy ṭaun bade-o Lebi kandanre aro beyallish ḳan ṭaun dilaibae.
35.7: Muṭ aṭchallish ḳan ṭaun Lebi oḳolre dibae, ar erloge foshur fal raḳar bondor zaga-o dibae.
35.8: Boni Israilor zomi-zoma taki Lebi kandanre zebla ṭaun oḳol dibae, ou shomoy hoḳol ḳandane faoa zominor baṭ taki tarare dibae. Ze ḳandane beshi faise era beshi diba, ar zera ḳom faise era ḳom diba.” Kuni manshor asroy ṭaun
35.10: “Tumi Boni Israilre ḳo, tumra zebla Zordan gang faroia Kenan desho gia hamaibae,
35.11: ou shomoy tumrar nizor lagi koyḳan asroy ṭaun ṭik korio. Teu kunu manshe zudi aḳta ḳoza ḳoria ḳeurore kun ḳorilae, te bagia hono gia asroy loibo.
35.12: Kunor bodla loura manshor ges taki bagia zan basanir lagi i asroy ṭaun. Ete Boni Israilor adaloto bisaror ag forzonto kunor ashamire ḳeu zane marar shuzug faito nae.
35.13: Erlagi Lebi kandanre tumra ze ṭaun oḳol dibae, itar mazor soyḳan ṭaun oibo tumrar asroy ṭaun.
35.14: Ermazor tinḳan ṭaun oibo Zordan gangor fubor faro, ar tinḳan oibo Kenan deshor bitre.
35.15: Ou soyoḳan ṭaun oibo Boni Israilor lagi, tumrar loge roura bin-deshi oḳlor lagi ar musafir oḳlor lagi asroy ṭaun. Erar mazor ḳeu zudi aḳta bekiale ḳeurore kun ḳorilae, te oḳano gia zan basaibo.
35.16: “Oile kunu manshe zudi luar kunu atiar dia ḳeurore mare ar hou zon morizae, te ogu kuni. Ou kunire zane marilibae.
35.17: Ze fattor dia kunu manshore kun ḳora zaibo, ila kunu fattor zudi keuror ato taḳe, ar ogudi keurore marae hou manush morizae, te ogu-o kuni. I kunire zane marilibae.
35.18: Manush kun oar moto kunu laḳṛir zinish zudi keuror ato taḳe, ar ogu dia ḳeurore marae hou manush morizae, te ogu-o kuni. I kunire zane marilibae.
35.19: Kun oa zonor afon ze manshe i kunor bodla loar ḳota, ḳali he-u ou kunire zane marilibo. Kunir deḳa faile-u tare zane marilibo.
35.20: “Ar ingsha ḳoria zudi eḳzone aroḳzonre ḍekka mare, ba kunuzat ostrodi ichcha ḳoria iṭa mare ar hou manush morizae,
35.21: ba dushmonir babe ḳeurore gushi mare ar he morizae, te ze marse he kuni. I kunire zane marilibae. Kun oa zonor afon ze manshe i kunor bodla loar ḳota, he ou kunir lagal faile-u tare zane marilibo.
35.22: “Oile mono kunu dushmoni na rakia bule aḳta ḳeurore ḍekka marle, ba mono kunu ḳarafi na taḳle-o bule tar ufre iṭa mari dile,
35.23: ba na dekia, manush morizibar zuka kunu fattor ḳeuror ufre falai dile he zudi morizae, te kunuzat dushmonir bab na taḳae, ar ḳeti korar kunu ichcha na taḳae,
35.24: Boni Israilor adalotor manshe, ou kunir ar kunor bodla loura zonor befare ou niom mania bisar ḳorba.
35.25: Ou shomoy adalotor manshe kunor bodla lourar at taki kuni zonre basaiba, basaia he age zeḳano bagia gesil, hou asroy ṭauno tare hirbar fosai diba. Ar fobitro tel dia ḳelafoti faoa fordan imam sabor moutor ag forzonto he hono roibo.
35.26: Oile he zudi kunu shomoy hou asroy ṭaunor bare bar oia zaegi,
35.27: ar bodla lourae tare faia zane marilae, te he kunor dayi oito nae.
35.28: Ḳaron fordan imamor mout na oa forzonto he asroy ṭauno roar ḳota. Ḳali fordan imamor moutor bade he nizor baṛit firia aito farbo.
35.29: Tumra deshor zeno-u boshot ḳoro na ḳene, oarishor for oarish dori ita mante oibo, ita to oilo tumrar shoriotor eḳṭa ain.
35.30: “Shakkir zobanbondir ufre nirbor ḳoria kunire zane marilaoa oibo. Oile ḳali eḳzon shakkir ḳotae ḳeurore marilaoa zaito nae.
35.31: Mout-u zar faona shaza, ila kunu kunire kunumonte-u ṭeḳar bodla ḳalas deoa zaito nae. Tare zane marilite-u oibo.
35.32: Ashroy ṭauno roura kunu ashamire ṭeḳar bodla, fordan imamor moutor age tar nizor baṛit firai ana zaito nae.
35.33: Mono rakio, ita ḳoria tumra nizor deshor maṭire nafak korio na. Zano to, kunor loue desh nafak oizae. Ar ze desho kunor lou zorse, hou kunir lou saṛa ar kunumonte-u hi deshor nafakir kofora oy na.
35.34: Ar tumra ze desho roibae ami-o to hono roimu, erlagi i deshre nafak banaio na. Ḳaron ami Mabud Boni Israilor maze boshot ḳori.”

36.1: Iusuf nobir aolador ḳandan oḳol taki, Manoshar nati Makiror fua Giliod gusṭir nanan foribar taki murobbi oḳol aila, aia tara Musa nobi ar Boni Israilor nanan gusṭir shordar oḳlor loge matila.
36.2: Ḳoila, “Mabude amrar i malikre hukum disla, loṭari maria Boni Israilor maze deshor zaga-zomin baṭia dita. Dibar shomoy amrar bai Zolafḳador zomi-zoma ḳanain tar fuṛintore dibar hukum disoin.
36.3: Oile Boni Israilor dusra kunu ḳandanor manshor loge zudi ou fuṛintor bia oy, te amrar baf-dadar samana taki tarar samana bar oia gia, tarar zamair ḳandanor zomi-zomat hamaizibo, ete amrar ḳandanor zomi-mirashor kisu ongsho ḳomizibo.
36.4: Boni Israilor zomi-mirash Firot Faoar hou fobitro foinchash bosoror ḳalo, tarar zomi-zoma gia to tarar zamair ḳandanor samana oizibo. Ou laḳan amrar baf-dadar zomi-mirash taki tarar ongsho bar oia zaibogi.”
36.5: Ikan hunia Mabudor hukum mafik Musae Boni Israilre ḳoila, “Iusufor aolador ou ḳandanor manshe zeta ḳoira, ita to hasa.
36.6: Erlagi Zolafḳador fuṛintor befare Mabude hukum dira, tara zare fosond ḳoroin tar gese-u bia boita farba. Oile shorto oilo, tarar bafor ḳandanor bitre bia boite oibo.
36.7: Boni Israilor zomi-mirash ek kandan taki arok kandano zaito farto nae. Boni Israilor forteḳ zone tar baf-dadar zomi-mirash basani lagbo.
36.8: Boni Israilor forteḳe zate tarar baf-dadar ges taki faoa zomi-zomar malikana ṭikai raḳto fare, otar lagi fortek kandanor zomi-zomar malikana faoa fuṛinte tarar bafor ḳandanor noshar gese bia boite oibo.
36.9: Ek kandan taki arok kandano kunu zomi-zoma zaito nae. Boni Israilor fortek kandane tarar zomi-zomar malikana doria raḳte oibo.”
36.10: Mabude Musare zela hukum disla, Zolafḳador fuṛinte ola manla.
36.11: Tarar bafor ḳandanor baiaintor gese bia boila. Zolafḳador fuṛintor nam oilo, Mohola, Tirza, Hogla, Milka, ar Nua.
36.12: Iusufor fua Manoshar ḳandanor gusṭi oḳlor maze-u tara bia boila.
36.13: Ar huno, Ziriho elaḳar Zordan gangor daro Muab deshor tol zagat, Mabude Musa nobir mazdi Boni Israilre ou hukum-ahkam ar niom-ḳanun oḳol disla.

1.1: Musa nobie Zordan gangor fub faror Araba namor morubumit Boni Israil zatire ou boyan ḳorsla, tain Suf gaur samne ubaia tarar loge matila. Er eḳbae asil Faran, ar oinnobae asil Tufol, Labon, Hazirut ar Dizahab, ou sair gau.
1.2: Seiror faṛia fotedi Tur faṛ taki Kadesh-Bornea forzonto aṭia zaite ḳali egaro din lage.
1.3: Oile Boni Israil Mishor taki bar oia unchallish bosor egaro mash forzonto, ortat soforor sallish boros solar ḳalo, ono gurila. Bade ou mashor foyla tariko Musa nobie tarare zanaila Mabude tanre zeta ḳoisla.
1.4: Tain laṛai kori Amuri oḳlor bashsha Sihunre ar Bashon deshor bashsha Uzre araia harle ita ḳoila. Ou Sihune bashshai korta Hishbon ṭauno, ar Uze bashshai korta Osṭarut ar Idri ṭauno.
1.5: Zordan gangor fub faror Muab desho, Musa nobie Allar deoa Tourator talim boyan ḳoria buzaila. Tain ḳoila,
1.6: “O Boni Israil, huno, amra Tur faṛor galat taḳar ḳalo Mabud Allae amrare ḳoisla, ou faṛor galat tumrar bout din guzori gese.
1.7: Te oḳon tumra hoḳole tambu tulia Amuri oḳlor faṛia elaḳa ar ou elaḳar ḳanda-ḳasar hoḳol zagat zaoar lagi roana o. I zaga hoḳolta oilo gia: Araba morubumi ar ou morubumir ḳanda-ḳasar usa faṛia zaga ar nisa faṛia zaga, Negeb morubumi ar doriar kinara, mani Kenan desh taki arombo ḳoria Lebanon desh oia Furat gang forzonto ita hoḳol zaga.
1.8: Mono rakio, ita hoḳol zaga ami tumrare dilaisi. Ami Mabude tumrar baf-dadain Ibrahim, Isʼhak, Iakub ar tarar ḳandanre ze desh deoar oada ḳorslam, tumra oḳon gia ita hoḳol zaga doḳol ḳorilao. Hozrot Musae aro ḳoyzonre neta banaila
1.9: “Te baiainre, hou shomoy ami tumrare ḳoislam, tumra hoḳlor bar to ami eḳla boibar shaiddo nai.
1.10: Tumrar Mabud Allae tumrare oto aolad baṛai disoin, erlagi tumra aiz asmanor terar laḳan oiso, gonia fuṛail zae na.
1.11: Tumrar baf-dadar Mabud Allae tumrare aro azar azar gun baṛaukka, ar tan oada mafik tumrare rohom-borkot deukka.
1.12: Oile ami eḳla ḳemne tumrar ḳaijja-fosad miṭaitam, ar tumrar zimmadarir bar boitam?
1.13: Erlagi tumrar fortek kandan taki koyzon aḳoldar, zanra-hunra ar hoḳol manshor gese ijjoti zonre fosond ḳoro, ami tumrar zimmadari erar ato shomzaimu.
1.14: “Tumra zuaf dislae, aichcha, afne zela ḳoira, ola-u bala oibo.
1.15: Teu ami tumrar fortek kandan taki aḳoldar, buddiman ar zanra-hunra zonre nia tumrar azar zonor ufre, sho zonor ufre, foinchash zonor ufre, dosh zonor ufre shordar banai dislam, ar ofisar-o boail ḳorslam.
1.16: “Hou shomoy ami tumrar hakim oḳolre hukum dislam, ḳoislam, ḳaijja-fosador bisaro badi-bibadi duio fokkor mat hunia hok insaf ḳorio, ita nizor zatir ouk ba bin zatir ouk.
1.17: Bisaror shomoy tumra ḳeuror fokko loio na, doni-gorib hoḳlor ḳota hunio. Ashole bisaror malik to Alla, erlagi tumra kunu manshore ḍoraio na. Ze bisaror mimangsha ḳora tumrar lagi koṭin oy, ikan amar gese anio, ami deḳmu.
1.18: Ar tumra kila kita ḳortae, ita to ami hou shomoy ḳoia dislam. Guia faṭaia deshor ḳobor zana
1.19: “Bade amra Mabud Allar hukum faia, Tur faṛ saṛia Amuri oḳlor faṛia elaḳa muka roana oilam. Tumra to deḳso, ḳoto boṛo ar ḳoto marattoḳ morubumi faroia amra Kadesh-Bornea aia azilam.
1.20: Azia hari ami koislam, oḳon to tumra Amuri oḳlor hou faṛia elaḳat aia fosi geso, i deshḳan amrar Mabud Allae amrare dilaira.
1.21: Huno, tumrar Mabud Allar dan ḳora ou asta desh-u tumrar samne foṛi roise. Oḳon zao, gia tumrar baf-dadar Mabud Allar oada ḳora ou deshre doḳol ḳoro. Ḳeu ḍoraio na, nirash oio na.
1.22: “Ou shomoy tumra hoḳol aia amare ḳoilae, te foyla ḳoyzon guiare ou desho faṭail ouk, tara gia deshḳan dekia aia amrare ḳoiba, kun fote zaoa amrar lagi bala ar zaoar foto kun kun ṭaun foṛbo.
1.23: “Tumrar foramish amar fosond oilo, erlagi fortek kandan taki eḳzon ḳori muṭ baro zonre alog korlam.
1.24: Tara tumrare ono toia ou faṛor ufre uṭlo, ar Ashkul namor faṛia ḳalo gia bala ḳori hoḳolta dekia ailo.
1.25: Tara hou desh taki kisu fol-mul ania amrare deḳaia ḳoilo, amrar Mabud Allae amrare ze deshḳan dan ḳorra, ikan to boṛo bala zaga.
1.26: “Oile tumra ou desho zaite razi oilae na. Tumra nizor Mabud Allar hukumor birudita ḳorlae.
1.27: Tumra zarzir tambut hamaia boḳa-zoḳa shuru ḳorlae, ar ḳoilae, Mabude amrar loge dushmoni koroin, erlagi-u amrare binash ḳorar niote, Amuri oḳlor ato falaia marar kiale, Mishor desh taki tain amrare bar ḳori anchoin.
1.28: Amra kila hino zaimu? Amrar guia baiainte aia zano ḍor harai disoin. Tara ḳoisoin, hinor manush bule amra taki bout usa-muṭa foyluan. Tarar ṭaun oḳol-o boṛo boṛo, itar sairobae usa usa oal dia baunḍori kora, asmano soilar lager. Ar foyluan Anaki oḳolre-o bule hono deḳsoin.
1.29: “Ita hunia ami tumrare ḳoislam, tumra mon gabṛaio na, itare ḍoraio na.
1.30: Tumrar Mabud Alla to tumrar age age zaira. Tain tumrar fokko loia tumrar sokur samne Mishor desho zela zuddo ḳorsla, oḳono oula ḳorba.
1.31: Ar ou morubumir maze-o to tumra deḳso, ono aia fosar ag forzonto, bafe zelaḳan afon futre kulo ḳori boia nein, oulaḳan Alla Mabude tumrare-o asta fot boia anchoin.
1.32: Otota hunar bade-o tumra tan ufre borosha ḳorlae na.
1.33: Taine-u to tambu gaṛibar zaga sinanir lagi ar fot sinaia nibar lagi, raitkur shomoy agunir kuṭi ar dinkur shomoy megor kuṭir nomuna oia tumrar age age gesoin.
1.34: “Oile tumrar ita zuaf hunia Mabude kub gusa ḳorla, tain ḳosom ḳaia ḳoila,
1.35: ami Mabude tumrar baf-dadar gese ḳosom ḳaislam ou deshḳan ditam ḳori, ta-o oḳonkur ita naforman oḳole i bala zaga ḳan deḳar nosib oito nae,
1.36: ḳali Zifunnir fua Kalut saṛa. Ikan deḳar shoubaiggo ou Kalute faibo, he amar ḳotare furafur manche, he zeta zaga faodi faṛaia aise, ita zaga ami tare ar tar aolad oḳolre dimu.
1.37: “Baiainre, tumrar ḳarone Mabude amar ufre-o gusa ḳorla, gusa ḳori amare ḳoila, tumi Musa-o hou desho hamaitae fartae nae.
1.38: Ḳali tumar ḳadim Nunor fua Iusa gia hono hamaibo. Tumi tare shaosh dio, he Boni Israilre i deshor doḳoldari dia malik banaibo.
1.39: Tumra ḳoislae, amrar bebuz nabalik huruttaintore hou deshor manshe doria nibogi. Oile ami Mabude erare-u ou Kenan deshor malik banaimu, era ikan doḳol ḳorba.
1.40: Te oḳon tumra hirbar fisaia gia Nil doriar faredi morubumir bae roana deo.
1.41: “Ikan hunia tumra ḳoislae, amra to Mabudor dorbaro gunagar oigesi. Ta-o amrar Mabud Allar hukum mafik oḳon gia zuddo ḳormu. Oḳan ḳoia tumra ostro-shostro loilae, ar mono ḳorslae, faṛi elaḳat uṭia zuddo ḳora-o kub shuza.
1.42: “Oile Mabude amare ḳoila, tumi tarare ḳo, tara zanu zuddor lagi faṛo na uṭe, ḳaron ami tarar loge roitam nae, ar amare saṛia zudi tumrar nizor ichchae zao, te dushmonor gese aribae.
1.43: Ami tumrare hushiari deoar bade-o tumra ita manlae na. Tumra Mabudor hukumor ulṭa gia buk fulaia ou faṛo uṭat laglae.
1.44: Teu faṛor bashinda Amuri zatie tumrare dekia fal bandi bar oilo, mousaḳor mou-fukor laḳan fal bandia tumrar ḳore ḳore ailo, ar marte marte Seiror Horma ṭaun forzonto ḳedaia nilo.
1.45: Bade tumra aia Mabudor gese ḳandon lagailae, oile Mabude ḳan bond ḳorilla, i kandon hunla na.
1.46: Ou nomunae tumra bout din Kadesh elaḳat roilae, lamba shomoy ono guzrilo.”

2.1: Hozrot Musae aro ḳoila, “Mabude amare zela hukum disla, oula amra fisaia gia morubumir mazedi Nil doriar muka roana dilam. Seiror faṛia elaḳa sokkor dia zaite amrar bout din gelogi.
2.2: Bade Mabude amare ḳoila,
2.3: tumra bakka din taki ou faṛia elaḳat sokkor dirae, oḳon uttor muka roana deo.
2.4: Erbade tain amare ḳoila, ami tumrare zanaitam tumra oḳon Shek Ishʼor aolador doḳole taḳa Seir deshor bitredi zaite oibo. Gele tumrare dekia tara ḍoraiba, oile tumra kub hushiar roio, era to tumrar baiain.
2.5: Tarar loge ḳaijja-fosad ḳorio na. Mono rakio, tarar deshor eḳ inchi zomi-o ami tumrare ditam nae. Ḳaron asta Seir faṛor malikana ami Shek Ishʼre dilaisi.
2.6: Tarar ou desh faroia zaibar ḳalo tumrar ḳani-kuraki lagle ṭeḳadi loia ḳaibae, oula fani-o loia ḳaibae.
2.7: “Tumrar Mabud Allae hoḳol ḳamor maze-u tumrare rohom-borkot disoin. Ou oto boṛo morubumi faronir bala tain tumrare hefazot ḳorsoin. Ou sallish bosor dori tumrar Mabud Alla tumrar loge loge asoin, erlagi kunu laḳan obab oise na.
2.8: “Teu amra fatari fote aṭilam, aṭia amrar bai Seiror bashinda Ishʼor aolador desh falaia gelam. Amra Araba tolbumir ze rasta Elat ar Izion-Geber taki bar oia aise, ou fotedi na gia Muabor morubumir muka aṭa dorlam.
2.9: Ar Mabude amare ḳoila, tumra Muabi oḳolre sataio na, kunu zuddor bab-shab deḳaio na. Mono rakio, tarar deshor kunu zomi-u ami tumrare ditam nae. Tarar razdani Aur ṭaunor malikana ami Lut nobir aolad Muabi oḳolre dilaisi.”
2.10: (Age Eimi zatir manush ou elaḳat roita, ita asla foyluan zati, tara forimane asla bout zon, ar deḳte Anaki zatir laḳan usa-muṭa lamba.
2.11: Anaki oḳlor laḳan Eimi oḳolre-o Rofayi name ḍaḳa oito, oile Muabi oḳole itare Eimi koia ḍakita.
2.12: Seir faṛo Hurio oḳole boshot ḳorta, bade Ishʼor aolad oḳole tarare ḳedaia dia ikan doḳol ḳorla. Mabudor ate Boni Israile zela Kenan deshor malikana faia Kenani oḳolre ḳedaiba, ṭik ola Ishʼor aolad oḳole-o ḳorsla. Tara Hurio oḳolre binash ḳoria hoḳol zomi-maṭi doḳol ḳoria nize hono boshot ḳorla.)
2.13: Musa nobie aro ḳoila, “Bade Mabude hukum dila, tumra zoldi kori roana o, ar Zered faṛia ḳal faroia hofaro zao. Teu amra faroilam.
2.14: Ar Kadesh-Bornea taki bar oia hari Zered gulla faroia aite amrar aṭtish bosor lagsil. Ermaze oula oilo, Mabude age ḳosom ḳaia zela ḳoisla, oula Kadesh-Bornea taki baronir ḳalo amrar zoto sifai asla, era hoḳol-u ou aṭtish bosore morigela.
2.15: Boni Israil shomaz taki tarare binash ḳorar ag forzonto Mabud tarar bifokke asla.
2.16: “Ou hoḳol sifai moria shesh oia harle,
2.17: Mabude amare ḳoila,
2.18: Aiz tumra Muabi oḳlor deshor shimana faroibae, tarar razdani Aur ṭaunor ḳandabae zaibae.
2.19: Oile tumra zebla Boni-Amman deshor ḳasat zaibaegi, gia tarare sataio na, tarare zuddor bab-shab deḳaio na. Mono rakio, tarar deshor kunu zaga-u ami tumrare ditam nae, ikanor malikana to ami Lut nobir aolad Boni-Ammanre dilaisi.”
2.20: (Age Rofayi oḳol ono roita, erlagi ikanre Rofayi oḳlor desh ḳoia ḍaḳa oito. Ar Boni-Ammane itare Zam-Zamimi koia ḍakita.
2.21: Rofayi zati foyluan asla, deḳte Anaki zatir laḳan usa-muṭa lamba ar forimane-o bout beshi asla. Mabude Boni-Amman zatir ato itare binash ḳoraila, Boni-Ammane Rofayi zatire ḳedai dia ou desh doḳol ḳorla.
2.22: Mabude Ishʼor aolad oḳolredi ou eḳoi kam ḳoraila, tain erar ato Hurio zatire binash ḳorla. Era Hurio oḳolre ḳedaia dia, tarar Seir desh doḳol ḳoria boshot ḳorra.
2.23: Ermaze Koftur dif taki Kofturi zatie aia Obbi zatire binash ḳorla, tarar maṭire doḳol ḳoria boshot ḳorla. Ou Obbi oḳol Gaza ṭaunor daro boshot ḳorta, honor hoḳol gau-geramo tara roita.)
2.24: “Erbade Mabude ḳoisla, O Boni Israil, tumra bar o, bar oia Ornon ḳalor hofaro zao. Huno, Amuri zatir bashsha Sihun ar tar Hishbon deshre ami tumrar ato shofi disi. Ikan doḳol ḳorat gia bashshare zuddor filḍo lamao,
2.25: teu deḳbae, ami Mabude aiz taki zogotor hoḳol zatir dilo ḍor harai dimu, tumrar ḍore tara ḳafiba. Tumrar aoaz hunle-u tarar zano doṛfoṛ shuru oibo.” Bashsha Sihun ar tar zatir binash
2.26: Musa nobie Boni Israilre aro ḳoila, “Bade ami shanti-chukti korar kiale Ḳadimut morubumi taki Hishbonor bashsha Sihunor gese ḳobria faṭailam, ḳoilam,
2.27: amra afnar deshor bitredi faroia zaitam sai, onumoti diba ni? Amra atare-fatare kunubae zaitam nae, ḳali mul shoṛokedi aṭia zaimu.
2.28: -29 Amra nogod ṭeḳadi afnar ges taki kani-kuraki ba fani-o ḳorid ḳoria ḳaimu. Amrar Mabud Allae amrare ze deshḳan dita saira, Zordan gang faroia hou desho zaibar ag forzonto, afnar deshor ufredi amrare aṭia zaite deukka. Seiror faṛia elaḳar bashinda Ishʼor aolad oḳole, ar Aur ṭaunor bashinda Muabi oḳole-o amrare ola faroite disoin.
2.30: “Oile Hishbonor bashsha Sihun razi oilo na, amrare zaite dilo na. Tumrar Mabud Allae-u tar dilre fashan banailla, tar monor bab luar laḳan oigelo, zate tumrar ato tar binash oy, ar ṭik-u ola oilo.
2.31: Teu Mabude amare ḳoila, O Musa, Sihun ar tar bashshaire ami tumar ato shofi dilam. Oḳon tumi hono zao, gia ou desh doḳole anat lago, ar hono boshot ḳoro.
2.32: “Teu Iyahaz elaḳat Sihune tar hoḳol sifai dol loia amrar loge laṛai korat ailo,
2.33: ou shomoy amrar Mabud Allae tare amrar ato falaila. Amra bashshare, tar fuaintore, tar sifai dolre nifat ḳorlam.
2.34: Ar amra tar hoḳol ṭaun, gau-geram hoḳolta doḳol ḳorlam, tarar hoḳol beṭain-beṭin ar huruttare binash ḳorlam. Eḳzon-o zinda roise na.
2.35: Ḳali tarar foshur fal ar gonimotor mal-samana amrar lagi anlam.
2.36: Ornon ḳalor shimanar Aruar ṭaun, ar ou elaḳar ek gau taki arok gau doḳol ḳori kori, Giliod forzonto kunu zaga amrar doḳolor baire roilo na. Amrar Mabud Allae ita hoḳolta amrar ato dila.
2.37: Ḳali Boni-Amman zatir desh, Zabbuk faṛia ḳalor ḳanda-ḳasar hoḳol zila, faṛor ufror gau-geram, ar amrar Mabud Allae zeta zaga doḳol ḳorte nished ḳorsoin, ou zaga ḳanain tumrar doḳolor baire roilo.”
