22.22: “Kunu beṭae zudi aroḳ beṭar bour loge zina ḳorat dora ḳae, te ou beṭa-beṭi duio zonre marilite oibo. Boni Israil taki tumra i laḳan naformanir nam miṭaibae.
22.23: “Bia ṭik oigese ila kunu fuṛire ḳeu ṭaunor maze faia zudi tair loge zina ḳore,
22.24: te tara duiogure hou zagar mein geiṭor gese nia fattor maria marilibae. Fuṛire marilibar ḳaron oilo, tai to hono taki shaijjor lagi kunu sik-sillani dise na, ar beṭare zane marar ḳaron oilo, he aroḳ beṭar bour ijjot marse. Ou nomunae tumra Boni Israil taki ola naformani fusia falaibae.
22.25: “Bia ṭik oigese omon kunu fuṛire ḳeu kunu nirai zagat faia hari, zur ḳoria tair loge mila-misha ḳorle, ḳali ou beṭa morbo.
22.26: Ar ou fuṛire saṛi dibae, tai to morar zuka guna ḳorse na. Ita to eḳzone dusra zonre kun ḳorar laḳan-u.
22.27: Ḳaron ou beṭae taire nirai zagat dorse, sik-sillani dile-o taire basanir ḳeu to ino asil na.
22.28: “Bia-shadi ṭik oise na, omon kunu fuṛire faia ḳeu zudi zur ḳoria tair loge mila-misha ḳore, ar tara dora ḳae,
22.29: te ou beṭae fuṛir bafre foinchash tola rufa dibo, ar fuṛir ijjot marae taire bia ḳorte oibo. Zindegie kunudin taire talaḳ dito farto nae.
22.30: “Kunu beṭae tar haton maʼre bia ḳora zaiz nae, ila ḳorle he tar bafor bour loge zina ḳoria bafre beijjot ḳorbo.”

23.1: Hozrot Musae aro ḳoira, “Kunu beṭar zudi onḍokush sesa oy, ba tar furushali nofs ḳaṭia falail oy, te hi beṭa Mabudor bonda oḳlor mahfilo hamanir shuzug nai.
23.2: “Kunu funga manush Mabudor bonda oḳlor mahfilo hamanir shuzug nai, tar souddo siṛir ḳeuror hamanir fot nai.
23.3: “Boni-Amman ba Muabi zatir kunu manush Mabudor bonda oḳlor mahfilo hamanir shuzug nai, tarar souddo siṛir ḳeu hamanir fot faito nae.
23.4: Mono ase ni, tumra Mishor desh taki bar oia aibar ḳalo, fotor maze tara tumrar ḳani-fani loia aguai aise na, borong tumrare boddua dibar lagi Balam bin Baur namor eḳ pirre tara gush disil, dia Oram-Nohoroyim deshor Fotur ṭaun taki tare baṛa ḳori anchil.
23.5: Oile tumrar Mabud Allae ou Balamor arzit shae disoin na, tain to tumrare mohobbot ḳoroin, erlagi hou Balam piror bodduare bodlaia tain nek-dua banaila.
23.6: Oḳon tumra zindegie kunudin itar kunu balai ba ufoḳar ḳorio na.
23.7: “Ta-o Idumi oḳolre tumra ingsha ḳorio na, era to tumrar bai. Mishori manshore ingsha ḳorio na, tumra musafir halote age tarar desho boshot ḳorso.
23.8: Tumrar loge boshot ḳorar tin siṛi taki tara Mabudor bonda oḳlor mahfilo hamaita farba. Sifai oḳlor kemp fak-fobitro rakio
23.9: “Dushmonor loge laṛait bar oia tumra hoḳol nomunar nafaki taki basia roio.
23.10: Raitor bala kunu sifair zoubonor fani bar oia nafak bonigele, he kempor bare zaite oibo.
23.11: Bade biali bala he naia hari, shuruz ḍubia harle kempo aia hamaibo.
23.12: “Faeḳana ḳorar lagi tumra kempor bare eḳ zaga banaibae.
23.13: Tumrar atiar-fotror loge maṭi kuṛibar kudal rakio. Faeḳana ḳoria harle kudaldi gat kudia maṭir tole haraio.
23.14: Kial rakio, tumrare basanir lagi, ar dushmonre tumrar ato shofibar kiale tumrar Mabud Alla tumrar kempor bitre gura-fira ḳoroin. Erlagi tumrar kempre fak-fobitro rakio, arnae tumrar nafaki dekia Mabude tumrar ufre taki muk firailiba. Nanan laḳan hukum-ahkam
23.15: “Kunu manshor kina gulam bagia aia zudi tumrar gese asroy loy, te tare tar malikor gese firai dio na.
23.16: He tumrar deshor zeḳano roito sae, ono-u tare zaga dio, tare duk dio na.
23.17: “Boni Israilor kunu beṭinte zanu mondir-aḳṛar noṭigiri na ḳore. Kunu beṭae-o zanu ola noṭagiri na ḳore.
23.18: Noṭi beṭi ba noṭa beṭar ruzi-ruzgaror ṭeḳa-foyshar kunuzat mannot-kurbani tumrar Mabud Allar goro anio na. Ilaḳan beṭa-beṭintore to Mabude gin ḳoroin.
23.19: “Tumrar zatir kunu bair ges taki shud ḳaio na, ita ṭeḳa-foysha, ḳani-kurakir zinish ba aro kunuta oile-o kunuzat shud loio na.
23.20: Oinno zatir ges taki shud nitae farbae, oile Boni Israil taki shud ḳaoa haram. Ita mania solle tumra ze deshor doḳoldari fairae, hou zagat gia harle tumrar Mabud Allae tumrar hoḳol ḳam-ḳazo rohom-borkot diba.
23.21: “Tumra nizor Mabud Allar name kunuta mannot ḳorle, ita zoldi kori adae ḳorio, ita adae na ḳorle tumrar guna oibo. Ar i hishab to tumrar Mabud Allae bad dita nae.
23.22: Oile kunuzat mannot na ḳorle guna nae.
23.23: Tumrar zoban taki ze mannot ḳorso, iṭa nichchit adae ḳorbae, ḳaron tumar nizor zobane, nizor kushie Alla Mabudor name ita mancho, erlagi adae-o ḳorbae.
23.24: “Tumrar ari-forir anguror bagano hamaile nizor haus miṭaia angur ḳaio, oile kunu boul ba bostat ḳori kunta nitae fartae nae.
23.25: Ḳeuror zomino gia atdi kunuzat foy-fosholor soṛa siṛitae farbae, oile ḳasi dia daia nitae fartae nae.”

24.1: Hozrot Musae aro ḳoira, “Biar bade zudi kunu zamaie tar bour maze kut fae, faia tair ufre naraz oy, ar talaḳ nama lekia tair ato dia bidae ḳori dey.
24.2: Ar ou boue gia zudi dusra zamair gese bia boy,
24.3: bade hou dusra zamaie-o taire nafosond ḳoria zudi ola talaḳ dilae, ba hou zamai morizae,
24.4: te tair hou foyla zamaie taire ar bia ḳorto farto nae, tai to en lagi nafak oigese. Ilaḳan bia-shadire Mabude gin ḳoroin. Tumrar Mabud Allae tumrare ze deshor malikana dira, tumra ila guna ḳoria i deshre nafak banaio na.
24.5: “Noya bia ḳora kunu beṭare zuddot faṭaio na, zur-zobordosti koria tare kunu ḳamor bar dio na. He fura eḳ bosor ḳam-ḳaz na ḳoria, tar bour loge kushi-bashi korar shuzug dio. Shomazo solar hukum-ahkam
24.6: “Aolati malor bondok hishabe tumra ḳeuror gail-sia, ba ḳali sia bondok rakio na. Ila ḳorle tar zan basanir ḳani-kurakir fot bond oizibo.
24.7: “Kunu manshe zudi Boni Israilor aroḳ baire suri koria nia gulam banailae, ba dusra zagat besia hari dora ḳae, te tare zane marbae. Ou nomunae tumrar shomaz taki ila naformanire fusia falaibae.
24.8: “Ḳeuror gotro fosa-kusṭo bemar deḳa dile, Lebi kandanor imam oḳlor foramish mafik solio. Ami tarare zeta hukum disi, tumra kub kiali oia ita manio.
24.9: Mishor desh taki bar oia aibar foto, tumrar Mabud Allae amar boin Moriomor ze dosha goṭaisla, ita tumra mono rakio.
24.10: “Tumar ari-forire kunta aolat dile, tar ges taki kunu mal bondok nibar niote, tumi tar goro hamaio na.
24.11: Tumi goror bare ubaio, ar zare aolat diso, he tar gor taki bondoki mal ania tumare dibo.
24.12: Aolat neora zon gorib-duki oile, tar deoa bondoki keta-ḳomli nia tumi rait gumaio na.
24.13: Hainja bala tumi tar mal firai dio, ota uṛia he rait gumaia tumare dua dibo. Teu tumar balai oibo, ar bondoki samana firot deoa to, tumrar Mabud Allar nozoro nekir ḳam.
24.14: “Tumrar Boni Israil shomazor kunu bai ba tumrar desho roura bin zatir kunu manshor gese faona taḳle, ar he gorib-duki, ruzi kamla zon oile, tar ufre zulum ḳorio na.
24.15: Shuruz ḍubar age tumra tar faona mozuri dilaio, he to gorib manush, ou mozuri dia-u tar zindegi sole. Arnae mozurir lagi he Mabudor dorbaro foriad ḳorle, tumra gunar bagi oibae.
24.16: “Fua-fuṛir oforador lagi tarar ma-bafre, ba ma-bafor oforade fua-fuṛire zane mara zaito nae. Forteḳ zone nizor oforador shaza nize faibo.
24.17: “Kunu bideshi musafir ba etimor ufre na-hok bisar oite dio na. Kunu ṛaṛi beṭir findibar ḳafoṛ bondok rakio na.
24.18: Mono rakio, Mishor desho tumra gulam aslae, tumrar Mabud Allae tumrare hon taki azad ḳori anchoin. Erlagi ami tumrare ita ḳam ḳorar hukum diram.
24.19: “Tumrar zominor dan ḳaṭar bade, danor kunu muiṭ fauria gelegi, iṭa anar lagi ar firot zaio na. Bideshi musafir, etim ar ṛaṛi beṭintor lagi iṭa dilaio, teu tumrar Mabud Allae tumrar hoḳol ḳam-ḳazo rohom-borkot diba.
24.20: Zoytun gasor fol faṛibar ḳalo eḳoi ḍalor fol duibar faṛio na. Eḳbar faṛar bade zeta roy, ita bideshi musafir, etim ar ṛaṛi beṭintor lagi toio.
24.21: Tumrar angur baganor eḳ lot taki dui bar angur faṛio na, eḳbar faṛar bade zeta roy, ita bideshi musafir, etim ar ṛaṛi beṭintor lagi toi dio.
24.22: Faurio na, tumra to age Mishor desho gulam aslae. Erlagi ami tumrare ita ḳorar hukum diram.”

25.1: Musa nobie tarare aro ḳoira, “Manshor maze ḳaijja-fosad lagia zudi ita hakimor adaloto zae, te hakim oḳole oforadi zonre dushi shaibosto ḳorba, ar ni-oforadire ḳalas diba.
25.2: Ou bisaro dushi zonre singladi marar ray dile, hakime tare maṭit hutaia tar faona mair tan nizor samne maraiba,
25.3: oile sallishṭar beshi mara zaito nae. Arnae nizor zatir eḳ baire shomazor samne beijjot ḳora oibo.
25.4: “Dan maṛa dibar ḳalo gorur muko hufi lagaio na. Niaoladi ṛaṛi beṭir bia
25.5: “Eḳ foribaror hoḳol baiain ekḳano roar ḳalo zudi biati kunu bai morizae, ar tar kunu fuain na taḳe, te tar ṛaṛi boue tair deor saṛa dusra ḳeuror gese bia boito farto nae. Tair deore taire bia ḳoria tar ufre bortail dayitto adae ḳorbo.
25.6: Tarar foyla fuar zonom oile, i fua ou mora bair oarish hishabe goinno oibo, teu ou bair nam Boni Israil taki musi zaito nae.
25.7: Oile tair deore zudi taire bia ḳorto razi na oy, te tai hou gau ba ṭaunor fainchaitor gese gia honor murobbi oḳolre ḳoibo, amar deore amare bia ḳorto razi nae, he tar mora bair nam Boni Israilor maze zinda raḳto sae na. Amar befare tar ufre bortail day-dayitto adae ḳorer na.
25.8: Teu hou murobbi oḳole tare anaia buzaiba, erbade-o he nika ḳorte razi na oile,
25.9: ou ṛaṛi beṭie hou murobbi oḳlor samne, tar ḳasat gia tar faor ekkan zuta nize kulia nibogi, ar tar muko sef falaia ḳoibo, afon bair bongsho zegie basaito sae na, ogur dosha ola ouk.
25.10: Bade ou beṭar bongshore Boni Israilor maze, zuta araorar bongsho name ḍaḳa oibo. Shomazor aro hukum-ahkam
25.11: “Dui beṭae maramarir ḳalo zudi, eḳzonor bou gia tair zamaire hou beṭar at taki basanir niote, hou beṭar furushali nofso sifia dore,
25.12: te tumra hou beṭir at ḳaṭia falai dio. Taire kunu doya ḳorio na.
25.13: “Mafo ṭogibar lagi tumrar tolir maze eḳoi mafor huru-boṛo dui fattor rakio na.
25.14: Tumrar goro eḳoi mafor huru-boṛo duiṭa her-feṭu rakio na.
25.15: Tumrar Mabud Allae tumrare ze deshor doḳoldari dira, hono lamba hayati faibar lagi, tumrar mafibar fattor ar her-feṭur uzon shoṭik rakio.
25.16: Ḳaron zegie mafor maze ṭogaṭogi kore, tumrar Mabud Allae tare gin ḳoroin.
25.17: “Mishor desh taki tumra bar oia aibar foto, Amaleki oḳole tumrar loge ze bebohar ḳorsil, ita faurio na.
25.18: Aṭite aṭite tumrar ḳeu ḳeu zebla heran oia fise foṛi gesil, ou shomoy Amaleki oḳole aia hamla ḳorsil, tara to Allare-o ḍoraise na.
25.19: Tumrar Alla Mabude tumrare ze deshor malikana dira, hou deshor ash-fashor dushmon oḳol taki tain zebla tumrare shanti diba, hou shomoy tumra dunia taki Amaleki oḳlor nam miṭailibae. I hukum ḳan tumra kunu din-u faurio na.

26.1: “O Boni Israil huno, tumrar Mabud Allae tumrare ze deshor malikana dira, tumra zebla hou deshor doḳol faia hono boshoti korbae,
26.2: ou shomoy tumrar Mabud Allar deoa zominor hoḳol zator foshol taki, foyla faoa fosholor eḳṭa ongsho eḳ ṭukrit boria algaia toio. Ar tumrar Mabud Allae nizor Baytulla Shorif hishabe ze zagare fosond ḳorba, ou foshol loia hono zaio.
26.3: Gia hono azir imam sabre ḳoio, amrar Mabud Allae amrar moy-murobbir gese ḳosom ḳaia ze deshḳan dibar oada ḳorsla, amra oḳon ono aisi, aia tan samne azir oisi.
26.4: Teu imam sabe tumrar at taki folor ṭukri nia Alla Mabudor kurbani kanar samne toiba.
26.5: Bade tumra forteḳe tumrar Mabud Allar samne ubaia ḳoio, amrar ḳandanor mul murobbi Hozrot Iakub asla eḳzon Orami musafir, tain tuṛa ḳoyzon manshore loge loia Mishor desho geslagi. Gia Mishor desho musafir halote boshot ḳorar ḳalo tan usillae tara eḳ mohan zati, ar bout boṛo bolala zati bonla.
26.6: Bade Mishoror manshe amrar loge bojjati korla, amrare duk-koshṭo dia, amraredi koṭin gulami korailo.
26.7: Amra duk faia amrar moy-murobbir Mabud Allar dorbaro ḳandilam. Teu Mabude amrar foriad hunia, amrar duk-koshṭo, ḳoṭin gulami, ar amrar ufror zulumor bae nozor dila.
26.8: Ar tan bolala-mozbut at baṛaia, kub ḍor-ḳof deḳaia, kudroti lila-ḳela dia ar asanok gozob ḍalia Mishor desh taki amrare bar ḳori anla.
26.9: Tain-u amrare ou desho anchoin, dud ar mour banḍar-ala aramor ou desh amrare dan ḳorsoin.
26.10: Erlagi O amrar Mabud, tumar deoa zominor fosholor foyla baṭ loia ami tumar samne azir oisi. Oḳan ḳoia, tumrar Mabud Allar samne ou ṭukri toio, toia tanre soizda ḳorio.
26.11: Tumrar Mabud Allae tumrare ar tumrar foribarre zoto nomunar balai korsoin, ota mono ḳoria tumra nize, Lebi kandanor hoḳole, ar tumrar loge roura bideshi musafir oḳole kushi-bashi korio.
26.12: “Forti tin bosor bade bade tumra foy-fosholor dosh baṭor eḳ baṭ Lebi kandanor manshore, bideshi musafir oḳolre, etim ar ṛaṛi beṭintor maze bilai dio. Teu era feṭ bori kaia tumrar deshor maze arame roiba. Erlagi ikṭar nam oilo Doshomangshor Bosor.
26.13: Bade tumra forteḳe tumrar Mabud Allare ḳoio, Mabud, ami tumar hukum mafik amar ruzir fobitro baṭre, amar gor taki nia Lebi kandanre, musafir oḳolre, etim ar ṛaṛi beṭintore bilai disi. Ami tumar kunu hukumor ḳelaf ḳorsi na, ba faurisi na.
26.14: Murdar lagi kanda-ḳaṭi ar ahazari korar shomoy ami ou fobitro ongshor kunuta ḳaisi na, ba nafak halote ita baṛir bare nisi na, ar itar kunu ongsho murdar name dan-ḳoyrat-o ḳorsi na. Ami amar Mabud Allar hukum mafik solchi, tumar hukum mafik hoḳol ḳam ḳorsi.
26.15: Oḳon, O Mabud, tumar fobitro boshot ḳana taki, tumar arshe-azim taki toledi saia deḳo, ar tumar ḳas proza Boni Israilre rohom-borkot deo. Amrar moy-murobbir loge ḳosom ḳora oada mafik, tumi amrare dud ar mour banḍar-ala ou ze deshḳan dan ḳorso, er maṭit tumi rohom-borkot nazil ḳoro. Allai oada-chukti
26.16: “Tumrar Mabud Allae aiz tumrare ou hukum dira, tumra tan batail niom-ḳanun ar hukum-ahkam mania solio. Tumra dile-zane ashik bonia ita amol ḳorio.
26.17: Tumra to aiz shikar ḳorso, ou Alla-u oila tumrar Mabud, tumra tan fote solbae, tan hukum-ahkam, tan shoriot ar niom-ḳanun manbae, tan ḳota hunbae.
26.18: Erlagi Mabude-o aiz shikar ḳorsoin, tan oada mafik tumra oḳon tan proza, tumra-u tan ḳas shompod, tumra tan hoḳol hukum-ahkam amol ḳorbae.
26.19: Tain aro ḳoira, tan foyda ḳora tamam zatir ufre tumrare boṛo ḳorba. Tumrar ijjot, shunam ar tarif, hoḳol zatir ufre roibo. Tan oada mafik tumra oibae tumrar Mabud Allar name eḳ fobitro proza.”

27.1: Musa nobie Boni Israilor murobbi oḳolre loia manshore ḳoila, “Ami tumrare aiz zeta zeta hukum diram, tumra ita furafur amol ḳorio.
27.2: Tumrar Mabud Allae tumrare ze desh dan ḳorra, Zordan gang faroia hari tumra zebla hou desho zaibae, zaoar bade ḳoyeḳṭa boṛo boṛo fattor ḳaṛa ḳori hazaia, itare suna dia faḳa ḳorio.
27.3: Ar otar ufre ou Tourator tamam hukum-ahkam lekio. Buzrae ni, tumrar moy-murobbir Mabud Allae, dud ar mour banḍar-ala ze deshḳan tumrare dibar oada ḳorsoin, in taki hou desho gia harle,
27.4: Zordan gang faroia Ibal faṛor ufre uṭia, amar batail aizkur hukum mafik tumra hou fattor oḳol hazaia ḳaṛa ḳorio, ar itare suna dia faḳa ḳorio.
27.5: Ar hono tumrar Mabud Allar name fattordi ekkan kurbani kana banaio. Ou fattoror maze luar kunu atiar lagaio na.
27.6: Asta asta fattor dia tumrar Mabud Allar ou kurbani kana banaio, banaia er ufre tumrar Mabud Allar name zalail kurbani adae ḳorio.
27.7: Ar salamoti kurbani-o adae ḳorio. Ou kurbanir gust ḳaia tumrar Mabud Allar samne kushi-bashi korio.
27.8: Ar suna lefa hou fattoror ufre Tourator ou hukum-ahkam oḳol kub shundor ḳori lekio.”
27.9: Bade Musa nobie Lebi kandanor imam oḳolre loia hoḳol Boni Israilre ḳoila, “O Boni Israil, nirai o, ar amar ḳota huno, oḳon to tumra nizor Mabud Allar ḳas proza bonigeso.
27.10: Te tumra tan hukume solio, ar ami aiz zeta niom-ḳanun, hukum-ahkam zanailam, ita amol ḳorio.” Ibal faṛ taki lannoti buli
27.11: Musa nobie ou din manshore hukum dila, ḳoila,
27.12: “Zordan gang faroia harle ou shomoy Shimion, Lebi, Ehuda, Isaḳor, Iusuf, ar Bin-Iamin ḳandanor manush oḳol gia nek duar nishana hishabe Gorisim faṛor ufre uṭio.
27.13: Ar bodduar nishana hishabe Ruben, Sadu, Ashir, Sobulon, Dan ar Noftali kandanor manush gia Ibal faṛor ufre uṭio.
27.14: Bade Lebi kandanor manush oḳol ubaia, Boni Israilor tamam manshore zure zure sillaia ḳoibae,
27.15: “Ze manshe laḳṛi ba fattor kudia, shuna-rufa ba fitol golaia kunu murti banae, ar puja ḳorar niote ogure nia lukail zagat toy, he to lannoti. I murtire to Mabude gin ḳoroin, ita ḳali kamaror ator ḳam. Ikan hunia hoḳole ḳoio, Amin.
27.16: “Ma-bafre zegie beijjot ḳore, he lannoti. Ikan hunia hoḳole ḳoio, Amin.
27.17: “Doḳoldarir niote zominor ail ba shimana kuṭi zegie horae, he lannoti. Ikan hunia hoḳole ḳoio, Amin.
27.18: “Anda manshore zegie bul fot deḳai dey, he lannoti. Ikan hunia hoḳole ḳoio, Amin.
27.19: “Bideshi musafir, etim, ar ṛaṛi beṭintor bisar-salishit zegie be-insafi kore, he lannoti. Ikan hunia hoḳole ḳoio, Amin.
27.20: “Haton maʼr loge zegie zina ḳore, he afon bafre beijjot ḳore. He to lannoti. Ikan hunia hoḳole ḳoio, Amin.
27.21: “Kunu foshur loge zegie zina ḳore, he to lannoti. Ikan hunia hoḳole ḳoio, Amin.
27.22: “Zegie nizor boinor loge, haton maʼr, ba haton bafor torofa boinor loge zina ḳore, he to lannoti. Ikan hunia hoḳole ḳoio, Amin.
27.23: “Nizor hoṛir loge zegie zina ḳore, he to lannoti. Ikan hunia hoḳole ḳoio, Amin.
27.24: “Zegie lukaia kunu manshore kun ḳore, he to lannoti. Ikan hunia hoḳole ḳoio, Amin.
27.25: “Ni-oforadi manshore kun ḳorar chuktie zegie ṭeḳa ḳae, he to lannoti. Ikan hunia hoḳole ḳoio, Amin.
27.26: “Ou shoriotor kunu hukum-ahkam zegie mane na, zegie ita amol ḳore na, he to lannoti. Ikan hunia hoḳole ḳoio, Amin.

28.1: “O Boni Israil, ami aiz tumrare zeta hukum-ahkam diram, ota amol ḳorar niote tumra zudi nizor Mabud Allar kalamre kial ḳori mano, te tumrar Mabud Allae duniar hokkol zatir ufre tumrare usa ḳorba.
28.2: Tumrar Mabud Allar kalam mania solle, tumra ou rohomot faibae, ar ou rohomot oḳol hamesha tumrar loge loge roibo,
28.3: “Tumrar boshot-baṛi ar ḳet-ḳamaror maze rohom-borkot faibae.
28.4: “Tan rohomote tumra bout aolad faibae, zomino bout foshol folibo, goru-sagole bout baichcha diba.
28.5: “Tumar ugaro ar tumar saulor moṭkit borkot faibae.
28.6: “Hoḳol halote hoḳol ḳamo tumi rohom-borkot faibae.
28.7: “Dushmonir niote zetae tumrar loge lagba, Mabude itare tumrar gese araiba. Tara eḳ duaredi tumrare marat aile, shat duaredi bagiba.
28.8: “Tumrar ugaror maze Mabude borkot diba, tumra ze ḳamo at dibae, ou ḳamo-u tain borkot diba. Tumrar Mabud Allae tumrare ze desh dan ḳorra, hono tumrare rohom-borkot diba.
28.9: “Tumra zudi tumrar Mabud Allar hukum-ahkam mania, tan batail fote solo, te tain ḳosom ḳaia zela oada ḳorsoin, ola tan nizor fobitro proza hishabe tumrare ḳaim ḳorba.
28.10: Ar asta duniar hoḳol zatie deḳba, tumra-u oilae Mabudor ḳas manush, dekia tara hoḳole tumrare ḍoraiba.
28.11: “Tumrar Mabud Allae tumrar moy-murobbir gese ze desh dibar lagi kosom ḳaisla, ou desho tain tumrar bout balai korba, tumrare bout aolad diba, tumrar foshur falainte bout baichcha diba, zomino bout foshol folibo.
28.12: Tumrar Mabud Allae tan asmani rohomotor duar kulia diba, zorur mafik meg-fani dia tumrar ator hoḳol ḳamor maze rohom-borkot diba, bout zatire tumra ṭeḳa-foysha aolat dibae, oile tumra kunu aolat nibar dorḳar oito nae.
28.13: Mabude tumrare ola banaiba, zate tumra hoḳlor matar ufre ro, ḳeuror faor tolat na taḳo. Tumra ḳali tumrar Mabud Allar ou hukum-ahkam oḳol kub zoton ḳoria amol ḳorio, zeta aiz ami tumrare ḳoiar, teu tumra hoḳlor ufre roibae, tole foṛtae nae.
28.14: Ar aiz ami tumrare zeta hukum diar, amar ou talim taki tumra ḍaine-baue horio na. Kunu deb-debir ḳoredi douṛaia itar puja ḳorat lagio na. Naformanir lagi lannot
28.15: “Oile tumra zudi tumrar Mabud Allar hukum na mano, tan zeta hukum-ahkam ar niom-ḳanun aiz ami zanaisi, tumra kub kiali oia ita na manle, tumrar ufre ou lannot oḳol foṛbo, ita hamesha tumrar loge loge roibo:
28.16: “Tumrar boshot-baṛi, ḳet-ḳamar hoḳol zagat lannot foṛbo.
28.17: “Tumrar ugaro ar saulor moṭkit lannot foṛbo.
28.18: “Tumrar hurutta ḳom zonmiba, zomino foy-foshol ḳomizibo, goru-sagole baichcha ḳom diba, ou nomunae tumrar ufre lannot foṛbo.
28.19: “Goro ba baira hoḳol ḳano tumra forti din lannot faibae.
28.20: “Naformani kam ḳoria Mabudor ges taki hori zaoae, tumrar hoḳol ḳam-ḳazor maze tain lannot diba. Bala-mosiboto foṛia, Allai gozobor zatae, tumra ekkere binash oar ag forzonto, aste aste ḳali koy oibae.
28.21: Tumra ze deshor doḳoldari fairae, Mabude hono tumrar ufre bemar saṛiba, bemare tumra morte morte hou desho taki binash oibae.
28.22: Mabude tumrar shorilo nosṭo oa bemar, bakka taf ar zola-fuṛa, ota bemardi tumrar ufre gozob diba. Ar morki, hukna gorom batash, fosholor huna-ḳani hukai zaoar bemar ar fata mora, ota gozob oḳol tumrar zomino diba. Tumra moria fuṛanir ag forzonto i gozob tumrar ḳore ḳore roibo.
28.23: Tumrar matar ufror asman oibo fitolor laḳan shokto, ar faor tolor zomin oibo luar laḳan ḳoṭin.
28.24: Mabude megor bodla tumrar desho asman taki duil saṛiba, tumra binash oar ag forzonto ita hamesha foṛat roibo.
28.25: “Mabude tumrar dushmon oḳlor mukabilat tumrare araiba, erare eḳ fotedi marat gele shat fotedi bagibae. Tumrar dosha dekia zogotor hoḳol zatie ḍoraia ḳafiba.
28.26: Tumrar lash oibo foshu-fakintor kuraḳ. Itare ḳedanir lagi keu roito nae.
28.27: Mabude hou Mishori oḳlor laḳan tumrar gotro gozobi bish-furi, ṭiumar, fuṭ-ḳauzli bemar diba, ita taki keu tumrare shifa ḳorar ḳemota nai.
28.28: Tain tumrare fagol, anda ar bedisha banaiba.
28.29: Andae zela andarir maze atai atai aṭe, tumra dinor bala ola aṭibae, tumrar kunu ḳam-u kamiab oito nae. Tumrar ufre hamesha zulum ar luṭ-toraz solbo, ita taki basanir lagi keu aito nae.
28.30: “Shadi korar lagi ze ḳoinar loge tumar aḳt oibo, aroḳ beṭae aia ou ḳoinar ijjot luṭibo. Tumi gor banaibae, oile goro boshot ḳortae fartae nae. Anguror bagan ḳoria, fol ḳaoa ḳofalo zuṭto nae.
28.31: Tumrar sokur samne tumrar goru zobo ḳora oibo, oile eḳ ṭukra gust-o tumrar feṭo zaito nae. Tumrar gadare tumrar at taki kaṛia neoa oibo, ita ar firot faitae nae. Tumrar meṛa-sagol tumrar dushmonor ato zaibo, ota bifod taki basanir lagi keu aguai aito nae.
28.32: Tumrar fua-fuṛin dusra zatir ato aṭoḳ oiba, tarar ashae bar saite saite tumrar sokur zuti nosṭo oibo, oile kunta ḳorar shuzug oito nae.
28.33: Tumrar osina bin zatie tumrar ḳetor foy-foshol, ar tumrar menotor hoḳol mozuri luṭia nibogi, tumra hara zindegi kali zulum-mosibot faibae ar surmar oibae.
28.34: Tumrar souke i laḳan aro zeta deḳbae, dekia mata ḳaraf oibo.
28.35: Mabude tumrar urato ar aṭut shuru ḳoria, faor tola taki matar talu forzonto asta gotro bish-furi diba, itar kunu shifa nai.
28.36: “Tumrar ufre bashshai korar lagi tumra zare godit boaibae, Mabude hou bashsha ar tumrare bondi koraia omon eḳ zatir ato falaiba, zetar nam-u tumra huncho na, tumrar moy-murobbie-o hunchoin na. Hono gia tumra fattor ar laḳṛidi banail murtir puja ḳorbae.
28.37: Mabude tumrare zeta zatir maze ḳedai diba, hotae tumrare dekia somkiziba, tumrar dosha siṛ ar ṭaṭṭa-moshkorar bishoy oibo.
28.38: “Tumra ḳet ḳorbae bout, oile foshol faibae tuṛa, ḳaron fongofale ḳailiba.
28.39: Tumra anguror bagan ḳoria zae-zoton ḳorbae, oile kiṛa ar fuke bagan ḳailibo, erlagi tumra angur-o faitae nae, er shorbot-o ḳaitae fartae nae.
28.40: Tumrar hara desh zoytun gase bora roile-o, zoytun fol zoria foṛizibo, erlagi tumrar shorilo tel maḳa oito nae.
28.41: Tumrar zoto aolad oiba, ita tumrar gese roita nae, itare bondi kori neoa oibo.
28.42: Gozobi moua-fukor fal aia tumrar gas-gasali ar foshol ḳailiba.
28.43: “Tumrar maze boshot ḳorra bin zatir manush oḳol aste aste ufredi uṭba, ar tumra toledi lambae.
28.44: Tara tumrare ṭeḳa-foysha aolat diba, tumra tarare aolat dibar shaiddo oito nae. Tara roiba tumrar matar ufre, tumra roibae tarar faor tolat.
28.45: “Ou tamam lannot tumrar ufre foṛbo. Tumrar Mabud Allar kushi mafik na solae, tan hukum-ahkam ar niom-ḳanun na manae ou lannot oḳol tumrar loge lagail roibo. Itae tumrare zatia doria binash ḳorilaibo.
28.46: Ou lannot oḳol tumra ar tumrar aolador ufre, zug zug dori kudroti hushiari hishabe roibo.
28.47: Tumra nizor shudinor ḳalo monor kushie ashik bonia nizor Mabud Allar gulami korso na,
28.48: erlagi Mabude tumrar ḳoredi dushmon lagaiba, tumra feṭor buke, fanir fiase, obab-onoṭone hokir bonia tarar gulami korbae. Mabude tumrar ḳando luar zual findaiba, ou zualir tole tumrar binash oibo.
28.49: “Mabude bout duroi taki, zogotor hesh shimana taki, ola eḳ zatire silor nomunae uṛaia anba, zetar mukor buli tumra buztae nae.
28.50: Itar goṭon oibo bodsurot, itae kunu buṛa-buṛire ijjot dita nae, ar huruttare-o maya ḳorta nae.
28.51: Tara tumrar foshur baichcha ar ḳetor foshol ḳailiba, hesh-mesh tumra binash oibae. Tara kunuzat foshol, noya kunu anguror shorbot, tel, goru-sagolor baichcha, kunta-u tumrar lagi toita nae, hesh-mesh tumra binash oizibae.
28.52: Tara tumrar ṭaun oḳol beria raḳba, ar tumra zetar ufre borosha ḳorrae, tumrar hou usa usa mozbut baunḍorir oal oḳol hesh-mesh bangia foṛizibo. Tumrar Mabud Allae tumrare ze deshor doḳoldari dira, hou deshor hokkol gau ar ṭaun tara beriliba.
28.53: “Ar dushmone beria raḳar ḳalo tumra oto boṛo mosiboto foṛbae, erlagi tumrar nizor fua-fuṛire ḳailibae, tumrar Mabud Allar deoa aolador gust nize ḳaibae.
28.54: Hou shomoy tumrar maze zera bala manush, zera shuke ar aram-ayeshe ase, tarar mon-mizazo olaḳan oizibo, tara afon baire, nizor boure ar baki fua-fuṛire kunu doya-maya ḳorto nae.
28.55: He tar ze aolador gust ḳaibo, itar ekkan ṭukra-o tarare dito nae. Ḳaron dushmone zebla tumrar ṭaun oḳol beria raḳba, ou shomoy tumrar feṭor buk miṭanir lagi nizor huruttar gust saṛa ar kunuta-o milto nae.
28.56: Tumrar mazor kub norom dilor ze beṭi manush ase, ze beṭie shukila zindegir dae kunudin maṭit fao falaise na, hou beṭie-o tair zanor ṭukra zamai ba aolador bae kunu doya-maya ḳorto nae.
28.57: Dushmone tumrare beria raḳae feṭor bukor zalae aolador zonom deoar loge loge, ou maʼe nizor aolador gust, ar feṭo taki baroil fuati-ful forzonto nize nize lukaia ḳailibo.
28.58: “Ou kitabor maze shoriotor zoto hukum-ahkam leḳa ase, ita zudi tumra kub kial ḳoria amol na ḳoro, tumrar Mabud Allar mohima ar ḍor-ḳof ala namor ijjot na ḳoro,
28.59: te Mabude tumra ar tumrar aolad oḳolre bezuita bemar diba, ou bemare tumra lamba shomoy buganti korbae.
28.60: Mishoro taḳte bezuita zoto bemar-azar dekia tumra ḳafitae, hou bemar-azar oḳon tumrar ufre diba, itae tumrar fis saṛto nae.
28.61: Ar ou Tourat Kitabo zeta bemaror nam leḳa nai, ola ḳoṭin gozobi aro bout bemar-azar Mabude tumrar ufre saṛiba, tumra binash oar ag forzonto ita salu roibo.
28.62: Tumra nizor Mabud Allar hukum na manae, tumrar manshor foriman oḳon asmanor terar laḳan bout beshi oile-o, ita moria kub tuṛa basia roiba.
28.63: Mabude kushi oia tumrare zela ay-unnoti dia baṛaisla, tumrar manshor foriman boṛo ḳorsla, hou laḳan kushi koria oḳon hirbar tumrare binash ḳoria nifat ḳorba. Tumra oḳon ze deshor doḳoldari fairae, hou desh taki tumrare ḳaṛia neoa oibo.
28.64: “Bade zogotor ek kinara taki arok kinara forzonto, hoḳol zatir maze tumrare sitrai diba. Hono roia tumra ar tumrar moy-murobbir osina deb-debir sheba ḳorbae, laḳṛi ar fattoror murtire puja dibae.
28.65: Hou zati oḳlor loge roia tumrar shanti milto nae, tumrar aramor lagi kunu zaga roito nae. Hono Mabude tumrar monor maze hae-hutash baṛaiba, tumrar sokur hoḳol asha-borosha, ar dilor shoḳre tain nirash, nistez ḳorba.
28.66: Kita goṭibo ba na goṭibo ota sintae tumrar din guzoribo, din-rait hamesha ḳali zanor ḍor-boye oshantit roibae, basia roar kunu nichchoyota faitae nae.
28.67: Tumra monor ḍore, zanor maire, souke kunu kul-kinar na dekia ḳali hae hae ḳorbae. Bian oile ḳoibae zoldi rait ouk, ar rait oile ḳoibae zoldi din ouk.
28.68: Hou ze Mishor deshor befare ami koislam, tumra hino ar zaoa oito nae. Oile hou gozobor shomoy Mabude tumrare zazo ḳori hirbar Mishor desho neoaiba, nia harle tumra gulami korar lagi hono biki kaitae saibae, oile ḳeu tumrare kinto nae.”

29.1: Mabude Musa nobir marfote Tur faṛor ufre, Boni Israil zatir loge age eḳ oada-chukti korsla, oḳon Muab desho Mabude dusra oada-chukti boail ḳorla. Ita oilo ou oada-chuktir shorto oḳol. Hozrot Musae hirbar Allar deoa oada-chukti boail ḳorla
29.2: Musa nobie hoḳol Boni Israilre anaia ḳoila, “Alla Mabude Mishoror Feraunor loge, tar uzir-naziror loge, ar Mishoror hokkoltar loge zeta ḳorsila, ita to tumra deḳso.
29.3: Boṛo boṛo azob goṭona, Mabudor nanan laḳan nishana, ar kudroti kam to tumra nizor souke deḳso.
29.4: Oile itar mormo buzar moto mon, deḳar moto souk, hunar moto ḳan, Mabude oḳono tumrare disoin na.
29.5: Ami sallish bosor dori tumrare ou morubumir maze sofor ḳoraisi, ermaze tumrar finnor ḳafoṛ nosṭo oise na, faor zuta-o siṛse na.
29.6: Kunu bat-ruṭi-o ḳaiso na, anguror shorbot ba kunuzat shorab tumra ḳaitae faiso na. Ita hoḳolta to tain-u ḳorsoin, zate tumra buzo, tain-u tumrar Mabud Alla.
29.7: “Tumra hou zagat zaoar bade, Hishbonor bashsha Sihun ar Bashonor bashsha Uze amrar loge laṛai korat aisla, aile amra tarare arai dilam.
29.8: Tarar deshre doḳolo ania amra asta Ruben ḳandan, asta Sadu ḳandan ar Manosha ḳandanor ordeḳ manshore baṭia dilam.
29.9: Erlagi tumra ou oada-chuktir hoḳol hukum-ahkam kub kiali oia manio, manle hoḳol ḳam-ḳazo tumrar fayda oibo.
29.10: “Tumrar Mabud Allar samne aiz tumra hoḳol aia azir oiso, tumrar ḳandanor amir oḳol, moy-murobbi oḳol, ofisar oḳol, ar Boni Israilor hoḳol beṭain.
29.11: Tumrar loge oia tumrar bou, fua-fuṛin, ar bin zatir hou manush oḳol zetae tumrar daru faṛoin ar fani boia anoin tara-o aisoin.
29.12: Tumra hoḳol ono aia azir oiso, tumrar Mabud Allae ḳosom ḳaia ze oada-chukti aiz boail ḳorra, ou oada-chuktit tumra nize nize aiz hamaira.
29.13: Ar Mabude agor amolor tumrar moy-murobbi Ibrahim, Isʼhak, ar Iakub nobir loge ḳosom ḳaia ze oada ḳorsla, hou oada mafik oḳon taki tain tumrar Alla, ar tumra tan ḳas proza bonia roite razi aso, oḳan manat aiso.
29.14: -15 Te ami oḳon ze oada-chukti boail ḳorram, ita ḳali tumrar loge nae, borong tumra zoto zon oḳon amrar Mabud Allar samne azir aso, tumrar loge, ar tumrar zeta aolador zonom oḳono oise na, tarar loge-o ou oada-chukti zari roibo.
29.16: “Tumra nize-u to zano, Mishor desho amra kila din ḳaṭaisi, bade ḳoto desh ar ḳoto fot-gaṭ faroia ono aia azisi.
29.17: Tumra to ota deshor manshore shuna, rufa, fattor ar laḳṛidi banail zogoinno deb-debir murti oḳlor puja ḳorte deḳso.
29.18: Tumra kuz-ḳobor loia deḳo, tumrar maze zanu ou laḳan kunu beṭa ba beṭi, kunu bongsho ba ḳandan na taḳe, zetae tumrar Mabud Allare bad dia hota deb-debir puja ḳorar lagi kiali oizae. Zudi ila kunugu taḳe, te ogu oilo ola bishakto gasor zoṛ, ze zoṛor ḍem ou bishakto titta gas bonbo.
29.19: Zeta manshe ou ḳosom ḳaoar ḳota hunia-o zudi tar nizore kub ḳofali mono ḳore, ar beforua oia solle-o kunu shomoshsha nai ila mono ḳore, te tumrar bala-bura duioṭar ufre ota manshe shorbonash ḍakia anbo.
29.20: Mabude kunumonte-u erare mafi dita nae, erar ufre tan gusar aguin dau dau ḳori zolia uṭbo. Ar ou kitabor maze zoto laḳan lannotor ḳota leḳa ase, ita hokkolta erar ufre ḍaliba, Mabude asta dunia taki tarar nam miṭailiba.
29.21: Tain duḳ-mosiboto falanir lagi hokkol Boni Israil taki tarare basia alog korba, ou Tourat Kitabor oada-chuktir maze zoto laḳan lannotor ḳota leḳa ase, ita ota manshor ufre saṛiba.
29.22: “Ar Mabude ou deshor ufre zoto nomunar lannoti gozob ar bemar-azar ḍaliba, ita dekia tumrar aolad oḳole ar bin desh taki aoa musafir oḳole tumrar i dosha dekia ḳaron zikaiba.
29.23: Nun ar gondoḳe asta deshor maṭi zolizibo, i maṭit kunta folito nae, kunta lagaile oito nae, maṭir ufre kunuzator gash, lota-fata zonmito nae. Ikan hou lannoti desh Sadum, Amura, Odma ar Soboyimor laḳan bonizibo, Mabudor gusar aguin zolia uṭae tain to itare binash ḳorilisla.
29.24: Ota dekia hoḳol zatir manshe zikaiba, Mabude i deshor halot ḳene ila ḳorla? Tain ḳene oto boṛo gusa ḳorla?
29.25: “Teu manshe zuaf diba, ou zatir manshe tarar moy-murobbir Mabud Allar boail ḳora hou oada-chukti bad dilaise, Mishor desh taki tarare bar ḳori anar bade ze chukti boail ḳora oisil.
29.26: Tara hou Mabudre bad dia tarar gese noya, ota deb-debir pujat lagse, zeta deb-debir ḳota Mabude ḳoisoin na, otar gese mata nuaia soizda ḳorat lagse.
29.27: Erlagi ou deshor ufre Mabudor gusar aguin zolia uṭse, tain ou kitabo leḳa hoḳol nomunar lannoti gozob i desho nazil ḳorsoin.
29.28: Gusar aguine zolia, tarar ufre bezuita gozob ḍalia tarare ou desh taki zoṛe-foṛe tulia tarare bin desho nia asaṛ mari falaisoin, ar oḳono tara hono asoin.
29.29: “Batuni hoḳolta-u to amrar Mabud Allar ato, oile zair ḳora hoḳolta siroḳalor lagi amra ar amrar aolad oḳlor ato, zate amra ou shoriotor hoḳol hukum-ahkam amol ḳortam fari.”

30.1: Hozrot Musae ḳoira, “O Boni Israil huno, ami tumrar samne ze rohomot ar lannotor fot deḳaisi, ita hoḳolta tumrar ufre folibo. Folia harle tumrar Mabud Allae tumrare zeta zati oḳlor maze sitrai diba, tarar loge boshot ḳorar bala tumra ita kial ḳorio.
30.2: Hou shomoy tumra ar tumrar aolad oḳol zudi tumrar Mabud Allar gese firia ao, ar aiz ami tumrare zeta hukum-ahkam zanairam, ita dile-zane amol ḳoro,
30.3: te hou shomoy Mabude tumrare bondi halot taki azad ḳorba. Tain tumrare maya-momota ḳorba, ar tain zeta zatir maze tumrare sitraia disla, ota taki hirbar tumrare tukaia anba.
30.4: Duniar aḳeri kinarat-o zudi tumrare falail oy, te hono taki tumrar Mabud Allae tumrare tukaia anba.
30.5: Tumrar moy-murobbir desho tumrare firaia anba, ita hirbar tumra doḳol ḳorbae. Tain tumrare bout baṛai diba, ar tumrar moy-murobbir saite-o tumrar aolador foriman aro baṛaiba.
30.6: Tumra zate furafur dile-zane Allar mohobbotor ashik bonia basia ro, ou niote tumra ar tumrar aolad oḳlor dilor mosolmani tain nize diba.
30.7: Ar ou lannot oḳol tumrar Mabud Allae tumrar hou dushmonor ufre falaiba, zetae tumrare ingsha ar zulum ḳoroin.
30.8: Hou shomoy tumra hirbar tumrar Mabudor hukum mafik zindegi kaṭaibae, tan batail zeta hukum-ahkam aiz ami tumrare zanairam, ota hoḳolta amol ḳorbae.
30.9: “Hou shomoy tumrar Mabud Allae hoḳol nomunae tumrare ay-unnoti diba, tain tumrar ḳam-ḳazo borkot diba, tumrar aolador foriman baṛaiba, tumrar goru-sagolor baichchain ar zominor foshol baṛai diba. Tumrar moy-murobbir ufre tain zela kushi asla, tumrar ufre-o ola kushi oia tumrare hoḳol nomunae baṛaiba.
30.10: Ḳali tumra nizor Mabud Allar kushi mafik solia, ou Tourat Kitabo leḳa tan hoḳol hukum-ahkam ar niom-ḳanun manle, asta dile-zane tan bae firle, tain ou rohom-borkot diba. Zindegir fot ar moutor fot
30.11: “O Boni Israil huno, aiz ami tumrare zeta hukum diram, ita mania sola tumrar lagi beshi koshṭor kunu ḳam nae, ita tumrar lagalor bare-o nae.
30.12: Ita to behesto tulia toa kunu siz nae zen tumra ḳoitae, behesto taki kegie lamai ania ita amrare hunaito, ar amra amol ḳortam?
30.13: Ita doriar hofaror kunu siz-o nae zen tumra ḳoitae, doria faroia ḳegie gia ita ania amrare hunaito, ar amra amol ḳortam?
30.14: Borong Mabudor kalam to tumrar loge-u ase, tumrar mukor maze ar dilor bitre ita ase, zate ita amol ḳoro.
30.15: “Huno, aiz ami tumrar samne zeta tulia dorsi, ita oilo zindegi ar balai, ba mout ar duḳ-mosibot.
30.16: Aiz ami tumrare ou hukum diram, tumra nizor Mabud Allare mohobbot ḳorio, tan morzi zugaia solio, tan deoa shoriot, hoḳol niom-ḳanun, hukum-ahkam hor-hamesha manio. Teu tumra zane basbae, forimane baṛbae, ar ze deshḳan tumra doḳol ḳorat zairae, hou desho tumrar Mabud Allae tumrare rohom-borkot diba.
30.17: “Oile tumrar mon zudi Alla Mabudor bae taki firizae, tan hukum na mania tumra zudi kunu deb-debir pujat lagia otare fornam ḳoro,
30.18: te aiz ami tumrare zanai diram, tumra nischit binash oizibae. Zordan gangor hofaro ze desh tumra doḳol ḳorat zairae, hino tumra beshi din bastae nae.
30.19: “Ou asman-zominre tumrar birudde shakki rakia ḳoiar, aiz ami tumrar samne zindegi ar mout, rohomot ar lannotre tulia dorsi. Erlagi O baiain, tumra zindegire fosond ḳorilao, teu tumra ar tumrar aolad oḳlor zan basibo.
30.20: Tumra nizor Mabud Allare mohobbot ḳorio, tan hukum-ahkam manio, tan ashik bonia tanre ainja ḳori doria rakio, otar maze-u tumrar zindegi. Tain ze deshor doḳoldari dibar lagi tumrar moy-murobbi Ibrahim, Isʼhak, ar Iakubor loge ḳosom ḳaia oada disoin, hou desho ota hukum-ahkam manar maze-u tumrar zindegi.”

31.1: Erbade Musae hoḳol Boni Israilre ḳoila,
31.2: “O Boni Israil huno, amar boyosh to eḳ-sho bish bosor oigese, ami ar amar ḳam ḳortam fariar na, ḳaron Mabude amare zanaisoin, ami Zordan gangor hifaro zaitam fartam nae.
31.3: Te tumrar Mabud Alla nize tumrar age age roia Zordan gang faroia zaiba. Tain tumrar samne taki honor hoḳol zatire binash ḳorba, teu tumra hou desh doḳol ḳorbae. Ar Mabudor ḳota mafik Hozrot Iusae tumrare loia hofaro tumrar age age zaiba.
31.4: Mabude Amuri oḳlor bashsha Sihun ar Uzre zelaḳan binash ḳorsila, hou zati oḳolre-o ola binash ḳorba.
31.5: Tain hitare tumrar ato shofia diba, hou shomoy tumra amar batail hukum mafik kam ḳorio.
31.6: Tumrar bukut bol raḳo ar shaosh ḳoro. Ḍoraio na, tarare dekia gabṛaio na. Mono rakio, tumrar Mabud Alla tumrar loge loge zaira, tain kunumonte-u tumrare saṛta nae, kunu halote-u tumrare falaita nae.”
31.7: Bade Musa nobie hoḳol Boni Israilor samne Iusa nobire anaila, anaia ḳoila, “Tumi bukut bol raḳo ar shaosh ḳoro. Ou manush oḳolre loia tumi gang faroia hou desho zaibae, hou desh dibar lagi Mabude to tarar moy-murobbir gese oada ḳorsla. Tumi tarare hono nia honor zomi-zoma tarare baṭia dio.
31.8: Shoyong Mabud tumar age age roiba, tumare shaijjo ḳorba, tain tumare-o saṛta nae ar tumare falaita-o nae, te tumi ḍoraio na, shaosh araio na.” Tourat Kitab tilaotor hukum
31.9: Bade Musa nobie Tourator ou hukum-ahkam oḳol leḳla, lekia Lebi kandanor hou imam oḳol, zara Mabudor shahadot shonduk boia nita, tarar ato ar Boni Israilor moy-murobbir ato dila.
31.10: Dia tarare hukum dila, “Forteḳ shat bosor bade bade, aolat mafir bosoror ḳalo, Ḍera-goror Idor oḳto,
31.11: hoḳol Boni Israil zebla tumrar Mabud Allar fosond ḳora zagat gia tan samne azir oiba, hou shomoy tumi tara hoḳlor samne ou Tourat Kitab tilaot ḳoria hunaio.
31.12: Beṭain, beṭin, huruttain, ar tumrar loge boshot ḳorra gau ba ṭaunor bin zatir hoḳol manshore eḳ zagat dola ḳoria ita hunaio, ita hunia tara tumrar Mabud Allare ḍoraiba, ar ou shoriotor hoḳol hukum-ahkam zoton ḳori amol ḳorba.
31.13: Ar tarar zeta huruttae Tourator ou hukum-ahkam hunchoin na, Zordan gangor hofaro tumra ze deshor doḳoldari fairae, tumra hono gia harle tara-o hara zindegibor tumrar Mabud Allar ḍor-ḳofe sola hikba.” Naformani korar agam ḳobor
31.14: Bade Mabude Musa nobire ḳoila, “Tumar hayati to ar beshi nai, mout daro aichche, te tumi Iusare anao, anaia duio zon Milon-tambur samne ao, ami tar ufre tar noya ḳam shomzai dimu.” Teu tara duio zon gia Milon-tambur samne azir oila.
31.15: Ou shomoy Mabude megor kuṭir maze takia Milon-tambur duaror samne aia tarare doroshon dila, ou kuṭi tambur duaror ufre ubai roilo.
31.16: Ar Mabude Musare ḳoila, “Huno, tumi to tumar baf-dadaintor gese aram ḳorat zairaegi, oile ou manush oḳol ze desho hamaira, hamanir tuṛa bade-u amar loge tarar oada-chuktire tara bongo ḳorba, tara amare bad dia honor deb-debir ato nizore shofi diba.
31.17: Tara ita ḳoria harle amar gusar aguin zolibo, ami tarar log saṛi dimu, tarar bae taki amar muk firailimu, teu tara binashor foto zaiba. Tarar ufre nanan bala-mosibot aibo. Hou shomoy tara ḳoiba, amrar dosha ila oilo ḳene? Nischoy, amrar Alla amrar loge nae ḳori-u, ita goṭer.
31.18: Ashole tarar hou deb-debintor gese gia zeta ku-ḳam ḳorsoin, otar lagi-u ami hou shomoy tarar ges taki amar muk firailisi.
31.19: “Te tumra ou gozolṭa lekilao, lekia Boni Israilre hikao ar tara gaiba. Ou gozol to tarar birudde amar shakki oia roibo.
31.20: Buzrae ni, ami tarare ze desh dibar lagi tarar moy-murobbir gese oada ḳorsi, dud ar mour banḍar-ala aramor hou desho tarare nia harle-u, tara ḳana-fina ḳaia muṭa-taza oiba. Oia honor deb-debir puja ḳorat lagba, hotar bozona ḳorba, amare elami koria amar logor oada-chukti bangiba.
31.21: Teu tarar ufre zebla nanan nomunar bala-mosibot ar bifod-afod aibo, hou shomoy ou gozole tarar samne shakki dibo, ou gozol to tarar aolad oḳole faurita nae. Hasa ḳota oilo, amar oada ḳora hou desho nibar age-u, tara mone mone kita sinta ḳorer, ita to amar zana ase.”
31.22: Musae loge loge ou gozol lekia Boni Israilre hikaila.
31.23: Ar Mabude Nunor fua Iusare tan noya ḳamor lagi oula hukum dila, “Tumi bukut bol raḳo ar shaosh ḳoro. Ami kosom ḳaia Boni Israilre ze desh dibar lagi oada ḳorsi, tumi tarare loia hou desho zaibae, ami tumar loge loge roimu.”
31.24: Shoriotor ou hukum-ahkamor hoḳolta Musae shullo-ana leḳla,
31.25: lekia Mabudor shahadot shonduk boia neora Lebi kandanor manshore hukum dila,
31.26: “Ou Tourat Kitab ḳan nia tumra Alla Mabudor shahadot shondukor ḳasat toio. Ikan Boni Israilor birudde shakki hishabe hono roibo.
31.27: Tumra ḳoto boṛo gaṛteṛa ar naforman, ita amar zana ase. Ami zinda halote tumrar loge roite-u tumra zebla Mabudor naformani korso, te amar moronor bade tumra ar kita na ḳorbae!
31.28: Tumra hoḳole zarzir ḳandanor murobbi ar ofisar oḳolre amar gese ano, ami nize tarar gese ota kulasa ḳoria ḳoia zaimu, asman-zominre tarar birudde shakki raḳtam sai.
31.29: Ami to zani, ami souk muzar bade tumra ekkebare be-foti bonizibae, amar batail fot taki tumra horizibae, teu tumrar ufre gozob lambo. Ḳaron Mabude zeta gin ḳoroin, tumra ota ḳam ḳoria, nizor ate murti banaia, tan gusa tulaibae.”
31.30: Bade Musa nobie hoḳol Boni Israilor samne ou gozolor foyla taki aḳer forzonto hunaila; tain gaila,

32.1: O asman, ḳan fatia huno ami zeta gai, O zomin, tumi-o huno ami za batai.
32.2: Amar talim lamouk megor fuṭar laḳan, kuar moton foṛouk amar mukor boyan. Ḳesma gashor ufre fuṭa fuṭa meg oia foṛouk, noya sera gasor ufre shantir meg oia lamouk.
32.3: Ami to elan ḳormu amar Mabudor nam, tumra-o gaio Allar mohima gan.
32.4: Tain-u to asroy ṭilla, nikut tan ḳam, hok-hasa tan fot shoṭik tamam. Sol-soturi nai tan, hok-halal ase shorboda, hok insaf forezgari ase shotota.
32.5: Ta-o tan ḳobis bondae ḳorse beimani, dilor ḳarafie tara bonche ḳolonkini.
32.6: Haere ammok nadan, haere be-aḳol, ouni tumra bodla dilae, Mabudor danor? Taine-u tumrar foyda ḳorra Foroar digar ni? Boail ḳorla tumrar Israil zati.
32.7: Iad ḳoro tumra hou agor amolor mat, mono raḳo kita oisil furan zomanat. Baf-dadare zikar ḳori itihash huno, buṛa-buṛir muk taki hoḳolta zano.
32.8: Allatalae dila zebla zomin baṭia, nanan zatire dila bag-baṭura ḳoria. Boni Israilor foriman to zana asil tan, erar ongsho algai toia baki korla dan.
32.9: Mabudor ḳas shompotti to tan nizor proza, Iakub bongsho Israil zati afon samana.
32.10: Tarare tain tukai faila morubumir desho, nirai-nirzon desh ar bag-shinghor gorzono. Kudroti ḍaḳnadi guria zoton ḳorila, sokur monir laḳan-u tarare basaila.
32.11: Sile zela nizor badar baichchare nasae, aste aste uṛi uṛi ḍaḳnare laṛae, ḍaḳna melia baichchainre ufre tule, tulia hari uṛal dia loia loia gure,
32.12: Mabude eḳla oula ḳori tarare nila, kunuzator deb-debi tan loge asil na.
32.13: Faṛe faṛe uṛai uṛai nila tarare, faṛia deshor doḳol dila Boni Israilre. Ḳetor bala foshol dila ḳaibar lagi, faṛia saḳor mou ḳabaila faṭa-sifa taki. Ḳabaila malike zoytunor tel, luar laḳan shokto maṭit tel foli gelo.
32.14: Ḳabaila tarare tain gorur dudor doi, sagol-meṛar dud-o ḳaila zanio nichchoy. Muṭa-taza meṛar gust ḳaila moza ḳori, Bashon deshor goru-ḳoshi kaila ruṭidi. Taza-fusṭo gomor ruṭi anguror shorbot, ḍemdi uṭa angur oilo Allar niamot.
32.15: Bade tara lat marila feṭla bonia, Boni Israile lat marla tarar fao dia. Ḳaia ḳaia feṭ fulaia marlo oḳon lat, faurililo hou Allare zein dila bat. Foyda ḳorra Allar log tara saṛi dilo, asroy ṭilla Allare tara huru mono ḳorlo.
32.16: Deb-debir puja ḳoria zalailo aguin, eḳ Alla saṛia tara bozilo hoguin. Gusar aguin zalailo tan arshor maze, murti puja gin ḳoroin mohan Alla Pake.
32.17: Butor name boli dilo tanre saṛia, but to kunu Alla nae ta-o failo puja. Noya noya devta zeta ḳoydin taki sine, baf-dadar osin devta oḳon tara boze.
32.18: Zonom data bafor laḳan zein asroy ṭilla, tanre tumra fauria hari korlae obohela.
32.19: Aolador ou halot dekia muk firailla Mabude, rage-gusae aguin oila tarar-u bod amole.
32.20: Gusa ḳori Mabude ḳoila muk firailam ami, tarar hesh dosha kita ami nichchit zani. Deḳmu saia tarar hoḳol beimanir shaza, be-foti beiman zate buzba nizor dosha.
32.21: Zeṭa Alla nai ila devtar puja ḳoria, amar bitre dise tara gusa tulia. Zeṭa zati nai ila zati dia ingsha ḳoraimu, ammok zati dia tarar gusa tulaimu.
32.22: Amar gusar aguin oḳon dau dau ḳori zoler, maṭir tolor fatalre-o zalaia sarḳar ḳorer. Hara zogot ar foy-foshol zalai korbo sali, faṛor tolat aguin zolbo, zolbo duil bali.
32.23: Laḳo laḳo bifod dimu hoḳoltar ufor, amar tamam tir marmu feṭor buke ḳormu ḳator.
32.24: Ufashi nidane tara hukai hukai morba, gozobi bemaror loge duk-toklif faiba. Dat ala zongli foshu faṭaimu ami, bishakto shob hafor fale diba ḳamṛani.
32.25: Bare gele morba tara toluaror tole, goro roile morba hoḳol zanor ḍor-ḳofe. Zuan fua zuan fuṛin dudor hurutta, binashi gozobe morba daṛi sul faḳna.
32.26: Ḳoislam ami uṛai marmu Boni Israilre, itar nam fusilaimu manshor mon tone.
32.27: Oile amar zana ase dushmonor bab-shab, beṭagiri korba tara oibo tarar lab. Na buzia ḳoibo tara zitse nizor bole, Mabud ita kuntat nae zitsi kole-bole.
32.28: Bisar-bibek kuaia oḳon name Israil zati, aḳol-buddi araia tara oise be-foti.
32.29: Aḳol taḳle buzto tarar nizor durdosha, bibek kaṭai zan basaia roito hamesha.
32.30: Eḳ dushmone aia kila azar zon ḳedae, dui sifaire dekia ḳene dosh azar douṛae. Nizor asroy ṭilla zudi tarare na besita, shoyong Mabude zudi saṛia na dita.
32.31: Dushmonor asroy ṭilla oto mozbut nae, tara-u ikan shikar ḳori hoḳolre hunae. Amrar asroy ṭilla to bout boṛo boloban, tarar muke gaia ita zofe tan shunam.
32.32: Mabude bataira oḳon tarar ḳetor ḳota, Sadum ṭaun taki aise itar anguror lota, Amura shohor taki itae angur fol faise, bish ar tittae i folor soṛi furafur oise.
32.33: Anguror shorbot zela nag-naginir bish, alod hafor bish-o ola marattoḳ zinish.
32.34: Amar gese ita gozob tumrar lagi kaṛa, amar banḍaro toa shob sil-sappoṛ mara.
32.35: Naformanir shaza deoa amar-u ḳam, amol mafik bodla dimu tamam insan. Shomoy oile fislizibo dushmonor fao, mosibotor din tarar nozdik zanilao. Ṭik kori toa ase tarar ḳamor bodla, zoldi kori faiba nizor amol-nama zela.
32.36: Mabude deḳba zebla bol-shokti nai, tan bondar bol-takkot gesegi fuṛai. Gulam kiba azad bonda hoḳol-u mazur, dekia tain fokko loiba afon gulamor. Maya-doya ḳorba Allae tan gulamre, mazur taki shobol ḳorba doya-rohome.
32.37: Ḳoiba tain hou shomoy kuai gela hita, otodin bozisla tara zeta devta. Bagia gelogi kuai tarar asroy fahaṛ, tarar hoḳol deb-debi oshaṛor oshaṛ.
32.38: Ḳoi gela hou deb-debi zetae ḳaisla sorbi, sorbi ala bolir gust ḳaisil besh ḳori. Zeta devtain ḳaisil sodgar shorbot, oḳon tara basauk aia tarar ummot. Shaijjo ḳorouk na aia tumrar hou ṭakur, asroy dey na ḳene naforman bodkur.
32.39: Sinta-babna ḳoria deḳo hou tain-u ami, ami saṛa Mabud nai ikan zancho ni. Ami-u marilai ami-u basai, ami-u to zoḳom ḳori ami dei balai. Ama taki basailito shaiddo ase ḳar, hayat moutor malik ami Allahu Akbar.
32.40: Arshor bae at tulia ḳosom ḳaia ḳoi, siroḳalin zinda ami zanio nichchoy.
32.41: Dar zebla dimu amar soḳsoḳa toluar, ḳaim ḳorat lagmu zebla amar ray-bisar. Hou shomoy shaza dimu amar hoḳol dushmonre, amare ginnanir bodla dimu tarare.
32.42: Tir-donuke lou ḳaia ḳorbo matlami, amar toluare-o to lou ḳaibo zani. Murda ar bondi oḳlor lou he ḳaibo, dushmonor gust ḳaia feṭ fulaibo. Lamba-suli sifair ḳolla ḳaibore muke, tarar ḳolla sibai kaibo amar donuke.
32.43: Mayar prozar loge oia asman kushi o, behestor hoḳol firistae tane soizda deo. Zogotor tamam zatie gao gunogan, Allar hoḳol bondar loge lo tan moha nam. Tan gulamor lour bodla oḳon loiba tain, dushmonre shaza dia saf ḳorba zomiḳan. Tan bondae Kenan desho failiba rehai, gunar kofora dia diba tar bodlai.
32.44: Musa nobi ar tan ḳadim Nunor fua Iusa gia hoḳol manshor gese ou gozolor shob ḳota zanaila.
32.45: Musae hoḳol Boni Israilor gese gia ita hoḳolta ḳoia hari,
32.46: ḳoila, “Ami ou zoto hushiarir ḳota tumrare zanaisi, ita tumrar dilo gatia rakio, ita to tumrar birudde shakki bonia roibo. Ar tumrar aolad oḳolre hukum dio, ou shoriotor hoḳol hukum-ahkam kiali oia amol ḳorta.
32.47: Ita to aze-baze kunu mat-ḳota nae, ita oilo tumrar zindegi! Zordan gang faroia hari tumra ze deshor doḳoldari fairae, ota amol ḳorle hono tumra lamba hayati faibae.” Hozrot Musa (a:)or aḳeri halot
32.48: Hou din-u Mabude Musa nobire ḳoila,
32.49: “Tumi gia ou Abarim faṛo uṭo, iṭa to Muab deshor Ziriho ṭaunor samne ase. Hono uṭia Nobo namor hou usa ṭillar ufre zao, ar Boni Israilre ami ze deshor malikana diram, ou Kenan desh eḳbar dekilao.
32.50: Tumar bai Harun zela Hur faṛor ufre uṭia harle ufat oisil, bade tar baf-dadar ḳataro gia azisil, ou Nobo faṛo uṭar bade oula tumar-o ufat oibo, ar tumar baf-dadar gese gia oulaḳan tumi-o azibae.
32.51: Mono ase ni, hoḳol Boni Israilor samne tumra duio baie amare fak-fobitro ḳoia mainno ḳorso na, hou Zin morubumir Kadesh elaḳar Meriba namor zagat fanir gese tumra amar name zaliati korslae.
32.52: Hono uṭia harle tumar sokur samne hou desh deḳbae, ze deshḳan ami Boni Israilre dan ḳorram, tumi kali soukdi deḳbae, oile hi desho hamaibar shuzug tumar oito nae.”

33.1: Allar ḳas bonda Musa nobir ufator age, Boni Israilre tain ou dua dila:
33.2: Toshrif anla Mabud Allae Tur faṛ taki, amra hoḳole deḳa failam nure elahi. Seir ar Faran faṛ taki deḳain nuror tez, laḳo laḳo firista kiba aro besh. Didar dila Mabude erar maz tone, ḍain ato bora asil nuror aguine.
33.3: Hasau tain maya ḳoroin nizor bondare, tamam forezgar bonda tan hukume sole. Soizda ḳorat asoin tara tan faor tolat, hukum faile tamil ḳoroin roin tan ḳotat.
33.4: Musa nobie ze shoriot disla amrare, Boni Israilor don ita zane hoḳole.
33.5: Dola oia aila zebla moy-murobbir dol, log oia aisla Israilor ḳandanor hoḳol, hou shomoy to Mabud asla tarar ufror bashsha, era hoḳol tan proza tain-u Shahansha. Baro ḳandanre dua dila
33.6: Ruben ḳandanor befare Hozrot Musae ḳoila: Ruben ḳandan zinda rouk, nifat nae kunudin, ta-o tar goro foyda oibo ḳom fua-fuṛin.
33.7: Ehuda ḳandanor befare ḳoila: O Mabud, tumi oḳon Ehudar foriad huno, bai-biradoror daro tare firaia ano. Duio at tar shobol raḳo laṛair shomoy, shaijjo ḳoro tumi tare dushmonre deo arai.
33.8: Lebi kandanor befare ḳoila: Tumar ashikor ato ase Tummim ar Urim , kudroti hou dui samanar malik kali ou Lebin. Masa namor zagat loiso tar forikka, Meriba namor fanir zagat oisil ou ḳaijja.
33.9: Ma-bafore-o tulche na he tumar ufre, gunar shaza dise tar maʼr feṭor baire. Dabi saṛia shofi dise afon fua-fuṛi, zindegi kurbani dise tumar ain mani. Tumar kalam fara dise manche shoriot, oada-chukti mania solche, na ḳori kianot.
33.10: Tumar hukum tara hikae Iakub bongshore, tumar shoriot buzae tara Israil zatire. Agor-kushboy zalae tara tumar samne aia, zalail kurbani dey kurban-gat gia.
33.11: Tar samanat borkot deo go O amar Mabud, razi-kushi ro tumi tar ufre bout. Tar dushmonor ḳomor tumi bangi-suri deo, ginna ḳorrar ḳomor bangi borbad ḳorilao.
33.12: Bin-Iamin ḳandanor befare tain ḳoila: Mabudor mayar bonda shae-shantie roibo, nirafode roibo he tan ḍaḳnar tolo. Hara din hara rait sayat raḳba tare, zindegi guzoribo tar tan bogol tole.
33.13: Iusuf ḳandanor befare tain ḳoila: Rohom-borkot ḳoro Mabud tar deshḳanre, asman taki dami dami zinish deo tare. Kua dia bizai deo ufror asman taki, aro deo tar zomino maṭir muror fani.
33.14: Shuruzor teze faḳaia deo bala fol, sande sande deo tare mozar foshol.
33.15: Furana faṛ taki don-samana deo, siroḳalin faṛia mal tar zomino neo.
33.16: Zomin taki deo go Mabud bala bala mal, zalail zonglar nuror malik rohom ḳoro siroḳal , Iusufor matat lamouk amar ou dua, baiain taki mohan zonor talut lamouk ita.
33.17: Ḍeḳa baichchar moto ouk tar bol-shokti ar shan, tar matar hing zuṛa to zongli boyrar laḳan. Hing dia gutaibo he hara zogotre, fub fosim uttor dokkin douṛaibo hoḳolre. Afraimor oiba ola laḳo laḳo zon, azar azar zon oiba Manoshar mul don.
33.18: Sobulon ar Isaḳoror ḳandanor befare tain ḳoila: Sobulone kushi korouk bairor ḳam-ḳaz loia, Isaḳor kushi rouk goror ḳamo roia.
33.19: Ḍaki ḍaki faṛor daro anbo manshore, kurbani dibo hono ḳas sohi dile. Doria taki tulba tara doriar feṭor don, bali taki tulia anba lukail shob roton.
33.20: Sadu ḳandanor befare tain ḳoila: Mubarok hou zon, Sadur zaega baṛai diba zein, Sadu to shinghor laḳan ḳaf dori roy, dushmonor at ar ḳolla siṛia falae.
33.21: Hoḳol taki shorosh zomi nizor lagi nise, zoiggo murobbir ashon tar lagi toa oise. Zatir shordar oḳol dola oar ḳalo, Mabudor niae bisar he tamil ḳorilo, Boni Israilre deoa hukum fura mainno ḳorlo.
33.22: Dan ḳandanor befar tain ḳoila: Furfura shinghor baichcha oilo Dan ḳandan, Bashon desh ton faldi aia ḳore boṛai shan.
33.23: Noftali kandanor befare tain ḳoila: Noftali to Mabudor maya-momotat habuḍubu ḳar, tan rohom-borkoto he hatar ḳaṭer. Tumi tare tar afon shimanat ano, soi-salamote Galil aor ar douknor desho neo.
33.24: Ashir ḳandanor befare tain ḳoila: Ashire faibo rohomot oinno taki beshi, hoḳol baie maya ḳorba tare rashi rashi. Oto rohom-borkot faia kushi taḳar ḳalo, dui fao tar ḍubail roibo zoytunor telo.
33.25: Tar geiṭ oḳol bandail ouk lua ar tamadi, he bolala mozbut rouk tar fura zindegi.
33.26: Musa nobie aro ḳoila: Boni Israilor Allar homani dusra ḳeu nai, tumrare shaijjor lagi asmano beṛain. Tan nizor shan-mohimae megor saḳat soṛia, shaijjoḳari oita sain tumrar lagia.
33.27: Hoḳol foylakur eḳ Alla-u oila asroy ṭikana, tan siroḳalin at dia tumrare raḳsoin doria. Tumrar samnor hoḳol dushmon tain-u ḳedai dein, itare binash ḳoro hukum disoin tain.
33.28: Erlagi Israil zati bala-afta roin, Iakub bongshor fanir zorna nirafod taḳoin. Hino roibo foy-foshol ar angur roshe bora, tar ufre lambo asmani kua.
33.29: O Boni Israil, mubarok aolad tumi! Tumi oilae Mabud Allar azad ḳora zati. Shoyong Mabud oila tumar zan basanir ḍal, tain-u oila tumar joyor darail toluar. Dushmon tumar samne aile tor-toraia ḳafe, tumi tarar bukur ufre maṛa dibae ne.

34.1: Bade Musa nobi Muab deshor tol zaga taki, Nobo faṛor ṭillar ufre uṭila, ou ṭilla to Ziriho ṭaunor samne Pisga faṛor hoḳol taki usa ṭilla. Hono Mabude tanre hoḳol desh deḳaila, Giliod taki Dan forzonto,
34.2: asta Noftali desh, Afraim ar Manosha desh, ar foismor doriar far forzonto fura Ehuda desh,
34.3: douknor Negeb morubumi, ḳezuri ṭaun Ziriho, ar er ḳandar Zordan gangor douknor morubumi taki Suar gau forzonto hoḳol zaga.
34.4: Ota deḳanir bade Mabude tanre ḳoila, “Ikan oilo hou desh, zeḳanor befare ami Ibrahim, Isʼhak ar Iakubor gese ḳosom ḳaislam. Tarare ḳoislam, deshḳan ami tumar oarishre dimu. Te ita ami tumare shorashori deḳailam, oile tumi Zordan gang faroia hino hamaitae fartae nae.”
34.5: Mabudor zoban mafik, tan gulam Musa nobir ufat ou Muab desho-u oilo.
34.6: Muab deshor Bayt-Piyuror daro faṛia tol zagat Allar kudroti ate tanre dafon ḳorla. Oile tan rouza shorifre oḳono ḳeu sine na.
34.7: Ufator ḳalo tan boyosh asil eḳ-sho bish bosor. Hou shomoy-o tan souḳor faoar ḳomse na, tan shoril ḳomzur oise na.
34.8: Ufator bade Boni Israile tish din dori Muab deshor nisa tol zagat tan lagi kanda-ḳaṭi ar ahazari korla. Ou tish din bade tarar duk-ahazari shesh oilo.
34.9: Hozrot Musae Nunor fua Iusar matar ufre at raḳar ḳarone, ou shomoy tone Iusa aḳolor ruhe furafur kamil oigela. Teu Boni Israil oḳol tan foramishe solla, ar Musa nobir marfote Mabudor batail hukum mafik tara zindegi kaṭaila.
34.10: Hozrot Musar laḳan ila kunu nobi oḳon forzonto Boni Israilor maze zonom loisoin na, zan loge Mabude samna-samni oia batchit ḳorta.
34.11: Mabude Musa nobire bezia Mishoror bashsha Feraun ar tar uzir-nazir, tar asta deshor ufre zoto laḳan kudroti nishana ar keramoti kam deḳaisoin, ita-o ar ḳeu ḳorsoin na.
34.12: Tamam Boni Israilor souḳor samne Musa nobie zela kudroti moha taijjubi ar ḍor-ḳofor nanan keramotir ḳam ḳorsoin, ila ḳam dusra ḳeu ḳorar takkot oise na. Ḳotom

1.1: -2 Hozrot Daud nobir tin siṛi age amir oḳlor hukumotor amolo, Ehuda desho Ali Malik name eḳ beṭa asla, tan bibir nam Noyomi, Moholun ar Kilion namor tarar dui fua asla. Ou shomoy desho kub bezuita nidan deḳa dilo. Nidanor ṭelae Betelham gaur Ifrata gusṭir ou Ali Malike tan bibi ar fuainre loia Muab desho gelagi.
1.3: Hono zaoar ḳoydin bade Ali Malik morigela, tan bou Noyomi ar duio fua etim oilo.
1.4: -5 Bade Bibi Noyomie duio fuare ou Muab deshor dui koinar loge shadi dila. Ek koinar nam Rut, arok koinar nam Orpa. Shadir ḳoydin bade duio fua-o morigela. Oula eḳ dosh boros gelo. Bibi Noyomie tan duio boure loia ṛaṛi halote hou Muab desho-u roila. Rutre loia Bibi Noyomi baṛit firot aila
1.6: Aḳta eḳdin tain ḳobor faila, tan nizor hou Ehuda desho Mabude borkot nazil ḳoria ḳani-kuraki dan ḳorsoin.
1.7: Ou ḳobor faia tain duio fuar boure loia hirbar desho zaitagi kori tiar oila.
1.8: Foto bar oia Bibi Noyomie tan fuar bouainre ḳoila, “O beṭin, tumitain tumartanor maʼr gese zaogi, hono gele tumra shuk faibae. Ma-bafe tumrare bia-shadi diba, tumra noya gor-shongshar ḳorbae. Ar mai oḳolre, amar foribaror loge tumra zela bala bebohar ḳorso, Allae-o tumrar oula balai koroukka,
1.9: tumrare bala beṭa milai deukka, tumra zate shuḳ-shantie zindegi kaṭaitae faro.” Ḳoia tain tarare ainja ḳori doria maya dila. Teu tara duiozone au au ḳori ḍaḳaia ḳandi kandi koila,
1.10: “Mai go, amrare-o afnar logkano afnar desho neukkagi.”
1.11: Hoṛie ḳoila, “Na rego mai, tumra kitallagi amar loge zaitae? Tumrar baf-maʼr gese zaogi. Amar loge gele to lab-ub oito nae. Ila to nae zen amar aro fuain asoin, otar loge tumrare raḳmu,
1.12: ba ami aroḳ shongshar fatia hou torofa fuar loge tumrare raḳtam farmu. Amar to ar i boyosh-o roise na. Ar roile-o ami aiz rait-u aroḳ shongshar fatia hari amar goro kunu fut zonmile-o,
1.13: tumra kunu otodin baṛ saibae ni? Tumra zarzir baṛit zaogi, ami to obagi, ḳofal-fuṛa. Shoyong Mabude amar ufre ṭaṭa falai disoin.”
1.14: Ikan hunia tara au au ḳori kandon dorla. Ḳoto shomoy ḳandia hari Orpae tan hoṛire maya dia bidae loia bafor baṛit gelagi. Oile Rut tan hoṛir loge-u roigela.
1.15: Ein gia harle hoṛie Rutre ḳoila, “O beṭi, tumar zal to tair nizor baṛi ar devtar gese zargi, te tumi-o tair loge zaogi.”
1.16: Rute zuaf dila, “Ji na amma, afne ila matoin na zanu, afnar ḳor oia roite amare nished ḳoroin na zanu. Afne zeno-u zain na ḳene ami-o zaimu, afne zeno roiba ami-o ono roimu. Afnar zati-u oibo amar zati, afnar Mabud-u oiba amar Mabud.
1.17: Ze zagat afne morizibae, ono ami-o morizimu, ar ono-u amar ḳoybor oibo. Ḳali moron saṛa dusra kunutae zudi amare afnar log saṛaito fare, te Allae zanu amare gozobi shasti dein.”
1.18: Ikan hunia hoṛie ar kunta ḳoila na, tain buzilila Rute tan loge zaito ḳori dil bandilise.
1.19: Bade tara duiozone aṭa dorla, aṭi aṭi tara Betelham gaut aia fosila. Gaut aite-u gaur beṭinte aia uloistol lagaia ḳoila, “Iyallare, Noyomir ou halot oise ni?”
1.20: “Oy go shuna, amare ar Noyomi [mani, shuki] ḳoia ḍakio na, Marua [mani, titta] ḳoia ḍakio, Shorbo-shoktiman Allae to amar zindegire titta banailise.
1.21: Ami obagini kofal-fuṛa. Amare ar kitallagi Noyomi koia ḍakirae? Desh taki geslam bora ate, ar Mabude anla ḳali ate. Shoyong Shorbo-shoktimane-u amar bora ḍubi korilisoin.”
1.22: Olaḳan ḳori Muabi Rutre loia Noyomie Muab desh saṛia nizor baṛit Betelham gia hamaila. Ou shomoy barli foshol ḳaṭar mousum asil.

2.1: -3 Baṛit aia harle eḳdin Muabi Rute tan hoṛire ḳoila, “Maiji, ami saislam bondo zaitam, ar ḳeu zudi meherbani koria amare tar zomino lurite dey, te lurilam one. Te afne kita mono ḳoroin?” Noyomie zuaf dila, “Aichcha, tumar bala lagle zao.” Teu Rut lurat gela. Bondo bout manshe barli daira, oile taijjubi mamela oilo, Rute ze zagat lurita gela, i ketor malik asla tan hour Ali Malikor kuṭum Buaz. Ein oila hi elaḳar nami-dami kandani manush. Rute hino ḳamlaintor ḳore ḳore lurira,
2.4: ou shomoy aḳta-u ḳetor malik Buaz Betelham gau taki aia ḳoila, “Assalamu alaikum, kita ba tumra bala aso ni?” Salamor alek loia tara ḳoila, “Ji oy sab, bala asi.”
2.5: Teu Buaze tan fordan ḳamlare zikaila, “Oba, ou zen lurer i beṭigu ḳe?”
2.6: Ou he ḳoilo, “Sab, enre sinchoin na ni? Ein to afnarar kuṭum Noyomi beṭir fuar bou, i beṭir bafor baṛi asil Muab desho.
2.7: Beṭie aia amare ḳoila, ou zera barli daira, meherbani koria amare erar ḳore ḳore lurite diba ni? Beṭi to bian taki oḳon forzonto ono asoin, mazḳano ḳali uṛar tole tuṛa ziraisoin.”
2.8: Ou Buaze Rutre ḳoila, “O boin, tumi hamesha amar zomino lurio, amar ota beṭintor loge loge roio, bara manshor zomino zaio na,
2.9: ami amar ḳamlaintore ḳoisi, tara tumare sataito nae, kial rakio tara kundin kun zagat daira. Ar ḳamlainte ḳaoar lagi zeta fani-uni anchoin, fiase dorle tumi-o on tone ḳaio.”
2.10: Ikan hunia Rute Buazor faot doria ḳodombusi koria ḳoila, “Sab, ami to eḳ bideshi beṭi, tebou afne ḳene amare oto maya-doya ḳorra?”
2.11: Teu Buaze zuaf dila, “Tumi ṛaṛi beṭi oia-o tumar hoṛir lagi zeta ḳorrae ita hoḳolta-u ami hunchi, tumar ma-baf ar zonom-maṭi saṛia i osin zagat aiso.
2.12: Allae tumare rohom ḳorouk. Boni Israilor Mabud, zen ḍaḳnar tole aia tumi asroy loiso, ein tumar shullo-ana faona hok dan ḳoroukka.”
2.13: Ou Rute ḳoila, “Sab, afne zen amare oto mayadari mat matia afnar i bandire shaosh zugai disoin, ami to afnar ita ek kamla beṭiro homani nae.”
2.14: Bade ḳanir oḳt aia harle, Buaze Rutre ḍaḳdi ania ḳoila, “O boin, aio, on taki ruṭi nia talo bizaia ḳao.” Rut aia ḳamla beṭintor galat ḳanit boila, boia harle Buaze tanre kisu chiṛa-muṛi dila. Teu Rute ita hoḳolta ḳaila, ḳaia harle zeta ufrilo ita tan bego haraia toila.
2.15: -16 Bade Rut uṭia hirbar lurat zaita tiar oisoin, ou shomoy Buaze tan ḳamlaintore ḳoila, “Oba, tumra barli daoar bala tuṛatuṛi soṛain toia zaio, teu ein lurile ota faiba. Ein ḳaṭa muiṭ taki soṛain siṛia nile-o enre domoḳ-ṭomoḳ dio na.”
2.17: Rute hainja forzonto ono luria maṛa dia zaṛia saf ḳoria onuman eḳ furar barli loia tain baṛit gela.
2.18: Gia harle tan begor mosa bar ḳoria hoṛire dila, ar lurar barlir gaiṭ kulia tanre deḳaila.
2.19: Barli dekia Noyomie ḳoila, “Tumi kar zomino lurat geslae go? Tumare zar zomino lurite dise, Allae tar bala ḳorouk.” Teu Rute ḳoila, “Maiji, ze girostor zomino ami lurisi, en nam oilo Buaz.”
2.20: Ikan hunia Noyomie ḳoila, “Tamam zinda ar murdar ufre hok insaf ḳoroneala Mabude ere rohomot deukka. Ein to tumar houror korib manush. Amrar foribarre deḳa-huna ar ḳalas ḳorar eḳtiar zerar ase, ein oila erar mazor eḳzon.”
2.21: Rute ḳoila, “Maiji, emon ki ou sabe amare ḳoisoin, O boin, zotodin amar daoa-ḳaṭi ase, otodin tumi amar zomino aia amar bandintor loge roia lurio.”
2.22: Noyomie ḳoila, “Ikan to bala oibore mai, tumi en zomino gia tan bandintor loge roia lurio. Bara zomino zaio na, teu ḳeu tumare sataito nae.”
2.23: Barli ar gom daoa zotodin asil otodin-u Rute gia Buazor ḳamla beṭintor loge roia lurila, ar tan hoṛir loge mili-mishi roila.

3.1: Ḳoydin bade Bibi Noyomie Rutre ḳoila, “Ami mono ḳorram tumi hirbar shuki-shongshari o.
3.2: Tumi zar ḳamla beṭintor loge roia lurirae, ou Buaz to emne-u amrar kuṭum. Aiz rait tain ḳolat aia barli maṛa diba.
3.3: Te tumi ek kam ḳoro, tumi naia-doia, tel-tul makia, hazi-faṛi tan ḳolat zaogi. Oile tain tumare deḳoin na zanu.
3.4: Raitkur ḳaoa-daoa bade ein zebla hutiba, ou shomoy tumi en bisna sinia rakio. Bade hono gia tan faor ufror ḳeta horaia hono hutiroio. Hutia harle kita oibo, tain emne-u ḳoia diba.”
3.5: Rute ḳoila, “Ji aichcha, afne zela ḳoira ola-u ḳormune.”
3.6: Bade shomoy moto tain ḳolat gela, ar hoṛie zela ḳoisla ola-u ḳorla.
3.7: Ḳaoa-daoa bade Buaz zebla kush mizaze tan ḳolar uṛar tole gia hutila, Ruto lae lae hono gia Buazor faor ufor tone ḳeta horaia faor ḳandat hutiroila.
3.8: -9 Ada raitkur bala Buaze ḳoroṭ firaia enre dekia somkia uṭia ḳoila, “Tumi ke go?” Rute ḳoila, “Sab, ami afnar bandi Rut, afne afnar ḳetar tolḳano bandire eḳzora ṭai deukka. Amrare deḳa-huna ḳorra kuṭum oḳlor maze afne to eḳzon.”
3.10: Buaze zuaf dila, “Boinre, Allae tumare rohom ḳoroukka, tumi foyla taki-u zela horir bishashi aslae, tair balair lagi aiz aro beshi bishashi zair ḳorlae, tumi to doni-gorib kunu zuan beṭar loge zaoar lagi sinta ḳorso na.
3.11: Asta gaur hoḳol manshe-u tumare bala fae. Tumi sinta ḳorio na, tumi zela sairae, ami ola-u ḳormu.
3.12: Oile ama tone aro korib tumatanor eḳzon asoin,
3.13: ḳail bianku bala ami tan loge matimu, tain zudi tumare shadi korte razi oin te to bala, tain-u shadi korilla. Ar na oile ami Allar ḳosom ḳaia ḳoiar, ami tumare shomzia loimu. Oḳon tumi ono-u rait ḳaṭailao, raitḳal ar zaio na.”
3.14: Fozoror ag forzonto Rut Buazor faor ḳandat hutiroila. Buaze Rutre ḳoila, “Tumi zen ino aiso, ikan zanu ḳeu na zane.” Teu andair roite-u Rut baṛit zaitagi kori zuit oila.
3.15: Ar Buaze tanre ḳoila, “Hoṛir samne ḳali ate kila zaitae? Deki, tumar saddorḳan melao.” Rute saddor melia kunat dorla ar Buaze soy feṭu barli ania saddordi bandia tan ḳando tulia dila. Rute ou gaiṭ loia baṛit gelagi.
3.16: Gia harle tan hoṛie zikaila, “Kita go mai, ḳobor kita?” Teu Buaze zeta zeta ḳoisoin ota tan hoṛir gese kulia ḳoila,
3.17: loge eoḳan-o ḳoila, “Buaze ḳoisoin tumi hoṛir gese ḳali ate kila zaitae, ḳoia tain amare soy feṭu barli-o bandia disoin.”
3.18: Ita hunia hoṛie ḳoila, “Te hesh forzonto kita oy deḳo, i manshe aizkur maze-u er ek gala na lagaia dom loita nae.”

4.1: Biane uṭia Buaz gaur fainchaiti boiṭok kanat aia boiroila, mone mone, hou kuṭumor bar saira zar ḳota tain ḳoisla. Aḳta-u deḳla, hou manush fotedi aṭia zaira, dekia tain enre ḍaḳ dia ḳoila, “O bai sab, obae tuṛa huni zao.” Teu hein aila,
4.2: ar Buaze gaur buzdar moy-murobbi dosh zonre ania boaila.
4.3: Boia harle Buaze hoḳlor samne hou zonre ḳoila, “Noyomi beṭie Muab desh taki firia aia oḳon amrar kuṭum Ali Malikor zaga-zomin ota besilaita saira.
4.4: Ami hoḳolre eḳloge dola ḳorsi, te tumi oilae tan korib manush, erlagi ou murobbi oḳol ar gusṭir hoḳlor samne oḳnainta ḳalas ḳorar lagi tumi loilao. Ar tumi zudi na neo, te amare ḳo, ami nimu. I foribaror lagi tumi-u boṛo korib, erbade oilam ami.” Ikan hunia hein ḳoila, “Aichcha, ami loimune.”
4.5: Teu Buaze uṭia ḳoila, “Te tumi aro ekkan ḳam ḳorte oibo, tumi Noyomi beṭir zominor loge ḳori morar ḳandanḳan ḳaim raḳar lagi, tar ṛaṛi bou Muab deshor Rutre-o shadi kora lagbo.”
4.6: Teu hein zuaf dila, “Na, te ami fartam nae. Arnae amar nizorta loia-u bezal lagizibo. Ar ami zebla fariar na, te afne-u ita gosilaukka.”
4.7: -8 Oḳan ḳoia hari hi amolor shoriotor ain, ar Israil shomazor kuṭmor zaga-zomin ḳorid-bikir reoaz mafik hein tan faor zuta kulia Buazre dilaila, ar ḳoila, “Afne-u ita loilaukka.”
4.9: Teu Buaze ḳoila, “Te ami moy-murobbi ar baki hoḳolre shakki rakia ḳoiar, ami Noyomi beṭir ges tone Ali Malikor hokkolta ar tan dui fua Moholun ar Kilionor hokkolta-o loililam.
4.10: Ar mora manshor nam zinda raḳar lagi, tar don-samana ar zomi-mirash basanir lagi ami Moholunor ṛaṛi bou Muab deshor Rutre-o kobul ḳorillam, zate i gau ar gusṭir maze morar namḳan ḳaim roy. Aiz afnara ita hokkoltar shakki roila.”
4.11: Teu mozlisor hoḳole ḳoila, “Oy, amra itar shakki roilam.” Oḳan ḳoia-u tara dua ḳorla, “Ou ze ḳoinare afne kobul ḳorla, Mabude Iakub nobir dui bibi Rahela ar Lea, ze duizone asta Boni Israil zatire goṛia tulche, erar laḳan-u i koinare uzila ḳoroukka. Asta Betelham gaut afnar shunam baṛouk, Ifrata gusṭir maze Allae afnare doni-samani banauk.
4.12: Rutor feṭo taki Allae afnare zoto aolad diba, era zanu Tamar ar Ehudar fut Firuzor ḳandanor laḳan oin.”
4.13: Buaze Bibi Rutre shadi koria tan baṛit loia gela, tara duiozone gor-shongshar ḳorla, bade Mabudor rohomote tarar eḳ fua oilo.
4.14: Teu ari-forir beṭinte aia hurutta dekia Noyomire ḳoila, “Alhamdulilla, tumare go shuna, Allae aiz azad ḳorar lagi eḳ noya zamai disoin. Asta Israil desh zuṛi en shunam ouk.
4.15: Ein tumare buṛa ḳalo furfura ḳori tuloukka, buṛir kezmot ḳoroukka. Tumar futor ou bou to tumar lagi shat fua taki-o dami, tai tumare dile-zane maya ḳore, ou bour feṭ tone-u i aolador zonom oise.”
4.16: Teu Bibi Noyomie i natire uro loia tar zoy-zoton ḳorla.
4.17: Ar ari-forir beṭinte ḍong kori koitra, “Oḳon Noyomie eḳ noya hai faise.” Ḳoia tara i geda baichchar nam raḳla Ubayed. Ubayedor fuar nam Ias, ar Iasor fuar nam Hozrot Daud. Bibi Rutor fonti Hozrot Daud (a:)
4.18: Ou oilo Iakubor nati Firuzor ḳandan-nama. Firuzor fuar nam Hasir,
4.19: Hasiror fua Rayam, Rayamor fua Aminadab,
4.20: Aminadabor fua Nahish, Nahishor fua Selim,
4.21: Selimor fua Buaz, Buazor fua Ubayed,
4.22: Ubayedor fua Ias, Iasor fua Hozrot Daud.

1.1: Shuki hou zon, naformanor sallae ze sole na, fafir foto ze ubae na, moshkora ḳorrar aḍḍat boy na.
1.2: Oile Mabudor deoa hedayot-u tar kushi, i hedayotre dian ḳore he din-rait dori.
1.3: Tar zindegi to fanir futor daror gasor laḳan, ze gase shoṭik shomoye fol dore, ḳorar dino tar fata hukae na, he zetat-u at dey, otat-u laboban oy.
1.4: Oile ḳobis-bojjator sola to ola nae, itar zindegi danor susar laḳan batashe uṛe.
1.5: Hashoror din ubaito tarar ola shaosh nai, fak-forezgaror mozliso naformanor nai kunu ṭai.
1.6: Forezgar bondar sola-firar foto Mabude nozor raḳoin, oile ḳobis-bojjator foto ase shorbonash.

2.1: Hokkol zatie ḳene ostir oia sillaira, kior lagi manshe behuda fondi korer?
2.2: Zogotor bashsha oḳol bigṛi gelo, raza oḳol ekkano dola oilo, Mabudor birudde ar tan al-Mosir birudde.
2.3: Era dola oia ḳoilo, ao, siṛia falai tarar ḍanḍa-beṛi, tarar bandon kulia shadin boni.
2.4: Arshe-azimor kursit boia Mabude ashoin, tain itare loia moshkora ḳoroin.
2.5: Tan gorom deḳaia befana lagaiba, ar gusae aguin oia otare ḳoiba,
2.6: ami shoyong amar bashshare boail ḳorsi, amar fobitro Sion faṛor ufre.
2.7: Ar hou bashshae ḳoira, ami kali Mabudor ou hukum zanai, tain amare ḳoisoin, tumi to amar fut , aiz-u ami tumar bafor laḳan oilam.
2.8: Tumi amar gese sao, saile zogotor hokkol zati tumar-u oibo, duniar hesh matar doḳol-o faibae,
2.9: tumi luar laṭi dia itare bangibae, maṭir fatilor laḳan surmar ḳorbae.
2.10: O raza oḳol, shoṭik aḳol ḳaṭao, zogotor shashok oḳol, hushiar ro,
2.11: dilor ḍor-ḳofe Mabudor ebadot ḳoro, ḳafi ḳafi
2.12: tan kudroti ḳodomo suma deo, tain to sokur foloke gusae zolia uṭoin, gusae tan gozob nazil ḳorle, tumra maz-foto aḳta-u binash oibae. Tara-u to boṛo ḳofali, zera tan sayat asroy loin.

3.1: O Mabud, amar dushmonor foriman ḳoto baṛigese, deḳra ni, ḳoto manshe amar loge lager.
3.2: Amar befare ḳoto zone matira, ḳoira, Allar dorbaro tar zan basanir fot nai. (Sela)
3.3: Oile O Mabud, ḳoror dushmon taki tumi-u amar roikkaḳari, tumi-u amar shan-boṛai, bifodor maze amare shaosh dirae.
3.4: Ami zure zure Mabudre ḍaki, nizor fobitro faṛo taki amar arzi hunoin. (Sela)
3.5: Ami hutilam, hutia gumailam, bade hozag-o oilam, shoyong Mabude-u amare tan kulo ṭai dein.
3.6: Amar sairobae hazare hazar dushmone beria ubai roise, ubaile-o ami itare ḍorai na.
3.7: O Mabud, zoldi ḳoro! O amar Alla, amar zan basao! Tumi to amar hokkol dushmonor muko gushi marbae, bojjat oḳlor dat bangilibae.
3.8: Zan basani to Mabudor-u ḳam, afon prozar ufre tumar rohom-borkot zari rouk. (Sela)

4.1: O Alla, amar ḍaḳo ḳan dio, amare nirdush ḳoia tumi to zair ḳorso. Mosibotor ḳalo tumi amar zano aram diso, meherbani koria amar dua kobul ḳoro.
4.2: O manush oḳol, amar ijjotre tumra ar ḳotodin beijjot ḳortae, ḳotodin beḳama mator mayat roitae, misa mator ḳore ḳore gurtae? (Sela)
4.3: Mono rakio, Mabude tan ashik bondare nizor lagi alog korsoin, te ami ḍaḳle-u tain hunoin.
4.4: Tumrar rag-gusar shomoy kunu guna ḳorio na, bisnat hutia dil di sinta ḳoro, ar nirai taḳo. (Sela)
4.5: Fak-forezgarir kurbani adae ḳoro, Mabudor ufre shullo-ana borosha raḳo.
4.6: Bout zone ḳoy, “Amrare ḳegie balair fot deḳaibo?” O Mabud, tumar fobitro mukor nuror didar ḳan amrar nosib ouk.
4.7: Besh ḳori foy-foshol faia tarar zoto furti zugae, ita taki bout beshi furti to tumi amar dilo diso.
4.8: Ami to shae-shanti ar arame gumai, O Mabud, ḳali tumi-u amare boshot ḳorao sohi-salamote.

5.1: O Mabud, amar foriad ḳobul ḳoro, dilor ḳandon amar tumar ḳane huno.
5.2: O amar Alla, amar bashsha tumi, amar aoaz huno tumi doya ḳori, dua-minoti ḳori tumar gese-u ḳali.
5.3: Tumi forti din fozore amar buli to huno, dilor hokkolta hazai raki tumar didaro.
5.4: Tumi to ila Alla nae ḳarafi zar fosond, tumar meman oito nae kunu fafi zon.
5.5: Boṛai-beṭagiri deḳaorar ṭai nai tumar samne, hoḳol laḳan naformani tumi ginna ḳoro nize.
5.6: Misa ḳota matrare nichchoy binash ḳoro tumi, Mabude to ginnain beshi kun-ḳarafi sol-soturi.
5.7: Oile tumar doya-mayae tumar goro hamaimu ami, noto oia soizda ḳormu tumar fobitro gor muki.
5.8: O Mabud, amar sairobae to dushmone bora, tumar forezgarir fote more neo salaia, amar samne tumar fot ḳoro sohi-shuza.
5.9: Tarar mukor kunu ḳota-u ekinor zuka nae, tarar dil-mon bora ḳali binashor sintae, kula ḳoyboror fosa lashor laḳan tarar gola, fam-foṭṭi marar ustad to tarar zifra.
5.10: O Alla, tumi itare dushi shaibosto ḳoro, tarar shorbonash ouk tarar fatail fando, shima saṛa naformanir dae ḳedao otare, birudita ḳorra to otae tumi Allar loge.
5.11: Oile tumar sayat boshotḳari kushe-bashe rouk, hor-hamesha kushir gozol tara hoḳole gauk. tumi basao tarare tumar ashik zara, amud-furti ḳorouk shobe tumar name tara.
5.12: Tumi-u Mabude forezgarre deo rohom-borkot, rohomotor beṛadi tumi tarare raḳo nirafod.

6.1: Damki dio na go Mabud gusa ḳoria, shaza dio na more rag ḳoria.
6.2: Doya ḳoro amae Mabud hukai zaiar ami, bemar shifa ḳoro tumi ḳafer mor aḍḍi.
6.3: Ḍoror suṭe amar zan doṛfoṛ doṛfoṛ ḳore, ar ḳotodin solbo ila mor zibone?
6.4: Firia sao go Mabud basao amar zan, tumar doyar duai lage ḳoro mor asan.
6.5: Morar bade tumare to ḍaḳar nai ufae, fatalo hamanir bade tumar gunogan ḳe gae?
6.6: Ḳandi ḳandi amar bisna forti rait bizailai, amar souḳor fanie bisna-balish bizia zae,
6.7: dilor duke amar souk hukai zar, dushmonor ḍore souk amar ḳomzur boniar.
6.8: Amar ges taki bago hoḳol naforman, Mabude to hunchoin amar dilor ḳandon.
6.9: Furafur hunchoin tain amar minoti, ḳobul ḳorsoin tain amar arzi.
6.10: Amar hokkol dushmon ḍoror suṭe ḳafouk, shorom faia oḳon-u amar fis saṛouk.

7.1: Ogo amar Mabud Elahi tumar sayat asroy loisi, ḳore oia ḳedaira zara amare, tarar at taki basao more.
7.2: Naile shinghor laḳan ṭukra ṭukra ḳorbo more, faria-siria marbo to basanit ḳeu na aile.
7.3: Ogo amar Mabud Elahi, zudi ḳoria taki kunu ḳarafi, amar ato roy zudi kunu naformani,
7.4: mor birudi nae tebuo zudi ḳeti ḳoria taki, —borong bina ḳarone ze dushmon oise tar-o ufoḳar ḳorsi—
7.5: te dushmone amare dorilauk ḳedaia, maṭit falaia faodi faṛaia, dulat mishailauk amar ḳaya. (Sela)
7.6: Mabud go, tumar moha gusae amar fokke ubao, zara more ingshae ota dushmonor bifokke ḳaṛa o, O amar Alla, tumar hok bisar zari ḳorilao.
7.7: Tumar sairo galat zoma ouk duniar hoḳol zati, arsho boia deḳo tarar hoḳol ku-kirti.
7.8: Mabud ota hoḳol zatir bisarok to tumi, ray dio dekia mor forezgari ar hok-halali.
7.9: Naformanor zulum bond ḳorilaukka, forezgarre mozbut banao O hok Alla, dil-monor bitor tumi zasai ḳoro hoḳolta.
7.10: Alla pak mor rokkaḳari, zan basain amar, tain-u basaneala shorol monor bondar.
7.11: Alla pake ḳoroin hok bisar, naformanor ufre gusa ḳoroin borabor,
7.12: manshe touba na ḳorile tan toluar daraiba, tir-donuk loia tain donuko tir lagaiba.
7.13: Zane marar atiar tain zuit ḳorsoin, tan tir oḳolre tain aguindi hazaisoin.
7.14: Naformane bod ḳamre feṭor bitre raḳe, bod ḳame feṭ bori gele zonom dey misare.
7.15: Maṭi kuṛia kuf kude he goin ḳoria, tar banail ou kufo nize zae foṛia.
7.16: Tar naformani to tar matat firia ae, tar zulum aia nizor talut foṛi zae.
7.17: Mabudor hok bisaror lagi shukur-guzar ḳormu tan, Rabbul alaminor name ami ḳormu gunogan.

8.1: O Mabud amrar malik, tumar shan-shouḳote bora hara dunia! Tumar nuror tozolli ḳaim ḳorso asman geria!
8.2: Tumar birudi oḳlor bifokke, geda ar nabalik huruttar mukor zobandi tumi shoktir banḍar banaiso. Ola ḳoria dushmon ar zidkurre tumi leṭaililae.
8.3: Tumar ator banail asmanor baedi ami zebla sai, hono tumar boail ḳora sand-tera deḳtam fai,
8.4: dekia mone mone ḳoi, manush aroḳta kita zen, tumi tarare iad ḳoro? Adom zati oto kita zen, tumi tarar kial raḳo?
8.5: Manushre banaiso ḳali firista taki tuṛa ḳom guni, oile gourob-ijjotor mala to tarare findaiso tumi.
8.6: Tumar foyda hokkoltare shashonor ḳemota erar ato diso, hokkolta-u erar faor tolat, erar aotae raḳso—
8.7: goru-sagolor fal ar zogotor tamam zanuar,
8.8: asmano uṛra faki ar doriar hokkol mas, shagoror fanit solra hoḳol nomunar zandar.
8.9: O Mabud amrar malik, tumar shan-shouḳote bora hara dunia.

9.1: Ami furafur dile-zane Mabudor gunogan gaimu, tumar kudroti ḳam-ḳazor ḳota ami toblig ḳormu.
9.2: Ami tumare loia-u furti-amud ḳormu, O Rabbul alamin, tumar namor tarif git gaimu.
9.3: Dushmon oḳol zebla amar ḳor taki firia zae, zaoar ḳalo usṭa ḳaia foṛia tara morizae.
9.4: Nalish hunia tumi amar fokke ray diso, raz-godit boia tumi to hok bisar ḳorso.
9.5: Tumi bin zatire damki dia ou naforman binash ḳorso, tumi siroḳalor lagia itar nam miṭailiso.
9.6: Ita dushmon oḳol gese nifat oia, tarar baṛi-gor binash siroḳalor lagia, tarar ṭaun oḳol tumi falaiso tulia, kunu sin nam-nishana na rakia.
9.7: Oile Mabud to roin siroḳal, tain ḳorsoin bisaror godi boail,
9.8: hok-insafe zogotor bisar-foysala ḳorba, hok-halalie tamam zatir bisar ḳorba.
9.9: Zulumo foṛa zonor lagi Mabud-u tar asroy, mosibotor ḳalo tain nirafod ṭikana oy.
9.10: Tumare sine zara, tumar ufre borosha ḳore tara, Mabud go, tumar tallash ḳorra ashikor log tumi saṛso na.
9.11: Sion nogoro boshot ḳari Mabudor tarif-gozol gao, tan kudroti lila-ḳelar boyan hokkol zatire zanao.
9.12: Kun-ḳarafir bodla deorae mono raḳoin hoḳolta, duki-kangalor ḳandon tain kunudin fauroin na.
9.13: Dushmonor ato durdosha dekia rohom ḳoro Mabud go, moutor duar taki tumi amare tulia neo go,
9.14: zate tumar shukria-tarif ami gaitam fari, tumi amar zan basanie ami ḳormu kushi-bashi, Sion nogrir faṛae faṛae ḳormu nasa-nasi.
9.15: Nizor kuṛa gato foṛia bin zati buṛigese, tarar fatail lukail fando tarar-u fao hamaise.
9.16: Mabude nizore zair ḳoria hok bisar ḳorsoin, naforman dolor banail fando tara-u aṭkisoin. (Higgayon-Sela)
9.17: Naforman oḳol hamauk gia goin fatale, otar loge bin zati-o buli zain zetae Allare.
9.18: Nirasroyre fauroin na tain siroḳalor dae, duki-kangalor asha-o kunudin bifole zaito nae.
9.19: Zoldi ao go Mabud! manshe zanu na deḳae baṛti bahaduri, tumar samne bisar ouk hoḳol bin zati.
9.20: Ḍor-boy deḳao Mabud tumi tarare, tara ḳali maṭir manush zanouk bin zatie. (Sela).

10.1: Mabud go, tumi kene duroi roirae? Bifodor ḳalo kitallagi lukairae?
10.2: Zalimor bahadurie duki-ḳangal buge, heshe tarar soturir fando tara-u dora foṛe.
10.3: Mondo zone tar monor bojjatir bahaduri deḳae, lubi manshe Mabudre tuchcho mono ḳoria galiae.
10.4: Beṭagiri koria mondo luke sae na tan didar, Alla bolte ḳeu nai, ola ekin tarar.
10.5: Duniabi zindegi hamesha laboban tarar, tarar souke deḳe na to hok insaf tumar, “Ita bule bout ufre,” oḳan tara ḳoy, “Amar birudire fu dia uṛailimu nichchoy.”
10.6: Mone mone ḳoy tara, “Amar kunu foton nai, kunu zuge kunu din-u bifod-afod aito nae.”
10.7: Tar mato lannot ar danda, zur-zulume bora, zifra bora naformani bojjatir boshot ḳana.
10.8: -9 Nirai zonglar maze he ut fatia boy, nirjon zagat ni-oforadire kun ḳorat roy. Oshohae-obaga oḳol tarar duio souḳor nishana, shinghoe zela ḳaf doria zonglat boy lukaia, duki zonre dorar lagi tara-o ola boy, doria tare ṭania ani fando harai toy.
10.10: Fando harai norom ḳori fishia surmar ḳore, oshohae-obaga zon tarar nokur tabat foṛe.
10.11: Mone mone ḳoy tara, “Allae ita deḳoin na, tan muk to lukailisoin, itar baedi sain-o na.”
10.12: O Mabud zoldi ao, tumar atḳan baṛao, duki-ḳangalre na fauria zan ḳan basao.
10.13: Naformane ḳene ḳore Alla Pakre elami? Mone mone ḳene ḳoy, “Tain hishab loiba ni?”
10.14: Otoso tumi to duḳ-mosibot deḳrae, erar zimmadari tumar ator ḳobzae. Oshohae zone to tumar ato-u nizore shofe, tumar gese-u asroy fae etim-miskine.
10.15: Naforman bojjator bol oḳon bangilao, tarar hoḳol bod ḳamor hishab tumi loilao.
10.16: Sirodin siroḳal Mabud-u oila bashsha, tan zomin taki bidormi zati shorbonash oiba.
10.17: Mabud go, ḳangal-dukir asha tumi fura ḳoro, tarar mono shaosh zugai dilor foriad huno.
10.18: Etimor bae sao go Alla, bisar ḳoro shob zalimor, ḍor deḳani bond ḳorilao maṭir foyda manushor.
