11.1: Ami to Mabudor gese-u asroy loisi, te tumra ḳene amare ḳoirae, “O faki, tumar asroy faṛedi bagia zao.
11.2: Bojjator dole donukre furafur zuit ḳori dorse, shorol manshore andarit marto ḳori tir lagaise.
11.3: Bangia foṛi zae zudi shomazor mul filar, ila oile kita ḳorbo zara forezgar?”
11.4: Mabud to roin tan fobitro mukamo, tan arosh-kursi boail ase asmano, adom zatire raḳoin tan sokur nozoro.
11.5: Bala-bura hoḳolre zasai koroin Mabude, zalim oḳol tan dushmon, gin ḳoroin tarare.
11.6: Bojjator ufre ḍaliba tain zalail gondoḳ ar angra, gorom agunir gulla-u oibo tarar ḳani-fani hamesha.
11.7: Mabud nize forezgar, fosond ḳoroin forezgarre, hok-nikut bondae faiba tan mukor didarre.

12.1: O Mabud, zane basaukka, oḳon ar nai kunu ashik bonda, adom zatir maze hok kunu zon tukaia miler na.
12.2: Forteḳe-u eḳe-oinne misa mat mate, ḳali fam-foṭṭi mare ar munafiki kore.
12.3: O Mabud, fam-foṭṭi marra hokkol ṭuṭ ḳaṭia falao, boṛai-beṭagiri deḳaorar zifra tumi kaṭilao.
12.4: Tara ḳoy, “Zitimu nichchit amrar zifrar bole, ar ḳegu oibo saloḳdar nizor ṭuṭ taḳte?”
12.5: “Gorib-dukir zulum dekia ami Mabud ubaimu, nirufayor dilor ḳandon ami nichchit hunimu. Shay-shantie din ḳaṭaito zara dile-zane sae, tarar asha ḳormu furon ami Allae.”
12.6: Mabudor zobano to kunu ḳad nai, ḳosṭi-fattoro zela rufa oy zasai, shatbaror aguindi saf ḳora rufa, tan zoban ḳaṭi nikut-nikad ola.
12.7: O Mabud, tumi nichchoy amrar bae saibae, ola manshor at taki siroḳal basaibae.
12.8: Naforman-bojjate zebla sairobaedi gure, adom zatir maze obola ḳarafi ḳam baṛe.

13.1: O Mabud, ar ḳotodin? Tumi amare siroḳal-u fauria roitae ni? Tumar fobitro muk kan ar ḳotodin amar ges taki lukai raḳtae?
13.2: Ar ḳotodin ami monor sintar bar, dilor ḳoshṭor buza fortidin shoitam ni? Amar dushmon oḳol ḳotodin amar ufre nasito?
13.3: O Alla, amar baedi sao, Mabud go, amar minotir zuaf deo, amar souko bol-rushoni deo, arnae ami hoyto aḳeri gumo foṛizimu.
13.4: Bade dushmone ḳoiba, “Oḳon to amra ziti gesi,” ar ami oshohae-mazur bonigele amar birudi oḳole to furti-amud ḳorba.
13.5: Oile ami borosha ḳori tumar doyar ufre-u, tumi zan basaibae, otar lagi amar dil kushie borigese.
13.6: Ami Mabudor name gozol gaimu, amar balai to tain-u ḳorsoin.

14.1: Beaḳole mone mone ḳoy, “Alla bolte ḳeu nai.” Ashole tara bedin-beiman, ḳorer ḳali zogoinno ḳam, hok kam ḳore ila ḳeu nai.
14.2: Arshe-azim taki Alla Pake adom zatir bae sain, saia deḳoin, hasaror aḳoldar kunu manush ase ni, Allar ashik-deoana ḳeu ase ni.
14.3: Tain deḳla, hoḳol manush be-foti oigese, hokkol eḳloge naforman bonigese, hok kam ḳore ila ḳeu nai, eḳzon-o nai.
14.4: Ou bojjat oḳlor maze kunu aḳol nai ni? Manshe zela ḳana-ḳaiddo ḳain, tara ola amar bondare ḳailae, Alla Mabudor nam-o ae na tarar mukedi.
14.5: Tara ḍoror suṭe tor-toraia ḳafiba, Alla Pak to tan ashikor maze boshot ḳoroin.
14.6: Tumrar sinta oilo binash ḳora duki-kangalor asha-borosha, oile Mabud-u tarar asroy ṭikana.
14.7: Boni Israilor basar fot Sion faṛ taki lamia auk! Mabude zebla tan proza oḳlor halot bodlaiba, Iakubor ḳandane ou shomoy furti-amud ḳorba, Boni Israile kushir shukur-guzari gaiba.

15.1: O Mabud, tumar dorbaro meman oar ḳe zoiggo, kun manush tumar fobitro faṛo roar zoiggo?
15.2: Ze zone nikut zindegi kaṭae, nek amole din guzrae, zar dil taki hok mat bar oy.
15.3: Oinno manshor bodnam ze zone gae na, tar kunu dustor ḳeti he ḳore na, ari-forir durnam-o he roṭae na.
15.4: Ku-foti naforman taki horia roy ze, borong Allar fiara bondare ijjot ḳore he, ar nizor ḳeti mania-o oada furon ḳore.
15.5: Ṭeḳa-foysha ḳorzo dey shud na loia, ni-oforadir fokko loy gush na ḳaia. Ou laḳan amole sole zei zon, kunudin-u gabṛito nae hou sadu mon.

16.1: Tumi amare hefazote raḳo Alla go, ami to asroy loisi tumar-u dorbaro.
16.2: Mabudre ḳoisi ami, “Amar-u munib tumi, tumi saṛa nai to balai ami nichchit zani.”
16.3: Zominor forezgar bondain tumar sokut ijjoti, tarar loge-u amar dusti ar firiti.
16.4: Oile Alla saṛa oinno nam zeta zone loy, tarar boṛo duḳ-mosibot baṛibo nichchoy. Zetar name dey tara bolir lou bilaia, itar nam to loitam nae amar muke dia.
16.5: Mabud-u amar don, amar fiasor fani, amar ḳofal ase to tan ato-u zani.
16.6: Amar baṭo foṛse zeta doulotor shimana, mirashdari dekia souke dil deoana.
16.7: Mabudor shukria zanai! Buddi-foramish to dein tain-u amare, raitor bala hushiar raḳe amar bibeḳe.
16.8: Amar souk hamesha roy Mabudor bae ḳali, tain-u amar ḍain galat, alitam nae ami.
16.9: Te kushie bora amar dil, furti korer foran, amar ḳayae borosha faia ḳore shanti-aram.
16.10: Amare falaitae nae tumi goin fatalo, tumar ashik bondar koy nai to ḳoyboror gato.
16.11: Deḳairae zindegir fot amare tumi, tumar didaror maze ase furafur furti, tumar ḍain ḳandat ase siroḳalin shuk-shanti.

17.1: O Mabud, tumi hok foriad huno, amar minotir bae kial ḳoro, amar dua kobul ḳoro go tumi, amar muko nae kunu sol-soturi.
17.2: Amar hok insaf tumar arosh taki auk, tumar fobitro souke hok-halalir bae sauk.
17.3: Tumi amar dilor ḳobor loile, raitor bala-o zasai korle, hunaror laḳan tukaile-o ḳad faitae nae, niot ḳorsi mukdi to gunar ḳam ḳortam nae.
17.4: Manshe zela ḳore bod ḳam ami ila ḳori na, zalimor fot horaia toi tumar fak buli hunia.
17.5: Amar faore shokto ḳorsi tumar foto roito, loṛse na mor fao dukan eḳ sul foriman-o.
17.6: Alla tumi hunbae ḳori-u tumare ḍakiar, ḳan fatia huno bondu foriad amar.
17.7: Ḳoto asanoḳ deki ami tumar doya-maya, ou minoti koro kobul ogo doyal Alla, basar lagi tumar gese asroy loy zara, dushmon taki basao tare tumar ḍain at dia.
17.8: Sokur moni zela nirafod ola raḳo amare, amare lukao tumar ḍaḳnar tole.
17.9: Marar lagi zeguin aia berilisoin more, ola zalim-bojjat taki basao amare.
17.10: Tarar oshaṛ dilor duar tala mari raḳe, tarar zoban bora ḳali beṭagirir mate.
17.11: Ḳore ḳore aia tara berilise more, maṭit falai marto ḳori koṛa nozor raḳe.
17.12: Shikari shinghoe zela ḳaf doria roy bono, tara ola lukai boise amar zan nito.
17.13: Ao go Mabud, zalimre aṭḳaia maṭit hutailao, tumar kudroti toluar dia amare basao.
17.14: Tumar ate basao Mabud ota manush taki, duniakuror ḳobza taki zan basao tumi. Tarar monor asha ḳali ou zogotor ufore, tarar feṭ borao tumar lannoti gozobe. Ota ḳaia tarar aolade feṭ borilauk, otar huruttar lagi baki ongsho besh ḳori toia zauk.
17.15: Oile ami zanu ni-oforadi roi tumar dorbaro, hozag oia shad miṭaia roimu tumar didaro.

18.1: O Mabud, amar bol-shokti, ami tumar-u ashik.
18.2: Alla-u amar nirafod minar, amar zan basanir malik, amar Mabud, amar faṛ, tan sayat asroy loisi. Zuddor moydano tain-u amar ḍal, zan basanir bol-takkot, amar asroy mukam.
18.3: Gunogan faoar laḳ Mabudor nam loimu, teu dushmonor at taki ami zane basimu.
18.4: Moronor doṛie fesailisil amare, shorbonasha futor fanit ḍubailisil more,
18.5: Fatalor doṛi dia oisil more banda, amar lagi oisil ḳoyboror gat kuda.
18.6: Olaḳan bifodo foṛia Mabudre ḍakilam, zure zure tan shaijjo ami mangilam, tain nizor arosh taki hunla amar ḍaḳ, tan dorbaro azilo amar foriad.
18.7: Asta dunia ḳafia tor-torani dorlo, faṛ-ṭillar bit oḳol loṛa-soṛa ḳorlo, gusar aguine tan itae to ḳafilo.
18.8: Naḳedi bar oilo tan gusar gorom duma, muk taki ailo tan agunir lukka, aro to bar oia ailo zalail angra.
18.9: Asmanre lamaia tain tole lamia aila, tan ḳodomor tole asil gono ḳala megor saḳa.
18.10: Tain Karubir ufre soṛia uṛal dila, batashor ḍaḳnat bor dia uṛia aila.
18.11: Tain andairor bitre nizore aoṛ ḳorilla, gono megor saḳae tan fobitro tambu gurilla.
18.12: Nuror zilkie tan andair meg hori gelo, megor hil ar zalail angra zomino foṛlo.
18.13: Mabude asman taki gorzia uṭila, Allatalae tan golar aoaz hunaila.
18.14: Tan donukor tir maria dushmonre sitrailla, megor zilkanie tarare befana banaila.
18.15: Tumar domoḳe ar naḳor shashe, Mabud go, doriar muror fanir fut oḳol deḳa dilo, zogotor mul bit oḳol-o udla oigelo.
18.16: Ufre taki at baṛaia tain more dorla, goin fani tone amare ṭania tulla.
18.17: Basaila amare tain foyluan dushmon taki, basaila dushmon-rifu oḳlor ḳobza taki, zetar bol-takkot to amar taki-o bout beshi.
18.18: Amar mosibotor dino-o tara more marat aila, oile Mabud Alla to amar shohae oila.
18.19: Kula moydano tain amare bar ḳori anla, amar ufre kush oae amare basaila.
18.20: Mabude dila amar forezgarir bodla, amar ator nek kamor boḳshish tain dila.
18.21: Mabudor fote-u solchi ami, ḳorsi na naformani, ila ḳam ḳorsi na zetae horae Allar didar taki.
18.22: Tan tamam hok-foysala amar sokur ayna, ami to tan hukumor kunu ḳelaf ḳorsi na.
18.23: Tan nozoro ami nikut roisi hor-hamesha, guna-naformani taki nizore raḳsi horaia.
18.24: Erdae Mabude amar forezgarir disoin furushkar, amar nek kam dekia tain ḳorsoin ou bisar.
18.25: Doya-maya ḳorrare tumi-o doya-maya ḳoro, ḳaṭi bondar loge tumi-o ḳaṭi ro.
18.26: Nirbezalir bae tumi-o nirbezal, ar ḳominre deḳao tumar fesor fand.
18.27: Norom dilor manshore tumi-u basao, oile boṛai-gorima deḳaorare toledi lamao.
18.28: Ḳali tumi Allae for ḳoro amar mushalre, amar Mabude uzila ḳoroin amar andairre.
18.29: Tumare loge loia dushmonor sifai dolre araimu, amar Mabudor loge usa deoal-o faldi faroimu.
18.30: Tain-u Alla, tan fot to nikut, Mabudor zoban okkoy. Tan gese zoto zone asroy loin, tain-u tarar zan basanir atiar oin.
18.31: Ḳali Alla saṛa ar dusra kunu Mabud ase ni? Amrar Alla bade dusra kunu asroy faṛ mile ni?
18.32: Allae-u amar ḳomro bol-shokti bandia disoin, tain to amar solar fot nikut ḳorsoin.
18.33: Tain amar faore disoin orinor laḳan hekmot, tain amare ṭikai raḳoin faṛia ḳoṭin ṭillat.
18.34: Tain-u amar atre laṛai ḳorar ḳola-ḳoushol hikain, erlagi amar ate fitolor tir-donukre-o beḳa ḳorilae.
18.35: Tumi amare zan basanir atiar dan ḳorso, tumar ḍain atdi amare doria raḳso, tumar deoa norom mone ami oisi boṛo.
18.36: Tumi amar solar fotre ḳorso shuza, erlagi amar fao to fislise na.
18.37: Amar dushmon dolor ḳore douṛaia itare dorsi, otar shorbonash na ḳoria ami firot na aisi.
18.38: Surmar ḳorsi tarare, ubaito ar farto nae, fishisi tarare amar faor tolae.
18.39: Zuddor lagi tumi-u amar ḳomro bol-shokti bandia diso, amar birudi sifaire amar faot falaiso.
18.40: Tumi amar dushmon dolre bagaiso samon taki, amare zetae ingshain ami tarar binash ḳorsi.
18.41: Basar lagi tara sillaisil, basanit ḳeu aisil na, Mabudor gese shaijjo saisil, tain-o ita hunla na.
18.42: Ami itare maria duil-balur laḳan batasho uṛailam, fotor bada-sadar laḳan itare horaia falailam.
18.43: O Mabud, manshor gonḍogul taki tumi-u basaiso amare, amare saloḳdar banaiso hoḳol zatir ufre, oḳon amar kezmot ḳorer osina zatie.
18.44: Amar nam hunle-u tara aioin amar tole, bin-deshi oḳole amar gese minot-ḳajji kore.
18.45: Hou bin-deshi oḳol nirash oia zae, tara bankar taki bar oia ḳafi kafi ae.
18.46: Mabud to zinda! Amar asroy faṛor tarif ouk! Amare basaora Allar ijjot-tazim baṛouk!
18.47: Zati oḳolre zein amar odine anoin, tain-u Alla, amar fokko loia tarare bodla dein.
18.48: Dushmonor at taki zein amare basain, tumi-u Alla, bifokko oḳlor ufre tumi-u amare tulcho, ingsha-gonḍogul ḳorrar at taki tumi amare basaiso.
18.49: Erlagi O Mabud, hokkol zatir gese ami tumar tarif ḳormu, hamesha tumar fak namor gunogan gaimu.
18.50: Mabude tan bashshare bout bar moha joyi ḳorsoin, tan ḳelafoti faoa bashsha Daud ar tan ḳandanre hor-hamesha doya-mayat raḳsoin.

19.1: Asman oḳole boyan ḳore Alla Pakor mohima, san-shuruz groho-terae deḳae tan lila-ḳela.
19.2: Dine dine gae tan zalal ar shan, raite raite hikae tan aḳolor boyan.
19.3: Nai kunu mat-ḳota nai kunu buli, aoaz-shur zae na huna erar muko taki.
19.4: Ta-o tarar aoaz mile duniai zuṛi, fub fosim uttor dokkin hara zogot bori. Gaṛila Allae ono shuruzor boshot gor, tambur maze roia shuruz ḳore zogot for.
19.5: Bashor taki bar oin zela noya biati daman, douṛai douṛai furti koroin zoyi zonor laḳan.
19.6: Asmanor ek kinar taki zain arok kinaro, iṭar gorom taki shaiddo nai kunu kichchu lukaito.
19.7: Allar deoa hedayot furafur nikut, bondar zanre ḳore ikan tortaza mozbut. Allar forman hok ar shoṭik siroḳal boail, be-aḳol zonre banae furafur aḳoldar.
19.8: Allar deoa niom-niti shoṭik hamesha, monor maze zugae itae kushir fuara. Allar hukum-ahkam to kula-mela forishkar, uzila ḳore itae dilor souk amrar.
19.9: Allar ḍor-ḳof to nikut, hor-hamesha zari, furafur shoṭik ray dein hok-insafḳari,
19.10: shuna taki-o bout dami, mulloban ar ḳaṭi, mousaḳor fuṭa foṛa mou taki-o mishṭi.
19.11: Tumar i gulame ota hunia hushiar roy, amol ḳorle ita nichchoy bout fayda oy.
19.12: Bondae kunu nizor bul nize-u buze ni? Bekiale ḳora gunar lagi ami mafi mangi.
19.13: Monor gorimae ḳora guna taki basao amare, itae zanu ḳobza ḳorto na fare more. Teugi ami nekkar bonda bonitam farmu, boṛo boṛo guna taki mor zan basaimu.
19.14: Toraneala O Mabud, amar asroy ṭilla, dilor dian mukor zoban kobul ḳoro go Alla.

20.1: Mosibotor shomoy Mabude tumar foriad hunoukka, Iakubor Allar nam tumare sohi-salamote raḳoukka.
20.2: Tan fak mukam taki tumar lagi shaijjo faṭaukka, fobitro Sion taki tumare bol-takkot deukka.
20.3: Tain tumar hoḳol lilla-sodgare mono raḳoukka, kobul ḳoroukka tumar zalail kurbani. (Sela)
20.4: Tumar dilor arzire kobul ḳoroukka, monor asha oḳol furon ḳoroukka.
20.5: Tumi zoyi oile amra kushi-bashir gozol gaimu, amrar Allar name janḍa uṛaimu, Mabude tumar hoḳol minoti furon ḳoroukka.
20.6: Ami to oḳon zani-u, Mabude tan nizor ḳelafoti faoa zonre basaiba. Tan afon ḍain ator bol-takkote zuddot zitaiba, nizor fobitro arosh taki en minoti hunba.
20.7: Ḳeuror borosha oilo tar zuddor rot, ar ḳeuror borosha tar guṛaintor ufre, amrar borosha ḳali amrar Alla Mabudor ufre.
20.8: Tara to unda oia leṭizain, oile amra shida oia hamesha ḳaṛa roi.
20.9: O Mabud, bashshare zoyi koroukka, amrar ḍaḳ hunia zuaf deukka.

21.1: O Mabud, tumar bol-takkote bashshae kushi korra, tumi zuddot zitanie tain kub kushi-bashi korra.
21.2: Tan monor asha tumi furaiso, tan mukor abdarre tumi firai diso na. Sela
21.3: Bout rohom-borkot loia tumi tan gese aiso, ḳaṭi shunar mukuṭ-taz tan matat findaiso.
21.4: Bashshae tumar dorbaro saila zindegi, ar tanre dilae tumi siroḳalor hayati.
21.5: Tumar deoa zoye baṛaise tan ijjot, gourob-mohima diso tane tumar-u rohomot.
21.6: Tanre diso tumi siroḳalin borkot, tumar fak didaro diso tanre kushir niamot.
21.7: Bashshae to Mabudor ufre-u borosha ḳoroin, Allatalar doya-mayae tain mozbut roin.
21.8: O bashsha, tumar ate dushmon falre dorbo, ḍain ate tumar birudire tallash ḳori anbo.
21.9: Tumi aibar ḳalo itare agunir kunḍoli banaibae, aguine tarare a ḳori gilbo Mabudor gusae.
21.10: Dunia taki miṭailibae itar aolad oḳlor nam, Adom zat taki fusilibae tarar shob ḳandan.
21.11: Tumar bifokke ku-motlobe fand fatise tara, tarar ita hoḳolta-u oibo beḳama.
21.12: Tarar mukre nishan ḳoria tumar donuko marle ṭan, fiṭ guraia bagia tara basaito saibo zan.
21.13: Tumar bol-shokti zair ḳoro ogo amar Alla, gan-baznae gaimu amra tumar lila-ḳela.

22.1: O amar Alla, amar Moula, tumi kene amar log saṛi dilae? Amare na basaia amar ḳandon na hunia ḳene duroi horia roilae?
22.2: O amar Alla, ami dinor bala ḍakilam tumi kunu zuaf na dilae, raitor bala-o na ḍakia ami roi na nirai.
22.3: Oile tumi-u to fak-fobitro, Boni Israilor gaoa proshongsha-tarif-u tumar raz-godi.
22.4: Amrar moy-murobbie tumar ufre ekin raḳsoin, tara tumar ufre borosha ḳorae tumi-o tarare basaitae.
22.5: Tumar dorbaro foriad ḳoria zan-man basaita, tara borosha ḳoria to shorom faisoin na.
22.6: Oile ami to manush nae, ḳali elamir ek kiṛa-fuk, manshe amare loia ḳauri kae ṭaṭṭa ḳoria siṛae.
22.7: Zoto zone amare deḳe, hokkole ṭuṭ bekaia ṭiṭkari maria ḳoy,
22.8: “He zebla Mabudor ufre ḳore borosha, te oḳon deki tain tare basaukka, tain zebla tar ufre kushi ar razi, oḳon tare rokka ḳoroin ni deki.”
22.9: Maʼr feṭo taki tumi-u amare zogoto anlae, maʼr dud ḳaoar shomoy-o amare borosha dilae.
22.10: Zonom taki amare tumar ato shofi deoa oise, maʼr feṭo taki-u tumi amar Alla.
22.11: Oḳon amare falaia tumi horia roio na, samne bout boṛo bifod, amare basanir dusra ḳeu nai.
22.12: Zongli bisalor falor laḳan tara amare berilisoin, Bashon deshor foyluan bolod oḳole amare aṭḳaisoin.
22.13: Gorzon ḳorra fashan shinghor laḳan tara, a ḳoria amare gililita saira.
22.14: Borbad fanir laḳan amare ḍalia falai deoa oise, amar asta shorilor aḍḍi-guḍḍir zuṛa suṭi gese, amar ḳoilja-gurda momor laḳan golia, feṭor at-boṛo hamaise.
22.15: Amar bol-shokti hukaia maṭir saṛor laḳan oise, ar zifra hukaia talut lagigese, tumi amare dula-balur ḳoyboro harai toiso.
22.16: Ḳobis oḳole amare kuttar falor laḳan berilisoin, amar at-faore gatilisoin.
22.17: Ami to amar hokkol aḍḍi gonitam fari, otae amar bae souk melia sai roisoin.
22.18: Tara nizor maze amar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ baṭa-baṭi korse, amar kurtar lagi tara loṭari-o marse.
22.19: Oile O Mabud, tumi duroi horia roio na, O amar ḳanḍari, amare shaijjor lagi zoldi aguai ao.
22.20: Toluaror tol taki basao amar zan, ota kukror muk taki basao mor foran.
22.21: Shingho falor muk taki rokka ḳoro more, zongli bisalor darail hingre horao bout dure! Ou foriad hunia tumi amar zan basaiso,
22.22: te ami-o amar baiaintor gese tumar nam toblig kormu, shomazor maze tumar tarif-gozol gaimu.
22.23: Tumra zara Mabudor ḍor-ḳofe ro, tumra tan tarif-gozol gao. O Iakubor aolad oḳol huno, Mabud Elahire tazim ḳoro. Ebadot-bondegi koro tumra hoḳole, Boni Israilor hoḳol ḳandan ekḳano mile.
22.24: Duki zonor duk dekia tain horoin na, ḳangalre deḳle tain horia zain na, afon fak muk lukain na tarare deḳle, minot-ḳajji hunia tain shaijjo ḳorla tarare.
22.25: Tumar name moha mahfilo zoto tarif-gozol gai, tumare ḍoraora zonor samne mor mannot ḳormu adae.
22.26: Feṭ bora ḳani kaiba duki-ḳangal zone, Mabud Moular tarif gaiba tan ashik dole. Siroḳal zinda rouk ashikor ontor!
22.27: Zogotor hesh shimanar manshe-o touba ḳori firia aiba, zati oḳlor hokkol gusṭie Mabudor samne ḳorba soizda.
22.28: Raz-shinghashon nichchit Mabud Moular-u, tain-u hoḳol zatir ufre bashshai koroin.
22.29: Zogotor boloban oḳole ḳaoa-daoa ḳorba, tan samne aia ebadot ḳorba, ar zarar nizor zan basanir ufae nai, tara-o aia noto oia tanre soizda ḳorba.
22.30: Tan ebadot-bondegi korba samnor zugor ḳandane, Malik Moular ḳobor hunba hou zomanar hoḳole.
22.31: Bobishote zonom oibo duniait zarar, tarar gese zanail oibo ou kudroti karbar.

23.1: Amar Mabude amare faloin, amar to ar obab nai.
23.2: Ḳesma gasho tain amare hutain, aramor ḳalor faredi amare aṭain,
23.3: amar zanre tortaza ḳoroin, tan ijjotor lagi sohi fote amare salain.
23.4: Goin gono andarit aṭile-o ami ḍorai na, tumar atdi to amare doria raḳso, tumar muṭit to ase munib raḳalor laṭi-sulfi, ami ar ḍoraitam ḳene?
23.5: Dushmon dolor samne-u amare feṭ bori kaoaiso, amar matat kushboy tel maḳaiso, shorbotor fiala boria utlia foṛer.
23.6: O munib, tumar oshim maya-doya ar balai amar loge hara zibon roibo, ami siroḳal Mabudor goro boshot ḳormu.

24.1: I zogot ar zogotor hokkolta-u Mabudor, dunia ar duniar bashinda oḳol to tan.
24.2: Tain doriar fanir ufre duniar bit boail ḳorla, gang-kalor ufre ian kuṭi boaila.
24.3: Ḳe gia Mabudor faṛor ufre uṭito, tan fak-fobitro mukamo kun jon ḳaṛa roibo?
24.4: Hou zon-u to, zar at ni-oforadi, zar dil fak-saf; he zogotor maya zalo bondi nae, ar ṭogaṭogir niote ḳosom ḳae na.
24.5: He-u faibo Allar torof taki rohom-borkot, tar zan basaora malikor ges taki be-ḳosur ḳalas faibo.
24.6: Era-u oila tan ashik bondar dol, tumar didar faito sae, O Iakubor Alla. (Sela)
24.7: O geiṭ oḳol, mata usa ḳoro, usa oizao, O sirostayi duar oḳol, zalal-shanor bashshae toshrif anilaukka.
24.8: Ou zalal-shanor bashsha ḳe? Boloban ar foyluan Mabud, laṛai-zuddot foyluan Mabud.
24.9: O geiṭ oḳol, mata usa ḳoro, usa o, O sirostayi duar oḳol, zalal-shanor bashshae toshrif anilaukka.
24.10: Zalal-shanor ou bashsha ḳe? Sifai dol oḳlor kamanḍar Mabud, tain-u zalal-shanor bashsha. (Sela)

25.1: O Mabud, amar zanre tumar dorbaro dilaisi shofia,
25.2: ḳali tumar ufre-u borosha ḳori, ogo amar Alla. Shorminda ḳorio na more dushmonor samne, bahaduri na ḳorouk tara amar ufre.
25.3: Tumar ufre ḳore zara asha-borosha, tarar mazor kunu zon oito nae to shorminda, shorom faibo tara, ḳamoḳa beimani ḳore zara.
25.4: O Alla, tumar fot oḳol amare sinao, tumar shoṭik rasta amare deḳao.
25.5: Tumar hoke amare salao ar hikao, amar zan basanir malik to tumi-u, hor-hamesha tumar ufre asha raki.
25.6: Ogo Mabud, iad ḳoro tumar doya-maya, shuru taki to ebo ḳorat aso ota.
25.7: Amar zuan ḳalor guna-naformani na rakio mono, O go Mabud, tumar doya-mayae more iad ḳoro, tumar oṭol meherbanir ḳatire tumi ola ḳoro.
25.8: Mabud to doyalu, oti hok tain, erlagi gunagarre-o tan fot sinain.
25.9: Hok fote salain tain norom dilor manshore, tan fot deḳai dein tara hoḳolre.
25.10: Tan oada-chukti hukum-ahkam mania sole zara, tarar lagi tan fot oḳol hok ar doyae bora.
25.11: Bout bod ḳam naformani ḳorilisi ami, tumar namor duai go Mabud, dilao more mafi.
25.12: Mabudre hasau ḍoraia soler ola adom ḳe? Kun fot basia nito, Mabude-u deḳain tare.
25.13: Shuk-shanti arame ḳaṭain tarar zindegani, tarar aolade-o faiba deshor mirashdari.
25.14: Mabudor ḍor-ḳofe zara zindegi ḳaṭain, tarare-u tan dilor gufon ḳota zanain, tan oada-chuktir befar tarare hikain.
25.15: Amar souke hor-hamesha Mabudor bae sai roise, shikarir zal taki tain basain amar faore.
25.16: Rohom ḳoro tumi more, amar baedi saia, ami oilam duki-ḳangal, asi boṛo eḳla.
25.17: Amar dilor duḳ-zontrona dilao horaia, hokkol bala-mosibot taki raḳo basaia.
25.18: Deḳo mor duḳ-mosibot behalot dosha, maf ḳoria dilao mor zindegir guna.
25.19: Deḳrae ni ḳoto dushmon lagse amar ḳore, tara sorom ingsha-ginna ḳorer amare.
25.20: Fana deo amare, basao amar zan ḳan, asroy loisi tumar gese, raḳo amar man-shomman.
25.21: Hok-halali shorolota ḳorouk amare rokka, ami to tumar-u ufre ḳorsi borosha.
25.22: O go Alla, ḳalas ḳoro Boni Israilre, tarar hoḳol mosibot taki basao tarare.

26.1: Ami zen nirdushi Mabud, tumi ta ḳoro go zair, ami to hok fote-u soliar, Mabudor ufre-u borosha ḳoriar, bodlaitam nae niot amar.
26.2: Mabud go, amare azmaia deḳo, amar dil forikka ḳoria zasai ḳoro.
26.3: Tumar doya-maya to amar sokur samne, ami soli tumar deḳail hok fote.
26.4: Misa matrar aḍḍat ami boi na, beiman-munafikor daro ḳase zai na.
26.5: Ḳobis-naformanor shong taki horia roi, bojjat oḳlor aḍḍat ami na boi.
26.6: Ḳalasor ray faia go Mabud, at doisi ami, tumar gor toaf ḳoria adae ḳori kurbani.
26.7: Zure zure tumar shukria zanairam, tumar hokkol keramotir ḳota ḳoiram.
26.8: Mabud, tumar boshot gor ami balobashi, ze zagat tumar gourob-mohimar boshoti.
26.9: Gunagaror loge amar zan na nio, kuni oḳlor loge amar moron na dio.
26.10: Tarar ato ase ḳali naformani, ḍain at bora tarar gushor ṭeḳadi.
26.11: Ami to soli hok-halal fote, doya-maya ḳoria ḳalas ḳoro more.
26.12: Homan zagat mozbut ase amar duio fao, Mabudor tarif ḳormu ami moha mozliso.

27.1: Mabud-u amar rushni, amare basaneala, ami ḳare ḍoraitam? Mabud-u amar asroy ṭikana, ḳar ḍore ami ḳafitam?
27.2: Amare gilibar lagi naforman oḳol, aguia ae zebla ou dushmon dol, ou shomoy usṭa ḳaia tara foṛi zae, foṛi zaoae tara bifol bonizae.
27.3: Shena bahinie zudi berilae more, amar dile ḍoraito nae tarare. Amar birudde zudi zuddo lagae, ami to roimu tumar-u boroshae.
27.4: Mabudor gese amar ou minoti zanai, tan dorbaro ḳali otoḳan-u sai— roitam sai ami Mabudor goro, amar hara zindegi ḳaṭouk hono, tan shundor surot ḳan ami zanu deki, tan mukamo roia ami zikir ḳori.
27.5: Mosibotor dino tain-u to more lukaia raḳba tan asroy bankare, tulia raḳba more faṛor usa ṭillat, nirafode raḳba more tan boshot ḳanat.
27.6: Ou shomoy more beria raḳse zeta dushmone, amar ijjot baṛibo ota zonor ufre. Kushir suṭe zure zure gozol gaimu ami, tan goro dan ḳormu lilla-kurbani, baznar tale tale tan name gaimu ami, usa golae gaimu ami gozol-ḳaoali.
27.7: Amar aoaz huno Mabud, ḳori minoti, doya ḳoria amar ḍaḳor zuaf deo tumi.
27.8: Tuma taki ou kalam dilo aise mor, “Amar ashik bonia tumra tallash ḳoro mor didar.” Mabud go, erlagi-u tumare ḍakiar,
27.9: na lukaia deḳao go amare muk kan tumar. Gusa ḳoria ḳedai dio na tumar i gulamre, tumi-u amar borosha, horai dio na more, saṛia zaio na tumi amare falaia, Mabud go tumi-u ḳali amar basaneala.
27.10: Ma-bafe amare falai dile-o, Mabude to loisoin more tan-u kulo.
27.11: O Mabud, tumar afon fot sinao amare, shorol fote salao more, basao dushmon tone.
27.12: Dushmon dolor morzir ato dio na shofia, misa shakkir dol aia dome dome saṛer ingsha.
27.13: Amar mozbut ekin ase monor bitre, Mabudor asan deḳmu ami zinda halote.
27.14: Mozbut o Mabudor ashae, ore zan amar, dilor maze shaosh ano, ro ashae Mabudor.

28.1: O Mabud amar asroy faṛ, tumare ḍakiar, amar lagi bond ḳorio na duio ḳan tumar, nirai roile tumi amar lagia, roshatolo zaorar laḳan oibo mor dosha.
28.2: Ami zebla tumar gese zure zure ḳandi, tumar ḳas pak zagar bae duio at tuli, ou shomoy hunio go doyal amar minoti.
28.3: Naforman bodḳuror loge ḳori nio na more ṭania, tara muke muke deḳae bala dilo ḳarafi rakia.
28.4: Tarar ḳam mafik fol tarare deo, tarar ḳaraf ḳamor fol tarare deo, tarar ator bod ḳamor bodlai tarare deo, tarar faona shoṭik shaza tarare dilao.
28.5: Mabudor ḳam-ḳaz tarar dilo zaga na fae, tan ator ḳamor bae tarar kunu kial nae, erlagi Mabude itare ḳoriliba surmar, bade kunu din-u itare goṛita nae ar.
28.6: Hoḳol tarif-gunogan ḳali Mabudor, tain-u to hunchoin minoti mor!
28.7: Mabud amar bol-shokti, zan basanir atiar, tan ufre borosha ḳore dil-zan amar, tan shaijjo faia hari kushie borse mor dil, amar golae shukria zanai ḳori tan zikir.
28.8: Mabud-u to bol-shokti tan afon prozar, tan ḳelafoti faoa zonor zan basanir bankar.
28.9: Tumar afon prozare tumi basao go, tara tumar don-doulot, rohom-borkot deo, tumi to tarar raḳal, siroḳal boia neo.

29.1: O firista oḳol, zanao Mabudor gunogan, gourob ar bol-shoktir ḳota zanao tan,
29.2: Mabudor name tan faona gourob zanao, fobitrotar haze hazia soizdat foṛi zao.
29.3: Mabudor golar aoaz doriar ufre zari ase, boṛai-shanor Allar gorzon baz foṛar laḳan ḍaḳe. Allar hunkar zari ase goin doriar ufre.
29.4: Mabudor golar aoaz bout boloban, tan golar aoaz oti mohan.
29.5: Mabudor golar shure debdaru gas bangizae, Lebanonor debdaru gas-o bangia foṛizae.
29.6: Tan shure basuror laḳan nase Lebanon, zongli boyrar baichchar laḳan falae Sirion.
29.7: Tan golar aoaz hunia, asman uṭe zilḳaia.
29.8: Mabudor golar shure morubumi kafia uṭe, Kadesh deshor morubumi kafain Mabude.
29.9: Elon gas-o alizae Mabudor aoaz hunia, zonglar fata-sata foṛi zae siṛia, Kaba goror hoḳole ḳoy, Subohan Alla!
29.10: Moha boinnar fani asil Mabudor zimmae, siroḳalin bashsha tain, boisoin arosh ḳanae.
29.11: Bol-shokti dein Mabud tan afon prozare, shanti dia rohom ḳoroin tara hoḳolre.

30.1: Tumar tarif ḳormu Mabud tulia ancho more, dushmonre diso na shuzug furti korto mor ufre.
30.2: Ogo Mabud Alla zure zure fana saisi tumar dorbare, foriad hunia tumi-u bemar taki shifa ḳorso amare.
30.3: Fatal takia Mabud tulia ancho more, hamai geslam goin gato basaiso amare.
30.4: Mabudor ashik bondae gao tan gunogan, fak-fobitro zania tane shukur-guzar ḳoro tan.
30.5: Tan gusa roy na to beshi shomoy, hara zibon-u tan doya-rohom roy, raitor bala zae ḳali ḳanda-ḳaṭi kori, bian oite-u ae kushi ar furti.
30.6: Shudinor ḳalo ḳoislam to ami-u, amar binash oito nae kunu din-u.
30.7: Tumar rohomote Mabud faṛor laḳan mozbut ḳorse more, zebla tumar muk lukailae ḍor hamaise mor bitre.
30.8: Zure zure ḍaḳsi go Mabud ami tumare, doya mangisi ami amar Allar dorbare.
30.9: Ami zudi hamai zai goin roshatole, lab kita oibo tumar ami morigele? Murdar ḳayar duil-balue ḳorbo ni tumar gunogan, gaibo ni itae tumar hok-halalir boyan?
30.10: Hunia mor foriad Mabud rohom ḳoro more, shaijjo ḳoro ogo Mabud tumi amare.
30.11: Duk-koshṭor halot taki oḳon amare tulia ancho tumi-u more kushir mahfile, solar soṭor lebas mor tumi bodlaiso, kushi-bashir shundor lebas more findaiso.
30.12: Amar dile hor-hamesha gunogan gaibo tumar, shukria zanaimu siroḳal Alla Mabud amar.

31.1: Asroy loisi go Mabud tumar sayae, more zanu na fae kunudin shorom-lojjae, tumar hok bisare rehai deo amae.
31.2: Amar minoti hunia zoldi basao more, faṛor shuṛong oia tumi basao amar zanre, asroy bankar o go tumi nirafode raḳo more.
31.3: Tumi amar asroy-shuṛong, mozbut bankar, fot deḳaia salao more duai lage tumar.
31.4: Lukaia fatail fando taki more ḳoro uddar, tumi-u ḳali amar asroy, amar bankar.
31.5: Amar ruhu tumar ato shofia dilailam, O Mabud, hok Alla, basaiso to amar zan.
31.6: Oshaṛ murtir pujarire ginnai ami, Mabudor ufre-u ami borosha ḳori ḳali.
31.7: Amar zanor shob mosibot behal dosha deḳso tumi, tumar doya-maya faia kushi-furti ḳormu ami.
31.8: Dushmonor ato tumi diso na more tulia, kula-mela maṭo more raḳso uba ḳoraia.
31.9: Doya ḳoro ogo Mabud mosiboto asi, souk ar deho-ḳayae kunumonte zita roisi.
31.10: Zindegi mor koy oilo duk-ḳoshṭoe ḳandi kandi, gunar dae bol ḳomia hukai gese mor aḍḍi.
31.11: Dushmon oḳole more ginnae, amar ari-forie-o nindae, sina-zana zone deḳle ḍoraia hore, douṛaia bage manshe fote-gaṭe deḳle more.
31.12: Murda zonor laḳan to faurilise more, banga-nosṭo malor laḳan mono ḳore amare.
31.13: Boutor ḳana-ḳani ami huniar, ḍor-ḳofe bora sairobae amar, amar birudde tara hoḳol ekḳano oise, zan ḳaṛia nitogi ḳori fondi korise.
31.14: Ami to borosha ḳorsi Mabud tumar ufre, tumi-u amar Mabud Alla zanai hoḳolre.
31.15: Amar hayati to tumar-u ato, ḳedaora dushmon taki hefazot ḳoro.
31.16: Tumar nuror didar deḳao ami gulamre, tumar afon doya-mayae basao amare.
31.17: Shorom dio na more Mabud zanai minoti, naformane shorom faia roshatole zaukgi.
31.18: Duio ṭuṭ bond oizauk beimani ze mate, boṛai-gorima deḳae zara forezgaror loge.
31.19: Tumar ashik bondar lagi zoma ase ḳoto doya, asroy loise zara tumar sayat aia, hoḳlor samne tarare deḳaiso tumar oto maya.
31.20: Tarare lukaia raḳo tumar-u pak didaro, dushmonor zifrar dafoṭ taki raḳo tumar boshot goro.
31.21: Mabud-u mubarok, dushmonor gerao ḳora nogoro, asanoḳ doya-mayae raḳsoin more nirafodo.
31.22: Ḍoror suṭe ḳoislam to ami, “Hori gesi duroi tumar nozor taki,” ami zebla ḍakislam shaijjor lagi, ḍakor zuaf dilae tumi hunlae minoti.
31.23: Mabudor ashik bono ore forezgar hoḳol bonda, hok manshore basaia tain ohonkarire dein ḳoṭin shaza.
31.24: Bukut shaosh raḳo dilo zugao bol, aso zoto Mabudor ashik bonda oḳol.

32.1: Nek-kofali ḳoy tarare, maf ḳora oise zarar naformanire, Mabud moulae zerar gunare amol-namar hishabo dorta naere.
32.2: Hou zon-o nek-kofali, Allae zar gunare ḳaṭi disoin ḳata taki, zar maze nai kunu dukabazi.
32.3: Touba ḳorslam na zebla amar gunar lagi, hara din kukai kukai koy oisil mor aḍḍi-guḍḍi.
32.4: Tumar ate zatia dorsil din-rait amare, ḳomi gesil mor ḳayar shokti Soit-maia gorome. (Sela)
32.5: Ami zebla touba ḳorlam tumar dorbare, oforad shikar ḳorlam lukailam na kunutare, ḳoilam ami zebla shikar ḳormu oforadre, loge loge-u mafi dilae tumi amar shob shazare. (Sela)
32.6: Te mosibotor ḳalo forteḳ forezgare dua ḳorouk tumar-u dorbare, moha boinna oile-o faito nae to tarare.
32.7: Mor lukanir bankar tumi, basaiso more mosibot taki, ami uddar faoae beria raḳso tumi mor sairobae kushir ḳaoali. (Sela)
32.8: Ami Allae talim dimu, tumare solar fot deḳaimu, ami to soukdi nozor raḳmu, aḳol-buddi tumare dimu,
32.9: gada kiba guṛar laḳan obuz oio na, itare shamlaite oy doṛi-lagam dia, na dile manto nae ita tumar kunu ḳota.
32.10: Naformanor lagi bout zala-zontrona ase, Mabudor ufre borosha ḳorle doya-mayae beria raḳe.
32.11: Mabudor name anondo-ullash ḳoro shob forezgar, zur golae gao gozol-git nikut dil zar.

33.1: Mabudor name gozol gao ore dindar bonda, nikut muminor ḳam oilogi shukur-guzar ḳora.
33.2: Dutarar tale tale shukria zanao tan, dosh taror bina bazaia ḳoro tan gunogan.
33.3: Mabudor name noya noya git boṛo golae gao, nikut ate tan niote bazona bazao.
33.4: Mabudor kalam to hok siroḳal, tan hoḳol ḳam hamesha hok-halal.
33.5: Forezgari ar hok-insaf Mabude fain bala, asta zogot bora ase tan doya-maya.
33.6: Asman tiar oise Mabudor ou kalame, er mazor shobta-u oise tan mukor fue.
33.7: Doriar hoḳol fanire ḳoloshit raḳoin tain, fatalor fanire-o tain banḍaro zomain.
33.8: Asta duniae Mabudre ḍorauk, duniar bashinda oḳol tan ḍore ḳafouk,
33.9: tan ḳotae to hokkoltar oise foyda, tan hukumor loge loge boail oise hoḳolta.
33.10: Zati oḳlor forikolpona Mabude ḳoroin beḳama, binash ḳoroin tain tarar sinta-babna.
33.11: Mabudor-u forikolpona siroḳal ṭikia taḳe, tan monor sinta-babna zug zug dori boail taḳe.
33.12: Shuki hou zati, Alla zar afon Mabud, tain zare fosond ḳorsoin ḳoia afon doulot.
33.13: Asman taki Mabude saia deḳoin, hokkol adom shontanor ufre tain souk raḳoin.
33.14: I duniat zein-tain boshot ḳoroin, arosh taki tarar bae kial raḳoin,
33.15: forteḳ zonor dil to tain goṛisoin, zegie zeta ḳore ita buzita faroin.
33.16: Boṛo sifai dol taḳle-o razar rokka nai, mohashokti dia-o kunu bir zuddae fae na rehai,
33.17: joyor lagi guṛar ufre borosha ḳora beḳama, guṛar shokti zoto-u taḳouk basaito fare na.
33.18: Mabudre zara ḍorae, taḳe tan doya-mayar ashae, tain kial raḳoin tarar bae,
33.19: moron taki tarar zibon rokka ḳoroin tain, boṛo boṛo nidan ḳalo tarare basain.
33.20: Mabudor ofekkat asi to amra, tain-u zan basanir malik, amrar borosha.
33.21: Tanre loia-u amrar dilor furti, tan pak namor ufre borosha ḳori.
33.22: Ogo Mabud, tumar maya-doya rouk amrar ufre, amrar asha-borosha tumar-u ufre.

34.1: Hor-hamesha ami Mabudor tarif ḳormu, tan gunogan hamesha roibo mor muko. ב Bet
34.2: Amar zane boṛai ḳore Mabudre loia, duki zone ḳorouk furti ita hunia. ג Gimel
34.3: Amar loge Mabudor gunogan ḳoro, ao hokkole eḳloge tan name tarif ḳori. ד Dalet
34.4: Ami Mabudre ḍakisi, tain zuaf disoin, shob ḍor-ḳof taki tain amare rokka ḳorsoin. ה He
34.5: Tan bae sao, tumra nurani oizibae, tumrar muk shorom faito nae. ז Zayin
34.6: I kangalor ḍaḳ Mabude hunchoin, shob mosibot taki tain basaisoin. ח Chet
34.7: Mabudor ashikor sairobae hefazot ḳoroin tan firistae, dia erar zan basae. ט Tet
34.8: Zasai ḳoria deḳo Mabud ḳoto meherban, boṛo ḳofali hou zon ze asroy loy sayat tan. י Yod
34.9: O Mabudor pak bonda oḳol, tanre ḍorao, tarar kunutar obab nai zara ḍorae. כ Kaph
34.10: Bolala shinghor fal ḳanir obabe ufash, Mabudor ashik oḳlor balair kunu obab nai. ל Lamed
34.11: Ore fua-fuṛin ao, amar ḳota huno, tumrare Mabudor ḍor-ḳofor ḳota hikaimu. מ Mem, נ Nun, סSamekh
34.12: Zindegit shuk sae kun zone, shudin deḳar asha ḳore ḳe?
34.13: Te he bad ḳota taki zifrare shamlauk sol-soturi taki ṭuṭre,
34.14: bad ḳam taki firia bala ḳam ḳorouk, shantir ashik oia er ḳore ḳore rouk. ע Ain
34.15: Mabudor nozor to forezgaror ufre, tarar dua hunar lagi tan ḳan ḳaṛa taḳe. פ Pe
34.16: Bad ḳam ḳorrar ufor Mabudor bod nozor, dunia taki fusiliba nam-nishana tarar. צ Tsade
34.17: Dindare foriad ḳorle hunoin Mabude, bala-mosibot taki rokka ḳoroin tarare. ק Qoph
34.18: Mon zarar bangi gese Mabud roin tarar loge loge, dil zarar surmar oise Mabude-u basain tarare. ר Resh
34.19: Hok fote ze sole tar bout mosibot, ita taki Mabude-u tare ḳoroin hefazot. ש Shin
34.20: Nirafod raḳoin tain tar shob aḍḍire, banga oito nae to ita kunuṭare. ת Tav
34.21: Ḳaraf ḳamor dae oy naformanor moron dosha, forezgarre ingshae zara, shaza faibo tara.
34.22: Mabude uddar ḳoroin tan gulam oḳolre, tan asroy loy zara, shaza dein na ita ḳeurore.

35.1: Amar birudita ḳorer zara, tumi Mabude ḳoro tarar birudita, laṛai ḳorer zara amar loge, tumi-o laṛai ḳoro tarar loge.
35.2: Zan basanir atiar lo tumar ato, amar shaijjor lagi zoldi ao go.
35.3: Amare ḳedaorar lagi ato lo sulfi-kusa, amar zanre ḳo go, “Ami-u tumar basaneala.”
35.4: Amare kun ḳorto sae zara, beijjot-shorminda ouk tara, amar ḳeti ḳorto sae zara, bagia zauk tara mata nuaia.
35.5: Danor susare zela tufane ney uṛaia, Mabudor firistae ola tarare deukka ḳedaia.
35.6: Tarar fot ouk andair ar fisla, ḳedaia neukka tarare Mabudor firista.
35.7: More dorar lagi tara fatise zal lukaia, amar zan nibar lagi kudise gat ḳamoḳa.
35.8: Aḳta ḳori tarar ufre shorbonash lamouk, tarar fatail zalo tara-u hamauk.
35.9: Teugi amar dile gaibo Mabudor kushir gan, tain amar zan basanie gaimu tan shan.
35.10: Amar mone-tone ḳouk, “O Alla, tumar homan ar ḳe ase zogote? Bolobanor at taki uddar ḳoro nirasroyre, luṭḳarir ges taki tumi basairae duki-kangalre.”
35.11: Ingshakur misa shakkir dol lagsil amar birudde, ami zeta zani na ota bishoy more zikaise.
35.12: Ufoḳaror bodla tara ḳorse amar ḳeti, ḳoto ḳofal fuṛa ami, hay-hutash ḳori.
35.13: Bemar-azar oile tarar solar soṭ finditam, ḳoshṭo ḳori ruza rakia dile-zane dua ḳortam.
35.14: Bai-birador dust morle manshe ḳande zela, tarar lagi ami-o to ḳanditam ola, ma morle ḳandi ḳandi mata zela oizae nisa.
35.15: Ami kunu usṭa ḳaile kushir ṭelae tara zome, osina manshe mor bodnam gaite ar mair-doir ḳorte na tame.
35.16: Beimanor dole mili ashi-tamsha ḳorlo more, dat kiṛimiṛi ḳailo tara amar birudde.
35.17: Saia saia ḳotodin deḳtae Mabud tarar ingsha-ginna? Shinghor dato taki amar zanḳan tumi basao na.
35.18: Moha mozliso ami adae ḳormu shukria, tumar tarif gaimu ami bout manshor samne dia.
35.19: Misa matra dushmon fale na ḳorouk kushi-bashi more loia, ḳamoḳa ginnae more zara souk ṭifaṭifi koria,
35.20: tara to shantir mat mate na, deshor ni-oforadi manshor loge ḳore solona.
35.21: Muk bengaia amar bae tamsha ḳori koy tara, “Ḳoto moza, ḳoto moza, nizor souke deḳlam amra.”
35.22: Nirai roio na Mabud go deḳrae to hoḳolta, amare saṛia Mabud horia roio na.
35.23: Zoldi ḳori aguai ao ḳoro amar hok bisar, amar fokke ro go Alla tumi-u Mabud amar.
35.24: Amar bisar ḳoro Alla nizor pak forezgarie, ogo amar Alla Mabud, more loia tara zanu kushi-furti na ḳore.
35.25: Tarar dio na mone mone ḳoite, “Amra zeta saisi ota-u to oise.” Eoḳan ḳoite dio na tumi tarare, “Zinda gilia haraisi ogure feṭor bitre.”
35.26: Mosibot dekia amar ḳoroin zetae kushi-furti, shorminda bonia tara ouk nisa muki, amar ufre zetae ḳore boṛai-beṭagiri, shorom ar beijjotit ḍubouk ita hokkolṭi.
35.27: Fak-forezgari dekia mor oy zara kush-bash, kushir suṭe tara ḳorouk anondo-ullash. Hor-hamesha ḳouk tara Alhamdulilla, nizor bondar shanti dekia kushi oin to Alla.
35.28: Tumar hok bisaror gun gaimu amar zifradi, gunogan gaimu tumar din-rait bori.

36.1: Naformanor ḳarafir befare, Mabudor kalam faise amar dile, tarar sokut Allar ḍor-ḳof naire.
36.2: Tara nizor souke deḳe nizor bahaduri, nizore ginnae na oforad ḳam ḳori.
36.3: Sol-soturi karafie bora tarar mukor ḳota, aḳol ḳaṭai sola, nek kam taki roy horia.
36.4: Bisnat hutia tara ku-ḳamor danda ḳore, bod ḳam na saṛia mondo fote sole.
36.5: Ogo Mabud tumar doya-mayae asman soilaise, tumar hok-halali megor ḳalnit lagi gese.
36.6: Faṛ-forbotor laḳan usa forezgari tumar, goin doriar laḳan tumar hok bisar, Mabude-u basao to shob manush ar zanuar.
36.7: Ogo Alla tumar maya-momota moha mulloban, adom zatie asroy fae tumar ḍaḳnar sayat.
36.8: Tumar goror don-samanae tarar feṭ bori zae, tumar omrit fanie tarar tirash miṭae.
36.9: Tumar maze ase zindegi-fanir indara, tumar nure-u to deki nur amra.
36.10: Tumare zara sine tarare tumi bilai deo tumar doya-maya, shorol dilor manshe fae tumar maya-momota.
36.11: Ohonkari zone zanu fao na baṛae amar bae, naformanor ate zanu amare na ḳedae.
36.12: Deḳrae ni naformani zetae ḳorse ita to leṭi gese, uṭito farer na tara, falai disoin itare.

37.1: Naformanor unnoti dekia mon ḳaraf ḳorio na, tarar balai dekia hari ḳorio na ingsha.
37.2: Tara to gashor laḳan zoldi hukai zibo, bondor fata-satar laḳan itar behalot oibo. ב Bet
37.3: Mabudor ufre borosha ḳori nek kam ḳoro, hok-halal roia hari boshot ḳoro desho.
37.4: Kushi-bashi ḳoro tumi Mabudre loia, tain-u tumar monor asha furon ḳoriba. ג Gimel
37.5: Tumar zindegir hoḳol bar Mabudor ato saṛo, tain-u salaiba hoḳolta, nichchit borosha raḳo.
37.6: Tain tumar forezgarire ḳorba uzila, tumar nirdushita zair ḳorba duiforor laḳan soḳsoḳa. ד Dalet
37.7: Mabudor samne nirai roia tan lagi bar saio, fondibazor unnoti dekia bezar na oio. ה He
37.8: Gusare domon ḳoria tamao mizaz deḳani, bezar oio na tumi, ḳarafi-u itar fol ḳali.
37.9: Mabudor borosha ḳorrae deshor mouroshi-malik bonibo, naforman oḳlor to nichchit shorbonash oibo. ו Bau
37.10: Tuṛa din bade-u naforman oibo nifat, tukaile-o milto nae ar tarar zagat.
37.11: Norom dilor manshe faiba deshor malikana, shay-shantie roia tara zindegi ḳaṭaiba. ז Zayin
37.12: Naformane sol-soturi ḳore forezgaror bifokke, dushmoni ḳoria tara dat kiṛimiṛi ḳore.
37.13: Tarar halot dekia hari Mabude to ashoin, naformanor din shesh ita tain deḳoin. ח Chet
37.14: Duki-kangalre faodi uṛia kunor kiale, naformane toluar kulia tir-donuk hazai raḳe.
37.15: Ou toluar tarar nizor ḳolijat-u hamaibo, tarar tir-donuk-o bangia hari beḳama oibo. ט Tet
37.16: Naformanor beshi don-doulot takia, forezgaror tuṛa don-u bout bala.
37.17: Naformanor at to zaibogi bangia, forezgarre basain nichchoy Mabude doria. י Yod
37.18: Mabude deḳoin dindaror zindegir halot, siroḳal zari roibo tarar mouroshi doulot.
37.19: Mosibotor dino tara oito nae shorminda, aḳal-nidanor ḳalo tara feṭ bora ḳani faiba. כ Kaph
37.20: Nam-nishana miṭizibo zara naforman, Mabudor dushmon hukai zibo aori fulor laḳan, deḳbae tarar hokkolta fuṛai zibo, dumar laḳan ita batasho mishibo. ל Lamed
37.21: Naformane ḳorzo nia firot na dilae, forezgare dan bilae maya-momotae.
37.22: Mabudor rohomoti zon zara deshor malik oibo tara, tan lannoti zonor to miṭizibo nam-nishana. מ Mem
37.23: Zarar sal-cholon dekia Mabud oin kushi, tain-u mozbut ḳoroin tarar solar goti.
37.24: Shoyong Mabude tarar ato doria raḳae, usṭa ḳaile-o tara foṛia roito nae. נ Nun
37.25: Ami age zuan aslam oḳon buṛa oisi, forezgarre saṛia zaite ami na deḳsi, tarar aoladre-o kunudin bik korat na faisi.
37.26: Doya-maya ḳore manshore rin dey hamesha, tarar aolade-o to rohom-borkot faiba. ס Samekh
37.27: Bod ḳam saṛo nek kam ḳoro, teu tumi siroḳal boshot ḳorbae ono.
37.28: Mabude to bala fain hok insaf, tain nizor ashikanre ḳoroin na to tiag. ע Ain Naformanor binash oibo siroḳalor lagi, tarar bongsho-buniad miṭizibo dunia taki.
37.29: Deshor malikana faiba forezgare, siroḳal roiba tara ou zagar maze. פ Pe
37.30: Forezgaror mukdi bar oy gianor buli, hok bisaror mat bar oy tarar zifradi.
37.31: Allar hukum gata ase tarar dilo, fislito nae tarar fao mozbut roibo. צ Tsade
37.32: Naformane ut fatia roy forezgaror bae, enre kunor ashae he shuzug tukae.
37.33: Mabude tanre saṛta nae naformanor ato, tan shaza oite dita nae adalotor bisaro. ק Qoph
37.34: Mabudor lagi bar sao, tan deḳail fote solo, tain tumrare ḳorba boṛo, deshor doḳol faibae, naforman dolor binash nizor souke deḳbae. ר Resh
37.35: Fashan naformanre deḳlam bout boṛo ijjoti, tortaza gasor laḳan ḍal-fala tar sairobaedi.
37.36: Hirbar gelam ami tare ar failam na, tukailam bout ami kuz-ḳobor millo na. ש Shin
37.37: Ni-oforadir bae sao deḳo hok manshor bae, ṭikia roy tar aolad shae-shanti ze bala fae.
37.38: Hokkol ḳaraf manshor oibo shorbonash naformanor bongsho-buniad oibo binash. ת Tav
37.39: Forezgaror nazat ae Mabudor ges taki, tarar mosibotor ḳalo tain roin bankar boni.
37.40: Mabude shaijjo ḳoria nistar dein tarare, tan asroy loae naformanor ḳobza taki zane basain erare.

38.1: Damki dio na go Mabud gusa ḳoria, shaza dio na more rag koria.
38.2: Tumar tiror folae to gatilise more, tumar ate go Mabud zatia dorse amare.
38.3: Tumar gusar suṭe amar ḳayar hoḳol ongo bemar, egu aḍḍi-o bala nae to gunar dae amar.
38.4: Amar nizor bod ḳamo ami habuḍubu ḳaiar, ita boṛo ḳoṭin buza-bar lager amar.
38.5: Amar beaḳolir lagia zoḳom oḳol takia, fosa durgondo bar or fosa ga oia.
38.6: Ami unda oia guza bonigesi, monor duke haradin ḳori guraguri.
38.7: Amar ḳomoror maze ḳoto zala-zontrona, amar ḳayar kunu ongo-u nae to bala.
38.8: Sinta ḳorte ḳorte ami bangia surmar, dilor zalae ami hamesha ḳatraiar.
38.9: Mabud go tumar dorbaro-u amar dilor saoa-faoa, amar bitoror ahazari to tumar gese lukail na.
38.10: Amar dile ḍoraia ḳafer, shorilor bol gesegi saṛia, souke deḳar ḳemota mor muṭe-u nae bala.
38.11: Afon zon ar dust oḳole mor ḳoshṭo dekia horia taḳe, amar ari-fori forisito zone-o duroi ubai tamsha deḳe.
38.12: Amare kun ḳorar motlob zarar tara fand fate, shorbonash sae zara mor tara amar birudde mate. Sol-soturir dandae tara haradin taḳe.
38.13: Ḳaluar laḳan to ami kane kunta huni na, bubar laḳan dosha amar muk kuli na.
38.14: Olan manush oisi ami zegue kunta hune na, mukedi zar kunu soalor zuaf bar oy na.
38.15: Mabud go bar saoat asi ami tumar-u ashae, ogo Mabud Elahi mor minotir zuaf tumi to dibae.
38.16: Ami to ḳoisi, “Amar fao fisli gele, amare loia tara zanu boṛai korto na fare.”
38.17: Foṛi zaiar foṛi zaiar amar halot ola, amar sokur samne gurer ḳali dilor zala-zontrona.
38.18: Amar hoḳol oforad ami korsi shikar, amar gunar buza loia oshanti koriar.
38.19: Amar dushmon oḳol bout tortaza boloban, tara bout bina ḳarone more zara ginnain.
38.20: Ami tarar balai korle tara ḳore ḳeti, tara more dushi koy balair fote soli kori.
38.21: O amar Mabud amare saṛia zaio na, horia zaio na ama taki ogo amar Alla.
38.22: Amare shaijjo ḳorat zoldi ao tumi, O amar Mabud amar zan basanir ḳanḍari.

39.1: Ami ḳoisi, “Hushiar roimu ami solar fotor befare, guna taki hefazot ḳormu amar zifrare, naforman zoto shomoy roibo amar samne, lagam lagai raḳmu to amar mukor maze.”
39.2: Zoban bond ḳoria ami nirai roilam, bala-bura kunuta-u na matilam, erlagi mor monor duk roilo aro baṛat.
39.3: Dilor ḳoshṭoe sinta ḳorae aguin laglo buko, teu zifradi ḳoilam, “Ami kita ḳortam go,
39.4: amare zanao go Mabud amar dosha oibo kita? Ḳotodin basimu ami shango oibo ayu kila?”
39.5: Eḳ muiṭ ḳorso tumi mor hayati, tumar samne shuinno zanu mor zindegi, duniar forteḳ manush oilo eḳṭa nishash ḳali. (Sela)
39.6: Sayar moto ḳori manush ḳore aoa-zaoa, beḳama fereshani kore don-doulotor lagia, oile ita ḳe ḳaibo ikan zane na.
39.7: Mabud go, kitar ashae roitam ami ofekkat? Amar hoḳol asha to tumare faoat.
39.8: Ḳoro go uddar more hoḳol onnae taki, beaḳolor ato ḳorio na more beijjoti.
39.9: Muk kulchi na ami roisi nirai, ita ḳoshṭo to oise mor tumar isharae.
39.10: Tumar shasti horailao amar ufor taki, tumar ator agat ḳaia mui shesh oigesi.
39.11: Gunar daye damki dia zebla manshore shongshudon ḳoro tumi, tarar mayar don fukor laḳan deo nosṭo ḳori, manush to oilo eḳṭa nishash ḳali. (Sela)
39.12: Amar foriad Mabud tumi huno, ḳan deo tumi mor ḳandono, dekia mor ḳandon nirai roio na tumi, tumar goro to ami bideshi, amar baf-dadar laḳan ami-o probashi.
39.13: Ḳoṛa nozor horailao tumar amar ufor taki, zaibar age, shesh oibar age ami, hirbar zanu mui kushi oitam fari.

40.1: Sobor ḳoria sai roislam amar Allar lagi, kial ḳori tain zuaf dila amar foriad huni.
40.2: Golaima gaṛa taki tulia anla more, feḳor gator moron doshat basaila amare. Amar faore bor deoaila fattoror ufor, shokto maṭit ṭai zugaila amar dui faor.
40.3: Zugai dila amar muko noya gozol tan, oḳon ami gai amar Allar gunogan. Deḳbo ita bout zone, dekia ḍoraibo, teu tara Allar ufre iman anibo.
40.4: Doinno ḳali hou bonda, Mabud-u zar ṭikana, bul fote gia zetae ḳore boṛai-gorima, itar baedi he to firia-o sae na.
40.5: Ogo amar Mabud Alla gonia fuṛail zaito nae, tumar kudroti kamor hishab aro nanan sinta-ufae, zanaia ba ḳoia ami fuṛanir shaiddo nai, tumar tulyo ḳe ase, ḳeu nai ḳeu nai.
40.6: Kurbani ar lilla-sodgae kushi o na tumi, kushi o na tumi go, kushi o na tumi, sao na tumi zalail kiba koforar foshu kurbani, hunar laḳ dui kan diso more hunia zanu mani.
40.7: Teu ami ḳoilam Alla, aisi ami ono, leḳa ase amar befar zela kitabo,
40.8: ogo amar Alla, ami kushi tumar morzi furone, hokkol hukum gata amar dilor bitre.
40.9: Moha zon-shomabesho ami zanaisi, tumar hoḳol hokkani kamor kush-ḳobri, amar aoaz bond ḳori na ita to zano, tumi shoyong shakki amar, O Mabud go.
40.10: Lukaia raḳsi na mor dilor bitor, tumi ze shoṭik hokkani zanaisi kobor, tumar deoa nazat ar hok-halali koisi hoḳolre, doya-maya ar hok tumi zanaisi moha shomabeshe.
40.11: O Mabud! Bond ḳorio na mor lagi tumar rohomotor duar, tumar doya ar hok ouk mor siroḳalor ḳanḍar.
40.12: Deḳrae ni! Hishab saṛa mosibote berilise more, fesailise aia amar hoḳol oforade, dekiar na kunta ami amar soukedi, amar matar sul taki-o ita to beshi, mor finjirar mon moyna-o saṛia gesoingi.
40.13: O Alla, tumar duai diar amar zan basao, Mabud go, amare shaijjo ḳorat zoldi ao.
40.14: Amar zanre zetae nita saira ḳaṛia, nisa ouk tarar mata shorminda bonia, amar ḳeti oile zetae ḳorba kushi, beijjot bonia tara bagi zauk koredi.
40.15: Amar ḳetie zetae ḳoin, oisere oise, muk lukaia horouk ota nizor laj-shorome.
40.16: Oile kushi-bashi korouk tumar ashik bondar dole, tumar deḳail basar fot bala fain zeta zone, hor-hamesha zofi zofi furti korouk tara, tumi-u mohan Moula, tumi-u mohan Alla!
40.17: Duki kangal zon to ami boṛoi obabi, amar lagi to sinta ḳoroin Mabud Elahi. Tumi-u mor shaijjoḳari zan basanir ṭikana, amare basao go Malik deri korio na.

41.1: Hou manush doinno, duki-kangalor ḳota sinta ḳore ze, mosibotor dino Mabude nichchit uddar ḳorba tare.
41.2: Mabude tare rokka ḳoria raḳba basaia, deshor manshe tare shukila manush ḳoiba, dushmonor ato Mabude tare shofia na diba.
41.3: Bemare bisnat foṛi gele Mabude tar asan ḳoroin, shifa ḳoria bisna taki tare tulia anoin.
41.4: Ami ḳoisi, “Ami to ḳorsi tumar birudde guna, ogo Mabud, doya ḳoria ḳoro more shifa.”
41.5: Amar ḳeti saia dushmone ḳoy, “Ogu kun shomoy morbo? Kun shomoy tar nam-nishana zomin taki musi zibo?”
41.6: Tara more deḳat aile baotabazi mate, tarar mono zomail bodnam roṭae gia bare.
41.7: Amar birudi oḳol milia ḳana-ḳani kore, amar ḳeti korto kila ou dandae taḳe.
41.8: Ḳoy tara, “Bout boṛo ḳarafie tare zatia dorse, uṭito farto nae ar zeḳano he hutail ase.”
41.9: Eḳ talo boia zegie ḳaito, borosha ḳortam zar ufre, oḳon ou mayar duste-o amar birudde lagigese
41.10: Ogo Mabud rohom ḳoro tumi nize more, tarar bodla nibar lagi tulilao amare.
41.11: Amar ufre kushi tumi ikan ami zani, dushmone to mor birudde sillae na ar joyor sillani.
41.12: Tumi doria raḳso more hok-halal dekia, tumar didaro zaga diso siroḳalor lagia.
41.13: Hokkol proshongsha Boni Israilor Mabud Allar ouk, shuru taki aḳer forzonto siroḳal zari rouk. Amin Summa-Amin. Zobur Shorifor dusra sifara (Zobur 42-72)

70.1: O Alla, tumar duai diar amar zan basao, Mabud go, amare shaijjo ḳorat zoldi ao.
70.2: Amar zanre zetae nita saira, nisa ouk tarar mata shorminda bonia, amar ḳeti oile zetae ḳorba kushi, beijjot bonia tara bagi zauk koredi
70.3: Amar ḳetie zetae ḳoin, oisere oise, muk lukaia horouk ota nizor laz-shorome.
70.4: Oile kushi-bashi korouk tumar ashik bondar dole, tumar deḳail basar fot bala fain zeta zone, hor-hamesha zofi zofi furti korouk tara, tumi-u mohan Moula, tumi-u mohan Alla!
70.5: Duki kangal zon to ami boṛoi obabi, amar ḳasat zoldi ao Mabud Elahi. Tumi-u mor shahaijjoḳari, zan basanir ṭikana, amare basao go Malik deri korio na.

95.1: Ao amra kushir gozol gai Mabudor name, rokkaḳari ṭilla tain, furti kori zure zure.
95.2: Solo amra shukur-guzar ḳori kori tan samne zai, baznar tale tale tan name zure-shure gai.
95.3: Mabud-u to uforala, shorbo mohan Allatala, dui jahanor bol-shoktir tain-u boṛo bashsha.
95.4: Zomin ar fatal shob-u tan ato, faṛ-forbotor usa ṭilla-o tan-u to.
95.5: Tain-u doriar malik banaisoin ita, hukna zomin-o tan duio ate goṛa.
95.6: Ao amra soizda dia tan ebadot ḳori, amrare foydaḳari Mabudor samne notozanu boni.
95.7: Tain-u to amrar Allatala, amra tan meṛar fal, tan zominor bonda. Ah! Tan golar aoaz zudi huntae tumra!
95.8: Dilre fashan ḳorio na tumra zela ḳorslae Meribat, hou din ḳorslae zeta morubumir Masa namor zagat.
95.9: Tumrar baf-dadainte hono to deḳsil more azmaia, amar kudroti lila-ḳela dekia-o tara ḳorla more forikka.
95.10: Hou zomanar manshor zala shoilam ami sallish bosor doria, heshe ḳoilam, itar dil to be-foti amar fotre sinlo na,
95.11: teugi amar gusar suṭe ḳoilam ḳosom ḳoria, mor deoa aramor desho hamanir shuzug faito nae tara.

96.1: Mabudor name noya git gao, O hara dunia, Mabudor git gao,
96.2: Mabudor name git gao, tan tarif ḳoro, dine dine tan deoa nazator toblig ḳoro.
96.3: Hoḳol zatire zanao tan gourobor ḳota, hoḳol manshore ḳo tan kudroti kamor mohima.
96.4: Mabud-u mohan, moha tarif tan, hoḳol deb-debi taki boṛo boyonkor tain,
96.5: zati oḳlor deb-debi to beḳama futul ḳali, Mabude-u banaisoin hoḳol asman monḍoli.
96.6: Shan-shouḳot ar mohima tan samne roise, bol-shokti ar zak-zomoḳe tan gor hazaise.
96.7: O zogotor ḳandan oḳol, zanao Mabudor gunogan, gourob ar bol-shoktir ḳota zanao tan,
96.8: Mabudor name tan faona gourob zanao, lilla-sodga ato loia tan dorbaro hamao.
96.9: Fak-saf dile Mabudor samne soizdat foṛo, hara dunia tan samne tor-toraia ḳafia uṭo.
96.10: Zati oḳlor maze elan ḳoro, Mabud-u bashsha. Zogotre banaisoin mozbut, ḳorto nae kunu loṛa-soṛa, tain nichchit hoḳol zatir hok bisar ḳorba.
96.11: Asman oḳol furti korouk, dunia kushi-o ouk, doria ar tar mazor shob zandar gorzia uṭouk,
96.12: zomin ar er hokkolta kushi-bashi ḳorouk, bon-baganor shob gas-fala-o anondo-ullash ḳorouk.
96.13: Mabudor samne ola-u ḳorouk ita hoḳolta, tain to aira duniar bisar ḳorta. Zogotor bisar-foysala ḳorba hok-insafe, tamam zatir bisar-foysala ḳorba hok-halalie.

97.1: Mabude bashshai ḳoroin, duniae ḳorouk furti, dur-durantor dif oḳol ouk moha kushi.
97.2: Tan sairobae ase to goin andair ar ḳalni, tan godir bit oilo hok bisar ar forezgari.
97.3: Aguin zae tan age age, zalaia mare tan sairo galar dushmonre.
97.4: Tan zilkie for oizae hara dunia, ita dekia asta zogot uṭe ḳafia.
97.5: Din-duniar malik Allar samne, faṛ-forbot oḳol momor laḳan gole.
97.6: Asman oḳole elan ḳore tan forezgari, hoḳol zatie deḳe tan mohimar bahaduri.
97.7: Oshaṛ deb-debir boṛai ḳore zara, shorom-loijja fauk ota murti pujarira, Allar samne soizda ḳorouk ou deb-debira.
97.8: Tumar hok bisaror ḳota hunia Sion oilo kushi, Ehuda deshor gau-gerame ḳorer to furti.
97.9: Tumi Mabud to hara zogotor uforala, hoḳol deb-debir bout ufre tumar ṭikana.
97.10: Naformanire ginnao tumra Mabudor ashik zara, allaoalar zan basain naformanor at takia.
97.11: Forezgaror lagi baṛe nuror kuṛi-fata, ḳaṭi dilor bitre to oy kushi-furti deoa.
97.12: Forezgar zon furti koro Mabudor name, tan fak-fobitrotar gunogan gao hoḳole.

98.1: Mabudor name git-gozol gao noya noya, tain to ḳorsoin taijjubi kam zotota. Nizor ḍain ator kudroti bol dia, ḳorsoin ḳoto asanoḳ joyor lila-ḳela.
98.2: Mabud tan uddar ḳam zanaisoin hoḳolre, tan hok kam deḳaisoin zati oḳlor sokur samne.
98.3: Tan doya-maya ar hok-halali, iad raḳsoin Boni Israilor lagi, dekise zogotor hesh shimanar manshe, amrar Mabudor uddar ḳora ḳamre.
98.4: Ore zogotbashi gao kushir gan Mabudor name, baiddo-baznar tale tale zure zure, tan gunogan gao tumra boṛo golaye.
98.5: Bina-behala bazaia tale tale gao gan, Mabudor tarif ḳori gozol-gan gao tan.
98.6: Tumra zure zure sunga ar shinga bazaia, Alla malikor samne gao kushi koria.
98.7: Tan tarife gorzia uṭouk boṛo golae, doria ar tar mazor hoḳoltae, erloge furti koro zogotor shob bashindae.
98.8: Gang oḳole kushi koro ator tali dia, furti koro eḳloge faṛ-forbot milia.
98.9: Mabudor samne gao kushie gola faṭaia, duniar bisar ḳorat shoyong Mabud aira, hok bisar ḳorba tain hok-halal roia, hoḳol zatir bisar ḳorba hok-insaf dia.

99.1: Mabude bashshai ḳoroin, zati oḳol ḳafouk, duio Karubimor maze tan ashon, duniae tortor ḳorouk.
99.2: Fobitro Sion nogrir maze Mabud-u mohan, hoḳol zatir ufre tan ijjot-shomman.
99.3: Tara ḳorouk tumar gunogan, mohan ar boyonkor tumar nam, tara ḳouk, moha fobitro tain.
99.4: O bolala bashsha, hok bisarre bala fao tumi, hok-halali gatiso to mozbut ḳori, Iakubor bongshot boail ḳorso hok bisar ar forezgari.
99.5: Amrar Mabud Allar tarif ḳoro, soizda ḳoro tan ḳodom mubaroko, ḳo, moha fobitro tain.
99.6: Musa ar Harun asla tan imamotir ḳamo, Shamuel nobi-o roita tan dua-munazato, zuaf faita tara ḍakile Mabudor dorbaro.
99.7: Megor kuṭit roia tain matita tarar loge, tan kalam mania tara solta tan hukume.
99.8: O Alla amrar Mabud, tarar minoti tumi huntae, tarar ḳosurir bodla dile-o tumi Allae mafi ditae.
99.9: Amrar Mabud Allar tarif ḳoro, soizda ḳoro tan fobitro faṛo, amrar Mabud Alla to fak-fobitro.

100.1: Ore zogotbashi kushi-bashi koro, Mabudor name zur golae ḳoro.
100.2: Mabudor ebadot ḳoro kush dile, kushir gozol gaia gaia ao tan dorbare.
100.3: Alla-u asol Mabud, mono rakio tumra, amrare banaila tain, tan bonda to amra, amra tan meṛar fal, tan zomino ḳani kaora.
100.4: Shukur-guzar ḳori kori hamao tan duaro, tarif-git gaia gaia ao tan uṭano, tan name shukria tarif adae ḳoro.
100.5: Mabud-u asol bala, siroḳal zari tan doya-maya, tan hok-halali salu roy bongshor for bongsho doria.

117.1: Hoḳol zatie Allar tarif ḳoro, desh ar gusṭie tan nam zofo,
117.2: amrar bae to Allar ḳoto maya-momota, tain roin hok-halal hor-hamesha, Alhamdulilla!

118.1: Allar shukria zanao, tain to bala, siroḳal zari tan doya-maya.
118.2: Boni Israile ḳouk, siroḳal zari tan doya-maya.
118.3: Harunor silsilae ḳouk, siroḳal zari tan doya-maya.
118.4: Mabudor ashike ḳouk, siroḳal zari tan doya-maya.
118.5: Mabudre ḍakilam ami foṛia bifodo, tain uddar ḳori more nila kula moydano.
118.6: Mabud to amar fokke, ami ḍoraitam nae, adome amar kita ḳorto?
118.7: Mabud amar fokke, tain-u amar shohae, dushmonor behal dosha deḳaiba Allae.
118.8: Adomor ufre borosha ḳora taki, Mabudor sayat asroy loa bala.
118.9: Boṛolukor ufre borosha ḳora taki, Mabudor sayat asroy loa bala.
118.10: Hoḳol deshe mili berilisil amare, Mabudor name ami shesh ḳorilisi tarare.
118.11: Hasau tara more berilisil sairobae, Mabudor name ami shesh ḳorilisi tarare.
118.12: Bingulor falor laḳan amare berisil, hukna bon-jonglar laḳan zolia uṭsil tara, Mabudor name ami shesh ḳorilisi tarare.
118.13: Zure zure dakka marsil ami zanu foṛi zai, oile Mabud-u amar shohae oila.
118.14: Mabud-u amar bol, amar kushir git, amare basanir ufae tan ato nichchit.
118.15: Forezgaror goro goro zuddor zoyor gan, Mabudor kudroti ate ḳorsoin azob ḳam.
118.16: Mabudor ḍain at ufre tulchoin tain, Mabudor kudroti ate ḳorsoin azob ḳam.
118.17: Ami to mortam nae, zinda roimu, Mabude zeta ḳorsoin hoḳolre zanaimu.
118.18: Mabude amare ḳoṭin shaza disoin, oile moronor ato more nahi shofisoin.
118.19: Amar lagi kulia deo Allar goror duar, bitre hamaia shukria Mabudor zanai.
118.20: Ita to shoyong Mabudor duar, ḳali forezgar oḳol ono hamae.
118.21: Tumar shukria zanai amar abdar hunae, tumar ato-u nichchit amare basanir ufae.
118.22: Beḳama ḳoia falai disil raz mestorinte ze fattor, oḳṭa dia-u ian kuṭi oilo tan goror.
118.23: Mabud nize-u i kam ḳoraila, dekia to amrar taijjubi lager.
118.24: Iṭa to hou din Mabudor banail din, ao kushi kori furti kori shobe ou din.
118.25: Minoti kori go Mabud basao amrare, minoti kori tumi kamiab ḳoro amrare.
118.26: Mabudor name zein aira tan tarif ouk, Mabudor goro taki koi tumrar ufre borkot lamouk.
118.27: Alla-u to Mabud, amrare disoin nur, idor kurbanir foshu doṛidi bandia ano, kurbani kanar hing oḳol-o ogu bandia raḳo.
118.28: Tumi-u amar Alla, tumar shukria zanai, tumi-u amar Alla, tumar gunogan gai.
118.29: Allar shukria zanao, tain-u to bala, siroḳal zari tan doya-maya.

121.1: Ami souk tulia faṛ-forbotor bae saimu, amar shae-shaijjo kuai taki aibo?
121.2: Hou Mabudor ges taki-u amar shaijjo aibo, zein asman-zomin foyda ḳorsoin.
121.3: Tumar faore tain fisla ḳaite dita nae, tumar basaneala to gumaita nae.
121.4: Mono rakio, Boni Israilre zein basain, tain gumaita nae, ungaita-o nae.
121.5: Mabud-u tumar hefazotḳari, tumar asroy saya, tumar ḍain ato doria tain asoin ḳaṛa.
121.6: Dinor balae shuruze ar raitor balae sande, kunutae-u tumar ḳeti korto nae.
121.7: Hokkol nomunar bifod taki Mabude-u basaiba, tain-u tumar zanor hefazot ḳorba.
121.8: Tumar sola-firar shomoy goro-baire Mabude-u basaiba, oḳon taki zuge zuge hor-hamesha.

150.1: Hoḳole milia ḳo re mumin Alhamdulilla, dile-zane ḳo bonda Alhamdulilla! Allar Heremo hamaia ḳo Subohan Alla, tan arshe-azimo gao Subohan Alla!
150.2: Tan lila-ḳela dekia tarif ḳoro, tan shan-mohimar lagi-o tarif ḳoro!
150.3: Shinga bazaia tan tarif ḳoro, bashi-behalar shure tan tarif ḳoro,
150.4: toblar tale nasi nasi tarif ḳoro, dutara ar bashir shure tarif ḳoro,
150.5: mondirar jun-junanie tan tarif ḳoro, ḍul ar kul-ḳortal bazaia tarif ḳoro.
150.6: Hokkol zandare Mabudor tarif ḳoro, Alhamdulilla! Tan tarif ḳoro! Ḳotom.

1.1: Mattar fua Iunusor gese Mabudor ou ohi nazil oilo,
1.2: “Tumi roana deo, ar Ninob namor hou boṛo ṭauno zao, gia amar gozobor ḳota zanao. Tarar naformani amar dorbaro zair oigese.”
1.3: Oile Iunuse Mabudor hukumor borkelaf ḳoria bagia Spen desho zaoar lagi roana oigela. Tain Jafa namor zazor gaṭo gia Spen desho zaora ekkan zaz faia, zazor baṛa adae ḳoria bitre hamaia Mabudor samne tone bagita ḳori naiaintor loge oia roana dilaila.
1.4: Oile Mabude doriar maze eḳ bezuita tufan saṛila. Tufanor ṭelae zazḳan bangi zaoar dosha oilo.
1.5: Naiainte ḍoraia zarzir devtar gese ḳanda-ḳaṭi korat lagla. Ar zazor bar ḳomanir lagi mal-samana doriat falai dilo. Oile Iunus zazor tolor talat lamia huti roila, hutia bedum gumo foṛla.
1.6: Ou shomoy zazor sharong Iunusor gese gia ḳoila, “Oi mia! Tumi kemne gumairae? Kunta hunrae nae ni? Uṭo, tumar devtare ḍaḳo. Oito fare tain amrar bae kial ḳorba, amrar zan binash oito nae.”
1.7: Bade naiainte eḳe-oinne ḳoilo, “Ao amra loṭari maria deki, ḳar dushe i mosibot aise.” Teu tara loṭari marlo ar loṭarir maze Iunusor nam uṭlo.
1.8: Ou tara tanre zikaila, “Ḳo sain, ḳar dushe amrar ufre i mosibot aise? Tumi kita ḳam ḳoro? Kuai taki aiso? Kun deshor manush? Tumi kun zator manush?”
1.9: Iunuse zuaf dila, “Baiainre, ami eḳzon Ibrani, Israil zatir manush. Ami behestor malik Alla Mabudor ebadot ḳori, tain-u doria ar zomin foyda ḳorsoin.”
1.10: Tain aro ḳoila, Mabudor samne tone bagibar niote tain aia zazo uṭsoin. Ikan hunia tara kub ḍoraia ḳoila, “Hae, hae! Tumi ita kun zator ḳam ḳorlae?”
1.11: Doriar tufan zebla aro bezuita bab dorlo, ou shomoy tara tanre zikailo, “Amra tumare kita ḳorle doria tir oibo?”
1.12: Iunuse zuaf dila, “Amare doria doriat falai deo, teu doria shanti oizibo. Ami to zani, amar dushe-u afnaintor ufre i gozobi tufan aise.”
1.13: Oile naiainte tane na falaia zazḳan kinaro biṛanir lagi zan-foran shofia daṛ baila, tufanor zur ḳali baṛte-u roilo, erdae tara zazḳan kinaro nita farla na.
1.14: Teu tara Allar gese foriad ḳorlo, ḳoilo “O Mabud, rohom ḳoro, ou manshor zanor lagi tumi amrare mario na, i ni-oforadir zanor ḳarone amrare dayi korio na. O Mabud, ita hoḳolta-u to tumar munsha.”
1.15: Bade tara Iunus nobire doria doriat falai dilo, ar doriar tufanor ḍeu dom loililo.
1.16: I halot dekia tara Mabudre kub ḍoraila. Tara Mabudor name foshu-kurbani dila ar mannot manla.
1.17: Mabude kub boṛo eḳ masre zugai toisla Iunusre gililibar lagi, tain tin din, tin rait hou masor feṭo roila.

2.1: Iunuse masor feṭo tone Mabud Allar dorbaro dua ḳorla.
2.2: Mosiboto foiṛa Moula ḍakilam tore, rohom ḳoria tui zuaf dile more. Fatalor feṭo boia ami kandilam, kobul ḳorilae aroz Rohim Rohman.
2.3: Doriar muro bondu more falailae, tumar fanir ḍeue amae bashai loia zae.
2.4: Mile na didar tumar nai kanḍari, tallashi koria mukam zikir ḳori.
2.5: Ḍeuor mazete foṛi zan doṛfoṛ ḳore, doriar lota-fatae fesililo more.
2.6: Fatalor tole gia miler na kinar, ḳoredi saia deki duar nai ar. Bondi oia ḳandi ami nirash bodone, azad ḳorilae Moula goin gaṛa tone.
2.7: Zan amar zae zae oilo zoḳon, ḳator oia go bondu ḳorinu shoron. Bikka mangilam ḳangal dorbare tumar, arsho takia doyal deḳailae didar.
2.8: Murtipuja ḳore zara na faibo rohomot, elami koria tara arailo kudrot.
2.9: Shukur-guzar ḳoro Iunus Mabud meherban, tumar dorbare ami korimu kurban. Lilla-sodga dan-ḳoyrat shofimu tore, nazator Malik Moulae basao amare.
2.10: Bade Mabude hou masre hukum dila, mase Iunusre nia hukna zominor ufre bait ḳori falai dilo.

3.1: Bade Iunusor ufre dusrabar Mabudor ou ohi nazil oilo.
3.2: Tain ḳoila, “Tumi roana deo, oḳon hou boṛo ṭaun Ninob zao, ar ami tumare zeta batai dimu tumi outa tarar gese elan ḳoro.”
3.3: Mabudor hukum mafik Iunus roana oia Ninob gela. Ninob oilo kub boṛo ṭaun, i ṭaunor eḳ mata taki aroḳ matat zaite tin din lagto.
3.4: Iunus hou ṭauno hamaia eḳdinor fot gela, gia elan ḳorla, ḳoila, “O Ninobor bashinda oḳol, ar sallish din bade Ninob ṭaun uloṭ-faloṭ oizibo.”
3.5: Ikan hunia Ninobor manshe Allar ufre iman anla, tara ruza raḳar lagi elan ḳorla, ar huru-boṛo hoḳole duk zair ḳorar lagi solar soṭ findila.
3.6: I kobor gia bashshar dorbaro azilo, tain-o bashshai godi saṛia finnor lebas kulia, solar soṭ findia salir maze boila.
3.7: Ar tain asta Ninob ṭauno ou elan ḳoraila, “Bashsha ar tan uzir-nazir oḳlor hukum oilo: manush ba foshu, goru-sagol ḳeu kunuzat dana-fani kunta-u muko dio na.
3.8: Manush ar foshu, hoḳole milia solar soṭ findia dile-zane Allar nam lo, hoḳole zarzir naformanir fot saṛo ar zur-zulum bad dia Allar bae firo.
3.9: Oito fare Allae rohom ḳorba, gozobor kial bodlailiba, tan dau dau ḳora gusa one ṭanḍa oizibo, ar amra binash oitam nae.”
3.10: Allae tarar i halot deḳla, tara zarzir naformanir fot bad dia touba ḳorsoin. Dekia tain-o tan agor sinta bodlailila, tarare binash ḳorar ḳota ḳoile-o oḳon ar binash ḳorla na.

4.1: Oile Iunuse itar lagi teḳto oia kub gusa ḳorla.
4.2: Tain Mabudor dorbaro foriad ḳorla, “O Mabud, ami desho taḳte-u to zantam ilaḳan oibo. Erdae ami age-u Spen desho horia zaitamgi saislam. Ami to zani, tumi doya-momotae bora Alla, gusa ḳoro dir gotie, rohom ḳoro behishab, ar gozob nazilor befare tumar morzi bodlailao.
4.3: O Mabud, ami oḳon aroz ḳorram, tumi amar zanḳan neogi, amar to basa taki mora-u bala.”
4.4: Mabude zuaf dila, “Tumar gusa ḳora ṭik or ni?”
4.5: Bade Iunus ṭaunor bara gela, gia fubedi eḳ zagat ḍera ṭangaia, ḍerar sebat boiroila. Ar ṭaunor kita dosha oy outa deḳar lagi bar saoat roila.
4.6: Mabud Allae hono ek gas zugaila. I gasor lot baṛia lamba oia, Iunusor ḳoshṭo ḳomanir lagi tan matar ufre aramor seba dilo. Ar Iunuse-o i gasor seba faia kub allade godgod ḳorla.
4.7: Oile bador din fozor oḳto Allae egu fuk zugaila. Fuke aia gasor guṛi kaṭidilo, ḳaṭar bade igu hukaigelo.
4.8: Bade zebla shuruz uṭlo, ou shomoy Allae fubali gorom haoa zugaila. Roide Iunusor matat kub gorom laglo, tain beush oizibar dosha. Teu Iunuse moron mangila, ḳoila, “Amar to basa taki moron-u bala.”
4.9: Oile Allae Iunusre ḳoila, “I gasor lagi tumar gusa ḳora kunu ṭik or ni?” Tain ḳoila, “Itar ḳaron ase. Ami gusa ḳoria-u mormu.”
4.10: Mabude ḳoila, “Tumi to i gasor lagia kunu ḳoshṭo ḳorso na, ar igu boṛo-o ḳorso na. Igu to ḳali eḳ raite oise, ar eḳ raite-u morigese, tebou igur lagi tumar maya lagse.
4.11: Oile i Ninob ṭauno to eḳ laḳ bish azaror-o beshi manush asoin, zera nizor ḍain-bau kita sine na. Ar bout heman-zanuar-o asoin, te oto boṛo ṭaunor bae ami kita maya-momota ḳortam na ni?” Ḳotom

1.1: Malaki nobir usillae Boni Israilor gese Mabudor ohi. Boni Israilre Allar mohobbot
1.2: O Boni Israil, ami Mabude ḳoiram, ami to hamesha tumrare mohobbot ḳori. Oile tumra ḳoirae, “Tumi kila amrare mohobbot ḳorlae?” Te huno, Ish kita Iakubor bai asil na ni? Oile ami to tumrar ḳandanor murobbi Iakubre mohobbot ḳorsi,
1.3: ar Ishʼre horaia raḳsi. Ami tar faṛ oḳol binash ḳorsi, tar biṭa-maṭi morubumir hialor aḳra banaisi.
1.4: Ishʼor aolad Idumi oḳole ḳoito fare, “Amrare surmar ḳora oile-o amra i surmar ḳora hoḳolta hirbar banailimu.” Oile ami Alla Rabbul Alamine ḳoiar, tara ita banaile-o ami bangilimu, ikanre ḳoa oibo, ‘Naformanir desh, ze deshor manshor loge Mabude hamesha gusa ḳoroin.’
1.5: I halot tumrar nizor souke dekia ḳoibae, “Israil deshor shimanar bare-o Mabudor takkot ḳaim ase.” Imam oḳlor gafloti
1.6: O imam oḳol huno, ami Alla Rabbul Alamine ḳoiar, fuainte tarar bafre ijjot ḳoroin, saḳore-o tarar malikre ḍorain. Ou laḳan ami eḳzon malik oile, amar bae ḍor-ḳof kuai? Ar ami eḳzon baf oile amar faona ijjot kuai? Tumra-u to amare beijjot ḳorso. Oile tumra hirbar ḳoirae, “Amra kila tumare beijjot ḳorlam?”
1.7: Tumra to amar kurbani kanar ufre nafak kurbani dirae. Dia ḳoirae, “Amrar kurbani nafak oilo kila?” Tumra buzairae Mabudor kurbani kana kunta-u nae.
1.8: Ami Alla Rabbul Alamine zikairam, kurbanir niote tumra zebla anda foshu loia ao, ita kunu ṭik oy ni? Ar lula-lengṛa, bemari foshu kurbani deo, ita ṭik ni? Tumrar deshor razare oula foshu ufohar dia deḳo sain, tain kushi oin ni? Ar tumrar abdar raḳoin ni?
1.9: Huno, Alla Rabbul Alamine ḳoiram, tumra amar dorbaro rohomot mangile kunu lab oibo ni? Tumra zebla nizor ate-u olaḳan kurbani deo, te ami ar tumrare rohom ḳormu kila?
1.10: Haere hae! Tumrar maze eḳzone-o zudi amar Baytul-Mukaddosor geiṭ ḳanain bond ḳorilto, tumra amar kurbani kanar ufre beḳamaya aguin na zalaitae, te ami kushi oilam one. Oḳon to ami Mabud tumrar ufre kushi nae, ar tumrar at tone kunu lilla-sodga-o kobul ḳortam nae.
1.11: Huno, Alla Rabbul Alamine ḳoiar, duniar eḳ mata taki aroḳ mata forzonto tamam zatir maze amar kudroti shan ḳaim or. Tamam zomino amar name agor batti zalani or, manshe faḳ-saf lilla-sodga dira. Hoḳol zatir maze-u to amar shan-shouḳot ḳaim ase.
1.12: Oile tumra amar namre beijjot ḳorrae. Tumra to ḳoirae, “Mabudor kurbani kana kunta-u nae, i kurbanir kunu dam-u nai.”
1.13: Amare beijjotir niote ḳoirae, “Ita to ḳamoḳa ḳoshṭo deoa!” Te Alla Rabbul Alamine ḳoiar, tumra ḍaḳati kora, ar lula-lengṛa, bemari foshu ania kurbani dirae, ami kunu ota kurbani tumrar at tone kobul ḳormu ni?
1.14: Ami Alla Rabbul Alamine ḳoiar, ḳeuror falor maze nikut meda foshu ase, ogure kurbani korar lagi he nioto ḳorse, oile bade ṭogami kori kunu kut-ala foshu Mabudor name kurbani dey, tar ufre lannot foṛouk! Ami to mohan bashsha, tamam zatie amare tazim ḳore.

2.1: Ami Alla Rabbul Alamine imam oḳolre hushiar ḳori koiram,
2.2: tumra zudi amar ḳota na huno ar amar ijjot-tazimor bae furafur kial na ḳoro, te ami tumrar ufre lannot falaimu. Tumrar hoḳol rohomotre-o gozob banailimu. Ashole tumra amar ḳota mancho na ḳori ou laḳan gozob oḳono ḍalia aiar.
2.3: Tumrar lagi tumrar aolad oḳolre-o shaza dimu. Tumrar idor kurbanir foshur gufor-sena ami tumrar muko maḳaimu, ota maḳail halote manshe tumrare horaia falaiba.
2.4: Ami Alla Rabbul Alamine ḳoiram, buzilao, ami tumrar gese ou hushiari faṭailam, zate tumrar ḳandanor murobbi Lebir loge amar ḳaim ḳora niom zari roy.
2.5: Tan loge ami ze niom ḳorslam, ikṭa oilo zindegi ar shantir niom. Ermaze ḍor-ḳofor befaro asil, zate tain amare tazim ḳoroin, ashole-o tain amare tazim ḳorta.
2.6: Tan muko asil hok talim, misa na-hok kunta ḳoita na. Shullo-ana ḳaṭi roia amar ebadoti korta, boutre naformani taki firaita.
2.7: Ashole imamor ḳam oilo Pak Kalam hefazote raḳa, zate manshe gia tan ges taki ou kalam talim ḳore. Imam oḳol to Alla Rabbul Alaminor foygambor.
2.8: Oile ami Alla Rabbul Alamine ḳoiram, tumra to i fot saṛia, mongoṛa talim dia bout manshore asaṛ ḳaoaiso. Ita ḳoria tumra Lebir ḳandanor lagi kaim ḳora amar niom borkelaf ḳorso.
2.9: Tumra amar fote na solia manshor muk saia bisar ḳorso. Erdae ami-o tumrare tamam manshor samne nisa ar beijjot ḳorsi. Hozrot Malaki nobir hushiari Boni Israilor Ehuda gusṭir naformani
2.10: Amra hoḳol eḳ bafor aolad nae ni? Eḳ Allae-u amrare foyda ḳorsoin na ni? Te amra ḳene eke-oinor loge beimani koria, amrar moy-murobbir ufre ḳaim ḳora niomor borkelaf ḳori?
2.11: Ehuda gusṭie to beimani korse. Zeruzalem ṭaun shoho asta Israil desho bezuita noforoti kam ḳoraise. Ehudar manshe murtipuja ḳorra furintore bia ḳoria, Mabudor mayar zagare-o nafak banaise.
2.12: Zoto zone ita ḳam ḳore, tara Alla Rabbul Alaminor name lilla-kurbani loia aile-o, Mabude tan ḳas bonda oḳol ḳata tone tarar nam miṭailiba.
2.13: Ar tumra to aroḳṭa ḳam ḳoro. Soukor fanie ḳali kurbani kanare bizao, ḳanda-ḳaṭi ar ahazari koro. Oile tumra zeta lilla-sodga deo, itar bae Mabude to kial ḳoroin na, kushi mone ḳobulo ḳoroin na.
2.14: Erbade-o tumra zikao, “Ḳene kobul ḳoroin na?” Ḳaron oilo, tumrar zuanki kalor bibir biar aḳto Mabud to shakki oisla. Ou bibi-u tumrar zindegir logi, tumrar ḳabin ḳora bou. Otota bade-o tumrar i bour loge beimani korso.
2.15: Mabude kita zamai-boure ek kaya banaisoin na ni? Ruhe ar ḳayae tara to tan-u saman. Tarare ḳene ekḳano ḳora oise? Tan kial asil, tarar mazdi allaoala ek kandan ḳaim roito. Erdae tumrar dilor befare hushiar o, zuankir bibir loge beimani korio na.
2.16: Boni Israilor Mabud Allae ḳoira, “Boure talaḳ deoa ami gin ḳori.” Alla Rabbul Alamine aro ḳoira, “Zulumre finnor ḳafoṛor laḳan findia, zalimi surote ze manush haze, tar ḳamre-o ami gin ḳori. Erdae tumra tumrar dilor befare hushiar o, bour loge beimani korio na.”
2.17: Tumra nizor zobandi Mabudre teḳto ḳoriliso. Erbade-o tumra zikairae, “Amra ḳemne tanre teḳto ḳorsi?” Tumra to ḳoiso, zetae naformani koroin, ita hokkolti Mabudor nozoro bala manush, tain otar ufre kushi. Arnae ḳoiso, kuai hou Alla, zein hok insaf ḳoroin?

3.1: Huno, ami Alla Rabbul Alamine oada ḳoriar, ami amar foygamborre bezimu, tain aiba, aia amar age gia fot ṭik-ṭak korba. Ar tumra ze malikor lagi bar sairae, tain-o aḳta-u tan goro toshrif anba. Ze zonor lagi tumra ashik oigeso ḳoirae, amar niomor hou foygambore toshrif anra.
3.2: Oile tan toshrif anar din, shoijjo ḳorar himmot oibo ḳar? Tan shamne ubanir ḳemota ḳar? Tain to hunaror agunir laḳan, dufar sabonor laḳan.
3.3: Hunare zela shuna-rufare zalaia ḳaṭi banae, tain-o ou beshe boiba. Ar shuna-rufar nomunae Lebir ḳandanre faḳ-saf ḳorba, ḳaṭi banaiba. Bade oula manush taḳba, zara Mabudor name sohi niote faḳ-saf lilla-kurbani adae ḳorba.
3.4: Teu agor amolor laḳan Zeruzalem ar Ehuda deshor manshor lilla-kurbani Mabude kushi oia kobul ḳorba.
3.5: Ami Alla Rabbul Alamine ḳoiar, hou shomoy ami bisar ḳorar lagi tumrar gese aimu. Aia zadugir, zinakur, misa shakki deora, ḳamlar beton ṭogra, ṛaṛi beṭin ar etimor ufre zulum ḳorra, musafiror bae hok insaf na ḳorra, mani zoto zone amare ḍorae na, tara hokkolor bifokke shakki dite ami kunu deri kortam nae. Allar faona adae na ḳorar shaza
3.6: O Iakubor aolad oḳol, ami Mabud, amar zobanor kunu rod-bodol nai, erdae-u tumra binash oirae na.
3.7: Tumrar baf-dadar zomana taki-u amar hukum-ahkam mancho na, ar amolo ḳorso na. Tumra amar gese firia aio, ami-o tumrar gese aimu. Oile tumra ḳoirae, “Amra kila firia aitam?”
3.8: Kunu manshe kita Allare ṭogito fare ni? Oile tumra to amare ṭogirae. Ṭogia hirbar ḳoirae, “Amra ḳemne tumare ṭogailam?” Huno, tumra to zoḳat adae ar lilla-kurbanir befare amare ṭogirae.
3.9: Tumrar asta zatie milia amare ṭogirae, erdae-u tumra lannotor maze gaṛi roiso.
3.10: Tumrar hoḳol ruzir dosh baṭor eḳ baṭ amar banḍaro deo, zate amar goro ḳani-kuraki roy. I befare tumra amare forikka ḳoria dekilao, ami Alla Rabbul Alamine asmanor hoḳol duar kulia, tumrar dorḳaror saite-o beshi, behishab boroḳot dei ki na.
3.11: Ami keti korra fuk oḳolre bada dimu, itae tumrar zominor foshol ḳaia binash ḳorta nae. Ar tumrar ḳetor angur folo zoria foṛto nae.
3.12: Ami Alla Rabbul Alamine ḳoiar, ola ḳorle duniar hoḳol zatie tumrare mubarok koibo, tumrar desh oibo aram ar kushi-bashir desh.
3.13: Oile ami Mabude ḳoiar, tumra to amar bifokke ḳoṛa-ḳoṛi mat matiso. Matia hirbar ḳoirae, “Amra tumar bifokke kita matilam?”
3.14: Te huno, tumra ḳoirae, “Allar ebadot ḳora to ḳamoḳa ḳoshṭo ḳora. Tan hukum-ahkam amol ḳorle, Alla Rabbul Alaminor gese mata nuaia solle amrar lab kita?
3.15: Te oḳon ao, amra beṭagiri deḳaora manshore doinno dei. Oe, oy, ḳaraf manshe-u to unnoti korra. Tara Allare forikka ḳoriao to rehai failira.”
3.16: Bade tarar maze zara Mabudre ḍoraito, tara eḳe-oinnoe batchit ḳorlo, ar Mabude ita kial ḳori hunla. Mabudor ḍor-ḳof zerar bitre asil, zera ḳas dile tan dian ḳorto, tarar nam Mabudor samne ek katat leḳa oilo.
3.17: Ami Alla Rabbul Alamine tarar befare ḳoiram, amar ṭik kori raḳa din aile tara amar ḳas samana oiba, tara amar-u bonda oiba. Bafe tar kezmot ḳorra fuare zela maya ḳore, ou laḳan ami-o tarare maya ḳormu.
3.18: Hou shomoy aroḳbar tumra deḳbae, forezgar ar naformanor maze, amar ebadot ḳorra, ar na ḳorrar maze ḳoto bebodan ḳori.

4.1: Huno, ami Alla Rabbul Alamine ḳoiram, hou din aior, zedin ḍomḳar agunir laḳan dau dau ḳori zolbo. I din hokkol boṛai korra ar naforman oḳol nerar laḳan zolba, tarar zoṛ ba dal-pala kunta-u zolar baki roito nae.
4.2: Oile tumra zera amare ḍorao, tumrar ufre dindarir shuruz uṭibo, i shuruzor tezor maze taḳbo shifa. Tumra guala tone saṛa faoa gorur baichchar laḳan nasibae.
4.3: Ami zedin ou ḳam ḳormu, i din tumra naforman oḳolre faodi uṛibae, tara oiba tumrar faor tolor sali. Iḳan ami Alla Rabbul Alamine ḳoilam.
4.4: Tumra amar bonda Musar shoriotor ḳota iad raḳo, ami Tur faṛor ufre tamam Boni Israilor lagi ze hukum-ahkam tan gese dislam, ota mono rakio.
4.5: Huno, Mabudor hou mohan ar bezuita ḍor-ḳofor din aibar age, ami Mabude Ilias nobire tumrar gese bezimu.
4.6: Tain aia ma-bafor dil tarar fua-fuṛintor bae, ar fua-fuṛintor dil tarar ma-bafor bae firaiba, zate ami aia hari tarar deshre lannot ḍalia binash na ḳori. Ḳotom.

1.1: Hozrot Isa al-Mosi oila Daud nobir bongshodor, ar Daud oila Hozrot Ibrahimor bongshodor. Isa al-Mosir ḳandanor forisoy oilo,
1.2: Hozrot Ibrahimor fua Hozrot Isʼhak, Isʼhakor fua Hozrot Iakub, Iakubor fua Ehuda ar tan baiain,
1.3: Ehudar fuain Firuz ar Zarah, erar maʼr nam Tamar. Firuzor fua Hasir, Hasiror fua Rayam,
1.4: Rayamor fua Aminadab, Aminadabor fua Nahish, Nahishor fua Selim,
1.5: Selimor fua Buaz, tan maʼr nam Rahba. Buazor fua Ubayed, tan ma oila Rut. Ubayedor fua Ias,
1.6: Iasor fua Bashsha Daud. Daudor fua nobi Sulaiman, en ma asla Uriar ṛaṛi bou Batseba.
1.7: Sulaimanor fua Rohbiam, Rohbiamor fua Abia, Abiar fua Asa,
1.8: Asar fua Zihusafoṭ, Zihusafoṭor fua Uram, Uramor fua Uzia,
1.9: Uziar fua Zutom, Zutomor fua Ahaz, Ahazor fua Hizkia,
1.10: Hizkiar fua Manosha, Manoshar fua Amon, Amonor fua Iushia,
1.11: Iushiar fua Iakunia ar tar baiain. Israil zatire Babil desho bondi kori neoar bala erar zonom oisil.
1.12: Israil zatire Babil desho bondi kori neoar bade Iakuniar fua Saltielor zonom oisil. Saltielor fua Zerbabil,
1.13: Zerbabilor fua Abihud, Abihudor fua Iliakim, Iliakimor fua Azor,
1.14: Azoror fua Sadik, Sadikor fua Akim, Akimor fua Elihud,
1.15: Elihudor fua Ali-Azor, Ali-Azoror fua Motin, Motinor fua Iakub,
1.16: Iakubor fua Iusuf, ou Iusuf oila Bibi Moriomor zamai. Bibi Moriomor feṭo Hozrot Isar zonom oisil, enre ḍaḳa oy al-Mosi.
1.17: Ou laḳan Hozrot Ibrahim taki Daud nobi forzonto souddo siṛi. Daud nobi taki Babilo bondi kori neoa forzonto souddo siṛi. Babilo bondi oa taki al-Mosi forzonto souddo siṛi. Hozrot Isa al-Mosir zonom
1.18: Isa al-Mosir zonom oisil ou laḳan. Iusuf namor eḳ zonor loge Bibi Moriomor shadi ṭik oisil, oile tara eḳloge mila-misha ḳorar age-u Allar Pak Ruhur kudroti bole Moriomor feṭo hurutta ailo.
1.19: Iusuf asla hok manush, Moriomor feṭo hurutta ase, i kobor hunia tain Moriomre manshor samne shorom dita saila na, erdae mone mone ṭik korla, lukaia i bia bangilita.
1.20: Tain zebla olaḳan sinta ḳorra, ou shomoy Mabudor eḳ firistae kuabor maze tanre doroshon dia ḳoila, “O Iusuf bin Daud, tumi Moriomre shadi korte ḍoraio na. Tan feṭo ze hurutta aise, ita to Pak Ruhur kudroti bole-u oise. Tan goro eḳ fuae zonom loiba.
1.21: Tumi i fuar nam rakio Isa. Ḳaron i namor mani toraneala, ein nizor ummot oḳolre guna taki toraiba.”
1.22: Agor zomanar nobir mazdi Mabude zela bataisla, oḳan folibar lagi-u ita oibo.
1.23: Mabude bataisla, “Huno, eḳzon abiati shoti narir feṭo hurutta aibo, tain eḳ fuar zonom diba, i fuare ḍaḳa oibo Immanuel.” I namor mani oilo, Alla amrar loge asoin.
1.24: Bade gum taki uṭia Iusufe firistar hukum mafik Bibi Moriomre shadi korla.
1.25: Oile ou fuar zonmor ag forzonto tain Moriomor loge kunu mila-misha ḳorla na. Shomoy moto ou fuar zonom oilo, tain ou fuar nam raḳla Isa.

2.1: Raza Herudor amolo Ehudia zilar Betelham gaut Hozrot Isar zonom oisil. Zonmor bade fubor deshor ḳoyzon gonoḳ Zeruzalem ṭauno aia zikaila,
2.2: “Ihudi zatir ze bashshar zonom oise, ein kuai? Amra asmanor fubedi tan zonmor tera deḳsi, dekia tanre boḳti deoat aisi.”
2.3: Noya bashshar ḳota hunia Raza Herud ar Zeruzalemor bad-baki hoḳol manush kub sintat foṛigela.
2.4: Erlagi Herude deshor boṛo imam ar moulana oḳolre ekḳano dola ḳori zikaila, “Afnara zanoin ni, al-Mosi kuai zonom loiba?”
2.5: Era ḳoila, “Tan zonom oibo Ehudia zilar Betelham gaut. Agor zomanar eḳ nobir kitabo leḳa ase,
