2.6: O Ehudia zilar Betelham, Ehudiar nami-dami zagar maze tumi kunumonte-u huru nae, tumar maz taki-u to ola eḳzon bashsha foyda oiba, zein amar Israil zatire salaiba.”
2.7: Teu Herude hou gonoḳ oḳolre niralae nia zikaia zanla, ṭik kun shomoy hou zonmor tera deḳa gesil.
2.8: Tain ou gonoḳ oḳolre ḳoila, “Afnara Betelham zaukka, gia bala ḳori ou huruttar tallash ḳoroukka. Tan kunu ḳobor faile amare zanaiba, teu ami-o gia tanre boḳti dimu.”
2.9: Razar hukum faia gonoḳ oḳol roana dila. Tara fubor asmano ze zonom tera deḳsila, ou tera tarar age age gelo. Ar ou hurutta ze zagat asla, ṭik ou zagat aia tera tami gelo.
2.10: Tera tami gese dekia gonoḳ oḳlor bitre kushir ḍeu uṭlo, kushir maire tara goror bitre hamaila.
2.11: Goro hamaia ou huruttare tan ma Moriomor ḳandat deḳla. Dekia tara maṭit foṛi tanre boḳti dila, ar tarar beg kulia dami dami ufohar dila. Ou ufohar oilo shuna, loban-agor ar mura-ator.
2.12: Oile Allae kuabor maze tarare hushiar ḳori dila, tara zanu Raza Herudor gese ar firia na zain. Teu tara dusra fote nizor desho gelagi. Hozrot Isa al-Mosir kuze Raza Herud
2.13: Gonoḳ oḳol gia harle Allar eḳ firistae kuabor maze Iusufre doroshon dia ḳoila, “O Iusuf uṭo, fua ar tan maʼre loia Mishor desho bagia zaogi, bade ami zotodin na ḳoi, otodin hono-u roio. I fuare marilito ḳori Herude tukaibo.”
2.14: Teu Iusuf uṭia ou rait-u tarare loia Mishoro roana dila,
2.15: ar Raza Herud morar ag forzonto hono roila. Ita goṭisil, zate agor eḳ nobir mazdi Mabude zeta zanaisla, ota fura oy. Mabude bataisla, “Ami amar futre Mishor taki ḍakia anlam.”
2.16: Gonoḳ oḳole Raza Herudre ṭogisoin ḳoria tain kub gusa ḳorla. Erlagi gonoḳ oḳlor ges taki tain ze shomoyor ḳota hunsla, ou shomoy mafik Betelham gau ar er ash-fash elaḳat dui bosor ba tar ḳom boyoshi zoto fuain asla, ita hoḳolre marilibar hukum dila.
2.17: Ete nobi Iaromiar mazdi Mabude zeta zanaisla, ota foligelo. Mabude bataisla,
2.18: Ramat kub ḳanda-ḳaṭir aoaz huna zar, Rahelae tair huruttaintor lagi kander, kunumonte-u shanti or na, tair huruttain shesh oigesoin.
2.19: Bade Raza Herud moria harle Mabudor eḳ firista aia, Mishor desho Iusufre kuabor maze ḳoila,
2.20: “O Iusuf, uṭo, ou fua ar tan maʼre loia Israil desho zaogi. Fuare zetae marilita saisla, ita to morigesoin.”
2.21: Teu Iusuf uṭia fua ar fuar maʼre loia Israil deshor shimanat aila.
2.22: Aia hunla, hou Herudor fua Arkilaus oḳon Ehudia zilar raza oigese. Erlagi tain hino zaite ḍoraila. Bade kuabe hukum faia Galil zilat gelagi.
2.23: Galilo gia Nasarot namor ek gaut boshot ḳorla. Ita goṭilo, zate agor nobi oḳlor mazdi zeta zanail oisil, ota oḳon fura oy. Zanail oisil, “Tanre Nasaroti koia ḍaḳa oibo.”

3.1: Ou shomoy Ehudia zilar morubumit aia Ehia nobie toblig korla,
3.2: “Touba ḳoro, duniar maze behesti bashshai salu oite ar beshi deri nae.”
3.3: Ou Ehia nobir befare-u Ishaya nobie age bataisla, Morubumir maze eḳzon manshe zure zure elan ḳorra, ‘Tumra malikor fot sohi koro, tan solar rasta oḳol shida ḳoro.’
3.4: Ehia nobie to uṭor rumor ḳafoṛ findita ar ḳomro samṛar belṭ bandita. Tain faṛia mou ar foring kaita.
3.5: Tan toblig hunar lagi asta Ehudia zila, Zeruzalem ṭaun ar Zordan gangor sairobae taki bout manush tan gese aila.
3.6: Aia zarzir guna shikar ḳorla, bade tain erare Zordan gango toubar gusol ḳoraila.
3.7: Tain deḳla, toubar gusol ḳorar lagi bout Forishi ar Siddekia mozobor manush-o tan gese aira. Ou tain ḳoila, “O hafor baichchain, asmani gozob aior dekia zan basanir fot tumrare ḳegie batai dilo?
3.8: Tumra zudi hasaror touba ḳoria taḳo, te er fol-o deḳao.
3.9: Mone mone ḳoio na, tumra Ibrahimor aolad. Huno, ami koiram, Allae saile to ou fattor oḳol taki-u Ibrahimor aolad banaita farba.
3.10: Gasor guṛit to kuṛal lagail-u ase. Ze gaso bala fol dore na, i gas ḳaṭia agunit falail oibo.
3.11: “Touba ḳorso gotike ami tumrare fanidi gusol ḳorailam, oile amar bade aro eḳzon aira, ein ama tone-o himmot-ala, tan faor zuta boar laḳ-o ami nae. Tain aia tumrare Pak Ruhu ar aguindi gusol ḳoraiba.
3.12: Tan kula to tan ato-u ase, ikan dia tain dan uaia ugaro tulba, ar susare ou agunit falaia zalaiba, ze aguin kunu shomoy nibto nae.” Hozrot Isar pak gusol
3.13: Ou shomoy Galil zila taki Hozrot Isa-o pak gusol ḳorar lagi, Zordan gango Ehia nobir gese aila.
3.14: Oile Ehiae tanre oḳan ḳoia na ḳorla, “Afne aisoin ni amar gese, amar-u zorur asil afnar gese gia gusol ḳora!”
3.15: Isae zuaf dila, “Aichcha, oḳon ola-u ouk, karon amrar usit oilo Allar morzi furon ḳora.” Ikan hunia Ehia razi oigela.
3.16: Pak gusol ḳoria fani taki uṭte-u Isae deḳla, asman dui bag oigese, ar Allar Ruhu faror surot doria tan ufre lamia aira.
3.17: Ou shomoy asman tone gaibi aoaz oilo, “Ein-u amar ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla, en ufre ami kub kushi.”

4.1: Pak gusol ḳorar bade, Allar Pak Ruhur isharae Isare morubumit neoa oilo, zate ou shomoy Iblise tane forikka ḳorar shuzug fae.
4.2: Morubumir maze tain eḳlagare sallish din sallish rait ruza asla. Erbade tan kub feṭo buk laglo.
4.3: Ou shomoy Iblise aia tanre ḳoilo, “Tumi zudi Ibnulla, Allar ḳas mayar zon o, te ota fattorre ḳo na ruṭi oizito.”
4.4: Isae zuaf dila, “Allar kalamo leḳa ase, ḳali ruṭi kaile-u manush base na, borong Allar fortek kalame-u manush base.”
4.5: Teu he Isare loia fobitro ṭaun Zeruzalemo gelo, gia Baytul-Mukaddos Kaba goror minarar ufre tane uba ḳoraia ḳoilo,
4.6: “Tumi zudi Allar ḳas mayar zon o, te deki sain, on taki fal dia lamat foṛo, kitabo to leḳa ase, Allae tan firista oḳolre hukum diba; ar tara nizor atdi tumare doriliba, zate tumar fao-o kunu fattoror suṭ na lage.”
4.7: Isae tare ḳoila, “Kitabo ou ḳota-o leḳa ase, Tumi tumar Mabud Allare forikka ḳorat lagio na.”
4.8: Bade Iblise tanre kub usa eḳ faṛor ufre loia gelo, nia eḳ foloḳe duniar tamam mulluk ar otar hoḳol zak-zomoḳ deḳailo ar ḳoilo,
4.9: “Tumi zudi amare soizda ḳorilao, te i hokkolta ami tumare dilaimu.”
4.10: Isae zuaf dila, “Dur Shoytan, bag! Allar kalamo ase, tumi kali tumar Mabud Allare-u ḍoraio, ḳali tan ebadot ḳorio.”
4.11: Oḳan hunia Iblis tan ges taki horia gelogi, ar Allar firista oḳol aia tan kezmot ḳorla. Hozrot Isa al-Mosir toblig
4.12: Bade Isae ḳobor faila, Ehia nobire aṭok koria zelo harail oise, oḳan hunia tain Galil zilat gelagi.
4.13: Hono gia Nasarot gau saṛia Sobulon-Noftali elaḳar aoror faror Kofornaum ṭauno gia roila.
4.14: Ita hoḳolta oilo, zate Ishaya nobir mazdi Allae zeta bataisla, ota oḳon folizae. Ishaya nobie ḳoisla,
4.15: Bidormi manshor boshot ḳana Galil zilar aoror faror Sobulon-Noftali elaḳar manush, ar Zordan gangor dusra faror manshor gese Allar nur zair oibo.
4.16: Zeta manush be-foti bonia andarir maze zindegi kaṭaira, tara Allar nuror moha rushni deḳba. Ar zera goin andarir maze boshot ḳore, tarar gese-o Allar nur zair oibo.
4.17: Ou shomoy taki Isae toblig korla, ḳoila, “Touba ḳoro, ḳaron duniar maze behesti bashshai salu oite ar beshi deri oito nae.” Hozrot Isar foyla shagrid oḳol
4.18: Hozrot Isa Galil aoror faredi aṭia zaira, ou shomoy deḳla, Saimon urfe Fitor ar en bai Andriase aoro zal baira, era to zalua asla.
4.19: Isae erare ḳoila, “Amar loge ao, ami tumrare manush dorar zalua banaimu.”
4.20: Loge loge era zal falaia Isar loge roana oigela.
4.21: On tone tuṛa age gia deḳla, Iakub ar Hannan tara duio baie bafor loge nao-o boia zal zuit-zait ḳorra. Erar bafor nam Zibudia. Isae erare dekia ḍaḳ dila,
4.22: ḍaḳ hunia era-o tarar bafre nao-o toia Isar loge aila. Hozrot Isae bout bemarire shifa ḳorla
4.23: Bade Isa Galil zilar hoḳol zagat guri guri, honor nanan mosido gia nosiot ḳorla, ar behesti bashshair kush-ḳobri toblig korla. Erloge bout nomunar bemarire bala ḳorla.
4.24: Asta Siria deshor maze tan ḳobor roṭi gelo. Ete nanan nomunar bemar-azar ar zala-zontronae zeta manshe ḳoshṭo faisil, zerare zin-bute dorsil, mirgi ar ordong bemari zoto manush asil, manshe otare Isar gese loia aila. Tain era hoḳolre bala ḳorla.
4.25: Galil, Dikafoli, Zeruzalem, Ehudia ar Zordanor oinno far taki bout manush Isar ḳore ḳore roana oila.

5.1: Bout manush aisoin dekia Isa gia eḳ faṛor ufre uṭila. Uṭia boar bade tan shagrid oḳol ḳandat aila.
5.2: Shagrid oḳolre dekia tain ou talim dila, ḳoila,
5.3: “Nek-kofali ou manush-u zara dil taki nizore gorib mono ḳore, behesti bashshai to tara-u faiba.
5.4: Tara-u ḳofali zarar mono oḳon duk ase, tara-u to shuk faiba.
5.5: Tara-u ḳofali zarar sal-cholon norom, i dunia to tarar-u oibo.
5.6: Tara-u ḳofali zara dile-zane fak-forezgarir lagi kande, tarar ou asha fura oibo.
5.7: Tara-u ḳofali zara manshore doya ḳore, tara-u to doya faiba.
5.8: Tara-u ḳofali zarar dil ḳaṭi, ḳaron tara-u Allar didar faiba.
5.9: Tara-u ḳofali zara manshore shantie raḳar lagi menot ḳore, Allae tarare tan afon aolad ḳoia ḍakiba.
5.10: Tara-u ḳofali zara Allar hukum mafik solat gia zulum-mosibot shoijjo ḳore, behesti bashshai to tara-u faiba.
5.11: “Ar tumra-u ḳofali zarare amar lagi manshe ginnae, manshe tumrare zulum ḳore ar nanan nomunar misa bodnam gae.
5.12: Ila oile mono rakio, tumrar age ze nobi oḳol aisla, ita manshe ou nobir ufre-o ola zulum ḳorta. Te tumra kushi-bashi ar furti korio, ḳaron tumra-o ou nobi oḳlor laḳan behesto bout boṛo furuskar faibae. Mumin oḳol duniar batti ar nun
5.13: “Tumra oilae duniar nun, oile nunor gun zudi nosṭo oizae, te ar nunta ḳora zae ni? I nun to ar kunu ḳamo lage na. Manshe ita bare falai dein ar itar ufredi aṭoin.
5.14: “Huno, tumra oilae duniar batti. Faṛor ufror kunu ṭaun to lukail raḳa zae na.
5.15: Ar kunu manshe lem zalaia ṭukrir tole toy na, ikṭa lem-danir ufre-u toy, zate goror hoḳole for deḳoin.
5.16: Ou laḳan tumrar for-o manshor samne zolouk, zate tumrar bala ḳam dekia manshe tumrar behesti baf, Alla Pakor tarif ḳoroin. Shoriotor befare talim
5.17: “Tumra ikan mono ḳorio na, ami Tourat Kitab ar nobi oḳlor sohifa batil ḳorat aisi. Ami to ita batil ḳorat nae, borong fura ḳorat aisi.
5.18: Ami hasa ḳota ḳoiram, Tourat Kitabor hoḳol ḳota zotodin na folise, oto din i kitabor eḳṭa horof ba zer-zobor-o batil oito nae. Asman-zomin koy na oa forzonto, ikan batil oito nae.
5.19: Tourat Kitabor kunu huru-muru hukum-o zudi keu na mane, ba i hukum na manar lagi manshore foramish dey, te behesti bashshait tare-o hoḳol taki huru ḳoa oibo. Oile ze zone i hukum-ahkam amol ḳore ar manshore-o hikae, behesti bashshait tare bout dam deoa oibo.
5.20: Ami tumrare ḳoiram, alim-ulama ar Forishi oḳlor amol taki-o, tumrar amol zudi aro bala na oy, te kunumonte-u behesti bashshait hamaitae fartae nae. Rag-gusar befare hushiari
5.21: “Tumra huncho, agor amolor manshor gese ḳoa oise, ‘Kun ḳorio na, zegie kun ḳorbo, he i kunor daṛo foṛbo.’
5.22: Oile ami tumrare ḳoiram, ze manshe tar bai-biradoror loge rag-gusa ḳore, he bisaror daṛo foṛbo. He zudi tar baire ḳoy, ‘Tumi to be-aḳol’ te aro boṛo bisaror daṛo foṛbo. Ar ze zone tar baire ḳoy, ‘Tumi beokuf,’ he duzoḳor aguino zolbo.
5.23: “Erdae kurbani kanat gia Allar name lilla-sodga dibar shomoy zudi tumar mono oizae, tumar loge tumar kunu bair bibad ase,
5.24: te tumar lilla-sodga ou zagat toia, age gia tumar bair loge miṭ-maṭ ḳoro, bade gia tumar kurbani deo.
5.25: “Ḳeu tumar birudde kunu mamla ḳorle adaloto zaoar age-u tar loge zoldi miṭ-maṭ ḳorilio. Ila na ḳorle, he tumare hakimor ato dibo, hakime tumare fulishor haola ḳorba, ar fulishe tumare zelo haraiba.
5.26: Heshe tar shullo-ana faona adae na ḳora forzonto, tumi kunumonte-u saṛa faitae nae. Ami tumrare asol ḳota ḳoilam. Zina ar ḳosmor befare hushiari
5.27: “Tumra huncho, age batail oise, ‘Zina ḳorio na.’
5.28: Oile ami tumrare ḳoiram, kunu beṭae zudi kunu beṭi manshor bae ku-nozore sae, te he ou shomoy mone mone tair loge zina ḳorlo.
5.29: “Tumar ḍain souke zudi tumare gunar fote ṭane, te i souk tulia falai deo. Asta shoril loia duzoḳo zaoa taki, eḳṭa ongo binash ḳorilaoa tumar lagi bala.
5.30: Tumar ḍain ate zudi tumare gunar fote ṭane, i at ḳaṭia falai deo. Asta shoril loia duzoḳo zaoa taki, eḳṭa ongo binash ḳorilaoa tumar lagi bala.
5.31: “Aro ḳoa oise, ‘Ze manshe tar boure talaḳ dey, he boure talaḳ nama deuk.’
5.32: Oile ami tumrare ḳoiram, ze manshe zina saṛa oinno kunu ḳarone nizor boure talaḳ dey, he to tar boure zinakur banae. Ar talaḳ faoa beṭire zegie bia ḳore, he-o zinakur bone.
5.33: “Tumra to zano, agor zomanar manshor gese batail oise, ‘Misa kunu ḳosom ḳorio na, ar zekunu ḳosom ḳorle iṭa Allar name adae ḳorio.’
5.34: Oile ami tumrare ḳoiram, kunuzat ḳosom ḳorio na. Behestor name ḳosom ḳorio na, ikan to Allar arosh.
5.35: Duniar name ḳorio na, ikan to Allar ḳodom mubarok toar zaga. Zeruzalemor name-o ḳosom ḳorio na, ikan oilo mohan bashsha Allar ṭaun.
5.36: Tumar nizor matar name ḳosom ḳorio na, i matar eḳsa sulre dola ba ḳala ḳorar ḳemota to tumar nai.
5.37: Tumrar mator oy ḳan oy, ar na ḳan na ouk. Huno, itar bare ar zotota-u oy, ita Iblis taki oy. Bodla loar befare talim
5.38: “Tumra to huncho, age batail oise, ze forimane ḳeti oise, ou forimane shaza dio, ‘Souḳor bodla souk ar dator bodla dat.’
5.39: Oile ami koiram, ḳeu zudi tumrar loge ḳaraf bebohar ḳore, te tumra er bodla loio na, borong kunu manshe tumar ḍain galo soṛ marle, tare bau gal-o fatia dilaio.
5.40: Ḳeu zudi mamla-mokoddoma ḳoria tumar kurta nitogi sae, te tumar saddor-o dilaio.
5.41: Ḳeu zudi tumare ḳoy, tar gaiṭ boia loia eḳ mail zaitae, te tumi tar loge dui mail zaiogi.
5.42: Ḳeu tumar gese kunta kuzile tare dio. Ḳeu aolat saile, tare firai dio na. Dushmonre mohobbot ḳoro
5.43: “Tumra zano, age to batail oisil, ‘Tumar ari-forire maya ḳorio ar dushmonre ginnaio.’
5.44: Oile ami tumrare ḳoiram, tumrar dushmonre-o maya ḳorio. Zera tumrare zulum ḳore, tarar lagi dua ḳorio.
5.45: Ita dekia manshe buzba, tumra hasau tumrar behesti baf Alla Pakor mayar aolad bonigeso. Tain to bala-bura hoḳlor ufre tan shuruz uṭain, dindar ar naforman hoḳlor ufre-u meg-fani dein.
5.46: Zara tumrare mohobbot ḳore, tumra zudi kali tarare-u mohobbot ḳoro, te tumra kita furuskar faibae? Gushkur toshildar oḳole-o ila ḳore na ni?
5.47: Tumra zudi kali nizor baire salam deo, te oinno manush taki beshi ar kita ḳorrae? Bidormi oḳole-o ila ḳoroin na ni?
5.48: Erlagi ami koiram, tumrar behesti baf Alla Pak zela ḳaṭi, tumra-o ola ḳaṭi o.

6.1: “Tumra hushiar roio, manshore deḳanir lagi ebadot-bondegi korio na, ila ḳorle tumrar behesti baf Alla Pakor ges taki kunu furuskar faitae nae.
6.2: “Kunu manshore dan-ḳoyrat dile bonḍo oḳlor laḳan dio na. Tara to manshor ges taki tarif faita ḳori mosido-mondiro ar fote-gaṭe, ḍul-ḍofki bazaia lilla-zoḳat dein. Ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, tarar furuskar to tara failise.
6.3: Oile tumi kunu dan-ḳoyrat dile, tumar ḍain ate bilaile bau ate zanu na zane.
6.4: Oula lukaia dan ḳorio. Teu tumar behesti baf Alla, zein lukaia hoḳolta deḳoin, tain-u tumare furuskar diba. Dua ḳorar befare talim
6.5: “Tumra zebla dua ḳoro, ou shomoy bonḍo oḳlor bab dorio na. Tara manshore deḳanir lagi mosido-mondiro ar fotor muko ubaia dua ḳore. Ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, itae to tarar furuskar failise.
6.6: Oile tumi dua ḳorar bala goror dorza-zanala lagaia dua ḳorio, ar tumar niraḳar baf, zenre deḳa na gele-o azir asoin, hou Allar gese saio. Tain to gufon hoḳolta deḳoin, tain-u tumare fol diba.
6.7: “Tumra zebla dua ḳoro, ou shomoy duniar manshor laḳan ḳamoḳa ber-beri korio na. Tara mono ḳoroin, beshi beshi koile Allae tarar dua kobul ḳorba.
6.8: Tumra tarar laḳan oio na, tumrar behesti baf Allar gese saoar age-u, tain zanoin tumrar kita dorḳar.
6.9: Erlagi tumra olaḳan dua ḳorio, O baba, amrar behesti baf, tumar nam fak-fobitro mana ouk.
6.10: Duniait tumar bashshai zoldi auk, shob tumar morzi mafik kora zauk, behesto zela oula duniait, behesto zela oula duniait.
6.11: O baba, aizkur ḳani aizku deo, maf ḳoro amrar hoḳol oforad,
6.12: zara amrar birudde ḳorse faf, amra to tarare dilaisi maf.
6.13: Falaio na amrare forikkat, Shoytanor ḳobza taki koro ḳalas.
6.14: Huno, tumra zudi aroḳzonor oforad maf ḳoro, te tumrar behesti baf Allae-o tumrar oforad maf ḳori diba.
6.15: Oile tumra zudi oinnore maf na ḳoro, te tumrar behesti bafe tumrare-o maf ḳorta nae. Ruzar befare talim
6.16: “Tumra zebla ruza raḳo, ou shomoy bonḍo oḳlor laḳan muk kala ḳorio na. Tara ruza raḳsoin, oḳan deḳanir lagi souk-muk kala ḳori raḳoin. Ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, itae to tarar furuskar failise.
6.17: Oile tumi ruza raḳle muk-at doio, matat tel-fani dio,
6.18: zela manshe buzto na fare, tumi ruza raḳso. Teu tumar niraḳar baf, zenre deḳa na gele-o azir asoin, hou Allae-u ita deḳba. Tain to gufon hoḳolta deḳoin, tain-u tumare fol diba. Aḳerator don ḳamao
6.19: “I zindegit tumra nizor lagi oto don-shompod zomaio na. Duniar shompodor maze zongare dore, fuke ḳae ar hing kudia sure ney.
6.20: Oile behestor maze nizor lagi samana zomao, hino zongare dore na, fuke-o ḳae na ar suri-o oy na.
6.21: Mono rakio, tumar don zeno, mon-o hono roy.
6.22: “Zano to, souk oilo shorilor batti. Tumar souk zudi bala oy, te tumar asta shorilo soḳsoḳa for oibo.
6.23: Oile tumar souk zudi karaf oy, te asta shoril-u ḳala andair oizibo. Tumar dilor batti andair oile, i andair boṛo bezuita.
6.24: “Zano ni, kunu gulame-u dui munibor kezmot ḳorto fare na, he eḳzonre ginnaibo aroḳzonre bala faibo. Arnae eḳzonor bae kial ḳorbo, aroḳzonre elami korbo. Te tumra-o Alla Pak ar don-samana, duiotar kezmot eḳloge ḳortae faro na.
6.25: “Erdae ami tumrare ḳoiram, kila ḳaitam ar kila finditam, ita loia sinta ḳorio na. Ḳani taki zan boṛo, ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ taki shoril boṛo.
6.26: “Asmanor ou fakintor bae sao, tara zala-o bain ḳore na, foshol-o ḳaṭe na, ugaro kunta zomae na, ḳali tumrar behesti baf Allae tarar kuraḳ dein. Te tumra kunu ita taki aro dami nae ni?
6.27: Ḳo sain, tumrar maze ḳeu sinta-babna ḳoria tar hayati ekkan gonṭa baṛaito farbo ni?
6.28: “Finnor ḳafoṛor lagi sinta ḳoro ḳene? Tumra ou zongli fulor bae saia deḳo, ita ḳoto beshi shundor! Itae to nizor shundoror lagi kunta-u ḳore na, kunu rong-o silai kore na, bain-o ḳore na, emne-u oy.
6.29: Te ami koiram, Bashsha Sulaiman oto zak-zomoḳor maze roile-o tan lebas to ota egu zongli fulor laḳan-o shundor asil na.
6.30: Deḳrae ni, zongolor maze ou zeta shundor ful oḳon ase, ḳail oile-u manshe ita daru banaia aguindi zalaibo. Allae zudi ou zongolre ola shundor ḳori hazaisoin, te O ḳomzur imandar oḳol, tumrare-o tain shundor ḳori hazaita nae ni?
6.31: Erdae kita ḳaitae ar kita finditae, ita loia sinta ḳorio na.
6.32: I duniar manshe ḳali ota loia-u danda ḳore. Tumrar behesti baf Allae to zanoin-u, ita hoḳolta tumrar zorur ase.
6.33: Erlagi tumra foyla-u Allar morzi zugaia solo, tan bashshair dandat ro. Teu ita hokkolta-o tumra faibae.
6.34: Ḳailkur sinta ḳorio na, ḳailkur befar ḳailkur ufre saṛi deo. Dinor azab dinor lagi zotesṭo.

7.1: “Tumra manshor dush tukanit roio na, teu tumrar dush-o tukail oito nae.
7.2: Tumra zela manshor dush tukao, Allae-o oula tumrar dush tukaiba. Tumra zela falladi mafibae, tumrar lagi-o ola mafa oibo.
7.3: “Tumar bair souḳor bitre guṛa ase ikan deḳrae, oile nizor souko gasor seli ase ikan deḳrae na ḳene?
7.4: Tumar sokut seli hamaise ikan zebla deḳrae na, te tumar baire kila ḳoibae, bai, tumar sokut guṛa hamaise, ao, bar ḳoria dei?
7.5: Haere bonḍo, foyla nizor souk taki seli bar ḳoro, bade tumar bair souk taki guṛa bar ḳorat lagle bala ḳori deḳtae farbae.
7.6: “Huno, kuttar samne fak-fobitro kunu siz dio na. Shuoror samne moni-mukta siṭaio na. Arnae ou sizre tarar faodi uṛia, ulṭa aia tumrare-o hamla ḳorta faroin. Dua-munazator befare oada
7.7: “Ami tumrare ḳoiram, sao, tumrare deoa oibo. Tallash ḳoro, teu faibae. Duaro ṭuka deo, teu duar kula oibo.
7.8: Zara sae, tara-u to fae. Ze tallash ḳore he fae. Ze duaro ṭukae, tar lagi duar kula oy.
7.9: Tumrar maze ila kunu ma-baf ase ni, zar fute ruṭi saile maṭi dibo?
7.11: Tumra ḳaraf oia-o zudi tumrar huruttainre bala bala siz ditae zano, te zara behesti baf Alla Pakor gese saibo, tain to nisoy tarare bala bala siz dan ḳorba, ita to shababik.
7.12: Huno, tumra manshor ges taki zelaḳan bebohar faitae sao, tumra-o hoḳlor loge ou laḳan bebohar ḳoro. Ota-u oilo Tourat Kitab ar nobi oḳlor sohifar mul talim. Kun fote soltae
7.13: “Huno, tumra sifa duaredi hamaio, ḳaron ze fote binashor bae ṭane, i fot muṭa, fotor duar-o boṛo, bout manush ou duaredi hamain.
7.14: Oile ze fote gele zindegi mile, i fotor duar sifa, fot-o huru-muru. Kub ḳom manshe-u i duaror kuz fain.
7.15: “Bonḍo nobi oḳol taki hushiar roio. Tara tumrar gese meṛar surote ae, oile bitre bitre tara raikkosh bagor laḳan.
7.16: Tarar zindegi dekia-u sintae farbae. Zano to, gosa-ḳaṭar maze kunu angur dore ni ba bon-jonglar maze kunu ḍumur fol dore ni?
7.17: Ṭik ou laḳan, bala gase to bala fol-u dore ar mondo gase mondo fol-u dore.
7.18: Bala gase to mondo fol dore na, ar mondo gase bala fol dore na.
7.19: Ze gase bala fol dore na, igure ḳaṭia daru zalail oy.
7.20: Ola-u bonḍo nobi oḳlor zindegir fol deḳle-u itare sinbae. Behesti bashshait ḳe hamaibo?
7.21: “Mono rakio, amare ‘Huzur, huzur!’ ḳoile-u zen behesti bashshait hamaizibae, ikan ṭik nae. Borong ze zone amar behesti baf Alla Pakor morzi zugaia sole, ḳali he-u hamaito farbo.
7.22: Hou din aile boute ḳoiba, ‘Munib, munib, amra tumar name gaibi kobor ḳoisi na ni? Tumar name zin-but saṛaisi na ni? Tumar name bout keramoti deḳaisi na ni?’
7.23: Oile ami tarare zuaf dimu, ‘Dur, Iblisor dol! Ami to tumrare sini-u na, amar ges taki bago.’ Imanor dui nomuna
7.24: “Ze manshe amar ou talim hunia amol ḳore, he aḳoldar manshor laḳan mozbut kuṭir ufre tar gor banae.
7.25: Bade meg-tufan ar zuar aia ou gorre ṭela dile-o falaito fare na, ḳaron ikan to mozbut kuṭir ufre banail oise.
7.26: Oile ze amar talim hunia-o amol ḳore na, he be-aḳolor laḳan norom maṭir ufre gor banae.
7.27: Bade zebla meg-tufan ar zuar aia ou gorre ṭela dey, ou shomoy ikan foṛia sefṭa oizae.”
7.28: Isar ita talim hunia manush taijjub bonigela.
7.29: Ḳaron tain to tarar moulana oḳlor laḳan talim na dia, ḳemotaban manshor laḳan talim dita.

8.1: Hozrot Isa faṛ taki lamia aile bout manush tan ḳore ḳore aila.
8.2: Ou shomoy eḳ fosa-kusṭo bemarie tan ḳandat aia faot foṛia ḳoilo, “Huzur, afnar morzi oile amare ou nafak bemar taki bala ḳorta faroin.”
8.3: Teu tain at baṛaia tare soia ḳoila, “Oy ami sairam, tumi fak-saf o.” Ḳoar loge loge-u tar bemar shifa oigelo.
8.4: Isae tare ḳoila, “Huno, ita ḳeurore hunaio na, ḳali imam sabor gese gia deḳao. Musa nobir shoriot mafik fak-saf oar lagi zela kurbani kora zorur, ou kurbani dile-u shomaze zaniliba tumi bala oigeso.” Ruman subedaror gulamre bala ḳora
8.5: Erbade Isa gia Kofornaum ṭauno hamaila. Hino Ruman sifair eḳ subedare tan gese aia minot-ḳajji lagaila,
8.6: “Huzur, amar gulamor obosh bemar oia bisnat foṛi roise, he kub ḳoshṭo ḳorer.”
8.7: Isae enre ḳoila, “Aichcha, ami zaimune, gia tare bala ḳormu.”
8.8: Teu subedare ḳoila, “Huzur, afnar moto zone amar baṛit toshrif nita, ami to er laḳ nae. Afne ḳali mukkandi koile-u he bala oizibo.
8.9: Afne to buzra, ami-o amar kamanḍaror hukume soli, oula amar sifai oḳol-o amar hukume soloin. Ami era eḳzonre ao ḳoile ae, zao ḳoile zae. Amar gulamre zudi koi, oḳan ḳoro, he ikan ḳore, te afne-o ola mukdi hukum dile-u he bala oizibo.”
8.10: Ikan hunia Isa ekkere taijjub oigela, tan ḳore oia zoto manush aoat asil, erare ḳoila, “Ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, i subedar to bidormi Ruman manush, oile amar Boni Israilor maze-o oto boṛo mozbut imandar ami ar deḳsi na.
8.11: Huno, fub ar foismor desh taki bout zon aiba, tara Hozrot Ibrahim, Isʼhak ar Iakub nobir loge behesti bashshait ḳanit boiba.
8.12: Oile behesti bashshait zara taḳar ḳota, tarare bare andair gato falai deoa oibo. Hino tara ḳanda-ḳaṭi korba ar zala-zontronae dat kiṛimiṛi kaiba.”
8.13: Bade Isae ou subedarre ḳoila, “Tumi zaogi. Tumi zela ekin ḳorso, ola-u ouk.” Hasau, loge loge-u hou gulam bala oigelo. Hozrot Fitoror hoṛir shifa
8.14: Erbade Hozrot Isa Hozrot Fitoror baṛit gela, gia deḳla, Fitoror hoṛir kub taf uṭse, tain bisnat foṛono.
8.15: Tane dekia Isae tan ato soila, ar loge loge taf saṛi dilo. Beṭie uṭia Isar memandarit lagla.
8.16: Ou din hainja bala manshe zinor asor-ala bout zonre Isar gese loia aila. Isae tan mukor ḳotae-u erar zin saṛaila, ar hokkol bemarire bala ḳorla.
8.17: Ita goṭlo, zate Ishaya nobir mazdi bout age zeta batail oisil, ota oḳon fura oy. Hono batail oisil, Amrar hoḳol ḳomzuri tan ḳando nila, amrar bemar-azar horaila. Ḳaṭi ummot oar tagid
8.18: Isar sairo galabae biṛ lagi gese dekia, tan shagrid oḳolre hukum dila aoror hofaro zaitagi.
8.19: Ou shomoy eḳzon moulana aia Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, afne zeno zaiba, ami-o hono zaimu.”
8.20: Isae enre ḳoila, “Hunoukka, hialor gat ase, fakir-o bada ase, oile ami bin-Adomor mata toar ṭai nai.”
8.21: Aroḳzon shagride aia ḳoila, “Huzur, amare baṛit zaite deukka, ami foyla gia amar babar dafon-ḳafon ḳoria ai.”
8.22: Tain ḳoila, “Mora oḳole-u tarar morare maṭi deuk, tumi amar loge solo.” Aoror tufan bond ḳora
8.23: Isa aoror hofaro zaita ḳori, tan shagrid oḳolre loia eḳ nao-o uṭla.
8.24: Isa naor maze gumaira, ou shomoy aḳta-u aoror maze boṛo eḳ tufan ailo, tufane naoḳan buṛizibar dosha oigelo.
8.25: I dosha dekia shagrid oḳole Isare hozag kori koila, “Huzur, amrare basaukka, amranu mori zairam.”
8.26: Isae zuaf dila, “O ḳomzur imandar oḳol, tumra ḍorairae ḳene?” Oḳan ḳoia tain uṭia tufan ar aorre domoḳ dila, teu hokkolta tir oigelo.
8.27: I keramoti dekia tara taijjub oia ḳoila, “Ein ashole ḳe? Tufan ar aore-o deki tan hukum mane!” Bute dora duizon manush
8.28: Erbade Isa aor faṛi dia Zerasini oḳlor desho aila. Ou shomoy bute dora duizon manush ḳobrostan taki bar oia tan gese ailo. Tara ola zonun fagol asla zen, tarare ḍoraia ḳeu ou fotedi zaito farto na.
8.29: Tara sillaia Isare ḳoilo, “O Allar ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla, amrar loge afnar kita dorḳar? Shomoy oar age-u afne amrare satanit aichchoin ni?”
8.30: Ou shomoy tarar ges taki tuṛa duroi boṛo eḳ shuoror fale ḳaoat asla.
8.31: But oḳole Isare minot ḳori koilo, “Afne amrare ḳedaite saile, ou shuoror falor maze faṭai deukka.”
8.32: Isae tarare izazot dia harle tara gia ou shuoror falor maze hamaigelo. Ar shuoror fale aoror ḳaṛa soredi kub zure douṛaia gia fanir maze buṛia morla.
8.33: Ita dekia shuoror raḳal oḳole douṛaia gia gaur hoḳol manshore ḳobor zanaila, erloge ou bute dora manshor ḳota-o ḳoila.
8.34: I goṭona hunia gaur hoḳol manush Isar loge deḳa ḳorat aila. Tan loge deḳa ḳoria tara minot ḳori koila, “Meherbani kori amrar desh taki zaukkagi.”

9.1: Bade Hozrot Isa nao-o ḳori aor faṛi dia nizor ṭauno aila.
9.2: Aia harle ḳoyzon manshe eḳzon obosh bemarire folodi boia loia tan gese ailo. Tarar imanor bol dekia Isae ou bemarire ḳoila, “Mono bol raḳo re fut, tumar guna maf ḳora oise.”
9.3: Ikan hunia ḳoyzon moulanae mone mone ḳoila, “I beṭae to shiriki korer.”
9.4: Isae tarar dilor bab buzia ḳoila, “Afnara ḳene ila ku-sinta ḳorra?
9.5: Amar lagi kunḳan ḳoa shuza, tumar guna maf ḳori dilailam, na uṭo, tumar bisna loia baṛit zaogi?
9.6: Te oḳon afnara forman deḳoukka, i duniat guna mafir ḳemota ami bin-Adomor ase.” Oḳan ḳoia-u tain bemari beṭare ḳoila, “Oba uṭo, tumar ḳeta-balish loia baṛit zaogi.”
9.7: Ḳoite-u hi bemari beṭa uṭia tar baṛit gelogi.
9.8: Ita dekia manush taijjub oigela, Allae manshore oto ḳemota disoin ḳori tara Allar tarif ḳorla. Hozrot Motire torikar daot
9.9: Isae fotedi aṭia zaira, ou shomoy deḳla, Moti namor eḳzon manush ḳazna tular ofiso boiroisoin. Dekia tanre ḳoila, “Ao, amar ummot o.” Teu Moti uṭia Isar ḳore ḳore gela.
9.10: Erbade Isae tan shagrid oḳolre loia Motir baṛit gia ḳaoat boila. Tan loge bout ḳazna tulra ar naforman oḳol-o ḳanit asla.
9.11: Ita dekia Forishi mozobor manshe Isar shagrid oḳolre ḳoila, “Tumrar murshide gushkur ḳazna tulra ar ḳobis oḳlor loge ḳaoa-daoa ḳoroin ḳene?”
9.12: Ikan hunia Isae ḳoila, “Bala manshor lagi kobiraz lage na, oile bemarir lagi to lage.
9.13: Allar kalamo batail oise, ‘Ami kunu foshu kurbani nae, ḳali doya deḳtam sai.’ Te ou ayator mani kita, oḳan tallash ḳoroukka. Mono raḳba, ami kunu forezgarre daot deoat aisi na, ḳali gunagar oḳolre-u daot ditam aisi.” Furan talim taki Hozrot Isar talim bala
9.14: Erbade Ehia nobir ummot oḳole aia Isare zikaila, “Huzur, amra ar Forishi mozobor manshe hamesha ruza raki, oile afnar ummot oḳole ruza raḳoin na ḳene?”
9.15: Tain zuaf dila, “Nosha loge taḳle logor boiratire kunu duk deoa zae ni? Deḳbane, ila shomoy aibo, zebla noshare tarar ges taki horail oizibo, hou shomoy tara ruza raḳba.
9.16: “Ana-doa noya ḳafoṛor ṭukradi keu furan kurtat tali dey na. Ila ḳorle doia harle furan ḳafoṛ taki noya tali kus oia siṛizae, ar siṛaḳan aro boṛo oy.
9.17: Furan samṛar tolit ḳeu noya anguror rosh bore na. Borle ou taza roshor fafe toli faṭia rosh ar toli duiota borbad oy. Erlagi manshe taza rosh noya tolit toin. Teu duiota base.” Eḳ mora fuṛi ar bemari beṭi
9.18: Hozrot Isae zebla ota befare talim dira, ou shomoy eḳ neta aia tan fao-o foṛia ḳoila, “Huzur, amar fuṛigu ou matro mara gese. Te afne aia meherbani kori taire atai dile-u fuṛigu zinda oizibo.”
9.19: Teu Isae tan shagrid oḳolre loia en loge roana dila.
9.20: Zaoar fote eḳ beṭie ḳoredi aia Isar saddoror kunat soilo. Baro bosor dori i beṭir beṭiara bemaror lou zaito.
9.21: Beṭir ekin asil, tai zudi kali tan saddoror kunat soilito fare, te bemar bala oizibo.
9.22: Isae ṭer faia ḳoredi saia ou beṭire ḳoila, “Ḍoraio na go mai, tumar imanor bole-u tumi bala oilae.” Oḳan ḳoar loge loge beṭi bala oigelo.
9.23: Erbade Isa hou netar baṛit gela. Gia deḳla, asta baṛir manshe hoi-hulla ḳorra, ar tarar shomazor reoaz mafik mora baṛit bashi-bazona bazaira.
9.24: Tain ḳoila, “Tumra hoḳol gor taki bare zao. Fuṛigu morse na, tai to gumar.” Ikan hunia manshe tanre loia asha-ashi lagaila.
9.25: Manshore bar ḳoria harle, tain gia goror bitre hamaia fuṛir ato dorla, dorte-u tai uṭia boigelo.
9.26: Ar i goṭonar ḳota ou elaḳar hoḳolbae roṭi gelo. Anda ar bubare bala ḳora
9.27: Isa ou netar baṛi taki bidae oia harle duizon anda beṭa tan ḳore ḳore gelo. Tara zure zure ḳoilo, “O Daudor aolad, amrare rohom ḳoroukka.”
9.28: Bade tain aia goro hamaile, hou duio anda-o tan gese ailo. Tain zikaila, “Tumra ekin ḳorrae ni, ami tumrare bala ḳortam farmu?” Tara ḳoilo, “Ji oy huzur, afne-u farba.”
9.29: Teu tain erar souk atai dia ḳoila, “Tumra zela ekin ḳorso, ola-u ouk.”
9.30: Oḳan ḳoite-u tarar souk bala oigelo. Bade Isae tarare kub doṛaia ḳoila, “Huno, ita ḳeurore hunaio na.”
9.31: Oile tara bar oia gia ash-fash hoḳol zagat tan i kobor roṭai dilo.
9.32: Hou duio anda zebla bala oia zairagi, ou shomoy manshe bute dora eḳ buba beṭare Isar gese loia ailo.
9.33: Tain i beṭar but saṛanir bade tar zoban kuligelo, he mat-ḳota matilo. Ita dekia hoḳole taijjub oia ḳoila, “Asta Israil deshor maze ila ḳam to kunudin deḳsi na.”
9.34: Oile Forishi oḳole ḳoila, “Igie to butor bashshar shaijjoe but saṛae.” Zomino foshol bout, ḳamla ḳom
9.35: Hozrot Isae gaue gaue ar ṭaune ṭaune gia tarar mosido hamaia talim dila. Tain behesti bashshair kush-ḳobri toblig korla, ar hoḳol nomunar bemarire bala ḳorla.
9.36: Ou shomoy manshor biṛ dekia tan kub duk laglo, ita manush to a-raḳali meṛar laḳan befana lagi gurira.
9.37: Teu Isae shagrid oḳolre ḳoila, “Zomino to foshol bout ase, oile ḳamla kub ḳom.
9.38: Erlagi zominor malikor gese dua ḳoro, tan foshol tular lagi tain ḳamla faṭaiba.”

10.1: Bade Isae tan barozon sahabire ḍaḳaia anla, ania zin-but saṛani, ar hoḳol zator bemarire bala ḳorar ḳemota dila.
10.2: Ou barozon sahabi oila, Saimon urfe Fitor ar tan bai Andrias, Zibudiar fuain Iakub ar Hannan, Filif ar Bortolmoy,
10.3: Tumas ar ḳazna tulra Moti, Alfir fua Iakub ar Toddey,
10.4: muktizudda Saimon ar Ihuda Iskariat. Ou Ihudae bade beimani koria Isare dushmonor ato dorai disil.
10.5: Ou barozon sahabire Isae hukum dila, ḳoila, “Tumitain tobligo zao, oile kunu bidormir gese ba Shomoria zatir kunu gaut zaio na,
10.6: ḳali Boni Israilor arail meṛa oḳlor gese zao.
10.7: Zaoar fote toblig kori kori zaio, ḳoio, Behesti bashshai daro aichche.
10.8: Ar tumra bemari oḳolre bala ḳorio, morare zinda ḳorio, fosa-kusṭo bemarire bala ḳorio, ar zin-but saṛaio. Tumra zela bina ṭeḳae faiso, oula bina ṭeḳae-u dio.
10.9: Zaoar shomoy loge ḳori ṭeḳa-foyshar toli, shuna-rufa ba eḳṭa shiki-o nio na.
10.10: Tumra fotor lagi laṭi, gaiṭ-buski, zuta, ba duiṭa kurta-o loge nio na. Ze zone ḳam ḳore, he ḳaoa-finda faoar zuka.
10.11: Tumra ze gaut hamaibae, ou gaur eḳzon zoiggo manshore tukaia bar ḳorio, i gau saṛia zaoar ag forzonto en baṛit-u roio.
10.12: Baṛir bitre hamanir bala tarare salam dio.
10.13: I baṛi zudi salam faoar zuka oy, te tumrar deoa ou shanti tara faiba, ar zuka na oile tumrar shanti tumrar gese-u firia aibo.
10.14: I zagar ḳeu zudi tumrare kobul na ḳore, tumrar ḳota na hune, te i baṛi ba gau taki baronir bala tumrar faor duil zaṛia falaia aio.
10.15: Ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, Hashoror din ou gaur dosha taki, hou lannoti Sadum ar Amura ṭaunor dosha bout bala oibo. Sahabi oḳolre agam hushiari
10.16: “Huno, raikkosh bagor samne meṛar laḳan ami tumrare faṭairam. Erlagi tumra hafor laḳan salaḳ-sotur ar faro fakir laḳan shorol o.
10.17: Hushiar roio, manshe tumrare doria adaloto shomzaiba, ar tarar mosido nia tumrare singladi marba.
10.18: Amar nam loar lagi tumrare raza-bashshar samne neoa oibo. Tumra erar samne ar bidormi oḳlor gese amar befare shakki dibae.
10.19: Manshe zebla tumrare dorai dibo, ou shomoy kita mattae ba kita ḳoitae, ita loia kunu sinta ḳorio na. Hou shomoy tumrare ita hikai deoa oibo.
10.20: Ashole tumrar mukdi zen tumra nize matbae, ikan nae, tumrar batuni bafor ze ruhu tumrar bitre ase, hou ruhe-u itar zuaf diba.
10.21: “Baie baire ar bafe fuare kun ḳoranir lagi dorai dibo. Fua-fuṛie-o tarar ma-bafor bifokke gia tarare kun ḳoraibo.
10.22: Amar ḳarone hoḳol manshe tumrare ginnaibo, oile hesh forzonto ze ṭikia roibo, he-u rehai faibo.
10.23: Kunu gaur manshe tumrare zulum ḳorle, i gau saṛia oinno gaut zaiogi. Huno, ami hasa ḳota ḳoiram, Israil deshor hokkol ṭaun ar gaut tumrar toblig shesh oar age-u bin-Adom hirbar aiba.
10.24: “Mono rakio, ustad taki shagrid boṛo nae, ar munib taki tar gulam boṛo nae.
10.25: Te shagrid tar ustador shoman, ar gulam tar munibor shoman oa-u zotesṭo. Hunrae ni, goror munibre zebla butor bashsha Bel-Sobul ḳoira, te goror baki hoḳolre tara aro ḳotota ḳoiba!
10.26: “Oile tumra tarare ḍoraio na, ḳaron ila gufon kunta-u nai zeta zair oito nae. Ila lukail-o kunta nai zeta ḳeu hunto nae ba zanto nae.
10.27: Ami andarir maze zeta tumrare ḳoisi, tumra ita foror maze ḳoio. Zeta ḳane ḳane huncho, ita saṭor ufre gia zure zure elan ḳorio.
10.28: Zara manshor ḳayare binash ḳorto fare, oile ruhre kunta ḳorto fare na, tarare ḍoraio na. Zein ḳaya ar ruhu duiotare duzoḳo zalaita faroin, ḳali tanre-u ḍoraio.
10.29: Huno, duiṭa soṛa faki kali dui ṭeḳae bike na ni? Oile tumrar batuni baf Allar hukum na oile ota egu soṛa faki-o maṭit foṛe na.
10.30: Zano to, tumrar matar sul gesain-o gona ase.
10.31: Erdae tumra ḍoraio na. Tumrar dam to bout soṛa taki-o beshi.
10.32: “Shomazor samne ze zone amare kobul ḳore, ami-o amar behesti baf Alla Pakor samne tare kobul ḳormu.
10.33: Oile ze manshe shomazor samne amare oshikar ḳorbo, ami-o tare amar behesti baf Allar samne oshikar ḳormu.
10.34: “Tumra mono ḳorrae ni, ami duniat shanti ditam aisi? Na, muṭe-u nae, ami to duniat eḳ motobed laganit aisi.
10.35: Ami bafe-fuae, mae-fuṛie, ar hoṛie-boue bibad laganit aisi.
10.36: Manshor nizor foribaror zone-u tar loge dushmoni korbo.
10.37: “Ze manshe ama taki tar ma-bafre beshi maya ḳore, he amar ummot oito farto nae. Ar ze zone ama taki tar fuare ba tar fuṛire beshi maya ḳore, he-o amar ummotor zuka nae.
10.38: Ze zone nizor duk-koshṭor solib boia loia amar ḳore na ae, he-o amar zuka nae.
10.39: Ze zone tar nizor zan basaito sae, he tar asol zindegi kuaibo. Oile ze zone amar lagi tar zan kurbani dilae, he asol zindegi faibo.
10.40: “Ze zone tumrare kobul ḳore, he amare-u kobul ḳore, ar ze amare kobul ḳore, he ashole hou Allare-u kobul ḳore, zein amare faṭaisoin.
10.41: Ḳeu zudi kunu nobire nobi koia kobul ḳore, te ou nobie ze furuskar faiba, he-o ou furuskar faibo. Kunu Allaraia manshore ḳeu zudi Allaraia ḳoia kobul ḳore, te ou Allaraia manshe ze furuskar faiba, he-o ou furuskar faibo.
10.42: Ar amar ummot zania ḳeu zudi tumrar mazor eḳ nogoinno zonre-o ek gelas fani kaoae, te he kunumonte-u er furuskar taki bad foṛto nae.”

11.1: Hozrot Isae tan barozon sahabire ou talim dia harle, tain gaue gaue gia toblig ar talim deoar lagi roana oigela.
11.2: Ehia nobie zelo taki zebla al-Mosir ḳamor ḳota hunla, ou shomoy tan ḳoyzon shagridre faṭaila ḳobor zanar lagi. Era gia Isare zikaila,
11.3: “Huzure ḳoisoin, zein aibar ḳota asil, afne-u hein ni? Na amra ar ḳeuror lagi bar saitam?”
11.4: Isae ḳoila, “Huno, ono aia tumrar nizor souke zeta deḳso ar huncho, ota gia Ehiare ḳo.
11.5: Tanre ḳoio, anda manshe souke deḳra, lengṛae-o aṭira, fosa-kusṭo bemari bala oira, ḳalua oḳole hunra, mora manush zita oira, ar gorib oḳlor gese Allai kush-ḳobri toblig kora or.
11.6: Huno, he-u nek-kofali, zar dilo amar befare kunu bada ae na.” Ehia nobi ashole ḳe
11.7: Ehia nobir shagrid oḳol zairagi, ou shomoy Ehiar befare Isae manshore ḳoila, “Kita ba, morubumit kita deḳat geslae? Batash aile zeta nol-ḳagṛae loṛe, ota deḳat geslae ni?
11.8: Na, kita deḳat geslae? Shundor ḳafoṛ finno kunu manshore ni? Ashole, zera dami dami kafoṛ findoin, tara to razbaṛit taḳoin.
11.9: Te tumra kita deḳat geslae? Kunu nobire deḳat ni? Huno, ami koiram, Ehia to ḳali nobi nae, nobi taki-o boṛo.
11.10: Ein to hou zon, zen befare Asmani Kitabo leḳa ase, Huno, tumar age faṭaiar ami, amar fegambor, ein gia ṭik-ṭak korba tumar solar fot.
11.11: Te ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, Ehia taki boṛo asta duniat-u kunu adom asla na. Oile behesti bashshair maze hoḳol taki huru zon-o, Ehia taki mohan.
11.12: Ehia nobir amol taki oḳon forzonto behesti bashshai kub mozbut oia aguar, ar zera imane mozbut, tara dile-zane aia er bitre hamaira.
11.13: Huno, Ehia nobir amol forzonto Hozrot Musar Tourat Kitab ar shob nobir sohifar maze, Allar bashshai aoar ḳota zanail oise.
11.14: Oḳon zudi afnara amar mat ekin ḳoroin, te hunoukka, ze Ilias nobie hirbar aibar ḳota asil, ou Ehia-u oila hou Ilias.
11.16: “I zomanar manshore ami kitar loge tulona ḳortam? Tara to omon huruttar laḳan, zetae bazaro boia eḳe-oinnore ḍakia ḳoin,
11.17: ‘Hoi, amra tumrar lagi bashi bazailam, tumra to naslae na, ahazarir gan gailam, tumra to ḳanlae na.’
11.18: Ṭik olaḳan, Ehia nobie aia shomazor loge ḳaoa-daoa na ḳorae, manshe ḳoira tane bute dorse.
11.19: Oile ami bin-Adom aia ḳaoa-daoa ḳorae tumra ḳoirae, ‘Deḳoukka, i beṭa to feṭua, modkur, he gushkur ḳazna tulra ar naforman oḳlor loge dusti kore.’ Te aḳol ḳaṭaia zera sole, tarar sal-cholon taki-u forman mile, aḳol-u oilo ḳaṭi-nikut siz.” Lannoti gau ar ṭaun
11.20: Hozrot Isae zeta gauainto ar ṭauno beshir bag keramoti deḳaisla, itar manshe touba ḳorsoin na. Erlagi tain i gau ar ṭaunor ufre bezar oia ḳoila,
11.21: “Haere Bayt-Soyda ar Kurasin gau, tumra to lannoti. Tumrar maze zeta kudroti kam deḳail oise, ita zudi Shur ar Sidon elaḳat deḳail oito, te bout age-u tara ḳator oia touba ḳorlo one.
11.22: Oile ami tumrare ḳoiram, kiamotor din Shur ar Sidon elaḳar dosha taki-o, tumrar dosha bout ḳoṭin oibo.
11.23: O Kofornaum ṭaun, huno, tumi bule usa oia asmano gia lagtae? Na, fartae nae! Tumare fatalo lamani oibo. Tumar maze zeta kudroti muzeza deḳail oise, ita zudi Sadum ṭauno deḳail oito, te i ṭaun oḳono ṭikia roilo one.
11.24: Oile ami tumrare ḳoiram, Hashoror din Sadum ṭaunor halot-o tumrar taki bout bala oibo.” Hozrot Isar dua ar aramor daot
11.25: Erbade Isae ḳoila, “O amar gaibi baf Alla, tumi to asman-zominor malik. Ami tumar shukria zanairam, ḳaron tumi aḳoldar ar buddiman oḳlor gese ita zair na ḳoria, bebuz-huruttar laḳan manshor gese zair ḳorso.
11.26: Baba, ashole ita hoḳolta-u tumar morzi.
11.27: “Amar gaibi babae hoḳolta-u amar ato shofi disoin. Baf saṛa dusra ḳeu ou futre sine na, ar fut saṛa dusra ḳeu ou bafre sine na. Fute bafre zar gese zair ḳorar kial oy, ḳali he-u bafor forisoy fae.
11.28: “Bar-buza boite boite tumra zera heran oigeso, tumra hoḳol amar gese ao, ami tumrare aram dimu.
11.29: -30 Amar zual tumrar ḳando tulo ar amar ges taki talim lo, teu tumrar aram oibo. Amar zual boia neoa shuza, amar deoa bar kub fatla. Amar mizaz kub norom ar ṭanḍa.”

12.1: Eḳ Zummabare Hozrot Isa ḳetor ailedi aṭia zaoat asla. Tan shagrid oḳlor feṭo buk lagae, tara danor soṛa siṛi siṛi kaoat lagla.
12.2: Ita dekia Forishi mozobor manshe Isare ḳoila, “Amrar shoriote ḳoy, Zummabare kunu ḳam ḳora zaiz nae, te afnar shagrid oḳole danor soṛa siṛira ḳene?”
12.3: Isae zuaf dila, “Daud nobi ar tan logor manshe eḳbar feṭor buke zeta ḳorsla, ita afnara foṛsoin na ni?
12.4: Tain Allar Kaba goro hamaia hou fobitro ruṭi kaisla, i ruṭi kaoa to tain ar tan logor manshor lagi nazaiz, ita ḳali imam sabor lagi zaiz asil.
12.5: Ar afnara Tourat Shorifo foṛsoin na ni, Baytul-Mukaddosor imam oḳole Zummabare zummar dinor niom bangle-o tarar kunu guna oy na.
12.6: Oile ami afnarare ḳoiram, Baytul-Mukaddos taki-o dami eḳ manush ono asoin.
12.7: Allar kalamor ou ayator bed zudi afnara buzta, ze ayato ase, ‘Ami doya deḳtam sai, foshu-kurbani nae.’ Te afnara ni-oforadire oforadi banaila na one.
12.8: Hunoukka, Zummabaror tamam eḳtiar ami bin-Adomor ato.” Hukna at-ala bemarir shifa
12.9: Bade Hozrot Isa intone gia ou Forishi oḳlor mosido hamaila.
12.10: Hono ola eḳ beṭa asil, tar eḳ at bemare hukai gese. Isar kunu kut bar ḳoria tanre dushi bananir niote, ou mosidor manshe tanre zikailo, “Sab, Musar shoriot mafik Zummabare ḳeuror bemar shifa ḳora zaiz ni?”
12.11: Isae zuaf dila, “Doroukka, afnara eḳzonor egu meṛa zudi Zummabare gator maze foṛizae, te ou din i meṛare gato taki tulta nae ni?
12.12: Ar manshor dam to meṛa taki bout beshi. Erlagi buza zae, Zummabare-o nek kam ḳora zaiz ase.”
12.13: Bade tain ou hukna at-ala beṭare ḳoila, “Tumar atḳan baṛao.” He tar at baṛaite-u hukna at oinno ator laḳan furafur bala oigelo.
12.14: Bade hou Forishi oḳole bare gia foramish ḳorla, Isare kila zane mara zae. Hozrot Isa-u Allar ḳas mayar zon
12.15: Tarar ou foramishor ḳobor Isae zanilila, erlagi tain hintone hori gela. Ou shomoy bout manush tan ḳore ḳore aila. Erar maze zoto bemari asla, tain era hoḳolre bala ḳorla.
12.16: Tain erare doṛaia ḳoila, “Ḳobordar, tumra amar forisoy zair ḳorio na.”
12.17: Ita oisil zate agor amolor nobi Ishayar mazdi zeta batail oisil, ota folizae. Tain ḳoisla,
12.18: Huno, ami amar ou gulamre fosond ḳorsi. Ein-u amar mayar zon, tan ufre ami kub kushi. En ufre ami amar ruhu dimu, hoḳol zatir gese tain amar hok bisaror ḳota zanaiba.
12.19: Tain kunu torka-torki ba silla-silli korta nae, fote-gaṭe kunu manshe tan aoaz hunto nae.
12.20: Hok bisar ḳaim oar ag forzonto, tain sesa nol-ḳagṛa bangita nae, ar miṭ miṭ ḳori zolra lemor fita-o limaita nae.
12.21: Duniar hoḳol zatie tan ufre-u borosha ḳorba. Hozrot Isa ar zinor bashsha
12.22: Bade manshe zinor asor-ala eḳ beṭare Isar gese loia ailo. I beṭa asil anda ar buba. Tain ou beṭare bala ḳorla. He bala oia mat-ḳota matilo ar souke-o deḳlo.
12.23: Ita dekia hoḳol manush taijjub oia ḳoila, “Daud nobir ḳandano zein zonom oar ḳota, ein-u hein ni?”
12.24: Ikan hunia Forishi oḳole ḳoila, “Igie to zinor bashsha Bel-Sobulor bole zinnat saṛae.”
12.25: Tarar monor sinta buzia Isae ḳoila, “Kunu deshor bitre doladoli lagigele, i desh to binash oizae. Ou laḳan kunu foribaror maze ba kunu ṭauno zebla doladoli lagizae, ita-o ar ṭike na.
12.26: Oula Shoytane zudi Shoytanre ḳedai dey, te to tar nizor maze-u doladoli lagigelo. Tar razotto ar kila ṭikbo?
12.27: Ami zudi Bel-Sobulor bole zinnat saṛai, te tumrar manshe ḳar bole saṛae? Tumrar mator bisar tumrar manshe-u ḳorba.
12.28: Oile ami zudi Allar ruhur bole zinnat saṛai, te to Allar bashshai tumrar daro aichche.
12.29: “Kunu bolala manshor baṛit luṭ-toraz ḳorat aia, foyla bolala zonre na bandile, ḳemne luṭ-toraz ḳorbo? Oile tare bandia harle luṭ-faṭ ḳorto farbo.
12.30: “Ḳeu zudi amar fokke na taḳe, he to amar bifokke. Ze zone amar loge tukae na, he to sitrae.
12.31: Ami tumrare ḳoiram, manshor tamam nomunar guna ar kufurir mafi ase, oile Pak Ruhur befare kufuri korle, i kufurir kunu mafi milto nae.
12.32: Ami bin-Adomor birudde ḳeu kunta matile-o he mafi faibo, oile Pak Ruhur birudde matile tar kunu mafi nai, i zindegit-o nai, aḳero-o nai. Fol dekia gas sina zae
12.33: “Mono raḳba, gas bala oile tar fol-o bala oy, ar gas bura oile tar fol-o bura oy. Fol dia-u gas sina zae.
12.34: O hafor baichchain, tumra nize-u to ḳaraf, te tumrar muk tone bala buli kemne bar oibo? Manshor dil zetadi bora, muk taki to ota-u baroy.
12.35: Bala manshor dilor bitoror balai tone bala buli baroy, ar bad manshor dilor burai tone bad buli baroy.
12.36: Oile ami tumrare ḳoiram, ze manshe aze-baze ber-beri kore, Hashoror moydano tar forteḳ mator hishab dite oibo.
12.37: Tumar zobane-u tumare dushi banaibo, ar ou zobane-u tumare nirdushi-o banaibo.”
12.38: Bade ḳoyzon moulana ar Forishie Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, amra afnar ekkan keramoti deḳtam sai.”
12.39: Isae zuaf dila, “I zomanar naforman ar beiman oḳole ḳali keramoti deḳta sain, oile Iunus nobir keramoti saṛa dusra kunu keramoti tarare deḳail oito nae.
12.40: Iunus nobi zela masor feṭo tin din, tin rait asla, ami bin-Adom-o oula tin din, tin rait maṭir tole roimu.
12.41: Kiamotor din hou Ninob ṭaunor murda oḳol uṭia hari, i zomanar manshor dush zair ḳorba. Ḳaron Iunus nobir toblig hunia tara touba ḳorsila. Oile oḳon to Iunus taki-o aro mohan eḳzon ino asoin, ta-o manshe touba ḳorer na.
12.42: Ruz kiamotor din douknor deshor rani uṭia aia ou zomanar manshor dush zair ḳorba. Ḳaron Bashsha Sulaimanor aḳolor ḳota hunar kiale tain duniar hesh mata taki aisla. Oile oḳon to Sulaiman taki-o aro mohan eḳzon ono asoin.
12.43: “Huno, kunu bute zebla manshor log saṛia zaegi, ou shomoy he arame taḳar kiale hoḳol hukna zagat asroy tukae. Oile aramor zaga na faia bade ḳoy,
12.44: ‘Dur, amar agor gor-u bala, zegur ges taki aisi, ogur gese-u firia zaigi.’ Firia aia deḳe i gorḳan ḳali, saf-sofa ar hazail-faṛail.
12.45: Dekia he gia tar tone aro ḳaraf shatgu but loge loia ae, aia ou goro roy. Erdae ou manshor dosha foyla taki heshe aro beshi karaf oy. Te i zomanar naforman oḳlor dosha-o olaḳan oibo.” Hozrot Isar mayar manush ḳe?
12.46: Isae zebla manshor loge matira, ou shomoy tan ma ar baiain bare aia, tan loge deḳa ḳorar lagi bar saoat asla.
12.47: Teu eḳzon manshe aia tanre ḳoilo, “Huzur, afnar ma ar baiain afnar loge matar lagi bare ubai roisoin.”
12.48: Ikan hunia Isae tare ḳoila, “Amar ma ḳe, ar amar baiain-u ba ḳe?”
12.49: Bade tan shagrid oḳolre deḳaia ḳoila, “Era-u amar ma ar baiain.
12.50: Zara amar behesti baf Alla Pakor morzi zugaia soloin, tara-u amar ma ar bai-boin.”

13.1: Hozrot Isa ou din gor taki bar oia aoror faro gia boila.
13.2: Boia harle bout manush tan gese aia biṛ lagai dila, biṛ dekia tain gia eḳ nao-o uṭia boila ar hoḳol manush faro ubai roila.
13.3: Ou shomoy tain kichcha hunai hunai nanan nomunar talim dila. Tain ḳoila, “Mono ḳoro, ek giroste zala bain ḳorat gelo.
13.4: Gia bain ḳorar bala kisu zala ailor maze foṛlo, ar fakinte aia ita ḳaililo.
13.5: Tar kisu zala hukna-shokto maṭir ufre foṛlo, i zala fuṭia ali bar oile-o tole beshi maṭi na taḳae, zoldi baṛilo.
13.6: Bade shuruz uṭia harle zoir ḳaililo, ar tolor zoṛe rosh na faoae hukaia morigelo.
13.7: Kisu zala bon-jonglar maze foṛlo, ar ou bon-jongla baṛia itare zatia dorlo.
13.8: Oile kisu zala bala zomino foṛlo, i zalae bala dan oilo, itar kunu soṛae tish, kunu soṛae shaiṭ, kunu soṛae eḳ-sho gun beshi dan dorlo.”
13.9: Ou kichcha hunanir bade Isae ḳoila, “Zar ḳan ase, he hunouk.”
13.10: Bade tan shagrid oḳole ḳoila, “Afne ḳali kichcha ḳoia manshore talim dira ḳene?”
13.11: Tain ḳoila, “Behesti bashshair gufon rohoisho zanar shuzug tumrare deoa oise, oile baki manshor gese ita batuni roise.
13.12: Huno, zar ase, tare aro deoa oibo, tar aro baṛibo. Oile zar nai, tar zeta ase, ota-o ḳaṛia neoa oibo.
13.13: Erlagi ami kichchar mazdi erare talim diram, era to dekia-o deḳe na, hunia-o hune na ar kunta buze-o na.
13.14: Erar mazdia-u Ishaya nobir batail ou ayat fura oise, tain ḳoisla, Tumra ḳane hunle-o kunta buztae nae, souke deḳle-o kunta sintae nae.
13.15: Ita manshor dil oshaṛ oigese, tarar ḳano tala lagigese. Tara zarzir souk muzi boiroise, zate souke na deḳe, ḳane na hune, dil dia na buze. Kizanu tara touba ḳoria amar bae firizain, ar ami tarar shifa ḳorilai.
13.16: Oile nek-kofali to tumra, tumrar souke deḳe, ar ḳane hune.
13.17: Ami tumrare hok kota ḳoiram, tumrar souke zeta deḳrae ar ḳane zeta hunrae, ita bout nobi ar oli-auliae deḳar asha ḳorle-o deḳar ḳofal oise na, ar hunar asha ḳorle-o hunar ḳofal oise na.
13.18: “Oḳon tumrare ou girostor kichchar mani buzai diram,
13.19: Huno, ailor maze foṛa zala dia olaḳan manshor befare buzail oise, ze manshe behesti bashshair ḳota hunia-o buze na, erlagi Iblise aia ou zonor dilo Allar ze kalam bain ḳora oisil, ota ḳaṛia neygi.
13.20: Hukna-shokto maṭir ufre foṛa zaladi buzail oise, zera i kalam hune ar kub kushi oia kobul ḳore,
13.21: oile tarar dilo balamonte hamae na, erlagi ita tuṛa ḳoydin roy, bade i kalamor lagi kunu zulum-mosibot aile-u tara ḳorlami zae.
13.22: Bon-jonglar maze foṛa zaladi buzail oise, zera i kalam hune, oile duniabi sinta-babna ar don-samanar mayae i kalamre zatia dorilae, erdae kalame kunu fayda oy na.
13.23: Ar bala zomino foṛa zaladi buzail oise, zera i kalam hune, hunia buze ar amol ḳore. Ḳeu zindegit tish gun, ḳeu shaiṭ gun, ḳeu eḳ-sho gun beshi fol dey.” Dan ar fufra gasor kichcha
13.24: Bade Isae talim dibar lagi arok kichcha hunaila. Ḳoila, “Behesti bashshai ola ek girostor laḳan, zein nizor zomino bala danor zala bain dila.
13.25: Bade rait oia harle zebla hoḳol manush gumai gesoin, ou shomoy tan eḳ dushmone aia bain deoa ou zominor maze fufra gasor bisi siṭaia gelogi.
13.26: Heshe danor gas zebla boṛo oia soṛa saṛlo, ou shomoy ermaze fufra gaso deḳa gelo.
13.27: Ita dekia baṛir saḳor oḳole tarar munibre ḳoila, ‘Afne zomino ḳali bala dan bain disla na ni? Oḳon fufra gas oilo kuai taki?’
13.28: “Tain ḳoila, ‘Kunu dushmone i kam ḳorse.’ Saḳor oḳole tanre zikailo, ‘Te amra gia ou fufra gas saf ḳoriltam ni?’
13.29: Munibe ḳoila, ‘Na, na, tumra fufra gas saf ḳorat gia, danor gaso tulilibae.
13.30: Erlagi dan daoar ag forzonto ita taḳouk. Bade daoar bala ami manshore ḳoimu, foyla hoḳol fufra gas tulta, ar daru zalanir lagi aṭi bandita, bade dan daia amar ugaro tulba.’ ” Ḍenga bisi ar ḳamiror kichcha
13.31: Hozrot Isae arok kichcha hunaila. Ḳoila, “Behesti bashshai oilo egu ḍenga bisir laḳan. Eḳzon manshe egu ḍengar bisi tar zomino bain dilo.
13.32: I bisi to hoḳol zator bisi taki huru. Oile bain deoar bade i gas hokkol zator hag-torḳari taki boṛo oy, ar fakinte aia tar ḍal-falat bada banae.”
13.33: Erbade arok kichchar maze ḳoila, “Behesti bashshai oilo ḳamiror laḳan. Eḳzon beṭi manshe tin bosta moydar maze tuṛa ḳamir mishailo. Ḳamiror fafe hoḳol moyda fulia uṭlo.”
13.34: Hozrot Isae kichcha hunai hunai hoḳol nomunar talim dila. Kichcha saṛa tain kunu talim dila na.
13.35: Ita hokkolta oilo, zate nobir mazdi zeta batail oisil, ota oḳon fura oy, Talime bora kichcha hunai hunai ami matimu, duniar foyla taki zotota batuni asil, ota oḳon kulmu. Dan ar fufra gasor kichchar orto
13.36: Bade Isae manshore bidae dia goro hamaila. Ou shomoy tan shagrid oḳole aia ḳoila, “Huzur, fufra gasor kichchar manikan amrare buzai deukka.”
13.37: Tain ḳoila, “Bala danor zala zein bain ḳoroin, ein oilam ami bin-Adom.
13.38: Zomin oilo ou zogot, ar behesti bashshair manush oila bala bis. Iblisor ḳandan oilo ou fufra gas.
13.39: Ze dushmone fufra gas bain disil, he oilo Iblis. Dan daoar shomoy oilo kiamot, ar daora oḳol oila Allar firista.
13.40: Fufra gas aṭi bandia zela daru zalani oy, kiamotor shomoy ṭik ola-u oibo.
13.41: Bin-Adome tan firista oḳol faṭaiba. Ze manshe nize guna ḳore ar aroḳzonre gunar fote ṭane, tara hoḳolre firista oḳole bin-Adomor bashshair maz taki ekḳano dola ḳoria,
13.42: duzoḳor agunit falaiba. Hino manshe ḳanda-ḳaṭi korba ar zala-zontronae dat kiṛimiṛi diba.
13.43: Hi shomoy Allaraia manshe tarar behesti baf Alla Pakor bashshait nurani surote shuruzor laḳan jilmil ḳorba. Hunar lak kan zar ase, he hunouk. Behesti bashshair aro tin kichcha
13.44: “Huno, behesti bashshai oilo, maṭir tole lukail kunu donor laḳan. Kunu manshe ou don tukaia failo, faia hirbar gaṛia toi dilo. I don faia kushi oia he tar hoḳol samana besia, ou zominḳan ḳorid ḳorlo.
13.45: “Hirbar, behesti bashshai oilo ola eḳ shodagoror laḳan, i shodagore ḳaṭi moni-mukta tukanit asil.
13.46: He eḳṭa dami muktar ḳobor faia, tar hokkolta besia ou mukta ḳorid ḳorlo.
13.47: “Ba behesti bashshai ola eḳ zalor laḳan, i zaldi aoro ṭan dile er bitre hokkol zator mas hamailo.
13.48: Mase zal borigele zalua oḳole ikanre ṭania faro tullo. Bade tara bala bala mas basia sangat toilo ar badguin falai dilo.
13.49: Te Hashoror moydano ou halot oibo. Firista oḳole aia Allaraia manshor dol taki, naforman oḳolre algaia duzoḳor agunit falaiba.
13.50: Hino tara ḳanda-ḳaṭi korba ar zala-zontronae dat kiṛimiṛi diba.”
13.51: Erbade Isae tan shagrid oḳolre zikaila, “Tumra ita hoḳolta buzcho ni?” Tara ḳoila, “Ji oy, buzchi.”
13.52: Teu Isae tarare ḳoila, “Ze moulana oḳole behesti bashshair talim faisoin, tara ola ek girostor laḳan, ze giroste tan shonduk taki noya ar furana mal bar ḳoroin.” Hozrot Isae ḳene toshrif anchoin (13:53–17:27) Nizor gaut Hozrot Isar oshomman
13.53: Hozrot Isae kichcha ḳoia ḳoia talim dia harle intone gelagi.
13.54: Gia tan nizor gaur mosido hamaia oaz-nosiot ḳorla. Tan boyan hunia manshe taijjub oia ḳoila, “I beṭae ḳemne oto ilim ar keramoti failo?
13.55: E kita hou ḳaṭ mestorir fua nae ni? Tar maʼr nam Moriom nae ni? He Iakub, Iusuf, Saimon ar Ehudar bai nae ni?
13.56: Tar boinain to amrar gaut-u roira? Te he ita ilim ḳoi taki failo?”
13.57: Ou laḳan Isare loia manshor dilo bitishona ailo. Ou shomoy Isae tarare ḳoila, “Nizor baṛi-gor ba gau-desh saṛa ar hoḳol zagat-u nobi oḳole shomman fain.”
13.58: Gaur manshor iman nai dekia, tain hikano beshi keramoti deḳaila na.

14.1: Ou shomoy Galil zilar Raza Herude Isar befare hunla,
14.2: hunia tan uzir-nazirre ḳoila, “Ein to toubar gusol ḳoraora Ehia. Ein mora taki zinda oia uṭae ou keramoti deḳaira.”
14.3: Ou Herude tar bai Filifor bou Herudiare hanga ḳorsil. Tair mon zuganir lagi he Ehia nobire zelo bondi koria toisil,
14.4: ḳaron Ehiae Herudre ḳoita, “Taire hanga ḳora to tumar ṭik oise na.”
14.5: Erlagi he Ehia nobire marilito sailo, oile manshor ḍore marto farlo na, manshe zanta ein eḳzon nobi.
14.6: Bade Raza Herudor zonom dinor onusṭano Herudiar fuṛie nasia razare kushi korlo.
14.7: Erdae razae ḳosom ḳaia ḳoilo, “Ou fuṛie zeta saibo, ota dimu.”
14.8: Fuṛie tair maʼr loge foramish ḳori koilo, “Toubar gusol ḳoraora Ehiar ḳolla ḳaṭia ekkan talo ḳori, oḳon ania amare deukka.”
14.9: Ikan hunia razar mon kub bezar oigelo. Oile tar loge boa meman-musafiror samne nize ḳosom ḳorse, erlagi he ou ḳolla ḳaṭibar hukum dilo.
14.10: Tar zollad faṭaia zelor bitre Ehia nobir ḳolla ḳaṭailo.
14.11: Bade ou ḳolla eḳ talo ḳori ania ou fuṛire deoa oilo, fuṛie nia tair maʼr gese dilo.
14.12: Erbade Ehia nobir ummot oḳole tan lash nia dafon ḳorla, ar Hozrot Isar gese gia ou ḳobor zanaila. Fas azar manshor gaibi kani
14.13: Ehiar moutor ḳobor hunia Isae ekkan naot uṭia nirai eḳ zagat gelagi. Tain gesoingi hunia, nanan zagar manush hukna bae aṭi aṭi tan ḳore roana oila.
14.14: Tain nao tone lamar bade manshor biṛ dekia tan bitre doya hamaigelo. Erdae tarar maze zoto bemari asla, tain erare bala ḳorla.
14.15: Biali bala sahabi oḳol ḳandat aia ḳoila, “Huzur, ikan to kub nirai zaga, ar beil-o zargi. Te ota manshore bidae dilaukka, era ḳanda-ḳasar gauainto gia tarar ḳani-kuraki louk.”
14.16: Isae ḳoila, “Na, tara zaoar dorḳar nai, tumra-u erare ḳani deo.”
14.17: Sahabi oḳole ḳoila, “Amrar gese to ḳali fasḳan ruṭi ar duiṭa biran mas saṛa ar kunta-u nai.”
14.19: Bade tain manshore ḳoila, gashor ufre boizita. Tain hou fasḳan ruṭi ar duiṭa biran mas ato loila, ar asmanedi saia shukria adae ḳorla. Bade ou ruṭi ṭukraia sahabi oḳlor ato dile, era baṭia dilaila.
14.20: Otadi hoḳol manshe feṭ bori kaila. Ḳaia harle baṛti zeta roilo, oḳnain dola ḳorle baro ṭukri borigelo.
14.21: Onuman fas azar beṭa manshe ou ḳana ḳaila, erar loge beṭin ar huruttain-o asla. Fanir ufredi aṭa
14.22: Ḳanir bade-u tan sahabi oḳolre hukum dila, tain zaibar age tara nao-o uṭia aoror hofaro zaitagi. Ḳoia tain onor manshore bidae dilaila.
14.23: Era gia harle tain dua ḳorar lagi faṛor ufre uṭila. Hainja bad forzonto hono eḳla roila.
14.24: Ou shomoy sahabi oḳlor nao aoror mazḳano gesegi, ar ufta batashor ḍeue nao kub ilkani dorlo.
14.25: Fotabala Hozrot Isa aoror fanir ufredi aṭia sahabi oḳlor ḳandat aira.
14.26: Ou shomoy sahabi oḳole tanre dekia kub ḍoraila, tara but mono ḳoria but, but ḳoia sillaia uṭla.
14.27: Ou tain ḳoila, “Ḍoraio na, shaosh ḳoro, i to ami.”
14.28: Teu sahabi Fitore ḳoila, “Huzur, afne-u zudi oin, te amare izazot deukka, ami-o fanir ufredi aṭia afnar gese aitam.”
14.29: Isae ḳoila, “Ao.” Teu Fitor nao taki lamia fanir ufredi aṭa dorla.
14.30: Oile batashor zur dekia tain ḍoraigela, ar buṛizira dekia zure zure Isare ḍaḳ dila, “Huzur, huzur, amare basaukka.”
14.31: Loge loge Isae at baṛaia tanre doria ḳoila, “Ouni tumar iman? Mono shondoy anlae ḳene?”
14.32: Bade Isa ar Fitor nao-o uṭte-u batash tamigelo.
14.33: Teu naor hoḳole tanre soizda ḳoria ḳoila, “Huzur, ashole-u afne Alla Pakor ḳas mayar zon, Ibnulla.”
14.34: Aor faṛi dia tara Gineshorot elaḳat aia nao taki lamla.
14.35: Lamte-u honor manshe tanre dekia sairobae ḳobor faṭaila. Ḳobor faia manshe hoḳol zator bemarire loia tan gese ailo,
14.36: tara minot ḳori koilo, ou bemari oḳole zanu tan gotror saddoror kunaḳano soita faroin. Ar zoto manshe soila, tara hokkol-u bala oigela.

15.1: Zeruzalem ṭaun taki koyzon moulana ar Forishi mozobor kisu manush Isar gese aila, aia tanre zikaila,
15.2: “Afnar ummot oḳole agor zomanar moulana oḳlor batail rosumot manoin na ḳene? Tara to uzu na ḳoria-u ḳani kailain.”
15.3: Isae zuaf dila, “Ou moulana oḳlor rosumot manar lagi afnara ḳene Allar hukumor borkelaf ḳorra?
15.4: Allae hukum disoin, ‘Ma-bafre ijjot ḳorio, ar ze manshe tar ma-bafor bodnam gae, tare nisoy marilite oibo.’
15.5: Oile afnara ḳoin, kunu manshe zudi tar ma-bafre ḳoilae, ‘Amar zeta samana dia afnaintor kezmot ḳortam asil, ita ami Allar name lilla dilaisi,’
15.6: te tar ma-bafre ar kunta ḳora lage na. Ou laḳan afnarar baf-dadar mongoṛa niom dia Allar kalam batil ḳorilisoin.
15.7: O bonḍo oḳol! Hozrot Ishaya nobie tumrar befare ṭik-u ḳoisoin,
15.8: Ita manshe muk dia ḳali amare ijjot ḳore, oile tarar dil ama taki bout duroi.
15.9: Tara hudar ḳamoḳa amar ebadot ḳore, tarar talim oḳol to manshor banail mongoṛa rosumot.” Manush kila nafak oy
15.10: Bade Isae manshore ḍakia ḳoila, “Amar talim ḳanain kial ḳori hunoukka.
15.11: Baire taki zeta zinish manshor mukor bitre hamae, itae to tare nafak banae na. Borong manshor muk taki zeta baroy, otae-u tare nafak banae.”
15.12: Teu tan shagrid oḳole ḳoila, “Huzur, afne buzchoin ni, Forishi oḳole mono ḳorra, ou talim dia afne tarare beijjot ḳorsoin?”
15.13: -14 Tain ḳoila, “Itar mat falao. Amar behesti baf Allae ze gas lagaisoin na, i gas tan bagan taki huria falail oibo. Tarar dayitto asil anda manshore fot deḳaito, oile tara nize-u anda bonigese. Kunu andae aroḳ andare fot deḳanit gele, duio anda-u gato foṛi morbo.”
15.15: Teu sahabi Fitore ḳoila, “Afne zeta bataira, ota amrare buzai deukka.”
15.16: Isae ḳoila, “Tumra oḳono bebuz roiso ni?
15.17: Tumra buzo na ni, baire taki zeta zinish manshor muko hamae, ita to ḳali feṭo hamae, ar feṭ taki hirbar bar oizae.
15.18: Oile manshor muk taki zeta baroy, ita dilo taki ae, ar otae-u manshore nafak banae.
15.19: Manshor dil taki-u to hoḳol nomunar ku-sinta baroy, zemon kun, zina, suri, misa shakki, ar ingsha-ninda baroy.
15.20: Otae-u manshore nafak banae, oile uzu saṛa ḳani kaile ḳeu nafak oy na.” Bidormi beṭir imanor bol
15.21: Bade Hozrot Isa nizor desh saṛia Shur ar Sidon desho gelagi.
15.22: Hono gia harle Kenani zatir eḳ bidormi beṭi tan gese aia zure zure ḳoilo, “O huzur, Daudor aolad, amare rohom ḳoroin. Amar fuṛigure zine dorae tai boṛo ḳoshṭo ḳorer.”
15.23: Oile Isae kunta matila na. Teu tan sahabi oḳole tanre minot ḳori koila, “Huzur, ou beṭigure bidae dilaukka, tai amrar ḳore oia sillar.”
15.24: Isae ḳoila, “Amare to faṭail oise, ḳali Boni Israilor arail meṛa oḳlor lagi.”
15.25: Oile ou beṭi tan ḳandat aia ḳodombusi koria ḳoilo, “Huzur, amare ou asanḳan ḳoroukka.”
15.26: Tain ḳoila, “Nizor huruttar rizek kuttar samne deoa ṭik nae.”
15.27: Beṭie ḳoilo, “Ji oy huzur, afnar ḳota-u ṭik, oile munibor ḳani taki zeta guṛa-gaṛa galabae foṛe, ita to kukre ḳae.”
15.28: Teu tain beṭire ḳoila, “Ashole go mai, tumar iman boṛo mozbut. Aichcha, tumi zela sairae, ola-u ouk.” Oḳan ḳoar loge loge-u fuṛi bala oigelo. Sair azar manshor gaibi kani
15.29: Bade Isa hon tone Galil aoror faredi aṭia gela, gia eḳ faṛor ufre uṭia boila.
15.30: Boia harle manshe lula-lengṛa, atur, anda, buba, olaḳan aro bout zator bemarire dole dole tan gese loia ailo. Ania tan faor ḳandat toilo, tain era hoḳolre bala ḳorla.
15.31: Manshe zebla deḳla, lula-lengṛa bala oizira, buba oḳole matira, atur manshe aṭira, andae souke deḳra, dekia tara hoḳol taijjub oigela, ar Boni Israilor Mabud Allar shukria adae ḳorla.
15.32: Erbade Isae tan sahabi oḳolre ḳandat ania ḳoila, “Ita manshor lagi amar boṛo dorod lager, aiz tin din dori tara amar ḳore ḳore gurira, oile tarar loge ḳanir kunta nai. Te ou halote erare bidae ditam sai na, arnae ita foto-u beush oiziba.”
15.33: Sahabi oḳole ḳoila, “Huzur, i nirai morubumir maze oto manshore ḳaoanir lagi ruṭi amra kuai faimu?”
15.34: Tain ḳoila, “Tumrar gese ḳoyḳan ase?” Era ḳoila, “Shatḳan ruṭi ar biran ḳora ḳoyṭa huru mas ase.”
15.35: Teu Isae manshore maṭit boar lagi koila.
15.36: Ḳoia tain ou shatoḳan ruṭi ar biran mas ato loia, Allar shukria adae ḳoria oḳnain ṭukraila, bade sahabi oḳolredi baṭaila.
15.37: Hokkol manshe feṭ bori kaila. Ḳaia zeta roisil, sahabi oḳole ota dola ḳorar bade shat ṭukri borigelo.
15.38: Onuman sair azar beṭa manshe ou ḳana ḳaila, erar loge beṭin ar huruttain-o asla.
15.39: Bade tain erare bidae dia nao-o uṭia Mogodon elaḳat gelagi.

16.1: Bade Isare forikka ḳorar lagi Forishi ar Siddekia mozobor kisu manush aila, aia asmani kunu nishana deḳta saila.
16.2: Isae ḳoila, “Biali bala asmanor lal rong dekia afnara ḳoin, ḳailkur din to bala oibo.
16.3: Ar biani bala asmano ḳalni dekia ḳoin, aiz meg-tufan oibo. Te asmanor halot afnara ṭik-u buzoin, oile zomanar halot afnara buzoin na.
16.4: Ou zomanar beiman ar naforman oḳole ḳali keramoti deḳta sain, oile Iunus nobir nishana saṛa dusra kunu nishana tarare deḳail oito nae.” Oḳan ḳoia tain erare toia hori gela.
16.5: Bade aor faṛi dia zaoar ḳalo sahabi oḳole loge ḳori ruṭi nita faurilila.
16.6: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Tumra shabdan o, Forishi ar Siddekia dolor ḳamir taki hushiar roio.”
16.7: Ikan hunia sahabi oḳole ḳana-ḳani kori koila, “Amra ruṭi anchi na ḳori monoloy tain oḳan ḳoira.”
16.8: Isae tarar bab buzilila, buzia ḳoila, “Haere ḳomzur imandar oḳol, tumrar gese ruṭi nai, ikan ḳoirae ḳene?
16.9: Tumra oḳono kunta buzo na ni, kunta mono or na ni? Ami zebla fasḳan ruṭidi fas azar manshore ḳaoaislam, ḳanir bade tumra ḳoto ṭukri guṛa-gaṛa dola ḳorslae?
16.10: Ar hou ze shatḳan ruṭidi sair azar manshe ḳaisla, ḳaia harle ḳoto ṭukri dola ḳorslae?
16.11: Te oḳon tumra buzo na ḳene, ami ou ruṭir befare ḳoiar na? Huno, Forishi ar Siddekia oḳlor ḳamir taki hushiar o.”
16.12: Teu sahabi oḳole buzla, tain ashole ḳaibar ḳamir taki hushiaror ḳota ḳoira na, borong Forishi ar Siddekia oḳlor talim taki hushiar oite ḳoisoin. Hozrot Isa ashole ḳe?
16.13: Bade tan sahabi oḳolre loia Ḳoisoria-Filifi ṭaunor ḳanda-ḳasat gela. Foto sahabi oḳolre zikaila, “Ḳo sain, manshe kita mono ḳoroin, ami bin-Adom ḳe?”
16.14: Era zuaf dila, “Kunu kunu manshe ḳoin, afne Ehia nobi. Kunu zone ḳoin Ilias nobi. Ḳeu ḳeu ḳoy Iaromia nobi, ba oinno kunu nobi.”
16.15: Ou tain ḳoila, “Oile tumra kita mono ḳoro, ami ke?”
16.16: Sahabi Saimon-Fitore zuaf dila, “Afne to Allar oada ḳora hou al-Mosi Ibnulla, zinda Allar ḳas mayar zon.”
16.17: Isae ḳoila, “O Saimon bin Iunus, tumi boṛo nek-kofali, ḳaron, duniar kunu manshe tumare ita zanaise na, oile amar behesti baf Allae-u zanai disoin.
16.18: Te ami tumare ḳoiram, tumi to fattor, erlagi tumar nam dislam Fitor, ar ou fattoror ufre-u amar torikar tamam zomat goṛia tulmu. Duzoki kunu shoktie-u er loge farto nae.
16.19: Tumar ato ami behesti bashshair sabi dimu, ou duniat tumi zetare nazaiz ḳoibae, ita Allar dorbaro nazaiz oizibo, ar tumi zetare zaiz ḳoibae, Allar dorbaro-o ita zaiz oizibo.”
16.20: Bade Isae tarare doṛaia ḳoila, “Ami-u zen hou al-Mosi, ita ḳeurore hunaio na.” Foyla bar nizor moutor agam ḳobor
16.21: Ou shomoy taki Isae tan sahabi oḳolre zanani dorla, tain Zeruzalemo zaite oibo. Honor murobbi oḳole, boṛo imam oḳole ar moulana oḳole tanre bout duḳ-mosiboto falaiba. Bade tanre zane mara oibo, oile moutor tin dinor din hirbar zinda oia uṭba.
16.22: Ikan hunia sahabi Fitore tanre tuṛa horaia nia ḳoila, “Huzur, oshombob, afnar ufre kunumonte-u ita oite fare na.”
16.23: Isae Fitoror bae firia ḳoila, “Dur Iblis, amar ges taki bag! Tui amar fotor zoinjal. Tui Allai munshare bad dia, manshor laḳan sinta ḳorre.”
16.24: Bade tain erare ḳoila, “Ḳeu zudi amar torikat aito sae, te he tar nizor kushie sola bad deuk, tar afon duk-koshṭor solib boia loia amar ḳore auk.
16.25: Ze manshe tar nizor zan basaito sae, he tar asol zindegi kuaibo. Oile ze zone amar lagi tar zan kurbani dey, he asol zindegi faibo.
16.26: Kunu manshe asta dunia faia-o zudi tar asol zindegi kuailae, te tar kunu fayda oilo ni? Heshe asol zindegi faoar lagi he kun don bilaibo?
16.27: Ami bin-Adome zebla amar firista oḳolre loge loia amar gaibi bafor kudroti mohimae zogoto hirbar aimu, ou shomoy forteḳ manshore tar amol mafik fol dimu.
16.28: Huno, ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, ono ilaḳan ḳoyzon azir asoin, ami bin-Adom bashsha halote na aoa forzonto, kunumonte-u erar mout oito nae.”

17.1: Er soydin bade Hozrot Isae ḳali Fitor, Iakub ar Iakubor bai Hannanre loia usa eḳ faṛor ufre uṭla.
17.2: Uṭia harle erar souḳor samne tan nizor surot bodli gelo. Tan muk oigelo shuruzor laḳan zolmol, ar finnor lebas oilo dola soḳsoḳa.
17.3: Sahabi oḳole deḳla, Hozrot Musa ar Ilias nobie aia tan loge batchit ḳorra.
17.4: Ou shomoy Fitore ḳoila, “Huzur, amra to ono asi, kub bala oise. Afne saile ami tinḳan ḍera-gor banailai, ekkan afnar, ekkan Musa nobir ar ekkan Ilias nobir lagi.”
17.5: Tain Isar loge matira, aḳta-u dola dobdoba megor eḳ ṭukrae aia erare gurililo, ar ou ṭukra taki gaibi aoaz ailo, “Ein-u amar ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla, en ufre ami kub kushi, tumra en nosiot huno.”
17.6: Ikan hunia sahabi oḳol kub ḍoraila, ḍoraia maṭit foṛigela.
17.7: Ou shomoy Isa aia tarare soia ḳoila, “Uṭo, ḍoraio na.”
17.8: Teu tara souk tuli saila, saia ḳali Isa saṛa ar ḳeurore ino deḳla na.
17.9: Faṛ taki lamia aoar bala Isae erare hukum dila, “Aiz zeta deḳlae, ami bin-Adom mora taki zinda oia uṭar ag forzonto ita ar ḳeurore hunaio na.”
17.10: Sahabi oḳole Isare zikaila, “Huzur, moulana oḳole ḳene ḳoin, al-Mosi aibar age, foyla Ilias nobir aoa zorur?”
17.11: Tain ḳoila, “Ikan hasa ḳota, foyla Hozrot Iliase aia hokkolta agor haloto firaia anba.
17.12: Oile ami tumrare ḳoiram, Ilias nobi ṭik-u aisla. I duniar manshe tanre na sinae, tan loge zeta monoloy ota ḳorse. Ar ami bin-Adome-o ou laḳan duḳ-mosibot fuani lagbo.”
17.13: Teu sahabi oḳole buzilila, tain oḳon Ehia nobir ḳota ḳoira. Zinor asor-ala mirki bemarir shifa
17.14: Bade tara faṛ taki lamia aila. Ono manshor biṛ asil, ou biṛor maze eḳ beṭa aia Isar samne aṭu galadi boia ḳoilo,
17.15: “Huzur, amar fuagure basaukka, he mirki bemare kub ḳoshṭo ḳorer. Ou bemar uṭle he hamesha agunit ar fanit foṛizae.
17.16: Ami tare loia afnar sahabi oḳlor gese aislam, oile tara bala ḳorta farsoin na.”
17.17: Isae ḳoila, “Haere beiman ar naformanor zat, ami ar ḳotodin tumrar loge roimu, tumrar zala ḳotodin shoijjo ḳormu? Deki, tumar fuare ono ano.”
17.18: Isae fuar logor hou zinnatre damki dila, damki kaia zine fuare saṛia gelogi, loge loge he bala oigelo.
17.19: Bade sahabi oḳole niralae Isare zikaila, “Huzur, amra ḳene ou zinnat saṛaitam farlam na?”
17.20: Tain ḳoila, “Tumrar imanor ḳomzurir lagi-u farso na. Ami hasau ḳoiram, tumrar dilo zudi egu ḍenga bisi foriman iman taḳe, ar tumra ou faṛre ḳo, ‘On taki ḍulia hono zaogi,’ te ou faṛ-o ḍulizibo. Tumrar oshaiddo kunta-u roito nae.
17.21: Huno, dua ar ruza raḳa saṛa i-zat zin saṛail zae na.” Dusrabar nizor moutor agam ḳobor
17.22: Bade Galil zilat aia Isae tan sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Ami bin-Adomre manshor ato dorai deoa oibo.
17.23: Tara amare zane mariliba, morar tin dinor din ami hirbar zinda oia uṭmu.” Ikan hunia sahabi oḳol kub bezar oigela. Masor muko rufar ṭeḳa
17.24: Erbade Isae sahabi oḳolre loia Kofornaum ṭauno gela, ou shomoy Baytul-Mukaddosor ḳazna tulra oḳole sahabi Fitorre ḳoila, “Afnarar ustade Baytul-Mukaddos Kaba Shorifor sanda dein na ni?”
17.25: Fitore zuaf dila, “Ji oy, dein to.” Oḳan ḳoia Fitor goro hamaia kunta matar age-u Isae ḳoila, “Fitor, tumi kita mono ḳoro? Duniar bashsha oḳole ḳar ges taki kazna-sanda adae ḳoroin? Nizor manshor ges taki, na bara manshor ges taki?”
17.26: Fitore ḳoila, “Bara manshor ges taki.” Teu Isae ḳoila, “Te to nizor manush ita taki basi gelo, ar amra-o Allar afon manush oae Allar goror ḳazna taki basi gesi.
17.27: Oile amra erare bezar ḳortam nae, erlagi tumi aoro zao, gia mas marar lagi bori falao, borit foyla ze mas lagbo, ogur mukor bitre eḳṭa rufar ṭeḳa faibae. Ou ṭeḳa nia tumar ar amar sanda dilao.”

18.1: Ou shomoy sahabi oḳole Hozrot Isar ḳandat aia zikaila, “Huzur, behesti bashshair maze hokkol taki boṛo ḳe?”
18.2: Teu Isae eḳ huruttare ḍakia ania tarar maze uba ḳorai koila,
18.3: “Ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, tumra zudi mon firaia ou huruttar laḳan na o, te kunumonte-u behesti bashshait hamaitae fartae nae.
18.4: Ze zone nizore ou huruttar laḳan huru mono ḳore, behesti bashshait he-u hoḳol taki dami.
18.5: Ar ze zone amar lagi ou huruttar laḳan kunu sabalre kobul ḳore, he amare-u kobul ḳore. Gunar ḳam taki hushiar roa
18.6: “Huno, amar torikar ou huru-muru eḳzonre zegie gunar fote ṭania ney, ogur lagi aro bala oilo one, ogur golat fattor bandia doriat falai deoa.
18.7: Haere dunia, gunar fote neoar lagi tumar maze ḳoto uskani ase! Uskani to aibo-u aibo. Oile lannot hou zonor ufre, zegie guna ḳoranir lagi uskani dey.
18.8: Tumar at ba fao zudi tumare gunar fote ṭane, te i at-fao ḳaṭia falai deo. Duio at-fao loia duzoḳo zola taki, atur oia-o behesto zaoa tumar lagi bala.
18.9: Tumar souke zudi tumare gunar fote ṭane, te i souk tulia falai deo. Duio souk loia duzoḳo zola taki, ḳana oia-o aḳer faoa tumar lagi bala.
18.10: “Huno, ami koiram, tumra ou huruttar laḳan kunu sabalre-o elami korio na. Tarar firista oḳole behestor maze hor-hamesha amar behesti baf Alla Pakor muk deḳra.
18.11: Zano ni, zera be-fote gesegi, erare basanir lagi-u ami bin-Adom i duniat aisi.
18.12: “Mono ḳoro, kunu manshor eḳ-shogu meṛa ase, er mazor egu meṛa arai gele he baki nirannobboiṭa bondo toia, hou arail ogu tukanit zae na ni?
18.13: Ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, he zudi ikṭa tukaia fae, te ze nirannobboigu arsil na, oguin toia zegu ari gesil, ogur lagi-u he kub kushi-bashi kore.
18.14: Ṭik ou laḳan, tumrar behesti baf Allae-o sain na, ou huruttaintor mazor egu hurutta-o binash ouk. Oforadire buzao
18.15: “Tumar kunu baie zudi tumar gese dush ḳorilae, te he zebla niralae taḳe, ou shomoy tumi eḳla gia tare buzaio. Tumar buz zudi manilae, te ou bair loge tumar baiali basaililae.
18.16: Oile he zudi tumar buz na mane, te aro dui-eḳzon mazor manush loia zaio. Gia tarar samne tare buzaio. Teu Musar shoriotor ou hukum fura oibo, ‘dui-tinzon shakkir ḳotae zekunu befar forman oy.’
18.17: Erar buz-o zudi he na mane, te tar befare zomato nalish deo. Zomator ḳota zudi manilae te bala, ar na manle tare bidormi ba gushkur toshildar mono ḳoria, tare tar fote saṛi deo.
18.18: Te ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, ou duniait tumra zetare nazaiz ḳoibae, ita Allar dorbaro nazaiz oizibo, ar tumra zetare zaiz ḳoibae, Allar dorbaro-o ita zaiz oibo.
18.19: “Huno, ami tumrare aro ḳoiram, tumrar mazor duizon zudi eḳmot oia kunu befare dua ḳore, te amar behesti baf Allae ou dua kobul ḳorba.
18.20: Amar name ze zagat dui ba tin zon zoma oy, hou zagat ami-o azir taki.” Maf ḳorar befare talim
18.21: Ou shomoy Fitore aia Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, amar baie zudi amar gese bar bar dush ḳore, te ami kotobar tare maf ḳortam? Shatbar ni?”
18.22: Isae ḳoila, “Ḳali shatbar nae, ami koiram, tare shottoir gun shatbar maf ḳorio.
18.23: “Huno, behesti bashshai ola eḳ bashshar laḳan, zein tan uzir-naziror gese hishab-nikash saila.
18.24: Bashshae hishab loat boile erar mazor ola eḳzonre tan samne ana oilo, bashshae er gese laḳ laḳ ṭeḳa faona asla.
18.25: Ou faona firot dibar ḳemota er nai. Erdae bashshae hukum dila, he shudda tar bou, fua-fuṛin gulam hishabe biki kaia, hoḳol shoy-shompotti besia tan faona adae ḳorar lagi.
18.26: Ou hukum hunia he bashshar faot doria ḳandia ḳoilo, ‘Huzur, amare tuṛa shuzug deukka, ami afnar hoḳol faona dilaimu.’
18.27: Ou tain doya ḳoria tare saṛi dila, ar hoḳol dena maf ḳori dilaila.
18.28: “Bade he bare gia tar logor aroḳ saḳrianre failo. Ou zonor gese he eḳ-sho ṭeḳa faona asil. Faia tare golat ṭifa mari doria ḳoilo, ‘Oi, tui amar faona ṭeḳa de.’
18.29: Hou zone tar fao-o foṛi minot ḳori koilo, ‘Amare tuṛa shuzug deo, ami tumar hoḳol faona dilaimu.’
18.30: Oile he er ḳota manlo na. Tar ṭeḳa na deoa forzonto tare zelo harai toilo.
18.31: “Ita dekia tar logor uzir-nazir oḳol kub bezar oila. Tara gia ita bashshare zanaila.
18.32: Bashshae hou saḳrianre anaia ḳoila, ‘Haere naforman, tumi amare minot ḳorae ami tumar hoḳol dena maf ḳori dilaislam.
18.33: Te ami zela tumare doya ḳorslam, tumi-o oula tumar logor saḳrianre doya ḳora usit asil na ni?’
18.34: Bade bashshae gusa ḳoria tare zelo haraila, tan faona adae oar ag forzonto zelor zollad sifaie tare ḳoṛaḳoṛi shaza dila.
18.35: “Ṭik ou laḳan, tumra-o zudi tumrar baire dil taki maf ḳori na deo, te amar behesti baf Allae-o tumrare oula shaza diba.”

19.1: Ou talimor bade Hozrot Isa Galil zila taki Zordan gangor hofaro Ehudia zilar fub elaḳat aila.
19.2: Ou shomoy bout manush tan ḳore ḳore aila, tain era hoḳlor bemar bala ḳorla.
19.3: Ar Forishi mozobor ḳoyzon manush aia Isare forikka ḳorar lagi zikaila, “Ḳoukka sain, Musa nobir shoriot mafik kunu manshe zekunu ḳarone tar boure talaḳ deoa zaiz ni?”
19.4: Isae ḳoila, “Afnara Allar kalamo faisoin na ni, Allae foyla Adom ar Haoare beṭa ar beṭi banai foyda ḳorsoin, tain ḳoisoin,
19.5: ‘Erlagi-u beṭainte tarar ma-bafre saṛia bour loge taḳba, tara duiozon eḳ shoril oiba.’
19.6: Erdae tara dui roita nae, ek kaya oiba. Te Allae zerare zuṛa bandia disoin, manshe itare alog na ḳorouk.”
19.7: Teu Forishi oḳole tanre ḳoila, “Te Musa nobie ḳene bataisoin, talaḳ nama lekia boure talaḳ deoa zaiz?”
19.8: Tain ḳoila, “Tumrar dil fashan gotike-u Musae i onumoti disoin. Oile foyla taki ila niom asil na.
19.9: Ami tumrare ḳoiram, ze manshe zinar dush saṛa oinno zekunu ḳarone tar boure talaḳ dia aroḳ beṭire hanga ḳore, he nize-u zina ḳore.”
19.10: Teu sahabi oḳole tanre ḳoila, “Zamai-bour maze-o zudi ola goṭona goṭe, te to bia na ḳora-u bala.”
19.11: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Hoḳol manush to ila roito fare na, ḳali Allae zerare i kemota disoin, tara-u fare.
19.12: Kunu kunu manush na-mord halote-u duniat zonom loy, erlagi tara bia ḳore na. Ar kunu kunu zonre manshe-u na-mord banailae, erdae tara-o bia ḳore na. Hirbar ḳeu ḳeu ase bia-shadi na ḳoria, ḳali behesti bashshair kezmoto zindegi kaṭanir niot ḳorilae. Te ikan zera amol ḳorto fare, tara amol ḳorouk.” Huru huruttaintor befare talim
19.13: Bade manshe huru huru huruttainre loia Isar gese aila, tara saila tain zanu huruttaintor matagu atai dia dua ḳoroin. Oile sahabi oḳole erare boḳa-zoḳa ḳorla.
19.14: Ita dekia tain ḳoila, “Huruttainre aṭḳaio na, tarare amar gese aite deo. Allar bashshai to erar laḳan manshor lagi-u.”
19.15: Huruttaintor mata ataia dua ḳoria harle, tain hin taki gelagi. Gorib ar donir behest
19.16: Bade eḳ zuan beṭae aia tanre zikailo, “Huzur, aḳerat faoar lagi ami kun hok kam ḳortam?”
19.17: Isae ḳoila, “Hok kamor befare amare ḳene zikairae? Hok to ḳali eḳzon-u asoin, tumi aḳerat faite saile, tan hoḳol hukum-ahkam amol ḳoro.”
19.18: Hou zuane ḳoilo, “Huzur, kun kun hukum mantam?” Tain ḳoila, “Kun ḳorio na, zina ḳorio na, suri korio na, misa shakki dio na,
19.19: ma-bafre ijjot ḳorio ar ari-forire nizor laḳan maya ḳorio.”
19.20: Beṭae ḳoilo, “Sab, ita to ami emne-u amol ḳoriar, oile ar kita ḳortam ḳoukka?”
19.21: Teu Isae tare ḳoila, “Tumi zudi shullo-ana ḳaṭi oitae sao, te tumar baṛit zao, gia tumar hoḳol don-samana besia gorib-dukire bilai deo. Teu tumi behesto don-samana faibae. Erbade aia amar ummot oio.”
19.22: Ikan hunia beṭa bezar oia gelogi, tar to bout don-samana asil.
19.23: Teu Isae tan sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Ami hasa ḳota ḳoiram, doni manush Allar bashshait hamani boṛo moshkil.
19.24: Huno, doni manush Allar bashshait hamanir saite, suir furedi uṭ hamani aro shuza.”
19.25: Ikan hunia sahabi oḳol taijjub oia ḳoila, “Te kun manush nazat hasil ḳorbo, ḳe rehai faibo?”
19.26: Tain erar bae saia ḳoila, “Manshor lagi oshombob oito fare, oile Allar nozoro ita to mamuli. Tain hoḳolta-u faroin.”
19.27: Ou shomoy Fitore zikaila, “Huzur, amra to hokkolta falai toia afnar ḳore aisi. Te amra kita faimu?”
19.28: Isae ḳoila, “Ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, tumra zara amar ummot oiso, ami bin-Adom zinda oia zebla Allar bashshair godit boimu, ou shomoy tumra-o amar loge oia baroṭa toḳto boibae, boia Boni Israilor baro gusṭir bisar ḳorbae.
19.29: Huno, ze manshe amar lagi nizor baṛi-gor, ma-baf, bai-boin, fua-fuṛi, ar zomi-mirash falaia aise, he ou duniat itar eḳ-sho gun beshi faibo, erloge aḳer-o faibo.
19.30: Oile oḳon zera agor ḳataro ase, erar bout zon ḳore foṛizibo, ar ḳoror ḳataror bout zon age aibo.”

20.1: Hozrot Isae aro ḳoila, “Behesti bashshai to ola ek girostor laḳan. I giroste tan ḳetor ḳamor lagi kub biane uṭia ḳamla tukanit gela.
20.2: Gia ḳamla saia tarare eḳ-sho ṭeḳa ruz fuṛaia tan angur bagano ḳamo lagaila.
20.3: Kisu beil oia harle tain hirbar bar oila, bar oia deḳla aro ḳoyzon ḳamla beḳar ubai roisoin.
20.4: Dekia ḳoila, ‘Tumra-o gia amar bagano ḳamo lago, ami tumrare usit ṭeḳa dimu.’
20.5: Teu tara gia ḳamo lagla. Olaḳan beil duifori bala ar zuhoror bade girost hirbar bar oia gia aro ḳamlain ania ḳamo lagaila.
20.6: Heshe biali bala tain bare gia, aro ḳamlain ubai roisoin dekia ḳoila, ‘Tumra haradin dori ino ubai roiso ḳene?’
20.7: Era ḳoila, ‘Sab, amra kunu ḳam faisi na.’ Giroste ḳoila, ‘Tumra-o gia amar bagano ḳamo lago.’
20.8: “Hainja bala giroste tan nizor saḳorre ḳoila, ‘Oba, baganor ou ḳamlaintore ania, sheshor zon taki foyla zon forzonto hoḳlor ruz dilao.’
20.9: Biali bala zera ḳamo lagsil, tara eḳ-sho ḳori failo.
20.10: Ita dekia foyla zara ḳamo lagsil, tara mono ḳorlo tara aro beshi ṭeḳa faibo, oile giroste era hoḳolre eḳ homan ruz dila.
20.11: Erdae foyla dol ou girostor ufre bezar oia ḳoila,
20.12: ‘Amra hara din dori roide zoli-fuṛi kam ḳoria eḳ-sho ṭeḳa failam. Oile tara heshe aia tuṛa shomoy ḳam ḳorae-o, afne tarare amrar homan ṭeḳa dila.’
20.13: “Teu giroste tarar eḳzonre ḳoila, ‘Oba, ami oinnae kunta ḳorsi ni, tumi nize-u to eḳ-sho ṭeḳae ḳam ḳorte razi oiso na ni?
20.14: Oḳon tumar faona loia tumi zao. Ami amar nizor ichchae hoḳolre eḳ homan disi.
20.15: Amar nizor samana, nizor ichchamoto ḳoros ḳorar odikar nai ni? Ami tarare doya ḳorae tumar sokut zoler ni?’ ”
20.16: Ou kichcha hunanir bade Isae ḳoila, “Buzcho ni, zera ḳoror ḳataro ase tara age aibo, ar agor ḳataror tara ḳore zaibo.” Tisrabar nizor moutor agam ḳobor
20.17: Bade tain zebla Zeruzalem muka roana oizita, ou shomoy tan barozon sahabire alga horaia nia ḳoila,
20.18: “Huno, amra oḳon Zeruzalem zairam. Hono ami bin-Adomre doria boṛo imam ar moulana oḳlor ato shofi deoa oibo. Tara bisar ḳoria amare zane marar ray diba.
20.19: Amare bin-deshi oḳlor ato shomzaiba. Tara amare ṭaṭṭa-moshkora ḳoria, bezuita sabuk maria, laḳṛir solibo loṭḳaia zane mariliba. Moutor tin dinor din ami hirbar zinda oia uṭmu.” Montri oar lagi onurud
