20.20: Bade Zibudiar duio fuare loia tarar maʼe Isar gese aila. Aia kunta saoar ashae tan fao-o foṛla.
20.21: Isae beṭire zikaila, “Afne kita sain?” Beṭie ḳoila, “Huzur, amar egu fuare afnar razottor ḍainor godi, ar arogure baur godikano boibar shuzug diba ni?”
20.22: Isae tarare zuaf dila, “Tumra to buzrae na, tumra kita sairae. Ami ze duḳ-mosibotor fialadi kaimu, ita kunu tumra ḳaitae farbae ni?” Tara ḳoila, “Ji oy, farmu.”
20.23: Tain ḳoila, “Aichcha, ami ze fialadi kaimu tumra-o ou fialadi kaibae, oile amar ḍaine ba baue boanir eḳtiar to amar ato nae. Amar behesti baf Allae zarar lagi i godi ṭik korsoin, ḳali tara-u faiba.”
20.24: Zibudiar duio fuar arzi hunia, baki doshozon sahabi erar ufre kub biroḳto oila.
20.25: Teu Isae era hoḳolre ḳandat ania ḳoila, “Tumra to zano, bidormi zatir raza oḳol tarar prozar ufre hukum zari kore, ar tarar zomidar oḳole gulamor ufre beṭagiri kore.
20.26: Oile tumrar maze to ila oa ṭik nae. Tumrar ḳeu dami bonte saile, he tumrar kezmot ḳorouk.
20.27: Ar ḳeu boṛo oite saile, he hoḳlor gulami korouk.
20.28: Mono rakio, ami bin-Adome-o kezmot faoat aisi na, aisi to kezmot ḳorat. Ar bout manshor zan basanir lagi, nizor zan bilai deoat aisi.” Hozrot Isae duizon andare bala ḳorla
20.29: Hozrot Isae tan sahabi oḳolre loia Ziriho ṭaun taki roana oigela, ou shomoy bout manush tan ḳore ḳore gela.
20.30: Zaoar shomoy fotor ḳandat dui anda beṭa boat asil. Tain ou fotedi zaira hunia tara zure zure sillaia ḳoilo, “O huzur, O Daud nobir aolad, amrare rohom ḳoroin.”
20.31: Sillani hunia onor manshe tarare domoḳ dila. Oile tara aro zure zure sillaia ḳoilo, “O huzur, O Daud nobir aolad, amrare rohom ḳoroin.”
20.32: Erar sillani hunia tain ubai gela, ubaia ou duio andare ḳandat anaia zikaila, “Kita ba, kita sao? Ami tumrare kita ḳortam?”
20.33: Tara ḳoilo, “Huzur, amrar soukguin bala ḳori deukka.”
20.34: Ikan hunia tan dorod hamaigelo. Tain tarar souk atai dila, loge loge-u tarar souk bala oigelo. Bade tara-o tan ḳore ḳore roana oilo.

21.1: Hozrot Isae tan sahabi oḳolre loia Zeruzalemor ḳasat, Zoytun faṛor loge Bayt-Faijja gaut aia azila. Ono aia tan duizon sahabire ḳoila,
21.2: “Tumra ou samnor gaut zao. Gaut hamaite-u deḳbae egu gada banda ase, loge tar baichcha-o banda. Oguintor golar doṛi kulia ono loia aio.
21.3: Ḳeu kunta zikaile ḳoio, huzuror dorḳar ase, erdae niram. Teu he loge loge razi oizibo.”
21.4: Ita oilo zate agor zomanar hou nobir mazdi zeta batail oise, ota oḳon folizae.
21.5: Tain ḳoisla, “Sion-ḳoina Zeruzalemre tumra ḳoio, tumar bashsha tumar gese aira. Tain kub norom mizazi. Tain gada soṛia, gadir baichcha soṛia aira.”
21.6: Teu Isae zela hikai disla, duio sahabie gia ola ḳorla.
21.7: Ou gada ar tar baichcha anar bade sahabi oḳole nizor gotror saddor kulia gadar fiṭit bisai dila, teu Isa er ufre soar oila.
21.8: Aro bout manshe tarar gotror saddor kulia fotor maze bisai dila, ar boute shundor shundor gasor fatain siṛia ania foto bisaila.
21.9: Isar age-ḳore aro bout manush zaoat asil, era zure zure misil dila, “Bashsha Daudor aolad, marhaba! Mabudor name zein aira, tan tarif ouk. Behesto-o marhaba!”
21.10: Hozrot Isa Zeruzalem aia harle asta ṭauno uloistol lagigelo. Hoḳole zikaila, “Oba, ein ḳe?”
21.11: Manshe ḳoila, “Ein to hou Isa nobi, en baṛi Galilor Nasarot gaut.” Zeruzalem Kaba Shorifre fak-saf ḳora
21.12: Bade Zeruzalem aia tain fobitro Baytul-Mukaddoso hamaila. Hono Kaba goror shimanat zera ḳorid-bikir ḳarbari asil, itare ḳedai dila. Tain ṭeḳar baṭṭar ḳarbari oḳlor kesh bakso, ar ḍufi-faro besra oḳlor ashon ulṭaia falai dila.
21.13: Tain ḳoila, “Allar kalamo batail oise, amar gor oibo ebadotor gor, oile tumra ikanre ḍaḳaitor aḍḍaḳana banailiso.”
21.14: Erbade anda, lula-lengṛa manush oḳol Isar gese Baytul-Mukaddoso aila, tain era hoḳolre bala ḳorla.
21.15: Hozrot Isae ze kudroti muzeza ḳam ḳorsla, boṛo imam ar moulana oḳole ita deḳla. Tara hunla, Baytul-Mukaddosor bitre huruttainte ḳoira, “Marhaba, Daudor aolad, marhaba.” Ikan hunia tara zoli-fuṛi uṭla.
21.16: Tara Isare ḳoila, “Ou huruttainte kita sillaira, ita tumi hunrae na ni?” Tain ḳoila, “Oy, huniar to. Allar kalamo foṛsoin na ni, ‘Nabalik huruttaintor muk taki tumi tumar tarif adae ḳorso’?”
21.17: Bade Hozrot Isa tarar ges taki gelagi, gia ṭaunor bare Bayt-Ania gaut rait roila. Mozbut imanor munazat
21.18: Bador din biane Bayt-Ania taki Zeruzalem ṭauno aoar shomoy tan feṭo buk laglo.
21.19: Ou tain fotor ḳandat egu ḍumur gas dekia, ogur fol ḳaoar kiale gasor daro gela. Gia deḳla, gasor maze ḳali fata, kunu fol nai. Tain ou gasre ḳoila, “Tumar maze zanu ar kunudin fol na dore.” Oḳan ḳoar loge loge-u gasṭa hukaia morigelo.
21.20: Sahabi oḳole ita dekia taijjub oia ḳoila, “Gasṭa oto zoldi hukai gelo kila?”
21.21: Isae zuaf dila, “Ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, tumra zudi dilor maze shondoy na ḳoria, furafur imane mozbut taḳo, te ami ou ḍumur gasre zeta ḳorsi, tumra-o ola farbae. Ḳali ikan nae, tumra zudi ou faṛore ḳo, ‘Uṛia gia doriat foṛo,’ te ola-u oibo.
21.22: Tumra zudi kalis niote ekin ḳoria dua ḳoro, te tumra zeta saibae, ota-u faibae.” Baytul-Mukaddoso Hozrot Isa al-Mosi
21.23: Bade Hozrot Isa hirbar Baytul-Mukaddoso aia oaz-nosiot ḳorat asla. Ou shomoy boṛo imam ar murobbi oḳol aia tanre zikaila, “Aichcha, ḳo sain, tumi kun eḳtiare ita ḳorrae? Ḳe tumare i kemota dise?”
21.24: Isae zuaf dila, “Ami-o afnarare ekkan soal ḳoriar, afnara er zuaf dilaile ami-o ḳoimu, kun eḳtiare ami ita ḳorram.
21.25: Afnara ḳoukka sain, Hozrot Ehiae torikar gusol deoar eḳtiar ḳar ges taki faisla? Manshor ges taki, na Allar ges taki?” Ikan hunia tara ḳane ḳane matila, “Amra zudi koi, Allar ges taki, te he ḳoibo, taile tumra tan ufre iman anlae na ḳene?
21.26: Ar zudi koi, manshor ges taki, te manshe amrare marba, ḳaron manshe to Ehiare nobi koia manoin.”
21.27: Erlagi-u tara zuaf dila, “Amra ikan zani na.” Isae ḳoila, “Te ami-o ḳoitam nae, kun ḳemotae ami ita ḳorram.”
21.28: Erbade Isae ḳoila, “Aichcha, afnara kita mono ḳoroin? Doroukka, eḳ beṭar dui fua asil. Beṭae tar boṛo fuare ḳoilo, ‘Tumi aiz anguror bagano ḳamo zao.’
21.29: Fuae foyla ḳoilo, ‘Ami fartam nae.’ Oile bade tar mon bodlaia ḳamo gelo.
21.30: Bade beṭae tar huru fuar gese gelo, gia ou ḳamor ḳota ḳoilo. He zuaf dilo, ‘Aichcha ami zaimune,’ oile bade gelo na.
21.31: Te ḳoukka sain, ou duio fuar maze ḳe bafor hukum manlo?” Tara ḳoila, “Boṛo fuae.” Teu Isae ḳoila, “Ami afnaintore hasa ḳota ḳoiram, gushkur toshildar ar silan beṭin afnaintor age oia Allar bashshait hamaizira.
21.32: Ḳaron Ehia nobie hok fot bataia deoat aisla, ta-o afnara tan ḳotae iman anchoin na. Oile gushkur toshildar ar silan beṭinte iman anla. Ota deḳar bade-o afnara iman anchoin na, touba-o ḳorsoin na.” Angur baganor girostor kichcha
21.33: Bade Hozrot Isae ḳoila, “Afnara oḳon arok kichcha hunoukka. Eḳzon giroste anguror bagan ḳoria sairobae beṛa dilo. Bade sokidaror lagi usa ḳori ekkan ṭong-gor banailo ar anguror rosh bar ḳorar lagi gat kudilo. Heshe ḳet bagi dia girost bidesh gelogi.
21.34: Angur fakia harle giroste tar baṭ nibar lagi, bagidar oḳlor gese tar saḳor oḳol faṭailo.
21.35: Oile bagidare girostor eḳ saḳorre doria kub mair-doir ḳorlo, dusra saḳorre fattordi maria zoḳom ḳorlo ar aroḳ saḳorre zane marililo.
21.36: Bade tain aro besh ḳori eḳ dol saḳor faṭaila, oile bagidar oḳole tarar loge-o oula bebohar ḳorlo.
21.37: Hesh-mesh giroste tan nizor fuare tarar gese faṭaila, mono ḳorla, tara tan fuare dam dibo.
21.38: Oile bagidar oḳole fuare dekia, eḳe-oinne foramish ḳori koilo, ou fua-u to bade i shompottir malik oibo. Te ao, ogure marilai, teu amra-u itar malik bonizimu.
21.39: Ḳoia-u tara fuare doria angur baganor bare nia zane marililo.
21.40: Oḳon ḳoukka sain, baganor malik zebla aiba, aia ou bagidar oḳolre kita ḳorba?”
21.41: Tara ḳoila, “Tain aia to ou naforman oḳolre kun ḳorba ar shomoy moto zera fosholor baṭ dibo, tarar gese ḳet bagi diba.”
21.42: Hozrot Isae ḳoila, “Afnara Allar kalamo foṛsoin na ni, Raz mestoir oḳole ze fattorre beḳama ḳoia falai disil, oḳṭa dia-u goror ian kuṭi oilo. Mabude nize-u ita oaila, ita dekia to amrar taijjubi lager.
21.43: Erlagi koiram, Allar bashshai afnarar ges taki kaṛia neoa oibo. Ar zerar zindegit ou bashshair fol deḳa zaibo, tarare-u ou bashshai deoa oibo.
21.44: Huno, ou fattoror ufre ze zon foṛbo, he ṭukra ṭukra oizibo. Ar ou fattoro zar ufre foṛbo, he-o surmar oizibo.”
21.45: Isar ou talim hunia boṛo imam ar Forishi oḳole buzilila, tain ita tarar bifokke-u ḳoira.
21.46: Erdae tara Isare dorilito sailo. Oile manshore ḍoraia tanre kunta ḳorlo na. Manshe to Hozrot Isare nobi hishabe manta.

22.1: Hozrot Isae hirbar tarare aro kichcha hunaila. Tain ḳoila,
22.2: “Behesti bashshai ola eḳ bashshar laḳan, ze bashshae tan fuar biar ḳanir bebosta ḳorla.
22.3: Ar daoti meman oḳolre anar lagi tan ḳoyzon saḳorre faṭaila, oile tara ḳeu ailo na.
22.4: Bade tan aro saḳorre oḳan hikai dia faṭaila, ḳoila, ‘Tumra gia meman oḳolre ḳoio, ami amar taza bisal ar ḍeḳain zobo ḳoria ḳani zuit ḳorsi. Oḳon ḳani tiar oigese, afnara aia ḳailaukka.’
22.5: “Daoti oḳole erar ḳota-o na hunia, ḳeu tar nizor ḳamaro ar ḳeu tar dukano gelogi.
22.6: Ar baki manshe ou saḳor oḳolre doria beijjot ḳoria kun ḳorillo.
22.7: Bashshae ita hunia gusae aguin oigela. Tain nizor sifai dol faṭaia hou kuni oḳolre binash ḳorla, tarar asta ṭaun aguindi zalailila.
22.8: Bade tan saḳor oḳolre ḳoila, ‘Ḳani to tiar oigese, oile zetare daot dislam, ita to i daotor zuka nae.
22.9: Te huno, tumra oḳon rastar muṛae muṛae zao, gia zoto manshore faibae, tara hokkolre biar ashoro loia ao.’
22.10: Bashshar hukum faia tara bar oia gia bad-bala zoto zonre failo, hoḳolre anlo. Erlagi memane asta bia baṛi bori gelo.
22.11: “Erbade bashshae memanor loge deḳa ḳorat aila, aia mozlisor bitre hamaia deḳoin, eḳ beṭae shadaron ḳafoṛ findia ḳanit aichche.
22.12: Tain ere zikaila, ‘Oba, bia baṛir zuka ḳafoṛ na findia ino hamaile kila?’ Oile he kunu zuaf dito farlo na.
22.13: Teu bashshae tan gulam oḳolre hukum dila, ‘Ogur at-fao bandia bare nia andair gato falai deo.’ Hono manshe ḳanda-ḳaṭi korba ar zala-zontronae dat kiṛimiṛi kaiba.”
22.14: Kichchar bade Isae ḳoila, “Erlagi-u ami koiram, daot faisoin boute, oile fosond oisoin ḳom.” Ḳaznar befare dushmon oḳlor prosno
22.15: Oḳan hunia Forishi dolor manush Isar ges taki horia gelagi, gia foramish ḳorla tanre kila ḳotar fando falail zae.
22.16: Teu tara nizor ḳoyzon shagrid ar Raza Herudor dolor kisu manshore Isar gese faṭaila. Otae aia ḳoila, “Huzur, amra to zani, afne eḳzon hok manush. Hok-halal fote manshore Allar rasta batai dira. Ḳe kita mono ḳore ba na ḳore, itae afnar kunta-u zae ae na, afne to muk saia kunta ḳoroin na.
22.17: Te amrare batai deukka, Hozrot Musar shoriot mafik Ruman bashshare ḳazna deoa zaiz ni? Amra tanre ḳazna ditam ni, na ditam na?”
22.18: Itar ku-foramish tain buzilila, buzia ḳoila, “O bonḍo oḳol, tumra ḳene amare forikka ḳorrae?
22.19: Ze ṭeḳadi kazna dein, ota egu ṭeḳa amare deḳao.” Ou tara eḳṭa dinar ania Isar ato dila.
22.20: Tain zikaila, “I foyshar ufre ḳar nam ar sobi?”
22.21: Tara ḳoila, “Ruman bashshar.” Tain ḳoila, “Te huno, bashshar zeta ita bashshare deo, ar Allar zeta ita Allare deo.”
22.22: Ikan hunia tara taijjub bonia tan ges taki gelagi. Moron bade zinda oar prosno
22.23: Ou din Siddekia mozobor ḳoyzon manush Isar ḳandat aila. Era ekin ḳoroin, moutor bade kunu manush ar zinda oia uṭoin na. Erdae tara Isare fando falaibar lagi zikaila,
22.24: “Huzur, Hozrot Musae ḳoisoin, ḳeu zudi tar boure niaoladi halote toia mara zae, te tar baie ou ṛaṛi beṭire bia ḳoria tar bair bongsho basaite oibo.
22.25: Te amrar ono eḳ foribaro shat bai asil. Boṛo zone bia ḳoria niaoladi halote mara gelo.
22.26: Bade dusra baie tar ou ṛaṛi babire bia ḳori mara gelo. Ou nomunae tisra bai taki shuru ḳoria shato baie ou beṭire bia ḳorlo.
22.28: Te ḳoukka sain, moron bade zebla tara zinda oia uṭba, ou shomoy i beṭi, era kun bair bou oibo? Tara hoḳole-u to i beṭire bia ḳorsil.”
22.29: Tain zuaf dila, “Afnara to Allar kalam zanoin na, Allar kudroti befar-o buzoin na. Erdae afnara i bul ḳorra.
22.30: Hunoukka, murda oḳol zebla zinda oia uṭba, ou shomoy tara bia-shadi korta nae, ḳeu tarare bia dito-o nae. Era to firistar laḳan boniziba.
22.31: Murda oḳol zinda oar befare Allae kita bataisoin, ita afnara kitabo foṛsoin na ni?
22.32: Kitabo leḳa ase, ‘Ami Ibrahimor Alla, Isʼhakor Alla ar Iakubor Alla.’ Oḳan taki buza zae, ou nobi oḳlor ufat oile-o era to Allar sokut oḳono zinda asoin. Alla to murda oḳlor Mabud nae, tain zinda oḳlor Mabud.”
22.33: I talim hunia tara taijjub oigela. Hoḳol taki boṛo hukum kita?
22.34: Forishi oḳole zebla hunla, Siddekia mozobor manshe Isar mator kunu zuaf dita farsoin na, teu tara hoḳol ekḳano oila.
22.35: Tarar dolor eḳzon moulana aia Isare forikka ḳorar lagi zikaila,
22.36: “Huzur, Musar shoriotor maze hoḳol taki boṛo hukum kunṭa?”
22.37: -38 Isae zuaf dila, “Hoḳol taki boṛo hukum oilo, ‘Tumrar asta dil, asta zan, asta mon ar hoḳol shokti dia tumrar Mabud Allare mohobbot ḳorio.’
22.39: Dusra hukum-o ou laḳan, ‘Tumrar ari-forire nizor laḳan maya ḳorio.’
22.40: Ou duio hukumor ufre asta Tourat Shorif ar Asmani Kitab oḳol nirbor ḳore.” al-Mosi ke?
22.41: Forishi oḳol ekḳano dola roisoin, ou shomoy Isae tarare zikaila,
22.42: “Al-Mosir befare afnara kita zanoin? Tain ḳar aolad?” Tara ḳoilo, “Daud nobir aolad.”
22.43: Teu Isae tarare ḳoila, “Te Pak Ruhur bole Daud nobie kila al-Mosire tan nizor munib ḳoisoin? Daude to ḳoisoin,
22.44: Mabude amar munibre ḳoila, ‘Ami zoto shomoy tumar dushmon oḳolre tumar faor tolat na falai, oto shomoy tumi amar ḍainor toḳto bo.’
22.45: Daude zebla nize-u al-Mosire tan munib ḳoisoin, te al-Mosi kemne Daudor aolad oiba?”
22.46: Tara er kunu zuaf dita farla na, ar ou din taki keu tanre kunta zikanir-o shaosh failo na.

23.1: Hozrot Isae tan logor manshore ar sahabi oḳolre ḳoila,
23.2: “Musa nobir shoriot talim dibar eḳtiar to moulana ar Forishi oḳlor ato.
23.3: Erlagi tara zeta ḳoin, ota manio, ar zeta amol ḳorar hukum dein, ota amol ḳorio. Oile tara nize zeta ḳoroin, tumra ita ḳorio na. Ḳaron, tara muk dia zela ḳoin, ila ḳam ḳoroin na.
23.4: Tara am manshor ḳando boṛo boṛo gaiṭ tulia dein, oile shaijjor lagi tara eḳṭa angul-o laṛain na.
23.5: Tara ḳali manshore deḳanir lagi hoḳolta ḳoroin. Allar kalamor ayat dia boṛo boṛo tabiz bandoin ar nizor forezgari deḳanir lagi lamba lamba faugṛi bandoin.
23.6: Tara ḳanir mozliso bala bala zaga tukain ar mosido hamaia samnor ḳataro boita sain.
23.7: Bazar-aṭo gia salam faite kub fosond ḳoroin, ar sain manshe tarare huzur huzur ḳorouk.
23.8: “Oile tumrare ḳeu huzur huzur ḳorouk, ita asha ḳorio na. Tumrar asol huzur to ḳali eḳzon-u asoin, tumra ḳali bai bai roio.
23.9: I duniat ḳeurore baba ḳoia ḍakio na, ḳaron tumrar batuni baf to eḳzon-u, tain behesto asoin.
23.10: Ḳeu tumrare neta ḳoia ḍaḳouk, ita asha ḳorio na. Tumrar neta to eḳzon-u, tain oila al-Mosi.
23.11: “Tumrar maze zein hoḳol taki boṛo, ein tumrar kezmot ḳorouk.
23.12: Ze zone nizore boṛo mono ḳore, tare huru ḳora oibo. Ar ze nizore huru mono ḳore, tare boṛo ḳora oibo.
23.13: “Haere moulana ar Forishir dol, afsus tumrar lagi, tumra bonḍo! Tumra manshor samne behesti bashshair duar bond ḳori toiso. Tumra nize-o ono hamairae na, manshore-o hamaite dirae na.
23.14: Haere bonḍo moulana ar Forishir dol, manshore deḳanir lagi tumra lamba lamba dua ḳoro, hirbar ṛaṛi beṭintor zaga-mirasho doḳol ḳoro. Erlagi tumrar ḳoṭin shaza oibo.
23.15: Haere bonḍo moulana ar Forishir dol! Eḳzon manshore tumrar dolo nibar lagi shat shomudro tero nodi faroia tumra douṛao. Oile he tumrar dolo hamaia harle, tare tumra taki aro boṛo duzoki banao.
23.16: “Haere anda fot deḳaora! Tumra nize anda oia oinnore kila fot deḳao? Tumra to ḳo, Baytul-Mukaddosor name ḳosom ḳaile kunta oy na, oile Baytul-Mukaddosor shunar name ḳosom ḳaile mante oibo.
23.17: Haere anda be-aḳolor dol, kunḳan boṛo? Baytul-Mukaddos, na shuna? Baytul-Mukaddose-u to ou shunare fak-fobitro ḳore.
23.18: Hirbar tumra ḳo, kurbani kanar name ḳeu ḳosom ḳorle kunta oy na, oile kurbanir sizor name ḳosom ḳorle mante oibo.
23.19: O anda oḳol, kunḳan boṛo? Kurbani kana, na kurbanir siz? Ou kurbani kanae-u ou sizre fak-fobitro ḳore na ni?
23.20: Erlagi ze zone kurbani kanar name ḳosom ḳore, he kurbani kana ar kurbanir siz, i duiotar name-u ḳosom ḳore.
23.21: Ola-u Baytul-Mukaddosor name ze zone ḳosom ḳore, he-o Baytul-Mukaddos ar er bitre zein taḳoin, tan name-u ḳosom ḳore.
23.22: Ze zone behestor name ḳosom ḳore, he Allar arosh ar arsho zein asoin, tan name-u ḳosom ḳore.
23.23: “Haere bonḍo moulana ar Forishir dol! Tumra guamuri, fodina fata, ar zirar dosh baṭor eḳ baṭ Allar oaste zoḳat dirae, oile Musa nobir shoriotor hukum mafik aro zoruri befar, mani hok insaf, doya ar Allar mohobbot tumra bad dilaiso. Te foyla hukum amol ḳorar loge loge badorta-o amol ḳora zorur.
23.24: Tumra nize-u anda, otoso aroḳzonre fot deḳairae. Tumra egu mosha-o sakia tulo, oile uṭre gililao.
23.25: “Haere bonḍo moulana ar Forishir dol! Tumra to bashon-bortonor bargala bala ḳori saf ḳoro, oile itar bitor gala zulum ar lub-lalose bora.
23.26: Haere anda Forishir dol, tumra foyla otar bitor saf ḳoro, teu bargala emne-u saf oibo.
23.27: “Haere bonḍo moulana ar Forishir dol! Tumra oilae sun-ḳam ḳora ḳoyboror laḳan, er bargala soḳsoḳa oile-o bitre to ḳali mora manshor aḍḍi-guḍḍi ar ḳasrae bora.
23.28: Ṭik ou laḳan, manshe mone ḳoroin tumra kub forezgar, ashole tumrar dil to bonḍami ar naformanie bora.
23.29: “Haere bonḍo moulana ar Forishir dol! Tumra nobi oḳlor rouzare shundor ḳori fakka ḳoro, ar oli-auliar mazarre soḳsoḳa ḳori hazao.
23.30: Ar tumra ḳo, ‘Ish, amra zudi amrar baf-dadar zomanat duniat aitam, te nobi oḳolre zane marar ḳalo baf-dadar loge gelam na one.’
23.31: Ou mate tumra forman dirae, nobi oḳolre zetae zane marsla, otar bongshodor-u tumra.
23.32: Te tumrar baf-dadainte zeta shuru ḳoria gesoin, tumra otar baki gala fura ḳorrae.
23.33: “O hafor baichchain, duzoḳor azab taki tumra kila bastae?
23.34: Erlagi ami tumrar gese nobi-rosul, ar alim-ulama faṭaiar. Erar mazor ḳoyzonre tumra zane marilibae, ḳoyzonre duk-koshṭor solibo loṭḳaia marbae. Ar ḳoyzonre tumrar mosido haraia sabuk maria, ek gau taki arok gaut ḳedaia nibae.
23.35: Erdae-u nirdushi hou Habilor kun taki shuru ḳoria Barakiar fut Zakariar kun forzonto, duniat zoto kun oise, ita hoḳol kunor dayi oibae tumra. Ou Zakariare to Baytul-Mukaddosor bitoror kurbani kana ar Herem Shorif ou dui zagar mazḳano kun ḳora oisil.
23.36: Ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, ou tamam kunor dayi oibae i zomanar manush. Zeruzalemor lagi afsus
23.37: “Zeruzalem! Haere Zeruzalem ṭaun! Tumi nobi oḳolre zane maro, tumar gese zarare faṭail oy, tumi tarare fattor maro. Murgie zela tair baichchare ḍaḳnar tole asroy dey, ami-o oula tumar manshore asroy ditam saisi, oile tara hunla na.
23.38: O Zeruzalemor bashinda oḳol, tumrar sokur samne-u tumrar boshot ḳana ḳali baṛi oibo.
23.39: Ami tumrare ḳoiram, zotodin tumra ikan na ḳoibae, ‘Mubarok tain-u, Allar nam loia zein aira,’ oto din tumra ar amare deḳtae nae.”

24.1: Hozrot Isa Baytul-Mukaddos taki bar oia zairagi, ou shomoy tan sahabi oḳol tan gese aila, tanre Baytul-Mukaddosor shundor shundor dolan deḳanir lagi.
24.2: Tain ḳoila, “Ami tumrare hok kota ḳoiram, tumra ou zeta boṛo boṛo dolan deḳrae, itar dui iṭ ekḳano roito nae, hoḳolta maṭit mishizibo.”
24.3: Bade tain zebla Zoytun faṛor ufre boat asla, ou shomoy sahabi oḳole aia tanre niralae zikaila, “Huzur, amrare ḳoiba ni, ita kun shomoy oibo? Kun alamot dekia amra buzmu, afnar aoar shomoy ar kiamotor-o shomoy aichche?”
24.4: Isae ḳoila, “Dekio, ḳeu zanu tumrare na ṭoge.
24.5: Bout zone amar nam doria aibo, aia ḳoibo, ami-u al-Mosi, ḳoia boutre ṭogibo.
24.6: Huno, zuddor aoaz ar laṛair ḳobor tumra faibae, oile itae ḍoraio na. Ita nisoy goṭbo, goṭle-o ita to shesh nae.
24.7: Eḳ zatie aroḳ zatir loge, eḳ deshe aroḳ deshor loge laṛai korbo. Bout zagat boisal ar nidan deḳa dibo.
24.8: Oile ita to ḳali mosibotor shuru.
24.9: “Ou shomoy aile manshe tumrare zulum ḳorar lagi dorai dibo ar kun ḳoraibo. Amar lagi hoḳol zatie tumrare ginnaibo.
24.10: Teu bout zon fislizibo, eḳe-oinnore ginnaibo ar dorai dibo.
24.11: Bout bonḍo nobi aia manshore ṭogiba.
24.12: Naformanir foriman baṛizibo, erlagi bout manshor maya-momota ḳomizibo.
24.13: Oile hesh forzonto zera ṭikia roiba, era-u rehai faiba.
24.14: Hoḳol zatir gese shakki hishabe behesti bashshair kush-ḳobri toblig kora oibo, erbade-u kiamot aibo. Aḳeri zomanar halot
24.15: “Hozrot Danial nobir muk taki ze bezuita noforoti zinishor ḳota zanail oise, tumra ou pak zagat i zinish deḳbae. Ze zone tilaot ḳorer, he buzouk.
24.16: Ou shomoy zera Ehudia zilat taḳba, tara faṛedi gia bagouk.
24.17: Hidin ḳeu zudi goror salor ufre taḳe, he tar goror mal-samana nibar lagi, lamat lamia goror bitre na hamauk.
24.18: Zera bondor maze ase, tarar gotror saddor nibar lagi baṛit na auk.
24.19: Ou shomoy zeta beṭintor feṭo hurutta, ar zera huruttare bukur dud ḳaoaira, tarar boṛo mosibot oibo.
24.20: Tumra dua ḳoro, shitor dino ba Zummabare zanu tumrar bagia zaoa na lage.
24.21: Ou shomoy oto bezuita ḳoshṭo oibo, zeta duniar foyla taki aiz forzonto kunudin oise na, ar oito-o nae.
24.22: Mabude zudi i shomoyre ḳomaia na dita, te ḳeu zinda roilo na one. Oile Allae tan fosond ḳora bonda oḳlor lagi i shomoy ḳomaia diba.
24.23: “Hi shomoy ḳeu zudi tumrare ḳoy, ‘Huncho ni, al-Mosi bule ono aisoin’ ba ‘Hono aisoin’ te tumra ekin ḳorio na.
24.24: Ḳaron al-Mosi nam loia bout bonḍo aiba, nobi hazia-o bout bonḍo aiba. Itae bout boṛo boṛo asanok keramoti kam deḳaiba. Tara saiba, shuzug faile Allar fosond ḳora bondare duka dia be-fote nitagi.
24.25: Dekio, ami ita hokkolta tumrare age-u zanai dilam.
24.26: “Huno, ḳeu zudi tumrare ḳoy, ‘al-Mosi bule morubumit asoin,’ te tumra zaio na. Zudi koy, ‘Tain goror bitre asoin,’ te ekin ḳorio na.
24.27: Megor zilkir loge fube-foisme hoḳolbae zela for oizae, ami bin-Adom aile-o ola oibo.
24.28: Huno, lash zeno taḳe, hokun emne-u hono dola oy.
24.29: “Ou mosibotor shomoy shesh oar bade-u, ‘shuruz andair oizibo, sande ar for dito nae. Tera oḳol asman taki foṛizibo, asmanor kunu shoktiala siz-u ṭik-ṭak roito nae.’
24.30: Ou shomoy asmanor maze ami bin-Adomor nishana deḳa zaibo. Duniar hoḳol manshe ahazari korba. Tara deḳba, Allar kudroti shokti ar nuror mohimae, ‘megor kuṭit oia bin-Adom duniat aira.’
24.31: Ou shomoy zure zure shingar aoaz oibo, er loge loge-u duniar eḳ mata taki aroḳ matat tain firista oḳolre faṭaiba, era Allar fosond ḳora bonda oḳolre sairobae tone dola ḳorba.
24.32: “Ou ḍumur gasor bae saia talim lo. Gasor ḍal-fala norom oia zebla noya kuṛi baroy, ou shomoy tumra buzilao gormor din aichche.
24.33: Te ou laḳan tumra zebla deḳbae ita hoḳolta goṭer, dekia buzilio, bin-Adom-o daro aichchoin. Ḳali daro nae, tain aia duaro ṭukaira.
24.34: Ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, ita na goṭa forzonto i zomanar manush fuṛaita nae.
24.35: Asman-zomin hoḳolta binash oizibo, oile amar kalam hamesha zari roibo.
24.36: “Hou din ar hi shomoyor befare ḳali amar gaibi baf Alla saṛa ar ḳeu zanoin na. Asmani firista ba Ibnullae-o zanoin na.
24.37: Nuh nobir amolo ze halot oisil, ami bin-Adom dusrabar aoar shomoy ṭik olaḳan-u oibo.
24.38: Boinna shuru oar age Nuh nobi zazo uṭar ag forzonto manshe ḳaoa-daoa ḳorse, eḳe-oinnore bia-shadi korse.
24.39: Nuh nobir boinnar fanie itare bashaia neoar ag forzonto tara kunta-u ṭer faila na. Ami bin-Adom aibar shomoy-o ṭik olaḳan oibo.
24.40: Ou shomoy duizon manush eḳloge bondo taḳle, eḳzonre neoa oibo ar dusra zonre bad deoa oibo.
24.41: Dui beṭie eḳloge bara-banat taḳle-o, erar eḳzonre neoa oibo, aroḳzon bad foṛizibo.
24.42: Erlagi koiram, tumra hushiar roio, tumrar malik kun din aiba, ita to tumra zano na.
24.43: Oile ikan mono rakio, sur kun shomoy aibo, ikan zudi giroste zanto, te to he hozag roilo one ar surre goro hamaite dilo na one.
24.44: Erlagi tumra-o hamesha tiar roio, ze shomoyor ḳota tumra sinta-o ḳortae nae, hou shomoy bin-Adom aiba.
24.45: “Ila hok-halali ar aḳoldar saḳor ḳe ase, zar ato tar munibe dayitto dila he oḳtor ḳalo oinno saḳor oḳolre ḳani baṭia dibo.
24.46: Ḳofali to hou saḳor, zare tar munibe aia hok-halal faiba.
24.47: Ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, munibe ou saḳoror ato-u tan nizor hoḳol don-samanar bar diba.
24.48: Oile doro, hou saḳore mone mone ḳoilo, amar munib aite to bout deri ase,
24.49: ar ou faḳe he hokkol saḳor-baḳorre mair-doir ḳorlo, ar modkuror loge ḳana-dana ḳoria mod ḳailo.
24.50: Bade ze din ar ze oḳtor ḳota he sinta-u ḳorto nae, hou din ar hou oḳto tar munib aia azir oiba.
24.51: Tain aia tare ḳaṭia ṭukraia bonḍo oḳlor loge mishaiba. Hino manshe ḳanda-ḳaṭi korba, ar zala-zontronae dat kiṛimiṛi diba.”

25.1: Erbade Isae ḳoila, “Behesti bashshai oilo ola doshgu fuṛir laḳan, zeta fuṛinte biar damandre aguaia anar lagi lem-lemṭon loia bar oilo.
25.2: Erar maze fas zon asil aḳoldar ar fas zon asil be-aḳol.
25.3: Be-aḳol fuṛinte ḳali lem loia bar oilo, lemor kunu tel nilo na.
25.4: Oile aḳoldar fuṛinte lemor loge fifat ḳori tel-o nilo.
25.5: Daman aite deri oae tara hoḳol-u ungaite ungaite gumai gelo.
25.6: “Bade ada-raitkur bala sillani huna gelo, ‘Daman aichchoin, daman aichchoin, zoldi baro.’
25.7: Sillani hunia ou fuṛin uṭia lem-lemṭon ṭik korat lagla.
25.8: Hou be-aḳol fuṛinte aḳoldar fuṛinre ḳoila, ‘Amrare tuṛa tel deo na, amrar lem limizargi.’
25.9: Tara ḳoila, ‘Amrar gese zeta tel ase, ita to amrar-u lagbo. Te tumra dukan taki tel anailao.’
25.10: Ou be-aḳol fuṛin tel anat gia harle-u daman ailla. Ou shomoy aḳoldar ou fuṛin zuit asla, tara damandre loia bia baṛit hamailo. Tara hamanir bade-u duar bond ḳora oilo.
25.11: Bade ou be-aḳol fuṛinte aia duar bond dekia ḳoila, ‘Hunra ni, duarḳan kuloukka.’
25.12: Damande zuaf dila, ‘Ami hasau ḳoiram, ami to tumrare sini na.’ ”
25.13: Ou kichchar bade Isae ḳoila, “Erdae tumra hushiar roio, hi din ar hi shomoyor ḳota to ḳeuror zana nai.” Tin saḳoror kichcha
25.14: Tain aro ḳoila, “Behesti bashshai ola eḳzon manshor laḳan, ein bidesh zaoar bala tan saḳor oḳlor ato asta shompottir bar shomzai dila.
25.15: Erar zoiggota mafik tain eḳzonre fas azar ṭeḳa, dusra zonre dui azar ar aroḳzonre eḳ azar ṭeḳa dila.
25.16: Fas azar ṭeḳa ze faisil, he ou ṭeḳadi karbar ḳoria aro fas azar lab ḳorlo.
25.17: Dui azar ṭeḳa ze faisil, he-o aro dui azar lab ḳorlo.
25.18: Oile eḳ azar ṭeḳa ze faisil, he tar malikor i ṭeḳa ḳamo na lagaia gat kudia maṭir tole toilo.
25.19: “Bout din bade hou malik desho aia tarar hishab-nikash saila.
25.20: Teu fas azar ṭeḳa ze faisil, he aro fas azar loia aia malikre ḳoilo, ‘Sab, afne amare fas azar ṭeḳa disla, ou ṭeḳadi ami aro fas azar lab ḳorsi.’
25.21: Ikan hunia malike ḳoila, ‘Shabbash, tumi kub hok-halali manush. Tumi huru-muru befare-u hok-halal roiso, erlagi ami tumare aro bout boṛo dayitto dimu. Ao, amar kushir bagi o.’
25.22: Bade dui azar ṭeḳa ze faisil, he aia ḳoilo, ‘Sab, afne amare dui azar ṭeḳa disla. Ami to aro dui azar lab ḳorsi.’
25.23: Teu malike ḳoila, ‘Shabbash, tumi kub hok-halali manush. Tumi tuṛa befare-u hok-halal roiso, erlagi ami tumare aro bout boṛo dayitto dimu. Ao, amar kushir bagi o.’
25.24: Oile eḳ azar ṭeḳa zare disla, he aia ḳoilo, ‘Sab, ami zani afne kub ḳoṛa manush. Afne ḳet na ḳoria-o dan ḳaṭoin ar bain na dile-o ali huroin.
25.25: Erdae ami ḍoraia afnar ṭeḳa maṭir tole lukaia toislam. Ou neukka afnar ṭeḳa.’
25.26: Malike ḳoila, ‘Haere ḳobis, tuin to kuṛia. Tui zudi ikan mono ḳorle, ami ket na ḳorle-o dan ḳaṭi ar bain na dile-o ali huri,
25.27: te amar ṭeḳa tui befarir gese dile na ḳene? Te to ami aia mul ṭeḳar loge kisu lab failam one.’
25.28: Bade tain oinno saḳor oḳolre ḳoila, ‘Tumra ogur ges taki ou ṭeḳa nia, dosh azar zar gese ase tare deo.
25.29: Huno, zar ase tare aro deoa oibo, tar aro baṛibo. Oile zar nai, tar zeta ase ota-o ḳaṛia neoa oibo.
25.30: Ou bojjat saḳorre nia tumra andair gato falai deo. Hou gato manshe ḳanda-ḳaṭi korbo ar zala-zontronae dat kiṛimiṛi dibo.’ Aḳerator bisaror boyan
25.31: “Bin-Adome zebla firista oḳolre loia nizor mohimae hirbar aiba, aia nizor bashshair godit boiba.
25.32: Ou shomoy duniar tamam zatir manshore tan samne ana oibo. Raḳale zela meṛa ar sagolre alada ḳore, tain-o oula hoḳol manshore algaia dui bag korba.
25.33: Tan ḍain galabae meṛa ar bau galabae sagolre raḳba.
25.34: “Erbade bashshae tan ḍain galar manshore ḳoiba, ‘Tumra zara amar batuni bafor rohom faiso, tumra ao. Ar duniar foyla taki tumrar lagi ze bashshai tiar ḳori raḳa oise, ou bashshair doḳol shomzia neo.
25.35: Mono ase ni, amar zebla feṭo buk lagsil, tumra amare ḳani dislae, fiasor shomoy fani dislae, ar musafir halote amare asroy dislae.
25.36: Ami zebla udla aslam, tumra ḳafoṛ dislae, bemaror shomoy kezmot ḳorslae, ar zel ḳanat amare deḳat geslae.’
25.37: “Ou shomoy hou allaoala manshe ḳoiba, ‘Malik, afnar buk lagae amra kun shomoy afnare ḳaoailam? Kun shomoy afnare fani dilam?
25.38: Ar kun shomoy musafir halote afnare asroy dilam, ḳali ga dekia kun shomoy ḳafoṛ dilam?
25.39: Ar kun shomoy-u ba bemari haloto afnar kezmot ḳorlam, ba zel ḳanat deḳat gelam?’
25.40: Ou shomoy bashshae tarare ḳoiba, ‘Ami hok kota ḳoiram, amar ou huru-muru eḳzon manshor lagi tumra zebla ita ḳorso, er mani amare-u ḳorso.’
25.41: “Bade bashshae tan bau galar manshore ḳoiba, ‘O lannotir dol, amar samon taki bago. Iblis-Shoytan ar tar samsa zinnat oḳlor lagi duzoḳor ze aguin tiar ḳora oise, hono zao.
25.42: Amar feṭo bukor ḳalo tumra amare ḳaoaiso na, fiasor shomoy fani diso na.
25.43: Amar musafir haloto roibar asroy diso na, ami zebla udla aslam, ḳafoṛ diso na, bemaror shomoy saiso na, amare deḳar lagi zelḳanat-o geso na.’
25.44: “Ou shomoy tara ḳoiba, ‘Huzur, amra kun shomoy ita ḳorlam? Afnare bukashi, fiasi, musafir, udla gotor, bemari ar zel ḳanat dekia-o shaijjo ḳorlam na?’
25.45: Bashshae tarare ḳoiba, ‘Ami hok kota ḳoiram, amar ou huru-muru eḳzon manshor lagi-u tumra zebla ita ḳorso na, er mani amare-u ḳorso na.’ ”
25.46: Heshe Isae ḳoila, “Ou naforman oḳole aḳerato siroḳal shaza faiba, oile allaoala manshe aḳeri zindegi faiba.”

26.1: Ou boyan shesh oia harle, Isae tan sahabi oḳolre ḳoila,
26.2: “Tumrar to zana ase, ar dui din bade-u Azadi Id. Idor shomoy ami bin-Adomre solibo loṭḳaia marar lagi dorai deoa oibo.”
26.3: Ou shomoy boṛo imam ar murobbi oḳol aia, tarar fordan imam Kayafar baṛit dola oila.
26.4: Dola oia ou foramish ḳorla, Isare kila lukaia aṭok koria zane mara zae.
26.5: Oile tara ḳoila, “Idor shomoy tare dortam nae. Dorle manshe gonḍogul lagai dito fare.” Hozrot Isare hazanir bed
26.6: Isa zebla Bayt-Ania gaur fosa-kusṭo bemari Saimonor baṛit asla,
26.7: ou shomoy eḳ beṭi manush tan gese aila. Beṭie sinor eḳ boyamo ḳori kub dami kaṭi ator anchila. Isa ḳaoat boia harle beṭie hoḳol ator tan matat ḍali dila.
26.8: Ita dekia sahabi oḳol biroḳto oia ḳoila, “Ou ator fuṭain ḳene borbad ḳora oilo?
26.9: I fuṭin besile to bout ṭeḳa faia gorib oḳolre bilai deoa gelo one.”
26.10: Ikan buzia Isae ḳoila, “Tumra i beṭigure duk dirae ḳene? Tain to amar lagi ṭik kam-u ḳorsoin.
26.11: Gorib oḳol to hamesha-u tumrar loge roiba. Oile amare to hamesha faitae nae.
26.12: Ein aia amar gotro ator maḳaia, dafon-ḳafonor lagi amare zuit ḳorsoin.
26.13: Ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, duniar zekunu zagat Allar kush-ḳobri toblig korar shomoy, ou besaṛire mono ḳorar lagi, tan i nek kamor ḳotaḳan-o ḳoa zaibo.” Sahabi Ihudar beimani
26.14: Bade tan barozon sahabir mazor eḳzon, en nam Ihuda Iskariat, ein boṛo imam oḳlor gese gia ḳoila,
26.15: “Isare afnarar ato doraia dile amare kita diba?” Teu boṛo imam oḳole tare rufar tish ṭeḳa dila.
26.16: Erbad taki-u Ihudae Isare doraia deoar shuzug tukanit roilo. Hozrot Isar aḳeri id
26.17: Ḳamir Saṛa Ruṭi Kaoar Idor foyla din, sahabi oḳole aia Isare zikaila, “Huzur, amra kun zagat gia afnar lagi Azadi Idor ḳana tiar ḳortam?”
26.18: Tain zuaf dila, “Tumra ṭauno zao. Gia omuk manshore ḳoio, ‘Huzure ḳoisoin, amar shomoy gonaia aichche, te ami amar sahabi oḳolre loia tumar baṛit id ḳormu.’ ”
26.19: Isar hukum mafik sahabi oḳole gia Azadi Idor ḳani tiar ḳorla.
26.20: Bade hainja bala Isae tan barozon sahabire loia ḳanit boila.
26.21: Boia ḳoila, “Ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, tumrar mazor eḳzone-u to amare dushmonor ato dorai dibo.”
26.22: Ikan hunia tara kub bezar oigela. Erlagi tara eḳ ek kori zikaila, “Huzur, i zon kita ami ni?”
26.23: Tain ḳoila, “Oḳon ze zone amar loge oia talo at harar, he-u amare doraia dibo.
26.24: Ami bin-Adomor moutor befare Asmani Kitabo zela leḳa ase, amar mout to oula-u oibo. Oile afsus hou zonor lagi, zegie amare doraia dibo. Duniat tar zonom na oa-u, tar lagi bout bala asil.”
26.25: Ze Ihudae Isare dorai dito sar, he tanre zikailo, “Huzur, hi zon kita ami ni?” Isae tare ḳoila, “Tumi ṭik-u ḳoirae.” al-Mosir mezbanir nomuna
26.26: Tara ḳana ḳaira, ou shomoy Isae ruṭi ato loia Allar shukria adae ḳorla. Tain ruṭi siṛia ṭukra ṭukra ḳori sahabi oḳolre dila. Dia ḳoila, “Ou neo, ḳao, mono ḳoro ita amar ḳaya.”
26.27: Bade tain shorbotor fiala loia Allar shukria zanaila, ar erare dia ḳoila, “Tumra hoḳole ou fiala taki anguror shorbot ḳao.
26.28: Mono ḳorio, ita amar lou. Ou lour zoriae adom zatir boutor guna mafi oibo. Allar loge manshor milonor usilla oilo ou lou.
26.29: Ami hasa ḳota ḳoiar, ami amar gaibi bafor bashshait dakil oia hari, tumrare loge loia zotodin noya halote anguror shorbot na ḳaisi, oto din i shorbot ar ḳaitam nae.”
26.30: Heshe tara hoḳole mili ek gozol gaia, gor taki bar oia Zoytun faṛo gelagi. Hozrot Fitore oshikar ḳorar agam ishara
26.31: Bade Isae tan sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Huno, aiz rait tumra hoḳole-u to amare falaia bagibae. Allar kalamo ase, ‘Ami meṛar falor raḳalre marmu, teu falor meṛain sairobae sitriziba.’
26.32: Oile amare murda taki zinda ḳorar bade, tumrar age-u ami Galil zilat zaimugi.”
26.33: Teu sahabi Fitore tanre ḳoila, “Huzur, hoḳol bagi gele-o ami bagitam nae.”
26.34: Isae ḳoila, “Te huno, ami tumare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, aiz fotabala murgae bang dibar age-u tumi tinbar ḳoibae, tumi amare sino na.”
26.35: Oile Fitore ḳoila, “Huzur, ou kita ḳoin, afnar loge zudi amar moron-o oy, ta-o ami kunumonte-u afnare oshikar ḳortam nae.” Hoḳol sahabie ou eḳlaḳan ḳoila. Getshimani bagano Hozrot Isa
26.36: Bade Hozrot Isae tan sahabi oḳolre loia Getshimani namor eḳ bagano aila. Aia erare ḳoila, “Tumra ono bo, ami hogalat gia dua ḳormu.”
26.37: Oḳan ḳoia tain Fitor ar Zibudiar dui fuare tan loge nila. Aste aste tan dilor maze duk ar hae-hutash baṛilo.
26.38: Tain erare ḳoila, “Baiainre, duke amar ḳoilja faṭizar. Tumra ono boiro ar amar loge hozag roio.”
26.39: Oḳan ḳoia tuṛa horia gia tain maṭit soizdat foṛia ḳoila, “O amar behesti abba, amar ufre ou ze zulum-mosibot aior, dusra kunu ufae taḳle ikanta horailao. Oile ita amar ichchae nae, tumar morzi mafik-u ouk.”
26.40: Soizda taki uṭia tain sahabi oḳlor gese aia deḳla, era gumai gesoin. Ou tain Fitorre hozag kori koila, “Tumra ekkan gonṭa-o hozag roitae farlae na ni?
26.41: Hozag ro dua ḳorar lagi, ar dua ḳoro forikka taki basar lagi. Tumrar dilor maze nisoy kial ase, oile ḳaya to ḳomzur.”
26.42: Bade tain dusrabar gia dua ḳorla, “O amar behesti abba, ou zulum-mosibot ami shoijjo na ḳorle, zudi dusra kunu fot na taḳe, taile tumar morzi mafik-u ouk.”
26.43: Bade tain hirbar aia deḳla, era gumai gesoin, gume tarar souk falai der.
26.44: Dekia tarare toia tain tisra bar gia eḳoi dua ḳorla.
26.45: Erbade tain sahabi oḳlor gese aia ḳoila, “Tumra deki oḳono arame gumairae. Huno, shomoy aichche, ami bin-Adomre gunagar oḳlor ato shomzai deoa oibo.
26.46: Uṭo, amra roana dei. Amare zegie dushmonor ato dorai dibo, he aia azigese.” Hozrot Isa dushmonor ato bondi
26.47: Tain erar loge mato roisoin, ou shomoy Ihuda hono ailo. He asil barozon sahabir mazor eḳzon. Tar loge oia aro boute laṭi-soṭa, toluar loia ailo. Boṛo imam ar murobbi oḳole erare faṭaisoin.
26.48: Tanre zegie doraia dito, ou Ihudae tar logor erare age hikaia disil, “Ami gia zar galo hunga dimu, he-u hou zon. Tumra ere aṭok korio.”
26.49: Erlagi Ihudae shuza-shuzi Isar gese gia ḳoilo, “Huzur, assalamu alaikum.” Ḳoia he tanre hunga dilo.
26.50: Isae tare ḳoila, “Baire, zeta ḳorat aiso, ḳorilao.” Loge loge-u tara aia Isare dorililo.
26.51: Ou shomoy Isar logor eḳzone nizor toluar bar ḳoria fordan imamor gulamre sed marla, sedor loge tar ek kan ḳaṭia foṛigelo.
26.52: Teu Isae enre ḳoila, “Tumar toluar bego harailao. Toluardi zara ḳelae, toluaror tole-u tarar zan zae.
26.53: Tumi ikan sinta ḳoro na ni, ami amar batuni bafor dorbaro aroz ḳorle, tain ḳoyeḳ azar firista faṭaita nae ni?
26.54: Oile ami ila ḳorle kitabor ḳota kila folibo? Kitabo zotota batail oise, ita to goṭbo-u.”
26.55: Bade tain ota manshore ḳoila, “Kita ba, ami kunu sur-ḍaḳait ni, tumra deki laṭi-soṭa, toluar loia amare dorat aiso. Ami to forteḳ din Baytul-Mukaddoso boia talim ditam. Ou shomoy to tumra amare dorlae na.
26.56: Ashole ita hokkolta goṭer, zate Asmani Kitabo nobi oḳole zela bataisoin, ota fura oy.” Ou shomoy sahabi oḳole Isare toia bagi gela. Deshor fotua komiṭir samne Hozrot Isa
26.57: Hozrot Isare doria hari ou manshe fordan imam Kayafar gese loia gelo. Hono moulana ar murobbi oḳol ekḳano dola oila.
26.58: Sahabi Fitor Isar ges tone duroi hori hori roia tan ḳore ḳore fordan imamor baṛir uṭanor ḳandat gela. Gia hesh-mesh kita oy, oḳan deḳar lagi uṭanor bitre hamaia, honor faradar oḳlor loge boila.
26.59: Hozrot Isare zane marilibar lagi boṛo imam oḳole ar mozlisor hoḳol manshe Isar bifokke kunu nalish tukaila,
26.60: oile faila na. Mozliso Isar bifokke boute misa shakki dile-o, tarar shakkir mil oilo na. Bade duizon manshe aia tan birudde misa shakki dia ḳoilo,
26.61: “Amra hunchi, he ḳoise, Allar Kaba Shorif, mani Baytul-Mukaddosre he bangilibo, ar tin dinor bitre hirbar banaibo.”
26.62: Teu fordan imam ubaia hoḳlor samne Isare zikaila, “Oba, tumi kunu mator zuaf ditae na ni? Ita manshe tumar befare kita shakki dira, hunrae ni?”
26.63: Oile tain kunu zuaf na dia nirai roila. Fordan imame tanre hirbar ḳoila, “Tumi zinda Allar ḳosom ḳaia ḳo sain, tumi kita Allar oada ḳora hou al-Mosi ni, tumi-u Allar ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla ni?”
26.64: Tain zuaf dila, “Afnara-u to ḳoira. Oile ami koiram, afnara deḳbane, ami bin-Adom arshe-azimo Alla Rabbul Alaminor ḍainor toḳto boat asi. Aro deḳba, ami behesti megor kuṭit oia duniat aiar.”
26.65: Ikan hunia-u fordan imame nizor finnor ḳafoṛ siṛia ḳoila, “He to shiriki korlo, te ar kunu shakkir zorur ase ni? Afnara nizor ḳane-u to hunla, he shiriki korlo.
26.66: Te oḳon afnara kita ray diba?” Tara ḳoila, “Ere to marilaoa dorḳar.”
26.67: Ou shomoy tara tan muko sef dilo, ar tanre soṛ-taboṛ marlo. Ḳeu ḳeu gushi maria ḳoilo,
26.68: “Hoi al-Mosi, gaibi ko sain, tore ḳegie marlo?” Hozrot Fitore tinbar oshikar ḳorla
26.69: Fitor uṭano boat asla, ou shomoy eḳ bandi beṭi tan ḳandat aia ḳoilo, “Galilor ou Isar loge to afne-o asla.”
26.70: Oile Fitore hoḳlor samne oshikar ḳoria ḳoila, “Na go, tumi ita kita mato? Ita kunta-u ami zani na.”
26.71: Oḳan ḳoia Fitor geiṭor daro gelagi. Tanre dekia aroḳ bandi beṭie ḳoilo, “Ou beṭa-o to Nasarot gaur Isar loge asil.”
26.72: Oile Fitore hirbar ḳosom ḳori koila, “Na, na, ami tare sini-u na.”
26.73: Ou shomoy tan ḳandat zera uba asil, tuṛa bade tara ḳoila, “Oba, tumi-o nichchoy erar logor, tumar mat-ḳotae-u to buza zar.”
26.74: Teu Fitore ḳoila, “Allar gozob foṛouk, ami kosom ḳaia ḳoiar, ami muṭe-u tare sini na.”
26.75: Oḳan ḳoite-u murgae bang dilailo. Bang hunte-u Fitoror mono oigelo, Isae age ḳoisla, “Murgae bang dibar age-u tumi tinbar ḳoibae, tumi amare sino na.” Erlagi tain bare gia au au ḳori kandon dorla.

27.1: Biane uṭia boṛo imam ar murobbi oḳole Hozrot Isare zane marar foramish ḳorla.
27.2: Tara tanre bandia Ruman hakim Filator gese loia gela. Ihudar moron
27.3: Ze zone Hozrot Isare dushmonor ato dorai disil, hou Ihudae zebla deḳlo bisaro tanre dushi shaibosto ḳora oise, ou tar bitre kub duk hamailo. He boṛo imam ar murobbi oḳlor gese hou rufar tish ṭeḳa loia aia ḳoilo,
27.4: “Ami to eḳzon ni-oforadi manshore zane marilibar lagi dorai dia guna ḳorsi.” Ikan hunia tara ḳoila, “Teu amrar kita oilo? Ita to tumar befar.”
27.5: Ou shomoy Ihudae hou tish ṭeḳa Baytul-Mukaddoso iṭa mari falaia gelogi, gia nize nize-u fash lagia morigelo.
27.6: Boṛo imam oḳole i ṭeḳa ato loia ḳoila, “Iguin to Baytul-Mukaddosor tohbilo raḳa ṭik nae, ḳaron ita oilo lour dam.”
27.7: Bade tara foramish ḳoria ou ṭeḳadi musafir manshor ḳobrostanor lagi ek kumaror ges taki zaga loila.
27.8: Erlagi ou zagare oḳono ‘lour zaga’ ḳoa oy.
27.9: Ita oae, Iaromia nobir mazdi zeta batail oisil, ota foligelo. Tain ḳoisla, “Tara ze tish ṭeḳa nilo, ikṭa oilo tan dam. Boni Israile tan ou dam shaibosto ḳorsil.
27.10: Allae amare zela hukum disoin, ola-u tara kumaror zaga loar lagi ṭeḳaguin dilo.” Hakim Filator adaloto Hozrot Isa
27.11: Hozrot Isare Ruman fordan hakim Filator adaloto azir ḳora oilo. Hakime tanre zikaila, “Kita ba, tumi Ihudi oḳlor bashsha ni?” Tain ḳoila, “Ji oy, afne ṭik-u ḳoira.”
27.12: Boṛo imam ar murobbi oḳole tan name bout nalish dila. Oile Isae kunu zuaf dila na.
27.13: Ou shomoy Filate zikaila, “Tumi kunu zuaf ditae na ni? Deḳrae ni, tara tumar birudde ḳoto nalish dira.”
27.14: Oile Isae itar ekkan-o zuaf na deoae Filat kub taijjub oigela.
27.15: Deshor fordan hakimor niom asil, Azadi Idor shomoy manshor fosond mafik eḳzon azotire ḳalas dita.
27.16: Ou shomoy Isa-Barabba namor eḳ namḳora azoti zelo asil.
27.17: Hoḳol manush ekḳano dola oar bade hakim Filate tarare zikaila, “Tumra kita ḳo? Ami kare saṛtam, Isa-Barabbare, na hou Isare, zare al-Mosi koa oy?”
27.18: Filate zanta, boṛo imam oḳole ingsha ḳoria Hozrot Isare nia tan ato disoin.
27.19: Filat zebla hakimor ashono boat, ou shomoy tan bibie ḳobor faṭaia zanaila, “Ou ni-oforad manshore tumi kunta ḳorio na, tan befare ami aiz eḳṭa kuab dekia boṛo duk lagse.”
27.20: Oile boṛo imam ar murobbi oḳole manshore uskaia dila, tara zanu Barabbar mukti sain ar Isare zane marilibar lagi koin.
27.21: Bade fordan hakim Filate onor manshore zikaila, “Ou duio zonor maze ami kare saṛtam?” Tara ḳoila, “Barabbare.”
27.22: Teu Filate tarare zikaila, “Te tumra zare al-Mosi ko, hou Isare kita ḳortam?” Tara hoḳole sillani lagailo, “Tare solibo gatia maro.”
27.23: Tain ḳoila, “Ḳene, he kita dush ḳorse?” Oile manshe aro zure zure misil lagailo, “Solibo deo, solibo deo.”
27.24: Filate zebla deḳla, tain kunumonte-u Isare basaita farra na, borong gonḍogul aro baṛer. Ou tain fani dia hoḳlor samne tan at doia ḳoila, “I manshor lour dayi ami nae, tumra-u er zuaf dibae.”
27.25: Teu hoḳol manshe ḳoila, “Ṭik ase, amra ar amrar aolad oḳol i lour dayi oimu.”
27.26: Teu Filate tarare kushi korta ḳori Barabbare ḳalas dilaila. Ar Isare besh ḳori sabuk maria, solibo deoar hukum dila. (Solib oilo laḳṛidi banail manshore loṭḳaia marar eḳ zinish.) Sifai oḳlor ṭaṭṭa-moshkora
27.27: Bade Filator sifai oḳole Isare doria tarar kempor bitre loia gelo. Hono asta sifai dol dia tanre ber ḳori raḳlo.
27.28: Tara tan finnor ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ kulia, lal-baingoni rongor bashshai lebas findailo.
27.29: Ar gosa-ḳaṭa dia raz-mukuṭ banaia tan matat dilo. Tan ḍain ato dilo eḳṭa raz-laṭi. Tane ijjot deḳanir ban ḳoria tan samne aṭu gaṛia boia ḳoilo, “Ihudir bashsha, marhaba.”
27.30: Ou shomoy tara tan ufre sef dilo ar ou laṭi dia bare bare tan matat marlo.
27.31: Ou laḳan ṭaṭṭa-moshkora ar bettomizi korar bade tan finnor baingoni lebas kulia, tan nizor ḳafoṛ findailo. Tanre solibo nia zane marilita ḳori roana dilo. Solibor ufre Hozrot Isa
27.32: Sifai dole Isare loia zaira, ou shomoy tara Kurini elaḳar Saimon namor eḳzon manshore deḳlo. Sifai oḳole zur ḳoria enedi hou solib boaia neoailo.
27.33: Tara Isare loia Golgata, mani ‘Kollar Saṛ’ namor zagat gelo.
27.34: Hono nia hari mura namor oshud furail anguror shorbot tan muko dilo, oile tain ita ḳaila na.
27.35: Bade tara Isare nia ou solibo gatilo. Sifai oḳole tan ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ baṭia neoar lagi loṭari maria baiggo forikka ḳorlo.
27.36: Ar tara ono boia tanre fara dilo.
27.37: Solibo tan matar ufre oforad-namar maze leḳlo, “En nam Isa, Ihudir bashsha.”
27.38: Duizon ḍaḳaitre-o tan loge loṭḳail oilo, eḳzon ḍain galat, oinnozon bau galat.
27.39: Fotedi zera zaoat asil tara mata laṛaia Isare siṛaia ḳoilo,
27.40: “Oi mia, tumi bule Baytul-Mukaddos Kaba gor bangia tin dinor maze hirbar banailibae! Te oḳon nizor zan basao na. Tumi bule Allar ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla, te solib taki lamia ao na.”
27.41: Boṛo imam, moulana ar murobbi oḳole-o tanre siṛaia ḳoila,
27.42: “He bule manshor zan basaito, oḳon to nizor zan-u basaito farer na. Hirbar Boni Israilor bashsha-o bule he! Te oḳon farle solib taki lamia auk, teu amra-o ota dekia tar ufre iman anmu.
27.43: He to Allar ufre borosha ḳore. Oḳon Alla zudi tar ufre kushi taḳoin, te tare basaukka. He to dabi korto, he Ibnulla, Alla Pakor ḳas mayar zon.”
27.44: Tan ḍaine-baue ze dui ḍaḳaitre solibo loṭḳail oisil, tara-o tanre ota ḳoia siṛailo. Hozrot Isa al-Mosir ufat
27.45: Ou din duifor taki zuhoror bad forzonto tin gonṭa asta desh andair oigelo.
27.46: Ar Isae kub zure zure ḳoila, “Eloi, eloi, lama sabaktani?” Mani, “O amar Alla, amar Moula, tumi kene amar log saṛi dilae?”
27.47: Ou shomoy tan daro zara uba asil, tara ikan hunia ḳoila, “Huno, huno, he Hozrot Iliasre ḍaḳer.”
27.48: Tara eḳzone douṛaia gia ekkan tena ania ṭenga anguror shorbotor maze bizaia, eḳ laṭir matat bandia usa ḳori tanre ḳaite dilo.
27.49: Baki hoḳole ḳoilo, “Aichcha, deki na, Ilias nobi tare basanit ain ni.”
27.50: Heshe Isae hirbar zure aoaz ḳoria aḳeri dom falaia inteḳal ḳorla.
27.51: Loge loge Baytul-Mukaddos mani Kaba goror Herem Shorifor fordaḳan, ufre taki tol forzonto siṛia dui ṭukra oigelo. Ar boisalor loge boṛo boṛo fattor oḳol faṭigelo.
27.52: Bout ḳoyboror muk kuligelo, ar Allar mayar ze bonda oḳol mara gesla, era bout zon zinda oia uṭla.
27.53: Tara ḳoybor taki bar oia aila. Isa murda taki zinda oia harle, tara fobitro ṭauno gia hamaila, ar bout zonre deḳa dila.
27.54: Fordan sifair loge aro zeta sifai oḳole Isare fara deoat asla, tara ou boisal ar hoḳol halot dekia kub ḍoraia ḳoila, “Nichchoy, ein-u asla Allar ḳas mayar zon, Ibnulla.”
27.55: Galil zila taki zeta beṭinte Isar kezmot ḳorar lagi tan loge oia aisla, tara-o duroi ubaia ita deḳla.
27.56: Erar maze asla Mogdilini Moriom, Iusi ar Iakubor ma Moriom, ar Zibudiar bou. Hozrot Isar rouza mubarok
27.57: Ou din hainja bala Arimatia gaur Iusuf namor eḳzon doni manush hono aila. Tain Isar eḳ shagrid asla.
27.58: Tain hakim Filator gese aia, Hozrot Isar lash nita saila. Teu Filate tanre lash neoar izazot dila.
27.59: Iusufe Isar lash solib taki lamaia ḳafon findaila.
27.60: Tain faṛ ḳaṭia nizor lagi ze ḳoybor kudisla, ou ḳoyboror maze Isare dafon ḳorla. Bade boṛo eḳ fattor ṭelia ania ḳoyboror muko dia gelagi.
27.61: Oile Mogdilini Moriom ar aroḳ Moriom ou ḳoyboror daro boi roila.
27.62: Bador din Zummabare boṛo imam ar Forishi oḳol aia hakim Filator gese ḳoila,
27.63: “Huzur, amrar mono ase, ou ṭoge zinda taḳte ḳoisil, he bule morar tin din bade hirbar zinda oia uṭbo.
27.64: Erlagi afne hukum deukka, ḳoyborṭa zanu tin din forzonto ḳoṛa fara dia raḳa oy. Arnae tar ummot oḳole tar lash suri kori nia manshore ḳoito fare, tain to zinda oigesoin. Taile age zeta ḳoia duka dise, oḳon aro beshi duka dibo.”
27.65: Filate ḳoila, “Tumra faradar oḳolre neo, nia zela faro, ola fara deoar bebosta ḳoro.”
27.66: Ou tara gia ḳoyboror muko ze fattor asil, ou fattoror ufre sil-sappoṛ mari toila ar ḳoṛaḳoṛi fara deoar bebosta ḳorla.

28.1: Zummabar shesh oia haftar foyla din fozor oḳto, Mogdilini Moriom ar oinno Moriome Hozrot Isar ḳoybor deḳat gela.
28.2: Ou shomoy aḳta-u boṛo eḳ boisal oilo ar asman taki Allar eḳ firista lamia aila. Aia tain ḳoyboror mukor fattorṭa horaia, er ufre boila.
28.3: Tan surot asil kub nurani ar finnor ḳafoṛ asil dola soḳsoḳa.
28.4: Tanre dekia faradar oḳole ḍoraia ḳafa dorla ar tara beush oia foṛi roila.
28.5: Firistae ou beṭintore ḳoila, “Ḍoraio na go. Ami zani, solibo loṭḳaia zare zane mara oise, tumra hou Isare-u tukairae.
28.6: Oile tain to ino nae. Tain zela ḳoisla, ola-u zinda oia uṭi gesoin. Ao, tanre ze zagat hutaia raḳa oisil, oḳan aia deḳo.
28.7: Ar tumra zoldi zao, gia tan sahabi oḳolre ḳo, tain murda taki zinda oia tarar age oia Galilo zairagi. Hono-u tan loge tarar deḳa oibo. Huno, ami age-u tumrare ikan zanai dilam.”
28.8: Beṭinte zudio ḍoraisla, tebou tara kushir suṭe tan sahabi oḳolre i kobor zananir lagi douṛaia roana oila.
28.9: Ou shomoy aḳta-u Hozrot Isa aia erare salam dila. Loge loge tara tan samne aia faot doria ḳodombusi korla.
28.10: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Ḍoraio na go. Tumra gia amar baiainre ḳo, tara Galilo zaitagi. Hono tarar loge amar deḳa oibo.”
28.11: Isar logor batchit shesh ḳoria tara zebla zairagi, ou shomoy hou faradaror ḳoyzone ṭauno gia boṛo imam oḳolre ita hokkolta zanaila.
28.12: Teu boṛo imam ar murobbi oḳol ekḳano dola oia foramish ḳorla, ou faradar sifai oḳolre bout ṭeḳa dibar lagi.
28.13: Tara sifai oḳolre ḳoila, “Tumra ḳoio, ‘Amra zebla gumo aslam, ou shomoy shagrid oḳole aia tan lash suri kori nisoingi.’
28.14: Ikan zudi deshor fordan hakim sabe hunilain, te amra tanre buz dimu, tan at taki tumrare basaimu.”
28.15: Teu faradar oḳole ou ṭeḳa nila, ar tarare zela hikail oisil, ola ḳoila. Oḳon forzonto i misa ḳota Ihudi shomazo roṭail ase. Hozrot Isa al-Mosir aḳeri hukum
28.16: Isae tan sahabi oḳolre Galilor ze faṛo zaoar ḳota ḳoisla, hou egaro zon sahabi ou faṛo aila.
28.17: Aia Isare dekia tara soizda ḳorla, ermaze ḳoyzonor bitre shondoy asil.
28.18: Ou shomoy Isa tarar ḳandat aia ḳoila, “Behest ar duniar hokkol ḳemota amare deoa oise.
28.19: Erlagi tumra gia tamam zatir manshore amar ummot banao. Behesti baba Alla Pak, tan ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla, ar Pak Ruhur name manshore torikar gusol ḳorao.
28.20: Ami tumrare zeta hukum disi, ota amol ḳorar lagi tarare talim deo. Mono rakio, kiamotor ag forzonto shob shomoy ami tumrar loge loge asi.” Amin.

1.1: Alla Pakor ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla Hozrot Isa al-Mosir Injil, mani kush-ḳobri boyanir shuru.
1.2: Bout din age, Hozrot Ishaya nobir kitabo Alla Pake bataisoin, Huno, ami tumar age amar fegamborre beziar, ein tumar fot sohi korba.
1.3: Morubumir maze zure zure eḳzone elan ḳorra, tumra malikor fot sohi koro, tan solar rasta oḳol shida ḳoro.
1.4: Ou ayat mafik Hozrot Ehia nobie morubumit gia toblig korta ar toubar gusol ḳoraita. Tain elan ḳorta, “Gunar mafir lagi touba ḳoro, torikabondi lo.”
1.5: Teu asta Ehudia zila ar Zeruzalem ṭaunor hoḳol manush bar oia Ehiar gese aia, zarzir gunar lagi touba ḳorla, ar Ehiae tarare Zordan gangor fanit toubar gusol ḳoraita.
1.6: Ehia nobie uṭor rumor ḳafoṛ findita ar ḳomro samṛar belṭ bandita. Tain faṛia mou ar foring kaita.
1.7: Tain manshore ḳoita, “Amar bade aro eḳzone toshrif anra, ein ama tone-o himmot-ala. Unda oia tan faor zutar fita kular laḳ-o ami nae.
1.8: Ami tumrare fanidi toubar gusol ḳorailam, oile tain tumrare Pak Ruhu dia gusol ḳoraiba.” Hozrot Isar pak gusol ar forikka
1.9: Ou shomoy Hozrot Isa Galil zilar Nasarot gau tone Ehiar gese aia, Zordan gango torikabondi loila.
1.10: Ar fanit buṛ dia uṭte-u Isae loge loge deḳla asman dui bag oigese, Allar ruhu faror surot doria tan ufre lamia aira.
1.11: Ou shomoy asman tone aoaz oilo, “O fut, tumi-u amar ḳas mayar zon, tumar ufre ami kub kushi.”
1.12: Erbade-u Allai Pak Ruhur tagide tanre morubumit beza oilo.
1.13: Ou morubumit Shoytane sallish din dori Isare lalos deḳaia guna ḳoraito sailo. Hino zongli zanuaror loge tain roila ar Allar firista oḳole tan kezmot ḳorta. Galil zilat Hozrot Isar muzeza ar toblig (1:14–7:23) Hozrot Isar foyla toblig kam
1.14: Hozrot Ehia zelḳanat bondi oar bade Isa Galil zilat aia Allar batail ou kush-ḳobri toblig korla,
1.15: “Shomoy fura oigese, Allar bashshai nozdik aichche. Afnara touba ḳoroukka ar ou kush-ḳobrir ufre iman anoukka.”
1.16: Bade tain Galil aoror faredi aṭia zaira, ou shomoy deḳla, Saimon ar tan bai Andriase aoro zal baira. Era to maimol asla.
1.17: Isae erare ḳoila, “Amar loge ao, ami tumrare manush dorar zalua banaimu.”
1.18: Loge loge era zalor log saṛia Isar loge log dorla.
1.19: On tone tuṛa age gia tain deḳla, Iakub ar Hannan duio baie nao-o boia zal zuit-zait ḳorra, erar bafor nam Zibudia.
1.20: Isae erare dekia-u ḍaḳ dila, ḍaḳ hunia era-o nizor baf Zibudiare ḳamlaintor loge nao-o toia Isar log dorla. Zinor asor-ala beṭare shifa ḳora
1.21: Bade era hoḳole milia Kofornaum ṭauno gela, ar Ihudir Zummabare tarar mosido hamaia Isae talim dila. Hozrot Musar reoaz mafik Ihudir Zummabar oilo Shukrobar shuruz ḍuba taki Shonibaror shuruz ḍuba forzonto. I din kunuzat ḳam ḳora haram.
1.22: Tan talim hunia manush taijjub bonigela, tain to tarar alim-ulamar laḳan boyan ḳorra na, tain ḳemota-ala manshor laḳan talim dira.
1.23: Ou shomoy zinor asor-ala eḳ beṭa-o ou mosidor bitre asil.
1.24: He sillaia ḳoilo, “O Nasarotor Isa, amrar loge afnar kunu zae-zorur ase ni? Afne kita amrare binash ḳorat aisoin ni? Ami to afnare sini, afne-u Allar hou pak zon.”
1.25: Ikan hunia Isae tare damki dila, “Chup, oḳon-u ere saṛia za.”
1.26: Ou hi zine beṭare murani maria zure sik dia saṛia gelogi.
1.27: Ita dekia hoḳole taijjub oia eḳe-oinne ḳoilo, “Deḳrae ni! Asanok karbar! Ita kun zator noya talim? Tan ḳemota ḳaṭaia zinnatre hukum dein, ar tara-o mane.”
1.28: Erdae Isar nam asta Galil zilar sairobae kub zoldi uṛi gelo. Saimonor hoṛir baṛit Hozrot Isa
1.29: Mosid taki bar oia tain-tain Iakub ar Hannanor loge oia Saimon ar Andriasor baṛit gela.
1.30: Saimonor hoṛir kub taf oisil, tain bisnat foṛono asla. Isae toshrif ante-u tanre bemarir ḳota zanail oilo.
1.31: Bemar hunia tain ou beṭir ato dori tulla, ar loge loge tafe saṛi dilo, beṭi uṭia gia erar memandari korat lagla.
1.32: Ou zummar din sheshe hainja bala, shuruz ḍubar bade manshe hoḳol bemarire ar zinor asor-ala manshore Isar gese loia ailo.
1.33: Asta ṭaunor manush aia ou baṛir uṭano dola oigelo.
1.34: Teu Isae nanan nomunar bout bemarir shifa ḳorla ar boutor log tone zinnat saṛaila. Oile zinnate tan forisoy zanai diba ḳori, tain itare kunu mat matar shuzug dila na. Galil zilat toblig
1.35: Bade fotabala uṭia tain nirai zagat gia dua ḳorat boila.
1.36: Teu Saimon ar tan logor hoḳole Isare tallash ḳorat bar oila.
1.37: Baroia tanre faia ḳoila, “Huzur, hokkol manshe afnar tallash ḳorer.”
1.38: Isae ḳoila, “Ao, amra ou ḳanda-ḳasar gauainto gia toblig kori. Erlagi-u to ami aisi.”
1.39: Bade tain hara Galil zilar mosidainto gia toblig korla ar zinnat saṛaila. Fosa-kusṭo bemarire shifa ḳora
1.40: Eḳdin eḳ fosa-kusṭo bemarie Hozrot Isar ḳandat aia tan faot foṛia minot ḳoria ḳoilo, “Huzur, afnar morzi oile amare shifa ḳoria fak-saf ḳoroukka.”
1.41: Beṭar bae tan kub doya hamailo. Tain nizor at baṛaia tare soia ḳoila, “Oy ami sairam, tumi fak-saf o.”
1.42: Ḳoar loge loge tar bemar bala oia he fak-saf oigelo.
1.43: Isae ou shomoy-u tare bidae dila ar doṛaia ḳoila,
1.44: “Huno, ita ḳobor ḳeurore hunaio na. Ḳali imam sabor gese gia deḳao ar fak-saf oar lagi Hozrot Musar kitabor hukum mafik, kurbani adae ḳoro. Teu shomaze-o zanilibo, tumi bala oigeso.”
1.45: Oile he bare gia-u ita hokkol bae roṭai dilo. Erdae Isa ar kula-mela kunu gaut zaita farla na. Tain bara nirai zagat gia roa laglo, ono-o sairobae tone manush tan gese aila.

2.1: Ḳoydin bade Hozrot Isa hirbar Kofornaum ṭauno firia aile manshe hunilila tain goro asoin.
2.2: Teu oto manush ino zoma oila, goro to duror ḳota, goror bare-o ar zaga roilo na. Tain era hoḳlor gese Allar kalam toblig korat asla.
2.3: Ou shomoy sairzon manshe eḳzon ordong bemarire boia loia Isar gese ailo, erar loge aro manush asla.
2.4: Oile biṛor lagi tare Isar gese loia zaita farla na. Erdae tain ze zagat boat asla, ṭik tar ufror sal fuṛ ḳoria folo shudda ou bemarire lamat lamai dilo.
2.5: Tarar imanor bol dekia tain ou ordong bemarire ḳoila, “Baba, tumar tamam guna maf ḳori dilailam.”
2.6: Oile hikano ḳoyzon moulana boat asla. Tain-tain mone mone ḳoila,
2.7: “I manshe ilaḳan mater ḳene? He to shiriki korer. Eḳmatro Alla saṛa ar ḳe guna maf ḳorto fare?”
2.8: Tanre loia moulana oḳole ze olaḳan sinta ḳorra, Isae tan gaibi bole ikan buzilila, buzia erare ḳoila, “Afnara ḳene mone mone ila sinta ḳorra?
2.9: I ordong bemarire kunḳan ḳoa amar lagi shuza, tumar guna maf ḳora oilo, na, uṭo tumar folo loia aṭia zaogi?
2.10: Te oḳon afnara forman deḳoukka, i duniat guna maf ḳorar ḳemota ami bin-Adomor ase,” oḳan ḳoia-u tain bemari beṭare ḳoila,
2.11: “Ami tumare ḳoiar, uṭo, tumar folo loia tumar baṛit zao.”
2.12: Teu loge loge ou bemari beṭa uṭia tar folo loia hoḳlor samne-u bar oia gelo. Ikan dekia hoḳole taijjub oia ḳoila, “Subohan Alla, zindegie kunudin ilaḳan ḳam deḳsi na.” Hozrot Isa gunagaror ḳanḍari
2.13: Bade Hozrot Isa hirbar bar oia Galil aoror daro gela, teu hokkol manush tan ḳandat ailo, tain tarare talim deoat lagla.
2.14: Talim dia fotedi zaite zaite deḳla, Alfir fua Lebi kazna tular ofiso boi roisoin. Dekia tanre ḳoila, “Ao amar ummot o.” Teu Lebi uṭia Isar loge loge gela.
2.15: Bade tain Lebir baṛit gia ḳaoat boila. Bout ḳazna tulra ar gunagar manush-o Isa ar tan ummot oḳlor loge ḳanit asla. Ou shomoy bout manush tan ḳore ḳore gurat asil.
2.16: Oile tain gunagar oḳlor loge boia ḳani kaira dekia Forishi mozobor moulana oḳole tan ummot oḳolre ḳoila, “Ein gushkur ḳazna tulra ar ḳobis oḳlor loge ḳaoa-daoa ḳoroin ḳene?”
2.17: Ikan hunia Isae ou moulana oḳolre ḳoila, “Bala manshor ḳobiraz lage na, oile bemarir to lage. Ami forezgaror gese aisi na, gunagar oḳolre-u daot ditam aisi.” Furan talim taki Hozrot Isar noya talim bala
2.18: Eḳbar Hozrot Ehiar ummot ar Forishi oḳol ruza asla, ita dekia kisu manshe Isar gese aia ḳoila, “Ehia nobir ummot ar Forishi oḳole ruza raḳoin, oile afnar ummot oḳole ruza raḳoin na ḳene?”
2.19: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Nosha loge taḳte kita boirati oḳole ruza raḳto fare ni? Na, ḳeu ruza roy na, zotodin nosha loge taḳoin, oto din tara ruza raḳto fare na.
2.20: Oile ola oḳt aibo, zebla noshare tarar ges tone horail oizibo, ou shomoy tara ruza raḳba.
2.21: Furan ḳafoṛor maze ḳeu noya ḳafoṛ zuṛa dey na. Zuṛa dile ou ḳafoṛ doia harle kus oia siṛia i fuṛ aro boṛo oizae.
2.22: Furan samṛar tolit ḳeu taza anguror rosh bore na. Borle ou taza roshor fafe toli faṭia rosh ar toli duiota borbad oy. Taza rosh noya tolit toite oy.” Zummabaror befare noya talim
2.23: Eḳ Zummabare Hozrot Isa ḳetor ailedi aṭia zaoat asla. Aṭi aṭi tan ummot oḳole danor soṛa siṛat lagla.
2.24: Ita dekia Forishi dole Isare ḳoila, “Amrar Musa nobir shoriot mafik to Zummabare kunuzat ḳam ḳora zaiz nae, te tara i danor soṛa siṛira kitar lagi?”
2.25: Isae zuaf dila, “Daud nobi ar tan logor hoḳole eḳbar feṭor buke zeta ḳorsla, ita kita tumitain kunu shomoy foṛso na ni?
2.26: Tain to fordan imam Abiatoror amolo Allar goro hamaia, ze fobitro ruṭi imam sab bade ar ḳeu ḳaoa zaiz nae, ou ruṭi kaisla ar tan logor manshore-o disla.”
2.27: Isae tarare aro ḳoila, “Zummabaror balair lagi to manshore banail oise na, oile manshor balair lagi-u Zummabar banail oise.
2.28: Huno, Zummabaror tamam eḳtiar ami bin-Adomor ato ase.”

3.1: Hozrot Isa hirbar mosido gia hamaila, hono ola eḳ beṭa asil, tar eḳ at bemare hukai gese.
3.2: Tain Zummabare ou beṭare bala ḳoroin ki na deḳar lagi Forishi mozobor ḳoyzon manshe tan bae kub kial raḳla, tara saila tan kunu kut bar ḳoria fando falaita.
3.3: Isae ou hukna at-ala beṭare ḳoila, “Oba, hoḳlor samne aia ubao sain.”
3.4: Beṭa aia harle tain hoḳol manshore zikaila, “Sab oḳol, Zummabare kita ḳora zorur, nek kam, na bod ḳam? Zanor hefazot ḳora, na zane mara?” Ikan hunia tara muk bond ḳori boiroila.
3.5: Tarar monor i fashan halot dekia, Isar dilo kub duk hamailo. Tain tarar bae saia gusa ḳori hou bemari beṭare ḳoila, “Tumar atḳan baṛao.” He tar at baṛaite-u agor laḳan fura bala oigelo.
3.6: Ikan dekia-u Forishi oḳol loge loge bar oigela, gia Raza Herudor manshor loge milia Isare zane marilibar foramish ḳorla.
3.7: -8 Bade Isae tan shagrid oḳolre loia aoror faro gelagi, hono-o bout manush tan ḳore ḳore gela. Tan nanan muzeza ar keramotir ḳobor faia, Ehudia zila, Galil, Zeruzalem, Idum, Zordan gangor hofar, Shur ar Sidon elaḳa taki ou manush oḳol aisla.
3.9: Manshor biṛ dekia tain shagrid oḳolre ḳoila, “Tumra amar lagi ekkan nao zuit ḳoro, arnae manshe ṭela-dakka ḳaia amar ufre aia foṛiziba.”
3.10: Tain bout bemarire shifa ḳorae bemari manshe tane soita ḳori ṭelia dakkaia aia tan ufre foṛizita.
3.11: Ar zin-but oḳole tane deḳle-u tan samne maṭit foṛia soizda ḳoria sillaia ḳoito, “Afne-u Allar ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla.”
3.12: Oile Isae tarare kub ḳoṛaḳoṛi hukum dita, “Ḳobordar! Tumra amar forisoy zair ḳorio na.” Barozon sahabi fosond ḳora
3.13: Bade Hozrot Isa faṛor ufre gelagi, gia tan fosond ḳora kisu shagridre tan ḳandat ḍaḳaia nila.
3.14: -15 Era aia harle erar maz tone barozonre tain alog korla, era zanu tan loge loge roin, ar zin-but saṛanir ḳemota dia erare toblig kamo bezita faroin. Ou barozon oila tan sahabi.
3.16: Tain Saimonor noya nam raḳla Fitor.
3.17: Zibudiar dui fua Iakub ar Hannan, tain erar noya nam dila Bunergosh, mani megor ḍaḳor fua.
3.18: Andrias, Filif, Bortolmoy, Moti, Tumas, Alfir fua Iakub, Toddey, muktizudda Saimon,
3.19: ar Ihuda Iskariat, ou Ihudae bade beimani koria Isare dushmonor ato doraia disil. Hozrot Isa ar zinor bashsha
3.20: Hozrot Isa eḳ baṛit gela. Ono aia-o oto beshi manshe biṛ bandila, biṛor lagi Isae ar sahabi oḳole-o ḳana ḳaita farla na.
3.21: Tan bai-biradore i kobor hunia tanre on taki bar ḳori neoat aila, era ḳoila, “Tar to mata ḳaraf oigese.”
3.22: Zeruzalem taki koyzon moulana aisla, tara ḳoila, “Zinor bashsha Bel-Sobule tare asor ḳorse. Ou Bel-Sobulor bole he zin-but saṛae.”
3.23: Ikan hunia Isae ou moulana oḳolre daro anaia kichcha dia ḳoila, “Shoytane kila Shoytanre ḳedae?
3.24: Kunu deshor bitre doladoli lagigele i desh to ar ṭike na.
3.25: Oula kunu foribaror maze-o zebla doladoli lagi zae, ou foribar-o ar ṭike na.
3.26: Te Shoytane-o zudi nizor maze doladoli lagai dey, he-o to ṭikto nae, binash oizibo.
3.27: Asol hasa ḳota oilo, kunu ḍaḳait ḍaḳatit aia foyla ou baṛir bolala mul girostre na bandile, he luṭ-toraz ḳorto farto nae. Oile tare bandia harle luṭ-toraz ḳorto farbo.
3.28: Hunoukka, ami hasa ḳota ḳoiram, manshor tamam nomunar guna ar kufurir mafi ase,
3.29: oile Pak Ruhur befare kufuri korle, kunumonte-u i gunar mafi milto nae. I guna Ruz Hashor forzonto zari roibo.”
3.30: Isar ufre zine asor ḳorse, moulana oḳole ou ḳota ḳoae tain tarare oula zuaf dila. Hozrot Isar afon manush ḳe?
3.31: Ou shomoy Hozrot Isar ma ar baiain aia bare tone tan gese ḳobor faṭaila.
3.32: Oile sairo galabae manshor biṛ lagail asil, manshe tanre ḳoila, “Huzur, afnar amma ar baiain aia bare afnar tallash ḳorra.”
3.33: Tain ḳoila, “Amar ma ar baiain ḳe?”
3.34: Ḳoia tain sairo galar manshor bae saia ḳoila, “Huno, era-u to amar ma ar baiain.
3.35: Zera Allar morzi zugaia soloin, tara-u to amar ma, ar bai-boin.”

4.1: Hozrot Isa hirbar Galil aoror faro aia manshore talim dita lagla. Tan sairo galabae bout manshe biṛ bandilla, erdae tain eḳ naot uṭia boila, ar manshe faro tone tan boyan hunla.
4.2: Tain kichcha hunai hunai manshore talim deoat asla, ermaze tain ḳoila,
4.3: “Doroukka, ek giroste zala bain ḳorat gelo.
4.4: Gia bain ḳorar shomoy kisu zala fotor ḳandat foṛlo, ar fakinte aia ita ḳaililo.
4.5: Kisu zala fattorala maṭit foṛlo, itar tole beshi maṭi asil na, erdae toledi bol na ḳoria-u zoldi kori fuṭigelo.
4.6: Bade shuruz uṭia harle zoir ḳaililo, ar tolor zoṛe rosh na faoae hukaia morigelo.
4.7: Kisu zala zonglar maze foṛlo, teu zongla boṛo oia itare zatia dorlo, erdae kunu soṛa saṛlo na.
4.8: Oile kisu zala bala zomino foṛlo, itae ali bar oia boṛo oia soṛa saṛlo, kunu soṛae tish, kunu soṛae shaiṭ, kunu soṛae eḳ-sho gun beshi dan dorlo.”
4.9: Heshe Isae ḳoila, “Hunar lak kan zar ase, he hunouk.”
4.10: Bade biṛ ḳomia harle tan logor manshe ar barozon sahabie tanre zikaila, “Huzur, i kichchar mul mani kita?”
4.11: Isae zuaf dila, “Allar bashshair gufon rohoisho zanar shuzug tumrare deoa oise, oile baira manshor gese kichchar mazdi koa oise.
4.12: Er ḳaron oilo, Allar kalamor ou ayat folite oibo, Tara saia taḳle-o kunta-u deḳto nae, hunle-o kunta buzto nae. Kizanu tara zudi Allar bae firizain, ar mafi failain.”
4.13: Bade Isae tarare ḳoila, “Tumra ou kichchar maniḳan-o buzlae na ni? Te baki kichchar mani kila buzbae?
4.14: Huno, giroste ze zala bain ḳorer, i zala oilogi Allar kalam.
4.15: Fotor ḳandat foṛa zala dia tarar befare buzail oise, zera i kalam hune, oile loge loge Iblis aia tarar dil taki i kalamre ḳaṛia neygi.
4.16: Fattoror ufre foṛa zaladi buzail oise, zera i kalam hune ar kub kushi oia loge loge kobul ḳorilae,
4.17: oile tarar dilo balamonte hamae na ḳoria, ita ḳali tuṛa ḳoydin ḳaim roy, bade i kalamor lagi kunu zulum-mosibot azir oile tara fislai zae.
4.18: Zonglar maze foṛa zalar mani oilo, zera i kalam hune,
4.19: oile zogotor sinta-babna, don-samanar maya ar duniabi lalose i kalamre zatia dorilae, erdae kalame kunu amol ḳore na.
4.20: Ar bala zomino foṛa zalar mani oilo, zera i kalam hune, kobul ḳore ar bala fol dore, ḳeu tish, ḳeu shaiṭ, ḳeu eḳ-sho gun fol dore.”
4.21: Isae aro ḳoila, “Kunu manshe lem zalaia ṭukrir tole ba sokir tole toy ni? Lem zalaia gasar ufre toin na ni?
4.22: Te ila lukail kunta-u nai, zeta bar oito nae. Ar ila kunu batuni befar-o nai, zeta zair oito nae.
4.23: Hunar lak kan zar ase, he hunouk.”
4.24: Bade tain ḳoila, “Tumra kial ḳoria huno, tumra zela mafia deo, tumrar lagi oula mafa oibo. Dorilao, tumrar lagi aro besh ḳori mafa oibo.
4.25: Zar ase tare aro deoa oibo, oile zar nai, tar zeta ase eota neoa oizibo.”
4.26: Tain aroḳbar ḳoila, “Huno, Allar bashshai oilo ou laḳan. Dorilao, ek giroste tar zomino zala bain ḳorlo.
4.27: Bade he rait oile gumailo ar dinor bala guraguri korlo. Oile zala fuṭia ḳemne gas oilo, he to kunta zane na.
4.28: Zomine nize nize-u ita folailo, foyla sera, bade soṛa ar soṛar maze fusṭo dan dorlo.
4.29: Dan fakia harle he buzilae daoar shomoy oigese, teu ḳasi lagaia dae.” Ḍenga bisir kichcha
4.30: Hozrot Isae ḳoila, “Allar bashshaire amra kitar loge tulona ḳortam? Kitadi buzaitam?
4.31: Aichcha, mone ḳoro, Allar bashshai oilo egu ḍenga bisir laḳan. I bisi bain ḳorar bala deḳa zae, hoḳol zator bisi tone iṭa huru-muru.
4.32: Oile bain ḳorar bade iṭa hokkol zator hag tone-o boṛo boṛo fata ar gas oy. Ar muṭa muṭa ḍal baroy, i ḍalor sayat fakinte aia asroy loin.”
4.33: Ou laḳan bout nomunar kichcha ḳoita, ar ze zela buzto fare, tar buz mafik tare Allar kalam hunaita.
4.34: Kichcha saṛa tarare kunu talim dita na. Oile ḳali sahabi oḳol zebla tan loge roita, ou shomoy tain hoḳol bed bangia buzaita. Aoror tufan bond ḳora
4.35: Ou din hainja bala Hozrot Isae tan sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Ao, amra aoror hofaro zaitam.”
4.36: Teu sahabi oḳole manshor ges taki bidae loia, Isa ze nao-o boat asla ou nao-o uṭia roana dilaila, erloge aro naoain-o asil.
4.37: Nao soler, ou shomoy aḳta-u kub boṛo eḳ tufan ailo, tufanor dae afalor fani hamaia nao buṛizibar dosha.
4.38: Isa naor ḳor galat eḳ balisho hitan dia gumo asla. Sahabi oḳole tanre hozag koria ḳoila, “Huzur, afne kial ḳorra na ni, amra to morizaiar.”
4.39: Tain uṭia tufanre domoḳ dila ar aorre ḳoila, “Dom lo, tir o.” Ḳoar loge loge tufan bond oigelo, ar hokkolta tir oilo.
4.40: Bade tain sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Tumra oto ḍoraluk kene? Tumra oḳono iman ancho na ni?”
4.41: Ita dekia sahabi oḳole kub ḍoraila, ar eḳe-oinne ḳoila, “Ein ashole ḳe? Fanie ar batashe-o deki tan hukum mane.”

5.1: Hozrot Isae tan sahabi oḳolre loia Galil aor faṛi dia Zerasini oḳlor desho aila.
5.2: Tain nao taki lamte-u bute dora eḳ beṭa, ḳobrostan taki bar oia tan samne ailo.
5.3: He ḳoyboror maze roito, kunu manshe luar zinjurdi bandia-o tare aṭḳaita farta na.
5.4: Tar at-fao bout bar zinjurdi bandile-o he ita siṛia, faor beṛi-o bangilito. Tare ḳeu shamlaita farta na.
5.5: He faṛor ṭillae ṭillae, ḳoybore ḳoybore hara din-rait gurto ar sillaito, fattor dia tar nizor shorilo marto.
5.6: Isare he duroi taki dekia-u douṛaia aia tan faot foṛia soizda ḳorlo,
5.7: ar sillaia ḳoilo, “O Isa, Allatalar ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla, afne ḳene amar gese aisoin? Ami Allar ḳosom ḳaia ḳoiar, afne amare satain na zanu.”
5.8: Isae age ou butre ḳoisla, “Tui ou beṭare saṛia bar oia za,” erdae he Isare ou minoti korlo.
5.9: Tain ou butre zikaila, “Tor nam kita?” He ḳoilo, “Amar nam fouz, ḳaron amra bout zon asi.”
5.10: Oḳan ḳoia he Isar gese bare bare minot ḳori koilo, “Afne amrare i elaḳa taki kedain na zanu.”
5.11: Ou shomoy hono faṛor galat boṛo eḳ shuoror fale ḳaoat asil.
5.12: Butor fale Isare minot ḳori koilo, “Huzur, amrare ou shuoror falor maze faṭai deukka, amra gia otar bitre hamai.”
5.13: Isae izazot dia harle tara gia ou shuoror falor maze hamaigelo. Teu shuoror fale faṛor ṭillar feṭedi kub zure douṛaia gia aoror maze buṛia morla. I falo onuman dui azar shuor asil.
5.14: Ita dekia shuoror raḳal oḳole douṛaia gia gaut ar ḳanda-ḳasar hoḳolre ḳobor zanaila. Ḳobor hunia manshe ita deḳat aila.
5.15: Tara Isar ḳandat aia deḳla, butor fouze ze beṭare dorsil, i beṭa bala oia ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ findia boiroise. Ita dekia tarar mono ḍor hamaigelo.
5.16: Teu zera ou goṭona deḳsil, tara hou bute dora beṭar ḳota ar shuoror goṭona erare zanailo.
5.17: Erdae manshe Hozrot Isare minot ḳori koila, “Meherbani kori amrar elaḳa taki toshrif neukkagi.”
5.18: Tain zebla naot uṭizira, ou shomoy bute dora beṭa-o tan loge oia zaito ḳori minot lagailo.
5.19: Oile Isae tare oḳan ḳoia bidae ḳori dila, “Tumi tumar baṛit zao, gia baṛir manshore deḳao, Mabude tumare ḳoto meherbani ar boṛo taijjubi kam ḳorsoin.”
5.20: Tan ḳota hunia beṭa gelogi ar asta Dikafoli elaḳar manshore ḳoilo, Isae tar lagi koto boṛo ḳam ḳorsoin. Ikan hunia tara-o taijjub oigela. Mora fuṛire zinda ḳora
5.21: Hozrot Isa naot ḳoria hirbar aoror hofaro gia harle, sairobae tone manshe aia ou aoror faro-u biṛ lagai dila.
5.22: Ou shomoy mosid komiṭir Zayir namor eḳ neta aia Isare dekia tan faot foṛia,
5.23: kub minot ḳori koila, “Huzur, amar fuṛigu morar foti oigese. Afne toshrif ania amar fuṛigure atai dile-u tai bala oizibo.”
5.24: Teu tain ou netar baṛit roana dilaila. Tan sairo galabae biṛ bandia ṭela-ṭeli koria aro bout manush tan loge oia zaira.
5.25: Ou biṛor maze eḳzon beṭi manush asla, baro boros dori tan beṭiara bemaror lou zaito.
5.26: Bout ḍaktor ḳobiraz deḳaia ḳoshṭo ḳori niom-ḳanun mania, hoḳol ṭeḳa-foysha kuaia-o kunu fayda oise na. Dine dine bemar aro baṛise.
5.27: Isar befare hunia beṭie ou biṛor maze ṭik tan ḳoredi aia, tan finnor saddor ḳanor ek kunat soilo.
5.28: Tai ekin ḳorsil zen, Isar finnor kunu ḳafoṛor maze soite farle-u bemar shifa oizibo.
5.29: Hasau, Isar saddoror kunat soite-u, beṭir lou zaoa ekkere ḳomigelo. Beṭie nizor shorilor halot buzililo, bemar ḳomigese.
5.30: Isae-o ṭer faila, tan shoril mubarok taki bol bar oise. Ou tain biṛor maze sairobae saia zikaila, “Amar ḳafoṛo ḳe soilo?”
5.31: Tan shagrid oḳole ḳoila, “Huzur, afne to deḳra, manshe kila sairobae ṭela-ṭeli korra, te ar ḳene zikaira, ḳe afnare soilo?”
5.32: Oile Isae sairobae soukdi tallashit roila, ḳe tane soilo.
5.33: Teu bemar shifa oa beṭie nizor halot buzia ḍoraia ḳafi kafi tan samne aia faot foṛlo, ar hoḳolta kulia ḳoilo.
5.34: Isae beṭire ḳoila, “Mai go, tumar imane tumi baslae. Oḳon shantie baṛit zao, ar i bemar taki hefazot ro.”
5.35: Tain ota mato roisoin, ou shomoy mosidor hou netar baṛi taki kobria aia netare ḳoilo, “Sab, afnar fuṛi to ar nai, dunia saṛia gesoingi. Te huzurre ar toklif dibar ḳam nai.”
5.36: Oile ikan hunia Isae hou netare ḳoila, “Ḍoraiba na, ḳali ekin ḳoroukka.”
5.37: Ḳoia tan sahabi Fitor, Iakub, ar Iakubor bai Hannan, ḳali ou tinzon bade ar ḳeurore tan loge nila na.
5.38: Erare loia tain hou netar baṛit aia deḳla, manshe ḳanda-ḳaṭi, bilaf ar mattom ḳorra.
5.39: Tain bitre gia manshore ḳoila, “Tumra i kanda-ḳaṭi ar mattom ḳorrae ḳene? I fuṛi to morse na, ḳali gumaise.”
5.40: Ikan hunia manshe tanre siṛaila. Teu tain murdar kuṭa taki hoḳolre bar ḳori dia, ḳali fuṛir ma-baf ar sahabi oḳolre loia kuṭat hamaila.
5.41: Tain fuṛir ato doria ḳoila, “Ṭalita kum,” mani, “O fuṛi, tumare ḳoiar, uṭo.”
5.42: Hasau, murda fuṛi loge loge uṭia aṭa dorlo, fuṛir boyosh asil baro bosor. Ita dekia era asanoḳ taijjub oigela.
5.43: Isae erare hukum dila, ita ḳeurore hunaio na. Ar ou fuṛire oḳon ḳaibar kunta deo.

6.1: Hozrot Isa hon tone nizor gau Nasaroto toshrif anla. Tan sahabi oḳol-o loge asla.
6.2: Zummabare tain mosido gia talim dila. Bout manshe tan talim hunla, hunia taijjub oia ḳoila, “I beṭae ita talim kuai taki failo? He ḳemne ita ilim hasil ḳorse, ar zeta muzeza oḳol deḳar, itar bed kita?
6.3: E to hou Moriomor fua ḳaṭ-mestoir nae ni? He Iakub, Iusi, Ehuda ar Saimonor bai nae ni? Tar bonin to amrar gaut-u roira.” Isar befar loia manshor dilor maze bitishona deḳa dilo.
6.4: Teu Isae tarare ḳoila, “Zekunu nobi-u nizor gau, nizor desh, nizor baṛi, ḳesh-kuṭumor bairaḳano ijjot fain.”
6.5: Bade tain ḳoyzon bemarire atai dia bemar shifa ḳorla. Oile hino ar kunu muzeza zair ḳorar ufae oilo na.
6.6: Manshe tan ufre iman na anae tain kub taijjub oigela. Bade tain gaue gaue sairobae sofor ḳoria manshore talim dila. Sahabi oḳolre tobligo faṭani
6.7: Isae tan barozon sahabire nizor daro ania, zin-butor ufre ḳemota dia, duizon duizon ḳori toblig kamo faṭaila.
6.8: Soforor shomoy ḳali ator laṭi saṛa ar kunta-u erare loge nite dila na. Ḳani-kuraki, beg ba ḳomror tolit bandia kunu foysha-ḳoṛi nite-o na ḳorla.
6.9: Tain ḳoila, “Faot zuta finditae farbae, oile finnor ek kafoṛ bade ar kunu ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ nio na.”
6.10: Ar hukum dila, “Tumra gia foyla ze baṛit hamaibae, i gau saṛia zaoar ag forzonto ou baṛit-u roio.
6.11: Kunu zagar manshe zudi tumrare kobul na ḳore, ar tumrar boyan na hune, te hon taki baronir bala tumrar faor duil zaṛia falaio, ou duil tarar naformanir shakki roibo.”
6.12: Teu sahabi oḳole gia toblig korla, manshore tagid dila touba ḳorar lagi.
6.13: Era bout but saṛaila, ar bout bemari manshor matat tel maḳaia bemarre shifa ḳorla. Hozrot Ehia (a:)re zane mara
6.14: Hozrot Isar shunam sairobae roṭi zaoae Raza Herudor ḳano-o gia azilo. Kunu kunu manshe ḳoila, tain oila Ehia nobi, ein hirbar zinda oia uṭia aisoin ḳori-u ou keramoti deḳaira.
6.15: Ḳeu ḳoilo, ein oila Hozrot Ilias nobi. Ar ḳeu ḳeu ḳoilo, ein furana zomanar kunu nobir laḳan noya eḳ nobi.
6.16: Ita hunia Herude ḳoilo, “Ein to hou Ehia, zen ḳolla ami kaṭaislam. Tain hirbar zinda oia uṭsoin.”
6.17: -18 Er age Herude tar babi Herudiar mon zuganir lagi, Ehia nobire aṭok koraia zelo harai toisil. He tar bai Filifor boure hanga ḳorae nobie tare hamesha ḳoita, “Afon bair boure nia hanga ḳora tumar zaiz oise na.”
6.19: Erdae Ehia nobir bae Herudiar kub gusa asil. Tai enre zane marilibar niot ḳorlo, oile farlo na.
6.20: Herude enre ḍoraito ar zanto, ein eḳzon fak-forezgar kamil manush, erdae hamesha enre tair at taki basaito. En nosiot hunte tar bitre doṛfoṛ ḳorle-o he ita kub fosond ḳorto.
6.21: Heshe tai eḳ shuzug failo, Herudor zonom dinor onusṭano tar uzir-nazir, sifair ofisar oḳol, ar Galil zilar goinno-mainno hoḳol manshor lagi kani zuit ḳora oilo.
6.22: Ou onusṭano Herudiar fuṛie aia nas deḳaia hoḳol meman ar Herudre kushi korlo. Kushi oia Herud razae fuṛire ḳoilo, “O ma, tumi amar gese kita sao? Zeta saibae, ota-u faibae.”
6.23: He ḳosom ḳaia ḳoilo, “Tumi amar gese zeta saibae, ota-u dimu. Amar raijjor ordeḳ saile-o dilaimu.”
6.24: Ou fuṛie tair maʼr gese gia zikailo, “Mai go, ami kita saitam?” Ma Herudiae hikai dilo, “Tumi hou Ehiar ḳolla saio.”
6.25: Fuṛie zoldi kori aia razare ḳoilo, “Ami sairam, afne hou Ehiar ḳolla ḳaṭia eḳ talo ḳori amare deukka.”
6.26: Ikan hunia raza kub bezar oigelo, oile onusṭanor meman oḳlor samne ḳosom ḳorae ou fuṛire na ḳorar kunu ufae asil na.
6.27: -28 Teu loge loge razae zolladre hukum dilo Ehiar mata ḳaṭia anar lagi. Zollade gia zel ḳanat bondi Hozrot Ehiar mata ḳaṭia eḳ talo ḳori loia ailo. Razae i tal ou fuṛir ato dile, tai nia tair maʼr gese dilo.
6.29: Ehia nobir shagrid oḳole i kobor hunia zel tone tan lash nia dafon ḳorla. Fas azar manshor gaibi kani
6.30: Hozrot Isar barozon sahabie toblig tone firia aia tanre zanaila, tobligo gia kita kita ḳorsoin, kilaḳan talim disoin.
6.31: Ou shomoy bout manush Isar gese aoa-zaoat taḳae sahabi oḳole kunu ḳana-finar-o shuzug faila na. Erdae tain sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Tumra amar loge kunu nirai zagat aia tuṛa zirao.”
6.32: Ḳoia naot uṭia eḳ nirai zagat roana oila.
6.33: Erare zaoat dekia bout manshe sinilila, teu era fosar age-u ash-fashor gauain taki manush douṛaia gia hono fosigela.
6.34: Isa nao taki lamia-u deḳla, bout manshe tan bar saira. Dekia erar bae tan boṛo dorod hamailo. Era asil a-raḳali meṛar laḳan. Ou Isae erare bout laḳan talim dila.
6.35: Hainja oia harle tan sahabi oḳole ḳoila, “Huzur, ikan kub nirai zaga, ar hainja-o oigese,
6.36: te ota manshore bidae dilaukka, era ḳanda-ḳasar ota gauainto gia tarar ḳani-kuraki louk.”
6.37: Isae ḳoila, “Tumra-u erar ḳanir intezam ḳoro.” Sahabi oḳole zuaf dila, “Amra kita dui-sho dinaror ḳani loia ania erare ḳaoaitam ni?” Dui-sho dinar to foinchash azar ṭeḳar homan.
6.38: Tain ḳoila, “Tumra saia deḳo, tumrar gese ki foriman ruṭi ase.” Tara dekia ḳoila, “Sab, fasḳan ruṭi ar duiṭa biran mas ase.”
6.39: Tain sahabi oḳolre hukum dila, “Tumra ou gashor ufre lain doraia manshore boai deo.”
6.40: Teu manshe eḳ-sho zon ḳori katar bandia foinchash ḳatar boila.
6.41: Isae hou fasḳan ruṭi ar duiṭa biran mas ato loia Allar arshor bae saia shukria adae ḳoria, manshore baṭia dibar lagi ou ruṭi ṭukra ṭukra ḳori sahabi oḳlor ato dila. Ou laḳan mas duiṭa-o baṭia dila.
6.43: Ḳaia harle baṛti ruṭi ar masor ṭukrain nia baroṭa ṭukri borla.
6.44: I dolor maze ḳali beṭa manush-u fas azar zone boia ḳaila. Fanir ufredi aṭa
6.45: Ḳanir bade-u Hozrot Isae sahabi oḳolre tagda dila, tara naot ḳori aoror hofaro Bayt-Soyda gaut zaoar lagi, tain onor manshore-o bidae dila.
6.46: Manush bidae oia harle tain dua ḳorar lagi faṛor ufre uṭila.
6.47: Raitor bala sahabi oḳlor nao aoror mazḳano asil, oile Isa eḳla huknat asla.
6.48: Tain deḳla, ufta batashor maze era kub ḳoshṭo ḳori daṛ baira. Fotabala Isae ou aoror fanir ufredi aṭia, sahabi oḳlor galabae tarare faroia agedi zaira.
6.49: -50 Tanre aoror fanir ufredi aṭia zaoat dekia, but mono ḳoria ḍoraia era hoḳole sik-sillani lagaila. Ou tain ḳoila, “Ḍoraio na, himmot ḳoro, i to ami.”
6.51: Tain aia sahabi oḳlor naot uṭte-u ufta batash dom loililo. Ita dekia era asanoḳ taijjub bonigela.
6.52: Oile agor hou ruṭi-masor gaibi kanir bed era buzla na. Erar dilor duar to bond asil.
6.53: Aor faṛi deoar bade era Gineshorot elaḳat aia nao biṛaila.
6.54: -55 Nao taki lamte-u tane dekia manshe sinilila, ar sairobae douṛa-douṛi lagaila. Douṛaia tara zarzir bemari oḳolre folodi boia ania, tain ze zagat asla ou zagat loia ailo.
6.56: Ṭauno ba gaut, ollie-gollie tain zeno-u toshrif nita, ono-u manshe bemari oḳolre ania bazaro dola ḳorta. Ar tanre minot-ḳajji koria ḳoita, bemari oḳole zanu tan saddoror kunaḳano soita faroin. Ar zera soita, hasau erar bemar shifa oizito.

7.1: Bade Zeruzalem taki koyzon moulana ar Forishi mozobor kisu manush Hozrot Isar gese aila.
7.2: Aia deḳla, Isar ḳoyzon ummote at na doia emne-u ḳanit boigesoin.
7.3: Ashole agor zomanar moulana oḳlor batail rosumot mafik, hokkol Ihudi ar Forishi oḳole-o uzu na ḳoria kunu ḳani kain na.
7.4: Bazar-aṭ taki kunu zinish anle fak-saf na ḳoria muko dein na, tal-bashon doia saf-sutra ḳora, ou laḳan bout riti-reoaz tara mane.
7.5: Erdae ou moulana ar Forishi oḳole Isare zikaila, “Afnar ummot oḳole agor zomanar moulana oḳlor batail rosumot ḳene manoin na? Tara to nafak ate ḳani kain.”
7.6: Tain zuaf dila, “Afnara to bonḍo! Hozrot Ishaya nobie afnaintor befare ṭik-u ḳoisoin, Ita manshe muk dia ḳali amare ijjot ḳore, oile tarar dil ama tone bout duroi.
7.7: Tara hudar ḳamoḳa amar ebadot ḳore, tarar talim oḳol to manshor banail mongoṛa shoriot.
7.8: Te afnara to Allar deoa hukum-ahkam bad dia, manshor banail rosumot amol ḳorra.”
7.9: Isae tarare aro ḳoila, “Allar deoa hukum bad dia, nizor mongoṛa rosumot ḳaim ḳorar danda to afnara kub bala ḳori-u zanoin.
7.10: Zela Hozrot Musae ḳoisoin, ma-babare ijjot ḳorio, ze manshe afon ma-bafor bodnam gae, tare zane mara oibo.
7.11: Oile afnara manshore talim dira, kunu manshe zudi tar ma-bafre ḳoilae, amar zeta samana dia afnaintor kezmot ḳortam asil, ita Allar name lilla dilaisi,
7.12: te tar ma-bafor lagi ar kunta-u ḳora lage na.
