7.13: Ou laḳan afnarar baf-dadar mongoṛa niom dia Allar kalam batil ḳorilisoin. Ikan bade-o afnara oula aro bout ḳam ḳorra.”
7.14: Bade Isae manshore tan ḳandat nia ḳoila, “Afnara hoḳole amar ḳota kial ḳori hunoukka ar buzoukka.
7.15: -16 Baire taki zeta zinish manshor bitre hamae, itae to tare nafak banae na. Borong manshor bitre taki zeta baroy, otae-u tare nafak banae.”
7.17: Boyan bade tain manshor ges taki horia gia goro hamaila, teu sahabi oḳole tanre er mani zikaila.
7.18: Isae ḳoila, “Tumra kita oula-u be-akkol ni? Tumra buzo na ni, bare taki zeta zinish manshor bitre hamae, itae manshore nafak korto fare na.
7.19: Ita to tar dilor bitre hamae na, ḳali feṭor maze hamae, ar feṭ taki hirbar baroi zae.” Isae ou talim dia buzaila, kunuzat ḳani-u nafak nae.
7.20: Tain ḳoila, “Manshor bitre taki zeta baroy, otae-u manshore nafak kore.
7.21: Manshor dil taki-u to hoḳol nomunar ku-sinta ae; zina, suri, kun,
7.22: lub-lalos, foror ḳeti korar danda, sol-soturi, bodmaishi, bod-nozor, ingsha-ninda, boṛai-beṭagiri ar shoytani baroy.
7.23: Ou tamam naformani manshor dil taki bar oia tarare nafak banae.” Galil zilar bare Hozrot Isar muzeza (7:24–10:52) Bidormi beṭir imanor bol
7.24: Bade Isa ou elaḳa tone Siria deshor Shur ṭaunor ḳandat toshrif nilagi. Ono aia tain ek goror bitre lukai roila, saila manshe zanu na zanoin tain aisoin ḳori. Oile tan ḳobor roṭi gelo.
7.25: Hono eḳ beṭi manshor fuṛire bute dorae, Isae toshrif anchoin hunia ou beṭie, zoldi kori aia tan faot foṛlo.
7.26: I beṭir baṛi Siria deshor Foinikia elaḳat, oile matito Iunani bashae. Tai Isar gese minot-ḳajji koria ḳoilo, “Huzur, butor ḳobza taki amar fuṛigure basaukka.”
7.27: Isae ḳoila, “Age nizor huruttainte feṭ bori kaukka, nizor sabalor ḳani kukror samne falani ṭik nae.”
7.28: Beṭie ḳoilo, “Ji oy huzur, afnar ḳota-u ṭik, oile nizor sabalor ḳanir zeta guṛa-gaṛa galabae foṛe, ita to kukre ḳae.”
7.29: Tain ḳoila, “Tumi to ḳaṭi mat-u matso. Te zao, gia deḳo, bute tumar fuṛire saṛia gesegi.”
7.30: Hasau beṭie baṛit gia deḳlo, tair fuṛi bala oia bisnat hutiroise. Ḳalua tutla beṭare shifa ḳora
7.31: Bade Isae Shur elaḳa tone Sidon ṭaun oia, Galil aoror hofaro Dikafoli elaḳat aila.
7.32: Ono aia harle manshe ek kalua tutla beṭare tan gese ania minot lagaila, tare atai dibar lagi.
7.33: Tain ere manshor biṛ tone bare nirai zagat nia, tar duio ḳano tan ator anguil haraila, tan mukor sef lagaia tar zifra atai dila.
7.34: Ar ufre asmanedi saia lamba ḳori shash falaia ḳoila, “Iffata,” mani, “Kuli zauk.”
7.35: Loge loge-u beṭar ḳan kuligelo. Tutlami saṛi gelo, he forishkar mata dorlo.
7.36: Heshe tain erare hukum dila, “Ḳobordar, tumra ita ḳeurore hunaio na.” Oile tain zoto beshi na ḳorla, tara oto besh ḳori ita roṭailo.
7.37: Tara asanoḳ taijjub oia ḳoila, “Ein to hoḳol ḳam-u kub nikut ḳori koroin. Deḳrae ni, tain ḳaluare hunar shokti, ar bubare matibar takkot disoin.”

8.1: Bade aroḳbar bout manush aia tan gese dola oila. Erar gese kunu ḳani-kuraki na taḳae, Isae tan sahabi oḳolre daro nia ḳoila,
8.2: “Ita manshor lagi amar boṛo dorod lager, aiz tin din dori tara amar loge loge asoin, oile oḳon tarar ḳanir kunta nai.
8.3: Ou halote erare bidae ḳori baṛit faṭai dile, ita foto-u beush oiziba, era ḳeu ḳeu to bout duroi taki aise.”
8.4: Sahabi oḳole ḳoila, “Huzur, i nirai-morubumir maze ḳe kuai taki oto ruṭi zugaia erare ḳaoaibo?”
8.5: Tain ḳoila, “Tumrar gese ruṭi koyḳan ase?” Era ḳoila, “Sab, shatḳan ase.”
8.6: Tain manshore ḳoila, “Afnara ḳanir lagi maṭit boizain.” Ḳoia ruṭi shatoḳan nia Alla Pakor shukria adae ḳori oḳnain siṛila, ar sahabi oḳolre dia baṭia deoaila.
8.7: Sahabi oḳlor gese huru huru ḳoyṭa biran mas-o asil, tain ou masor lagi shukria adae ḳorla, ar erare ḳoila manshore baṭia dita.
8.8: Hoḳol manshe feṭ bori kaila. Ḳanir bade zeta roisil, sahabi oḳole ota dola ḳoria harle shat ṭukri borigelo.
8.9: I dolor maze ḳali beṭa manush-u onuman sair azar zone ḳaila. Bade tain erare bidae dia,
8.10: sahabi oḳolre loia naot ḳori Dalmanuta zilat gelagi.
8.11: Ono aia harle Forishi oḳole tan loge torka-torki lagaila, ar tanre zasai korar lagi tara asmani kunu muzeza deḳta saila.
8.12: Ikan hunia Isae lamba ḳori shash falaia ḳoila, “I zomanar manshe ḳali muzeza tukain ḳene? Ami hok kota ḳoiar, erare kunuzat muzeza deḳail oito nae.”
8.13: Ḳoia tain erar ges taki horigela, ar naot uṭia hirbar aoror hofaro gelagi.
8.14: Sahabi oḳole loge ḳori ruṭi nite faurilila. Naor maze erar loge ḳali ekkan ruṭi asil.
8.15: Ou shomoy Isae ḳoila, “Tumitain hushiar o, Raza Herud ar Forishi mozobor ḳamir taki hushiar roio.”
8.16: Ikan hunia sahabi oḳole ḳana-ḳani kori koila, “Amra loge ḳori ruṭi na anae tain monoloy oḳan ḳoira.”
8.17: Oile sahabi oḳole kita matira, Isae ikan buzia tain erare ḳoila, “Tumitain ḳene ḳoirae, ruṭi ancho na ḳori ami ikan ḳoisi? Tumra kita oḳono kunta zano na ni, kunta-u buzo na ni? Tumrar dil fashan oigese ni?
8.18: Tumrar souk taḳte-o deḳrae na ni? Ḳan taḳte-o hunrae na ni? Tumrar mono foṛer na ni,
8.19: zebla ami fas azar manshor lagi kali fasḳan ruṭi siṛislam, ou manshe ḳaia harle tumra ḳoto ṭukri guṛa-gaṛa dola ḳorslae?” Era ḳoila, “Huzur, baro ṭukri.”
8.20: Tain hirbar ḳoila, “Aichcha, ami zebla sair azar manshor lagi shatḳan ruṭi siṛislam, manshe ḳaia harle tumra ḳoy ṭukri dola ḳorslae?” Era ḳoila, “Shat ṭukri.”
8.21: Ou tain ḳoila, “Erbade-o tumra buzlae na ni?” Andar souk bala ḳora
8.22: Bade Isae tan sahabi oḳolre loia Bayt-Soyda gaut aila, aia harle manshe eḳ anda beṭare tan gese ania ḳoilo beṭagure atai dibar lagi.
8.23: Isae ou beṭar ato dori gaur bare loia gela. Gia tan mukor sef beṭar sokut lagaia tar gotro at dia ḳoila, “Oba, tumi kunta deḳrae ni?”
8.24: Beṭae souk kulia saia ḳoilo, “Ji oy huzur, ami to manush deḳram, oile itare gasor laḳan lager, era aṭa-uṭi korer.”
8.25: Teu Isae aroḳbar tar sokur ufre atai dile, he bala ḳori sailo ar hokkolta forishkar deḳlo.
8.26: Isae tare tar baṛit faṭai dia ḳoila, “Huno, Bayt-Soyda gaut ar zaio na.” Hozrot Isa-u Allar oada ḳora al-Mosi
8.27: Bade tain ar sahabi oḳol Ḳoisoria-Filifi ṭaunor ḳanda-ḳasar gauainto gela. Foto tan sahabi oḳolre zikaila, “Ḳo sain, manshe amar befare kita mono ḳoroin, ami ke?”
8.28: Era zuaf dila, “Ḳeu ḳoy, afne Hozrot Ehia. Ḳeu ḳoy Ilias nobi. Ḳeu ḳeu ḳoin, afne oinno kunu nobi.”
8.29: Ou tain ḳoila, “Oile tumra kita mono ḳoro, ami ke?” Sahabi Fitore zuaf dila, “Afne-u Allar oada ḳora hou al-Mosi.”
8.30: Tain erare hushiar ḳori koila, “Tumra amar befare ḳeurore hunaio na.” Foyla bar nizor moutor agam ḳobor
8.31: Bade tan sahabi oḳolre ou boyan hunaila, “Ami bin-Adome bout duḳ-mosibot fuani lagbo. Murobbi oḳole, boṛo imam oḳole, ar moulana oḳole-o amare manta nae. Amare zane mara oibo, oile moutor tin din bade hirbar zinda oia uṭa lagbo.”
8.32: Tain kub kula-mela ḳori ita ḳoila. Erdae Fitore tanre alga horaia nia ḳoila, “Huzur, shabdan, ila mat matoin na zanu.”
8.33: Isae sahabi oḳlor bae muk firaia Fitorre damki dia ḳoila, “Dur Iblis, amar ges taki bag! Tui Allai munshare bad dia, manshor laḳan sinta ḳorre.”
8.34: Bade tan sahabi ar am manshore-o tan daro nia ḳoila, “Huno, amar torikae ḳeu zindegi kaṭaite saile, he tar nizor kushie sola bad deuk. Tar afon duk-koshṭor solib boia loia amar ḳore auk.
8.35: Ze zone tar nizor shadine solto sae, he tar hasaror zindegi kuailibo. Oile ze zone amar lagi ar Allar deoa kush-ḳobrir lagi tar zan bilae, he tar hasaror zindegi basaibo.
8.36: Ḳeu zudi asta duniar malik bonia-o tar hasaror zindegi, mani aḳer kuailae, te tar kunu fayda oilo ni?
8.37: Heshe hasaror zindegi faoar lagi he kun don bilaibo?
8.38: Hunoukka, i zomanar beiman ar gunagar oḳlor maze, ḳeu zudi amar lagi ba amar talimor lagia muk lukae, te ami bin-Adom zebla fobitro firista oḳolre loge loia, amar gaibi bafor shan-tozollie zogoto hirbar aimu, ou shomoy ami-o erare deḳle muk lukaimu.”

9.1: Hozrot Isae tan sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, ino ilaḳan ḳoyzon azir asoin, zera Allar bashshair shan-tozollire nizor souke na deḳar age mout oito nae.”
9.2: Ikan ḳoar soydin bade tain ḳali Hozrot Fitor, Iakub ar Hannanre loia usa eḳ faṛor ufre uṭila. Ou tino zonor souḳor samne tan nizor surot bodli gelo.
9.3: Tan finnor lebas oto beshi dola soḳsoḳa oilo zen, duniar kunu dufae-u ila soḳsoḳa ḳori doar takkot nai.
9.4: Sahabi oḳole Hozrot Musa ar Ilias nobire deḳla, era aia Hozrot Isar loge batchit ḳorra.
9.5: Teu Fitore ḳoila, “Huzur, amra to ono asi, kub bala oise. Amra tinḳan ḍera-gor tiar ḳorilai, ekkan afnar lagi, ekkan Hozrot Musa ar ekkan Ilias nobir lagi.”
9.6: Era kub beshi ḍoraigesla, erdae kita matita kunu tal faila na.
9.7: Ou shomoy gaibi eḳ megor ṭukrae aia erare gurililo, ar ou ṭukra taki gaibi aoaz oilo, “Ein-u amar ḳas mayar zon, tumra en nosiot huno.”
9.8: Ṭik ou shomoy tara sairobae saia ḳali Isa saṛa ar ḳeurore ino deḳla na.
9.9: Bade faṛ taki lamia aibar bala Isae erare hukum dila, “Aiz zeta deḳlae, ami bin-Adom mora taki zinda oia uṭar ag forzonto ita ar ḳeurore hunaio na.”
9.10: Era tan hukum manla, oile mora taki zinda oar bed kita oḳan na buzae, tara eḳe-oinne zikaila.
9.11: Bade Isar gese aroz ḳorla, “Huzur, moulana oḳole ḳene ḳoin, Hozrot Ilias nobie foyla toshrif ana zorur?”
9.12: Tain ḳoila, “Ikan hasa ḳota, foyla Hozrot Iliase aia hokkolta agor haloto firai anba. Oile bin-Adomor befare Allar kalamo ḳene leḳa oise, tain kub duḳ-mosibot fuani lagbo, manshe tanre kobul ḳorta nae?
9.13: Ami tumrare ḳoiar, Ilias nobir befare Pak Kitabo zela leḳa ase, olaḳan-u tain aisla. Manshe-o tan loge zeta monoloy ota ḳorse.” Zinor asor-ala fuare bala ḳora
9.14: Isae ou tino zonre loia faṛ tone lamia baki sahabi oḳlor gese aia deḳla, bout manush aia sairobae dola oisoin, ar ḳoyzon moulanae erar loge torka-torki korra.
9.15: Isare dekia-u manush taijjub oia, douṛaia aia tanre salam ḳorla.
9.16: Tain ou moulana oḳolre zikaila, “Afnara kita loia erar loge torko ḳorra?”
9.17: Biṛor maz taki eḳzone ḳoilo, “Sab, amar fuagure loia afnar gese aislam, ogure buba zine asor ḳorse.
9.18: Ou zine tare zebla-u dore, tare asaṛ maria maṭit falae. Tar muk taki fena baroy, dato ḳoboṭ lagia ḍaṭṭa oizae. Ami tare loia afnar sahabi oḳlor gese aislam, oile era farsoin na.”
9.19: Teu Isae ḳoila, “Haere beiman oḳol! Ami ar ḳotodin tumrar loge roimu, tumrar zala ḳotodin shoijjo ḳormu? Aichcha, fuare ono ano.”
9.20: Manshe fuare tan gese anla. Tane dekia-u zine tare kub zatia dorlo. Fuae maṭit foṛia mukor fena bar ḳori goṛagoṛi lagailo.
9.21: Isae tar bafre zikaila, “Tar i dosha ḳotodin taki?” Beṭae ḳoilo, “Huruman taki-u.
9.22: Ar i zine tare marilito ḳori bout bar tare agunit ar fanit falaise. Oḳon afne zudi faroin, te amrare doya ḳoroukka.”
9.23: Isae ḳoila, “Zudi faroin, i kotar mani kita? Ze ekin ḳore tar lagi hokkolta-u oy.”
9.24: Ou beṭae zure zure ḳoilo, “Huzur, ami ekin ḳorsi. Amar imanor ḳomzuri horai deukka.”
9.25: Aro bout manush douṛaia tan gese aira dekia, tain zinre damki mari koila, “Oi kalua ar buba zin, ami hukum diar, er ges taki baroi za. Tare ar kunudin doris na.”
9.26: Ikan hunia zine tare kub zure sik dia zata mari saṛia gelogi. Teu i fua murdar laḳan maṭit foṛi roise dekia manshe ḳoila, “E to mara gese.”
9.27: Oile Isae tare ato dori tulte-u he ubai gelo.
9.28: Bade tain goro hamaia harle sahabi oḳole tanre niralae zikaila, “Huzur, amra farlam na ḳene?”
9.29: Tain zuaf dila, “Dua na ḳorle ar kunumonte-u i laḳan zin saṛail zae na.” Dusrabar nizor moutor agam ḳobor
9.30: Bade hoḳole mili i zaga saṛia Galil zilar mazedi roana oila. Saila, manshe zanu ita na zanoin.
9.31: Ou shomoy to tan sahabi oḳolre talim deoat asla, tain ḳoila, “Ami bin-Adomre manshor ato dorai deoa oibo, zane mara oibo, ar moutor tin din bade hirbar zinda oia uṭmu.”
9.32: Sahabi oḳole tan i talimor kunu bed buzla na, ar tan gese zikanir-o shaosh faila na. Dami manush ḳe?
9.33: Bade Isae tan sahabi oḳolre loia Kofornaum ṭauno aila. Aia goro hamaia erare zikaila, “Foto tumra kita loia torko ḳorlae?”
9.34: Era muk bond ḳori boiroila. Ashole foto tara torko ḳorsla, tarar maze ḳe hoḳol taki dami manush.
9.35: Isa boigela, boia era barozonre tan daro nia ḳoila, “Ḳeu zudi dami manush oito sae, te he hoḳlor ḳore roite oibo. Ar hoḳlor kezmot ḳora lagbo.”
9.36: Bade eḳ huruttare ania erar samne uba ḳoraila. Tare kulo loia ḳoila,
9.37: “Ze zone amar lagi ou huruttar laḳan kunu sabalre kobul ḳore, he amare-u kobul ḳore. Ar amare ze kobul ḳore, he ḳali amare nae, amare zein bezisoin tanre-o kobul ḳorlo.”
9.38: Tan sahabi Hannane ḳoila, “Huzur, amra eḳ beṭare deḳsi, he afnar nam loia zinnat saṛae. Dekia amra tare nished ḳorsi, he to amrar torikar manush nae.”
9.39: Tain ḳoila, “Ere nished ḳorio na. Amar nam loia ḳeu keramoti deḳanir bade, he oto zoldi amar gibot gaito farto nae.
9.40: Zera amrar bifokke nae, tara to amrar fokke.
9.41: Huno, ami hasa ḳota ḳoiar, al-Mosir torikar manush oar ḳatire, ḳeu zudi tumrare ek gelas fani kaoae, te he er furuskar faibo-u faibo. Rifu taki hushiar roa
9.42: “Ar amar torikar ou huru-muru eḳzonre zudi keu tar imanor fote bada dey, te er saite tar lagi aro bala oibo, tar golat fattor bandia doriat falai deoa.
9.43: Tumar at zudi tumar rifu oizae, te at ḳaṭia falai deo.
9.44: Duio at loia Zahannami oa taki, eḳ at loia Zannato zaoa tumar lagi bala. Zahannamor aguin to kunudin nibe na.
9.45: Tumar fao zudi tumar rifu oizae, te fao ḳaṭia falai deo. Duio fao loia Zahannamo zola taki, lengṛa oia Zannato zaoa tumar lagi bala.
9.46: -47 Tumar souk zudi tumar rifu oizae, te souk tulia falai deo. Duio souk loia Zahannamo zola taki, ḳana oia Allar bashshait dakil oa tumar lagi bala.
9.48: I Zahannamor bichchu oḳol more na, ar hinor aguino kunudin nibe na.
9.50: Nun to bala zinish, oile nune zudi tar nunta gun kuailae, te tare ar nunta banail zaibo ni? Tumra zarzir dilor maze i nun ḳaim raḳo, ar eḳe-oinne shantie boshot ḳoro.”

10.1: Kofornaum taki Hozrot Isa Ehudia zilat aila, ar Zordan gangor hofaro gela. Ono aile hirbar bout manush aia tan gese dola oila. Tain-o tan reoaz mafik erare talim dila.
10.2: Ou shomoy tanre forikka ḳorar niote Forishi mozobor ḳoyzone aia zikailo, “Sab, ḳoukka sain, boure talaḳ deoa zaiz ase ni?”
10.3: Tain zuaf dila, “Hozrot Musae afnaintore kita bataisoin?”
10.4: Tara ḳoila, “Tain ḳoisoin, talaḳ nama lekia hari bou talaḳ deoa zaiz ase.”
10.5: Isae ḳoila, “Tumrar dil fashan, erlagi-u Musa nobie i musla leḳsoin.
10.6: Oile eoḳan to leḳa ase, Allae foyla Adom ar Haoare mordo ar aorot banai foyda ḳorsoin.
10.7: Erdae manshe-o tarar ma-bafre toia bour loge ashik oiba.
10.8: Zamai ar bou ek kaya oiba. Tara dui roita nae, eḳ oiba.
10.9: Te Allae zeta zuṛa lagaisoin, manshe itare alog na ḳorouk.”
10.10: Bade sahabi oḳole goro hamaia, hirbar tanre ou musla zikaila.
10.11: Teu Isae ḳoila, “Ze manshe tar boure talaḳ dia aroḳ beṭire nika ḳore, he to ou bour loge zina ḳore.
10.12: Oula boue-o zudi nizor zamaire talaḳ dia aroḳ beṭar gese nika boy, te tai-o zina ḳore.” Huru huruttaintor befare talim
10.13: Bade manshe huru huru huruttaintore loia Isar gese aila tarare atai dibar lagi. Oile sahabi oḳole erare boḳa-zoḳa ḳorla.
10.14: Ita dekia Isa naraz oia tarare ḳoila, “Huruttaintore amar gese aite mana ḳorio na, Allar bashshai to erar laḳan manshor lagi-u.
10.15: Ami hok kota ḳoiram, huru huruttainte zela boṛor shashon manoin, Allar shashonre ou laḳan na manle, manush kunumonte-u Allar bashshait hamaito farto nae.”
10.16: Bade tain tarare kulo loia tarar matat at rakia dua ḳorla. Gorib ar donir behest
10.17: Hozrot Isa zebla bar oia roana oila, ou shomoy eḳ beṭa douṛaia aia aṭu gaṛia tan samne boia ḳoilo, “Ustad, afne to meherban. Te amare batai deukka, aḳer faoar lagi ami kita ḳortam?”
10.18: Tain ḳoila, “Amare ḳene meherban ḳoirae? Eḳ Alla saṛa ar ḳeu meherban nae.
10.19: Tumi to Tourat Kitabor hukum zano. Kun ḳorio na, zina ḳorio na, suri korio na, misa shakki dio na, ṭogaṭogi korio na, ma-bafre ijjot ḳorio.”
10.20: Beṭae ḳoilo, “Sab, ami to huruman tone-u ita amol ḳoriar.”
10.21: Teu Isae mayar nozore tar bae saia ḳoila, “Ḳali ekkan zinish tumar baki roise. Tumi zao, gia tumar hoḳol don-samana besia gorib oḳolre bilai deo. Teu tumi behesto tumar samana ḳamaibae. Bade aia amar ummot oio.”
10.22: Ikan hunia beṭar muk kala oigelo. Tar bout don-samana asil ḳori mono duk loia gelogi.
10.23: Teu Isae sairobae saia tan sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Doni manush Allar bashshait hamani boṛo moshkil.”
10.24: Ikan hunia era taijjub oigela. Isae hirbar ḳoila, “Baba oḳol, deḳrae ni, duniabi don-samanar ufre zera borosha ḳore, Allar bashshait hamani tarar lagi bout moshkil.
10.25: Doni manush Allar bashshait hamanir saite, suir furedi uṭ hamani aro shuza.”
10.26: Ikan hunia sahabi oḳol aro taijjub oia eḳe-oinne ḳoila, “Te kun manshe nazat hasil ḳorbo, ḳe rehai faibo?”
10.27: Isae erar bae saia ḳoila, “Manshor lagi oshombob oito fare, oile Allar nozoro ita to mamuli. Tain hoḳolta-u faroin.”
10.28: Sahabi Fitore ḳoila, “Huzur, amra to hoḳolta falai toia afnar ḳore aisi.”
10.29: Tain ḳoila, “Ami tumrare hok kota ḳoiram, ze manshe amar lagi ar Allar batail kush-ḳobrir lagi nizor baṛi-gor, ma-baf, bai-boin, fua-fuṛi, zomi-mirash saṛi dise,
10.30: he ou duniat itar eḳ-sho gun beshi baṛi-gor, ma-baf, bai-boin, fua-fuṛi, zomi-mirash faibo. Itar loge he zulum-toklif-o faibo. Bador zindegit he aḳer-o faibo.
10.31: Oile zera foyla ḳataro asoin, erar maze bout zon ḳore foṛiziba, ar zera ḳoror ḳataro asoin, tarar bout zon foyla ḳataro aiba.” Tisrabar nizor moutor agam ḳobor
10.32: Hozrot Isae sahabi oḳolre loia Zeruzalemo zaira. Tain age oia aṭira, ar sahabi oḳol ḍorai ḍorai kore ḳore zaira. Aro zera tan ḳore oia zaira tarar zano-o ḍor asil. Isae tan barozon sahabire alga horaia nia hirbar ḳoila, tan kun dosha goṭibo.
10.33: Tain ḳoila, “Huno, amra oḳon Zeruzalem zairam. Hono ami bin-Adomre doria boṛo imam ar moulana oḳlor ato shofi deoa oibo. Tara bisar ḳoria amare zane marar ray diba. Amare bidormi zatir ato shomzai diba.
10.34: Ou bidormi oḳole ṭaṭṭa-moshkora ḳoria, shorilo sef siṭaia, bezuita sabuk marba, ar zane mariliba. Moutor tin din bade hirbar zinda oia uṭmu.” Montri oar lagi onurud
10.35: Bade Zibudiar dui fut Iakub ar Hannan namor duio sahabi Hozrot Isar gese aia ḳoila, “Huzur, amra ekkan arzi loia aisi, mono ḳorram, afne amrar arzikan raḳba.”
10.36: Tain ḳoila, “Ami tumrar lagi kita ḳortam, tumra kita sairae?”
10.37: Era ḳoila, “Afne zebla furafur dafoṭor loge raz-godit boiba, ou shomoy amra eḳzonre afnar ḍainor godi, oinno zonre bauor godiḳan diba.”
10.38: Isae ḳoila, “Tumra to buzrae na tumra kita sairae. Ami ze toklifor fialadi kaimu, ita kunu tumra ḳaitae farbae ni? Ami ze toklifor gusol ḳormu, tumra ita farbae ni?”
10.39: Tara ḳoila, “Ji oy farmu.” Tain ḳoila, “Aichcha, ami ze fialadi kaimu, tumra-o ogudi kaibae. Ami ze gusol ḳormu, tumra-o oula ḳorbae.
10.40: Oile amar ḍain ba bau galat boanir eḳtiar amar ato nae. I godi oḳol zerar lagi zuit ḳora oise, ḳali tara-u faiba.”
10.41: Baki doshzon sahabie Iakub ar Hannanor i arzi hunia kub biroḳto oila.
10.42: Teu Isae era hoḳolre ekḳano dola ḳoria ḳoila, “Tumra to zano, bidormi zatir raza oḳol tarar prozar munib oy. Tarar zomidar oḳole nizor gulamor ufre beṭagiri kore.
10.43: Oile tumrar maze ila oa ṭik nae. Tumrar ḳeu dami bonte saile, he tumrar kezmot ḳorouk.
10.44: Ar ḳeu boṛo oite saile, he hoḳlor gulami korouk.
10.45: Mono rakio, ami bin-Adome-o kezmot faoat aisi na, aisi to kezmot ḳorat. Ar bout manshor zan basanir lagi nizor zan bilai deoat aisi.” Anda beṭare shifa ḳora
10.46: Hozrot Isae tan sahabi oḳol loia Ziriho ṭauno aila. Bade erare ar aro bout manshore loia ṭaun taki baronir bala, Timoyor fua Bortimoy namor eḳ anda beṭae fotor daro boia bik korat asil.
10.47: Ein-u Nasarot gaur Isa, ikan hunia beṭae zure sillai sillai koilo, “O Isa, Hozrot Daudor aolad, amare rohom ḳoroin.”
10.48: Sillani hunia boute ḳoila, “Chup, sillais na.” Oile he aro zure sillaia ḳoilo, “Daudor aolad, amare rohom ḳoroin.”
10.49: Tar sillani hunia Isae dom loia ḳoila, “Ere ono ano.” Manshe ou anda beṭare ḳoila, “Ḍoraio na, ao. Huzure tumare ḍakira.”
10.50: Teu beṭae tar shorilor saddor kulia, faldi uṭia tan ḳandat gelo.
10.51: Isae tare zikaila, “Tumi kita sao ba? Ami tumare kita ḳortam?” Beṭae ḳoilo, “Huzur, ami souke deḳtam sai.”
10.52: Tain ḳoila, “Aichcha zao, tumar imanor bole-u tumi bala oilae.” Ḳoite-u tar deḳar shokti ailo ar Isar ḳore ḳore roana oilo.

11.1: Hozrot Isae tan sahabire loia Zeruzalemor ḳasat, Zoytun faṛor loge Bayt-Ania ar Bayt-Faijja gaut aia azila. Ono aia tain duizon sahabire ḳoila,
11.2: “Tumra duio zon samnor ou gaut zao. Gia gaut hamaite-u deḳbae egu gadar baichcha banda ase. Er ufre ḳeu kunudin soar oise na. Ogur golar doṛi kulia ono loia aio.
11.3: Ḳeu zikaile ḳoio, huzuror dorḳar ase, erdae niram. Tain zoldi kori firot dilaiba.”
11.4: Tan hukum mafik era gela. Gia deḳla, hasau fotor ḳandat eḳ baṛir uṭano gadar baichcha banda ase. Dekia era tar band kulita saila,
11.5: ou shomoy hono uba ḳoyzon manshe zikaila, “Oba, tumra i baichchar doṛi kulrae ḳene?”
11.6: Teu Isae zela hikai disla, era oula-u zuaf dila. Ikan hunia manshe ar kunta ḳoila na.
11.7: Gadar baichcha loia Isar gese aia harle, manshe nizor gotror saddor kulia gadar fiṭit bisaila. Bade tain er ufre soṛila.
11.8: Aro bout manshe tarar gotror saddor kulia fotor maze bisai dila, ar boute gasor fatain siṛia ania foto bisaila.
11.9: Isar loge oia age-ḳore zera zaoat asil, era zure zure elan dila, “Marhaba! Mabudor name zein toshrif anra, tan tarif ouk.
11.10: Amrar mul murobbi Daudor bashshai kaim or, Alhamdulilla! Behesto-o marhaba!”
11.11: Zeruzalem aia tain fobitro Baytul-Mukaddoso hamaila ar sairobae saia hoḳolta deḳla. Bade hainja oizaoae tan barozon sahabire loia Bayt-Aniat gelagi.
11.12: Bador din Bayt-Ania taki bidae oar shomoy tan feṭo buk laglo.
11.13: Ou tain duroi taki fatae bora egu ḍumur gas dekia, ogur fol ḳaibar niote gasor daro gela. Ou shomoy ḍumur gaso fol dorar din nae. Tain gia deḳla, gasor maze ḳali fata, kunu fol nai.
11.14: Tain ou gasre ḳoila, “Ar kunudin ḳeu zanu tumar fol na ḳae.” Tan i buli sahabi oḳole hunilila. Zeruzalemor Kaba Shorifre fak-saf ḳora
11.15: Bade Zeruzalem aia tain fobitro Baytul-Mukaddoso hamaila. Ar Kaba goror shimanat zoto ḳorid-bikir ḳarbari asil, itare ḳedai dila. Tain ṭeḳar baṭṭar ḳarbari oḳlor kesh bakso, ar faro besra oḳlor ashon ulṭaia falai dila.
11.16: Baytul-Mukaddosor uṭanedi kunuzat mal-samana loia solasol ḳorte nished dila.
11.17: Tain talim dila, “Allar kalamo batail oise na ni, amar gorre duniar tamam zatir ebadot ḳana ḳoia ḍaḳa oibo? Oile tumra i gorre ḍaḳaitor aḍḍaḳana banailiso.”
11.18: Ikan hunia boṛo imam ar moulana oḳole tanre zane marilibar dandat lagla. Oile tara Isare kub ḍoraita, ḳaron tan talim hunia manshor maze asanoḳ eshki foyda oisil.
11.19: Hainja bala tain sahabi oḳolre loia ṭaunor bare gelagi. Mozbut imanor dua
11.20: Biane sahabi oḳole fotedi aṭia aoar bala deḳla, ou ḍumur gas ekkere zoṛe-foṛe hukaia morigese.
11.21: Dekia sahabi Fitoror mono oigelo. Ou tain ḳoila, “Huzur, afne ze gasre boddua disla, deḳoukka, igu morigese.”
11.22: Tain erare ḳoila, “Allar ufre ekin raḳo.
11.23: Ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, kunu manshe tar dilor maze shondoy na ḳoria, furafur imane zudi ou faṛore ḳoy, ‘Zao, uṛia gia doriat foṛo,’ te he zela ḳoibo tar lagi ola ḳora oibo.
11.24: Erdae ami tumrare ḳoiram, dua ḳorar shomoy tumra zeta mango, ekin ḳorio tumra ita failiso. Teu hasau ita faibae.
11.25: -26 Tumra zebla-u dua ḳorat ubao, ou shomoy ḳeuror birudde tumrar kunu nalish taḳle, tare maf ḳori dio. Teu tumrar behesti baf Allae-o tumrar tamam guna maf ḳori diba.” Hozrot Isae ḳar eḳtiare ḳam ḳoroin?
11.27: Bade Hozrot Isae tan sahabi oḳolre loia hirbar Zeruzalem aila. Tain Kaba goror uṭano aṭira, ou shomoy boṛo imam oḳole, murobbi ar moulana oḳole tan daro aia zikaila,
11.28: “Tumi kun eḳtiare ita ḳorrae? Ḳe tumare i kemota dise?”
11.29: Tain ḳoila, “Ami afnarare ekkan soal ḳormu. Afnara er zuaf dilaile, ami-o ḳoimu, ḳar eḳtiare ami ita ḳoriar.
11.30: Aichcha ḳoukka sain, Hozrot Ehiae torikar gusol deoar eḳtiar ḳar ges taki faisla, Allar ges taki, na manshor ges taki?”
11.31: Ikan hunia tara ḳane ḳane matila, “Amra zudi koi Allar ges taki, te tain ḳoiba, tumra tan ufre iman anlae na ḳene?
11.32: Ar zudi koi manshor ges taki, te to?” Tara manshore kub ḍoraita, ḳaron hoḳol manshe-u manta, Hozrot Ehia eḳzon nobi.
11.33: Erdae tara zuaf dila, “Amra ikan zani na.” Teu Isae-o ḳoila, “Te ami-o afnarare ḳoitam nae, ḳar eḳtiare ami ita ḳoriar.”

12.1: Teu Hozrot Isae hou moulana oḳolre kichcha hunaia buzaila, “Eḳzon manshe angur ḳet ḳoria tar sairobae beṛa dila. Bade anguror rosh bar ḳorar lagi ek gat kudila ar sokidaror lagi usa ḳori ekkan ṭong-gor banaila. Heshe manshor gese ḳet bagi dia malik bidesh gelagi.
12.2: Angur fakia harle malike tan ek gulamre bagidaror gese faṭaila, tan baṭ anar lagi.
12.3: Oile bagidar oḳole i gulamre dori mair-doir ḳori, ḳali ate bidae ḳori dilo.
12.4: Teu malike tan aro ek gulamre faṭaila. Bagidar oḳole tare-o gala-gali koria maria tar mata faṭaililo.
12.5: Erbade tain aro eḳzonre faṭaila. Enre tara zane marililo. Olaḳan ḳori tain aro bout zonre faṭaila. Erar mazor ḳoyzonre tara mair-doir ḳorlo, ar ḳoyzonre zane marililo.
12.6: Heshe malikor ḳali eḳzon manush baki roisil, he oilo tan mayar fut. Hesh-mesh tain ou fuare-u tarar gese faṭaila, mono ḳorla, amar fuare tara ijjot dibo.
12.7: Oile bagidar oḳole eḳe-oinne foramish ḳori koilo, ‘Ou fua-u to bade i shompottir malik oibo. Te ao, ere-o amra marilai, teu amra-u itar malik bonizimu.’
12.8: Ḳoia-u tara fuare doria zane maria, angur ḳetor bare nia falai dilo.
12.9: “Te oḳon ḳoukka sain, ḳetor malike kita ḳorba? Tain aia to ou bagidar oḳolre mariliba ar ḳet oinno manshor gese bagi diba.
12.10: Afnara Allar kalamo foṛsoin na ni, Raz mestoir oḳole ze fattorre beḳama ḳoia falai disil, oḳṭa dia-u goror ian kuṭi oilo.
12.11: Mabude nize-u ita oaila, ita dekia to amrar taijjubi lager.”
12.12: Ita hunia tara Isare dorilito sailo. Tara buzililo, tain i kichcha tarar bifokke-u ḳoira. Oile manshore ḍoraia tanre saṛia gelogi. Ḳazna dibar befare talim
12.13: Bade ou murobbi ar moulana oḳole Isare fando falanir lagi, Forishi ar Raza Herudor dolor ḳoyzon manshore tan gese faṭailo.
12.14: Tara aia ḳoilo, “Huzur, amra to zani, afne eḳzon hok manush. Manshe kita mono ḳore ba na ḳore, itae afnar kunta-u zae ae na, afne to ḳeuror mukor bae saia kunta ḳoroin na. Hok-halal niome manshore Allar rasta batai dira. Te amrare batai deukka, Hozrot Musar shoriot mafik Ruman bashshare ḳazna deoa zaiz ni?
12.15: Amra tanre ḳazna ditam ni, na ditam na?” Tain tarar bonḍami buzilila, buzia ḳoila, “Tumra ḳene amare forikka ḳorrae? Deki, eḳṭa dinar ania amare deḳao.”
12.16: Tara dinar loia tan gese aile, tain zikaila, “I foyshar ufre ḳar nam ar sobi?” Tara ḳoila, “Ruman bashshar.”
12.17: Tain ḳoila, “Te huno, bashshar zeta ita bashshare deo, ar Allar zeta ita Allare deo.” Ikan hunia tara ammok bonigela. Moron bade zinda oa
12.18: Bade Siddekia mozobor ḳoyzon manush Isar ḳandat aila. Era ekin ḳoroin, moutor bade kunu manush ar zinda oia uṭoin na. Erdae tara Isare zikaila,
12.19: “Huzur, Hozrot Musae amrar lagi ou musla lekia gesoin, kunu manshe bia ḳoria, tar boure niaoladi halote toia he zudi mara zae, te tar baie ou beṭire bia ḳoria tar bair bongsho basaite oibo.
12.20: Te doroukka, eḳ foribaro shat bai asil. Boṛo zone bia ḳoria niaoladi halote mara gelo.
12.21: Bade dusra baie tar ou ṛaṛi babire bia ḳorlo. Oile he-o niaoladi roia mara gelo. Bade tin nombor baie bia ḳoria he-o oula mara gelo.
12.22: Ou nomunae tara shato bair ḳeuror-u hurutta oilo na. Heshe ou beṭi-o mara gelo.
12.23: Te moron bade zebla manush zinda oia uṭba, ou shomoy i beṭi, era kun bair bou oibo? Tara hoḳole-u to i beṭire bia ḳorsil.”
12.24: Tain zuaf dila, “Afnara to Allar kalam-o zanoin na, Allar kudroti takkot-o buzoin na. Erdae afnara i bul ḳorra.
12.25: Hunoukka, murda oḳol zebla zinda oia uṭba, ou shomoy tara bia-shadi korta nae, ḳeu tarare bia dito-o nae. Era to firistar laḳan boniziba.
12.26: Tourat Kitabo Tur faṛor zongla zolar boyanir maze, murda oḳol zinda oar befare kita leḳa ase, ita afnara foṛsoin na ni? Allae Musa nobire ḳoila, ‘Ami-u Ibrahim, Isʼhak ar Iakubor Alla’.
12.27: Te Alla to murda oḳlor Alla nae, tain zinda oḳlor Alla. Afnara to bout boṛo bul ḳorsoin.” Hoḳol taki boṛo hukum
12.28: Ou shomoy eḳzon moulana aia erar torka-torki hunla. Ar Isae zen ṭik zuaf disoin ikan buzia ein zikaila, “Ḳoukka sain, Tourat Shorifor maze hoḳol taki boṛo hukum kunṭa?”
12.29: Isae zuaf dila, “Hoḳol taki boṛo hukum oilo, O Boni Israil, amrar Mabud Alla eḳ.
12.30: Tumrar asta dil, zan, mon ar hoḳol shokti dia tumrar Mabud Allare mohobbot ḳorio.
12.31: Dusra hukum oilo, tumrar ari-forire nizor laḳan maya ḳorio. Ou duio hukum taki boṛo ar kunu hukum nae.”
12.32: Ikan hunia hi moulanae ḳoila, “Huzur, marhaba! Afne to ṭik-u ḳoisoin, Alla eḳ, tain saṛa ar kunu Mabud nai.
12.33: Ar asta dil, bibeḳ-buddi, hoḳol shokti dia tanre mohobbot ḳora, ari-forire nizor laḳan maya ḳora oilo, hoḳol nomunar foshu kurbani ar lilla-sodga taki-o zoruri.”
12.34: Isae zebla deḳla, ou moulanae kub shundor ḳori zuaf disoin, ou tain ḳoila, “Allar bashshai taki afne to beshi duroi nae.” Erbade tone Isare kunu soal ḳorar shaosh ar ḳeuror oilo na. al-Mosi ke?
12.35: Isae Baytul-Mukaddoso talim deoar shomoy zikaila, “Moulana oḳole ḳemne ḳoin, al-Mosi oila Hozrot Daudor aolad?
12.36: Daude to Pak Ruhur bole ḳoisoin, Mabude amar munibre ḳoila, Ami zoto shomoy tumar dushmon oḳolre tumar faor tolat na falai, oto shomoy tumi amar ḍainor toḳto bo.
12.37: Daude zebla nize-u al-Mosire tan munib ḳoisoin, te al-Mosi kemne Daudor aolad oiba?” Bout manshe kushi oia Isar boyan hunat asil.
12.38: Boyanor maze tain ḳoila, “Moulana oḳlor befare hushiar roio. Tara ḳali lamba lamba zubba findia bazar-aṭo gura-fira ḳoroin ar ijjot faita sain.
12.39: Tarar shoḳ oilo kunu mozliso gele dami zagat boa, ḳanir shomoy samnor ḳataro boia ḳaoa.
12.40: Eḳbae tara lamba lamba dua ḳoria manshor mon golain, aroḳbae ṛaṛi beṭintor zomi-mirash doḳol ḳori nein. Hashoror moydano erar hoḳol taki boṛo mosibot oibo.” Gorib ṛaṛi beṭir sodga deoa
12.41: Bade tain Baytul-Mukaddosor lillar ḍegor ḳandat boia deḳla, manshe aia ḳemne lilla-sodga dira. Tain deḳla, bout doni manshe besh ḳori ṭeḳa-foysha dan ḳorra.
12.42: Bade ek gorib ṛaṛi beṭie aia ḳali duiṭa foysha dan ḳorlo.
12.43: Dekia tan sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Ami tumrare hok kota ḳoiram, hoḳol manush tone ou beṭie beshi dan ḳorlo.
12.44: Hoḳol manshe tarar bout don-saman taki kisu ongsho dan ḳorse, oile i beṭi obabi oile-o, beṭie nizor lagi kunta na rakia, hoḳolta-u dan ḳori dilo.”

13.1: Hozrot Isa Baytul-Mukaddos taki bar oia zaoar bala tan eḳzon sahabie ḳoila, “Huzur, ou deḳoukka, ḳoto boṛo boṛo fattoror oal ar shundor shundor dolan.”
13.2: Tain ḳoila, “Tumi ou zeta boṛo boṛo dolan deḳrae, itar dui fattor ekḳano lagail roito nae, hoḳolta banga oizibo.”
13.3: Bade tain zebla Zoytun faṛor ufre Baytul-Mukaddos Kaba Shorif muka boat asla, ou shomoy sahabi Fitor, Iakub, Hannan ar Andriase tanre niralae zikaila,
13.4: “Huzur, amrare zanaukka, ita kun shomoy oibo? Kun alamot dekia amra buzmu, ita binash oar shomoy aichche?”
13.5: Tain ḳoila, “Dekio, ḳeu zanu tumrare na ṭoge.
13.6: Bout zone amar nam doria aia ḳoibo, ami-u hein, ḳoia boutre ṭogibo.
13.7: Oile zuddor aoaz ar laṛair ḳobor hunia tumra ḍoraio na. Ita nisoy goṭbo, goṭle-o ita to shesh nae.
13.8: Eḳ zatie aroḳ zatir loge, eḳ deshe aroḳ deshor loge laṛai korbo. Bout zagat boisal ar nidan deḳa dibo. Oile ita to ḳali mosibotor shuru.
13.9: “Tumra nizor befare hushiar roio. Manshe tumrare doria bisaror adaloto shomzaibo. Mosidor bitre tumrare singladi mara oibo. Amar lagi tumrare deshor raza-bashshar samne neoa oibo. Tumra erar samne amar befare shakki dibae.
13.10: Foyla duniar tamam zatir gese Allar deoa kush-ḳobri toblig kora zorur.
13.11: Tumrare doria zebla bisaro neoa oibo, ou shomoy kita zuaf ditae, ita loia age kunu sinta ḳorio na. Hou shomoy tumrare zeta hikaia deoa oibo, tumra ota-u ḳoio. Ashole tumra to hino mattae nae, Pak Ruhe-u matiba.
13.12: Baie baire, bafe fuare zane marar lagi dorai dibo. Fua-fuṛie afon ma-bafor birudde gia, ma-bafre kun ḳoraibo.
13.13: Ar amar lagi hoḳole tumrare ginnaibo, oile hesh forzonto ze ṭikia roibo, he rehai faibo.
13.14: “Ze tilaot ḳorer he buzouk, bezuita mosibotor ginnar i siz ze zagat aoar ḳota nae, i sizre zebla ono deḳbae, ou shomoy zera Ehudia zilat asoin, tara bagia faṛia elaḳat zauk.
13.15: Sator ufre zera roiba, tara lamat lamia kunta neoar lagi goror bitre ar na hamauk.
13.16: Ḳetor maze zera roiba, tarar gotror saddor neoar lagi baṛit na auk.
13.17: Ou shomoy zeta beṭintor hurutta oita, ar zera huruttare bukur dud ḳaoaira, tarar boṛo zobor mosibot oibo.
13.18: Tumra dua ḳoro, ita zanu shitor dino na oy.
13.19: Ou shomoy to oto bezuita ḳoshṭo oibo, zeta duniar foyla tone aiz forzonto kunudin oise na, ar kunudin oito-o nae.
13.20: Mabude zudi i shomoyre ḳomaia na dita, te ḳeu zinda roilo na one. Oile Allae tan fosond ḳora bonda oḳlor lagi i shomoy ḳomai disoin.
13.21: Hi shomoy ḳeu zudi tumrare ḳoy, ‘Huncho ni, al-Mosi ono aisoin,’ ba ‘Deḳo, ounu tain,’ te tumra ita ekin ḳorio na.
13.22: Ḳaron bout bonḍoe aia ḳoibo, ami-u al-Mosi, ar bout bonḍo nobi-o aiba. Shombob oile tara Allar fosond ḳora bonda oḳolre-o duka dia be-fote nita ḳori bout keramoti-muzeza deḳaiba.
13.23: Oile tumra hushiar roio, ami to tumrare age-u ita hal-hokikot zanai dilam.
13.24: “Ou mosibotor shomoy faronir bade, Shuruz andair oizibo, sande ar for dito nae.
13.25: Tera oḳol asman taki kulia foṛizibo, asmanor kunu shoktiala siz-u ṭik-ṭak roito nae.
13.26: Ou shomoy manshe deḳba, bin-Adome Allar kudroti zalal ar shan-tozollie, megor ṭukrat oia duniat toshrif anra.
13.27: Tain firista oḳolre duniar eḳ mata taki aroḳ matat faṭaia, Allar fosond ḳora bonda oḳolre sairobae tone dola ḳorba.
13.28: “Ḍumur gasor bae saia ilim ḳamai koro. Gasor ḍal-fala norom oia zebla noya kuṛi baroy, ou shomoy tumra buzilao gormor din aichche.
13.29: Te ou laḳan tumra zebla deḳbae ita hoḳolta goṭer, dekia buzilio, bin-Adom-o daro aichchoin. Ḳali daro nae, tain aia duaro ṭukaira.
13.30: Ami tumrare hok kota ḳoiram, ita na goṭa forzonto i zomanar manush fuṛaita nae.
13.31: Asman-zomin hoḳolta binash oizibo, oile amar kalam hamesha ḳaim roibo.
13.32: “Hou din ar hi shomoyor befare ḳali amar gaibi baf bade ar ḳeu zanoin na. Asmani firista ba ḳas mayar zone-o zanoin na.
13.33: Tumra hushiar o, kial ḳori solo ar dua ḳoro. Hi din kun shomoy aibo, tumra ḳeu to zano na.
13.34: Ola eḳ manshor laḳan hi din aibo, zein bidesh zaoar shomoy tan gulam oḳlor ato hoḳolta shomzai dia zarzir ḳam buzai dila. Ar sokidarre ḳoila hozag roito.
13.35: Tumra-o oula hozag roio. Baṛir malik kun shomoy aiba, hainja bala, maz raite, fotabala na fozore aiba, ikan to tumra ḳeu zano na.
13.36: Tain aḳta aile zanu na deḳoin, tumra gumai roiso.
13.37: Ami tumrare zela ḳoilam, hoḳolre-u oula ḳoiram, hozag ro.”

14.1: Azadi Id ar Ḳamir Saṛa Ruṭir Idor ḳali dui din baki roise. Boṛo imam ar moulana oḳole, Hozrot Isare manshor aforḳe doria zane marilibar danda lagaila.
14.2: Tara ḳoila, “Idor shomoy tare dortam nae. Dorle manshe gonḍogul lagai dito fare.”
14.3: Isa ou shomoy Bayt-Ania gaur fosa-kusṭo bemari Saimonor baṛit asla. Ono boia tain ḳana ḳaira, aḳta-u eḳ beṭi manshe sinor eḳ butolo ḳori kub dami kaṭi ator loia aia, butol bangia hoḳol ator tan matat ḍali dilo.
14.4: Ita dekia hino azir kunu kunu zone na-kush oia eḳe-oinne ḳoilo, “I ator fuṭain ḳene borbad ḳora oilo?
14.5: I fuṭin besile to tin-sho dinar faia gorib oḳolre bilai deoa gelo one.” Otar lagi tara beṭire boḳa-zoḳa ḳorla.
14.6: Oile Isae ḳoila, “Oise, tanre ar kunta ḳoio na. Tain to amar lagi kub shundor ḳam ḳorsoin.
14.7: Gorib oḳol to hamesha-u tumrar loge roiba. Tumrar zebla mone sae tarare shaijjo ḳortae farbae. Oile amare to hamesha faitae nae.
14.8: Besaṛie zeḳan farsoin oḳan-u ḳorsoin. Ein aia amar gotro ator ḍalia, dafon-ḳafonor lagi amare age-u zuit ḳorsoin.
14.9: Ami tumrare hok kota ḳoiar, duniar zekunu zagat Allar kush-ḳobri toblig korar shomoy, ou besaṛire mono ḳorar lagi, tan i kamor ḳota ḳan-o ḳoa zaibo.”
14.10: Bade tan barozon sahabir mazor eḳzon, en nam Ihuda Iskariat, ein Isare doraia deoar lagi boṛo imam oḳlor gese gela.
14.11: Imam oḳole hunia kub kushi oia ḳoila, “Tare doraia dile tumare ṭeḳa dimu.” Teu Ihudae tanre dorai deoar shuzug tukanit roilo. Hozrot Isar aḳeri id
14.12: Ḳamir Saṛa Ruṭir Idor foyla din, Azadi Idor lagi meṛa-baichcha zobo ḳora oito. Erdae sahabi oḳole Isare zikaila, “Huzur, amra kun zagat gia afnar lagi idor ḳana tiar ḳortam?”
14.13: Ou Isae tan duizon sahabire ḳoila, “Tumra ṭauno zao. Gia deḳbae hono eḳ beṭa manshe ḳoyladi fani boria nira. Tumra tan ḳore ḳore zaio.
14.14: Tain ze baṛit gia hamaiba, hou baṛir malikre tumra ḳoio, ‘Sab, murshide ḳoisoin, sahabi oḳolre loia ami zeḳano Azadi Idor ḳana ḳaitam, hou musafirḳana ḳan deḳai deukka.’
14.15: Tain tumrare ufor talat hazail-faṛail eḳ boṛo kuṭa deḳai diba. Tumra ono hoḳolta tiar ḳorio.”
14.16: Teu sahabi oḳol gia ṭauno hamaila. Hamaia Isae zelaḳan ḳoisla, ṭik ou laḳan hoḳolta faila ar idor ḳana tiar ḳorla.
14.17: Hainja bala Isae tan barozon sahabire loia ono aila.
14.18: Aia ḳani kaoar shomoy tain ḳoila, “Ami tumrare hok kota ḳoiram, tumrar mazor eḳzone-u beimani koria amare dorai dibo, he oḳon amar loge boia ḳar.”
14.19: Ikan hunia tara kub bezar oigela. Ar eḳ ek kori zikaila, “Huzur, i zon kita ami ni?”
14.20: Tain ḳoila, “He ou barozonor mazor-u eḳzon. He oḳon amar loge talo at harar.
14.21: Bin-Adomor moutor befare Asmani Kitabo zela leḳa ase, tan mout to oula-u oibo, oile afsus hou manshor lagi, ze tanre doraia dibo. Duniat tar zonom na oa-u, tar lagi bout bala asil.”
14.22: Ḳanat roisoin, ou shomoy Isae ruṭi ato loia Allar shukria adae ḳoria, siṛia ṭukra ṭukra ḳori sahabi oḳlor ato dia ḳoila, “Ou neo, mono ḳoro ita amar shoril.”
14.23: Bade tain anguror shorbotor fiala loia Allar shukria zanaia erare dila. Era hoḳole ou fiala taki shorbot ḳaila.
14.24: Isae ḳoila, “Ḳao, mono ḳoro ita amar lou. Ou lour zoriae Adom zatir boutor basibar lagi noya usilla ḳaim ḳora oibo.
14.25: Ami hasa ḳota ḳoiram, zei forzonto Allar bashshait dakil oia ami anguror shorbot na ḳaisi, oto din i laḳan shorbot ar ḳaitam nae.”
14.26: Heshe hoḳole mili ek gozol gaia, gor taki bar oia Zoytun faṛo gelagi. Hozrot Fitore oshikar ḳorar agam ishara
14.27: Faṛo gia Isae tan sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Tumra hoḳole-u to amare falaia bagibae. Allar kalamo ase, ‘Ami falor raḳalre marilimu, teu falor meṛain sairobae sitriziba.’
14.28: Oile amare murda taki zinda ḳorar bade, tumrar age-u ami Galilo zaimugi.”
14.29: Fitore tanre ḳoila, “Huzur, hoḳol bagi gele-o ami bagitam nae.”
14.30: Isae ḳoila, “Te huno, ami tumare ḳoiram, aiz fotabala murgae duibar bang dibar age-u, tumi tinbar ḳoibae, tumi amare sino na.”
14.31: Oile Fitore aro boṛo golae ḳoila, “Huzur ou kita ḳoin, afnar loge zudi amar moron-o oy, ta-o ami kunumonte-u ḳoitam nae ami afnare sini na.” Hoḳol sahabie-o ou laḳan ḳoila. Getshimani bagano Hozrot Isa
14.32: Bade Hozrot Isae tan sahabi oḳolre loia Getshimani namor eḳ bagano aila. Aia tain erare ḳoila, “Ami zoto shomoy dori dua ḳormu, oto shomoy tumra ono boat roio.”
14.33: Oḳan ḳoia tain Fitor, Iakub ar Hannanre tan loge raḳla, monor duk ar zalae tain boṛo toklif faila.
14.34: Tain erare ḳoila, “Duke amar zan baroi zargi. Tumra hoḳol ono ro ar hozag taḳo.”
14.35: Ḳoia tuṛa horia gia tain maṭit soizdat foṛia aroz ḳorla, shombob oile i mosibotor oḳtḳan horizibar lagi.
14.36: Tain ḳoila, “O abba, amar oli, tumi to hoḳolta-u ḳortae faro. Tumi amar ufor taki aneoala ou mosibotḳan horailao. Oile ita amar ichchae nae, tumar morzi mafik-u ouk.”
14.37: Soizda taki uṭia tain sahabi oḳlor gese aia deḳla, era gumai gesoin. Ou tain Fitorre hozag kori koila, “Saimon, tumi gumai gelae ni? Ekḳan gonṭa-o hozag roitae farlae na ni?
14.38: Hozag ro, forikka taki bastae ḳori dua ḳoro. Dilor maze nisoy kial ase, oile ḳaya to ḳomzur.”
14.39: Bade tain hirbar gia hou eḳoi dua ḳorla.
14.40: Firia aia deḳla, era hirbar gumai gesoin, gume tarar souk falai der. Tara Isare kita zuaf dita, kunta buzla na.
14.41: Tin nombor bar tain aia erare ḳoila, “Tumra deki oḳono arame gumairae. Aichcha oise, shomoy aichche to. Deḳrae ni, bin-Adomre gunagar oḳlor ato shomzai deoa or.
14.42: Uṭo, amra roana dei. Amare zegie dushmonor ato dorai dibo, he aia azigese.” Hozrot Isa al-Mosi dushmonor ato bondi
14.43: Tain erar loge mato roisoin, ou shomoy Ihuda hono ailo. He asil barozon sahabir mazor eḳzon. Tar loge oia aro boute laṭi-soṭa-toluar loia ailo. Boṛo imam, moulana ar murobbi oḳole erare faṭaisoin.
14.44: Tanre zegie doraia dito, he tar logor erare age hikaia disil, “Ami gia zen galo hunga dimu, ein-u hou zon. Tumra enre bondi koria kub shabdane loia zaio.”
14.45: Teu Ihudae shuza-shuzi Isar gese gia ḳoilo, “Huzur!” Ḳoia he tanre hunga dilo.
14.46: Loge loge tara aia Isare dorililo.
14.47: Tan ḳandat zera ubat asla, era eḳzone nizor toluar bar ḳoria fordan imamor gulamre sed marla, sedor loge tar ek kan ḳaṭia foṛigelo.
14.48: Isae ota manshore ḳoila, “Kita ba, ami kunu sur-ḍaḳait ni, tumra deki laṭi-soṭa-toluar loia amare dorat aiso?
14.49: Ami to forteḳ din Baytul-Mukaddoso gia tumrar samne-u talim ditam. Ou shomoy to tumra amare dorlae na. Nisoy Allar kalamor ayat to folite oibo.”
14.50: Tanre bondi korte-u tan hoḳol sahabi tane toia bagi gela.
14.51: Ḳali eḳzon zuane ekkan longi findia tan ḳore ḳore gelo. Oile manshe zebla tare-o dorta saila,
14.52: he tar longi falaia lemṭa oia douṛaia bagilo. Fotua komiṭir dorbaro bisar
14.53: Ou manshe Hozrot Isare doria hari fordan imamor gese loia gelo. Hono boṛo imam oḳol, murobbi ar moulana oḳol-o ekḳano dola oila.
14.54: Sahabi Fitor Isar ges tone duroi hori hori roia tan ḳore ḳore gia fordan imamor baṛir uṭano gela. Gia hono faradar oḳlor loge milia aguin tabanit boila.
14.55: Boṛo imam oḳole ar fotua komiṭir hoḳol manshe Isare zane marar lagi kunu nalish tukaila, oile faila na.
14.56: Mozliso Isar birudde boute misa shakki dile-o, tarar shakkir mil oilo na.
14.57: Teu aro ḳoyzone tan birudde ou misa shakki dilo. Tara ḳoilo,
14.58: “Amra hunchi, he ḳoise, manshor ator banail Zeruzalemor ou Kaba Shorif, ami bangilimu, ar tin dinor maze kunu manshor at na lagaia ami arokkan banaimu.”
14.60: Heshe fordan imam ubaia hoḳlor samne Isare zikaila, “Oba, tumi kunu mator zuaf ditae na ni? Ita manshe tumar befare kita shakki dira, hunrae ni?”
14.61: Oile tain kunu zuaf na dia nirai roila. Fordan imame tanre hirbar zikaila, “Tumi kita Allatalar oada ḳora hou al-Mosi ni, tan ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla ni?”
14.62: Tain zuaf dila, “Ji oy, ami-u hein. Afnara deḳba, ami bin-Adom arshe-azimo Alla Rabbul Alaminor ḍainor toḳto boat asi. Ar deḳba, ami behesti megor kuṭit oia duniat toshrif aniar.”
14.63: Ikan hunia-u fordan imame nizor finnor ḳafoṛ siṛia ḳoila, “Ar kunu shakkir zorur ase ni?
14.64: Afnara nizor ḳane-u to hunla, he shiriki korlo. Te oḳon afnara kita ray diba?” Ou tara hoḳole tane dushi shaibosto ḳoria, zane marilibar hukum dilo.
14.65: Ḳeu ḳeu tan ufre sef dilo. Tan muk bandia gushi maria ḳoilo, “Hoi, tuin bule nobi, te oḳon ohi kos na.” Bade sifai oḳole-o tane nia mair-doir ḳorlo. Hozrot Fitore tinbar oshikar ḳorla
14.66: Fitor zebla lamat uṭano asla, ou shomoy fordan imamor eḳ bandi beṭi tan ḳandat gelo.
14.67: Gia tanre aguin tabanit dekia, bala ḳori tan bae saia hari koilo, “Afne-o to ou Nasarotor Isar loge asla.”
14.68: Fitore oshikar ḳoria ḳoila, “Na go, tumi ou kita ḳoirae? Ami ita kunta-u zani na, buzi-o na.” Oḳan ḳoia Fitor geiṭor daro gela, ar ou shomoy murgae bang dilailo.
14.69: Bandi beṭie zebla deḳlo, Fitor ono gia ubaisoin, ou tan ḳasat uba manshore gia tai koilo, “Ou beṭa-o erar logor eḳzon.”
14.70: Fitore hirbar na ḳorla. Oile tan ḳandat zera uba asil, tuṛa bade tara ḳoila, “Tumi nichchoy erar logor, tumar baṛi-o to Galil zilat.”
14.71: Fitore ḳoila, “Allar gozob foṛouk, ami kosom ḳaia ḳoiar, tumra ou zar ḳota ḳoirae, tare ami sini-o na.”
14.72: Oḳan ḳoite-u murgae duara bang dilo. Bang hunia-u Fitoror mono oigelo, Isae ḳoisla, “Murgae duibar bang dibar age-u tumi tinbar ḳoibae, tumi amare sino na.” Oḳan mono oite-u tain au au ḳori kandon dorla.

15.1: Boṛo imam oḳole sobre uṭia murobbi oḳol, moulana ar fotua komiṭir hoḳlor loge foramish ḳoria, Hozrot Isare bandia Ruman hakim Filator gese loia gela.
15.2: Gia harle hakim Filate Isare zikaila, “Tumi kita Ihudi oḳlor bashsha ni?” Tain ḳoila, “Afne ṭik kota-u ḳoira.”
15.3: Boṛo imam oḳole tan name bout nalish dila.
15.4: Filate hirbar ḳoila, “Tumi kunta zuaf ditae na ni? Deḳrae ni, tara tumar birudde ḳoto nalish der.”
15.5: Oile Isae kunu zuaf na deoae Filat taijjub oigela.
15.6: Azadi Idor shomoy hakime deshor manshor fosond mafik, eḳzon azotire ḳalas dita.
15.7: Ou shomoy Barabba namor eḳzon manush zelo asil. Shongramor shomoy he fouzor loge roia manush kun ḳorsil.
15.8: Manshe Filator gese aia dabi zanaila, “Afne afnar nizor reoaz mafik kam ḳoroukka.”
15.9: Tain zikaila, “Tumra sairae ni, ami Ihudi oḳlor bashshare saṛi ditam?”
15.10: Filate zanta, boṛo imam oḳole ingsha ḳoria Isare nia tan ato disoin.
15.11: Boṛo imam oḳole manshore uskaia dila, manshe Isar mukti na saia Barabbar mukti sain.
15.12: Erdae Filate hirbar manshore zikaila, “Te tumra zare Ihudir bashsha ḳo, tare ami kita ḳortam?”
15.13: Tara hoḳole sillani lagailo, “Tare solibo deo.”
15.14: Tain ḳoila, “Ḳene, he kita dush ḳorse?” Oile manshe aro zure zure sillaia ḳoilo, “Solibo deo.”
15.15: Teu Filate tarare kushi korta ḳori Barabbare ḳalas dilaila, ar Isare besh ḳori sabuk maria, solibo loṭḳaia zane marar hukum dila. (Solib oilo laḳṛidi banail manshore loṭḳaia marar eḳ zinish.) Sifai oḳlor ṭaṭṭa-moshkora
15.16: Bade sifai oḳole Isare doria fordan hakimor baṛir bitre loia gela. Hono tara aro sifai oḳol dola ḳorla.
15.17: Tara Isare baingoni rongor bashshai lebas findaila, ar gosa-ḳaṭa dia mukuṭ banaia tan matat dila.
15.18: Bade tara moshkora ḳori misil dilo, “Ihudir bashsha, marhaba.”
15.19: Ar eḳ laṭi ania bare bare tan matat marlo, gotro sef dilo, tane ijjot deḳanir ban ḳoria tan samne aṭu gaṛia boilo.
15.20: Ou laḳan ṭaṭṭa-moshkora ar bettomizi korar bade tan finnor baingoni lebas kulia, tan nizor ḳafoṛ findailo ar solibo nia zane marilito ḳori roana dilo. Solibor ufre Hozrot Isa
15.21: Tara loia zaira ou shomoy Kurini elaḳar Sikondor ar Roufor baf, Saimon namor eḳzon manush gau taki ou fotedi aṭia zaoat asla. Sifai oḳole zur ḳoria enedi hou solib boaia nila.
15.22: Tara Isare Golgata, mani ‘Kollar Saṛ’ namor zagat loia gela.
15.23: Hono nia tanre mura namor oshud furail anguror shorbot ḳaite dila, oile tain ita ḳaila na.
15.24: Bade tara tanre solibo, mani gaso loṭḳailo. Sifai oḳole tan ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ baṭia neoar lagi loṭari maria baiggo forikka ḳorlo.
15.25: Biane noyṭar shomoy tara tanre zane marar lagi solibo gatilo.
15.26: Ar tan oforad-namar maze leḳlo, “Ihudir bashsha.”
15.27: Tara duizon ḍaḳaitre-o tan loge solibo loṭḳailo, eḳzon ḍain galat, oinnozon bau galat.
15.28: Erdae Allar kalamor ou ayat-o foligelo, “Tanre naforman oḳlor loge gona oise.”
15.29: Hou fotedi zera zaoat asil tara mata laṛaia Isare siṛaia ḳoilo, “Oi mia, tumi bule Kaba gor bangia tin dinor maze hirbar banaitae farbae!
15.30: Te oḳon solib taki lamia aia nizor zan basao na.”
15.31: Boṛo imam ar moulana oḳole-o tanre siṛaia mata-mati korla, “He to manshor zan basaito, oḳon nizor zan basaito farer na.
15.32: He bule oada ḳora hou al-Mosi, Boni Israilor bashsha! Te farle oḳon solib taki lamia auk, teu amra-o ota dekia iman anmu.” Tan ḍaine-baue zerare solibo loṭḳail oisil, tara-o tanre siṛailo. Hozrot Isa al-Mosir ufat
15.33: Bade beil duifor taki zuhoror bad forzonto tin gonṭa asta desh andair oigelo.
15.34: Erbade-u tain kub zure zure ḳoila, “Eloi, eloi, lama sabaktani,” mani, “O amar Alla, amar Moula, tumi kene amar log saṛi dilae?”
15.35: Ou shomoy zera tan daro uba asil, tara ikan hunia ḳoila, “Huno, huno, he Hozrot Ilias nobire ḍaḳer.”
15.36: Oḳan hunia eḳzon manshe douṛaia gia ekkan tena ania ṭenga anguror shorbotor maze bizaia, eḳ laṭir matat bandia usa ḳori tanre ḳaite dilo. He ḳoilo, “Ouk, deki na Iliase tare lamaia neoat ain ni.”
15.37: Heshe Isae zure aoaz ḳoria aḳeri dom falaia inteḳal ḳorla.
15.38: Loge loge Zeruzalemo Kaba goror Herem Shorifor fordaḳan, ufre taki tol forzonto siṛia dui ṭukra oigelo.
15.39: Sifair ze ofisar hono fara deoat asla, ein Isar moutor i halot dekia ḳoila, “Nichchoy, ein-u asla Allar ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla.”
15.40: Ḳoyzon beṭi manshe-o duroi ubaia ita deḳla, erar maze asla Mogdilini Moriom, Iusi ar huru Iakubor ma Moriom, ar Bibi Salumi.
15.41: Isa zebla Galilo asla, ou shomoy ou beṭin hamesha tan loge loge roita ar tan kezmot ḳorta. Aro bout beṭi manush, zera tan loge oia Zeruzalemo aisla, tara-o ita deḳla. Hozrot Isar rouza mubarok
15.42: I din asil intezamor din, mani Ihudir Zummabaror agor din, ou din shuruz ḍubar bade tone kunuzat ḳam ḳora haram asil.
15.43: Erdae ou biali bala fotua komiṭir ijjoti montri, Arimatia gaur Iusuf namor eḳzon manshe, shaosh ḳoria hakim Filator gese aia, Hozrot Isar lash nita saila. Allar bashshai kaim oar lagi ein bar saoat asla.
15.44: Filate hunia kub taijjub oigela zen, Isae oto zoldi kori inteḳal formaisoin. Erdae tain sifair subedarre ania zikaila, hasau Isar ruhu baroi gese ni.
15.45: Subedare zebla ḳoila, “Ji oy, tain mara gesoin”, ou Filate Isar lash Iusufor zimmae shomzai dila.
15.46: Iusufe gia ḳafonor ḳafoṛ ḳorid ḳori ania, Isar lash solib taki lamaia, ḳafon findaia, fattor ḳaṭia banail ek koyboror maze tanre dafon ḳorla, i laḳan ḳoyboro maṭi deoa lage na. Erdae tara boṛo eḳ fattor goṛiaia ania ḳoyboror muko dila.
15.47: Ou shomoy Mogdilini Moriom ar Iusir ma Moriome deḳla, tanre kun zagat dafon ḳorsoin.

16.1: Tarar zummar din shesh oia harle Mogdilini Moriom, Iakubor ma Moriom ar Bibi Salumie, Hozrot Isar lasho maḳanir lagi kushboy-ala moshla loia anaila.
16.2: Haftar foyla din biane, mani Robibare fozore shuruz uṭar loge loge-u era tan ḳoyboror ḳasat gela.
16.3: Ou shomoy tara eḳe-oinne zikaila, “Ḳoyboror mukor ou fattor ḳe horaiba?”
16.4: Mati mati tara saia deḳla, i fattor horail oigese. Fattorṭa asil kub boṛo.
16.5: Bade tara ḳoyboro hamaia deḳla, eḳ zuan beṭae dola ḳafoṛ findia ḍain galat boi roisoin. Ene dekia tara kub taijjub oigela.
16.6: Ou hein ḳoila, “Taijjub oio na go. Tumitain to Nasarot gaur Isare-u tallash ḳorrae, zenre solibo gatia zane mara oise? Tain oḳon ino nae, tanre zinda ḳora oise. Dekizao, ou zagat-u tanre dafon ḳora oisil.
16.7: Te tumitain oḳon zao, gia tan sahabi oḳolre ar Fitorre-o ḳo, tain age zelaḳan ḳoisla, oula tumrar age Galilo zaira. Tumra hono gele tan doroshon faibae.”
16.8: Ikan hunia beṭinte ḳoybor taki bar oia douṛaia bagila. Tara taijjub bonigela, ḍoror suṭe ḳeurore kunta ḳoila na.
16.9: Haftar foyla din fozor oḳto Isa murda taki zinda oia uṭla, ar foyla-u Mogdilini Moriomre doroshon dila. Ou Moriomor log taki tain shatgu zinnat saṛaisla.
16.10: Tan doroshon faia-u Moriome gia Isar logor hoḳolre ḳobor zanaila. Ou shomoy tara ḳanda-ḳaṭi ar ahazari korat asil.
16.11: Oile tain zinda oisoin ar Moriomre doroshon-o disoin, ita tara ḳeu ekin ḳorla na.
16.12: Bade tan duizon ummote aṭi aṭi gau baedi roana oila, ou shomoy Isae tan surot bodlaia tarare doroshon dila.
16.13: Tara gia baki hoḳolre ou ḳobor zanaila. Oile tarar ḳota-o era ekin ḳorla na. Hozrot Isar aḳeri soboḳ
16.14: Heshe Hozrot Isae tan egaro zon sahabire doroshon dila. Ou shomoy era ḳaoat asla. Murda taki zinda oar bade zera tanre deḳsil, tarar ḳota ekin na ḳorae, erar imanor ḳomzuri ar dilor na-humarir lagi tain erare domḳaila.
16.15: Ar ou sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Tumra duniar tamam zagat zao, gia hoḳol manshor gese Allar batail kush-ḳobri toblig koro.
16.16: Ze manshe iman ania toubar gusol ḳore, he-u rehai faibo. Ze manshe iman anto nae, he Allar dorbaro dushi bonia shaza faibo.
16.17: Zera iman anbo, erar maze ou nishana deḳa zaibo: amar name tara zinnat saṛaibo, noya noya bashae gaibi buli matibo.
16.18: Tara zati hafre ato loiba, bezuita bishakto kunta ḳaile-o tarar kunu ḳeti oito nae. Ar kunu bemarire ataia dile bemar shifa oizibo.” Hozrot Isar behesto zaoa
16.19: Sahabi oḳlor loge batchit ḳorar bade Hozrot Isare arshe-azimo tulia neoa oilo. Hono tain Alla Pakor ḍainor toḳto toshrif raḳsoin.
16.20: Bade sahabi oḳole hoḳol zagat gia toblig korla. Hozrot Isae erar mazdi kam ḳorla, ar erare keramoti kamor takkot dia forman deḳaila, era zeta toblig korra, ita hasa. Amin.

1.1: -2 Mohamainno Tiofilas, Afnar to zana ase, amrar maze zeta zeta goṭise, ita zera foyla taki-u nizor souke deḳsoin ar toblig-o ḳorsoin, erar mukor ḳota hunia balamonte shomzia hari, bout mumine leḳat lagsoin.
1.3: Erlagi oḳon ami-o adi-onto hokkolta tallash ḳoria, eḳ ek kori lekia afnare zanani kan bala mono ḳorlam.
1.4: Oḳan taki afne shomzita farba, afne age zeta talim hunchoin, ita ekkebare ṭik. Hozrot Ehia ar Hozrot Isar zonom ar foyla zindegi (1:5–2:52) Hozrot Ehia (a:)or zonmor gaibi kobor
1.5: Raza Herude zebla Ehudia zila salaira, ou shomoy Zeruzalem ṭauno Baytul-Mukaddosor imam oḳlor mazor eḳzonor nam asil Zakaria. Tain Boni Israilor mul imam Harunor ḳandanor Abia dolor manush. Tan bibir nam Elisabet, ein-o Harunor bongshor manush.
1.6: Era duiozon-u Allar nozoro kamil dindar asla. Mabudor hoḳol hukum-ahkam shullo-ana adae ḳorta.
1.7: Oile era asla niaoladi, Bibi Elisabet oila aṭkura bemari. Ou halote duiozon murobbi oigesoin.
1.8: Ermaze oinno dolor imamotir din shesh oia tan nizor dolor imamotir bari ailo, teu Zakaria Allar goro imamotit asla.
1.9: Imamoti kamor niom mafik loṭari maria tane fosond ḳora oilo, zate tain Baytul-Mukaddosor fobitro Herem Shorifo hamaia agor-kushboy zalain.
1.10: Tain bitre ota zalaira, ar bare bout manshe dua-durud ḳorra.
1.11: Aḳta-u agor-kushboy zalanir ṭebulor ḍainedi Allar eḳzon firistae tanre doroshon dila.
1.12: Firistare dekia-u tan dil ḳafigelo, zano ḍor ailo.
1.13: Firistae ḳoila, “O Zakaria, ḍoraio na. Huno, Allar dorbaro tumar dua kobul oise. Tumar bibi Elisabetor goro eḳ fua oiba, tumi en nam rakio Ehia.
1.14: Ou fute tumar zindegit bout kushi baṛaiba, tain zonom loae aro bout zon kushi oiba.
1.15: Ein to Mabudor nozoro bout boṛo ijjoti oiba. Zindegie kunudin-u anguror shorab ba kunuzat nisha ḳaita nae. Tan maʼr feṭo taḳte-u Pak Ruhe kamil oiba.
1.16: Ar Boni Israilor bout manshore tarar Mabud Allar bae firaia anba.
1.17: Tain Ilias nobir laḳan himmot ar takkote malikor age oia aiba. Aia baf oḳlor dilre aolador bae, ar naforman oḳlor dilre forezgarir bae firaiba. Ou laḳan Mabudor lagi eḳ dol bondare tain furafur tiar ḳorba.”
1.18: Ita hunia Zakariae firistare ḳoila, “Er forman kita, ami kemne ekin ḳortam? Ami to buṛa oigesi, amar bou-o ekkere murobbi oigesoin.”
1.19: Firistae ḳoila, “Ami Zibrail, ami Allar samne azir taki. Tumar loge batchit ḳoria, ou kush-ḳobri tumare zananir lagi-u Allae amare bezisoin.
1.20: Dekio, amar ḳota shomoy moto folibo. Oile amar mat ekin na ḳorae, ikan folibar ag forzonto tumi buba bonizibae, kunta mattae fartae nae.”
1.21: Ibae manshe Zakariar lagi bar saira. Baytul-Mukaddosor bitoror ou pak zagat tan deri or dekia, tara hoḳol sintat foṛigela.
1.22: Bade Zakaria bar oia aila, oile tain kunta-u matta farla na. Tain buba oigela ar ishara-asharae buzaila. I halot dekia manshe buzilila, pak zagar bitre tain kunu doroshon faisoin.
1.23: Imamoti kamor bari shesh oia harle, tain nizor baṛit gelagi.
1.24: Erbade tan bibi Elisabetor feṭo hurutta ailo, erdae Elisabet fas mash baṛir bare bar oila na.
1.25: Tain ḳoila, “Ita to Allai lila-ḳela. Manshor gese ami ze kuṭar bagi oisi, ou kuṭar shorom horanir lagi tain amar bae kial ḳorsoin.” Isa Ruhullar zonmor gaibi kobor
1.26: -27 Elisabetor feṭo zebla soy mashor hurutta, ou shomoy Galil zilar Nasarot gaut eḳzon abiati shoti nari asla, en nam Bibi Moriom. Allae Zibrail firistare tan gese bezila. Tan bia ṭik oisil, Bashsha Daudor ḳandanor Iusuf namor eḳzonor loge.
1.28: Firistae aia Bibi Moriomre ḳoila, “Assalamu alaikum; Alla Pake afnare rohomot ḳorsoin, tain afnar loge asoin.”
1.29: Ikan hunia Moriomor mon fereshan oigelo. Tain mone mone ḳoila, i salamor mani kita?
1.30: Firistae ḳoila, “O Moriom, afne ḍoraiba na, Allae afnare rohomot ḳorsoin.
1.31: Hunoukka, afnar goro eḳ fua foyda oiba, afne en nam raḳba, Isa.
1.32: Tain bout boṛo ijjoti oiba. Tanre ḳoa oibo Ibnulla, Allatalar ḳas mayar zon. Alla Mabude tan ḳandanor murobbi Bashsha Daudor godi tanre diba.
1.33: Tain dunia aḳerato Boni Israilor ufre bashshai korba, tan bashshai kunudin-u fuṛaito nae.”
1.34: Teu Bibi Moriome firistare ḳoila, “Ita kilan oibo? Amar to bia-shadi-u oise na.”
1.35: Firistae ḳoila, “Pak Ruhu afnar ufre nazil oiba, ar Allar kudroti saya afnar ufre aibo. Erdae-u afnar goro ze pak aolade zonom loiba, tanre Ibnulla, mani Allar ḳas mayar zon ḳoia ḍaḳa oibo.
1.36: Hunoukka, afnar kuṭum Bibi Elisabetor befare manshe ḳoita na ni, tan kunu hurutta-u oita nae? Oile oḳon to ou murobbi boyosho tan feṭo-o soy mashor fua ase.
1.37: Te Allae faroin na, ila kunta-u nai.”
1.38: Moriome ḳoila, “Ami to Allar bandi; afnar ḳotamoto-u hoḳolta folouk.” Bade firista tan ges taki bidae oigela. Bibi Moriom Bibi Elisabetor baṛit gela
1.39: Erbade Bibi Moriom uṛa-taṛa ḳori, Ehudia zilar eḳ faṛia gaut gela.
1.40: Gia hono imam Zakariar baṛit hamaia, tan bibi Elisabetre salam ḳorla.
1.41: Elisabete Moriomor aoaz hunar loge loge-u, tan feṭor hurutta aḳta loṛia uṭila. Tain Pak Ruhe kamil oia,
1.42: zure zure ḳoila, “Duniar tamam beṭintor maze tumi-u ḳofali, tumar feṭor sabal-o ḳofali.
1.43: Amar munibor ma amar goro toshrif anchoin, amar oto boṛo ḳofal kila oilo?
1.44: Ami tumar aoaz hunar loge loge-u, amar feṭor gedae-o kushie loṛia uṭisoin.
1.45: Tumi to ḳofali beṭi, ḳaron Mabude tumare zeta zanaisoin, tumi dile-zane ita ekin ḳorso.”
1.46: Ou Bibi Moriome ḳoila, “Amar ḳolbe tarif ḳorer amar Mabudor,
1.47: behesti kushie borigese amar ontor, toraora sand aisoin, obaginir gor.
1.48: Souk tulia saisoin doyal, ḳangal bandir bae, erdae-u tamam zatie shabash shabash gae, boṛo ḳofali koiba more, zug-zugantor.
1.49: Shoktimane ḳorla more oto boṛo ḳam, amar lagi oisoin tain kudroti asan, tain-u to Subohan Alla, fak-fobitro tain.
1.50: Zera tane tazim ḳori roin ḍoraia, rohom ḳoroin tain itare nizor zania, oarishe oarishe rohom, tain-u bilain.
1.51: Tan-u kudroti ate ḳorsoin moha ḳam, monor gorimae zetae ḳore boṛai shan, itare ḳedaia dia, boitol banaisoin.
1.52: Raza-bashshain hokir oila godi kuaia, hokir oḳol bashsha oila rohomot faia, usa-nisa hokir-bashsha, tain-u banaisoin.
1.53: Ufashi kangalre dila bala bala ḳani, bukashir feṭo gelo dami dana-fani, doni zonre ḳali ate, ḳedaia disoin.
1.54: Tain zela oada ḳorsla moy-murobbir loge, ola-u to asan ḳorsoin Boni Israilre, Boni Israil oila Allar afon gulam.
1.55: Ibrahimre iad raḳsoin rohom-borkot diba, loge tan ḳandane-o ou doya faiba, siroḳalin ou oada mono rakisoin.”
1.56: Bibi Moriom tan kuṭum Elisabetor gese tin mash roila, heshe tan nizor baṛit gelagi. Hozrot Ehia (a:)or zonom
1.57: Bade miad fura oia harle Elisabetor goro eḳ fua oila.
1.58: Mabude tanre oto boṛo rohom ḳorsoin hunia, ari-fori ar ḳesh-kuṭum oḳol aia tan loge kushi-bashi korla.
1.59: Ihudi oḳlor reoaz mafik zonmor aṭ dinor din, fuar mosolmani ar akika ḳoranir lagi tara hoḳol dola oila. Tara saila, bafor namor laḳan fuar nam-o ouk.
1.60: Oile maʼe ikan manla na, tain ḳoila, “Na, er nam oibo Ehia.”
1.61: Tara ḳoila, “Tumar ḳesh-kuṭumor maze to ila nam ḳeuror nai.”
1.62: Teu tara isharae fuar bafre zikaila, tain kun nam fosond ḳoroin.
1.63: Zakariae tarar ges taki kata-ḳolom nia leḳla, “Tar nam Ehia.” Ou tara hoḳol taijjub oigela.
1.64: Ar loge loge-u Zakariar zoban kuligelo, tain mat-ḳota matila ar Allar shukria adae ḳorla.
1.65: Ita dekia ari-fori hoḳole ḍoraigela. Ehudia zilar faṛia oncholor hoḳol manshor muke muke ou ḳobor roṭigelo.
1.66: Zoto manshe i goṭona hunchil, tara hoḳole-u mone mone sinta ḳori koilo, boṛo oia harle i fua kita oibo. Ḳaron Mabudor kudroti at tan ufre asil. Hozrot Zakaria (a:) nobir muko gaibi kobor
1.67: Bade fuar baf Zakaria, Pak Ruhe kamil oia ou gaibi kobor ḳoila,
1.68: “Shukria zanai ami bondae Alla Mabudor, asan ḳorsoin tain nize afon Israilor, kial ḳori korla azad nizor gulam dol.
1.69: Amrar lagi fosond ḳorla Daud ḳandanre, bol-takkoti kanḍarire anla oḳan tone, deḳailae doyal more nazat ḳorra zon.
1.70: Nobi oḳole zobandi koisla bout age, tain-u ḳoaisla ita nobi oḳlor muke, takkoti kanḍari-u oiba Daud kulor bol.
1.71: Dushmon oḳlor ḳobza taki tain basaila, gin-ingsha ḳorra taki oḳon fana dila, amrare basaila aia doyal Moular zon.
1.72: Basaila amrare ḳali moy-murobbir ḳatire, ḳosom ḳora pak oada furanir niote, moy-murobbire zoban deoae amra basilam.
1.73: Ḳosom ḳori oada ḳorsla doyal Allae, Ibrahimre zanaila tain nazator ufae, Ibrahim nobi-u oila amrar asol baf.
1.74: -75 Amrare basaita ḳori Moular ou ḳosom, dushmon taki basar lagi batai dila niom, zinda zudin asi amra nisinta roitam. Ḍor-ḳof saṛa amra zanu ḳori ebadot, forezgar ar sohi fote taki nirafod, tan samne roia zate ḳori tan kezmot.
1.76: Ore amar mayar fut Ehia babaji, tumare to ḍaḳa oibo Allatalar nobi, munibor age roia sohi korbae fot.
1.77: Batai dibae tumi tan bonda oḳolre, guna mafir fot sinba tumar talime, bataia dibae baba nazat faoar fot.
1.78: Amrar Allar rohom ar hou mohobbote, behesti nuror eḳ shuruz aiba ufrete, amrar ufre aia hari rakiba nozor.
1.79: Mout ar andarir gato zera ḳaṭae din, nuror fot deḳba tara ḳoria ekin, amrare-o shantir fote salaiba ou zon. Ou huzur nazil oia deḳaiba kudrot, tain-u hou oada ḳora Allai rohomot.”
1.80: Bade Ehia aste aste boṛo oila, loge oia tan ruhani bol-o baṛilo. Boni Israilor samne kula-mela zair oibar ag forzonto, tain morubumir maze din ḳaṭaila.

2.1: Ou shomoy Ruman bashsha Agosto Ḳoisore hukum dila, tan asta bashshair hoḳol prozae zarzir nam leḳanir lagi.
2.2: Siriar hakim Kuriniasor amolo, ou foyla bar manush gonar lagi nam leḳail oilo.
2.3: Teu nam leḳanir lagi hoḳol manush zarzir buniadi gaut gela.
2.4: Ou laḳan Iusuf-o nam leḳanir lagi Galil zilar Nasarot gau taki Bashsha Daudor gaut aila. Tain to Daudor ḳandanor manush. Gaur nam Betelham, iṭa Ehudia zilat.
2.5: Bibi Moriom-o ou Iusufor loge oia nam leḳanit gela. Ou Iusufor loge-u tan shadi ṭik oisil, ar tan feṭo ou shomoy hurutta asil.
2.6: Betelhamo taḳte-u Moriomor hurutta oibar bishe dorlo.
2.7: Ar tan foyla fuar zonom oilo. Oile hino kunu meman ḳanat taḳar zaga millo na, erdae Moriome ou huruttare tenadi beraia gual goror ḳeror gamlat hutai toila. Firista ar raḳal oḳol
2.8: Ou Betelham gaur ḳandat bondor maze, meṛar raḳal oḳole raitkur bala tarar meṛa fara deoat asil.
2.9: Aḳta-u Allar eḳ firista tarar samne aia doroshon dila, ar Mabudor nuror teze sairobae for oigelo. Ita dekia raḳal oḳol ḍoror suṭe bedisha bonigela.
2.10: Oile firistae tarare ḳoila, “Tumra ḍoraio na. Ami tumrar lagi kub kushir ḳobor loia aisi. I kush-ḳobri duniar tamam manshor lagi.
2.11: Huno, tumrar toraneala aiz Daudor gaut zonom loisoin. Tain-u al-Mosi, tain-u Malik.
2.12: Tumra gia er forman deḳbae, deḳbae ek kasa huruttare tenadi beraia, gual goror ḳeror gamlat hutaia toa oise.”
2.13: Ou shomoy aḳta-u hou firistar loge aro bout firistare deḳa gelo. Era Allar zikir-azkar ḳori kori koila,
2.14: “Asmano Allar lila-ḳela deḳa zauk, duniar bukut tan fiara bondar shanti ouk.”
2.15: Bade firista oḳol tarar ges taki asmano gia harle, raḳal oḳole eḳe-oinnore ḳoilo, “Ao, amra Betelhamo zai. Mabude amrare ze ḳobor zanaila, ota dekia ai.”
2.16: Mati mati tara zoldi kori gela, gia Moriom, Iusuf ar ḳeror gamlat hutail ou huruttare faila.
2.17: Faia ou huruttar befare tarare ze ḳobor zanail oisil, ita tara hoḳolre ḳoila.
2.18: Tarar mat hunia hoḳole-u taijjub oigela.
2.19: Oile Moriome hoḳolta dilor maze gatia raḳla, ar mone mone sintat roila.
2.20: Firista oḳole raḳal oḳolre zela ḳoisla, era ita dekia hunia Allar zikir tarif ḳori kori firot gelagi.
2.21: Bade zonmor aṭ dinor din akika ar mosolmani koranir bala, tan nam raḳa oilo Isa. Maʼr feṭo aibar age-u firistae ou nam toisla. Geda Isare Baytul-Mukaddoso anla
2.22: Ermaze Musa nobir shoriot mafik tarar fak-saf oar shomoy oilo. Teu Isare Mabudor ato shofia dibar niote, Iusuf ar Moriome tane loia Zeruzalem ṭauno aila.
2.23: Mabudor shoriotor hukum asil, forteḳ zandaror foyla fuare Allar name shofia dite oibo.
2.24: Erloge, eḳ zuṛa ḍufi faki ba faror duiṭa baichcha kurbani dite oibo, shoriotor ou hukum mafik tara kurbani deoat aila.
2.25: Ou shomoy Zeruzalem ṭauno Samaun namor eḳzon Allaraia buzurg asla, tain Pak Ruhe kamil. Tain mone mone bar saoat asla, Allae kun shomoy Boni Israilre shanti diba.
2.26: Pak Ruhu tan loge asla, ou ruhe tanre bataisla, tan moutor age-u Allar oada ḳora al-Mosire tain deḳba.
2.27: Pak Ruhur isharae Samaun ou din Baytul-Mukaddoso azir oila. Isar ma-bafe-o shoriotor hukum adae ḳorar niote, geda Isare loia ono aila.
2.28: Ou kamil buzurg Samaune Isare kulo loia Allar shukria adae ḳorla. Tain ḳoila,
2.29: “O malik, tumar zoban mafik tumar i gulamre oḳon shantie bidae deo.
2.30: -31 Adom zatire toranir lagi, tamam manshor souḳor samne, tumi ze usilla ḳaim ḳorso hou al-Mosire amar niz souke dekia gelam.
2.32: Tumar ḳas proza Boni Israilor gourob to ein-u, bad-baki tamam zatire-o fot deḳanir nur.”
2.33: Samaune Isar befare ou zeta ḳoila, ita hunia Isar ma-baf taijjub oigela.
2.34: Samaune tarare dua dila, tain Isar ma Moriomre ḳoila, “Huno, Alla Pakor kial oilo, ou huruttar dorun Boni Israilor bout zone nazat hasil ḳorba, ar bout zon lannoti oiba. Tain ou laḳan eḳ nishana, tan bifokke boute-u matibo.
2.35: Ota taki tarar dilor hal-hokikot buza zaibo. Ar huno, toluare ḳaṭile zela oy, tumar dilo-o ola dukor sel hamaibo.”
2.36: Ou shomoy Hanna namor eḳzon beṭi manush-o asla, tain Allar nobi. Tan bafor nam Fanuel, ar ḳandanor nam Ashir. Tan bout boyosh oigese, shat bosor zamair gor ḳoria hari,
2.37: sourashi bosor forzonto ṛaṛi halote asla. Tain Baytul-Mukaddosor bitre ruza raḳta ar dua ḳorta. Ebadot-bondegir maze rait-din ḳaṭaita, bare bar oita na.
2.38: Ṭik ou shomoy tain-o ono aia Allar shukria adae ḳorla. Ar zerar dilo ou asha asil, Alla Pake Zeruzalemre azad ḳorba, tarar loge-o tain Isar befare batchit ḳorla.
2.39: Moriom ar Iusufe Mabudor shoriot mafik hoḳol ḳam shesh ḳoria harle, tarar boshot baṛi Galil zilar Nasarot gaut gelagi.
2.40: Nabalik Isar boyosh baṛilo, erloge tain shorilor bol ar ilim-aḳole-o mozbut oila. Allar rohomot to tan loge asil. Baro bosoror Hozrot Isa Zeruzalem Kaba Shorifo
2.41: Ihudi oḳlor Azadi Idor shomoy aile Isar ma-baf forti bosor-u Zeruzalemo zaita.
2.42: Isar boyosh zebla baro bosor, ou shomoy-o hou reoaz mafik tara Zeruzalemo aila.
2.43: Id shesh oia harle tara baṛit roana dila, oile Isa ou shomoy i dolor loge na gia Zeruzalemo roigela. Tan ma-bafe ikan ṭer faila na.
2.44: Isa-o dolor bitre asoin mono ḳoria tara eḳdinor fot aguai gela. Gia tarar ḳesh-kuṭum ar logor manshor gese tallash ḳoria tanre faila na.
2.45: Na faia tanre tukai tukai hirbar Zeruzalemo aila.
2.46: Tin din tallash ḳoria tanre Baytul-Mukaddoso faila. Tara deḳla, tain moulana oḳlor loge boia tarar boyan hunra, ar nanan musla zikaira.
2.47: Ar zoto manshe tan mat hunla, tara hoḳole-u tan aḳoldari batchit hunia taijjub bonigela.
2.48: Tan ma-bafe-o tanre dekia ekkere somkigela. Maʼe tanre zikaila, “Futre, tumi amrar loge ita ḳorlae ḳene? Ami ar tumar bafe ḳoto fereshan oia tumare tukairam.”
2.49: Isae zuaf dila, “Tumitain ḳene amare tukairae? Zano na ni, ami to amar gaibi bafor goro-u roite oibo?”
2.50: Tan ma-bafe i mator kunu bed buzla na.
2.51: Bade tain bar oia ma-bafor loge oia Nasaroto gela, ar tarar ḳotamoto solla. Oile tan maʼe ita hokkolta dilo gatia raḳla.
2.52: Ermaze Allar mohobbot, manshor maya, boyosh ar ilim-aḳole tain aste aste boṛo oila.

3.1: Ruman bashsha Tibirio Ḳoisoror bashshair fonro bosor soler. Ou shomoy Fontio Filat asla tan odinor Ehudia zilar hakim, ar Herud asla Galil zilar raza, Herudor bai Filif asla Zituria ar Takuniti zilar raza, ar Lusanias asla Abilini zilar raza. Era hoḳol-u asla Ruman bashshar odine.
3.2: Ou amolor Ihudi zatir fordan imam asla, imam Hanon ar Kayafa. Ṭik ou shomoy Zakariar fut Ehiar gese morubumi elaḳat Allae tan kalam nazil ḳorla.
3.3: Teu Ehia nobie Zordan gangor ḳanda-ḳasar hoḳol ḳano gia toblig korla. Ḳoila, guna taki mafi faoar lagi touba ḳoria torikar gusol ḳora zorur.
3.4: Ehia nobir befare Ishaya nobir kitabo zela leḳa asil, tain oula ḳorla. Leḳa ase, Morubumir maze eḳzone elan ḳorra, tumra malikor fot sohi koro, tan solar rasta oḳol shida ḳoro.
3.5: Faṛia hokkol nisa zaga boraṭ oibo, usa-nisa ṭillain homan ḳora oibo. Teṛa-beḳa hoḳol fot shuza oibo, gat-gaṛa hoḳolta homan ḳora oibo.
3.6: Ar duniar manshore toranir lagi Allae nazator ze usilla ḳorsoin tamam manshe-u ita deḳba.
3.7: Ehia nobir toblig hunia toubar gusol ḳorar niote zera ailo, tain erare ḳoila, “O hafor baichchain, asmani gozob aior dekia zan basanir fot tumrare ḳegie batai dilo?
3.8: Hasau zudi tumra touba ḳoria taḳo, te er fol-o deḳao. Mone mone ḳoio na, tumra Ibrahimor aolad. Huno, ami koiram, Allae saile to ou fattor oḳol taki-u Ibrahimor aolad banaita farba.
3.9: Gasor guṛit to kuṛal lagail-u ase. Ze gaso bala fol dore na, i gas ḳaṭia agunit falail oibo.”
3.10: Ita hunia manshe Ehiare zikaila, “Te amra kita ḳortam?”
3.11: Tain ḳoila, “Ḳeuror zudi duiṭa kurta taḳe, te zar nai tare eḳṭa deuk. Zar goro dan-saul ase, he-o oula bilauk.”
3.12: Ḳazna tulra ḳoyzon toshildare toubar gusol ḳorat aia zikaila, “Murshid, amra kita ḳortam?”
3.13: Tain ḳoila, “Niom taki beshi ṭeḳa adae ḳorio na.”
3.14: Ḳoyzon sifaie-o zikaila, “Huzur, te amra kita ḳortam?” Tain ḳoila, “Ḳeurore zur-zulum ḳoria ba fando falaia kunta adae ḳorio na. Zarzir betone kushi roio.”
3.15: Manshe mone mone al-Mosir lagi bar saoat asil, Ehiare dekia tara kub asha ḳorlo, ein-u monoloy al-Mosi.
3.16: Oile Ehiae tarare ḳoila, “Ami kali fanidi toubar gusol ḳoraiar, te amar bade zein toshrif anra, tain ama taki-o takkot-ala. Tan faor zutar fita gesa kular zuka-o ami nae. Tain aile Pak Ruhu ar aguin dia tumrare gusol ḳoraiba.
3.17: Tan kula to tan ato-u ase, maṛa deoa dan ou kuladi uaia hari dan nia ugaro tulba, ar susare omon agunit falai zalaiba, ze aguin kunudin nibe na.”
3.18: Ou laḳan aro bout nosiot ḳoria Ehiae manshor gese kush-ḳobri toblig korla.
3.19: Oile Raza Herude bout nomunar ḳaraf ḳam ḳorae, ar tar bair bou Herudiare hanga ḳorae, Ehiae tare dushi shaibosto ḳorla.
3.20: Erdae he tar hoḳol ku-ḳamor loge eoḳan-o baṛailo, he nobi Ehiare zelo haraililo. Hozrot Isae pak gusol ḳorla
3.21: Ehia nobi zelo hamanir age, tan gese aia zebla bout manshe toubar gusol ḳorra, ou shomoy Isa-o ono aia tarar loge gusol ḳorla. Gusolor bade Isae zebla dua ḳorra, aḳta-u Allar arshor duar kuligelo,
3.22: ar Pak Ruhu faror surot doria tan ufre nazil oila. Loge loge behesti ou aoaz-o huna gelo, “Tumi-u amar ḳas mayar zon, tumar ufre ami kub kushi.” Hozrot Isa al-Mosir ḳandanor forisoy
3.23: Onuman tish bosor boyoshor ḳalo Isae toblig kam shuru ḳorla. Manshe zanta tain Iusufor fua. Iusufor moy-murobbi oila,
3.24: Ali, Mattat, Lebi, Malki, Iyannai, Iusuf,
3.31: Malia, Manna, Mattata, Natan, Daud nobi,
3.33: Aminadab, Admin, Arni, Hasir, Firuz, Ehuda,
3.34: Iakub nobi, Isʼhak nobi, Ibrahim nobi, Tareḳ, Nahur,
3.36: Kinan, Arfaksad, Sham, Nuh nobi, Lamaḳ,
3.37: Matushalaḳ, Idris nobi, Iared, Maholail, Kenan,
3.38: Inush, Shish nobi, Adom, Alla Pak.

4.1: Isa Pak Ruhe kamil oia, Zordan gango taki uṭia morubumit gelagi. Gia Pak Ruhur isharae eḳlaga sallish din morubumit gurila.
4.2: Ar Iblis aia tanre forikka salailo. Ou sallish din eḳlagare ruza asla, kunuzat ḳana ḳaisoin na. Erbade tan feṭo buk laglo.
4.3: Teu Iblise tanre ḳoilo, “Tumi zudi Ibnulla, Allar ḳas mayar zon o, te ou fattorre ḳo na ruṭi oizito.”
4.4: Isae zuaf dila, “Allar kalamo batail oise, ḳali ruṭi kaile-u manush base na.”
4.5: Bade Iblise tanre kub usa eḳ zagat loia gelo, nia hari eḳ foloḳe duniar tamam mulluk tanre deḳailo ar ḳoilo,
4.6: “I tamam mullukor bashshai ar zak-zomoḳ ami tumare dilaimu. Ita hokkoltar malikana amare deoa oise. Ami zare kushi tare ditam fari;
4.7: ḳali tumi amare soizda ḳorilao, teu i hokkolta tumar oizibo.”
4.8: Isae tare ḳoila, “Allar kalamo ase, tumi kali afon Mabud Allare soizda ḳorbae, ḳali tan ebadot ḳorbae.”
4.9: Teu he Isare loia Zeruzalem ṭauno gelo, gia fobitro Kaba gor Baytul-Mukaddosor minarar ufre tane uba ḳoria ḳoilo, “Tumi zudi Ibnulla, Allar ḳas mayar zon o, te deki sain, on taki fal dia lamat foṛo.
4.10: Kitabo to leḳa ase, Allae tan firista oḳolre hukum diba, ar tara tumare basaiba.
4.11: Tara nizor atdi tumare doriliba, zate tumar faot kunu fattoror suṭ na lage.”
4.12: Isae tare ḳoila, “Kitabo leḳa ase, tumi tumar Mabud Allare forikka ḳorat lagio na.”
4.13: Iblise tar hoḳol nomunar forikka shesh ḳoria, afatoto tan ges taki horia gelogi. Galil zilat Hozrot Isar keramoti ar toblig (4:14–9:50) Nizor gaut Hozrot Isa
4.14: Bade Pak Ruhur kudrote Isa Galil elaḳat gela, gia harle tan nam sairobae roṭigelo.
4.15: Tain honor mosido mosido gia boyan-talim dila, teu hoḳol manshe tan tarif ḳorlo.
4.16: Ar Isa hou Nasarot gaut aila, ze gaut tain huru taki boṛo oisoin. Ono aia tain nizor niom mafik Zummabare mosido gia kutba foṛat ubaila.
4.17: Ishaya nobir sohifaḳan tan ato deoa oilo. Tain kitab kulia ou ayat bar ḳorla, ze ayato leḳa ase,
4.18: Amar dilo Mabudor ruhu boshot ḳoroin, tain-u amare ḳelafoti dia bezisoin, gorib oḳlor gese kush-ḳobri zananir lagi. Ar bondi oḳlor gese azadir ḳota, anda oḳlor gese souke deḳar ḳota, zerar ufre zulum or tarare basanir ḳota elan ḳorar lagi bezisoin.
4.19: Ar ou ḳota elan ḳorar lagi-o bezisoin, oḳon Mabudor rohomot deḳanir shomoy oigese.
4.20: Kutba tilaot ḳoria harle, tain kitabḳan aṭaia mosidor motollir ato dia boila, mosidor hoḳol manshe tan bae dian dori sai roise.
4.21: Tain ḳoila, “Asmani Kitabor i ayat ḳanain, aiz afnara hunar loge loge-u foligelo.”
4.22: Hoḳol manshe tan tarif ḳorlo, tan muk taki oto shundor boyan hunia taijjub oigelo. Tara ḳoilo, “Ein Iusufor fua nae ni ba?”
4.23: Ermaze Isae tarare ḳoila, “Afnara nisoy amare ou silleḳ hunaiba, ‘Ḍaktor sab, nizor bemar shifa ḳoro. Kofornaumo bule bout keramoti-muzeza deḳaiso, te oḳon nizor gaut-o ota deḳao na.’
4.24: Hunoukka, ami afnaintore hok kota ḳoiram, kunu nobire-u tan nizor gaur manshe manoin na.
4.25: Ar ikan-o hasa ḳota, Ilias nobir zomanat eḳlaga shaṛe tin bosor kunu meg oisil na, asta desho bezuita nidan asil. Hou shomoy to Israil desho bout ṛaṛi beṭin asla,
4.26: oile Ilias nobire era ḳeuror gese na bezia, ḳali Sidon deshor Sarifot gaur eḳ ṛaṛi beṭir gese beza oisil.
4.27: Ar Aliasha nobir amolo Israil desho bout fosa-kusṭo bemari asla, oile era ḳeurore bala na ḳoria, ḳali Siria deshor Namanre bala ḳora oisil.”
4.28: Ikan hunia-u mosidor shob manush gusae aguin oigela.
4.29: Tara uṭia tanre ṭelia ḳedaia gaur bare loia gelo, gia gaur kunar ḳaṛa ṭillar ufre nia, dakkadi tole falaito sailo.
4.30: Oile biṛor maz tone tain aṭia horia gelagi. al-Mosie bout bemarir shifa ḳorla
4.31: Bade Isa Galil elaḳar Kofornaum ṭauno gela, gia Zummabare manshore oaz-nosiot ḳorla.
4.32: Tan oaz hunia manush taijjub oigela, tain to fura himmot-ala zonor laḳan talim dita.
4.33: Hou mosido zinor asor-ala eḳ beṭa asil. He zure zure sillaia ḳoilo,
4.34: “O Nasarotor Isa, amrar gese ḳene aisoin? Amrare binash ḳorat aisoin ni? Ami zani afne ḳe, afne-u Allar hou fak-fobitro zon.”
4.35: Isae tare damki dia ḳoila, “Chup, er bitre taki baroi za.” Zine loge loge-u tare asaṛ mari hoḳlor mazḳano falaia, kunuzat ḳeti na ḳoria saṛia gelogi.
4.36: Ita dekia manush taijjub bonia mata-mati lagaila, “Ita kita deḳlam? Tain himmot ar ḳemota ḳaṭaia zin oḳolre hukum dein, tara-o deki bar oia zaegi.”
4.37: Bade hinor hokkol zagat Isar keramotir ḳobor roṭigelo.
4.38: Mosid taki bar oia tain Saimonor baṛit gela. Saimonor hoṛir kub beshi taf uṭsil, erdae hoḳole Isare kub minot ḳorla.
4.39: Tain Saimonor hoṛir ḳandat ubaia tafre domoḳ dila. Domoḳor loge loge-u tafe saṛidilo. Beṭie uṭia tarar memandarit lagla.
4.40: Hainja bala manshe bout zator bemarire loia Isar gese aila. Isae tara hoḳlor gotro atai dia bemar bala ḳorla.
4.41: Zinor asor-ala-o bout bemari asla, tara-o bala oila. Zin oḳole zure zure sillaia ḳoila, “Afne-u Ibnulla, Allar ḳas mayar zon.” Oile tain itare damki dia muk bond ḳorla. Tarar to zana asil, tain-u Allar oada ḳora hou al-Mosi.
4.42: Biane uṭia hari, Isa hi gau saṛia eḳ nirai zagat aila. Manshe tanre tukai tukai tan daro ailo, aia minot-ḳajji korlo zate tain tarar gese roin.
4.43: Oile tain zuaf dila, “Ami aro bout zagat gia Allar bashshair kush-ḳobri toblig kora zorur, ou ḳamor lagi-u Allae amare bezisoin.”
4.44: Bade tain asta Ihudi deshor mosidainto gia toblig korla.

5.1: Eḳ din Isa Galil aoror faro uba asla, ou shomoy bout manush Allar kalam hunar lagi tan ḳandat aia ṭelaṭeli lagaila.
5.2: Isae deḳla, aoror kinaro dukan zalua nao lagail. Nao taki lamia zalua oḳole tarar zal doira.
5.3: Isa gia Saimon namor eḳ zaluar nao-o uṭia tare ḳoila, naoḳan bashaia kisu fanit nibar lagi. Ḳoia tain nao-o boia manshore oaz-nosiot ḳorat lagla.
5.4: Nosiot bade tain zalua Saimonre ḳoila, “Naoḳan goin fanit neo ar zal falao.”
5.5: Saimone ḳoila, “Huzur, asta rait ḳoshṭo ḳoria-o kunu mas faisi na, ta-o afnar ḳotae zal falairam.”
5.6: Zal falanir bade oto beshi mas zalo hamaila, masor ṭelae zal farizibar dosha.
5.7: Ou tara shaijjor lagi logor naor zaluare ḍaḳ dila. Tara aia mas doria nao borilila, zalo oto mas hamaisil zen, masor bare duio nao ḍubuḍubu oigelo.
5.8: Ita dekia, Saimon-Fitore Isar fao-o foṛia ḳoila, “Huzur, ami to gunagar manush, amar ges taki toshrif ḳan neukkagi.”
5.9: Ḳaron, oto mas dekia Saimon-Fitor ar tan logor hokkole taijjub bonigela.
5.10: Saimonor logor zalua Zibudiar duio fua Iakub ar Hannane-o ita dekia taijjub oila. Teu Isae Saimonre ḳoila, “Ḍoraio na, oḳon taki ar mas nae, tumi Allar name manush dorbae.”
5.11: Bade tara nao loia kinarat aila, ar hokkolta toia Isar loge roana oigela. Nafak fosa-kusṭo bemarire bala ḳora
5.12: Eḳbar Isa ek gaut gela. Hou gaur eḳ beṭar asta gotor zuṛi nafak fosa-kusṭo bemar asil. Isare dekia-u he tan fao-o foṛia minot-ḳajji lagailo, “Huzur, afnar mone saile to amare ou nafak bemar taki bala ḳorta farba.”
5.13: Isae at baṛaia tare soia ḳoila, “Oy, ami-o sairam, tumi fak-saf o.” Ḳoar loge loge-u tar bemar ḳomigelo.
5.14: Bala oia harle Isae tare hukum dila, “Ita ar ḳeurore hunaio na, tumi gia ḳali imam sabre deḳao. Musa nobir shoriot mafik fak-saf oar lagi zela kurbani kora zorur, ou kurbani dile-u manshe zaniliba, tumi bala oiso.”
5.15: Oile Isar ḳobor sairobae roṭigelo. Erdae tan mukor buli hunar lagi ar bemari oḳol bala oar niote, bout manush tan gese aila.
5.16: Oile tain kunu na kunu nirai zagat gia hamesha dua ḳorta. Guna maf ḳorar ḳemota Hozrot Isar ase
5.17: Eḳdin Isa talim deoat asla, ou mozliso alim oḳol ar Forishi mozobor bout mullain boat asla. Tara Zeruzalem ṭaun, Galil ar Ehudia zilar nanan gauain taki aisoin. Isar maze Mabudor kudroti bol asil, ou bole-u bemari oḳolre shifa ḳorta.
5.18: Ermaze ḳoyzon manshe eḳzon obosh bemarire folodi boia loia aila. Tara saila tare nia goror bitre Isar samne toita.
5.19: Oile biṛor lagi goro hamanir fot faila na. Ou tara salor ufre uṭia, salor sani kulia folo shudda bemarire Isar samne manshor mazḳano lamai dila.
5.20: Tarar imanor bol dekia Isae ḳoila, “Baire, tumar guna maf ḳori dilam.”
5.21: Ikan hunia alim oḳole ar Forishi dolor mullainte mone mone ḳoila, “I manushgu ḳegu, he ola shiriki korer? Ḳali Alla saṛa ar ḳeu guna maf ḳorto fare ni?”
5.22: Tarar dilor sinta Isae buzilila, buzia ḳoila, “Afnara ḳene ila sinta ḳorra?
5.23: Ami kunḳan ḳoa shuza, tumar guna maf ḳori dilam? Ba tumi uṭia aṭia tumar bisna loia baṛit zaogi? Kunḳan shuza?
5.24: Te oḳon afnara forman deḳoukka, i duniat guna mafir ḳemota ami bin-Adomor ase.” Oḳan ḳoia-u tain bemari beṭare ḳoila, “Oba, ami tumare ḳoiram, uṭo, tumar ḳeta-balish loia baṛit zaogi.”
5.25: Ḳoite-u hi bemari beṭa hoḳlor samne ubaia, tar ḳeta-balish loia Allar tarif ḳori kori nizor baṛit gelogi.
5.26: Ita dekia hoḳol taijjub bonia, Allar tarif ḳori ḍorai ḍorai koila, “Aiz ita kizat keramoti kam deḳlam.” al-Mosie Lebire daot dila
