5.27: Bade Isa bare gela, gia toshil ofiso Lebi namor ek kazna tulrare boat deḳla. Dekia tare ḳoila, “Ao, amar ummot o.”
5.28: Daot hunia-u Lebie tan hoḳolta falaia Isar loge oia roana dilaila.
5.29: Bade Lebie tan nizor baṛit Isar lagi boṛo ek kaoa-daoar bebosta ḳorla. Tarar loge bout gushkur ḳazna tulra ar aro manush ḳaoat boila.
5.30: Teu Forishi ar tarar dolor alim oḳole na-kush oia Isar shagrid oḳolre ḳoila, “Tumra ḳazna tulra ṭogbaz ar naforman oḳlor baṛit ḳana-fina ḳao ḳene?”
5.31: Isae tarare zuaf dila, “Bala manshor lagi to ḍaktoror zorur nai, oile bemari oḳlor lagi zorur ase.
5.32: Te ami-o forezgar oḳolre daot deoat aisi na, ḳali gunagar oḳolre daot deoat aisi, zate tara touba ḳoroin.” Furan talim taki Hozrot Isar talim bala
5.33: Bade hou alim ar Forishi oḳole ḳoila, “Ehiar shishio oḳole hamesha ruza raḳoin, dua ḳoroin, ar Forishir shishio oḳole-o ola ḳoroin, te afnar shishio oḳole kunu shomoy-u ḳani bad dein na ḳene?”
5.34: Isae zuaf dila, “Nosha loge taḳle logor boiratire kunu ufash raḳa zae ni?
5.35: Oile omon eḳ din aibo, zebla noshare tarar ges taki neoa oizibo. Hou shomoy tara ruza raḳba.”
5.36: Isae tarare talim dibar lagi ou misal hunaila, ḳoila, “Noya kurtar ṭukra siṛia, ḳeu furan kurtat tali dey na. Ila ḳorle to noyaṭa-o nosṭo oibo, ar noya ḳafoṛor tali to furan ḳafoṛor loge milto-o nae.
5.37: Furan samṛar tolit ḳeu taza anguror rosh bore na. Borle ou taza roshor fafe toli faṭia rosh ar toli duiota borbad oy.
5.38: Taza rosh noya tolit toite oy.
5.39: Ar anguror furan rosh ḳaia hari kunu manshe noya rosh ḳaito sae na. Tara ḳoin, furanta-u moza.”

6.1: Eḳ Zummabare Isa gom ḳetor ailedi aṭia zaira. Ou shomoy tan shagrid oḳole gomor soṛa siṛia ato goshi goshi kaira.
6.2: Ita dekia Forishi mozobor ḳoyzone ḳoila, “Musa nobir shoriot mafik to Zummabare zekunu ḳam ḳora haram, te tumra i soṛa siṛirae ḳene?”
6.3: Isae zuaf dila, “Te Daud nobi ar tan logor hoḳlor zebla feṭo buk lagsil, hi shomoy tara kita ḳorsla, ita afnara foṛsoin na ni?
6.4: Tain nize Allar goro hamaia fobitro ruṭi kaisla, ar tan logor oḳolre-o ḳaoaisla. Ashole ḳali imam oḳol saṛa ar ḳeu i ruṭi kaoa zaiz asil na.”
6.5: Bade Isae tarare ḳoila, “Huno, ami bin-Adom-u Zummabaror malik.”
6.6: Aroḳ Zummabare Isa mosido gia oaz-nosiot ḳorat asla. Hono eḳ bemari beṭa asil, tar ḍainor at bemare hukai gese.
6.7: Moulana ar Forishi dolor manshe Isare fando falaita ḳori bana tukanit asla. Tara deḳta saila, zummar din tain ḳeurore bala ḳoroin ni, ḳorle tanre dushi banaita farba.
6.8: Isae-o tarar dilor ku-motlob buzilila. Buzia tain hukna at-ala beṭare ḳoila, “Oba, tumi aia hoḳlor samne ubao sain.” Teu beṭa aia ubailo.
6.9: Isae tarare zikaila, “Ami afnaintore ekkan ḳota zikairam, Zummabare kun ḳam ḳora zaiz, bala ḳam na bad ḳam? Zan basani, na zanor binash ḳora?”
6.10: Bade tain sairo galar hoḳlor bae saia hou beṭare ḳoila, “Tumar atḳan baṛao.” Beṭae tar at baṛailo, ar furafur bala oigelo.
6.11: Ita dekia hou mulla oḳlor kub gusa uṭlo. Tara foramish salaila, Isare ḳemne tamail zae. Barozon ḳas sahabi
6.12: Bade Isa dua ḳorar lagi eḳ faṛo uṭila, ar asta rait Allar gese dua ḳorla.
6.13: Biani bala tan shagrid oḳolre ḍakia ḳandat anla, erar mazor baro zonre fosond ḳoria, tan ḳas sahabi banaila.
6.14: Ou baro zon oila, Saimon—Isae en noya nam dila Fitor, Saimonor bai Andrias, Iakub, Hannan, Filif, Bortolmoy,
6.15: Moti, Tumas, Alfir fua Iakub, muktizudda Saimon,
6.16: Iakubor fua Ihuda, ar Ihuda Iskariat—ou Ihudae bade beimani korsil. Faṛor feṭo Hozrot Isar talim
6.17: Ermaze Isae tan sahabi oḳolre loia ufre taki lamia faṛor feṭo homan eḳ zagat aia ubaila. Hino tan bout ummot dola oisla, Zeruzalem ṭaun ar Ehudia zila taki, doriar faror Shur ar Sidon elaḳa taki-o dol bandi bandi manush aisla.
6.18: Tara tan boyan hunar kiale ar bemar taki shifa oar niote aila. Ar zarar ufre zinor asor asil, tara-o bala oila.
6.19: Hoḳol manshe-u tanre at dia soito sailo, ḳaron tan bitor taki kudroti shokti baronie, era hoḳlor bemar ḳomsil.
6.20: Teu Isae afon shagrid oḳlor bae saia ḳoila, “Tumra zera gorib tumra-u ḳofali, Allar bashshai to tumrar lagi-u.
6.21: Tumra zoto zonor feṭo buk ase, tumra-u ḳofali, tumra feṭ boria ḳaibae. Tumra zera ḳandirae tumra-u ḳofali, bade to ashibae.
6.22: “Tumra-u ḳofali, zebla bin-Adomor dae manshe tumrare ginnae, gau taki basia ekgori kore, bodnam gae, ar tumrar nam hunle mukor tu falae.
6.23: Ila ḳorle tumra kushi oio, furtie nasio, ḳaron behesto tumra bout boṛo furuskar faibae. Zano ni, ou naforman oḳlor baf-dadainte-o Allar nobi oḳlor ufre ola zulum ḳorta.
6.24: “Haere doni oḳol, tumrar shuk to duniat-u ḳamailirae.
6.25: Haere feṭ boria ḳaora oḳol, tumra-o buke soṭfoṭ ḳorbae. Haere hae zera oḳon ashirae, tumra ḳanda-ḳaṭi ar ahazari korbae.
6.26: Haere hae, manshe zebla tumrar shunam gae, zano ni, ota manshor baf-dadainte-o agor amolor bonḍo nobi oḳlor ola shunam gaito.
6.27: “Tumra zotozon amar torikae soltae sao, ami tumrare ḳoiram, tumra zarzir dushmonre-o mohobbot ḳorio. Zera tumrare ginnae, tumra tarar balai korio.
6.28: Zera tumrar lagi lannot mange, tumra tarar lagi rohomot saio. Ar zera tumrar bodnam ḳore, tumra tarar lagi dua ḳorio.
6.29: Ze tumar ek galo soṛ mare, tare arok gal fatia dio. Ze tumar saddor ḳaṛia nito sae, tare kurta-o kulia dio.
6.30: Zara tumar gese sae, tarare dio. Ḳeu tumar kunu siz nilegi, tar gese ar firot saio na.
6.31: Huno, tumra manshor ges taki zelaḳan bebohar faitae sao, tumra-o hoḳlor loge ou laḳan bebohar ḳoro.
6.32: “Zara tumrare maya ḳore, tumra zudi kali tarare-u maya ḳoro, te tumra bahba faitae kila? Ila to naforman oḳole-o eḳe-oinnore maya ḳore.
6.33: Ar zara tumrar balai kore, tumra zudi kali tarar balai koro, te bahba faibae kila? Naforman oḳole-o to ila ḳore.
6.34: Ze manshor ges taki tumra ḳorzo faibar asha ase, tumra zudi kali tare-u ḳorzo deo, te kila bahba faibae? Naforman oḳole-o eḳe-oinnore ila ḳorzo dey, he asha ḳore bifodo foṛle he-o hon taki korzo faibo.
6.35: Te ami tumrare ḳoiram, tumra zarzir dushmonre-o maya ḳorio, tarar balai korio. Bodla faoar asha na ḳoria ḳorzo dio, teu tumrar lagi boṛo boḳshish ase. Tumra Alla Pakor aolad bonbae. Tain to nimoḳ-haram ar ḳaraf manshore-o doya ḳoroin.
6.36: Tumrar niraḳar baf zela doyal, tumra-o olan doyal o.
6.37: “Manshor bisar ḳorio na, teu tumra-o bisaror daṛo foṛtae nae. Ḳeurore dushi shaibosto ḳorio na, teu tumra-o dushi oitae nae. Maf ḳoria dio, teu tumra-o mafi faibae.
6.38: Dan-ḳoyrat deo, teu tumrare-o deoa oibo. Manshe zatai zatai boria ania tumrar gaṭit bandia diba. Tumra zela mafia dibae, tumrar lagi-o ola mafa oibo.”
6.39: Bade Isae tarare ou kichcha hunaila, “Eḳ andae kunu aroḳ andare fot deḳaito fare ni? Te duiozon-u gato foṛto nae ni?
6.40: Shagrid ustad taki boṛo nae, oile ze shagride furafur talim loy, he-o ustador laḳan bonizae.
6.41: Tumar bair sokut guṛa hamaise oḳan-u deḳrae, oile nizor souko gasor seli ase ita deḳrae na?
6.42: Tumar sokut seli hamaise ikan na saia tumar baire kila ḳoibae, ‘Baisab, tumar souko ze guṛa foṛse, ao, ogu bar ḳoria dei.’ Tumar nizor sokur seli-u to deḳrae na. O bonḍo, foyla tumar nizor souk taki seli horao, teu bair souk taki guṛa bar ḳorat lagle bala ḳori deḳtae farbae.
6.43: Bala gase to mondo fol dore na, ar mondo gase bala fol dore na.
6.44: Fol dekia gas sina zae. Manshe to rifuzi lot taki boroi faṛe na, ba sutra gas taki angur faṛe na.
6.45: Bala manshor dilor nek banḍar taki balai baroy, ar bod manshor bod dil taki bod-u baroy. Manshor dilor banḍaro zeta zoma ase, ota taki-u to zobanor buli baroy.
6.46: “Tumra ḳene amare ḳali huzur huzur ḳoirae, otoso ami zeta ḳoi, ita mano na?
6.47: Amar ḳandat aia amar boyan hunia ze zone amol ḳore, he ḳar laḳan, ami tumrare ḳoiram.
6.48: He ou manshor laḳan, ze gor bananir niote goin ḳori maṭi kudia mozbut ḳori goror kuṭi banailo, bade boinna ailo ar fanir fute ou gorre ṭelilo, oile ikan loṛaito farlo na, ikan to mozbut ḳori banail.
6.49: Ar amar boyan hunia ze zone amol na ḳore, he ou laḳan manush, zegie gat na kudia ḳali norom maṭir ufre gor banailo, bade banor futor dakkae tar gor foṛia bangia surmar oigelo.”

7.1: Isae tan boyan shesh ḳoria manshor ges taki bidae loia Kofornaum ṭauno gelagi.
7.2: Hino Ruman sifair eḳ subedaror gulam bemar foṛia morar foti oigesil, subedar sabe i gulamre kub maya ḳorta.
7.3: Tain Isar ḳobor hunia ḳoyzon Ihudi murobbire Isar gese faṭaila, tan gulamre bala ḳorta sufarishor lagi.
7.4: Murobbi oḳol aia Isare minot-ḳajji kori koila, “Sab, ze zone amrare afnar gese faṭaisoin tan gulamor lagi minot ḳortam, ein ashole-o doya faoar laḳ.
7.5: Tain bideshi oile-o amrar Ihudi zatire kub maya ḳoroin. Amrar mosid ḳan-o tain banai disoin.”
7.6: Isa tarar loge oia roana dila, tain subedaror baṛir ḳandat aite-u subedare nizor dust oḳolre faṭaia zanaila, “Huzure ar ḳoshṭo ḳoroin na zanu, afnar moto zone amar baṛit toshrif anra, ami to itar laḳ nae.
7.7: Afnar samne ubanir zoiggo-o ami nae, erdae ami airam na. Te afne ḳali zobandi koile-u, amar gulamor bemar shifa oizibo.
7.8: Afne to buzra, ami amar kamanḍaror hukume soli, oula amar sifai oḳol-o amar hukume soloin. Ami era eḳzonre ao ḳoile ae, zao ḳoile zae, amar gulamre ou ḳam ḳoro ḳoile, he ḳore. Te afne-o ola ḳali mukdi koile-u, hokkoltae manbo.”
7.9: Ikan hunia Isa ekkere taijjub bonigela, dole dole zoto manush tan ḳore oia aoat asil, erar bae firia ḳoila, “Ami tumrare ḳoiram, i subedar to bidormi Ruman manush, oile amar Boni Israilor maze-o to oto mozbut imandar ami kunuḳano deḳsi na.”
7.10: Hasau subedare zarare faṭaisla, tara goro aia deḳla, hi gulamor bemar ḳomigese. Hozrot Isae murdare zinda ḳorla
7.11: Tuṛa ḳoy din bade Isae tan shagrid oḳol ar aro bout manush loia Nayin namor ek gaut aila.
7.12: Tain zebla hou gaut aia hamaira, ou shomoy manshe ḳoraro ḳori eḳ moiot loia zaira. I moiot asil eḳ ṛaṛi beṭir eḳmatro fua. Gaur bout manush ou ḳoraror loge asla.
7.13: Ou ṛaṛi beṭire dekia Isar dilo doya hamailo, tain ḳoila, “Ogo, ḳandio na.”
7.14: Ḳoia tain ḳoraror ḳandat gia ḳoraro soila, teu moiot boia neora beṭain ubai gela. Isae ḳoila, “O beṭa, ami koiram, tumi uṭo.”
7.15: Teu hi murda beṭa uṭia boigelo, boia mat-ḳota matilo. Isae tare tar maʼr ato shomzai dila.
7.16: Ita dekia hoḳlor bitre ḍor hamaigelo. Tara ḳoila, “Subohan Alla, eḳzon mohan nobie amrar maze toshrif anchoin, Allae meherbani koria tan bonda oḳlor bae souk firaisoin.”
7.17: Isar ou keramotir ḳota asta Ehudia zilat ar ash-fash hokkol zagat mashur oigelo. Hozrot Isar dorbaro Ehia nobir shagrid
7.18: Ehia nobir shagrid oḳol gia ou hokkolta Ehiare zanaila.
7.19: Ou Ehiae tan duizon shagridre Isar gese faṭaila. Tara aia Isare ḳoita, “Huzure ḳoisoin amra zania zaitam, zein toshrif anar ḳota, afne-u hein ni? Na amra ar ḳeuror lagi bar saitam?”
7.20: Teu duio shagrid aia Isare ḳoila, “Ehia nobie amrare faṭaisoin, afnare zikaitam, zein toshrif anar ḳota, afne-u hein ni? Na amra ar ḳeuror lagi bar saitam?”
7.21: Ṭik ou shomoy Isae bout manshore bemar-azar ar zin-butor asor taki bala ḳorla. Bout andare-o deḳar ḳemota dila.
7.22: Ota ḳoria harle Ehiar duio shagridre Isae ḳoila, “Tumra zaogi, tumra ono aia nizor souke zeta deḳlae ar hunlae, ota gia Ehiare zanao. Tanre ḳoio, andae-o souke deḳra, lengṛa oḳole aṭira, fosa-kusṭo bemari bala oira, ḳaluae-o hunra, murda manush zinda oira, ar gorib oḳlor gese-o Allai kush-ḳobri toblig kora or.
7.23: Ar era-u ḳofali manush, amar befare zerar dilo kunu bada na fae.”
7.24: Ehiar shagrid oḳol gia harle, Ehiar befare Isae manshore ḳoila, “Tumra morubumit kita deḳat geslae? Batashe loṛe-soṛe ota ḳagṛa-bon deḳat geslae ni?
7.25: Na, kita deḳat geslae? Shundor ḳafoṛ finno kunu manshore ni? Zera dami dami kafoṛ findia zak-zomok kore, ar shukirta din ḳaṭae, tara to razbaṛit taḳoin.
7.26: Te tumra kita deḳat geslae? Kunu nobire deḳat geslae ni? Oy, hasau ami tumrare ḳoiram, i Ehia to ḳali nobi nae, nobi taki-o boṛo zon.
7.27: Ein to hou zon, zen ḳota Asmani Kitabo leḳa ase, Huno, tumar age beziar ami amar fegambor, ein gia ṭik-ṭak korba tumar solar fot.
7.28: Te ami tumrare ḳoiram, asta duniar kunu adom-u Ehia taki boṛo nae. Oile Allar bashshair hoḳol taki huru zon-o, Ehia taki mohan.”
7.29: Shomazor hoḳol doronor am manshe ar gushkur ḳazna tulra oḳole-o Ehiar toblig hunla, tara toubar gusol ḳoria Alla Pakre hok-insafḳari hishabe manla.
7.30: Oile Forishi dolor manshe ar moulana oḳole Ehiar gese toubar gusol na ḳoria, tarar befare Alla Pakor ze kial asil, iṭare kunu dam dilo na.
7.31: Teu Isae hirbar ḳoila, “Ḳo sain, oḳon i zomanar manshore ami kitar loge tulona ḳortam? Tara ḳar laḳan?
7.32: Tara to omon huruttar laḳan, zetae bazaro boia eḳe-oinnore ḍakia ḳoy, Bashi to bazailam dust tumrar lagia, tumra ḳeu nasilae na bashi hunia. Mattomor zari-gan gailam amra shobe, ḳandilae na tumra ḳeu mattomor shure.
7.33: Te Ehia nobi aia hari bat-ruṭi ar anguror shorbot na ḳaoae, tumra ḳoilae tanre bute dorilise.
7.34: Ar bin-Adom aia ḳana-fina ḳorra dekia tumra ḳoirae, deḳrae ni, i beṭa to feṭua ar modkur. He gushkur ḳazna tulra ar naforman manshor loge dusti kore.
7.35: Ta-o aḳol ḳaṭaia zera sole, tarar sal-cholon taki-u forman mile, aḳol-u oilo ḳaṭi-nikut siz.” Ḳobis beṭir guna maf
7.36: Forishi dolor eḳzon manshe Isare tan baṛit ḳanir daot dila, Isa ou baṛit gia ḳanit boila.
7.37: Oile ou gaut ek kobis beṭi asil. Isa ono daoto aisoin hunia hou ḳobis beṭie dami eḳ fattoror boyamo ḳori ator loia ono ailo.
7.38: Aia Isar fison galabae tan faor ḳandat ubaia, ḳandia souḳor fanidi tan faor fata bizaililo. Bade tair matar suldi fao fusia dilo, faor maze hunga dite dite ator maḳailo.
7.39: Ita dekia Isare zein daot disla, ein mone mone ḳoila, “I beṭa kunu nobi oile to emne-u buzlo one i beṭi kegu, igu ḳoto boṛo ḳobis gunagar beṭi.”
7.40: Isae tare ḳoila, “Saimon, tumar loge amar kisu ḳota ase.” Saimone ḳoila, “Ḳoukka huzur.”
7.41: Isae tanre ḳoila, “Mone ḳoro, eḳ mazonor ges taki duizon manshe kisu ṭeḳa ḳoroz nisil, eḳzone fas-sho, aroḳzone foinchash dinar.
7.42: Tarar ḳeuror-u takkot asil na i ṭeḳa firot deoa, teu mazone era duio zonre maf ḳori dilaila. Oḳon ḳo sain, era kun zone mazonre beshi bala faibo?”
7.43: Saimone ḳoila, “Amar mone ḳoy, zar beshi ṭeḳa maf deoa oise.” Isae ḳoila, “Tumi ṭik-u ḳoiso.”
7.44: Teu Isae ou beṭir bae saia ḳoila, “Saimon, ou beṭi bae kial ḳoro ar huno, ami tumar goro aia harle tumi to amare fao doar-o fani diso na, oile tair souḳor fanidi amar fao bizaia, matar suldi fusia dise.
7.45: Tumi to amar loge ainja ḳori doria hunga diso na, oile deḳrae ni ami tumar baṛit hamanir bad one-u tai amar faot hunga deoat-u ase.
7.46: Tumi kunuzat tazim ḳori amare aguai ancho ni? Oile tai amar faot ator ḍalia tazim ḳorse.
7.47: Te ami tumare ḳoiram, tai beshi maya ḳorse ḳori buza zar, tai boṛo gunagar oile-o gunar mafi faise. Zar tuṛa guna maf ḳora oy, he tuṛa maya ḳore.”
7.48: Bade Isae beṭire ḳoila, “Ogo, tumar tamam guna maf ḳora oise.”
7.49: Zara Isar loge ḳanit boisla tara mone mone ḳoila, “Ein ḳe, zein guna-o maf ḳorilain?”
7.50: Isae hi beṭire ḳoila, “O beṭi, tumar imanor bole-u tumi nazat failae, oḳon shanti oia baṛit zao.”

8.1: Bade Isae ou barozon sahabire loia gaue gaue, ṭaune ṭaune guria Allar bashshair toblig korat roila.
8.2: Tarar loge ḳoyzon beṭin-o asla. Ou beṭin zinor asor ar bout zator bemar taki bala oia tan log dorsla. Erar nam oilo: Mogdilini Moriom, en ges taki shatgu zin saṛail oisil;
8.3: Raza Herudor uzir Kuzair bou Iuhanna; Susanna; ar aro bout beṭin asla. Ou beṭinte tarar nizor samana dia Isa ar tan shagrid oḳlor ḳoros-fati salaita. Girosti kamor loge imanor tulona
8.4: Bade zebla nanan zaga taki bout manush aia Isar gese dola oila, ou shomoy tain ek kichcha hunaila.
8.5: Tain ḳoila, “Ek giroste danor zala bain deoat gelo. Gia bain deoar bala kisu zala ailor maze foṛigelo, manshe faodi uṛia i zala nosṭo ḳorillo, ar fakinte-o aia ḳaililo.
8.6: Girostor kisu zala hukna-shokto maṭir ufre foṛlo, itae ali bar oile-o heshe rosh na faia hukaia morigelo.
8.7: Kisu zala bon-jonglar maze foṛlo, i zalae ali fuṭle-o itare bon-jonglae zatia dorlo.
8.8: Oile kisu zala bala zomino foṛlo, i zalae bala dan oilo, ar eḳ-sho gun beshi dan dorlo.” Ou kichcha ḳoia-u tain zure zure ḳoila, “Zar ḳan ase, he hunouk.”
8.9: Shagrid oḳole aroz ḳorla, “Huzur, i kichchar mani kita?”
8.10: Tain ḳoila, “Allar bashshair gufon rohoisho zanar shuzug kali tumrare deoa oise, oile baki manshor gese to ita kichchar laḳan ḳoiram, zate tara dekia-o na deḳe, hunia-o na buze.
8.11: “Te i kichchar mani oilo, i danor zala oilo Allar kalam.
8.12: Ailor maze foṛa zaladi buzail oise, zera Allar kalam hune, bade Iblise aia tarar dil taki ita ḳaṛia neygi. Iblise sae na manshe iman ania nazat hasil ḳorouk.
8.13: Ar hukna-shokto maṭir ufre foṛa zaladi buzail oise, zara i kalam besh kushi oia hune, oile kalame tarar dilo balamonte zoṛ ḳore na. Erdae i iman tuṛa ḳoydin ṭike, kunu forikkat foṛle-u tarar iman kuailae.
8.14: Bon-jonglat foṛa zaladi buzail oise, zera imanor daot hune, oile duniabi dandat foṛia don-samanar lalos, ar aram-ayeshor bae saia ita faurilae. Erdae tarar zindegit kunu bala fol dore na.
8.15: Bala zomino foṛa zaladi buzail oise, zera hok ar sohi dile Allar kalam hune, hunia nizor dilo balamonte gatia raḳe, ar imane mozbut roia zindegit bala fol dore.
8.16: “Kunu manshe lem zalaia hari sokir tole toy ni ba ṭukridi gurilae ni? Nisoy na, tara gasar ufre toy, zate goror bitre for deḳa zae.
8.17: Te ila gaibi kunta-u nai zeta zair oito nae. Ila lukail-o kunta nai zeta ḳeu hunto nae ba zanto nae.
8.18: Erdae tumra kila hunrae kial ḳorio, zar ase tare aro deoa oibo, ar zar nai, tar zeta ase bolia he mone ḳorer, ota-o neoa oizibo.” Hozrot Isar ma bai ke
8.19: Ermaze Isar ma ar baiain tan gese aia azila, oile biṛor lagi tara ḳasat aita farla na.
8.20: Teu eḳzon manshe aia Isare ḳoila, “Afnar ma ar baiain afnar loge deḳa ḳorat aia bare ubai roisoin.”
8.21: Isae zuaf dila, “Amar ma-bai to era-u, zera Allar kalam hunoin ar amol ḳoroin.” Hozrot Isae aoror tufan bond ḳorla
8.22: Eḳdin Isa ar tan sahabi oḳol gia nao-o uṭla, uṭia tain sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Ao, amra aoror hofaro zai.” Teu sahabi oḳole nao bashaila.
8.23: Nao soltir maze Isa gumai gela. Aḳta-u aoror maze omon tufan ailo, tufane naot fani hamaia borizar, tara deḳla boṛo mosibot aise.
8.24: Sahabi oḳol Isar daro gia tane hozag koria ḳoila, “Huzur, huzur, amranu moriziram.” Isa uṭia fanir ḍeu ar batashre damki dila. Loge loge-u ḍeu ar tufan tamia hoḳolta tir oigelo.
8.25: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Ou ota ni tumrar iman?” Tara ḍoraia taijjub oia eḳe-oinnore ḳoila, “Ein ashole ḳe, deḳrae ni batashe ar fanie-o tan hukum mane?” Zine dora bemarire bala ḳora
8.26: Isae tan sahabi oḳol loia Galil aor faroia Zerasini elaḳat gela.
8.27: Gia hari tain nao taki lamla, ou shomoy hou gaur zinor asor-ala eḳ beṭa tan gese ailo. Zinor fale asor ḳorae he bout din dori lemṭa ar kunu baṛi-goro roito na, ḳali kobrostano roito.
8.28: Isare dekia-u he sillaia uṭlo, tan samne foṛia zure zure ḳoilo, “O Allar ḳas mayar zon, afne ḳene amar ino toshrif anla? Meherbani kori amare satain na zanu.”
8.29: Ikan ḳoar ḳaron oilo, Isae hi zinre hukum disla ou beṭare saṛia zaoar lagi. I zine tare bout din taki asor ḳorsil, beṭare ḍanḍa-beṛi ar shikoldi bandia raḳle-o, he ita siṛilito, hou zine tare nirai zagat nitogi.
8.30: Isae tare zikaila, “Tor nam kita?” He ḳoilo, “Fouz fal” ḳaron tara bout zin eḳloge asil.
8.31: Teu hi fouz fale Isare minot-ḳajji koria ḳoila, tain zanu tarare roshatole na gaṛoin.
8.32: Hino faṛor ek galat boṛo eḳ shuoror fal asil. Fouz fale tanre minot ḳoria ḳoila, tarare hou shuoror bitre hamanir izazot dita. Tain izazot dila.
8.33: Ou tara hi beṭare saṛia shuoror bitre gia hamailo, ete shuoror fal faṛor ḍaledi douṛia gia aoror fanit buṛia morla.
8.34: Ita dekia shuoror raḳal oḳol douṛia gia ṭauno ar gaue gaue ḳobor dilo.
8.35: Ḳobor faia sairobae tone manush aila, aia deḳla, ze beṭar log taki fouz fal bar oia gesoin, he furafur bala oia ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ findia Isar faor ḳandat boiroise. Dekia tara somki gela.
8.36: Ar ou goṭona goṭite zera deḳsil, tara hoḳol manshore hunaila, i beṭa kila bala oise.
8.37: Hunia Zerasini elaḳar hoḳol manush ḍoraigela. Ḍoror suṭe tara Isare minot-ḳajji koria ḳoila, tain tarar ges taki toshrif nitagi. Teu Isa nao-o uṭia hirbar Galilo aila.
8.38: Oile ze beṭare zine dorsil, he aroz ḳorlo tan loge roibar lagi. Isae tare oḳan ḳoia baṛit faṭai dila,
8.39: ḳoila, “Tumi tumar baṛit zao, ar Allae tumar lagi ze kudroti kam ḳorsoin, ota gia ḳo.” Teu he gelogi, gia ṭaunor hoḳol manshore zanailo, Isae tar lagi oto boṛo ḳam ḳorsoin. Eḳ mora fuṛi ar bemari beṭi
8.40: Isa Galilo aia harle hinor manshe kushi oia tanre kobul ḳorla, tara tan lagi bar saoat asil.
8.41: Ou shomoy Zayir name mosid komiṭir eḳ motolli aia Isar fao-o foṛia minot lagaila, huzurre tan baṛit nibar lagi.
8.42: Ḳaron tan eḳmatro fuṛi sorḳato asil, fuṛir boyosh baro bosor. Isa zebla ou baṛit zaibar lagi roana dila, manshe aia tan sairobae biṛ ḳoria ṭelaṭeli lagaila.
8.43: Biṛor maze eḳ beṭi manush-o asla, ein baro bosor doria mashik bemari. Tan hoḳol don-samana ḍaktoror tole kuaia-o bala oita farsoin na.
8.44: Tain Isar ḳoredi aia Isar saddoror kunat soar loge loge-u tan bemar ḳomigelo.
8.45: Teu Isae zikaila, “Amare ḳe soilo?” Ḳeu shikar na ḳorae Fitor ar tan logor manshe Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, afnar sairobae ḳoto manshe ṭelaṭeli koria afnar gat lager.”
8.46: Oile Isae ḳoila, “Ḳeu amare soise, ḳaron ami buzram, amar bitor taki gaibi bol bar oise.”
8.47: Ou beṭie zebla deḳlo dora foṛigese, tai kafi kafi Isar samne aia tan fao-o foṛia hoḳlor samne-u ḳoilo, ḳene tai Isare soisil ar kilan loge loge-u bala oigese.
8.48: Isae beṭire ḳoila, “Mai go, tumi ekin ḳorso ḳori bala oiso. Oḳon shantie baṛit zao.”
8.49: Isae ota matira, omon shomoy mosidor motollir baṛi taki kobria aia tanre ḳoilo, “Sab, afnar fuṛi dunia taki gesoingi, te huzurre ar ḳoshṭo dibar ḳam nai.”
8.50: Ikan hunia Isae ḳoila, “Ḍoraio na, ḳali ekin ḳoro. Deḳbaene, tai bala oizibo.”
8.51: Isa hou baṛit gela, gia Fitor, Hannan, Iakub ar fuṛir ma-baf saṛa oinno ḳeurore goror bitre hamaite dila na.
8.52: Hoḳole zebla fuṛir lagi kanda-ḳaṭi ar ahazari korra, ou shomoy Isae ḳoila, “Ḳandio na-re, tai to morse na, gumar.”
8.53: Ikan hunia tara tanre siṛaila. Tara hoḳole-u zanto fuṛi morigese.
8.54: Teu Isae fuṛir ato doria ḍaḳ dila, “Mai go, uṭo.”
8.55: Loge loge-u fuṛir zan firot ailo. Tai uṭia boigelo. Isae ḳoila, fuṛire kunta ḳaibar dita.
8.56: Fuṛir ma-baf ekkere taijjub bonigela. Bade Isae ḳoila, “Huno, ita ḳeurore hunaio na.”

9.1: Bade Isae hou barozon sahabire ekḳano dola ḳorla, tarare hoḳol zator zin-but saṛani, bemarire bala ḳorar izazot ar ḳemota dila.
9.2: Bade tain Allar bashshair toblig ar bemarintore shifa ḳorat erare faṭaila.
9.3: Tain ḳoila, “Tumra fotor lagi laṭi, gaiṭ-buski, ḳani-kuraki, ṭeḳa-foysha, ba duiṭa kurta-o loge nio na.
9.4: Kunu gaut gele tumra ze baṛit hamaibae, ou baṛit-u roio, ar on taki hirbar bidae oio.
9.5: Manshe zudi tumrare zaga na dein, te hon taki bar oibar age tumrar faor duil fusia falaio, ou duile-u tarar bifokke shakki dibo.”
9.6: Sahabi oḳol roana oia gaue gaue gia, Allar kush-ḳobri toblig ar bemarintore shifa ḳorat lagla.
9.7: Raza Herude Isar ou ḳam-ḳazor ḳobor hunia kub gabṛi gela. Kunu kunu manshe tanre ḳoila, Ehia nobi hirbar zinda oia uṭi gesoin.
9.8: Ar kunu kunu zone ḳoila, Ilias nobie doroshon disoin. Hirbar ḳeu ḳeu ḳoilo, furana zomanar kunu nobi zinda oia aisoin.
9.9: Teu Herude ḳoila, “Ami nize-u to Ehiar mata ḳaṭaisi, te ou zeta hunram, ein ashole ḳe?” Erdae Herude Isare deḳar kial oilo. Fas azar manshor gaibi kani
9.10: Isae ze barozon sahabire tobligo faṭaisla, tara firia aila. Aia tanre zanaila, tobligi soforo kita kita ḳorsoin, ou tain erare loia kub niribili halote Bayt-Soyda namor ek gaut gela.
9.11: Oile manshe i kobor hunia dole dole Isar ḳore oia roana dilaila. Tain erare kushi mone kobul ḳorla. Tarar gese Allar bashshair boyani toblig korla, ar zeta bemarir bemar shifa oa zorur asil, tain erare shifa ḳorla.
9.12: Hainja bala hou barozon sahabi aia Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, amra ze zagat asi, ikan kub niribili zaga. Te ota manshore bidae dilaukka, tara ḳanda-ḳasar gaut gia raitkur taḳa-ḳaoar bebosta ḳorouk.”
9.13: Isae zuaf dila, “Tumra tarare ḳana ḳaoao.” Tara ḳoila, “Amrar gese to ḳali fasḳan ruṭi, duiṭa biran mas ase, ar kunta nai. Te amra bazaro gia erar lagi kana loia antam ni?”
9.14: Isae ḳoila, “Erare foinchash-zon, foinchash-zon ḳori boai deo.” Ino ḳali beṭa manush-u asla fas azaror laḳan.
9.16: Isae ou fasoḳan ruṭi ar duio mas loia asmanor bae saia Allar shukria adae ḳorla. Bade ruṭi ar mas ṭukra ṭukra ḳori bangia, sahabi oḳlor ato dia ḳoila baṭia dilaita.
9.17: Ou ḳanae hoḳol manshe feṭ boria ḳaila. Ḳaia harle zeta guṛa-gaṛa roisil ota dola ḳorle baro ṭukri borigelo. Hozrot Isar moutor agam ḳobor
9.18: Eḳdin Isa eḳ nirai zagat dua ḳorat boira, ḳali sahabi oḳol tan loge asla. Tain erare zikaila, “Ḳo sain, manshe kita mono ḳoroin, ami ke?”
9.19: Tara zuaf dila, “Kunu kunu manshe ḳoin, afne Ehia nobi. Kunu zone ḳoin Ilias nobi, ar ḳeu ḳeu ḳoy bout agor zomanar kunu nobi hirbar zinda oia uṭisoin.”
9.20: Isae erare zikaila, “Oile tumra kita mono ḳoro, ami ke?” Sahabi Fitore ḳoila, “Afne-u Allar oada ḳora hou al-Mosi.”
9.21: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Ḳobordar! Ita ar ḳeurore hunaio na.”
9.22: Bade tain ḳoila, “Ami bin-Adome bout ḳoshṭo shoijjo ḳora lagbo. Shomazor murobbi oḳole, boṛo imam, ar moulana oḳole amare ela ḳorba. Amare zane mara oibo, oile moutor tin dinor din amar hirbar zinda oia uṭa zorur.”
9.23: Tain era hoḳolre ḳoila, “Amar torikae ḳeu zindegi kaṭaite saile, he tar nizor kushie sola bad deuk. Tar afon duk-koshṭor solib forteḳ din boia loia amar ḳore ḳore auk.
9.24: Ze manshe nizor zan basaito sae, he tar hasaror zindegi kuaibo. Oile ze zone amar lagi nizor zan kurbani dey, he hasaror zindegi faibo.
9.25: Kunu manush zudi asta duniar malik bonia-o tar hasaror zindegi mani aḳer kuailae, te tar kunu fayda oilo ni?
9.26: Hunoukka, ḳeu zudi amar lagi ba amar talimor lagia muk lukae, te ami bin-Adom zebla amar nizor, ar fobitro firista oḳlor, ar gaibi bafor shan-tozollie duniat hirbar aimu, ou shomoy ami-o erare deḳle muk lukaimu.
9.27: Ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, ou mozliso oula ḳoyzon manush azir asoin, Allar bashshai na dekia erar mout oito nae.” Hozrot Isar nurani surot
9.28: Ou talimor eḳod hafta bade, Isa dua ḳorar lagi tan sahabi Fitor, Hannan, ar Iakubre loia eḳ ṭillar ufre uṭla.
9.29: Tain dua ḳorra, omon shomoy aḳta-u tan mukor rong bodligelo, tan finnor ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ dola soḳsoḳa oigelo.
9.30: Ou shomoy deḳa gelo, duizon manshe aia tan loge batchit ḳorra, erar eḳzon oila Musa nobi, dusra zon Ilias nobi.
9.31: Tara Allai zalal ar shane deḳa dila. Zeruzalem soforor ḳalo Isa zen Allar morzi mafik moutor mukamuki oira, ou befare-u tara batchit ḳorla.
9.32: Sahabi Fitor ar tan logor oḳol be-malum gumo asla. Aḳta-u gum bangi zaoae tara Isar zalal-shan deḳla, ar tan ḳandat uba ou duio zonre-o deḳla.
9.33: Hou duiozon zebla Isar ges taki roana dilaira, ou shomoy Fitore ḳoila, “Huzur, amra-o to ono asi, kub bala oise, te ek kam ḳorilai, amra ono tinḳan ḍera-gor banailai, ekkan afnar, ekkan Ilias nobi, ar ekkan Musa nobir lagi.” Fitore zen kita ḳoira, ita tain nize-u buzla na.
9.34: Fitore ota matira, ou shomoy aḳta-u megor ḳalni aia tarare gurililo. Tara ḳalnir aoṛe hamanir bade sahabi oḳol ḍoraigela.
9.35: Ar ḳalnir bitor taki ou aoaz ailo, “Ein-u amar ḳas mayar zon, tumra en ḳota mano.”
9.36: I aoazor bade-u deḳa gelo, Isa hono eḳla ubai roisoin. Sahabi oḳol nirai oigela, tara zeta deḳsila ou shomoy ita ar ḳeurore hunaila na. Zinor asor-ala fua
9.37: Bador din Isa ar sahabi oḳol faṛor ṭilla taki lamia aile, bout manush tan loge deḳa ḳorat aia biṛ bandilla.
9.38: Ou biṛor mazor eḳzone sillaia ḳoilo, “Huzur, amar fuagur bae kial ḳoroukka, ogu amar eḳmatro aolad.
9.39: Tare eḳṭa zine dore, igie tare saṛto sae na, he aḳta-u sik dia uṭe ar maṭit foṛia saṭiae. Tar mukedi fena baroy, heshe tare asaṛia ad-mora ḳori falai toia zae.
9.40: Ami afnar sahabi oḳlor gese minot-ḳajji korslam ogutare ḳedaibar lagi, oile tara farsoin na.”
9.41: Isae ḳoila, “O beiman ar naformanor zat, ami ar ḳotodin tumrar loge roimu, tumrar satani shoijjo ḳormu? Deki sain, tumar fuare ono ano.”
9.42: Beṭae fuare loia aguar, ou shomoy zinnate tare maṭit falaia zatia dorlo, he hutia saṭiani lagailo. Teu Isae zinnatre damki dila, tain ou fuare bala ḳoria tar bafor ato shomzai dila.
9.43: Allar kudroti lila-ḳela dekia hoḳol manush taijjub oigela. Dusrabar tan moutor agam ḳobor Isar keramoti kam-ḳaz dekia hokkole taijjub bonia sinta ḳorra, ou shomoy tain sahabi oḳolre ḳoila,
9.44: “Amar ḳota ḳanain tumra mon dia huno, ami bin-Adomre to manshor ato dorai deoa oibo.”
9.45: Sahabi oḳole i mator kunu mani buzla na. Allae tarar gese ikan gaib raḳla, zate tara na buzoin. Ar ou befare Isare-o kunta zikaite tarar shaosh oilo na. Boṛo ḳe?
9.46: Sahabi oḳlor maze ḳe hoḳol taki boṛo, ota loia tara torka-torki korra,
9.47: ermaze Isae tarar dilor bab buzilila. Tain eḳ nabalik huruttare ḳandat ania ḳoila,
9.48: “Ze zone amar lagi ou huruttar laḳan kunu sabalre kobul ḳore, he amare-u kobul ḳore. Ar amare ze kobul ḳore, he ḳali amare nae, amare zein bezisoin tanre-o kobul ḳorlo. Tumrar maze ze zon hoḳol taki huru, he-u hoḳol taki boṛo.”
9.49: Bade sahabi Hannane ḳoila, “Huzur, amra deḳlam afnar nam loia eḳzone but saṛar. Dekia amra tare mana ḳorsi, he to amrar torikar nae.”
9.50: Isae tanre ḳoila, “Ar mana ḳorio na, ze tumrar bifokke nae, he to fokke-u ase.” Zeruzalem zaoar fote Hozrot Isa (9:51–19:27) Hozrot Isa Zeruzalemor bae roana
9.51: Isae behesto toshrif nibar din gonaia ailo, ou tain Zeruzalemo zaita ḳori niot ḳorla.
9.52: Tan age oia ḳobria oḳol faṭaila. Tara age gia hoḳolta zuit-zait ḳorar kiale Shomoria zatir ek gaut gia hamaila.
9.53: Oile hi gaur manshe zebla hunla, Isa Zeruzalem zaita, hunia tara tanre asroy dilo na.
9.54: Erdae tan sahabi Iakub ar Hannane ḳoila, “Huzur, Ilias nobir laḳan amra-o oḳon aroz ḳortam ni, asmani aguin lamia otare binash ḳorilauk?”
9.55: Isae tarar bae firia damki dia ḳoila, “Tumra zano na ni tumra kun laḳan ruhur goṛa? Amare kunu beza oise ni manshor binash ḳortam? Amare to beza oise manshor zan basaitam.”
9.56: Oḳan ḳoia era arok gaut gelagi.
9.57: Tara zebla fotedi zaira, ou shomoy eḳ beṭa aia Isare ḳoilo, “Sab, afne zeḳano zaiba, ami-o afnar loge hono zaimu.”
9.58: Isae tare ḳoila, “Babare, hialor gat ase, fakintor bada ase, oile ami bin-Adomor mata guzar kunu ṭai nai.”
9.59: Bade Isae aroḳzonre deḳla, dekia tare ḳoila, “Oba, amar loge solo.” He zuaf dilo, “Huzur, amar bafor moutor bade tanre maṭi dia harle ami aimu.”
9.60: Isae tare ḳoila, “Mora oḳole tarar morare maṭi deuk, tumi aia Allar bashshair daot deo.”
9.61: Aro eḳzone ḳoilo, “Huzur, ami afnar loge zaimu, te amar baṛit gia bidae loia ai.”
9.62: Isae tare ḳoila, “Langolor kuṭit doria zegue ḳoredi firia sae, he Allar bashshair laḳ nae.”

10.1: Bade Hozrot Isae aro shottoirzon shagridre tobligo faṭaita ḳori fosond ḳorla. Tain nize zeta ṭaun ba gauainto zaoar irada ḳorsila, hono zaibar age erare duizon duizon ḳoria faṭaila.
10.2: Faṭanir bala erare ḳoila, “Huno, zomino to foshol bout ase, oile ḳamla kub ḳom. Erlagi zominor malikor gese dua ḳoro, tan foshol tular lagi tain ḳamla faṭaiba.
10.3: Tumra oḳon roana oizao. Kial rakio, bagor falor maze meṛa-baichchar laḳan ami tumrare faṭailam.
10.4: Tumra zaoar ḳalo ṭeḳar toli, gaiṭ-buski, faor zuta ita kunta-u loge nio na, ar fotor maze ḳeurore salam-o ḳorio na.
10.5: Ze baṛit gia hamaibae, hamaia-u ḳoio, assalamu alaikum.
10.6: Salam loar zuka ḳeu hino taḳle, tumrar salam tar ufre bortibo, ar ila ḳeu na taḳle, tumrar salam tumrar gese-u firot aibo.
10.7: Foyla ze baṛit hamaibae, hou baṛit-u roio. I baṛi saṛia dusra baṛit zaio na. Tara zeta dein ota ḳaio, ḳaron ḳamlae tar beton faoar zoiggo.
10.8: “Zebla kunu gaut zaibae, hinor manshe tumrare kobul ḳoria, tara zeta ḳaite dein, ota-u ḳaio.
10.9: Tarar bemari oḳlor bemar bala ḳorio. Tarare ḳoio, Allar bashshai to tumrar daro aichche.
10.10: Oile kunu gaut gele honor manshe zudi tumrare kobul na ḳoroin, te gaut aṭi aṭi oḳan ḳoio,
10.11: Hoba, tumrar gaur ze duil amrar faot lagse, ita amra fusia falai diram, ou duile-u tumrar bifokke shakki dibo. Oile mono rakio, Allar bashshai kandat aichche.
10.12: Ami tumrare ḳoiram, kiamotor din lannoti Sadum ṭaunor dosha taki, hi gaur dosha aro ḳoṭin oibo.
10.13: “Haere Bayt-Soyda ar Kurasin gau, tumra to lannoti. Tumrar maze zeta kudroti kam deḳail oise, ita Shur ar Sidon elaḳat deḳail oile, tara ḳator oia touba ḳorlo one.
10.14: Ashole kiamotor din Shur ar Sidon elaḳar dosha taki-o, tumrar dosha bout ḳoṭin oibo.
10.15: Ar O Kofornaum ṭaun, tumi bule usa oia asmano gia lagtae? Na, fartae nae! Tumare fatalo lamail oibo.
10.16: “Tumra mono rakio, zera tumrar ḳota mane, tara ashole amar ḳota-u mane. Ar zera tumrare mane na, tara amare-o mane na. Zera amare mane na, tara ashole hou Allare-o mane na, zein amare bezisoin.”
10.17: Bade hi shottoirzon shagride toblig koria kub kush mizaze firot aila. Aia ḳoila, “Huzur, afnar nam hunle zin-bute-o amrar ḳota mane.”
10.18: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Huno, ami deḳsi, Iblis-Shoytan megor zilkir laḳan behest taki foṛizar.
10.19: Te ami tumrare haf-bichchur ufredi aṭar ḳemota disi, ar tumrar dushmon, Iblisor hoḳol shoktir ufre tumrare ḳemota disi. Kunuzat kuntae-u tumrar ḳeti korto farto nae.
10.20: Ar zin-bute tumrar ḳota huner dekia kushi na oia, borong behesti katat tumrar nam leḳa oise ḳori-u kushi koro.”
10.21: Ou shomoy Isa-o Pak Ruhur bole kushi oia ḳoila, “O gaibi baba, tumi-u to asman-zominor malik. Ami tumar shukria adae ḳorram, ḳaron tumi aḳoldar-buddiman oḳlor gese ita zair na ḳoria, bebuz-huruttar laḳan manshor gese zair ḳorso. Baba, ashole to ita hoḳolta-u tumar morzi.
10.22: Amar gaibi babae hoḳolta-u amar ato shofi disoin. Baf saṛa dusra ḳeu zane na ou fut ḳe, ar fut saṛa dusra ḳeu zane na ou baf ḳe. Fute bafre zar gese zair ḳorar kial oy, ḳali he-u bafor forisoy fae.”
10.23: Bade tain shagrid oḳlor bae firia ḳane ḳane ḳoila, “Tumra zeta zeta deḳso, ita deḳar shuzug zar oy, he-u nek-kofali.
10.24: Ami tumrare ḳoiram, tumra zeta deḳrae, ita bout nobie ar raza-bashshae deḳar asha ḳorle-o, deḳar ḳofal oise na. Tumra zeta hunrae, ita tara hunte saile-o hunar ḳofal oise na.” Hoḳol taki boṛo hukum
10.25: Eḳbar eḳ alim sab Isar gese aila. Aia tanre forikka ḳorar lagi zikaila, “Huzur, kita ḳam ḳorle ami behest faimu?”
10.26: Isae ḳoila, “Musa nobir kitabo kita leḳa ase? Afne kita faisoin?”
10.27: Alime zuaf dila, “Leḳa ase, Tumi tumar asta dil dia, zan dia, hoḳol bol-shokti dia, tumar shullo-ana mon dia, tumar Mabud Allare mohobbot ḳorbae. Ar, Tumar ari-forire nizor laḳan maya ḳorbae.”
10.28: Isae tanre ḳoila, “Afne ṭik kota ḳoisoin. Te afne-o oula ḳoroukka, teu behest faiba.”
10.29: Ou alime nizor dam baṛanir lagi Isare ḳoila, “Aichcha, te amar ari-fori ke?”
10.30: Isae ḳoila, “Hunoukka, eḳzon manush Zeruzalem taki Ziriho ṭauno zaoat asil. Foto ḍaḳaite faia tar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ hoḳolta ḳaṛia nia, tare maria ad-mora ḳori falai toia gelogi.
10.31: Bade eḳ imam sab ou fotedi zaira, tain ou beṭare dekia galabae horia gelagi.
10.32: Ou laḳan Lebir ḳandanor ek kadim sab-o ou fotedi aila, tain-o ere dekia galabae gelagi.
10.33: Heshe Shomoria zatir eḳ beṭa ou fotedi ailo, he bidormi zatir oile-o er halot dekia tar dilo dorod hamailo.
10.34: Ou he er zoḳomor ufre tel ar anguror rosh malish ḳoria foṭṭi bandia dilo. Bade tar nizor gadar ufre tulia, eḳ musafir ḳanat nia tar zoton ḳorlo.
10.35: Bador din ou Shomorio beṭae musafir ḳanar malikor ato duiṭa dinar dia ḳoilo, ou manushgur zoton ḳorba. Er beshi koros oile-o, ami aia dimu.
10.36: “Te alim sab, afnar kita mono oy, ou tinzonor maze kun zon, ḍaḳaitor ato fiṭa ḳaora beṭar ari-fori?”
10.37: Alime ḳoila, “Ze manshe tare dorod ḳorlo he-u to.” Teu Isae ḳoila, “Te afne-o gia oula ḳoroukka.” Bibi Marta ar tan boin
10.38: Bade Isa ar tan sahabi oḳol aṭi aṭi ek gaut gela. Hou gaur eḳ beṭi manshe kushi oia Isare tan baṛit nia memandari korla. Ou beṭir nam Marta.
10.39: Beṭir eḳ boinor nam oilo Moriom, ein huzuror faor ḳandat boia nosiot hunra.
10.40: Ar Marta gia randa-baṛa ar ḳatir-zoton ḳorat fereshanit roila. Ermaze Marta aia huzur Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, deḳra ni amar boine hokkol ḳam-ḳaz eḳla amar ufre toia ono aise? Te afne ḳoukka, amare shaijjo ḳorto.”
10.41: Huzure ḳoila, “Marta, tumi bout befare sinta ḳoria fereshan oigeso.
10.42: Huno, ashole eḳṭa befar-u ḳali zorur ase. Tumar boin Moriome hou zoruri befarre fosond ḳorse. Ita to tair ges taki kaṛia neoa zaito nae.”

11.1: Eḳdin huzur Isae kunu eḳ zagat dua ḳorat asla. Dua shesh oia harle tan eḳ sahabie ḳoila, “Huzur, Ehia nobie to tan sahabire dua ḳora hikaita, te afne-o amrare dua ḳora hikaukka.”
11.2: Isae erare ḳoila, “Dua ḳorar shomoy tumra oula ḳoio, O asmani baba, tumar nam fobitro ḳoia mana ouk, duniat tumar bashshai kaim ouk.
11.3: Amrar forteḳ dinor rizek fortidin zugai dio;
11.4: Baba, amrar tamam gunare maf ḳoria dilao, zela amra-o mafi dilaisi amrar oforadi oḳolre; ar forikka taki hefazot ḳoro amrare.”
11.5: Bade Isae tarare ḳoila, “Dorilao, ada raitkur bala tumrar kunu dustor baṛit gia ḳoilae, dust, amare tinḳan ruṭi koroz deo.
11.6: Amar eḳ bondu fotedi zaoar bala aḳta-u amar baṛit uṭsoin. Oḳon tane kita ḳaoaitam, amar goro to kunta nai.
11.7: Teu duste goro tone zuaf dila, ami dorza bond ḳoria amar huruttain loia hutiroisi, amare ḳoshṭo dio na. Oḳon uṭia kunta ditam fartam nae.
11.8: Oile ami koiram, ou duste uṭia bondu hishabe kunta dite na saile-o, tumi bar bar minot ḳorle he uṭbo-u. Uṭia tumi zeta sairae, ita ṭik-u dibo.
11.9: “Te ami tumrare ḳoiram, tumra sao, teu deoa oibo. Tallash ḳoro, teu faibae. Duaro ṭuka deo, tumrar lagi duar kula oibo.
11.10: Zara sae, tara-u to fae. Ze tallash ḳore he fae. Ze duaro ṭuka dey, tar lagi duar kula oy.
11.11: Tumrar maze ila kunu baf ase ni, zar fute ruṭi saile tare maṭi dibo, mas saile haf dibo,
11.13: Te tumra naforman oia-o zudi tumrar huruttainre bala bala siz ditae zano, te zara behesti bafor gese saibo, tain nisoy tarare Pak Ruhu dan ḳorba-u.” Hozrot Isae kun bole keramoti deḳain
11.14: Eḳdin eḳ beṭar log takia Isae eḳ buba zinnat saṛaila. Zinnate saṛar bade hi beṭar zoban kuligelo, mat-ḳota matilo. Ita dekia manush taijjub bonigela.
11.15: Oile kunu kunu manshe ḳoilo, “I beṭae zinor bashsha Bel-Sobulor bole zin saṛae.”
11.16: Aro ḳoyeḳ zone tanre forikka ḳorar niote, tan ator kunu keramoti deḳto sailo.
11.17: Isae tarar dilor bab buzilila. Buzia ḳoila, “Kunu raijjo nize nize bag oigele, i raijjo binash oizae. Oula kunu foribaro zebla bibad lagizae, i foribar-o ar ṭike na.
11.18: Te zinnat zudi tar nizor bifokke lagizae, taile tar raijjo ḳemne ṭikbo? Tumra to ḳoirae, ami Bel-Sobulor bole zinnat saṛai.
11.19: Kub bala ḳota, ami zudi Bel-Sobulor bole zinnat saṛai, te tumrar manshe kitadi saṛae? Tumrar mator bisar tumrar manshe-u ḳorbo.
11.20: Oile ami zudi Allai kudrote zinnat saṛai, te to Allar bashshai tumrar nozdik aichche.
11.21: “Huno, kunu bolala manshe ostro-shostro loia tar baṛi fahara dile, tar samana nirafod taḳe.
11.22: Oile tar taki zobordosto aroḳzon aia hamla ḳoria tare arailile, he zeta ostro-shostror boṛai korsil, i ostro-o ḳaṛia nibogi. Tar hoḳol mal-samana-o luṭia nia ḳaṭilibo.
11.23: “Te ze zon amar fokke nae, he to amar bifokko. Ze amar oia ḳam na ḳore, he to amar birudde ḳam ḳore.
11.24: “Kunu zine zebla eḳ bemarir log saṛia zaegi, gia boshot ḳorar lagi morubumit guraguri kore. Bade kunuḳano roibar zaga na faia mone mone ḳoy, dur! Ami zen taki aisi ono-u hirbar zaigi.
11.25: Firot aia hari deḳe, hi zaga shundor ḳori hazai-faṛai toa.
11.26: Ou he gia tar taki aro bod shatgu zin loge ḳori ane. Ania ono hamaia basha banae. Erdae ou bemarir dosha foyla taki heshe aro ḳaraf oy.”
11.27: Isae ota boyan ḳorra, aḳta-u biṛor maz taki eḳ beṭie zure zure ḳoilo, “Huzur, ze maʼe afnare feṭo loisoin ar dud ḳaoaisoin, ein boṛo ḳofali ma.”
11.28: Isae ḳoila, “Ikan hasa ḳota, oile er saite-o boṛo ḳofali tara, zara Allar kalam hune, hunia ola amol ḳore.” Hozrot Iunus nobir alamot
11.29: Bade aro bout manush Hozrot Isar gese aila. Tain erare ḳoila, “I zomanar manush to naforman. Tara ḳali keramoti tukae, oile Iunus nobir alamot saṛa dusra kunu keramoti tarare deḳail oito nae.
11.30: Iunus nobi nize nize-u zela Ninob ṭaunor manshor gese eḳ alamot oisla, bin-Adom-o oula i zomanar manshor gese nize-u alamot oiba.
11.31: Ruz kiamotor din douknor deshor rani uṭia ou zomanar manshor dush zair ḳorba. Ḳaron Bashsha Sulaimanor aḳolor ḳota hunar niote tain duniar hesh mata taki aisla. Oile oḳon to Sulaiman taki-o aro mohan eḳzon ono asoin.
11.32: Kiamotor din Ninob ṭaunor murda oḳol uṭia i zomanar manshor dush zair ḳorba. Ḳaron Iunus nobir toblig hunia tara touba ḳorsila. Oile oḳon to Iunus taki-o aro mohan eḳzon ino asoin, ta-o manshe touba ḳorer na. Souk bala zar, dil bala tar
11.33: “Kunu manshe to lem zalaia hari sokir tole ba ṭukrir tole toy na, borong gasar ufre-u toy, zate goror manshe for deḳe.
11.34: Tumar souk-u oilo tumar ḳayar batti. Souk zudi bala oy, te tumar asta shorilo for oibo. Ar souk karaf oile, tumar shoril-o andarit roibo.
11.35: Te kial rakio, tumar dilo ze nur ase, ita andair oizar ki na?
11.36: Tumar asta shorilo zudi for taḳe, kunu ongo andair na taḳe, te leme zela tar nizor teze tumare for dey, oula i nure-o tumar asta shorilre for ḳorilibo.” Dilre pak-pakiza raḳa zorur
11.37: Isae boyan ḳorra ou shomoy Forishi dolor eḳzone tanre ḳaibar daot dila. Tain gia en goror bitre ḳanit boila.
11.38: Forishie deḳla, ḳaoat boibar ḳalo Isae Ihudi niom mafik at doisoin na, ou tain taijjub bonigela.
11.39: Teu Isae tanre ḳoila, “Hunoukka, afnara Forishi oḳole to bashon-bortonor bair gala kub shundor ḳoroin, oile afnarar bitre to naformani ar lalose bora.
11.40: O be-aḳolor dol, zein bargala banaisoin, tain-u kita bitor gala-o banaisoin na ni?
11.41: Erlagi afnarar bitre zeta ase, ota age Allar oaste lilla-sodga deukka. Teu deḳbane, afnarar hoḳolta-u fak-saf oizibo.
11.42: “Haere Forishi oḳol, lannot tumrare, tumra ḳali tezfata, fodina fata ar hokkol hag-torḳarir dosh baṭor eḳ baṭ Allar name zoḳat deo, oile Allar mohobbot ar hok insafor bae tumrar kunu kial-u nai. Ashole ou foylata manar loge loge badorta-o amol ḳora forz.
11.43: O lannoti Forishi oḳol! Mosido hamaia samnor ḳataro boa, ar bazar-aṭo gia salam faite tumra kub fosond ḳoro.
11.44: Lannot tumrar ufre, tumra oilae osina ḳoyboror laḳan. Manshe na sinia er ufredi aṭa-fira ḳore.”
11.45: Ikan hunia eḳzon alime Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, oḳan ḳoia to afne amrare-o beijjot ḳorra.”
11.46: Isae ḳoila, “Nisoy, afnara-o lannoti, afnara manshor ḳando bar buzai koria dein, oile tarar asanor lagi angulṭa-o laṛoin na.
11.47: “Haere lannoti oḳol, tumra nobi oḳlor rouzare shundor ḳoria fakka ḳoro, oile tumrar moy-murobbie-u to erare zane marsla.
11.48: Ota dekia-u buza zae, tumra tumrar moy-murobbir ḳamor shakki oirae, tumra-o ola oirae. Tara nobi oḳolre zane marsil, ar tumra hou nobir rouzare fakka ḳorrae.
11.49: Erdae Alla Pake-o tan nizor morzie ḳoila, ami tarar gese amar nobi-rosul bezimu, erar ḳeurore tara zulum ḳorbo, ar ḳeurore zane marbo.
11.50: Ete duniar foyla taki oḳon forzonto zoto nobire zane mara oise, era hokkolor dayi oiba ou zomanar manush.
11.51: Hunoukka, ami afnaintore ḳoiram, foyla Adomor fut Habilor kun taki shuru ḳoria, nobi Zakariar kun forzonto hoḳol lour shaza ou zomanar manshor ges taki adae ḳora oibo. Nobi Zakariare to Zeruzalemor fobitro Kaba Shorifor kurbani kana ar Herem Shorifor mazḳano kun ḳora oise.
11.52: Haere lannoti alim oḳol, tumra manshore-o Allar fot sinairae na, nize-o Allar bashshait hamairae na, ar zera hamaito sar, tarare-o bada dirae.”
11.53: -54 Boyan bade Isa ikan taki roana dilaila. Teu alim ar Forishi oḳole mizaz gorom ḳoria Isare fando falaita ḳori kusai-faṛai matila. Nanan nomunar soal ḳoria tanre aṭḳanir shuzug tukaila.

12.1: Ou shomoy azar azar manush dola oigela, tara ṭelaṭeli kori eḳe-oinnor ufre foṛla. Isae foyla tan sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Tumra Forishi mozobor ḳamir taki hushiar roio, ou ḳamir oilo tarar bonḍami.
12.2: Ṭik ou ḳamiror laḳan, ila lukail kunta-u nai, zeta zair oito nae. Ila gufon kunta-u nai, zeta zana zaito nae.
12.3: Tumra andair goro zeta matiso, manshe ita foror maze hunbo. Goror bitre ḳane ḳane zeta ḳoiso, ita salor ufre roṭail oibo.
12.4: “O amar dust oḳol, ami tumrare ḳoiar, zara ḳali shorilre binash ḳora saṛa ar kunta-u ḳorto fare na, tarare ḍoraio na.
12.5: Te ḳare ḍoraitae eoḳan-o ḳoiram, marar bade duzoḳo haranir ḳemota-o zan ase, ḳali tanre-u ḍoraio. Ami hirbar ḳoiram, tumra ḳali tane-u ḍoraio.
12.6: Matro dui anae fasgu soṛa faki mile na ni? Allae to ou soṛar ḳota-o fauroin na.
12.7: Ar kita ḳoitam, tumrar matar sulor hishab-o tan gese ase. Tumra ḍoraio na, bout soṛa faki tone-o tumrar dam tan gese beshi.
12.8: “Huno, ami tumrare ḳoiram, ze manshe shomazor samne amare kobul ḳore, ami bin-Adome-o Allar firista oḳlor samne tare kobul ḳormu.
12.9: Oile ze manshe shomazor samne amare oshikar ḳorbo, ami-o tare Allar firista oḳlor samne oshikar ḳormu.
12.10: Ami bin-Adomor birudde ḳeu kunta matile-o mafi faibo. Oile ḳeu zudi Pak Ruhur birudde kufuri kore, te tar kunu mafi nai.
12.11: “Manshe zebla tumrare mosidor fainchaito, bisari oḳlor samne, ba tanat nibo, ou shomoy kita zuaf ditae ba kita ḳoitae, ita loia kunu sinta ḳorio na.
12.12: Kita matitae ita Pak Ruhe tumrare hou shomoy batai diba.”
12.13: Biṛor maz taki eḳzone Isare ḳoilo, “Huzur, afne amar baire ḳoukka, amar babae zeta don-samana toia gesoin, ota baṭ-baṭura ḳoria dita.”
12.14: Isae tare ḳoila, “Oba, tumrar bisar ḳortam ar don-samana baṭitam, ita eḳtiar amare ḳegue dise?”
12.15: Tain manshore ḳoila, “Ḳobordar! Hokkol nomunar lub-lalos tone nizore basao. Ḳaron don-samana baia gele-o itae manshor zan basae na.”
12.16: Bade Isae tarare ou kichcha hunaila, ḳoila, “Eḳ doni beṭar zomino bout dan folisil.
12.17: Dan dekia he mone mone ḳoilo, oto dan oḳon kita ḳortam? Amar to toibar-u zaga nai.
12.18: Te ami ek kam ḳori, amar ugar bangia boṛo ḳori koyṭa ugar banailai. Teu amar hoḳol dan ar mal-samana zaga oibo.
12.19: Heshe amar zanre ḳoimu, O zan, bout bosoror mal-samana ar ḳani-kurakir lagi nisinta oigeso. Oḳon aram-ayeshe tumi kaia findia furti koro.
12.20: Oile Allae tare ḳoila, ore be-aḳol, tor zan to aiz rait-u ḳoboz ḳora oibo. Te tui zeta zomaisos, ita ḳegue ḳaibo?”
12.21: Heshe Isae ḳoila, “Ze manshe ḳali duniabi don-samana dola ḳore, oile aḳeror don na zomae, tar halot oula-u oy.”
12.22: Bade Isae tan shagrid oḳolre ḳoila, “Erdae-u ami tumrare ḳoiram, kita ḳaia bastam, ar kita finditam, ita loia tumra sinta ḳorio na.
12.23: Zan taki to ḳani boṛo nae, ar shoril taki kafoṛ boṛo nae.
12.24: Ou ḳauaguintor bae kial ḳoro, tara to ḳet-o ḳore na, foshol-o ḳaṭe na. Tarar ugar-o nai, banḍar-o nai. Allae tarar rizek zugaia dein. Te tumra to ou ḳaua taki bout dami.
12.25: Ḳo sain, tumrar maze ḳeu sinta-babna ḳoria tar hayati ekkan gonṭa-o baṛaito farbo ni?
12.26: Ar ou huru ḳamḳan-u zebla faro na, te ḳene baṛti sinta ḳoro?
12.27: “Tumra ou zongli fulor bae sao, ita ḳoto shundor! Itae to nizor shundoror lagi kunta-u ḳore na, kunu rong silai-o ḳore na, bain-o ḳore na, emne-u oy. Te ami koiar, Bashsha Sulaiman oto zak-zomoḳor maze roile-o tan lebas to ota egu zongli fulor laḳan-o shundor asil na.
12.28: Deḳrae ni, zongolor maze ou zoto shundor ful oḳon ase, ḳail oile-u manshe ita daru banaia aguindi zalaibo. Allae zudi ou zongolre ola shundor ḳori hazaisoin, te O ḳomzur imandar oḳol, tumrare-o tain shundor ḳori hazaita nae ni?
12.29: Te kila ḳaitam, kila soltam, ita befare sinta ḳorio na, ba ostir oio na.
12.30: I duniar manshe ḳali ota loia-u danda ḳore. Oile tumrar batuni bafe to emne-u zanoin, tumrar kita kita lagbo.
12.31: Erdae-u tumra ita bad dia, ḳali Allar bashshair dandat ro, teu ita hokkolta-u tain zugaiba.
12.32: “Tumra-u amar meṛar fal, tumrar dol huru-muru oile-o ḍoraio na, tumrar batuni bafor morzi oilo, tumra tan bashshair bitoro hamao.
12.33: Tumrar zotota ase, hokkolta besia gorib oḳolre bilai deo, ar nizor lagi kali oula ek kuti-beg tiar ḳoro, ze kuti kunudin furan oy na. Ou behesto samana zoma ḳoro, zeḳano samana koy oy na, sure-o ney na, fuke-o ḳae na.
12.34: Ḳaron tumrar don zeno roy, mon-o hono roibo. Hamesha tiar roio
12.35: “Tumra ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ findia ar batti zalaia tiar roio.
12.36: Tumra ou zat ḳamlar laḳan o, zara tarar munibor lagi bar sae, tain biar daot taki firot aia duaro ṭuka dile-u, loge loge duar kulto fare.
12.37: Hou gulam oḳol-u ḳofali, zerare tarar munibe aia hozag faiba. Ami hasa ḳota ḳoiram, munibe aia hari tan nizor ḳomro gamsa bandia tarare ḳanit boaiba, ar nizor ate baṛia ḳaoaiba.
12.38: Tara-u boṛo ḳofali, zerare tarar munibe ada rait ba hesh raite aia ḍaḳ dile-u hozag faiba.
12.39: Mono rakio, sur kun shomoy aibo, giroste ikan zanle to he hozag roilo one, tar goro hing kaṭte dilo na one.
12.40: Tumra-o ola tiar roio, ḳaron ze oḳtor ḳota tumra sinta-u ḳortae nae, hou shomoy-u bin-Adome toshrif anba.”
12.41: Teu sahabi Fitore ḳoila, “Huzur, i nosiot ḳali amrar lagi, na hoḳol manshor lagi?”
12.42: Huzure zuaf dila, “Aḳoldar ar hok-halali ou zon ḳe, zar ato malike tan gulam-bandire deḳa-hunar bar diba, he oḳtor ḳalo tarar ḳani baṭia dibo?
12.43: Hou gulam-u ḳofali, zare tar munibe aia ou laḳan ḳam ḳorat deḳba.
12.44: Ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, hou munibe tare tan nizor hoḳol don-samana todarkir eḳtiar diba.
12.45: Oile dorilao, hou gulame mone mone ḳoilo, amar munib aite to bout deri ase, ar ou faḳe he hokkol bandi-gulamre mair-doir ḳorlo, ḳaia-daia furti koria, mod ḳaia ṭal oia foṛi roilo.
12.46: Bade ze din ar ze oḳtor ḳota he sinta-u ḳorto nae, hou din ar hou oḳto tar munib aia azir oiba. Tain tare eḳ sede dui ṭukra ḳoria naforman oḳlor ḳataro mishaiba.
12.47: “Ar ze gulame tar munibor morzire buzia-o tiar oise na, tan hukum mafik kam ḳorse na, tare bezuita mair mara oibo.
12.48: Oile na zania zudi he shaza faibar ḳam ḳorilae, te tar shaza ḳom oibo. Zare beshi deoa oise, tar ges tone beshi saoa oibo, ar zar gese beshi forimane toa oise, tar gese-u beshi dabi kora oibo.
12.49: “Ami to duniat aguin laganit aisi. Oḳon zudi i aguinḳan zolizito, te boṛo bala oilo one.
12.50: Ami to ek kas gusol ḳora-u lagbo. Te amar duk-koshṭor i gusol zotodin na oise, otodin amar fereshanir kunu shima nai.
12.51: Tumra mono ḳorrae ni, ami duniat shanti ditam aisi? Na, muṭe-u nae, ami koiram, ami to duniat eḳ motobed laganit aisi.
12.52: Oḳon taki ek goror faszon zarzir alog oizibo. Tinzon duizonor bifokke, ar duizon tinzonor bifokke lagbo.
12.53: Bafe fuar bifokke ar fua bafor bifokke. Ma fuṛir bifokke ar fuṛie maʼr bifokke. Hoṛi bour bifokke ar boue hoṛir bifokke lagbo.”
12.54: Bade Isae manshore ḳoila, “Tumra to foismedi kalni deḳle-u ḳo, meg aior. Ar hasau meg ae.
12.55: Hirbar dokkina batash salu oile tumra ḳo, ḳora oibo, ar ola-u oy.
12.56: O bonḍo oḳol! Tumra asman ar zominor surot buztae faro, te aḳeri zomanar hal-hokikot ḳene buzo na?
12.57: “Kunḳan ṭik, ita tumra nize nize-u bisar ḳoro na ḳene?
12.58: Kunu nalish loia hakimor samne zaibar age, bifokkor loge foto boia-u miṭ-maṭ ḳorar sesṭa ḳorio. Arnae he tumare doria hakimor samne nibo, hakime fulishor ato dibo, ar fulishe nia zelo haraibo.
12.59: Heshe shesh foyshaṭa adae na ḳora forzonto, kunumonte-u zel taki saṛa faitae nae, ita ami tumrare ḳoiram.”

13.1: Hozrot Isae boyan ḳorra, ou shomoy honor ḳoyzon manshe tanre ḳoila, “Huzur, Galil zilar kisu manshe Allar pak zagat gia foshu kurbani deoat asla, ou shomoy hakim Filate tarare hou pak zagat zane maria, tarar lou ar kurbanir lou eḳloge mishaisoin.”
13.2: Ikan hunia Isae ḳoila, “Ou kurbani deorar mout ola oae, tumra mono ḳorrae ni, Galilor oinno manush taki era beshi gunagar asil?
13.3: Ami tumrare ḳoiram, na, ila nae, oile tumra zudi guna taki touba na ḳoro, te tumra-o ola binash oibae.
13.4: Huno, Zeruzalemor Siloa elaḳar hou usa minara bangae ze aṭaro zon mara gesil, tarar befare kita mono ḳoro? Zeruzalemor baki manush taki era beshi gunagar ni?
13.5: Ami tumrare ḳoiram, na, ikan ṭik nae, oile tumra zudi guna taki touba na ḳoro, te tumra-o ola binash oibae.”
13.6: Bade tain ou kichcha hunaila, “Ek giroste tan bagano ḍumuror eḳṭa gas lagaila. Shomoy aile ein aia gaso fol tukaila, oile kunu fol faila na.
13.7: Na faia baganor malire ḳoila, huno, aiz tin bosor dori ou ḍumur gaso fol tukairam, oile kunta-u fairam na. Te tumi gasgu ḳaṭilao, igue ḳamoḳa zominor rosh ṭaner.
13.8: Malie ḳoilo, Sab, i bosorḳano taḳouk. Ami ogur sairo galar maṭi kuṛia shar dimu.
13.9: Samnor bosor zudi fol dorilae, te to bala, naile ḳaṭilimu.” Zummabare keramoti
13.10: Eḳ Zummabare Isa mosidor bitre nosiot ḳorat asla.
13.11: Hono eḳ beṭi manush asil, i beṭir ufre aṭaro bosor dori atoshi-deoe asor ḳorsil. Deoe beṭire guza banailisil, beṭi shida oia ubaito farto na.
13.12: Isae beṭire ḍaḳdi kandat ania ḳoila, “Mai go, tumi oḳon i bemar taki rehai faiso.”
13.13: Oḳan ḳoia-u tain beṭire atai dila. Loge loge-u beṭi shida oia ubailo, ar Allar shukur-guzar ḳorlo.
13.14: Oile Zummar din tain i beṭire bala ḳorae, mosidor motollie gusa ḳoria ḳoila, “Ḳam ḳorar lagi to baki soydin-u ato ase. Tumra Zummar din na aia oinno zekunu din aia bala oio.”
13.15: Teu Isae hi motollire ḳoila, “O bonḍo oḳol! Zummar din afnarar goru-gadare gualar bare nia fani kabain na ni?
13.16: Aiz aṭaro bosor dori Ibrahimor ou aoladre Shoytane bandia raḳsil. Oḳon Zummabare i beṭire azad ḳora zaiz oise na ni?”
13.17: Ikan hunia zera tan bifokke asil tara hoḳole-u shorminda oilo. Oile baki musolli oḳole tan hoḳol keramoti dekia kushi oila. Ḍenga bisi ar ḳamiror kichcha
13.18: Bade Isae ḳoila, “Allar bashshaire ami kitar loge tulona ḳortam?
13.19: Mono ḳoroukka, Allar bashshai oilogi egu ḍenga bisir laḳan, kunu giroste tar zomino nia ou bisi bain dilo, bade iṭa boṛo oia gas oigelo, ar fakinte aia gasor ḍalo bada banailo.”
13.20: Tain hirbar ḳoila, “Allar bashshair tulona ami kitar loge ḳortam?
13.21: Doroukka, Allar bashshai oilogi kamiror laḳan, kunu eḳ beṭie tuṛa ḳamir nia eḳ mon moydar loge makilo, ar ḳamiror fafe hoḳol moyda fulia uṭilo.” Nazator befare talim
13.22: Hozrot Isae aṭi aṭi gaue gaue ar ṭaune ṭaune gia toblig koria Zeruzalemor bae aguaila.
13.23: Ermaze eḳzon manshe tane zikailo, “Huzur, zera nazat faiba, era forimane kub ḳom ni?” Ou Isae manshore ḳoila,
13.24: “Sifa duaredi hamanir lagi dile-zane fikir ḳoro. Huno, ami tumrare ḳoiram, bout zon ino hamaite saile-o, hamaito farto nae.
13.25: Goror malike zebla duar bond ḳoriliba, tumra bare ubaia duaro ṭukaite ṭukaite ḳoibae, ‘Huzur, amrare duarḳan kulia deukka.’ Oile tain zuaf diba, ‘Tumra kuai taki aiso, ami to sini-u na.’
13.26: Teu tumra ḳoibae, ‘Amra afnar loge ḳaisi-boisi, afne to amrar foto-gaṭo aia amrare nosiot ḳorta.’
13.27: Oile tain ḳoiba, ‘Haere naforman oḳol, amar ges taki bago. Tumra kuai taki aiso, ami to sini-u na.’
13.28: “Tumra deḳbae Ibrahim, Isʼhak, Iakub ar tamam nobi oḳol Allar bashshait dakil oisoin, oile tumrare horaia falani oise. Tumrar maze ḳeu ḳanda-ḳaṭi korbae ar ḳeu dat kiṛimiṛi kaibae.
13.29: Aro deḳbae, duniar sairobae taki manush aia Allar bashshait dakil oia ḳana-dana ḳaira.
13.30: Te zera oḳon ḳoror ḳataro ase, tara ḳeu ḳeu age aibo, oile oḳon zera agor ḳataro ase tara ḳeu ḳeu ḳore zaibogi.” Zeruzalemor lagi afsus
13.31: Tain ota matira, ermaze aḳta-u Forishi dolor ḳoyzon aia Isare ḳoila, “Afne in taki horia zaingi, ḳaron Raza Herude afnare marilita saira.”
13.32: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Afnara gia hou hialor saore ḳoukka, aiz ar ḳail ami zinnat saṛaimu, bemari oḳlor shifa ḳormu, foru din amar ḳam shesh oibo.
13.33: Te zela-u ouk, aiz, ḳail ar foru, ou tin din amar sola-u lagbo. Ami to zani-u, Zeruzalemor bare kunu nobire zane mara oy na.
13.34: “Zeruzalem! Haere Zeruzalem! Tumi nobi oḳolre zane maro. Tumar gese zarare beza oise, tumi tarare fattor marso. Murgie zela tair saore ḍaḳnar tole asroy dey, ami oula tumar manshore asroy ditam saisi, oile tumi razi oilae na.
13.35: Te huno, tumar baṛi kali-baṛi oibo. Ami tumrare ḳoiram, zotodin tumra na ḳoibae, Allar nam loia zein aira tain-u mubarok, otodin tumra ar amare deḳtae nae.”

14.1: Hozrot Isa Forishi dolor eḳ murobbir baṛit kunu eḳ Zummabare daoto gela, gia harle tara tan bae kub bala ḳori souk raḳlo.
14.2: Aḳta-u tan samne eḳ bemari beṭa ailo, tar asta shoril bemare fuligesil.
14.3: Teu Isae honor alim ar Forishi oḳolre zikaila, “Musa nobir shoriot mafik Zummabare kunu manshor bemar shifa ḳora zaiz ni?”
14.4: Ikan hunia tara hoḳol nirai roila, ar Isae hi bemarire shifa ḳoria bidae dilaila.
14.5: Bade tarare ḳoila, “Tumrar maze ila kunu zon ase ni, zar kunu hurutta ba goru-sagol zummar din fanit foṛigele, he igure fani taki tule na?”
14.6: Ikan hunia tara kunu zuaf dita farla na.
14.7: Ar ze meman oḳol daoto aisoin, tara hoḳole bala bala zaga tukai boira dekia, Isae tarare ou talim dila,
14.8: “Kunu manshe tumare biar daot dile, tumi mozliso hamaia dami zagat boa ṭik nae. Ḳaron malike kiban tumar taki aro ijjoti keurore daot disoin.
14.9: Te oile zein tumare daot disoin tain aia ḳoiba, ou siṭ taki uṭia amar dami memanre boibar dein. Teu tumi shorminda oia emne-u hoḳol taki nisa zagat gia boibae.
14.10: Erdae tumi kunu daoto gele foyla nisa zagat gia boio. Teu zar baṛit daoto geso tain aia ḳoiba, baisab, ino ḳene boisoin, bala zagat toshrif anoukka. Ete aro meman oḳlor samne tumar ijjot baṛbo.
14.11: Ashole ze nizore boṛo mono ḳore, tare huru ḳora oibo. Ar ze nizore huru mono ḳore, tare boṛo ḳora oibo.”
14.12: Ze moulanae Hozrot Isare daot disla, Isae enre ḳoila, “Dinor ba raitkur ḳanir lagi tumi kunu onusṭan ḳorle, tumar bondu-bandob, bai-birador, ḳesh-kuṭum, ar daro ḳasor doni manshore daot dio na. Tarare ḳaoaile bade tara-o tumare ḳaoaia bodla dilaiba.
14.13: Erlagi tumi kunu memandari korte saile, ḳali gorib manush, atur, anda, lula-lengṛare daot dio.
14.14: Era to firia tumare ḳaoaito farto nae. Ete kiamotor din tumi forezgar oḳlor loge itar bodla faibae.”
14.15: Ita hunia hou ḳanir mozlisor eḳzone ḳoila, “Mubarok hou bonda, zein Allar bashshait boia ḳana-fina ḳaiba.”
14.16: Teu Isae ḳoila, “Kunu eḳzon manshe kub boṛo eḳ mezbani koria, bout manshore daot dila.
14.17: Ḳaoar shomoy oile tan gulamredi koaila, ‘Afnara aioukka, ḳana tiar oigese.’
14.18: Oile hoḳol daotie eḳ eḳṭa uzor deḳailo. Foyla zone ḳoilo, ‘Ami tuṛa zomin ḳorid ḳorsi, oḳon deḳat zaitam, te hono na gele oito nae, erlagi amare maf ḳoroukka.’
14.19: Dusra zone ḳoilo, ‘Ami alor lagi fas zuṛa bisal loisi. Oḳon gia deḳtam, itae al bain ki na, amare maf ḳoroukka.’
14.20: Aroḳzone ḳoilo, ‘Ami to noya bia ḳorsi. Oḳon zaitam fartam nae.’
14.21: Hi gulame aia tar malikre hoḳolta zanailo. Ita hunia malike gusa ḳoria ḳoila, ‘Tui zoldi kori ṭaunor ollie-gollie za, gia gorib, atur, anda, lula-lengṛare angi.’
14.22: Teu he ola ḳoria hari bade aia ḳoilo, ‘Huzur, afnar hukume hoḳolta ḳora oise, oile oḳono zaga ḳali roise.’
14.23: Ou tain ḳoila, ‘Te ṭaunor bare foto-gaṭo, ar sifae-safae za, gia minot-ḳajji kori manshore an. Manush aia mozlis bori zaukka.
14.24: Ar tumra kial ḳori huno, age zetare daot dislam, ita kunugie zanu amar ḳani na fain.’ ” al-Mosir ummot oar shorto
14.25: Bade Hozrot Isar loge oia bout manush aṭat asla. Ou shomoy tain erar bae saia ḳoila,
14.26: “Ḳeu zudi amar torikat aito sae, te tar nizor ma-baf, bou-baichcha, bai-birador, ar nizor zanre-o amar taki huru mone ḳorte oibo. Arnae he amar ummot oito farto nae.
14.27: Ze manshe nizor duk-koshṭor solib ḳando loia amar ḳore ḳore roy na, he amar ummot oito fare na.
14.28: “Tumrar ḳeu zudi usa kunu dolan banaito sae, te he foyla tar ḳorosor hishab milaia deḳe, dolanor ḳam shesh ḳorar lagi tar ṭeḳa ase ki na.
14.29: Na oile, ian dia hari kam shesh ḳorte na farle, manshe ṭaṭṭa ḳorba,
14.30: tara ḳoiba, beṭae dolan tulia oḳon shesh ḳorto farer na.
14.31: “Ar zudi eḳ raza aroḳ razar bifokke zuddo ḳorat lagoin, te foyla boia foramish ḳorba, tain ḳoiba, bish azar fouz loia zera amar bifokke aira, ami dosh azar fouz loia er mukabila ḳortam farmu ni?
14.32: Zudi na faroin, te hamla ḳorra raza duroi taḳte-u afushor lagi koyzon tiait faṭaiba.
14.33: Ṭik oula, tumrar maze ḳeu zudi tar hokkoltar maya saṛto na fare, te he amar ummot oito farto nae.
14.34: “Nun to bala zinish, oile nunor zudi shad nosṭo oizae, te ar nunta ḳora zae ni?
14.35: Itadi shar-o banail zae na, zomino deoa zae na, erlagi manshe ita bare falai dein. Hunar moto ḳan zar ase, he hunouk.”

15.1: Hozrot Isar boyan hunar lagi bout gushkur ḳazna tulra ar be-shorioti am manush tan gese dola oila.
15.2: Ita dekia Forishi dolor manshe ar moulana oḳole ḳana-ḳani kori koila, “I manushgu ḳali naforman oḳlor loge uṭa-boa ar ḳana-fina ḳae.”
15.3: Teu Isae tarare ou kichchain hunaila. Tain ḳoila,
15.4: “Mono ḳoroukka, afnara kunu eḳzonor eḳ-shoṭa meṛa ase. Ermazor egu meṛa arai gele, he baki nirannobboiṭa bondo toia hou arail ogu tukanit zae na ni?
15.5: Gia ogu tukaia faile, kushie iṭare ḳando ḳori ane.
15.6: Bade baṛit gia bondu-bandob ar ari-forire ḳoy, ‘Ao, amar loge furti koro. Amar arail meṛagu tukaia failisi.’
15.7: Ami afnarare ḳoiram, ekkere ou laḳan-u, zara guna taki touba ḳorar zorur mono ḳore na, ila nirannobboi zon forezgar taki eḳzon gunagare mon bodlaia touba ḳorle, behesto aro beshi kushi-bashi oy. Arail ṭeḳar kichcha
15.8: “Ba doroukka, kunu eḳ beṭir gese rufar doshṭa ṭeḳa asil. Er taki egu ṭeḳa zudi araizae, te beṭie hi ṭeḳar lagi lem zalaia huruindi huria asta gor tukae na ni?
15.9: Bade tukaia failile bondu-bandob ar ari-forire ḍakia ḳoy, ‘Ao na, amar loge kushit shamil o. Amar arail ṭeḳagu tukaia failisi.’
15.10: Ami afnarare ḳoiram, ekkere ou laḳan-u, eḳzon gunagar manshe mon bodlaia touba ḳorle, Allar firista oḳole oula kushi koroin.” Arail fuar kichcha
15.11: Bade Isae ḳoila, “Ek girostor dui fua asil.
15.12: Eḳdin huru fuae tar bafre ḳoilo, baba, ami babaiti zomi-zoma ar don-samana zeta faitam, amar ou baṭḳan oḳon-u algaia dilaukka. Ou bafe tan samana duio fuar name baṭia dilaila.
15.13: Er ḳoydin bade huru fuae tar hokkol samana besia bidesh gelogi. Bidesh gia bad fote solia tar ṭeḳa-foysha hokkolta kuaililo.
15.14: Hoḳolta kuaia harle hou deshor hoḳol zagat kub nidan deḳa dilo erdae he kub ḳoshṭot foṛlo.
15.15: He hou deshor ek girostor baṛit gia saḳri sailo. Malike tare saḳri dia shuoror fal raḳar lagi bondo faṭailo.
15.16: Bondo gia shuore zeta ḳae, he-o ota ḳaia feṭor buk miṭaito sailo, oile ota-o ḳeu tare dito na.
15.17: “Bade aḳta eḳdin tar hush oilo. He mone mone ḳoilo, amar babar baṛit to bout saḳor-baḳore feṭ bori bat ḳaira. Te ami ono ufashe morram ḳene?
15.18: Ami gia amar babare ḳoimu, Baba, ami to Allar gese ar tumar gese-o naforman bonigesi.
15.19: Tumar fua ḳoia ami ar forisoy dibar laḳ nae. Ḳali tumar saḳoror laḳan amare eḳzora asroy deo.
15.20: Oḳan ḳoia he tar baṛit roana dilailo. Baṛir ḳandat aite-u tar bafe tare dekilila. Dekia tan dil goli gelo. Tain douṛia gia tare ainja ḳori doria hunga dila.
15.21: Teu fuae ḳoilo, ‘Baba, ami to tumar fua ḳoia forisoy dibar laḳ roisi na. Ami Allar gese ar tumar gese-o naforman bonigesi.’
15.22: Oile bafe loge loge ḳamlaintore ḳoila, ‘Hoi, zoldi kori gor taki bala zubbaṭa ania amar fuagure findao. Tar ato angṭi ar faot zuta findai deo.
15.23: Ar huno, falo taki taza ḍeḳa-basurgu ania zobo ḳoro. Ao, amra hoḳole milia kushi-bashi kori kana ḳai.
15.24: Amar i fuagu to morigesil, oḳon hirbar zinda oise. Ogu nai oigesil, oḳon firot faisi.’ Teu hoḳole milia kushi-bashit lagla.
15.25: “Ou shomoy beṭar boṛo fua bondo asil. He baṛir ḳandat aia nas-gan ar ḍul-ḍofkir aoaz hunia,
15.26: tarar eḳ saḳorre zikailo, ‘Kitare, ita kita or?’
15.27: Saḳore ḳoilo, ‘Sab, afnar huru bai baṛit aisoin. Afnar abbae tanre sohi-salamote faia, taza ou ḍeḳa-basur zobo ḳorsoin.’
15.28: Ikan hunia boṛo fuae gusa ḳoria baṛir bitre aito sailo na. Teu tar baf bar oia aia tare minot-ḳajji korla.
15.29: He tar bafre ḳoilo, ‘Deḳoukka, ami otodin doria afnar kezmot ḳorram, kunudin-u afnar hukum ulṭaisi na. Oile amar bondu-bandob loia kushi korar lagi egu bokrir baichcha-o kunudin disoin na.
15.30: Ar afnar ze fuae noṭi beṭintor tole hoḳol samana kuaise, he aite-u taza ḍeḳa-basurgu ania zobo ḳorilaila!’
15.31: Bafe ḳoila, ‘Futre, tumi to hamesha-u amar loge aso. Amar zeta samana roise, ita hokkolta-u to tumar.
15.32: Oḳon amra hoḳole dil saf ḳoria kushi-bashi kora zorur. Tumar i bai to mori-u gesil, oḳon hirbar zinda oise. Ogu ekkere nai oigesil, oḳon firot faisi.’ ”

16.1: Bade Hozrot Isae tan shagrid oḳolre ḳoila, “Huno, kunu eḳ zomidaror eḳ menezar asil. Ou menezaror bodnam bar oilo, he bule tar munibor don-samana binash ḳorilar.
16.2: Bodnam hunia munibe tare anaia ḳoila, ‘Tumar name ita kita hunram? Tumar hishab-nikash hoḳolta shomzai deo. Tumare ar saḳrit raḳtam nae.’
16.3: Ikan hunia menezare mone mone ḳoilo, ‘Oḳon ami kita ḳortam? Munibe to amare bidae dilaira. Ami to maṭi kam-o ḳortam fartam nae, bik korte-o shorom lage. Oḳon ḳaimu kila?
16.4: Aichcha, ek kam ḳori, zate amar menezari gelegi-o manshor goro asroy fai.’
16.5: Ou he kita ḳorlo, zarar gese tar munibor faona asil, eḳ ek kori erare anailo. Anaia foyla zonre ḳoilo, ‘Tumar gese amar munibor ḳoto faona ase?’
16.6: Hein ḳoila, ‘Eḳ-sho mon tel.’ Menezare ḳoilo, ‘Zoldi kori tumar ḳata bar ḳoro, ar eḳ-shor bodla foinchash mon lekilao.’
16.7: Bade menezare dusra zonre zikailo, ‘Tumar gese ḳoto fain?’ Hein ḳoila, ‘Eḳ-sho furar gom.’ Menezare ḳoilo, ‘Tumar hishabo ashi furar lekilao.’
16.8: Ita hunia hi zomidare ou beiman menezaror tarif ḳorla. Tain ḳoila, ‘He dandabaz oile-o bout boṛo buddimanor ḳam ḳorse.’ Te kita mono ḳoro, itae buza zae na ni, Allaraia manshor aḳol taki-o, i zomanar duniabi manshor fes-faichcha beshi.
16.9: Huno, ami kita ḳoiram, tumra-o naforman ou zogotor samana dia manshor loge dusti fatao, zate i samana fuṛaigele-o tumrare behestor bagano fulor mala deoa oy.
16.10: “Ze manush shamainno befare hok-halal roy, he boṛo befare-o hok-halal roy. Oile ze zone shamainno befare beimani kore, he boṛo befare-o beimani kore.
16.11: Te tumra zudi duniabi don-samanar befare hok na ro, taile ḳe tumrare bishash ḳoria asol don dibo?
16.12: Foror samana zudi tumra ṭik-ṭak moto bebohar ḳortae na faro, te ḳe tumrar nizor samana tumrar ato dibo?
16.13: Kunu gulame eḳloge dui munibor gulami korto fare na. Te oile he eḳzonre ingshaibo, aroḳzonre maya ḳorbo. Eḳzonre ijjot dibo ar aroḳzonre elami korbo. Tumra-o oula, Allatala ar don-samana duiotar gulami eḳloge ḳortae fartae nae.”
16.14: Ikan hunia Forishi mozobor manshe Isare loia ḍong-tamsha lagaila, tara to ṭeḳa-foyshare kub maya ḳorta.
16.15: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Tumra-u to manshor samne nizor forezgari deḳao, oile Allae tumrar dilor ḳobor zanoin. Manshor gese zeta kub dami, Allae itare ginnain.
16.16: Huno, Ehia nobir shomoy forzonto Musar shoriot, ar nobi oḳlor sohifa zari asil. Oile oḳon Allar bashshair kush-ḳobri toblig kora or, ar manshe-o dile-zane ono dakil oita saira.
16.17: I shoriotor eḳṭa horof batil oar saite, asman-zomin binash oaḳan bout shuza.
16.18: Te huno, ze beṭae nizor boure talaḳ dia aroḳ beṭire hanga ḳore, he zinakur. Oula talaḳ faoa kunu beṭire zegie bia ḳore, he-o zinakur.” Lasar hokir ar eḳ doni manush
16.19: “Eḳ doni beṭa asil, he raza-bashsha oḳlor laḳan dami dami kafoṛ-sufoṛ finto, ar hamesha zak-zomok koria furti-amud ḳorto.
16.20: Manshe Lasar namor eḳ hokir beṭare hamesha ou donir duaror samne boaia toita, tar asta gotro fosa-ga asil,
16.21: ar fotor kuttainte aia tar ga zifradi leita. Ou donie bat ḳaia hari aḍḍi-guḍḍi guṛa-gaṛa zeta tole falaita, ota ḳaoar lagi tar kub ichcha asil.
16.22: Eḳdin ou hokir beṭa morigelo, morar bade Allar firista oḳole tare Ibrahim nobir kulo nia boaila. Ermaze hou doni beṭa-o morigelo, tare dafon ḳora oilo.
16.23: Bade he duzoḳor azab taki aḳta ufredi saia deḳlo, duroi behestor maze Ibrahim nobi boi roisoin, tan kulo hou Lasar.
16.24: Dekia-u he sillaia ḳoilo, ‘Baba Ibrahim! Amare rohom ḳoroukka. Lasarre amar gese faṭaukka, he tar angulir agaḳan fanit buṛaia amar zifrare ṭanḍa ḳorouk. Duzoḳor i agunit amar boṛo azab or.’
16.25: Ibrahime ḳoila, ‘Babare, mono ḳoria deḳo, tumar shuk tumi duniat-u ḳamailiso, ar Lasare bout ḳoshṭo ḳorse. Oḳon ino aia he arame ase, ar tumi azabo aso.
16.26: Huno, ita saṛa-o tumrar ar amrar maze oḳon bout boṛo faḳ raḳa oise. Inor ḳeu ichcha ḳorle-o tumrar gese zaito farto nae, ar tumra-o ḳeu ichcha ḳorle ino aitae fartae nae.’
16.27: Ou hi doni beṭae ḳoilo, ‘Baba, te doya ḳori Lasarre amar babar baṛikano faṭaukka.
16.28: Hono amar aro fasgu bai roisoin. He gia amar baiainre hushiar ḳorouk, tara zanu i duzoḳor azab taki basoin.’
16.29: Ibrahime zuaf dila, ‘Tarar gese to Hozrot Musa ar nobi oḳlor usillae bout kitab beza oise, tara ou talim hunouk.’
16.30: Hou donie ḳoilo, ‘Na, na, baba Ibrahim! Murda taki keu zinda oia tarar gese gele-u, tara touba ḳorba.’
16.31: Ibrahime ḳoila, ‘Tara zudi Hozrot Musa ar nobi oḳlor ḳota na hune, te murda taki zinda oia gele-o tara manto nae.’ ”

17.1: Hozrot Isae tan shagrid oḳolre ḳoila, “Gunar fote neoar lagi uskani aibo-u aibo. Oile lannot hou zonor ufre, zegie guna ḳorar lagi uskani dey.
17.2: Ou bebuz oḳlor eḳzonre-o zegie gunar fote ṭania ney, ogur lagi aro bala oilo one, ogur golat fattor bandia doriat falai deoa.
17.3: Tumra-o zarzir befare hushiar roio. Tumar kunu baie tumar gese dush ḳorle tare buzaio. He dil bodlaia maf saile tare mafi dio.
17.4: He dinor maze shatbar dush ḳoria, shatbar aia tumar gese maf saile, tare maf ḳori dio.”
17.5: Sahabi oḳole Hozrot Isar gese abdar ḳorla, “Huzur, amrar imani bol baṛai deukka.”
17.6: Tain ḳoila, “Tumrar dilo zudi egu ḍengar bisir foriman iman taḳe, ar tumra ou heora gasre ḳo, zoṛ shudda huria gia doriat gaṛizao, te he tumrar ḳota hunbo.
17.7: “Tumrar maze ila kunu girost ase ni, zar ḳamlae al baia ba goru rakia bondo taki baṛit aite-u, he tar ḳamlare ḳoy, tumi zoldi aia ḳana ḳao?
17.8: Na, ḳeu ila ḳoy na. Borong oula ḳoy, oba, tui amar ḳana zuit ḳor. Ami zoto shomoy ḳana ḳai, tui ono ubaia balamonte amare batash de. Bade tui kais.
17.9: Ar hou gulame tan hukum manche ḳori tain tare kunu doinnobad dein ni? Nisoy na.
17.10: Ou laḳan tumra-o hoḳol hukum-ahkam adae ḳorle-o ḳoio, Malik, amra to tumar na-layek gulam. Amra zeta ḳam ḳora zorur asil, ḳali ota-u kunu roḳome adae ḳorsi.” Doshzon fosa-kusṭo bemarire shifa ḳora
17.11: Hozrot Isa Zeruzalem ṭauno zaoar bala Shomoria ar Galil zilar mazedi aṭia zaira.
17.12: Ou shomoy ek gaut hamanir fotor muko doshzon fosa-kusṭo bemarie tanre deḳat aila. Tara duroi ubaia zure zure ḳoila,
17.14: Tarare dekia tain ḳoila, “Zao, imam sab oḳolre gia tumrar halot deḳao.” Fotedi zaite zaite tara hoḳlor bemar ḳomigelo.
17.15: Tarar maze eḳzone zebla deḳlo, he bala oigese, dekia-u zure zure Allar tarif ḳori kori he firia ailo.
17.16: Aia Isar faot foṛia tanre shukria zanailo. He oilo Shomoria zatir manush.
17.17: Teu Isae ḳoila, “Dosho zonre-u kunu bala ḳora oise na ni? Te baki noyzon kuai?
17.18: Allar tarif ḳorar lagi ou bideshi beṭa saṛa ar ḳeu firia ailo na ni?”
17.19: Bade Isae tare ḳoila, “Bai, tumar imanor bole-u tumi bala oiso. Oḳon sohi-salamote zao.” Kiamotor alamot
17.20: Forishi mozobor ḳoyzon aia Hozrot Isare zikaila, Allae kun shomoy tan bashshai salu ḳorba. Tain ḳoila, “Allar bashshai to ḳeurore zanai-hunai ae na.
17.21: Ḳeu ḳoar shaiddo nai, Allar bashshai ono ba hono deḳsi. Hunoukka, Allar bashshai to oḳon-u afnarar maze salu ase.”
17.22: Bade tan shagrid oḳolre ḳoila, “Omon eḳ shomoy aibo, zebla tumra ami bin-Adomor ekkan din deḳtae saibae, oile fartae nae.
17.23: Manshe tumrare ḳoiba, ono deḳo, hono deḳo. Oile tumra tarar ḳotae douṛio na, kunuḳano zaio na.
17.24: Huno, megor zilkir loge asmanor eḳ mata taki aroḳ mata zebla for oy, ou shomoy to hoḳole deḳe. Te ami bin-Adom zebla aimu hou shomoy-o ola hoḳole deḳbo.
17.25: Oile-o foyla i zomanar manshor ato ami bout ḳoshṭo faitam oibo, tara amare dur dur ḳorba.
17.26: “Zela Nuh nobir amolo oisil, ami bin-Adomor zomanat-o ola oibo.
17.27: Nuh nobi zazo uṭar ag forzonto manshe ḳana-fina, bia-shadi ar gor-shongshar ḳorta, Nuh nobir boinna aia itare nifat ḳorlo.
17.28: Oula Lut nobir amolo-o manshe ḳana-fina, ḳorid-biki, ḳet-girosti ar baṛi-gor bananit besto asla.
17.29: Oile Lut nobi zedin Sadum ṭaun saṛia bidae oigela, hou din-u asman taki aguin ar gondoḳor gozob lamia ita hokkolṭire nifat ḳorlo.
17.30: Ṭik oula, ami bin-Adom zedin zaira oimu, houdin-o ola aḳta aibo.
17.31: “Hidin ḳeu zudi goror salor ufre taḳe, te tar goror mal-samana nibar lagi, lamat lamia goror bitre na hamauk. Ou laḳan ḳeu zudi bondo taḳe, he-o ar baṛit na auk.
17.32: Lut nobir bibir goṭona iad ḳoro.
17.33: Mono rakio, ze zone zan basaito sae, he nizor zindegi kuaibo, oile ze zone zan shofia dey, he zindegi faibo.
17.34: Hi rait eḳoi bisnat duizon hutile-o, eḳzonre neoa oibo, dusra zon bad foṛizibo.
17.35: -36 Dui beṭie eḳloge bara-banat taḳle-o, erar eḳzonre neoa oibo, aroḳzon bad foṛizibo.”
17.37: Sahabi oḳole ḳoila, “Huzur, ita kuai oibo?” Tain zuaf dila, “Mora lash zeḳano, hokun-o hono dola oy.”

18.1: Munazator befare shagrid oḳol nirash na oia hamesha zate munazat ḳoroin, oḳan buzanir lagi Isae ek kichcha hunaila.
18.2: Ḳoila, “Kunu eḳ ṭauno eḳzon hakim asla. Ein Allare-o ḍoraita na, kunu manshore-o toakka ḳorta na.
18.3: Hou ṭauno eḳ ṛaṛi beṭi asil. Ou beṭie aia hamesha tanre ḳoito, ‘Hakim sab, amare dushmonor at taki basaukka, doya ḳori ou niajjo bisarḳan ḳoroukka.’
18.4: I hakime ḳoydin kunta ḳoila na. Bade mone mone ḳoila, ‘Ami to Allare ḍorai na, manshore-o toakka ḳori na,
18.5: oile i ṛaṛie aia to hamesha satae, oḳon ogur niajjo bisarḳan ḳorilai. Naile tai aia bar bar sataibo.’ ”
18.6: Bade huzure ḳoila, “Deḳlae ni, ou naforman hakime kita ḳorse?
18.7: Te zera hamesha dine-raite Allar gese ḳande, Allae kita tan i mayar bonda oḳlor hok foriad hunta nae ni? Tain hunte kunu ar deri korba ni?
18.8: Ami koiram, tain zoldi kori-u erar hok foriad hunba. Oile ami bin-Adom dusrabar zebla i duniat aimu, hou shomoy duniat kunu iman faimu ni?” Forishi ar ḳazna tulrar dua
18.9: Zeta manshe nizore kub forezgar, ar bad-baki hoḳol manshore huru mono ḳorto, Hozrot Isae tarare ou kichcha hunaila.
18.10: Ḳoila, “Duizon manush dua ḳorar lagi Baytul-Mukaddoso gelo. Erar eḳzon Forishi dolor ar dusra zon gushkur ḳazna tulra.
18.11: Forishi beṭae alga ubaia oula dua ḳorlo, ‘O Alla, ami tumar shukria adae ḳorram, ami to shomazor manshor laḳan naforman, zalim, ar zinakur nae, ba ou gushkur ḳazna tulrar laḳan-o nae.
18.12: Ami haftat duidin ruza raki, ar amar hokkol ruzir dosh baṭor eḳ baṭ tumar name zoḳat dei.’
18.13: Oile ou ḳazna tulra beṭae duroi ubai roilo, Allar arshor bae souk tular shaosh-o tar oilo na. He bukut mari mari kandi kandi koilo, ‘O Alla, ami boṛo gunagar, amare rohom ḳoro.’
18.14: “Ami tumrare ḳoiram, ou ḳazna tulra beṭa-u forezgar bonia tar goro gelo, hi Forishi nae. Ashole ze nizore boṛo mono ḳore, tare huru ḳora oibo. Ar ze nizore huru mono ḳore, tare boṛo ḳora oibo.” Huruttaintor laḳan bonizao
18.15: Manshe tarar huru huruttainre loia Isar gese ailo, tain zanu huruttainre atai dia dua ḳoroin. Ita dekia sahabi oḳole manshor ufre biroḳto oia na ḳorla.
18.16: Oile Isae huruttainre tan ḳandat nila, nia ḳoila, “Huruttainre amar ḳandat aibar deo, tarare bada dio na. Allar bashshai to ou nomunar manshor lagi-u.
18.17: Ami hok kota ḳoiar, huru hurutta bonia Allar shashon na manle, kunu zon-u Allar bashshait hamaito farto nae.” Hozrot Isar gese eḳ doni
18.18: Hozrot Isar gese fainchaitor eḳ murobbi aila, aia ḳoila, “O hok ustad, amare batai deukka, kita ḳorle ami aḳer faimu?”
18.19: Isae ḳoila, “Amare ḳene hok koira? Ḳali eḳ Alla bade ar ḳeu hok nae.
18.20: Afne to shoriotor hukum-ahkam zanoin, Zina ḳorio na. Kun ḳorio na. Suri korio na. Misa kunu shakki dio na. Tumar ma-bafre ijjot ḳorio.”
18.21: Hi murobbie ḳoila, “Huzur, i hokkolta to huruman tone-u adae ḳorram.”
18.22: Ikan hunia Isae ḳoila, “Oḳon ḳali ekkan ḳam baki ase, afnar hoḳol don-samana besia gorib oḳolre lilla dilaukka. Teu afne behesto don faiba. Bade aia amar ummot oukka.”
18.23: Ikan hunia hi murobbi kub bezar oigela, tain ashole bout boṛo doni asla.
18.24: Tain bezar oigesoin dekia Isae ḳoila, “Doni manush Allar bashshait hamani boṛo moshkil.
18.25: Doni manush Allar bashshait hamanir saite, suir naʼ baedi uṭ hamani aro shuza.”
18.26: Ikan zara hunla, tara aroz ḳorla, “Te ar ḳegie rehai faibo?”
18.27: Tain ḳoila, “Manshor gese zeta oshombob, Allar gese to ita shombob.”
18.28: Ou shomoy Fitore ḳoila, “Huzur, amra to hoḳolta falai toia afnar ummot oisi.”
18.29: Teu Isae sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, Allar bashshair lagi zera nizor baṛi-gor, ma-baf, bou, fua-fuṛi, bai-birador falaia aise,
18.30: tara ou duniat-u er bout beshi faiba, ar bador zindegit aḳer-o faiba.” Hozrot Isar moutor tin nombor agam ḳobor
18.31: Bade Isae tan barozon sahabire daro boaila. Boaia ḳoila, “Huno, amra oḳon Zeruzalemo zairam, te ami bin-Adomor befare nobi oḳole zotota lekia gesoin, ita oḳon fura oibo.
18.32: Amare bidormi zatir ato shofi deoa oibo. Manshe loia ḍong-tamsha ḳorba, beijjot ḳorba, ar tutu ḳori muko sef diba.
18.33: Amare sabuk marba bade zane marba. Moutor tin dinor din ami hirbar zinda oia uṭmu.”
18.34: Oile tan sahabi oḳole ou mator kunu bed buzla na. Tain kita ḳoira tara shomzita farla na, ḳaron tarar gese gufon raḳa oisil. Anda hokirre bala ḳora
18.35: Isa zebla Ziriho ṭaunor ḳandat aila, ou shomoy eḳ anda beṭae fotor ḳandat boia bik korat asil.
18.36: Aḳta-u bout manshor faor tali hunia beṭae zikailo, “Kita ba, kita or?”
18.37: Manshe ḳoila, “Nasarotor Isae ou fotedi toshrif nira.”
18.38: Ou he sillaia uṭlo, “O Daudor aolad Isa, amare doya ḳoroukka.”
18.39: Sillani hunia biṛor samnor ḳataror manshe tare domoḳ dila, “Chup ḳoro, nirai ro.” Oile he aro zure sillaia ḳoilo, “O Daudor aolad, amare rohom ḳoroukka.”
18.40: Teu Isa ubai gela. Ubaia anda beṭare tan ḳandat anaila. Beṭa daro aia harle tain zikaila,
18.41: “Kita ba, tumare kita ḳortam?” Beṭae ḳoilo, “Huzur, ami kali souke deḳtam sai.”
18.42: Isae tare ḳoila, “Aichcha te deḳo. Tumar imanor bole-u tumi bala oilae.”
18.43: Loge loge-u beṭar souk kuligelo, deḳar shokti failo. Beṭae Allar shukria adae ḳori kori tan ḳore oia roana dilailo. Ita dekia hoḳol manshe Allar tarif ḳorla.

19.1: Hozrot Isa Ziriho ṭaunor mazedi aṭia zaira,
19.2: hono Zakir namor boṛo eḳ doni manush asla. Ein oila ḳazna tulra oḳlor fordan.
19.3: Isare deḳar lagi tan kub ḳaish asil, oile tain baṭṭi manush, erdae oto biṛor maze deḳar ufae oilo na.
19.4: Ou douṛia agedi gela, gia Isa ze fotedi aira ou fotor ḳandar eḳ ḍumur gaso uṭla.
19.5: Isa zebla hou ḍumur gasor tole aila, tain ufredi saia Zakirre ḍaḳ dila, “Zakir, zoldi lamia ao. Ami aiz tumar baṛit roite oibo.”
19.6: Zakir loge loge-u lamia aila. Tain kushi oia Isare tazim ḳoria tan baṛit nila.
19.7: Ita dekia hoḳole ḳana-ḳani kori koila, “Tain ḳene eḳ naforman beṭar baṛit rait ḳaṭanit gela?”
19.8: Zakire hoḳlor samne ubaia ḳoila, “Huzur deḳoukka, ami oḳon-u amar don-samanar ordek goribre lilla dilairam. Ar zerar hok ṭogia anchi, tarare sair otoḳan firot dilaimu.”
19.9: Teu Isae ḳoila, “Aiz taki i baṛit nazat aise. Ein-o to Ibrahimor ḳandanor eḳzon.
19.10: Ou laḳan be-foti oḳolre tukaia bar ḳoria, tarare basanir lagi-u to ami bin-Adom i duniat aisi.” Raza ar dosh gulamor kichcha
19.11: Hozrot Isae tarar loge ota matira, ou shomoy tain Zeruzalem taki tuṛa duroi roisoin. Tara mono ḳorla, Zeruzalem fosia-u tain Allar bashshai zair ḳoriliba. Erlagi Isae tarare ou kichcha hunaila,
19.12: “Nobab foribaror eḳzon beṭa manush bout duroi eḳ desho soforo gela. Tan kial asil hono gia raza oia firot aiba.
19.13: Zaibar age tan doshzon gulamre ania forteḳ zonre eḳṭa ḳori shunar mohor dia ḳoila, ‘Ami aibar ag forzonto oguindi tumra ḳay-ḳarbar ḳoro.’
19.14: “Oile tan proza oḳole tanre fosond ḳorta na. Erlagi tara tan ḳore oia guia faṭaia hou bashshare zanaila, ‘Amra sai na, ein amrar raza oukka.’
19.15: Oile-o tain raza bonia firot aila. Aia hou ze doshzon gulamre tain mohor disla, tarare anaia zikaila, ḳay-ḳarbar ḳoria tara ḳe ḳoto lab ḳorsoin.
19.16: Foyla zone aia ḳoilo, ‘Huzur, afnar eḳ mohordi ami dosh mohor ruzi korsi.’
19.17: Razae tare ḳoila, ‘Bala ḳorso! Tumi to bala gulam, tumi kub shamainno befare-o hok aso. Te tumi ou dosh forgonar ufre zomidari koro.’
19.18: Dusra zone ḳoilo, ‘Huzur, afnar mohordi ami fas mohor ruzi korsi.’
