19.19: Tain ḳoila, ‘Tumi-o fas forgonar ufre zomidari koro.’
19.20: Bade aroḳzone ḳoilo, ‘Huzur, ou neukka, afnar hi mohor. Ami afnare ḍoraia afnar mohor rumalo bandia toi disi.
19.21: Afne to ḳoṛa mizazor manush. Zoma na ḳoria-o adae ḳoroin, ḳet na ḳoria-o foshol ḳaṭoin.’
19.22: “Teu razae ḳoila, ‘O ḳobis gulam! Tor mukor ḳotae ami tor bisar ḳormu. Tui to zanos-u ami koṛa mizazor manush, zoma na ḳoria-o adae ḳori, ḳet na ḳoria-o foshol ḳaṭi!
19.23: Te amar mohor tui befarir gese toile na ḳene? Te to ami aia mul mohoror loge kisu lab-o failam one.’
19.24: Razae tan uzir-nazirre ḳoila, ‘Ogur ges taki ou mohor firot ano, ar zar dosh mohor ase tare deo.’
19.25: Teu hoḳole ḳoila, ‘Huzur, tar to emne-u dosh mohor ase.’
19.26: Razae ḳoila, ‘Ami tumrare ḳoiram, zar ase tare aro deoa oibo. Zar nai, tar zeta ase ota-o ḳaṛia neoa oibo.
19.27: Ar amar zeta dushmone saisoin na ami raza oitam, otare ono doria ania amar samne marilao.’ ” Zeruzalem ṭauno Hozrot Isa (19:28–21:38) Hozrot Isa Zeruzalemo hamaila
19.28: Oḳan ḳoia hari Isae tarar age oia Zeruzalemor bae toshrif nila.
19.29: Tain Zoytun faṛor ḳandat Bayt-Faijja ar Bayt-Ania gaur galat aia harle, tan duizon sahabire oḳan ḳoia faṭaila, “Tumra ou samnor gaut zao.
19.30: Gaut hamaia-u deḳbae, egu gadar baichcha banda ase. Ogur ufre ḳeu kunudin soṛse na. Tumra ogur ban kulia ono loia aio.
19.31: Ḳeu zudi zikae, ‘Igur ban kulo ḳene ba?’ te ḳoio, ‘Huzuror goroz ase.’ ”
19.32: Ze sahabi oḳolre faṭaisla, tara gia tan ḳotamoto hoḳolta faila.
19.33: Tara zebla gadar baichchar ban kulra, ou shomoy malike zikaila, “Oba, doṛi kulrae ḳene?”
19.34: Tara ḳoila, “Huzuror goroz ase ḳori kulram.”
19.35: Bade gadar baichcha loia Isar ḳandat aia, erar gotror saddordi gadar fiṭit godi banaia Isare boaila.
19.36: Tain zebla gada soṛia fotedi roana dila, fotor maze manshe tarar zarzir saddor bisai dila.
19.37: Isa Zeruzalemor ḳandat Zoytun faṛ tone lamar foto aia azila, ou shomoy tan ummot oḳol-o loge asla, era tan zeta keramoti kam deḳsila, otar lagi tara kushie zure zure sillaia Allar tarif ḳoria ḳoila,
19.38: “Mubarok hou bashsha, zein Mabudor name toshrif anra. Behesto shanti, Allar arsho gourob!”
19.39: Biṛor maze Forishi dolor ḳoyzone Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, afnar ummot oḳolre domoḳ deukka.”
19.40: Isae ḳoila, “Ami afnarare ḳoiram, erar muk bond ḳorille-o, fattor oḳole sillaia uṭbo.”
19.41: Tain zebla Zeruzalemor ḳandat aila, ou shomoy Zeruzalem ṭaun dekia ḳandi dila.
19.42: Tain ḳoila, “Haere hae! Aiz zudi tumi buztae, shanti kila ḳaim oy! Oile oḳon ita tumar sokur aoṛe roise.
19.43: Tumar ufre ila shomoy azir oibo, zebla dushmon oḳole deoalor sairo galabae maṭir ṭeki bandibo. Tumare berilibo, ar hokkolbae aṭok korbo.
19.44: Tara tumare ar tumar feṭor aolad oḳolre maṭir loge mishaibo. Tumar eḳ fattoror ufre aroḳ fattor roito nae. Ḳaron Allae tumare basaita ḳori ze shuzug disoin, tumi i shomoy-shuzugre sinlae na.” Zeruzalemor Kaba Shorifo Hozrot Isa
19.45: Bade tain Baytul-Mukaddoso hamaila. Hamaia hono zetae bebsha ḳorat asla, ota hokkolṭire ḳedai dila.
19.46: Tain ḳoila, “Pak kalamo leḳa ase, amar gor oibo munazator gor, oile tumra ikanre ḍaḳaitor aḍḍaḳana banailiso.”
19.47: Hozrot Isa forteḳ din Baytul-Mukaddoso gia nosiot ḳorta. Ou shomoy boṛo imam, moulana ar shomazor murobbi oḳole tanre marilita saila.
19.48: Oile kila tanre mara zae, er kunu fondi tara failo na. Ḳaron hoḳol manshe ashik oia dile-zane tan boyan hunta.

20.1: Ou soforor ḳalo eḳdin Hozrot Isa Baytul-Mukaddosor maze, manshor gese Allai kush-ḳobri toblig korat asla. Aḳta-u boṛo imam ar alim oḳol tarar murobbi oḳolre loia aia ḳoila,
20.2: “Aichcha ḳo sain, tumi kun ḳemotae ita ḳam ḳorrae, tumare itar eḳtiar ḳegie dise?”
20.3: Isae zuaf dila, “Te ami-o afnaintore zikairam, ḳoukka sain,
20.4: Ehia nobie toubar gusol ḳoranir ḳemota faisla, manshor ges taki na Allar ges taki?”
20.5: Ou tara eḳe-oinne zukti-foramish ḳorlo, “Zudi koi Allar ges taki, te he ḳoibo, taile tan ufre iman anlae na ḳene?
20.6: Ar zudi koi manshor ges taki, te manshe amrare fattordi marba. Ehiare to tara Allar nobi koia manoin.”
20.7: Ou tara ḳoilo, “I ḳemota kuai taki faisla, amra zani na.”
20.8: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Te ami-o ḳoitam nae, kun ḳemotae ita ḳorram.” Angur bagan bagidaror kichcha
20.9: Bade Isae manshore ou kichcha hunaila, “Ek giroste anguror bagan ḳorla, bade tan baganre ḳetal oḳlor gese bagi dia bout dinor lagi bidesh gelagi.
20.10: Angur faḳar shomoy oile malike tan baṭ nibar lagi ek gulamre faṭaila. Oile ḳetal oḳole tare mair-doir ḳoria ḳali ate firai dilo.
20.11: Bade tain arok gulamre faṭaila. Tara i gulamre-o mair-doir ḳori beijjot ḳoria ḳali ate firai dilo.
20.12: Bade tin nombor gulamre faṭaile, tara eo gulamre maria zoḳom ḳoria bare falai dilo.
20.13: Teu baganor malike ḳoila, ‘Ami kita ḳortam? Oḳon ami amar mayar futre faṭaimu, teu tara manto fare.’
20.14: Oile malikor fuare dekia ḳetal oḳole ḳoilo, ‘Ou fua-u to tar bafor hoḳoltar malik oibo. Ao, ere maria falai dei. Teu malikor hoḳolta amra failimu.’
20.15: Oḳan ḳoia hari tare baganor bare nia kun ḳorilailo. “Oḳon ḳoukka sain, baganor malike i bagidar oḳolre kita ḳorba?
20.16: Tain aia tarare nifat ḳoriliba na ni? Ar tan bagan dusra manshor gese diba na ni?” Ita hunia tara ḳoila, “Nauzubilla! Allae fana deuk!”
20.17: Teu Isae tarar bae saia ḳoila, “Te Allar kalamo ḳene ila leḳa ase, Raz mestoir oḳole ze fattorre beḳama ḳoia falai disil, oḳṭa dia-u goror ian kuṭi oilo.
20.18: I fattoror ufre ḳeu foṛle, i zon bangia ṭukra ṭukra oizibo, ar i fattoro ḳeuror ufre foṛle, he-o zon surmar oizibo.”
20.19: Oḳan hunia-u moulana ar boṛo imam oḳole Isare dorilta saila. Tara buzilila, Isae i kichcha tarar niote-u ḳoira. Oile manshore ḍoraia tara kunta ḳorla na. Bashshar ḳazna deoa zaiz ni
20.20: Erlagi tara Isare souke souke raḳla, tan ḳore ḳoyzon guia lagaila. Guia oḳole mumini besh doria solle-o, tarar niot oilo Isare ḳotar fando falaita, zate tane deshor fordan hakimor adaloto salan ḳorail zae.
20.21: Ou guia oḳole Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, afne to hoḳolre homan souke deḳoin. Afne hok mat matoin, hok talim dein. Ḳeurore toakka na ḳoria, manshore Allar hok fot deḳain.
20.22: Te ḳoukka sain, Ruman bashsha Ḳoisorre ḳazna deoa zaiz ni, na nazaiz?”
20.23: Isae tarar ku-motlob buzilila. Buzia ḳoila,
20.24: “Deki, amare eḳṭa dinar deḳao.” Dinar dekia ḳoila, “Igur ufre ḳar sobi ar nam ase?” Tara ḳoila, “Bashsha Ḳoisoror.”
20.25: Isae ḳoila, “Te Ḳoisororta Ḳoisorre deo, ar Allarta Allare deo.”
20.26: Tan zuaf hunia tara taijjub bonia nirai oigela. Guia oḳole manshor samne tanre ḳotar fando falaito farlo na. Aḳerator befare prosno
20.27: Bade Siddekia mozobor kisu manush Isar gese aila. Ou mozobor manshe mono ḳoroin, morar bade kunu zandar-u ar zinda oita nae.
20.28: Tara Isare zikaila, “Huzur, Musa nobie amrar lagi ou niom lekia gesoin, kunu manshe tar bou toia niaoladi halote morigele, tar baie ou boure bia ḳoria mora bair oarish foyda ḳorbo.
20.29: Oḳon mono ḳoroukka, ek goro shat bai asil. Foyla zone bia ḳoria niaoladi halote morigelo.
20.30: -31 Bade dui nombor ar tin nombor baie ou beṭire bia ḳorlo. Ou laḳan tara shato baie-u ou beṭire bia ḳoria niaoladi halote morigelo.
20.33: Te kiamotor din i beṭi kar bou oibo? Shato zone-u to i beṭire bia ḳorsil.”
20.34: Isae ḳoila, “I duniar manshe bia-shadi koroin, ar bia-shadi dein.
20.35: Oile moutor bade zinda oia zera aḳerato kamiabir laḳ oizae, tara ar bia-shadi korta nae, ba bia-shadi boita-o nae.
20.36: Tarar kunu mout-o oito nae, tara firistar laḳan oiziba. Moutor bade aḳer faoae tara Alla Pakor aolad boniziba.
20.37: Tur faṛor zalail zonglar boyanir maze Musa nobie buzaisoin, murda oḳol to zinda oia uṭoin, erlagi-u bout age ze nobi oḳol mara gesoin Musae Mabudre hou nobi oḳlor Alla ḳoia ḍakila. Tain Mabudre ḳoila, Ibrahimor Alla, Isʼhakor Alla ar Iakubor Alla.
20.38: Te Alla to murda oḳlor Alla nae, tain zinda oḳlor Alla. Tan nozoro hokkol manush-u zinda asoin.”
20.39: Teu ḳoyzon alime ḳoila, “Huzur, afne to ḳaṭi mat matsoin.”
20.40: Heshe tara Isare ar kunu soal ḳorar shaosh failo na. Alim oḳolre hedayot
20.41: Ermaze Isae ou alim oḳolre zikaila, “Manshe ḳene al-Mosire Daud nobir aolad ḳoin?
20.42: -43 Zobur Shorifor maze Daude nize-u to oḳan ḳoira, Mabude amar munibre ḳoila, zotodin tumar dushmon oḳolre tumar faor tole na falai, otodin tumi amar ḍain galat boiro.
20.44: Daude to al-Mosire tan munib ḳoia ḍakila, te al-Mosi kemne Daudor aolad oiba?”
20.45: Manshe Isar boyan hunra, ou shomoy tain shagrid oḳolre ḳoila,
20.46: “Alim oḳlor befare hushiar o. Tara lamba lamba zubba findia gurite kub bala fain. Bazar-aṭo gia salam faite fosond ḳoroin. Mosido gia samnor ḳataro boite ar mozliso gia dami zagat boite fosond ḳoroin.
20.47: Tara manshore deḳanir lagi lamba lamba dua ḳoroin. Hirbar ṛaṛi beṭintor gor-baṛi doḳol ḳoroin. Kiamotor din erar boṛo ḳoṭin shaza oibo.”

21.1: Hozrot Isae saia deḳla, doni oḳole Baytul-Mukaddosor lillar ḍegor maze dan-ḳoyrat dira.
21.2: Ermaze deḳla, kub gorib eḳ ṛaṛi beṭie-o aia ḍegor maze duiṭa foysha dan ḳorlo.
21.3: Dekia tan sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, ou gorib ṛaṛi beṭie hoḳol taki beshi dan ḳorse.
21.4: Ḳaron baki hoḳole ḳoros ḳorar bade zeta deṛia roise, on taki tuṛa ongsho ḍegor maze dan ḳorse. Oile i beṭie nizor obab-onoṭon taḳle-o, tair ḳamail hokkolta-u dan ḳorilise.” Kiamotor agor alamot
21.5: Ḳoyzon sahabie Baytul-Mukaddos Kaba Shorifor befare matila, ḳoila, “Deḳra ni, oto shundor shundor fattordi ar dan-ḳoyratdi gorḳanre hazail oise.”
21.6: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Tumra ou zotota deḳrae, ola eḳ din aibo, zebla ita eḳ fattoror ufre aroḳ fattor roito nae. Hoḳolta maṭir loge mishizibo.”
21.7: Sahabi oḳole tanre zikaila, “Huzur, ita kun zomanat oibo? Kun alamot deḳle buza zaibo, hi shomoy oigese?”
21.8: Tain ḳoila, “Hushiar roio, ḳeu zanu tumrare be-fote na ney. Bout zone amar nam dori aia ḳoibo, shomoy oigese, ami-u al-Mosi. Oile tumra itar ḳore zaio na.
21.9: Tumra zebla zuddo ar gonḍogulor ḳobor hunbae, ḍoraio na. Ḳaron foyla ita oibo-u oibo, oile ita to shesh nae.”
21.10: Bade tain ḳoila, “Zatie zatir bifokke, razae razar bifokke zuddo ḳorbo.
21.11: Boṛo boṛo boisal oibo, zagae zagae nidan ar bezuita bemar-azare manush morba. Asmano-o kub ḍor-ḳofor nishana ar azob azob kudroti lila zair oibo.
21.12: “Oile ita goṭar age manshe tumrare ḳedaibo, dorbo. Bisaror lagi mozlisor samne azir ḳorbo, zelo haraibo. Amar namor lagi tumrare raza-bashsha ar hakim oḳlor samne neoa oibo.
21.13: Teu amar name toblig korar lagi tumra shuzug faibae.
21.14: Oile tumra mono rakio, kita zuaf ditae, ita age sinta ḳorar kunu zorur nae.
21.15: Ḳaron ami tumrare oula zoban ar hekmot zugaia dimu, tumrar bifokko oḳole ita firaito farto nae, er zuaf dibar-o takkot oito nae.
21.16: Tumrar ma-baf, bai-birador, ḳesh-kuṭum ar dust oḳole-o tumrare doraia diba. Tara tumrar kunu kunu zonre zane marailiba.
21.17: Ar amar namor lagi tumrare hokkole ginnaibo.
21.18: Oile-o kunumonte-u tumrar matar eḳsa sulor-o ḳeti oito nae.
21.19: Tumra imane mozbut roile, nizor hasaror zindegi hasil ḳorbae.
21.20: “Tumra deḳbae, sifai oḳole aia sairobae tone Zeruzalemre gerao ḳorilira, teu buzilio, Zeruzalemor binash aichche.
21.21: Hi shomoy zara Ehudia zilat taḳba, tara faṛedi gia bagouk. Zara ou Zeruzalemo taḳba, tara ṭaunor bare zauk. Zara gau-geramo taḳba, tara zanu kunumonte-u ṭauno na ain.
21.22: Ḳaron i oḳt oilo Allai gozobor oḳt, Allar kalamor ayat oḳol fura oibar oḳt.
21.23: Ish! I shomoy zeta beṭintor feṭo hurutta taḳba, zera huruttare bukur dud ḳaoaiba, erar bout ḳoshṭo oibo! Deshor ufre bezuita durgoti, ar Ihudi oḳlor ufre gozob nazil oibo.
21.24: Toluaror tole tara zan kuaiba, bondi oia hokkol zatir maze zaiba. Ou bidormi zatir ḳemotar shomoy fura oar ag forzonto, i Zeruzalem tarar faor tole roibo.
21.25: “San-shuruz ar asmanor terar maze nanan alamot deḳa zaibo. Duniar hoḳol deshor manshor ḳoshṭo oibo. Doriae utal-fatal ḳorbo. Ḍeur aoaze manush bedisha lagba.
21.26: Duniat kun dosha goṭibo ota sinta ḳoria ḍoror suṭe manush beush oizibo, asmani san-shuruz, tera hokkolta aula-zaula oizibo.
21.27: Ou shomoy deḳbae, ami bin-Adome Allar kudroti shokti ar nuror mohimae megor kuṭit oia duniat toshrif aniar.
21.28: Ita hal-hokikot deḳle tumra mozbut oio, mata usa ḳorio, buzilio tumrar nazat daro aichche.”
21.29: Isae tarare ou misal hunaila, ḳoila, “Tumra ḍumur gas ar oinno gasaintor bae deḳo,
21.30: itar noya kuṛi-fata baroni deḳle-u tumra buzilao, gormor din aichche.
21.31: Oula tumra zebla deḳbae, ita hal-hokikot goṭer, te buzilio Allar bashshai nozdik aichche.
21.32: Ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, ita hokkolta na goṭar age, i zomanar manush koy oita nae.
21.33: Asman-zomin koy oizibo, oile amar kalam kunudin-o koy oito nae.
21.34: “Tumra nize hushiar roio, zate mozar mozar ḳani, mod ḳaia ṭal oa ar ruzi-ruzgaror neshae aula-zaula na o, arnae hou din aia aḳta-u tumrare fando haraito fare.
21.35: Duniar tamam manshor ufre-u hi din azir oibo.
21.36: Oile tumra hamesha hozag roio, ar dua ḳorio, zate ou zeta zair oibo ota faroia hari amar samne ubanir bol fao.”
21.37: Isae forteḳ din Baytul-Mukaddoso aia nosiot ḳorta. Bade rait oile tain bar oia Zoytun faṛo zaitagi.
21.38: Hoḳol manshe tan boyan hunar niote bian-sobre Baytul-Mukaddoso aita.

22.1: Ihudi oḳlor Ḳamir Saṛa Ruṭir Id ḳasat ailo, ou idor nam Azadi Id.
22.2: Ibae moulana ar boṛo imam oḳole foramish ḳorla, Hozrot Isare am manshor ges taki lukaia kila zane marta. Tara am manshore kub ḍoraita. Ihuda Iskariator beimani
22.3: Ou shomoy tan barozon sahabir mazor eḳzon, en nam Ihuda Iskariat, en bitre Shoytan hamailo.
22.4: Ein Isare doraia deoar lagi lukaia Baytul-Mukaddoso gela. Gia honor daroga ar boṛo imam oḳlor loge foramish ḳorla, kun nomunae Isare tarar ato dorai deoa zae.
22.5: Teu imam oḳol kub kushi oia oada ḳorla, tanre doraia dile tare boḳshish diba.
22.6: Ete Ihuda-o razi oia manshor aforḳe, tanre dorai deoar shuzug tukanit roilo. Hozrot Isar aḳeri mezbani
22.7: Bade Azadi Id ailo, ou idor din meṛa-baichcha kurbani deoa oy.
22.8: Teu Isae sahabi Fitor ar Hannanre hukum dila, “Tumra gia amrar lagi idor ḳani tiar ḳoro, amra hoḳol aia eḳloge ḳaimu.”
22.9: Era zikaila, “Huzur, afnar kial kita, amra kunano gia ḳana tiar ḳortam?”
22.10: Tain ḳoila, “Huno, ṭauno hamaia harle tumra deḳbae, eḳ beṭae fanir ḳoyla boria loia zaira. Tumra en ḳore ḳore zaio, gia ein ze goro hamaiba,
22.11: hou goror malikre ḳoio, ‘Huzure zikaisoin, tan sahabi oḳolre loia Azadi Idor ḳani ze goro ḳaita, i musafir ḳana kuai?’
22.12: He tumrare ufror talat hazail-faṛail boṛo ek kuṭa deḳaia dibo. Hono gia tumra randa-baṛa ḳorio.”
22.13: Hasau tara gia tan ḳota mafik hoḳolta faila, faia Azadi Idor ḳani-o tiar ḳorla.
22.14: Bade shomoy aile Isae tan barozon sahabi loia ḳanit boila.
22.15: Boia ḳoila, “Amar boṛo kial asil mosibotor mukamuki oibar age, aḳeri idor ḳani kan tumrare loia ḳaitam.
22.16: Ami tumrare ḳoiram, Allar bashshair asol morzi-munsha furafur hasil na oa forzonto, ami ar kunu idor ḳani kaitam nae.”
22.17: Bade tain shorbotor fiala loia Allar shukria zanaia ḳoila, “Ou fuṭain tumra baṭia ḳailao.
22.18: Ar huno, ami tumrare ḳoiram, Allar bashshai na aoa forzonto, ami ar anguror kunu shorbot ḳaitam nae.”
22.19: Erbade ruṭi ato loia Allar shukria zanaila. Ruṭi ṭukraia sahabi oḳolre dila, ḳoila, “Mono ḳorio iṭa amar ḳaya, ou ḳaya ami tumrar lagi shofi dimu. Amare mono ḳorar lagi tumitain-o ola ḳorio.”
22.20: Ḳaoar bade shorbotor fiala ato loia ḳoila, “Amar lour zoriae Allar loge manshor milonor ze noya usilla nazil or, ou fiala oilo er nishana. Amar ou lou tumrar nazator lagi dimu.
22.21: Te deḳrae ni! Amare zegie doraia dibo, he oḳon amar loge ou dostarḳanat boia ḳar.
22.22: Allae zela hukum ḳorsoin, ami bin-Adomor mout to ola-u oibo. Haere hae! Lannoti hou adom, zegie amare doraia dibo.”
22.23: Sahabi oḳole eḳe-oinnore zikaila, “Te amrar mazor kun manshe ila ḳam ḳorbo?” Kun zon hoḳol taki boṛo
22.24: Ou shomoy sahabi oḳlor maze kun zon hoḳol taki boṛo, ota loia tarar maze torka-torki lagigelo.
22.25: Teu Isae tarare ḳoila, “Bidormi deshor raza oḳole tarar prozar ufre munibgiri deḳain. Tarar zomidarre ḳoa oy zongonor dust.
22.26: Oile tumra ilan oio na. Tumrar maze zein hoḳol taki boṛo, ein hoḳlor huru ouk. Ar zein neta, ein ḳadimdaror laḳan ouk.
22.27: Ḳo sain kun zon boṛo? Zein ḳana ḳain, na ze ḳadimdari kore? Zein ḳana ḳain ein-u nae ni? Te ami nize-u to tumrar ḳadimdari koriar.
22.28: “Huno, amar hoḳol bala-mosiboto tumra amar loge loge aslae.
22.29: Ar amar batuni bafe amare zela godi ar ḳemota dan ḳorsoin, ami-o oula tumrare ḳemota dan ḳorram.
22.30: Ou ḳemota faia, tumra-o amar bashshait dakil oia amar loge boia ḳana-fina ḳaibae, amar loge godit boia Boni Israilor baro gusṭir bisar-adalot ḳorbae. Hozrot Fitoror befare agam ḳobor
22.31: “Saimon, Saimon, huno, dan-saul zela saindi saniain, Shoytane-o tumrare ola saniaito saise.
22.32: Oile tumar lagi ami aroz ḳorsi, tumar iman zanu ḳomzur na oy. Te tumi eḳbar gelegi-o touba ḳoria zebla firot aibae, ou shomoy tumar ou baiaintor imani bol-o mozbut ḳorio.”
22.33: Fitore ḳoila, “Huzur, ami to afnar loge oia zelo zaite, ba zan dite-o tiar asi.”
22.34: Tain ḳoila, “Fitor, ami tumare ḳoiram, aiz fotabala murgae bang dibar age-u, tumi tin-tinbar ḳoibae, tumi amare sino na.”
22.35: Bade tan sahabi oḳolre zikaila, “Ḳo sain, ami zebla tumrare ṭeḳar toli, gaiṭ-buski ita kunta na dia ḳali faoe faṭaislam, hi shomoy tumrar kuntar obab oisil ni?” Tara ḳoila, “Ji na, kunu obab oise na.”
22.36: Isae ḳoila, “Te oḳon ami koi, oḳon zar ṭeḳar toli ba gaiṭ-buski ase, he ota loge raḳouk. Zar toluar nai, he tar saddor besia toluar ḳorid ḳorouk.
22.37: Pak Kalamor ayato to leḳa ase, tanre naforman oḳlor ḳataro milail oibo. I ayat to amar ufor dia-u folibo. Amar befare zotota leḳa ase, ita hokkolta oḳon folizar.”
22.38: Teu sahabi oḳole ḳoila, “Huzur deḳoukka, ino dukan toluar ase.” Tain ḳoila, “Ota-u to bout.” Zoytun faṛo Hozrot Isar toklif
22.39: Ḳana-finar bade Isa bar oia boraborkur laḳan hou Zoytun faṛo gela, sahabi oḳol-o tan ḳore ḳore gela.
22.40: Hono gia harle Isae tarare ḳoila, “Tumra dua ḳoro, zate kunu forikkat na foṛo.”
22.41: Ḳoia hari sahabi oḳlor ges taki sair nol foriman duroi gia, zanu fatia dua ḳorat boila.
22.42: Tain ḳoila, “Behesti baba, tumar ichcha oile mosibotor i fialaṭa amar ges tone horailao. Oile amar ichchae nae, tumar ichchae-u ouk.”
22.43: Teu behest taki eḳ firista aia Isare doroshon dia tan bol baṛaila.
22.44: Bade tain monor duke fereshan bonia aro ḳator oia dua ḳorla. Erlagi tan gotror gam lour fuṭar laḳan maṭit foṛto laglo.
22.45: Dua shesh ḳoria sahabi oḳlor ḳandat aia deḳla, monor duke ḳator oia tara gumai gesoin.
22.46: Dekia tarare ḳoila, “Gumairae ḳene? Uṭia dua ḳoro, zate forikkat na foṛo.”
22.47: Isa mato roisoin, ou shomoy aḳta-u hikano bout manush aila. Erar hokkolor age asil Ihuda, he Isar barozon sahabir mazor eḳzon. Ihudae tanre hunga dibar lagi kandat ailo.
22.48: Isae tare ḳoila, “Ihuda, ami bin-Adomre hunga dia dorai dirae ni?”
22.49: Ou shomoy Isar ḳandat zera asla, tara buzilila kita or. Buzia ḳoila, “Huzur, otare amrar toluardi martam ni?”
22.50: Ḳoia-u eḳ sahabie toluardi sed mari fordan imamor gulamor ḍainor ḳan ḳaṭilila.
22.51: Oile Isae ḳoila, “Bad deo, ar mario na.” Oḳan ḳoia tain hi gulamor ḳan atai dia tare bala ḳorilla.
22.52: Hozrot Isare aṭok korat zoto boṛo imam, Baytul-Mukaddosor daroga, ar murobbi oḳol aisla, Isae tarare zikaila, “Manshe sur-ḍaḳait dorte zela laṭi-sulfi loia zain, tumra amare dorat oula aiso ni?
22.53: Ami to forteḳ din-u Baytul-Mukaddoso tumrar samne aslam, hi shomoy amare dorlae na ḳene? O, oḳon nisoy tumrar shomoy, andairor razotto salu oise.” Hozrot Fitoror oshikar
22.54: Dushmonor dole Isare aṭok koria fordan imamor baṛit loia gelagi. Sahabi Fitor duroi hori hori Isar ḳore oia gela.
22.55: Uṭanor maze bakka manshe aguin doraia tabanit lagla, Fitor-o ono aia shorik oila.
22.56: Ou shomoy eḳ bandi beṭie agunir foror maze Fitorre dekia bala ḳori saia ḳoilo, “Ou beṭa-o hogur loge asil.”
22.57: Fitore ḳoila, “Na beṭi, ami ere sini-u na.”
22.58: Tuṛa bade aroḳzone Fitorre dekia ḳoilo, “Tumi-o otar logor eḳzon.” Tain ḳoila, “Na ba, ami nae.”
22.59: Aro eḳod gonṭa bade aroḳzone boṛo golae ḳoilo, “Oy, oy, ogu-o er loge asil, e-o to Galilor manush.”
22.60: Tain ḳoila, “Dur beṭa! Tumi ita kita mato, kunta buzi na.” Fitore ota ḳoira, ermaze aḳta-u murgae bang dilailo.
22.61: Teu Isae muk firaia Fitoror bae saila. Saite-u Fitoror mono oigelogi, huzure to age-u ḳoisla, “Aiz fotabala murgae bang dibar age-u, tumi tinbar ḳoibae, tumi amare sino na.”
22.62: Teu Fitor bare gia kub ḳandon ḳandila. Deshor fotua komiṭir samne Hozrot Isa
22.63: Hozrot Isare doria ania faradar oḳole tanre ṭaṭṭa-moshkora ar mair-doir ḳorlo.
22.64: Tan souk bandia ḳoilo, “Hoi, tui bule nobi, te oḳon gaibi ko sain, tore ḳegie marlo?”
22.65: Oula aro boutta ḳoia tanre beijjot ḳorlo.
22.66: Rait fuanir bade deshor fotua komiṭir murobbian, boṛo imam ar alim oḳol dola oila, ar Isare tarar samne anaia ḳoila,
22.67: “Tumi zudi Allar oada ḳora hou al-Mosi o, te amrare ḳo.” Isae ḳoila, “Ami koile-o to tumitain ekin ḳortae nae.
22.69: Oile ami bin-Adom oḳon taki-u arshe-azimo Allar ḍainor kursit boimu.”
22.70: Teu hokkole zikailo, “Te tumi-u kita Allar ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla ni?” Tain ḳoila, “Oy, tumitain-u to ḳoirae, ami-u hein.”
22.71: Teu tara hokkole ḳoilo, “Te ar shae-shakkidi kita ḳortae? Amra nizor ḳane-u to tar zobanbondi hunlam.”

23.1: Tara hoḳole eḳloge dol bandia Isare loia Ruman hakim Filator gese gela.
23.2: Gia Isar bifokke nalish dila. Tara ḳoila, “Amra deḳsi, ou beṭae amrar deshor manshore bigṛai der, he manshore nished ḳore amrar bashsha Ḳoisorre ḳazna dita na. He nize-u bule al-Mosi namor eḳ bashsha.”
23.3: Filate Isare zikaila, “Tumi kita Ihudi oḳlor bashsha ni?” Tain zuaf dila, “Afne zela ḳoin, ola-u.”
23.4: Teu Filate boṛo imam ar hoḳol manshore ḳoila, “Ami to i ashamir kunu dush-u fairam na.”
23.5: Oile tara zid ḳoria ḳoilo, “I beṭae Galil zila taki arombo ḳoria asta Ehudia zilar manshore bigṛaia, oḳon amrar ono aia-o hokkolre bigṛailar.”
23.6: Ikan hunia Filate zikaila, “He kita Galilor manush ni?”
23.7: Hakime zebla hunla, Isar baṛi oilo Raza Herudor odinor Galil zilat, hunia tain Isare Herudor gese faṭai dila, ḳaron Herud-o ou shomoy Zeruzalemo asla.
23.8: Isare dekia Herud kub kushi oila. Tain bout din dori Isare deḳta saira. Age tain Isar befare boutta hunchila, erlagi tan monor asha asil, Isae tanre kunu keramoti-muzeza deḳaiba.
23.9: Tain Isare bout nomunar prosno ḳorla, oile Isae itar kunu zuaf dila na.
23.10: Adaloto ubaia-o boṛo imam ar moulana oḳole kub gorom oia Isar bifokke nalish hunanit roila.
23.11: Erloge Herude ar tan sifai oḳole-o Isare ṭaṭṭa-moshkora, beijjoti korla, hesh-mesh tanre bashshai soḳsoḳa lebas findaia hakim Filator gese firot faṭai dila.
23.12: Er age Raza Herud ar hakim Filator maze dushmoni asil, oile ou din taki-u tarar maze dusti oigelo.
23.13: Bade Filate boṛo imam, murobbi oḳol, ar am manshore ekḳano dola ḳoria,
23.14: ḳoila, “Ou ashamire tumra doria ania amar gese nalish dilae, he hokkol manshore bigṛailar, oile ami to tumrar samne-u tare zera ḳorlam, te tumra zela nalish diso, tar maze to ila kunu dush-u failam na.
23.15: Ar Raza Herude-o nisoy tar kunu dush faisoin na, erlagi-u tain tare amar gese firot faṭaisoin. Ami deḳram, moutor shazar zuka kunu dush-u he ḳorse na.
23.16: Te ami tare singladi maria saṛi dimu.”
23.17: Ashole hakim Filator reoaz-o asil, tain Azadi Idor oḳto eḳzon ḳoydire ḳalas dita.
23.18: Oile manshe eḳloge sillaia ḳoilo, “Na, na, ogure marilao. Barabbare saṛi deo.”
23.19: Ou Barabbare age zelo harail oisil, he Zeruzalem ṭauno kun ar shontrash ḳorsil.
23.20: Oile Filate Isare saṛi deoar niote hirbar tarar loge batchit ḳorla.
23.21: Ta-o tara eḳloge sillaia uṭlo, “Ogure solibo deo, solibo deo.” (Solib oilo laḳṛidi banail manshore loṭḳaia marar eḳ zinish.)
23.22: Filate tin-tinbar tarare zikaila, “Ḳene? I ashamie kita dush ḳorse? Moutor shazar zuka tar kunu dush-u ami fairam na. Ami kali singladi maria tare saṛi dimu.”
23.23: Oile tara mairmuki oia, sillaia, misil lagaila, “Ogure solibo loṭḳao, solibo loṭḳao.” Sillanir suṭe tarar dabi fura oilo.
23.24: Tarar dabi mafik-u Filate ray dilaila.
23.25: Tain Hozrot Isare tarar bod ḳaish mafik tarar ato saṛi dila ar hou kuni-shontrashire ḳalas dilaila. Solibor ufre Hozrot Isa al-Mosir mout
23.26: Hakimor ray faia sifai oḳole Isare zane marilita ḳori Isare loia zaira. Ou shomoy Saimon namor Kurini elaḳar eḳzon manush gau taki ṭauno aoat asil. Tara ou beṭare doria laḳṛidi banail solib tar ḳando tulia dia ḳoilo, he ogu loia Isar ḳore ḳore zaito.
23.27: Isar ḳore ḳore bout manush asil, erar loge bout beṭin-o asla. Tara tan lagi bilaf ar ahazari koria bukut tabaia ḳandon lagaila.
23.28: Oile Isae tarar bae saia ḳoila, “O Zeruzalemor mai oḳol, amar lagi kandio na. Tumra nizor lagi ar nizor fua-fuṛir lagi kando.
23.29: Huno, omon eḳ din aibo, zebla manshe ḳoiba aṭkura beṭin-u boṛo ḳofali. Zerar kunu hurutta-u oise na, bukor dud-o kunudin ḳaoaise na, tara-u ḳofali.
23.30: Hi shomoy manshe boṛo boṛo faṛre ḳoibo, tumra aia amrar ufre foṛo. Faṛor ṭilla oḳolre ḳoibo, amrare lukaia raḳo.
23.31: Tumra deḳrae na ni, taza gasre-u itae ou halot ḳorra, te hukna gasor kun dosha oibo.”
23.32: Hozrot Isar loge ḳori marar lagi sifai oḳole duizon dagi ashamire loia ailo.
23.33: Bade Matar-Kuli namor zagat ania, tara Isare ar hou duio dagi ashamire gasor ṭukradi banail solibo loṭḳailo, eḳzonre tan ḍain galat, aroḳzonre bau galat loṭḳailo.
23.34: Ou shomoy Isae ḳoila, “Baba, erare maf ḳori dilao. Tara to buzer na tara ita kita ḳorer.” Bade tara tan ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ nita ḳori loṭari maria baṭa-baṭi korla.
23.35: Bout manshe ubaia ita deḳla, oile tarar murobbi oḳole Isare ṭiṭkari maria ḳoila, “He to bout manshor zan basaito, he zudi hasau Allar oada ḳora hou al-Mosi oy, te oḳon tar nizor zan-o basauk.”
23.36: Ruman sifai oḳole-o tanre loia moshkari korlo, tara ṭenga anguror shorbot loia tan ḳandat gia ḳoila,
23.37: “Tumi zudi Ihudi oḳlor hasaror bashsha o, te oḳon nizor zan basao na.”
23.38: Tan matar ufre ekkan sainborḍ lagail oilo, hono leḳa asil, “He Ihudir bashsha.”
23.39: Ou shomoy tan loge aro ze duizon ashamire solibo loṭḳail oisil, ota eḳzone tanre ṭiṭkari maria ḳoilo, “Tumi bule hou al-Mosi? Te oḳon amrare ar tumare-o basao na.”
23.40: Oḳan hunia dusra zone ere damki dia ḳoilo, “Tumi kita Allare-o ḍorao na ni? Tumi-o to ou homan shaza fairae.
23.41: Ar amra to fairam amrar usit shaza, amra zelan ḳam ḳorsi oulan fairam. Oile ein to kunu dush-u ḳorsoin na.”
23.42: Bade he ḳoilo, “O Isa, afne firia aia zebla nize bashshai korba, ou shomoy ḳano amare iad raḳoin zanu.”
23.43: Tain ḳoila, “Ami tumare hok kota ḳoiram, tumi aiz taki-u amar loge arshe-azimo taḳbae.”
23.44: Ou shomoy beil onuman duifor, erbad taki zuhoror bad forzonto tin gonṭa dori asta desh andair oigelo.
23.45: Shuruzor for nibigelo. Ermaze Zeruzalemo Kaba goror fobitro Herem Shorifor fordaḳan, ufre taki tol forzonto siṛia dui ṭukra oigelo.
23.46: Heshe Isae zure aoaz ḳoria ḳoila, “Baba, amar ruhu tumar ato shofia dilailam.” Oḳan ḳoia-u aḳeri dom falaia inteḳal ḳorla.
23.47: Ruman sifair ze boṛo ofisar hono fara deoat asla, ein Isar moutor i halot dekia Allar tarif ḳoria ḳoila, “Nichchoy, i besaṛa ḳaṭi dindar manush asla.”
23.48: Ar ita deḳar lagi zoto manush dola oisla, tara-o i halot dekia bukut mari mari ahazari koria firia gela.
23.49: Isar forisito zon oḳole, ar Galil zila taki zeta beṭin tan loge oia aisla, tara hokkole duroi ubaia ita deḳla. Hozrot Isar ḳoybor
23.50: -51 Deshor fotua komiṭir eḳzon ijjoti membar asla, en nam Iusuf, en baṛi Arimatia gaut. Ein to forezgar ar hok manush, Isare zane marar ou ku-dandat tain tarar loge razi oila na. Tain Allar bashshair lagi bar saoat asla.
23.52: Ou Iusuf hakim Filator gese gela, gia Isar lash nita saila.
23.53: Bade Hozrot Isar lash solib taki lamaia, ḳafon findaila, ar fattor kudia banail oula ek koyboror maze dafon ḳorla, i koyboro kunudin ar ḳeurore dafon ḳora oise na.
23.54: I din asil Ihudir zummar agor din, tuṛa bade-u Zummabar shuru oizibo.
23.55: Ar zeta beṭin Galil taki Isar loge oia aisla, tara Iusufor ḳore ḳore gia hou ḳoybor deḳla, ar kilaḳan tan lash dafon ḳora oilo eota deḳla.
23.56: Bade tara firia gia hari ator-gulaf ar sondon-molom banaila, heshe shoriotor hukum mafik zummar din ziraila.

24.1: Ou beṭinte zeta ator-gulaf tiar ḳorsla, haftar foyla din kub sobre tara ota loia, Isar ḳoyboror ḳandat aila.
24.2: Aia deḳla, ḳoyboror mukor fattorḳan horail oigese.
24.3: Dekia tara ḳoyboror bitre hamaia deḳoin, Isar lash to ḳoyboro nai.
24.4: Teu tara sintat foṛigela. Ou shomoy dola soḳsoḳa ḳafoṛ finno duizon aia tarar ḳandat ubaila.
24.5: Erare dekia beṭinte ḍoraia mata nuailila. Ou duiozone tarare ḳoila, “Ogo, tumitain zindare ḳene murda oḳlor maze aia tukairae?
24.6: Tain to ono nai, tain zinda oigesoin. Tain Galilo taḳte tumrar gese kita ḳoisla, mono ḳoria deḳo.
24.7: Tain ḳoisla na ni, bin-Adomre naforman manshor ato dorai deoa oibo. Tanre solibo loṭḳaia zane mara oibo, oile moutor tin dinor din hirbar zinda oia uṭba?”
24.8: Oḳan hunte-u Isar agor ḳota oḳol tarar mono oigelo.
24.9: Tara ḳobrostan taki firia gia, hou egaro zon sahabire ar baki hoḳlor gese ḳobor zanaila.
24.10: Mogdilini Moriom, Iuhanna, Iakubor ma Moriom ar tarar loge zeta beṭin asla, era hoḳole gia i kobor ḳoila.
24.11: Oile zera ita hunla, era mono ḳorla ita nisoy baze mat, ita beṭintor mat tara ekin ḳorla na.
24.12: Oile Fitor douṛaia ḳoyboror ḳandat gela. Gia unda oia deḳla, ḳali kafonḳan foṛi roise. Ita dekia tain taijjub bonia firot aila. Duizon shagride zinda Isare deḳla
24.13: Ou din-u duizon shagrid Zeruzalem taki shat mail duroi Imuas namor ek gaut zaoat asla.
24.14: Foto tara ota befar oḳol loia-u mati mati zaira.
24.15: Tara mato roisoin ou shomoy aḳta-u Isa nize tarar ḳandat aia eḳloge aṭa dorla.
24.16: Oile tarar sokut saṭa lagigesil, tara Isare dekia-o sinla na.
24.17: Isae tarare zikaila, “Aṭi aṭi afnara ita kitar batchit ḳorra?” Ikan hunia era muk bezar ḳori ubai gela.
24.18: Ermaze Kiliofas name eḳzone Isare ḳoila, “Afne-u eḳmatro zon, zein hunchoin na i koydine Zeruzalemo kita goṭise?”
24.19: Isae tarare zikaila, “Kita goṭise ba?” Tara ḳoila, “Nasarotor Isare loia zotota goṭise. Tain to Allar nobi, tan mukor zoban ar ḳame-ḳaze Allar nozoro ar hoḳol manshor sokut-o kub takkoti ar mortuba-ala nobi asla.
24.20: Amrar boṛo imam ar murobbi oḳole tanre zane marar lagi Ruman oḳlor ato doraia dilaila, tara tanre nia solibor ufre zane marilise.
24.21: Oile amrar asha asil, tain Boni Israilre azad ḳorba. Aiz tin din oilo i goṭona goṭise.
24.22: Ar amrar logor ḳoyzon beṭi manshe aia amrare taijjub banailisoin. Tara kub sobre Isar ḳoyboro gesla,
24.23: gia deḳsoin, tan lash nai. Tara firot aia ḳoila, tara firistar doroshon faisoin, ar firista oḳole tarare ḳoisoin, Isa zinda asoin.
24.24: Bade amrar loge zara asla, tarar maze-o ḳeu ḳeu ḳoyboro gia deḳla, beṭintor ḳota-u hasa, Isar lash ḳoyboro nai.”
24.25: Hoḳolta hunia Isae tarare ḳoila, “Afnara to kunta-u buzoin na. Afnaintor dil ola oshaṛ bonigese ni? Allar nobi oḳole zeta bataia gesoin, otare-o afnara ekin ḳorra na.
24.26: Nobi oḳole ḳoisoin na ni, Allar oada ḳora al-Mosie duḳ-mosibot shoijjo ḳoria hari tan zalal ar gourob hasil ḳorba?”
24.27: Bade tain Musa nobir Tourat Kitab taki shuru ḳoria, hokkol nobir kitabor maze tan befare zotota leḳa ase, ota tarare buzaila.
24.28: Ar ze gaut zaita ḳori tara roana disla, hou gaur ḳandat aile Isae aro duroi zaoar bab deḳaila.
24.29: Oile tara kub minot-ḳajji koria tanre ḳoila, “Oḳon to beil gesegi, hainja oizar, te raitḳan afne amrar gese roi zaukka.” Ou tain roar lagi baṛit hamaila.
24.30: Bade zebla ḳanit boila, ou shomoy Isae ruṭi loia ṭukraia Allar shukria adae ḳoria tarare dila.
24.31: Teu tarar souk kuligelo, tara Isare sinilila. Sinar loge loge-u tain erar ges taki auṛi dilaila.
24.32: Bade tara eḳe-oinnore ḳoila, “Foto zebla tain amrar loge batchit ḳorsla, amrare Allar kalam buzaia disla, hou shomoy amrar dilor maze eḳ eshki foyda oisil na ni?”
24.33: Loge loge tara duiozon bar oia Zeruzalem aila. Aia hou egaro zon sahabi ar baki hokkolre ekḳano boat faila.
24.34: Tara ono boia ota matira, Hozrot Isa ashole-u zinda oigesoin, zinda oia Saimon-Fitorre deḳa disoin.
24.35: Ou shomoy hou duio zone-o erare ḳoila, fotor maze tara kila Isar deḳa faila, ruṭi ṭukraibar shomoy kila tanre sinla, ita hoḳolta zanaila. Zinda Isare hoḳol shagride deḳla
24.36: Sahabi oḳole to ota loia batchit ḳorra, ou shomoy aḳta-u Isa nize ono aia tarar mazḳano ubaia ḳoila, “Assalamu alaikum.”
24.37: Tane dekia tara kub ḍoraigela, mono ḳorla but aise.
24.38: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Tumra oto ostir oigelae ḳene? Ḳene tumrar dilo shondoy hamailo?
24.39: Amar at-fao balamonte deḳo, deḳo na, i to ami. Amare ataia deḳo, butor to amar laḳan aḍḍi-mangsho nai.”
24.40: Oḳan ḳoia tain nizor at-fao tarare deḳaila.
24.41: Oile tara tane dekia oto beshi kushi oila, kushir suṭe bedisha bonigela, kunta bishash ḳorta farla na. Teu Isae tarare ḳoila, “Ino ḳaibar kunta ase ni?”
24.42: Tara eḳ ṭukra biran mas tanre dila.
24.43: Ou mas tain hoḳlor samne ḳaila.
24.44: Ḳaia erare ḳoila, “Ami zebla tumrar loge aslam, hou shomoy tumrare ḳoislam na ni, Musa nobir Tourat Shorif, nobi oḳlor sohifa, ar Zobur Shorifor maze zeta leḳa ase, ita hoḳolta nichchit folibo.”
24.45: Oḳan ḳoia hari, tain sahabi oḳlor dilor duar kuli dila, zate Allar kalamor mani era buzta faroin.
24.46: Tain ḳoila, “Allar kalamo leḳa ase, al-Mosie bout ḳoṭin duk-toklif faiba, moutor tin dinor din tain murda taki zinda oiziba.
24.47: Zekunu manshe tan name touba ḳorle, gunar mafi magile mafi faibo, ou boyani Zeruzalem taki shuru oia asta duniar hoḳol zatir ḳano fosani lagbo.
24.49: Ar huno, amar batuni bafe zeta dan ḳorar oada ḳorsoin, ami ita tumrar gese bezimu. Oile behest taki bol-takkot na faoa forzonto, tumra ou Zeruzalemo roio.” Hozrot Isare behesto tulia neoa oilo
24.50: Bade Isae sahabi oḳolre loia Bayt-Ania gaur muko gela, gia tain at tulia tarare dua dila.
24.51: Ar ou duar halote-u tain tarar ges tone alog oigela, tanre behesto tulia neoa oilo.
24.52: Tara hoḳole tanre soizda ḳoria, kub kushi oia Zeruzalemo firot aila.
24.53: Ar Baytul-Mukaddosor maze hamesha Allar hamd-tarif ḳorat roila. Amin.

1.1: Foyla-u kalam asla, kalam Allar loge asla ar ou kalam nize-u Alla asla.
1.2: Hoḳol foyla ou kalam Allar loge asla.
1.3: Ou kalamor mazdi hokkolta foyda ḳora oisil, zotota foyda ḳora oise, er kunuta-u tanre saṛa foyda oise na.
1.4: Tan maze zindegi asil, hou zindegi-u oilo manshor nur.
1.5: Ou nur andarir maze zoler, oile andaire i nurre ḳobza ḳorto farse na.
1.6: Allae Ehia namor eḳzon manshore duniat faṭaila.
1.7: Ou nuror befare shakki dibar lagi tanre faṭail oilo, zate tan zobanbondi hunia manshe iman ane.
1.8: Tain nize hi nur asla na, oile nuror befare shakki dibar lagi duniat aisla.
1.9: Asol nur oila hou zon, zein hokkol manshore nur dan ḳoroin, tain duniat toshrif anra.
1.10: Ou duniat tain asla, dunia tan usillae foyda oise, ta-o duniar manshe tanre sinlo na.
1.11: Tain nizor zomino aila, tan nizor manshe-u tanre kobul ḳorlo na.
1.12: Oile zoto zone tan ufre iman ania tanre kobul ḳorla, era forteḳ zonre tain Allar ḳas aolad, mani mayar zon bonar eḳtiar dila.
1.13: Ashole ou zon oḳlor zonom to manshor lou taki oise na, shorilor ḳaish ba manshor ichchae-o oise na, iṭa ḳali Alla taki-u oise.
1.14: Ou kalam-u manush surote zonom loila ar amrar maze boshoti korla. Bafor ḳas aolad hishabe tain ze zalal ar mohima faisoin, hou zalal ar mohima amra deḳsi. Tain to hok ar rohomote shullo-ana kamil.
1.15: Ehia nobie tan befare boṛo golae shakki dila, ḳoila, “Ein-u to hou zon, zen befare ami age ḳoislam, amar bade eḳzone toshrif anra, tain ama taki-o mohan, amar bout ag taki-u to tain asoin.”
1.16: Tain shullo-ana kamil oae amra hoḳole rohomotor ufredi aro rohomot faisi.
1.17: Musa nobir marfote Allae shoriot dan ḳorsila, oile Isa al-Mosir marfote hok ar rohomot aise.
1.18: Allare to ḳeu kunudin deḳse na. Tan loge roura hou eḳmatro fut, mani tan ḳas mayar zon, zein shoyong Moula, tain-u Allare zair ḳorsoin. Hozrot Ehia (a:) ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosir foyla ummot (1:19–51) Hozrot Ehia (a:)or forisoy
1.19: Ihudi neta oḳole Zeruzalem ṭaun taki zebla ḳoyzon imam ar Lebi shomazor kisu manshore Ehia nobir gese faṭaila, ou shomoy Ehiae erar gese shakki dila. Tara zebla zikaila, “Sab, afne ashole ḳe?”
1.20: Ehia nobie kunta na lukaia shikar oia ḳoila, “Ami to al-Mosi nae.”
1.21: Teu tara tanre zikaila, “Te afne ḳe? Afne Ilias nobi ni?” Tain ḳoila, “Na, ami Ilias nae.” Ou tara zikaila, “Te afne kita agor zomanar hou nobi ni?” Tain zuaf dila, “Ji na.”
1.22: Tara hirbar tanre zikaila, “Taile afne ḳe? Amrare zera faṭaisoin, amra firia gia kita ḳoitam, afnar nizor forisoy kita?”
1.23: Ehiae zuaf dila, “Ami oilam hou aoaz, zen befare Hozrot Ishaya nobie batai gesoin, Morubumir maze zure zure eḳzone elan ḳorra, tumra Malikor fot sohi koro.”
1.24: Ehia nobir gese zerare faṭail oisil, era asla Forishi shomazor manush.
1.25: Tara tanre zikaila, “Afne zebla al-Mosi-o nae, Ilias nobi-o nae ba agor zomanar hou nobi-o nae, te afne ḳene manshore toubar gusol dira?”
1.26: Ehia nobie tarare zuaf dila, “Ami to manshore fani dia toubar gusol ḳorairam, oile afnarar maze oula eḳ buzurg zon asoin, zenre afnara sinoin na.
1.27: I buzurg hou zon, zein amar bade toshrif anar ḳota asil. Tan faor zutar fitagesa kular laḳ-o ami nae.”
1.28: Zordan gangor aroḳ faro Bayt-Ania gaut, Ehia nobi ze zagat toubar gusol ḳoranit asla, hou zagat ou soal-zuaf oilo. Allai meṛa-baichcha
1.29: Bador din Ehia nobie deḳla Huzur Isa tan gese aira, dekia ḳoila, “Ou deḳrae ni Allai meṛa-baichcha, zen usillae hokkol manshor gunar mafi oy.
1.30: Ein oila hou zon, zen befare ami age ḳoislam, amar bade eḳzone toshrif anra, ashole tain amar ag taki-u asoin, ar tain ama taki-o ijjoti zon.
1.31: Age to ami tanre sintam na, oile Boni Israilor maze tain zate forisiti fain, otar lagi ami age aia manshore fanidi toubar gusol ḳorairam.”
1.32: Bade Ehia nobie ou shakki dila, ḳoila, “Ami deḳlam ḳoitoror surote Pak Ruhu asman taki lamia aila, aia en ufre azila.
1.33: Ami to tanre sintam na, oile toubar gusol ḳoranir lagi zein amare bezisoin, tain amare batai disoin zen, Allai Pak Ruhre zar ufre lamia aite deḳbae, ein-u hou zon, zein manshore Pak Ruhdi torikabondi diba.
1.34: Te ami ita deḳlam, dekia hari shakki diram, ein-u Ibnulla, Allar ḳas mayar zon.” Hozrot Isar foyla sahabi
1.35: Bador din Ehia nobi ar tan duizon ummot hirbar hou zagat aila.
1.36: Ou shomoy Hozrot Isa aṭia zaira, tanre dekia Ehiae ḳoila, “Ou deḳrae ni Allai meṛa-baichcha.”
1.37: Ehia nobir ou ḳota hunia hou duiozon Isar ḳore ḳore roana oigela.
1.38: Isae ḳoredi firia erare deḳla, dekia ḳoila, “Kita ba, tumra kita sao?” Tara zuaf dila, “Robbi, (mani ustad), afne kuai taḳoin?”
1.39: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Ao na, aia dekia zao.” Teu tara tan loge gela, gia deḳla tain kun zagat taḳoin, ar tara-o asta din tan loge roila. Ou shomoy asoror oḳt aichche.
1.40: Ehia nobir ḳota hunia ze duizon Isar ḳore ḳore gesla, erar eḳzonor nam oilo Andrias, en bair nam Saimon-Fitor.
1.41: Ou Andriase foyla tan bai Saimonre tukaia bar ḳoria ḳoila, “Baisab huncho ni, amra to al-Mosire deḳsi.” Al-Mosir mani oilo Allar ḳelafoti faoa zon.
1.42: Andriase Saimonre loia Isar gese aila. Isae Saimonor bae saia ḳoila, “Tumi to Saimon bin Iuhanna, oile oḳon taki tumare Koifa name ḍaḳa oibo.” Koifa mani Fitor, ba fattor.
1.43: Bador din Isae niot ḳorla, Galil zilat zaitagi. Ou shomoy tain Filifre deḳla, dekia ḳoila, “O Filif ao, aia amar ummot o.”
1.44: Filif asla Bayt-Soyda gaur manush. Andrias ar Fitoror baṛi-o asil ou gaut.
1.45: Filife Notonelre tukaia bar ḳoria ḳoila, “Musa nobir Tourat Kitabo ar asmani nobi oḳlor sohifat zen ḳota leḳa ase, amra to tanre deḳsi. Tain to Nasarot gaur Isa, tan bafor nam Iusuf.”
1.46: Ikan hunia Notonele Filifre ḳoila, “Dut! Nasarot taki bala kunta baroy ni?” Filife ḳoila, “Te aia deḳo.”
1.47: Isae deḳla, Notonel tan gese aira, dekia ḳoila, “Ou deḳrae ni eḳzon ḳaṭi Boni Israili. Tar maze kunu dundur-mundur nai.”
1.48: Teu Notonele Isare zikaila, “Afne amare ḳemne sinla?” Isae zuaf dila, “Huno, tumare ḍakibar age tumi zebla hou ḍumur gasor tole aslae, hou shomoy ami tumare deḳsi.”
1.49: Ikan hunia Notonele Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, afne-u to Ibnulla, Allar ḳas mayar zon. Afne-u Boni Israilor bashsha.”
1.50: Isae tanre ḳoila, “Tumare hou ḍumur gasor tole deḳsi oḳan ḳoae tumi iman anlae ni? Huno, er taki-o aro bout boṛo boṛo keramoti tumi deḳbaene.”
1.51: Bade Isae ḳoila, “Ami tumrare hok kota ḳoiram, tumra deḳbae behest kuligese, ar Allar firista oḳol ami bin-Adomor ufre uṭa-nama ḳorra.”

2.1: Er duidin bade Galil zilar Kanna gaut eḳ bia asil. Hozrot Isar ma ou biat asla.
2.2: Ou biat Isa ar tan sahabi oḳole-o daot faisla.
2.3: Biar onusṭano zebla anguror shorbot fuṛai gelo, ou shomoy Isar maʼe Isare ḳoila, “Erar anguror shorbot shesh oigese.”
2.4: Isae tan maʼre ḳoila, “Mai go, ita to amar bishoy nae. Oḳono amar shomoy oise na.”
2.5: Oile tan maʼe ḳadimdar oḳolre ḳoila, “Oba, tain zeta ḳoin, ota-u ḳoro.”
2.6: Ihudir shoriot mafik uzu ḳorar lagi hino fattoror soyṭa gamla asil. Ita eḳoṭat onuman dui-tin mon fani dorto.
2.7: Isae ḳadimdar oḳolre ḳoila, “Ou gamlainto fani boro.” Teu tara iguin ṭefe ṭefe bori dilo.
2.8: Bade tain ḳoila, “On taki tuṛa fani nia fordan baburchire deo.” Teu tara ola-u ḳorlo.
2.9: Baburchie ou fani kaia deḳla, ita to anguror shorbot. Oile i shorbot kuai taki ailo, ikan tain zanta na. Ḳali kadimdar oḳole zanto. Erlagi baburchie biar noshare ḍakia ḳoila,
2.10: “Foyla hoḳole-u manshore ḳaṭi shorbot ḳaite dey. Manshe ichchamoto ḳaoar bade zebla shesh oizae, ou shomoy ze shorbot dey, ita foyla taki kisu bezal taḳe. Oile tumi kaṭi shorbot oḳono raḳso.”
2.11: Hozrot Isae Galil zilar Kanna gaut nishana hishabe ou foyla keramoti deḳaia nizor mohima zair ḳorla. Ita dekia sahabi oḳole tan ufre iman anla.
2.12: Erbade Isae tan ma, baiain ar sahabi oḳolre loia Kofornaum ṭauno gela, gia ḳoydin hono roila. Zeruzalem Baytul-Mukaddoso Isa al-Mosi
2.13: Ihudir Azadi Id gonai gele Isa Zeruzalem ṭauno aila.
2.14: Zeruzalemo aia tain deḳla, fobitro Baytul-Mukaddos Kaba goror shimanat kurbanir goru, meṛa ar faro besa-kina soler, ar ṭeḳar baṭṭar ḳarbari oḳol-o boi roisoin.
2.15: Ita dekia tain doṛi dia eḳṭa sabuk banaila, ar sabuk dia hoḳol goru-meṛa ar manshore intone ḳedai dila. Ar ṭeḳar baṭṭar ḳarbari oḳlor ṭeḳa-foysha sitraia, tarar kesh bakso ulṭaia falaila.
2.16: Faro besra oḳolre Isae ḳoila, “In tone hokkolta horao. Amar bafor gorre bazar banaio na.”
2.17: Ou shomoy Pak Kitabor ou ḳota sahabi oḳlor mono oigelo, “Tumar goror lagi amar ze mohobbot, ou mohobbote-u amar dilor maze agunir laḳan zoler.”
2.18: Isar i kamor lagi Ihudi neta oḳole tanre zikaila, “Ita ḳorar odikar ze tumar ase, tar forman hishabe tumi kun keramoti deḳaibae?”
2.19: Tain zuaf dila, “Afnara ou Kaba gor bangilaukka, ami tin dinor bitre hirbar tulmu.”
2.20: Ikan hunia tara ḳoila, “I ebadot ḳana banaite soysallish bosor lagsil, ar tumi kita tin dinor bitre banailibae ni?”
2.21: Oile Isae ino Allar gor bolte nizor shorilor ḳota-u ḳoisoin.
2.22: Erlagi Isa mora taki zinda oar bade sahabi oḳlor mono oisil, tain ou ḳota-u ḳoisla. Teu sahabi oḳole Pak Kitabor ḳota ar Isae zeta ḳoisla, ota ekin ḳorla.
2.23: Azadi Idor shomoy Isae Zeruzalem roia zeta keramoti kam ḳorsila, ita dekia bout manshe tan ufre iman anlo.
2.24: Oile Isae nizore tarar gese dora dila na, ḳaron tain hoḳol manshore sinta.
2.25: Manshor befare tan kunu shakkir zorur asil na, tain erar dilor ḳobor zanta.

3.1: Forishi oḳlor maze Nikodim name Ihudi oḳlor eḳzon neta asla.
3.2: Eḳdin rait tain aia Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, amra zani, afne eḳzon ustad hishabe Allar ges taki aisoin. Afne zeta keramoti kam ḳorra, Alla loge na taḳle ḳeu ita ḳorto fare na.”
3.3: Tain Nikodimre ḳoila, “Ami afnare hasau ḳoiram, noya ḳori zonom na loile ḳeu Allar bashshai deḳe na.”
3.4: Teu Nikodime tanre ḳoila, “Manush buṛa oigele hirbar zonom loy kila? Dusrabar maʼr feṭo hamaia zonom loy ni?”
3.5: Isae zuaf dila, “Ami afnare hasau ḳoiram, fani ar Pak Ruhu taki zonom na oile ḳeu Allar bashshait hamaito fare na.
3.6: Roḳto-mangsho taki zetar zonom oy, ita to ḳali roḳto-mangsho. Ar Pak Ruhu taki zetar zonom, ita ruhu.
3.7: Ami ze afnare ḳoilam, noya ḳori zonom loa zorur, ete taijjub oiba na.
3.8: Batash tar zebae ichcha obae zae, ar afne tar aoaz hunoin, oile ḳoi taki ae ar ḳoi zae, ikan zanoin na. Te Pak Ruhu taki zerar zonom oise, tarar belae-o olaḳan oy.”
3.9: Nikodime Isare zikaila, “Ikṭa kila oito fare?”
3.10: Isae zuaf dila, “Afne Boni Israilor ustad oia-o ita buzoin na ni?
3.11: Afnare hasau ḳoiram, amra zeta zani oḳan-u ḳoi, ar zeta deḳsi ou befare shakki dei. Oile afnara amrar shakki manoin na.
3.12: Ami afnarare duniabi befare ḳoile zebla ekin ḳoroin na, te behesti befar ḳoile kila ekin ḳorba?
3.13: Zein behesto taḳoin ar behest taki aisoin, hou bin-Adom saṛa ar ḳeu behesto uṭsoin na.
3.14: “Morubumir maze Musa nobie zela hafre usat tulchila, ola ami bin-Adomre-o usat tula oibo.
3.15: Zate ze zone amar ufre iman ane, he aḳeri zindegi hasil ḳore.
3.16: Alla Pake duniar manshore oto beshi maya ḳorla, i mayar ḳatire tan ḳas mayar zonre dan ḳorla. Ze manshe ou mayar zonor ufre iman ane, he binash oy na, borong aḳeri zindegi hasil ḳore.
3.17: “Allae manshore dushi forman ḳorar lagi tan mayar zonre duniat faṭaisoin na. Ou mayar zonor ḳatire manshe zate nazat fae, erlagi-u faṭaisoin.
3.18: Ze zone ou mayar zonor ufre iman ane, tar kunu bisar oy na, oile ze iman ane na, tare age-u dushi shaibosto ḳora oigese. Ḳaron Allar eḳmatro mayar zon Ibnullar ufre he iman anche na.
3.19: Tare dushi shaibosto ḳora oise, ḳaron duniat nur zair oise. Oile manshor bod ḳamor lagi nur taki andairre beshi bala faise.
3.20: Ze manshe bod ḳam ḳore, he nurre ginnae, tar bod ḳam oḳol zair oizibo ḳori he nuror gese ae na.
3.21: Oile ze zon hok-halalir fote sole, he nuror gese ae, zate tar hoḳol ḳam Allar munsha mafik oise ḳori forman oy.” Ehia nobie Isar befare ḳoira
3.22: Erbade Hozrot Isa ar sahabi oḳol Ehudia elaḳat aila. Hino tain sahabi oḳlor loge kisu din ḳaṭaila ar manshore toubar gusol ḳoraila.
3.23: Ou shomoy Salim namor ek gaur ḳandat Oinun namor eḳ zagat Ehiae-o toubar gusol ḳoranit asla. Hou zagat bout fani taḳae dole dole manush aia toubar gusol loila.
3.24: Ehia nobire ou shomoy-o zelo bondi kora oise na.
3.25: Ou shomoy shoriot mafik fak-saf oar befar loia, Ehia nobir ummot oḳole Ihudir eḳ alimor loge torko lagai dila.
3.26: Bade tain-tain Hozrot Ehiar gese aia ḳoila, “Huzur, zein Zordan gangor hofaro afnar loge asla, ar zar befare afne shakki disla, deḳra ni, hoḳol manush tan gese zairagi ar tain erare toubar gusol dira.”
3.27: Ikan hunia Ehiae ḳoila, “Behest taki deoa na oile ḳeu kunta fae na.
3.28: Tumra-u to huncho, ami koisi, ami al-Mosi nae, oile tan age amare faṭani oise.
3.29: Zar gese ḳoinare bia deoa oy, ein-u nosha. Noshar duste ḳali ubaia noshar mat hunoin ar tan golar aoaz hunia kushi oin. Ou laḳan amar kushi-o aiz fura oilo.
3.30: Tanre boṛo oite oibo ar ami hori zaitam oibo.” Behest taki zein aisoin
3.31: Zein ufor taki ain, ein hoḳlor ufre. Oile ze dunia taki ae, he to duniar, he duniabi mat-u mate. Zein behest taki ain, tan ashon hoḳlor ufre.
3.32: Tain hono zeta deḳsoin ar hunchoin, otar shakki-u dein. Ḳeu tan shakki mane na.
3.33: Oile ze zone tan shakki kobul ḳorse, he oḳan dia-u forman ḳore, Allar kalam-u hasa.
3.34: Allae zenre faṭaisoin, tain Allar kalam-u batain, ḳaron Allae tanre furafur ḳoria Pak Ruhu dan ḳoroin.
3.35: Bafe tan futre, mani tan ḳas mayar zonre maya ḳoroin ar tan ato-u hoḳolta disoin.
3.36: Ze manshe Allar ḳas mayar zonor ufre iman anche, he aḳeri zindegi failise. Oile ze tanre mane na, he kunumonte-u aḳer faito nae borong tar ufre Allar gozob foṛbo.

4.1: Forishi oḳole hunla, Hozrot Isae Ehia nobi taki beshi manshore tan ummot banaisoin, ar toubar gusol ḳoraira.
4.2: Oile Isae nize toubar gusol ḳoraira na, tan ummot oḳole-u ḳoraira.
4.3: Hozrot Isae i kobor faia, Ehudia zila saṛia hirbar Galil zilat zaoar lagi roana oila.
4.4: Zaoar ḳalo tanre Shomoriar mazdi zaoa lagsil.
4.5: Foto tain Shomoriar Shukar namor ek gaur daro aila. Hozrot Iakube tan fua Iusufre ze zomin dan ḳorsla, ou zominḳan asil hou gaur daro.
4.6: I zomino Hozrot Iakubor kua asil. Isa aṭte aṭte heran oia ou kuar ḳasat ziraila. Ou shomoy onuman duifor oigese.
4.7: -8 Ermaze Shomoria zatir eḳ beṭie fani tulat ailo, ar kuar ḳasat Isa eḳla asla, ḳaron tan sahabi oḳol ḳani-fani loar lagi bazaro geslagi. Isae taire ḳoila, “O mai, amare tuṛa fani kaoaukka.”
4.9: Beṭie ḳoilo, “Ami to Shomoria zatir manush. Afne eḳzon Ihudi oia amar gese fani saira kila?” Beṭie ikan ḳoilo, ḳaron Shomoria zatir loge Ihudi manshor kunuzat mil-mish ba sola-fira asil na.
4.10: Isae taire ḳoila, “Tumi zudi zantae Allar dan kita, ar ḳe tumar gese fani saira, te tumi nize-u tan gese fani sailae one, ar tain tumare zinda fani dila one.”
4.11: Beṭie ḳoilo, “Sab, afnar gese to fani tular kunta nai, ar i kua-o goin. Te zinda fani kuai taki faila?
4.12: Afne kunu amrar mul murobbi Iakub nobi taki boṛo ni? Tain-u amrar lagi i kua kudisla. Tain ar tan fuainte-o ou kuar fani kaita, ar tan foshur falre-o ḳaoaita.”
4.13: Teu Isae ḳoila, “Ze zone i kuar fani kaibo, tar hirbar fias lagbo.
4.14: Oile amar deoa fani ze ḳaibo, tar kunu shomoy-u fias lagto nae. Borong i fani tar dilor maze zornar laḳan utlia uṭbo ar aḳeri zindegi dan ḳorbo.”
4.15: Teu beṭie Isare ḳoilo, “Huzur, te amare-o hou fani deukka, zate amar fias na lage, ar fanir lagi ino aoa na lage.”
4.16: Isae beṭire ḳoila, “Te zao, tumar zamaire ono loia ao.”
4.17: Beṭie ḳoilo, “Sab, amar to kunu zamai nai.” Isae ḳoila, “Tumi ṭik-u ḳoiso, tumar zamai nai.
4.18: Ḳaron er age to tumar faszon zamai oigesoin, ar oḳon ze tumar loge ase, he tumar zamai nae. Tumi hasa ḳota-u ḳoilae.”
4.19: Ikan hunia beṭie Isare ḳoilo, “Huzur, oḳon ami buzlam, afne eḳzon nobi.
4.20: Amrar baf-dadainte ou faṛor ufre-u ebadot ḳorta, oile afnara ḳoin, Zeruzalemo-u manshor ebadot ḳora usit.”
4.21: Isae tanre ḳoila, “Huno, amar matḳan ekin ḳoro. Dekio, oula shomoy aibo zebla tumra i faṛor ufre, ba Zeruzalemor kunuḳano, gaibi baf Allar ebadot ḳortae nae.
4.22: Tumra zare sino na, tar ebadot ḳoro, oile amra zan ebadot ḳori, tanre amra sini. Zano ni, nazator fot to Ihudi oḳlor mazdi-u aise.
4.23: Huno, ola shomoy aibo, borong oḳon-u aichche, zebla asol ebadotḳari oḳole hokkani ruhe gaibi baf Allar ebadot ḳorba. Gaibi bafe-o olaḳan ebadotḳarir tallash ḳoroin.
4.24: Allatala oilagi ruhu, erlagi zara tan ebadot ḳorba, tara hokkani ruhe tan ebadot ḳora lagbo.”
4.25: Bade ou beṭie ḳoilo, “Ami zani, al-Mosi aira. Tain aia hoḳolta amrare zanaiba.”
4.26: Isae ou beṭire ḳoila, “Ami-u hein, zein oḳon tumar loge matira.”
4.27: Ou shomoy sahabi oḳole aia deḳla, Isae eḳ beṭir loge matira, dekia tara taijjub oigela. Ta-o tara ḳeu zikaila na, afne kita saira ba en loge matira ḳene.
4.28: Bade beṭie tair fanir ḳoyla toia gaur manshore gia ḳoilo,
4.29: “Tumra aia eḳzonre deki zao. Amar zindegit zeta ḳorsi, ita hoḳolta-u tain ḳoilisoin. Te tain-u kita hou al-Mosi ni?”
4.30: Ita hunia gaur manush bar oia Isar gese aoa dorla.
4.31: Bade tan sahabi oḳole tanre onurud ḳori koila, “Huzur, kunta ḳaukka.”
4.32: Tain ḳoila, “Amar gese ila ḳani ase, ze ḳanir befare tumra zano na.”
4.33: Ikan hunia sahabi oḳole eḳe-oinne zikaila, “Te tanre ḳeu kunu ḳani ania dise na kita?”
4.34: Teu Isae tarare ḳoila, “Zein amare bezisoin, tan morzi mafik tan ḳam fura ḳora-u amar ḳani.
4.35: “Tumra ḳo na ni, ‘Ar sair mash bade-u foshol ḳaṭar shomoy aibo’? Oile ami tumrare ḳoiram, bala ḳori eḳbar ḳetedi saia deḳo, foshol fakia ḳaṭar zuka oigese.
4.36: Foshol ḳaṭrae oḳon-u beton faira ar aḳeror lagi foshol dola ḳorra. Erlagi zein zala bain dein ar zein foshol ḳaṭoin, duiozon-u homan kushi oin.
4.37: Ete ou silleḳor forman oy, ‘Eḳzone bain dein, aroḳzone ḳaṭoin.’
4.38: Ami-o tumrare ola foshol ḳaṭat faṭaisi, ze fosholor lagi tumra menot ḳorso na. Oinno manshe menot ḳorse ar tumra ou menotor foshol ḳaṭiso.”
4.39: Ze beṭir zindegir hoḳolta Isae ḳoilisoin, ou beṭir shakki hunia hou gaur bout Shomoria manshe Isar ufre iman anla.
4.40: Tara Isare gia minot ḳori koila, tarar oḳano roibar lagi. Erdae tain dui din hono roila.
4.41: Ou shomoy tan talim hunia aro bout manshe iman anla.
4.42: Ar gaur manshe ou beṭire ḳoila, “Tumar ḳotae amra iman anchi na, amra nize-u tan mat hunia buztam farsi, ein-u zogotor asol toraneala.” Hozrot Isar dusra keramoti
4.43: Shomoriat duidin roia hari Hozrot Isa nizor baṛi Galil zilat gelagi.
4.44: Zudio tain age ḳoisla, kunu nobire-u nizor desho dam deoa oy na,
4.45: tebou ou shomoy tara tanre kobul ḳorla. Ḳaron idor shomoy Isae Zeruzalemo zeta keramoti deḳaisla, Galilor manush hono taḳae tara ita deḳsla ḳori tain Galilo aile tara kobul ḳorla.
4.46: Bade Isa hirbar Galilor Kanna gaut gela. Ono-u tain fanire anguror shorbot banaisla. Kofornaum ṭauno eḳ shorḳari ofisaror fua kub bemar asil.
4.47: Hozrot Isa Ehudia taki Galil aisoin hunia, ou ofisar tan gese gia minot ḳorla, tain zanu Kofornaum gia en fuagure bala ḳoroin. Ou shomoy tan fua morar foti oigesil.
4.48: Isae ou ofisarre ḳoila, “Kunu nishana ba keramoti kam na deḳle afnara kunumonte-u iman anta nae.”
4.49: Teu ofisare ḳoila, “Huzur, doya ḳori zoldi aukka, fuagur zan taḳte aukka.”
4.50: Isae tanre ḳoila, “Afne zaukkagi, afnar fua bala oigese.” Isar ḳota ekin ḳoria ein gelagi.
4.51: Hasau, hou ofisar baṛit zaoar fote tan gulam oḳole aia ḳobor ḳoilo, “Sab, afnar fuar bemar ḳomigese.”
4.52: Tain erare zikaila, “He kun shomoy bala oise?” Tara ḳoila, “Ḳail duifor taki tan taf saṛi dise.”
4.53: Teu ofisaror mono oilo, ṭik duifori bala Isae tanre ḳoisla, “Afne zaukkagi, afnar fua bala oigese.” Erlagi ou ofisar ar tan foribaror hoḳole Isar ufre iman anla.
4.54: Hozrot Isa Ehudia tone Galilo aoar bade ou dusra keramoti nishana deḳaila.

5.1: Itar bade Ihudi oḳlor idor shomoy aile Isa Zeruzalemo gelagi.
5.2: Zeruzalemo meṛa-dorzar ḳandat eḳṭa furki asil, ou furkit siṛi banda fasḳan gaṭ asil, faso gaṭor ufre fasḳan sauni. Ibrani bashae i furkir nam Bayt-Soda.
5.3: Ou gaṭo bout zator bemari foṛi roito. Lula-lengṛa, anda, ar bemare zerar shoril ekkebare hukai gese, tara-o ono roito.
5.4: Maze maze eḳzon firista aia ou furkir fani laṛaita, laṛanir bade-u foyla ze zon fanit lamto, tar zoto boṛo bemar ouk bala oizito. Erdae ou bemari oḳole fani laṛanir ashae ono foṛi roito.
5.5: Erar maze ola eḳzon bemari asil, ze beṭa aṭtish bosor taki bemar.
5.6: Bout din taki he ono foṛi roise hunia Isae tare zikaila, “Kita ba, tumar ichcha ni tumi bala oizitae?”
5.7: Beṭae ḳoilo, “Huzur, amar to ila ḳeu nai, zein fani laṛanir loge loge-u amare furkit lamaito. Ami lamte lamte aroḳzon gia lami zae.”
5.8: Isae ere ḳoila, “Te uṭo, tumar bisna loia aṭa-sola ḳoro.”
5.9: Loge loge-u ou bemari bala oigelo, ar tar bisna tulia sola-fira ḳorlo. Hi din asil Zummabar, Zummabare kunuzat ḳam ḳora zaiz nae.
5.10: Erdae Ihudi neta oḳole ou beṭare ḳoila, “Aiz to Zummabar, te aiz tumar bisna tulia neoa zaiz nae.”
5.11: Oile he ḳoilo, “Zein amare bala ḳorsoin, tain-u amare ḳoila, uṭo, tumar bisna loia aṭa-sola ḳoro.”
5.12: Teu neta oḳole beṭare zikaila, “Ou manushgu ḳegu, zegie tumare ḳoise, bisna loia sola-fira ḳortae?”
5.13: Oile ou beṭae to zanto na, tain ḳe, hi zagat bout manshe biṛ ḳorilisoin dekia, Isa hin tone geslagi.
5.14: Bade Isae ou beṭare Baytul-Mukaddoso faia ḳoila, “Huno, tumi to bemar taki bala oigeso. Te ar kunu guna ḳorio na, zate tumar shorbonash na oy.”
5.15: Teu ou beṭae gia Ihudi neta oḳolre ḳoilo, tare zein bala ḳorsoin en nam Isa. Hozrot Isar Allai eḳtiar
5.16: Isae Zummabare bemarire bala ḳorae Ihudi neta oḳole tanre marilita saila.
5.17: Oile Isae tarare ḳoila, “Huno, amar gaibi bafe hamesha ḳam ḳorra ar ami-o ḳorram.”
5.18: Ikan hunia tara tanre zane marar lagi aro gorom oia fot tukanit roila. Tara mono ḳorsil, tain ḳali Zummabaror niom bangisoin na, tain Alla Pakre baf ḍakia shiriki-o ḳorsoin.
5.19: Erlagi tain ou neta oḳolre ḳoila, “Ami nichchit hok kota ḳoiram, fute to nize nize kunta ḳorta faroin na, oile tan bafre zeta ḳam ḳorat deḳoin, tain ḳali ota-u ḳoroin, bafe zeta ḳoroin, fute-o to ota ḳoroin.
5.20: Bafe tan futre maya ḳoroin ar tain nize ze ḳam ḳoroin, ita hoḳolta-u futre deḳain. Ar ita taki aro boṛo boṛo kudroti kam futre deḳaiba, zeta dekia afnara taijjub oiziba.
5.21: Bafe zela murdare zinda ḳori tuloin, fute-o oula zerare ichcha zindegi dan ḳoroin.
5.22: Bafe ḳeuror bisar-o ḳoroin na, tan hoḳol bisaror bar futor ato disoin,
5.23: zate bafre zela hoḳole ijjot ḳore, oula futre-o ijjot ḳore. Futre ze ijjot ḳore na, he ashole hou bafre-o ijjot ḳore na, zein i futre bezisoin.
5.24: “Ami afnarare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, ze zone amar kalam hune ar zein amare faṭaisoin tan ufre iman ane, he to aḳeri zindegi failise. Tare ar dushi shaibosto ḳora oito nae. He to mout taki zindegit faṛi dilaise.
5.25: Ar ami hasau ḳoiram, ila eḳ zomana aibo, borong oḳon-u aichche, zebla murda oḳole ami Ibnullar golar aoaz hunba, ar zara hunba tara zinda oiba.
5.26: Itar ḳaron oilo, baf nize zela zindegir malik, tan futre-o oula zindegir malikana disoin.
5.27: Bafe futre manshor bisar ḳorar eḳtiar disoin, ḳaron ein-u to bin-Adom.
5.28: Te ita hunia afnara taijjub oiba na, zanoin ni, oula shomoy aior, zebla Allar futor golar aoaz hunia murda oḳol ḳoybor taki bar oia aiba.
5.29: Ar zera nek kam ḳorsoin, tara behesti zindegi faoar lagi uṭba, oile zera naformanir maze zindegi kaṭaise, tara uṭba shaza faoar lagi.
5.30: “Ami to nize nize kunta ḳortam fari na, ami zela huni ola bisar ḳori. Ami hok bisar ḳori, ḳaron ami amar nizor ichchae ḳam ḳortam sai na, ḳali zein amare faṭaisoin tan morzi fura ḳortam sai. Nizor befare Hozrot Isa
5.31: “Ami zudi nizor befare nize shakki dei, te i shakki shoṭik nae.
5.32: Oile dusra zone-o amar befare shakki dira, ar ami zani, tain ze shakki dira, ita hasa.
5.33: Afnara to Ehia nobir gese ḳobria faṭaia zikaisoin, tain-o hokor fokke shakki disoin.
5.34: Ar ami kunu manshor shakkir ufre borosha ḳori na, oile afnara zate nazat faia zan basaita faroin, erdae ita ḳoiram.
5.35: Hozrot Ehia-u asla hou zalail mushal, ze mushale for disil. Afnara-o tuṛa ḳoydin ou mushalor foror maze kushi korte razi oisla.
5.36: “Oile Ehia nobir shakki tone-o aro boṛo shakki amar ase, ḳaron amar gaibi bafe ze ḳamor lagi amare faṭaisoin, ami ota-u ḳorram. Ar ou ḳamor shakkie-u buza zae, amare amar gaibi bafe bezisoin.
5.37: Tain-u to hou baba, zein amare faṭaisoin, tain nize-o amar befare shakki disoin. Afnara kunu shomoy tan golar aoaz hunchoin na, ar tanre deḳsoin-o na.
5.38: Esaṛa tan kalam to afnarar dilo roy na, ḳaron tain zare faṭaisoin, en ufre afnara iman anoin na.
5.39: “Afnara to kub mon dia Asmani Kitab tilaot ḳoroin, mono ḳoroin ita tilaot ḳorle aḳeri zindegi faiba. Oile ou kitab to amar befare shakki dey.
5.40: Erbade-o afnara zindegi faoar lagi amar gese aita sain na.
5.41: “Ami to manshor ges taki tarif faoar ashae aisi na,
5.42: oile ami zani, Allar bae afnarar kunu mohobbot nai, ami to afnarare sini.
5.43: Ami amar gaibi bafor nam loia aisi, ta-o afnara amare ekin ḳorra na. Oile dusra ḳeu zudi tar nizor name ae, te tare afnara ekin ḳorba.
5.44: Afnara eḳe-oinnor ges taki tarif faita sain, oile ze tarif Allar ges tone faoa zae, itar lagi kunu sesṭa ḳoroin na. Te afnara ḳemne ekin ḳorba?
5.45: Afnara mono ḳorba na, ami amar babar gese afnaintore dushi banaimu. Oile ze Musa nobir ufre afnara borosha ḳori asoin, hou Musae-u afnaintore dushi koira.
5.46: Afnara zudi Musa nobire ekin ḳorta, te amare-o ekin ḳorla one, i Musa nobie to amar befare-u leḳsoin.
5.47: Oile afnara zebla tan leḳare-u ekin ḳoroin na, te amar mukor ḳotare kila ekin ḳorba?”

6.1: Erbade Hozrot Isa Galil aoror hofaro gelagi, ou aoror aroḳ nam Tibiria aor.
6.2: Bout manush tan ḳore oia zaoat asla, tara to deḳsila, bemari oḳlor ufre tain kila keramoti kam ḳorsoin.
6.3: Hono gia hari tan sahabi oḳolre loia eḳ faṛor ufre boila.
6.4: Ou shomoy Ihudi oḳlor Azadi Id gonai aise.
6.5: Isae saia deḳla, bout manush tan gese uṭia aira, ou tan sahabi Filifre ḳoila, “Ita manshore ḳaoanir lagi amra ruṭi faimu kun zagat?”
6.6: Ashole Filifre forikka ḳorar lagi tain ikan zikaila, oile kila kita ḳorba, ikan tain age-u zanta.
6.7: Filife zuaf dila, “Erare tuṛa tuṛa ḳani dile-o dui-sho dinaror ruṭie kulaito nae.”
6.8: Hono Andrias name Hozrot Isar eḳ sahabi asla. Tain oila Saimon-Fitoror bai.
6.9: Tain Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, ono huru eḳ fuar gese fasḳan aṭar ruṭi ar duiṭa biran mas ase, oile oto manshor maze itae kita oibo?”
6.10: Isae hukum dila, “Tumra ota manshore gashor ufre boai deo.” Teu tara gashor ufre boigela. Ino ḳali beṭa manush-u asla onuman fas azar zon.
6.11: Bade tain ou fasḳan ruṭi ato loia Allar shukria adae ḳoria erare baṭia dila. Oula biran mas-o baṭia dila. Ze zoto sailo, he otoḳan failo.
6.12: Hoḳol manshe feṭ bori kailo. Ḳaia harle Isae tan sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Ḳanir bade zeta roise, tumra ota ekḳano dola ḳoro, kunta falaio na.”
6.13: Era ou fasḳan ruṭir baṛti ṭukrain dola ḳoria baro ṭukri borla.
6.14: Hozrot Isar i keramoti dekia manshe mata-mati lagaila, “Nichchoy ein-u hou nobi, zein duniat toshrif anar ḳota.”
6.15: Teu Isae buzilila, manshe zur ḳoria tanre tarar bashsha bananir lagi dorto sar. Oḳan buzia tain hirbar eḳla-u faṛor ufre gelagi. Aoror fanir ufredi aṭa
6.16: Hainja bala Isar sahabi oḳol aoror faro gela.
6.17: Ar Kofornaum ṭauno zaita ḳori nao loia aor faṛi deoat lagla. I shomoy andair oigesil ar Isa-o tarar loge asla na.
6.18: Aoror mazḳano zaite-u kub tufani batash ar boṛo boṛo ḍeu shuru oilo.
6.19: Onuman tin-sair mail nao baia zaoar bade tara deḳla, Hozrot Isa fanir ufredi aṭia tarar gese aira. Ita dekia sahabi oḳole kub ḍoraigela.
6.20: Ou shomoy Isae tarare ḳoila, “Ḍoraio na, i to ami.”
6.21: Sahabi oḳole tanre nao-o tulta saila, ar tara ze zagat zaoar ḳota, loge loge nao gia hono fosi gelo. Zindegi-ruṭir befare boyan
6.22: Aoror hofaro zeta manush uba asla, bador din tara buzla, agor din ino ekkan nao saṛa dusra kunu nao asil na. Tara eoḳan-o buzla, Isa tan sahabi oḳlor loge nao-o uṭsoin na, borong tara eḳla-u aor far oisoin.
6.23: Oile ze zagat Isae Allar shukria adae ḳoria hari manshore ruṭi kaoaisla, ou zagar gese Tibiria ṭaun taki koyḳan nao ailo.
6.24: Manshe zebla deḳla, Isa ba tan sahabi oḳol ḳeu i zagat nai, ou tara ota naoainto uṭia Isar tallashe Kofornaum ṭauno gelagi.
6.25: Hono gia tara Isare faia ḳoila, “Huzur, afne ino kun shomoy aila?”
6.26: Tain zuaf dila, “Ami tumrare hasa ḳota ḳoiram, tumra amar keramoti nishanar mani buzia amare tukairae na, borong feṭ bori ruṭi kaiso ḳori-u tukairae.
6.27: Oḳon huno, duniabi ze ḳani nosṭo oizae, tar ḳore guria lab kita? Ze ḳani kunudin nosṭo oy na, borong aḳeri zindegi dan ḳore, tar ḳore oia guro. I kani to ami bin-Adome tumrare dimu. Ou eḳtiar ḳali amar ase, amar gaibi baf Allae-u itar forman deḳaisoin.”
6.28: Ikan hunia tara Isare zikaila, “Te Allar ḳam ḳorar lagi amra kita ḳortam?”
6.29: Tain ḳoila, “Allae zare faṭaisoin, tan ufre iman ana-u oilo Allar ḳam.”
6.30: Erbade tara tanre zikailo, “Te afne omon kita nishana deḳaiba, zeta dekia amra afnar ufre iman anmu? Afne kun ḳam ḳorba?
6.31: Amrar baf-dadae to morubumit manna ḳaisla. Pak Kitabo leḳa ase, Allae tarare behesti kani kaoaila.”
6.32: Isae zuaf dila, “Ami tumrare hok kota ḳoiram, behesti ze ruṭi tumra faislae, ita to Musa nobie disoin na, borong amar gaibi bafe-u tumrare asol behesti ruṭi dan ḳoroin.
6.33: Ar Allar deoa hou ruṭi oila ou zon, zein behest taki lamia aia hara zogotre zindegi dein.”
6.34: Teu tara ḳoilo, “Huzur, te ou ruṭi-u amrare hor-hamesha deukka.”
6.35: Isae ḳoila, “Ami-u hou zindegi-ruṭi. Ze zon amar gese ae, tar kunu shomoy buk lage na, ar ze amar ufre iman ane, tar kunu shomoy fiase-o dore na.
6.36: Ami to tumrare mukdi koisi-o, ar tumra amare dekia-o iman anlae na.
6.37: Amar gaibi bafe zerare amar ato dein, tara hoḳol-u amar gese aibo. Ze zon amar gese ae, ami kunumonte-u tare bare falaitam nae.
6.38: Ami kunu amar morzi mafik kam ḳorat aisi ni? Na, borong zein amare faṭaisoin, tan morzi zugaia ḳam ḳorar lagi-u ami behest taki lamia aisi.
6.39: Huno, ze bafe amare faṭaisoin, tan munsha oilo, tain zerare amar ato disoin, ami zanu era eḳzonre-o na arai borong Ruz Hashoro erare zinda halote tuli.
6.40: Amar bafor munsha oilo, zara tan futre dekia tan ufre iman ane, tara zanu aḳer fae. Ar ami-u tarare Ruz Hashoro zinda ḳori tulmu.”
6.41: Ikan hunia Ihudi neta oḳole Isare loia ḳana-gusha lagaila. Ḳaron tain age ḳoisla, “Behest taki ze ruṭi lamia aise, ami-u hou ruṭi.”
6.42: Erlagi tara nize nize ḳoila, “Ogu to Iusufor fua Isa nae ni ba? Amra to tar ma-bafore-o sini. Te he ḳemne ḳoy, he bule behest taki lamia aise?”
6.43: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Tumra nizor maze ḳana-gusha ḳorio na.
6.44: Amar ze gaibi bafe amare faṭaisoin, tain ashik na banaile kunu manush-u amar gese aito fare na. Ar ami-u tare Ruz Hashoro zinda halote tulmu.
6.45: Zano ni, nobi oḳlor kitabo leḳa ase, ‘Tara hoḳole Allar ges taki talim loiba.’ Ar ze zone gaibi bafor ges taki talim faise, hou zon-u amar gese ae.
6.46: “Ou bafre to kunu manshe deḳse na, ḳali Allar ges taki zein aisoin, tain-u i bafre deḳsoin.
6.47: Ami tumrare nichchit hasa ḳota ḳoiram, ze zone amar ufre iman anche, he loge loge-u aḳer failise.
6.49: Tumrar baf-dadainte to morubumit manna ḳaisla, ta-o tarar mout oise.
6.50: Oile ikan oilo hou ruṭi, ze ruṭi behest taki lamia aise, zate ou ruṭi kaia manush moron taki rehai fae.
6.51: Huno, ami-u oilam hou zinda ruṭi, ze ruṭi behest taki lamia aise. Ze zone i ruṭi kaibo, he siroḳalin zindegi faibo. Amar ḳaya-u oilo ou ruṭi. Manshore siroḳalin zindegi dibar niote ami amar deho-ḳaya bilai dimu.”
6.52: Ikan hunia Ihudi neta oḳlor maze torka-torki lagigelo. Tara eḳe-oinne ḳoilo, “I beṭae ḳemne tar shorilor gust amrare ḳaoaibo?”
6.53: Isae ḳoila, “Te huno, ami nichchit hok kota ḳoiram, tumra ami bin-Adomor lou ar gust na ḳaile to tumrar maze zindegi-u nai.
6.54: Ḳeu zudi amar lou ar gust ḳae, te he aḳeri zindegi failise, ar Ruz Hashoror dino ami tare zinda ḳori tulmu.
6.55: Amar gust-u oilo asol ḳani ar amar lou-u oilo asol fani.
6.56: Ze zone amar lou ar gust ḳae, he amar bitre taḳe ar ami-o tar bitre taki.
6.57: Zela amar gaibi zinda bafe amare faṭaisoin, erlagi-u ami-o zinda asi. Oula ze zone amare ḳae, he-o amar lagi zinda roibo.
6.58: Deḳrae ni, ou ruṭi to behest taki lamia aise. Ze ruṭi kaia tumrar baf-dadain mara gesoin, i ruṭi to amar laḳan nae. Amar ou ruṭi ze zone ḳaibo, he siroḳal zinda roibo.”
6.59: Hozrot Isae Kofornaum ṭaunor mosido talim deoar shomoy ita hoḳolta ḳoila. Bout ummotor mono moto-birud
6.60: Talim hunia hari tan ummotor mazor boute ḳoila, “Ita to boṛo gorom talim. Ita ḳegie manbo?”
6.61: Oile Isae tan gaibi bole buzilila, kita loia era ḳana-gusha ḳorra. Buzia erare ḳoila, “Ou talim hunia tumra gabṛi gelae ni?
6.62: Te ami bin-Adom age ze zagat aslam, amare zebla hono uṭi zaoat deḳbae, ou shomoy tumra kita ḳoibae?
6.63: Tumra buzrae ni, manshor shoril to beḳama, ashole ruhu oilogi zindegi. Ami tumrare ze boyani koilam, ita oilogi manshor ruhu ar zindegir befar.
6.64: Oile tumrar maze ḳeu ḳeu oḳono amar ufre iman anche na.” Ḳe tan ufre iman anche na, ar ḳe tanre dushmonor ato dorai dibo, Isae foyla taki-u ita zanta.
6.65: Ou tain ḳoila, “Ou ḳarone ami tumrare ḳoisi, gaibi bafe bol na dile, kunuzon-u amar gese aito fare na.” Hozrot Fitoror shakki
6.66: Isar ita talim hunia tan bout ummot firia gelagi, tara tan loge sola-fira bad dilaila.
6.67: Erlagi Isae tan barozon sahabire zikaila, “Kita ba, tumitain-o zaitaegi ni?”
6.68: Saimon-Fitore zuaf dila, “Huzur, amra ar ḳar gese zaitam? Aḳeri zindeganir talim to ḳali afnar gese-u ase.
6.69: Amra to zanchi ar afnar ufre iman-o anchi, afne-u Allar oada ḳora hou fobitro zon.”
6.70: Teu Isae erare ḳoila, “Ami to tumra barozonre fosond ḳorsi, oile tumrar maze-u eḳzon shoytan ase.”
6.71: Ino tain Saimon Iskariator fua Ihudar befare ḳoila, ou Ihudae bade tane dorai dibo. He asil ou barozon sahabir mazor eḳzon.

7.1: Erbad taki Hozrot Isa Galil zilar bitre-u sola-fira ḳorla. Ihudi neta oḳole tanre zane marilito saisil, erlagi tain ar Ehudia zilat zaita saila na.
7.2: Ou shomoy Ihudi oḳlor Ḍera-goror Idor din gonai aisil.
7.3: Erlagi Isar baiainte tanre ḳoila, “Tumi in tone Ehudia zilat zaogi, teu tumi zeta ḳam ḳorso, ota tumar ummot oḳole-o deḳba.
7.4: Ḳeu zudi nizore manshor gese zair ḳorto sae, te he lukaia kunta ḳore na. Tumi-o zebla omon ḳam ḳorrae, te nizore manshor gese zair ḳoro.”
7.5: Ashole Isar baiainte-o tan ufre iman anchoin na.
7.6: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Amar shomoy oḳono oise na, oile tumrar to shomoy oshomoy kunta nai.
7.7: Duniar manshe tumrare ginnaito nae, oile amare gin ḳore. Ami to tarar befare ḳoiar, tarar hoḳol ḳam-u ḳaraf.
7.8: Te tumra zaogi, gia id ḳoro. Amar shomoy oḳono fura oise na, erlagi ami oḳon zaitam nae.”
7.9: Oḳan ḳoia tain Galil zilat roigela.
7.10: Tan baiain idor mahfilo gia harle tain-o gela, oile kula-mela na gia lukaia gela.
7.11: Idor ḳalo Ihudi neta oḳole tan tallash ḳorat roila, ar ḳoila, “Hou manushṭa kuai.”
7.12: Biṛor maze Isar befare manshe mata-mati korla. Ḳeu ḳeu ḳoilo, “Ein to boṛo bala manush.” Ar ḳeu ḳeu ḳoilo, “Na, na, he to manshore be-foti banailar.”
7.13: Oile Ihudi neta oḳolre ḍoraia, muk kulia tan befare ḳeu kunta matilo na. Idor shomoy Hozrot Isar talim
7.14: Ou idor mazamazi shomoy Hozrot Isa Baytul-Mukaddos Kaba Shorifo gia talim dila.
7.15: Tan talim hunia taijjub oia Ihudi neta oḳole ḳoila, “I manshe madrashat na foṛia oto ilim failo kila?”
7.16: Isae zuaf dila, “Ami ze talim dei, ita amar nizor nae, zein amare bezisoin, ita to tan-u talim.
7.17: Ḳeu zudi tan morzi zugaia solto sae, te he buzbo, i talim Allar ges taki aise, na amar muk taki diram.
7.18: Ze zone nizor mon taki mate, he ḳali nizor tarif faito sae. Oile ze zone tar faṭaneala malikor tarif ḳorar sesṭa ḳore, he hamesha hok-halal taḳe, tar mono kunu dukabazi nai.
7.19: “Tumra kunu Musa nobir shoriot faiso na ni? Oile tumra eḳzone-o to shoriotor hukum-ahkam manrae na. Te tumra ḳene amare marilitae sairae?”
7.20: Teu tara ḳoila, “Tumare bute faise, tumare ḳe marto sar?”
7.21: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Ami kali ekkan ḳam ḳorlam, ar tumra taijjub oigelae.
7.22: Hozrot Musae to tumrare mosolmani kam ḳoranir niom disla, ar Zummabare-o tumra ou ḳam ḳorao. Ashole, i niom Musa nobir ges taki aise na, borong agor moy-murobbir ges taki-u aise.
7.23: Ṭik ase, Musa nobir niom salu raḳar lagi Zummabare-o zudi mosolmani kam ḳorail zae, te ami Zummabare eḳzon bemarire bala ḳorsi dekia amar ufre gusa ḳorrae ḳene?
7.24: Hok-insaf ḳoro, ḳali bargala dekia bisar ḳorio na.” al-Mosi ke?
7.25: Ou shomoy Zeruzalem ṭaunor kisu manshe ḳoilo, “Neta oḳole zare marilta saira, ogu kita hou manush nae ni?
7.26: Te he to deki kula-mela mater, ta-o tara deki kunta ḳoira na. Taile tara kita hasa ḳota buzilisoin ni, ou manush-u al-Mosi?
7.27: Ar amra to zani, ogu kuai taki aise. Oile al-Mosi zebla aiba, ou shomoy ḳeu zanto nae, tain kuai taki aisoin.”
7.28: Erbade Isae Baytul-Mukaddoso talim deoar shomoy zure zure boyan ḳorla, “Afnara amare-o sinoin, ar ami kuai taki aisi ikan-o zanoin. Hunoukka, ami niz taki aisi na, hok Alla Pake-u amare faṭaisoin.
7.29: Afnara tanre sinoin na, oile ami sini. Ḳaron ami tan ges taki-u aisi ar tain-u amare faṭaisoin.”
7.30: Ikan hunia manshe Isare dorilito sailo, oile tan shomoy fura oise na gotike ḳeu tan gotro at tullo na.
7.31: Ar erar mazor boute tan ufre iman ania ḳoilo, “Ein to bout keramoti deḳaisoin, al-Mosi aia kunu er saite beshi keramoti deḳaiba ni?”
7.32: Ita loia manshe ḳana-ḳani korra, ikan Forishi oḳole hunla. Hunia boṛo imam ar Forishi oḳole Isare dorar lagi koyzon faradar-sifai faṭaila.
7.33: Isae ḳoila, “Huno, ami ar beshi din tumrar maze nae. Ami to tan gese zaimugi, zein amare faṭaisoin.
7.34: Tumra amare tukaia faitae nae, ar ami ze zagat roimu, tumra ḳeu hino aitae-o fartae nae.”
7.35: Hozrot Isar ita mat hunia Ihudi neta oḳole eḳe-oinne zikaila, “He kuai zaibogi, zeḳano amra tare tukaia faitam nae? He kita Iunani oḳlor desho zeta Ihudi asoin, hono roia Iunani otare-o talim dibo ni?
7.36: He to ḳoilo, tumra amare tukaia faitae nae, ar ami zeḳano zaimu, tumra hino aitae fartae nae. Tar i mator mani kita?”
7.37: Idor aḳeri din Hozrot Isa ubaia zure zure boyan ḳorla, “Kunu manshor fiase dorle, he amar gese aia fani kauk.
7.38: Ze zone amar ufre iman ane, Pak Kitabor ayat mafik tar dil taki zinda fanir gang bar oibo.”
7.39: Isar ufre iman ania zera Pak Ruhre faiba, hou Pak Ruhur befare tain ou ḳota ḳoila. Tarar gese Pak Ruhre oḳono deoa oise na, ḳaron Isae tan mohima oḳono hasil ḳorsoin na. Hozrot Isare loia doladoli
7.40: Ita hunia kisu manshe ḳoilo, “Ashole ein-u hou oada ḳora nobi.”
7.41: Ar ḳoyzone ḳoilo, “Ein-u al-Mosi.” Oile ḳeu ḳeu ḳoilo, “Al-Mosi kunu Galil zila taki aiba ni?
7.42: Pak Kitabe to batae, al-Mosie zonom loiba Daud nobir bongshot, Daud nobir Betelham gaut.”
7.43: Ou laḳan Isare loia manshor maze doladoli lagigelo.
7.44: Ermaze ḳoyzone tanre dorilito sailo, oile ḳeu tan gotro at tullo na.
7.45: Isare dorar lagi ze faradar-sifai oḳolre faṭani oisil, tara firot aile boṛo imam ar Forishi oḳole zikaila, “Tare doria anlae na ḳene?”
7.46: Era ḳoila, “I manshe zela mat mate, ila mat ḳeu kunudin matise na.”
7.47: Teu Forishi oḳole sifai oḳolre ḳoila, “He tumrare-o ṭogililo ni?
7.48: Deḳso ni, neta ba Forishi shomazor ḳeu tar ufre iman anche ni?
7.49: Ḳali ou zetae shoriotor kunta-u zanoin na, ota-u to. Itar ufre lannot ase.”
7.50: Forishi oḳlor maze eḳzonor nam asil moulana Nikodim, ein age Isar gese gesla.
7.51: Nikodime ḳoila, “Ḳeuror mukor ḳota na hunia ba tar oforad na zania, tare shaza deoar niom kunu amrar shorioto ase ni?”
7.52: -53 Ikan hunia Forishi oḳole Nikodimre ḳoila, “Tumi-o kita Galil zilar manush ni? Pak Kitabo saia deḳo na, Galilo kunu nobir zonom oy na.”

8.1: Bade hoḳol manush zarzir baṛit gelagi, ar Hozrot Isa eḳla Zoytun faṛo gia uṭla.
8.2: Bador din fozor oḳto Isa hirbar Baytul-Mukaddoso gela, gia harle hoḳol manush tan gese ailo. Tain ono boia tarare talim dila.
8.3: Ou shomoy moulana ar Forishi shomazor manshe eḳ zinakur beṭire loia tan gese ailo. Aia beṭire mozlisor mazḳano uba ḳoraia ḳoilo,
8.4: “Huzur, ou beṭi ogu zinar ḳamo dora ḳaise.
8.5: Te Tourat Shorifor maze to Musa nobie zinakur beṭintore fattor maria marilibar hukum disoin. Oḳon afne kita ḳoin?”
8.6: Tara Isare forikka ḳorar niote-u ila ḳoila, zate tanre dushi bananir lagi kunu kut fain. Teu Isae-o mata nisa ḳori angul dia maṭit leḳat lagla.
8.7: Oile tara zebla bar bar tanre zikaira, ou shomoy tain mata tulia ḳoila, “Afnaintor maze ze zone kunudin guna ḳorsoin na, ein foyla ou beṭire fattor maroukka.”
8.8: Oḳan ḳoia tain hirbar mata nisa ḳori maṭit leḳat lagla.
8.9: Ikan hunia neta oḳlor maze buṛa taki shuru ḳoria eḳe eḳe hoḳol-u gelagi. Ḳali Isa ar hou beṭi saṛa dusra ḳeu roilo na.
8.10: Teu Isae mata tulia ou beṭire zikaila, “Kita go mai, ita manush kuai? Ḳeu tumare shazar zuka mono ḳorlo na ni?”
8.11: Beṭie ḳoilo, “Ji na huzur, tara ḳeu to shaza disoin na.” Ou shomoy Isae ḳoila, “Te ami-o tumare kunu shaza ditam nae. Oḳon zaogi, gunar fote ar zindegi kaṭaio na.” Hozrot Isa al-Mosi-u duniar nur
8.12: Bade Hozrot Isae manshore ḳoila, “Ami-u duniar nur. Ze zon amar fote ae, he kunu shomoy andarit fao falaito nae, borong nuror zindegi faibo.”
8.13: Ikan hunia Forishi oḳole ḳoila, “Tumar shakki loa zaito nae, tumi tumar nizor fokke shakki dirae.”
8.14: Teu Isae zuaf dila, “Ami amar nizor fokke shakki dile-o amar shakki to hasa. Ḳaron ami kuai taki aisi ar kuai zairam, ita to tumra zano na, ḳali ami-u zani.
8.15: Tumra to duniabi manshor laḳan bisar ḳoro, oile ami keuror bisar ḳori na.
8.16: Ami keuror bisar ḳorle-o hok bisar ḳormu, ḳaron ami eḳla nae, amar loge amar gaibi baf-o asoin, ou bafe amare bezisoin.
8.17: Tumrar shoriotor maze leḳa ase, duizone zudi eḳ homan shakki dey, te i shakki hasa.
8.18: Olaḳan ami-o amar fokke shakki dei, ar ze bafe amare faṭaisoin, tain-o amar fokke shakki dein.”
8.19: Forishi oḳole tanre ḳoila, “Tumar baf kuai?” Isae zuaf dila, “Tumra amare-o sino na, ar amar bafre-o sino na. Amare sinle amar bafre-o sinlae one.”
8.20: Fobitro Baytul-Mukaddosor dan-baksor gese ubaia Hozrot Isae ou talim dila. Oile tan shomoy fura na oae ḳeu tanre dorlo na. Nizor moutor befare agam ḳobor
8.21: Hozrot Isae Forishi oḳolre hirbar ḳoila, “Ami to zaiargi. Gia harle tumra amare tukaibae, oile ar faitae nae, ami zeno zairam, tumra hino aitae-o fartae nae, tumra nizor gunar maze-u morbae.”
8.22: Ihudi neta oḳole ḳoila, “He ḳene ḳoilo, ami zeno zairam, tumra hino aitae fartae nae? He kita nize nize morizito ni?”
8.23: Isae ḳoila, “Ami aisi ufre taki, ar tumra tole taki. Tumra i zogotor, oile ami to i zogotor nae.
8.24: Erlagi ami koiram, tumra nizor gunar maze-u morbae. Tumra zudi ekin na ḳoro, ami-u hein, te gunagar halote-u morbae.”
8.25: Ikan hunia neta oḳole tanre ḳoila, “Tumi ke?” Tain zuaf dila, “Foyla taki ami zela ḳoiram, ami-u hein.
8.26: Tumrar befare matar ar bisar ḳorar boutta ase. Huno, zein amare faṭaisoin tan maze to misa kunta nai. Ami tan ges taki zeta huni, ota-u i duniare zanai.”
8.27: Isae zen tan gaibi bafor ḳota ḳoira, tara ita buzla na.
8.28: Erdae Isae ḳoila, “Tumra zebla ami bin-Adomre ufre tulbae, ou shomoy buzbae ami-u hein. Ar eoḳan buzbae, ami nize nize kunta ḳori na, amar gaibi bafe amare ze talim disoin, ou talim-u ami batai.
8.29: Zein amare faṭaisoin, tain nize amar loge asoin. Tain amar log saṛsoin na, ami to hamesha ou ḳam-u ḳori, ze ḳam ḳorle tain kushi oin.”
8.30: Isar i boyan hunia bout manshe tan ufre iman anla. Hozrot Ibrahimor ḳaṭi aolad ḳe
8.31: Erar maze zeta Ihudi oḳole tan ufre iman anchila, tain erare ḳoila, “Tumra zudi amar ḳotamoto solo, te tumra amar hasaror ummot.
8.32: Tumra hok sinbae ar ou hoke-u tumrare azad ḳorba.”
8.33: Ikan hunia tara ḳoila, “Amra to Hozrot Ibrahimor bongshor manush, amra kunu shomoy-o ḳeuror gulam aslam na. Te tumi kila ḳoirae, amrare azad ḳora oibo?”
8.34: Hozrot Isae ḳoila, “Ami tumrare hok kota ḳoiram, zera gunar maze zindegi kaṭae, tara gunar gulam.
8.35: Kunu gulam siroḳal tar munibor baṛit taḳe na, oile fut to siroḳal taḳe.
8.36: Erlagi fute zudi tumrare azad ḳoroin, te tumra hasaror azad oibae.
8.37: Ami zani, tumra Ibrahim nobir bongshor manush, tebou amare marilitae sairae, ḳaron amar nosiot tumrar bitre hamae na.
8.38: Ami amar gaibi bafor gese zeta deḳsi ota ḳoiram, ar tumra nizor bafor ges taki zeta hikso ota-u ḳorrae.”
8.39: Ou shomoy tara Isare ḳoila, “Huno, Hozrot Ibrahim-u amrar baf.” Tain ḳoila, “Tumra zudi Ibrahim nobir aolad oitae, te Ibrahimor laḳan ḳam ḳorlae one.
8.40: Ami Allar ges taki ze hok kalam faisi, ota-u tumrare ḳoiram. Tebou tumra amare marilitae sairae, oile Ibrahime to ila ḳorsoin na.
8.41: Tumrar nizor bafe zeta ḳore, tumra-o ota ḳorrae.” Ou tara Isare ḳoila, “Amra to funga fua nae. Amrar eḳzon-u baf asoin, ein oila Alla.”
8.42: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Ashole-u Alla zudi tumrar gaibi baf oita, te amar bae tumrar maya taḳlo one. Ḳaron ami Allar ges taki aisi ar oḳon tumrar maze asi. Ami nize aisi na, tain-u amare faṭaisoin.
8.43: Tumra amar ḳota buzrae na, ḳaron tumra amar ḳota shoijjo ḳortae faro na.
8.44: Iblis-u tumrar baf ar tumra tar aolad, erdae tumra tar ḳaish fura ḳortae sairae. Iblis to foyla taki-u kuni. He kunudin hokor maze boshot ḳorse na, ḳaron tar maze kunu hok nai. He zebla misa mate, ou shomoy he niz taki-u mate. Ḳaron he beiman, ar hoḳol beimani tar maz taki-u foyda oise.
8.45: Ami hok mat matiar erlagi tumra amare ekin ḳorrae na.
8.46: Tumrar maze ḳeu amare gunagar forman ḳorto farbo ni? Ami zudi hok mat mati, te amare ekin ḳorrae na ḳene?
8.47: Ze manush Allar bonda, he Allar kalam hune. Tumra Allar nae gotike Allar kalam huno na.”
8.48: Ou shomoy tara Isare ḳoila, “Amra to ṭik kota ḳoisi, tui Shomoria zator manush, tore bute dorse.”
8.49: Tain ḳoila, “Na, amare bute dorse na. Ami amar bafre ijjot ḳori, oile tumra amare beijjot ḳorrae.
8.50: Ami nize kunu ijjot faitam ḳori kam ḳori na. Oile eḳzon asoin zein amar ijjotor lagi kam ḳoroin, tain-u amar bisarok.
8.51: Ami tumrare hok kota ḳoiram, ḳeu zudi amar ḳota mane, he kunu shomoy-u morto nae.”
