8.52: Tara tanre ḳoila, “Oḳon amra buzlam, tore ṭik-u bute dorse. Ibrahim nobi ba aro nobi oḳol to mara gesoin, ar tui koire, ḳeu zudi amar ḳota mane, he kunu shomoy-o morto nae.
8.53: Tui kunu baba Ibrahim taki-o boṛo ni? Tain nize ar baki tamam nobi oḳol-u mara gesoin. Te tui nizore kita mono ḳoros?”
8.54: Isae zuaf dila, “Ami zudi nizor tarif nize-u ḳori, te er kunu dam nai. Amar gaibi baf, zanre tumrar Alla ḳoia dabi koro, tain-u amare ijjot dan ḳoroin.
8.55: Tumra tanre sincho na, oile ami tanre sini. Ami zudi koi ami tanre sini na, te to tumrar laḳan ami-o beiman oimu. Ami tanre sini ar tan hukum-ahkam mania soli.
8.56: Tumrar baf Ibrahim nobie amar din deḳar ashae kushi korsoin. Tain ita deḳsoin ar kushi-o oisoin.”
8.57: Ihudi neta oḳole tanre ḳoila, “Tumar boyosh to oḳono foinchash bosor oise na, te tumi Ibrahim nobire deḳlae kila?”
8.58: Isae ḳoila, “Ami tumrare hok kota ḳoiram, Ibrahim nobir zonmor ag taki-u ami asi.”
8.59: Ikan hunia neta oḳole tanre marar lagi fattor tukaia loila. Oile Hozrot Isae auṛi dia Baytul-Mukaddos taki bar oia gelagi.

9.1: Hozrot Isa fotedi aṭia zaoar shomoy eḳ anda beṭare faila. He zonmo taki-u anda asil.
9.2: Ere dekia tan sahabi oḳole tanre zikaila, “Huzur, ou manushgu ḳar gunae anda oia zonmise? Tar nizor gunar lagi, na tar ma-bafor?”
9.3: Tain zuaf dila, “Tar nizor lagi-o nae, ar tar ma-bafor gunar lagi-o nae. Tar mazdi Allar lila-ḳela zair oar lagi-u ila oise.
9.4: Huno, zein amare bezisoin, shomoy taḳte taḳte tan ḳam ḳora amrar zorur. Rait gonaia ar, hi shomoy ḳeu ḳam ḳorar ufae nai.
9.5: Buzrae ni, ami zotodin duniat asi, otodin ami-u duniar nur.”
9.6: Oḳan ḳoia-u tain maṭit sef falaia feḳ banaila, bade ou feḳ anda beṭar sokut lagaia ḳoila,
9.7: “Zao ba, Siloar furkit gia doilao.” Siloa mani faṭani. He gia souk doilo ar bala oia ailo.
9.8: Ikan dekia ari-fori ar zoto manshe tare age bik korat deḳsila era ḳoila, “Ogu kita hou beṭa nae ni, zegie ono boia bik korto?”
9.9: Ḳeu ḳeu ḳoilo, “Oy, he to ou beṭa-u.” Ar ḳeu ḳeu ḳoilo, “Deḳte zudio tar laḳan, oile he nae.” Teu he nize ḳoilo, “Ji oy, ami-u hou zon.”
9.10: Ou tara ere zikaila, “Ḳo sain, tumar souk bala oilo kila?”
9.11: He ḳoilo, “Isa namor ou manshe feḳ banaia amar sokut lagaia ḳoila, zao ba, Siloar fukrir maze doia aogi. Ami gia doilam ar bala oigelam.”
9.12: Tara ḳoila, “Ou manushgu kuai?” He ḳoilo, “Ami zani na.”
9.13: Ou ze beṭa anda asil, manshe tare doria Forishi oḳlor gese loia gela.
9.14: Ḳaron Isae zedin feḳ lagaia tar souk bala ḳorsla, i din asil tarar Zummabar.
9.15: Erlagi Forishi oḳole hirbar tare zikaila, “Tumar souk bala oilo kila?” He ḳoilo, “Hou zone amar sokut feḳ lagaia dila, ar ami gia doia-u souke deḳlam.”
9.16: Ou shomoy ḳoyzon Forishie ḳoila, “I manushgu to Allar ges taki aise na. Deḳrae ni, he Zummabar-o mane na.” Oile ḳeu ḳeu ḳoila, “Gunagar manshe ilaḳan keramoti kam ḳorbo kila?” Ota loia tarar maze doladoli lagigelo.
9.17: Tara hirbar ou manshore zikaila, “Ṭik ase, he to tumar souk bala ḳorse, erlagi tumi tar befare kita ḳo.” He ḳoilo, “Tain eḳzon nobi.”
9.18: Oile ou beṭa zen age anda asil ar oḳon souke deḳer, Ihudi neta oḳole tar ma-bafre na zikani forzonto ita ekin ḳorla na.
9.19: Tara tar ma-bafre zikaila, “Deḳo sain, ogu tumrar hou anda fua ni, zegure tumra zonmor anda ḳo? Te he oḳon souke deḳer kila?”
9.20: Tar ma-bafe ḳoila, “Ji oy, he amrar-u fua ar he anda oia zonmisil.
9.21: Oile oḳon kila souke deḳer, ikan amra zani na. Ar ḳe tar souk bala ḳorsoin, ta-o ḳoitam fari na. He to boṛo oigese, tare-u zikaukka, tar befar he ḳouk.”
9.22: Tar ma-bafe Ihudi neta oḳlor ḍore ola matila, ḳaron Ihudi neta oḳole ag taki-u ain ḳorsila, ḳeu zudi Isare al-Mosi koia kobul ḳore, te tare shomaz taki bar ḳori deoa oibo.
9.23: Erlagi-u tar ma-bafe ḳoila, “He boṛo oigese, tare-u zikaukka.”
9.24: Neta oḳole dusrabar tare ania zikaila, “Tumi Allar name hasa mat mato. Amra to zani i manushṭa gunagar.”
9.25: He zuaf dilo, “Tain gunagar na kita, ikan ami zani na. Ḳali oḳan zani, ami age anda aslam, oḳon souke dekiar.”
9.26: Neta oḳole ḳoila, “Ḳo sain, he tumare kita ḳorse? Tumar souk kila bala ḳorlo?”
9.27: Ou beṭae zuaf dilo, “Ami to age-u ḳoilam, oile afnara hunla na. Te oḳon ḳene ar hunta saira? Afnara-o tan ummot oita saira ni?”
9.28: Ikan hunia tara beṭare kub gala-gali koria ḳoila, “Hoi, tui gia ogur ummot oisot, oile amra oilam Musa nobir ummot.
9.29: Amra zani, Allae nize Musa nobir loge batchit ḳorsoin, oile i beṭa kuai taki aise, ita to amra zani-u na.”
9.30: Teu beṭae ḳoilo, “Ki taijjubi! Afnara zanoin na tain kuai taki aisoin, otoso tain-u amar souk bala ḳorla.
9.31: Amra zani, naforman oḳlor ḳota Allae hunoin na. Oile ḳeu zudi Allar ashik bonia tan morzi zugaia sole, te Allae tar foriad hunoin.
9.32: Ar aiz forzonto ila huna gese na zen, zonmo taki anda kunu manshor souk keu bala ḳorse.
9.33: Tain zudi Allar ges taki na aita, te ila ḳorta farla na one.”
9.34: Neta oḳole tare ḳoila, “Tor zonom oise naformanir maze, ar tui amrare talim dire ni?” Oḳan ḳoia tara tare shomaz taki ekgori korla.
9.35: Isae hunla, neta oḳole ou beṭare ekgori korsoin. Tain ou beṭare tukaia bar ḳoria ḳoila, “Oba, tumi kita bin-Adomor ufre iman ancho ni?”
9.36: He ḳoilo, “Huzur, tain ḳe? Amare ḳoukka, ami zate tan ufre iman antam fari.”
9.37: Isae tare ḳoila, “Tumi tanre deḳso, ar tain-u tumar loge matira.”
9.38: Ou beṭae ḳoilo, “Huzur, ami iman anlam.” Oḳan ḳoia-u he Hozrot Isare soizda ḳorlo.
9.39: Isae ḳoila, “Huno, ami aisi i duniat bisar ḳorar lagi, zera anda asoin tara zanu bala oin, ar bala oḳol anda oin.”
9.40: Ou shomoy ḳoyzon Forishi-o Isar ḳandat asla. Ikan hunia tara ḳoila, “Te afne kita ḳoita saira, amra anda ni?”
9.41: Isae ḳoila, “Tumra zudi anda oitae, te tumra kunu dushi oilae na one. Oile tumra-u ḳoirae anda nae, erlagi-u tumrar maze dush ase.”

10.1: Hozrot Isae aro ḳoila, “Ami tumrare nichchit hasa ḳota ḳoiram, ze manush meṛar gual-goror duaredi na hamaia, oinno fote hamae, he to sur-ḍaḳait.
10.2: Oile ze zon duaredi hamae, he-u meṛar raḳal.
10.3: Gual-goror sokidare raḳalre duar kulia dey. Meṛainte-o raḳalor ḍaḳ hunoin ar raḳale tarar nam dori ḍaki ḍaki bar ḳori ney.
10.4: Gor taki nizor meṛaintore bar ḳoria harle, raḳal tarar age age zae, ar tar meṛain zae ḳore ḳore, ḳaron tar golar aoaz tara sine.
10.5: Tara kunubala osina kunu raḳalor loge zaito nae borong tar ges taki bagibo, ḳaron osina kunu raḳalor golar aoaz tara sine na.”
10.6: Isae Forishi oḳolre hikanir lagi ou udahoron dila, oile tain kita buzaira, tara shomzita farla na.
10.7: Erlagi tain hirbar ḳoila, “Ami tumrare nichchit hok kota ḳoiram, meṛar falor lagi ami-u duar.
10.8: Amar age raḳalor bab doria zeta aisla, iguin to sur-ḍaḳait asla, meṛainte-o tarar ḳota hunchoin na.
10.9: Ami-u duar. Amar mazdi ze hamaibo, he tar zan basaibo. He bitre aoa-zaoa ḳorbo ar aṭia-soria ḳaibo.
10.10: Sure to ḳali suri, kun-ḳarafi ar binash ḳorar niote-u ae. Oile ami aisi zate tara zindegi fae, ar ou zindegi furafur bug kore.
10.11: “Ami-u asol raḳal. Asol raḳale tar meṛar lagi nizor zan bilai dey.
10.12: Ḳali betonor lagi ze zone raḳali kore, he ḳaṭi raḳal nae ar i meṛain-o tar nizor nae. Bag aoat deḳle-u he meṛain falaia nizor zan basae.
10.13: Ḳaron he ḳali betonor ashae raḳali kore, meṛaintor ḳota sinta-o ḳore na. Bage aia meṛain doria neygi, teu tara fal bangia sitri zae.
10.14: -15 Te ami-u bala raḳal. Amar gaibi bafe amare sinoin, ar ami-o amar bafre sini. Ṭik oula, ami amar meṛaintore-o sini, ar amar meṛainte-o amare sinoin. Ami amar meṛa falor lagi nizor zan dilairam.
10.16: Amar to aro meṛain asoin, zeta i gual-goro nai, tarare-o ami ante oibo. Tara nichchoy amar ḍaḳ hunba, teu ḳali eḳzon raḳal ar eḳṭa fal oibo.
10.17: “Bafe amare maya ḳoroin, ḳaron ami amar zan bilaimu zate hirbar firot nei.
10.18: Amar zan ḳeu amar ges taki kaṛia nito nae, oile ami nize-u zan bilaimu. Mono rakio, zan deoar ḳemota zela amar ase, oula firot neoar ḳemota-o ase. I dayitto ami amar gaibi bafor ges taki faisi.”
10.19: Hozrot Isar ita mat-ḳota hunia Ihudi neta oḳlor maze hirbar doladoli lagigelo.
10.20: Tarar mazor boute ḳoilo, “Ogure bute dorse, he fagol, tumra ogur mat hunrae ḳene?”
10.21: Ar boute ḳoilo, “Bute dora manshor mat to ila nae. Bute kunu andar souk bala ḳore ni?” Hozrot Isa al-Mosir dabi
10.22: Bade Zeruzalem Kaba goror doḳol faoar idor shomoy aia azilo. Ou shomoy asil shitor din.
10.23: Hozrot Isa Baytul-Mukaddosor Bashsha Sulaimanor barindat aṭa-uṭi korra.
10.24: Ermaze Ihudi neta oḳol Isar sairobae dola oia ḳoila, “Ar ḳotodin tumi amrare loṭḳaia raḳtae? Tumi zudi hasaror al-Mosi o, te forishkar ḳori amrare ḳo.”
10.25: Teu Isae zuaf dila, “Ami to ḳoilam, oile afnara ekin ḳorra na, ar amar gaibi bafor name ami ze ḳam ḳori, itae-o amar befare shakki der,
10.26: ta-o afnara ekin ḳorra na, ḳaron afnara amar falor meṛa nae.
10.27: Amar meṛainte amar ḍaḳ hunoin. Ami to tarare sini ar tara-o amar ḳore ḳore roin.
10.28: Ami tarare aḳeri zindegi dan ḳori, tara kunu shomoy binash oita nae. Ḳeu amar ges tone tarare ḳaṛia nito nae.
10.29: Amar ze gaibi bafe tarare amar ato disoin, tain hoḳol taki mohan. Tan at taki keu kunta ḳaṛia nito fare na.
10.31: Teu Ihudi neta oḳole hirbar fattor loila tanre marar lagi.
10.32: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Gaibi bafor hukum mafik bout bala bala ḳam ami afnaintore deḳaisi. Itar maze kun ḳamor lagi afnara amare fattor marta saira?”
10.33: Tara ḳoila, “Bala kunu ḳamor lagi amra tore fattor mariar na, tui to shiriki korre, erlagi-u fattor marmu. Manush oia tui nizore Alla hishabe dabi korre.”
10.34: Tain ḳoila, “Afnarar shorioto leḳa ase na ni, ‘Ami koilam, tumra-u elahi’?
10.35: Te Allar kalam zerar gese nazil oisil, erare to tain nize-u Allar laḳan ḳoia ḍakisoin. Ar Pak Kitabor ḳota to bad deoa zae na.
10.36: Te gaibi bafe zanre nizor lagi basia fosond ḳorla ar duniat faṭaila, ou ami zebla ḳoilam, ami Ibnulla, te afnara kila ḳoira, tui shiriki korre?
10.37: Ami zudi amar gaibi bafor ḳam na ḳori, te afnara amar ufre iman anba na.
10.38: Oile ami zudi amar bafor hoḳol ḳam ḳoria taki, te amar ufre iman na anle-o ita ekin ḳoroukka. Teu afnara zanba, gaibi baf amar maze-u asoin, ar ami-o tan maze asi.”
10.39: Ou shomoy hirbar tara Isare dorar sesṭa ḳorla, oile tain in tone gaib oigela.
10.40: Bade tain hirbar Zordan gangor hofaro gia roila. Age ou zagat Hozrot Ehiae manshore toubar gusol dita.
10.41: Hono bout manush tan gese ailo ar mata-mati korlo, “Ehia nobie to kunu keramoti nishana deḳaisoin na, oile tain Hozrot Isar befare zotota ḳoisla, ita furafur hasa.”
10.42: Oḳan buzia honor bout manshe Hozrot Isar ufre iman anla.

11.1: Lasar name eḳzon manush bemar asla. Tan baṛi Bayt-Ania gaut, Moriom ar Marta namor tan dui boin-o ou gaut roita.
11.2: Ḳoydin bade ou Moriome-u Isar fao-o kushboy-ala ator maḳaia, nizor matar suldi fao fusai diba. Ou Moriomor bai oila bemari Lasar.
11.3: Erlagi tan boinainte oḳan ḳoia Hozrot Isar gese ḳobor faṭaila, “Huzur, afnar mayar manush kub bemar.”
11.4: Ḳobor faia Isae ḳoila, “I bemar to tar moutor lagi oise na, borong Allar mohima zairor lagi-u oise, zate er mazdi ami Ibnullar mohima-o zair oy.”
11.5: Hozrot Isae Bibi Marta, tan boin ar Lasarre kub maya ḳorta.
11.6: Lasaror bemaror ḳota hunar bade-o Isa ze zagat asla, hono aro duidin roila.
11.7: Bade tan sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Ao, amra hirbar Ehudia zilat zai.”
11.8: Sahabi oḳole ḳoila, “Huzur, ou ḳoydin age honor manshe afnare fattor marta saila, oḳon afne hirbar hono zaita ni?”
11.9: Tain ḳoila, “Dinor bela to baro gonṭa ase, ḳeu zudi dinor bela sola-fira ḳore, he usṭa ḳae na, ḳaron he ou duniar for deḳe.
11.10: Ar ḳeu zudi raitor bela sola-fira ḳore, he usṭa ḳae, ḳaron tar maze kunu for nai.”
11.11: Oḳan ḳoia hari tan sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Huno, amrar dust Lasar gumai gesegi, ami tare hozag korat zaiar.”
11.12: Ikan hunia sahabi oḳole ḳoila, “Huzur, he zudi gumo taḳe, te to bala oizibo.”
11.13: Isae Lasaror moutor ḳota ḳoisla, oile tara mono ḳorla, tain emne gumor ḳota ḳoisoin.
11.14: Teu Isae forishkar ḳori koila, “Lasar mara gese.
11.15: Oile ami tumrar ḳota mono ḳoria kushi oisi, ami hino aslam na, zate tumra ekin ḳortae faro. Oḳon ao, amra Lasaror gese zai.”
11.16: Teu tan sahabi Tumase logor sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “Ao na, amra-o zai, zate tan loge mortam fari.” Ou Tumasre Zomoz ḳoia ḍaḳa oy.
11.17: Hono gia harle Hozrot Isae hunla, tain zaoar sair din age-u Lasarre dafon ḳora oigese.
11.18: Zeruzalem ṭaun taki ou Bayt-Ania gau onuman dui mail duroi asil.
11.19: Lasaror moutor bade tan boin Bibi Marta ar Moriomre buz deoar lagi Ihudi shomazor bout manush aila.
11.20: Ermaze Hozrot Isae toshrif anra hunia Bibi Marta tan loge deḳa ḳorat gela, oile Moriom goro boi roila.
11.21: Bibi Martae Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, afne zudi ono roita, te amar baigu morlo na one.
11.22: Oile erbade-o ami zani, afne Allar gese zeta saiba, tain afnare ota diba.”
11.23: Isae ḳoila, “Huno, tumar bai hirbar zinda oia uṭbo.”
11.24: Teu Martae ḳoila, “Ji oy, ami zani kiamotor din zebla murda oḳol zinda oiba, ou shomoy he-o zinda oia uṭbo.”
11.25: Isae Martare ḳoila, “Ami-u to kiamot ar zindegi. Ze zone amar ufre iman ane he morle-o zinda oibo.
11.26: Ar ze zone asol zinda oia amar ufre iman ane, he kunudin-o morto nae. Tumi ikan ekin ḳoro ni?”
11.27: Martae ḳoila, “Ji oy huzur, ami iman anchi, Allar oada ḳora ze zone duniat toshrif anar ḳota, afne-u hou al-Mosi Ibnulla, Allar ḳas mayar zon.”
11.28: Oḳan ḳoia Martae gia tan boin Moriomre sufte ḍakia nia ḳoila, “Huno, huzur ono asoin, tain tumare ḍakira.”
11.29: Teu Moriom zoldi kori Isar ḳandat gela.
11.30: Isa ou shomoy-o gaur bitre hamaisoin na, Martae tan loge zeno deḳa ḳorsla, tain hono-u ubai roisla.
11.31: Ar goror bitre zeta Ihudi oḳole Moriomre buz deoat asla, Moriome aḳta-u bare zaoat dekia tara tan ḳore ḳore gela. Tara mono ḳorlo, Moriom ḳoyboror gese ḳanda-ḳaṭi korat zaira.
11.32: Isa ze zagat asla, Moriom-o hono gela ar Isare dekia tan fao-o foṛia ḳoila, “Huzur, afne zudi ono taḳta, te amar baigu morlo na one.”
11.33: Moriom ar tan logor Ihudi oḳlor ḳandon-ahazari dekia Hozrot Isar dilor ruhu gorom oigelo, tain ḳator oigela.
11.34: Tain erare zikaila, “Lasarre kuai dafon ḳorso?” Tara ḳoila, “Huzur aukka, deki zaukka.”
11.36: Tan ḳandon dekia honor era ḳoila, “Deḳrae ni, tain Lasarre ḳoto maya ḳorta!”
11.37: Oile kunu kunu zone ḳoila, “Zein andar souk bala ḳorsoin, tain ila kunta ḳorta farla one na ni, zate Lasargu na more?”
11.38: Ita hunia Hozrot Isar dilor ruhu hirbar gorom oigelo, tain Lasaror ḳoyboror daro gela. I koybor asil guhar laḳan ek gato ar ḳoyboror muko eḳ fattor deoa asil.
11.39: Tain manshore ḳoila, “Fattorṭa horao.” Lasaror boin Martae ḳoila, “Huzur, oḳon to lash fosia gondo bar oigese, tain sair din age mara gesoin.”
11.40: Isae enre ḳoila, “Ami to tumare ḳoisi, tumi zudi ekin ḳoro, te Allar kudroti mohima deḳbae.”
11.41: Teu manshe ḳoyboror mukor fattorṭa horaila. Isae asmanor bae saia dua ḳorla, “O gaibi baba, tumi amar ḳota huncho, erlagi ami tumar shukria adae ḳori.
11.42: Ami zani, tumi hamesha amar ḳota huno. Oile amar sairobae zeta manush asoin, tara zate ekin ḳoroin, tumi amare faṭaiso, erdae-u oḳan ḳoilam.”
11.43: Oḳan ḳoia tain zure ḍaḳ dia ḳoila, “Lasar, bar oia ao.”
11.44: Teu murda Lasar ḳoybor taki bar oia aila. Tan at-fao ḳafondi fesail asil, ar muk asil rumal dia banda. Isae manshore ḳoila, “Tar band kulo ar tare zaite deo.” Hozrot Isare zane marar shoṛozontro
11.45: Bibi Moriomor gese zeta Ihudi manush aisla, Hozrot Isar ou keramoti kam dekia erar mazor boute tan ufre iman anla.
11.46: Oile ḳeu ḳeu Forishi oḳlor gese gia Isar ou ḳamor ḳota zanailo.
11.47: Ita hunia boṛo imam oḳole ar Forishi dolor manshe deshor fotua komiṭire loia ekḳano boila, boia ḳoila, “Amra oḳon kita ḳortam? I beṭae to bout keramoti kam deḳar.
11.48: Amra zudi tare emne solte dei, te hoḳol manshe tar ufre iman anbo, ar ita hunia Ruman shorḳaror manshe amrar ṭikana ar amrar zatire-o binash ḳorba.”
11.49: Ou mozlisor maze ou bosoror fordan imam, Kayafa namor eḳzon asla. Tain erare ḳoila, “Tumra to kunta-u zano na.
11.50: Buzo na ni, asta zati binash oar saite, hoḳlor bodla eḳzonor moron aro bala.”
11.51: Imam Kayafae ashole nizor mon taki ou ḳota ḳoisoin na, tain ou bosoror fordan imam oae gaibi buli tan muk taki bar oise ze, Ihudi zatire basanir lagi Isar moron oibo.
11.52: Ḳali Ihudi zatir lagi nae, Allar zoto bondain sairobae sitria asoin, tarare dola ḳoria ekḳano ḳorar lagi-o tain zan bilai diba.
11.53: Hou din taki tara Isare marar faetara ḳorat lagla.
11.54: Erlagi Isae tarar maze kula-mela sola-fira bad dilaila, ar ou zaga saṛia morubumir ḳandat Afraim namor ek gaut gia tan sahabi oḳolre loia roila.
11.55: Ou shomoy Ihudi oḳlor Azadi Id gonai aisil. Idor age nizore fak-saf ḳorar lagi bout manush gau taki Zeruzalem ṭauno gela.
11.56: Hino gia tara Hozrot Isare tukaila. Tara Baytul-Mukaddoso ubaia eḳe-oinne zikaila, “Kita mono ḳoroin, tain i ido aita nae ni?”
11.57: Boṛo imam ar Forishi oḳole hukum disla, ḳeu zudi Isar kuz fae, te tarare zananir lagi, zate tara Isare dorta faroin.

12.1: Azadi Idor soydin age, Hozrot Isa hou Lasaror gau Bayt-Aniat aila, ze Lasarre tain mora taki zinda ḳorsla.
12.2: Ino tara Hozrot Isar lagi kanir mezbani zuit ḳorla. Isar loge ḳaoat zera boisil, erar loge Lasar-o asla ar Bibi Martae ḳadimdari korla.
12.3: Ou shomoy Lasaror boin Moriome ada sher kub dami kaṭi ator loia aila, aia ou ator Isar fao-o ḍalia nizor matar suldi fao fusia dila. Atoror kushboye asta gor borigelo.
12.4: Ihuda Iskariat name Isar eḳ sahabi, zein tanre dushmonor ato dorai diba, ein ḳoila,
12.5: “Ish, i ator fuṭin besile to tin-sho dinar faia gorib oḳolre bilai deoa gelo one.”
12.6: Ashole Ihudae gorib oḳlor ḳota sinta ḳoria ikan ḳoise na. He asil sur. Ṭeḳar toli tar gese taḳto, ar zoma ṭeḳa taki he suri korto, erlagi ola ḳoise.
12.7: Isae ḳoila, “Tumra i beṭigur mono duk dio na. Amar dafon-ḳafonor lagi tain i fuṭain toisla.
12.8: Gorib oḳol to hamesha-u tumrar maze asoin, oile amare hamesha faitae nae.”
12.9: Hozrot Isa Bayt-Aniat aisoin hunia, Ihudi zatir bout manush ono aila. Tara ḳali Isar lagi nae, hou ze Lasarre Isae mora taki zinda ḳorsla, tare-o deḳat aila.
12.10: Ou shomoy boṛo imam oḳole niot ḳorla Lasarre-o marilita.
12.11: Ḳaron Lasaror lagi bout Ihudi manshe neta oḳlor log saṛia, Isar ufre iman anchila. Hozrot Isa Zeruzalemo aila
12.12: Idor niote dole dole zoto manush aisoin, tara bador din hunla, Hozrot Isae Zeruzalemo toshrif anra.
12.13: Ou tara ḳezuror ḳesma ḍal loia tanre aguaia anat gela ar misil dia ḳoila, “Marhaba! Mabudor name zein toshrif anra, tan tarif ouk, tain-u Israilor bashsha!”
12.14: Allar kalamor ayat mafik Hozrot Isae eḳṭa gada dekia tar ufre soar oila. Kitabo leḳa ase,
12.15: “O Sion-ḳoina Zeruzalem, ḍoraio na. Saia deḳo, gadar baichcha soṛia tumar bashsha aira.”
12.16: Sahabi oḳole foyla itar kunu mani buzla na. Bade Hozrot Isar kudroti mohima zair oia harle, Pak Kitabor ḳota tarar mono oilo, ou ayato tan befare-u leḳa asil, ar manshe tan lagi-u otota ḳorse.
12.17: Ḳoybor taki Lasarre ḍakia zinda ḳori tular shomoy zeta manush Isar loge asla, tara-o ou befare hamesha mat-ḳota matita.
12.18: Erlagi manshe tan ou keramoti kamor ḳobor hunia tanre aguaia anat gesla.
12.19: Ita dekia Forishi oḳole eḳe-oinne ḳoilo, “Amrar to kunu lab or na. Deḳrae ni, asta dunia-u tar ḳore gesegi.” Nizor moutor agam ḳobor
12.20: Azadi Ido zera ebadot ḳorat aisla, tarar maze ḳoyzon Iunani manush-o asla.
12.21: Tara Galil zilar Bayt-Soyda gaur Filifre aia minot ḳorla, “Sab, amra huzur Isare deḳtam sai.”
12.22: Filife ikan Andriasre ḳoila. Bade Andrias ar Filife gia Isare zanaila.
12.23: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Ami bin-Adomor mohima zair oar shomoy aichche.
12.24: Ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, danor bis maṭit foṛia zudi na more, te eḳṭa-u taḳe, ar maṭit morle bout foshol fole.
12.25: Ola ze zone nizor zanre beshi maya ḳore, he tar asol zindegi kuailae, oile ze zone i duniat nizor zanre tuchcho mono ḳore, he tar asol zindegi, mani aḳerator lagi zan basae.
12.26: Ḳeu zudi amar kezmot ḳorto sae, te amar fote solouk. Teu ami zeḳano roimu amar kezmotḳari-o ono roibo. Ze zone amar kezmot ḳore, amar gaibi bafe tare ijjot diba.
12.27: “Amar mon oḳon fereshan oigese. Te ami oḳan ḳoitam ni, baba, ze shomoy aia azise, ou shomoyor at taki amare basao? Oile otar lagi-u to ami ou shomoy forzonto aisi.
12.28: Baba, tumi tumar mohima zair ḳoro.” Ou shomoy asman taki gaibi aoaz ailo, “Ami amar mohima zair ḳorsi ar hirbar zair ḳormu.”
12.29: I aoaz hunia hino zoto manush asla, tara ḳoila, “Ita to megor ḍaḳ.” Ḳeu ḳeu ḳoilo, “Kunu firistae tan loge batchit ḳorsoin.”
12.30: Ikan hunia Isae ḳoila, “I aoaz to amar lagi aise na, afnarar lagi-u aise.
12.31: I zogotor manshor bisaror shomoy aichche, duniar munib Iblisor at taki oḳon ḳemota ḳaṛia neoa oibo.
12.32: Amare zebla zomin taki ufre tula oibo, ou shomoy ami hoḳolre amar gese ṭania tulmu.”
12.33: Tan kilaḳan mout oibo, oḳan buzanir lagi tain ita ḳoila.
12.34: Ou shomoy manshe Isare ḳoila, “Amra Pak Kitab taki hunchi al-Mosi siroḳal roiba. Te afne kila ḳoira, bin-Adomre usat tula oibo? Taile i bin-Adom ḳe?”
12.35: Tain zuaf dila, “Ar kisu shomoy nur afnarar loge ase, nur taḳte taḳte-u aṭa doroukka, zela andaire aia afnaintore na bere. Ze zon andair fote aṭe, he zane na he kuai zar.
12.36: Nur afnarar loge taḳte taḳte-u nuror ufre iman anoukka, zate afnara-o ou nuror manush oita faroin.” Erbade Isa in tone horia gia, erar souk taki nizore lukailila. Manshor dil fashan
12.37: Hozrot Isae manshor samne oto beshi keramoti nishana deḳanir bade-o tara tan ufre iman anlo na.
12.38: Ita hokkolta goṭisil zate agor zomanar nobi Ishayar ḳota fura oy, tain bataisla, Mabud go, amrar tobligor ufre ḳe ekin ḳorse? Tumar kudroti at ḳar gese-u ba zair oise?
12.39: Erlagi-u to ita manshe iman anche na, ḳaron Ishaya nobie eoḳan ḳoisla,
12.40: Allae tarar souk anda banailisoin, tarar dil fashan banailisoin, zate soukdi na deḳe ar dildi na buze. Arnae kizanu tara touba ḳorilain, Allar bae firizain, ar ami tarare shifa ḳorilai.
12.41: Ishaya nobie Isar mohima deḳsla gotike, tan befare ou ḳota ḳoisla.
12.42: Tebou Ihudi neta oḳlor maz taki boute tan ufre iman anla, oile Forishi oḳole tarare shomaz taki bar ḳori dilaibo, oḳan ḍoraia tara shikar ḳorla na.
12.43: Tara Allar tarif taki manshor tarif faite beshi fosond ḳorta. Hozrot Isa-u toraneala
12.44: Bade Isae zure zure ḳoila, “Ze zone amar ufre iman ane, he ḳali amar ufre nae, zein amare faṭaisoin tan ufre-o iman ane.
12.45: Ze zone amare deḳe, he ashole tanre-u deḳe, zein amare faṭaisoin.
12.46: Ami i duniat nur hishabe aisi, zate amar ufre ze iman ane, he ar andarit na roy.
12.47: Ḳeu zudi amar ḳota hunia, ou mafik amol na ḳore, te ami nize tar bisar ḳori na, ḳaron ami manshore dushi shaibosto ḳorat aisi na, borong manshore toranit aisi.
12.48: Ze zone amare mane na ar amar ḳota hune na, tar bisaror lagi to eḳzon asoin. Ami tare ze ḳota ḳoisi, ou ḳotae-u kiamotor din tare dushi shaibosto ḳorbo.
12.49: Ami to nize taki kunta ḳoisi na, ḳali amar ze gaibi bafe amare bezisoin, tain nize-u hukum disoin, ami kita kita ḳoitam.
12.50: Ami zani, tan hukum mana-u oilo aḳeri zindegi. Erlagi ami zeta ḳoi, ita amar gaibi bafor hukme-u ḳoi.”

13.1: Azadi Idor tuṛa agor goṭona. Isae buzilila, tain i dunia saṛia tan gaibi bafor gese zaibar shomoy aichche. Duniat zera tan afon manush asla, tarare tain kub maya ḳorta ar hesh forzonto ola maya ḳoria-u gesoin.
13.2: Raitkur ḳanit boibar agor ḳota, Hozrot Isare dushmonor ato dorai dibar lagi, Iblise aia Saimon Iskariator fua Ihudar mono ḳaish zagai dilo.
13.3: Isae zanta, tan gaibi baf Allae tan ato hoḳolta shofi disoin, tain Allar ges taki aisoin ar tan gese-u firia zaira.
13.4: Erlagi tain ḳaoa taki uṭla ar finnor fainjabi kulia ekkan gamsa ḳomro bandila.
13.5: Bade tain gamlar maze fani loia sahabi oḳlor fao doai dila, ar ḳomror gamsadi fao fusia deoat lagla.
13.6: Ou laḳan tain zebla Saimon-Fitoror gese aila, Fitore ḳoila, “Huzur, ita kita ḳoroin, afne amar fao doaia dita ni?”
13.7: Tain ḳoila, “Ami zeta ḳoriar, oḳon tumi itar mani buztae nae, bade buzbae.”
13.8: Ou Fitore tanre ḳoila, “Ji na, afne kunumonte-u amar fao doai diba na.” Isae ḳoila, “Ami zudi tumar fao doia na dei, te tumar loge amar kunu ḳatir nai.”
13.9: Teu Saimon-Fitore ḳoila, “Huzur, te ḳali fao nae, amar mata ar at-o doaia deukka”.
13.10: Tain ḳoila, “Ze manshe gusol ḳorse, tar fao saṛa ar kunta doar zorur nae, tar to hoḳolta forishkar ase. Tumra-o nichchoy forishkar aso, oile hoḳol nae.”
13.11: Ashole dushmonor ato ḳe tanre dorai dibo, ikan tain zanta. Erdae tain ḳoila, “Tumra hoḳol forishkar nae.”
13.12: Sahabi oḳlor fao doaia harle Isae tan fainjabi findia hirbar boila ar tarare ḳoila, “Ami kita ḳorlam, tumra ita buzcho ni?
13.13: Tumra amare ustad ar malik koia ḍaḳo, ikan ṭik-u, ami-u tumrar ustad ar malik.
13.14: Ar ami tumrar ustad ar malik oia-o zebla tumrar fao doaia dilam, te tumra-o ola eḳe-oinnor fao doai deoa zorur.
13.15: Ami ila ḳoria deḳailam, zate ami zela ḳorlam tumra-o ola ḳoro.
13.16: Ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, gulam tar munib taki boṛo nae. Ar zare faṭani oise, he tar faṭaora taki boṛo nae.
13.17: Ita zania zudi amol ḳoro, te tumra doinno.
13.18: “Ami tumra hoḳlor befare ḳoiram na. Ami zerare fosond ḳorsi tarare to sini. Huno, Allar kalamor ayat to folite oibo, leḳa ase, ‘Amar loge boia zegue ḳaoa-daoa ḳore, hogue amar ufre fao tulche.’
13.19: Ita goṭar age-u ami tumrare zanai dilam, teu goṭar bade tumra buzbae, ami-u hein.
13.20: Ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, ami zare faṭai, tare ze zone kobul ḳore, he ashole amare-u kobul ḳore. Ar ze zone amare kobul ḳore, he tanre-u kobul ḳore, zein amare faṭaisoin.” Beiman Ihuda
13.21: Oḳan ḳoia harle Hozrot Isar dil fereshan oigelo. Tain kulia ḳoila, “Ami hok kota ḳoiram, tumrar mazor eḳzone-u amare dushmonor ato dorai dibo.”
13.22: Tain ḳar ḳota ḳoira, sahabi oḳole ikan na buzae eḳe-oinnor bae sai roila.
13.23: Erar mazor ze sahabire Isae maya ḳorta, ein Isar kulo elain dia boat asla.
13.24: Saimon-Fitore enre ishara dia ḳoila, tumi zikao, tain ḳar ḳota ḳoira.
13.25: Teu ou sahabie Isar bae zukia ḳoila, “Huzur, ḳe ou zon?”
13.26: Isae zuaf dila, “Ou ruṭir ṭukra boulo bizaia zare dimu, he-u ou zon.” Ar ou ruṭi tain Saimon Iskariator fua Ihudare dila.
13.27: Ruṭir ṭukra loar loge loge-u Iblis Ihudar bitre hamailo. Isae tare ḳoila, “Zeta ḳortae sao, zoldi korilao.”
13.28: Isar loge zara ḳaoat boisla, tara ḳeu buzla na, tain Ihudare ḳene ikan ḳoisoin.
13.29: Ḳeu ḳeu mono ḳorlo, idor bazar ḳorar lagi Isae Ihudare oḳan ḳoisoin ba gorib oḳolre kunta deoar ḳota ḳoisoin, ḳaron ṭeḳar toli to Ihudar gese-u taḳto.
13.30: Ruṭir ṭukra loar loge loge Ihuda bar oia gelogi. I shomoy rait asil. Noya hukum
13.31: Ihuda bare gia harle Isae ḳoila, “Bin-Adomor mohima zair ḳorar shomoy aichche, tan mazdi Allar mohima zair oibo.
13.32: Ar Allar mohima zebla tan mazdi zair oibo, ou shomoy Allae-o nizor maze bin-Adomor mohima zair ḳorba, ita tain kub zoldi-u ḳorba.
13.33: O aolad oḳol, ami ar beshi din tumrar gese roitam nae. Te Ihudi neta oḳolre age zela ḳoislam, tumra amare tallash ḳorbae, oile ami zeḳano zaimu tumra hino zaitae fartae nae, oḳon ou ḳota tumrare-o ḳoiram.
13.34: Ami tumrare ekkan noya hukum diram, tumra eḳe-oinnore maya ḳorio. Ami zela tumrare maya ḳorsi, tumra-o ola eḳe-oinnore maya ḳorio.
13.35: Tumra zudi eḳe-oinnore maya ḳoro, te hoḳole buzbo tumra amar ummot.” Sahabi Fitoror oshikaror ḳota
13.36: Saimon-Fitore Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, afne kuai zaira?” Tain ḳoila, “Ami zeno zairam, tumra oḳon amar loge hino aitae fartae nae, oile bade aibae.”
13.37: Fitore ḳoila, “Oḳon ḳene zaitam fartam nae? Afnar lagi ami amar zan-o bilai dimu.”
13.38: Ou shomoy Isae ḳoila, “Amar lagi hasau tumar zan dibae ni? Te hasa ḳota ami tumare ḳoiram, murgae bang dibar age-u, tumi tinbar ḳoibae, tumi amare sino na.”

14.1: Hozrot Isae ḳoila, “Tumra ar fereshan oio na. Allar ufre to tumrar ekin ase, te amar ufre-o ekin raḳo.
14.2: Amar bafor baṛit roar bout zaga ase, na taḳle ami koilam one. Ami to tumrar lagi zaga ṭik korat zairam.
14.3: Zaga ṭik koria hirbar aimu, aia tumrare amar gese nimu. Teu ami zeno roimu, tumra-o hono roibae.
14.4: Ar ami kuai zairam, i fot to tumrar sina ase.”
14.5: Ou shomoy sahabi Tumase Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, afne kuai zaira, oḳan-u amra zani na, te fot kila sinmu?”
14.6: Isae ḳoila, “Ami-u fot, ami-u hok ar ami-u zindegi. Amar usilla saṛa kunu manush-u gaibi bafor gese zaito fare na.
14.7: Tumra amare sinle amar gaibi bafre-o sinlae one. Te oḳon tumra tane sincho ar deḳso-o.”
14.8: Filife ḳoila, “Huzur, ou gaibi baf amrare deḳaukka, teu amra shanti oimu.”
14.9: Isae ḳoila, “Filif, otodin taki ami tumrar loge loge asi, erbade-o tumi amare sinlae na ni? Ze zone amare deḳse, he amar gaibi bafre-o deḳse. Te tumi kilan ḳoilae, gaibi bafre deḳaukka?
14.10: Tumi ekin ḳoro na ni, ami gaibi bafor maze asi, ar gaibi baf-o amar maze asoin? Ami tumrare zeta ḳoi, ita amar nizor mukor buli nae, ze gaibi baf amar bitre asoin, tain-u tan nizor ḳam salaira.
14.11: Amar ḳota ekin ḳoro, ami amar bafor maze asi, ar tain amar maze asoin. Arnae ontoto amar ota keramoti kam dekia amare ekin ḳoro.
14.12: “Ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, ḳeu zudi amar ufre iman ane, te ami zeta ḳam ḳori, he-o ota ḳorbo. Ar ami amar bafor gese zaiargi kori he aro boṛo boṛo ḳam ḳorbo.
14.13: Tumra amar name zeta saibae, ami ita fura ḳormu zate bafor mohima futor mazdi zair oy.
14.14: Amar nam loia amar gese kunta saile, ami dimu. Pak Ruhur befare oada
14.15: “Tumra zudi amare maya ḳoro, te amar hoḳol hukum-ahkam amol ḳorio.
14.16: Ami gaibi bafor gese saimu, ar tain tumrar lagi aroḳ shaijjogir faṭaiba, ein siroḳal roiba.
14.17: Ou shaijjogir oila hok ruhu. I duniar manshe ou hok ruhre kobul ḳore na, ḳaron tara ere deḳe-o na, sine-o na. Oile tumra ene sino, ein to tumrar loge loge roin ar samnedi tumrar dilor maze boshot ḳorba.
14.18: “Ami tumrare etim halote falaia zaitam nae, ami hirbar tumrar gese aimu.
14.19: Tuṛa bade duniar manshe amare ar deḳto nae, oile tumra deḳbae. Ami zinda asi gotike tumra-o zinda roibae.
14.20: Ami zinda oia uṭia harle tumra buzbae, ami amar gaibi bafor maze asi ar tumra amar maze aso, ami tumrar maze asi.
14.21: Ze zone amar hukum-ahkam sine ar amol ḳore, he-u amare maya ḳore. Ar ze zone amare maya ḳore, amar gaibi baf Allae-o tare maya ḳorba. Ami-o tare maya ḳormu, ar amar nizore tar gese zair ḳormu.”
14.22: Sahabi oḳlor maze Ihuda Iskariat saṛa aroḳ sahabir nam asil Ihuda, ein ḳoila, “Huzur, duniar hoḳol manshor gese zair na ḳoria, ḳali amrar gese-u afnare ḳene zair ḳorba?”
14.23: Isae zuaf dila, “Ḳeu zudi amare maya ḳore, te he amar ḳota manbo. Amar gaibi bafe tare maya ḳorba, amra tar gese aimu, aia tar loge boshot ḳormu.
14.24: Oile ze zone amare maya ḳore na, he kunumonte-u amar ḳotae sole na. Ami tumrare zeta ḳoilam, ita amar mukor ḳota nae, zein amare bezisoin hou bafor ḳota.
14.25: “Ami tumrar loge taḳte taḳte-u ita ḳoilam.
14.26: Ou shaijjogir Pak Ruhu, zanre amar bafe amar name faṭaiba, tain-u hoḳol befare tumrare talim diba, ar ami tumrare zeta ḳoisi ota iad ḳorai diba.
14.27: “Ami tumrar lagi shanti rakia zaiar, amar shanti-u ami tumrare dia zaiargi. I duniae zemne shanti dey, ami ila dei na. Tumrar dilo zanu kunu fereshani ba ḍor-ḳof na ae.
14.28: Ami to age-u tumrare ḳoisi, ami zaiargi, ar hirbar tumrar gese aimu. Tumra zudi amare maya ḳortae, te ami amar bafor gese zaiar ḳori kushi oilae one, ḳaron i baf to amar taki-o mohan.
14.29: Ita goṭar age-u tumrare zanai dilam, zate goṭia harle tumra ekin ḳortae faro.
14.30: Ami tumrar loge ar beshi shomoy mattam nae, ḳaron duniar munib Iblis aior. Amar ufre tar kunu ḳemota nai.
14.31: Oile ami amar bafor hukum mania ita hoḳolta ḳori, zate duniar manshe buzoin, ami amar bafre maya ḳori. Te ao, amra oḳon i zaga taki zaigi.”

15.1: Hozrot Isae ḳoila, “Ami-u asol angur gas ar amar baba girost.
15.2: Amar zeta ḍalainto fol dore na, tain itare ḳaṭia falai dein. Ar zeta ḍalainto fol dore, tain itare saṭia saf-sutra ḳori raḳoin, zate aro beshi fol dore.
15.3: Te ami tumrare ze kalam talim disi, erlagi to tumra ag taki-u saṭa oia saf-sutra oiso.
15.4: Tumra amar maze ro, ami-o tumrar dilo roimu. Angur gasor loge ḍal zudi lagail na taḳe, te ḍale zela nize nize fol doraito fare na, oula tumra-o amar maze na roile nize nize folala oitae faro na.
15.5: Ami-u angur gas, ar tumra oilae ḍal-fala. Ze zon amar loge lagail taḳe, ami-o tar loge lagail roi, teu tar zindegit bout fol dore. Ar, amare saṛa to tumra kunta-u ḳortae faro na.
15.6: “Amar loge ḳeu lagail na roile, tare ḳaṭa ḍalor laḳan falai deoa oy ar roide hukai zae. Bade hukna ḍalain tubaia aguino dein, teu ita zoli-fuṛi zae.
15.7: Tumra zudi amar loge lagail taḳo ar amar kalam ḳanain tumrar dilo taḳe, te tumrar zeta ichcha ota-u saio, ita tumrare deoa oibo.
15.8: Tumrar zindegit zudi bout fol dore, ar olaḳan tumra nizore amar ummot hishabe forman ḳorilao, te amar gaibi bafor tarif oibo.
15.9: Bafe amare zela maya ḳorsoin, ami-o oula tumrare maya ḳorsi. Tumra amar mayar maze ro.
15.10: Ami amar bafor hoḳol hukum-ahkam mania zela tan mayar maze roisi, tumra-o oula amar hukum-ahkam manle amar mayar maze roibae.
15.11: “Ami tumrare ita ḳoilam, zate amar kushi tumrar dilo taḳe ar tumrar kushi fura oy.
15.12: Amar hukum oilo, ami zela tumrare maya ḳorsi, tumra-o oula eḳe-oinnore maya ḳoro.
15.13: Ḳeu zudi nizor dustor lagi zan bilai dey, te tar taki ar beshi maya ḳar ase?
15.14: Amar deoa hukum zudi tumra amol ḳoro, te tumra amar dust.
15.15: Ami tumrare ar gulam ḳoiram na, ḳaron munibe kita ḳoroin gulame to ita zane na, borong ami tumrare dust ḳoisi, ḳaron gaibi bafor ges taki ami zotota hunchi, hoḳolta-u tumrare zanaisi.
15.16: “Amare to tumra fosond ḳorso na, borong ami-u tumrare fosond ḳorsi ar ḳamo lagaisi, zate tumrar zindegi folala oy ar ou fol ṭikia roy. Teu amar name gaibi bafor gese zeta saibae, tain tumrare diba.
15.17: Ami tumrare ou hukum diar, tumra eḳe-oinnore maya ḳoro. Dunia mumin oḳlor dushmon
15.18: “Duniar manshe tumrare ginnain, oile mono rakio, er age tara amare-u ginnaise.
15.19: Tumra zudi ou duniar oitae, te tara tumrare nizor hishabe bala failo one. Tumra to i duniar nae, ami tumrare duniar maz taki fosond ḳorsi gotike tara tumrare ginnae.
15.20: Amar ḳotaḳan mono rakio, gulam tar munib taki boṛo nae. Erlagi manshe zudi amare zulum ḳore, te tumrare-o ola ḳorbo. Tara amar ḳota manle tumrar ḳota-o manlo one.
15.21: Amar ḳarone-u tara tumrar loge ola ḳorbo, ḳaron amare zein bezisoin, enre tara sine na.
15.22: “Ami zudi na aitam ar tarar gese nosiot na ḳortam, te tara gunagar oilo na one, oile oḳon to tarar kunu ozuat nai.
15.23: Ze zone amare ginnae, he amar gaibi bafre-o ginnae.
15.24: Huno, zeta keramoti keu kunudin deḳaise na, ota keramoti zudi ami na deḳaitam, te tara gunagar oilo na one. Oile tara to amare ar amar gaibi bafre deḳse, dekia-o ginnaise.
15.25: Ita oilo, zate tarar kitabor ou ḳota fole, kitabo ase, tara bina ḳarone amare ginnaise.
15.26: “Ami amar gaibi bafor ges taki ze shaijjogir ruhre tumrar gese faṭaimu, tain aia amar befare shakki diba. Tain oila hok ruhu, tain gaibi bafor ges taki aiba.
15.27: Ar tumra-o amar befare shakki dibae, tumra to foyla taki-u amar loge loge aso.”

16.1: Hozrot Isae aro ḳoila, “Ami ita zanai dilam, zate tumra ḳorlami na zao.
16.2: Manshe tumrare shomaz taki bar ḳori diba. Ola shomoy aibo, zara tumrare kun ḳorbo, tara mono ḳorbo ita Allar ebadot ḳorer.
16.3: Tara ita ḳorbo, ḳaron tara gaibi bafre-o sinche na, amare-o sinche na.
16.4: Ami ita age-u ḳoia raḳlam, zate shomoy aile mono oy, ami tumrare ota ḳoislam. Ami foyla taki ita ḳoisi na, ḳaron ami to tumrar loge loge-u aslam. Shaijjogir ruhur ḳam-ḳazor nomuna
16.5: “Huno, amare zein faṭaisoin, ami oḳon tan gese zaiargi, ta-o tumra ḳeu amare zikairae na, ami koi zairam.
16.6: Borong ami tumrare ita ḳoisi, erlagi tumrar mono kub duk aise.
16.7: Tebou ami hok kota ḳoiram, amar zaoaḳan tumrar lagi bala, ami na gele to hou shaijjogir ruhu aita nae. Ami gelegi tanre tumrar gese faṭaimu.
16.8: Tain aia gunar befare, Allar morzi mafik solar befare ar Allar bisaror befare manshore hozag korba.
16.9: Tain gunar befare hozag korba, ḳaron manshe amar ufre iman ane na.
16.10: Allar morzi mafik solar befare hozag korba, ḳaron ami amar gaibi bafor gese zaiargi, tumra amare ar deḳtae nae.
16.11: Bisaror befare hozag korba, ḳaron duniar munib Iblisor bisar oigese.
16.12: “Tumrare aro boutta ḳoar ase, oile oḳon ita ḳoile shoijjo ḳortae fartae nae.
16.13: Hou hok ruhu aia hari fot deḳaia tumrare furafur hokkan zanaiba. Tain to niz taki kunta ḳoita nae, ḳali zeta hunoin, ota-u ḳoiba. Ar zeta goṭbo, ota-u zanaiba.
16.14: Ami zeta ḳoi, tain aia ota-u tumrar gese zair ḳorba. Olaḳan tain amar mohima zair ḳorba.
16.15: Gaibi bafor zeta ase, ita hoḳolta-u amar. Erlagi ami koiram, ami zeta ḳoi, tain ota-u tumrar gese zair ḳorba.” Ummot oḳolre buz deoa
16.16: Hozrot Isae ḳoila, “Tuṛa bade tumra ar amare deḳtae nae, hirbar tuṛa bade deḳbae.”
16.17: Ikan hunia ḳoyzon sahabie mata-mati korla, “Tain ita kita matoin, ‘Tuṛa bade tumra ar amare deḳtae nae, hirbar tuṛa bade deḳbae’, tain hirbar ḳoira, ‘Ami bafor gese zairamgi.’
16.18: Te tain ze tuṛa shomoyor ḳota ḳoira, ikan kita? Tain kita matira, amra to buzram na.”
16.19: Hozrot Isae buzilila, tan sahabi oḳole ou befare tanre kunta zikaita saira, buzia tain ḳoila, “Ami ze ḳoisi, ‘Tuṛa bade tumra ar amare deḳtae nae, hirbar tuṛa bade deḳbae’ ota loia tumra mata-mati korrae ni?
16.20: Huno, ami tumrare hasau ḳoiram, tumra ḳandibae ar ahazari korbae, oile i duniar manshe kushi korba. Tumra oḳon duk-koshṭo ḳorbae, oile bade i duk roito nae, er bodla kushi korbae.
16.21: Baichcha oar shomoy beṭintor kub ḳoshṭo oy, oile oia harle noya aolador furtie mon bori zae, hi koshṭor ḳota ar mono taḳe na.
16.22: Ou laḳan tumra-o oḳon duk-koshṭo ḳorrae, oile hirbar zebla tumrar loge amar deḳa oibo, hou shomoy kushie tumrar dil borizibo, i kushi keu ḳaṛia nito farto nae.
16.23: “Hi shomoy tumra amar gese kunta saitae nae. Ami tumrare hasa ḳoiram, tumra amar name amar gaibi bafor gese zeta saibae, tain tumrare diba.
16.24: Oḳono to tumra amar name kunta saiso na. Sao, teu faibae, zate tumrar kushi fura oy.
16.25: “Ami tumrare udahoron dia ou talim dilam. Oile olaḳan shomoy aibo, zebla ami kunu udahoron saṛa, amar gaibi bafor befare kula-mela buzaimu.
16.26: Hou din-u tumra amar name saibae. Ami to ikan ḳoiram na, ami tumrar oia gaibi bafor gese minot ḳormu.
16.27: Tain nize-u tumrare maya ḳoroin, ḳaron tumra amare maya ḳorso ar ekin ḳorso ze, ami Allar ges taki aisi.
16.28: Ashole, ami amar gaibi baf Allar ges taki ou duniat aisi ar dunia saṛia tan gese-u zairam.”
16.29: Ou shomoy sahabi oḳole tanre ḳoila, “Huzur deḳoukka, oḳon to afne kula-mela-u matira, kunu udahoron dira na.
16.30: Oḳon amra buzlam, afnar ozana kunta nai, ar afnare ḳeu kunta zikanir-o nai. Gotike-u amra ekin ḳorlam, afne Allar ges taki-u aisoin.”
16.31: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Oḳon ekin oise ni?
16.32: Huno, ola shomoy aior, emonki aichche, zebla tumra dol saṛia amare toia zarzir zagat bagibae. Oile ami to eḳla nae, amar gaibi baf amar loge loge asoin.
16.33: Ami tumrare ita ḳoilam, zate tumra amar loge mishia aso gotike mono shanti fao. I duniat tumra duḳ-mosiboto aso, ta-o monobol rakio, ami-u duniare joy ḳorsi.”

17.1: Oḳan ḳoia hari Hozrot Isae asmanor bae saia dua ḳorla, “Baba, shomoy oigese. Tumi tumar futor mohima zair ḳoro, zate fute-o tumar mohima zair ḳorta faroin.
17.2: Tumi tanre hoḳol manshor ufre ḳemota diso, zate tumi zerare tan ato shofiso, erare tain aḳeri zindegi dein.
17.3: Eḳmatro hok Allare mani tumare ar tumi zenre faṭaiso, hou Isa al-Mosire sina-u oilo aḳeri zindegi.
17.4: Tumi amare ze ḳam diso, i kam adae ḳoria duniat tumar mohima zair ḳorsi.
17.5: Te baba, dunia foyda ḳorar age tumar dorbaro amar ze mohima asil, tumar gesor ou mohima oḳon amare hirbar deo.
17.6: “I duniar mazor zerare amar ato shofiso, ami erar gese tumare zair ḳorsi. Tara to tumar-u asla, tumi-u tarare amar ato shofiso. Tara tumar hukum mania solche.
17.7: Tara oḳon buzche, tumi zeta amare diso, ita to tumar ges taki-u aise.
17.8: Ḳaron oilo, tumi zeta toblig korar hukum diso, ami ota zanaisi. Ar tara-o itare kobul ḳoria asolḳan buzilise zen, ami tumar ges taki-u aisi. Tara ekin-o ḳorse, tumi-u amare faṭaiso.
17.9: Te ami to hoḳlor lagi minot ḳoriar na, ḳali tumi zarare amar ato diso, erar lagi-u minot ḳorram, tara to tumar-u.
17.10: Amar zotota ase hokkolta-u tumar, ar tumar hokkolta-u amar. Erar mazdi-u amar mohima zair or.
17.11: “O fobitro baba, i duniat ami ar beshi shomoy nae, oile tara i duniat asoin, ami to tumar gese airam. Tumi amare tumar ze nam diso, ou namor bole erare basao, zate amra zela eḳ, tara-o ola eḳ oita faroin.
17.12: Ami zotodin tarar loge aslam, otodin tumar deoa ou namor gune tarare basaisi. Tarare fara dia raḳsi, tara ḳeu binash oise na. Ḳali zar binash oar ḳota, he-u binash oise, zate Allar kalamor ḳota fole.
17.13: “Te oḳon ami tumar gese airam, duniat roite-u ita tarare zanai dilam, zate amar kushie tarar dil bori zae.
17.14: Tumi amare zeta zanaiso, ami-o tarare ota zanaisi. Ami zela i duniar nae, tara-o ola i duniar nae, erlagi duniar manshe tarare ginnaise.
17.15: Ami tumar gese abdar ḳorram na, tumi tarare dunia taki nitaegi, borong ou abdar ḳorram, tumi tarare Iblisor at taki hefazot ḳoro.
17.16: Ami zela ou duniar nae, oula tara-o i duniar nae.
17.17: Tumi tarare tumar hok dia ḳas hishabe raḳo. Tumar kalam-u oilo ou hok.
17.18: Tumi zela amare duniat faṭaiso, oula ami-o tarare duniar maze faṭaisi.
17.19: Ami tarar lagi nizore ḳas ḳori raḳsi, zate tarare-o hok dia ḳas hishabe raḳa oy.
17.20: “Te ami kali erar lagi minot ḳoriar na, tarar lagi-o minot ḳorram, zera erar ḳota hunia amar ufre iman anbo.
17.21: Ami minot ḳoriar tara hoḳol zanu eḳ oy. Baba, tumi zela amar loge aso ar ami-o zela tumar loge asi, oula tara-o zanu amrar loge milia roin. Teu duniar manshe ekin ḳorba, tumi-u amare faṭaiso.
17.22: Tumi amare ze mohima dan ḳorso, ami ita tarare dan ḳorsi, zate amra zela eḳ, oula tara-o eḳ oita faroin.
17.23: Tumi zela amar maze aso, ola ami-o tarar maze asi. Ou laḳan tara zanu furafur eḳ oita faroin. Teu duniar manshe buzbo, tumi-u amare faṭaiso, ar tumi amare zela maya ḳoro, oula tarare-o maya ḳoro.
17.24: Baba, ami sairam, tumi zerare amar ato shofiso, ami zeḳano asi, tara-o zanu amar loge hono roin ar amar mohima deḳoin. I mohima to tumi-u amare dan ḳorso, ḳaron dunia foyda ḳorar ag taki-u tumi amare maya ḳorso.
17.25: “O hok insafḳari baba, duniar manshe tumare sine na, oile ami to sini. Ar tumi-u zen amare faṭaiso, ikan era buzilise.
17.26: Erar gese ami tumar nam zair ḳorsi, agedi aro ḳormu, zate tumi amare zela maya ḳoro, ola maya tarar bitre-o taḳe ar ami tarar loge mishia taki.”

18.1: Ou munazator bade Hozrot Isae tan sahabi oḳolre loia Kidrun namor eḳ faṛia ḳal faroia gela. Gia tarare loia eḳ baganor bitre hamaila.
18.2: Beiman Ihudae i zaga sinto, ḳaron Isae age bout bar sahabi oḳolre loia ono boisoin.
18.3: Ermaze boṛo imam ar Forishi oḳole ou Ihudar loge eḳ dol sifai ar Baytul-Mukaddosor ḳoyzon fulish faṭaila. Ihudae tarare loia ono ailo, ou shomoy tarar ato lem, mushal, ar ostro-shostro asil.
18.4: Isae ag taki-u hoḳolta zanta, tan ufre kita goṭbo. Erlagi tain aguaia aia tarare zikaila, “Afnara ḳare tukaira?”
18.5: Tara ḳoila, “Nasarot gaur Isare.” Tain ḳoila, “Ami-u hein.” Ou shomoy beiman Ihuda-o tarar loge asil.
18.6: Isae zebla ḳoila, “Ami-u hein,” ikan hunia-u tara ḳoredi gia maṭit foṛigela.
18.7: Tain hirbar tarare zikaila, “Afnara ḳare saira?” Tara ḳoila, “Nasarot gaur Isare.”
18.8: Tain ḳoila, “Ami to ḳoilam, ami-u hein. Afnara zudi amare-u tukanit ain, te amar logor erare saṛi deukka.”
18.9: Ashole ila goṭlo, zate Isae age zeta ḳoisla ota fura oy. Tain ḳoisla, “Baba, tumi zerare amar ato shofiso, era eḳzonre-o ami kuaisi na.”
18.10: Ou shomoy Saimon-Fitoror loge ekkan toluar asil, oḳan bar ḳoria, tain fordan imamor gulamor ḍain ḳan ḳaṭilila. I gulamor nam asil Malkus.
18.11: Erlagi Isae Fitorre ḳoila, “Tumar toluar ḳafo harao. Gaibi bafe amare ze mosibotor fiala disoin, ikṭar shad ami loitam na ni?”
18.12: Ou shomoy sifai oḳole, fordan sifaie ar Baytul-Mukaddosor fulish oḳole Isare doria bandililo.
18.13: Bandia foyla tara Hanonor gese loia gelo. I Hanon asla hou bosoror fordan imam Kayafar hour.
18.14: Ou Kayafae age Ihudi neta oḳolre ḳoisla, “Asta zati binash oar saite, hoḳlor bodla eḳzonor moron aro bala.” Sahabi Fitoror foylabar oshikar
18.15: Ou shomoy Fitor ar aroḳzon sahabi Isar ḳore ḳore gela. Ou sahabire fordan imame sinta. Ein Isar loge oia fordan imamor baṛir uṭano hamaila.
18.16: Oile Fitor baire geiṭor gese ubai roila. Teu fordan imamor forisito Isar ou sahabi bare gia faradar beṭire ḳoia Fitorre bitre anaila.
18.17: Ou beṭie Fitorre ḳoilo, “Tumi-o en murid ni?” Fitore ḳoila, “Na, na, ami nae.”
18.18: Ou shomoy kub shit foṛsil, erdae sifai ar gulam oḳole uṭano angradi aguin doraia aguin tabanit lagla. Fitore-o tarar daro ubaia aguin tabaila. Fordan imamor zera
18.19: Ou shomoy fordan imame Isare tan ummot ar tan talimor befare zikaila.
18.20: Isae zuaf dila, “Ami manshor samne kula-mela matisi. Ihudi oḳol zeḳano zoma oin, ota mosido ar Baytul-Mukaddoso hamesha talim disi. Ami to lukaia kunta ḳoisi na.
18.21: Te amare ar ḳene zikaira? Amar talim zera hunche, tarare-u zikaukka. Ami ze talim disi, ita tarar zana ase.”
18.22: Isar i zuaf hunia, ḳandat ze sifai oḳol uba asla, era eḳzone tanre soṛ maria ḳoilo, “Tui fordan imamre ola zuaf dire ni?”
18.23: Tain ḳoila, “Ami zudi bad kunta ḳoia taki te ḳoukka, ar bala mat matile amare marra ḳene?”
18.24: Ou shomoy Hanone banda halote Isare fordan imam Kayafar gese faṭai dila. Hozrot Fitoror hirbar oshikar
18.25: Sahabi Saimon-Fitore zebla aguin tabaira, ou shomoy manshe tanre ḳoilo, “Tumi-o tar logor eḳzon sahabi ni?” Fitore dusrabar oshikar ḳori koila, “Na, na, ami nae.”
18.26: Fitore zar ḳan ḳaṭisla, tar ek kuṭum asil fordan imamor gulam. He ḳoilo, “Ami baganor bitre ogur loge tumare-o deḳlam na ni?”
18.27: Fitore hirbar oshikar ḳorla, ar loge loge-u murgae bang dilailo. Hakim Filator samne Hozrot Isa
18.28: Ihudi neta oḳole biane Isare Kayafar ges taki, Ruman bashshar fordan hakim Filator ṭongit loia gela. Oile tara baṛir bitre hamaila na, zate be-din hakimor baṛit hamaia nafak na oin, borong fak-saf roia Azadi Idor ḳani kaita faroin.
18.29: Erlagi Ruman hakim Filat bare aia zikaila, “I beṭar birudde tumrar nalish kita?”
18.30: Tara ḳoila, “He oforad na ḳorle to afnar gese anlam na one.”
18.31: Filate tarare ḳoila, “Tumra tare loia zaogi, gia tumrar shoriot mafik bisar ḳorilao.” Ikan hunia tara Filatre ḳoila, “Kunu manshore zane marar moto shaza deoar ḳemota amrar ato nai, ḳali Ruman oḳlor ato ase.”
18.32: Nizor mout kilan oibo, Isae ikan age-u ḳoisoin. Te ita oilo, zate tan ou ḳota fole.
18.33: Teu Filat hirbar ṭongir bitre hamaila ar Isare ḍaḳ dia ḳoila, “Oba, tumi kita Ihudi oḳlor bashsha ni?”
18.34: Tain zuaf dila, “Afne nize ou ḳota ḳoira, na manshe amar befare afnare ḳoise?”
18.35: Filate zuaf dila, “Ami kita Ihudi ni? Tumar nizor zatir manshe ar boṛo imam oḳole tumare amar ato dise. Ḳo, tumi kita ḳorso?”
18.36: Isae ḳoila, “Amar bashshai i duniar nae. Amar bashshai zudi ou duniar oito, te Ihudi neta oḳlor ato ami na foṛar lagi amar manshe laṛai korlo one, oile amar bashshai to inor nae.”
18.37: Ikan hunia Filate Isare zikaila, “Taile tumi kita bashsha ni?” Isae ḳoila, “Afne-u to ḳoira, ami bashsha. Hunoukka, hokor fokke shakki deoar lagi ami duniat aisi. Zara hokor loge ase, tara amar ḳota hune.”
18.38: Filate tanre ḳoila, “Te hokkan kita?” Oḳan ḳoia tain hirbar bare gia Ihudi neta oḳolre ḳoila, “Ami to er kunu dush faisi na.
18.39: Oile tumrar to eḳṭa reoaz ase, Azadi Idor shomoy ami eḳzon ḳoydire ḳalas dei. Te tumra sao ni, ami Ihudir ou bashshare saṛi ditam?”
18.40: Ikan hunia tara sillaia ḳoilo, “Na, na, ere na, Barabbare saṛi deukka.” Ou Barabba asil eḳ ḍaḳait.

19.1: Bade Ruman hakim Filate Isare sabuk marar hukum dila.
19.2: Ar sifai oḳole gosa-ḳaṭa dia eḳ mukuṭ banaia tan matat dilo, ar baingoni rongor bashshai lebas findailo.
19.3: Bade tara tan samne aia ḳoilo, “O Ihudir bashsha, marhaba!” Oḳan ḳoia ḳoia tara tan galo soṛailo.
19.4: Teu Filat hirbar bare aia ḳoila, “Huno, ami ere tumrar gese bar ḳoria aniar, teu tumra buzbae, ami er kunu dush-u fairam na.”
19.5: Hou gosa-ḳaṭar mukuṭ ar baingoni lebas finda halote Isa bar oia aila, ar Filate ḳoila, “Ou deḳo, hou manush.”
19.6: Isare dekia boṛo imam ar Baytul-Mukaddosor fulish oḳole sillaia ḳoila, “Tare solibo deo, solibo deo.” Filate ḳoila, “Ami to tar kunu dush faisi na, te tumra-u tare nia solibo gatilao.” (I solib oilo laḳṛidi banail, manshore loṭḳaia marar eḳ zinish.)
19.7: Ihudi neta oḳole Filatre ḳoila, “Amrar shoriot mafik tar moron oa usit, ḳaron he nizore Allar ḳas mayar zon, Ibnulla ḳoise.”
19.8: Ikan hunia Filate aro beshi ḍoraigela.
19.9: Tain hirbar ṭongi-goror bitre hamaia Isare zikaila, “Tumi kuai taki aiso?” Oile Isae kunu zuaf dila na.
19.10: Erdae Filate Isare ḳoila, “Tumi amar mator kunu zuaf ditae na ni? Tumi zano ni, tumare ḳalas dibar ba solibor ufre loṭḳaia marar ḳemota amar ase?”
19.11: Teu Isae ḳoila, “Ufre taki afnare ḳemota na deoa oile, amar ufre afnar kunu ḳemota-u taḳto na. Erlagi ze manshe amare afnar ato dorai dise, he-u boṛo gunagar.”
19.12: Ikan hunia Filate Isare ḳalas dilaita saila, oile Ihudi neta oḳole sillaia ḳoila, “Afne zudi ere ḳalas dilain, te afne Ruman bashshar dust nae. Ze manshe nizore bashsha ḳoia dabi kore, he to Ruman bashshar dushmon.”
19.13: Ikan hunia Filate Isare bar ḳori anla ar Fattordi-Banda namor eḳ uṭano bisaror ashono boila. Ibrani bashae i uṭanre Gabbata ḳoa oy.
19.14: I din asil Azadi Idor ayozonor din. Ou shomoy beil onuman duifor oigese. Filate Ihudi neta oḳolre ḳoila, “Ou deḳo, tumrar bashsha.”
19.15: Isare dekia tara sillaia ḳoilo, “Ogure horao, horao, tare solibo deo.” Filate ḳoila, “Tumrar bashshare ami solibo dilaitam ni?” Boṛo imam oḳole ḳoila, “Ḳali Ruman bashsha saṛa, amrar ar kunu bashsha nai.”
19.16: Teu hakim Filate solibor ufre loṭḳaia marar lagi Isare tarar ato shomzai dila, ar sifai oḳole tanre loia gela. Hozrot Isa al-Mosir mout
19.17: Bade Isae tan solib nize boia ‘Ḳollar Saṛ’ namor zagat gela. Ibrani bashae i zagar nam Golgata.
19.18: Hino nia tara tanre solibo loṭḳailo. Isare mazḳano, ar tan dui galar duio solibo oinno duizonre loṭḳailo.
19.19: Ar Filate ekkan oforad-nama lekia Isar solibor ufre lagaila. Ikano leḳa asil, “Nasarot gaur Isa, Ihudir bashsha.”
19.20: Ze zagat tanre solibo loṭḳail oisil, ou zaga ṭaunor ḳandat asil gotike bout Ihudie ou oforad-nama foṛlo. Ikan Ibrani, Iunani ar Ruman bashae leḳa asil.
19.21: Ihudir boṛo imam oḳole hakim Filatre ḳoila, “Ihudir bashsha na lekia, afne ola leḳoukka, he ḳoito, ami Ihudir bashsha.”
19.23: Isare solibo loṭḳanir bade sifai oḳole tan ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ sair baṭ ḳori baṭia nila. Bade tan kurtaṭa-o nila. I asta kurtar gola taki bain ḳora, kunu silai asil na.
19.24: Erlagi sifai oḳole eḳe-oinne ḳoilo, “Ikṭa na siṛia borong loṭari mari deki, ḳar baiggot foṛe.” Ita goṭsil, zate Asmani Kitabor ḳota fole, kitabo leḳa ase, Tara nizor maze amar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ baṭa-baṭi korse, amar kurtar lagi tara loṭari marse.
19.25: Ar hasau tara ola ḳorlo. Hozrot Isar solibor ḳandat tan ma, ḳala, Kulufar bou Moriom ar Mogdilini Moriom uba asla.
19.26: Isae deḳla, tan ma ar mayar hou sahabi daro ubai roisoin. Dekia foyla tan maʼre ḳoila, “Mai go, ounu tumar fua.”
19.27: Ar sahabire ḳoila, “Bai, ounu tumar ma.” Ou shomoy taki i sahabie Isar maʼre tan nizor goro loia gelagi.
19.28: Erbade hokkolta shesh oigese zania, al-Zobur kitabor ayat zate fole, otar lagi Isae ḳoila, “Amar fiase dorse.”
19.29: Ou shomoy hino eḳ zog ṭenga anguror shorbot asil. Tara ekkan tena ania ou shorbotor maze bizaia, esub gasor ḍeṭar matat lagaia usa ḳori tan mukor gese dilo.
19.30: I shorbot ḳaia harle tain ḳoila, “Shesh oigese.” Oḳan ḳoia, tain mata nuaia aḳeri dom falaila. al-Mosir lashor forikka
19.31: Azadi Idor agor din Hozrot Isae inteḳal ḳorla. Bador din asil ḳas fobitro eḳ Zummabar. Erlagi Ihudi neta oḳole saila, i din zanu kunu lash solibor ufre na taḳe. Ou tara hakim Filator gese saila, zate solibo zera ase, tara zoldi morar lagi tarar fao bangia solib taki lamani oy.
19.32: Teu Isar loge zerare solibo loṭḳail oisil, sifai oḳole era duiozonor fao bangi dilo.
19.33: Tara Isar gese aia deḳlo, tain mara gesoin, erlagi tan fao banglo na.
19.34: Oile eḳ sifaie sulfi dia tan fatti-aṛor mazedi faṛ marlo, faṛor loge lou ar fani bar oia ailo.
19.35: Ze zone nizor souke i goṭona deḳsoin, tain-u shakki disoin ar tan shakki hasa. Tain zanoin, tain zeta ḳoira ita hasa, zate tumra-o ekin ḳoro.
19.36: Ita oisil zate Pak Kitabor ou ḳota fura oy, kitabo ase, ‘Tan eḳṭa aḍḍi-o banga oito nae.’
19.37: Eoḳan ase, ‘Zara tanre gatise, tara tan bae sai roibo.’ Hozrot Isa al-Mosir dafon
19.38: Ita goṭonar bade Arimatia gaur Iusufe Isar lash nita ḳori hakim Filator onumoti saila. Iusuf asla Isar eḳzon lukail ummot, ḳaron tain Ihudi neta oḳolre ḍoraita. Filator onumoti faia tain Isar lash nila.
19.39: Age raitor bala zein Isar gese aisla, hou Nikodime-o mura-ator ar oguru mishaia onuman eḳ mon kushboy moshla loia aila.
19.40: Ar Isar lash nia Ihudi oḳlor niom mafik ou kushboy-ala moshla maḳaia ḳafon findaila.
19.41: Isare zeḳano solibo gata oisil, hono eḳ baganor bitre faṛor guhar maze noya eḳṭa ḳoybor kudia raḳa asil. I koyboro ḳeurore dafon ḳora oise na.
19.42: Ou din Ihudi oḳlor idor agor din oae ar ḳoyborṭa-o ḳandat taḳae, tara taṛa-uṛa ḳori Isare ono-u dafon ḳorla.

20.1: Haftar foyla din fozor oḳto andair roite-u Mogdilini Moriom Hozrot Isar ḳoyboror ḳandat gela. Gia deḳla, ḳoyboror muk taki fattorṭa horail oigese.
20.2: Dekia tain Saimon-Fitor ar ze sahabire Isae kub maya ḳorta, erar gese douṛaia gia ḳoila, “Hunchoin ni, huzuror lash manshe ḳoybor taki tulia nisoingi. Nia ḳoi raḳsoin amra zani na.”
20.3: Ḳobor faia Fitor ar ou sahabi koyboror bae roana oila.
20.4: Duiozone eḳloge douṛaira. Fitorre ḳore falaia hou sahabi age ḳoyboror ḳandat gela.
20.5: Gia unda oia deḳla, ḳoyboror bitre ḳafon foṛi roise, oile tain ḳoyboror bitre hamaila na.
20.6: Fitor-o tan ḳore ḳore aila, aia ḳoyboror bitre hamaia deḳla, ḳali kafon ḳan foṛi roise.
20.7: Ze ḳafonor ṭukra dia tan mata banda oisil, ikan oinno ṭukrar loge nae, alga foṛi roise.
20.8: Ze sahabi foyla ḳoyboror ḳandat gesla, bade tain-o bitre hamaila, hamaia hoḳolta dekia ekin ḳorla.
20.9: Isar to murda taki zinda oa zorur, Pak Kitabor ou talimor mani age to era ḳeu buzchoin na.
20.10: Erbade sahabi oḳol zarzir baṛit gelagi,
20.11: oile Moriome ḳoyboror ḳandat ubaia ḳandon lagaila. Tain ḳandi kandi unda oia ḳoyboror bitredi saia deḳla,
20.12: Isar lash zeno hutaia raḳa oisil, hono dola ḳafoṛ finno duizon firista boi roisoin, eḳzon hitanedi, aroḳzon fao galabae.
20.13: Firista oḳole Moriomre ḳoila, “Tumi kandirae ḳene go?” Tain ḳoila, “Manshe amar malikor lash tulia nisoingi, nia ḳoi toisoin zani na.”
20.14: Oḳan ḳoia tain ḳoredi saite-u deḳla, Hozrot Isa ubai roisoin. Oile tain-u ze Isa, Moriome ikan buzla na.
20.15: Isae Moriomre ḳoila, “Ogo, tumi kando ḳene? Ḳare tukairae?” Isare baganor mali mono ḳoria tain ḳoila, “Deḳoukka, afne zudi tan lash nia taḳoin, te kuai nisoin, ḳoukka. Ami tan lash nimu.”
20.16: Isae ḳoila, “Moriom.” Teu Moriom firia ubaia Ibrani bashae tanre ḳoila, “Rabbuni” mani ustad.
20.17: Isae tanre ḳoila, “Amare doria rakio na, ami to oḳono gaibi bafor gese ufre gesi na. Tumi borong amar baiainre gia ḳo, zein amar ar tumrar gaibi baf, amar ar tumrar Alla, ami ufre tan gese-u zairam.”
20.18: Teu Mogdilini Moriome sahabi oḳolre gia ḳoila, Isar loge tan deḳa oise ar Isae-u tanre ita hoḳolta ḳoisoin. Sahabi oḳole zinda Isare deḳla
20.19: Hou din, mani haftar foyla din hainja bala sahabi oḳol ekḳano dola oila. Oile Ihudi neta oḳlor ḍore goror duar-kiṛki hoḳolta bond asil. Ermaze aḳta-u Hozrot Isa aia erar mazḳano ubaia ḳoila, “Assalamu alaikum.”
20.20: Oḳan ḳoia hari tain nizor duio at ar fatti-aṛor zoḳomor dag erare deḳaila. Huzurre dekia sahabi oḳol kub kushi oila.
20.21: Bade Isae hirbar erare ḳoila, “Assalamu alaikum. Huno, amar gaibi bafe zela amare faṭaisoin, ami-o oula tumrare faṭairam.”
20.22: Oḳan ḳoia tain sahabi oḳlor ufre fu dia ḳoila, “Allar Pak Ruhre kobul ḳoro.
20.23: Huno, tumra zudi keure maf ḳori deo, te tar guna maf ḳora oibo, ar zudi maf na ḳoro, te tar gunar mafi milto nae.” Sahabi Tumasor shondoy
20.24: Hozrot Isa zebla sahabi oḳlor samne aila, ou shomoy barozon sahabir mazor Tumas namor eḳzon sahabi ino asla na. Ou Tumasre Zomoz ḳoia ḍaḳa oito.
20.25: Erlagi baki sahabi oḳole Tumasre ḳoila, “Amra to huzurre deḳsi.” Tumase ḳoila, “Hunoukka, ami amar nizor souke zudi tan duio ator feregor dag na deki, ou zoḳomo angul na lagai, ar tan fatti-aṛor zoḳomo at na dei, te kunumonte-u ami ita ekin ḳortam nae.”
20.26: Er eḳ hafta bade hirbar sahabi oḳol ou goro dola oila, erar loge Tumas-o asla. Ou shomoy goror hoḳol duar-kiṛki bond taḳle-o aḳta-u Isa aia tarar mazḳano ubaia ḳoila, “Assalamu alaikum.”
20.27: Bade tain Tumasre ḳoila, “Tumar angul lagaia amar duio at deḳo, ar tumar at baṛaia amar fatti-aṛor zoḳomo harao, ekin ḳoro, shondoy ḳorio na.”
20.28: Teu Tumase ḳoila, “Malik amar, Alla amar.”
20.29: Isae tanre ḳoila, “Tumas, amare deḳso ḳori tumi iman anlae ni? Huno, doinno tara, zera na dekia-o amar ufre iman ane.” Ou kitabor mul nosiot
20.30: Hozrot Isae sahabi oḳlor samne aro bout keramoti nishana deḳaisoin, ita hoḳolta to ou kitabo leḳa oise na.
20.31: Ḳali ou goṭona oḳol leḳa oise, zate ota tilaot ḳoria tumra iman ano, Hozrot Isa-u Alla Pakor oada ḳora hou al-Mosi, tain-u Ibnulla, Allar ḳas mayar zon, ar iman ania zate tan usillae tumra aḳeri zindegi hasil ḳoro.

21.1: Erbade Tibiria namor aoror faro Hozrot Isae sahabi oḳolre hirbar deḳa dila. Goṭona ou laḳan oilo.
21.2: Saimon-Fitor, Tumas zare Zomoz ḳoa oito, ar Galil zilar Kanna gaur Notonel, Zibudiar fuain shoho aro duizon sahabi eḳloge asla.
21.3: Sahabi Saimon-Fitore logor erare ḳoila, “Ami mas marat zaiargi.” Tara ḳoila, “Amra-o tumar loge zaimu.” Teu tara nao loia mas marat bar oila, oile i rait kunu mas faila na.
21.4: Fozor oḳto Isa aia aoror faro ubaila. Oile tain-u ze Isa, era ikan buzla na.
21.5: Tain sahabi oḳolre ḳoila, “O beṭain, tumra kunu mas faiso na ni?” Tara ḳoila, “Ji na, faisi na.”
21.6: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Te naor ḍain galabae zal falao, teu faibaene.” Tan ḳotamoto tara zal falaila ar zalo oto mas hamaila, ikan ṭania tulta farla na.
21.7: Ze sahabire Isae maya ḳorta, tain Fitorre ḳoila, “Ein to malik.” I shomoy Saimon-Fitoror gotro ḳafoṛ asil na. “Ein to malik” oḳan hunia-u tain ḳafoṛ findia faldi fanit foṛla.
21.8: Oile baki sahabi oḳole mase bora zalḳan ṭani ṭani nao loia faro azila. Ḳaron tara far taki beshi duroi nae, onuman dui-sho at duroi asla.
21.9: Tara faro uṭia deḳla angrar aguin, ou aguinor ufre mas ar ruṭi.
21.10: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Oḳon zeta mas marso, on tone ḳoyṭa ano.”
21.11: Saimon-Fitore nao taki zalḳan faro ṭania tulla. Zalor bitre eḳ-sho teppannoṭa boṛo mas asil, tebou zal faṛlo na.
21.12: Isae tarare ḳoila, “Ao, ḳao aia.” Oile kunu sahabie zikanir shaosh oilo na “Afne ḳe?” Ḳaron tara zanta, tain-u Malik.
21.13: Bade tain aia tarare ruṭi kaite dila, oula biran mas-o dila.
21.14: Murda taki zinda oar bade, ou tin nombor bar tain sahabi oḳolre deḳa dila. Hozrot Fitoror loge soal-zuaf
21.15: Tarar ḳaoa-daoar bade Isae Saimon-Fitorre zikaila, “O Saimon bin Iuhanna, era zela amare maya ḳoroin, tumi amare er taki beshi maya ḳoro ni?” Tain ḳoila, “Ji oy malik, afne to zanoin, ami afnare ḳoto maya ḳori.” Teu Isae ḳoila, “Te amar meṛa-baichchar raḳali koro.”
21.16: Isae hirbar tanre zikaila, “Saimon bin Iuhanna, tumi amare maya ḳoro ni?” Fitore ḳoila, “Ji oy malik, afne to zanoin, ami afnare ḳoto maya ḳori.” Isae ḳoila, “Te amar meṛar fal deḳa-huna ḳoro.”
21.17: Bade tain tisrabar zikaila, “O Saimon bin Iuhanna, hasau ami tumar mayar manush ni?” Isae tisrabar zikanie Fitor mone mone kisu dukito oia ḳoila, “Malik, afne to hoḳolta-u zanoin, afne zanoin-u afne amar kub mayar zon.” Teu Isae ḳoila, “Te amar meṛa falor raḳali koro.
21.18: Ami tumare hasau ḳoiram, tumar zuankir shomoy tumi nize-u tumar ḳomor bandia zeno kushi ono zaitae. Oile buṛakir shomoy tumar at baṛai dibae, ar oinno zone tumare bandia, tumi zeno zaitae sao na, hono loia zaibo.”
21.19: Allar gourob zair oar lagi Fitoror mout kilan oibo, oḳan buzanit gia Isae ou ḳota ḳoila. Bade tain Fitorre ḳoila, “Ao, amar loge taḳo.”
21.20: Ou shomoy Fitore ḳoredi saia deḳla, Isar hou mayar sahabi kore ḳore aira. Ou sahabie ḳoydin age ḳanit boia Isar bae zukia ḳoisla, “Huzur, afnare dushmonor ato ze dorai dibo, he ḳe?”
21.21: Fitore enre dekia Isare ḳoila, “Huzur, en kita oibo?”
21.22: Isae Fitorre ḳoila, “Ami zudi sai, ami dusrabar duniat na aoa forzonto he ono rouk, te tumar kita? Tumi amar loge taḳo.”
21.23: Erlagi ummot oḳlor maze ḳobor roṭi gelo, ou sahabi morta nae. Oile Isae Fitorre ikan ḳoisoin na. Borong tain ḳoisla, “Ami zudi sai, ami hirbar toshrif na ana forzonto he ono taḳouk, te tumar kita?” Leḳok sahabir shakki
21.24: Ou sahabie ita hoḳol befare shakki disoin ar leḳsoin. Amra zani, tan shakki hasa.
21.25: Hozrot Isae aro bout ḳam ḳorsoin. Ita zudi eḳ ek kori leḳa oito, te oto kitab oito, ita asta duniaiye dorlo na one.

1.1: 11Mohamainno Tiofilas, Hozrot Isare behesto tulia neoar ag forzonto tain zeta talim disoin ar zeta zeta ḳorsoin i hoḳolta-u ami agor kitabo leḳsi.
1.2: Ze sahabi oḳolre tain basia loisla, tanre tulia neoar age Pak Ruhu dia erar gese osiot ḳorai gesoin.
1.3: Tan toklif ḳaimor bade tain zen zinda asoin iṭar bout kisimor alamot deḳaisoin. Sallish din dori tain sahabi oḳolre deḳa dia Allar bashshair bishoye batchit ḳorsoin.
1.4: Isae tara hokkolor loge ekḳano shorik oia ou hukum dila, “Tumra Zeruzalem taki zaio na, amar gaibi bafor oada ḳora ze danor ḳota tumra age amar gese huncho, er lagi ono bar sao.
1.5: Hozrot Ehiae to fanir maze toubar gusol ḳoraita, oile besh deri oito nae Allae tumrare Pak Ruhu dia gusol ḳoraiba.”
1.6: Tara hokkol ekḳano dola oia Isare zikaila, “Huzur, i shomoy kita Boni Israil oḳlor ato raijjo firot anba ni?”
1.7: Isae zuaf dila, “Ze oḳt ba zomana amar gaibi bafe tan nizor eḳtiaro raḳsoin, ita tumra zanar goroz nai.
1.8: Oile Pak Ruhu tumrar ufre ḳaim oia harle tumra gaibi bol faibae, ou bole Zeruzalem, asta Ehudia ar Shomoria elaḳa, ar duniar hesh shimana forzonto amar shakki oibae.”
1.9: Ou mator bade-u sahabi oḳlor souḳor samne Isare tulia neoa oilo, ar tain megor ṭukrar aoṛ oigela.
1.10: Isa zebla asmano uṭira i shomoy sahabi oḳole souk na firaia asmanor bae sairoila, ou shomoy dola ḳafoṛ finda duizon beṭa manush tarar ḳandat ubaia
1.11: ḳoila, “O Galilor manush oḳol, ikano ubaia asmanor bae sairiso ḳene? Zare tumrar ges taki tulia neoa oilo, ou Isare zelaḳan tumra behesto zaite deḳlae, ou laḳan tain firia-o aiba.” Zeruzalem Isayi zomator zonom (1:12–5:42) Noya sahabi fosond ḳora
1.12: Ou sahabi oḳol Zoytun namor faṛo taki Zeruzalemo firia aila. I faṛ Zeruzalem ṭaun tone tuṛa duroi.
1.13: Ṭauno firia tara ze goror ufror talat roita hou goro gela. Tara oila Fitor, Hannan, Iakub, Andrias, Filif, Tumas, Bortolmoy ar Moti, Alfir fua Iakub, muktizudda Saimon, ar Iakubor fua Ihuda.
1.14: Goro hamaia hoḳole milia ḳas dile dua ḳorat roila, erar loge asla imandar beṭin, Isar ma Moriom ar tan baiain.
1.15: Hou shomoy eḳdin Fitore onuman eḳ-sho bishzon mumin oḳlor maze ubaia ḳoila,
1.16: “Bai oḳol, Isare zera dorat aisil tarare fot sinaia nisil Ihuda, tar befare bout age Daud nobir muko Pak Ruhe zeta ḳoisla, Pak Kalamor i kota fura oar dorḳar asil.
1.17: He to amrar-u eḳzon asil, ar amrar loge torikar kezmotor lagi tare-o sahabi hishabe fosond ḳora oisil.”
1.18: Ou nafaki kamor ṭeḳa dia he eḳzora zomi loisil, ar ou zomino ufoit oia foṛia tar feṭ faṭia at-boṛ bar oilo.
1.19: Zeruzalemor hoḳol manshe ita hunchil, erlagi hoḳole ou zominre ḍaḳoin Akeldama ba ‘Lour Zomin’. Fitore aro ḳoila,
1.20: “Ou ḳota fobitro Zobur Shorifo ase: Tar boshot ḳana ḳali rouk, hono roar ḳeu na taḳouk. Tar godi aroḳzone fauk.
1.21: -22 Erlagi Ehiae zebla toubar gusol ḳoraita hou shomoy taki, Isare amrar ges tone tulia neoar ag forzonto, zotodin Isa amrar loge sola-fira ḳorsila, otodin zera amrar dolo asil, erar maz tone Isa zen murda taki zinda oia uṭsoin, er shakki hishabe oinno aroḳzonre amra sahabi oḳlor dolo harani lagbo.”
1.23: Teu tara ou duizonre uba ḳoraila, Iusuf Barshabba, tan aroḳ nam Iustus; ar Matias.
1.24: -25 Bade tara dua ḳorla, “O Mabud, tumi hoḳlor dilor ḳobor zano, Ihudae to tar nizor zagat zaoar lagi kezmot ar sahabi fodor ḳam bad dilaise, Ihudar bodla i duizonor maze tumi kare fosond ḳoro amrare sinaia deo.”
1.26: Heshe tara duizonor name loṭari marle Matiasor nam uṭlo; teu Matias ou egarozon sahabir loge zug oila.

2.1: Fonchaisha Idor din tara hoḳol eḳ zagat dola asla.
2.2: Ou shomoy asman taki tufanor laḳan eḳ aoaz oilo, tara ze goro boat asla i aoaze asta gor borigelo.
2.3: Tara deḳla, aguinor lukkar laḳan kitar ṭukrain aise, ar i lukkain tara hoḳlor ufre aia boilo.
2.4: Teu tara hoḳole Pak Ruhe kamil oila, ar ruhur gaibi bole tara alog alog bashae matta lagla.
2.5: I shomoy duniar hokkol deshor forezgar Ihudi oḳol Zeruzalemo asla.
2.6: I aoazor loge loge-u tara aia biṛ ḳorilla ar be-aḳol oigela, ḳaron erare zarzir nizor bashae mat-ḳota matte deḳla.
2.7: Dekia tara taijjub oia mata-mati korla, “Ou zera matra era hoḳol-u kita Galilor manush nae ni?
2.8: Zudi oy te amra kila zarzir nizor bashar buli erar ges taki hunram?
2.9: Amra to Partio, Madio, Ilamio, ar Meshofotamiar bashinda, Ehudia, Kappadokia, Fonto, Asiya,
2.10: Forugia, Pamfulia ar Mishor deshor manshe-o; Libiar Kurini elaḳar manshe, ino gurat aisoin oula Ruman oḳole,
2.11: zera Ihudi zati ba Ihudi dormor manush, ar Kritio, Arobi, amra hoḳole-u to zarzir nizor bashae Allar kudroti kamor ḳota erar muk taki hunram!”
2.12: Ou laḳan tara taijjub ar be-aḳol bonia eḳe-oinne zikaila, “Er mani kita?”
2.13: Ar baki oḳole ṭaṭṭa ḳoria ḳoilo, “Era to mod ḳaia matlami korer!” Hozrot Fitoror boyan
2.14: Ita hunia Fitore ou egaro zon sahabir loge ubaia zure zure tarare ḳoila, “O Ihudi oḳol ar Zeruzalemor bashinda oḳol, afnara zania raḳoukka ar mon dia amar boyan hunoukka.
2.15: Afnara mono ḳorra era matal oigese, na, ashole ṭik nae, oḳon to ḳali shoḳal noyṭa bazer.
2.16: Iṭa to ou goṭona zar befare nobi Zuele ḳoisla:
2.17: Allae formaira, aḳeri zomanat oula goṭbo, ami amar ruhu hokkolor maze bezimu; teu tumrar fua-fuṛinte nobir laḳan batuni mat matba, tumrar zuan oḳole gaibi alamotor deḳa faiba, murobbi oḳole kuab deḳba.
2.18: Ou shomoy amar bonda-bandir ufre amar ruhu bezimu, tara nobir laḳan ohi koiba.
2.19: Ami ufre asmano bout keramoti deḳaimu, ar tole duniat bout nishana goṭaimu, lou, aguin ar ḳala-duma deḳaimu.
2.20: Mabudor i mohan ar ḳas din aibar age, shuruz andair oizibo, sand lour laḳan oizibo.
2.21: Ar oulan oibo, zekunu manshe Mabudor name ḍakile, he nazat hasil ḳorbo.
2.22: O Boni Israil oḳol, hunoukka, Nasarotor Isar mazdia Allae tan kudroti ar keramoti kam ḳoraia, afnaintor gese forman ḳorsoin, tain-u Isare faṭaisla, ar ita to afnara-o zanoin.
2.23: Alla, zein age-u zanoin ar foysala-o ḳoria raḳsoin, Isare afnaintor ato shofiba. Ar afnara be-din oḳlor atane tanre duk-koshṭor solibo dia zane marsoin.
2.24: Oile Allae moutor azab taki tanre ḳalas ḳoria zinda ḳorsoin, ḳaron moutor ḳemota asil na tanre ḳobza ḳorar.
2.25: Daude-o tan ḳota ḳoisoin: Ami hamesha munibre amar samne deḳtam, tain amar ḍain galat asoin, ami zanu ostir na oi.
2.26: Erlagi amar dil kushi oy, amar muk taki furti baroy, amar ḳaya ou ashae zita roibo,
2.27: ḳaron tumi amar zanre fatalo falaia toitae nae, tumar pak bondar shorilre fosa-gola oite ditae nae.
2.28: Tumi amare zindegir fot zanaiso. Tumar didaror maze ase furafur furti.
2.29: Bai oḳol, ou mohan-baf Daudor befare ami afnarare kula-kuli koiram, tain mara gesoin, tanre dafon ḳora oise, ar tan ḳoybor aiz-o oḳano ase.
2.30: Tain eḳzon nobi asla ar tain zanta, Allae ḳosom ḳoria i oada ḳorsoin zen, tan-u oarishor eḳzonre tan godit boaiba.
2.31: Erlagi ag tone dekia-u tain Allar oada ḳora bashsha, mani al-Mosir murda taki zinda oia uṭar befare ou ḳota ḳoisla, enre fatalo falaia toa oito nae, en ḳaya-o fosto nae.
2.32: Allae ou Isare-u zinda ḳoria tulchila, amra hokkol er shakki.
2.33: Allar ḍainor toḳto boibar takkot tanre-u deoa oise, gaibi bafor oada ḳora Pak Ruhu tain-u faisla, ar oḳon afnara zeta deḳra ar hunra ita tain-u ḳorsoin.
2.34: Daud to nize behesto hamaisoin na, oile tain ḳoisoin: Mabude amar munibre ḳoila, tumi amar ḍain galat bo,
2.35: ami tumar dushmon oḳolre tumar faor tolat falani forzonto bo.
2.36: Erlagi hokkol Boni Israile ou ḳota bala ḳori zanoukka, afnara zenre solibo gatisla, Allae ou Isare-u malik ar al-Mosi duio toḳt disoin.”
2.37: Ita hunia manshor dilo sel hamailo, tara Fitor ar sahabi oḳolre zikailo, “Baiainre, amra kita ḳortam?”
2.38: Fitore zuaf dila, “Mon firaukka, afnara hoḳole gunar mafir lagi Isa al-Mosir name toubar gusol ḳoroukka, teu afnara dan hishabe Pak Ruhu faiba.
2.39: I oada afnaintor lagi, afnaintor aolador lagi, zera duroi ase tarar lagi, zoto manshore amrar Mabud Allae tan ḳas bonda oibar lagi daot diba tara hokkolor lagi.”
2.40: Aro boutta ḳoia Fitore hushiar ar minot ḳori koila, “I zomanar naforman oḳlor ges taki afnaintor zan basaukka.” Mumin oḳlor sal-cholon
2.41: Tan boyan hunia zera iman anla tara toubar gusol ḳorla, onuman tin azar manush i din ummot oḳlor loge shorik oila.
2.42: Tara sahabi oḳlor talim huna, tarar loge shorik oia al-Mosir mezbani kaoa, ar dua ḳorat hamesha ḳaim roita.
2.43: Teu hoḳole ḍoraito ḳaron sahabi oḳole bout keramoti ar muzeza ḳam deḳaita.
2.44: Hokkol imandar oḳol ekḳano roita ar zarzir dorḳari samana on taki nita.
2.45: Tarar zomi-zoma don-doulot besia zar zela dorḳar oula baṭia dita.
2.46: Tara forteḳ din Baytul-Mukaddoso ekḳano milta, ar kushi oia eḳloge shorol mone goro goro gia ḳana-fina ḳorta.
2.47: Tara Allar tarif ḳorat roita ar hokkol manshor mohobbotor manush oila. Zera nazat hasil ḳorta, Allae tarare-o ania dine dine erar loge shorik korta.

3.1: Eḳdin asor oḳtor nomazor lagi Fitor ar Hannan Baytul-Mukaddoso zaoat asla;
3.2: manshe forteḳ din eḳzon manshore boia ania Baytul-Mukaddosor ‘Shundor’ namor geiṭor gese toita, he zonmogoto lengṛa-atur asil, zera Baytul-Mukaddoso zain tarar gese bik saoar lagi tare hikano toa oito.
3.3: Fitor ar Hannanre Baytul-Mukaddoso hamanit dekia he tarar gese minot-ḳajji kori bik kuzilo.
3.4: Fitor ar Hannan tar bae dian dori saia ḳoila, “Amrar bae sao.”
3.5: Teu he tarar ges taki kunta faoar lalose dian dori sairoilo.
3.6: Fitore tare ḳoila, “Amrar gese to shuna-rufa kunta nai reba, oile zeta ase tumare dan ḳorram. Nasarotor Isa al-Mosir name aṭia zao.”
3.7: Ḳoia hari tain er ḍain ato doria usa ḳorla, ar loge loge-u tar fao ar gusit bol ailo.
3.8: He faldi uṭia ubailo ar aṭa shuru ḳorlo, aṭi aṭi falai falai Allar tarif ḳorte ḳorte erar loge oia Baytul-Mukaddoso hamaigelo.
3.9: Hokkol manshe tare aṭat ar Allar tarif ḳorat dekia
3.10: ere sinililo, igu deki ou manush, zegue Baytul-Mukaddosor Shundor namor geiṭo boia bik korto! Tar halot dekia manush asanoḳ taijjub oigelo. Baytul-Mukaddoso Hozrot Fitor ar Hannan
3.11: Oile lengṛa hokire Fitor ar Hannanor ḳore oia gurae, manshe Fitoror i kame taijjub oia douṛia Sulaiman namor barindat tan gese ailo.
3.12: Ita dekia Fitore manshore ḳoila, “O Boni Israil oḳol, ere dekia afnara taijjub oigela ḳene? Amrar nizor firaki ba forezgarir gune tare solar shokti disi mone ḳoria, ḳene amrar bae dian dori sairoiso?
3.13: Ibrahim, Isʼhak ar Iakubor Alla, amrar baf-dada oḳlor Alla, tan afon bonda Isar mohima zair ḳorsoin, zenre afnara dushmonor ato shofi disla. Ar hakim Filate zebla tanre saṛi dita ḳori niot ḳorsla, i shomoy afnara Isare duroi horai disoin.
3.14: Afnara ou fak-forezgar manshore horai dia eḳzon kunire saṛanir lagi sufarish disoin.
3.15: Zein zindegi dan ḳoroin tanre afnara zane marilisoin, oile Allae tanre murda taki zinda ḳorsoin, amra er shakki.
3.16: Ar tan ufre iman anae, ou ze beṭare afnara sinra ar deḳra, hou Isar nam-u tare bolala ḳorse. Isar mazedi zeta iman foyda oy, ou imanor bole-u afnara hoḳlor samne tare bala ḳora oise.
3.17: “O bai oḳol, ami oḳon zani afnaintor murobbi-salish oḳlor laḳan afnara-o na-buzia i kam ḳorilisoin.
3.18: Oile Allae tan tamam nobi oḳlor mazdi al-Mosir toklifor befare age zotota zanaisoin, i hokkolta ou laḳan ḳori fura ḳorsoin.
3.19: Erlagi afnara mon firaukka ar Allar muki oukka, zate afnaintor guna oḳol fusia saf ḳora oy.
3.20: Te ou laḳan oḳt aibo, zebla Mabude hou Isare mani tan fosond ḳora al-Mosire bezia afnaintore tortaza ḳorba.
3.21: Allae hoḳoltare agor haloto firaiba, ita bout din age-u pak nobi oḳlor zoban dia ḳoisoin. Zotodin tan i oada fura na ḳorba, otodin Isa-o behestor maze roiba.
3.22: Musae to ḳoisla, ‘Mabud Allae tumrar lagi tumrar nizor manush oḳol taki amar laḳan eḳ nobi foyda ḳorba, tain tumrare zeta ḳoiba, tumra i hoḳolta-u amol ḳorio.
3.23: Zegue tan ḳota hunto nae, Allae ere nizor bondar ḳata taki fusia falai diba.’
3.24: Ar [Bashsha Daudor amolor] Shamuel nobi taki shuru ḳori zoto nobi oḳole kalam bataisoin, era hoḳole-u i oḳtor ḳota ḳoisoin.
3.25: Afnara to i nobi oḳlor oarish, ar hou ḳanunor-o oarish zeta Allae afnaintor baf-dada oḳlor loge ḳaim ḳorsila. Allae Hozrot Ibrahimre ḳoisla, ‘Tumar oarishor mazedi duniar hokkol zatie borkot faiba.’
3.26: Hou oarish, mani tan ḳas gulam Isare, Allae foyla-u afnaintor gese bezisoin, zate tain afnarare be-dini kam oḳol taki firaia hari borkot dein.”

4.1: Fitor ar Hannane zebla manshore boyan ḳorra ou shomoy imam oḳol, Baytul-Mukaddosor boṛo daroga ar Siddekia mozobor manush aḳta-u tarar gese aila.
4.2: Fitor ar Hannane manshore talim dira ar Isar mazdia-u murda oḳol hirbar zinda oia uṭar befare toblig korra dekia tara kub naraz oisla.
4.3: Tara Fitor ar Hannanre aṭok korla ar hainja oigesil ḳori erare bador din forzonto bondi kori toila.
4.4: Zera Fitoror boyan hunchila erar maze boute iman anla, teu imandar beṭaintor foriman fas azaror laḳan oilo.
4.5: Bador din Ihudir neta oḳol, murobbi-salish ar moulana oḳol eḳloge Zeruzalemo dola oila.
4.6: Hikano fordan imam Hanon, Kayafa, Iuhonna, Sikondor ar fordan imamor ḳesh-kuṭum oḳol-o azir asla.
4.7: Tara Fitor ar Hannanre tarar mazḳano uba ḳoraia zikaila, “Tumra kun bole ar ḳar name i kam ḳorrae?”
4.8: Teu Fitore Pak Ruhe kamil oia tarare ḳoila, “O murobbi saebain ar deshor buzurg oḳol,
4.9: eḳzon lengṛa-atur manshor balai korsi kori afnara aiz amrare zera ḳorra, manushgu kila bala oilo.
4.10: Te afnara hoḳole ar Boni Israil oḳole-o hunoukka, Nasarotor Isa al-Mosir name, zenre afnara solibo gatia zane marsla, zenre Allae murda taki zinda ḳorsoin, tan bole-u i manushgu afnaintor samne bala oia ubaise.
4.11: Tain hou fattor, zeṭare raz mestoir oḳole, mani afnara elami kori bad dilaisla, Pak Kitabor ḳota mafik hou fattor-u aiz ian kunar hoḳol taki zoruri kuṭi oise.
4.12: Toranir ḳemota ar ḳeuror gese nai, ḳaron asmanor tole ar zominor ufre oula ar kunu nam deoa oise na, zen name amra rehai faimu.”
4.13: Fitor ar Hannanor shaosh dekia, era zen oshikkito shamainno manush ita zania tara taijjub oigela, ar era Isar loge asla ḳorio sinla.
4.14: Ze beṭa bala oisil, he erar loge ubairoise dekia erare ar kunta ḳoar shaosh oilo na.
4.15: Bade mozlis taki erare bare zaoar hukum dia tara hoḳole foramish ḳorat boia
4.16: ḳoila, “I manshore loia amra kita ḳortam? Era to bout boṛo ek keramoti kam ḳorse ar ita to asta Zeruzalemor hoḳole zane, ar amra-o iṭare oshikar ḳortam fariar na.
4.17: Oile manshor gese zanu i kota ar zana-zani na oy, erlagi erare ḍor deḳail ouk, zate i zonor name tara ar ḳeuror gese kunta na ḳoy.”
4.18: Bade tara Fitor ar Hannanre hirbar anaia ou hukum dila, “Tumra Isar name ar kunudin eḳdom kichchu ḳoio na, kunuzat nosiot-o ḳorio na.”
4.19: Fitor ar Hannane tarare zuaf dila, “Amra afnaintor hukum mantam, na Allar hukum mantam? Allar nozoro kunḳan ṭik, ita afnara-u bisar ḳoroukka.
4.20: Amra zeta deḳsi ar hunchi, ita na ḳoia to taḳtam fari na.”
4.21: Teu tara Fitor ar Hannanre aro ḍor deḳaia saṛi dila. Manshore ḍoraia tara erare kunu shaza dita farla na, ḳaron zeta goṭsil ita dekia hoḳol manshe Allar proshongsha ḳorat asil.
4.22: Ze manushgu keramoti kamor mazdi bala oisil tar boyosh sallish bosoror beshi asil. Toblig kamor shaoshor lagi dua
4.23: I bisar taki tarare saṛar bade Fitor ar Hannan tarar afon manshor gese gelagi, gia boṛo imam oḳole ar murobbi-salish oḳole-o tarare zeta zeta ḳoisla, ita hokkolta zanaila.
4.24: Ita hunar bade tara hoḳole eḳ dile Allar gese zure zure dua ḳorla, “O malik, tumi asman, zomin, doria ar itar maze zotota ase hokkolta foyda ḳorso.
4.25: Tumi tumar gulam, amrar ḳandanor baf Daudor zobano Pak Ruhur mazdia oula ḳoiso, Hokkol zatie ḳene ostir oia sillaira? Kior lagi manshe behuda fondi korer?
4.26: Zogotor bashsha oḳol bigṛi gelo, raza oḳol ekḳano dola oilo, Mabudor birudde ar tan al-Mosir birudde.
4.27: Tumar fobitro gulam Isa, zenre tumi al-Mosi koria duniat faṭaiso, tan birudde Raza Herud ar Fontio Filat, ou shohoro o-Ihudi ar Boni Israilor loge ekḳano oisil.
4.28: Tumar morzi ar tumar kudrote zeta goṭar lagi tumi age-u ṭik kori raḳsilae, tara outa-u goṭaise.
4.29: Oḳon O malik, tara amrare kila ḍor deḳaira, tumi kial ḳoro, tumar gulam oḳolre oula takkot deo zate, furafur shaosh ḳoria tumar kalam toblig kortam fari.
4.30: Bemari oḳlor shifar lagi tumar at mubarok baṛai deo, ar tumar pak gulam Isar name muzeza ar keramoti deḳanir tofik deo.”
4.31: Tarar dua ḳorar bade ze zagat tara dola oisla, hi zaga ḳafia uṭlo. Ar tara hoḳole Pak Ruhe kamil oia shaosh ḳoria Allar kalam toblig korat roila. Imandaror mohobbot
4.32: Zera al-Mosir ufre iman anchila, tarar eḳ mon ar eḳ dil asil. Tara eḳzone-o nizor don-doulotre nizor ḳoia dabi korta na, hokkolta-u hoḳlor dorḳar moto ḳoros ḳorta.
4.33: Sahabi oḳole kub himmot ḳoria, Hozrot Isar murda taki zinda oia uṭar bishoye toblig korta, ar tara hokkolor ufre Allar ḳas rohomot asil.
4.34: Tarar maze ḳeu obabi asla na, ḳaron zerar zomin ba baṛi asil tara ita hoḳolta besia,
4.35: sahabi oḳlor gese ania dan ḳorilita, bade zar zela goroz tare oula deoa oito.
4.36: Ar Iusuf name Lebir bongshor eḳzon manush asla, tan baṛi Saipras dif, sahabi oḳole tanre ḍakita Barnabas, mani utshaho zugaora,
4.37: tan eḳzora zomin asil, tain-o tan zominḳan besia ṭeḳa ania sahabi oḳlor ḳodomo dan ḳorla.

5.1: Ou shomoy Ononio name eḳzon manush ar tar bou Safirae tarar-o eḳzora zomin besila,
5.2: besia tar bour zana monte-u zominor kisu ṭeḳa nizor lagi lukaia, baki ṭeḳa sahabi oḳlor faot dila.
5.3: Teu Fitore ḳoila, “Ononio, Shoytane ḳemne tumar dilre doḳol ḳorlo, tumi Pak Ruhur gese kila misa matlae, ar zomin besar ṭeḳa kisu lukai raḳlae?
5.4: Besar age zominḳan kita tumar asil na ni? Ar besar bade-o to i ṭeḳa tumar eḳtiaro asil, te ḳene tumar bitre ita hamailo? Tumi to manshor gese misa matso na, Allar gese-u misa matlae.”
5.5: Ita hunar loge loge-u Ononio maṭit foṛia morigelo. Ar zera i goṭona hunlo tara hoḳole-u kub ḍoraigelo.
5.6: Bade zuan oḳole aia tare ḳafon findaia bare nia maṭi dila.
5.7: Onuman tin gonṭa bade tar bou-o hono ailo, oile age kita goṭse tai zanto na.
5.8: Teu Fitore taire zikaila, “Amare ḳo sain, tumra i zomin oto ṭeḳae besislae ni?” Tai koilo, “Ji oy oto ṭeḳae-u.”
5.9: Ou Fitore ḳoila, “Mabudor ruhre forikka ḳorar lagi tumra ḳene eḳmot oilae? Deḳo, zera tumar zamaire dafon ḳorse tara oḳon dorzar samne aior, tara tumare-o bare loia zaibo.”
5.10: Loge loge-u Safira Fitoror faot foṛia morigelo, ar ou zuan oḳole goro aia taire mora dekia bare nia zamair ḳandat maṭi dila.
5.11: Teu hokkol zomat, ar zoto manshe ita hunlo, hoḳole-u kub ḍorailo. Sahabi oḳlor keramoti kam
5.12: Sahabi oḳlor atane manshor maze bout muzeza ar keramoti nishana zair oito, tara hoḳole eḳ dil oia Baytul-Mukaddosor Sulaimanor barindat dola oita.
5.13: Zudio manshe tarare ijjot ḳorta, ta-o ar ḳeu tarar loge mishte shaosh ḳorlo na.
5.14: Ar dine dine bout beṭain-beṭinte iman ania Allar dolo hamanit lagla.
5.15: Ar manshe bemari oḳolre bare ania fotor ḳandae ḳandae hutaia ar bisna fatia boaia toita, zate Fitore sola-firar shomoy ontoto tan seba ḳan-o tara ḳeuror ufre foṛe.
