5.16: Ar Zeruzalemor ḳanda-ḳasar gauain taki manshe tarar bemari oḳolre ar zinor asor-ala manshore loia aia biṛ zomaito, tara hokkol-u bala oito. Hokkol sahabire aṭok kora
5.17: Ita dekia fordan imam ar tan logor Siddekia oḳol ingshae zoli-fuṛi uṭla,
5.18: ar sahabi oḳolre doria shorḳari zelo haraila.
5.19: Oile raitku Mabudor eḳzon firistae zelor duar kulia tarare bare ania ḳoila,
5.20: “Tumra zao, Baytul-Mukaddoso ubaia manshor gese noya zindegir ḳota ḳo.”
5.21: Ita hunia tara kub shoḳale Baytul-Mukaddoso hamaia manshore nosiot ḳorat lagla. Ibae fordan imam ar tan logor hoḳole aia deshor fotua komiṭire ar Boni Israilor murobbi oḳolre ekḳano dola ḳorla, ar sahabi oḳolre anar lagi zel ḳanat manush faṭaila.
5.22: Oile tara gia erare zel ḳanat faila na. Ou tara firia aia ḳobor ḳoila,
5.23: “Amra deḳsi, zelor dorza shokto ḳori lagail, ar duaro duaro faradar ubai roisoin, oile duar kulia bitre ḳeurore failam na.”
5.24: Ita hunia Baytul-Mukaddosor boṛo darogae ar boṛo imam oḳole beokuf oia sintat foṛla, er fol kita oibo.
5.25: Ermaze kunu eḳzone aia tarare ḳobor dilo, “Deḳoukka, afnara ze manshore zelo haraisla, tara Baytul-Mukaddoso ubaia manshore nosiot ḳorer.”
5.26: Teu boṛo darogae tan sifai dolre loia hono gia sahabi oḳolre doria anla, oile zur-zobordosti korla na ḳaron tara ḍoraigela, manshe tarare fattordi marta faroin.
5.27: Bade sahabi oḳolre ania tara fotua komiṭir samne uba ḳoraila, ar fordan imame erare zikaila,
5.28: “Amra tumrare doṛaia hukum dislam, i name kunu nosiot na ḳorar lagi, ta-o asta Zeruzalem zuṛi tumrar talime boriliso, ar ou zonor kunor bar amrar ufre falaitae sairae.”
5.29: Teu Fitor ar tan logor sahabi oḳole zuaf dila, “Manshor hukum manar saite Allar hukum mana to forz.
5.30: Amrar baf-dadar Allae hou Isare murda taki zinda ḳorsoin, zenre afnara gaso loṭḳaia zane marsla,
5.31: Allae tanre-u toraneala ar bashsha banaia nizor ḍain galat boibar ijjot dan ḳorsoin, zate tain Boni Israil oḳolre touba ḳorar shuzug, ar gunar mafi dita faroin.
5.32: Amra i hoḳoltar shakki, ar Allae tan nizor hukum manra bonda oḳolre ze Pak Ruhu disoin, hou Pak Ruh-o er shakki.”
5.33: Ita hunia tara gusae aguin oigela, ar sahabi oḳolre zane marar lagi niot ḳorla.
5.34: Oile ou mozlis taki Gomoliel name Forishi mozobor eḳzon manush ubaila, tain eḳzon namḳora moulana asla, hokkole tanre ijjot ḳorto, tain sahabi oḳolre tuṛa bare neoar hukum dila.
5.35: Bade tain fotua komiṭir manshore ḳoila, “O Boni Israil oḳol, i manush oḳolre tumra zeta ḳortae sairae i befare hushiar o.
5.36: Huno, ou ḳoydin age Tuda name eḳzon manush aia kub boṛo-manshi deḳaisil, ar onuman sair-sho manush tar dolo hamaisil. Tare kun ḳora oilo, ar tar dolor hoḳol manush sairobae sitrigese, ḳeu dolo roise na.
5.37: Bade Galilor Ehuda aia deshor manush gononar bosor, eḳdol manshore tar dolo haraia fitna ḳaṛa ḳorlo, he-o morigelo, ar tar logor hokkol-o sitrigese.
5.38: Ita dekia ami tumrare ḳoiram, tumra i manush oḳolre kunta ḳorio na, tarare saṛi deo, tarar ḳam-ḳaz ar niot zudi manush taki oy, te ita emne-u binash oizibo.
5.39: Ar zudi Alla taki oy, te tumra tarare tamaitae fartae nae, ki zani heshe deḳa zaibo zen, tumra-u Allar birudde jihad ḳorrae.” Gomolielor mate neta oḳol razi oila,
5.40: tara sahabi oḳolre ḳasat anaia singladi marla ar ḳoila, “Tumra Isar name kunta matio na.” Heshe tarare saṛi dila.
5.41: Teu sahabi oḳole, Isar namor lagi beijjoti kamanir zuka oisoin gotike kushi oia furti kori kori mozlis taki bar oia gela.
5.42: Sahabi oḳole forteḳ din Baytul-Mukaddoso ar baṛie baṛie gia nosiot ḳorta, ar Isa-u zen al-Mosi ikan toblig kora bad dita na.

6.1: Hi shomoy ummot oḳlor foriman baṛte-u asil, ar ummot oḳlor maze zeta Ihudi oḳole Iunani bashae matta, tara Ibrani bashae matra Ihudi oḳlor loge ḳaijja ḳorta lagla. Tara dush deḳaila, forteḳ din ḳani bilanir shomoy tarar ṛaṛi beṭinte kunta fain na.
6.2: Teu hou barozon sahabie hoḳol ummotre eḳ zagat dola ḳoria ḳoila, “Amra Allar kalamor toblig bad dia, ḳana-finar befare besto oaḳan ṭik nae.
6.3: Oile bai oḳol, tumrar maz taki oula shatzon shunam-ala manshore fosond ḳoro, zera Pak Ruhe ar hekmote fura kamiab ase, amra tarar ufre i kamor zimma dilaimu.
6.4: Ar amra kalamor kezmot ar dua ḳorar ḳamo ḳaim roimu.”
6.5: Teu hokkol manush shanti oila, tara Pak Ruhu ar imane kamil Stifanre fosond ḳorla, tan loge Filif, Foḳor, Nikanor, Timun, Farmina ar Antiokia ṭaunor noya Ihudi Nikulaere basia nila.
6.6: Bade tara ou shatzonre sahabi oḳlor gese loia aile, sahabi oḳole dua ḳoria tarar ufre at raḳla.
6.7: Ar Allar kalam sitria sairobae fosigelo, teu Zeruzalemo ummotor foriman kub zoldi kori baṛto laglo, Ihudi imam oḳlor maze-o bout zone al-Mosir ufre iman anla. Hozrot Stifanor halot
6.8: Stifan Allar rohomot ar himmote kamil oia, manshor maze bout keramoti ar muzeza ḳam ḳorta lagla.
6.9: Ihudir ze mosidre azad-oa gulam oḳlor mosid ḍaḳa oito, hou mosidor ḳoyzon manush, kunu kunu Kurini, Alekzandria, Kilikia ar Asiya deshor kisu manshe Stifanor loge ḳaijja-torko ḳorat lagla.
6.10: Oile Stifane Pak Ruhur bole kub aḳoldar manshor laḳan tarar loge matae, tara tan loge matia kulaito farsil na.
6.11: Teu tara ḳoyzon baze manshore gush dia oḳan hikai dilo, “Tumra ḳoio, amra hunchi ou beṭae Hozrot Musa ar Allar birudde kufuri mat mater.”
6.12: Ota ḳori tara manshore, murobbi oḳolre, ar alim shomazre Stifanor birudde bigṛailo, ar tanre zobordosti kori doria deshor fotua komiṭir samne bisaro anlo.
6.13: Ar misa shakki oḳole ḳoila, “Ou beṭae hamesha Musar shoriotor birudde ar ou fobitro mukamor birudde-o mate.
6.14: Amra hunchi he ḳor, hou Nasarotor Isae i Baytul-Mukaddos bangilibo ar Musa nobie amrar lagi ze shoriot toia gesoin, ita bodlailibo.”
6.15: I shomoy zera fotua komiṭit boat asla tara hoḳole dian dori Stifanor bae saia deḳla, tan muk firistar mukor laḳan oigese.

7.1: Teu fordan imame Stifanre zikaila, “Ita kita hasau ni?”
7.2: Stifane zuaf dila, “O bai oḳol, baba oḳol, hunoukka, amrar mul baf Ibrahim zebla Haran shohoro roar age Meshofotamiat asla, hou shomoy Allae tanre didar dia ḳoisla,
7.3: ‘Tumi tumar desh ar ḳesh-kuṭum saṛia roana deo, ami tumare ze desh deḳaimu hou desho zao.’
7.4: Ou tain Kolodio oḳlor Babil desh taki bar oia, Haran shohoro boshot ḳorla; ar tan bafor moutor bade Allae tanre hon taki i desho anchoin, zeḳano afnara oḳon boshot ḳorra.
7.5: Ta-o Allae ino Ibrahimre tan nizor bolte kunta-u dila na, fao toibar zaga ḳan-o na, oile Allae tan loge oada ḳorla, tanre ar tan oarish oḳolre ou zominor malikana diba, zudio i shomoy Ibrahimor kunu aolad oisoin na.
7.6: Allae tanre ḳoila, ‘Tumar aolad oḳol bidesho musafir roiba, manshe tararedi gulami koraiba, ar sair-sho boros tarar ufre zulum solbo.’
7.7: Allae eoḳan-o ḳoila, ‘Ze zatie tararedi gulami koraiba, ami hi zatir bisar foysala ḳormu; bade tara hi desh taki bar oia aia, ou zagat amar ebadot ḳorba.’
7.8: Allae tanre mosolmani korar hukum dila; heshe Ibrahimor fua Isʼhakor zonom oilo, ar tain aṭ dinor din tar mosolmani koraila. Bade Isʼhake Iakubre, ar Iakube tan fuain baro ḳandanor barozon bafor mosolmani koraila.
7.9: “Hou ḳandanor baf oḳole ingsha ḳoria Iusufre besilaile, tanre Mishor desho neoa oilo. Oile Alla Iusufor loge loge asla,
7.10: tain Iusufre hoḳol toklif taki hefazot ḳorla, Mishoror bashsha Feraunor nozoro doya ar kamiabi dan ḳorla; teu Feraune tanre Mishoror hakim ar asta razbaṛir deḳa-hunar bar dila.
7.11: Bade fura Mishor ar Kenan desho nidan deḳa dilo erlagi manshor kub durgoti oisil, ar amrar baf-dada oḳol-o ḳanir obabo foṛla.
7.12: Oile Mishoro foshol ase hunia, Iakube amrar baf-dada oḳolre foyla bar hikano faṭaila.
7.13: Bade dusrabaror bala Iusufe tan baiainre zanaila tain ḳe, ar Feraune Iusufor foribarre sin faila.
7.14: Iusufe tan baba Iakub ar nizor ḳesh-kuṭum milaia hokkoltae fosottoir zonre ḳobordi anaila.
7.15: Iakub Mishoro aila, heshe tain ar amrar baf-dada oḳol-o mara gela.
7.16: Tarar lash Shikimo ania ḳoybor deoa oilo, i kobrostan Ibrahime Shikim shohoror Homuror ḳandanor ges taki rufar ṭeḳa dia ḳorid ḳorsla.
7.17: “Ibrahimor gese Allae zeta oada ḳorsila, hi oada furon oar shomoy zebla ḳasai gelo, i shomoy Mishoro amrar manshor foriman bout oigese.
7.18: Heshe Mishoro eḳ noya bashsha oila, ein Iusufor befare kunta zanta na.
7.19: Hi bashshae amrar manshore ṭogaita ar amrar baf-dada oḳlor ufre kub zulum ḳorta, tan niot asil erar huruttain zonmor bade-u zate bare falai deoa oy, ar tara mori zain.
7.20: Hou shomoy Hozrot Musar zonom oilo, Allar nozoro tain kub shundor asla. Tin mash forzonto tain tan ma-bafor baṛit asla.
7.21: Bade tanre bare falai deoa oile, Feraunor fuṛie tanre nia nizor fua banaia falia boṛo ḳorla.
7.22: Musa Mishorio ilim ar adob-ḳaislote boṛo oila, tain ḳotae ar ḳame himmoti asla.
7.23: Bade Musar boyosh zebla sallish boros oilo, ou tan dilor maze nizor Boni Israili bai oḳolre deḳa-huna ḳorar kial oilo.
7.24: Tain bar oia deḳla, eḳzon Mishorie eḳ Israilir ufre zulum ḳorer, tain hou Israilire shaijjo ḳorat gela, ar Mishorire zane maria er bodla loila.
7.25: Musae mone ḳorsila tan zatir manshe buzba zen, Allae tanre dia-u tarare uddar ḳorba; oile tara ita buzla na.
7.26: Bador din Musae duizon Israilire mair ḳorat dekia, tarare mil-mish ḳorar niote ḳoila, ‘Oi tumra to bai bai, te tumra ḳene eḳzone aroḳzonor loge maramari korrae?’
7.27: Oile ze manshe bad bebohar ḳorat asil, he Musare ṭela mari falaia ḳoilo, ‘Oba, tumare ḳegie amrar ufre salish ar hakim banaise?
7.28: Ḳail zela hou Mishorire kun ḳorso, amare-o ola ḳortae sao ni?’
7.29: Ikan hunia-u Musae bagia Madian desho gelagi, ar hikano tan dui fuar zonom oilo.
7.30: “Bade aro sallish boros guzori gele, Tur faṛor ḳandat morubumit, aguin zalail zonglar maz tone eḳ firistae Musare doroshon dila.
7.31: Musae ita dekia ekkere taijjub bonigela, ar bala ḳori deḳar niote ḳandat zaira, ou shomoy Mabudor aoaz hunla,
7.32: ‘Ami tumar baf-dadar Alla, Ibrahim, Isʼhak ar Iakubor Alla.’ Teu Musae ḍoraia ḳafa shuru ḳorla, ar bala ḳori deḳar shaosh faila na.
7.33: Mabude tanre ḳoila, ‘Tumar faor zuta kulilao, ḳaron tumi zeno ubaiso ikan pak zaga.
7.34: Huno, ami Mishor desho amar proza oḳlor toklif deḳsi, ami tarar ahazari hunchi, tarare uddar ḳorar lagi lamia aisi, oḳon ami tumare Mishor desho firot faṭaimu.’
7.35: “Ein hou Musa, zare Israili oḳole ou ḳota ḳoia firot disil, ḳe tumare salish ar hakim banaise? Tanre-u Allar ze firistae zonglar maze deḳa disla, hou firistar atane Boni Israilor salish ar toraneala banaia faṭaila.
7.36: Ar ou Musae-u Mishoror Nil doria ar morubumit sallish boros bout keramoti ar muzeza ḳam ḳoria, Mishor desh taki Israili oḳolre bar ḳori ansla.
7.37: “Ein hou Musa, zein Boni Israilre ḳoisla, Allae tumrar lagi tumrar nizor manush taki, amar laḳan eḳzon nobire beziba.
7.38: Ou Musa-u to morubumit amrar baf-dada Boni Israilor loge asla. Ar ze firistae Tur faṛo batchit ḳorsila, ou Musar loge-u tain matisla. Ar amrare dibar lagi zinda-kalam ou Musar gese-u deoa oisil.
7.39: “Oile amrar baf-dada oḳole Musar hukum manta saila na, tara Musare horai toia mone mone hirbar Mishoror bae niot ḳoria Harunre ḳoila,
7.40: ‘Amrare fot sinaia loia zaoar lagi devta banai deukka. Ḳaron ze Musae Mishor desh taki amrare bar ḳori anchoin, tan dosha kita oise, amra to zani na.’
7.41: Ou shomoy tara gorur basuror laḳan eḳ murti banaila, ar ou murtir name boli dila, nizor ator banail murtire loia tara furti-amud ḳorla.
7.42: Oile Allae naraz oia tarar log saṛi dila, ar tarare asmanor san-shuruz, terar pujat buṛai toila; zela nobi oḳlor kitabo leḳsoin: O Israil zati, morubumit hi sallish boros, tumra amar name kunu foshu kurbani dislae ni?
7.43: Na, tumra to Mulok devtar murti, ar Rifon devtar tera banai kando loia gurso. Hou duio futul to puja ḳorar niote banaislae, erlagi ami tumrare Babil deshor hofaro bonobash dimu.
7.44: Te shahadot tambur Kaba Shorif morubumit amrar baf-dadaintor gese asil. Tain Musare hukum disla, tumi zelaḳan noksha deḳlae, ou laḳan ḳori iṭa tiar ḳoro.
7.45: Amrar baf-dada oḳole hi Kaba Shorif faia, tarar amir Iusar atane nizor loge ḳori amrar i desho anchila, tara zebla hi desho hamaisil i shomoy Allae tarar samon taki hinor manshore ḳedai disla. Hi tambu Hozrot Daudor amol forzonto ou desho asil.
7.46: “Daude Allar rohomot hasil ḳorsila, ar Iakubor Allar name ekkan gor banaibar arzi korsla.
7.47: Oile Hozrot Sulaimane tan lagi hi gor banaisla.
7.48: Ta-o Allatala to manshor ator banail goro boshot ḳoroin na; zela nobie ḳoisoin,
7.49: Mabude ḳoin, Behest amar toḳt, dunia amar fao toibar zaga, tumra amar lagi kizat gor banaibae? Amar ziranir zaga kuai?
7.50: I hokkolta kita amar nizor ate banaisi na ni?
7.51: “O gaṛteṛar zat! Ḳan ar dilor mosolmani na ḳorail zat! Tumra hamesha Pak Ruhur duar bond ḳori to. Tumrar baf-dadain zela asla, tumra-o oula oiso.
7.52: Tumrar baf-dadainte kun nobir ufre zulum ḳorsoin na? Tara to hou nobi oḳolre zane-o marse, zera age i dindar zon aibar ḳota elan ḳorsoin. Ou dindar zonre oḳon tumra-o dushmonor ato shofia zane maraiso.
7.53: Firista oḳlor mazdi nazil oa shoriot tumrare deoa oisil, oile ita amol ḳorso na.” Foyla shohid Hozrot Stifan
7.54: Ita hunia-u tara gusae aguin oigela, ar dat kiṛi-miṛi kora dorla.
7.55: Oile Stifane Pak Ruhe kamil oia behestor bae dian dori saia Allar shan-tozolli deḳla, ar Isare Allar ḍain bazut uba deḳla.
7.56: Teu tain ḳoila “Deḳoukka, ami deḳram behest kula ase, ar Isa bin-Adom Allar ḍaine ubai roisoin.”
7.57: Ar tara ḳano angul dia eḳloge sillaia Stifanor ufre uṛia gia foṛla.
7.58: Tanre ṭania shohoror bare nia fattor marat lagla; ar badi oḳole zarzir ḳafoṛ kulia Shoul namor eḳ zuanor faor ḳandat toila.
7.59: Manshe zebla Stifanre fattor marra, ou shomoy tain dua ḳoria ḳoila, “O Malik Isa, amar ruhre kobul ḳoroukka.”
7.60: Ḳoia-u tain aṭu gala dia zure sillaia ḳoila, “Malik, erar i gunare amolo dorio na.” Oḳan ḳoia-u tain aḳeri dom saṛi dila. Ar Shoule hono Stifanor kunor hukumor loge shae dila.

8.1: Hidin taki Zeruzalemor zomator ufre kub zulum-mosibot ḳaṛa oilo, erlagi kali sahabi oḳol bade ar hoḳole-u Ehudia ar Shomoria elaḳar zagae zagae sitri gela.
8.2: Ḳoyzone milia Allaraia manush Stifanre dafon ḳorla ar tan lagi bout ahazari korla.
8.3: Oile Shoule zomatre binash ḳorar niote, goro goro hamaia imandar beṭain-beṭinre bondi kori ṭania sesraia zel ḳanat haranit lagla. Shomoriat Hozrot Filifor toblig
8.4: Teu zera sairobae sitri gesil, tara hokkol zagat guri guri Injilor kush-ḳobri toblig korla.
8.5: Ar Filif Shomoriar eḳ shohoro gia al-Mosir befare toblig korla.
8.6: Manshe Filifor boyan hunia ar tan keramoti kam oḳol dekia, dian dori eḳ dile tan nosiot hunla.
8.7: Ḳaron boutor ges taki but oḳol zure zure sillaia saṛia gelo, ar bout ordong bemari ar lengṛa oḳol bala oila.
8.8: Ita dekia hi shohoror manush kub kushi oila.
8.9: Oile hikano Saimon namor eḳzon manshe bout din dori zadu-ṭunar ḳam ḳorto, Shomoriar manshore danda lagaia he nizore eḳzon kamil pir ḳoia dabi korto.
8.10: Ar huru-boṛo hoḳole tar ḳotar dam dito, manshe ḳoito, Allar ze kudrotre ḳas kudrot ḳoin, i beṭa oilo hou ḳas kudroti beṭa.
8.11: Manshe-o tar ḳotamoto solto ḳaron bout din dori he tar zadu-ṭuna deḳaia tarare taijjub banaisil.
8.12: Oile Filife zebla Allar bashshai ar Isa al-Mosir befare kush-ḳobri toblig korla, ar manshe tan toblige iman anla, i shomoy beṭain-beṭinte aia toubar gusol ḳorla.
8.13: Hou Saimon-o iman ania toubar gusol ḳoria Filifor ḳore ḳore roila, bout keramoti ar boṛo boṛo kudroti kam hasil or dekia taijjub oigela.
8.14: Zeruzalemor sahabi oḳole zebla hunla, Shomoriar manush oḳole Allar kalamor ufre iman anchoin, teu tara Fitor ar Hannanre erar gese faṭaila.
8.15: Fitor ar Hannan aia tarar lagi dua ḳorla, zate tara Pak Ruhu fain.
8.16: Ḳaron oḳono tarar ufre Pak Ruhu nazil oise na, tara ḳali Hozrot Isar name toubar gusol ḳorsoin.
8.17: Fitor ar Hannane tarar ufre at raḳla, teu tara Pak Ruhu faila.
8.18: Ar Saimone zebla deḳla, sahabi oḳlor at raḳar ḳarone Pak Ruhu miler, ou tain ṭeḳa ania erar gese dia ḳoila,
8.19: “Amare-o ou ḳemota deukka, zate ami keuror ufre at raḳle he-o ou Pak Ruhu fae.”
8.20: Fitore tare ḳoila, “Tumar rufa tumar loge-u binash ouk, tumi mono ḳorso Allar dan ṭeḳadi korid ḳora zae.
8.21: Amrar i kamo tumar kunu bag nai, ḳaron Allar nozoro tumar dil shorol nae.
8.22: Erlagi i nazaiz ḳam taki tumar dil firao. Ar Allar gese minot-ḳajji koro, kiba tumar dilor i nazaiz kial tain maf ḳorilita faroin.
8.23: Ami deḳram, tumar dil lifshae bora ar tumi gunar maze bondi oiroiso.”
8.24: Teu Saimone ḳoila, “Afnara Allar gese amar lagi dua ḳoroukka, zate afnara zeta zeta ḳoisoin ita zanu amar ufre na ae.”
8.25: Bade Fitor ar Hannane malikor kalam toblig koria Zeruzalemo firot zaoar foto, Shomoriar bout gaut kush-ḳobri toblig kori kori gela. Hozrot Filif ar raz ḳazanchi
8.26: Eḳdin Allar eḳ firistae Hozrot Filifre ḳoila, “Uṭo, douknor ze fot Zeruzalem taki Gaza ṭaunor bae gese hou fote roana deo.” I fot asil morubumit.
8.27: Teu Filif uṭia hobae roana dila, zaite zaite foto Itiopia deshor Kandaki ranir eḳzon boṛo raz ḳazanchir loge tan mulaḳat oilo, hi kazanchi asla na-mord, ar ranir hokkol don-rotnor zimmadar. Allar ebadot-bondegi korar lagi ein Zeruzalemo aisla.
8.28: Bade baṛit zaoar bala foto tan nizor guṛar garit boia Ishaya nobir kitab tilaot ḳorat asla.
8.29: Ou shomoy Pak Ruhe Filifre ḳoila, “Ou gaṛir ḳandat zao, ar en loge log doro.”
8.30: Teu Filife douṛia ou gaṛir ḳandat gia hunla, ein Ishaya nobir kitab tilaot ḳorra; Filife tanre zikaila, “Afne zeta tilaot ḳorra itar mani buzra ni?”
8.31: Hein ḳoila, “Ḳeu buzaia na dile ami kemne buzmu?” Ou tain Filifre garit uṭia tan ḳandat boar lagi minot ḳorla.
8.32: Hein kitabor ze ayat tilaot ḳorat asla, ita oilo, Zobo ḳorar lagi meṛare zela nein, marar niote tanre oula neoa oilo, ruma ḳaṭrar samne meṛa-baichcha zela nirai roy, oula tain-o zoban kulla na.
8.33: Tain beijjot oila, tanre be-insaf ḳora oilo. Tan oarishor ḳota ḳegie ḳoito farbo? Tan zanre dunia taki kaṛia neoa oisil.
8.34: Hou ḳazanchie Filifre ḳoila, “Ḳoukka sain, nobie ḳar befare ita ḳoisoin? Nizor befare na ar ḳeuror?”
8.35: Filife zoban kulia Pak Kalamor ou ayat taki loia Isar kush-ḳobri forzonto tan gese toblig korla.
8.36: -37 Foto zaite zaite tara faniala eḳ zagat aia fosla, teu hi kazanchie ḳoila, “Ou deḳoukka ono fani ase, te ami toubar gusol ḳorte kunu bada ase ni?”
8.38: Ḳoia tain guṛar gaṛi uba ḳorar hukum dila, Filif ar hou na-mord ḳazanchi duiozon fanit lamla, ar Filife tanre toubar gusol ḳoraila.
8.39: Tara zebla fani taki uṭia aila, ou shomoy Mabudor ruhe aḳta-u Filifre aoṛe nilagi. Hi na-morde ar Filifre deḳla na, teu tain furti kori kori tan nizor fote gelagi.
8.40: Oile Filifre Ashdud ṭauno deḳa millo; tain gaue gaue kush-ḳobri toblig kori kori heshe Ḳoisoria ṭauno gela.

9.1: -2 I shomoy-o Shoule al-Mosir ummot oḳolre zane marta ḳori ḍor deḳanit roisoin. Ar Damesk shohoror Ihudir mosidainto deoar lagi tain fordan imamor ges taki siṭi saila, zoto beṭain-beṭin Isar fote soloin, tarare bandia Zeruzalemo anta ou ḳemota faoar lagi siṭi saila.
9.3: Foto zaite zaite zebla Damesk ṭaunor ḳandat aila, teu aḳta-u asman taki tan sairo galabae for oia somḳaia uṭlo.
9.4: Ou tain maṭit foṛigela ar gaibi aoaz hunla, ḳe zanu tanre ḳor, “Shoul, Shoul, ḳene amare zulum ḳorrae?”
9.5: Shoule zikaila, “Malik, afne ḳe?” Tain ḳoila, “Ami Isa, zenre tumi zulum ḳorrae.
9.6: Tumi oḳon uṭia shohoro zao, tumi kita ḳortae tumare zanail oibo.”
9.7: Oile zera Shoulor loge zaoat asla tara somki gela, tara i aoaz ṭik-u hunchila, oile ḳeurore deḳla na.
9.8: Bade Shoul maṭi taki uṭla, ar souk melia harle kunta-u deḳla na; tan logor manshe tanre ato doria Damesko loia gela.
9.9: Shoule tin din dori souke kunta-u deḳla na ar kunuzat ḳana-fina-o ḳaila na.
9.10: Damesk shohoro Ononio name eḳzon mumin asla,
9.11: Mabude tanre doroshon dia ḳoila, “Ononio!” Tain zuaf dila, “Malik, ounu ami.” Mabude tanre ḳoila, “Shuza namor ze shoṛok ase, tumi hou shoṛoke zao, gia honor Ehudar baṛit Tarsho shohoror Shoul namor eḳzon manshor tallash ḳoro.
9.12: Hono he dua ḳorer, ar he doroshon faise, Ononio namor eḳzon manush aia tar shoril ataia dibo, teu he hirbar souke deḳbo.”
9.13: Ononioe ḳoila, “Malik, ami bout manshor gese i manushgur ḳaislot hunchi, he Zeruzalemo tumar pak bonda oḳlor ufre bout zulum ḳorse.
9.14: Ar ou zagat-o zoto manshe tumar fote sole, erare bandia neoar ḳemota he boṛo imam oḳlor ges taki faise.”
9.15: Oile malike tanre ḳoila, “Tumi zao, ḳaron o-Ihudi oḳol, tarar raza oḳol, ar Boni Israilor gese amar nam tobligor lagi ami tare fosond ḳorsi.
9.16: Ami tare deḳaimu, amar namor lagi tare ḳoto zala-zontrona shoijjo ḳora lagbo.”
9.17: Teu Ononio bar oia hou baṛit gia hamaila, ar Shoulor gotro at dia ḳoila, “Bai Shoul, ono aoar foto zein tumare doroshon disoin tain Hozrot Isa, tain amare faṭaisoin, zate tumi hirbar souke deḳtae fao ar Pak Ruhe kamil o.”
9.18: Ar loge loge-u tan souk taki masor-foiror laḳan kita foṛigelo, tain deḳta farla ar uṭia fanit gia toubar gusol ḳorla;
9.19: ḳaoa-daoar bade shorilo hirbar bol faila. Ar tain kisudin Dameskor ummot oḳlor loge roila.
9.20: Shoule ar deri korla na, tain zagae zagae mosidainto gia toblig korat lagla, Hozrot Isa-u Allar hou ḳas mayar zon, Ibnulla.
9.21: Zera tan boyan hunto tara hoḳole-u taijjub oia mata-mati korto, “Ein hou manush nae ni zein Zeruzalemo Isar ummot oḳolre zulum ḳorta? Ar ono-o to otar lagi-u aisoin, zera Isar fote sole tarare bandia boṛo imam oḳlor gese loia zaita?”
9.22: Oile Shoul din din aro himmot-ala oila, ar Dameskor Ihudi oḳolre la-zuaf banaita lagla, tain forman deḳaila, ou Isa-u hi al-Mosi.
9.23: Er bout bade Ihudi oḳole tanre marar lagi solla-foramish ḳorla,
9.24: ar Shoule i kobor faila. Tara tanre marar lagi shohoro hamani baronir hokkol duaro dine-raite sokidar boaila.
9.25: Eḳdin rait ummot oḳole Shoulre eḳ ṭukrir bitre haraia, baunḍori oalor kiṛkibae far ḳori bare lamaia dila. Hozrot Shoul Zeruzalemo aila
9.26: Bade tain Zeruzalemo aia ummot oḳlor loge shorik oita saila; oile hokkole tanre ḍorailo, tain zen hasau iman anchoin tara bishash ḳorla na.
9.27: Teu Barnabase tanre ato doria sahabi oḳlor gese loia gela, ar Damesk zaoar foto kila tain al-Mosir didar faila, ar kila malike tan loge batchit ḳorla, Damesko kila tain shaosh ḳori Isar name toblig korsoin hoḳolta erare zanaila.
9.28: Bade Shoul Zeruzalemo erar loge loge roita, tain Zeruzalemor hoḳol zagat guria firia shaosh ḳori Isar name toblig korta.
9.29: Tain Iunani bashae matra Ihudi oḳlor loge dini batchit ar torko ḳorta; Ihudi oḳole tanre zane marilta saila.
9.30: Mumin oḳole i kobor hunia tanre Ḳoisoria shohoro loia gela, hon taki tanre Tarsho shohoro faṭai dila.
9.31: Hi shomoy Ehudia, Galil ar Shomoria elaḳar zomat oḳol shantir maze toiar oilo, i zomat oḳol Mabudor ḍore ar Pak Ruhur isharae soli soli bout forimane baṛlo. Hozrot Fitoror sofor ar keramoti
9.32: Fitore hokkol zagat gurte gurte Ludda gaur mumin oḳlor gese aia azila.
9.33: Hou gaut Oinio name eḳzon manush asil; he ordong bemare aṭ boros dori bisnat foṛono asil.
9.34: Fitore tare dekia ḳoila, “Oinio, Isa al-Mosi tumare bala ḳorla, uṭo, tumar bisna tulilao.” Ar loge loge-u Oinio uṭia ubai gelo.
9.35: Teu Ludda gau ar Sharun elaḳar hoḳol manshe Oinior halot dekia Allar bae firla.
9.36: Jafa shohoro Ṭabita name eḳzon mumin beṭi asla, Iunani bashae Ṭabita namor orto Dorka, mani horini, tain hoḳol shomoy bala ḳam ḳorta ar goribre shaijjo ḳorta.
9.37: Tain bemar foṛia mara gela, ar manshe tanre gusol deoaia ufror kuṭat nia toila.
9.38: Jafa shohor Luddar ḳasat asil gotike, ummot oḳole zebla hunla, Fitor Luddat asoin, ou tara duizon manshore tan gese faṭaia minot ḳorla, “Afne zoldi kori amrar gese aukka.”
9.39: Teu Fitor tarar loge roana dila, tain hono zaoar bade tara tanre ufror kuṭat loia gelo, hoḳol ṛaṛi beṭinte Fitoror sairobae ubaia ḳandon shuru ḳorla ar Dorka zita taḳte zeta ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ banaisla, ota Fitorre deḳaila.
9.40: Fitore tara hokkolre kuṭa taki bar ḳori dia zanu faṛia dua ḳorla; bade mora beṭir lashor bae firia ḳoila, “Ṭabita, uṭo.” Loge loge Dorkae souk kulla, ar Fitorre dekia uṭia boila.
9.41: Fitore tan ato doria uba ḳorla, bade hi ṛaṛi beṭin ar mumin oḳolre ḍakia deḳaila, Dorka zita oisoin.
9.42: I kobor Jafa shohoror hoḳol zagat uṛigelo ar bout manshe al-Mosir ufre iman anla.
9.43: Fitor bout din Jafa shohoro Saimon namor eḳ samaror baṛit roila.

10.1: Ḳoisoria shohoro Kornilus name eḳzon manush, Itali namor sifai dolor subedar asla.
10.2: Tain eḳzon forezgar manush, tan foribaror hoḳole-o Allare ḍoraita. Tain gorib oḳolre bout ṭeḳa-foysha dan-ḳoyrat ar hamesha Allar gese dua ḳorta.
10.3: Eḳdin onuman tinṭar shomoy tain eḳ saf doroshon faila. Deḳla, Allar eḳ firistae tan gese aia ḍakira, “Kornilus!”
10.4: Korniluse ḍoraia hi firistar bae saia ḳoila, “Malik, ḳoukka, hunram.” Firistae tanre ḳoila, “Tumar munazat ar gorib oḳolre danor ḳota behesto fosise ar Allae ita kobul ḳorsoin.
10.5: Oḳon tumi Jafa shohoro manush faṭao, ar Saimon urfe Fitorre tallash ḳorai anao.
10.6: Ein doriar faro aroḳ Saimonor baṛit taḳoin, hi Saimone samṛar ḳarbar ḳore.”
10.7: Ze firistae Kornilusor loge batchit ḳorsila, tain zaoar bade Korniluse tan baṛir duizon ḳamla ar tan shaijjoḳari eḳzon forezgar sifaire ḍaḳ dila.
10.8: Tain erare hoḳolta buzai dia Jafa shohoro faṭaila.
10.9: Bador din zebla hou manush oḳol zaite zaite Jafa shohoror ḳasat aila, i shomoy beil onuman duifor, Fitore dua ḳorar lagi hou shomoy sato uṭsoin.
10.10: Tan kub buk lagsil, teu kunta ḳaita saila ar manshe ḳani tiar ḳorra, ou shomoy gume tan ungani ailo.
10.11: Ou haloto tain deḳla, asman kuligese ar kub boṛo saddoror laḳan eḳ sizor sair kunat doria duniat lamai deoa or;
10.12: ar i saddoror maze duniar hokkol zator foshu, buke solra zandar ar fakin ase.
10.13: Bade tain ou aoaz hunla, ḳe zanu tanre ḳor, “Fitor, uṭo, maria ḳao.”
10.14: Fitore ḳoila, “Na, na, malik, kunumonte-u na, ami kunu shomoy-u nafak ar haram kunta ḳai na.”
10.15: Tain hirbar ou aoaz hunla, “Allae zeta halal ḳorsoin, itare tumi haram ḳoio na.”
10.16: Oula tinbar oar bade hou saddorḳan asmano tulia nilagi.
10.17: Fitore ze batuni doroshon deḳla, er mani kita oito fare tain dian ḳorra, ou shomoy Kornilusor faṭail hi manush oḳol Saimonor baṛi tukaia faia, baṛir duaror samne aia ubaila.
10.18: Tara ḍakia zikaila, “Saimon zenre Fitor ḳoia ḍaḳoin, tain ikano asoin ni?”
10.19: Fitore hou doroshonor ḳota sinta ḳorra, ou shomoy Pak Ruhe tanre ḳoila, “Deḳo, tinzon manshe tumare tukanit aisoin.
10.20: Tumi lamat lamo ar tarar loge roana deo, kunu shondoy ḳorio na, tarare ami-u faṭaisi.”
10.21: Teu Fitor lamia gia tarare ḳoila, “Afnara zare tukaira ami-u hein; ḳoukka sain, kitallagi aisoin?”
10.22: Tara ḳoila, “Sho-sifair subedar Korniluse Allar firistar hukum faia amrare faṭaisoin, tain eḳzon forezgar manush, Allar hukum mafik soloin, Ihudi oḳole tanre kub tazim ḳoroin. Firistae tanre ḳoisoin, zate afnare tan baṛit neoaia afnar nosiot hunoin.”
10.23: Ou Fitore tarare bitre ḍakia nia, tarar memandari korla. Bador din uṭia Fitor tarar loge roana dila, ar Jafa shohoror ḳoyzon imandar-o tan loge gela.
10.24: Er bador din tara Ḳoisoriat fosla; ou shomoy Korniluse tan ḳesh-kuṭum ar bondu-bandob oḳolre dola ḳoria tarar bar saira.
10.25: Ar Fitor gia zebla goro hamaila, i shomoy Korniluse tan ḳasat gia faot foṛia soizda ḳorla.
10.26: Oile Fitore tanre tulia ḳoila, “Uṭoukka, ami nize-o to eḳzon manush.”
10.27: Bade Kornilusor loge mati mati bitre hamaia Fitore deḳla, bout manush dola oiroise.
10.28: Ou tain ḳoila, “Afnara to zanoin, eḳzon Ihudi manshe kunu o-Ihudir ḳasat zaoa ba mila-misha ḳora amrar shoriotor nazaiz. Oile Allae amare deḳaisoin zen, kunu manshore nafak ba ofobitro ḳoa amar lagi nazaiz.
10.29: Erlagi afnara zebla amare ḳobor disoin, te ami kunu omot na ḳoria-u aisi. Oḳon ami afnarare zikairam, amare kitallagi anaisoin?”
10.30: Korniluse zuaf dila, “Aiz taki sair din age omon bala mani tinṭar shomoy ami amar goro dua ḳorat aslam, ou shomoy somḳail ḳafoṛ finda eḳ beṭa manush amar samne aia ubaila,
10.31: tain ḳoila, ‘Kornilus, Allae tumar dua kobul ḳorsoin. Ar tumar dan-ḳoyrat-o kobul ḳorsoin.
10.32: Oḳon tumi Jafa shohoro manush faṭao ar Saimon urfe Fitorre anao. Tain doriar faro Saimon namor eḳ samṛar ḳarbarir baṛit asoin.’
10.33: Erlagi ami zoldi kori afnare anat manush faṭailam. Afne toshrif anchoin dekia kub kushi oilam. Oḳon amra hoḳol Allar samne azir asi, Allae afnare zeta hukum ḳorsoin, amra hokkolta zanmu.” Bidormir dilo Hozrot Fitoror nosiotor fol
10.34: Teu Fitore zoban kulia ḳoila, “Ami oḳon hasaror buzlam, Allar nozoro hoḳol-u homan.
10.35: Hoḳol zatir maze zera tanre ḍorae ar tan hukum mania sole, tarare tain kobul ḳoroin.
10.36: Afnara to zanoin, tain Boni Israilor gese kushir ekkan ḳobor zanaisoin. Hozrot Isa al-Mosi, zein hoḳlor malik, tan usillae shanti faoa zae.
10.37: Manshor lagi toubar gusol ḳora zorur, Ehiae ikan toblig korar bade-u Galil taki asta Ehudia zuṛi zeta goṭsil, ita hoḳolta-u afnara hunchoin.
10.38: Allae Nasarotor Isare Pak Ruhu ar kudrote kila ḳas kolifa banaisla; tain bala ḳam ḳori kori sofor ḳorta, ar zine dora bemari oḳolre bala ḳorta, Alla Pak to tan loge asla.
10.39: Tain Ihudi oḳlor zomino ar Zeruzalemo zeta ḳorsila, amra ita hoḳoltar shakki; ar manshe tanre gaso loṭḳaia marlo.
10.40: Allae tanre tin din bade zinda ḳori uṭaila, ar manshe-o tanre deḳla.
10.41: Ta-o hokkole tane deḳar nosib oise na, ḳali Allae zerare age fosond ḳorsila, hou shakki oḳolre, mani amrare deḳaila, ar murda taki tain zinda oia uṭar bade amra tan loge ḳana-fina-o ḳaisi.
10.42: Tain amrare hukum disoin, amra zanu Ihudi oḳlor gese toblig kori ar shakki dei zen, tanre-u Allae zinda ar murda oḳlor hakim banai faṭaisoin.
10.43: Hoḳol nobie-o tan befare oula shakki disoin zen, zera tan ufre iman ane, tara hoḳole-u tan namor usillae gunar mafi fae.”
10.44: Fitore boyan ḳorra, i shomoy zera tan boyan hunat asil, tara hoḳlor ufre Allai Pak Ruhu nazil oilo.
10.45: Ar Fitoror loge oia mosolmani korail zeta imandar oḳol aisla, tara ita dekia somkia uṭla, ḳaron o-Ihudi oḳlor ufre-o Pak Ruhu borshisoin.
10.46: Tara deḳla, ou o-Ihudi oḳole nanan gaibi bashae matira, ar Allar tarif ḳorra.
10.47: Teu Fitore ḳoila, “Ou zeta manshe amrar laḳan Pak Ruhu hasil ḳorsoin, era fanit toubar gusol ḳorte kita ḳeu bada dito farbo ni?”
10.48: Bade tain erare Isa al-Mosir name toubar gusol ḳorar hukum dila. Ar tara Fitorre minot ḳorla, tarar gese ḳoyḳan din roar lagi.

11.1: Bade sahabi oḳole ar Ehudia zilar hokkol mumin baiainte hunla, o-Ihudi oḳole-o Allar kalamor ufre iman anchoin.
11.2: Erlagi Fitor zebla Zeruzalemo aila, i shomoy mosolmani korail imandar oḳole tane dushi shaibosto ḳoria ḳoila,
11.3: “Afne to mosolmani na ḳorail manshor goro hamaisoin, ar tarar loge ḳana-o ḳaisoin.”
11.4: Teu Fitore foyla taki zeta zeta goṭsil, tarar gese eḳ ek kori buzaia ḳoila,
11.5: “Ami Jafa shohoro dua ḳorat aslam, omon shomoy Pak Ruhur doroshon failam, ami deḳlam, asman taki boṛo saddoror laḳan ekkan sizor sair kunat doria amar gese lamaia deoa or.
11.6: Ami dian dori saia sintat foṛigelam, ar deḳlam, ermaze hoḳol zator foshu, faki, zongli zanuar ar buke solra zandar oḳol asoin.
11.7: Bade eḳ aoaz hunlam, Fitor, uṭo, maria ḳao.
11.8: Ami koilam, na, na malik, kunumonte-u na, nafak ba haram kunta ami kunudin muko disi na.
11.9: Bade dusrabar asman taki ou aoaz hunlam, Allae zeta halal ḳorsoin, tumi itare haram ḳoio na.
11.10: Oula tinbar ḳoar bade hoḳolta asmano tuli neoa oilo.
11.11: Ar er loge loge-u, ami ze baṛit aslam ou baṛit aia tinzon manush hamailo, tarare Ḳoisoria taki faṭail oisil.
11.12: Teu Pak Ruhe amare ḳoila, kunu shondoy na ḳoria tarar loge oia zaoar lagi. Ar ou soyzon bai-o amar loge gesla. Bade amra ou o-Ihudir baṛit hamailam.
11.13: Tain kila tan baṛit eḳzon firistar doroshon faisla ita amrare hunaila. Hou firistae to tanre ḳoisla, Saimon urfe Fitorre anar lagi Jafa shohoro manush faṭao.
11.14: He tumare oula nosiot ḳorbo, zeta mania tumi ar tumar foribaror hoḳole nazat faibae.
11.15: Ar ami boyan shuru ḳorar bade, Pak Ruhu foyla zela amrar ufre aisla, ekkere oula tarar ufre-o aila.
11.16: Ougi al-Mosir talim amar mono oilo, tain ḳoisla, Ehiae toubar gusol ḳoraisoin fanit, ar tumrar gusol oibo Pak Ruhe.
11.17: Te bai oḳol, Isa al-Mosir ufre iman anae Allae amrare zela dan disoin, hou eḳoi dan zebla tarare-o dila, te ami aroḳzon ḳe, Allare na ḳortam?”
11.18: Ikan hunar bade Ehudiar imandar oḳole ar kunu afotti na ḳoria, Allar tarif ḳora dorla, tara ḳoila, “Te Allae o-Ihudi oḳolre-o guna taki mon bodlaia, zindegi faoar tofik disoin.” Antiokiat foyla Isayi ufadi
11.19: Stifanor moutor goṭonar bade zeta imandar oḳol zulumor lagi sitri gesla, tara Foinikia, Saipras ar Antiokia forzonto gia ḳali Ihudi oḳlor gese Allar kalam toblig korla.
11.20: Oile erar maze ḳoyzon asla Saipras dif ar Kurini elaḳar manush, era Antiokiat gia Iunani oḳlor gese-o Hozrot Isar kush-ḳobri toblig korla.
11.21: Ar Allae tan kudroti bole tarare shaijjo ḳorla, teu bout manush iman ania tan muki oila.
11.22: I kobor Zeruzalem zomator mumin oḳlor ḳano ailo, ḳobor hunia tara Barnabasre Antiokiat faṭaila.
11.23: Tain hono fosia Antiokiat Allar meherbani dekia kub kushi oila, ar manshore asha dita taḳla, zate tara dile-zane malikor name imane mozbut roin.
11.24: Barnabas eḳzon hok manush, tain Pak Ruhu ar imane kamil asla. Ar bout manush malikor muki firia aisil.
11.25: Bade Barnabas Shoulor tallashe Tarsho ṭauno gela,
11.26: ar tanre faia Antiokiat loia aila. Barnabas ar Shoul fura eḳ boros hono zomator loge milia bout manshore talim dila. Ou Antiokiat-u al-Mosir ummot oḳolre foyla Isayi name ḍaḳa oilo.
11.27: Ou shomoy ḳoyzon nobi Zeruzalem taki Antiokiat aila.
11.28: Erar maze Agabus namor eḳ nobie Pak Ruhur zoriae ḳaṛa oia ḳoila, asta duniai zuṛia eḳ bezuita nidan deḳa dibo; Bashsha Keladusor razottor ḳalo ikan fura oilo.
11.29: Erlagi mumin oḳole niot ḳorla, Ehudia zilar imandar oḳlor kezmotor lagi, tara zarzir ḳemota mafik shaijjo faṭaita.
11.30: Ar niot mafik kam-o tara ḳorla, tara Barnabas ar Shoulor atane Ehudiar zomator murobbi oḳlor gese shaijjo faṭaila.

12.1: Hi shomoy Raza Herude zomator ḳoyzon manshore dorai ania zulum ḳorla.
12.2: Tain Hannanor bai Iakubre toluar dia ḳaṭilila.
12.3: Erlagi Ihudi oḳol kushi oisoin dekia, tain Ḳamir Saṛa Ruṭir Idor oḳto Fitorre-o aṭok korla.
12.4: Ar tanre zelo haraila, zelo-o fahara deoar lagi sairzon ḳori, sair dol sifaire hukum dila. Herudor niot asil Azadi Idor bade Fitorre manshor samne bar ḳori bisar ḳorba.
12.5: Fitor zel ḳanat bondi roila, oile zomator manshe Fitoror lagi dile-zane Allar dorbaro dua ḳorat roila.
12.6: Bisaror lagi zedin Fitorre bare anaita, er agor rait tain duizon sifair mazḳano duigesa cheindi banda halote gumo asla, ar bare sifai oḳole duaro fahara dira.
12.7: Omon shomoy aḳta-u Mabudor eḳzon firista hono aia ubaila, ar zelor bitor for oigelo. Firistae Fitoror gotro ṭela dia tanre hozag kori koila, “Zoldi uṭo!” Teu Fitoror duio at taki chein kulia foṛigelo.
12.8: Bade firistae tanre ḳoila, “Tumar ḳomro ḳafoṛ findo ar zuta faot deo.” Tain oula ḳorla. Firistae ḳoila, “Tumar saddor gotro dia amar ḳore ḳore ao.”
12.9: Fitor firistar ḳore ḳore zelḳana taki baroi aila, oile firistae zeta ḳorla, ita zen hasaror-u or, ita kunta-u Fitore buzta farla na, tain mono ḳorla ita kunu doroshon deḳra.
12.10: Tara foyla ar dui nombor faradaror dolre faroia zebla shohoro hamaibar luar geiṭor gese aila, geiṭ nize nize-u kuligelo. Tara bar oia ek gollir hesh galat aia azila, ar ou shomoy firista Fitoror log taki gelagi.
12.11: Teu Fitoror hush oilo ar tain ḳoila, “Oḳon ami hasaror-u buzlam zen, Mabude tan firistare faṭaia, Herudor at taki ar Ihudi oḳlor bod ḳaish taki amare hefazot ḳorsoin.”
12.12: Tain mone mone ita mati mati Moriomor baṛir muka gela, i Moriom oila Hannan urfe Markusor ma. Ono bout manush dola oia dua ḳorat asla.
12.13: Fitore geiṭo ṭuka marar bade Ruda namor eḳ bandi beṭie geiṭ kulat ailo;
12.14: ar Fitoror golar shur hunia kushie tai geiṭ na kulia douṛia gia hoḳlor gese ḳoilo, “Fitor aia bare geiṭo ubai roisoin.”
12.15: Tara ita hunia hi beṭire ḳoila, “Tumar mata ḳaraf oise ni?” Beṭie tarar loge niae ḳoria ḳoilo, “Na, hasau Fitoror gola hunchi!” Teu hoḳole ḳoila, “Te ein mone oy Fitoror surote kunu firista.”
12.16: Ibae Fitore geiṭo ṭukanit roila. Ou tara kulia Fitorre dekia taijjub oigela.
12.17: Fitore atdi ishara dila tarare nirai oar lagi, ar zelḳana taki Mabude kila tanre bar ḳori anla, outa hoḳolta ḳoila. Bade tain ḳoila, “I koborḳan tumra Iakub ar baki baiaintore-o zanaio.” Heshe tain on taki bar oia aroḳ zagat gelagi.
12.18: Rait fuanir bade Fitor kuai gela, i mat loia sifai oḳlor maze ulustul foṛigelo.
12.19: Herude tanre tukaia na faoae faradar oḳolre zera ḳorla, ar tarare zane marar hukum dila, bade Herud nize-o Ehudia saṛia ḳoydinor lagi Ḳoisoriat gelagi. Raza Herudor lannoti mout
12.20: Hi shomoy Herude Shur ar Sidonor manshor ufre kub gusa asla. Oile Raza Herudor desh taki tarar desho ḳanir samana aito ḳori, hinor hoḳol manshe eḳloge milia Herudor gese aila, tara razar hutibar goror Belastos namor eḳ boṛo gulamre at ḳoria razar loge afush ḳorat aila.
12.21: Ar Herude eḳ din ṭik koria, hidin tan raz lebas findia shinghashono boia tarar samne bashon deoat asla.
12.22: Tan ḳota hunia tara sillaia ḳoila, “Ita to manshor buli nae, kunu devtar buli!”
12.23: Ar loge loge Mabudor eḳ firistae tanre marla, ḳaron Herude Allar ijjot raḳla na. Teu kirmir kuraḳ bonia tan dom bar oilo.
12.24: Oile Allar kalam hoḳolbae aro beshi sitrilo, ar bout manshe iman anla.
12.25: Ibae Barnabas ar Shoulor toblig kam shesh oae tara Hannan urfe Markusre loge loia Zeruzalemo firot gela.

13.1: Antiokia zomato ḳoyzon nobi ar ustad asla, erar nam Barnabas, Samaun urfe Ḳalabai, Kurini shohoror Lukias, Raza Herudor ḳatiror manush Monohem, ar Shoul.
13.2: Era zebla ruza rakia Mabudor ebadot ḳorat asla, ou shomoy Pak Ruhe erare ḳoila, “Barnabas ar Shoulre ami ze ḳamor lagi fosond ḳorsi, ou ḳamor lagi tarare alog kori deo.”
13.3: Teu era ruza rakia, hou duiozonor ufre at toia dua ḳoria bidae dila.
13.4: Ou laḳan ḳori Pak Ruhe Barnabas ar Shoulre Silukiat faṭai dila, ar hikan taki zazo ḳoria tara Saipras difo gela.
13.5: Ar Salamis gia harle tara Ihudi oḳlor mosidainto hamaia Allar kalam toblig korla. Tarar ḳam ḳorar lagi Hannan urfe Markus tarar loge asla.
13.6: Tara asta dif guria harle Fafus ṭauno aila, ar hino Bor-Jishu namor eḳ Ihudi zadugiror loge deḳa oilo, he asil bonḍo nobi.
13.7: -8 Tar aroḳ nam asil Iluma, mani zadugir. He oilo hi deshor hakim Sergio Paulusor dust, oile hi hakim asla eḳzon aḳoldar manush, tain Allar kalam hunar lagi Barnabas ar Shoulre ḳobordi anaila. Ilumae hakimre iman ante dito na ḳori Barnabas ar Shoulre bada dilo.
13.9: Ar Shoul, zenre Paulus ḳoia-o ḍaḳoin, tain Pak Ruhe kamil oia Ilumar bae dian dori saia ḳoila,
13.10: “O Iblisor baichcha, hoḳol mumini kamor dushmon, tor bitre hoḳol laḳan sol-soturi ar naformanie bora, tui Mabudor sohi fotre teṛa ḳorar fikir bad dite nae ni?
13.11: Hun, Mabudor at tor birudde lagse. Tui anda oizibe, ar ḳoydin shuruz deḳte nae.” Loge loge-u kua ar andaire tare gurililo, ar he at baṛaia ḍaine-baue ḳeurore tukailo, tare ato doria neoar lagi.
13.12: Ita dekia hi hakime malikor bishoye ze talim faila, ete tain taijjub oia iman anla. Fisidia desho toblig
13.13: Bade Hozrot Paulus ar tan logor hoḳole Fafus saṛia zazo ḳori Pamfulia deshor Forga shohoro fosla. Ar Hannan urfe Markuse tarare toia Zeruzalemo firot gelagi.
13.14: Bade tara Forga taki aguaia Fisidia deshor Antiokia shohoro fosla ar Zummabare Ihudir mosido hamaia boila.
13.15: Musar shoriot ar nobi oḳlor kitab taki tilaot ḳora shesh oile, mozlisor neta oḳole tarare ḳoila, “O baisab oḳol, manshore nosiotor lagi kunta boyan ḳorar kial oile, ḳoroukka.”
13.16: Ou Pauluse ubaia atdi ishara ḳori koila, “O Boni Israil oḳol, ar Allare ḍoraora o-Ihudi oḳol afnara hunoukka.
13.17: Ou Israil zatir Allae amrar baf-dada oḳolre fosond ḳorsla, zebla tara Mishor desho musafirit asla, ou shomoy tarare mohan ḳorsila, ar tan moha kudrote tarare hikan taki bar ḳori anchila.
13.18: Onuman sallish boros dori tain morubumir maze huruttar ma-bafor laḳan tarar be-adobi sobor ḳorsla.
13.19: Bade tain Kenan deshor shatṭa zatire binash ḳoria, tan nizor bonda oḳolre hou deshaintor malikana dan ḳorla. Ou laḳan onuman sair-sho foinchash boros guzori gelo.
13.20: Heshe Shamuel nobir amol forzonto Allae ḳoyzon amir bezisla.
13.21: Oile manshe eḳzon bashsha sailo. Teu Allae sallish bosoror lagi Bin-Iamin bongshor Kishor fua Talutre bashsha banaila.
13.22: Bade Allae Talutre horaia Hozrot Daudre tarar bashsha banaila. Tain Daudor befare ḳoila, ‘Ami Iasor fua Daudre faisi, he amar monor moto manush. Amar hoḳol morzi amol ḳorbo.’
13.23: Allae tan oada mafik ou manshor oarish taki eḳzon toraneala, mani Hozrot Isare Boni Israil oḳlor gese azir ḳorsila;
13.24: Ou Isa aoar age hokkol Boni Israilor gese Hozrot Ehiae toblig korsila, ‘Guna taki dil firaia hari manshe toubar gusol ḳora dorḳar.’
13.25: Ar Ehiae tan toblig kamor aḳer ḳalo ḳoila, ‘Tumra kita mono ḳoro, ami ke? Ami to hi oada ḳora al-Mosi nae; tain amar bade toshrif anra. Tan faor zutar fita kular laḳ-o ami nae.’
13.26: “Te O baiain, Ibrahimor oarish oḳol, ar Allare ḍoraora o-Ihudi oḳol, amra hokkolor gese-u nazator i kalam nazil oise.
13.27: Zeruzalemor manshe ar tarar neta oḳole Isare na sinae, ar forteḳ Zummabare nobi oḳlor ze boyan tilaot oy eota na buzae, tara Isare dushi shaibosto ḳoria hou ḳota oḳol fura ḳorla.
13.28: Ar zane marar lak kunu dush na faile-o tara hakim Filator gese dabi zanaila, tanre zane marar lagi.
13.29: Tan bishoye Asmani Kitab oḳol-o zeta leḳa asil, ita hoḳolta fura oar bade tara tanre gaso loṭḳail halot taki, mani solib taki lamaia dafon ḳorlo.
13.30: Oile Allae tanre murda taki zinda ḳori tulla.
13.31: Ar Galil taki zera tan loge Zeruzalemo aisla, tarar gese tain bout din dori deḳa dila; era-u oḳon amrar gese tan befare shakki dira.
13.32: Ar amrar baf-dada oḳlor gese Allae zeta oada ḳorsila, amra afnaintor gese hou kush-ḳobri zanairam,
13.33: Allae Isare murda taki zinda ḳoria tarar oarish oḳol, mani amrar gese tan oada fura ḳorsoin, ar i befare Zobur kitabor dusra rukut oula leḳa ase: Tumi amar fut, aiz taki ami oilam tumar gaibi baf.
13.34: Allae zen tanre murda taki zinda ḳorsoin, ar tain zen kunudin-o koy oita nae, i befare Allae ḳoisoin: Ami Daudor gese ze pak oada oḳol ḳorsi, ita ami tumrare dan ḳormu.
13.35: Tain Zobur Shorifor aroḳ ayato ḳoisoin: Tumi nizor pak bondare koy oite ditae nae.
13.36: Daud to hi amolor manshor maze Allar kial-kushi fura ḳorar bade inteḳal ḳorla, ar tan moy-murobbi oḳlor gese tanre dafon ḳorar bade koy oigela,
13.37: oile Allae zenre murda taki zinda ḳorsoin, ein to koy oisoin na.
13.38: Erlagi amar bai oḳol, afnara-o zania raḳoukka, ou Isar mazdia-u guna taki mafi faoar ḳota afnaintor gese toblig kora or.
13.39: Afnara Musar shoriotor usillae gunar shaza taki rehai faisoin na, oile zekunu zone Isar ufre iman anle, tan usillae he gunar shaza taki rehai fae.
13.40: Erlagi afnara-o hushiar oukka, zate nobi oḳlor kitabo zeta boyan ḳora oise, ita zanu afnaintor ufre na goṭe:
13.41: Tumra zera Allare loia ṭaṭṭa ḳoro, tumra kial ḳoro, tumra somḳaia uṭo ar binash o; ḳaron tumrar amolo-u ami oula ek kam ḳormu, ze ḳamor ḳota ḳeu tumrar gese ḳoile-o, tumra kunumonte-u bishash ḳortae nae.”
13.42: Paulus ar Barnabas mosid taki zaoar bala manshe tarare minot ḳori koila, bador Zummabare-o tara i befare aro boyan ḳorar lagi.
13.43: Mosid taki manush oḳol bar oia zaoar bade, bout Ihudi ar Ihudi dormo manra forezgar oḳole Paulus ar Barnabasor ḳore ḳore gela. Era Paulus ar Barnabasor loge batchit ḳorla, tara erare utshaho dila, era Allar rohomotor ufre ḳaim roita ḳori.
13.44: Bador Zummabare ṭaunor manush dole dole Allar kalam hunar lagi aila.
13.45: Oile oto manshor biṛ dekia Ihudi oḳole ingshae bori gela, ar Pauluse zeta boyan ḳorla tara er ninda gaia tan birudita ḳorla.
13.46: Teu Paulus ar Barnabase shaosh ḳoria zuaf dila, “Allar kalam foyla afnaintor gese toblig kora dorḳar asil; oile afnara zebla ita ṭelia horai dira, ar aḳeri zindegi kamai kora dorḳar mono ḳorra na, te amra-o o-Ihudi oḳlor bae nozor firaillam.
13.47: Ḳaron Mabude amrare oula hukum ḳorsoin, Ami tumare o-Ihudi oḳlor gese nur hishabe bezisi, zate tumi duniar hesh shimana forzonto nazator usilla o.”
13.48: O-Ihudi oḳole ita hunia kushi oila ar malikor kalamor tarif ḳorla; ar zoto manshore Allae aḳeri zindegi hasilor lagi fosond ḳori raḳsila, tara iman anla.
13.49: Malikor kalam hi deshor hoḳol zagat fosi gelo.
13.50: Oile Ihudi oḳole tarar forezgar ḳandani beṭintore ar ṭaunor boṛo boṛo murobbi oḳolre uskaia dilo tara Paulus ar Barnabasor ufre zulum ḳoraia, tarar shimana taki kedaia bar ḳori dilo.
13.51: Teu Paulus ar Barnabase hi manshor birudde tarar faor duil zaṛia falaia Ikonia ṭauno gelagi.
13.52: Ar hinor ummot oḳol kushie ar Pak Ruhe furafur kamil oila.

14.1: Ikonia ṭauno aia-o ou laḳan Paulus ar Barnabas Ihudir mosido gia hamaila, hamaia tara omon laḳan toblig korla, ita hunia bout Ihudi ar o-Ihudi oḳole iman anla.
14.2: Oile zeta Ihudie iman anla na, tara o-Ihudi oḳolre uskai dia, mumin oḳlor bae bigṛaila.
14.3: Paulus ar Barnabas hi ṭauno bout din roila, tara shaosh ḳoria malikor befare toblig korla. Ar malike-o tan rohomotor kalamor fokke Paulus ar Barnabasor mazdi, bout muzeza ar keramoti oḳol zair ḳoraila.
14.4: Bade asta ṭaunor manush dui dol oigelo, eḳ dol Ihudi oḳlor fokke, aroḳ dol sahabi oḳlor fokke.
14.5: Oile Ihudi ar o-Ihudi kisu manshe tarar neta oḳlor loge milia, Barnabas ar Paulusre mair-doir ar fattor marar fondi korla.
14.6: Paulus ar Barnabase ita ṭer faia Luḳaenia deshor Lushra ar Dorbi shohoro, ar er ḳanda-ḳasat bagia roila;
14.7: tara hono Injilor kush-ḳobri toblig korla.
14.8: Lushra ṭauno eḳzon manush boat taḳto, tar faot kunu bol asil na, he maʼr feṭ taki-u lengṛa, kunudin-o aṭto farse na.
14.9: He Paulusor boyan hunat asil; Pauluse tar bae dian ḳori saila, ar bala oar lagi tar iman ase buzia,
14.10: tare zure ḍaḳdi koila, “Tumar faot bordi shida oia ubao!” Teu loge loge-u manushgu faldi uṭia aṭto laglo.
14.11: Paulusor i keramoti dekia manshe Luḳaenia bashae sillaia ḳoilo, “Devta oḳole manshor surot doria amrar gese lamia aisoin!”
14.12: Ar manshe Barnabasor nam dilo ‘Zius deb’ ar Paulus boṛo boyan ḳorra gotike, tan nam dilo ‘Harmis deb’.
14.13: Shohoror baira mul geiṭor ḳandat Zius devtar mondiror babon ṭakure bisal ar mala loia ailo, ḳaron hi ṭakure ar hokkol manshe Paulus ar Barnabasor niote foshu boli dito sailo.
14.14: Oile sahabi Barnabas ar Pauluse ita hunia beḳorar bonia zarzir finnor ḳafoṛ siṛia douṛia manshor gese gela, ar zure sillaia ḳoila,
14.15: “O sab oḳol, afnara ḳene ita ḳorra? Amra to ḳali afnaintor laḳan-u duki-shuki manush, amra afnaintor gese ou kush-ḳobri toblig korram, zate i oshar hoḳolta bad dia zinda Allar bae firoin, zein asman-zomin, doria ar ermaze zotota ase hokkolta foyda ḳorsoin.
14.16: Agor amolor hoḳol zatire tain zarzir ichchamoto fote solte disoin;
14.17: ta-o tain hamesha nizore zair ḳorsoin, tain asman taki meg dia, shomoy moto foshol dan ḳoria tan meherbani deḳaisoin, afnaintor feṭ bora ḳani ar dilor aram zugaisoin.”
14.18: I mat oḳol matar bade-o bout ḳoshṭo ḳoria erar foshu boli deoa bond ḳoraila. Nanan ṭauno toblig
14.19: Bade Antiokia ar Ikonia taki koyzon Ihudi aia, Paulusor birudde manshore uskaia dia tanre fattor marlo, ar tain morigesoin mone ḳoria, ṭaunor bare sesraia loia gelo.
14.20: Oile mumin oḳol tan sairobae eḳloge dola oar bade, tain uṭia ṭauno firia gela. Bador din tain Barnabasor loge oia Dorbi shohoro gelagi.
14.21: Dorbit gia harle hono kush-ḳobri toblig koria Paulus ar Barnabase bout manshore imandar banaila, bade tara Lushra, Ikonia ar Antiokiat firot gela;
14.22: hono gia tara mumin oḳlor imani bol baṛaia tarare imane mozbut roar lagi tagid dila, tara ḳoila, bout duk-toklifor fot faroia amra Allar bashshait hamani lagbo.
14.23: Tara zomatre salanir lagi forteḳ zomator murobbi-komiṭi banaila. Ar ze malikor ufre tara iman anchoin, en name ruza rakia dua ḳoria ou Isar ato erare shofia dila.
14.24: Bade Paulus ar Barnabase Fisidia deshor bitredi Pamfulia desho gela.
14.25: Tara Forga shohoro Allar kalam toblig koria Antulia zaz gaṭo gela;
14.26: Antulia taki zazo uṭia Antiokiat firot aila. Tara i soforo zeta ḳam oḳol injam ḳorsila, i kamor lagi tarare ou Antiokia taki-u Allar rohomotor hefazoto shofi deoa oisil.
14.27: Antiokiat fosia zomator hoḳolre ekḳano dola ḳorla, ar Allae tarar i ṭauno tarar loge roia zeta zeta ḳam oḳol ḳorsoin, ar tain kila o-Ihudi oḳlor maze iman anar duar kulia disoin, i hokkolta zanaila.
14.28: Heshe tara mumin oḳlor loge hikano bout din roila.

15.1: Ehudia taki koyzon manush Antiokiat aila ar imandar oḳolre ou talim hikanit lagla, “Musar shoriot mafik tumrar mosolmani korail na oile, kunumonte-u guna taki nazat faitae nae.”
15.2: Ita loia Hozrot Paulus ar Barnabasor loge ou manush oḳlor kub ḳota ḳaṭaḳaṭi oilo. Bade ṭik oilo, Paulus ar Barnabas Antiokiar ḳoyzon imandarre loge loia Zeruzalemo zaiba, gia tara sahabi ar zomator murobbi oḳlor loge i bishoye batchit ḳorba.
15.3: Antiokiar zomate tarar zaoar bondobost ḳori dila, Foinikia ar Shomoria elaḳar bitredi zaite zaite Paulus ar Barnabase manshore zanaila o-Ihudi oḳol kila Allar bae firer, ita hunia tara kub kushi oila.
15.4: Paulus ar Barnabas Zeruzalemo aia fosar bade zomator manshe, sahabi ar murobbi oḳole-o tarare mayar nozore kobul ḳorla. Ar tarar usillae Allae zeta ḳam ḳorsoin, ita hoḳlor gese zanaila.
15.5: Ou shomoy Forishi dolor ḳoyzon imandare ubaia ḳoila, “O-Ihudi oḳlor mosolmani korani zorur, ar tara zanu Hozrot Musar shoriot-o amol ḳore, erlagi tarare hukum deoa ouk.”
15.6: Teu i bishoyor foysala ḳorar lagi sahabi oḳol ar zomator murobbi oḳol eḳ zagat dola oila.
15.7: Bout batchitor bade Hozrot Fitore ubaia ḳoila, “Baiain oḳol, afnara to zanoin, bout din age afnaintor maz taki-u Allae amare fosond ḳori nisoin, zate o-Ihudi oḳole-o amar muk taki kush-ḳobri hunia iman anoin.
15.8: Allae to hoḳlor dilor ḳobor zanoin, te tain amrare zelaḳan Pak Ruhu dan ḳorsoin, o-Ihudi oḳolre-o oula Pak Ruhu dan ḳoria deḳaisoin, tara-o nazat hasil ḳorse.
15.9: Tain amrar ar tarar maze alada kunta raḳsoin na, ḳaron tara iman anchoin ḳori, tarar dil-o saf ḳorilisoin.
15.10: Te amrar baf-dada oḳole ba amra-o ze bar boitam farsi na, hi bar o-Ihudi ummot oḳlor ḳando tulia dia, ḳene afnara Alla Pakre forikka ḳorra?
15.11: Amra to mono ḳori, Hozrot Isar meherbanie amra zela guna taki mafi faisi, tara-o oula mafi faisoin.”
15.12: Teu hokkol nirai oigela; Paulus ar Barnabasor zoriae Allae o-Ihudir maze zeta muzeza ar keramoti kam oḳol ḳoraisoin, tarar muk taki ota hunla.
15.13: Tarar boyan shesh oar bade Iakube ḳoila, “Baisab oḳol, hunoukka,
15.14: Allae tan nizor bonda oar lagi o-Ihudi oḳol taki eḳdol manshore fosond ḳori nia deḳaisoin, o-Ihudi oḳlor bae-o tan kial ase, ar ou ḳota-u Saimon-Fitore oḳon boyan ḳorsoin.
15.15: I boyanor loge nobi oḳlor kalamor-o mil ase; zela leḳa ase,
15.16: Erbade ami aia Daudor foṛi zaoa gor hirbar tiar ḳormu, zeta binash oigese ita hirbar gatimu, hirbar noya ḳoria banaimu,
15.17: zate baki hoḳol manshe Mabudor tallash ḳoroin, ar zoto o-Ihudir nam amar bondar ḳatat leḳa ase, tara-o tallash ḳoroin. Mabude-u ou kalam ḳoira,
15.18: Ita bout din ag taki-u tan malum asil.”
15.19: Iakube aro ḳoila, “Te amar foysala oilo, o-Ihudi taki zera Allar foti or, tarare amra kunu duk ditam nae.
15.20: Tarar gese ḳali ou hukumḳan lekia zanai dei, tara zanu devtar namor hokkol ḳam taki, zinar ḳam taki, ar gola ṭifia mara zandaror gust ḳaoa ar lou ḳaoa taki duroi roin.
15.21: I hukum oḳol tarare zananikan bala, ḳaron Musae zeta talim disoin, ita bout zomana taki forteḳ ṭauno manshe toblig korra, ar tain zeta lekia toia gesoin, ita to forteḳ Zummabare mosidainto tilaot ḳora or.”
15.22: Teu sahabi oḳol, zomator murobbi oḳol, ar zomator hoḳol am manshe eḳmot oila, tarar nizor maz taki koyzonre fosond ḳoria Paulus ar Barnabasor loge Antiokiat faṭai diba. Ou tara Silas ar Ehuda urfe Barshabba namor ou dui murobbire fosond ḳorla.
15.23: Tarar ato ou siṭi lekia faṭaila: “Antiokia, Siria ar Kilikiar o-Ihudi mumin baiaintor gese, sahabi oḳole, zomator murobbi oḳole, ar mumin oḳole i salam zanairam.
15.24: Amra hunlam zen, amrar maz taki koyzon manush gia tarar zobandi afnarare ostir banaia fereshani korar; oile amra to tarare ila ḳamor kunu hukum disi na.
15.25: Erlagi amra hoḳole eḳmot oia ḳoyzonre fosond ḳoria, amrar mayar manush Barnabas ar Paulusor loge ḳori tarare afnaintor gese faṭailam,
15.26: Barnabas ar Paulus to amrar Hozrot Isa al-Mosir namor lagi morar zuka oigesla.
15.27: Amra Ehuda ar Silasre-o faṭailam, tara ita muke muke-o zanaiba.
15.28: Pak Ruhu ar amra milia oṭa-u bala mono ḳorlam zen, ou zoruri talim oḳol saṛa ar kunu bar afnaintor ufre na gosai.
15.29: Te afnara devtar namor mana kunu ḳani, lou, ar gola ṭifia mara zandaror gust ḳaiba na, ar zinar ḳam taki duroi roiba; ita taki hefazot roile afnaintor balai oibo. Iti, assalamu alaikum.”
15.30: Bade tara bidae loia Antiokiat aila, hino tara zomator manshore ekḳano dola ḳori siṭikan shomzai dila.
15.31: Manshe siṭikan foṛia i shantir nosiot hunia kushi oila.
15.32: Ehuda ar Silas, era duiozon nobi asla, era hinor mumin oḳolre bout laḳan oaz-nosiot ḳoria utshaho dila ar tarar imani bol mozbut ḳorla.
15.33: -34 Hono bakka ḳoydin roar bade, zera tarare faṭaisla erar gese hirbar firot aita ḳori, Antiokiar mumin oḳolre salam zanaia bidae loila.
15.35: Oile Paulus ar Barnabas Antiokiat roigela, tara hino aro boutor loge malikor kalamor talim ar kush-ḳobri toblig korat roila. Hozrot Paulusor duara tobligi sofor (15:36–18:23) Paulus ar Barnabasor omil
15.36: Ḳoydin bade Pauluse Barnabasre ḳoila, “Amra zeta zagainto age malikor kalam toblig korslam, ao, hou zagainto hirbar gia deḳa ḳori. Dekia ai baiaintor hal-hokikot kita.”
15.37: Teu Barnabasor kial oilo, Hannan urfe Markusre loge loia zaita;
15.38: oile Pauluse enre loge neoa bala mono ḳorla na, ḳaron Markuse age Pamfuliat tarare falaia geslagi, tarar loge ḳam ḳora bad dilaisla.
15.39: Erlagi Paulus ar Barnabasor maze motor omil oigelo erdae tara zarzir fote alog oigela. Barnabase Markusre loia zazo ḳori Saipras difo gela;
15.40: ar Pauluse Silasre fosond ḳoria, Antiokiar mumin oḳlor zoriae Mabudor rohomotor ato shofa oia roana dila.
15.41: Tain Siria ar Kilikiar mazedi roana ḳoria fote fote zomat oḳolre aro mozbut ḳorla.

16.1: Hozrot Paulus foyla Dorbi ar bade Lushra ṭauno gia azila. Lushrat Timoti name eḳzon ummot asla, tan ma imandar, ma to Ihudi zator, oile baf Iunani zator.
16.2: Lushra ar Ikonia ṭaunor hoḳol imandare Timotir bout tarif ḳorta.
16.3: Pauluse Timotire loge nita ḳori kial ḳorla; tain Timotire mosolmani koraila, ḳaron hi zagaintor Ihudi oḳole zanta Timotir baf oila Iunani zator manush.
16.4: Zeruzalem zomator sahabi ar murobbi oḳole zeta hukum disla, tara ṭaune ṭaune sofor ḳori kori ita mumin oḳlor ato shomzaila ar manar tagid dila.
16.5: Oula zomator mumin oḳlor iman mozbut oilo, ar dine dine tarar foriman aro baṛilo. Makidoniat Hozrot Paulus
16.6: Pak Ruhe Hozrot Paulus ar tan logor hoḳolre Asiya desho kalam toblig korte mana ḳorla, teu tara Forugia ar Galatia deshor bitredi faroia gela.
16.7: Gia Mushiar shimanat aia harle Bitunia desho zaita saila, oile Isar ruhe tarare hikano zaite dila na,
16.8: erdae tara Mushia desh falaia Toruas ṭauno gelagi.
16.9: Raitor bala Pauluse gaibi eḳ doroshon faila; tain deḳla, Makidonia deshor eḳ beṭae ubaia tanre minot ḳori koira, “Makidoniat faroia aia amrare shaijjo ḳoroukka.”
16.10: Tain i alamot deḳar bade-u amra Makidoniat zaoar lagi tiar oilam, amra buzlam, Makidoniar manshor gese kush-ḳobri toblig korar lagi Allae amrare faṭaira.
16.11: Ou amra Toruas saṛia zazo ḳori shuza Samtraki difo gelam, hin taki bador din Niafoli ṭauno gia azilam.
16.12: Niafoli taki amra Filifi ṭauno gelam. Iṭa oilo Makidoniar hoḳol taki boṛo ṭaun, ino Ruman razar manush boshot ḳorta. Amra ḳoydin ono roilam.
16.13: Eḳ Zummabare amra ṭaunor baira gangor faro gelam, mono ḳorlam, hikano Ihudi dormor dua ḳorar kunu zaga ase. Hino gia amra beṭintor eḳ dol dekia tarar loge mato boilam.
16.14: Ar erar maze Tuatira ṭaunor Ludia namor o-Ihudi Allaraia eḳ beṭi manush asla, ein baingoni rongor ḳandani kafoṛor ḳarbar ḳorta. Tain amrar boyan hunat asla, ar Mabude tan dilor duar kulia dilaila, zate tain Paulusor boyan dil dia hunoin.
16.15: Tain ar tan goror hoḳole toubar gusol ḳoria harle tain minot ḳori koila, “Afnara zudi amare malikor ufre imandar mono ḳoroin, te amar baṛikano aia roukka.” Ḳoia tain zure zatia amrare tan baṛit nilagi. Zel ḳanat aṭoḳ ar gaibi kalas faoa
16.16: Eḳdin amra zebla hou dua ḳorar zagat zaoat aslam, ou shomoy zinnat shadoki eḳ bandi beṭi aḳta-u amrar samne ailo. Tai baiggo gonia tair girost oḳolre bout lab ḳoraito.
16.17: Tai amrar ḳore ḳore aia sillaia ḳoilo, “I manushguin uforalar shebok, era tumrare toranir fot deḳai dira.”
16.18: Tai bout din dori ita ḳorsil, eḳdin Pauluse biroḳto oia tair bae muk firaia hou zinre ḳoila, “Ami Isa al-Mosir name tumare i hukum diram, tumi i beṭir ges taki bar oia zaogi!” Ar loge loge-u hi zin bar oia gelogi.
16.19: Oile tair munib oḳole tarar lab fuṛaigelo dekia, Paulus ar Silasre doria ṭania shodoro loia gela.
16.20: Bade hakim oḳlor gese shomzai dia ḳoila, “I manush guinte amrar ṭauno aia betaya gonḍogul baṛai dise. Era to Ihudi ar amra oilam Ruman manush.
16.21: Era ou zator ḳayda-ḳanunor ḳota manshore hikaira, zeta ḳora amrar lagi be-aini.”
16.22: Ar hinor aro manush eḳloge dol bandia Paulus ar Silasor birudita ḳorlo, teu hakim oḳole erar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ kulia singladi marar hukum dila.
16.23: Ar kub balaṭike singladi maria tarare zelo harai toia, zelor ofisarre hukum dila ḳoṛaḳoṛi fahara deoar lagi.
16.24: Zelor ofisare i hukum faia hari tarare zelor bitoror kuṭat harai toila, ar tarar faot ḍanḍa-beṛi lagaila.
16.25: Ada raitkur bala Paulus ar Silase Allar hamd-gozol gaite gaite dua ḳorat asla, zelor ḳoydi oḳole ḳan fatia tarar gozol hunla.
16.26: Ou shomoy aḳta-u boṛo eḳ boisal oilo, asta zelḳanar bit ḳafia uṭlo. Zelor hoḳol duar ar ḳoydi oḳlor shikol kuligelo.
16.27: Teu zelor ofisaror gum banglo ar zelor hoḳol duar kula dekia tan toluar bar ḳoria nize nize kun oizita saila, tain mono ḳorla, hoḳol ḳoydi bagia gesoingi.
16.28: Ou Pauluse dekia sillaia ḳoila, “Dom lo, dom lo, nizor ḳeti korio na, amra hoḳol-u ikano roisi.”
16.29: Teu ofisare eḳzonre batti anar hukum dia, tain douṛaia gia bitre hamaila, ar ḍoror suṭe ḳafi kafi Paulus ar Silasor faot foṛla;
16.30: bade Paulus ar Silasre bare ania zikaila, “Sab oḳol, ami kita ḳorle zane bastam farmu?”
16.31: Tara zuaf dila, “Hozrot Isar ufre iman anoukka, teu afne ar afnar baṛir hoḳol zane basba.”
16.32: Paulus ar Silase zelor ofisar ar tan baṛir hoḳolre malikor kalam hunaila.
16.33: Ar hou rait-u tain Paulus ar Silasre loia gia tarar shorilor ḳaṭa-sira doia dila, bade tain ar tan baṛir hoḳole loge loge toubar gusol ḳorla.
16.34: Ar tarare tan nizor goro nia ḳana ḳaite dila. Baṛir hoḳole mili Allar ufre iman ania bout kushi oila.
16.35: Bador din biane hakim oḳole fulish faṭaia zanaila, “I koydi oḳolre saṛi deo.”
16.36: Teu zelor ofisar sabe Paulusre zanaila, “Hakim oḳole hukum disoin afnarare saṛi dibar lagi, te afnara bar oia aukka ar sohi-salamote toshrif neukka.”
16.37: Pauluse tarare ḳoila, “Amra Ruman manush, amrar kunu bisar na ḳoria hoḳlor samne singladi marsoin ar zelo haraisoin. Oḳon hakim oḳole amrare lukaia saṛi dita saira? Ita oito nae, tara nize aia amrare bar ḳori neukka.”
16.38: Fulishe gia hakim oḳolre ou ḳota zanaila, hakim oḳole Paulus ar Silasre Ruman manush hunia ḍoraigela.
16.39: Tara Paulus ar Silasor gese aia maf saila, ar tarare bare nia ṭaun taki hori zaoar lagi minot ḳorla.
16.40: Teu tara zelḳana taki bar oia aia Bibi Ludiar baṛit hamaila. Hikano mumin oḳlor loge deḳa-shakkat ḳoria tarare utshaho dila, bade hon taki roana oila.

17.1: Hozrot Paulus ar Silas Amfipuli ar Apollunia ṭaunor mazedi gia Tisholonikit aila. Hino Ihudi oḳlor ekkan mosid asil;
17.2: Paulus tan niom moto-u hi mosido gela, ar laga laga tin Zummabare manshore Pak Kalam taki buzaila.
17.3: Tain buzaila ar forman-o deḳaila, toklif shoijjo ḳora ar murda taki zinda oia uṭa al-Mosir lagi zorur asil. Tain ḳoila, “Ou ze Isar ḳota ami afnarare buzairam, ein-u al-Mosi.”
17.4: Ita hunia erar maz taki koyzone iman ania Paulus ar Silasor loge shorik oila. Bout Allaraia Iunani beṭain ar ḳandani beṭin-o tarar loge shorik oila.
17.5: Oile Ihudi oḳole ingsha ḳoria bazari gunḍain ania dol banailo ar ṭaunor maze gulmal lagai dilo. Tara Zasunor baṛit hamla ḳoria Paulus ar Silasre tukaia manshor samne anto sailo.
17.6: Oile erare na faia tara Zasun ar aro ḳoyzon muminre ṭania sesraia ṭaunor shordar oḳlor gese loia gelo, ar sillai sillai koilo, “Ou beṭainte asta duniare lonḍo-bonḍo ḳoria oḳon ono-o aise.
17.7: Ar ou Zasune tar nizor baṛit erare memandari korse; era hoḳole amrar bashsha Ḳoisoror hukum na mania ḳoira, tain saṛa Isa name aroḳzon bashsha asoin.”
17.8: Ou laḳan mat matia tara shordar oḳolre ar am manshore-o uslaia dilo.
17.9: Shordar oḳole Zasun ar tan logor hokkolor zamanot loia zamine saṛi dila.
17.10: Rait oar bade mumin oḳole zoldi kori Paulus ar Silasre Biroyat faṭai dila. Hikano gia harle tara Ihudir mosido aila.
17.11: Tisholonikir Ihudi oḳol taki Biroya ṭaunor Ihudi oḳol bout kula-mela asla. Tara Allar kalam hunia kub gorzi oia kobul ḳorla, ar Pauluse zeta talim dira ita hasa ki na deḳar lagi tara forteḳ din Asmani Kitab kulia milaita.
17.12: Tarar maz taki bout Ihudie, ar Iunani taki-o bout ḳandani beṭain-beṭinte Isar ufre iman anla.
17.13: Oile Tisholonikir Ihudi oḳole zebla hunlo, Pauluse Biroyat aia-o toblig korra, ou tara-o Biroyat aia hinor manshore uslaia gulmal lagailo.
17.14: Ita hunia-u mumin oḳole Paulusre doriar faro faṭai dila, oile Silas ar Timoti Biroyat-u roila.
17.15: Paulusre loia zera roana oisil, tara tanre loia Atiniat gela. Gia harle Pauluse tarare ḳoila, Silas ar Timotire kub zoldi kori tan gese faṭanir lagi, ḳoia tarare bidae dilaila. Atinia ṭauno toblig
17.16: Atiniat aia Hozrot Pauluse zebla Silas ar Timotir lagi bar saira, ou shomoy tain deḳla hi ṭaunor maze murtie bora, dekia tan monor maze kub ḳoshṭo faila.
17.17: Ou tain Ihudi mosido gia Ihudi ar Allaraia Iunani oḳolre, ar fortidin bazaro gia-o zerar loge deḳa oito, tarar loge-o Hozrot Isar befare batchit ḳorta.
17.18: Teu Ifikuri ar Stuiki motobador ḳoyzon fonḍite tan loge torko lagaila, tara ḳoyzone ḳoila, “I bok-bok korrae kita hikaito sae?” Ar ḳeu ḳeu ḳoilo, “Mone ḳoy he kunu bideshi devtaintor ḳota zanaito sar.” Ḳaron Pauluse Hozrot Isa ar murda taki zinda oar kush-ḳobrir ḳota toblig korsila.
17.19: Bade tara Paulusre ania Areo-fagor mozliso nia azir ḳorla, ar tanre zikaila, “Ou zeta noya shikka afne ḳoira, ita kita amrare-o hunaiba ni?
17.20: Afne to kisu azgubi mat matira, te amra zantam sairam er asol maniḳan kita.”
17.21: Atinia ṭaunor manshe ar hino roura musafir oḳole-o ḳali noya noya befaror mat matia ba hunia tarar din ḳaṭaita.
17.22: Teu Hozrot Pauluse Areo-fagor mozlisor mazḳano ubaia ḳoila, “O Atiniar manush oḳol, ami deḳram, afnara hoḳol ḳamo-u kub devta bozoin.
17.23: Ami zebla faḳanit geslam, ou shomoy afnaintor pujar hoḳolta guria deḳlam, ami deḳlam eḳ fattoror maze leḳa ase, ‘Osina devtar name.’ Te hunoukka, afnara na-sinia zen puja ḳorra, ami tan ḳota-u afnaintor gese toblig korram.
17.24: Alla Pak, zein i dunia ar er mazor hoḳolta foyda ḳorsoin, tain behest ar duniar malik, tain to manshor banail kunu mondiro boshot ḳoroin na.
17.25: Tan kunu obab nai gotike manshor ges taki kunuta neoar-o goroz nai, tain-u to hokkol manshor zan, dom, ar hoḳolta dan ḳoroin.
17.26: Tain eḳzon manush taki hokkol zator manush foyda ḳorsoin, asta duniai zuṛi boshot ḳorar lagi. Tara kun amolo kunano boshot ḳorba iṭa-o tain foysala ḳori disoin.
17.27: Allae i kam ḳorsoin zate manshe tanre tallash ḳoroin, ar tukai tukai tan didar fain. Otoso tain amra ḳeuror ges taki duroi nae.
17.28: Afnaintor ḳoyzon ḳobie-o ḳoisoin, ‘Tan kudrote-u amrar zindegi, goti ar ṭai.’ Ar, ‘Amra-o tan oarish.’
17.29: “Ar amra zebla Allar oarish, te Allar surotre manshor kial-morzie banail shuna-rufa ba fattoror murti mono ḳora amrar lagi usit nae.
17.30: Agor zomanar manshe ita zanta na gotike Allae itare ḳosur mono ḳorsoin na, oile oḳon tain hoḳol zagar hokkol manshore mon bodlaia touba ḳorar lagi hukum dira.
17.31: Tain to oula eḳ dino ṭik korsoin, zedin tan fosondor hokkani manshor atane din-duniar hok bisar ḳoraiba. Iṭare ekin ḳorar lagi tain hou manshore murda taki zinda ḳoria er forman-o deḳaisoin.”
17.32: Murda oḳol hirbar zinda oia uṭba ikan hunia ḳeu ḳeu asha-ashi korlo, ar ḳeu ḳeu ḳoilo, “Afnar i befarḳan amra aroḳbar hunmu.”
17.33: Ou laḳan ḳori Pauluse hi mozlis taki uṭia gelagi.
17.34: Oile ḳeu ḳeu tan loge eḳmot oila ar iman-o anla. Erar maze Dionusio name Areo-fagor eḳzon membar, Damaris namor eḳzon beṭi manush ar aro ḳoyzone iman anla.

18.1: Bade Hozrot Paulus Atinia saṛia Korint ṭauno aila.
18.2: Hino aia harle Akil namor eḳzon Ihudir loge tan deḳa oilo. En baṛi Fonto desho, Ruman bashsha Keladuse Ihudi oḳolre Rum taki hori zaoar hukum disla gotike, Akile tan bou Fiskilare loge loia tuṛa ḳoydin age Itali taki Korintot aisla. Paulus tarar ḳandat gela.
18.3: Tain-o tarar laḳan tambu bananir ḳam ḳorta gotike tain tarar loge roia ou ḳamo lagla.
18.4: Forteḳ Zummabare Paulus Ihudi mosido gia Isar befare batchit ḳorta, tain Iunani ar Ihudi oḳolre iman anar lagi tagid dita.
18.5: Hozrot Silas ar Timoti Makidonia taki aia harle, Pauluse ḳali Allar kalamor toblig korta. Tain Ihudi oḳolre buzaita, Hozrot Isa-u oila al-Mosi mani Allar ḳas fosond ḳora zon.
18.6: Oile Ihudi oḳole zebla Paulusor birudita ar bodnam gaoat lagla, i shomoy tain nizor lebasor duil zaṛia falaia ḳoila, “Afnaintor lour dae afnaintor matat-u rouk. Ami amar dayitto taki kalas failam. Oḳon taki o-Ihudi oḳlor muka fot dorlam.”
18.7: Ḳoia hari hon taki Titio-Iustus namor eḳzon Allaraia manshor baṛit gela. En baṛi asil mosidor loge.
18.8: Mosidor mutolli Kirispo sab ar tan baṛir hoḳole malikor ufre iman anla. Ar Paulusor boyan hunia Korintio oḳlor maze boute iman ania toubar gusol ḳorla.
18.9: Raitor bala Mabude Paulusre doroshon dia ḳoila, “Ḍoraio na, toblig salaia zao, muk bond ḳorio na.
18.10: Ami tumar loge loge asi, ḳeu tumare hamla ḳoria tumar ḳeti korto nae. Ḳaron i ṭauno amar bout proza asoin.”
18.11: Ou Paulus deṛ boros dori hono roia manshore Allar kalam talim dila.
18.12: Bade Galion zebla Gris deshor hakim asla, ou shomoy Ihudi oḳol eḳloge milia Paulusre doria bisar ḳoranir lagi raz dorbaro nia ḳoila,
18.13: “Ou beṭae amrar shoriotor hukumor ulṭa talim dia ḳor, amra-o oula Allar ebadot ḳortam.”
18.14: Oile Pauluse zebla zobanbondi dita saila, ou shomoy Galione Ihudi oḳolre ḳoila, “O Ihudi oḳol, iṭa zudi kunu oinnae ba dushor ḳam oito te tumrar nalish ami hunlam one.
18.15: Oile iṭa zebla kunu ḳas buli ba nam ba tumrar shoriotor firka, te ita bishoy-ashoy tumra-u foysala ḳorilao, ita mator lagi ami bisar ḳortam sai na.”
18.16: Ḳoia hari tain adalot taki itare bar ḳori dilaila.
18.17: Teu manshe Ihudi mosidor ḳadim Susinre doria adalotor samne mair-doir ḳorla. Oile Galione imuka firia-u saila na. Tobligi sofor heshe hirbar Antiokiat
18.18: Paulus aro bout din Korintot roar bade, mumin oḳlor ges taki bidae loia Siria desho zaita ḳori Kinkria namor zaz gaṭo aila, Akil ar Fiskila-o tan loge aila. Paulusor eḳ mannot asil ḳori ono aia tan matar sul ḳamaia zazo uṭla.
18.19: Bade Ifis ṭauno aia Pauluse hi duiozonre ono toia, tain mosido hamaia Ihudi oḳlor loge Hozrot Isar befare batchit ḳorla.
18.20: Ihudi oḳole tanre ḳoydin tarar gese roar lagi minot ḳorle-o, tain razi oila na.
18.21: Tain erar ges taki bidae loia ḳoila, “Inshalla, ami hirbar aimu.” Ḳoia tain Ifis taki zazo ḳori roana oigela.
18.22: Ar Ḳoisoriat aia harle zaz taki lamia Zeruzalemo gela, gia zomator manshor loge mulaḳat ḳoria hon taki Antiokiat aila.
18.23: Antiokiat ḳoydin ḳaṭanir bade hikan taki roana dia, Galatia ar Forugia deshor zagae zagae guria mumin oḳlor imani bol mozbut ḳorla. Hozrot Apollosor toblig kam
18.24: Er maze Apollos namor eḳzon Ihudi Ifis ṭauno aila. Tan baṛi Alekzandria ṭauno, tain shundor ḳori oaz ḳoroin, ar Asmani Kitab-o kub bala buzoin.
18.25: Malikor torikar ilim-o tan asil, tain ruhe gorom oia Hozrot Isar befare sohi-shuddo oaz-nosiot ḳorta ar talim dita. Oile tain ḳali Hozrot Ehiar torikar toubar gusol saṛa ar kunu toubar gusolor ḳota zanta na.
18.26: Tain kub himmot ḳoria mosido gia oaz ḳorta. Fiskila ar Akile tan oaz hunia tanre tarar baṛit daot dila, ar Allar rasta aro bala ḳori buzaia dila.
18.27: Bade Apollos zebla Gris desho zaita saila, i shomoy imandar oḳole tanre utshaho dila, ar tanre kobul ḳorta ḳori ummot oḳlor gese siṭi-o dila. Teu tain gia Griso azir oila, ar Allar rohomote zera iman anchila tarar bout fayda oilo.
18.28: Ar Hozrot Isa-u zen al-Mosi, ou ḳota to tain Pak Kitab taki forman deḳaia, manshor samne himmot ḳori Ihudi oḳolre ekkere la-zuaf banaila.

19.1: Apollos zebla Korintot asla, ou shomoy Hozrot Paulus Asiya deshor mazedi Ifis ṭauno aila. Hikano ḳoyzon ummotor loge deḳa oae,
19.2: tain erare zikaila, “Afnara iman anar shomoy kita Pak Ruhu hasil ḳorsla ni?” Tara zuaf dila, “Pak Ruhu aroḳta kita, ita to amra hunchi-u na.”
19.3: Pauluse tarare ḳoila, “Te afnara kun torikae toubar gusol ḳorsla?” Tara ḳoila, “Ehia nobir torikae.”
19.4: Ou tain ḳoila, “Guna taki mon bodlaile ze gusol ḳorail oy, oṭa-u oilo Hozrot Ehiar torikar gusol, oile Ehiae to talim disla, tan bade zein toshrif anra, mani Hozrot Isar ufre-o iman ana lagbo.”
19.5: I nosiot hunar bade tara Hozrot Isar name toubar gusol ḳorla.
19.6: Bade Pauluse tarar ufre at raḳle tara Pak Ruhu faila, teu era nanan gaibi bashae matila ar firaki mat mata dorla.
19.7: Era hoḳole milia onuman barozon asla.
19.8: Bade tain Ihudir mosido gia eḳlagare tin mash himmot ḳoria toblig korla, Allar bashshair befare zukti-torko deḳaia tarare buzaila.
19.9: Erar maze ḳoyzonor dil na-humar oae tara iman anla na, tara hoḳlor gese Isar torikar gibot gaita. Teu Pauluse erar ges taki horia ummot oḳolre algaia tan loge raḳla, ar forteḳ din Turanno namor eḳ ustador ṭongit gia tarare talim dila.
19.10: Oula dui bosor guzorar bade Asiya deshor Ihudi ar Iunani, hokkolor ḳano-u Mabudor kalam fosi gelo.
19.11: Allae Hozrot Paulusor atane asanok keramoti kam zair ḳoraila.
19.12: Heshe oula-o oilo zen, tan gotror ḳafoṛ ba gamsaḳan-o kunu bemari manshor ḳasat nile-u bemar bala oizito, ar zin-bute-o bemari saṛia bagita.
19.13: Ermaze ḳoyzon guria faḳaia ḳaora Ihudi tabzati mullae-o Hozrot Isar nam loia zin-but saṛaito sailo, tara oula ḳoito, “Pauluse zen name toblig koroin, hou Isar duai dia, ami tumrare bar oia zaoar hukum diram.”
19.14: Erar maze Skiba namor eḳzon Ihudi fordan imamor shat fuae-o oula ḳorto.
19.15: Teu eḳdin bute tarare zuaf dilo, “Ami Isare-o sini, Paulusre-o sini, oile tumra ḳe?”
19.16: Ḳoia-u ze beṭare bute dorsil hi beṭae tarar ufre fal dia foṛia mair-doir ḳoria tara shato zonre arailo. Maire tarar shoril siṛia-biṛia zoḳom oigelo, tara lemṭa oia i baṛi taki bagila.
19.17: I kobor zebla Ifisor Ihudi ar Iunani oḳole zanla, te tara hokkole ḍoraigela, ar sairobae Hozrot Isar namor mohima zair oilo.
19.18: Zera Hozrot Isar ufre iman anchil, era boute aia hari kula-mela ḳori tarar bad ḳamor ḳota shikar ar zair ḳorla.
19.19: Ar zera zadu-ṭunar ḳam ḳorto, tarar maze-o boute tarar zadu-ṭunar boiain ania dola ḳori hoḳlor samne zalailila. I boiaintor dam hishab ḳoria deḳa gelo foinchash azar rufar dinar.
19.20: Ou laḳan ḳori malikor kalam bout baṛilo ar manshor maze kub ḳam ḳorlo.
19.21: Ita goṭar bade Pauluse mone mone niot ḳorla, tain Makidonia ar Gris oia Zeruzalemo zaitagi, tain ḳoila, “Zeruzalem zaoar bade ami Rum ṭauno-o zaoa zorur.”
19.22: Bade tain Timoti ar Irastas namor tan duio ḳadimre Makidoniat faṭaia, nize aro ḳoydin Asiya desho roila.
19.23: Ou shomoy Isar torikar bishoy loia bout gonḍogul laglo.
19.24: Ḳaron Dimitri name eḳzon baniae Artemis debir mondiror nomunae rufadi huru huru mondir banaito, aro bout baniae-o ou ḳam ḳoria bout lab ḳorto.
19.25: He ou bania oḳolre ar tarar logi oḳolre-o ekḳano dola ḳoria ḳoilo, “Bai oḳol, tumra to zanrae, i karbar taki amra bala lab fairam.
19.26: Oile tumra deḳrae ar hunrae-o, Paulus namor ou beṭae ḳali amrar Ifiso-u nae, ḳoite gele asta Asiya zuṛi bout manshore ḳoise ar ekin ḳoraise, ator banail deb-debi oḳol bule kunu devta-u nae.
19.27: Erlagi oḳon ḍor ḳorer, ḳali amrar ḳarbaror-u bodnam oibo ila nae, oile mohadebi Artemisor mondir-o beḳama oizibo, ar Asiya deshor hokkol manshe ar hara duniaiye milia zen puja ḳore, tain-o nizor ijjot araiba.”
19.28: Ita hunia tara gusae aguin oia zure zure sillaia ḳoila, “Ifisiar Artemis debi, zindabad!”
19.29: Loge loge asta ṭauno gonḍogul lagigelo; manshe Makidoniar Gous ar Aristakus namor Paulusor logor duizonre doria, eḳloge fal bandia douṛaia sṭeḍiamo loia gela.
19.30: Hozrot Paulus ou biṛor samne zaita saila, oile mumin oḳole tanre aṭḳailla.
19.31: Asiya deshor shorḳari ofisaror maze ḳoyzon asla Paulusor dust, era ḳobriadi tanre zanaila, tain hi biṛor samne gia nizor mosibot ḍakia anta na.
19.32: Biṛor maze manshe kub silla-silli ar geinjam lagaila. Beshir bag manshe zanta-u na ino kita oise, tara eḳzone eḳlaḳan, aroḳzone aroḳ laḳan matila.
19.33: Teu ḳoyzon Ihudie Sikondor namor eḳzonre samne ṭelia dilo bashon dibar lagi. Tain atdi ishara dila, zate manush nirai oia tan boktita hunoin.
19.34: Oile manshe zebla buzla, ein-o Ihudi, teu tara aro zure zure onuman dui gonṭa dori sillaia ḳoila, “Ifisiar Artemis debi, zindabad!”
19.35: Heshe ṭaunor searmane manshore nirai koraia ḳoila, “O Ifisia oḳol, ḳoukka sain, kun manushgue na zane zen, i Ifis ṭaun oilo mohan Artemis debir mondir ar asman taki tan zeta murti lamat foṛse er roikka ḳoroneala?
19.36: Ar i hasa ḳota ḳeu zebla ḳonḍaito farto nae, te bebutar laḳan kunu ḳam na ḳoria tumra nirai o.
19.37: Ou manshe to amrar mondiro suri-o ḳorse na, amrar debir kunu bodnam-o ḳorer na, ta-o tumra erare doria ancho.
19.38: Te huno, Dimitri ar tar logor bania oḳlor zudi kunu nalish taḳe, te adalot to kula ase, hakim oḳol-o asoin, tara hono gia zarzir mamla-mokoddoma ḳorouk.
19.39: Oile tumrar ar kunu dabi-daoa taḳle ita niom mafik mozliso boia miṭ-maṭ ḳora oibo.
19.40: Ashole aizkur i geinjam laganir lagi amrar ufre-u dush foṛto fare, i gonḍogul laganir kunu ḳaron deḳaitam fartam nae.”
19.41: Oḳan ḳoia tain mozlis bangi dila.

20.1: Geinjam shesh oar bade Hozrot Pauluse mumin oḳolre ḳobordi anaila, tara aia harle tain tarare utshaho dia, sohi-salamote bidae loia Makidoniat zaita ḳori roana oila.
20.2: Makidoniar mazedi zaite zaite mumin oḳolre bout utshaho dia, Gris desho aia azila.
20.3: Ono aia tin mash roar bade zebla zazo ḳori Siria desho zaita saila, ou shomoy Ihudi oḳole tan bifokke ku-motlob ḳorer hunia, tain Makidoniar mazedi zaita ḳori niot ḳorla.
20.4: Ar Biroya ṭaunor Furosor fua Sufatos, Tisholonikir Aristakus ar Sikundos, Dorbi shohoror Gous, Timoti, ar Asiya deshor Tukik ar Tofim, era hokkol Paulusor loge gela.
20.5: Era age oia Toruas ṭauno gia amrar lagi bar saoat asla.
20.6: Bade Ḳamir Saṛa Ruṭir Id shesh oigele amra zazo ḳori Filifi taki roana dia, fas din bade Toruas aia tarar loge millam, ono shatdin roilam. Hozrot Pauluse eḳ murdare zinda ḳora
20.7: Haftar foyla din Isar mezbani kaoar lagi amra ekḳano dola oile, Paulus bador din zaitagi kori maz rait forzonto mumin oḳlor gese oaz ḳorla.
20.8: Amra ufror talar ze goro boislam hikano bout batti asil.
20.9: Ar Utuḳ namor eḳ zuan fua kiṛkir ufre boat asil, Pauluse bout shomoy dori oaz ḳorae he huni huni gumai gesil, aḳta-u he tin tala taki lamat foṛigelo. Teu manshe tare mora halote tulla.
20.10: Paulus lamat lamia fuar ufre ḳait oia ainja ḳori doria ḳoila, “Tumra uloistol ḳorio na, tar bitre to zan ase.”
20.11: Bade tain hirbar ufror talat gia mezbani kaila, ḳaia harle fozor forzonto batchit ḳoria bidae loila.
20.12: Er maze ou fuare manshe zita halote baṛit nia zar for nai kushi oila.
20.13: Amra age gia zazo ḳori Asus gaṭor bae roana oilam, mono ḳorlam Paulusre hon taki tulmu. Ḳaron tain kial ḳorsla aṭia hikano gia uṭta.
20.14: Asus aia tain amrar loge milar bade, amra tanre zazo tulia Mitulinit ailam.
20.15: Bador din amra zaz kulia hikan taki roana oia Kius difor ḳandat ailam; er bador din amra Samus difo roilam, tar bador din gia amra Milita gaṭo biṛilam.
20.16: Asiya desho Pauluse deri korar kial na oae tain mone mone ṭik korsla, Ifiso na hamaia er galabae zaibagi, tain zoldi kori Zeruzalemo gia hari Fonchaisha Id hono adae ḳorta saila. Ifis zomato aḳeri boyan
20.17: Milita taki Pauluse ḳobria faṭaia Ifisor zomator murobbi oḳolre anaila.
20.18: Tara aia fosar bade Pauluse ḳoila, “Afnara to zanoin, Asiya desho aia harle ami foyla din taki-u kila afnaintor loge shomoy ḳaṭaisi.
20.19: Ihudi oḳlor bout zator ku-foramish taki, tarar fatail fondir maze-o ami furafur norom dile, souḳor fani falaia Mabudor gulami korsi.
20.20: Afnarar fayda oibo ila kunu talim-u na lukaia furafur zanaisi, kula-mela mozliso ar goro goro gia talim dite-o na ḳorsi na.
20.21: Ihudi ar Iunanir gese toblig koria buzaisi, tarar gunar mon bodlaia Allar foti oita, ar amrar malik Hozrot Isar ufre iman anta.
20.22: Ar oḳon Pak Ruhur hukumbondi oia ami Zeruzalemo zairam, hikano amar kun dosha oibo, zani na.
20.23: Ḳali ou ḳoborḳan zani, Pak Ruhe hokkol ṭauno amare ou ḳota zanaira, toklif ar zel ḳaṭa amar lagi bar sar.
20.24: Oile-o amar nizor zanor forua ḳori na, amar zanre oto mulloban mono ḳori na. Ami irada ḳora fotor hesh ṭikana forzonto douṛaitam sairam. Allar rohomotor kush-ḳobrir toblig ar kezmotor ou ze bar Hozrot Isar ges taki faisi, er injam ditam sairam.
20.25: Oḳon ami eoḳan-o zani, afnara zerar maze ami Allar bashshair ḳota toblig korram, ou afnaintor loge-o ar kunudin deḳa oito nae.
20.26: Erlagi ami aiz afnaintor gese ou zobanbondi diram, hokkolor lour dae taki ami kalas.
20.27: Ami Alla Pakor hoḳol laḳan morzir ḳota afnaintor gese boyan ḳorte ḳoredi gesi na.
20.28: Afnara zarzir befare hushiar oukka. Pak Ruhe afnarare zerar saloḳdar banaisoin, tarar befare hushiar oukka. Allae tan nizor zonredi zerare ḳorid ḳorsoin, hi zomatre furafur deḳa-huna ḳoroukka, zela raḳale tar meṛar falor deḳa-huna ḳore, imam oia afnara-o oula ḳoroukka.
20.29: Ami zani, ami zaoar bade tumrar maze fagola bagor surotor manush aia hamaiba, tara nirdoy oia falor bout ḳeti korba.
20.30: Ar afnaintor nizor maz taki-o ḳeu ḳeu mumin oḳolre tar ḳore neoar lagi, hasa talimre misa ḳoia noya talim bar ḳorbo.
20.31: Erlagi afnara hozag roukka, ar mono raḳba, ami tin boros doria rait-din souḳor fani falaia afnarare hushiar ḳorte dom loisi na.
20.32: Oḳon Alla ar tan rohomotor kalamor zimmae ami afnarare shofilam. Allar i kalame afnarare goṛia tulbo ar tan pak bonda oḳlor lagi oada ḳora behesti monjilo fosai dibo.
20.33: Ami to ḳeuror shuna-rufa ba ḳafoṛ-sufoṛor bae lalos ḳorsi na.
20.34: Afnara nize-u to zanoin, amar ar amar logi oḳlor obab miṭanir lagi ami duio ate ḳam ḳorsi.
20.35: Ami hoḳol laḳan ḳamor maze nomuna deḳaisi, ou laḳan ḳam ḳoria durbol oḳolre shaijjo ḳora zorur. Hozrot Isar talimre mono raḳo, tain nize bataisoin, neoar saite deoa doinno.”
20.36: Oḳan ḳoia harle, Pauluse aṭu gaṛia hoḳlor loge dua ḳorla.
20.37: Bade zomator hoḳole milia kub ḳandon ḳandila, ar Paulusre ainja ḳori doria hunga dila.
20.38: Ḳas ḳori Paulusor ou ḳotar lagi beshi kandila, tain ḳoisla, tan muk tara ar deḳta nae. Bade tara tan loge oia gia zazo tulia dila.

21.1: Ifisor zomator murobbi oḳlor ges taki bidae loia, zaz kulia hari amra shuza fote Kus namor difo ailam, bador din amra Rudos difo ailam, hon taki Fatara namor ṭauno gelam.
21.2: Hono gia harle Foinikiat zaora ekkan zaz failam, amra hou zaze roana dilam.
21.3: Ar zebla Saipras dif deḳlam, ou shomoy difor ḍain galabae gia amra Siria deshor Shur ṭauno aia lamlam. Hikano zazor mal-samana lamai dilo.
21.4: Honor mumin oḳolre tukaia hari amra shat din tarar gese roilam; tara Pak Ruhur marfote Paulusre minot ḳorla, tain zanu Zeruzalemo na zain.
21.5: Ino ḳoydin ḳaṭanir bade amra hirbar roana oilam, teu tara hokkole bou-baichcha loia ṭaunor bare aia amrare aguai dila. Bade doriar faro amra aṭu gaṛia dua ḳorlam.
