21.6: Dua bade zarzir fote bidae loia amra zazo uṭlam, ar tara nizor baṛit gelagi.
21.7: Shur taki roana oia amra zazor sofor shesh ḳoria Tolimayit azilam, honor mumin oḳolre bala-bura zikanir bade amra tarar loge eḳdin roilam.
21.8: Bador din amra bidae loia Ḳoisoriat ailam, ar toblig kamor buzurg Filifor baṛit gelam. Ein to Zeruzalemor hou shat ḳadimdaror eḳzon.
21.9: Tan sairzon abiati fuṛin asla, era nobir laḳan ohi koita.
21.10: Bakka ḳoydin hono roar bade Agabus namor eḳzon nobie Ehudia taki toshrif anla.
21.11: Tain aia hari Paulusor ḳomror taga kulilila, ar iṭadi nizor at-fao bandia ḳoila, “Pak Ruhe oula ḳoira, Zeruzalemor Ihudi oḳole ou ḳomror taga-alare oula banba, ar o-Ihudi oḳlor ato shofia diba.”
21.12: Ita hunia hinor manshe ar amra-o Paulusre bout minot ḳorlam, tain zanu Zeruzalemo zaoa bad dilain.
21.13: Pauluse ḳoila, “Tumra ita kita lagailae? Ḳandia amar mon bangi dirae ḳene? Hozrot Isar lagi ami Zeruzalemo ḳali bondi oa-u nae, morte-o tiar asi.”
21.14: Tanre ḳota hunaitam na faria amra nirai oigelam, ar ḳoilam, “Mabudor morzi kaim ouk.” Bondi halote Hozrot Paulus (21:15–28:31) Hozrot Paulus Zeruzalemo aṭoḳ
21.15: Bade amra mal-samana gaiṭ bandia Zeruzalemo roana dilam.
21.16: Ḳoisoria ṭaunor ḳoyzon mumin-o amrar loge aila, ar Saipras difor Menason namor eḳzon furana imandaror baṛit amrare loia gela. En baṛit-u amra roar ḳota asil.
21.17: Zeruzalemo aoar bade mumin oḳole kushi oia amrare kobul ḳorla.
21.18: Bador din Pauluse amrare loia Hozrot Isar bai Iakubor loge mulaḳat ḳorla. Hikano zomator murobbi oḳol-o aila.
21.19: Pauluse erare bala-bura zikaia harle, tan tobligor mazdi Allae kilan o-Ihudi oḳlor maze dini kam hasil ḳorsoin, ita hoḳolta eḳ ek kori tarar gese boyan ḳorla.
21.20: Ita hunia murobbi oḳole Allar tarif ḳorla ar tanre ḳoila, “Bai, tumi to deḳrae, azar azar Ihudie Hozrot Isar ufre iman anchoin, ar tara hoḳole-u Hozrot Musar shoriotre amol ḳorar kial ase.
21.21: Oile tara ou ḳobor-o faisoin, o-Ihudi oḳlor loge zeta Ihudi oḳol taḳoin, tarare tumi talim diso Musar shoriot bad dilaita ḳori, tara zanu huruttaintor mosolmani korani bad dilain ar Ihudi oḳlor reoaz-o na manoin.
21.22: Te kita ḳora zae? Tara to nisoy hunba tumi aiso.
21.23: Oḳon amra tumare zela ḳoi, tumi oula ḳorilao. Amrar maze sairzon beṭain asoin, tara ekkan mannot ḳorsoin;
21.24: tumi tarare loge loia zao, tarar loge gia tumi ar tarar fak-saf oar ḳoros ar matar sul ḳamanir foysha-o dilao. Teu hoḳole zanba, tumar name tara zeta ḳobor faisoin, ita kunta-u nae, ashole tumi nize-o Musar shoriot ar reoaz manrae.
21.25: Oile zeta o-Ihudi oḳole iman anchoin, tarare amrar ou foysala lekia zanai disi, devtar name niot ḳora ḳani kaita na, lou ḳaita na ar gola ṭifia mara kunu zandaror gust ḳaita na, kunu zator zinar ḳamo zaita na.”
21.26: Teu Pauluse hou manush oḳolre loge loia gia, tarar loge nizore-o fak-saf ḳorla. Bador din Baytul-Mukaddoso hamaila, ar tarar fak-saf oar lagi foshu kurbani kundin deoa oibo, eo tarik zanai dila.
21.27: Fak-saf oar niomor hi shat din shesh na oite-u, Asiya deshor ḳoyzon Ihudie Paulusre Baytul-Mukaddoso dekia, manshore uskai dia tane dorla.
21.28: Tara sillaia ḳoila, “O Boni Israil oḳol, aguao! Asta duniar manshor gese zegue amrar zatir, amrar shoriotor ar Baytul-Mukaddosor bifokke talim dia gure, ogu hou beṭa! He Iunani oḳolre ono haraia i pak zagaḳanre-o nafak banaise.”
21.29: Er age to Ifisor Tofimre Paulusor loge ṭauno sokkoro dekia tara mone mone shondoy ḳorsoin, Pauluse tanre Baytul-Mukaddoso-o haraisoin.
21.30: Teu asta ṭaunor manush gorom oigela, ar eḳloge douṛia aia Paulusre doria Baytul-Mukaddos taki ṭania bare anla, ar loge loge-u er duar oḳol bond ḳorilla.
21.31: Tara Paulusre marilita saila, oile ou shomoy Ruman sifai oḳlor fordanor gese ḳobor gelo, asta Zeruzalemor maze uloistol lagigese.
21.32: Loge loge-u tain subedar oḳol ar sifai dol loia douṛia tarar gese aila. Manshe sifai ar sifair fordanre dekia Paulusre mair-doir ḳora bond ḳorla.
21.33: Teu hi ofisare aia Paulusre aṭok koria duigesa shikoldi bandar hukum dila, bade zikaila, “I manushgu ḳe, he kita dush ḳorse?”
21.34: Gonḍogulor maze sillaia ḳeu eḳlaḳan, ḳeu ḳeu aroḳ laḳan ḳoilo. Oile tain balamonte kunta shomzita na faria Paulusre nia kenṭonmenṭo haraia toar hukum dila.
21.35: Paulus siṛir muko zaite-u manshor at taki basanir lagi, sifai oḳole tanre usa ḳoria boia nilagi.
21.36: Manshe ḳore oia misil dita lagla, “Ogure marilao!”
21.37: Sifai oḳole tanre kenṭonmenṭo harai dita saira, ou shomoy tain fordan ofisarre Iunani bashae soal ḳorla, “Ami afnar gese kunta mattam farmu ni?” Ofisare ḳoila, “Tumi kita Iunani basha zano ni?
21.38: Te tumi kita hou Mishori beṭa ni, zegue ḳoydin age laṛai koria, sair azar shontrashire loge loia morubumit gesil?”
21.39: Pauluse zuaf dila, “Sab, ami eḳzon Ihudi, Kilikiar Tarsho shohoror manush, ami zeta mone ḳoy ita ṭaunor manush nae. Ami afnare minot ḳorram, doya ḳori manshor gese amare matar shuzugkan deukka.”
21.40: Tain shuzug deoar bade Pauluse siṛir ufre ubaia, manshore nirai oar lagi atdi ishara dila, tara nirai oia harle tain Ibrani bashae ḳoat lagla.

22.1: Pauluse ḳoila, “O baba oḳol, bai oḳol, ami oḳon amar nizor zobanbondi diram, afnara hunoukka.”
22.2: Tain Ibrani bashae matra dekia manush ekkere nirai oigela. Ou tain ḳoila,
22.3: “Ami eḳzon Ihudi. Kilikiar Tarsho shohoro amar zonom oise; oile ou Zeruzalem ṭauno aia ami manush oisi, allama Gomolielor faor ḳandat boia ami amrar moy-murobbi oḳlor shoriot ar ḳayda-ḳanunor shullo-ana talim faisi. Ar aiz afnara zela allaoalagiri deḳaira, ami nize-o age oula allaoala aslam.
22.4: Ami Isar foti oḳolre zan-foran shofia zulum ar zane martam, beṭain-beṭinre bandia nia zel ḳanat haraitam.
22.5: Ita to fordan imam sab ar deshor fotua komiṭir hokkol moy-murobbi oḳole-o bala ḳori zanoin. Ami tarar ges taki siṭi loia, Damesk shohoror amrar baiainre dibar lagi roana oislam. Hono zera Isar torikat aisla, tarare bondi koria Zeruzalemo ania shaza deoar lagi hono zaoat aslam.
22.6: Zaite zaite Dameskor ḳandat gia harle beil duifor oigelo, aḳta-u amar sairo galabae asmani for somḳaia uṭlo.
22.7: Ami maṭit foṛigelam ar hunlam, amare ḳeu ḍakia ḳoira, ‘Shoul, Shoul, tumi amare ḳene toklif dirae?’
22.8: Ami zikailam, ‘Huzur, afne ḳe?’ Tain ḳoila, ‘Ami Nasarotor Isa, zenre tumi toklif dirae.’
22.9: Zera amar loge asil tara hoḳole-u i for oise ḳori deḳla, oile zein amar loge batchit ḳorsila, tan buli tara hunla na.
22.10: Bade ami koilam, ‘Malik, te ami kita ḳortam?’ Tain ḳoila, ‘Uṭo, Damesko roana deo, tumar zeta zeta ḳorar goroz ase, ita tumare hono zanail oibo.’
22.11: Ar hi somḳanie amar souk anda oigesil gotike, amar logi oḳole amar ato doria Dameskor bae loia roana dila.
22.12: “Hono Ononio namor eḳzon manush asla, tain Hozrot Musar shoriot mafik kub forezgar manush. Hikanor hoḳol Ihudir gese tain kub ijjoti zon.
22.13: Tain aia amar ḳasat ubaia ḳoila, ‘Bai Shoul, tumar deḳar takkot firot auk.’ Ar loge loge-u ami tanre deḳlam.
22.14: Ou tain ḳoila, ‘Amrar baf-dada oḳlor Allae tumare fosond ḳorsoin, tumi zanu tan morzi zantae faro, ar hou masum bonda Hozrot Isare-o deḳtae faro, ar tan zobanor buli-o huntae faro.
22.15: Tumi tan shakki oibae, zeta zeta deḳso ar huncho ita hokkolta tamam duniare zanaibae.
22.16: Oḳon ar deri korrae ḳene? Uṭo, tane ḍaḳo, ar toubar gusol ḳoria tumar hoḳol guna doia falao.’
22.17: “Bade ami Zeruzalemo firot aia harle eḳdin Baytul-Mukaddosor bitre dua ḳorat aslam, ou shomoy unganir haloto aḳta-u tan doroshon failam.
22.18: Ami deḳlam, tain amare ḳoira, ‘Zoldi kori uṭo, oḳon-u Zeruzalem saṛia baro, ḳaron amar befare tumar mukor kunu shakki inor manshe hunto nae.’
22.19: Ami koilam, ‘Malik, i hoḳol manshe-u to zanoin, zera tumar ufre iman anta, erare zelo harani ar mair-doir ḳorar lagi, ami hokkol mosidainto zaitam;
22.20: tumar shakki Stifanre zebla mara oisil, hi shomoy ami nize hikano ubaia shae deoat aslam, ar zera tanre marsil, ami tarar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ fara dislam.’
22.21: Teu Malike amare ḳoila, ‘Tumi roana deo, ami duroir bin zati oḳlor gese tumare bezimu.’ ”
22.22: Manshe oto shomoy dori Paulusor boyan hunat asla, bade o-Ihudir nam hunia-u tara sillaia ḳoila, “Ogure dunia taki horai deo, igu basia roar zuka nae!”
22.23: Manshe zebla sillani dorla ar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ falaia, asmano duil uṛanit lagla,
22.24: ou shomoy fordan ofisare Paulusre kenṭonmenṭo loia zaoar hukum dila, ar ḳoila, “Ere sabuk maria zera ḳoro, ḳene manshe tar birudde ila silla-silli korer.”
22.25: Paulusre zebla sabuk marar lagi bandila, i shomoy sho-sifair eḳ subedar hikano ubat asla, teu Pauluse tanre ḳoila, “Oḳono zare dushi shaibosto ḳora oise na, ila eḳzon Ruman manshore sabuk mara afnaintor lagi ṭik or ni?”
22.26: Ikan hunia hi subedare fordan ofisarre gia ḳoila, “Sar, afne ita kita ḳorat lagsoin? I beṭa to Ruman manush.”
22.27: Teu tain Paulusor daro gia zikaila, “Ḳo sain, tumi Ruman ni?” Pauluse ḳoila, “Ji oy.”
22.28: Ofisare ḳoila, “Ami bout ṭeḳa-foysha ḳoros ḳoria Ruman siṭizen oar shuzug loisi.” Pauluse ḳoila, “Ami zonom shutre-u Ruman.”
22.29: Ikan hunia-u ze sifaie tanre zera ḳorat zaoat asla, loge loge-u tara hon tone horia gelagi. Ar tain Ruman manush oile-o tanre bandisla ḳori fordan ofisare-o ḍoraigela.
22.30: Oile bador din hirbar Paulusre zikaita saila, kitar lagi Ihudi oḳole tanre dush dira, teu fordan ofisare Paulusor band kuli dila, boṛo imam oḳol ar fotua komiṭir hoḳolre ekḳano dola oar hukum dila. Bade Paulusre lamaia tarar samne azir ḳorla.

23.1: Pauluse fotua komiṭir manshor bae dian dori saia ḳoila, “O baisab oḳol, ami to oḳon forzonto amar bibeḳ forishkar rakia, Allar bonda hishabe dayitto adae ḳorram.”
23.2: Ikan hunia fordan imam Ononioe, Paulusor galat zera ubat asil, tarare ḳoila, “Ogur muko soṛ maro.”
23.3: Teu Pauluse tanre ḳoila, “O bonḍo, Allae tumare-o soṛ marba. Tumi shoriotor aine amar bisar ḳorat boia, shoriotor borkelaf ḳoria amare soṛ marar hukum dirae?”
23.4: Zera Paulusor ḳandat ubaisil, tara tanre ḳoilo, “Tumi Allar goror fordan imam sabre beijjot ḳorrae ni?”
23.5: Pauluse ḳoila, “Bai oḳol, ami to zani na ein fordan imam ḳori. Arnae ila ḳoilam na one, Allar kalamo to leḳa ase, ‘Tumar nizor zatir murobbire kunu gali dio na.’ ”
23.6: Pauluse zebla buzla hi mozlisor kisu manush Siddekia mozobor ar kisu oila Forishi mozobor, ou tain mozlisor maze zure zure ḳoila, “O bai oḳol, ami eḳzon Forishi ar Forishir aolad. Murda oḳol hirbar zinda oia uṭba, ou mator lagi oḳon amar bisar ḳora or.”
23.7: Tain ikan ḳoar loge loge-u Forishi ar Siddekia oḳlor maze ḳaijja lagigelo, mozlisor maze dui dol oigela.
23.8: Ḳaron Siddekia oḳlor ekin oilo, murda oḳol ar zinda oita nae, firista ba ruhu ita kunuta nai. Oile Forishi oḳole ekin ḳoroin ita hoḳolta-u asoin.
23.9: I gonḍogul bout boṛo oigelo, teu Forishi dolor ḳoyzon moulanae ubaia torka-torki kori koila, “Amra to i manshor kunu dush deḳram na. Kunu ruhu ba firistae to tar loge ila batchit ḳorta faroin.”
23.10: Ou laḳan ḳori betaya gonḍogul laglo, erdae fordan ofisare ḍoraigela, manshe Paulusre ṭukra ṭukra ḳori siṛilaiba, ou tain sifai oḳolre hukum dila, tara lamia gia Paulusre manshor ges taki horaia nia kenṭonmenṭo haraila.
23.11: Bade raitor bala Malik Isae Paulusor gese ubaia ḳoila, “Himmot ḳoro, amar name Zeruzalemo zela shakki diso, Rum ṭauno-o oula shakki dite oibo.” Hozrot Paulusre marar shoṛozontro
23.12: Bador din fozoror oḳto Ihudi oḳole eḳ dagabazi korla, tara ḳosom ḳaia ḳoila, Paulusre marar ag forzonto tara dana-fani kunta muko dita nae.
23.13: Sallish zonor-o beshi manush ekḳano oia i dagabazir ḳosom ḳaila.
23.14: Tara boṛo imam ar murobbi oḳlor gese gia ḳoila, “Amra ḳoṛaḳoṛi kosom ḳaisi, Paulusre na mara forzonto dana-fani kunta muko ditam nae.
23.15: Oḳon afnara ar fotua komiṭir hoḳole fordan ofisaror gese ou abdar ḳoroukka zen, afnara aro balaṭike i bisaror todonto ḳorta saira, ou usillae he afnaintor gese aoar age-u, fotor maze amra tare marilimu.”
23.16: Oile Paulusor bagnae tarar i dagabazir ḳobor hunia, kenṭonmenṭo gia Paulusre ita zanaila.
23.17: Teu Pauluse sho-sifair eḳzon subedarre anaia ḳoila, “Ou fuagure fordan ofisar sabor gese loia zaukka, he tanre kita ḳoito aise.”
23.18: Ou hi subedare tare loia fordan ofisaror gese gia ḳoila, “Bondi Pauluse amare anaia ḳoila, ou fuagure afnar gese loia aitam, he afnar gese kita ḳoito sar.”
23.19: Fordan ofisare tar ato doria ek galabae loia gia ḳoila, “Tumi amare kita ḳoitae sairae?”
23.20: He ḳoilo, “Ihudi oḳole niot ḳorsoin, tara afnar gese ou abdar ḳorba, Paulusor bisar aro balaṭike todonto ḳorar lagi afne zanu samnor ḳail tanre deshor fotua komiṭir samne azir ḳorain.
23.21: Afne tarar ḳotae razi oin na zanu, era sallish zonor-o beshi manshe lukaia Paulusor lagi bar saira, tara ḳosom ḳaise, tanre na mara forzonto dana-fani kunta muko dito nae. Tara oḳon tiar oia foto boise, ḳali afnar razi oar bar saira.”
23.22: Fordan ofisare tare ou hukum dia bidae dila, “Tumi amar gese i kobor ḳoiso ḳori keurore hunaio na.” Hozrot Paulusre Ḳoisoriat faṭani
23.23: Bade tain sho-sifair duizon subedarre anaia ḳoila, “Dui-sho zon sifai, shottoir zon guṛa-ala sifai, ar dui-sho zon sulfi-ala sifai aiz rait noyṭat Ḳoisoriat zaoar lagi tiar ḳoro.
23.24: Ar Paulusor lagi-o guṛar bondobost ḳoro, tare zanu nirafode deshor fordan hakim Filiksor gese fosail oy.”
23.26: “Manonio fordan hakim sab, ami Keladus Lusias, afnare salam zanairam.
23.27: Ihudi oḳole ou manushgure doria zane marilita saisla, ami hunlam he eḳzon Ruman manush, hunia amar sifai oḳol loia gia tare basailam.
23.28: Bade ami huntam sailam manshe tar kita dush faisoin, erdae tare nia tarar mozliso azir ḳorlam.
23.29: Teu ami buzlam, tarar shoriotor kunu fotuar lagi er ufre dush dira, oile zelo harani ba zane marar zuka kunu nalish faisi na.
23.30: Ar ami hunlam, tar birudde dagabazi kora or, teu zoldi kori tare afnar gese faṭai dilam. Tar birudde zera nalish dise, tarare-o ḳoisi, tarar kunu nalish taḳle afnar gese gia hunaita.”
23.31: Sifai oḳole fordan ofisaror hukum mafik Paulusre loia raitor bala Antifatri ṭauno gela.
23.32: Bador din guṛa-ala sifai oḳlor loge Paulusre bidae dia baki sifai oḳol kenṭonmenṭo guria aila.
23.33: Guṛa-ala sifai oḳole siṭi ar Paulusre loia Ḳoisoriat fosia harle deshor fordan hakimor ato shomzai dila.
23.34: Tain i siṭi foṛia Paulusre zikaila, “Tumi kun deshor manush?” Paulus Kilikiar manush ikan hunia tain ḳoila,
23.35: “Tumare zera dusher tara ikano aia harle, ami tumar zobanbondi hunmu.” Bade tain hukum dila, Paulusre nia Raza Herudor baṛir zelo haranir lagi.

24.1: Fas din bade fordan imam Ononioe ḳoyzon Ihudi murobbi ar Tortullo namor eḳzon ukilre loia Ḳoisoriat gela, gia fordan hakimor adaloto Hozrot Paulusor birudde nalish dakil ḳorla.
24.2: Paulusre ania adaloto azir ḳora oilo. Bade ukil Tortulloe ou nalish gaila, “Manonio hakim sab, afnar shashono roia amra bout din taki boṛo shantie asi. Afne afnar aḳol-hekmot dia i zatir bout balai korra.
24.3: Erlagi amra hamesha hoḳol zagat afnar gunogan gai.
24.4: Amra afnar mulloban shomoy nosṭo ḳortam sairam na, meherbani koria hunle, amrar nalishḳan dui-sair ḳotae ḳoilimu.
24.5: Sab, amra deḳsi, ou manushgu boṛo eḳ afod oia azise. He Nasara namor eḳ bidormi dolor ustad. Hamesha ḳali hangama lagae, duniar hoḳol Ihudir maze doladoli lagani-u tar ḳam.
24.6: -7 He amrar Baytul-Mukaddosre-o nafak banaito saisil, erdae amra tare aṭok korsi.
24.8: Ar ou zeta nalish dilam, afne nize tare zera ḳorle-u ita hoḳolta bar oizibo.”
24.9: Ukilor loge oia Ihudi oḳole-o ita hokkolta hasa ḳoia shae dila.
24.10: Teu fordan hakim sabe Paulusre ishara dila, Pauluse ḳoila, “Sab, afne bout boros dori i Ihudi zatir bisar ḳoria aira, iṭa hunia ami kub kushi oia amar zobanbondi diram.
24.11: Afne tallash ḳorle-u zaniliba, oḳono baro din oise na, ami ebadot ḳorar lagi Zeruzalemo geslam.
24.12: Ou zera amar befare nalish dira, tara ḳeu amare Baytul-Mukaddoso kunu manshor loge hangama ḳorat deḳsoin na. Ṭaunor kunuḳano ba kunu mosido-o manshore uskaia deoat amare faisoin na.
24.13: Oḳon tara amar zeta dush deḳaira, itar kunu forman-o tara dita farta nae.
24.14: Oile ami afnar gese shikar ḳorram, era zeḳṭare bidormi dol ḳoira, hou Isa al-Mosir torikae ami amar moy-murobbi oḳlor Allar ebadot ḳori. Tourat Kitabor batail hoḳol hukum-ahkam ar tamam nobi oḳlor kitabre ami ekin ḳori.
24.15: Ar era zelan ekin ḳoroin, ami-o oula Allar ufre ekin ḳori, forezgar ba gunagar hoḳolre-u morar bade hirbar zinda ḳora oibo.
24.16: Erdae ami Allar gese ar manshor gese-o hamesha amar bibeḳ forishkar raḳtam sai.
24.17: Bout boros bade ami Zeruzalemo geslam, kurbani ditam ar amar nizor zatir gorib oḳolre dan-ḳoyrat bilaitam ḳori.
24.18: Te ami fak-saf oia zebla Baytul-Mukaddoso hamailam, ou shomoy tara amare deḳsoin. Amar gese kunu biṛ-o oise na, ba kunu gonḍogul-o oise na.
24.19: Ḳali Asiya deshor ḳoyzon Ihudi hono asla. Amar ufre kunu nalish taḳle hou Ihudi oḳole afnar gese aia nalish dita asil.
24.20: Arnae ono zera aisoin era-u ḳoukka, ami zebla fotua komiṭir samne ubaislam, ou shomoy tara amar kita dush faisla?
24.21: Kunta-u na, ḳali ekkan mat ami zure zure matislam zen, murda oḳol hirbar zinda oia uṭar musla loia aiz afnaintor samne amar bisar ḳora or.”
24.22: Hakim Filikse Hozrot Isar torikar befare kub bala ḳori zanta, erdae tain bisar bond ḳoria ḳoila, “Sifair fordan ofisar Lusias aia harle ami tumrar bisaror foysala ḳormu.”
24.23: Tain sho-sifair subedarre hukum dila, “Paulusre aṭoḳ raḳo, oile tare mayar nozore rakio, tar ḳesh-kuṭume tar kezmot ḳorat aile bada dio na.”
24.24: Ḳoydin bade Filikse tan Ihudi bou Drusillare loge loia aia Paulusre ḳobordi anaila, ar Paulusor muk taki Isa al-Mosir ufre iman anar boyani hunla.
24.25: Pauluse zebla hok fote sola, nizore domaia raḳa, ar Hashoror bisaror ḳota boyan ḳorla, Filikse ita hunia ḍoraigela. Ḍoraia ḳoila, “Tumi oḳon zaogi, shomoy shuzug oile ami tumare ḳobordi anaimu.”
24.26: Tan mone mone asil, Pauluse tanre kisu gush diba, erlagi tain bare bare Paulusre anaia gof ḳorta.
24.27: Dui boros faronir bade Forkio Fistos aia Filiksor godit boila. Filikse Ihudi oḳolre kushi korta ḳori Paulusre zelo toia gelagi.

25.1: I desho aoar tin din bade Fistos Ḳoisoria taki Zeruzalemo gela.
25.2: Ou shomoy boṛo imam ar Ihudi neta oḳole tan gese aia Paulusor befare nalish dila. Tara Fistosor gese kub minot-ḳajji kori koila,
25.3: tain zanu meherbani kori Paulusre Zeruzalemo anain. Tarar motlob asil, Paulusre anar shomoy fotor maze lukaia roia marilita.
25.4: Hakim Fistose tarare ḳoila, “Paulusre to Ḳoisoriat aṭoḳ raḳa oise, ar ami-o kub tagda ḳori hikano zairam.
25.5: Te tumrar maz taki buzdar ḳoyzon amar loge aio, he kunu dush ḳorle er nalish dibae.”
25.6: Fistos tarar loge aṭ-dosh din roia harle Ḳoisoriat gelagi. Gia bador din tain adaloto boia, Paulusre tan samne azir ḳorar hukum dila.
25.7: Zeta Ihudi oḳol Zeruzalem taki aisla, Paulus hino azir oar bade tara tanre sairobae beria ubaia kub dusha-dushi korla, oile itar kunu forman dita farla na.
25.8: Ou Pauluse nizor zobanbondi dila, “Ami to Ihudi oḳlor shoriot, Baytul-Mukaddos, ba Ruman bashsha Ḳoisoror birudde kunu dush ḳorsi na.”
25.9: Oile Fistose Ihudi oḳolre kushi korar kial oae tain Paulusre zikaila, “Ou mamlar bisar ami Zeruzalemo ḳortam sairam, tumi hikano zaite razi aso ni?”
25.10: Pauluse zuaf dila, “Ami to Ruman adalotor samne azir oisi, ar ou adaloto-u amar bisar oaḳan zorur. Afne nize-o bala ḳori zanoin, ami Ihudi oḳlor loge kunu oinnae ḳorsi na.
25.11: Ta-o amar kunu ḳosur oile, moutor shaza faoar zuka kunu dush faile, ami morte razi asi. Oile era amar birudde zeta dush dira, ita zudi hasa na oy, te amare tarar ato saṛi deoar eḳtiar ḳeuror nai. Erdae ami bashsha Ḳoisoror gese afil ḳorram.”
25.12: Ikan hunia Fistose tan uzir-naziror loge foramish ḳori koila, “Tumi zebla bashshar gese afil ḳorlae, te bashshar gese-u zaibae.” Raza Agrippor gese Hozrot Paulusor zobanbondi
25.13: Ḳoydin bade Ihudi oḳlor raza Agrippo ar tan boin rani Bornikie, noya hakim Fistosre salam zananir lagi Ḳoisoriat aila.
25.14: Tara ikano ḳoydin roiba gotike, Fistose Paulusor mamlar ḳota razare zanaila. Tain ḳoila, “Filikse eḳzon manshore zelo toia gesoin.
25.15: Ami zebla Zeruzalemo geslam, ou shomoy honor boṛo imam ar Ihudi murobbi oḳole ou beṭar birudde nalish dia tar shaza saisoin.
25.16: Ami tarare ḳoislam, zar birudde nalish deoa oy, ar zera i nalish dein, hi badi-bibadir mukamuki zobanbondi ar zera na oile, ashamire kunu shaza deoar eḳtiar Ruman aino nai.
25.17: Teu tara hoḳol ono aia harle, ami bador din-u adaloto boia hou ashamire samne anar hukum dilam.
25.18: Zera tar birudde nalish disla tarar zobanbondi hunlam, oile ami zela onuman ḳorslam, ila kunu nalish tara disoin na.
25.19: Ḳali tarar nizor dormor ḳota, ar Isa namor kunu eḳzon mora manshor ḳota, Pauluse enre zinda ḳoia dabi korer, ota loia tara adaloto nalish dise.
25.20: Ar ita kila tallash ḳortam, ikan malum na oae ami tare zikailam, he Zeruzalemo gia i mamlar foysala ḳorte razi ase ni.
25.21: He razi na oia, afil ḳoria bashshar rayor lagi bar saoae, ami tare bashsha Ḳoisoror gese faṭanir ag forzonto aṭoḳ raḳar hukum disi.”
25.22: Ou raza Agrippe Fistosre ḳoila, “Ami nize tar zobanbondi huntam sai.” Fistose zuaf dila, “Te ḳail hunbane.”
25.23: Bador din raza Agrippo ar rani Borniki bout dumdam ḳori aila, tain sifair fordan ofisar oḳol, ṭaunor goinno-mainno manshore loia adaloto hamaila. Fistose hukum dia Paulusre-o ono anaila.
25.24: Bade Fistose ḳoila, “Mohan raza Agrippo, ar adaloto azir goinno-mainno sab oḳol, afnara hoḳole ou besaṛare deḳra. Hoḳol Ihudie milia Zeruzalem ar Ḳoisoriat amar gese tar bisar saia misil dia ḳoisoin, tare ḳotom ḳoro.
25.25: Oile ami deḳlam, moutor shaza deoar zuka kunu dush tar nai. Ta-o he nize bashshar gese afil ḳorae, ami tare tan gese faṭanir kial ḳorsi.
25.26: Oile mohan bashshar gese leḳtam, ila kunu dush fairam na gotike, ami shroddeo raza Agrippo ar afnara hoḳlor samne tare azir ḳorsi. Afnara zera ḳorle leḳar zuka kunta faimu ḳori mono ḳorram.
25.27: Ḳaron ami mono ḳori, kunu bondire salan deoar bala tar dush oḳol zananikan zorur.”

26.1: Ikan hunia raza Agrippe Paulusre ḳoila, “Tumar zobanbondi koar lagi onumoti dilam.” Teu Pauluse at zuṛ ḳoria nizor zobanbondi koila,
26.2: “Manonio raza namdar, Ihudi oḳole amar birudde zeta nalish disoin, ita befare aiz afnar gese amar zobanbondi hunanir shuzug faia, ami nizore baiggoman mono ḳorram.
26.3: Ḳas ḳori, Ihudi oḳlor hoḳol laḳan sal-cholon ar tarar fitna oḳol afnar zana ase. Erdae aroz ḳorram, meherbani kori afne amar matḳanain hunba.
26.4: “Huruman tone-u nizor elaḳat amar sal-cholon kila asil, bade Zeruzalemo aia kilaḳan solchi, ita to tamam Ihudi oḳole zanoin.
26.5: Tara to bout din dori amare sinoin gotike, tara kial ḳorle i shakki dita farba, amrar dormor maze Forishi namor ze moulobadi dol ase, ami ou Forishi torikae zindegi kaṭaitam.
26.6: Allae amrar moy-murobbi oḳlor gese zeta oada ḳorsila, hou oadae ami borosha ḳori, erlagi aiz amar bisar or.
26.7: Amrar baro ḳandanor manshe rait-din dile-zane ebadoti koria, hou oadar fol deḳar ashat asoin. Raza namdar, hou ashar lagi-u Ihudi oḳole amare dushira.
26.8: Allae murdare zinda ḳoria tuloin, ikan ḳene afnara bishash ḳorta faroin na?
26.9: “Ami to mono ḳortam, Nasarotor Isa namor birudde, hoḳol nomunar ḳam ḳora amar lagi forz.
26.10: Ar Zeruzalemo ami ola ḳorsi-o. Boṛo imam oḳlor onumoti loia Isar ummot oḳolre ami zelo haraitam. Tarare zane marar ḳalo ami tarar birudde buṭ ditam.
26.11: Ami hoḳol mosidainto gia bare bare tarare shaza ditam. Isar torika taki tarare firaia, Isar name lannot dita ḳori tarar ufre zur-zulum ḳortam. Erar ufre amar oto gusa asil zen, erare zulum ḳorar lagi ami bara deshor ṭauno-o zaitam.
26.12: “Oula eḳbar boṛo imam oḳlor ges taki kemota ar hukumzari loia ami Damesko zaoat aslam.
26.13: Ar raza namdar, ou shomoy beil duifor oigese. Aḳta-u deḳlam, amar ar amar logor hoḳlor sairobae shuruz taki aro beshi forala eḳ rushni, asman tone zoli uṭlo.
26.14: Ou amra hoḳol maṭit foṛi gelam ar ami hunlam, Ibrani bashae ḳeu amare ḳoira, Shoul, Shoul, tumi kene amar ufre zulum ḳorrae? Suḳa faizono lat maria nizor ḳeti korrae na ni?
26.15: Teu ami zikailam, munib, afne ḳe? Munibe zuaf dila, ami Isa, zenre tumi zulum ḳorrae.
26.16: Oḳon uṭo, faot bordi ubao. Tumi oḳon zeta deḳso ar zeta tumare deḳaimu, ita hoḳoltar shakki ar kezmotgar bananir kiale, ami nize tumare deḳa dilam.
26.17: Ami tumare o-Ihudi oḳlor gese faṭaiar, tarar ar tumar nizor zatir at taki ami tumare basaimu.
26.18: Tumi tarar souk kulia dibae, tara zanu andair taki nuror bae, Shoytanor doḳol taki Allar bae firia ain, amar ufre iman ania gunar mafi faia, forezgar bonda oḳlor maze tara-o dakil oin.
26.19: “Manonio raza namdar, behesti i doroshonre ami falaitam farlam na.
26.20: Erdae foyla Dameskor manshor gese, bade Zeruzalemo, Ehudia zilar hoḳol zagat ar o-Ihudi oḳlor gese-o toblig korlam. Tarare ḳoilam, touba ḳoria Allar bae firo, ar ou laḳan amol ḳoro, zeta dekia forman mile tumra hasaror touba ḳorso.
26.21: Ou ḳarone Ihudi oḳole Baytul-Mukaddoso doria amare marilita saisoin.
26.22: Oile Allar shaijjoe ami oḳon forzonto ṭikia asi, ar huru-boṛo hoḳlor samne ubaia shakki-o diram. Hozrot Musae ar tamam nobi oḳole zeta goṭibo ḳori bataia gesoin, itar bara ami kunta-u ḳoiram na.
26.23: Era ḳoisoin, al-Mosie toklif shoijjo ḳorba, tain-u foyla murda taki zinda oia uṭia hari tan nizor zati, ar o-Ihudi oḳlor gese-o nuror torikar ḳota toblig korba.”
26.24: Pauluse zebla ou laḳan zobanbondi dira, aḳta-u Fistose tanre zure damki mari koila, “Paulus, tumi to fagol oigeso. Tumi bout leḳa-foṛa ḳorso, ou leḳa-foṛae tumare fagol banailise.”
26.25: Pauluse zuaf dila, “Ji na, hakim sab, ami fagol nae. Ami to hok ar zuktir mat matram.
26.26: Raza namdare to ita hokkolta-u zanoin, ar ami himmot ḳoria tan samne kula-mela matiram. Ami furafur zani, ita hokkolta-u raza namdaror malum ase, ita to kunu andarir maze lukaia goṭse na.
26.27: “Te manonio raza namdar, afne kita nobi oḳolre ekin ḳoroin ni? Ami to zani, afne-o ḳoroin.”
26.28: Ou Agrippe ḳoila, “Tumi kita oto zoldi amare-o al-Mosir torikat nitaegi sairae ni?”
26.29: Pauluse ḳoila, “Ami Allar gese ou dua ḳorram, zoldi ouk ba derie ouk, ḳali afne nae, zoto manshe amar aizkur i zobanbondi hunra, era hokkol-u amar laḳan bonizaukka. Ḳali ou shikol bad dia.”
26.30: Teu raza, deshor fordan hakim, rani Borniki ar tarar loge adalotor hoḳol manush ubai gela.
26.31: Bade tara baronir fote eḳe-oinne ḳoila, “I besaṛae to moutor shaza ba zel ḳaṭar zuka kunta-u ḳorse na.”
26.32: Raza Agrippe Fistosre ḳoila, “He zudi bashshar gese afil na ḳorto, te tare oḳon ḳalas deoa gelo one.”

27.1: Hakimor foysala mafik zazo ḳoria amrare Itali desho faṭanir shomoy aile, Paulus ar aro ḳoyzon ḳoydire Zulio namor eḳzon sho-sifair subedaror ato shomzai dila. Zulio asla bashsha Ḳoisoror afon sifai dolor eḳzon subedar.
27.2: Bade amra Adramuttio gaṭor oula eḳ zazo oia roana dilam, zeḳan Asiya deshor bout zaz gaṭo zaoar lagi zuit ḳora oise. Ar Makidonia deshor Tisholoniki ṭaunor Aristakus amrar loge asla.
27.3: Bador din amrar zaz gia Sidono biṛlo. Subedar Zulioe Paulusor loge kub bala bebohar ḳorla. Tain tan dust oḳlor gese gia, nizor zoruri goroz kulanir izazot dila.
27.4: Bade hi zaga taki hirbar zaz saṛlo, ar amrar ulṭamuka batash deoae, amra Saipras difor zebae batash asil na hobaedi gelam.
27.5: Gia Kilikia ar Pamfuliar samnor shagor faroia Lukia deshor Mura ṭauno aia azilam.
27.6: Subedare hikano Itali desho zaora, Alekzandriar ekkan zaz faia, hou zazo ḳori amrare loia roana dila.
27.7: Amrar zazḳan kub aste aste solia bout din bade ḳoshṭo ḳori Klid ṭaunor ḳandat aia azilo, oile batashor lagi amra ar shohoze aguaitam farlam na. Teu amra ḳom batashedi Salmunar ḳandabae gia Kriti difor aoṛedi zaoat laglam.
27.8: Ar doriar faror ḳandabae ḳoshṭo ḳoria zaite zaite, ‘Shundor Longorḳana’ namor eḳ huru zaz gaṭo ailam, er ḳandat asil Lasea ṭaun.
27.9: Ou laḳan bout din guzori gelo, ruzar idor din shesh oia tuṛa tuṛa shit aise. I shomoy zaze sofor ḳora kub bifod. Teu Pauluse zazor manshore foramish dila.
27.10: Tain ḳoila, “Sab oḳol, ami deḳram, i soforo amrar bout mosibot ar ḳeti oibo. Ita ḳali zaz ba mal-samanar nae, amrar zanor-o ḳeti oibo.”
27.11: Oile subedare Paulusor ḳota na mania, zazor malik ar kefṭinor ḳota hunla.
27.12: Ar i longorḳanat shitor dino roite shubida oito nae gotike, beshir bag manshe hin taki zaoar lagi foramish dila. Tara saila kunumonte Finiks gaṭo fosia shitor din ḳaṭaita. I gaṭ asil Kriti difo, er uttor-fochchim ar dokkin-fochchim dik kula asil. Doriar tufane bedisha zaz
27.13: Bade zebla aste aste douknor batash salu oilo, ou tara mono ḳorla, tara zela asha ḳorsla ola-u oise. Erdae tara zazor longor kulia Kriti difor galabae roana dilo.
27.14: Oile tuṛa bade-u hi faro taki ian-kuni namor kub bezuita eḳ tufan ailo.
27.15: Amrar zaz tufanor maze foṛlo, tufanor ṭela mukabila ḳortam na faria, zazre batashor tale tale baṭiol dilam.
27.16: Bade Kouda namor eḳ huru difor aoṛedi gia, zazor logor barki naoḳanre amra bout ḳoshṭo ḳori banga taki basailam.
27.17: Manshe naore ṭania nia zazor ufre tulla, ar zazor toḳtainre doṛi dia doṛo ḳori bandila, zate tufane na bange. Bade Surti namor shagoror soro zaz lagizibar ḍore, fal lamaia zazre emne batash baṭiole saṛi dilam.
27.18: Tufane zazre omon laḳan goṛagoṛi shuru ḳorlo, erdae tara bador din zazor mal-samana fanit falai dila.
27.19: Tin dinor din tara nizor ate zazor shaz-shoronjam-o fanit falai dila.
27.20: Bout din taki san-shuruz kun zinish ita na deḳae, ar tufanor zur kub beshi oae, amra zane basar asha saṛi dilam.
27.21: Zazor manush bout din dori ufash roae Pauluse ubaia tarare ḳoila, “O baisab oḳol, amar ḳota hunia Kriti dif taki zazḳanre na saṛle, i mosibot ar ḳeti taki afnara basla one.
27.22: Oile oḳon ami afnarare ou foramish diram, afnara monor maze bol raḳoukka, amra ḳeu zane mortam nae, ḳali zazḳan binash oizibo.
27.23: Ami ze Allar ebadot-bondegi kori, hou Allar eḳ firistae goto rait amar ḳandat ubaia ḳoisoin,
27.24: Paulus, ḍoraio na, bashsha Ḳoisoror samne tumar ubani lagbo. Ar i zazo ḳori zera tumar loge oia zaira, Allae tumar ḳatire meherbani koria era hokkolor zan basaisoin.
27.25: Te sab oḳol, afnara monor maze bol raḳoukka. Ami ekin ḳori, Allae amare zela ḳoisoin, ola-u oibo.
27.26: Oile amra kunu difor ufre gia foṛmu.” Zaz buṛi gelo
27.27: Ou laḳan ḳori amra Adria shagoror ufredi zaoat roilam, bade tufanor souddo dinor din ada raitkur bala naia oḳole andaz ḳorla, tara faror ḳandat aisoin.
27.28: Tara fani mafia deḳla ḳali ashi at goin ase, tuṛa bade hirbar mafia deḳla, shaiṭ at ase.
27.29: Erdae soror fattoror maze gia zaz dakka lagar ḍore, tara zazor ḳoredi sairgesa longor falaia, shuruzor for deḳar lagi dua ḳorat boila.
27.30: Naia oḳole zaz taki bagia zaoar motlob ḳori, samnor goloir tuṛa age longor falanir ḳota ḳoia, zazor barki naore doriat lamaila.
27.31: Teu Pauluse subedarre ar sifai oḳolre ḳoila, “Naia oḳol zaz taki bagi gele afnara hoḳol mara zaiba.”
27.32: Ikan hunia sifai oḳole naor doṛi kaṭi dila, teu nao fanit bashia gelogi.
27.33: Fotabala Pauluse hoḳolre minot ḳorla kunta ḳaoar lagi, tain ḳoila, “Aiz souddo din dori kita oibo na oibo ou sintae afnara kunta ḳaisoin na.
27.34: Ami afnarare minot ḳorram, kunta ḳaukka. Zan basaite oile to afnara ḳaite oibo. Deḳbane, afnaintor matar eḳsa sulor-o ḳeti oito nae.”
27.35: Ikan ḳoia hari Pauluse tara hoḳlor samne ruṭi ania Allar shukria zanaia, ruṭi siṛia ḳaoat lagla.
27.36: Teu hoḳole monor maze bol faia ḳani kaila.
27.37: I zazor maze amra hoḳole milia dui-sho siottoir zon aslam.
27.38: Hoḳole feṭ boria ḳaoar bade zazor bar ḳomanir lagi hokkol gom doriat falai dila.
27.39: Bian oia harle tara sinla na, i zaga ashole kun zaga. Oile oula eḳ baḳ deḳa gelo, i baḳor sor balue bora. Dekia tara foramish ḳorla, farle zazre nia hou soro tulilita.
27.40: Teu tara longorain ḳaṭia doriat falai dila, ar ḳanḍarir boiṭar doṛin-o ḳaṭi dila. Bade batash baṭiole samnor fal ṭangaia hou balur soror muka gelam.
27.41: Oile zaz tole lukail kuntat aṭki gelo. Ar samon gala aṭki zaoae, ḳoror goloit ḍeur baṛi lagia banga dorlo.
27.42: Teu sifai oḳole foramish ḳorla bondi oḳolre marilita, arnae ḳeu ḳeu hatraia bagizito fare.
27.43: Oile sho-sifair subedare Paulusre basanir kiale sifai oḳlor i foramish manla na. Tain hukum dila, zera hatar zane, tara age zaz taki falaia foṛia huknat uṭouk.
27.44: Ar hatar na zanra oḳole zazor toḳta ba aro kuntat doria huknat farouk. Ou laḳan hoḳole huknat uṭia zan basaila.

28.1: Amra hefazote faro uṭia harle zanlam, i difor nam oilo Malṭa.
28.2: Hinor manshe amrar loge kub bala-manshi korla, meg ar shit asil ḳori tara aguin zalaia amrare ḍakia nia ḳatir-zoton ḳorla.
28.3: Ermaze Pauluse eḳ aṭa hukna laḳṛi tukaia dola ḳori ania agunir maze deoar bade, agunir teze ek kalnag bar oia hari Paulusor ato ḳamoṛ mari dorlo.
28.4: Ḳalnage Paulusor ato ḳamoṛdi loṭki roise dekia, hinor manshe mata-mati lagaila, “I manushgu nisoy kunu kuni, doriar at taki he basigele-o niae-devtae tare baste dila na.”
28.5: Oile Pauluse at zaṛa dia ḳalnagre aguino falai dila, ar tan kunu ḳeti oilo na.
28.6: Manshe mone mone bar saoat asil, Paulusor gotor fulizibo, ba tain aḳta-u maṭit foṛia moriziba. Bout shomoy bar saia harle tan kunu bifod oise na dekia, tarar mot bodlaia ḳoila, “Ein to kunu devta.”
28.7: I zagar ḳandat hou difor Fublio namor ek kandani manshor zomidari asil. Tain amrare tan baṛit daot dila ar tindin dori amrare kub ḳatir-zoton ḳorla.
28.8: Ou shomoy Fublior baf taf ar ḳamṛi bemare bisnat falail asla. Pauluse bitre hamaia tan ḳandat boia dua ḳorla, tan gotro atai dia bemar shifa ḳorla.
28.9: Ita dekia hari hi difor zoto bemari asla, tara-o aia bala oila.
28.10: Tara amrare bout laḳan ijjot ḳorla, bidae bala zaz saṛar age amrar dorḳari hoḳol siz zugaia zazo ania boria dila. Razdani Rum ṭauno Hozrot Paulus
28.11: Tin mash bade amra Alekzandriar eḳ zazo ḳori roana dilam. I zazḳan ou difo roia shitor din ḳaṭaisil, er samnor goloi kudia Zuṛ devtar murti lagail asil.
28.12: Bade amra Surakusho aia tin din roilam.
28.13: Hikan taki roana dia guri guri Italir Riziot ailam. Bador din douknor batash saṛlo, teu dusra din amra Futioli zaz gaṭo ailam.
28.14: Hino ḳoyzon muminor loge mulaḳat oilo, tara minot-ḳajji korae tarar loge eḳ hafta roilam. Ota ḳori kori amra Rum ṭauno aia azilam.
28.15: Rumor mumin oḳole amra aoar ḳobor hunsla, tara amrar loge mulaḳat ḳorta ḳori kunu kunu zone Appior bazar, ḳeu ḳeu Tin-Shoraiḳanar gau forzonto aguai aila. Erare dekia Pauluse Allar shukria adae ḳorla, ar dilor maze bout bol faila.
28.16: Amra Rumo aoar bade Pauluse tan nizor fosond mafik roibar onumoti faila. Ḳali eḳzon sifaie tane fara dito. Bondi halote Rum ṭauno toblig
28.17: Tindin bade Pauluse Ihudi oḳlor boṛo boṛo murobbire dola ḳoria ekḳano ḳoraila. Tara dola oia harle tain ḳoila, “O baisab oḳol, zudio ami nizor zator ba moy-murobbir batail niom-ḳanunor ulṭa kunta-u ḳorsi na, ta-o Zeruzalem taki amare aṭok koria, Ruman oḳlor ato shomzail oise.
28.18: Ruman oḳole amare zera ḳoria moutor shaza deoar zuka kunu dush na faoae, amare ḳalas dilaita saisla.
28.19: Oile Ihudi oḳole bada deoae nirufae oia ami bashshar gese afil ḳorsi. Ta-o ami amar nizor zator ufre kunu laḳan dush ditam saisi na.
28.20: Te sab oḳol, tamam Boni Israilor dilor maze ze asha ase, hou ashar lagi-u amare i shikol findail oise, erlagi-u ami afnaintor loge mulaḳat ar batchit ḳortam sairam.”
28.21: Tara ḳoila, “Amra to afnar befare Ehudia taki kunu siṭi faisi na. Ar zeta Ihudi baiain hon taki aisoin, tara-o afnar name kunu nalish disoin na, ba bura kunta ḳoisoin-o na.
28.22: Oile amra afnar muk taki motamot huntam sairam. Ḳaron amra zani, hoḳol zagar manshe-u i torikar bifokke matoin.”
28.23: Paulusor loge hirbar mulaḳat ḳorar lagi eḳ tarik ṭik korla. Hou din tarar loge aro bout manush Paulusor goro aila. Pauluse fozor taki hainja forzonto haradin Allar bashshair ḳota tarar gese bangia boyan ḳorla. Hozrot Musar Tourat Kitab ar nobi oḳlor kitabor ayat deḳaia, Isar befare tarar dilo ekin zonmaita saila.
28.24: Tan boyan hunia kunu kunu zone iman anla, ar kunu kunu zone ita ekin ḳorla na.
28.25: Boyan hunar bade tarar maze motor omil oigelo, tara hikan taki bidae oita saila. Zaoar age Pauluse tarare ḳali ou nosiotḳan ḳorla, “Pak Ruhe Hozrot Ishaya nobir zoriae afnaintor baf-dada oḳolre ou ḳotaḳan ṭik-u ḳoisla,
28.26: Ou manush oḳlor ḳasat gia ḳo, tumra ḳane hunle-o kunta buztae nae, souke deḳle-o kunta sintae nae.
28.27: Ḳaron ita manshor dil oshaṛ oigese, tarar ḳano tala lagigese, tara zarzir souk muzi boiroise. Zate souke na deḳe, ḳane na hune, dil dia na buze, kizanu tara touba ḳoria, amar bae firizain, ar ami tarar shifa ḳorilai.
28.28: -29 Erlagi afnara-o zania raḳoukka, oḳon taki Allai nazator kush-ḳobri o-Ihudi oḳlor gese zanail oibo, tara ita kush oia hunba.”
28.30: Hozrot Paulus fura dui boros dori tan nizor baṛa ḳora bashat roila. Ar zoto manush tan gese aita tarare kobul ḳoria,
28.31: furafur himmot ḳori Allar bashshair ḳota toblig korta. Ar Malik Isa al-Mosir befare bina badae kula-mela talim dita.

1.1: Ami Paulus to Hozrot Isa al-Mosir gulam. Ruman bashshair razdani Rum ṭaunor mumin oḳlor gese ou sohifaḳan leḳram. Alla Pake amare fosond ḳoria anchoin al-Mosir sahabi oar lagi ar tan batail kush-ḳobri toblig korar lagi.
1.2: Allae tan nobi oḳlor mazdi Pak Kitabor maze ou kush-ḳobrir ḳota age-u oada ḳorsoin.
1.3: -4 Ou kush-ḳobri oilo tan ḳas mayar zon Isa al-Mosir befare. Tain-u amrar malik. Roḳto-mangshor silsilae tain oila Hozrot Daud nobir aolad, ar Allai Pak Ruhur kudrotie murda taki zinda oia Ibnulla hishabe zair oisoin.
1.5: Tan nam uzila ḳorar lagi, tan mazdi-u amra Allar niamot ar sahabi fod faisi, zate hoḳol zatir manshe iman ania Allar baiddo oia sole.
1.6: Ou manshor maze tumra-o aso. Allae to tumrare daot ḳoria anchoin, Isa al-Mosir afon zon oar lagi.
1.7: Te ou Rum ṭauno Allar zoto mayar bonda oḳol asoin, Allae tan pak bonda oar lagi zerare daot ḳoria anchoin, tumra hoḳlor gese ami ou siṭikan leḳram. Amrar gaibi baf Alla Pak ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosie tumrare rohomot ar shanti dan ḳoroukka.
1.8: Ami foyla-u ḳoiram, tumrar mozbut imanor ḳota asta duniair maze roṭigese ḳori, ami Isa al-Mosir name amar Allar shukria adae ḳorram.
1.9: Allar ḳas mayar zon Ibnullar befare kush-ḳobri toblig koria, ami dile-zane Allar ebadot ḳorram. Eḳ Alla-u shakki asoin, ami forteḳ bar munazator shomoy tumrar ḳota iad ḳori.
1.10: Ami hamesha ou ḳota magiram, otodin bade oile-o Allar morzie zekunu monte ami zanu tumrar gese aitam fari.
1.11: Ami tumrar loge deḳa ḳortam sairam, zate ruhani kunu niamot dia tumrare boloban ḳortam fari.
1.12: Mani, amar iman dekia tumra hoḳole ar tumrar iman dekia ami nize-o utshaho fai.
1.13: O baiain huno, ami bout bar tumrar gese aitam saisi, oile bar bar bada aise. Nanan zagat gia bin zatir gese toblig koria zela fol faisi, tumrar gese-o ola fol deḳar ashae aitam sairam.
1.14: Bodro Iunani zati ba obodro borbor zati, shikkito ba oshikkito, hoḳlor lagi-u to amar eḳ homan dae-bar ase.
1.15: Erlagi tumra zera Rum ṭauno boshot ḳorrae, ami amar shaiddo mafik tumrar gese-o kush-ḳobri toblig korar lagi kiali.
1.16: Ḳaron Hozrot Isa al-Mosir befare kush-ḳobri toblig korte ami kunu shorom mono ḳori na, ou kush-ḳobri hunia zera iman ane, tarar zan basanir lagi iṭa oilo Allai bol. Foyla Boni Israilor lagi zera eḳ Alla manoin, bade be-din bin zati oḳlor lagi.
1.17: Ou kush-ḳobrir maze-u to batail oise, Allae kila manshore be-ḳosur ḳalas hishabe kobul ḳoroin. Ḳali imanor mazdi-u manshore aual taki aḳer forzonto be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳora oy. Zela kitabo leḳa ase, “Imanor bole-u be-ḳosur ḳalas oa zonor zan basibo.” Hoḳol manush-u naforman
1.18: Manshe nizor naformani dia Allai hokre lukaia raḳe. Tarar naformani ar Allar bae ḍor-ḳof na taḳae asman taki tarar ufre gozob nazil oy.
1.19: Allar befare zotoḳan buzar takkot ase ita manshor gese forishkar, Allae nize-u to ita zair ḳorsoin.
1.20: Tan zeta gunagun manshor a-deḳa, mani tan siroḳalin ḳemota ar Allai shobab, ita dunia foyda oar ag taki-u forishkar fuṭia uṭse. Tan foyda ḳora zinish deḳle-u manshe ita buzto fare. Erlagi-u tanre sini na ḳoia kunu manshe bana deḳanir ufae nai.
1.21: Allar befare otota zanar bade-o manshe tanre Alla babia tan ebadot-bondegi ar shukur-guzari na ḳorae, tarar bisar-bibeḳ oshar oigese ar be-aḳol mon andair oigese.
1.22: Zudio tara nizore aḳoldar mono ḳoroin, ashole tara be-aḳol.
1.23: Tara siroḳalin zinda Allar ebadot bad dia ostayi manush, foshu-faki, ar buke solra zandaror murti banaia otar puja ḳorse, Allar faona gourob-mohima otare dise.
1.24: Erlagi Alla Pake-o tarar dilor bod ḳaish mafik, tarare noforoti kamor ato saṛi disoin, otar dae tara eḳe-oinnor loge bodmaishi-beijjoti korer.
1.25: Tara Allar hokre bad dia misare fosond ḳorse. Foyda ḳorra Allare bad dia, tan foyda ḳora zinishor puja ḳorse. Oile zuge zuge siroḳal hoḳol tarif eḳmatro foyda ḳorra Allar-u. Amin.
1.26: Manshe olaḳan noforoti kam ḳorer dekia, Allae-o tarare ou bod ḳaishor ato shofi disoin. Otar beṭinte-o zamair loge mila-misha bad dia oinno beṭintor loge ḳobisi kam ḳorse.
1.27: Oula beṭainte-o beṭintor loge mila-misha bad dia oinno beṭar loge mila-mishar lagi fagol oigese, beṭainte beṭaintor loge ḳobisi kam ḳorse. Erlagi tara forteḳor zindegit zarzir bod ḳamor shaza faira.
1.28: Manshe tar dil taki Alla Pakre maner na dekia, Allae-o tarare ola bod ḳaishor ḳobisi dilor ato saṛi disoin, erlagi tara ota ḳorat roy.
1.29: Tara hoḳol nomunar naformani, bod ḳam, lub-lalos, ingsha-ninda, kun-ḳarafi, maramari, sol-soturi ar ḳana-ḳani korar lagi ustad.
1.30: Tara manshor gibot gae, ar Allare ginnae. Tara bod-mizazi, ohonkari, boṛai-beṭagiri ar noya noya naformanir dandae taḳe. Tara ma-bafor-o obaiddo.
1.31: Neki-bodi buzar aḳol nai, oada ḳelafḳari, fashan, itar dilo kunu doya-maya nai.
1.32: Tara to Allar i bisaror ḳota bala ḳori-u zane, zera ilaḳan ḳam ḳore, tarar shaza oibo mout. Ikan zania-o, tara ḳali nize ita ḳore na, baki zera ila ḳam ḳore, tarar fokke-o shae dey.

2.1: Erlagi-u ḳoiram, O manush zati, tumi to oinno zonre dushi shaibosto ḳorrae, ita bisar tumi hiklae kila? Tumar zuaf dibar kunu fot ase ni? Ḳaron tumi nize ze oforad ḳorrae, ou eḳoi oforade tumi aroḳzonre dushi koirae. Te i dush tumar ufre-o foṛer na ni?
2.2: Amra to zani, zera ilaḳan oforad ḳore, Allae hok insaf mafik tarar faona shaza diba.
2.3: O manush zati, ze ḳam tumi nize-o ḳoro, ou eḳoi kamor lagi tumi aroḳzonre dushi shaibosto ḳoro, te ḳemne buzlae, tumi Allar shaza taki rehai failibae?
2.4: Tumi to Alla Pakor oshesh meherbani, tan doirjo-shokti ar soborgarire elami korrae. Tan meherbanie tumare ḳali touba ḳorar fote ṭania ney, ikan fauriliso ni?
2.5: Oile tumar fashan dil ar touba na ḳorar monobabor lagi, tumar ufre Allar gozob dola ḳori toirae, Allae zedin gozob zair ḳorba, hok bisar ḳorba, hou dinor lagi shaza dola ḳorrae.
2.6: Tain forteḳ manshore zarzir ḳamor fol diba.
2.7: Zera doijjo doria nek kamor mazdi Allai tarif, ijjot, ar koyhin zindegi tallash ḳore, Allae tarare-u aḳeri zindegi dan ḳorba.
2.8: Oile zera nizor ḳaishor boshe sole, Allai hokor birudde roy, naformanir fokke taḳe, tarar ufre Allai duḳ-mosibot, gozob ar lannot aibo.
2.9: Forteḳ naformanor ufre ita aibo, foyla Boni Israilor ufre, bade bin zatir ufre.
2.10: Oile zera nek kam ḳore, tara forteḳe tarif, ijjot ar shanti faibo. Foyla Boni Israile, bade bin zatie faiba.
2.11: Allar dorbaro to fokkofatir kunu ḳarbar nai, hoḳol-u homan.
2.12: Shoriotor baire roia zeta manshe guna ḳorse, tara binash-o oiba shoriot saṛa, ar shoriotor bitre roia zera guna ḳore, ou shoriot mafik-u tarar bisar oibo.
2.13: Zeta manshe shoriotor boyan ḳali hune, Allar nozoro to tara be-ḳosur nae, oile zera shoriot amol ḳore, tara-u ḳali be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno oiba.
2.14: Bin zati oḳole Allai kunu shoriot na faile-o, tara zebla emne-u shoriot mafik soloin, ou shomoy tarar bibeḳ-u shoriot bonizae.
2.15: Ete deḳa zae, shoriot mafik zeta ḳora zorur, ita tarar dilor bibeḳor maze leḳa ase. Tarar bibeḳe tarar ḳamor shakki dey, kunu kunu shomoy tarar bibeḳe tarare dushi shaibosto ḳore, ar kunu kunu shomoy tarar fokke-o shae dey.
2.16: Te Allae zedin Isa al-Mosir mazdi hoḳol manshor lukail amolor bisar ḳorba, hou din-u ita zair oibo. Ar ami oḳon ze kush-ḳobri toblig koriar, ou mafik-u bisar oibo. Boni Israil ar shoriot
2.17: Tumi zebla nizor forisoy dirae Boni Israil ḳoia, tumi Hozrot Musar shoriotor ufre borosha ḳorrae ar Allar mayar bonda ḳoia boṛai deḳairae.
2.18: Te Allae tumar ges taki kita asha ḳoroin, tumi kita ḳortae, ikan to tumi zano-u, shoriot taki tumi itar talim faiso.
2.19: Tumi mone mone ḳoirae, ami to andare fot deḳaiar, andarit zeta asoin, itar gese ami nuror rushni.
2.20: Be-aḳolre hedayot ḳoriar, huruttainre talim diar. Tumi buzrae, shoriotor bitre hok ar aḳol-buddi ase.
2.21: Ita kub bala ḳota, oile tumi zebla oinno manshore hikairae, te nize-o ita hiko na ḳene? Tumi manshore ḳoirae, suri korio na, oile tumi nize-u suri korrae na ni?
2.22: Manshore ḳoirae, zina ḳorio na, oile tumi nize kunu zina ḳorrae na ni? Tumi to deb-debir murtire ginnairae, hirbar nize-u murtir mondirre luṭ-toraz ḳorrae na ni?
2.23: Ze shoriot loia tumi boṛai korrae, i shoriotor ulṭa solia tumi nize-u Allare oshomman ḳorrae na ni?
2.24: Allar kalamo ase, “Tumrar sal-cholon dekia bin zati oḳole Allar namre beijjot ḳorer.”
2.25: Huno, tumi zudi shoriot mania solo, te mosolmani kam ḳoranir dam ase, ar shoriot mafik na solle, mosolmani kam ḳoraile-o zeta, na ḳoraile-o ota. Allar nozoro tumi mosolmani na ḳorail be-dinor laḳan.
2.26: Oḳon mosolmani na ḳoraia-o zudi keu shoriot mania sole, te Allae tare mosolmani korail ḳoia shomzita nae ni?
2.27: Ar mosolmani na ḳorail manshe zebla shoriot mania sole, te likito shoriot faia ar mosolmani koraia-o zudi tumi er ulṭa solo, taile hou mosolmani na ḳorail beṭae tumare dushito nae ni?
2.28: Bishoyṭa buzrae ni? Ḳali name Boni Israil oile-u ḳeu asol Boni Israil nae. Shorilor ongo ḳaṭia mosolmani koraile-o to, asol mosolmani oy na.
2.29: Oile mon taki zera Boni Israil, tara-u asol Boni Israil. Ita kunu likito ain-ḳanunor befar nae, dilor bitoror ruhani befar. Dilor mosolmani-u oilo asol mosolmani. Zogotor manshe erar tarif na ḳorle-o, Allae tarif ḳoroin.

3.1: Te ilaḳan befar oile, Boni Israil oae baṛti kunu lab ase ni? Mosolmani kam ḳoranit kunu fayda ase ni?
3.2: Nichchoy ase. Bout nomunar fayda ase. Foyla fayda: Alla Pake tan hokkol kalam nazil ḳorsoin Boni Israilor gese.
3.3: Oboshsho tarar kunu kunu zone beimani korse, ete kita oise? Tara beimani korle-o Alla Pake kunu tarar laḳan beimani korba ni?
3.4: Nauzubilla! Hoḳol manshe misa matle-o Alla to hamesha hok taḳoin. Fobitro Zobur Shorifo ase: Erbade-o forman milbo tumar zoban shoṭik, tumar fokke ray zaibo.
3.5: Duniabi manshe ḳoito fare, amrar na-hok kame zebla aro forishkar buza zae Alla Pak koto hok, te amrar na-hoke tan gourob oar bade-o tain amrare shaza dile ita tan oinnae? Nauzubilla.
3.6: Allae zudi hok insaf na ḳoroin, te tain kila asta zogotor bisar ḳorba?
3.7: Tara ḳoin, “Amar misa mator mazdi-u buza zae, Alla Pak hok-insafḳari. Ar amar misa mate zebla Allar gourob-tarif oy, te tain amare gunagar shaibosto ḳoroin ḳene?”
3.8: Ikan kub shundor zukti. Erlagi amra ḳoitam ni, “Ao, amra naformani korat roi, zate ou naformanir mazdi bala fol mile?” Kunu kunu manshe amrar bodnam gaia ḳoin, amra-o bule ola talim dei. Itae tarar faona shaza faiba. Allar dorbaro hoḳol manush-u dushi
3.9: Oḳon amra kita ḳoitam? Boni Israil hishabe amrar halot kita bin zati taki bala ni? Nichchoy na. Age-u amra ḳoisi, Boni Israil ar bin zati hoḳol-u gunar gulam.
3.10: Allar kalamo ase, Be-ḳosur bolte ḳeu nai, eḳzon-o nai;
3.11: aḳoldar eḳzon-o nai, ḳeu Allar tallash ḳore na.
3.12: Hoḳol manush be-foti oigese, hoḳol eḳloge naforman oigese, nek kam ḳore ila ḳeu nai, eḳzon-o nai.
3.13: Tarar muk to fosa lashor kula ḳoyboror laḳan, tarar zibe sol-soturi mate, ar ṭuṭor tole ase, hafor bish.
3.14: Tarar golar maze boddua ar titta mat-ḳotae bora,
3.15: kun-ḳarafir lagi tarar fao aguail,
3.16: tarar foto ḳali binash ar ahazari.
3.17: Shantir fot tara sine na,
3.18: tarar dil taki Allar ḍor-ḳof horigese.
3.19: Amra zani, Hozrot Musar shoriot tarar lagi-u, zerar gese ou shoriot deoa oise. Zate ḳali bin zati nae, shoriot faora Boni Israil-o, mani asta zogotor ḳeu kunta matibar shuzug nai, shob-u Allar bisaror daṛo foṛe.
3.20: Ḳaron shoriot amol ḳorle-u, Allae manshore be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳoriliba, ila kunta nae. Oile shoriotor mazdi-u manush gunar befare hushiar oy. Manush kila be-ḳosur hishabe goinno oin
3.21: Oḳon to Alla Pake fot batai disoin, shoriot saṛa-o tain kila manshore be-ḳosur ḳalas hishabe goinno ḳoroin. Age tain Tourat Shorif ar nobi oḳlor kitabo ou befare ishara disoin.
3.22: Ou fot oilo, Hozrot Isa al-Mosir ufre zera iman ane, ou imanor mazdi-u Allae tarare be-ḳosur ḳoia goinno ḳoroin. I befare Boni Israil ouk ba bin zati ouk hoḳol-u eḳ homan.
3.23: Ḳaron, hoḳole-u guna ḳorse, Allar shan-tozollit hamanir shamorto ḳeuror nai.
3.24: Oile Isa al-Mosie manshore gunar at taki basanir bebosta ḳorsoin, tain Allar rohomotor dan hishabe manshore be-ḳosur ḳoia goinno ḳorar fot ḳorsoin.
3.25: Zera tan ufre iman ane, al-Mosie tarar lagi nizor loure koforar kurbani dia Alla Pakre kushi korsoin. Ou nomunae Allae deḳaisoin, zudio tan nizor soborgarir lagi manshor furana gunar shaza dite deri korra, tebou tain hok-insafḳari.
3.26: Ar oḳon tain ita deḳaisoin, zate forman oy, tain nize hok-insafḳari ar zera al-Mosir ufre iman anoin, tarare be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳoroin.
3.27: Erbade-o manshe boṛai deḳanir kunta ase ni? Na, kunta-u nai. Ḳene nai? Manshe shoriot mane ḳori tar boṛai korar kunta nai ni? Na, asol ḳota oilo, imanor maze boṛai korar zaga nai.
3.28: Amra zani, Allae manshore tar imanor lagi-u be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳoroin, shoriot manar lagi nae.
3.29: Te Alla ḳali Boni Israilor ni, bin zatir lagi-o nae ni? Nichchoy, tain bin zatir-o Alla.
3.30: Ḳaron Alla to eḳzon-u. Tain Boni Israilre zela imanor mazdi be-ḳosur ḳoia goinno ḳoroin, ola bin zati oḳolre-o ḳorba.
3.31: Oḳon ḳo sain, imanor lagi amra shoriot batil ḳorram ni? Na, muṭe-u na! Borong amra shoriotre mozbut ḳoriar.

4.1: Te amrar ḳandanor mul baf Hozrot Ibrahimor zindegir befare kita ḳoitam? Tain kita faila?
4.2: Shoriot manar lagi-u zudi tanre be-ḳosur ḳoia gona oy, te tain nizor boṛai deḳaita faroin, oile Allar dorbaro to nae.
4.3: Ḳaron Allar kalamo ase, “Ibrahime Allar ufre iman anae, Allae tanre be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳorla.”
4.4: Ḳamlae ḳam ḳoria ze beton fae, ikṭa kunu dan nae, ikṭa tar faona mozuri.
4.5: Oile kunu manshe zudi nizor amolor ufre borosha na ḳoria, ḳali tan ufre iman ane, zein gunagarre be-ḳosur ḳoia goinno ḳoroin, te tar imanor lagi he ḳalas fae.
4.6: Ar niz amol saṛa Alla Pake zare be-ḳosur ḳoia goinno ḳorsoin, Hozrot Daude-o tare nek-kofali koisoin. Fobitro Zobur Shorifo tain ḳoira,
4.7: Nek-kofali tara-u, zerar naformanire maf ḳora oise, Mabud Moulae zerar gunare ar hishabo dorta nae.
4.8: Nek-kofali hou zon, zar gunare Allae tar amol-nama taki kaṭi disoin.
4.9: Te nek-kofali kali tarare-u ḳoa oise ni, zerar mosolmani kam ḳorail oise? Mosolmani na ḳorail manshore-o ḳoa oise na ni? Oy, tarare-o nek-kofali koa oise. Ḳaron Allar kalamo faisi, Hozrot Ibrahimor imanor lagi-u, Allae tanre be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳorla.
4.10: Kun shomoy ḳorla? Mosolmani koranir age, na bade? Nichchoy, mosolmani koranir age-u oisla.
4.11: Mosolmani kam ḳoranir age-u Allae tanre imanor lagi be-ḳosur ḳoia goinno ḳorsla, ar mosolmani kam ḳorani asil er forman ba nishana. E taki buza zae, mosolmani na dile-o, ḳali imanor lagi zerare be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia dora oy, tarar mul baf oila Hozrot Ibrahim.
4.12: Mosolmani koranir age Hozrot Ibrahimor iman zelaḳan asil, mosolmani koraia zoto manshe ou imane sole, tarar-o mul baf oila ou Ibrahim. Imanor bole-u Allai oada furon
4.13: Alla Pake oada ḳorsla, Hozrot Ibrahim ar tan ḳandanre i duniar doḳoldari diba. Shoriot manar lagi i oada ḳora oise na, borong Ibrahimor imanor lagi-u tanre be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳoria ou oada ḳorsla.
4.14: Shoriot mania ḳeu zudi doḳoldari failae, te to iman beḳama bonizae ar Allar oadar-o kunu dam roy na.
4.15: Shoriote to Allar gozob lamae. Asol ḳota oilo, zeḳano shoriot nai, ino shoriot bongor ḳota-o nai.
4.16: Erlagi i oada ḳali manshor imanor mazdi fura ḳora oy, zate iṭa Allar rohomotor dan hishabe roy. Te Ibrahimor ḳandanor gese ze oada ḳora oise, ikan nichchoy fura ḳora oibo. Ḳali shoriot manra oḳlor lagi-u furon ḳora oito nae, zera Ibrahimor imanor loge shorik, tarar lagi-o i oada fura ḳora oy.
4.17: Allar kalamo zela leḳa ase, “Ami tumare bout zatir mul baf banailam.” Ou hishabe Allar nozoro Ibrahim oila amra hoḳlor mul baf. Zein morare zindegi dein ar zeta oar nae, ota oaita faroin, hou Allar ufre tain iman ansla.
4.18: Ou Ibrahime zebla aolad faoar kunu asha ḳorar ḳota nae, hou shomoy-o tain Allar ufre borosha ḳoria imane mozbut roisoin. Allae tanre ḳoisla, “Tumar ḳandanre ami asmanor terar laḳan behishab ḳormu.” Ar ou ḳotar ufre tain iman anla.
4.19: Eḳ-sho bosor boyoshor Ibrahime zudio buzchila, hurutta zonom deoar ḳemota ar tan nai, tan bibi Sayrar-o hurutta oar boyosh shesh oigese, tebou tan iman mozbut asil.
4.20: Allar oadar befare tan mono kunu shondoy aise na, borong tain imane aro mozbut oia Allar tarif ḳorla.
4.21: Ibrahime furafur ekin ḳorla, Allae ze oada ḳorsoin, ita fura ḳorar ḳemota-o tan ase.
4.22: Ou ḳarone-u tan imanor lagi tanre be-ḳosur ḳoia goinno ḳora oisil.
4.23: “Be-ḳosur ḳoia goinno ḳora oisil,” ikan ḳali Ibrahimor lagi leḳa oise na,
4.24: amrar lagi-o leḳa oise. Imanor lagi-u Allae amrare be-ḳosur ḳoia goinno ḳorba, ḳaron ze Allae amrar Malik Isare murda taki zinda ḳorsla, amra tan ufre-u iman anchi.
4.25: Amrar gunar kofora hishabe ou Isare moutor ato tuli deoa oisil, ar amrare be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳorar lagi tanre murda taki zinda ḳora oisil.

5.1: Imanor mazdi amrare be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳora oise, gotike Malik Isa al-Mosir usillae Alla Pak ar amrar maze shu-shomporko boail oise.
5.2: Ou ze rohomotor tole amra asi, al-Mosie amrare i zagat ania fosaisoin. Erlagi Allar mohima faoar ashae amrar mon oḳon nichchit kushie bori gese.
5.3: Ḳali ikan nae, amra duk-koshṭor maze-o kushi-bashi korram. Ḳaron duk-koshṭoe sobor ane,
5.4: sobre meoa fole, ou meoae asha-borosha ane,
5.5: ar ou asha-borosha beḳama zae na. Ḳaron Allae amrare ze Pak Ruhu disoin, i Pak Ruhe amrar dilor maze Allai mohobbot zonmae.
5.6: Amra to ḳomzur-lasar aslam, shoṭik shomoye amrar laḳan gunagarre basanir lagi, al-Mosie nizor zan kurbani dila.
5.7: Kunu forezgar manshor lagi shadaronoto ḳeu zan dilaito sae na, ta-o kub bala zonor lagi aḳta ḳeu dile-o dilaito fare.
5.8: Oile amra gunagar halote-u al-Mosie amrar lagi nizor zan kurbani disoin. Oḳan taki forman mile, Allae amrare ḳoto maya ḳoroin.
5.9: Ar al-Mosir kurbanir usillae zebla be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno oisi, te oḳon al-Mosir mazdi amra Allar shaza taki-o rehai faimu, iṭa to shullo-ana nichchit.
5.10: Amra age Allar dushmon aslam, hou shomoy tan ḳas mayar zon Ibnullar moutor usillae, tan loge amrar milon oise. Te to al-Mosir zinda oia uṭar mazdi oḳon aro beshi nichchit, amra nazat faimu.
5.11: Ḳali ikan nae, zar usillae ou milon oise, amrar malik ou Isa al-Mosir mazdi oḳon Allar name kushi-bashi-o ḳorram. Hozrot Adom (a:) ar al-Mosir tulona
5.12: Eḳzon manshor mazdi duniait guna aia hamaisil, ar ou gunar mazdi mout-o aisil. Bade hoḳol manshe-u guna ḳorse, erlagi hoḳlor lagi-u mout aia azise.
5.13: Hozrot Musar shoriot nazilor age-o duniait guna asil. Oile shoriot asil na gotike gunare hishabo dora oito na.
5.14: Ta-o Baba Adom taki Musa nobir amol forzonto zera Adomor laḳan shorashori Allar hukumre bangise na, tarar ufre-o moute beṭagiri korse. Te kunu kunu ḳarone Baba Adomor loge, bade toshrif ana ou al-Mosir-o mil asil.
5.15: Oile Baba Adomor naformani ar Allar rohomotor danor maze bout tofat ase. Hou eḳzonor naformanir dae boutor lagi mout ailo ar aroḳzon, mani Isa al-Mosir meherbanir mazdi ze rohomoti dan ailo, Allar i rohomot aro bout beshi baṛi gelo.
5.16: Ar eḳzon manshor gunae zela fol deḳa gelo, Allar rohomotor dan to ilaḳan nae. Ḳali eḳzon manshor gunar lagi bout manshore dushi shaibosto ḳora oise. Oile bout beshi forimane guna ḳorar bade-o Allar ou rohomote bout zonre be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳora oise.
5.17: Eḳzon manshor gunar lagi zebla moute amrar ufre beṭagiri korse, te dusra aroḳzon, mani Isa al-Mosir mazdi amra zera Allar rohomote be-ḳosur ḳalas hishabe goinno oisi, amra-o ola ḳoto beshi nichchit oia Allai zindegi faia hoḳoltar ufre razotto ḳormu.
5.18: Asol ḳota oilo, eḳzon manshor gunar lagi zela hoḳol manshore dushi shaibosto ḳora oise, oula eḳṭa nek kamor mazdi hoḳol manshore be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno oar shuzug deoa oise. Ou shuzugor fol oilo aḳeri zindegi.
5.19: Zemon doro, eḳzon manshor obaiddotar lagi bout manush gunagar oisoin. Oula eḳzon manshor baiddotar lagi bout manshore be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳora oise.
5.20: Ermaze shoriotor hukum-ahkam-o nazil oigelo, zate i naformanir hishabor foriman aro baṛi zae. Oile naformani zeno baṛilo, ino Allar rohomot aro bout baṛigelo.
5.21: I rohomot baṛilo, zate moutor mazdi age gunae zela beṭagiri korsil, oḳon be-ḳosur ḳalas oar mazdi Allar rohomote oula razotto ḳore. Ar otar fol hishabe amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir usillae aḳeri zindegi fai.

6.1: Te oḳon amra ola ḳoitam ni, amrar ufre zate Allar rohomot aro baṛe, erlagi amra aro guna ḳorat roi?
6.2: Nauzubilla, muṭe-u na! Gunar babote amra to morigesi, te i murda halote oḳon ar ḳemne gunar ḳamo roitam?
6.3: Aichcha, amra zoto zone al-Mosir name toubar gusol ḳorsi, amra to tan moutor loge-o shorik oisi.
6.4: Ou gusolor ḳalo amrare to al-Mosir loge ḳoybor deoa oise. Ar gaibi baf Allae tan moha kudrote al-Mosire zela ḳoybor taki zinda ḳori tulchoin, ṭik oula amra-o zanu noya zindegie din ḳaṭai.
6.5: Ar amra zebla al-Mosir mouto shorik oisi, te tain zela murda taki zinda oia uṭsoin, ola amra-o tan zinda oar loge shorik roimu.
6.6: Amra ikan zani, amrar shorilor bod ḳaishre beḳama ḳorar niote amrar furan ‘ami’re al-Mosir loge solibor ufre maria falail oise, zate amra ar gunar gulam na roi.
6.7: Ḳaron zar mout oizae, he to gunar ḳobza taki kalas failise.
6.8: Te al-Mosir loge zebla amrar moron oise, oḳon amrar iman oilo, tan loge zindegi-o faimu.
6.9: Amra zani, al-Mosi murda taki zinda oia uṭisoin ḳori tan ar mout oito nae. Moutor kunu ḳemota tan ufre nai.
6.10: Ashole tan ze mout oise, ita to gunar ḳemota binash ḳorar lagi kali eḳbar-u oise. Ar oḳon tan ze zindegi ase, iṭa to Allar mohimar lagi zinda asoin.
6.11: Ṭik oula, tumra-o mono ḳorio, gunar ḳemotar befare tumrar moron oigese, oḳon ḳali Isa al-Mosir name Allar mohimar lagi zinda aso.
6.12: Erlagi moutor zuka tumrar i shorilor ufre gunare kunu laḳan beṭagiri korte dio na, shorilre bod ḳaishor ato shofi dio na.
6.13: Shorilor kunu ongore bod ḳamor atiar banaio na. Borong nizore murda taki zinda oa zon mono ḳoria furafuri Allar ato shofi deo, shorilor hoḳol ongore nek kamor atiar hishabe Allar name bilai deo.
6.14: Tumra to gunar gulam nae, shoriotor aotae-o nae, ḳali Allar rohomotor tole aso.
6.15: Te oḳon kita ḳortam? Shoriotor aota taki saṛa faia, Allar rohomotor aotae asi kori, amra ḳali guna ḳortam ni? Nauzubilla, muṭe-u na!
6.16: Tumra buzo na ni, tumra zebla nizore ḳeuror ato shofi dia tar hukum mafik solo, te emne-u to tar gulam bonizao. Olaḳan tumra hoyto gunar gulam bonia morbae, arnae Allar gulam bonia nek kam ḳorbae.
6.17: Alla Pakor shukur, age zudio tumra gunar gulam aslae, ta-o Isayi torikar talim faia hari, dile-zane itar ashik oiso.
6.18: Gunar gulami taki saṛa faia, nek kamor gulam oiso.
6.19: Baiainre, tumrar aḳolor ḳomzuri dekia ami tumrar loge manush bulie matiram, age zela tumrar shorilor ongore nafaki ar bod ḳaishor gulam banaislae, oḳono ṭik oula, fak-fobitro zindegi kaṭanir lagi, zarzir ongore nek kamor gulamit shofi deo.
6.20: Tumra zebla gunar gulam aslae, i shomoy to nek kamor day-dayitto taki azad aslae.
6.21: Agor bod ḳam-ḳazor ḳota mono oile oḳon tumrar shorom lage, te ḳo sain, ita ḳame tumrar kita lab oito? Itar hesh fol to moron.
6.22: Oile oḳon tumra gunar gulami taki azad oia, Allar fotor gulam bonia fak-fobitro zindegi kaṭairae, er hesh fol to aḳeri zindegi.
6.23: Ashole gunar mozuri oilo mout, oile Allar rohomotor dan oilogi amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir usillae aḳeri zindegi.

7.1: Te O bai oḳol, Hozrot Musar shoriotor bishoy to tumrar zana-u ase. Ta-o tumra buzo na ni, shoriotor dabi-daoa manshor ufre boail taḳe, ḳali zinda taḳa forzonto.
7.2: Zela, zamai zotodin zita ase, otodin tar bou tar aotae banda roy, ar zamair moutor bade tar bou i bandon taki kalas fae.
7.3: Ar zamai zita taḳte bou zudi dusra beṭar gese hanga boy, taire to zinakur hishabe gona oy. Oile zamair moutor bade tai zamair bandon taki ain mafik kalas fae, erbade tai oinno zonor gese bia boile zinakur nae.
7.4: Baiainre, ṭik ou laḳan-u, al-Mosir shorilor moutor mazdi shoriotor bandon taki tumrar mout oigese ḳori, oḳon tumra oinno zonor bandono zaitae faro, ar ou oinno zon oila, murda taki zinda oa hou Isa al-Mosi, zate amrar zindegit Allar name nek fotor fol dore.
7.5: Age zebla amra shorilor morzie soltam, ou shomoy shoriote amrar mazor gunar bod ḳaishre kusaia hozag korto, ou ḳarone amrar shorilor ongo oḳole moutor foti gunar fol dorto.
7.6: Te age amra ze shoriotor bandono aslam, ita taki amrar mout oigese, oḳon amra i shoriotor bandon taki kalas faisi. Erlagi amra ar hi likito shoriotor gulam nae, ḳali Allai Pak Ruhe noya zindegir gulami kori. Shoriote gunare hozag kore
7.7: Oḳon amra ola ḳoitam fari ni, shoriote-u guna ḳorae? Nauzubilla, muṭe-u na! Asol ḳota oilo, shoriot na taḳle to ami buztam farlam na one, guna ki zinish. Shoriote zudi na ḳoito, lub-lalos ḳorio na, te lalos ḳorle kita oy, ita amra buzlam na one.
7.8: Ar ou hukumor shuzug buzia amar bitre guna hamaia, hoḳol nomunar lub-lalos zonom dise. Shoriot na taḳle to guna-o morar laḳan sufsaf roy.
7.9: Amar zindegit shoriotre balamonte sinar age ami to zita aslam, oile ou hukum zanar loge loge-u guna hozag oilo, ar amar mout oilo.
7.10: Buzrae ni, ze shoriote ami zindegi faoar ḳota, hou shoriote amar lagi moron loia ailo.
7.11: Shoriotor ou hukumor shuzug faia gunae amare ṭogilo, ou hukumor bole-u gunae amar zan ḳaṛia nilo.
7.12: Oile ikan to hasa, Musa nobir deoa shoriot fobitro, er hukum-ahkam-o fobitro, ita shoṭik ar bala zinish.
7.13: Te ou bala zinishe-u kita amar moron anlo ni? Nauzubilla, muṭe-u nae! Borong gunae-u ita ḳorse, he bala zinish dia amare maria hari forman deḳailo, guna to guna. Ar ou hukum-ahkame-u buza zae, guna oilo mosto boṛo zogoinno. Dilor loge shorilor laṛai
7.14: Amra to zani, shoriot oilogi ruhani zogotor, oile ami oilam roḳto-mangshor zogotor, ami shorilor morzir bandono taḳae gunar gulam oisi.
7.15: Ami nize-u to buzi na, ami kita ḳam ḳori. Ashole ami zeta ḳortam sai, ita na ḳoria, zetare ginnai ota-u ḳori.
7.16: Ar zeta ḳortam sai na, ola gunar ḳam zebla ḳori, te ami emne-u shikar ḳoriar, shoriot ashole-o bala zinish.
7.17: Ita taki buza zae, ami nize ila ḳoriar na, oile amar maze ze gunae boshot ḳore, he-u amare dia ita ḳorae.
7.18: Ar ami to buziar, amar lour maze, mani shorilor ḳaishor maze bala kunu zinish-u nai. Ami nek kam ḳorar kial taḳle-o, amar shamortoe kulae na.
7.19: Ḳaron ami zeta nek kam ḳortam sai, ita ḳortam fari na, oile ze bod ḳam ḳortam sai na, ota-u ḳori.
7.20: Te zeta ḳortam sai na, ota-u zebla ḳori, er mani oilo ita ami kori na, borong ze gunae amar maze boshot ḳore, he-u ita ḳorae.
7.21: Oḳon amar nizor bitre-u dekiar, eḳṭa bod rifue ḳam ḳorer, ami nek kam ḳorat lagle, bod ḳam emne-u aia azi zae.
7.22: Ashole amar dilor ḳaislot mafik ami Allai hukum-ahkame kushi oi.
7.23: Oile amar shorilor ongor maze dusra arok kaislote ḳam ḳorer, amar dile nek kamre fosond ḳorle-o, ou bod ḳaislote amar dilor loge zuddo ḳoria, amare tar gulamit bandia raḳe.
7.24: Amar boṛo bod nosib! Amar shorilor ou bod ḳaislot, zegie amare moutor fote ṭane, tar at taki ke amare basaibo?
7.25: Allar shukur, amrar Malik Isa al-Mosie tar at taki amare basaisoin! Oḳon nichchit buza zae, dilor dik taki ami Allai shoriotor gulami kori, oile shorilor morzir dik taki ami gunar ḳaislotor gulami kori.

8.1: Te ou talim taki amra buzi, Isa al-Mosir zera afon zon boni gesoin, oḳon tarare ar dushi shaibosto ḳora oito nae.
8.2: Guna ar moutor at taki amare ḳalas ḳora oise, zindegi deora ruhe Isa al-Mosir usillae ḳalas ḳorsoin.
8.3: Roḳto-mangshor shorilor bod ḳaishor lagi shoriote amrare basaito farse na, ar shoriote zeta ḳorto farse na, Allae to nize-u ita ḳorsoin. Tain tan nizor ḳas mayar zon Ibnullare amrar laḳan gunagar manshor surote faṭaila, gunar ḳemotare binash ḳorar lagi. Ar ou mayar zonor zan kurbanir mazdi gunar bisar ḳoria tar ḳemotare batil ḳori dila.
8.4: Tain amrar fokko loia ita ḳorla, amra zera roḳto-mangshor shorilor ḳaishe na solia ruhur boshe soli, ou amrar lagi shoriotor dabi-daoa adae ḳorla.
8.5: Shorilor bod ḳaishor aotae zeta manush soloin, tarar mon-o bod ḳaishor bae kiali taḳe, ar zera Pak Ruhur aotae, tarar mon to Pak Ruhur kushi mafik solte kiali roy.
8.6: Shorilor bod ḳaish ze ḳamor kiali, itar fol oilo moron, oile Pak Ruhur kiale solar fol oilo zindegi ar shanti.
8.7: Ze zonor mon shorilor bod ḳaishor bae kiali, i mon to Allar dushmon, he Allai shoriot mante razi nae, manto fare-o na.
8.8: Erlagi-u zeta manush shorilor bod ḳaishor aotae soloin, tara Allare kushi korta faroin na.
8.9: Oile tumrar dilo zebla Allar ruhu boshot ḳoroin, te tumra to shorilor bod ḳaishor aotae nae, borong Pak Ruhur aotae. Asol ḳota oilo, al-Mosir ruhu zar maze nai, he al-Mosir nae.
8.10: Ar hasau zudi al-Mosi tumrar maze taḳoin, te gunar fol hishabe tumrar shoril morar foti oile-o, Pak Ruhur fol hishabe tumra to zinda. Allae to tumrare be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳorsoin.
8.11: Ar hou Isare zein murda taki zinda ḳorsoin, ou Allar ruhu zebla tumrar dilo boshot ḳoroin, te tan ou ruhur bole moutor aotae taḳa tumrar shorilre-o zindegi dan ḳorba.
8.12: Erlagi O bai oḳol, shorilor bod ḳaishor gese amra ar ṭeḳat nae, ou bod ḳaishor odine solar-o zorur nae.
8.13: Oḳon shorilor bod ḳaishor aotae solle to tumra siroḳalor lagi morbae, oile Pak Ruhur bole shorilor hoḳol naformanire binash ḳorille siroḳal zinda roibae.
8.14: Ḳaron Allar ruhur bole zera sole, tara-u Allar aolad.
8.15: Tumra to gulamir ruhu faiso na, te ar ḍoraitae ḳene? Tumra ḳali hou Allar ruhu faiso, zein tumrare aolad oar eḳtiar disoin. Erlagi-u Alla Pakre amra ruhani abba, fobitro baba ḳoia ḍaki.
8.16: Amrar dilor mazor Allai Pak Ruhe-o ola shakki dia ḳoira, amra Allar aolad.
8.17: Amra zebla aolad, te amra mouroshi baṭ faimu. Al-Mosie Allar ges taki mouroshi baṭ faiba, ar tan loge amra-o faimu. Ḳali amra tan loge duk-koshṭo shoijjo ḳorle, tan loge gourob-mohimar-o bag faimu. Amra kun laḳan baṭ faimu
8.18: Baiainre, amra bade ze mohima faimu, itar tulonae oḳonkur i duk-koshṭo kunta-u nae, ita to ami zani.
8.19: Hou shomoy aile deḳa zaibo ḳe ḳe tan asol aolad, erare deḳar lagi-u Allar foyda ḳora hoḳoltae zane-forane bar saira.
8.20: Ḳaron tan foyda ḳora hoḳolta-u oḳon oshar oigese. Ita kunu nize nize oshar oigese ni? Na, borong Allae-u tarare hou fote saṛi disoin. Oile erloge tain ou asha-o disoin,
8.21: eḳdin ita hoḳolta binashor at taki kalas oia, Allar aolad oḳlor shadinota ar gourobor bagi oito farbo.
8.22: Oḳon forzonto dekiar, hurutta foydar ḳalo maʼe zela buk faṭaia sillain, tan foyda ḳora hoḳoltae-u ola ahazari kori sillaira.
8.23: Ḳali ikan nae, amra-o hou ze mohima bade faimu, er foyla kishti hishabe Allai Pak Ruhre oḳon faisi, faia baki kishtir lagi amra-o ola sillaiar. Ar hou kishti faoar dinor lagi bar saiar, ze din amrare Allar aolad hishabe zair ḳora oibo, mani ze din amrar shorilre binashor at taki kalas ḳora oibo.
8.24: Amra ḳalas oar ou asha faisi, iman anar ḳalo. Te zeta zinish manshe dekilae, ita deḳar lagi he ar asha ḳore na, zeta deḳa oigese, itare deḳar asha ar ḳene ḳorto?
8.25: Oile na deḳa zinishre deḳar lagi amra doijjo doria bar sai.
8.26: Ita saṛa amrar ḳomzurir shomoy to Pak Ruhe amrare shaijjo ḳoroin. Dua ḳorar ḳalo amra kita saitam, ita to amra zani na. Oile mukdi zeta ḳoar shaiddo nai, dilor ḳandonor loge Pak Ruhe nize-u amrar fokko oia, itar lagi minoti koroin.
8.27: Ḳaron zein manshor dilor tallash ḳoroin, tain to Pak Ruhur ḳota-o buzoin. Pak Ruhe Allar morzi mafik tan pak bonda oḳlor lagi minoti koroin.
8.28: Amra zani, Allare zera mohobbot ḳoroin, mani Allae tan nizor morzi mafik zerare daot disoin, tarar balair lagi hoḳoltae eḳloge ḳam ḳorer.
8.29: Allae zerare ag taki-u tan nizor lagi fosond ḳori raḳsila, tarare tan ḳas mayar zon Isar laḳan oar lagi-u fosond ḳorsila, zate ou Isa Ibnulla-u, era hoḳlor boṛo bai oin.
8.30: Tain age zerare fosond ḳorsila, tarare-u daot dila. Ar zerare daot dila, tarare be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳorla, ar zerare be-ḳosur goinno ḳorla, tarare tan nizor gourob-mohima-o dan ḳorla. Allar mohobbotor bol-shokti
8.31: Oḳon ita befare amra kita ḳoitam? Shoyong Alla Pak zebla amrar fokke, te amrar bifokke ḳegu lagto?
8.32: Amra hoḳolre basanir lagi, Allae zebla tan ḳas mayar zon Ibnullare bilai dite-o naraz oila na, tanre moutor ato shofi dila, te ou mayar zonor loge hoḳolta-u amrare dan ḳorta nae ni?
8.33: Ar Allae tan nizor lagi zerare fosond ḳorsoin, erar birudde nalish dibar shaiddo ḳar? Allae nize-u tarare be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳorsoin.
8.34: Te tarare ḳegue dushito? Zerar lagi hou Isa al-Mosir mout oise, moutor bade zinda ḳorio tula oise, tain oḳon Alla Pakor ḍain galar toḳto boia, amrar lagi minot-ḳajji korat asoin.
8.35: Erlagi ila kunu zinish ase ni, zetae amrare al-Mosir mohobbot taki alog korto? Zulum-nirjaton, zala-zontrona, monor ḳoshṭo, ḳaoa-findar obab, bifod-afod ba dushmonor toluar?
8.36: Fobitro Zobur Shorifo ase, Tumar namor lagi amrare hor-hamesha kun ḳora or. Manshor sokut amra oilam bolir faṭa.
8.37: Na, ila kunta-u nai. Ḳaron ze Isae amrare oto mohobbot ḳorsoin, tan bole amra ita hoḳoltat-u furafur joyi oiar.
8.38: Te ami ikan balamonte-u zani, zindegi ba mout, firista ba Iblisor kunu sela, oḳon ba bobishotor kunutae-u, kunu laḳan shoktie-u,
8.39: asmanor ba fatalor ba foyda oa kunu zinishe-u amrare Allar mohobbot taki alog korto farto nae. Tan ou mohobbot to amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir usillae faisi.

9.1: Ami al-Mosire shakki rakia, ekkere hasa ḳota ḳoiram, amar bibeḳe-o Pak Ruhur loge oia ou shakki der.
9.2: Boni Israilor lagi amar boṛo afsus ar shimahin ḳoshṭo lager.
9.3: Haere hae, ami lannotir ḳataro gia al-Mosir ges taki horail oia-o zudi, amar zatir baiain Boni Israilre basaitam fartam.
9.4: Allae to Boni Israilre tan nizor aolador eḳtiar disoin, tan shan-tozolli deḳaisoin, tan loge milonor usilla oḳol ḳaim ḳorsoin, shoriot nazil ḳorsoin, tan ebadot-bondegir shuzug kori disoin ar bout laḳan oada-o ḳorsoin.
9.5: Hozrot Ibrahim, Isʼhak ar Iakub nobi asla Boni Israilor mul murobbi. Bade Isa al-Mosi-o to roḳto-mangshor bae taki erar ḳandano-u zonom loisoin, ein hoḳoltar uforala, zuge zuge siroḳal tan tarif ouk. Amin.
9.6: Huno, Allar oada oḳol oḳon zen beḳama oigese, ila kunta nae. Ḳaron Boni Israilor maze zonom oilo ḳori-u, era hoḳol to asol Boni Israil nae.
9.7: Hozrot Ibrahimor ḳandan ḳori-u tara zen tan asol aolad, ila kunta nae. Borong kitabo leḳa ase, “Tumar fua Isʼhakor ḳandanre-u tumar ḳandan ḳoia gona oibo.”
9.8: Mani Israil zatir maze zonom oise gotike-u mono ḳorio na, tumra Allar aolad bonigeso. Ḳali Allar oada mafik zera aolad bonche, tarare-u Ibrahimor ḳandan hishabe goinno ḳora oibo.
9.9: Buzrae ni, Allae to Hozrot Ibrahimor gese ou oada ḳorsla, “Samnor bosor ou sando ami firia aimu, ou shomoy tumar bibi Sayrar kulo eḳ fua taḳbo.”
9.10: Ar ou fua oila, amrar furbofurush Hozrot Isʼhak. Ḳali ikan nae, ou Isʼhakor bibi Rebekar feṭor zuṛor fuain eḳoi bafor aolad oile-o,
9.11: -12 era maʼr feṭo taḳa halote zebla bala-bura kichchu ḳorsoin na, hou shomoy Allae Rebekare ḳoisla, “Tumar boṛo fua to huru fuar gulam oibo.” On taki buza zae, Allae tan munsha fura ḳorar kiale manshore fosond ḳoroin, ḳeuror amolor bae na saia, tan nizor fosond mafik basia nein.
9.13: Erlagi-u Pak Kitabo leḳa ase, “Ami to Iakubre mohobbot ḳorsi, oile tar bai Ishʼre horaia raḳsi.”
9.14: Te oḳon amra ḳoitam ni, Allae-o obisar ḳoroin? Nauzubilla, muṭe-u na!
9.15: Allae Hozrot Musare ḳoisla, “Ami zare kushi doya ḳormu, ar zare kushi rohom ḳormu.”
9.16: On taki buza zae, rohomot to ḳeuror sesṭae ba ichchae mile na, ḳali Allar meherbani taki-u mile.
9.17: Asmani Kitabor ayato ase, Allae Feraunre ḳoisla, “Ami tumare bashsha banaisi, zate tumar mazdi hoḳole amar lila-ḳela dekia, hara duniait amar nam zair oy.”
9.18: Te deḳa zae, Allae tan nizor kushi mafik ḳeurore doya ḳoroin, ar ḳeuror dilre fashan banain. Allar gozob ar rohomot
9.19: Oḳon tumra amare zikaitae faro, “Allar morzir baira zebla ḳeu kunta ḳorto fare na, te Allae ḳene manshor dush-tiruti gonoin?”
9.20: I soalor shuza zuaf oilo, Allar ufre matar tumi ke? Ḳeu zudi kunu zinish banae, te tar banail zinishe zikaito farbo ni, amare ḳene ila banailae?
9.21: Eḳ maṭi taki kumare nanan zator zinish banaito fare na ni? Itar kunuṭa ijjoti kamo ar kunuṭa shadaron ḳamo lage.
9.22: Ṭik olaḳan, Allae tan lannot ar kudroti kemota deḳaita saisla, ar zerar ufre i lannot ḍalita saisla, erar faona asil ḳali binashi gozob, ta-o tain bout boṛo sobor ḳoria tarar ita shoijjo ḳorla.
9.23: Tain ita shoijjo ḳorla, ḳaron aroḳbar nizor kudroti shan-tozollir ḳota zanaita saila. Ar zerare doya ḳorsoin, erare tain age taki-u zuit ḳoria raḳsila, tan shan-tozolli deḳanir kiale.
9.24: Ashole amra-u oilam hou doyar zon. Amrare tain ḳali Boni Israilor maz taki-u daot dia anchoin na, oinno zatir maz taki-o to anchoin.
9.25: Hozrot Husia nobir sohifat Allae ḳoisoin, Zeta manush amar proza nae, tarare-o amar nizor proza banaimu. Ar zera amar mayar manush asil na, tarare-o mayar manush ḳoia ḍaḳmu.
9.26: Ze zomino ḳoa oisil, tumra amar proza nae, hou zomino-u tarare zinda Allar aolad ḳoa oibo.
9.27: Oile Boni Israilor befare Hozrot Ishaya nobie ḳoisla, Gonar bala zudio tara doriar soror balur laḳan behishab, tebou tarar mazor kub huru eḳ ongshoe ḳalas faiba.
9.28: Mabud Moulae zogotor faona ze shaza zuit ḳorsoin, ou shullo-ana shaza kub zoldi-u diba.
9.29: Hozrot Ishaya nobie aro bataisoin, “Alla Rabbul Alamine zudi amrar lagi kisu manshore zinda na raḳta, te amrar dosha to lannoti Sadum ar Amura ṭaunor laḳan oilo one.” Boni Israil be-foti oar ḳaron
9.30: Te amra ou ḳota-u ḳoimu, bin zati oḳole zudio Allar forezgar bonda oar sesṭa ḳorse na, tebou iman anar mazdi tara Allar dorbaro forezgar bonigese.
9.31: Ar Boni Israile ḳali shoriot mania forezgar bonto saisil, oile shoriot manto farse na.
9.32: Aichcha, tara ḳene farse na? Tara imanor ufre borosha na ḳoria, ḳali kam-ḳazor amolor ufre borosha ḳorse, erlagi farse na. Manshe ze fattoro usṭa ḳain, tara-o ou fattoro usṭa ḳaisoin.
9.33: I befare Asmani Kitabo leḳa ase, Huno, ami Zeruzalemo ola eḳ fattor boaisi, ze fattoro manshe usṭa ḳaia foṛbo. Oile ze zone tan ufre iman anbo, he kunumonte-u shorminda oito nae.

10.1: Te O bai oḳol, Boni Israilor lagi amar dilor ou foriad ase, ami Allar dorbaro dua ḳoriar, tara zanu nazat fain.
10.2: Tarar befare ami oḳan-u ḳoiram, tarar monor maze Allar eshki ase, oile tara zane na, Allar dorbaro ḳemne forezgar bona zae.
10.3: Allar dorbaro be-ḳosur ḳalas oar fot na zanae, tara i fotre manche-o na, tara ḳali shoriot amol ḳoria forezgar bonto sae.
10.4: Ou shoriotor hoḳol dabi-daoa al-Mosie to adae ḳorilsoin, erlagi tan ufre zera iman ane, Allar dorbaro tarare be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳora oy. Allai nazator bebosta hoḳlor lagi
10.5: Shoriot amol ḳoria Allar dorbaro forezgar oar befare, Hozrot Musae Tourat Kitabo leḳsoin, “Zera shoriot manto sae, tara furafur manle basibo.”
10.6: Ar imanor bole manush kila Allar dorbaro forezgar bone i befare Allar kalamo leḳa ase, “Mone mone ḳoio na, ḳe gia asmano uṭito?” Er mani oilo, hono uṭia al-Mosire lamaia anto.
10.7: Ba ikan-o ḳoio na, “Ḳe gia fatalo lamto?” Er mani oilo, hono lamia al-Mosire ḳoybor taki tulia anto.
10.8: Na ila kunta nae, ḳaron leḳa ase, “Ashole Allar kalam to tumar kub daro ase, ita tumar muko ar tumar dilo ase.” Ar amra zeta toblig korram, ita-u to hou kalam.
10.9: Oḳon tumi zudi muke shikar ḳoro Hozrot Isa-u malik, ar dile ekin ḳoro, Allae tanre murda taki zinda ḳorsoin, te tumi aḳer faibae.
10.10: Ḳaron dile iman anle Allae manshore be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳoroin, ar muke shikar ḳorle Allae nazat dan ḳoroin.
10.11: Allar kalame batae, “Ze zone tan ufre iman anbo, he kunumonte-u shorminda oito nae.”
10.12: Boni Israil ouk ba bin zati ouk, erar maze kunu tofat nai, ḳaron hoḳlor malik to eḳzon. Ze manshe Allar nam loy, Allae tare bout meherbani koroin.
10.13: Allar kalame to ḳoy, “Zekunu manshe Mabudor name ḍakile, he nazat hasil ḳorbo.”
10.14: Oile zan ufre tara iman-u anche na, tanre kila ḍakibo? Ar zan befare tara hunche-u na, tan ufre iman anbo kila? Toblig korra na taḳle, tara hunbo kila?
10.15: Ar tobligo ḳeu na faṭaile, tara kila tobligo zaibo? Zela Allar kalamo batail oise, “Doinno tarar fao ḳanain, zera aṭi aṭi kush-ḳobri toblig koroin.”
10.16: Oile hoḳol manshe to i kush-ḳobrire ḳano ṭai dey na. Hozrot Ishaya nobie ḳoisoin, “O Mabud, amrar toblig hunia ḳe iman anche?”
10.17: Te deḳa zar, Allar kalam hunle iman ae, ou kalam oilo, al-Mosir befare toblig.
10.18: Oile ami koiram, Boni Israil oḳole i kalam hunche na ni? Nichchoy hunche. Pak Kalame ḳoy, Tarar aoaz to hara duniait sitri gese, sitri gese tarar mat-ḳota, duniar eḳ mata taki aroḳ mata forzonto.
10.19: Ami hirbar ḳoiram, Boni Israile hou kalam buzchoin na ni? Nichchoy buzchoin, Allae to Hozrot Musa nobir mazdi tarare ḳoisoin, Zeṭa zati nai ila zati dia ingsha ḳoraimu, ammok zati dia tarar gusa tulaimu.
10.20: Bade Ishaya nobie kub shaosh ḳoria i ayato ḳoisoin, Amare zera tallash ḳorse na, tara-u amare faise. Amar gese zera kunta saise na, tarare ami didar disi.
10.21: Oile Boni Israilor befare tain ḳoira, Ami at baṛaia ḍakiram, hara din dori duio ate ḍakiram, naforman ar fashan eḳ zatire ḍakiram.

11.1: Erlagi ami oḳon zikairam, Allae kunu tan afon bonda Boni Israilor log saṛi disoin ni? Nichchoy na! Ḳaron ami nize-o to eḳzon Boni Israil ar Hozrot Ibrahimor bongshodor, Bin-Iamin ḳandanor manush.
11.2: Allae foyla taki tan ze prozare fosond ḳoria alog korsila, tain to erar log saṛsoin na. Hozrot Ilias nobir befare Allar kalamo kita ase, ita tumra zano na ni? Tain to Boni Israilor birudde Allar dorbaro ou nalish disla,
11.3: “O Mabud, itae tumar nobi oḳolre zane marilise, tumar kurbani kanain-o bangilise. Ḳali ami-u basia roisi, oḳon tara amar zanḳan-o nitagi saira.”
11.4: Teu Allae tanre kita zuaf disla mono ase ni? Tain ḳoisla, “O Ilias, ami to shat azar manshore amar nizor lagi alog koria raḳsi, era to i Baal devtare fornam ḳorse na.”
11.5: Ṭik olaḳan, Allae rohom ḳoria Boni Israilor eḳṭa ongshore oḳono alog kori raḳsoin.
11.6: Ar Allae zebla rohom ḳoria erare alog korsoin, te iṭa kunu nek amolor fol nae. Amolor fol oile to ar rohomot ḳoa oilo na one.
11.7: Te buza zae, Boni Israile shoriot amol ḳoria zeta faita saisla, ita tara faisoin na. Ḳali Allar fosond ḳora zone faisoin. Oile baki hoḳlor dil fashan bonigese.
11.8: Zela Allar kalame ḳoise, Allae tarar dilre beushi gumo falaisoin, tarar souk taḳte-o deḳe na, ḳan taḳle-o hune na. Aiz forzonto ou haloto ase.
11.9: Ola Hozrot Daud nobie-o ḳoira, Tarar dumdam ḳori kaoa-daoa-u shikaror zal ar fand bonizauk. Ita tarar bifodor ḳaron ouk, bod ḳamor shaza bonizauk.
11.10: Tarar souk anda oizauk zate na deḳe, tumi tarar ḳomorre hamesha guza ḳori rakio.
11.11: Te Boni Israil siroḳalor lagi ou bifodor fando roibo ni? Nichchoy na. Borong tarar naformanie bin zati oḳlor lagi nazator duar kuligelo. Allae saila, ita dekia tarar dilo zanu zala foyda oy, ḳaron bin zatie nazat failira.
11.12: Oḳan taki buza zae, tarar naformanir lagi zogotor manshor bout fayda oise, ar tarar ḳetie zebla bin zatir lab oilo, te tara zebla Allar nazator daot kobul ḳorba, ou shomoy bin zati oḳole aro ḳoto beshi rohom faiba. Bin zati oḳlor nazat
11.13: O bin zati oḳol, ami tumrare ḳoiram, huno, tumrar gese-u amare sahabi hishabe faṭail oise ḳori, ami amar ḳamre kub dam diram.
