11.14: Ḳaron, ou ḳam deḳaia amar nizor zati Boni Israilor dilo kunu zala foyda ḳortam fari, ar ou zalae tarar mazor kisu manshor zan basaitam fari.
11.15: Tara duroi hori zaoae zebla zogotor manshor loge Allar milon oilo, te tarare zebla hirbar ṭai diba hou shomoy kun halot oibo? Ita mora manush zita oar laḳan nae ni?
11.16: Doro, Allar name bilanir ruṭir mul ḳai zudi fobitro oy, te to banail ruṭi-o fobitro. Gasor mul zoṛ fobitro oile, er ḍal-fala-o nichchoy fobitro. Ṭik ola, Boni Israilor mul baf Hozrot Ibrahim zebla fobitro, te Boni Israil-o fobitro.
11.17: Ar mone ḳoro, gasor kisu ḍal-fala ḳaṭa oilo, bade ou ḳaṭa zagat tumar laḳan zongli zoytun gasor kisu ḍal ḳolom dia zuṛa deoa oilo, te tumi nichchoy mul gas taki-u rosh fairae.
11.18: Oḳon tumi-o nizore hou ḳaṭia falail ḍal taki boṛo mono ḳorio na, iad rakio, tumi mul gasre ṭikai raḳso na, borong mul gase-u tumare ṭikaia raḳse.
11.19: Tumi ikan ḳoitae faro, “Amare zuṛa dibar lagi-u to agor ḍal-falain ḳaṭa oisil.”
11.20: Ikan ṭik ase, oile iman na anar ḳarone-u to tarare ḳaṭia falail oise, ar iman anae tumare hono lagail oise. Te tumi-o beṭagiri na deḳaia Allare ḍorao.
11.21: Mono rakio, Allae zebla mul ḍal-falare-u rehai disoin na, te tumi kolomor ḍalre kunu rehai diba ni?
11.22: Erlagi-u sinta ḳoria deḳo, Alla Pak koto doyal ar ḳoto fashan. Zera be-fote faṭi gesoin tarar lagi tain fashan, ar tumar bae tain doyalu, zudi tumi tan doyar maze ro, na roile tumare-o ola ḳaṭia falai diba.
11.23: Ar hou Boni Israile-o zudi hirbar iman anoin, te tarare-o tain mul gasor loge zuṛa diba, Allae to ila zuṛa dita faroin.
11.24: Ashole to tumi aslae zongli zoytun gasor ḍal, tumare zebla hon taki kaṭia ania malikana baganor zoytun gasor loge asanoḳ halote zuṛa lagail oise. Te sinta ḳoro, zera ou gasor asol ḍal, tarare mul gasor loge lagani koto shuza. Allar doya hoḳlor ufre
11.25: O bai oḳol, tumra zate nize nize aḳoldar na bono, erlagi eḳṭa batuni befar ami tumrare hikai dei. Huno, bin zati oḳlor nazat faoar shongḳa fura na oa forzonto bout Boni Israilor dil fashan halote roibo.
11.26: Heshe ola-u hoḳol Boni Israile nazat hasil ḳorba, zela Asmani Kitabo ase, Toranealae toshrif anba Zeruzalemor Sion faṛ taki, tain Iakub nobir ḳandan taki naformani kedai diba.
11.27: Ami ola-u tarar gunare horailimu iṭa to amar deoa oada.
11.28: Huno, tumrar balair lagi kush-ḳobrir befare tara to oḳon Allar dushmon, oile Allai fosondor befare baf-dadar silsilae tara oila Allar mohobbotor manush.
11.29: Ḳaron Allae tan rohomotor dan-dokkina ar tan daotor ḳota kunumonte-u mot bodlain na.
11.30: Zela tumra-o eḳ shomoy naforman aslae, oile oḳon Boni Israile naformani korae tumra tan meherbani faiso,
11.31: ṭik ou laḳan, tumra meherbani faoae tara oḳon naformani korer, zate tara-o ola meherbani fain.
11.32: Ar Allar munsha oilo, tain zate hoḳlor bae meherbani deḳaita faroin, otar lagi hoḳolre-u naformanir maze bondi korsoin.
11.33: Buzrae ni, Allar banḍar ḳoto boṛo! Tan aḳol-hekmot ḳoto goin! Tan bibeḳ-bisar buzar oshaiddo, tan ḳam-ḳaz oḳol tallash ḳori buza zae na.
11.34: Zela kitabo ase, Ḳaron Mabudor mon sinar shaiddo ḳar ase? Tanre foramish dibar lak ḳe ase?
11.35: Ḳe age Allare kunta dilaito farse, ze ḳarone tain tar gese denadar asoin?
11.36: Ashole hoḳolta-u to tan ges taki, tan mazdi-u ae, tan nizor lagi foyda ḳorsoin. Zuge zuge siroḳal tan tarif ouk. Amin.

12.1: Erlagi O bai oḳol, Allae tumrare ola meherbani korae, ami tumrare ḳas minoti koriar, tumra zarzir shorilre Allar ato shofi deo, ila zinda fobitro kurbani Allar dorbaro kobul oy, oḳṭa-u oibo tumrar sohi-shuddo ebadot.
12.2: Ar ou ḳaraf zomanar talo foṛio na, borong nizor dilor bab bodlaia noya manush o. Teu tumra Allar morzi buzbae. Tan morzi to bala ar furafur nikut, ola ḳorle tain kushi oin.
12.3: Talim dibar lagi Allae amare ze ḳas niamot disoin, ou niamotor bole ami tumra forteḳ zonre ḳoiram, nizore zotoḳan boṛo mono ḳora usit, er saite beshi mono ḳorio na. Allae zare zotoḳan imani bol disoin, he zanu nizore er taki beshi kunta mono na ḳore.
12.4: Kial rakio, amra hoḳlor shorilo bout ongo ase, hoḳol ongoe to eḳlaḳan ḳam ḳore na.
12.5: Ṭik ou laḳan, mumin hishabe amra bout zon oile-o, al-Mosir loge shorik oia ḳali eḳ shoril oisi. Eḳoi shorilor ongo gotike amrar eḳe-oinne mil ase.
12.6: Allar rohomote amra nanan zone nanan laḳan niamot faisi, ou niamot zudi gaibi ohi zananir befare oy, te amrar iman mafik oli-auliar laḳan ohi koite taki.
12.7: Ḳeu zudi kezmot ḳorar niamot fae, te kezmot ḳorouk. Ar talim dibar niamot ze faise, he talim deuk.
12.8: Utshaho dibar niamot ze faise, he manshore utshaho deuk. Dan ḳorar niamot ze faise, he ḳalis niote dan ḳorouk. Murobbiana ḳorar niamot ze faise, he dile-zane hoḳolta salauk. Manshore shaijjo ḳorar niamot ze faise, he kushi mone shaijjo ḳorouk. Mumini sal-cholon
12.9: Maya-mohobbotor maze kunu ḳad mishaio na. Ḳarafire ginnao, balair ashik o.
12.10: Eḳe-oinnore afon bair laḳan dile-zane maya ḳoro, niz taki oinnore beshi dam deo.
12.11: Kezmot ḳamo durbol oio na, ruhre gorom raḳo, malikor gulami korat ro.
12.12: Samnor furuskaror ashae hamesha kushi-bashi koro, duḳ-mosiboto sobor ḳoro, hor-hamesha munazat ḳorat ro.
12.13: Allar pak bonda oḳlor obabo shaijjo ḳoro. Memandari korte kiali o.
12.14: Tumrar ufre zera zulum ḳore, tarar lagi nek dua ḳorio, boddua dio na.
12.15: Zera kushi-bashi korer, tarar loge kushi koro, zera ḳander tarar loge oia ḳando.
12.16: Tumra eḳe-oinne bai bai oia ro. Boṛoluki bab na deḳaia, shadaron manshor loge mili-mishi solo. Nizor fonḍiti deḳaio na.
12.17: Ḳarafir bodla hishabe ḳeuror ḳarafi korio na, hoḳol manshe zetare bala mono ḳoroin, tumra sinta-babna ḳoria ota-u ḳoro.
12.18: Tumrar torof taki zotoḳan shombob hoḳol manshor loge shantie boshot ḳoro.
12.19: O mayar bai oḳol, tumra ḳeuror bodla loio na, ita Allar ato saṛi deo, bodla deoa tan ḳam. Allar kalamo ase, “Naformanir shaza dibar eḳtiar ḳali amar-u ase, zar zela faona ami tare ola bodla dimu, ikan ami Mabude ḳoiram.”
12.20: Borong kitabe ḳoy, “Tumar dushmonor feṭo buk lagle, tare ḳani deo. Fiase dorle tare fani deo. Ola ḳorle to tumi tar matar ufre zalail angrar ṭukri toilae.”
12.21: Ḳarafir gese kunumonte-u ario na, borong balare dia ḳarafire arao.

13.1: Forteḳ manshe deshor razare mania solouk, ḳaron Allar morzi saṛa ḳeu razotto fae na, raza oḳolre to Allae-u godit boain.
13.2: Erlagi ze manshe deshor razar dushmoni kore, he ashole Allai hukumor dushmoni kore. Ila ḳam zetae ḳoroin, tara to nizor ufre gozob ḍakia anoin.
13.3: Ar bala ḳam ḳorra zone to razare ḍoranir kunta nai, oile ku-ḳam ḳorra zonor lagi koṭin bifod. Te tumra kita nirboye roitae sao ni? Taile bala fote aṭo, teu razae tumrar tarif ḳorba.
13.4: Razae to tumrar balair lagi-u Allar ḳadim hishabe ḳam ḳoroin. Oile tumra zera ku-ḳam ḳoro, tumrar lagi bifod ase. Tain ḳamoḳa ḳeurore maroin na, oile ku-ḳam ḳorrare Allar ḳadim hishabe ṭik-u shaza dein.
13.5: Te ḳali shazar ḍore nae, borong zarzir bibeḳor bisare-o razar hukum mana zorur.
13.6: Otar lagi-u to tumra ḳazna deo, ḳaron ḳazna tulia ḳoros ḳorar mazdi tara Allar kezmot ḳorra.
13.7: Oḳon zar zela faona, tare ola deo. Zenre ḳazna dibar ḳota, enre ḳazna deo; zenre mashul dibar ḳota, enre mashul deo; zenre ijjot ḳorar ḳota, ene ijjot ḳoro; zenre tazim ḳorar ḳota, ene tazim ḳoro. Eḳe-oinne maya ḳoro
13.8: Ḳali mayar rin saṛa dusra kunu befare ḳeuror gese rini oio na. Zano ni, ze manshe oinno zonre maya ḳore, he to shoriotor hukum-ahkam shullo-ana adae ḳorse.
13.9: Zela shoriotor hukum ase, “Zina ḳorio na, kun ḳorio na, suri korio na, lub-lalos ḳorio na,” ba i laḳan aro zoto hukum ase, i hoḳol hukumre ekḳano ḳori koa oise, “Tumar ari-forire nizor laḳan maya ḳoro.”
13.10: Ar maya taḳle ḳeu ari-forir ḳeti korto fare na, erlagi maya ḳorle furafur shoriot-u mana oizae.
13.11: Te bai oḳol, oḳonkur zomanar halot to tumra zano-u, erlagi buzi-huni solo. Tumra gum taki hozag oar shomoy oigese, ḳaron amra ze shomoy iman anchilam, hou halot taki-o amrar nazat oḳon aro daro aichche.
13.12: Rait fuaia hari bian oizar; oḳon zoldi ao, amra andarir bod ḳam saṛia nuror lebas lagai, Allai atiar findilai.
13.13: Hoi-hulla ḳori mod ḳaia ṭal oa, zina-bodmaishi ba mongoṛa sola, ingsha ar ḳaijja-fosad bad dia, ao, amra dinor fore solra manshor laḳan soli.
13.14: Finnor lebasor laḳan tumra Malik Isa al-Mosire furafur findilao. Shorilor bod ḳaish miṭanir sinta ekkere bad deo.

14.1: Tumrar mazor ze bai imane ḳomzur, tare-o afon hishabe shomzo, tar fosond-ofosond loia torka-torki korio na.
14.2: Buzrae ni, eḳzone mono ḳore, he hoḳol zator ḳani kaito farbo, oile ḳomzur imandar zone ḳali niramish ḳae.
14.3: Te mas-mangsho ḳaora zone ou niramish ḳaora zonre zanu na siṛae. Ar niramish ḳaorae-o zanu mas-mangsho ḳaorare na dushe, ḳaron Allae to duiozonre-u nizor ḳoia kobul ḳorsoin.
14.4: Ar tumare ḳegie ḳemota dilo, aroḳ beṭar gulamor bisar ḳortae? He ṭik fote ase, na bul fote ase ikan to tar munibe buzba. Ashole to he ṭik fote-u roibo, malike-u tare ṭik fote raḳta farba.
14.5: Kunu kunu manshe mono ḳoroin, shadaron din taki kunu ḳas dinor fozilot beshi. Ar ḳeu ḳeu hoḳol dinre-u eḳlaḳan mono ḳore. Te i befare ḳe kita ḳorto na ḳorto, ita zanu tar dil taki furafur shae dey.
14.6: Ze manshe kunu ḳas dinre mane, he to Malik Isare kushi korar niote-u ita mane. Ze zone hoḳol zator ḳani kae, he-o to malikre kushi korar niote-u ḳae, he Allar shukria adae ḳoria ḳae, ar ze zone hoḳolta ḳae na, he-o malikre kushi korar niote ḳae na, he-o Allar shukria adae ḳore.
14.7: Amrar mazor kunu bonda-u nizor lagi nize zinda roy na, ar nizor lagi more-o na.
14.8: Ḳaron amra zebla zinda roi, ḳali malikor lagi-u zinda roi, ar zebla moron oy, ḳali malikor lagi-u moron oy. Te amra zinda roile-o zeta, morle-o ota, amra to Malik Isar-u.
14.9: Malik al-Mosi-o to mara gesla ar hirbar zinda oia uṭsoin, zate tain zinda ar murda duio dolor-u malik bonoin.
14.10: Te tumi kene tumar bair kut tukairae? Tare ḳene siṛairae? Allar bisaror samne to amra hoḳol-u ubaimu.
14.11: Zela Allar kalamo ase, Mabude ḳoira, amar namor ḳosom ḳaia ḳoiar, hoḳole-u amar samne aia soizda ḳorbo, forteḳ muke-u shikar ḳorbo, ami-u Alla.
14.12: Ono deḳa zae, Allar dorbaro amra forteḳe-u zarzir ḳamor hishab dite oibo.
14.13: Te ao, oḳon taki amra eḳe-oinnor kut dora bond ḳori, ar niot ḳori, ila kunu ḳam ḳortam nae, ze ḳame aroḳ bair imanor ḳeti oibo, ba tare gunar fote nibo.
14.14: Malik Isar ummot oae ami balamonte-u zani ar buzi, emne to kunu zinish-u nazaiz nae, oile ḳeu zudi itare nazaiz mono ḳore, te tar lagi-u ita nazaiz.
14.15: Zudi tumar kunu ḳanir lagi aroḳ baie mono duk fae, te to tumi tare mohobbot ḳorrae na. Ze baire basanir lagi al-Mosie mout kobul ḳorla, kunu ḳanir lagi i bair shorbonash ḳorio na.
14.16: Tumi zetare fosond ḳoro, itar lagi dusra zone zanu tumare na nindae.
14.17: Allar bashshai to ḳali kana-finar lagi nae, borong Allai Pak Ruhe deoa forezgari, shanti ar kushi-bashir befar.
14.18: Ou nomunae zera al-Mosir kezmot ḳore, erar ufre Alla kushi taḳoin, ar manshe-o bala fain.
14.19: Erlagi ao, amra ola ḳam ḳori, ze ḳame shanti kaim oy, ze ḳame eḳe-oinnore goṛia tultam fari.
14.20: Ar kunu laḳan ḳanir lagi Allar ḳamre binash na ḳori, ḳanir zuka hoḳolta-u to halal. Oile tumi kunu eḳ bishesh ḳani kaoae zudi dusra manshor imano ḳoshṭo lage, te ita ḳaoa tumar lagi zaiz nae.
14.21: Bishesh kunu gust ba shorab ḳaoa, ze ḳame tumar baie mono duk fae, imane bada fae, ila kunu ḳam ḳora tumar lagi ṭik nae.
14.22: Tumar dilor ekinre, ḳali tumi ar tumar Allar maze raḳo. Nek-kofali to hou zon, ze zone bala mono ḳoria kunu ḳam ḳoria harle, tar mono kutkuti ae na.
14.23: Oile mono kutkuti loia zudi he kunta ḳae, te to he dushi. Ḳaron he zeta ḳaise, ita tar bibeḳor ofosond, ar bibeḳor ulṭa ḳam-u oilo guna.

15.1: Erlagi amra zerar iman mozbut ase, amra ḳali nizor kushir bae na saia, amrar ḳomzur motoshokki mona imandar baiainre-o zanu shoijjo ḳori.
15.2: Ota baiaintore goṛia tular niote, forteḳe-u tarar balair lagi tarar monor fosondre zanu kush raki.
15.3: Al-Mosie-o to tan nizore kushi korsoin na, borong Fobitro Zobur Shorifo ase, “O Mabud, tumare zera beijjot ḳorse, tarar ou hoḳol beijjoti amar ufre-u aise.”
15.4: Te agor Asmani Kitabo zotota leḳa oise, ita to amrare-u talim dibar lagi leḳa oise, zate ota dekia amrar sobor ar shantona ae, ar asha-borosha fai.
15.5: Oḳon sobor ar shantona deora Allae Isa al-Mosir fote solar lagi, tumra hoḳlor mon ek koroukka.
15.6: Teu tumra eḳ mone ar eḳ muke, amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir gaibi baf Allar tarif ḳortae farbae. Hoḳlor lagi al-Mosir toshrif
15.7: Erlagi-u O bai oḳol, al-Mosie zela tumrare afon ḳorsila, tumra-o ola eḳe-oinnore afon ḳorilao, zate Allar gourob oy.
15.8: Mono rakio, Allae Boni Israilor mul murobbi oḳlor loge zoto oada ḳorsla, otar hokikoti forman ḳorar lagi al-Mosi aia Boni Israilor kezmotgar oila.
15.9: Ar bin zatir gese-o aila, zate era-o Allar rohomot dekia tan tarif ḳore. I befare Zobur Shorifo age-u ḳoa oise, Erlagi-u ami bin zati oḳlor maze tumar tarif ḳormu tarar maze tumar gunogan gaimu.
15.10: Ar Tourat Shorifo ḳoa oise, O duniar hoḳol zatir manush, Allar afon proza Boni Israilor loge milia, tumra-o tan tarif ḳoro.
15.11: Hirbar Zobur Shorifo ḳoa oise, Hoḳol zatie Allar tarif ḳoro, desh ar gusṭie tan nam zofo.
15.12: Ar Hozrot Ishaya nobie leḳsoin, Zein Bashsha Daud bin Iasor ḳandanor mul kuṭi, hoḳol zatir ufre bashshai korar lagi ein aiba, tan ufre-u taḳbo hoḳol manshor asha-borosha.
15.13: Te dilor maze asha deora Allae imanor bole, tumrare hoḳol laḳan kushi-bashi ar shantir maze habuḍubu ḳaoaukka. Teu Allai Pak Ruhur kudrotie tumrar asha-borosha baia foṛbo. Hozrot Paulusor toblig kamor niom-shutro
15.14: O bai oḳol, tumrar befare ami furafur buzram, tumrar dilḳan nek niote bora ar sohi-shuddo imani aḳol ase, zate eḳe-oinnore foramish ditae faro.
15.15: Ta-o ḳoyeḳṭa befare ami tumrare mono ḳorai diram, Allae amare ou niamot disoin ḳori, ami shaosh ḳori tumrar gese lekiar,
15.16: Isa al-Mosir ḳadim hishabe Allae amare tumrar laḳan bin zati oḳlor gese faṭaisoin. Erlagi-u tan deoa kush-ḳobri tobligor mazdi ami imamotir ḳam ḳoriar, zate ou bin zati oḳol Allar Pak Ruhe fobitro oia tan dorbaro kobul oar zuka kurbani oin.
15.17: Alla Pakor lagi ami ze kezmot ḳoriar, ou ḳamor ḳarone Isa al-Mosir mazdi amar boṛai deḳanir eḳtiar ase.
15.18: Al-Mosie amar mazdi ze ḳam hasil ḳorra, er baire kunta matibar shaosh amar nai. Tain amar mukor ḳota, amar ḳam-ḳaz,
15.19: keramoti-muzeza ar Allai Pak Ruhur kudroti bole bin zati oḳolredi Allar gulami koraisoin. Erlagi-u ami al-Mosir kush-ḳobrire Zeruzalem taki Ilurika forzonto hoḳol zagar maze furafur toblig korsi.
15.20: Te ze zagat kunudin al-Mosir kush-ḳobri toblig kora oise na, hou zagat toblig kora-u amar zindegir mul ḳam mono ḳori. Ami sai na aroḳzonor gaṛa kuṭir ufre bor ḳoria gor banaitam.
15.21: Zela Allar kalamo ase, Tan ḳota zerar gese zanail oise na oḳon tara ita deḳba, tan befare age zera hunchoin na tara oḳon buzba. Hozrot Paulus Rum ṭauno zaoar kial
15.22: Te ou ḳarone ami bout bar tumrar gese zaoar fote bada faisi.
15.23: Oinno zagat amar ḳam shesh na oae zaoa bond oigese, oile oḳon to ita zagat amar toblig kam shesh, kunu zaga-u bad roise na. Ashole bout bosor dori-u amar kial asil tumrar gese zaitam,
15.24: erlagi oḳon Spen desho zaoar ḳalo ami tumrar gese zaitam sairam. Ami asha ḳorram, hono zaoar shomoy tumrar loge deḳa oibo, ar kushi-bashi koria ḳoyḳan din tumrar loge ḳaṭaimu. Bade Speno zaoar lagi tumra-u amar bebosta ḳoria dibae.
15.25: Oile oḳon ami Allar pak bonda oḳlor maze rilif baṭibar lagi Zeruzalem ṭauno zairam.
15.26: Hino obab-onoṭonor maze Allar ze bonda oḳol asoin, tarar gese baṭia dibar lagi Makidonia ar Gris deshor zomat oḳole kisu shaijjo tulchoin.
15.27: Tara kub kushi oia ita tulchoin. Zano ni, i zomator bai-boin oḳol Zeruzalem ṭaunor Allar pak bonda oḳlor gese rini asoin. Ḳaron Allai batuni niamotor baṭ zebla Boni Israilor mazdi bin zatie faisoin, te bin zatir lagi-o zorur oilo, Boni Israilre duniabi befare shae-shaijjo ḳora.
15.28: Amar ou rilif baṭat gia hari ami zebla nichchit oimu, ita furafur tarar ato fosi gese, ou shomoy ami tumrar gese aia Spen desho zaimu.
15.29: Ami buziar, ami zebla tumrar gese aimu, ou shomoy al-Mosir shullo-ana rohom-niamot loia aimu.
15.30: O bai oḳol, Allar Pak Ruhur mohobbote ar amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir name ami tumrare ḳas minoti koriar, amar loge oia tumra-o amar lagi Allar dorbaro dua-munazator jihad salao.
15.31: Dua ḳorio, Ehudia zilat Isayi torikar birudi manshor at taki ami zanu rehai fai, ar amar ana i rilif ḳanain zanu Zeruzalem ṭauno Allar pak bonda oḳole shomzoin.
15.32: Teu ami kushi mone tumrar gese zaitam farmu, tumrar loge aram-ayesh ḳormu, inshalla.
15.33: Shanti deora Alla Pak tumrar loge loge roukka. Amin.

16.1: Te oḳon amrar boin Foibi Bibire faṭairam, tain oila Kinkria ṭaunor Isayi zomator ḳadim, tan befare ḳoiar,
16.2: Allar bonda oḳolre zela afon ḳora zorur, Malik Isar name enre-o ola afon mono ḳorio. Tain to amare ar aro bout manshore shaijjo ḳorsoin, erlagi zekunu befare shaijjo saile, tumra tanre shaijjo ḳorio.
16.3: Amar loge oia al-Mosir lagi zera ḳam ḳorsoin, ou Fiskila ar Akilre amar salam zanaio.
16.4: Amar zan basanir lagi, tara nizore moutor ato shofi disla. Ḳali ami nae, bin zatir mazor hoḳol zomat-u tarar gese rini.
16.5: Oḳon tarar baṛir zomato aia zera shorik oin, era hoḳolre-u amar salam zanaio. Turoshkor Asiya elaḳat hoḳol foyla zein al-Mosire kobul ḳorsla, hou Afinitus baire salam zanaio, ein amar mayar manush.
16.6: Ar hou Moriom Bibire-o salam zanaio, zein tumrar lagi bout menot ḳorsoin.
16.7: Amar nizor zatir manush Andronikus ar Juniare-o salam zanaio, era to amar loge oia zel ḳaṭisoin. Al-Mosir sahabi oḳlor gese era kub ijjoti zon, era amar age iman anchoin.
16.8: Amar mayar mumin bai Amfilusre salam zanaio.
16.9: Amrar logor tobligkari Urban baire, ar amar mayar dust Stakisre-o salam ḳoio.
16.10: Al-Mosir forikkat fash ḳora sifai Afilis baire-o salam dio. Bai Aristabulor baṛir hokkolre salam zanaio.
16.11: Amar zatir bai Herudunre salam dio. Morhum Nakisusor baṛir zera Malik Isar ummot oisoin, tarare-o salam zanaio.
16.12: Turfana ar Turfasa Bibire-o salam dio. Ou beṭinte Malik Isar lagi boṛo menot ḳorra. Mayar boin Farsiare-o salam ḳoio, Malikor lagi tain-o bout menot ḳorsoin.
16.13: Malik Isar fosondor manush Rouf baire salam dio, tan ammare-o salam ḳoio, i beṭi to amar-o ma.
16.14: Singkirat, Filigun, Harmis, Fatrub, Hermas ar tarar loge zoto imandar bonda asoin, era hoḳolre salam zanaio.
16.15: Bai Filagi, Julia Bibi, Nirias ar tan boinre, ar Olimpasre salam ḳoio, Allar zoto bonda tarar loge asoin era hoḳolre salam dio.
16.16: Huno, tumra eḳe-oinne fobitro golagoli korio. Al-Mosir hoḳol zomator bai-boninte tumrare salam zanaira. Hozrot Paulusor (ra:) bidayi nosiot
16.17: O bai oḳol, tumrare minot ḳori koiram, age zeta talim faiso, ou talimor ulṭa talim dia zeguinte doladoli ar bada-bignor zonom dein, otar bae nozor rakio, tumra itar ges taki horia roio.
16.18: Ḳaron itae amrar malik al-Mosir gulami na ḳoria, tarar feṭor gulami kore. Miṭa miṭa mat matia ar tel malish ḳoria shorol-shuza manshore be-foti banae.
16.19: Ar tumra zen Allar hukum mafik solrae, ita to hoḳole-u zane, i kobor hunia ami-o kub kushi oisi. Te ami sairam, tumra nek fote kamil o, bod fot taki basia ro.
16.20: Shanti deora Allae Iblis-Shoytanre kub zoldi kori tumrar faor tole falai fishaiba. Amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir rohom-niamot tumrar ufre zari rouk.
16.21: Amar loge kush-ḳobri toblig koroin ze Timoti bai, ein tumrare salam zanaira. Amar zati bai Lukias, Zasun ar Sufatose-o tumrare salam ḳoira.
16.22: Hozrot Paulusor buli hunia ami Tortius mohorire leḳram, Malik Isar name ami-o tumrare salam zanairam.
16.23: -24 Ami Paulus ar zomator hoḳolre zein memandari koroin, hou Gous baie tumrare salam zanaira. Ou ṭaunor shorḳari keshiar Irastas baie ar mumin bai Kuatuse tumrare salam zanaira.
16.25: Alhamdulilla, ami Pauluse Isa al-Mosir befare ze kush-ḳobri toblig kori, Alla Pakor ḳemota ase ou kush-ḳobrir usillae tumrare imane tir raḳa. Mono rakio, bout zomana dori Allae tan i batuni munshar ḳota lukai raḳsila,
16.26: oile oḳon ita duniar hoḳol zatir gese zair or. Siroḳalin zinda Allar hukume, agor zomanar nobi oḳole zeta lekia raḳsila, ota zair or, zate tara al-Mosir ufre iman ania Alla Pakor baiddo oin. Erlagi ou kush-ḳobri oḳon toblig kora or.
16.27: Tain-u eḳmatro Alla, tain-u aḳoldar, zuge zuge siroḳal Isa al-Mosir mazdi tan tarif ouk. Amin.

1.1: Ami Paulus, Alla Pakor morzie Allai daot faia Hozrot Isa al-Mosir eḳzon sahabi oisi. Ami ar amar mumin bai Susine,
1.2: Korint ṭaunor Allar zomator manshor gese, mani tumrar gese leḳram. Hozrot Isa al-Mosir torika kobul ḳorae Allae tumrare fak-fobitro ḳorsoin ar tan afon bonda oibar lagi daot disoin. Tumrar gese ar oinnainno zagar zoto manshe amrar Hozrot Isa al-Mosire malik koia manoin, tara hoḳlor gese amra ou siṭikan leḳram. Tain tarar-o malik, amrar-o malik.
1.3: Amrar gaibi baf Alla Pake ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosie tumrare rohomot ar shanti dan ḳoroukka.
1.4: Ami hamesha tumrar lagi amar Allar dorbaro shukria adae ḳori, ḳaron Isa al-Mosir torika kobul ḳorae tumra Allar rohomotor tole aiso.
1.5: Ou rohomot oilo, Hozrot Isa al-Mosir loge shorik oia tumra hoḳol nomunae mat-ḳota mata ar aḳol-ilime doni oiso.
1.6: Oḳon deḳa zar, al-Mosir befare amra zeta talim dislam, ita tumrar dilo gatia raḳso.
1.7: Ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosie dusrabar toshrif anar lagi tumra bar sairae, ermaze Allar deoa batuni kemotar zekunu niamot faite tumrar obab or na.
1.8: Ami zani, amrar Hozrot Isa al-Mosie tumrare aḳer forzonto imane mozbut raḳba, zate tain aibar ag forzonto tumra furafur nikut roibae.
1.9: Alla Pak to hok ar ḳaṭi, tain zela ḳoin ola oy. Tain tumrare daot disoin, tumra zanu tan ḳas mayar zon Isa Ibnullar loge ḳatir-shomporko raḳo, ein-u al-Mosi, amrar malik. Allar zomator day-dayitto (1:10–4:21) Zomator maze doladoli
1.10: Te bai oḳol, Hozrot Isa al-Mosir oia ami tumrare zuṛ ate minot ḳoriar, tumra hoḳol eḳ o. Tumrar maze kunu doladoli na rouk, eḳ mon ar eḳ mot o.
1.11: Huno, Kulua Bibir baṛir manshor ges taki zanlam, tumrar maze ḳaijja-fosad soler.
1.12: Ami hunlam, tumrar maze ḳeu ḳoy, “Ami Paulusor dolor,” ḳeu ḳoy, “Ami Apollosor dolor,” ḳeu ḳoy, “Ami Fitoror dolor,” ar ḳeu ḳoy, “Ami al-Mosir dolor.”
1.13: Te ḳo sain, al-Mosire kita baṭa-baṭi kora oigese ni? Ami Paulusre tumrar lagi solibo loṭḳaia mara oise ni? Tumra kita amar name toubar gusol ḳorso ni?
1.14: Ami Allar dorbaro shukria zanai, ḳali Kirispo ar Gous saṛa, dusra kunu manshore ami toubar gusol ḳoraisi na.
1.15: Zate ḳeu ḳoito na fare, tumra amar name toubar gusol ḳorso.
1.16: Astifan bair foribaror manshore-o ami toubar gusol ḳoraisi, esaṛa ar kunu manshore gusol ḳoraisi koria amar mono or na.
1.17: Al-Mosie to amare toubar gusol ḳoranir lagi faṭaisoin na, ḳali kush-ḳobri tobligor lagi-u faṭaisoin. Ar ou kush-ḳobri-o kunu aḳoldari fonḍiti bab-bongie toblig korat faṭaisoin na, zate solibor ufre al-Mosir kurbani oa beḳama na bone. al-Mosi-u Allai aḳol ar bol
1.18: Zara gozobi fotedi douṛar, al-Mosir solibor ufror kurbani tarar gese to ḳali be-aḳoli mono oy, oile amra zara nazator fote douṛairam, amrar gese ita oilo Allai bol.
1.19: Asmani Kitabo leḳa ase, “Ami aḳoldar oḳlor aḳolre beḳama ḳormu, ar buddiman oḳlor buddire bifol ḳormu.”
1.20: Te ou aḳoldar oḳol kuai? Alim oḳol-u ba kuai? Ar ou zomanat torko ḳorar ḳemota zar ase, he oḳon kuai? Duniabi aḳol to ḳali be-aḳoli, ita Allae-u deḳaira.
1.21: Allae tan nizor aḳol dia foysala ḳorsoin, zate duniae zanu tar aḳol dia tanre sinto na fare. Erlagi be-aḳolir ou kush-ḳobri tobligor mazdi Allae mumin oḳlor zan basaita saila.
1.22: Ihudi oḳole ḳali keramoti kam deḳta sain, Iunani oḳole aḳolor tallash ḳoroin,
1.23: oile amra toblig kori solibor ufre kurbani oa al-Mosir ḳota. Ita oilo Boni Israilor gese eḳṭa be-dini kam ar bin zati oḳole mono ḳoroin be-aḳoli kam.
1.24: Oile Boni Israil oukka ba Iunani oukka, Allar daoti bonda oḳlor gese ou al-Mosi-u oila Allai aḳol ar Allai bol.
1.25: Allai be-aḳoli manshor aḳol taki bout boṛo aḳoldar, ar Allai komzuri manshor shokti taki bout shobol.
1.26: Bai oḳol, sinta ḳori deḳo, tumrare zebla daot deoa oisil, hi shomoy tumra kilaḳan aslae. Tumrar mazor bout zon-u manshor sokut aḳoldar, ḳemotaban ba nami-dami bongshor aslae na.
1.27: Oile duniae zetare be-aḳoli koia mono ḳore Allae otare-u fosond ḳorsoin, zate duniar aḳoldar oḳole shorom fain. Ar duniae zetare ḳomzur mono ḳore, Allae otare fosond ḳorsoin, zate duniar boloban hoḳolta shorminda oin.
1.28: Duniar manshe zetare kub tuchcho mono ḳore, duniar bukut zetar kunu dam nai, Allae otare-u fosond ḳorsoin, zate duniar sokut zeta nami-dami, ita be-dami oizae.
1.29: Tain itare fosond ḳorsoin, zate duniar kunu manshe tan samne boṛai deḳanir shuzug na fain.
1.30: Ar tumra zera Isa al-Mosir afon zon boncho, ita to Alla taki-u oise. Al-Mosi-u oila amrar gese Allar deoa aḳol, fak-forezgari, fobitrota ar azadir kuṭi.
1.31: Erlagi Asmani Kitabo leḳa ase, “Ze manshe boṛai kore, he Mabudre loia-u boṛai korouk.”

2.1: Bai oḳol, Allar deoa kush-ḳobri tumrar gese toblig korat gia ami to shundor shundor bashae matisi na, ba boṛo kunu alim-ulamar laḳan boyan ḳorsi na.
2.2: Ami mone mone ṭik korslam, tumrar loge taḳar ḳalo ami kali ou Isa al-Mosir bishoye matimu, ze Isare solibor ufre loṭḳaia mara oise, ita saṛa ar kunta mattam nae.
2.3: Ami zebla tumrar loge roitam, ou shomoy nizore ḳomzur mono ḳortam ar ḍoraia ḳafitam.
2.4: Amar toblig ar amar boyanor maze manshor mon joy ḳorar moto kunu aḳol-hekmot ar zukti asil na, ḳali Allai Pak Ruhu ar kudroti bol deḳa gesil.
2.5: Ami sailam, tumrar iman manshor aḳol-ilimor ufre borosha na ḳoria, ḳali Allai bolor ufre borosha ḳore. Allai Pak Ruhur deoa aḳol
2.6: Ta-o zera imane kamil, tarar gese amra aḳolor mat mati. Oile ou aḳol to i zogotor nae ba zogotor neta oḳlor laḳan-o nae, tara to borbad oar foti.
2.7: Ashole amra ḳali Allai aḳol-hekmotor batuni gufon befare mati. Ou batuni befar to dunia foyda ḳorar age-u Allae tan nizor morzie ṭik koria raḳsoin, zate amra tan gourobor bagi oi.
2.8: Oile ou zogotor neta oḳole ita buzra na. Ita buzle tara, hou gourobor don amrar Malik Isare solibor ufre loṭḳaia marlo na one.
2.9: Oile amra zani, Allar kalame ḳoy, Zara Allare mohobbot ḳoroin, tarar lagi tain zeta raḳsoin, ita ḳeu souke deḳse na, ḳane-o hunche na, dilor maze kunudin sinta-o ḳorse na.
2.10: Ita oḳon tan Pak Ruhur mazdi amrar gese zair ḳorsoin. Pak Ruhur ozana kunta-u nai, tain Allar hoḳol batuni befar-o zanoin.
2.11: Manshor maze ola ḳeu ase ni, zera eḳzone aroḳzonor monor ḳobor zanoin? Ḳali nizor ruhe-u tar monor ḳobor zane. Ṭik ou laḳan, Allar Pak Ruhu saṛa dusra ḳeu tan gaibi befar zane na.
2.12: Ar amra to duniabi ruhu faisi na, borong Allar torof taki tan ruhu faisi, erlagi tan deoa niamot oḳol amra sini.
2.13: Ar ou niamotor befare-u amra ḳoi, ita ḳoar shomoy amra manshor aḳol bebohar ḳori na, ḳali Pak Ruhur mazdi talim faia ḳoi. Ruhani hokikotre zair ḳorar lagi, amra ruhani mat mati.
2.14: Ze manush ruhani monobabor nae, Allai Pak Ruhur mazdi zeta mile he itare kobul ḳore na, ḳaron tar gese ita beḳama. Ita befar he buze-o na, ḳaron ita ruhani zogotor befar, ḳali ruhdi zasai kora zae.
2.15: Ze zonor maze Pak Ruhu ase, he hokkolta zasai koria deḳe, tare ḳeu zasai korto fare na.
2.16: Zela Allar kalamo ase, Mabudor mon ḳegie buzto farse, tanre foramish dibar shaiddo ḳar? Oile al-Mosir mon amrar dilo taḳae, amra ita buzram.

3.1: Bai oḳol, ruhanik zonor loge zelaḳan mata usit, ami tumrar loge ila mattam farsi na. Borong duniabi manshor loge zela mata usit, tumrar loge ola-u matisi. Tumra to Isayi torikat ekkere huruttaintor laḳan, erlagi-u oula matilam.
3.2: Foyla ami tumrare shokto ḳani na dia ḳali dud ḳabaislam, hi shomoy shokto ḳani kaoar zuka aslae na, ar otodin bade-o tumra i befare hurutta roiso.
3.3: Ḳaron tumra oḳono duniabi roḳto-mangshe solrae. Tumrar maze oḳono ingsha, ḳaijja-fosad lagail-u ase. Te tumra roḳto-mangshor boshe roiso na ni?
3.4: Tumrar maze ḳeu zebla ḳoy, he Paulusor dolor, ḳeu ḳoy Apollosor dolor, te tumra duniabi manshor laḳan nae ni?
3.5: Apollos ḳe? Ar Paulus-u ba ḳe? Amra to shamainno kezmotḳari, amrar mazdi tumra imanor fote aiso. Allae-u amrare zarzir i dayitto disoin.
3.6: Ami bis lagaisi, Apollose fani disoin, ar Allae itare boṛo ḳorsoin.
3.7: Erlagi zein bis lagain ar zein fani dein, era ashole kunta-u nae, oile zein itare boṛo ḳori tuloin, tain-u hokkolta.
3.8: Bis lagaora ar fani deorar eḳoi uddesho. Era forteḳe zarzir menot mafik kamor fol faiba.
3.9: Oile amra duio zone-u Allar ḳam ḳoriar. Tumra Allar-u ḳet, tan banail bilḍing.
3.10: Allar ges taki ze ḳas rohomot ami faisi, ou rohomotor bole-u ami aḳoldar raz mestorir laḳan ian kuṭi gaṛsi. Ar ou kuṭir ufre oinno zone bilḍing banaira. Oile ḳe kila banaira, i befare tara hushiar ouk.
3.11: Ze ian kuṭi age-u gaṛa oigese, Malik Isa al-Mosi-u oila hou kuṭi, ikṭa bad dia ar kunu noya kuṭi keu gaṛto farto nae.
3.12: Oḳon i kuṭir ufre shuna, rufa, dami fattor, laḳṛi ar son dia ḳeu zudi gor banae,
3.13: te ḳe kila banaisoin, ita bala ḳori deḳa zaibo. Ruz Hashoror din ita zair oibo, hou din ogni-forikkar mazdi ita kula-mela oibo.
3.14: Zein zeta banaisoin, ita zudi ṭikia roy, te ein furuskar faiba.
3.15: Oile ita zoli gele furuskar taki bad foṛbo, ta-o tar nizor zan basibo. Tare deḳle buza zaibo, he aguinor mazdi faṛi dia aise.
3.16: Tumra zano na ni, tumra oilae Allar Kaba gor, tumrar maze tan Pak Ruhu boshot ḳoroin?
3.17: Ḳeu zudi Allar Kaba gor binash ḳore, te Allae-o tare binash ḳorba. Ḳaron tan taḳar gor oilo fobitro, ar tumra-u oilae hou gor.
3.18: Tumra ḳeu nizore faki dio na. Tumrar mazor ḳeu zudi duniar aḳol-ilime nizore aḳoldar mono ḳore, te he be-aḳol bonouk zate asol aḳoldar oito fare.
3.19: Ḳaron i zogotor aḳol-buddi, Allar nozoro ḳali be-aḳoli. Asmani Kitabo ase, “Allae aḳoldar oḳolre tarar salakit doroin.”
3.20: Aroḳ ayato ase, “Aḳoldar oḳlor hoḳol sinta-u beḳama, ita to Mabude zanoin.”
3.21: Erlagi amar ḳota oilo, hokkolta-u to tumrar, te tumra kunu manshore loia boṛai korio na.
3.22: Paulus, Apollos, Fitor, i dunia, zindegi, mout, bortoman, bobishot, hokkolta-u tumrar.
3.23: Tumra oilae al-Mosir, ar al-Mosi oila Allar.

4.1: Amrare dekia manshe buzouk, amra al-Mosir ḳadim, Allai batuni banḍaror ḳazanchi.
4.2: Ar zerar ufre banḍaror ḳazanchir bar deoa oy, tara to forman deḳani lagbo, tara hok-halal.
4.3: Te ami hok-halal ki na i bisar tumra ḳoro ba adalote-u ḳorouk, ete amar kunta zae ae na. Ami to amar nizor bisar-u ḳori na.
4.4: Amar mon shada oile-o forman ḳora zar na ami nirdush. Te Malik Isae-u amar bisar ḳorba.
4.5: Erlagi shoṭik shomoyor ag forzonto, mani Malik Isa hirbar na aoa forzonto tumra kunu bisar ḳorio na. Andairo zeta lukail ase, tain aia itare foro anba ar manshor dilor gufon niot oḳol zair ḳorba. Hou shomoy Allar ges taki hoḳole zarzir faona tarif faiba.
4.6: Bai oḳol, tumrar balair lagi ami amar nizor ar Apollosor udahoron dia tumrare ḳoilam, zate tumra amrar ges taki ou talim neo, Asmani Kitabo zeta leḳa ase, itar bare zaoa ṭik nae. Te tumra eḳzonre toia areḳzonre loia boṛai korio na.
4.7: Ḳeu zanu mono na ḳore tumi alada kunta bonigeso. Tumar nizor emon kun don ase, zeta tumi Allar ges taki lilla faiso na? Ar ita zudi lilla faia taḳo, te lilla faiso na ḳoia beṭagiri korrae ḳene?
4.8: Tumrare dekia to mono or, tumra age-u hokkolta faia doni oigeso, amrare bad dia-u tumra bashsha bonigeso! Tumra hasaror bashsha oile bala-u oito, amra-o tumrar loge bashsha oitam fartam.
4.9: Zuddo-bondi oḳolre marilibar niote, zuddor bijoe misilor ḳoror ḳataro zarare raḳa oy, amar mono oy Allae amrar laḳan sahabi oḳolre-o ola hoḳlor ḳore raḳsoin. Amra asta zogotor gese, hoḳol manshor gese, ar firista oḳlor gese-o tamshar nayok bonigesi.
4.10: Amra to al-Mosir lagi be-aḳol oisi, ar tumra bule al-Mosir name aḳoldar bonigeso. Amra ḳomzur, tumra boloban, tumra bule ijjoti bonigeso, amrar to kunu ijjot nai.
4.11: Amra oḳono feṭor buke, fanir fiase, ḳafoṛ-sufoṛor obabe ḳoshṭo ḳoriar, baṛi-gor nai kori boitolor laḳan roiar ar mair-doir ḳaiar.
4.12: Hamesha nizor ate menot ḳori kaiar. Manshor gail-mondo hunia-o, tarar balai saiar, zulum-nirjaton, humki-damkire sobor ḳoriar.
4.13: Bodnam-gibot shoijjo ḳori kori, norom shure tarare buzaiar. Oḳon forzonto amra asta zogotor ḳasrar laḳan, hoḳoltar gese-u zoinjal bonigesi.
4.14: Huno, tumrare shorom deoar niote ita leḳram na, ḳali amar mayar aolad hishabe hushiar ḳorar lagi leḳram.
4.15: Mono rakio, al-Mosir befare talim deoar lagi tumrar azar azar ustad taḳta faroin, oile tumrar baf to otozon nae. Kush-ḳobri tobligor mazdi Isayi zindegit eḳmatro ami-u oilam tumrar baf.
4.16: Oḳon ami tumrare minot ḳoria ḳoiar, ami zela soli, tumra-o ola solo.
4.17: Ou niote ami Timotire tumrar gese faṭailam, malikor name ein to amar mayar hok-halal fut. Malik Isa al-Mosire ami kila mania soliar, ar hoḳol zagar hoḳol zomato kila talim diar, ita tain mono ḳorai diba.
4.18: Tumrar mazor ḳeu ḳeu mono ḳorer, ami ar tumrar gese aitam nae, erlagi tara boṛai-beṭagiri deḳaira.
4.19: Inshalla ami kub zoldi-u aimu. Zetae boṛai-beṭagiri deḳaira, tarar mat hunat nae, ḳali tarar mul ḳemota deḳat aimu.
4.20: Allar bashshai to mat-ḳotar befar nae, ita oilo kudroti kemotar befar.
4.21: Tumrar ichcha kita? Ami tumrar gese kita loia aitam? Singla loia ni, na maya-momota ar norom mizaz?

5.1: Ami hunram, tumrar maze zelaḳan zogoinno zinar ḳam soler, ila ḳam bidormi oḳole-o ḳore na. Tumrar mazor eḳzone nizor haton maʼre-o bour laḳan raḳse.
5.2: Erbade-o tumra boṛai koro kila? Itar lagi tumra fana manga zorur nae ni? Ar zegie ita ḳorse, tare zomat taki bar ḳori deoa usit na ni?
5.3: Ami sho-shorile tumrar maze na taḳle-o ruhe to tumrar loge asi, erlagi zegie ita ḳorse, samne taḳa bisarir laḳan ami-o age-u tar bisar ḳoria raḳsi.
5.4: Amar bisar oilo, tumra Malik Isar name eḳ zagat dola o, ou shomoy ami-o ruhe tumrar loge roimu ar Malik Isar bol-shokti-o amrar loge taḳbo.
5.5: Ar ou naformanor shorilre binash ḳorar lagi Shoytanor ato dilaite oibo, zate Malik Isa aibar ḳalo tar ruhe nazat fae.
5.6: Baiainre, boṛai kora tumrar lagi ṭik nae. Zano na ni, moydar ḳair boṛo gamlare-o tuṛa ḳamire fulailae?
5.7: Te tumrar dil taki-o hou furan ḳamiror bab falai deo, zate ḳamir saṛa moydar ḳai bono, ar ashole-u to tumra ḳamir saṛa zon. Azadi Idor kurbanir meṛa-baichchar laḳan amrar lagi al-Mosire-o kurbani deoa oise. Zano to, hou ido hoḳol laḳan ḳamir raḳa haram.
5.8: Erlagi ao, amra-o hou furan ḳamir, mani ingsha ar ḳarafire bad dilai, er bodla ḳamir saṛa ruṭi, mani hok ar shada dile id adae ḳori.
5.9: Ami age tumrare leḳslam, tumra naforman ḳobis oḳlor loge shong dorio na.
5.10: Ami koiram na, i zogotor ḳobis manush, lubi, doḳolbaz ar deb-debir puja ḳorrar shongo ekkere saṛi ditae. Ila oile to tumra zogotor bare aro kunuḳano zaitegi oibo.
5.11: Oile ami kali oḳan ḳoitam sairam, ḳeu zudi nizore mumin ḳoia dabi kore, ar he zinakur, lubi, deb-debir pujari, gibot gaora, modkur, ba sur-ḍaḳait oy, te tar shong dorio na, tar loge ḳana-fina-o ḳaio na.
5.12: -13 Huno, amar ola ṭeḳa foṛse ni, Isar torikar bairor manshor bisar ḳortam? Itar bisar Allae-u ḳorba. Oile torikar bitoror manshor bisar ḳora tumrar ḳam na ni? Tourat Kitabo ase, “Hou naformanre tumrar shomaz taki bar ḳori deo.”

6.1: Tumra ḳeuror zudi kunu imandar bair bifokke nalish taḳe, te Allar pak bonda oḳlor gese na gia, he kun shaoshe baira manshor gese bisar sae?
6.2: Tumra zano na ni, ou pak bonda oḳole-u asta zogotor bisar ḳorba? Ar asta zogotor bisar ḳorte farle ou mamuli befaror foysala ḳortae faro na ni?
6.3: Tumra zano na ni, amra firista oḳlor-o bisar ḳormu? Te duniar befar to kunta-u nae!
6.4: Tumrar zebla ou laḳan bisar-asaror zorur oy, ou shomoy zomator baira manshore ḳene bisaror salish banao?
6.5: Ami to tumrare shorom deoar lagi-u leḳram, tumrar maze ila aḳoldar salish eḳzon-o nai ni, zein tumrar nizor mazor gonḍogul miṭ-maṭ ḳorta faroin?
6.6: Ami deḳram, bisaror mozliso boia-o tumra baie baie ḳaijja ḳorrae. Ta-o abar o-imandaror samne!
6.7: Ashole tumra baie baie ou zela bisar salish salairae, itae to tumrar nizor-u ḳeti or. Tumra ita shoijjo ḳoro na ḳene ba nize nize ṭoga ḳao na ḳene?
6.8: Borong tumra nize-u to oinnae ḳorrae, manshore ṭogirae, ar ita nizor bair loge-u ḳorrae!
6.9: Ashole tumra zano na ni, Allar bashshait naforman ḳobis oḳlor kunu ṭai nai. Te tumrar bul sinta dur ouk, zeta manshor shobab ḳaraf, zetae zina ḳoroin, murtipuja ḳoroin, gaṭua nasain, shomḳami,
6.10: suri, lub-lalchi, modkur, gibot gaora ar doḳolbaz, ita manshe to Allar bashshait ṭai faita nae.
6.11: Tumrar mazor kunu kunu zon-o age ola aslae, oile Malik Isa al-Mosir usillae ar amrar Allar ruhe tumrare doia saf ḳorse, tumrare fobitro ḳora oise ar be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳora oise. Hoḳol nomunar zina taki hushiar
6.12: Kunu kunu manshe ḳoin, “Amar lagi kunta-u haram nae, hokkolta-u zaiz.” Oile hokkolta zen manshor lagi ufoḳari, ila sinta ṭik nae. Amar lagi hokkolta zaiz oile-o, ami kuntar gulam oitam nae.
6.13: Ḳeu ḳeu ḳoin, “Feṭor lagi kani ar ḳanir lagi feṭ deoa oise.” Kub shundor ḳota, oile Allae to i duiota-u binash ḳoriliba. Mono rakio, shoril to zina ḳorar lagi nae borong Malik Isar lagi-u, ar Malik Isa shorilor lagi.
6.14: Allae tan kudroti bole Malik Isare murda taki zinda ḳorsoin, ar ou bole amrare-o zinda ḳorba.
6.15: Tumra zano na ni, tumrar shoril oilo al-Mosir shorilor ongo? Te al-Mosir shorilre ami bodmaish beṭir shorilor loge milaitam ni? Nauzubilla, kunumonte-u na!
6.16: Tumra buzo na ni, ze beṭae bodmaish beṭir loge mila-misha ḳore, tar shoril to ou beṭir loge ekḳano milizae. Zela Fobitro Tourat Shorifo leḳa ase, “Tara duiozon eḳ shoril oiba.”
6.17: Oile ze zon Malik Isar loge milizae, he tan loge ruhe-o eḳ oizae.
6.18: Baiainre, tumra hoḳol zator zina taki zan basao. Manshe bad-baki zoto guna ḳore, ita shorilor bare ḳore, oile zegie zina ḳore, he tar nizor shorilor birudde guna ḳore.
6.19: Tumra buzo na ni, tumrar shoril oilo Allai Pak Ruhur Kaba gor, ou ruhre tumra Allar ges taki faiso, ein tumrar dilo boshot ḳoroin. Tumar shoril to tumar nizor shompod nae.
6.20: Bout dam dia tumare ḳorid ḳora oise. Erlagi tumar shorilre Allar gourobor ḳamo lagao.

7.1: Baiainre, tumra zeta fotua zanar lagi amar gese leḳso, oḳon ou befare ḳoiram. Tumrar ḳota ṭik ase, manshor lagi bala ḳam oilo bia-shadi na ḳora.
7.2: Oile shomazor halot dekia ami koiram, zina taki basibar lagi forteḳ beṭaintor bou taḳle bala, ar forteḳ beṭintor-o zamai taḳle bala.
7.3: Hoḳol zamaie tar bour faona hok adae ḳorouk, ar boue-o ola zamair faona adae ḳorouk.
7.4: Bour shoril to tair nizor nae, tair zamair. Olaḳan zamair shoril-o tar nizor nae, tar bour.
7.5: Zamai-boue eḳe-oinnore nirash ḳorio na, ḳali kas kunu dua-munazator lagi duiozone foramish ḳoria kisu shomoy alada roitae faro. Bade hirbar milizio, zate shorilor ḳaishor lagi Shoytane tumrare gunar fote ṭanar shuzug na fae.
7.6: Te i befare ami tumrare kunu hukum diram na, ḳali izazot diram.
7.7: Ta-o amar monor asha oilo, hoḳol manush amar laḳan abiati rouk! Oile Allar ges taki to eḳo manshe eḳo nomunar rohom-niamot faisoin.
7.8: Te ṛaṛi beṭintore ar bou mora beṭaintore ami foramish diram, tara zudi amar laḳan roita faroin, te bala.
7.9: Oile nizore shamlaite na farle tara bia-shadi korouk. Karon shorilor ḳaishe zolia-fuṛia mora taki bia-shadi kora-u bala.
7.10: Ar zamai-boure ami ou hukum diram, boue zanu tair zamai saṛia na zae. I hukum ḳali ami diram na, shoyong malike-u dira.
7.11: Ar zudi tai horia zaegi, te dusra bia na bouk, borong zamair gese firia auk. Ola kunu zamaie-o tar boure talaḳ na deuk.
7.12: Oḳon zeta ḳoiram, ita to shorashori malikor hukum nae, tan fokke ami koiram, kunu mumin bair bou zudi Isayi torikar na oin ar tain zamair loge shongshar ḳorta sain, te zamaie tanre talaḳ na deuk.
7.13: Ou laḳan kunu beṭi manshor zamai-o zudi Isayi torikar na oin, ar zamai tan loge roita sain, te boue i zamaire talaḳ na deuk.
7.14: Ḳaron ou bour usillae Allae tair zamaire fak-fobitro ḳorsoin ar ou zamair usillae tar boure-o fak-fobitro ḳorsoin. Ila na oile tumrar huruttain to nafak oilo one. Ashole to Allae oḳon tarare-o fak-fobitro mono ḳoroin.
7.15: Oile Isayi torikar baira hou bou ba zamai zudi emne-u alog oizita sain, te oita farba. Ila halote hou mumin bai ba boin biar kunu bandonor maze taḳoin na. Buzrae ni, amra shantie roar lagi Allae-u amrare daot disoin.
7.16: O bou oḳol, tumi kila buzlae, tumar zamair zan tumi basaitae fartae nae? O zamai oḳol, tumi-u ba kila buzlae, tumar bour zan tumi basaitae fartae nae?
7.17: Zai ouk, Malik Isae zare zela raḳsoin, Allae zare zela daot disoin, he ola solouk. Hoḳol Isayi zomatre ami ou eḳoi hukum diar.
7.18: Zela, mosolmani kam ḳorail kunu manshe Isayi torika kobul ḳorle he tar ou mosolmanire oshikar na ḳorouk, ar mosolmani na ḳorail kunu manshe Isayi torika kobul ḳorle, he mosolmani na ḳorouk.
7.19: Mosolmani kam ḳorani ba na ḳorani iṭa kunu boṛo befar nae, Allar hukum-ahkam mana-u oilo asol ḳota.
7.20: Allae zare ze halote daot disoin, he ou halote-u taḳouk.
7.21: Isayi torikat aibar ḳalo tumi gulam aslae ni? Te itar lagi bezar oio na, ar shadin oite farle shadin o.
7.22: Gulami kora halote Malik Isae zare daot ḳori anchoin, he to tan dorbaro shadin oigese. Ar shadin halot taki zare daot ḳori anchoin, he to al-Mosir gulam bonigese.
7.23: Baiainre, tumrare bout damdi korid ḳora oise, erlagi manshor gulam bonio na.
7.24: Allae zare ze halote daot disoin, Allar dorbaro he ola-u rouk.
7.25: Oḳon ami abiati fuṛintor muslar befare ḳoiram. I befare malikor ges taki ami shorashori kunu hukum faisi na, oile Allar rohomote hok-halal roia ami amar motamot zanairam.
7.26: Ou aḳeri zomanat zela mosibot aia azise, amar mone or tumra zein zela aso, ola-u ro.
7.27: Tumar zudi bou taḳe, te taire talaḳ dio na, ar bou na taḳle bia-shadi korat-o lagio na.
7.28: Oile bia ḳorle kunu guna oito nae, ar kunu abiati fuṛi bia boile tair-o guna oito nae. Ḳali zogoto tarar ḳoshṭo baṛibo, ou ḳoshṭo taki ami tumrare basaitam sairam.
7.29: Bai oḳol, ami koitam sairam, Malik Isae kub zoldi toshrif anra, beshi deri nae. Erlagi oḳon taki oula mono ḳorio, zerar bou-baichcha ase, mono ḳorio bou-baichcha nai.
7.30: Zera duḳ-mosiboto asoin, tara mone ḳoroukka kunu duḳ-mosibot nai, zera kushi-bashi korra, tara mone ḳoroukka kunu kushi-bashi nai, ar zara ḳorid-biki korer, tara-o mone ḳoroukka, ita malor ufre tarar kunu dabi-daoa nai.
7.31: Zera zogot-shongshar loia besto, tarar bab zanu furafur shongshari na oy, ḳaron bobor bazar to shango oizar.
7.32: Ami sairam, tumrare hoḳol nomunar sinta-babna taki horai raḳtam. Ḳaron abiati beṭainte sinta ḳoroin malikor befare, kila Malik Moulare kushi raḳa zae.
7.33: Oile biati manshe sinta ḳoroin shongsharor befare, kila goror bou-baichchare kushi raḳa zae,
7.34: erlagi tarar mon du-ṭanat foṛizae. Oula abiati beṭi ar fuṛinte sinta ḳoroin malikor befare, kila Malik Moulare kushi raḳa zae, zate tarar shoril ar mon fak-fobitro taḳe. Oile biati beṭinte sinta ḳoroin shongsharor befare, kila zamaire kushi raḳa zae.
7.35: Buzrae ni, ou talim oḳol to tumrar balair lagi koiram. Ami tumrar golat kunu fash lagaitam sairam na, ḳali koitam sairam, tumra nek fote solo ar dile-zane Malik Moular ashik o.
7.36: Kunu manshe zudi mono ḳore, he tar abiati fuṛir day-dayitto adae ḳorer na, fuṛir biar boyosh far oizar ḳori, he fuṛire bia deoa zorur mono ḳore, te tar kushi mafik fuṛire bia deuk. Ete kunu guna oito nae.
7.37: Oile ze manshor mon tir ase, zar mono kunu oshanti nai, he tar nizor monre shamlaia ḳam ḳore, i manshe zudi mone ḳore tar fuṛir bia-shadi zorur nae, te he ṭik kam-u ḳorer.
7.38: Oḳon buza zar, ze zone tar fuṛire bia-shadi dey, he nek kam ḳore ar ze zone tar fuṛire abiati halote raḳe, he aro beshi nek kam ḳore.
7.39: Zamai zotodin zinda taḳoin, otodin bou zamair bandono taḳoin. Oile zamai mara gele boue ḳalas fain, ar nizor fosond mafik Isayi torikar zekunu zonor gese bia boita faroin.
7.40: Ta-o ami mono ḳori, tain ṛaṛi halote roile-u aro bala. Ami buzram, ami ou hokkolta Allai ruhur bole ḳoiram.

8.1: Huno, oḳon ami devtar name bilai deoa foshador muslar ḳota ḳoiram. Amra to zani, amra hoḳlor-u aḳol-buddi ase. Oile aḳole boṛai baṛe, ar mohobbote manush goṛe.
8.2: Ḳeu zudi nizore shian mono ḳore, te zotoḳan shian oa zorur, otoḳan to oise na.
8.3: Oile ze zone Allare mohobbot ḳore, Alla Pake to tare sinoin.
8.4: Te devtar name bilai deoa foshador befare ḳoiram, amra zani, devta bolte i zogoto kunta-u nai, eḳ Alla saṛa dusra kunta-u nai.
8.5: Asmano ba zomino zekunu zagat, deb-debi name zudi kunta takia taḳe, te bout devta ar bout munib asoin.
8.6: Oile amrar zana mote ḳali eḳ Alla asoin, tain-u amrar gaibi baf. Tan ate hokkolta foyda oise, tan lagi-u amra basia asi. Ṭik oula amrar malik-o ḳali eḳzon, tan nam Isa al-Mosi. Tan usillae hokkolta foyda oise, amra ḳali tan lagi-u ṭikia asi.
8.7: Ita buzar aḳol to hoḳol manshor nai. Kunu kunu zone age devtare bozona ḳorto, erlagi tara oḳon devtar name bilai deoa foshad ḳaile, tarar bibeḳor ḳomzurie tare ḳolonki banae.
8.8: Ashole kunu nomunar ḳanir bole-u amra Allar dorbaro kobul oi na. Ḳani na ḳaile-o amrar imanor ḳeti oy na, ar ḳaile-o kunu lab oy na.
8.9: Oile hushiar roio, tumrar ou shadinota kunumonte-u zanu ḳomzur imandaror lagi gunar ḳaron na oy.
8.10: Tumar to aḳol-bibeḳ ase, oile zar bibek komzur, he zudi tumare devtar mondiro boia foshad ḳaoat deḳe, te he-o ou foshad ḳaito nae ni?
8.11: Ar ou ḳomzur baire basanir lagi-u to al-Mosie zan kurbani disla, oḳon tumar ou aḳole tar imanor shorbonash or.
8.12: Olaḳan tumra zebla tumrar mumin baiaintor loge gunar ḳam ḳoro, tarar ḳomzur bibeḳre duk deo, ou shomoy tumra al-Mosir birudde-u guna ḳoro.
8.13: Erlagi ami koiram, ḳana-finar ḳarone zudi amar bair imanor ḳeti oy, te tare guna taki basanir lagi ami gust ḳaoao ekkere bad dilaimu.

9.1: Baiainre, ami kita shadin nae ni? Ami kunu sahabi nae ni? Ami kunu amrar Malik Isare deḳsi na ni? Malikor lagi ami ze toblig kam ḳorsi, itar fol tumra nae ni?
9.2: Oinno ḳeu amare sahabi koia na manle-o tumra to manbae, amar sahabi kamor sil-sappoṛ tumra-u, ḳaron amar mazdi tumra tan ummot oiso.
9.3: Te amar sahabi fod loia zera shondoy ḳoroin, tara amar ou zuaf hunoukka.
9.4: Ami ar sahabi Barnabase kita ḳana-finar beton faibar odikar nai ni?
9.5: Mumin kunu boinre shadi korar odikar amrar nai ni? Oinno sahabi oḳole, Malik Isar baiainte ar sahabi Fitore zela zarzir bibire loia soforo zain, amra-o ola fari na ni?
9.6: Ḳali ami ar Barnabase-u nizor ate ḳamai koria ḳaitam ni?
9.7: Nizor gaṭṭir ṭeḳa bangia ḳeu sifair saḳri kore ni? Ze giroste folor bagan ḳore, he itar fol ḳae na ni? Ze raḳale foshufal raḳe, he itar dud ḳae na ni?
9.8: Ami to ḳali manush aḳole matiar na, Musa nobir shoriote-o ola ḳoise.
9.9: Shorioto ase, “Dan maṛa deoar shomoy gorur muko hufi lagaio na.” Te Allae ḳali gorur ḳota-u sinta ḳoroin ni?
9.10: Tain ashole amrar ḳota-u ḳoisoin, ikan hasa nae ni? Nichchoy, ita amrar lagi-u leḳa oisil, ḳaron zein ḳet ḳoroin ar zein dan maṛa dein, fosholor baṭ faoar ashae-u tarar ita ḳora usit.
9.11: Te amra zela tumrar maze ruhanik bisi ruisi, oula zudi tumrar ges taki duniabi kani-fani zugai, te beshi kunta niram ni?
9.12: Ar ou befare zudi tumrar ufre oinno manshor dabi kaṭe, te amra aro beshi dabi kaṭaitam fari na ni? Oile amra ila dabi na ḳaṭaia shoijjo ḳoriar, zate al-Mosir befare kush-ḳobri toblig kamo amra ḳeuror fotor ḳaṭa na oi.
9.13: Tumra zano na ni, fobitro Baytul-Mukaddoso zera ḳam ḳoroin, tara oḳan taki-u ḳana-fina fain, ar kurbani kanat zera ḳam ḳoroin, tara ou kurbanir mal taki baṭ fain.
9.14: Ṭik olaḳan Malik Isar hukum ase, zara kush-ḳobri toblig koroin, tara zanu ou ḳamor usillae ḳaoa-finda fain.
9.15: Oile ami to er kunta-u nisi na. Ar oḳon tumrare-o ita lekiar na, amar lagi otar bebosta ḳortae ḳori. Oḳon amar ou boṛaire zudi keu beḳama banailae, te amar mori zaoa-u bala.
9.16: Ami ze kush-ḳobri toblig koriar, ete amar boṛai deḳanir kunta nae, ita amar lagi forz. Toblig na ḳorle amar ufre lannot foṛouk!
9.17: Oile ami zudi kushi mone toblig kori, te to amar furuskar ase, ar zudi nizor kushie na-o ḳori, te malikor deoa zimmadar hishabe to ḳoriar.
9.18: Oḳon amar i kamor furuskar kita? I furuskar oilo, kush-ḳobri toblig koria hari faona beton nei na, bina foyshae toblig kora-u amar beton.
9.19: Ami zudio kunu beṭar gulam nae, tebou bout manshor zan basanir lagi nizore hoḳlor gulam banaia raḳsi.
9.20: Ihudi oḳlor mon joy ḳorar lagi Ihudi shomazo ami Ihudir laḳan oisi. Ami to Musa nobir shoriotor odine nae, oile zara tan shoriot mane, tarare joy ḳorar lagi ami tarar laḳan oisi.
9.21: Ar zara shoriotor baira, tarare joy ḳorar lagi ami shoriotor baira manshor laḳan oisi. Ashole ami Allar deoa shoriotor bare nae, al-Mosir shoriotor odine asi.
9.22: Zera ḳomzur, tarar gese ami komzuror laḳan oisi, tarare-o joy ḳorar lagi. Befar oilo, zekunu monte kisu manshor zan basanir lagi ami hoḳol shomazor mon zugai soliar.
9.23: Ḳali kush-ḳobrir lagi-u ami ita ḳoriar, zate er rohomotor bagi oi.
9.24: Tumra zano na ni, douṛor ḳelat uṭia hoḳole-u douṛae, oile furuskar ḳali eḳzone-u fae. Oḳon tumra-o oula douṛao zate furuskar fao.
9.25: Douṛor ḳelat douṛaia hari manshe ola eḳ mala fae, ze mala bade nosṭo oizae, ar ou mala faoar lagi era bout ḳoṭin niom-ḳanun-o mane. Oile amra to asol okkoy mala faoar lagi ita ḳorram.
9.26: Erlagi uddesho saṛa ami douṛairam na. Zeta beṭainte batashor loge kilakili koroin, ami to itar laḳan nae.
9.27: Borong ami nizor shorilre ḳoshṭo dia gulamor laḳan raḳsi, zate oinnor gese kush-ḳobri toblig koria hari, furuskar taki nize bad na foṛi.

10.1: Bai oḳol, ami sairam, morubumir maze amrar moy-murobbi oḳlor goṭona tumrar mono rouk. Era hoḳol to gaibi megor kuṭir tole roita, hoḳole faoe aṭia Nil doria faroia gesla.
10.2: Hoḳole-u hou megor kuṭi ar Nil doriar maze Hozrot Musar torikae pak gusol ḳorsla.
10.3: Tara Allar deoa eḳoi laḳan gaibi kani kaisoin,
10.4: eḳoi laḳan gaibi fani-o ḳaisoin, hoḳole ola ek kudroti fattor taki fani kaita, ze fattor tarar loge loge roito, ou fattor-u oila al-Mosi.
10.5: Ta-o era beshir bag manshor ufre Alla Pak kushi asla na. Erlagi-u tarar lash morubumir maze foṛi roilo.
10.6: Ita goṭona oilo amrar talimor lagi eḳ itihash, zate ota dekia amra hushiar oi ar tarar laḳan ku-fotor ashik na oi.
10.7: Tarar maze ḳeu ḳeu zela murtipuja ḳorsil, tumra ila ḳorio na. Tourat Shorifo ase, “Hoḳol manush ḳanit boila, bade tara ḳaoa-daoa ḳoria hari, hoi-hulla ḳori nas-gan, furti-amud ḳorat lagla.”
10.8: Aroḳbar tarar mazor bout zone zina ḳorae, eḳoi dine teish azar manush mara gesla. Te amra zanu olaḳan zina taki basia roi.
10.9: Tarar mazor boute Malik Moulare forikka ḳorat lagia hafor ḳamoṛ ḳaia morsoin. Amra zanu tanre ila forikka na ḳori.
10.10: Tarar mazor boute na-kush oia boḳa-zoḳa ḳorae, Allar gozobor firistae tarare binash ḳorsoin. Erlagi tumra ila ḳorio na.
10.11: Tarar ufre ita goṭisil nishana hishabe, zate ota dekia amra hushiar oi. Amra zera ou aḳeri zomanar manush, ou leḳa foṛia amra zanu shabdane roi.
10.12: Erlagi kunu manshe zudi mono ḳore, he mozbut ase, te he hushiar rouk zate tar iman na ale.
10.13: Manshor zindegit zelaḳan forikka ae, otar baira noya kunu forikka to tumrar ufre or na. Alla Pak to hok-halal, tain tumrare shoijjor otirikto kunu forikkat falaita nae, borong forikka taki basibar fot-o batai diba, zate tumra ita shoijjo ḳortae faro.
10.14: O mayar dust oḳol, erlagi ami tumrare ḳoiram, deb-debir puja taki zan basao.
10.15: Tumrare aḳoldar zania-u ami koiram, ami zeta ḳoiram tumra ita zasai-basai koria deḳo.
10.16: Al-Mosir mezbanir shomoy, shukria adae ḳoria fiala taki amra ze shorbot ḳai, itar mazdi amra al-Mosir lour loge shorik oi na ni? Ar ze ruṭi siṛia ḳai, i kanir mazdi tan shorilor loge shorik oi na ni?
10.17: Amra hoḳole zebla eḳ ruṭi baṭia ḳai, te buza zae, amra bout zon oile-o amra ḳali eḳ shoril.
10.18: Huno, Boni Israilor halot sinta ḳoro, tarar zeta manshe kurbanir gust ḳain, tara hou kurbani kanar hoḳol ḳamo-o shorik oizain na ni?
10.19: Ar ami kunu ḳoiram ni, devtar namor foshadre hishabo dora zae, ba ou devtare hishabo dora zae?
10.20: Na, muṭe-u na. Ta-o bidormi oḳole zoto nomunar boli dein, ita deo-danob, but-ferotor name-u dein, Allar name nae. Te ami sai na, ou but-ferotor loge tumrar kunu ḳatir-dusti rouk.
10.21: Huno, Malik Isar mezbani ar but-ferotor mezbani, i duio ḳamo shorik oa tumrar lagi ṭik nae. Malikor fiala ar butor fiala, duiota taki eḳloge ḳaoa ṭik nae.
10.22: Te amra kita ḳoriar, amra Malik Isar dilo aguin lagaitam ni? Tan loge laṛai koria zittam farmu ni? Ḳana-finar befare hushiari
10.23: Mono or ni, ami to age ḳoisi, kunu kunu zone ḳoin, “Amar lagi kunta-u haram nae, hokkolta-u zaiz.” Oile hokkolta zen manshor lagi ufoḳari, ila sinta to ṭik nae. Zudio era ḳoin, hokkolta-u halal, oile hoḳoltae to manshor iman baṛae na.
10.24: Te kunu zone-u nizor sharto loia fagol oio na, borong oinnor balai korar sesṭa ḳoro.
10.25: Bazar-aṭo zekunu gust biki oile ita ḳaio, nizor bibeḳre shanti raḳar lagi kunu shondoy ḳorio na.
10.26: Fobitro Zobur Shorife to ḳoy, “I zogot ar zogotor hokkolta-u Mabudor.”
10.27: Erlagi amrar torikar bairor kunu manshe zudi tumrare daot dein, ar tumra zaitae sao, te bibeḳre ṭanḍa raḳar lagi kunu shondoy na ḳoria zeta samne dein ota-u ḳaio.
10.28: Oile ḳeu zudi tumrare zanai dey, i kani kunu devtar namor foshad, te ze zone ikan ḳoise, tar balair lagi ar bibeḳor aramor lagi ita ḳaio na.
10.29: Ami to tumrar bibeḳor ḳota ḳoiram na, hou dusra manshor bibeḳor ḳota ḳoiram. Ḳaron oinno manshor bibeḳ-bisare, amar ichcha-onichchar shadinotat ḳene nak golaito?
10.30: Ami zudi Allar shukria adae ḳoria ḳana-fina ḳai, te ze ḳanir lagi shukria adae ḳorlam, ou ḳanir lagi ar bodnam oito ḳene?
10.31: Erlagi tumra ḳana-fina ḳoro ba zeta-u ḳoro na ḳene, hoḳolta-u Allar gourobor niote ḳorio.
10.32: Boni Israil ba bin zati, ba Allar zomator kunu manshor fotor ḳaṭa bonio na.
10.33: Ami zela hoḳol nomunar manshore hoḳol befare kush raḳar sesṭa ḳori, tumra-o oula ḳorio. Ami to nizor shartor sinta ḳori na, shob manshor balair sesṭa ḳori, zate tara nazat hasil ḳoroin.

11.1: Te ami zela al-Mosir laḳan soliar, tumra-o oula amar laḳan solo. Zomato Allar ebadot-bondegi (11:2–14:40) Niom mania ebadot ḳoro
11.2: O bai oḳol, tumra amar deoa talim mono rakia solrae, ar hoḳol befare-u amare iad raḳrae, erlagi ami tumrar tarif ḳoriar.
11.3: Te ami sairam, tumra oḳan buzo, al-Mosi-u oila hoḳol beṭaintor mata, beṭain oila beṭintor mata, ar Alla Pak oila al-Mosir mata.
11.4: Ebadot-bondegir shomoy ze beṭae mata guria dua-munazat ḳore, ba firaki mate, he to tar matare oshomman ḳore.
11.5: Olaḳan ze beṭie mata na guria dua-munazat ḳore, ba firaki mate, ou beṭie-o tair matar oshomman ḳore, tai mata ḳamail beṭintor laḳan bonizae.
11.6: Kunu beṭie zudi mata na gure, te tair sul ḳamailauk. Oile beṭintor sul ḳamani shoromor bishoy mono oile, tair mata guria raḳouk.
11.7: Ebadot-bondegir shomoy mata guria raḳa beṭaintor lagi ṭik nae, Allae to beṭaintore tan nizor surote foyda ḳorsoin ar beṭaintor mazdi-u Allar mohima zair oy, oile beṭintor mazdi beṭaintor mohima zair oy.
11.8: Foyla beṭa manush Baba Adom to beṭi taki foyda oisoin na, oile foyla beṭi manush Mai Haoa nichchoy beṭa taki-u foyda oisoin.
11.9: Ar beṭintor lagi beṭain foyda oisoin na, borong beṭaintor lagi-u beṭin foyda oisoin.
11.10: Ou talim mafik firista oḳlor ḳota kial rakia, tabedari manar nishana hishabe hoḳol beṭinte mata guria raḳa zorur.
11.11: Ta-o Malik Isar torikar beṭi manshe goror beṭar ufre borosha ḳoroin, ar beṭae-o ola beṭir ufre borosha ḳoroin.
11.12: Ḳaron, foyla beṭa Adom taki zudio foyla beṭi Mai Haoa foyda, ta-o beṭin taki-u hirbar beṭaintor zonom oy. Ashole hokkolta-u to Allar foyda.
11.13: Tumra nize-u bisar ḳori deḳo, matat ḳafoṛ na dia kunu beṭie dua-munazat ḳora ṭik ni?
11.14: Ar shomazor hal-sal taki-u to buza zae, beṭaintor matat lamba sul raḳa shoromor befar,
11.15: oile beṭinte lamba sul raḳle tarar shunam baṛe na ni? Nizore guria raḳar lagi-u to tara i lamba sul faisoin.
11.16: Te ita loia ḳeu torko-bitorko ḳorle, amar forishkar zuaf oilo, ita saṛa dusra kunu niom amrar maze nai ar Allar zomator maze-o nai. Isa al-Mosir mezbanir befare
11.17: Oḳon ami ze befare foramish ditam sairam, i befare to tumra muṭe-u tarif faoar zuka nae. Tumra zomato zela shorik o, itae tumrar kunu fayda oy na, borong keti oy.
11.18: Ami huniar, tumra zebla zomato shorik o, ou shomoy tumrar maze doladoli taḳe, ar ita kisu ami bishash-o ḳori.
11.19: Ashole to tumrar maze motor omil taḳbo-u, zate tumrar mazor ḳaṭi nikut manshor forisoy mile.
11.20: Huno, tumra zebla ekḳano milia ebadot-bondegi koro, ou shomoy to al-Mosir mezbanir niote ḳani bilani oy na.
11.21: Ḳaron tumra eḳzone aroḳzonor bae kial na ḳoria-u ḳani kailao. Tumrar eḳzonor feṭo buk taḳe, ar aroḳzon ḳaia ṭal oizae.
11.22: Ḳana-fina ḳaibar lagi tumrar kunu gor-baṛi nai ni? Tumra ichcha ḳoria Allar zomatre elami korrae ni? Ar zerar ḳanir kunta nai, tarare shorom dirae ni? Oḳon ami ar kita ḳoitam? Tumrar tarif ḳortam ni? Nauzubilla!
11.23: Ashole ami Malik Isar ges taki ze talim faisi, ou talim-u ami tumrare disi. Malik Isare ze rait dushmonor ato dorai deoa oisil, hou rait tain ḳanir ruṭi ato loila,
11.24: ar Allar shukria adae ḳorla, bade ou ruṭi ṭukraia ḳoila, “Ita to amar shoril, ou shoril tumrar lagi bilai deoa or, te amare mono raḳar lagi oula ḳorio.”
11.25: Ola ḳaoar bade tain shorbotor fiala loia ḳoila, “Amar lour zoriae Allar loge milonor ze noya usilla ḳaim oibo, ou fiala oilo er nishana. Tumra ou fiala taki kaoar shomoy amare iad ḳorar lagi hamesha ola ḳorio.”
11.26: Te tumra zotobar ou ruṭi kaibae ar ou fialar shorbot ḳaibae, Malik Isa hirbar na aoa forzonto otobar-u tan moutor ḳota elan ḳorrae.
11.27: Erlagi kam-ḳeali koria ḳeu zudi i ruṭi kae ar fialar shorbot ḳae, te he Malik Isar shoril ar lour birudde guna ḳoria dushi bonizae.
11.28: Ou ruṭi kaibar age ar fialar shorbot ḳaibar age, manshe nizore zasai kori deḳouk.
11.29: Ḳaron ita ḳaoar shomoy he zudi Malik Isar shorilor befare na buze, te ita ḳaia he nizor ufre gozob ḍakia ane.
11.30: Otar lagi-u tumrar mazor bout manush ḳomzur ar bemari asoin, emonki keu ḳeu morsoin.
11.31: Amra nizor bisar nize ḳorille, malikor ator bisar taki rehai faimu.
11.32: Oile malike zebla amrar bisar ḳoroin, ou shomoy tain amrare shashon ḳoroin, zate duniar hoḳlor loge aḳerator din amrare dushi shaibosto ḳora na oy.
11.33: Erlagi O bai oḳol, tumra zebla mezbani kaoar lagi ekḳano dola o, ou shomoy eḳe-oinnor bae kial ḳorio.
11.34: Eḳzonor zudi feṭo buk lagizae, te he baṛi taki kaia auk, zate tumra ekḳano oae kunu shaza na fao. Te ami zebla tumrar gese aimu, ou shomoy bad-baki befare nosiot ḳormu.

12.1: O bai oḳol, ami sairam Allai Pak Ruhur dan-niamotor befare tumrar kunta-u ozana na rouk.
12.2: Tumrar zana ase, age zebla tumra Allar ebadot ḳortae na, hou shomoy tumrare olaḳan deb-debir bae ṭania neoa oito, zetae kunta matito fare na.
12.3: Oile ami tumrare zanairam, Allar ruhur bole matile kunu manshe ikan ḳoy na, “Isar ufre lannot foṛouk.” Ar Allai Pak Ruhur bol saṛa ḳeu ḳoito-o fare na, “Hozrot Isa-u malik.”
12.4: Ou eḳoi Pak Ruhur nanan nomunar dan-niamot ase.
12.5: Amra nanan niome eḳoi malikor kezmot ḳori.
12.6: Amra forteḳ zonre nanan nomunar ḳam-ḳaz deoa oise, oile Alla Pak to eḳzon-u, tain nanan ufaye amrar maze ḳam ḳoroin.
12.7: Hoḳlor faydar lagi ou Pak Ruhu eḳo zonor maze eḳo nomunae zair oin.
12.8: Ou Pak Ruhur bole kunu kunu zonre gian-buddir mat mata, ar ḳeurore aḳoldari mat matar niamot deoa oy.
12.9: Eḳzone ou ruhur bole gaibi borosha fain, ar ou ruhur bole dusra zone bemarire bala ḳorar ḳemota fain,
12.10: ḳeu ḳeu keramoti kam ḳorar ḳemota, ḳeu ḳeu firaki matar ḳemota, ḳeu ḳeu bad-bala ruhu oḳol ar zin-butre sinar ḳemota, ḳeu ḳeu nanan nomunar gaibi bashae matar ḳemota ar ḳeu ḳeu itar mani buzaia dibar ḳemota fain.
12.11: Ita hoḳol ḳam to ou eḳoi Pak Ruhe ḳoroin. Ou dan-niamot oḳol tan nizor kushi mafik forteḳ muminre baṭia dein. Eḳ shorilor maze bout ongo
12.12: O baiain oḳol, eḳ shorilor zela bout ongo taḳe, ola bout ongo milia eḳ shoril oy, al-Mosi-o to ṭik olaḳan.
12.13: Amra Boni Israil oi ba bin zati oi, azad ba gulam oi, ou eḳoi Pak Ruhe hoḳlor torikabondi oise eḳ shoril oar lagi. Hoḳole-u to ou eḳoi Pak Ruhu faisi.
12.14: Kunu manshor shorilre ḳali eḳ ongo dia banail oise na, borong bout ongo zuṛa deoa oise.
12.15: Oḳon faoe zudi koy, “Amar nam to at nae, te ami shorilor ongo-o nae,” erlagi fao zen shorilor ongo nae, ikan to ṭik nae.
12.16: Oula ḳane zudi koy, “Amar nam to souk nae, te ami shorilor ongo-o nae,” erlagi kan zen shorilor ongo nae, ikan to ṭik nae.
12.17: Manshor asta shoril-u zudi souk oizito, te hunbar ḳemota ḳoi failo one? Ar zudi shara shoril-u ḳan oizito, te geran hungibar ḳemota ḳoi roilo one?
12.18: Te Allae tan nizor kial-kushi mafik shorilor nanan ongore eḳ ek kori hazaisoin.
12.19: Hoḳol ongo zudi eḳlaḳan oizito, taile shorilor kun halot oilo one?
12.20: Shorilo bout ongo ase, ta-o shoril to eḳṭa-u.
12.21: Souke atre ḳoito fare na, “Tumare amar dorḳar nai,” ar matae duio faore ḳoito fare na, “Tumrare amar dorḳar nai.”
12.22: Ashole shorilor ze ongore ḳomzur mono oy, oguin-u beshi dorḳari.
12.23: Shorilor ze shoromor ongore amra huru-muru mono ḳori, iṭare amra beshi dam dei, mani ze ongore bare deḳani zae na, itare amra ijjot ḳoria guria raki.
12.24: Oile ze ongore bare deḳani zae, itare guria raḳar dorḳar oy na. Ashole Allae ou huru-muru ar ḳomzur ongore beshi ijjot dia, hoḳol ongore zuṛa lagaia eḳ shoril banaisoin,
12.25: zate shoril bagabagi na oy, borong eḳ ongoe aroḳ ongore nizor laḳan mono ḳore.
12.26: Shorilor eḳ ongor zudi koshṭo oy, te shara shorile ḳoshṭo fae, ar eḳ onge ijjot faile, asta shorile kushi-bashi kore.
12.27: Te tumra-u oilae al-Mosir shoril, tumra eḳo zon ou shorilor eḳo ongo.
12.28: Zano ni, Allae to zomator bitre foyla sahabi, bade firaki mat matra, bade ustad oḳol boail ḳorsoin. Erbade boail ḳorsoin zera keramoti kam ḳorra, bemar bala ḳorra, shaijjo-shohayota ḳorra, Isayi zomatre salaora ar nanan gaibi bashae matra zon.
12.29: Te era hoḳole-u kunu sahabi fod faisoin ni? Hoḳole-u firaki matoin ni? Hoḳol-u ustad ni? Ar hoḳole kunu keramoti kam ḳorar ḳemota faisoin ni?
12.30: Hoḳole kunu bemar shifa ḳorta faroin ni? Hoḳole-u gaibi bashae matoin ni? Hoḳole-u itar mani buzaia dita faroin ni? Nichchoy na.
12.31: Ta-o ami koiram, tumra hoḳol taki dami niamot oḳol faoar lagi ashik o. Ar kial ḳoro, oḳon ami tumrare aro bala ekkan fot deḳairam.

13.1: Ami zudi zogotor manush ba asmani firistar gaibi bashae mati, ar amar bitre kunu mohobbot na taḳe, te to ami zure zure bazail fitolor gonṭi ba jonjon ḳora ḳortalor laḳan oigesi.
13.2: Amar zudi firaki matibar ḳemota taḳe, hoḳol batuni befar buzi, hoḳol nomunar aḳol-buddie kamil oi, ar amar imani boldi usa faṛore-o eḳ zaga taki aroḳ zagat horailitam fari, oile amar dilo kunu mohobbot na taḳe, te Allar nozoro ami kunta-u nae.
13.3: Amar hoḳol don-samana zudi gorib-dukire bilai dei, emonki amar shorilre-o zudi zalanir lagi dan ḳorilai, ar amar bitre zudi mohobbot na taḳe, te kunu fayda nai.
13.4: Mohobbot hoḳol shomoy sobor ḳore, doya-maya ḳore, ingsha ḳore na, boṛai kore na, ohonkar ḳore na,
13.5: bad bebohar ḳore na, nizor shartor sesṭa ḳore na, rag-gusa ḳore na, ḳeu kunu ḳeti korle mono raḳe na,
13.6: naformanit kushi oy na, borong hokikotie kushi kore.
13.7: Mohobbote hokkolta shoijjo ḳore, hoḳolta bishash ḳore, hoḳol befare monor maze asha zugae ar hoḳol befare sobor ḳoria doijjo dore.
13.8: Huno, hoḳol firaki mat eḳdin fuṛaizibo, nanan basha-o shesh oizibo ar aḳoldaror aḳol-o fuṛaizibo, oile mohobbot kunu shomoy fuṛae na.
13.9: Te oḳon amra to kunuta-u shullo-ana zani na, firaki mat-o shullo-ana ḳoitam fari na.
13.10: Oile amra zani, shullo-ana oar shomoy zebla aibo, ou shomoy banga-sura hoḳolta fuṛaizibo.
13.11: Ami zebla huru aslam, ou shomoy huruttar laḳan matitam, huruttar laḳan sinta-babna ḳortam, ar huruttar laḳan bisar-bibechona ḳortam. Oile oḳon to boṛo oigesi, erlagi huruttar laḳan asar-bebohar bad dilaisi.
13.12: Oḳon to amra zafsa aynar maze hoḳolta forishkar deḳram na, bade hou shullo-ana oar shomoy aile amra hoḳolta samna-samni deḳmu. Oḳon ami hokkolta furafur zani na, hou shomoy aile ami hoḳolta furafur zanmu, Allae amare zela furafur sinoin, ola ami-o hoḳolta zanmu.
13.13: Buzrae ni, iman, asha, ar mohobbot, ou tino don hor-hamesha roibo, itar maze mohobbot-u hoḳol taki boṛo.

14.1: Erlagi O bai oḳol, tumra-o mohobbotor lagi ashik o, Pak Ruhur deoa dan-niamotor lagi kiali o, ḳas ḳori firaki matibar ḳemota faite kiali o.
14.2: Ḳaron ze manshe gaibi kunu bashae mate, he ita manshor loge mater na, Allar loge-u mater. Tar mator basha kunu manshe buze na, he ḳali Pak Ruhur bole batuni buli koy.
14.3: Oile zein firaki matoin, ein manshor gese-u matoin, en mate manshor zindegire goṛia tule, manshor dilo asha ar shantona zugae.
14.4: Te ze zone gaibi bashae mate, he ḳali nizore goṛia tule, oile zein firaki matoin, ein to Allar zomatre goṛia tuloin.
14.5: Erlagi ami sairam, tumra hoḳole-u gaibi bashae mato, oile aro beshi sairam, tumra hoḳole firaki mat mato. Mono rakio, kunu manshe zudi gaibi bashae mate, ar mator bade zomator manshore goṛia tular lagi dusra ḳeu itar mani buzaia na dey, te hou zein firaki matoin ein-u boṛo.
14.6: Baiainre, ami zudi tumrar gese aia ḳali gaibi kunu bashae mati, oile er mazdi Allar batuni munshar ḳota, aḳol-hekmotor ḳota, firaki kunu mat ba kitabi nosiot na zanai, te amaredi tumrar kunu fayda oibo ni?
14.7: Mone ḳoro, bashi, sharinda, ar zeta baiddo-bazonar bitre kunu zan nai, ita zudi ganor shoṭik shur-tal na mania baze, te ou baznat kita bazer, manshe ita ḳemne buzbo?
14.8: Zuddot zaoar lagi fouzi shingae zudi forishkar aoaz na dey, te kunu sifai reḍi oibo ni?
14.9: Olaḳan tumi zebla ozana bashae mato, te tumi kita ḳoirae, tara ḳemne buzbo? Tumar i mat ḳali batashor loge matrae ni?
14.10: I duniat nanan zator buli ase, ita kunuṭa-u mani saṛa nae.
14.11: Ar ami zudi ou buli na buzi, te ze zone matira, tan gese to ami bideshi manshor laḳan, ar tain-o amar gese bideshi.
14.12: Ikan to tumrar belae-o ṭik. Tumra zebla Pak Ruhur deoa dan-niamotor lagi kiali oirae, te ze niamot dia zomatre goṛia tula zae, ou niamot faoar lagi-u beshi sesṭa ḳorio.
14.13: Erlagi ze manshe gaibi bashae mate, he Allar gese mangouk, zate itar mani buzaia dito fare.
14.14: Ami zudi gaibi bashae dua ḳori, te ashole amar ruhe dua ḳorer, amar nizor mone kunta ḳorer na.
14.15: Oḳon ami kita ḳortam? Ami ruhu dia dua ḳortam, ar buddi dia-o ḳortam. Ami ruhu dia git-gozol gaimu, buddi dia-o git-gozol gaimu.
14.16: Ar tumi zudi kali ruhu dia shukria adae ḳoro, te mozlisor manshe kila Amin ḳoito? Tara to buzer-u na tumi kita ḳoirae, tara to osina zonor laḳan roila.
14.17: Tumi hoyto ṭik babe-u shukria adae ḳorrae, oile ou manshore to goṛia tula or na.
14.18: Ami Alla Pakor shukria adae ḳori, ḳaron ami gaibi bashae tumrar saite bout beshi mati.
14.19: Ta-o zomator mahfilor maze gaibi bashae azar azar ḳotar bodla, manshor talimor lagi ami aḳol ḳaṭaia ḳali fasḳan ḳota ḳoimu.
14.20: Baiainre, tumrar aḳol-buddi huruttar laḳan na oia boyosko manshor laḳan ouk. Oile ingsha-nindar befare tumrar mon masum baichchar laḳan ouk.
14.21: Asmani Kitabo ase, Osina bashae matra manushdi, bideshi manshor mukdi, ami ou zatir loge matimu. Ta-o amar mat tara hunto nae, ikan ami Mabude ḳoiram.
14.22: Te buza zae, gaibi bashae mata imandar oḳlor lagi kunu nishana nae, borong o-imandar oḳlor lagi ita eḳṭa nishana. Ar firaki mat mata o-imandaror lagi kunu nishana nae, oile imandaror lagi to ita eḳṭa nishana.
14.23: Zomator hoḳol manush eḳ zagat milar bade, hoḳole zudi eḳloge gaibi bashae mate, ar ou shomoy zomator bairor ba o-imandar kunu manush ino ae, te tara tumrare fagol ḳoiba na ni?
14.24: Ar hoḳole zudi firaki matoin, omon shomoy kunu o-imandar aia ino hamae, te ou hoḳlor mator mazdi he nizor gunar halot buzilibo, ou mat hunae tar nizor bisar nize ḳorbo.
14.25: Tar monor lukail bishoy kula-mela oibo, teu he soizdat foṛia Allar gourob-tarif ḳoria ḳoibo, “Afnarar maze nichchoy Alla Pak azir asoin.” Isayi zomator niom-ḳanun mana
14.26: Baiainre, kita oito? Tumra zebla eḳ zagat zomato dola o, ou shomoy ḳeu git-gozol gain, ḳeu nosiot ḳoroin, ḳeu batuni befare ḳoin, ḳeu gaibi bashae matoin, ar ḳeu itar mani buzaia dein. Te zein zeta-u ḳoroin na ḳene, ita zanu zomatre goṛia tular niote oy.
14.27: Ḳeu zudi gaibi bashae kunta mate, te eḳozon ḳori dui-tinzone matouk ar eḳzone itar mani buzaia deuk.
14.28: Mani buzai dibar ḳeu na taḳle, tara zomato sufsaf taḳouk, ḳali nize nize Allar loge matouk.
14.29: Ar firaki matra oḳole ola dui-tinzone matouk ar baki hoḳole zasai-basai korouk.
14.30: Oile zomato zera boat asoin, tara ḳeuror gese zudi kunu ohi ba batuni kobor nazil oy, te zein boyan ḳorra, tain nirai oizaukka.
14.31: Olaḳan tumra hoḳole-u eḳ ek kori firaki matio, zate hunra oḳole talim ar utshaho fae.
14.32: Firaki matrar ruhu to tarar nizor boshe taḳe,
14.33: Alla Pake nichchoy gulmal fosond ḳoroin na, borong shanti fosond ḳoroin.
14.34: Allar pak bonda oḳlor hoḳol zomator niom-ḳanun oilo, zomator maze beṭi manush nirai roa usit, gof-shof ḳora tarar lagi ṭik nae. Shoriotor niom mafik tara odinota manouk.
14.35: Tara kunu talim zanar kiali oile baṛit gia nizor zamair ges taki zanouk. Ḳaron zomator maze beṭinte gof-shof ḳora shorom.
14.36: Aichcha ḳo sain, Allar kalam kunu tumrar ges taki bar oise ni? Ḳali tumrar gese-u aise ni?
14.37: Mono rakio, kunu manshe zudi nizore pir-dorbesh ba batuni kemota-ala mono ḳore, te he ikan buzilauk, ami tumrar gese zeta leḳlam, ita hokkolta-u Malik Isar hukum.
14.38: Ar ḳeu ita na manle, tare-o mainno ḳora oito nae.
14.39: Erlagi O bai oḳol, tumra firaki mat matibar lagi kiali o, ar gaibi bashae matite-o bada dio na.
14.40: Ta-o zomator hoḳol ḳam-u furafur adob-ḳayda ar niom-ḳanun mania ḳora zorur.

15.1: O mumin bai oḳol, ami age ze kush-ḳobri toblig korsilam, hou ḳota oḳon iad ḳorai diram. Tumra to ita kobul ḳorslae ar imane ṭikia-o roiso.
15.2: Ami ze kalam toblig korsi, ita zudi tumra mozbut ḳori doria raḳo, te ou kush-ḳobrir mazdi nazat fairae, ar na faile tumrar iman ana-u beḳama.
15.3: Ashole ami nize ze talim faisi, ou talimre kub zoruri mono ḳoria tumrare-o zanaisi. Allar kalam mafik amrar gunar mafir lagi al-Mosie nizor zan kurbani disoin.
15.4: Tanre dafon ḳora oisil, ar Allar kalam mafik moutor tin dinor din tain murda taki zinda oisoin.
15.5: Zinda oar bade tain foyla sahabi Fitorre, bade tan hou barozon sahabire deḳa disoin.
15.6: Erbade tain eḳloge fas-shor-o beshi mumin baire deḳa disoin. Erar maze ḳeu ḳeu mara gele-o, oḳono beshir bag zinda asoin.
15.7: Erbade tan bai Iakubre, bade hoḳol sahabire deḳa disoin.
15.8: Ar ami to hoḳlor heshor juli-jaṛa fut, ou amare-o tain deḳa disoin.
15.9: Sahabi oḳlor maze ami-u hoḳol taki nogoinno, ami to sahabi koia forisoy dibar laḳ nae, age ami Allar zomator ufre zulum ḳortam.
15.10: Oile oḳon ami zela oisi, ita Allar rohomote-u oisi. Amar ufre tan i rohomot beḳama gese na, ami oinno sahabi oḳol taki beshi menot ḳorsi. I menot to ami nize nize ḳortam farsi na, borong Allar rohomote-u ita ḳoraise.
15.11: Erlagi ami ba oinno kunu sahabie zein-u toblig kori na ḳene, amra ou eḳoi befare-u toblig koriar, ita hunia tumra-o iman ancho. Amra moron bade zinda oimu
15.12: Te al-Mosire murda taki zinda ḳora oise ḳoia zebla toblig kora oy, taile tumrar mazor ḳeu ḳeu ḳemne ḳoy, manush morigele ar zinda oita nae?
15.13: Moron bade zinda oia uṭte na farle to, al-Mosi-o zinda oisoin na.
15.14: Ar al-Mosi zinda oia na uṭle to amrar toblig-o beḳama ar tumrar iman anao beḳama.
15.15: Emonki oḳan-o buza zar zen, Allar befare amra zeta toblig koriar ita misa, ḳaron amrar toblig oilo, Allae al-Mosire murda taki zinda ḳorsoin. Oile murda oḳolre zudi zinda ḳora na oy, te to tain al-Mosire-o zinda ḳorsoin na.
15.16: Ar murda oḳol zudi zinda oia na uṭoin, te to al-Mosi-o zinda oia uṭsoin na.
15.17: Al-Mosire zudi zinda ḳora na oia-u taḳe, te to tumrar iman beḳama, ar tumra oḳono gunar maze habuḍubu ḳairae.
15.18: Taile al-Mosir torikar zerar mout oigese, tara-o to binash oigesoin.
15.19: Al-Mosir ufre amrar ze asha, i asha zudi kali ou duniabi zindegir lagi oy, te to hoḳol taki amrar-u beshi bod nosib.
15.20: Oile asol ḳota oilo, al-Mosire to hasau murda taki zinda ḳora oise. Tain-u foyla foshol, murda taki zoto zonre zinda ḳora oibo, erar maze tanre-u foyla zinda ḳora oise.
15.21: Buzrae ni, eḳzon manshor mazdi zela mout aise, ola zinda oia uṭa-o eḳzon manshor mazdi aise.
15.22: Baba Adomor aolad hishabe hoḳol manshor zela moron oy, al-Mosir ummot hishabe oula hoḳolre zinda ḳora oibo.
15.23: Oile ermaze ḳota ase, Allae tan morzi mafik dafe dafe hoḳolta ḳoraiba. Ḳeto taki foyla tula fosholor laḳan foyla dafo al-Mosire zinda ḳora oise, bade tain dusrabar toshrif anar ḳalo tan ummot oḳolre-o zinda ḳora oibo.
15.24: Erbade kiamotor ḳalo al-Mosie duniabi hoḳol shashon, odikar ar ḳemotare binash ḳoria gaibi baf Allar ato bashshai shomzaiba.
15.25: Ḳaron, Allae zoto shomoy forzonto al-Mosir hoḳol dushmonre tan faor tolat na falain, oto shomoy forzonto tain bashshai korte oibo.
15.26: Ar shesh dushmon moutre-o tain binash ḳorba.
15.27: Fobitro Zobur Shorifo ase, “Tain hokkoltare-u al-Mosir faor tolat raḳsoin.” Te buza zae, hokkoltare al-Mosir odine raḳar mani oilo, Allae tan nizore bad rakia oinno hoḳoltare-u al-Mosir tole raḳsoin.
15.28: Ar hokkolta tan odine aia harle, hokkoltare loia ou ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla-o Alla Pakor odin oiba. Zate zein hoḳolta tan odine raḳsila, hou Alla Pak-u hokkoltar uforala oin.
15.29: Aichcha doro, murda oḳlor lagi zera toubar gusol ḳorer, murda oḳolre zudi kunudin-u zinda ḳora na oy, te erar fayda kita?
15.30: Ar amra sahabi oḳol-o ḳene gonṭae gonṭae bifodor mukamuki oiar?
15.31: Oy, bai oḳol, ami to forteḳ din-u moutor mukamuki oiar! Amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir name tumrare loia ze boṛai deḳai, ou boṛair lagi-u ami tumrare ita zanairam.
15.32: Ifis ṭauno zongli zanuar falor loge ami ze laṛai korsi, ita zudi kali duniabi niote ḳoria taki, te amar kunu lab oise ni? Murda oḳolre zudi zinda ḳora na oy, te ao, ola ḳoi, “Ao, ḳao-dao furti koro, ḳail to nichchit moron oibo.”
15.33: Baiainre, tumra bul ḳorio na, ola eḳ silleḳ ase, “Ku-shongie bala manshore-o naṭailae.”
15.34: Erlagi tumra bod nisha taki hozag o, ar guna ḳorio na. Tumrar mazor ḳeu ḳeu to shoyong Allare-u sine na, ita boṛo shoromor befar.
15.35: Kunu kunu manshe zikaito fare, “Murda oḳol ḳemne zinda oiba? Tarar shorilor goṭon kilaḳan oibo?”
15.36: Haere be-aḳol! Tumar nizor ḳetor maze ze bisi bain ḳoro, i bisi na morle to sera uṭe na.
15.37: Ar tumar bain ḳora bisi taki ze sera baroy, tumi to i sera bain ḳoro na, tumi kali bisi bain ḳoro dan ba oinno kunu fosholor, ogu moria-u sera baroy.
15.38: Bade Allae tan morzi mafik itar surot-aḳar goṭon ḳoroin. Tain forteḳ bisre-u tar zat mafik serar surot-aḳar dein.
15.39: Buzo na ni, hoḳol zandaror gust to eḳ shoman nae. Manshor gust eḳlaḳan, foshur eḳlaḳan, fakir eḳlaḳan ar masor aroḳ laḳan.
15.40: Oula asmano-o bout nomunar shoril ase, duniat-o bout shoril ase, ta-o behesti shorilor tez eḳlaḳan, ar duniabi shorilor tez aroḳ laḳan.
15.41: Shuruzor tez eḳlaḳan, sandor tez aroḳ laḳan ar terar tez dusra laḳan. Emonki eḳ tera taki aroḳ terar tez-o alada.
15.42: Moron bade zinda oia uṭa-o ou laḳan. Lash maṭi dia harle fosizae, oile ou lashre zebla zinda ḳora oibo, iṭa ar fosto nae.
15.43: Oshommani halote maṭi deoa oy, shommani halote tula oibo. Maṭi deoa oy durbol halote, ar tula oibo boloban halote.
15.44: Maṭi deoa oy roḳto-mangshor shoril, oile tula oibo ruhanik shoril. Roḳto-mangshor shoril zebla ase, te to ruhanik shoril-o ase.
15.45: Zela Baba Adomor befare Fobitro Tourat Shorifo ase, “Ou foyla Adom zinda zandar oila.” Te shesh Adom, zein al-Mosi, tain kita oila? Tain to oila zindegi deora ruhu.
15.46: Oile ruhanik ze shoril, ikan to foyla oy na, foyla oy roḳto-mangshor shoril, bade oy ruhanik shoril.
15.47: Zela foyla Adom maṭi taki aila, bade dusra Adom, al-Mosi aila behest taki.
15.48: Zogotor manush oila ou maṭir banail manshor laḳan, ar behesti manush oila hou behesti zon al-Mosir laḳan.
15.49: Te Baba Adomor laḳan amra zela maṭir ḳayar surot faisi, ṭik oula hou behesti zonor laḳan behesti surot-o faimu.
15.50: Baiainre ami tumrare ḳoiram, roḳto-mangshor kunu shoril Allar bashshair odikar fae na. Zetar binash ase, ita kunumonte-u sirostayi bone na.
15.51: Te ami tumrare eḳṭa batuni kota zanairam, zano ni, amra hoḳlor to mout oito nae, oile hoḳlor-u surot bodlizibo.
15.52: Kiamotor ḳalo eḳ muhurtor maze, sokur foloḳe, shingat fu deoar loge loge-u amra bodlizimu. Ou shinga bazia harle, hoḳol murda ola surote zinda oiba, zeta kunudin binash oito nae, ar amra-o hou surote bodlizimu.
15.53: Erlagi ze shoril binash oizae, itae ola surot faite oibo, zeta kunudin fosito nae, ar zeta morizibo, itae ola surot faite oibo, zeta kunudin morto nae.
15.54: Ar ze shoril fosizae, i shorile zebla sirostayi surot faibo, ze shorilor mout oy, itae zebla siroḳalin zindegi faibo, hou shomoy Allar kalamor ou leḳa folibo, Moutor binash oia joy aise.
15.55: O mout, tor joy kuai? Moutre, tor bish-dat kuai?
15.56: Moutor bish-dat oilo guna, ar gunare ḳemota zugae Musa nobir shoriot.
15.57: Oile Alla Pakor shukria adae ḳori, amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir usillae tain amrare joy dan ḳoroin.
15.58: Te, O amar mayar baiain, tumra imane mozbut o, zate kuntae tumrare alaito na fare. Malikor kezmotor lagi nizore hor-hamesha furafur bilai deo, tumra to zano, tan lagi menot ḳorle i menot kunumonte-u beḳama zae na.

16.1: O bai oḳol, Allar pak bonda oḳolre shaijjor lagi sanda tular befare ami oḳon ḳoiram. Galatia deshor Isayi zomat oḳolre ami zela hukum disi, tumra-o oula ḳoro.
16.2: Tumra forteḳ zone zarzir tofik onuzayi haftar foyla din kisu ṭeḳa-foysha dola ḳoro, zate ami zebla aimu, ou shomoy kunu sanda tula na lage.
16.3: Ami aia harle tumrar dola ḳora ou dan-ḳoyrat Zeruzalemo loia zaoar lagi, tumra zerare fosond ḳorbae, ami siṭi dia tarare faṭaimu.
16.4: Ar tumra zudi mono ḳoro ami-o zaoa zorur, te tara amar loge oia zaiba. Hozrot Pauluse Korint soforor niot
16.5: Amar kial oilo Makidonia oia aitam, erlagi ami Makidonia deshor bitredi tumrar gese aimu.
16.6: Aia hoyto tuṛa ḳoydin tumrar gese roimu ba asta shitkal tumrar gese-u ḳaṭaimu, zate ami zeno-u zai na ḳene tumra-u amare ou soforor lagi hoḳolta zuit-zait ḳoria dibae.
16.7: Fotor kuṭmor laḳan ami kali fotedi zaoar ḳalo tumrar loge deḳa ḳortam sai na, ami sairam, Allar morzi oile bakka ḳoydin tumrar loge taḳmu.
16.8: Oile Fonchaisha Id forzonto ami ou Ifis ṭauno-u roimu,
16.9: ḳaron amar samne oula boṛo eḳṭa shuzug ase, i shuzuge boṛo bala fol mile. Ta-o bout manshe itar birudita ḳorra.
16.10: Kial rakio, Timoti bai tumrar ono aile tain zanu shantie-nirboye roita faroin. Zano to, ami zela malikor kezmot ḳoriar, tain-o ṭik oula ḳorra.
16.11: Erlagi keu zanu tanre elami na ḳore. Bade tain zela amar gese aita faroin, oula shanti moto tanre aguaia dio. Ami to tan lagi bar saiar, asha ḳori baiaintor loge tain-o aiba.
16.12: Ar Apollos bair befare ḳoiram, tanre bout minot ḳorslam, baiaintor loge oia oḳon tumrar gese zaita, ta-o kunumonte-u razi oila na. Te shomoy-shuzug oile bade zaibane. Bidayi salam
16.13: Baiainre, tumra hoḳol hushiar o, imane mozbut o, shaoshi bab deḳao ar boloban o.
16.14: Tumra zotota-u ḳoro, mohobbotor shohit ḳorio.
16.15: Ar tumrar to zana ase, asta Gris deshor maze Astifan bair foribar-u oila foyla imandar. Allar pak bonda oḳlor kezmotor lagi tara nizore shofi disoin.
16.16: Erlagi minot ḳoriar, ilaḳan manshore tumra ijjotor shohit bozio, aro zoto zone ola kezmot ḳoroin, Allar name menot ḳoroin, tarare-o ola bozio.
16.17: Ou Astifan bai, Fatunat bai ar Akik bai aisoin dekia ami kub kushi oisi, era aoae tumrar obab furon oise.
16.18: Era amar ar tumrar dilo aram disoin. Tumra ou laḳan manshore ḳas ijjot ḳorio.
16.19: Turoshkor Asiya deshor zomator manshe tumrare salam zanaira. Akil ar Fiskila, ar tarar goror zomator manshe malikor mohobbotor shohit tumrare salam zanaira.
16.20: Hoḳol mumin baiainte tumrare salam zanaira. Tumra eḳe-oinne fobitro golagoli korio.
16.21: Ami Pauluse nizor ate ou salamor ḳota leḳlam.
16.22: Malik Isare zudi keu mohobbot na ḳore, te tar ufre lannot foṛouk. Marana ta! Mani, O amrar malik, toshrif anoukka!
