16.23: Malik Isar rohomot tumrar ufre zari rouk.
16.24: Tumra hoḳlor lagi amar Isayi mohobbot roilo. Amin.

1.1: Ami Paulus, Alla Pakor morzi mafik Hozrot Isa al-Mosir eḳzon sahabi. Korint ṭaunor Isayi zomat ar asta Gris deshor maze Allar zoto pak bonda oḳol boshot ḳoroin, erar gese ami ar amrar mumin bai Timotie ou sohifaḳan leḳram.
1.2: Amrar gaibi baf Alla Pake ar Malik Isa al-Mosie afnara hoḳlor ufre rohomot ar shanti nazil ḳoroukka. Buz deoar malik Alla
1.3: Amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir gaibi baf Alla Pakor tarif ouk. Tain-u rohmanur rohim Alla, hokkolor dilor buz deora Alla.
1.4: Hoḳol zat duḳ-mosibotor shomoy tain amrare buz dein, zate tan ges taki buz faia, oinnor duḳ-mosibotor shomoy amra-o tarare buz ditam fari.
1.5: Al-Mosir laḳan amra zela bout duḳ-mosibot shoijjo ḳoriar, oula tan usillae bout buz-shanti-o faiar.
1.6: Amra ze duḳ-mosibot shoijjo ḳori, ita to tumrar monor shantona ar nazator lagi-u ḳori. Tumrare buz deoar niote-u Allae amrare buz dein. Tumra zebla amrar laḳan duḳ-mosiboto foṛbae, ou shomoy amrar deoa buz mafik tumrar ḳoshṭore shoijjo ḳorte shaijjo ḳorbo.
1.7: Tumrar ufre amrar mozbut ekin ase, tumra zela amrar duḳ-mosiboto shorik aso, oula Allar deoa buz-shantonar maze-o shorik aso.
1.8: Turoshkor Asiya desho amra ze mosiboto foṛslam, ota tumrare zanaitam sai. Hino taḳte amrar ufre ze azab aisil, ou azab ola marattoḳ asil, erlagi amra zanor maya saṛi dislam.
1.9: Mono ḳorslam, amra nichchit mara zaimu. Te amrar i halot oisil, zate amra nizor ufre borosha na ḳoria, ze Allae murdare zinda ḳori tuloin, ou Allar ufre borosha ḳori.
1.10: Eḳ bezuita moutor at taki tain amrare basaisoin, ar oḳono basaira. Amra tan ufre borosha ḳortam fari, tain hamesha-u amrare olaḳan basaiba.
1.11: Tumra-o dua-munazat ḳoria amrare shaijjo ḳorrae, erlagi bout zonor duar ḳatire amra ze rohom faisi, otar fol dekia boute Allar shukria adae ḳorba. Korint zomator loge Hozrot Paulusor shomporko (1:12–7:16) Hozrot Paulusor soforor deri
1.12: Amra zeta loia gourob ḳoriar, amrar bibeḳe-o ola ḳoy, Allar deoa fobitro ar shorol mon loia hoḳol manshor maze zindegi kaṭaisi, ḳas ḳori tumrar maze-u ḳaṭaisi. I zindegi amra duniabi aḳol-hekmote nae, ḳali Allar rohomotor bole ḳaṭaisi.
1.13: Amra to tumrar gese lukai-safai kunuta lekiar na, tumra ze leḳa foṛrae ar buzrae, ḳali ou befare-u lekiar. Ar asha ḳoriar, tumra hamesha-u ola buzat roibae.
1.14: Ashole amrar befare tumra tuṛa kisu zania-u, amrare loia zela boṛai korrae, Malik Isae toshrif anar shomoy tumrare loia amra-o ola boṛai kormu.
1.15: Ar ou ḳotar ufre borosha ḳoria ami kub kiali oislam, ami aoa-zaoar foto duiobar tumrar gese zaimu, gele tumra duiobar-u rohom-niamot faibae.
1.16: Ami mono ḳorslam, Makidoniat zaoar fote tumrar loge deḳa ḳormu ar hon taki hirbar tumrar gese aimu, zate Ehudia zilat zaoar ḳalo tumra amare aguaia deo.
1.17: Oile ami na aoae tumra mono ḳorrae ni, ami ita ḍong korslam? Zogotor manshe zela eḳbar ḳoy “Oy, oy” aroḳbar ḳoy “Na, na”, ami-o ola ni?
1.18: Alla Pak to hok ar ḳaṭi, ikan zela hasa, oula eoḳan-o hasa, tumrar gese amrar zoban eḳbar “Oy” ar aroḳbar “Na” oy na.
1.19: Ami, Silas, ar bai Timotie tumrar gese zar ḳota toblig korsi, hou Isa al-Mosi-u oila Allar ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla, tain eḳbar “Oy” ar eḳbar “Na” nae, tain to hoḳol shomoy-u “Oy.”
1.20: Alla Pakor hoḳol oada-u to al-Mosir mazdi fura oy. Erlagi munazator shomoy Allar gourobor lagi al-Mosir namor usillae amra “Amin” mani “Oy” ḳoi.
1.21: Ar al-Mosir lagi amrare ar tumrare zein mozbut ḳori ṭikai raḳsoin, tan nam Alla. Tain-u amrare ḳelafoti disoin.
1.22: Tan nizor don hishabe amrare sil-sappoṛ maria raḳsoin, ar tain zeta amrare dibar oada ḳorsoin, itar foyla kishti hishabe amrar dilor maze Allai Pak Ruhu dan ḳorsoin.
1.23: Ami Allare shakki rakia amar zindegir ḳosom ḳaia ḳoiram, tumrar bae doya-maya taḳae tumrare basanir kiale ami Korint ṭauno zaoa bond raḳsi.
1.24: Amra nizore tumrar imanor malik mono ḳorram na, borong tumrare kushi-bashie raḳar lagi tumrar loge roia ḳam ḳorram. Ḳaron tumra imane mozbut aso.

2.1: Erlagi mone mone ṭik korlam, tumrar mono duk deoar lagi ami ar tumrar gese zaitam nae.
2.2: Ḳaron ami tumrare duk dile amare kushi korbo ḳe? Ar ami zarare duk dimu, ou tumra saṛa amare kushi korar ar to ḳeu nai.
2.3: Amar ila leḳar ḳaron oilo, ami zebla zaimu, ou shomoy zera amare kushi korar ḳota, tarar ges taki zanu kunu duk na fai. Tumrar ufre amar i bishash ase, ami zetat kushi oimu, tumra-o itat kushi oibae.
2.4: Amar mono boṛo duk loia, sokur fani falaia age tumrar gese leḳslam. Ashole ami tumrare duk deoar lagi leḳsi na, borong tumrar lagi amar ze ḳoto mohobbot, oḳan zananir lagi-u leḳsi. Oforadire maf ḳora
2.5: Amare zudi keu duk dia taḳe, te he ḳali amare nae, tuṛa oile-o tumra hoḳolre-u duk dise.
2.6: Tumra beshir bag zone milia tare ze shaza diso, ota-u tar lagi zotesṭo.
2.7: Oḳon tumra tare maf ḳori dilao, tare buz deo, zate beshi duke he ḳator na oy.
2.8: Erlagi kas ḳori tumrare ḳoiram, tumra zen tare maya ḳoro, ita forman ḳori deḳao.
2.9: Ami forikka ḳori deḳtam saislam, tumra hoḳol befare baiddo aso ki na, erlagi-u ami tumrar gese leḳsi.
2.10: Tumra zudi kunu befare ḳeurore maf ḳori dilao, te ami-o tare maf ḳori dei. Ar hasau zudi ami kunta maf ḳoria taki, te al-Mosir samne tumrar lagi-u ḳoriar,
2.11: zate Shoytane amrare duka dito na fare. Tar ku-motlobor ḳota to amrar ozana nae. al-Mosire sina-u to geranor laḳan
2.12: Ami Toruas ṭauno al-Mosir befare kush-ḳobri toblig korat gia deḳlam, hono ḳam ḳorar lagi malike amare eḳṭa shuzug kori disoin.
2.13: Oile amar imandar bai Titasre hono na faoae amar mono kub oshanti asil. Erlagi Toruas ṭaunor manshor ges taki bidae loia Makidoniat gelamgi.
2.14: Oile amra Allar shukria zanai, tain amrare hamesha al-Mosir bijoyor moha furtir misilor loge salaira. Al-Mosire sina to ek geranor laḳan. Allae tan joy-jatrae ou geran amrar mazdi hoḳol zagat sitrai dein.
2.15: Zera nazat hasil ḳorra ar zera binash oira, ou duio dolor lagi amra oilam al-Mosir ek geran, ou geranre al-Mosie Allar dorbaro kurbanir laḳan shofia dira.
2.16: Zera binash oizar, tarar gese amrar geran oilo morar gondo, zar fol oilo nichchit moron. Ar zera nazat hasil ḳorra, tarar gese amra oilam zindegir geran, er fol oilo aḳerator zindegi. I oto boṛo nek kam ḳorar lak kun zon?
2.17: Nizor labor lagi zela bout zone Allar kalam loia bebsha ḳore, amra to itar laḳan nae. Amra borong Allar faṭail zon hishabe shorol mone al-Mosir name Allare azir-nazir rakia toblig koriar.

3.1: Tumra kita mono ḳoro, amra ita ḳoia hirbar amrar nizor shunam gaoat lagsi ni? Kunu kunu manshor zela oinnor ges taki sonod neoa lage, amra-o olaḳan tumrar gese ba tumra taki sonod faoa lagbo ni? Na, muṭe-u na.
3.2: Tumrar nam to amrar dilor maze leḳa ase, tumra-u oilae amrar sonod. Ar ou sonodor ḳota to hoḳole-u zane ar hoḳole-u foṛe.
3.3: Ikan to forishkar buza zae, al-Mosir leḳa sonod oilae tumra-u, tumra-u amrar menotor fol. I sonod to kunu ḳali-kolom dia leḳa oise na, ḳali Allar Pak Ruhu dia leḳa oise. Ikan to Tur faṛo faoa shoriotor laḳan kunu fattoror ufre leḳa nae, borong manshor dilor maze-u leḳa oise.
3.4: Ou befare al-Mosir usillae Allar dorbaro amrar furafur nichchoyota ase,
3.5: ta-o amra ze nizor gune hoḳolta ḳoriltam farmu, ila kunu ḳota nae. I kezmoti gun to ḳali Allar ges taki-u fai.
3.6: Allar loge milonor noya usillar ḳota zananir lagi, tain-u amrare i kezmoti gun dan ḳorsoin. I usilla to okkore okkore shoriot manar befar nae, borong Pak Ruhur forisalonae dilor iman-akidar befar. Ḳaron okkore mout, ar ruhe zindegi.
3.7: Fattoror ufre leḳa shorioti ze kezmote moron ae, ou shoriot nazilor shomoy to Allar mohima zair oisil. Ou shomoy Hozrot Musar sehara-o Allar mohimae nurani oigesil. Tan mukor nurani surot zudio aste aste ḳomi zaoa dorsil, tebou Boni Israil oḳole tan sehara bae saoar takkot oise na.
3.8: Ou shoriotor kezmoti fol zudi oto mohima-ala oy, te Pak Ruhur kezmoti fol ḳoto beshi mohima-ala!
3.9: Ou ze okkori shoriote manshore dushi shaibosto ḳore, tar kezmoti kam zudi oto mohima-ala oy, te ze kezmote be-ḳosur ḳalas ḳoia goinno ḳore, i kezmot to aro ḳoto beshi mohima-ala!
3.10: Buzrae ni, age zeta mohima-ala asil, oḳon itar kunu mohima nai koile-u sole, tar tulonae oḳonkur noya kezmotor mohima bout beshi.
3.11: Ze nuranir tez ḳoma dorsil, ita zebla oto mohima-ala, te zeta siroḳal roibo, ita to aro ḳoto beshi mohima-ala!
3.12: Amrar mono olaḳan asha ase gotike-u amra kula-kuli mati.
3.13: Amra to Hozrot Musar laḳan nae, tain forda dia tan muk guria toisla, zate tan mukor ḳomi zaoa nurani surot Boni Israile na deḳoin.
3.14: Oile tarar dil fashan oigesil. Ar oḳono Tourat Shorifo leḳa, Allar loge milonor hou furana usillar ḳota tilaot ḳorle, tarar dilor maze forda taḳe. Ḳali Isa al-Mosir ufre iman anle ou forda hori zae.
3.15: Ar oḳon forzonto Hozrot Musar Tourat Shorif tilaot ḳorar shomoy Boni Israil oḳlor dil forda dia gura taḳe.
3.16: Tarar maze ḳeu zebla malikor ufre iman ane, ou shomoy hou forda hori zae.
3.17: Ou malik oila Pak Ruhu, ar malikor ruhu zeno ase, ono-u shadinota ase.
3.18: Aynar samne zela forda saṛa muk shorashori deḳa zae, oula amra hoḳol-u al-Mosir nurani mohima deki deki aro beshi mohima-ala bonia tan laḳan mohima-ala oiram. Amrar Malik Isa, mani Pak Ruhur kudroti bole-u ila or.

4.1: Ou ḳarone, Allae meherbani koria ou noya kezmoti kamor dayitto amrar ato disoin ḳori, amra nirash oi na.
4.2: Toblik kamo manshe lukaia zeta behayami koroin, ita amra muṭe-u ḳori na. Amra kunu ḳamo sol-soturi kori na, Allar kalamo bezal mishai na. Borong hok kotare kula-mela ḳoia hoḳol manshor gese ar Allar dorbaro amrare zoiggo hishabe forman ḳori.
4.3: Amrar kush-ḳobri zudi lukail taḳe, te lannoti fote zera zaira, tarar gese-u lukail taḳe.
4.4: Ou zogotor devta Iblise o-imandar oḳlor dilre anda banailise, zate tara kush-ḳobrir nur na deḳe. Ou kush-ḳobrir mazdi al-Mosir gourob zair oise, ar ou al-Mosi-u oila Allar obikol surot.
4.5: Amra to nizor befare toblig korram na, ḳali Isa al-Mosire toblig korram, tain-u malik, tan lagi-u amra tumrar gulam bonchi.
4.6: Amra ita toblig korram, ḳaron ze Allae ḳoisoin, “Andair taki for ouk,” hou Alla Pake tan nur amrar dilo zalaisoin, zate al-Mosir seharar maze Allar nuror mohima zair oy.
4.7: Allai ou nuror don to maṭir bashono raḳa oise, ou bashon oilam amra-u. Maṭir bashono raḳa oise, zate manshe buzto fare ou kudroti mohashokti amrar nizor ges taki aise na, borong Allar ges taki-u aise.
4.8: Hoḳolbae taki amrar ufre bout laḳan saf aile-o, amra surmar oisi na. Amra bedisha lagle-o furafur nirash oisi na.
4.9: Amrar ufre zulum ḳora oile-o Allae to amrar log saṛsoin na. Maṭit falaia asaṛle-o amra binash oisi na.
4.10: Hamesha Malik Isar moutor duk-koshṭor nishana amrar shorilo loia guriar, zate amrar shorilor maze tan zindegi-o deḳa zae.
4.11: Ar amra zoto shomoy basia asi, Malik Isar lagi amrare to hor-hamesha-u moutor ato tuli deoa or, zate ou moutor odin shorilo tan zindegi zair oy.
4.12: Ou nomunae amrar maze ḳam ḳorer moute, ar tumrar maze ḳam ḳorer zindegie.
4.13: Fobitro Zobur Shorifo ase, “Ami iman anchi gotike-u ḳoilam.” Ou eḳoi imanor bagi oia amra-o ola ḳoi.
4.14: Ḳaron amra zani, ze Allae Malik Isare zinda ḳorsla, hou Allae tan loge amrare-o zinda ḳorba, ar amrar loge ḳori tumrare-o tan samne azir ḳorba.
4.15: Ita hoḳolta tumrar balair lagi-u oise, zate manshor ufre Allar ze rohomot nazil oise, hou rohomotor ḳatire boute aro beshi kori Allar shukria adae ḳore ar Allar gourob oy. Imane zindegi kaṭani
4.16: Erlagi amra nirash oi na. Zudio amrar roḳto-mangshor shoril koy oizar, tebou amrar ruhu din din taza oia uṭer.
4.17: Oḳon amra ze ḳoydinor lagi shamainno ḳoshṭo ḳoriar, i koshṭor bodla amra siroḳalor lagi ofuronto shan-mohima lab ḳormu.
4.18: Soukdi zeta deḳa zae, amra to itar bae sairam na, borong zeta deḳa zae na, otar bae sairam. Souke zeta deḳa zae, ita to tuṛa ḳoydinor, oile zeta deḳa zae na, ita siroḳalor.

5.1: Amra zani, amra i duniabi ze ḍera-goro boshot ḳori, mani ze ḳomzur shoril loia asi, ikan zudi binash-o oizae, tebou Allar deoa ekkan gor amrar ase. I gor kunu manshor ator banail nae, ikan to hamesha behesto ase.
5.2: Ou ḍera-goro boshot ḳora halote amra lamba ḳori dom falaiar ar dile-zane asha ḳoriar, zate behesti hou noya goror maze amrare gura oy.
5.3: Ta-o ḳota oilo, ou ḍera-gor bangar bade amrare zanu lemṭa deḳa na zae.
5.4: Ou ḍera-goro roia bar-buza boite boite amra ahazari koriar. Erbade-o amra roḳto-mangshor i ḍera-gor saṛtam sai na, ta-o bala goror lagi bar sairam, zate oḳonkur ou moutor odin ḍera-gor falaia, siroḳal zinda taḳar zuka gor fai.
5.5: Otar lagi-u Allae amrare zuit ḳorsoin ar itar baenama hishabe amrare Pak Ruhu dan ḳorsoin.
5.6: Erdae amrar shaoshor kunu ḳomti nai. Amra to buzilisi, zotodin ou roḳto-mangshor shoril loia boshot ḳormu, otodin amra malikor ges taki horail roimu.
5.7: Amra to sokur deḳa kuntar boroshae soli na, ḳali imanor bole-u soli.
5.8: Ashole amrar bitor bora shaosh ase, ar amra roḳto-mangshor shorilo roa taki malikor loge boshot ḳoraḳan-u bala mono ḳori.
5.9: Erlagi amra shorilor maze taki ba na taki, amrar niot oilo malikre kushi kora.
5.10: Ḳaron al-Mosir adaloto amra hoḳole-u ubani lagbo, zate duniabi ou shorile amra zoto nomunar bad-bala ḳam ḳorsi, ou ḳamor bodla fai. Allar loge milonor kush-ḳobri toblig
5.11: Amra to Alla Pakre ḍoraia soli, erlagi manshore buzanir sesṭa ḳorram. Amrar befar to Allar dorbaro forishkar, asha ḳori tumrar gese-o ola forishkar asi.
5.12: Ikan ḳoia amra hirbar nizor tarif gairam na, borong amrare loia tumrar boṛair ḳaron zanairam. Te zeta manshe bitor na dekia, ḳali manshor bar gala loia boṛai kore, tumra tarare eḳṭa zuaf ditae faro.
5.13: Amra zudi fagol oi, te Allar fagol oisi, ar zudi mata bala taḳe, te tumrar lagi-u bala ase.
5.14: Al-Mosir mohobbote amrare fush manaia salae. Amra nichchit buzchi, hoḳlor torof taki eḳzonor mout oisil, erlagi hoḳlor-u mout oise.
5.15: Tain hoḳlor lagi mara gesla, zate zera zinda asoin, tara zanu ar nizor lagi na basoin. Borong tarar lagi zein mara gesla ar hirbar zinda oisla, tan lagi-u tara basoin.
5.16: Erlagi oḳon taki amra ar manshor bairor surot dekia bisar ḳori na. Amra to age al-Mosire olaḳan mono ḳorslam, oile oḳon ar ila ḳori na.
5.17: Ḳeu zudi al-Mosir torika kobul ḳore, te he noya foyda oilo. Tar furan hoḳolta fusia hari ekkere noya bonigelo.
5.18: Ita to Alla taki-u oy. Tain al-Mosir usillae tan loge amrar milon goṭaisoin, ar amrare ou kezmotor dayitto disoin, bad-baki hoḳol manshore tan loge milai ditam.
5.19: Er mani oilo, Allae manshor gunar bae na saia, al-Mosir usillae tan loge manshor milon goṭaisoin. Ar ou milonor kush-ḳobri tobligor dayitto amrare disoin.
5.20: Erlagi-u amra al-Mosir naib hishabe tan fokke matiram. Ashole Allae-u amrar mazdi manshore minoti korra. Ar al-Mosir fokke amra-o minot ḳorram, tumra Allar loge milito o.
5.21: Hozrot Isa al-Mosie to kunu guna-naformani korsoin na. Oile amra hoḳlor gunar shaza Allae tan ḳando tuli dila, zate tan ufre iman anar mazdi Allai fobitrotae amra forezgar hishabe kobul oi.

6.1: Allar ḳadim hishabe amra ou minot ḳoriar, tumra zebla Allar rohomot faiso, te ikṭare bifol oite dio na.
6.2: Pak Kalamo Allae bataisoin, Ami shoṭik shomoye tumar arzi hunchi, nazat faoar din tumare shaijjo ḳorsi. Huno, oḳon-u shoṭik shomoy, oḳon-u nazat faoar din. Hozrot Paulusor kezmot ḳamor halot
6.3: Al-Mosir name amra ze toblig kori, ou tobligor bodnam na oar lagi amra ila kunu ḳam ḳori na, ze ḳame manshor mono bada ae.
6.4: Borong hoḳol befare amra forman deḳairam, amra Allar kezmotḳari. Bout duk-koshṭo, zulum-mosibot, ar bifod-afod shoijjo ḳoria itar forman diram.
6.5: Amrare bout bar mair-doir ḳora oise, bout bar zelo harani oise, bout danga-hangama amrar ufredi gese, bout menot ḳorsi, na gumaia rait ḳaṭaisi ar ufash-ḳafash roisi.
6.6: Ita saṛa amrar fak-forezgar zindegi, aḳol-buddi, soborgari, doya-maya, dilor Pak Ruhu, ḳaṭi mohobbot,
6.7: hok kota ḳoa ar Allar kudroti bol, duio ate forezgarir atiar bebohar ḳoriar.
6.8: Manshe amrare dam deuk ba na deuk, amrar shunam gauk ba bodnam gauk, itae amrar zae ae na. Manshe ḳoira, amra bule ṭog, ashole to amra hok fote soli.
6.9: Manshe ḳoin, amrare sinoin na, tebou hoḳole amrare sine. Amra morar laḳ oigele-o basia asi. Amrare mair-doir ḳora or, oile zane mara or na.
6.10: Bout dukor maze-o amra hamesha kushi-bashi asi. Amra nize gorib oia-o boutre doni banaisi. Amrar to kunta-u nai, tebou hokkoltar malik. Ou laḳan amra forman ḳorsi, amra Allar kezmotḳari.
6.11: O Korint zomator mumin bai oḳol, tumrar gese to kula-mela-u matisi, tumrar lagi amrar mon uzaṛ ḳori disi.
6.12: Amrar dil tumrar lagi kulia raḳsi, oile tumrar dil amrar lagi bond ḳori toiso.
6.13: Te amar aolad hishabe tumrare ḳoiram, amra zela tumrar lagi dil kulia raḳsi, tumra-o ola amrar lagi tumrar dilḳan kulia deo. Bidormir loge kuṭumita ḳorio na
6.14: Tumra bidormi manshor loge ḳeshi-kuṭumita ḳorio na. Forezgaror loge naformanor mil kuai? Allar nuror loge andarir kunu ḳatir ase ni?
6.15: Iblisor loge al-Mosir kunu ḳatir ase ni? Muminor loge bidormi shorik oibo kila?
6.16: Zano to, Pak Kalamo Allae ḳoira, Ami tarar bitre boshot ḳormu, tarar loge-u sola-fira ḳormu. Ami oimu tarar Alla, tara oiba amar proza. Te amra-u oilam zinda Allar boshot ḳana. Allar Kaba goror bitre murtir kunu zaga ase ni?
6.17: Pak Kalamo aro bataisoin, Erlagi tumra bidormir ges taki horo, tarar ges taki alog ro, nafak kunu zinish soio na, teu ami tumrare kobul ḳormu.
6.18: Ami oimu tumrar gaibi baf, tumra oibae amar aolad, ikan ami Alla Rabbul Alamine ḳoiram.

7.1: O mayar bai oḳol, ou oada oḳol to amrar lagi-u ḳora oise, te ao amra shorilor ar dilor nafaki dur ḳoria nizore fak-saf ḳori, ar Allar ḍor-ḳofe furafur fak-fobitro zindegir fote soli. Touba ḳorar bade kushi-bashi
7.2: Bai oḳol, amra to kunu manshor loge oinnae ḳorsi na, ḳeuror ḳeti-o ḳorsi na ar ḳeurore ṭogaisi-o na. Erlagi amrare tumrar dilor maze ṭai deo.
7.3: Tumrare dushibar lagi ikan ḳoiram na. Ami age-u ḳoisi, tumra to amrar zanor zan ḳoiljar ṭukra, amra morle-o eḳloge mormu, basle-o eḳloge basmu.
7.4: Tumrar ufre ami kub borosha ḳori, tumrare loia boṛai kori. Erlagi oto duḳ-mosibotor maze roia-o amar zano shanti asil, amar mon kushi-bashie bora.
7.5: Huno, ou Makidoniat aia-o amrar shorilo kunu shuk faisi na, hoḳolbae taki-u amra ḳoshṭo faisi, baire asil gonḍogul ar zanor bitre asil ḍor-ḳof.
7.6: Oile Alla Pak, zein duki zonre buz dein, tain amrare buz dibar lagi Titas baire ono anaila.
7.7: Ḳali ikan nae, Titas baie tumrar ges taki ze buz faisla, ou buze tain amrare-o buz dila. Tain tumrar monor eshki, tumrar ḳanda-ḳaṭir ḳota zanaila, amar befare tumra bule kub agrohi. Ou hoḳolta hunia ami kub kushi oisi.
7.8: Baiainre, amar agor siṭir maze zudio tumrare duk dislam, tebou amar mono kunu ḳoshṭo nai. Ami zebla buzlam, ou siṭie tumrar monor maze tuṛa ḳoydin duk dise, ou shomoy ami-o kisu duk faislam,
7.9: oile oḳon ami kushi. Tumrare duk deoae kushi oisi na, borong duk faia tumra touba ḳorso dekia kushi oisi. Ou duk faislae tumra Allar morzie, zate amrar dara tumrar kunu ḳeti na oy.
7.10: Allar deoa monor ḳoshṭoe manshe touba ḳoroin, ar zan basain. Te ou ḳoshṭoe to duk nai. Oile duniabi monor ḳoshṭoe manshor moron ane.
7.11: Tumra buzrae ni, Allar deoa monor ḳoshṭoe tumrar ḳoto balai korse, tumrare naformani taki basaise, gunar bae tumrar ginna zonmaise, mone mone ḳoto ḍor ḍoraiso, Allar bae ḳoto aguaiso, naformani kamor bisar ḳorso. Ou befare tumra hoḳol monte-u forman diso, tumra nikut.
7.12: Ami zudio ou siṭi leḳsilam, oile ze manshe oinnae ḳorse ba zar ufre oinnae ḳora oise tar lagi nae, borong Allar dorbaro zate tumrar ou halotḳan zair oy zen, tumra hasau amrare mohobbot ḳoro, otar lagi-u leḳsi.
7.13: Erlagi amra buz-o faisi. Ou buz faia ar bai Titasor kushi dekia amra aro beshi kushi oisi, ḳaron tumra hoḳlor ges taki tain kub aram faisoin.
7.14: Ashole ami tumrare loia tan gese boṛai korslam, ete kunu shorminda-o oisi na. Tumrar gese amrar batail hoḳol ḳota zela hasa asil, oula tumrare loia amrar boṛai koraḳan-o tan gese hasa forman oise.
7.15: Tumra hoḳole zela tan nosiot mancho, monor ḍor-ḳofe ḳafi kafi tanre kobul ḳorso, oḳan mono oae tumrar bae tan maya kub beshi baṛise.
7.16: Ar ami-o kub kushi, tumrar ufre ami oḳon furafur borosha ḳortam fari.

8.1: Bai oḳol, ami tumrare zanairam Makidonia deshor zomat oḳole Allar ges taki koto niamot faisoin.
8.2: Zudio bout duḳ-mosibot dia tarare forikka ḳora oisil, tara kub gorib halote asla, tebou tarar monor maze bout furti asil, tara kula ate Allar name dan-ḳoyrat ḳorsoin.
8.3: Ami tarar fokke ḳoiram, tara kushi oia nizor tofik mafik, emonki tofik taki aro beshi-o dan ḳorsoin.
8.4: Ar kub kiali oia amrare minot ḳorsila, zate Allar ze bonda oḳol obabor maze asoin, erare obab taki basanir lagi tara shorik oita faroin.
8.5: Amra zotoḳan asha ḳorslam, tara er saite-o beshi dan ḳorsoin. Ḳali ikan nae, tara foyla nizore Malik Isar ato shofisoin, bade Allar morzie amrar gese-o shofa oisoin.
8.6: Ita dekia amra Titas baire kub minot ḳorslam, dan-ḳoyrat ḳorar ze ḳam tain tumrar maze salu ḳorsoin, ita zanu shesh-o ḳoroin.
8.7: Tumra zela hoḳol befare-u aguail aso, tumrar shobol iman, ḳota-barta, aḳol-hekmot, monor eshki, ar amrar bae zela kub maya-mohobbot ase, ṭik ou laḳan dan-ḳoyrat ḳorar nek amol-o zanu tumrar maze baia foṛe.
8.8: Ita lekia ami tumrare kunu hukum diram na, ḳali forikka ḳori deḳram, erlagi oinno mumin oḳlor nek kamor eshkir ḳota zanairam. Deki, tumrar mohobbot ḳotoḳan nikut.
8.9: Amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir rohom-niamotor ḳota to tumra zano-u, tain to Allai done doni asla, oile tumrar lagi gorib bonla, zate tain gorib bonar ḳarone tumra doni oitae faro.
8.10: Te ami tumrare foramish diram, ita manle tumrar balai oibo, tumra kub kushi oia goto bosor dan-ḳoyrat tulat lagsilae,
8.11: oḳon ou ḳam shesh ḳoro. Monor ze eshki loia tumra i kam shuru ḳorsilae, oula eshkie zarzir tofik mafik dan-ḳoyrat dia ita shesh ḳoro.
8.12: Dan-ḳoyrat dibar niot ḳorle, Allae to niot mafik kobul ḳoroin, te tofik taḳle deo, na taḳle nai.
8.13: Baiainre, ami sairam na, oinno manshe aram ḳorouk ar tumra ḳoshṭo ḳoro, borong tumra hoḳlor halot eḳlaḳan ouk, oḳan-u asha ḳorram.
8.14: Tumrar zeta don-doulot oḳon baṛti ase, otae tarar obab miṭauk, ar tarar zebla beshi oibo, ou shomoy tara-o tumrar obab miṭaiba. Olaḳan hoḳlor halot eḳoi laḳan ouk.
8.15: Zela Tourat Shorifo ase, “Zein beshi tukaisla tan-o beshi oise na, ar zein tuṛa tukaisla tan-o ḳom oise na.” Dan-ḳoyrat baṭibar ḳalo hushiari
8.16: Huno, ami Allar shukria adae ḳori, amar monor maze tumrar bae zela kial ase, Allae ou eḳoi laḳan kial dan ḳorsoin bai Titasor maze-o.
8.17: Tain amrar onurud mania tumrar gese zaira, ar asol ḳota oilo tain nize-u kushi oia zaira.
8.18: Tan loge ḳori amra hou baire-o faṭaiar, kush-ḳobri tobligor lagi hoḳol zomate-u i bair tarif ḳoroin.
8.19: Zomator manshe ḳali tan tarif ḳorse na, amrar loge oia dan-ḳoyrat loia zaibar lagi tara-u tanre fosond ḳorse. Te Malik Isar gourobor lagi, ar oinno mumin oḳolre shaijjo ḳorar lagi, amra ou dan-ḳoyrat nibar bebosta ḳorsi.
8.20: Amra kub hushiar oia soliar, zate boṛo aḳaror ou rilif bilanir bade ḳeu amrar bodnam ḳorar shuzug na fae.
8.21: Mono rakio, amra ḳali Malik Isar gese nae, manshor samne-o hok-halali roar sesṭa ḳoriar.
8.22: Ar erar loge ḳori amra aroḳ baire faṭairam, enre amra bout bar bout laḳan forikka ḳoria deḳsi, tan kub eshki ase. Oḳon deḳram, tain tumrare kub bishash ḳoroin, erlagi tumrar bae tan eshki aro baṛise.
8.23: Oḳon Titas bair befare ami koiram, ein to amar loge roin, ar tumrar lagi kam ḳoroin. Bad-baki hoḳol baiaintor befare ḳoiram, hoḳol zomator manshe fosond ḳoria tarare faṭaira, tarar mazdi al-Mosir gourob oy.
8.24: Erlagi koiram, tumrar bitoror mohobbot, ar tumrare loia amra ze boṛai-beṭagiri deḳai, itar forman deḳaio. Teu hoḳol zomator manshe buzba, tumra ḳe.

9.1: Baiainre, Allar pak bonda oḳolre shaijjor lagi dan-ḳoyrat tular ze ḳam soler, ita befare to tumrare kunta leḳar zorur nae.
9.2: Ou befare tumrar monor kial to amar zana ase. Makidoniar manshor gese ami tumrar shunam gaia ḳoiram, Gris deshor manush mani tumra, goto bosor taki-u dan-ḳoyrat loia zuit aso. Tumrar i eshki dekia, Makidoniar bout manush hozag oisoin.
9.3: Erlagi ami ou baiainre faṭairam, zate tumrare loia amra ze boṛai deḳai, tara gia nizor souke ita dekia forman fain. Te ami zela boṛai korsi tumra-o olaḳan zuit roio.
9.4: Arnae amar loge oia Makidoniar kunu baiain gia zudi deḳoin tumra zuit nae, te tumrar ufre oto boṛo borosha ḳorae, amra shorom faimu ar tumra-o shorminda oibae.
9.5: Erlagi ou mumin oḳolre onurud ḳorlam, tara zanu amar age tumrar gese zain. Rilif ḳamor lagi dan-ḳoyrat dibar ze oada ḳorsilae, tara gia oguin zuit ḳorat shaijjo ḳorba. Te tumrar ges taki zur-zobordosti koria kunta adae ḳora oito nae, ḳali monor kushie deoa dan-ḳoyrat neoa oibo.
9.6: Kial rakio, ze giroste tuṛa ḳori zala bain dey, he tuṛa foshol daibo, ar ze giroste besh ḳori zala bain dey, he besh ḳori foshol daibo.
9.7: Te tumra-o ola forteḳe zarzir niot mafik dan-ḳoyrat deo. Monor maze ḳoshṭo loia ba deoa lagbo ḳori dio na. Ḳaron dilor kushie dan ḳorle, Allae maya ḳoroin.
9.8: Allae tumrare hoḳol laḳan rohom-borkot dita faroin. I ḳemota tan ase, zate tumrar dorḳari hoḳolta hamesha tumrar gese taḳe, ar nek kamor lagi kula ate ita bilaitae faro.
9.9: Zela Fobitro Zobur Shorifo ase, He to kula ate bilai dise, gorib oḳolre dan ḳorse, tar forezgari siroḳal stayi.
9.10: Mono rakio, girostor lagi zein bis zugaia dein, ar ḳaibar lagi zein dana-fani zugaia dein, tain tumrare-o bis zugai diba, itat borkot diba, tumrar nek kamor foshol bout baṛai diba.
9.11: Ou laḳan tumra hoḳolmonte doni oibae, ar kula ate dan-ḳoyrat bilaibae, teu amrar mazdi Allar shukur-guzar adae oibo.
9.12: Ou rilif ḳame ḳali Allar bonda oḳlor obabo shaijjo oito nae, borong bout zonor torof taki Allar shukur-guzar-o baia foṛer.
9.13: Tumra al-Mosir kush-ḳobrir ufozukto ou kezmot ḳorso dekia, tara Allar shukur-guzar adae ḳorba. Tumra duio ate dan-ḳoyrat bilanie, Makidoniar manshe ar baki hoḳole-u Allar gourob ḳorba.
9.14: Tumra dan-ḳoyrat deoae Allar ges taki ou ze asanoḳ niamot faiso, ota dekia tara tumrar lagi dile-zane dua ḳorba.
9.15: Allar ze danor ḳota mukdi koia fuṛanir shaiddo nai, hou danor lagi tan tarif ouk.

10.1: O mumin baiain, al-Mosir norom ar doyalu babor ḳota iad ḳoria, ami Pauluse tumrare minot ḳoriar, manshe ḳoin, ami zebla tumrar loge roi, ou shomoy ami bule ḍorai ḍorai taki, ar horia gia harle shaoshi oizai.
10.2: Te zera mono ḳore, amra duniabi manshor laḳan zindegi kaṭaiar, tarar loge zotoḳan shaosh deḳani dorḳar, ami sairam, ami aoar bade zanu otoḳan shaosh deḳani na lage.
10.3: Amra zudio roḳto-mangshor manush, oile amra ze laṛai korram, ita to kunu roḳto-mangshor laṛai nae.
10.4: Duniabi sifaie zeta ostro-shostro dia laṛai koroin, amra to ita dia laṛai kori na, Allai bole amrar ostro-shostroe faṛor ufror bankar-o bangilto fare.
10.5: Amrar ostrodi manshor banoaṭ zukti binash ḳori, ar Allare sinar fote zoto laḳan bada-bignoe dilre aṭḳaia raḳe, itare-o binash ḳori. Manshor monor hoḳol ku-sintare ḳedaia hari al-Mosir tole ani.
10.6: Te tumra zebla shullo-ana baiddo oia tan tole aibae, hou shomoy zeta obaiddo roiba, itare shaza dibar lagi amra zuit oimu.
10.7: Tumra to ḳali amrar bairor surot deḳso. Kunu manshe zudi nizore al-Mosir ummot mono ḳore, te tar sinta ḳora zorur, he zan ummot, amra-o to tan ummot.
10.8: Ashole Malik Isae amrare ze odikar disoin, i befare ami kisu boṛai deḳaile-o to shorminda oitam nae. Ḳaron i odikaror uddesho oilo, tumrare goṛia tula, kunu ḳeti kora nae.
10.9: Amar i leḳa foṛia mono ḳorio na, ami siṭi dia tumrare ḍor deḳairam.
10.10: Kunu kunu manshe matoin, “Tan leḳa siṭinte dilo ḍekka mare, ita shoktishali siṭi, oile tain ḳandat aile deḳa zae, tain ḳomzur ar oaz-nosiot-o muṭe-u gorom nae.”
10.11: Ota manshore zananir lagi koiram, amra duroi taki siṭir mazdi zeta leḳram, samne aile ṭik ola-u ḳormu.
10.12: Tumrar mazor kunu kunu zone tar nizor tarif gae. Tarar loge to amrar tulona sole na, ba tarar dolor shodoishsho oite-o shaosh ḳori na. Tara to nize nize zeta bala mono ḳoroin, otar loge-u tarar tulona ḳoroin, otadi-u bisar ḳoroin, buzrae ni, ita ḳoto boṛo ammok!
10.13: Huno, amrar zotoḳan boṛai kora usit, er beshi kortam nae, borong Allae amrar ḳamor ze shimana ṭik kori disoin, amra er bitre roia-u boṛai kormu, i shimanar bitre tumra-o aso.
10.14: Erlagi amra zebla tumrar gese geslam, ou shomoy shimar bara to gesi na. Tumrar gese to hoḳol foyla amra-u al-Mosir kush-ḳobri toblig korat geslam.
10.15: Esaṛa foror ḳam loia amra gourob ḳoriar na, ita ḳorle shimar bara oilo one. Amra asha ḳoriar, tumrar imani bol baṛar loge loge tumrar maze aro bout ḳam ḳortam farmu.
10.16: Hou shomoy tumrar ges taki aro duror deshainto gia kush-ḳobri toblig kortam farmu. Teu kunu manshe ḳoito farto nae, foror ḳam loia amra boṛai koriar.
10.17: Oile Allar kalamo ase, “Ze manshe boṛai kore, he Malik Moulare loia boṛai korouk.”
10.18: Ḳaron nizor shunam nize gaile-u forman oy na he bala manush, borong Malik Moulae zar shunam gain, he-u bala hishabe forman oy.

11.1: O mumin bai oḳol, ami sairam, amar tuṛa be-aḳoli tumra shoijjo ḳoro, ar hasau tumra amare shoijjo ḳorrae-o.
11.2: Allai eshkir zalae amar dilo tumrar lagi eḳ zala foyda oise. Te ami eḳzon noshar loge tumrar biar mat-ḳota ṭik kori raḳsi, en nam al-Mosi. Ami sairam, shoti koina hishabe tumrare tan ato shomzai ditam.
11.3: Oile ami ḍoraiar, hou hafe zela ku-buddi dia Bibi Haoare be-fote nisilgi, olaḳan tumrare-o al-Mosir ges taki horailito fare, he tumrar dilor ḳaṭi bab ar monor nishana alailibo.
11.4: Ḳaron amra ze Isar befare toblig korsi, oinno zone zebla tanre saṛa dusra kunu Isar ḳota toblig kore, tumra ita manrae. Ar tumra ze Pak Ruhu faiso, ou Pak Ruhu saṛa dusra kunu ruhu faile, ba ze kush-ḳobri tumra manrae, i kush-ḳobri saṛa dusra kunu kush-ḳobri hunle, kub kushi oia-u manilirae.
11.5: Oile ami mono ḳori na, hou nam-ḍaki sahabi dol taki ami kunumonte-u huru.
11.6: Ami zudio kub miṭa miṭa shure oaz ḳortam fari na, tebou amar to aḳol-buddir ḳomti nae, ita to ami hoḳol nomunae hoḳol halote tumrare deḳaisi.
11.7: Tumrar unnoti deḳanir lagi ami bina betone Allar deoa kush-ḳobri toblig koria nizore nisa ḳorsi, ita kunu faf ḳorsi ni?
11.8: Tumrar kezmotor lagi ami oinno zomat oḳlor ges taki shaijjo anchi, ḳoite gele tarare luṭia anchi.
11.9: Tumrar gese roar ḳalo ami zebla obabo foṛlam, hou shomoy-o ami keuror buza oisi na. Ḳaron Makidonia taki zeta baiain aisla, tara amare shaijjo ḳorsoin. Te kunu halote-u ami tumrar buza oisi na, oitam-o nae.
11.10: Al-Mosir ze hokikoti amar bitre ase ou hokor bole-u ami koiram, asta Gris deshor kunu zagat-u amar i beṭagiri keu bond ḳorto farto nae.
11.11: Ami ila matar ḳaron kita? Ami tumrare maya ḳori na ni? Eḳ Allae-u zanoin, ami tumrare ḳoto maya ḳori.
11.12: Nizor boṛai-beṭagiri deḳaia zeguin amrar homani oita sain, itae zanu i shuzug na fain, otar lagi ami zeḳan ḳorat asi, ikan ḳorat roimu-u.
11.13: Ashole to ita oila bonḍo sahabi ar ṭog kamlain. Tara nizore al-Mosir sahabi deḳaito ḳori nizor surot bodlilae.
11.14: Ete taijjub oar kunta nae, Iblise-o to nizore nuror firista deḳanir lagi tar surot bodlae.
11.15: Erlagi zeguinte Iblisor kezmot ḳoroin, tara-o zudi nizor surot bodlaia deḳain tara nek kam ḳorra, te taijjub oar kita ase? Tarar ḳamor fol tara aḳerato faibo. Sahabi kamor lagi Hozrot Paulusor zulum-ḳoshṭo
11.16: Ami aroḳbar ḳoiram, amare zanu ḳeu fagol mono na ḳore. Ar zudi ila mono ḳorilao, te amare eḳ fagol hishabe-u shomzilao, zate ami-o tuṛa boṛai korar shuzug fai.
11.17: Ami oḳon zeta ḳoiram, ita Malik Isar hukume ḳoiram na, ḳali nizor boṛai deḳanit gia faglami korram.
11.18: Bout zone zebla duniabi bishoy loia boṛai deḳaira, te ami kene deḳaitam na?
11.19: Tumra to beshi aḳoldar, erlagi be-aḳol oḳolre kush dile shoijjo ḳoro.
11.20: Ḳali ikan nae, ḳeu zudi tumrare nizor gulam banaia raḳe, tumrare tar shikar banailae, fando falae, tumrar ufre ustadi kore ba tumrar galo soṛ mare, ta-o to tumra kushi oia shoijjo ḳorrae.
11.21: Oile ami kub shorminda oia shikar ḳoriar, ita befare tumrar gese amra boṛo ḳomzur aslam, ila netagiri kortam farsi na. Oinno manshe zeta loia boṛai korar shaosh fae, amar-o shaosh ase ita befare boṛai deḳanir, ami kali faglor laḳan ita matiram.
11.22: Zetae boṛai-beṭagiri deḳain, tara kita Ibrani zatir ni? Ami-o to tarar laḳan. Tara Boni Israil zatir ni? Ami-o ola. Tara Hozrot Ibrahimor aolad ni? Ami-o to.
11.23: Tara al-Mosir kezmotḳari ni? Ami aro boṛo kezmotḳari. Mono rakio, ami faglor laḳan matiram. Ami al-Mosir kezmoto lagia tara taki bout beshi menot ḳorsi. Bout bar zel ḳaṭsi, bout bar mair-doir ḳaisi, ar bout bar moutor mukabila oisi.
11.24: Ihudi oḳole amare fasbar durra marsoin, forteḳ bar unusallishṭa ḳori durra ḳaisi.
11.25: Tinbar amare singladi mara oise. Eḳbar amare fattor mara oise. Tinbar amar zaz ḍubi gesil, ar eḳ din eḳ rait doriar fanit bashail aslam.
11.26: Ami bout desh sofor ḳorsi. Ban-fanir ato, sur-ḍaḳaitor ato, nizor zatir ato ar bin zatir ato ami mosiboto foṛsi. Esaṛa ṭauno, morubumit, doriat, ar bonḍo mumin oḳlor ato-o ami mosiboto foṛsi.
11.27: Ou duḳ-mosibotor maze-o zane-forane menot ḳorsi, bout rait uzagori korsi, ḳani-fanir lagi koshṭo faisi, bout ufash-ḳafash roisi, shit ar ḳafoṛ-sufoṛor obabe-o ḳoshṭo faisi.
11.28: Ita saṛa-o al-Mosir zomat oḳlor lagi ami forteḳ din sinta ḳori.
11.29: Ḳeu ḳomzur oile ami nize-o tar ḳomzurir bagi oi na ni? Kunu ku-shongir talo foṛia ḳeu gunar fote gelegi, ami oshanti kori na ni?
11.30: Ami zudi boṛai deḳaitam sai, te ou ḳomzuri loia-u boṛai kormu.
11.31: Amrar Alla Pak ar Malik Isa al-Mosir gaibi baf, zein hamesha gourob faoar laḳ, tain nize-u zanoin, ami kunta-u misa matram na.
11.32: Dameskor bashsha Aritar hakim sabe amare dorar lagi Damesk ṭauno fara deoar hukum disla.
11.33: Oile ṭaunor baunḍorir oalor maze ze kiṛki asil, mumin baiainte eḳ ṭukrit ḳori ou kiṛki baedi amare maṭit lamai disla, ou nomunae ami tan at taki bagisi.

12.1: Te amar aro kisu boṛai kora dorḳar, i boṛaie kunu fayda nai, oile Malik Isae ze doroshon deḳaisoin ar zeta zanaisoin, ita oḳon ḳoiram.
12.2: Hozrot Isar eḳzon ḳadimre ami sini, oḳon taki souddo bosor age meraz shorifor lagi tanre behesto tulia neoa oisil. Tain zannatul-ferdouso gela, i shomoy tain sho-shorile gesoin ki na zani na, ḳali Allae-u zanoin.
12.3: Te enre ami sini, oile tane sho-shorile neoa oise ki na ami zani na, ḳali Alla Pake zanoin.
12.4: Meraz Shorifo nia harle tan loge bout batchit ḳora oise, ita batchit manshore hunani ṭik nae.
12.5: Oula manshore loia ami boṛai kormu. Amar nizore loia kunu boṛai nae, ḳali amar ḳomzurir lagi boṛai kormu.
12.6: Ou boṛai deḳaite saile-o, ami kunu be-aḳoli kortam nae, ḳali hasa mat matimu. Ta-o ami boṛai deḳani bad dilailam, kizanu amar ḳam-ḳaz dekia ba amar mukor zobanbondi hunia, manshe oḳon amare zotoḳan mono ḳoroin, er saite beshi mono ḳorilain.
12.7: Allae amare oto batuni befar zananie amar dilo zanu ohonkar na ae, ou niote tain amar shorilo eḳṭa rifu dila, amare ḳoshṭo dibar lagi, ou rifu oilo Iblisor sela.
12.8: Malik Isar dorbaro ami tinbar aroz ḳorslam, ou rifugu amar ges taki horaia nitagi.
12.9: Oile tain zuaf dila, “Amar rohomot-u tumar boutta, amar bol-shokti mile ḳali komzur halote.” Erlagi amar ḳomzurir befare ami kushi mone-u boṛai kormu, zate al-Mosir ou bol-shokti amar maze boshot ḳore.
12.10: Te al-Mosir namor lagi nanan laḳan ḳomzuri, beijjoti, obab-onoṭon, zulum-mosibot, ar befanat foṛle-o ami kushi oi. Ḳaron ḳomzur halote-u ami boloban oi. Korint zomator lagi sinta-babna
12.11: Ami fagol oisi ṭik-u, oile tumra-u amare fagol oite baiddo ḳorso. Tumrar usit asil amar tarif ḳora. Ami zudio kub shadaron manush, tebou tumrar hou nam-ḍaki sahabi dol taki kunumonte-u huru nae.
12.12: Ami nizore eḳzon hok sahabi hishabe forman ḳorsi, bout shoijjo ḳoria tumrar maze nanan nomunar keramoti kam, kudroti nishana ar muzeza deḳaisi.
12.13: Aichcha ḳo sain, oinno zomat oḳol taki tumra kunumonte huru ni? Oy, ḳali eḳṭa befare huru aso, ita oilo, ami tumrar gese buza oisi na. I bulor lagi amare mafi deo.
12.14: Huno, ami tumrar gese zaoar lagi ou tin nombor bar zuit oilam, te ami kunu buza oitam nae, tumrar gese kunu don-samana sairam na, ḳali tumrare sairam. Ma-bafor lagi don-samana zomani to aolador forz nae, borong ma-bafor usit oilo aolador lagi don zomani.
12.15: Te ami kub kushi oia-u tumrar lagi amar hoḳolta ḳoros ḳormu, amar nizore-o bilai dimu. Ami zebla tumrare besh ḳori maya-mohobbot ḳoriar, te tumra ḳene amare ḳom maya ḳorrae?
12.16: Zai ouk, ami tumrar ufre buza oisi na, arnae ḳeu ḳoilito fare, ami salaki koria tumrare duka disi.
12.17: Ar tumrar gese ami zerare faṭaislam, eraredi tumrare ṭogaisi ni?
12.18: Titas baire ami minot ḳorlam tumrar gese zaoar lagi, tan loge hou baire-o faṭailam. Te ou Titase tumrare ṭogisoin ni? Ami ar Titas, amra duiozone to eḳoi ruhe ar eḳoi niote ḳam ḳori.
12.19: Aichcha, tumra mono ḳorrae ni, ou siṭi lekia amra nizor dush ḳaṭairam? Na, ikan ṭik nae, O dust oḳol, amra al-Mosir ḳadim hishabe Alla Pakre azir-nazir rakia leḳram, tumrare goṛia tular niote-u ita ḳoiram.
12.20: Ashole amar kub ḍor ḳorer, ami zebla tumrar gese aimu, aia hari tumrare zela deḳtam sairam, tumra zudi ilaḳan zuit na o, ar tumra-o amar ze ruf deḳtae sao na, ami zudi hou ruf deḳani lage. Ba aia deki tumrar maze ḳaijja-fosad, ingsha-ninda, rag-gusa, doladoli, foror bodnam gaoa, gibot gaoa, boṛai-beṭagiri ar gulmal ase.
12.21: Amar bitre ḍor ḳorer, ami aroḳbar zebla tumrar gese aimu, ou shomoy amar Allae ni tumrar samne amare shorminda banailain, zeta manshe guna ḳorsoin, zetae nafaki kam, zina, ar bodmaishi koria touba ḳorse na, otare dekia ni ami monor maze ḳoshṭo fai.

13.1: Baiainre, ami ou tin nombor bar tumrar gese airam. Zano to, Allar kalamo ase, “Dui ba tin zon manshe eḳoi laḳan shakki dile ou befar hasa forman oy.”
13.2: Te ami zebla dusrabar tumrar gese geslam, hou soforor age zera guna-ḳosuri korsil, ami tarare ar bad-baki hoḳolre hushiar ḳori dislam. Ar oḳon ami nize azir na oile-o tarare ola hushiar ḳori diram, ami aroḳbar aile tara ḳeu rehai faita nae.
13.3: Tumra bule forman sairae, amar muk dia al-Mosie matira ni. Ashole al-Mosi to tumrar befare kunumonte-u ḳomzur nae, tan nizor bol-shokti tumrar maze azir ase.
13.4: Zudio tanre ḳomzur halote solibor ufre loṭḳaia zane mara oisil, ta-o Allar kudroti bole tain oḳon zinda asoin. Ar amra-o ola tan laḳan ḳomzur asi, oile tan loge zinda roae Allai kudroti bole tumrar gese aia mukabila oimu.
13.5: Tumra nizore zasai kori deḳo, al-Mosir ufre hasaror iman ase ni? Tumra buzo na ni, Isa al-Mosi tumrar dilo asoin. Kial rakio, zasai korat gia zanu tumrar maze bezal na mile.
13.6: Ar ami asha ḳori tumra buzbae, amra to ḳaṭi hishabe forman oigesi.
13.7: Amra Allar dorbaro munazat ḳorram, tumra hoḳol laḳan bod ḳam taki basia ro. Amra nizor forezgarir forman deḳanir lagi ikan ḳoiram na. Ar manshe amrare forezgar mono na ḳorle-o, tumra hamesha nek kam ḳorat ro.
13.8: Amrar ḳemota oilo hokor fokke, na-hokor fokke amrar kunu bol nai.
13.9: Te amra zebla ḳomzur ar tumra boloban, ita deḳle amra kushi. Amra dua ḳoriar, tumra touba ḳoria hari furafur ḳaṭi o.
13.10: Erlagi ami tumrar ges taki duroi roia ita leḳram, zate tumrar samne aia harle Malik Isar deoa ḳemota ḳaṭaia ḳoṭu bebohar ḳora na lage. Malike amare i kemota disoin tumrare goṛia tular lagi, ḳeti korar lagi nae. Bidayi salam ar dua
13.11: O bai oḳol, hesh-mesh ḳoiram, tumra kushi-bashi koro, nizore kamil banao, eḳe-oinnore nosiot ḳoro, eḳoi monobabe ro, shantie boshot ḳoro. Teu shantir ar mohobbotor Alla-o tumrar loge loge roiba.
13.13: Allar hoḳol pak bondae tumrare salam zanaira.
13.14: Malik Isa al-Mosir rohomot, Alla Pakor mohobbot, ar Pak Ruhur ḳatir-zoton tumra hoḳlor dilo rouk. Amin.

1.1: Ami Paulus, Isa al-Mosir eḳzon sahabi. Ami kunu manshor hukum-foramishe ba kunu manshor usillae sahabi oisi na. Ḳali Isa al-Mosi ar amrar gaibi baf Alla, zein al-Mosire murda taki zinda ḳori tulchoin, erar ges taki-u ḳelafoti faisi.
1.2: Ami ar amar logor hoḳol mumin baiainte milia, Galatia deshor Isayi zomat oḳlor gese ou sohifaḳan leḳram.
1.3: Amrar gaibi baf Alla Pake ar Isa al-Mosie tumrare rohomot ar shanti dan ḳoroukka.
1.4: Amrar gaibi baf Alla Pakor munshae, hou Isae amrar gunar mafir lagi nizor fobitro zan kurbani disoin, zate ou ḳaraf zomanar at taki amrare basaita faroin.
1.5: Alla Pakor tarif hor-hamesha zari rouk. Amin.
1.6: Ami boṛo taijjub oigesi, al-Mosir rohome zein ḍakia ania tumrare nizor bonda banaisoin, tane saṛia tumra kila oto zoldi aroḳ nomunar kush-ḳobrir bae firigelae.
1.7: Ashole to iṭa kunu kush-ḳobri-u nae. Oile ḳoyzon manush ase, zetae tumrar iman loia ḳeiṛ ḳelaira, tara al-Mosir kush-ḳobrire ulṭa-falṭa ḳorilta saira.
1.8: Huno, amra ze kush-ḳobri tumrar gese toblig korsi, ou kush-ḳobri saṛa dusra kunu kush-ḳobri zudi tumrar gese toblig kora oy, ita zudi amra nize-u ḳori, ba asmani kunu firistae aia ḳoroin, te ogur ufre lannot foṛouk.
1.9: Ami age zemne ḳoisi, oḳon hirbar oula ḳoiram, agor ze kush-ḳobri tumra mancho, ita saṛa dusra kunu kush-ḳobri keu tumrar gese toblig korle, ogur ufre lannot foṛouk.
1.10: Ita ḳoria ami kar ges taki tarif faitam saiar, kunu manshor ges taki na Allar ges taki? Ami kunu manshore kush ḳorar sesṭa ḳoriar ni? Ami zudi oḳono manshore kush ḳorar sesṭa ḳortam, te ami al-Mosir ḳadim oilam na one. Hozrot Paulus kila sahabi oila
1.11: O baisab oḳol, afnara zania raḳoukka, ami ze kush-ḳobri toblig korsi, ita to kunu manshor banail motobad nae.
1.12: Ami ita kunu manshor ges taki faisi na, ḳeu amare ita hikaise-o na. Ḳali Isa al-Mosie nize amar gese ita zair ḳorsoin.
1.13: Ami age zebla Ihudi dormo mantam, hou shomoy amar sal-cholon kila asil ita to tumra huncho. Ami Allar zomat oḳolre ḳoto beshi zulum ḳortam, ar itare binash ḳorar sesṭat aslam, eota tumra zano.
1.14: Amar baf-dadar ges taki faoa shora-rosumot manat-o ami kub kiali aslam. Erdae amar boyoshi Ihudi oḳlor maze Alla-billa ḳorat ami bout aguail aslam.
1.15: Oile Allae to amar maʼr feṭo taḳte-u amare fosond ḳorsoin, tain-u nizor rohomote amare daot disoin. Tan munsha asil,
1.16: ami tan ḳas mayar zonor didar faia, oinnainno zatir gese kush-ḳobri toblig kori. Te ou didar faia-o ami kunu Adom zator loge foramish ḳorsi na.
1.17: Ar amar agor kunu sahabir loge mulaḳat ḳorar lagi ami Zeruzalem ṭaun ḳano-o gesi na. Borong ami Arob desho geslamgi, gia guri-firi hirbar Damesk ṭauno aisi.
1.18: Er tin boros bade sahabi Fitoror loge mulaḳat ḳorar niote Zeruzalem geslam, gia tan ono fonro din aslam.
1.19: Ou shomoy Hozrot Isar bai sahabi Iakub saṛa, dusra kunu sahabir loge amar deḳa oise na.
1.20: Eḳ Alla shakki asoin, ami ou zeta leḳlam, er eḳṭa horof-o misa nae. Mono raḳba, ou kush-ḳobri to kunu manshor ges taki faisi na, ḳali Isa al-Mosie nize amar gese zair ḳorsoin.
1.21: Bade ami Siria ar Kilikia deshor bout zagat geslam.
1.22: Ou shomoy Ehudia zilar Isayi zomat oḳole-o amare sinta na.
1.23: Tara ḳali ou ḳobor hunchila, “Age ze beṭae amrar ufre zulum ḳorto, ar Isar namre dunia taki tuṛilito saisil, oḳon hou beṭae al-Mosir imanor kush-ḳobri toblig korer.”
1.24: Ami iman ania bodli zaoae, tara Allar shukur-tarif ḳorta.

2.1: Souddo boros bade Barnabasor loge oia ami hirbar Zeruzalem gelam, ou shomoy Titasre-o loge nilam.
2.2: Allai hukume ami hono gelam. Gia honor baiainre ḳoilam, oinnainno zatir gese ami kun kush-ḳobri toblig kori. Oile zomator murobbi oḳolre ita niralae ḳoilam, amar sinta asil, amar oto douṛor ḳam zate beḳama na zae.
2.3: Amar logor bai Titas o-Ihudi oile-o, tan mosolmani kam ḳoranir lagi era kunu saf dise na.
2.4: Ashole imandar dolor bitre ḳoyzon munafik hamanie ola oilo. Isa al-Mosir ummot bonae amra ze shadinota faisi, otar kut dorar lagi-u era hamaisil, zate amrare Musar shoriotor gulamit raḳto fare.
2.5: Oile amra eḳ foloḳor lagi-o tarar gulami manlam na, zate kush-ḳobrir hokikoti tumrar gese ḳaim roy.
2.6: Ar zomator nam-ḍaki zon oḳlor loge ami matilam, era zein-u oin na ḳene, itae amar kunta-u zae ae na, Allae to muk saia mosolmani koroin na. Era to amare noya kunta disoin na,
2.7: borong tara buzilila, Ihudi shomazor gese kush-ḳobri tobligo Fitorre zela dayitto deoa oisil, ou laḳan oinnainno zatir gese tobligor dayitto amare deoa oise.
2.8: Tara oḳan deḳla, Ihudi oḳlor gese sahabi kamo Fitorre zein salaisoin, hou Allae-u oinnainno zatir maze sahabi kamo amare salaisoin.
2.9: Oḳan dekia zomator goinno-mainno murobbi, mani Iakub, Fitor ar Hannane buzilila, Allar torof tone ami kas rohomot faisi. Teu tara-o amrar loge eḳmot asoin oḳan deḳaita ḳori, amar ar Barnabasor loge tarar at milaila. Ar ou mate razi oila, amra toblig kormu oinnainno zatir gese, oile tara toblig korba Ihudi shomazor gese.
2.10: Tara ḳali ekkan abdar ḳorla, amra zanu zomator gorib oḳlor bae kial raki. Ashole amar-o ola ḳorar kub ichcha asil. Hozrot Paulus ar Fitore omil
2.11: Bade Fitor Antiokia ṭauno aila. Ermaze tain eḳ boṛo oinnae ḳorae ami tan mukor samne-u afotti zanailam.
2.12: Ou shomoy Ihudi taki mumin oa eḳdol manshe fotua dita, oinnainno zati taki zera Isar ummot oy, tarar mosolmani kam ḳorani zorur. Ou fotua dolor kisu manush sahabi Iakubor ges taki aibar age Fitore oinno zatir loge mila-misha ḳori kana-dana ḳaita. Iṭa to kub bala. Oile era aoae erar ḍore tain ou bala ḳam bond ḳorilla. Oḳṭa-u boṛo oinnae.
2.13: Antiokiar aro bout Ihudi mumine-o Fitoror loge ou bonḍamit shamil oila. Hesh-mesh Barnabas-o tarar loge bul fote fao dilaila.
2.14: Oile ami zebla deḳlam, kush-ḳobrir hokikotor loge tarar ḳam-ḳaz miler na, ou hoḳlor samne Fitorre ḳoilam, “Afne Ihudi oia-o zudi Ihudi niom bad dia oinno zatir laḳan soloin, te oinno zatire ḳene oḳon Ihudi niom manar tagid dira?
2.15: Afne-ami duiozon-u to Ihudi, naforman o-Ihudi kulo zonmisi na.
2.16: Erbade-o to amra zani, Musar shoriot amol ḳorle-o Allae manshore dindar ḳoia kobul ḳoroin na, ḳali Isa al-Mosir ufre iman anle-u dindar ḳoia kobul ḳoroin. Erdae-u amra tan ufre iman anchi, zate shoriotor amole nae, oile al-Mosir ufre iman anae amrare dindar ḳoia kobul ḳoroin. Ḳaron shoriot amol ḳorle-o kunu manshore dindar ḳoia gona oito nae.”
2.17: Oile oḳon amra al-Mosir torikae dindar bontam sairam ḳori, Ihudi shorar niom-ḳanun bad dilaisi. Ete zudi kunu kunu zone amrare naforman ḳoin, te kita buza zae, al-Mosie kunu gunar kezmot ḳoroin ni? Nauzubilla, nisoy na.
2.18: Ami nize zeta bad dilaisi, ota zudi hirbar ḳori, te to nize-u nizore dushi forman ḳoriar.
2.19: Shoriotor niome shoriotor ato-u amar mout oigese, zate Allar tarifor lagi ami zinda roi.
2.20: Te dorilao, amare al-Mosir loge gaso loṭḳaia zane mara oise. Ami ar zinda nae, amar ḳayar maze al-Mosi-u zinda asoin. Ou ḳayae oḳon ze zindegi kaṭairam, iṭa Allar ḳas mayar zonor ufre imanor bole ḳaṭairam. Tain amare mohobbot ḳoria, amare toranir lagi nizor zan kurbani disoin.
2.21: Alla Pakor i rohomot ami bifol oite ditam nae. Shoriot amol ḳoria zudi manush dindar bonizito, te al-Mosi kamoḳa kurbani oila ni?

3.1: O be-aḳol Galati oḳol, tumrare ḳegie zadu ḳorse? Tumrar gese to kula-mela ar saf-sofa toblig kora oise, Isa al-Mosire gaso loṭḳaia zane mara oisil.
3.2: Te oḳon ami kali ou ḳotaḳan zantam sairam, tumra ze Pak Ruhu faiso, iṭa kita Musar shoriot amol ḳoria faiso ni? Na kush-ḳobri hunia iman anae faiso?
3.3: Tumra kunu ola be-aḳol ni? Pak Ruhur bole noya zindegi shuru ḳoria, oḳon nizor bole kamiab oitae sairae?
3.4: Te ḳamoḳa oto duk-koshṭo ḳorlae ni? Ami asha ḳori tumrar i koshṭo muṭe-u behuda gese na.
3.5: Aichcha, Allae to tumrare Pak Ruhu dan ḳorsoin, ar tumrar maze bout keramoti kam-o ḳorsoin. Te ḳo sain, tan shoriot manae tain ita ḳorla ni? Na kush-ḳobri hunia tumra iman anae ita ḳorsoin?
3.6: Ibrahim nobir befarḳan deḳo, Allar kalamo ase, “Ibrahime Allar oadae iman anae, Allae tanre dindar ḳoia kobul ḳorla.”
3.7: Erdae tumra-o shomzilao, zera iman ane, tara-u Ibrahimor asol aolad.
3.8: Asmani Kitabo age-u batail oise, Allar ufre iman anle-u to tain oinnainno zatire dindar ḳoia kobul ḳoroin. Ibrahimor gese ou ayator kush-ḳobri age-u zanail oisil, “Tumar usillae duniar tamam zatie borkot faiba.”
3.9: Te buza zae, Allar oadae iman anae Ibrahime zela borkot faisoin, tan bade zera iman anba tara-o ola borkot faiba.
3.10: Asmani Kitabe ḳoy, “Ze manshe shoriotor kitabo leḳa tamam hukum-ahkam amol na ḳore, he lannoti.” On taki buza zae, zera shoriot manar ufre borosha ḳore, tara hoḳlor ufre-u i lannot ase.
3.11: Allar kalame batae, “Dindar ḳoia zare kobul ḳora oy, he tar imanor zoriae zindegi faibo.” Erdae buza zae, shoriotor hukum-ahkam manle-o Allae ḳeurore dindar ḳoia kobul ḳoroin na.
3.12: Oile shoriote ḳoy, “Shoriotor hukum-ahkam mafik ze manush sole, he shoriotor mazdi-u zindegi kaṭaibo.” Te to buza zae, shoriote imanor ufre borosha ḳore na.
3.13: Shoriotor borkelaf ḳorae amrar ufre ze lannot asil, ou lannot al-Mosie tan nizor ḳando nia amrare azad ḳorsoin. Allar kalamo to ase, “Gaso loṭḳaia zare zane mara oy, he lannoti.”
3.14: Allae Ibrahim nobire ze borkot dan ḳorsoin, Isa al-Mosir zoriae ou borkot zate oinno zati oḳole-o fain, ar amra-o zate imanor mazdi oada ḳora hou Pak Ruhu fai, otar dae-u al-Mosie i lannot nizor ḳando nisoin. Shoriot ar oada
3.15: O bai oḳol, ami duniabi kotadi buzai diram. Dui fokko manshor maze zebla kunu chukti faḳa-fukto oizae, ou chukti eḳ fokkoe ar batil ḳorto fare na, ba ermaze noya kunta lagaito-o fare na.
3.16: Te Ibrahim nobi ar tan aolador loge Allae ze oada ḳorsla, Allar kalamo to ḳoa oise na, “aolad oḳlor loge” mani bout aolador loge. Borong koa oise ḳali “tumar aolador loge” mani eḳ aolador loge, ar ou aolad-u oila al-Mosi.
3.17: Ami koitam sairam, Allae Ibrahimor amolo oadar mazdi ze niom boail ḳorsla, er sair-sho tish boros bade shoriot deoa oisil. Ou shoriot aoae agor hou oadar niom to batil ḳorto fare na. Te to tan oada zari roilo.
3.18: Ar Allar borkot faoa zudi shoriot amolor ufre nirbor ḳorto, te oadar ufre nirbor roilo na one. Oile Allae oadar mazdi-u Ibrahimre borkot dan ḳorsla.
3.19: Te ḳoiba, shoriot ḳene deoa oisil? Manshe gunar ḳam na saṛae, Allar torof taki oadar loge shoriot-o shamil ḳorsla. Ar Ibrahimor ze aolador befare Allae oada ḳorsla, ou zone toshrif na ana forzonto i shoriot boail asil. Allar firistar zoriae Musa nobir gese i shoriot nazil oisil. Ou Musa-u asla Alla ar manshor maze shafayatḳari, mani mazor manush.
3.20: Oile ḳali eḳfokko taḳle to mazor manshor zorur asil na; ar Alla to eḳzon-u. Tain Ibrahimor loge oadar ḳalo kunu mazor zon lagse na.
3.21: Te shoriot kunu Allar oada oḳlor ulṭa ni? Nichoy na. Allae zudi ou laḳan shoriot dan ḳorta, zetae aḳeri zindegi mile, te shoriot mania-u manush Allar dorbaro kobul oigelone.
3.22: Oile Asmani Kitabe batae, tamam manush-u gunar ḳobzae bondi, tara zanu Isa al-Mosir ufre iman ania, imanor zoriae oada ḳora hou borkot fain.
3.23: Iman aoar age shoriote amrare fara disil. Iman zair na oa forzonto ou shoriote-u amrare bandia raḳsil.
3.24: Erdae buza zae, al-Mosir gese fosanir age ou shoriote-u otodin amrare salaise, zate imanor zoriae amrare dindar ḳoia kobul ḳora oy.
3.25: Oile oḳon iman ḳaim oae, amra ar saloḳdar shoriotor tolua nae. Allar nuror aolad
3.26: Isa al-Mosir ufre iman anae tumra hokkol oḳon Allar aolad bonigeso.
3.27: Tumra zara al-Mosir torika kobul ḳorso, tumra to finnor noya ḳafoṛor laḳan al-Mosir bitre hamaigeso.
3.28: Ihudi ar o-Ihudi, gulam ar azad, beṭin ar beṭaintor maze oḳon kunu tofat nai. Isa al-Mosir loge mishi zaoae tumra hoḳol-u to eḳ oigeso.
3.29: Tumra zebla al-Mosir zon oigeso, te to Ibrahimor aolad-o oiso, ar Allae Ibrahimre zeta diba ḳori oada ḳorsla, tumra-o otar bagi bonigeso.

4.1: Ashole ami buzaitam sairam, bafor hoḳol don-samanat aolador eḳtiar taḳle-o, he zotodin nabalik roy otodin aolad ar gulamor maze kunu tofat mile na.
4.2: Tar bafe ze shomoyor ḳota osiot ḳori zain, otodin he tar murobbi ba zimmadaror aotae roite oy.
4.3: Ou laḳan amra-o zebla nabalik aslam, hou shomoy duniar nanan sal-cholonor gulam aslam.
4.4: Oile shomoy fura oia harle, Allae tan ḳas mayar zonre bezila. Tain eḳzon nek aorotor feṭo zonom loia, shoriotor hukum-ahkam mafik zindegi kaṭaila.
4.5: Zate shoriotor aotae taḳa manshore azad ḳorta faroin, ar amrare-o Allar aolad bonar eḳtiar dein.
4.6: Erdae tumra Allar aolad bonizaoae tumrar dilo boshot ḳorar lagi, Allae tan ḳas mayar zonor ruhre bezisoin. Tumrar dilor ou ruhe to Alla Pakre abba ḳoia ḍaḳoin.
4.7: Gotike-u tumra gulam roiso na, aolad bonigeso; ar aoladre Allae zeta deoar oada ḳorsila, oḳon tumra eotar malikana-o faiso. Imane mozbut ar ḳaṭi o
4.8: Age tumra zebla Alla Pakre sintae na, hou shomoy tumra zetar gulami kortae, iguin to ashole kunu devta-u nae.
4.9: Oile oḳon to Allare sincho; ashole Allae-u tan nizor forisoy disoin. Te tumra kila hirbar duniabi hou ḳomzur ar batil sal-cholonor bae firizirae? Aroḳbar otar gulam bontae sairae ni?
4.10: Tumra hirbar omuk ar tomuk din, mash, ritu ar bosorre manrae.
4.11: Erdae amar ḍor ḳorer, tumrar tole amar oto menot ni maṭi oizae.
4.12: O bai oḳol, ami tumrare minot ḳoriar, ami zela tumrar laḳan oigesi, tumra-o ola amar laḳan o. Tumra to otodin amar kunu ḳeti korso na.
4.13: Tumrar zana ase, amar shorilo bemar oae, ami tumrar gese foyla bar kush-ḳobri tobligor shuzug faislam.
4.14: Amar bemaror dae tumrar ḳoshṭo oile-o, tumra to gin ba ela ḳoria amare falaiso na. Borong Allar kunu firista ba Isa al-Mosire zelaḳan kobul ḳortae, ou laḳan amare-o kobul ḳorso.
4.15: Oile oḳon tumrar dilor hi eshki gelo kuai? Ami to tumrar befare oḳan-u ḳoitam fari, hou shomoy farle tumra nizor ḳoilja kulia amare dilailae one.
4.16: Te tumrar gese hok kota matae, ami oḳon dushmon oigelam ni?
4.17: Huno, ou zeguinte tumrar kuz-ḳobor loira, oguin to bod niote aira. Tara sain, tumrare amar bae tone firaia, tarar ashik banaita.
4.18: Bala niote ola ḳorle fayda oilo one. Oile ami zebla tumrar samne ai, ḳali ou shomoy nae, nek niote hor-hamesha kuz-ḳobor loa bala.
4.19: O amar fiara aolad oḳol, tumra zotodin al-Mosir laḳan na boncho, otodin ami hirbar tumrar lagi hurutta foydar bishor laḳan soṭfoṭ ḳorram.
4.20: Amar mone sar, ou foygam leḳa bad dia oḳon-u ami nize tumrar gese aia, ṭanḍa matae batchit ḳortam. Te tumrare loia kita ḳortam kunta buzram na. Bibi Sayra ar bandi Hazera taki talim
4.21: Tumra zera Musar shoriotor gulami kortae sao, tumra ḳo sain, shoriote zeta ḳoy ita tumrar ḳano hamae na ni?
4.22: Allar kalame batae, Ibrahim nobir dui fua asla, foyla fua bandi beṭi Hazerar torofa ar dusra fua asol shadin Bibi Sayrar torofa.
4.23: Bandi beṭir torofa fuar zonom oisil duniar niome, oile asol shadin bibir fuar zonom oisil Alla Pakor oadae kudroti bole.
4.24: I mator mani oilo, ou dui beṭi oila duiṭa niom. Eḳ niom Tur faṛ tone aise, iṭae tar kezmot ḳorra manshore gulamir fote ṭane; ein oila bandi Hazera.
4.25: Ou Hazera mani Arob deshor Tur faṛ. Ar Hazera oila ou zogotor Zeruzalem ṭaunor eḳ nomuna, Zeruzalem ṭaune to tar fua-fuṛinre loia bandi bonche.
4.26: Oile asmani ze Zeruzalem, ein to shadin; ein-u amrar ma.
4.27: Asmani Kitabe ḳoy, “O niaoladi beṭi, zar kunu hurutta oise na, tumi kushir gozol gao. Hurutta foydar bishe zare dorse na, tumi gola faṭaia zure zure gozol gao. Zamair goror bour saite-o, zar ḳeu nai tair bout beshi aolad oiba.”
4.28: Bai oḳol, erdae-u tumrar zonom oise Allar oadar Isʼhakor laḳan.
4.29: Oile hou shomoy duniar niome zar zonom oisil, he zulum ḳorto ou zonre, zein zonom loisoin Allar Pak Ruhur bole; ar oḳono oula zulum or.
4.30: Erdae deḳo, Allar kalame ḳoy, “Bandire ar tair fuare baṛi tone ḳedai deo; bandir torofa fuae kunumonte-u asol bibir fuar loge, don-samanar baṭ faito nae.”
4.31: Te O bai oḳol, ou ayate buza zae, amra bandir aolad nae, amra to asol shadin bibir goror aolad.

5.1: O mumin oḳol, al-Mosie amrare shadin ḳorsoin, shadin halote roar lagi. Erdae tumrar shadinotare doria raḳo, gulamir lagam ar findio na.
5.2: Huno, ami Pauluse tumrare ḳoiram, tumra zudi oḳono mosolmani kam ḳorao, te al-Mosir kunu dam-u to tumrar gese nai.
5.3: Ami hoḳlor gese hirbar oḳan ḳoiram, ze zonre mosolmani korail oy, tar ufre forz oizae shoriotor tamam hukum-ahkam mana.
5.4: Tumra zara shoriot amol ḳoria dindar bontae sairae, tumra to al-Mosir ges tone alog oigeso, Allar rohomot tone horigeso.
5.5: Oile amrare dindar ḳoia kobul ḳora oibo, imane ou nichoyota faia Pak Ruhur bole amra bar sairam.
5.6: Isa al-Mosir ummot bonia harle mosolmani kam ḳoraile-o zeta, na ḳoraile-o ota. Borong mohobbotor mazdi ze iman zair oy, ou iman-u oilo asol.
5.7: Tumra to bala fote solat aslae; te ou hok fote solte tumrare ḳegie bada dilo?
5.8: Huno, tumra oḳon ze motobad manrae, ze Allae tumrare fosond ḳori anchoin, i motobad to tan batail fot nae.
5.9: Zano ni, eḳ fuṭa senae eḳ balti dudre borbad ḳorilae.
5.10: Te tumrar befare ami malikor dorbaro ou borosha ḳori, tumra dusra kunu motobado zaitae nae. Oile zegie tumrare satar, he ze-u oy na ḳene, tar faona shaza he faibo.
5.11: O bai oḳol, ami zudi oḳono oḳan ḳoi, manshe mosolmani kam ḳorani zorur, te amar ufre ḳene oḳono zulum or? Te duk-koshṭor solibor ufre al-Mosir moutor ḳota hunle zetae muk lukain, tarar muk lukani to bond oigelo one.
5.12: Erdae ami sairam, tumrar dilo zetae gonḍogul lagaisoin, oguinte tarar asta nofs ḳaṭia falai deuk. Gunar gulami saṛo, Pak Ruhe ḳaṭi o
5.13: O bai oḳol, Allae tumrare fosond ḳoria anchoin azad oar lagi. Oile azad bonia tumrar dilor gunar ḳaish furanit lagio na, borong dilor mohobbote eḳe-oinnor kezmot ḳoro.
5.14: Ḳaron asta shoriotre-u ekḳano ḳoria ḳoa oise, “Tumar ari-forire nizor laḳan maya ḳorio.”
5.15: Oile tumra zudi eḳe-oinne ḳaijja-fosad ar resha-reshi koro, te hushiar oizao! Ita ḳorle to tumra eḳe-oinnore binash ḳorilibae.
5.16: Huno, ami tumrare ḳoiram, Pak Ruhur bole zindegi kaṭao, teu dilor ou ḳaish miṭanir kial oito nae.
5.17: Ou ḳaishe zeta ḳoy, ita to Pak Ruhur bifokke, ar Pak Ruhe zeta ḳoin ita bod ḳaishor bifokke. Bod ḳaish ar Pak Ruhu era eḳe-oinnor birudi, erdae nek kamor niot ḳoria-o tumra ita fura ḳoro na.
5.18: Ar tumra zudi Pak Ruhur bole zindegi kaṭao, te tumra shoriotor gulam nae.
5.19: Dilor bod ḳaishor ḳam-ḳaz to kula-mela-u sina zae, ita oilogi zina, nafaki, bodmaishi,
5.20: devta puja, zadu-ṭuna, dushmoni, ḳaijja-fosad, lub-lalos, gusa, niz-motlobi, omil, doladoli,
5.21: ingsha, matlami, hoi-hulla ḳori bojjati kora, ar ou nomunar aro bout ḳam. Te ami age zela hushiar ḳorslam, oḳon hirbar oula ḳoiram, dilor ou bod ḳaishor gulami zera ḳore, Allar bashshait tarar kunu ṭai nai.
5.22: Oile Pak Ruhe sola zindegir fol oilo mohobbot, kushi-bashi, shanti, sobor ḳora, doyalu bab, bala-manshi kora, hok-halali roa,
5.23: norom oa ar nizore shamlaia raḳa. Ou nek kamor birudi kunuzat ain nai.
5.24: Ar Isa al-Mosir afon ummote to, zarzir rifure, dilor hoḳol bod ḳaish shudda Isa al-Mosir solibo ḳoybor dilaise.
5.25: Oḳon amra zudi ekin ḳori Pak Ruhur zoriae noya zindegi faisi, te ao, amra Pak Ruhur zimmae zindegi kaṭai.
5.26: Amra behuda boṛai-beṭagiri bad dei, eḳe-oinnore satani ar ingsha-ingshi ekkere saṛi dei.

6.1: O bai oḳol, zomator ḳeu zudi aḳta kunu gunar fando foṛizae, te tumra zera Pak Ruhe zindegi kaṭairae, tumra tare tulia anio. Ar kub norom dile i kam ḳorio, nizor befare-o hushiar roio, zate nize-o fando na foṛo.
6.2: Tumra eḳe-oinnor bar bo, teu al-Mosir niom furafur mana oibo.
6.3: Kunta na bonia-o ze manshe nizor boṛai-bahaduri deḳae, he to nize-u nizore ṭogae.
6.4: Te forteḳ manshe zarzir amol-ḳaislot forikka ḳorouk. Teu oinnor loge nizor tulona na ḳoria, tar nizor ḳamor lagi boṛai korto farbo.
6.5: Forteḳ zone-u nizor gaiṭ nize bo.
6.6: Huno, ze zonre Allar kalam hikail oy, he tar ustador balair lagi kezmot ḳorouk.
6.7: Bai oḳol, tumra be-foti bonio na, Allar loge to ṭaṭṭa-moshkora sole na. Zein zela ḳet ḳorbae, ein ola foshol faibae.
6.8: Dilor ou bod ḳaishre kush ḳorar lagi ket ḳorle, i ket taki gozob milbo. Oile Pak Ruhre kush raḳar lagi ket ḳorle, i Pak Ruhu taki aḳeri zindegi milbo.
6.9: Nek kam ḳorat lagia amra zanu nirash na oi. Hamesha lagia roile ṭik shomoye er foshol faimu.
6.10: Shuzug faile-u amra zanu hoḳol manshor, ḳas ḳori Allar foribaror manshor asan ḳori. Aḳeri nosiot
6.11: Deḳrae ni, ḳoto muṭa muṭa horofe ami nizor ate tumrar gese leḳsi!
6.12: Zeguinte tarar nizor bala-manshi zair ḳorto sae, otae tumrare mosolmani kam ḳoranir lagi tagid der. Al-Mosir solibor lagi zate tarar ufre kunu zulum na oy, zulum taki basar lagi tara ita ḳorer.
6.13: Huno, mosolmani kam zetae ḳoraisoin, otae-o to shoriotor borkelaf ḳoroin. Oile erbade-o tara tumrare mosolmani koraito sae, zate tara boṛai koria ḳoito fare tumra-o tarar dolo aso.
6.14: Oile ami koiram, ḳali Isa al-Mosir solib saṛa dusra kunu befare-u ami boṛai kori na. Ou solibor mazdi-u i dunia amar gese morigese, ar ami-o duniar sokut morigesi.
6.15: Erdae mosolmani kam ḳoraile-o zeta, na ḳoraile-o ota. Al-Mosir zoriae hirbar noya foyda oa-u oilo asol befar.
6.16: Ar ou imane zera zindegi kaṭae, mani kaṭi Allar bondare, tain rohom ar shanti dan ḳoroukka.
6.17: Hesh-mesh ḳoiram, Hozrot Isar lagi mair ḳaia ḳoto nomunar zoḳom amar nizor shorilo loia sokkor diar. Te amare ḳeu duk dio na.
6.18: Bai oḳol, amrar munib Isa al-Mosir rohomot tumrar dilo ḳaim rouk. Amin.

1.1: Ami Paulus, Alla Pakor morzi mafik Hozrot Isa al-Mosir eḳzon sahabi. Ifis ṭaunor maze al-Mosir torikar pak bonda ar mumin oḳlor gese ami Pauluse ou sohifaḳan leḳram.
1.2: Amrar gaibi baf Alla Pake ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosie afnara hoḳlor ufre rohomot ar shanti nazil ḳoroukka. Hozrot Isa al-Mosir maze-u rohomot
1.3: Alla Pakor tarif ouk, tain-u Isa al-Mosir Alla ar tan gaibi baf, ar ou Hozrot Isa-u amrar malik. Alla Pake to al-Mosir usillae asmanor forteḳ nomunar ruhani rohomot amrare dan ḳorsoin.
1.4: Alla Pakor dorbaro amra zate fak-fobitro ar nikut oitam fari, ou kiale tain i dunia foydar age-u, nizor maya-mohobbote al-Mosir usillae amrare fosond ḳorsoin.
1.5: Allae tan nizor morzi ar nizor kushie age-u ṭik koria raḳsoin, zate Isa al-Mosir usillae amrare tan afon aolad hishabe kobul ḳorba.
1.6: Allae ita ḳorsoin, zate tan ḳas mayar zon Isar usillae amrare zoto forimane rohomot ar mohima dan ḳorsoin, otae tan tarif oy.
1.7: Al-Mosir fobitro kurbanir usillae tan lour bodla amra gunar shaza taki kalas faisi, amra ou mafi faisi, ita to Alla Pakor ḳas rohomot.
1.8: Ou rohomot to Allae tan ḳas aḳol-hekmote amrar ufre ḍalia disoin.
1.9: Tain age taki zelaḳan kial ḳorsla, al-Mosir mazdi zeta ḳorar niot ḳorsila, ou kial-kushir hokkol batuni befar tain amrare zanaisoin.
1.10: Tain to age-u oḳan ṭik koria raḳsila, zate shomoy fura oia harle, tan afon morzi mafik asman-zominor hokkoltare ekḳano ḳoria, al-Mosir aotae anba.
1.11: Allae tan nizor aḳol-insaf dia nizor morzi mafik hoḳol ḳam ḳoroin. Tan munsha mafik tain age-u zeta ṭik koria raḳsila, hou munsha mafik tain amrare-o fosond ḳorsoin al-Mosir usillae tan ḳas bonda oar lagi.
1.12: Erlagi amra zera ag taki-u al-Mosir ufre borosha ḳortam, ou amrar mazdi-u zate Allar gourob-mohimar tarif oy, ou kiale-u tain amrare fosond ḳorsoin.
1.13: Ar afnara-o Allar hok kalam, mani nazator kush-ḳobri faia al-Mosir ufre iman anchoin. Al-Mosir ummot oae Alla Pake tan oada ḳora Pak Ruhu dia afnaintore sil-sappoṛ marsoin.
1.14: Te zeta manshore Alla Pake tan nizor shompod ḳoia ḍakisoin, erare tain eḳṭa odikar dibar oada ḳorsoin. Erlagi zotodin forzonto era furafur ḳalas na oisoin, otodin forzonto ou odikaror foyla kishti hishabe erare Pak Ruhu dan ḳorsoin. Ar ou hokkoltar mazdi Allar gourob-mohimar tarif oibo. Hozrot Paulusor shukria ar munazat
1.15: Te Hozrot Isar ufre afnara iman anchoin ar Allar hoḳol bondare-u afnara maya-mohobbot ḳorra, ou ḳobor ami zebla hunlam,
1.16: hunar bad taki-u, ami afnarar lagi Allar dorbaro shukria adae ḳora kunu shomoy-o bond ḳorsi na. Ami zebla munazat ḳori, i shomoy afnaintor ḳota fauri na.
1.17: Ami Allar dorbaro aroz ḳori, amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir Allae, zalal ar shan-ala gaibi bafe afnaintore ruhani aḳol ar buzar ḳemota deukka. Teu afnara aro balamonte tanre sinba.
1.18: Ami aro munazat ḳoriar, afnarar dilor souk kuli zauk, teu Allai daot faia afnarar dilor maze ze eshki foyda oise ota aro balamonte buzba. Erloge eoḳan-o buzta farba, Allar dorbaro tan pak bonda oḳol ḳoto boṛo shompotti.
1.19: Ar amra zera tan ufre iman anchi, amrar dilor maze ḳoto boṛo shoktie ḳam ḳorer. I shokti oilo, tan kudrotor mohashokti.
1.20: Ou shoktir bole-u tain al-Mosire mora taki zinda ḳorsoin, ar behestor arshe-azimo tan ḍainor toḳto nia boaisoin.
1.21: Asmanor hokkol nomunar ḳemota, shashon, shokti, ar bahaduri zarar ato ase, era hoḳolre-u tain al-Mosir tole raḳsoin. Ar zare ze name-u ḍaḳa oy na ḳene, ita i zogotor ouk ba aḳeri zogotor ouk, hokkol namor ufre Isa al-Mosir nam.
1.22: Allae hokkoltare-u al-Mosir aotae raḳsoin. Manshor mata zela tar shorilor bashsha, al-Mosire ola zomator mata, mani bashsha hishabe boail ḳorsoin.
1.23: Ar i zomat oilogi al-Mosir shoril. Zein asman-zominor hokkoltare shullo-ana furafur ḳorsoin, ou al-Mosie zomatre furafur ḳoroin.

2.1: Tumra to guna ar naformanir maze mora aslae.
2.2: Zogotor babor maze foṛia tumra-o eḳ shomoy hou naformani ar gunar fote sola-fira ḳortae. Ze bod ruhu asmanor hoḳol taki shoktiala raza, hou bod ruhe naforman oḳlor bitre ḳam ḳore, ar tumra-o hou bod ruhur murid aslae.
2.3: Amra hoḳole-u eḳ shomoy gunar shobabor gulam bonia, ota naforman manshor laḳan zindegi kaṭaitam. Ou bod shobab taki ze bod ḳaish amrar dilo aito, amra ola ḳam ḳortam. Ar ou ḳam-ḳazor lagi hota manshor laḳan amra-o Allar gozobor laḳ aslam.
2.4: Oile Alla Pak to rohomotor banḍar; tain amrare kub beshi maya-mohobbot ḳoroin.
2.5: Erlagi-u naformani koria amra zebla mora zindegir maze habuḍubu ḳaislam, hou shomoy al-Mosir loge tain amrare zinda ḳorla. Allar rohomote tumra rehai faiso.
2.6: Amra al-Mosir loge asi, erlagi Allae amrare al-Mosir loge zinda ḳoria, tan loge ḳori behestor bitre boaisoin.
2.7: Tain ita ḳorsoin, zate tan moha-mulloban rohomot oḳol zuge zuge siroḳal deḳaita faroin. Al-Mosir usillae tain amrare ze doya ḳorsoin, ou doyar mazdi tan i rohomotor ḳota zair oise.
2.8: Allar rohomote iman anae tumra nazat faiso. Ita tumrar nizor kunu amolor fol nae, ḳali Allar deoa dan.
2.9: Ita to kunu nek kamor bodla nae, zate ḳeu kunu laḳan boṛai korto na fare.
2.10: Amra to Alla Pakor ator foyda. Tain al-Mosir ummot hishabe amrare hirbar noya ḳori foyda ḳorsoin, zate amra nek kam ḳori. Ou nek kam tain age taki-u ṭik koria raḳsila zate amra ola zindegi kaṭai. Hozrot Isar hoḳol ummot eḳ
2.11: Zonmogoto babe tumra oilae bidormi zatir manush. Manshor at dia zarare shorilo mosolmani korail oise, era ḳoira, tumra bule mosolmani koraiso na.
2.12: Te mono rakio, age to tumra al-Mosir ges taki horail aslae; tumra aslae Allar fosond ḳora Boni Israilor bairor manush. Allae Boni Israilor loge milonor zoto laḳan usillar oada ḳorsoin, itar loge tumrar to kunu shomporko asil na. Tumrar kunu asha-o asil na; tumra aslae i duniat Alla saṛa zati.
2.13: Ek kotae, tumra Alla taki duroi aslae. Oile oḳon Isa al-Mosir ummot oae, tan kurbanir lour usillae tumrare Allar daro ana oise.
2.14: Tain-u amrar shanti. Israil zati ar bin zati, hokkolre tain ek korsoin. I duio zatir maze dushmonir ze oal asil, i oalre tain bangia surmar ḳorsoin.
2.15: Ar solibor ufre nizor ḳayare kurbani dia, tain Musa nobir shoriotor hoḳol hukum-ahkam ar ain-ḳanunor ḳemotare batil ḳorsoin. Tan ila ḳorar ḳaron oilo, tain saila, ou duiota dia tan nizor noya eḳ zati foyda ḳorta, zate ou zatir mazdi i duio dolor maze shanti oy.
2.16: Ar tain saila, solibor ufre tan nizor zan kurbanir usillae, ou duio dolre tain ekḳano ḳoria Allar loge milon goṭaita. Erlagi ou duio dolor maze dushmonir ze bab asil, i dushmonire tain ekkebare miṭai disoin.
2.17: Tumra eḳ shomoy Alla taki duroi aslae, ar Boni Israil oḳol ḳasat asla, oḳon tain aia ou duio dolor gese-u shantir kush-ḳobri toblig korsoin.
2.18: Erfole tan usillae amra duio dol Pak Ruhur mazdi, amrar behesti baf Alla Pakor dorbaro azir oitam fari.
2.19: Erlagi-u tumra oḳon bairor manush nae, bin zati-o nae. Borong Allar ḳas bonda oḳlor loge tumra-o Allar bashshai ar tan foribaror shodoishsho bonigeso.
2.20: Sahabi ar nobi oḳol oila tan goror kuṭi, ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosi oila mul ian kuṭi. Ou kuṭir ufre-u tumrare goṛa oise.
2.21: Al-Mosir loge zuṛa lagae, asta goror hoḳol ongsho eḳloge milia ekkan fobitro gor tiar oise.
2.22: Tumra-o aia tan loge zuṛa lagso, mani tan ummot oiso, erlagi tumrare-o eḳloge goṛia tula or, zate Pak Ruhur mazdi i goror maze Allar boshot ḳana oy.

3.1: Ou ḳarone ami Pauluse Allar dorbaro dua ḳoriar. Ar tumra zara bin zati, tumrare Isa al-Mosir torikar daot deoar lagi-u ami oḳon zelo bondi oisi.
3.2: Tumra nisoy huncho, Allae amare ou ḳas dayitto disoin, tan rohomotre ami tumrar ato fosai ditam.
3.3: Allae tan nizor batuni munsha ohir mazdi amare zanaisoin, ar ou befarḳan ami tumrar gese shongkefe leḳlam.
3.4: Ikan foṛle tumra buzbae, al-Mosir befare ou batuni bishoy buzar ḳemota amar ase.
3.5: I batuni befarḳan sahabi ar nobi oḳlor gese zela Pak Ruhur mazdi oḳon zair or, agor zomanar kunu manshor gese-u ila zair oise na.
3.6: Ar i batuni befar oilo, Injilor kush-ḳobrir mazdi bin zati oḳol-o Isa al-Mosir loge eḳ oia, Boni Israilor loge Allai odikaro shorik oy, hoḳol eḳ shorilor ongsho oy, eḳoi oadar duar bagi oy.
3.7: Allae tan moha kudrotor bole amare rohomot dan ḳorsoin, ar zela rohomot faisi, ola kush-ḳobri tobligor dayitto adae ḳorram.
3.8: Allar hokkol bondar maze ama taki huru ar ḳeu nai, ta-o al-Mosir ze donor ḳota shullo-ana buza zae na, ou mulloban donor kush-ḳobri bin zatir gese tobligor dayitto amar ufre disoin, iṭa-u Allar rohomot.
3.9: Ar tan batuni munsha kila ḳamo lagail zae, ikan zair ḳorar bar-o tain amar ufre disoin. Zein asman-zomin hokkolta foyda ḳorsoin, hou Allae otodin doria ita batuni raḳsila.
3.10: Tain ita batuni raḳar ḳaron oilo, asmanor hoḳol raza ar ḳemota-ala hoḳlor gese, Allar nanan nomunar aḳol-hekmot al-Mosir zomator mazdi oḳon kula-mela oy.
3.11: Tan nizor siroḳalor munsha mafik ita oise, ar ou munsha-morzi amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir mazdi fura ḳorsoin.
3.12: Tan loge shorik oia imanor bole, bukut shaosh rakia Allar samne amra azir oar eḳtiar faisi.
3.13: Erlagi ami tumrare minot ḳoriar, ami duḳ-mosibot shoijjo ḳoriar dekia tumra nirash oio na. Ita to tumrar lagi-u shoijjo ḳoriar, erlagi gourob ḳoro. Mumin oḳlor lagi munazat
3.14: -15 Te asman-zominor hoḳol zandarre zein foyda ḳorsoin, ami aṭu gaṛia hou batuni bafor samne munazato boisi.
3.16: Ami dua ḳori, Allae zanu tan oshesh kudrotor bole tumrare omon bol-shokti dein, zate Pak Ruhur mazdi tumrar dil mozbut oy,
3.17: ar imanor usillae al-Mosie tumrar dil furafur doḳol ḳoroin. Ami dua ḳori, tumra zanu Isa al-Mosir mohobbotor maze furafur ḍub dia tir ro.
3.18: Teu hoḳol pak bonda oḳlor loge tumra-o buzbae, al-Mosir mohobbotor kunu kul-kinar nai, kunu shesh shima nai.
3.19: Ou ze mohobbot furafur buzar oshaiddo, ami dua ḳoriar, i mohobbotre zanu tumra sino, sinia hari tumra-o Allai hoḳol nomunar gunagun hasil ḳoria furafur kamil o.
3.20: Ashole Allar ze kudroti bole amrar dilor maze ḳam ḳore, hou bolor usillae amrar sinta-babna ba saoa-faoa taki aro bout beshi kam tain ḳorta faroin.
3.21: Hozrot Isa al-Mosir mazdia ar zomator mazdia-o zug zug dori hor-hamesha Alla Pakor tarif ouk. Amin.

4.1: Amar malik al-Mosir lagi ami zelo bondi asi. Ou bondi halote ami tumrare minot ḳoriar, ze ḳamor lagi Allae tumrare daot disoin, tumra er ufozukto oia solo.
4.2: Tumrar asar-bebohar zanu furafur miṭa ar norom oy. Forteḳe sobor ḳoro ar dilo mohobbot rakia eḳe-oinnore shoijjo ḳoro.
4.3: Al-Mosir ze shantie amrare ekḳano zuṛa lagaise, hou shantir bole Pak Ruhur deoa eḳota rokkar lagi dile-zane sesṭa ḳoro.
4.4: Allae tumrare tan fote daot disoin ḳoria tumrar maze ḳali ekkan asha ase, ḳali eḳ shoril ar eḳzon Pak Ruhu asoin.
4.5: Ek iman, eḳ torikabondi ar eḳzon malik asoin.
4.6: Hoḳlor Alla ḳali eḳzon, mani behesti baf eḳzon-u asoin. Tain-u hoḳlor ufre, hoḳlor maze, hoḳlor dilo asoin.
4.7: Oile al-Mosie zela ṭik koria raḳsoin, hou mafik amra forteḳe ḳas rohomot faisi.
4.8: Erlagi Zobur Shorifo leḳa ase, Tain gia zebla behesto uṭila, ou shomoy bondi oḳolre bandia ṭania nila, ar tan manshore bout dan dila.
4.9: Te behesto gia uṭila, i ayat taki buza zae na ni, age tain duniar tole lamsila.
4.10: Ar zein lamsila, tain hoḳolta furon ḳorar lagi, asman taki aro ufre gia uṭisoin.
4.11: Tain manshore ou dan disoin, ḳoyzonre sahabi, ḳoyzonre nobi, ḳoyzonre kush-ḳobrir toblig, ḳoyzonre zomator imam ar ustad hishabe boail ḳorsoin.
4.12: Tain ila ḳorar ḳaron oilo, Allar pak bonda oḳole zanu tan ebadot-bondegi korar lagi zuit oy, ar ou nomunae al-Mosir shoril, zomat hishabe goṛia uṭe.
4.13: Tan kial oilo, amra hoḳole zanu Allar ḳas mayar zon, Ibnullar ufre iman ania, tanre bala ḳori sinia ekḳano oi. Ar al-Mosi zela hoḳol laḳan gune furafur bora, amra-o ola hoḳol gune furafur oia kamil oi.
4.14: Teu amra ar huruttar laḳan roitam nae. Manshe shoytani aḳol ḳaṭaia be-fote nibar lagi manshore ze bul talim dey, ou bul talime zanu amrare fanir aula-zaula ḍeur laḳan du-dila na banae.
4.15: Borong amrar dilor mohobbote hok mat matimu, hoḳol nomunae boṛo oia al-Mosir laḳan oimu. Tain-u to asta shorilor mata.
4.16: Asta shoril omola banail oise, zate shorilor hoḳol ongo zarzir zagat roia mul ḳayar loge zuṛa lagail roy. Forteḳ ongo zebla ṭik-ṭak kam ḳore, ou shomoy asta shoril-u matar bole baṛia uṭe, ar mohobbotor mazdi nizore goṛia tule. Furan zindegi bodlao, noya o
4.17: Erlagi ami amar malikor name tumrare hushiar ḳori diar, bin dormor manshe zela baze sinta ḳoria zindegi kaṭain, tumra ar ila zindegi kaṭaio na.
4.18: Tarar dil to andairor maze foṛi roise. Itar dil gumra, erlagi-u tara Allar befare kunta sine na, kunta sinto sae-o na, erlagi Allar deoa zindegi taki tara bout duroi.
4.19: Tarar bibeḳ oshaṛ oigese, otar dae hor-hamesha nafaki kamor danda ḳore, tara nizor zindegire lagam saṛa bod ḳaishor ato saṛi dise.
4.20: Oile tumra to al-Mosir befare ilaḳan talim faiso na.
4.21: Tumra nichchoy tan befare huncho, hunia tan loge shorik oia, tan maze ze hok ase, ou hokor talim faiso.
4.22: Tan talim oilo, finnor furan ḳafoṛ manshe zebla ekkere falai dey, ou laḳan tumrar bitoror furan ‘ami’re ekkebare falai deo, ḳaron ou ‘ami’r bod ḳaishe manshor zindegire borbad ḳorilae.
4.23: Er bodla Alla Pakre shuzug deo, tain tumrar dilre noya halote goṛia tuloukka,
4.24: tan deoa noya ‘ami’re noya ḳafoṛor laḳan findo. Ou noya ‘ami’re asol hok-forezgari ar fak-fobitro ḳoria Allar surote goṛa oise.
4.25: Erlagi tumra misa mata bad deo, eḳe-oinne hasa mato, ḳaron amra hoḳol-u eḳe-oinne mishia asi.
4.26: Rag-gusa ḳorle-o i ragor lagi guna ḳorio na, shuruz ḍubar age-u gusar ḳota faurilao,
4.28: Sure tar suri kora bad deuk, nizor ate halal fote menot ḳoria ḳana ḳauk, zate tar ḳaoa-findar bade-o gorib-dukire dibar lagi kisu zoma roy.
4.29: Tumrar mukdi zanu bad ḳota na baroy, borong aroḳzonor ufoḳari talimor lagi bala mat matio, zate ita hunia hunra zonor balai oy.
4.30: Tumra Allar Pak Ruhre duk dio na, aḳeri nazator ag forzonto ou ruhu dia-u Allae tumrare sil-sappoṛ maria toisoin.
4.31: Hoḳol nomunar birokti bab, mizaz deḳani, rag-gusa, sillaia ḳaijja ḳora, gala-gali, ar hoḳol nomunar ingsha-ninda tumrar ges taki horailao.
4.32: Borong tumra eḳe-oinne doya ḳoro, oinnor duke duki o, al-Mosir mazdi Allae zela tumrare maf ḳorsoin, tumra-o ola eḳe-oinnore maf ḳoro.

5.1: Tumra to Allar mayar aolad, te fut zela bafor laḳan oy, tumra-o ola o.
5.2: Al-Mosie zela amrare mohobbot ḳorsoin, tumra-o ola maya-mohobbotor fote solo. Tain amrare basaita ḳori nizor zanre kushboydar kurbani hishabe Allar name bilai disoin.
5.3: Kunu nomunar zina, nafaki ar lub-lalosor ḳota tumrar maze zanu na huna zae, ḳaron ita ḳam Allar pak bondar lagi ṭik nae.
5.4: Ar behaya-beijjotir zekunu mat-ḳota, asar-bebohar ba ḳobisi ṭaṭṭa-moshkora zanu tumrar maze na oy, itae tumrare manae na. Itar bodla Allar shukur-guzar ḳoro.
5.5: Tumra to zano-u, zinakur, nafak ar lalosi manshe, Alla Pak ar al-Mosir bashshair maze kunu zaga faito nae. Itae to eḳlaḳan murtipuja ḳorra.
5.6: Hushiar roio, misa mat matia ḳeu zanu tumrare be-fote na ney, Allar naforman bonia zera ita bod ḳam ḳore, tarar ufre Allar gozob lame.
5.7: Tumra ilaḳan manshor loge mishio na,
5.8: ḳaron tumra age andarir maze taḳle-o oḳon to al-Mosir ummot bonia nuror foto aiso. Erlagi Allar nure kamil zone zela zindegi kaṭani usit, tumra oula solo.
5.9: Ar nure solar fol oilo, forezgari, shotota, hoḳol nomunar nek kam.
5.10: Erlagi ze ḳame malik kushi oin, tumra zasai koria ou ḳam ḳoro.
5.11: Andair zogotor befayda ḳamor loge kunu nomunar shomporko rakio na, borong tumra otar dush deḳai deo.
5.12: Manshe lukaia zeta ḳam ḳoroin, ita befare kunta mata-o shorom.
5.13: Nuror mazdi dush deḳaia dilaile ita zaira oizae,
5.14: ḳaron ou nure-u hoḳolta zair ḳore. Erlagi silleḳ ase, O gumor manush, hozag o, mora taki zita o, teu al-Mosir nure, nurani koriba tumare.
5.15: Tumra sinta-babna ḳori deḳo, tumrar sal-cholon kilaḳan. Be-aḳolor laḳan na solia, aḳoldaror laḳan solo.
5.16: Nek kam ḳorar ze shuzug tumrar ato ase, ita shullo-ana ḳamo lagao, zano to oḳonkur zomana ḳaraf.
5.17: Erlagi-u ḳoiram, tumra be-aḳol bonio na, borong malikor morzire buzo.
5.18: Modor nishae ṭal oio na, itae zindegi nosṭo ḳorilae. Borong furafur Pak Ruhur boshe ro,
5.19: tumra hamd, ḳaoali ar Fobitro Zobur Shorifor gozol gaia eḳe-oinne batchit ḳoro; tumrar dilor bitre malikor name gozol gao.
5.20: Hamesha hoḳol befare amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir name behesti baf Allar shukria adae ḳoro. Zamai-bour befare talim
5.21: Al-Mosir ijjot ar ḍore tumra eḳe-oinnore dil taki mainno ḳoro.
5.22: Tumra zera bou oiso, tumra zela Malik Isare mainno ḳoro, ou laḳan zarzir zamaire mainno ḳoro.
5.23: Ḳaron al-Mosi zela zomator, mani tan shorilor mata, zamai-o ola bour mata. Ashole al-Mosi-u ou asta shorilor toraneala.
5.24: Ar zomat zela al-Mosir zimmae ase, oula bou oḳol-o hoḳol befare zamair zimmae roa usit.
5.25: Tumra zera zamai oiso, huno, al-Mosie zela zomatre mohobbot ḳorsoin, ṭik olaḳan tumra-o zarzir boure mohobbot ḳorio. Tain to zomator lagi tan nizor zan kurbani disoin.
5.26: Tan kial oilo, tain zomatre fobitro ḳorar lagi, tan kalamor mazdi manshore torikar gusol ḳoraia,
5.27: nuror mohimae nizor samne azir ḳora. Ou shomoy zomator maze kunu ḳolonkor dag, kut ba ila kunta-u roito nae, ita fak-fobitro ar nikut oibo.
5.28: Erlagi zamaie tar nizor shorilre zela maya ḳore, ṭik tar boure-o oula maya ḳora forz. Nizor boure maya ḳorar mani oilo, nizor shorilre maya ḳora.
5.29: Ḳeu to kunu shomoy tar nizor shorilre ginnae na, hoḳole-u zarzir shorilor boron-fushon ḳore. Ekkere ou laḳan, al-Mosie-o tan zomator boron-fushon zugain.
5.31: Allar kalamo leḳa ase, “Erlagi-u beṭainte ma-bafre saṛia bour loge taḳba, tara duiozon eḳ shoril oiba.”
5.32: Ikan oilo bout boṛo batuni befar, ashole ami to al-Mosi ar tan zomator befare ḳoiram.
5.33: Zai ouk, tumra hoḳole-u zarzir boure nizor laḳan maya ḳorio, ar bou oḳole-o zarzir zamaire ijjot ḳora zorur.

6.1: O aolad oḳol, malikor morzi mafik tumrar ma-bafor ḳotamoto solio, ar ola solaṭa-u to usit.
6.2: Allar kalamor foyla hukum, ze hukumor loge furuskaror oada ase, iṭa oilo, “Tumar ma-bafre ijjot ḳorio.
6.3: Teu tumar balai oibo, ar i duniat tumar hayati baṛibo.”
6.4: Te tumra zera huruttar baf oiso, tumra-o nizor aoladre sataio na, borong malikor talim ar shrinkolar mazdi tarare manush banao. Gulam ar munibor lagi talim
6.5: Tumra zera gulam, tumra al-Mosir zela baiddo, oula ḍor ar tazime dile-zane tumrar zogotor munib oḳlor baiddo roio.
6.6: Ḳali manshore kushi korar niote munibor samne baiddo roio na, borong al-Mosir gulam hishabe dile-zane Allar morzi mafik solrae ḳoria tumrar munibor baiddo roio.
6.7: Tumra ikan mono ḳorio na ze, tumra manshor kezmot ḳorrae, borong asmani malikor kezmot ḳorrae mono ḳoria, zogotor munibor kezmoto kiali o.
6.8: Mono rakio, malikor ges taki forteḳ manshe zarzir nek kamor furuskar faibo, he gulam ouk ba azad ouk.
6.9: Tumra zera munib, tumra-o tumrar gulam oḳlor loge oula bala bebohar ḳoro. Tarare ḍor deḳani bad deo, ḳaron tumra to zano, tara ba tumra hoḳlor-u malik eḳzon, tain behesto asoin; tan nozoro hoḳol-u shoman. Allai atiardi Iblisor loge zuddo ḳoro
6.10: Hesh-mesh ḳoiram, tumra asmani malikor loge milia roia tan kudroti bole bolala o.
