6.11: Zuddor lagi Allar deoa hoḳol nomunar atiar lagao, teu Iblisor hoḳol sol-soturir birudde mozbut oia ubaitae farbae.
6.12: Amrar ou zuddo to kunu manshor loge nae, ita oilo andair zogotor hoḳol raza ar tar ḳemota-ala oḳlor birudde, andair zogotor shoktiala bod ruhu oḳlor birudde, ar asmanor Iblis-Shoytan dolor birudde.
6.13: Te ou zuddor lagi tumra Allar deoa hoḳol nomunar atiar findilao, zate Iblise zebla hamla ḳorbo ou shomoy mozbut oia ubaitae faro, ar hesh-mesh tir roitae faro.
6.14: Erlagi Allai hokikotir belṭ ḳomro bando, ar buk basanir lagi forezgarir amol dia buk guria raḳo,
6.15: sifai oḳlor laḳan duio fao-o zuta lagao, zate shantir kush-ḳobri tobligor lagi zuit taḳtae faro.
6.16: Ar sifai oḳole nizore basanir lagi ze ḍala bebohar ḳore, oula hoḳol shomoy tumra imanor ḍala ato lo, ou ḍala dia Iblisor hoḳol zalail tir nibaitae farbae.
6.17: Matare basanir lagi Allar deoa nazat sifair kefor laḳan findilao. Ar Pak Ruhur toluar mani, Allar kalamre mozbut ḳori doro.
6.18: Pak Ruhur bole dile-zane hor-hamesha munazat ḳoro. Erlagi hozag roia hoḳol pak bonda oḳlor lagi shob shomoy munazat ḳorat roio.
6.19: Amar lagi-o dua ḳorio, ami kota matar bala zanu Allae amar mukor buli zugai dein, zate toblig korar shomoy ami shaosh ḳaṭaia kush-ḳobrir asol batuni bed manshore buzaitam fari.
6.20: Ou kush-ḳobri tobligor lagi luar cheindi banda halote-o ami al-Mosir naib hishabe ḳam ḳorram. Te zelor maze roia zelaḳan shaosh ḳaṭaia toblig kora zorur, dua ḳorio, ami zate ola ḳortam fari. Bidayi dua
6.21: Amar hal-hokikot kilaḳan ar amar din-kal kila zar, ita amar mayar dust Tukik bair ges taki hunbae. Ein amrar malikor hok-halal kezmotḳari.
6.22: Ami tanre tumrar gese faṭailam, tumra tan muk taki amrar ḳobora-ḳobor hunbae, tain gia tumrare utshaho diba.
6.23: Amrar gaibi baf Alla Pake ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosie, mumin bai oḳolre shanti ar imani maya-mohobbote raḳoukka.
6.24: Amrar Hozrot Isa al-Mosir lagi zarar dilo ḳaṭi mohobbot ase, era hoḳlor ufre Allar rohomot nazil ouk. Amin.

1.1: Ami Paulus ar Timoti oilam Hozrot Isa al-Mosir gulam. Ou Filifi ṭauno boshot ḳorra, ze pak bonda oḳole Hozrot Isa al-Mosir ufre iman anchoin erare, erar ustad oḳolre ar ḳadimdar oḳlor gese leḳram.
1.2: Amrar gaibi baf Alla Pak ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosir rohomot ar shanti tumrar ufre nazil ouk. Filifi zomator lagi munazat
1.3: Tumrar ḳota zotobar-u amar iad oy, otobar-u ami amar Allar shukria adae ḳori.
1.4: Ami zebla tumrar lagi dua ḳori, amar mono kub kushi loia dua ḳori.
1.5: Hozrot Isa al-Mosir toblig kamor lagi to tumra foyla taki oḳon forzonto amare shaijjo ḳorrae.
1.6: Ami ekin ḳori, ze Allae tumrar dilor maze ou nek kam shuru ḳorsoin, al-Mosie dusrabar toshrif ana forzonto, ou Allae i kam fura ḳorba.
1.7: Tumra to amar mayar manush, erlagi tumrar befare amar monor bab ola oa usit. Ami zelo bondi halote ba kush-ḳobrir hok kota zeno-u toblig kori na ḳene, tumra-o amar logor rohomotor bagi.
1.8: Eḳ Allae zanoin, al-Mosir mohobbote ami tumrar lagi koto ashik.
1.9: Ami dua ḳori, tumrar mohobbot zanu kamil bibeḳ ar aḳole din din baṛe.
1.10: Zate tumra aḳol ḳaṭaia bala bala befar oḳol sinbae, ar al-Mosie dusrabar toshrif anar ag forzonto,
1.11: tan bole tumra nek kam-ḳaz ḳoria ḳaṭi fote nikut oia roibae. Teu Alla Pakor gourob ar tarif zair oibo. Hozrot Paulusor nizor halot
1.12: O amar bai oḳol, ami sairam tumra-o zano, amar ufre zeta zeta goṭise, itar lagi ashole kush-ḳobri tobligor ḳam aro baṛigese.
1.13: Erlagi onor razbaṛir sifai oḳole ar bad-baki manshe-o zanilisoin, ami to ḳali al-Mosir lagi-u zel ḳaṭiar.
1.14: Ar ami zelo hamanie amrar bout baiainte malikor ufre aro besh ḳori borosha ḳora hiksoin, tara ḍor-boy fauria Allar kalam tobligor lagi aro shaoshi oisoin.
1.15: Erar maze ḳeu ḳeu ingsha ar doladolir niote al-Mosir toblig korer, oile ḳeu ḳeu bala niote ḳorer.
1.16: Erar dilor mohobbote-u al-Mosir toblig korer. Tara zanoin, kush-ḳobrir fokke matar lagi-u amare aṭok kora oise.
1.17: Oile zera nizor fayda ḳamanir lagi al-Mosir toblig kore, era to bala niote ḳam ḳore na. Tara sae, ami zelo bondi roi ar amar ḳoshṭo baṛouk.
1.18: Oile itae kita ae zae? Asol ḳota oilo, zemne-u oy na ḳene, al-Mosir nam to toblig or. Ita dukabazir niote ouk ba sohi niote-u ouk. Ar ota dekia-u ami kushi. Amar i kushi kunudin fuṛaito nae.
1.19: Ami to zani, amar ufre zeta goṭise, itar hesh fol oilo, ami nistar faimu. Tumrar dua ar Isa al-Mosir ruhur bole ita oibo.
1.20: Amar kub mozbut ekin ase, ami kunumonte-u shorom faitam nae. Ami furafur shaosh ḳoria age zela al-Mosir gourob zair ḳorsi, ami mori ba basi oḳono ola zair oibo.
1.21: Ḳaron amar lagi zindegi oila al-Mosi ar moron oilo lab.
1.22: Oile ami zudi basia roi, te amar zindegit kub bala ḳam ḳorar shuzug oibo. Erlagi ami buzram na, ami kun fot loitam.
1.23: Duio fote-u amare ṭaner. Amar ichcha oilo, ami moria hari al-Mosir loge roitam, oḳan-u amar lagi bala.
1.24: Oile tumrar lagi amar basia roaḳan aro zoruri.
1.25: Ar ou monobole ami bala ḳori zani, ami basmu ar tumrar loge roimu, zate tumrar iman aro mozbut oia tumrar kushi baṛe.
1.26: Ami tumrar maze hirbar aia harle, amare loia tumra Isa al-Mosir name kub kushi korbae. Isa al-Mosir torikar zindegi
1.27: Asol befar oilo, tumra zarzir zindegire ou nomunae ḳaṭao, ze zindegi al-Mosir kush-ḳobrir laḳ. Teu ami nize aia deki ba duroi taki huni, ami buzmu, tumra dile-zane milia mozbut aso. Ar kush-ḳobrir mazdi ze iman foyda oy, ou imanor lagi hoḳole milia eḳ dile menot ḳorrae.
1.28: Zetae tumrar birudita ḳoroin, kunu befare-u tumra itare ḍoraio na. Teu forman oizibo, tara binashor fote zairagi ar tumra rehai fairae. I rehai kali Allar ges taki-u mile.
1.29: Al-Mosir ufre iman ancho iṭa zela rohomot, tan lagi zulum-mosibot shoijjo ḳorar shuzug faiso iṭa-o tumrar lagi rohomot.
1.30: Tumra age amare zela ḳoshṭo ḳorat deḳso ar oḳono zeta ḳoshṭor ḳota hunrae, tumra-o to ou laḳan ḳoshṭor maze foṛigeso.

2.1: Al-Mosir ufre iman anle zebla borosha mile, tan mohobbote zebla shanti mile, tumrar loge zebla Pak Ruhur bala shomporko ase, ar tumrar dilo zebla maya-momota ase,
2.2: te tumra amar bitoror kushikan furailao. Tumra hoḳol eḳ mone solo, dile-zane eḳ o, ar eḳe-oinnore mohobbot ḳoro.
2.3: Nizor labor asha ba beṭagiri deḳanir lagi kunta ḳorio na, borong noto oia nizor saite oinnore beshi dam deo.
2.4: Ḳali nizor shartor sinta ḳorio na, foror ḳota-o sinta ḳorio.
2.5: Hozrot Isa al-Mosir mon zelaḳan asil, tumrar mon-o olaḳan banailao.
2.6: Tain ashole Allai surote roile-o, Allai shinghashon doria raḳar lagi lalosi asla na.
2.7: Borong gulam bonia manush hishabe zonom loia nizore huru banaila.
2.8: Tain manush surote roia mout forzonto, duk-koshṭor solibor ufror mout forzonto baiddo roia nizore noto ḳorla.
2.9: Erlagi-u Allae tanre arshe-azimo uṭaila ar ola ijjoti eḳ nam dila, ze nam hoḳol taki shera.
2.10: Zate ou namor gune asman-zomin ar fatalor tamam zandar Isar samne noto oin,
2.11: ar gaibi baf Alla Pakor gourobor lagi shikar ḳoroin, Isa al-Mosi-u malik. Mumin oḳol nuror laḳan
2.12: O amar mayar bai oḳol, tumra to hamesha-u amar hukum mania airae. Te ami samne taḳle zela mano, oḳon amar aforḳe-o ola tumrar dilor ḍor-ḳofe nek amol ḳoro. Ou amolor mazdi deḳao, tumra guna taki nazat failiso.
2.13: Buzrae ni, Allae tumrar dilor maze ola eḳ bab dan ḳorsoin, ita amol ḳorle tain kushi oin, ou amol ḳorar niot ar takkot-o tain tumrare disoin.
2.14: Tumra kunuzat torka-torki ba ḳaijja-fosad na ḳoria hoḳol ḳam ḳoro.
2.15: -16 Zate shullo-ana forezgar ar nikut bono, ar i zomanar ḳobis naforman shomazor maze-o tumra Allar aolad hishabe ro. Ota manshor samne Allar Pak Kalam toblig koria, ou duniat-u tumra asmanor san-shuruzor laḳan soḳsoḳa bonizao. Teu al-Mosi zebla dusrabar toshrif anba, hou din ami buk fulaia ḳoitam farmu, amar ou menot ar aṭni-ḳaṭni beḳama gese na.
2.17: Huno, ze imanor kurbanir mazdi tumra Allar ebadot ḳorrae, er ufre zudi amar nizor loure kurbani hishabe ḍali deoa oy, ta-o ami kush asi, tumrare loia kushi korram.
2.18: Ṭik tumra-o ola kushi o, amar loge kushi koro. Duizon ustadre faṭani
2.19: Ami asha ḳori, Hozrot Isar morzi oile ami Timotire kub zoldi kori tumrar gese faṭaimu, teu tumrar halot zania ami shanti oimu.
2.20: Timotir laḳan ila ar ḳeu amar gese nai, zein tumrar lagi sinta ḳoroin.
2.21: Baki hoḳole-u Isa al-Mosir befare sinta na ḳoria, tara zarzir dandae asoin.
2.22: Oile Timotir befar to tumra zano, fute zela nizor bafor loge ḳam ḳore, tain-o ola al-Mosir kush-ḳobri tobligor lagi amar loge menot ḳorsoin.
2.23: Erlagi-u ami asha ḳoriar, amar dosha kita oibo, oḳan zanar bade-u ami tanre faṭaitam.
2.24: Oile ami malikor ufre borosha ḳori koiar, ami nize-o kub zoldi kori aitam farmu.
2.25: Ar ami mono ḳoriar, Usaidre tumrar gese faṭanikan kub zorur. Amar kezmot ḳorar lagi tumra tanre amar gese faṭaislae. Amra eḳloge toblig kori, Isa al-Mosir lagi jihad ḳori. Ein amar imandar bai.
2.26: Tain-o tumrar loge deḳa ḳorta saira, tumra tan bemaror ḳobor hunae, tain fereshanit foṛigesoin, erlagi ami tanre faṭaiar.
2.27: Ashole tain kub bemar asla, bemare tan na-basar halot oigesil. Oile Allae tanre rohom ḳorsoin. Ḳali tanre nae, tain basi zaoae Allae amare-o bout boṛo rohom ḳorsoin, zate ami ek koshṭor ufre ar kunu ḳoshṭo na fai.
2.28: Erlagi ami kub kiali oia tanre faṭaiar, zate tanre faia tumra-o kushi o, ar amar monor sinta-o hori zae.
2.29: Te Allar bonda hishabe furafur kushi oia tanre kobul ḳorio, ar erar laḳan manshore ijjot ḳorio.
2.30: Al-Mosir toblig korat gia tain morar foti oigesla. Amar samne na taḳae tumra ze ḳam ḳortae farso na, ou ḳamor lagi tain nizor zan dite-o razi asla.

3.1: O amar bai oḳol, hesh-mesh ḳoiram, malikor name kushi koro. Eḳ befar loia bare bare leḳte amar kunu ḳoshṭo or na, tumrare basanir lagi-u ami ita ḳorram.
3.2: Huno, hou kukror fal taki, mani naforman dolor dadir musla taki hushiar roio. Itae to tarar shorilor ḳaṭa-sirar ufre-u borosha ḳore.
3.3: Ashole amra-u oilam ḳaṭi mosolmani korail manush, amra to Isa al-Mosir name gourob ḳori, Allar ruhur bole tan ebadot ḳori, shorili kunu ebadotor ufre borosha ḳori na.
3.4: Ashole ḳeu zudi mono ḳore, nizor shorili ebadotor ufre borosha ḳorar zukti ase, te he buzilauk, tar saite amar aro beshi zukti ase. Ami-o itar ufre borosha ḳortam farlam one.
3.5: Zonmor aṭ dinor din-u amar mosolmani kam ḳorail oisil. Ami eḳzon ḳaṭi Ibrani, amar zonom oise to Boni Israilor Bin-Iamin gusṭit. Hozrot Musa nobir shoriotor befare ami to Forishi zomator.
3.6: Shoriot manar befare kunu manshe amar kut bar ḳorto farse na. Dormor befare ami kub ḳoṛa, al-Mosir zomator ufre-o ami zulum ḳortam.
3.7: Oile ou amol ḳorae amar zoto fayda oisil, oḳon al-Mosir lagi ami itare ḳeti mono ḳori.
3.8: Ashole ami zar lagi i keti shikar ḳoriar, ein-u amar Malik Isa al-Mosi. Tanre zanar maze-u hoḳol taki boṛo fayda, tan tulonae bad-baki hokkoltare-u ami keti mono ḳori. Ami zate al-Mosire fai, ar amare zate al-Mosir loge ekḳano milail deḳa zae, ou niote-u ami ita hokkoltare moylar laḳan horaia falaisi.
3.9: Te shoriot manae ami ze forezgar bonigesi, ikan nae, al-Mosir ufre iman anae-u Allae amare forezgar hishabe kobul ḳorsoin. I forezgari kali Alla taki-u mile, iṭa to imanor ufre nirbor ḳore. Al-Mosir loge milar bade-u amar ou halot oise.
3.10: Te ami al-Mosire sintam sai, ze kudroti bole tanre mora taki zinda ḳora oisil, ou bolre-o sintam sai. Ami tan duḳ-mosibotor bagi oitam sai, tain zela nizor zan kurbani disla, ami-o ou mouto shorik oitam sai.
3.11: Ar zekunu laḳan moron taki zinda oat-o shorik roi. Aḳerator fote solo
3.12: Te ami zeta faitam sairam, ita ze oḳon-u failisi, ba furafur kamiab oigesi ila kunta nae. Hozrot Isa al-Mosie ze niote amare bondi korsoin, ou niot fura ḳorar lagi-u ami douṛairam.
3.13: Bai oḳol, ami mono ḳorram na, ami itar lagal failisi. Oile ḳoror hoḳolta falaia ami dile-zane samnedi douṛaiar.
3.14: Douṛai douṛai sesṭa ḳoriar, Isa al-Mosir zoriae Alla Pakor ze behesti daot ase, furuskar hishabe ou daoto hamaitam fari.
3.15: Erlagi koiram, amra zara Hozrot Isar fote bout aguai gesi, amrar niot-o olaḳan oa zorur. Ar tumrar zudi oinno kunu niot taḳe, te Allae-u fot batai dibane.
3.16: Zai ouk, amra zotoḳan aguaisi, ou laḳan zindegi-o ḳaṭani usit.
3.17: Bai oḳol, tumra kilan zindegi kaṭaitae, ita to ami hikaisi. Tumra amar laḳan solo, ar ou laḳan zara sole, tarare dekia hiko.
3.18: Ami to bout bar tumrare ḳoisi, ar sokur fani falaia oḳono ḳoiram, ila-o bout zon ase, zera al-Mosir duk-koshṭor solibor dushmonor laḳan soler.
3.19: Tarar ḳofalo ase binash. Tarar feṭ-u tarar Alla. Naformani kam loia tara boṛai kore, ḳali duniar dandae fagol.
3.20: Oile amrar asol baṛi to behesto. Amrar toraora malik, Hozrot Isa al-Mosie hon taki toshrif anba. Amra tan lagi dile-zane bar sairam.
3.21: Tain aia amrar ou ḳomzur ḳaya bodlaia, tan ḳayar laḳan ḳemota-ala nuror ḳaya diba. Ze kudroti bole tain hokkolta ḳorta faroin, hou bole-u tain ita ḳorba.

4.1: O amar mayar bai oḳol, ami tumrare deḳtam sai. Tumra-u amar kushi, amar joyor mala. Amrar malikor loge tumra mozbut oia lagia ro. Hozrot Paulusor foramish
4.2: O amar boin Salima ar Saida, ami minot ḳori koiram, eḳ malikor kezmoto lagail aso ḳori, tumra mili-mishi eḳ mone solo.
4.3: O amar logor asol shongi, ami tumare-o minot ḳorram, tumi ou beṭintore shaijjo ḳorio. Al-Mosir kush-ḳobri toblig kamo era amar loge bout ḳoshṭo ḳorsoin. Kiliman ar oinnainno baiaintor loge-o ḳoshṭo ḳorsoin. Tarar nam to Allar zindegi katat leḳa ase.
4.4: Malik Isar name tumra hamesha kushi-bashi koro. Ami hirbar ḳoiram, kushi-bashi koro.
4.5: Tumrar norom bebohar zanu hoḳol manshor sokut foṛe. Zano to, amrar malik kub zoldi-u aira.
4.6: Kunu befare-u tumra fereshan oio na, borong munazat ḳoro. Tumrar zotota saibar ase, Allar shukria adae ḳoria tan gese sao.
4.7: Teu Allar deoa ze shantir ḳota manshe sinta-o ḳorto fare na, Isa al-Mosir mazdi ou shanti aia tumrar dil ar monre roikka ḳorbo.
4.8: O bai oḳol, ami hesh-mesh ḳoiram, zeta hasa, zeta ufozukto, hok, ḳaṭi, shundor, ar ijjot faoar zuka, mani zeta bala ar zetae tarif oy, ou laḳan befare tumra kiali o.
4.9: Tumra amar ges taki ze talim faiso, zeta huncho, zeta deḳso, ar zeta kobul ḳorso ota oḳon amol ḳoro. Teu shanti deora Alla-o tumrar loge loge roiba. Dan-ḳoyrator lagi doinnobad
4.10: Malike amar kushi aro baṛai dila, bout din bade tumra amare mono ḳorrae. Amar lagi to hamesha-u tumra sinta ḳorso, oile ita deḳanir shuzug faiso na.
4.11: Kunu obabo foṛia ami ikan ḳoiram na, zekunu halote-u shontusto roaḳan ami zani.
4.12: Obabi ba nobabi halote, ufashi feṭe ba bora feṭe, doni ba goribir maze kila shontusto roa zae, ita talim ami faisi.
4.13: Ashole zein amare bol-shokti zugaia dein, tan bole-u ami hokkolta ḳortam fari.
4.14: Ta-o tumra amar ḳoshṭor loge shorik oia, kub bala ḳam ḳorso.
4.15: O Filifi zomator mumin oḳol, tumra to zano, tumra foyla kush-ḳobri faoar bade ami zebla Makidonia desh taki geslamgi, ou shomoy tumra saṛa ar kunu zomate-u amar loge kunuzat len-den ḳorse na.
4.16: Ami zebla Tisholoniki ṭauno aslam, ou shomoy amar obabor ḳalo tumra ḳoybar shaijjo faṭaiso.
4.17: Ami tumrar ges taki kunu dan-dokkina sairam na, oile tumrar lagi ola eḳ fol asha ḳorram, zeta tumrar amol-namat zoma roibo.
4.18: Amar hoḳol faona-u ami failisi. Ashole amar zotoḳan zorur, er saite-o beshi ase. Usaid bair at taki tumrar ufohar faia oḳon amar bout oise. Ou ufohar to Allai kushboy-ala, Allar dorbaro kobul oar zuka kurbani. Alla Pak itae kushi oin.
4.19: Amar Allae tan nizor gourobor don hishabe, Hozrot Isa al-Mosir usillae tumrar hoḳol obab dur ḳorba.
4.20: Zuge zuge hor-hamesha amrar gaibi baf Alla Pakor tarif zari rouk. Amin. Aḳeri munazat ar salam
4.21: Hozrot Isa al-Mosir torikar Allar hoḳol bondare amar salam dio. Amar logor hoḳol baiainte tumrare salam zanaira.
4.22: Allar zoto pak bonda i zagat asoin, ḳas ḳori bashsha Ḳoisoror baṛir mumin oḳole salam zanaira.
4.23: Hozrot Isa al-Mosir rohomot tumrar dilo taḳouk. Amin.

1.1: -2 Ami Paulus, Alla Pakor morzie Hozrot Isa al-Mosir eḳzon sahabi. Kolosi ṭaunor maze al-Mosir torikar pak bonda ar mumin oḳlor gese ami ar bai Timotie ou sohifaḳan leḳram. Amrar gaibi baf Alla Pake tumrar ufre rohomot ar shanti nazil ḳoroukka.
1.2: 3-4 Hozrot Isa al-Mosir ufre tumrar iman ar Allar pak bonda oḳolre maya ḳorar ḳota amra hunchi. Erlagi zebla-u tumrar lagi dua ḳori, ou shomoy amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir gaibi baf Alla Pakor shukria adae ḳori.
1.5: Tumra age ze kush-ḳobri mani Allar hok kalam faiso, ou kalam hunia-u tumrar mono eḳ asha zonmise. Ou asha taki-u tumrar iman ar maya foyda oise. Ar tumra asha ḳorrae ze saman faitae, ita to behesto raḳa ase.
1.6: I kush-ḳobri duniar hoḳolbae sitria bala folala oia din din baṛer. Ze din tone tumra ou kush-ḳobri ar Allar rohomotor befare furafur huncho, ou din tone-u itae tumrar bitre-o furafur ḳam ḳorer.
1.7: Ou kush-ḳobrir ḳota tumra amar logor mayar bai Abu-Farasor gese huncho. Tain tumrar torof taki al-Mosir eḳzon hok kezmotḳari.
1.8: Pak Ruhur bole tumrar dilor maze ze maya foyda oise, ou befare Abu-Farase amrare zanaisoin.
1.9: Erlagi tumrar befare hunar bad taki-u amra hamesha tumrar lagi dua ḳori. Ruhani ilim ar buddi dia tumra zanu Allar munsha furafur buztae faro.
1.10: Amra Allar dorbaro ou dua-u ḳorram, tumra zate hoḳol befare al-Mosir morzi zugaia solo ar tan ufozukto ummotor laḳan zindegi kaṭao. Hok kam ḳori kori foloban o, ar Alla Pakre aro bala ḳori sino.
1.11: Allae tan moha kudroti bole hoḳol nomunar bol dia tumrare boloban ḳoroukka. Bala-mosiboto foṛle-o kushi-bashi roia sobor ḳorar tofik deukka.
1.12: Ar hoḳol shomoy behesti baf Alla Pakor shukria zanao. Allar pak bonda oḳole nuror bashshait ze odikar faiba, itar bagi oar lagi to tain-u tumrare ufozukto banaisoin.
1.13: Tain-u amrare andairor bashshai taki uddar ḳoria, tan ḳas mayar zonor bashshait anchoin.
1.14: Ou mayar zonor ufre iman anae amra rehai faisi, mani guna taki mafi faisi. Al-Mosi-u hokkoltar fordan
1.15: Ou mayar zon-u oila, batuni Allar zairi surot; hokkolta foyda ḳorar age tain asla, ar foyda oa hokkoltar maze tain-u fordan.
1.16: Asman-zominor maze deḳa ar a-deḳa zotota ase, ita bashshai ouk ba bahaduri, shashon kiba ḳemota ouk, hokkolta-u tan ator foyda. Ita to ḳali tan lagi-u foyda ḳora oise.
1.17: Hokkoltar foyla tain asla ar tan mazdia-u hoḳolta ṭikia ase.
1.18: Tain-u tan shorilor mata, mani zomator mata. Tain-u hokkoltar foyla, ar tain-u foyla murda taki zinda oisoin, zate hoḳol befare tain-u fordan oita faroin.
1.19: Allae saila, tan Allai gunor hokkolta zanu al-Mosir maze taḳe.
1.20: Ar duniat ba behesto zeno-u oy na ḳene, ou al-Mosir mazdia zanu hokkoltar loge tan milon oy. Tain saila, solibor ufre al-Mosir kurbanir lour bodla shanti kaimor mazdi ou milon ouk.
1.21: Tumra to eḳ shomoy Allar ges taki duroi aslae, ar tan befare tumrar dilo dushmoni bab asil. Ita tumrar bod ḳamor mazdi zair oise.
1.22: Oile al-Mosir zan kurbanir mazdi Allae tumrare-o tan loge milon goṭaisoin, zate tumrare fak-fobitro, nikut ar ni-oforadi halote tan samne azir ḳorta faroin.
1.23: Te al-Mosir befare kush-ḳobri taki ze nichchit asha tumra faiso, ḳali ou ashar ufre imane tir roio, in taki loṛio na. Tumra to zano, i kush-ḳobri hara duniat toblig kora oise, ami Paulus-o ou kush-ḳobri tobligor ḳadim oisi. Zomator lagi Hozrot Paulusor ḳam
1.24: Tumrar lagi ami duḳ-mosibot shoijjo ḳorae kub anondo fairam. Zano to, al-Mosir shoril mani zomator lagi tan ze duḳ-mosibot oḳono baki ase, ita oḳon amar shoril dia fura ḳoriar.
1.25: Alla Pake tan fobitro kalam tumrar gese furafur toblig korar bar amare disoin, gotike-u ami zomator eḳzon kezmotḳari oisi.
1.26: Allar kalamor ze batuni befar agor zomanar manshor gese zug zug dori lukail asil, ita oḳon tan pak bonda oḳlor gese zair ḳora oise.
1.27: Allae saisoin, bin zati oḳlor gese-o tan batuni munshar gourob ze kita, ita zenu tan hoḳol bonda oḳole zanta faroin. Ashole al-Mosi tumrar dilo asoin, gotike tumra gourob faoar asha faiso.
1.28: Ar ou al-Mosir befare amra toblig koriar, Allar deoa aḳol-hekmot dia manshore hushiar ḳoriar ar talim diar zate al-Mosir torikat furafur kamil halote tarare Allar dorbaro azir ḳortam fari.
1.29: Ou niote Allar ze kudroti bol amar maze ḳam ḳorer, ou kudroti bole-u ami dile-zane menot ḳoriar.

2.1: Ami tumrare zanaitam sairam, ami to tumrar lagi, Laodikea ṭaunor zomator lagi, ar zera amare deḳse na tarar lagi-o ḳoto menot ḳorram.
2.2: Ami sairam, tarar dilo borosha faia mohobbote eḳ ouk. Ar furafur aḳole aḳoldar bonia nichchit ouk. Teu Allar lukail batuni bed buzbo, mani al-Mosire tara sinbo.
2.3: Al-Mosir maze-u hoḳol aḳol-hekmot lukail ase.
2.4: Ami ita ḳoilam, zate ḳeu banoaṭ mat-ḳota matia tumrare be-fote nito na fare.
2.5: Ami sho-shorile tumrar maze na taḳle-o ruhur bole ṭik-u tumrar maze azir asi. Tumrar bala sal-cholon ar al-Mosir ufre mozbut iman dekia amar kub bala lager. Al-Mosir maze-u asol zindegi
2.6: Isa al-Mosire tumra malik hishabe zela kobul ḳorso, ou laḳan tan loge roia zindegi-o ḳaṭao.
2.7: Al-Mosir maze shullo-ana ḍub dia tumrar zindegire goṛia tulo. Tumra talim faia ze iman ancho, ou imane mozbut ro ar hamesha Alla Pakor shukria adae ḳoro.
2.8: Tumra hushiar roio, ḳeu zanu tumrare manshor banail mongoṛa talimdi bandia be-fote ṭania nito na fare. Al-Mosir loge i talimor kunu mil nai, ita to manshor mongoṛa rosumot ar duniabi nanan asar-beboharor ufre borosha ḳore.
2.9: Allar hokkol laḳan gunagun al-Mosir ḳayar bitre ase.
2.10: Erlagi al-Mosir loge shorik oia tumra-o hoḳol gune kamil oiso, tan ashon to hoḳol nomunar shashonḳari ar ḳemota-ala hokkoltar ufre.
2.11: Al-Mosir ufre iman anae to tumrare mosolmani kam ḳorail oise. Ou mosolmani kunu manshor ate ḳorail oise na, al-Mosie nize-u ita ḳorsoin, mani dilor maze ze bod ḳaish asil, ou bod ḳaishre dil taki kaṭia falaisoin.
2.12: Toubar gusolor mazdi al-Mosir loge tumrare-o maṭi deoa oisil, ar zein al-Mosire murda taki zinda ḳorsoin, hou Allar kudroti bole imanor mazdi tumrare-o al-Mosir loge zinda ḳora oise.
2.13: Tumrar guna ar dilor bod ḳaish na horanie murda aslae, oile Allae tumrare al-Mosir loge zinda ḳorsoin. Tain amrar hoḳol gunar mafi disoin.
2.14: Ar amrar bod amol-namar ze dolil asil, ou dolilre hoḳol zator dabi-daoa shudda fusia falaisoin. Laḳṛidi banail ze solibo Isare zane mara oise, ou solibo i dolilre fereg maria batil ḳorsoin.
2.15: Al-Mosie bod shashonḳari ar ḳemota-ala hokkolor ḳemotare binash ḳorsoin. Solibo tan nizor zan kurbanir mazdi tarar ufre joyi oisoin ar hoḳlor samne tarar muk nisa ḳorsoin. Noḳol talimor befare hushiari
2.16: Erlagi-u shinni-shoḳat, puja-foshad omaboishsha-funnima, id ba Zummabaror niom-ḳanun loia tumrare dushi korar eḳtiar ḳeuror nai.
2.17: Ita to asil, bobishote zeta aibo otar eḳṭa nomuna matro, oile asolta to al-Mosir maze-u ase.
2.18: Zera nizor shorilre ḳoshṭo deoa ar firista oḳlor ebadot ḳorare zoruri mono ḳore, era zanu tumrare furuskaror fot taki horaito na fare. Ou nomunar manshe zeta deḳse ḳoia ḳamoḳa boṛai-beṭagiri kore, ar ota loia boṛo boṛo gof mare, ashole erar ontor to ḳali duniabi sintae bora.
2.19: Tara to matare, mani Isa al-Mosire mozbut ḳori doria raḳe na, ou matar ḳemotae asta shorilor aḍḍi-mangsho bol-shokti faia ekḳano roy, ar Allai bole baṛe.
2.20: Al-Mosir loge mara gia tumra zebla duniabi hoḳol sal-cholon taki horia aiso, te hirbar ḳene duniabi manshor laḳan duniabi niom-nitir gulam oirae?
2.21: -22 Huno, ze zinish bebohar ḳorte ḳorte borbad oizae, ou zinishor befare ola niom ase, ita dorio na, soio na, ḳaio na. Ita to ḳali manshor mongoṛa hukum ar talim.
2.23: Ḳemne ebadot ḳora, nizore nisa ḳora, ḳemne nizor shorilre ḳoshṭo deoa, ou niom-nitie ota hikae. I niom-niti deḳle mono oy, ita kub aḳolor ḳam, oile dilor bod ḳaishre domon ḳorar lagi itar kunu dam-u nai.

3.1: Huno, tumra to al-Mosir loge mora taki zinda oiso, ar al-Mosi to behesto Allar ḍainor toḳto boat asoin, erlagi tumra-o oula behesti befar loia ashik o.
3.2: Duniabi befare ashik na bonia, behesti befare ashik o.
3.3: Tumra to mara geso, tumrar zindegi al-Mosir loge Allar dorbaro lukail ase.
3.4: Zein tumrar zindegi, hou al-Mosi zebla hoḳlor samne zair oiba, ou shomoy tumra-o tan mohimar bagi oia tan loge zair oibae.
3.5: Erlagi gunar zeta rifu oḳol tumrar zindegit ase, itare eḳdom binash ḳorilao. Ita oilo hokkol nomunar zina, nafaki, bod ḳaish, ku-sinta, ar lub-lalos, i lub-lalos oilo eḳlaḳan murtipuja.
3.6: Zara Allar naformani kore, otar ḳarone-u tarar ufre Allar gozob lamia ae.
3.7: Tumra-o age ou laḳan naformanir maze zindegi kaṭaitae.
3.8: Oile oḳon rag-gusa, bitori dushmoni, ingsha-ninda, gala-gali ar ḳobisi mat-ḳota tumrar ges taki horailao.
3.9: Eḳe-oinne misa matio na, ḳaron tumrar zindegir furan ‘ami’re tar hoḳol amol shudda furan ḳafoṛor laḳan falai diso,
3.10: ar Allar deoa noya ‘ami’re noya ḳafoṛor laḳan findiso. Ou noya ‘ami’ aro noya oia tar foyda ḳorra malikor laḳan boner, zate ou foyda ḳorrare tumra furafur sino.
3.11: Ou halote Ihudi kiba bin zati, mosolmani kam ḳorail ba na ḳorail, oshikkito borbor, nisa zati, gulam ba azad manshor maze kunu tofat nai. Ita hoḳoltar maze al-Mosi-u fordan, hoḳlor maze-u tain asoin.
3.12: Te Allae zarare fosond ḳoria tan nizor lagi alog korsoin, tan hou mayar bonda hishabe tumrar dilor maya-momota, doya, norom bebohar, norom shobab ar sobor dia nizore hazao.
3.13: Eḳe-oinnore shoijjo ḳoro, ḳeuror birudde tumrar kunu nalish taḳle tare maf ḳori deo. Malike zela tumrare maf ḳorsoin, tumra-o oula eḳe-oinne maf ḳora zorur.
3.14: Ar ita hokkoltar loge maya-mohobbotdi nizore hazao. Mohobbote to hoḳolre furafur eḳloge bandia raḳe.
3.15: Al-Mosie ze shanti dan ḳoroin, ou shanti tumrar dilo roia tumrare salauk. Eḳ shoril oia shantir maze roitae ḳori-u to tumrare daot deoa oise. Tumra shukur-guzar ḳorat ro.
3.16: Al-Mosir kalamre tumrar dilor maze furafur boshot ḳorte deo. Allar deoa aḳol ḳaṭaia eḳe-oinnore talim ar foramish deo. Allar shukria adae ḳorar mazdi tan name hamd, ḳaoali ar Zobur Shorifor gozol gao.
3.17: Tumra mukdi zeta mato ar shoril dia zotota ḳoro, ita Hozrot Isar name ḳoro, tan usilla loia gaibi baf Alla Pakor shukria zanao. Foribaror lagi foramish
3.18: Tumra zera bou oiso, tumra forteḳe zarzir zamair hukum mania solo, malikor bonda hishabe to ola sola zorur.
3.19: Tumra zera zamai oiso, tumra-o zarzir boure mohobbot ḳorio, bour loge ḳoṭu bebohar ḳorio na.
3.20: Tumra zera fua-fuṛi, tumra hoḳol befare ma-bafor baiddo roio, ila solle malik kushi oin.
3.21: Ar tumra zera baf oiso, tumra nizor fua-fuṛintor monre titta ḳorio na, zate tarar mon na bange.
3.22: Tumra zera gulam, tumra hoḳol befare tumrar zogotor munib oḳlor baiddo roio. Tara samne roia zebla tumrar ḳam-ḳaz deḳoin, ḳali ou shomoy tarare kushi raḳar sesṭa na ḳoria, borong malikor ḍor-ḳof bitre rakia ḳaṭi dile tarar baiddo roio.
3.23: Tumra zeta-u ḳoro na ḳene, ita manshor lagi nae, borong malikre kushi korar niote dile-zane ḳorio.
3.24: Mono rakio, malike tan bonda oḳlor lagi zeta raḳsoin, ita to furuskar hishabe tan ges taki-u tumra faibae. Tumra to ḳali Hozrot Isa al-Mosir kezmot ḳorrae.
3.25: Ar ze zone naformani kore, he to tar ḳamor fol faibo. Mono rakio, malike ḳeuror muk saia bisar ḳoroin na.

4.1: Tumra zera munib, tumrar gulam oḳlor loge niae ar hok insaf ḳorio. Mono rakio, behestor maze tumrar-o eḳzon munib asoin. Aḳeri foramish
4.2: Tumra mon dia shukria adae ḳoria dua ḳorat roio.
4.3: Amrar lagi-o dua ḳorio, zate Allae amrare al-Mosir befare batuni hok kalam toblig korar tofik dein. Ou batuni hok kalamor lagi-u to amare bondi kora oise.
4.4: Dua ḳorio, manshore zela forishkar ḳori buzani zorur, ami zanu ṭik oula buzaitam fari.
4.5: Al-Mosir torikar bairor manshor loge aḳol ḳaṭaia solio, ar toblig korar hokkol shuzug kamo lagaio.
4.6: Tumrar mukor zoban hamesha miṭa ar roshail ouk, zate ḳare kila zuaf ditae, ita tumra buzo. Aḳeri munazat ar salam
4.7: Amrar mayar bai, bishashi kadim ar malikor kezmoto amrar logor tobligkari Tukik baie, amar bistarito ḳobora-ḳobor tumrare zanaiba.
4.8: Tan marfote amrar hal-hokikot zanbae, tain tumrare shaosh diba. Erlagi ami tanre tumrar gese faṭailam.
4.9: Tukikor loge amrar mayar imandar bai Onisimre-o faṭailam. Ein to tumrar-u eḳzon. Tara inor hoḳol ḳobor-antor tumrare zanaiba.
4.10: Amar logor bondi bai Aristakus ar Barnabasor kuṭum Markuse-o tumrare salam disoin. Ou Markusor befare tumra to ag taki-u ḳobor faiso, tain zudi tumrar gese zain, te kushi mone tanre kobul ḳorio.
4.11: Ar Isa urfe Iustuse-o tumrare salam disoin. Allar bashshair lagi Ihudi oḳlor maze ḳali ou tin zone-u amar loge ḳam ḳoroin, tara amare bout shaosh disoin.
4.12: Abu-Farase-o tumrare salam disoin, tain to tumrar afon manush ar Isa al-Mosir gulam. Ein hamesha tumrar lagi dile-zane munazat ḳorra, tumra zate kamil o, ar Allar morzi-munsha buzia mozbut oia ubao.
4.13: Tan befare ami ou shakki ditam fari, tumrar lagi ar Laodikea, Hiorapoli ṭaunor manshor lagi-o Abu-Farase kub menot ḳoroin.
4.14: Amrar mayar ḳobiraz Luk ar bai Dimase-o tumrare salam disoin.
4.15: Laodikear imandar bai oḳolre, ar Nimufa ar tan baṛir zomator hoḳlor gese-o salam zanaio.
4.16: Tumra ou siṭikan foṛia harle Laodikear zomator manshore foṛar lagi dio ar Laodikea zomatre dusra ze siṭi deoa oise, ou siṭi-o tumra foṛio.
4.17: Arkipasre oḳan ḳoio, “Malikor kezmoto tumare ze ḳam deoa oise, ou ḳam shesh ḳorar niote mon dia ḳam ḳoro.”
4.18: Ami Pauluse nizor ate ou salamor ḳota leḳlam. Mono rakio, ami zelo bondi asi. Allae tumra hoḳlor ufre rohomot nazil ḳoroukka. Amin.

1.1: Ami Paulus, bai Silas ar Timotie Tisholoniki ṭaunor zomator gese leḳram. Tumra amrar gaibi baf Alla Pak ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosir afon zon oiso. Tumrar ufre rohomot ar shanti nazil ouk. Tisholoniki zomator iman
1.2: Amra dua ḳorar bala hamesha tumrar zomator hoḳlor nam mono ḳoria Allar shukria adae ḳori.
1.3: Imanor lagi tumra ze ḳam ḳorrae, mohobbotor lagi tumra ze menot ḳorrae ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosir ufre asha-borosha ḳoria tumra ze sobor ḳorrae, ita amrar gaibi baf Allar dorbaro dua ḳorar shomoy hamesha mono ḳori.
1.4: O bai oḳol, Allar mayar bonda oḳol, amra zani, Allae-u tumrare fosond ḳorsoin.
1.5: Amrar kush-ḳobrir toblig kam to tumrar gese ḳali mukor ḳota-u roise na, borong Allai bol, Pak Ruhu, ar nichchit boroshar ufre salu oise. Tumrar balair lagi amra zebla tumrar loge roitam, ou shomoy kilan solchi, ita to tumra zano-u.
1.6: Tumra bout zulum-mosibotor maze-o Pak Ruhur deoa kushie amrar toblig kobul ḳoria, amrar ar malikor fote solrae.
1.7: Oula solia tumra Makidonia ar Gris deshor mumin oḳlor gese eḳ nishana oigeso.
1.8: Malikor kalam tumrar mazdi kali Makidonia ar Gris desho-u sitrise na, borong Allar ufre tumrar imanor ḳota hoḳol zagat-u sitrigese. I befare amra kunta matar zorur nae.
1.9: Hoḳol manshe-u to amrare ḳoira, tumra ḳoto ador ḳoria amrare kobul ḳorsilae, tara eoḳan ḳoira, tumra kila deb-debintor puja bad dia Allar foti oia, zinda hok Allar ebadot ḳorat aiso.
1.10: Ar murda oḳlor maz taki zenre zinda ḳori tula oise, hou Isa duniat aoar bar saitae faro. Tain oila Allar ḳas mayar zon Ibnulla, behest taki lamia aira, Allar ze gozob aia lamer, i gozob taki ou Isae amrare basaiba.

2.1: Bai oḳol, tumra to nize-u zano, tumrar gese amrar zaoaḳan beḳama gese na.
2.2: Tumra eoḳan-o zano, er age amra Filifi ṭauno zulum-mosiboto foṛslam ar beijjot oislam. Bade tumrar ono-o bout bada-nished ḳaṭaia amra Allai shaoshe shaoshi oia dile-zane tan kush-ḳobri kula-mela toblig korsilam.
2.3: Amrar daot to kunu bul talim taki nae, kunu bod niote-o nae ba kunu ṭogaṭogir niote-o nae.
2.4: Ḳali Allae amrare zoiggo mono ḳoria zela kush-ḳobri tobligor dayitto disoin, amra ola-u toblig korram. Kunu manshore kush ḳorar niote amra ita ḳoiram na, ḳali zein amrar dilre zasai koria deḳoin, hou Allare kush ḳorar lagi-u toblig korram.
2.5: Tumra to zano, amra kunu shomoy-u ḳeuror gese tel-malish ḳoria ḳota matsi na, ar kunu lub-laloso foṛia dandabazir ḳam-o ḳorsi na, eḳ Alla-u itar shakki.
2.6: Kunu manshor ges taki ijjot faite asha ḳorsi na, tumrar ges taki-o na, ba baira manshor ges taki-o na.
2.7: Amra ichcha ḳorle to al-Mosir sahabi hishabe tumrar ufre dabi kaṭaitam farlam one. Oile er bodla, maʼe zela nizor huruttainre zoy-zoton ḳoroin, tumrar loge taḳar shomoy amra-o ola norom bebohar ḳorsi.
2.8: Tumrar lagi kub beshi maya-mohobbot oae, ḳali Allai kush-ḳobri toblig nae, amrar nizor zan dite-o razi aslam. Zano to, tumra oilae amrar kub mayar manush.
2.9: Baiainre, ashole to amrar menot ar aṭni-ḳaṭnir ḳota, nichchoy tumrar mono ase. Allai kush-ḳobri tobligor faḳe faḳe amra dine-raite ruzi-ruzgar ḳorsi, zate amrar ḳorsa-fati tumra ḳeuror lagi buza na oy.
2.10: Ar tumra zera iman ancho, tumrar loge to amrar asar-bebohar asil fobitro, hok ar nikut. Tumra-u itar shakki, ar Alla Pak-o shakki asoin.
2.11: Tumra to zano, bafe zela nizor forteḳ aoladre utshaho, shantona ar mozbut foramish dein, amra-o tumra hoḳolre oula foramish ditam,
2.12: zate Allar bonda hishabe tumra ufozukto oia solo. Allae tumrare daot dira, tan nizor bashshai ar gourobor bagi oar lagi.
2.13: Mono rakio, amra hamesha Allar shukria adae ḳorram, ḳaron amrar ges taki Allar kalam hunia tumra zebla iman anchilae, hou shomoy kunu manshor mukor ḳota nae, borong Allar kalam hishabe-u tumra ita kobul ḳorsilae, ar hasau ita Allar kalam. Tumra zera iman ancho, hou kalame-u tumrar dilo ḳam ḳorer.
2.14: Bai oḳol, Hozrot Isar torikae solra Allar zoto zomat oḳol Ehudia zilat ase, tumrar hal-hokikot to tarar laḳan-u. Ḳaron tara zela nizor Ihudi zatir ato duḳ-mosibot faisoin, tumra-o oula nizor zatir manshor ges taki duḳ-mosibot faiso.
2.15: Mono rakio, Ihudi oḳole Hozrot Isa ar nobi oḳolre zane marsil, tara amrar ufre-o zulum ḳorse. Te Alla Pak tarar ufre kushi nae, hoḳol manshor loge-o tarar dushmoni bab ase.
2.16: Tara amrare nished dira, zate bin-dormi manshor gese amra Allai nazator kush-ḳobri toblig na ḳori. Ou laḳan tara zarzir gunar buza boṛo ḳorra. Erlagi tarar ufre Allar ḳaṛa gozob lamche. Tisholonikir muminre hirbar deḳar kial
2.17: O bai oḳol, monor dik taki na oile-o, shorilor dik taki to amra tuṛa dinor lagi, tumrar ges taki horail asi. Erlagi amrar kub kial ase, zate tumrar mukkan hirbar deḳtam fari.
2.18: Amra hoḳol-u, ḳas ḳori ami Pauluse bar bar sesṭa ḳorsi tumrar gese aitam. Oile Shoytane amrare aṭḳailise.
2.19: Hasau amrar Malik Isae zebla toshrif anba, ou shomoy tan samne amrar asha, anondo ar gourobor joyor mala hishabe kita faimu? Ita to tumra-u nae ni?
2.20: Ashole tumra-u amrar gourob, tumra-u amrar anondo.

3.1: Bade amra zebla ar shoijjo ḳortam farlam na, ou shomoy amra niot ḳorlam, amra eḳla-u Atinia ṭauno roia,
3.2: amrar bai Timotire faṭaimu, zate tain gia tumrar iman mozbut ḳoroin ar monor shaosh zugain. Tain to al-Mosir kush-ḳobrir toblig kamo Allar ḳadim, amrar logor bai, tanre faṭailam,
3.3: zate ou duḳ-mosibotor maze-o tumra ḳeu ḳoredi na zao. Tumrar zana ase, duḳ-mosibot amrar ufre ṭik-u aibo, ar ita shoijjo ḳora lagbo.
3.4: Ami age zebla tumrar loge aslam, hou shomoy tumrare ḳoisi, duḳ-mosibot amrar ufre aibo-u, ar ṭik-u olaḳan aise.
3.5: Te ami zebla ar shoijjo ḳortam farlam na, ou shomoy tumrar imanor halot deḳar lagi Timoti baire faṭailam. Amar mono ḍor asil, kizanu Shoytane tumrare lalos deḳaise ar amrar hoḳol menot beḳama gesegi.
3.6: Oile Timoti bai tumrar ges taki firia aia amrare zanaisoin, tumrar iman ar maya-mohobbotor halot bout bala. Tain ḳoisoin, tumra hamesha maya-mohobbote amrare mono ḳoro, ar amra zela tumrare deḳtam sairam, tumra-o oula amrare deḳar asha ḳorrae.
3.7: O bai oḳol, erlagi-u tumrar imanor mozbutir ḳota hunia, amrar oto duḳ-mosibotor maze-o dilo shanti faisi.
3.8: Tumra malikor ufre imane mozbut roile-u, amrar zindegikan doinno.
3.9: Tumrare loia Allar dorbaro amra ze kushi-bashi koriar, itar lagi amra kila Allar shukria zanaitam, zanram na.
3.10: Amra mon dia dine-raite hamesha dua ḳorram, zate tumrar mukkan hirbar deḳar shuzug fai, ar tumrar imanor bad-baki hoḳolta fura ḳortam fari.
3.11: Te gaibi baf Allae ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosie zanu, tumrar gese zaoar lagi amrare shuzug dein.
3.12: Amra zela tumrar bae maya-mohobbotor maze ḍubi gesi, ṭik oula Malik Isae tumrare-o eḳe-oinne, ar hoḳlor bae maya-mohobbote habuḍubu ḳaoaukka.
3.13: Ou laḳan tain tumrar dil furafur mozbut ḳoroukka, zate amrar Hozrot Isae zebla tan nizor pak bonda oḳol loia toshrif anba, ou shomoy amrar gaibi baf Allar nozoro tumra fobitro ar nikut ro.

4.1: O baiain huno, Allare kushi korar lagi kemne zindegi kaṭani lage, i talim to tumra amrar ges taki age-u faiso ar tumra ola solrae-o. Erbade-o Hozrot Isar oia tumrare minot ḳoriar ar hushiar ḳoriar, tumra zela solrae, oula aro besh ḳori solo.
4.2: Hozrot Isar deoa eḳtiare amra zeta hukum disi, ita to tumrar zana ase.
4.3: Ashole Allae saira, tumra zanu fak-fobitro o, mani hoḳol nomunar zina taki horia ro.
4.4: -5 Ar zeta manshe Allare sinoin na, hou bin-dormir laḳan shorilor ḳaishor boshe na solia, tumra forteḳ zone zarzir shorilre fak-fobitro rakia man-shommane zina taki hushiar ro.
4.6: I befare ḳeu zanu nizor bair loge gaddari na ḳore. Mono rakio, amra age-u tumrare ḳoisi ar hushiar-o ḳorsi, ita naformani korle Malik Isae shaza diba.
4.7: Allae kunu amrare daot disoin ni naformanir fote solar lagi? Tain to amrare fak-fobitro oia solar lagi koisoin.
4.8: Erlagi zegie i talim mane na, he ḳali duniar manshore mane na ikan nae, he ashole hou Allare-u maner na, zein tumrare Pak Ruhu dan ḳorsoin.
4.9: Te baie baie kila maya-mohobbot taḳa zorur, i befare tumrare kunta leḳar goroz nai, ḳaron Allae tumrare hikaisoin, eḳe-oinne maya-mohobbot ḳortae.
4.10: Ar hasau tumra asta Makidonia deshor bai-boinre oula maya ḳorrae. Oile amrar ḳas onurud oilo, tumrar i mohobbot zanu dine dine aro baṛe.
4.11: Huno, amra age zela ḳoisi, ou ḳota mafik shantie zindegi kaṭao, foror ḳamo naḳ na golaia nize ḳam ḳoria ḳao.
4.12: Teu baira manshor sokut tumrar sal-cholon bodro oibo, ar oinno zonor ruzir ufre tumrar borosha ḳora lagto nae. Al-Mosi dusrabar aibar hal-hokikot
4.13: O bai oḳol, huno, murda oḳlor kun halot oibo, amra sairam ita tumra zano, zate moron bade kita oibo ikan na zanae zera nirash oizae, tumrar mon zanu ilaḳan na oy.
4.14: Huno, amra zebla ekin ḳori, Hozrot Isar mout oisil oile tain zinda oia uṭsoin, te eoḳan-o ekin ḳori, Hozrot Isae dusrabar toshrif anle Isar ufre iman ania zerar mout oise, Allae tarare-o Isar loge milon ḳoria tan loge niba.
4.15: Erlagi malikor kalam mafik tumrare ḳoiram, amra zera zinda asi ar malike toshrif anar ag forzonto zinda roimu, amra kunumonte-u hi murda oḳlor age zaitam fartam nae.
4.16: Ḳaron Allai shingar aoazor loge loge, fordan firistar ḍaḳor loge, Malik Isae zure haukdi hukum diba, tain nize-u behest taki lamia aiba. Ar al-Mosir ummot bonia zerar mout oigese, tara-u foyla zinda oia uṭba.
4.17: Erbade amra zera duniat zinda taḳmu, amrar malikor loge mulaḳat ḳorar lagi amrare-o megor kuṭit ḳori asmano tulia neoa oibo. Olaḳan amra siroḳal malikor loge roimu.
4.18: Erlagi tumra ota zanaia eḳzone aroḳzonre utshaho deo.

5.1: Baiainre, kun zomanat kun shomoy kita goṭibo, ita tumrar gese leḳar zorur nai.
5.2: Tumra nize-u to bala ḳori zano, raitkur bala zela aḳta-u sur ae, Malik Isa aibar dino ṭik ola-u aibo.
5.3: I zogotor manshe zebla ḳoiba, “Hoḳolta shanti oigese, kunu ḍor-boy nai,” ou shomoy, beṭintor hurutta oar bedona zela aḳta-u dore, oula ota manshor shorbonash aḳta-u oibo. Tara kunumonte-u rehai faito nae.
5.4: Bai oḳol, tumra kunu andarir maze boshot ḳorrae ni zen, hou din aḳta-u suror laḳan tumrar ufre aito?
5.5: Tumra hoḳol-u to Allar nuror ar dinor foror manush. Amra to andarir ba raitor balar manush nae.
5.6: Erlagi ao, oinno manshor laḳan amra na gumaia borong hozag roi ar nizore shamlaia raki.
5.7: Zano to, zera gumae, tara raitor balae-u gumae ar zera modkur, rait oile tara mod ḳaia ṭal oy.
5.8: Oile amra to dinor foror manush, erlagi nizore shamlaia raki. Amrar buk basanir lagi iman ar mohobbot dia buk guri, ar matare basanir lagi Allai nazator ashare sifair kefor laḳan matat lagai.
5.9: Mono rakio, Allae amrare shaza dibar lagi ḍakia anchoin na, borong amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir usillae nazat faoar lagi-u ḍakisoin.
5.10: Ar al-Mosir mout oise to amrar lagi-u, zate amra basi ba mori, tan loge-u hamesha zinda roi.
5.11: Erlagi-u tumra oḳon zela ḳorrae, hamesha ola eḳe-oinnore shaosh deo ar goṛia tulo. Kuṛiami bad dia nek kam ḳoro
5.12: Te baiain, amra minot ḳoria ḳoiar, tumrar lagi zera aṭni-ḳaṭni kaṭoin, malikor oia tumrare salain ar nosiot ḳoroin, tumra erare ijjot ḳorio.
5.13: Tara zela kezmot ḳorra, otar bae saia dilor mohobbote tarare ḳas ijjot dio. Ar tumra eḳe-oinne mili-mishi roio.
5.14: O bai oḳol, tumrare ou nosiotḳan ḳoriar, zeta manush kuṛia, tumra itare hushiar ḳori deo, ḍoraluk zonre shaosh deo, ḳomzur oḳolre shaijjo ḳoro, ar doijjo doria hokkolre shoijjo ḳoro.
5.15: Kial rakio, oinnayor bodla ḳeu zanu oinnae na ḳore. Tumra hamesha eḳe-oinnor, ar hoḳlor-u balai korar sesṭa ḳorio.
5.18: Ar hoḳol haloto Allar shukria adae ḳorio. Ḳaron Alla Pakor kial oilo, Hozrot Isa al-Mosir loge imane tumra olaḳan solo.
5.19: Pak Ruhre dilor bitor taki nibaio na.
5.20: Ar zera Allar oli hishabe batuni koin, tarar ḳotare elami korio na,
5.21: borong hoḳolta zasai kori dekia, balaḳan bitre haraio.
5.22: Ar hoḳol nomunar naformani taki horia roio.
5.23: Shanti deora Allae nize tumrare furafur fak-fobitro ḳoroukka, amrar Malik Isa al-Mosie toshrif anar ḳalo tumrar asta shoril, ruhu ar dilre furafur nikut raḳoukka.
5.24: Ar tain nichchit ola-u ḳorba. Zano to, zein tumrare daot ḳori anchoin, tan ufre furafur borosha ḳora zae.
5.25: O baiain, amrar lagi dua ḳorio.
5.27: Amrar malikor name ami tumrare ou hukum diar, ou siṭikan foṛia zanu hoḳol baiaintore hunail oy.
5.28: Amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir rohomot tumrar loge rouk. Amin.

1.1: Amrar gaibi baf Alla Pak ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosir loge shorik, Tisholoniki ṭaunor zomator gese ami Paulus, bai Silas ar Timotie ou sohifaḳan leḳram.
1.2: Gaibi baf Allae ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosie tumrare rohomot ar shanti dan ḳoroukka. Muminor furuskar ar be-dinor shaza
1.3: Bai oḳol, amra hamesha tumrar lagi Allar shukria adae ḳora zorur. Tumrar imani bol bout baṛer ar eḳe-oinne maya-mohobbot-o baia foṛer, erlagi amra shukria adae ḳora dorḳar.
1.4: Amra to Allar zomat oḳlor samne tumrare loia boṛai koriar, ḳaron oto zulum-mosibot ar duk-koshṭo faia-o tumra sobor ḳorso ar imane ṭikia roiso.
1.5: Tumrare zate Allar bashshair zoiggo ḳoia gona oy, otar lagi-u tumra oto duḳ-mosibot shoijjo ḳorrae, ita oilo Allar hok-insafor forman,
1.6: tan hok-insaf oilo, zetae tumrare ḳoshṭo dein, tain itare ḳoshṭo diba.
1.7: -8 Ar tumra zera oḳon ḳoshṭo fairae, Allae amrar loge tumrare-o i koshṭo taki rehai diba. Hozrot Isae zebla tan shoktishali firista oḳol loia, zalail agunir kunḍolit oia behest taki lamia aiba, ou shomoy oula oibo. Zeta manshe Allare sine na ar Hozrot Isar kush-ḳobrir ḳota mane na, Allae itare tarar faona shaza diba.
1.9: Malik Isae zebla toshrif anba, ou shomoy tarare omon shaza deoa oibo, zate tara tan didaror ar moha kudrotir bare foṛia hor-hamesha lannoti shaza faibo.
1.10: Hou din tan nizor pak bonda oḳol, zera tan ufre iman anche tarar mazdi, tan gourob-mohima zair oibo. Erar maze tumra-o aso, ḳaron amrar toblig hunia tumra iman ancho.
1.11: Erlagi amra hamesha tumrar lagi dua ḳori, amrar Allae zanu tumrare tan daotor zuka mono ḳoroin, tan ḳemotar bole tumrar hoḳol nek kamor asha furon ḳoroin, ar iman ania hari tumra zeta ḳam ḳorrae, i kam-o zanu tain fura ḳoroin.
1.12: Teu amrar Alla ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosir rohomotor lagi, tumrar mazdi amrar Malik Isar gourob zair oibo, ar tan mazdi tumra-o gourobor bagi oibae.

2.1: O bai oḳol huno, amrar Malik Isa al-Mosi to hirbar aiba, aia amra hoḳolre ekḳano dola ḳoria tan gese niba. Te ou befare tumrare minot ḳori koiram,
2.2: ḳeu zudi aia ḳoy Malik Isar din aia harse, he kunu gaibi doroshon deḳse, ba ohi nazil oise, ba amrar leḳa siṭi mono ḳoria-o tumra ḍoraia ostir oio na.
2.3: Ḳeu zanu kunumonte-u tumrare ṭogia iman luṭito na fare. Ḳaron hou din aoar age beshir bag manush Alla Pakor birudde zaibo, tara Allar ges taki duroi horizibo, ar duzoki zon, hou naforman Kane-Dorjal bar oibo.
2.4: Baroia “Allar name” zotota ase, ita hokkoltar bifokke ar ebadoti korar zuka hokkoltar bifokke gia, he nizore boṛo mono ḳorbo. He ola-o ḳorbo, Allar ebadot ḳanat boia nizore Alla ḳoia dabi korbo.
2.5: Te ami zebla tumrar gese roitam, hou shomoy ami i befare mattam, ita tumrar mono or na ni?
2.6: Hou naforman zate shomoy fura oar age bar oito na fare, erlagi kitae tare aṭḳaia raḳse, ikan to tumra zano-u.
2.7: Tumra eoḳan-o zano, hou naformanor lukail ḳam-ḳaz oḳono soler. Oile zein tare aṭḳaia raḳra, tain horia zaoar ag forzonto tare aṭḳanit roiba.
2.8: Tain hori gele hou naforman Kane-Dorjal bar oibo. Hozrot Isae mukdi fu dia tare binash ḳorba, ar tan kudroti mohimae azir oia tar bol-shoktire ḳotom ḳorba.
2.9: Hi Kane-Dorjal zebla aibo, tar loge roibo shoytani kemota. Ou shoytani kemotae he hoḳol misa keramoti ar muzeza ḳam deḳaibo.
2.10: Tar hoḳol nomunar beimani kaṭaia beiman manshore ṭogibo. Ita manush binash oiziba, ḳaron zan basanir lagi tara Allai hokre fosond ḳorse na, ar ḳobul-o ḳorse na.
2.11: Erlagi Allae tarare shoktishali ek ku-dandat falaiba, zate tara misa befarre ekin ḳore.
2.12: Ete Allai hokor ufre iman na ania zetae naformanire fosond ḳorsoin, tarare kiamotor din dushi shaibosto ḳora oibo. Nazat faia imane mozbut ro
2.13: O bai oḳol, O Malik Isar mayar zon oḳol, tumrar lagi amra hamesha Allar dorbaro shukria adae ḳora dorḳar, Allae to tumrare foyla taki-u basia alog korsoin nazat faoar lagi. Pak Ruhu dia tumrare fobitro ḳorar mazdi, ar Allai kush-ḳobrir hokor ufre iman ania tumra nazat faiso.
2.14: Amra ze kush-ḳobri toblig korsi, er usillae nazat faoar lagi Allae tumrare fosond ḳorsoin, zate tumra amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir mohimat shorik o.
2.15: Te O bai oḳol, tumra imane tir ro ar muke muke ba siṭir marfote amra ze talim disi, ita balamonte mono rakio.
2.16: -17 Amrar gaibi baf Alla Pake ar shoyong Isa al-Mosie tumrar dilo nek utshaho dan ḳoroukka, hoḳol nomunar nek kam ar mat-ḳotar maze tir raḳoukka. Tain-u amrare mohobbot ḳorsoin, tain rohom ḳoria siroḳalin utshaho ar kushi-bashir asha dan ḳorsoin.

3.1: O bai oḳol, hesh-mesh ḳoiram, amrar lagi dua ḳorio, Hozrot Isar kush-ḳobri tumrar maze zela zoldi zoldi sitrisil, oula zanu din din sitrat roy ar gourob faoat roy.
3.2: Ar ou duaḳan-o ḳorio, amra zanu bibeḳ saṛa naforman oḳlor at taki rehai fai. Shob manush to ar imandar nae.
3.3: Oile Malik Isa to hok ar ḳaṭi, tain-u tumrare imane tir raḳba ar Shoytanor at taki hamesha hefazot ḳorba.
3.4: Malikor ufre iman ancho ḳori tumrar ufre amrar i ekin ase, amra zela hukum disi, tumra ṭik ou laḳan ḳam ḳorrae ar ḳorat roibae-o.
3.5: Malik Isae zanu tumrar dilre Allar mohobbotor fote ar al-Mosir soboror fote salu raḳoin. Olosh-kuṛiare hushiar ḳoro
3.6: Bai oḳol, amrar Hozrot Isa al-Mosir name ou hukum diram, tumrar zomator kunu imandar baie zudi kuṛiami kore ar amra zeta talim disi, ita na mane, te tar loge sola-fira bad dilao.
3.7: Huno, amrar laḳan ḳemne soltae, ita to tumra zano-u. Amra zebla tumrar loge roitam, ou shomoy to kunuzat kuṛiami korsi na,
3.8: magna kunu ḳani kaisi na. Amra dine-raite menot ḳoria ruzi-ruzgar ḳorsi, zate tumra ḳeuror buza na oi.
3.9: Oile amra zen tumrar ges taki shaijjo nibar odikar nai, ila to nae, ta-o amra ola ḳoria deḳaisi, zate tumra-o amrar laḳan solo.
3.10: Tumrar gese taḳar ḳalo talim dislam, kunu zone zudi kam ḳorto na sae, te he ḳani-o bad dilauk.
3.11: Amra oḳono hunram, tumrar maze ḳeu ḳeu kuṛiami korer ar kunuzat ḳam-ḳaz ḳorer na, borong hamesha foror kichcha gaia din ḳaṭae.
3.12: Te amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir oia ita manshore nosiot ar hukum diar, tara zanu shanti oia ruzi-ruzgar ḳoria ḳae, ar nizor ḳani nize zugae.
3.13: Baiainre, nek kamo heran oio na.
3.14: Ou siṭir bashae leḳa amrar foramish zudi keu na mane, te tare sinia raḳo, tar loge sola-fira bad dilao, teu he shorminda oibo.
3.15: Oile kial rakio, tare dushmon mono ḳorio na, borong bai hishabe hushiar ḳoro. Bidayi salam
3.16: Shanti deora malike tumrare hamesha hoḳol nomunar shanti dan ḳoroukka. Malik Isa tumra hoḳlor loge loge roukka.
3.17: Huno, i salamor ḳota ami Pauluse nizor ate leḳsi. Oḳṭa-u amar forteḳ siṭir alamot, ami ou nomunae siṭi leki.
3.18: Tumra hoḳlor ufre amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir rohomot zari rouk. Amin.

1.1: Ami Paulus to amrar toraneala Alla Pak ar amrar asha-borosha Hozrot Isa al-Mosir hukume tan sahabi oisi.
1.2: Mumin hishabe amar ḳas aolad, Timotir gese leḳram. Gaibi baf Alla Pake ar amrar Malik Isa al-Mosie tumare rohomot, meherbani ar shanti dan ḳoroukka. Bonḍo mullaintor befare hushiari
1.3: O Timoti, ami Makidonia desho zaoar bala tumare ḳoislam, oḳon hirbar minoti kori koiram, huno, tumi Ifis ṭauno-u ro, roia onor ola kisu mullaintore hukum deo, tara zanu manshore ar bul talim na dey.
1.4: Tarare ḳoio, tara zate banoaṭ kichcha ar lamba lamba ḳandanor lisṭor bae kiali na oin. Itae to nanan nomunar doladolir zonom dey, Allar ḳamor kunu fayda oy na, Allai fayda mile ḳali imanor mazdi.
1.5: Borong shoṭik talimor fol oilo, maya-mohobbot, ita to ḳaṭi dil, forishkar bibeḳ ar hasaror iman taki foyda oy.
1.6: Oile kisu manshe ita bad dia banoaṭ mat-ḳotar bae mon dilaise.
1.7: Tara zudio nize-u nizor mator mani buze na, ar ze befar loia boṛo golae mater, i befare-o balamonte zane na, tebou tara Musa nobir batail shoriotor ustad oito sae.
1.8: Amra zani, shoriot bala zinish, ḳeu zudi ṭik moto ita ḳamo lagae.
1.9: Amra to zani, i shoriot kunu forezgar manshor lagi deoa oise na. Ikan deoa oise, zetae Allar ain manoin na, Allare ḍorain na, naformani koroin, gunagar, kuni, nafak ar be-din, ma-bafor kuni,
1.10: -11 zinakur, shomoḳami, bandi-gulamor ḳarbari, misa matra, misa shakki deora, ek kotae gunogane doni Alla Pakor mohan kush-ḳobrir talimor birudi zeta manush, otar lagi-u i shoriot deoa oise. Ar ou mohan kush-ḳobri tobligor bar tain amare dan ḳorsoin. Meherbanir lagi shukria
1.12: Hozrot Isa al-Mosi, zein amrar malik, tain amare bol zugaisoin, amare hok-halal mono ḳoria tan ḳamo boail ḳorsoin, erlagi ami tan dorbaro shukria zanairam.
1.13: Zudio ami age al-Mosir bodnam gaitam, tan manshor ufre zulum ḳortam, bod-mizaz deḳaitam. Ta-o tain amare rohomot dan ḳorsoin, ḳaron hou shomoy ami iman anchilam na.
1.14: Amrar munibe amare ḳoto boṛo meherbani korsoin, Isa al-Mosir torika kobul ḳorle ze iman ar mohobbot foyda oy, ita to amare furafur dan ḳorsoin.
1.15: Ashole i kota to hok-kaṭi ar shullo-ana manar laḳ, gunagar oḳlor zan basanir lagi-u Isa al-Mosie i duniat toshrif anchila. Ou gunagaror maze ami-u fordan.
1.16: Otar lagi-u Allae amare doya ḳorsoin, zate amar moto fordan gunagaror mazdi Isa al-Mosie tan shima saṛa soborgari deḳaita faroin, ar tan ufre iman anae zera aḳeri zindegi faiba, tara zanu amare dekia Allai fot buzoin.
1.17: Zein siroḳalin bashsha, zein niraḳar, eḳmatro Alla, zan kunu koy nai, tan ijjot ar gourob hor-hamesha zari rouk. Amin.
1.18: O mayar fut Timoti, tumar befare age zeta batuni mat mata oisil, ou mafik ami tumare minot ḳori koiram, tumi ita mono rakia al-Mosir lagi dile-zane laṛai korat ro.
1.19: Erloge nizor iman ar forishkar bibeḳre basaio. Kunu kunu manshe bibeḳor buli na mania, nizor imanre nosṭo ḳorilise.
1.20: I dolo asoin, Huminas ar Sikondor. Erlagi ami itare Iblisor ato shofi disi, zate tara buzta faroin, kufuri mat mata ṭik nae.

2.1: Ami foyla-u zanairam, forteḳ manshor lagi tumra Allar dorbaro kakuti-minoti, dua-munazat, foriad zanao ar shukria adae ḳoro.
2.2: Olaḳan raza-bashsha oḳol ar usa fodor hoḳol ofisaror lagi munazat ḳora zorur, zate amra Allar ḍor-ḳof mono rakia, hok-halal fote roia, nirafode shantie zindegi kaṭaitam fari.
2.3: Ita to amrar toraneala Allar nozoro nek kam, itae tain kushi oin.
2.4: Alla Pakor kial oilo, zate hoḳol manshe nazat fain, ar al-Mosir torikar hokkolta shullo-ana buzoin.
2.5: I hokikoti oilo, Alla ḳali eḳzon, Alla ar manshor maze shafayatḳari mazor manush-o ḳali eḳzon-u asoin, en nam Isa al-Mosi, ein-o manush.
2.6: Duniar hoḳol manshor zanor bodla hishabe, tain nizor zan kurbani disoin. Ou befare to Allar ṭik kora shomoye shakki deoa oise.
2.7: Ar ou shakki dibar lagi Allae amare toblig kamo, sahabi fodo boail ḳorsoin, tain amare dayitto disoin, bin zatir gese iman ar Allai hokor ustad hishabe. Ami ita hok mat matiar, misa kunta nae.
2.8: Ami sairam, hoḳol zagar beṭainte ḳalis niote duio at tulia munazat ḳorouk. Tarar monor maze kunuzat rag-gusa ba ḳaijja-fosador bab na rouk.
2.9: Ami eoḳan-o sairam, beṭinte tarar haya-shorom rakia shomazor ufozukto beshe bodro ḳafoṛ-sufoṛ findouk. Tara zanu nanan nomunae sulor beni bolia, shuna-rufa ar moni-muktar goyna lagaia ar dami dami kafoṛ findia nizore na hazain.
2.10: Borong Allar forezgar bandie zela nek kamor maze zindegi kaṭani usit, tara-o ola oin.
2.11: Ḳortar furafur baiddo roia, ar nirai-zirai roia ilim ḳamai koroukka.
2.12: Ustadi kora ar beṭaintor ufre musoddori korar odikar ami kunu beṭire dei na. Tara nirai-zirai roa zorur.
2.13: Zano to, hoḳol foyla Adomre ar bade Bibi Haoare foyda ḳora oisil.
2.14: Adom to Iblis-Shoytanor dukat foṛsoin na, oile Haoa Iblisor dukat foṛia Allar hukumor borkelaf ḳorsoin.
2.15: Oḳon zudi beṭinte tarar haya-shorom rakia iman, mohobbot ar fak-fobitro oia soloin, te hurutta zonom deoar mazdi tara rehai faiba.

3.1: Huno, asol hok kota oilo, ḳeu zudi zomator saloḳdar oita sain, te tain to nek kam ḳorar kiali oisoin.
3.2: Zomator saloḳdar manshor sokut nikut oite oibo. Tan ḳali eḳ bou oibo. Tain nizore shamlaia raḳba, tan bala aḳol-buddi roibo, shobab oibo bodro, ar memandari korte bala faiba. Manshore talim deoar ḳemota taḳte oibo.
3.3: Tain zanu modkur ar bod-mizazi na oin, borong tan shobab oibo norom, tain zanu mair-danga ḳorra ba ṭeḳa-foyshar lalosi na oin.
3.4: Tain zanu shoṭik babe tan nizor foribaror hokkolta salain, tan huruttain oiba baiddo ar adob-ḳayda manra.
3.5: Ze manshe tar nizor gor shamlaito fare na, he Allar zomatre kila deḳa-huna ḳorbo?
3.6: Kunu noya imandar bai zomator saloḳdar oa ṭik nae, ila oile tain hoyto boṛai-beṭagirie bahaduri korba, ar Iblisor lagi ṭik kora shazar bagi oiba.
3.7: Zomator bairor manshor gese tan shunam taḳa dorḳar, zate aḳta kunu bodnamor bagi na oin ar Iblisor fando na foṛoin.
3.8: Oula zomator ḳadim oḳol-o ijjoti ar ek kotar manush oa zoruri. Era zate modkur ar haram lub-lalchi na oin.
3.9: Tara zanu hok bibeḳe Isayi imanor batuni befarre mozbut ḳori dilo raḳoin.
3.10: Erlagi foyla tarare zasai kori deḳa zorur, zasait zudi tara nikut oin, te zomator ḳadim oita farba.
3.11: Ṭik olaḳan beṭi manush-o zanu ijjoti oin. Era manshor bodnam na gain, nizore shamlaia raḳoin, ar hoḳol befare bishashi oin.
3.12: Ḳadim sab ḳali eḳ bou-ala manush oiba. Tain zanu balamonte tan bou fua-fuṛin ar shongsharor deḳa-huna ḳoroin.
3.13: Ze ḳadime balamonte kezmot ḳoroin, ein shunam fain, ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosir ufre iman taḳae tan dil shaoshe bora roy. Isayi imanor batuni befar
3.14: O Timoti, ami asha ḳorram kub zoldi-u tumar gese aitam. Oḳan mono ḳoria tumare ita leḳram.
3.15: Zudi kunu ḳarone amar aite deri oizae, te i leḳa foṛle tumi buzbae, Allar foribaror manshor sal-cholon kila oito. I foribar to zinda Allar zomat, Allai hokikotor bit ar ian kuṭi.
3.16: Isayi imanor marifoti koto mohan, ita to oshikar ḳora zae na. Ou marifoti oula zair oilo, Tain manush surote zair oila, Pak Ruhe forman oila be-ḳosur, firista oḳole tan doroshon faila. Tan befare hokkol zatir gese toblig kora oilo, asta duniar manshe tan ufre iman anla, gourob-mohimae tanre ufre tuli neoa oilo.

4.1: O Timoti, Allai Pak Ruhe forishkar ḳori koira, aḳeri zomanat kisu manush Isayi iman taki horizibo, tara na-hok ruhu ar zin-butor talimor ashik oibo.
4.2: Zeta beiman oḳlor bibeḳ-buddi oshaṛ oigese, otar bonḍamir dae ola oibo.
4.3: Itae manshore ḳoṛaḳoṛi hukum dein bia-shadi na ḳorar lagi, ar kunu kunu ḳani kaite-o nished ḳoroin. Oile Allae to i kani foyda-u ḳorsoin, zera iman anche, zera Allar hokre zanilise, tara zate Allar shukria adae ḳoria ita ḳain.
4.4: Allar foyda ḳora hoḳol zinish-u bala. Haram mono ḳoria kunuta bad deoa ṭik nae, borong Allar shukria adae ḳoria ḳaoa zae.
4.5: Ḳaron Allar kalam ar i munazator mazdi ita fak-fobitro oizae. Hozrot Isar ḳaṭi kadim o
4.6: O Timoti, tumi zudi ou talim oḳol mumin baiainre buzaia deo, te Isayi imanor ze hok ar nirbul talim mania solrae, i befare tumi faḳa-fukto oia al-Mosir eḳzon ufozukto ḳadim oibae.
4.7: Tumi aze-baze kichcha-ḳahini taki horia roio, ita to dadi-nanir ḳoa banail kichchar laḳan. Erlagi ita bad dia dilor imani beyam ḳorat ro.
4.8: Shorilor beyam ḳorle kisu fayda oy, oile dilor imani beyame hokkol bae taki fayda oy. Ermaze to ḳali i dunia nae, aḳerator asha-o ase.
4.9: Ita to furafur hok ar ḳaṭi, shullo-ana kobul ḳorar laḳ.
4.10: Erlagi-u amra zane-forane imanor menot ḳoriar ar kiali oia ḳam ḳoriar. Ḳaron amra to zinda Allar ufre borosha ḳori. Tain-u hoḳol manshor toraneala, ḳas ḳori zera tan ufre iman ane.
4.11: Te tumi-o ou befare hukum ar talim deo.
4.12: Tumi zuan beṭa mono ḳoria ḳeu zanu tumare ela na ḳore, erlagi mat-ḳotae, sal-cholone, mohobbote, imane ar fak-fobitrotae tumi mumin oḳlor gese eḳṭa nishana bonizao.
4.13: Ar ami aibar ag forzonto tumi mumin oḳolre Pak Kalam tilaot ḳora, shu-foramish deoa, ar talim deoat lagail roio.
4.14: Mono rakio, zomator murobbi oḳole tumar ufre at rakia, nobir laḳan gaibi buli matia tumare ḳelafoti disoin, te tumi i niamotre elami korio na.
4.15: Ita befare kiali o, nizore otar maze furafur ḍubaia raḳo, teu hoḳlor sokut foṛbo tumi agedi aguairae.
4.16: Tumar nizor befare ar tumar talimor befare hushiar roio. Teu tumi nizore basaibae, ar zera tumar boyan hunbo, tarare-o basaitae farbae.

5.1: O Timoti, huno, kunu murobbi manshor dush deḳanit gia ḳoṛa bashae matio na. Tarar loge nizor bafor laḳan bebohar ḳorio. Ar zuan oḳolre nizor bai mono ḳoria hedayot ḳorio.
5.2: Murobbi beṭinre nizor ma ar fuṛintore boin mono ḳoria, monor bab fak-fobitro rakia tarare hedayot ḳorio.
5.3: Zeta ṛaṛi beṭintor ḳeu nai, tarare kub zoton ḳori deḳa-huna ḳorio.
5.4: Oile kunu ṛaṛi beṭintor zudi fua-fuṛin ba nati-natni taḳoin, te Allar ḍore era-u zanu foyla zarzir foribaror deḳa-huna ḳore. Ou nomunae tarar moy-murobbir maya-momotar rin shud ḳorta farba, ar ita ḳame to Alla kushi oin.
5.5: Ze ṛaṛi beṭintor ḳeu nai, tara ḳali Allar ufre borosha rakia, dine-raite tan dorbaro munazat ar ḳanda-ḳaṭi korat roin.
5.6: Oile zeta ṛaṛi beṭinte zemne mone sae emne soloin, ita to zinda halote-u mora.
5.7: Ou befare hukum deo, zate ḳeu tarare dushi koar shuzug na fae.
5.8: Ze zone afon zonre, ḳas ḳori nizor foribaror manshor deḳa-huna ḳore na, he ashole Isayi imanre-u oshikar ḳorlo. Igu to bidormi taki-o bad.
5.9: Erlagi ṛaṛi beṭintor namor lisṭ ḳorar bala age deḳte oibo, i beṭir boyosh shaiṭ bosor oise ni, ar zamair bae tain furafur hok-halali asla ni.
5.10: Esaṛa nek kamor lagi tan shunam taḳte oibo, ou nek kam oilo, fua-fuṛin manush banani, memandari kora, Allar bonda oḳlor fao doani, duk-mosiboti manshore shaijjo ḳora, ar hoḳol nomunar nek kamo shorik oa.
5.11: Kunu zuan ṛaṛi beṭir nam i lisṭo tulio na. Ḳaron tarar zoubonor lagi shorilor gorome zebla utal-fatal ḳoroin, ou shomoy al-Mosir bae tarar ḍor-boy ḳomi zae, teu tara hirbar bia boita sain.
5.12: Erlagi tara Allar logor agor oada bongo ḳoroin, nizor ufre gozob ḍakia anoin.
5.13: Ar tara baṛie baṛie aḍḍa maria kuṛia bonizain. Ḳali kuṛia nae, zeta mat-ḳota tarar lagi zaiz nae, ota baze mat-ḳota-o matoin ar foror gibot gaoat roin.
5.14: Erlagi ami ou nosiot ḳoriar, zuan ṛaṛi beṭinte bia-shadi kora-u bala, tara huruttar ma ouk, nizor shongsharor deḳa-huna ḳorouk, ar dushmonre kunu laḳan bodnam gaoar shuzug na deuk.
5.15: Ḳoyzon ṛaṛi beṭin er maze-u to be-foti bonia Shoytanor fote sola-fira ḳorra.
5.16: Kunu Isayi imandar beṭi manshor goro zudi ṛaṛi beṭin taḳoin, te ou beṭie zanu erar deḳa-huna ḳoroin. Erare deḳa-hunar bar zomator ufre na deoa bala. Teu zeta ṛaṛi beṭin eḳdom lasar, zomate tarar deḳa-huna ḳorte shubida oibo.
5.17: Zomator ze fordan murobbi oḳole zomatre balamonte salain, ḳas ḳori zera Allar kalam toblig ar talim deoar lagi menot ḳoroin, tara ḍabul ijjot faoa zorur.
5.18: Allar kalamo to ase, “Dan maṛa deoar shomoy gorur muko hufi lagaio na.” Aroḳ ayato ase, “Ḳamlae tar beton faoar zoiggo.”
5.19: Mono rakio, dui ba tin zon shakkir ḳota saṛa, zomator murobbir birudde kunu nalish shomzio na.
5.20: Oile ze murobbi oḳole guna ḳorat-u taḳoin, zomator manshor gese tarar dush zair ḳorio, zate oinno hoḳole ḍorain.
5.21: Huno, Alla Pak, Malik Isa al-Mosi, ar Allar mayar firista oḳolre shakki rakia tumare ou hukum diram, tumi nirofokko roia ita ḳam ḳorio, ḳeurore for ba afon mono ḳorio na.
5.22: Soṭ ḳori keurore ḳelafoti dia, kunu fodo boail ḳorio na. Oinno manshe zebla gunar ḳam ḳore, tumi tarar loge shorik oio na, nizore nikut rakio.
5.23: Ar ḳoydin bade bade-u tumar bemar oy, erlagi tumi kali fani kaio na, tuṛa tuṛa anguror shorbot-o ḳaio, teu ozom oibo.
5.24: Kial rakio, kunu kunu manshor guna ola forishkar deḳa zae, erlagi tar bisar age-u oizae. Ar kunu kunu manshor guna bade dora foṛe.
5.25: Olaḳan nek kam forishkar deḳa zae, ar kunu nek kam forishkar deḳa na gele-o, ita lukail roy na.

6.1: Huno, ze gulam-bandie munibor gulami koroin, tara hoḳole-u zarzir munibre ijjoti zon mono ḳorouk, zate ḳeu Allar namre ba amrar talimre ḳaraf ḳoar shuzug na fae.
6.2: Ze zone Isayi imandar kunu munibor gulami koroin, ein zanu imandar bai hishabe tan munibre elami na ḳoroin borong aro bala ḳori tan kezmot ḳoroin. Ḳaron gulamor kezmote ze munibe ufoḳar faira, tain to mayar imandar bai. Te ota befare tumi talim ar hukum deo. Bul talim ar asol don
6.3: Ḳeu zudi ita bad dia dusra kunu talim dey, ar amrar Malik Isa al-Mosir ḳaṭi talim ar Allar ḍor-ḳofor talimre na mane,
6.4: he to misa ohonkari, he kunta-u buze na, motobed ḳora, behuda uftami kora tar eḳṭa bemar. Otar ḳarone ingsha-ninda, ḳaijja-fosad, ku-shondoy foyda oy.
6.5: Ar oshaṛ bibeḳ-ala manshor maze hamesha gulmal lagail-u taḳe. Ita manshor maze Allai hok nai. Tara Isayi imanre duniabi labor ufae mono ḳore.
6.6: Ashole monor tusṭie Isayi iman mafik zindegi kaṭaile kub beshi lab oy.
6.7: Amra duniat aibar ḳalo to kunta-u loge loia aisi na, ar zaoar ḳalo-o kunta nitam fartam nae.
6.8: Erlagi kali kani-ḳafoṛ faile-u amra kushi roimu.
6.9: Oile duniat zera doni oito sae, tara nanan nomunar forikkat ar fando foṛe, tarar mono kub bod ḳaish foyda oy, zetae tarar zindegire shorbonashor gato falae.
6.10: Ḳaron hoḳol nomunar bod ḳamor zonom oilo ṭeḳa-foyshar maya. Kunu kunu zon ṭeḳa-foyshar lalose Isayi iman taki horia gia, nizor ufre boṛo duḳ-mosibot ḍakia anche. Souk raḳo Allar arshor bae
6.11: Oile tumi to Allar bonda, tumi ita bod ḳam taki horia ro. Tumi fak-forezgar zindegi, Allar ḍor-ḳof, iman, mohobbot, sobor, ar norom shobabor bae kiali o.
6.12: Imani laṛai korat ro. Aḳerator ze zindegir lagi Alla Pake tumare daot disoin, hou zindegire tumi mozbut ḳori doro. Tumi to imani shakki dislae bout manshor samne.
6.13: Oḳon Alla Pakor name, zein hokkoltar zan dein, ar zein hakim Fontio Filator samne nizor befare hok shakki disla, hou Isa al-Mosir name-o tumare ou minoti korram,
6.14: amrar Malik Isa al-Mosi zair oar ag forzonto tumi furafur nikut ar bodnam saṛa roia hukum adae ḳoro.
6.15: Ar gunogane doni hou Alla, zein eḳmatro shomraṭ, bashsha oḳlor bashsha ar malik oḳlor malik, tain-u tan ufozukto shomoye al-Mosire zair ḳorba.
6.16: Ḳali Alla Pakre-u moute ḳobza ḳorto fare na. Tain ola eḳ nuror foro boshot ḳoroin, hino kunu adom zat zaito fare na. Kunu Adome kunudin tanre deḳse-o na, deḳar takkot-o nai. Ijjot ar ḳemota siroḳal ḳali tan-u. Amin.
6.17: Huno, ou duniar doni oḳolre hukum deo, tara zanu boṛai na ḳoroin, ar duniabi ostayi donor ufre borosha na ḳoria, Allar ufre borosha ḳoroin. Amrar balair lagi tain-u hoḳolta kula ate dan ḳoroin.
6.18: Ar tarare ḳo, tara zanu oinnor balai kore, nek kam ḳorat roy, mon kulia dan-ḳoyrat ḳore, ar tarar don-doulotor baṭ oinno manshore dey.
6.19: Teu tara nizor lagi emon don zoma ḳorbo, zeta bobishote tarar lagi ekkan mozbut bitor laḳan oibo. Ete hasaror zindegire tara shokto ḳori doria raḳto farbo.
6.20: O Timoti, tumar zimmae ze shompod deoa oise, i shompod tumi balamonte hefazot ḳoro. Aze-baze aḳolor beḳama biddar bulir du-nosla talim taki horia ro.
6.21: Kunu kunu zon ota beḳama aḳol deḳanit gia, asol iman taki be-fote gesegi. Alla Pake tumrare rohomot dan ḳoroukka. Amin.

1.1: Ami Paulus to Alla Pakor morzie Hozrot Isa al-Mosir sahabi. Al-Mosir usillae Allar oada ḳora aḳeri zindegir ḳota tobligor lagi sahabi fod faisi.
1.2: Ami amar mayar aolad Timotir gese leḳram. Gaibi baf Allae ar amrar Malik Isa al-Mosie tumare rohomot, meherbani ar shanti dan ḳoroukka. Ruhani aguin zalao
1.3: O Timoti, huno, amar moy-murobbie zela eḳ Allar ebadot ḳorta, ami-o oula forishkar bibeḳe Allar ebadot ḳori. Ami dua ḳorar bala dine-raite hamesha tumar lagi Allar shukria adae ḳori.
1.4: Tumar hou ḳandonor ḳota mono ḳoria tumare deḳar lagi mone kub ṭaner, tumare deḳle amar bitor kushie borizibo.
1.5: Amar mono ase, tumar dilḳan hok imane bora, tumar nani Lois ar tumar amma Unikir bitre-o ola hok iman asil. Ami nichchit zani, tumar bitre-o ola iman ase.
1.6: Erlagi oḳon tumare mono ḳorai diram, ami tumar shorilo at rakia ḳelafoti deoae, Allae tumare ze ḳas niamot dan ḳorsoin, i aguin zalaia tulo.
1.7: Allae to amrare bitu-ḍoralukor monobab disoin na. Borong bol-shokti, maya-mohobbot ar nizore shamlanir ḳemota dan ḳorsoin.
1.8: Erlagi amrar Malik Isar befare shakki dite shormaio na, ar tan namor lagi ami zen zelo bondi asi, amare loia-o shormaio na. Borong Allar deoa bole kush-ḳobri tobligor ḳamo amar loge roia duk-koshṭo shoijjo ḳoro.
1.9: Allae amrar zan basaisoin, ar fak-fobitro oia zindegi kaṭanir lagi daot disoin. Ita to amrar kunu nek kamor gune nae, borong tan morzi ar rohomotor gune-u ḳorsoin. Amrare i rohomot dan ḳorsoin to, dunia foyda ḳorar age Hozrot Isa al-Mosir usillae.
1.10: Ar Allae oḳon ou rohomot zair ḳorsoin, amrar toraneala Isa al-Mosie duniat toshrif anar mazdi. Al-Mosie to moutor ḳemotare surmar ḳorsoin, tan kush-ḳobrir mazdi siroḳalin nurani zindegir fot kula-mela ḳorsoin.
1.11: Ou kush-ḳobri tobligor lagi-u to amare tobligkari, sahabi ar ustad hishabe boail ḳora oise.
1.12: Erlagi-u ami ola duk-koshṭo faiar, ta-o ami shorminda nae. Ḳaron ami zani, ami kar ufre borosha ḳorsi. Amar furafur ekin ase, ami tan dorbaro zeta zoma ḳorsi, itare hefazote raḳar ḳemota tan ase, al-Mosie dusrabar toshrif anar din forzonto ita roibo.
1.13: Te tumi amar muk taki zoto talim huncho, ou hok talimre zanor ḳoboz mono ḳoria, al-Mosir ufror iman ar mohobbote doria raḳo.
1.14: Allae ze samana hefazote raḳar lagi tumar zimmae disoin, amrar dilor mazor Allai Pak Ruhur bole tumi itar hefazot ḳoro.
1.15: Tumi to zano, Turoshkor Asiya elaḳar hoḳol manush amar ges taki algi gesoin, Fugilas ar Hamaginas-o tarar loge gesoingi.
1.16: Bai Anisor foribaror ufre Malik Isae rohom-borkot deukka. Ein bout bar amar zano aram disoin, ami zelo hamaile-o tain kunu shorom mono ḳorsoin na.
1.17: Tain ou Rum ṭauno aia bout tallash ḳori amare bar ḳorsoin.
1.18: Ami Ifis ṭauno taḳte tain kila amar kezmot ḳorsla, ita to tumi balamonte-u zano. Malik Isae ola ḳoroukka, zate tan toshrif anar din ein meherbani fain.

2.1: O amar aolad Timoti, Isa al-Mosir usillae faoa rohomote tumi boloban o.
2.2: Ar bout shakkir samne amar mukor zeta talim huncho, ou talimre olaḳan hok-halal manshor ato deo, zera oinno manshore-o talim deoar ufozukto.
2.3: Tumi Isa al-Mosir ḳaṭi sifai oia duk-koshṭot shorik o.
2.4: Kamanḍarre kushi raḳar lagi zuddor ḳalo kunu sifai shongsharor maya-zalo hamae na.
2.5: Ou laḳan ḳelat lagia ḳeu zudi niom moto na ḳelae, te joyor mala he fae na.
2.6: Ar ze giroste menot ḳore, fosholor foyla baṭ to he-u fae, iṭa-u niom.
2.7: Te ami zeta buzaitam sairam, ita sinta ḳori deḳo, Malik Isae tumare ita hoḳolta buzar aḳol diba.
2.8: Isa al-Mosir befare tumi oḳan mono rakio, tanre murda taki zinda ḳora oisil, tain oila Bashsha Daud nobir bongshodor, amar ḳoa kush-ḳobrir maze-o ikan ase.
2.9: Ar ou kush-ḳobri toblig korae-u ami duk-koshṭo faiar. Dagi ashamir laḳan amare bondi raḳa oise, oile Allar kalam to bondi oise na.
2.10: Allae zerare fosond ḳoria alog korsoin, tarar lagi ami hokkolta shoijjo ḳoriar, zate al-Mosir usillae tara nazat fain, loge siroḳalin gourob-mohima-o fain.
2.11: Ou ḳota to ekin ḳorar zoiggo, Al-Mosir loge zebla amrar moron oise, te amra zinda-o oimu tan loge.
2.12: Amra sobor ḳoria shoijjo ḳorle, tan loge bashshai kormu. Ar tanre oshikar ḳorle to, tain-o amrare oshikar ḳorba.
2.13: Amra beiman oigele-o, tain hamesha hok-halali roin. Tain kunumonte-u nizore oshikar ḳorta faroin na. Aze-baze torko taki hushiar
2.14: O Timoti, tumi mumin oḳolre amar ou talimḳan mono ḳorai deo. Allar samne tarare hushiar ḳoro, zate aze-baze mat loia torka-torki na ḳoroin, ita mator to kunu dam nai, ita zera hune, tarar shorbonash oy.
2.15: Tumi Allar kushi mafik nizore forezgar halote tan samne azir ḳoro, ou laḳan ḳamla bono, ze ḳamlae Allar dorbaro shorom faoar kunu ḳaron nai. Ze ḳamlae shoṭik babe hok kalam talim dein, ou laḳan o.
2.16: Allar birudi aze-baze mat taki duroi ro. Ila mate Allar bae manshor ḍor-ḳof ḳoma dorbo.
2.17: Ila aze-baze talim to fosa-gar laḳan sairobae sitre. I dolo ase, Huminas ar Filitas.
2.18: Iguin to Allai hok taki ku-fote gesoingi. Itae ḳoin, mumin oḳol bule murda taki zinda oia harsoin. Ola aze-baze matia tara kunu kunu zonor iman nosṭo ḳorilise.
2.19: Tebou Allar banail mozbut bit uba roise, er ufre sil-sappoṛor laḳan ou ḳota leḳa ase, “Malike zanoin, ḳe ḳe tan,” ar “Ze zone al-Mosire malik koia shikar ḳore, he hoḳol zator guna taki horail rouk.”
2.20: O Timoti, zomidar baṛit to ḳali shuna-rufar zinish taḳe na, laḳṛir zinish ar maṭir tal-bashon-o taḳe. Ermaze kunuṭa shommani kamo ar kunuṭa nisa ḳamo bebohar oy.
2.21: Te zeta manush ou nisa ḳamor ashbabor laḳan, itar ges taki horia aia ḳeu zudi nizore fak-saf ḳorilae, te he shommani zinish bonizae. Tare fobitro hishabe alada ḳori raḳa oibo. He tar malikor ḳamo lagbo ar hoḳol nomunar nek kamor lagi zuit oibo.
2.22: Timoti hushiar o, zoubonor bod ḳaish taki tumar zan basao, ar zera ḳas dile malikor nam loy, tarar loge shorik oia forezgari, iman, mohobbot ar shantir lagi kiali o.
2.23: Aze-baze be-aḳoli torka-torkit shamil oio na, tumar zana ase, itae ḳali kaijja-fosad baṛae.
2.24: Malik Isar gulame ḳaijja-fosad ḳora ṭik nae, ein borong hoḳlor bae doyal oite oibo, ein manshore talim deoar ḳemota ar sobor-shokti taḳte oibo.
2.25: Tain nizor birudi manshore-o norom mone buz diba. Ou ashae talim diba, hoytoba Allae tarare touba ḳorar shuzug diba, zate tara Allai hokre balamonte sinoin.
2.26: Teu tara seton faia Iblisor fando taki zan basaiba, ou Iblise tar gulam bananir lagi erare dorsil.

3.1: O Timoti, ou hushiari kanain mono rakio, aḳeri zomanat kub mosibotor din aibo.
3.2: Manush shartofor oizibo, ṭeḳa-foyshar lalosi, boṛai-beṭagiri deḳani, manshore elami kora, durnam gaoa, ma-bafor obaiddo, nimoḳ-harami korbo ar Allar naformani korbo.
3.3: Maya-momota ḳomizibo, ḳaijja-fosad ḳorle afush ḳorto nae. Foror bodnam gaibo, nizore shamlaito farto nae, manush omanush oizibo ar hoḳol nomunar nek kamor dushmoni korbo.
3.4: Manshe beimani, fuṭani ar beforua bab deḳaibo, Allar ashik na oia duniabi aram-ayeshor ashik oibo.
3.5: Bairor bab-surote buza zaibo kub allaoala pak-musolli, oile muloto lebasdari bonḍo. Te tumi itar ges taki horia roio.
3.6: Otar mazor ḳeu ḳeu duka dia manshor goro hamaia ḳom imani beṭintore ku-fote ṭane. Ita beṭintor mogoz oilo gunar banḍar. Tara nanan nomunar furti-amudor boshe sole.
3.7: Tara hamesha Allai fotor talim hune, oile kunudin-o Allai hokikot tarar bitre hamae na.
3.8: Mishoror Feraunor zadugir-gunin Zanni ar Zamborie zela Musa nobir birudita ḳorsila, ṭik ou laḳan oguinte-o Allai hokor birudita ḳore. Itar bibeḳ fosi gese, tarar bitre imanor balai nai.
3.9: Oile tara ar aguaito farto nae, hou zadugir Zanni ar Zamborir be-aḳoli zela hoḳlor gese dora foṛsil, itar be-aḳoli-o ola dora foṛbo. Allar kalam-u muminor kuraḳ
3.10: O Timoti, tumi amar talim, amar sal-cholon, amar uddesho, iman, soborgari, mohobbot, ar amar doijjor ḳota furafur kial ḳorso.
3.11: Antiokia, Ikonia ar Lushra ṭauno ami koto zulum-mosibot shoijjo ḳorsi, ita to tumi zano. Oile malike amare rokka ḳorsoin.
3.12: Ashole Allar ḍor-ḳof bitre rakia, Isayi imandar bonia zera zindegi kaṭaito sae, tara to zulum-mosiboto foṛbo-u.
3.13: Oile bonḍo ar ḳobis oḳol din din aro ḳaraf oibo. Tara nize-o be-fote solbo, ar aroḳzonre-o be-foti banaibo.
3.14: Te tumi zeta talim faiso, faia dile-zane ekin ḳorso, er ufre tir taḳo, ḳaron tumi nize zano, i talim ḳar ges taki faiso.
3.15: Tumi to huruman tone-u Allar kalamor talim faiso, ar ou kalame-u tumare Isa al-Mosir ufre iman anar usillae, nazat hasilor fot batai dibo.
3.16: Huno, Allar kalamor forteḳṭa horof Allar ges taki-u aise. Ita to talim, hushiari, hedayot, ar hok zindegi goṛibar kuraḳ,
3.17: zate Allar bonda oḳol ufozukto bonia hoḳol nek kamor lagi zuit oin.

4.1: Ami Alla Pakre shakki rakia, ar zein tamam zinda-murdar bisar ḳorba, hou Isa al-Mosire shakki rakia, duniat tan dusrabaror toshrif ana ar tan bashshair duai dia tumare ou ḳoṛa hukum diar.
4.2: Tumi Allar kalam toblig koro, shomoy-oshomoy kunta nai, hamesha toblig koro, kub beshi doijjo doria talim deo ar manshor oforad deḳai deo, tarare hushiar ḳoro ar buzao.
4.3: Agedi ola shomoy aibo, zebla hasa talim manshor shoijjo oito nae, borong nizor monor ḳaish furaita ḳori tara olaḳan ustad dorba, zetae tarar mon zugaia mongoṛa talim diba.
4.4: Tara hok talim taki muk firaia, mongoṛa kichcha-ḳahinir ḳore douṛaiba.
4.5: Oile tumi hoḳol befare nizore shamlaia raḳo, duk-koshṭo shoijjo ḳoro, al-Mosir befare kush-ḳobri toblig korat ro, Allar deoa dayitto adae ḳoro.
4.6: Amar moutor din aia azigese, amar nizor loure kurbani hishabe ḍali deoa or.
4.7: Ami to al-Mosir lagi zane-forane laṛai korsi, amare batai deoa fotor hesh mata forzonto douṛaisi, amar iman ṭikaia raḳsi.
4.8: Te amar forezgarir furuskar to zoma ase, hou hok-insafḳari malike Ruz Hashoror din amare joyor mala furuskar diba. Ita ḳali amare nae, zoto manush ashik oia tan lagi bar saira, tara hoḳolre-u diba. Adalotor maze shaijjo
4.9: O Timoti, tumi sesṭa salaia zoto zoldi faro amar gese ao.
4.10: Ḳaron Kirisken bai Galatia desho, Titas bai Dalmatia desho gesoin. Ar Dimas bai duniabi mayar dandat foṛia, amare saṛia Tisholoniki ṭauno gesoingi.
4.11: Ḳali Luk bai amar gese asoin. Erlagi Markus baire loia tumi zoldi ao, amar ḳam-ḳazo tain bout shaijjo ḳoroin.
4.12: Tukik baire ami Ifiso faṭaisi.
4.13: Ami aibar shomoy Toruas ṭaunor Karfus bair gese, amar ekkan saddor toia aisi, tumi aibar fote oḳanta anio, ar amar kitab ḳanain, ḳas ḳori samṛar ufre leḳa kitab ḳanain-o anio.
4.14: Huno, tama-fitolor ḳam ḳore ze Sikondor, ogie amar bout ḳeti korse, oile Malik Isae tare ufozukto bodla diba.
4.15: Te tar befare tumi hushiar roio, he ḳomor bandia amrar toblig kamor birudita ḳorsil.
4.16: Zano ni, amare foyla bar zebla adaloto neoa oilo, ou shomoy ḳeu amare shaijjo ḳorse na, hoḳole-u amare saṛia bagise. Ta-o Allae zanu tarar i bishoyḳan hishabo na doroin.
4.17: Ḳali Malik Isa amar fokke ubaila, tain amare bol zugaila. Erlagi ami bin zatir samne shullo-ana kush-ḳobri toblig korar shuzug faisi, tara hoḳole ita hunche. Ou bisaro tarar shinghor mukor kuraḳ oa taki Allae amare basaisoin.
4.18: Ou Malik Isae hoḳol nomunar bod ḳam taki-o amare hefazote raḳba ar sohi-salamote behesti bashshait far ḳorba. Zuge zuge siroḳal tan tarif ouk. Amin. Bidayi salam
4.19: Amrar mumin bai Akilre, tan bibi Fiskila ar Anis bair foribarre amar salam zanaio.
4.20: Irastas bai Korint ṭauno roisoin, ar Tofimre bemar halote ami Milita bondoro toia aisi.
4.21: Te tumi kub sesṭa salao, shitor age aibar lagi. Bai Abul, Bodis, Olinis, boin Kuludia shoho aro hoḳol bai-boine tumare salam disoin.
4.22: Malik Isa tumar loge loge roukka. Allar rohomot tumrar loge taḳouk. Amin.

1.1: Ami Paulus to Alla Pakor gulam ar Hozrot Isa al-Mosir eḳzon sahabi. Amar dayitto oilo, Allar fosond ḳora bonda oḳolre imanor fote ana, ar Allare mania solar maze ze hokikot ase, ou hokikotre sinai deoa.
1.2: Ami al-Mosir kezmot ḳoriar, aḳeri zindegi faoar ashae. Ze Allae kunu misa matoin na, hou Allae i zindegi deoar oada ḳorsoin, dunia foyda oar age-u.
1.3: Tain tan kalam shoṭik shomoye zair ḳorsoin, ar amrar toraneala Allar hukum mafik ita toblig korar bar amar ato deoa oise.
1.4: Amar hou ḳas aolad Titasor gese leḳram, amra duiozon-u eḳoi imane al-Mosir ummot oisi. Amrar gaibi baf Allae ar toraneala Isa al-Mosie rohomot ar shanti dan ḳoroukka. Kriti difor zomator saloḳdar neoa
1.5: Titas huno, ami tumare ou Kriti difo toia aisi, zate zeta ḳam oḳono baki roise, tumi ota furafur adae ḳoro. Ar ami zela hukum dislam, ṭik oula tumi forteḳ ṭaunor zomator murobbi oḳolre ḳamo boail ḳoro.
1.6: Mono rakio, ze murobbi oḳol bodnam saṛa nikut, zerar ḳali eḳzon bou asoin, zerar fua-fuṛin Isayi imandar, zera beforua babe zindegi kaṭae na, borong ma-bafor baiddo ase, ou murobbire tumi boail ḳoro.
1.7: Allai kamor zimmadari faoae zekunu saloḳdar zanu bodnam saṛa nikut oin. Tain zanu shoirasar, bodragi, nishakur, maramari korra ba haram ruzi-ruzgaror lalosi na oin.
1.8: Er bodla tain zanu memandari korra, nek babor ashik, hok-halali, ar Allar baiddo zon oin. Tan bala bisar-buddi taḳe, ar nizore furafur shamlaia raḳta faroin.
1.9: Alla Pakor ze hok kalam talim faisoin, tain itare mozbut ḳori doria raḳoin, ar ṭik ou laḳan ḳaṭi talim toblig korta faroin. Erloge zera tan bifokke ase, tarar bul-beaḳoli-o dorai dein.
1.10: Ḳaron bout beshamal manush asoin, zetae ḳeurore manoin na, beḳama mat matoin, sol-soturi koroin. Zetae mosolmani kam ḳoranir lagi zura-zuri koroin, ami kas ḳori otar ḳota-u ḳoiram.
1.11: Itar muk bond ḳora zorur. Itae ku-fote ṭeḳa ḳamanir ashae ola talim dein, ze talim deoa tarar lagi ṭik nae. I talim dia kunu kunu foribarre bigṛailira.
1.12: Erlagi tarar nizor deshor eḳzon fonḍite ḳoisoin, “Kriti difor manshe hamesha misa matoin, iguin to zongli zanuaror laḳan, kuṛia ar feṭua.”
1.13: Ita to eḳdom hasa, erlagi tumi kub gorom oia tarar aib deḳaia deo, zate tarar Isayi iman shullo-ana nikut oy.
1.14: Ihudi oḳlor banail kichcha-ḳahini, ar zeta manush Allai hokikot taki be-fote gesegi, tara zanu itar hukum-ufodesh ḳano na loin.
1.15: Zerar dil fak-fobitro, tarar gese hoḳolta-u fobitro. Oile zerar dil nafakie bora, ar zeta beiman, itar gese kunta-u fobitro nae. Itar mon ar bibeḳ hoḳolta-u borbad.
1.16: Tara mukdi dabi koroin Allare manoin, oile tarar ḳamor mazdi tanre oshikar ḳoroin. Iguin to noforoti ar obaiddo. Itare kunu bala ḳamo lagail zae na.

2.1: Titas huno, tumi manshore olaḳan talim deo, zate tumar mator maze nikut hok talim taḳe.
2.2: Zomator murobbi beṭainre ḳo, tara zanu hamesha nizore shamlaia raḳoin, ijjoti bonoin, bala bisar-bibek kaṭain. Tarar zanu ḳaṭi iman, maya-mohobbot ar sobor taḳe.
2.3: Olaḳan murobbi beṭintore-o ḳo, tara zanu forezgarir adob-ḳayda mania soloin ar nekir bab hikain. Oinnor bodnam gaoa, ba nishakur bona tarar lagi ṭik nae.
2.4: Teu tara zuan fuṛintore hikaita farba, zate tarar zamai ar fua-fuṛinre mohobbot ḳoroin,
2.5: nizore shamlaia raḳoin, shoti roin, bala shongshari oin, doyalu oin, ar zamair baiddo taḳoin. Teu Allar kalamor bodnam ḳorar shuzug keu faito nae.
2.6: Olaḳan zuan fuaintore-o ufodesh deo, zate tara nizore shamlaia raḳoin.
2.7: Tumi tarar gese hoḳol nomunar nek kamor nishana o. Hok niote ar day-dayitto loia talim deo.
2.8: Ḳeu zanu tumar zobanor kunu dush na fae. Tumar oula sal-cholon dekia dushmon oḳol shorminda oiba ar amrar bodnam ḳorar kunu kut faita nae.
2.9: Tumi saḳor oḳolre ḳo, tara zanu hokkol befare munibor baiddo roin, munibor mon zugaia soloin, tarar mukor ufre be-adobi mat na matoin.
2.10: Munibor mal-samana suri na ḳoroin, borong nizor hok-halalir forman deḳaia hari, amrar toraneala Allar befare ze talim ase, ou talimre hokkol nomunae shundor ḳori hazain.
2.11: Zano to, Allar ze rohomotor usillae hoḳlor nazat mile, ita oḳon duniat zair oigese.
2.12: Ou rohomote-u amrare talim dira, zate amra be-dini kam-ḳaz taki ar duniar hoḳol bod ḳaish taki duroi roia, i zogoto nizore shamlaia raki, ar nek fote roia forezgar zindegi kaṭai.
